Matthew1:1 Che sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê ka-phó͘: Iâ-so͘ sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi, Tāi-pi̍t sī A-pek-la-hán ê hō͘-tāi." 
Matthew1:2 A-pek-la-hán siⁿ Í-sat, Í-sat siⁿ Ngá-kok, Ngá-kok siⁿ Iû-tāi kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī." 
Matthew1:3 Iû-tāi tùi Tha-má siⁿ Hoat-le̍k-su kap Siā-la, Hoat-le̍k-su siⁿ Hi-su-lûn, Hi-su-lûn siⁿ A-lân," 
Matthew1:4 A-lân siⁿ A-bí-ná-ta̍t, A-bí-ná-ta̍t siⁿ Ná-sūn, Ná-sūn siⁿ Sat-bûn," 
Matthew1:5 Sat-bûn tùi Lat-ha̍p siⁿ Pho-a-su, Pho-a-su tùi Lō͘-tek siⁿ Gô-pī-tek, Gô-pī-tek siⁿ Iâ-se," 
Matthew1:6 Iâ-se siⁿ Tāi-pi̍t -ông. Tāi-pi̍t tùi O͘-lī-a ê bó͘ siⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn," 
Matthew1:7 Só͘-lô-bûn siⁿ Lô-pho-an, Lô-pho-an siⁿ A-pí-ngá, A-pí-ngá siⁿ A-sat," 
Matthew1:8 A-sat siⁿ Iok-sa-hoat, Iok-sa-hoat siⁿ Iok-lân, Iok-lân siⁿ O͘-se-a," 
Matthew1:9 O͘-se-a siⁿ Iok-thán, Iok-thán siⁿ A-hap-su, A-hap-su siⁿ Hi-se-ka," 
Matthew1:10 Hi-se-ka siⁿ Má-ná-se, Má-ná-se siⁿ A-mô͘-sū, A-mô͘-sū siⁿ Iok-se-a." 
Matthew1:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng siū chhian-sóa khì Pa-pí-lûn ê sî, Iok-se-a siⁿ Iok-ngá-kun kap i ê hiaⁿ-tī." 
Matthew1:12 Siū chhian-sóa khì Pa-pí-lûn í-āu, Iok-ngá-kun siⁿ Sat-lia̍p-thiat, Sat-lia̍p-thiat siⁿ Só͘-lô-pa-pek," 
Matthew1:13 Só͘-lô-pa-pek siⁿ A-pí-gio̍k, A-pí-gio̍k siⁿ Í-lī-a-kèng, Í-lī-a-kèng siⁿ A-só͘," 
Matthew1:14 A-só͘ siⁿ Sat-tok, Sat-tok siⁿ A-kim, A-kim siⁿ Í-lu̍t," 
Matthew1:15 Í-lu̍t siⁿ Í-lī-a-sat, Í-lī-a-sat siⁿ Má-tān, Má-tān siⁿ Ngá-kok," 
Matthew1:16 Ngá-kok siⁿ Iok-sek, Iok-sek sī Má-lī-a ê tiōng-hu; hit-ê chheng-chòe Ki-tok ê Iâ-so͘ sī tùi chit-ê Má-lī-a siⁿ,ê." 
Matthew1:17 Án-ni, tùi A-pek-la-hán kàu Tāi-pi̍t lóng-chóng ū cha̍p-sì tāi, tùi Tāi-pi̍t kàu siū chhian-sóa khì Pa-pí-lûn ū cha̍p-sì tāi, tùi siū chhian-sóa khì Pa-pí-lûn kàu Ki-tok mā ū cha̍p-sì tāi." 
Matthew1:18 Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chhut-sì ê keng-kè sī án-ni: I ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a í-keng kap Iok-sek tēng-hun, iáu-bē kiat-hun chiū tùi Sèng Sîn hoâi-īn." 
Matthew1:19 I ê bī-hun-hu Iok-sek sī chèng-ti̍t ê lâng, bô ài hō͘ i tī lâng ê bīn-chêng kiàn-siàu, siūⁿ-beh àm-tiong kái-tû hun-iok." 
Matthew1:20 I teh siūⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì ê sî, tī bîn-bāng tiong, Chú ê thiⁿ-sài tùi i chhut-hiān, kóng, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi Iok-sek, m̄-bián kiaⁿ, tio̍h chhōa Má-lī-a ji̍p-mn̂g chòe bó͘, in-ūi i só͘ hoâi-īn ê thai sī tùi Sèng Sîn lâi,ê." 
Matthew1:21 I ōe siⁿ chi̍t ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ, lí tio̍h kā I hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘, in-ūi I beh kiù I ê chú-bîn thoat-lī in ê chōe.”" 
Matthew1:22 Che it-chhè ê sū hoat-seng sī beh èng-giām Chú thok sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe: 
Matthew1:23 Lí khòaⁿ, chāi-sek-lú ōe hoâi-īn siⁿ-kiáⁿ, I ê miâ beh kiò-chòe Í-má-lōe-lī. “Í-má-lōe-lī” ê ì-sù sī “Siōng-tè kap lán tông-chāi”." 
Matthew1:24 Iok-sek chi̍t-ē khùn-chhíⁿ, chiū chiàu Chú ê thiⁿ-sài só͘ hoan-hù chhōa Má-lī-a ji̍p-mn̂g chòe bó͘," 
Matthew1:25 put-kò chit-ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ iáu-bē chhut-sì í-chêng bô kap Má-lī-a tâng-pâng. Eⁿ-á chhut-sì, Iok-sek chiū kā I hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew2:1 Hi-lu̍t choh-ông ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tī Iû-thài ê Pek-lī-hêng chhut-sì. Ū kúi-nā ê seng-siōng-ka tùi tang-hng lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Matthew2:2 In mn̄g kóng, “Hit-ê chhut-sì chòe Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông,ê tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi? Goán ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I ê chhiⁿ chhut-hiān, choan-kang lâi beh pài I.”" 
Matthew2:3 Hi-lu̍t -ông thiaⁿ,tio̍h, sim-lāi tio̍h-kip put-an; Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng choân-siâⁿ ê lâng mā-sī án-ni." 
Matthew2:4 I chiū tiàu-chi̍p só͘-ū ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap bîn-kan ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, mn̄g in kóng, “Ki-tok eng-kai tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi chhut-sì?”" 
Matthew2:5 In ìn kóng, “ Iû-thài ê Pek-lī-hêng. In-ūi sian-ti ū án-ni kì-chài:" 
Matthew2:6 Iû-tāi tōe-khu ê Pek-lī-hêng ah, lí tī Iû-tāi siâⁿ-chhī tiong m̄-sī siōng bî-sòe,ê; in-ūi ū chi̍t ê léng-siù ōe tùi lí hia chhut,lâi, I beh bo̍k-ióng góa ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t.”" 
Matthew2:7 Hi-lu̍t chiū àm-tiong tiàu hit kúi ê seng-siōng-ka, siông-sè kā in mn̄g hit-lia̍p chhiⁿ sím-mi̍h sî chhut-hiān." 
Matthew2:8 Āu-lâi, i chhe in khì Pek-lī-hêng, kóng, “Lín khì siông-sè chhâ-mn̄g koan-hē chit-ê sòe-hàn gín-á ê sū; chhē,tio̍h, tio̍h lâi pò góa chai, góa mā thang khì pài I.”" 
Matthew2:9 In thiaⁿ ông ê ōe chiū khì. In tī tang-hng khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê hit-lia̍p chhiⁿ chòe thâu chhōa in, lâi kàu hit-ê sòe-hàn gín-á ê só͘-chāi chiū thêng tī téng-bīn." 
Matthew2:10 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-lia̍p chhiⁿ, hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí." 
Matthew2:11 In ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h sòe-hàn gín-á kap I ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a, chiū phak lo̍h-khì pài I, jiân-āu khui in ê pó-a̍h, chiong n̂g-kim, jú-hiuⁿ, kap bu̍t-io̍h chòe lé-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ I." 
Matthew2:12 Āu-lâi, tī bîn-bāng tiong Siōng-tè chí-sī in m̄-thang tò-khì Hi-lu̍t hia, in chiū tùi pa̍t-tiâu lō͘ tò-khì pún-kok." 
Matthew2:13 Seng-siōng-ka lī-khui liáu-āu, Chú ê thiⁿ-sài tī Iok-sek ê bîn-bāng tiong tùi i chhut-hiān, kóng, “Khí,lâi, chhōa sòe-hàn gín-á kap I ê lāu-bú tô-cháu khì Ai-ki̍p, tòa hia kàu góa kóng thang lī-khui ê sî, in-ūi Hi-lu̍t teh chhē chit-ê sòe-hàn gín-á, beh kā I thâi-sí.”" 
Matthew2:14 Iok-sek chiū khí,lâi, chhōa sòe-hàn gín-á kap I ê lāu-bú thàu-mî lī-khui khì Ai-ki̍p," 
Matthew2:15 tòa tī hia kàu Hi-lu̍t sí. Che sī beh èng-giām Chú thong-kè sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe: Góa ū tiàu góa ê kiáⁿ chhut Ai-ki̍p. 
Matthew2:16 Hi-lu̍t chi̍t-ē chai ka-kī hō͘ seng-siōng-ka phiàn,khì, hui-siông siū-khì, chiū chhe lâng chiong Pek-lī-hêng í-ki̍p chiu-ûi só͘-ū ê ta-po͘ gín-á, chiàu i tùi seng-siōng-ka siông-sè chhâ-mn̄g ê sî sǹg-khí, nn̄g hè í-hā,ê lóng thâi-sí." 
Matthew2:17 Chit-ê tāi-chì ū èng-giām Chú thong-kè sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí só͘ kóng ê ōe: 
Matthew2:18 Tī La-má ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h siaⁿ, thî-khàu chin pi-siong; Lúi-kiat ūi-tio̍h i ê kiáⁿ-jî teh khàu, m̄-khéng siū an-ùi, in-ūi in lóng bô,khì lah." 
Matthew2:19 Hi-lu̍t sí í-āu, Chú ê thiⁿ-sài tī Ai-ki̍p, tī Iok-sek ê bîn-bāng tiong tùi i chhut-hiān," 
Matthew2:20 kóng, “Khí,lâi, chhōa sòe-hàn gín-á kap I ê lāu-bú tò-khì Í-sek-lia̍t -tōe; in-ūi beh hāi sòe-hàn gín-á ê sìⁿ-miā hiah-ê lâng í-keng sí.”" 
Matthew2:21 Iok-sek chiū khí,lâi, chhōa sòe-hàn gín-á kap I ê lāu-bú tò-khì Í-sek-lia̍t -tōe." 
Matthew2:22 Iok-sek thiaⁿ-kìⁿ A-ki-ló sòa-chiap i ê lāu-pē Hi-lu̍t chòe Iû-thài ê ông, m̄-káⁿ tò-khì hia; āu-lâi tī bîn-bāng tiong tit-tio̍h chí-sī, chiū thè-khì Ka-lī-lī kéng-lāi," 
Matthew2:23 kàu chi̍t ê siâⁿ kiò-chòe Ná-sat-le̍k, tòa tī hia. Che sī beh èng-giām Chú thong-kè sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe: I beh kiò-chòe Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng." 
Matthew3:1 Tng-sî, Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān lâi Iû-thài ê khòng-iá teh thoân-tō." 
Matthew3:2 I soan-iông kóng, “Lín tio̍h hóe-kái, in-ūi Thian-kok teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah!”" 
Matthew3:3 Chit-ê lâng chiū-sī sian-ti Í-sài-a só͘ teh kóng,ê: Ū siaⁿ tī khòng-iá teh hoah: Tio̍h ūi Chú chún-pī tō-lō͘, ūi I siu-ti̍t sió-lō͘." 
Matthew3:4 Iok-hān chhēng lo̍k-tô-mn̂g ê saⁿ, io hâ phê-tòa, só͘ chia̍h,ê sī chháu-meh kap iá-bi̍t." 
Matthew3:5 Ū chin chōe lâng tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Iû-thài ta̍k só͘-chāi, kap Iok-tàn-hô it-tài lâi i hia," 
Matthew3:6 jīn-chōe, tī Iok-tàn-hô tùi i niá-siū sóe-lé." 
Matthew3:7 Iok-hān khòaⁿ-tio̍h chin chōe Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng mā lâi niá-siū sóe-lé, chiū tùi in kóng, “Lín chiah-ê to̍k-chôa, sím-mi̍h-lâng kéng-kò lín siám-pī Siōng-tè teh-beh hoat ê siū-khì?" 
Matthew3:8 Tio̍h ēng hêng-ûi chèng-bêng lín ū hóe-kái. 
Matthew3:9 Lín m̄-thang ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng ‘ A-pek-la-hán sī goán ê chó͘-sian’, góa kā lín kóng, Siōng-tè ōe-tàng ēng chiah-ê chio̍h-thâu chō kiáⁿ-sun hō͘ A-pek-la-hán." 
Matthew3:10 Pó͘-thâu í-keng khòa tī chhiū-thâu; só͘-ū bô kiat hó ké-chí ê chhiū lóng beh kā chhò,khí-lâi, hiat-lo̍h hé." 
Matthew3:11 Góa ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé, piáu-sī lín í-keng ū hóe-kái; m̄-kú tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi Hit-ūi pí góa khah ū koân-lêng, góa liân kā I kōaⁿ ôe to bōe-kham,tit; I beh ēng Sèng Sîn kap hé kā lín sóe-lé." 
Matthew3:12 I ê chhiú the̍h pòa-ki, beh chiong be̍h-tiâⁿ ê be̍h pòa chheng-khì, be̍h-á siu-ji̍p chhng-khò͘, be̍h-hiūⁿ chiū ēng bōe hoa ê hé kā i sio-tiāu.”" 
Matthew3:13 Hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ tùi Ka-lī-lī lâi Iok-tàn-hô Iok-hān hia, beh tùi i niá-siū sóe-lé." 
Matthew3:14 Iok-hān beh kā I chó͘-chí, kóng, “Góa eng-kai tùi lí niá-siū sóe-lé, lí hoán-tńg lâi chhē góa?”" 
Matthew3:15 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lán hiān-chāi án-ni chòe chiah ha̍h Siōng-tè it-chhè ê iau-kiû.” Iok-hān chiū tông-ì." 
Matthew3:16 Iâ-so͘ niá-siū sóe-lé í-āu sûi-sî tùi chúi,ni̍h khí,lâi; hut-jiân thiⁿ ūi-tio̍h I khui, I khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê Sîn chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu kàng,lo̍h-lâi, hioh tī I sin-chiūⁿ." 
Matthew3:17 Koh tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng: Chit-ê sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, I, góa chin ì-ài." 
Matthew4:1 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhōa-khì khòng-iá, tī hia siū Mô͘-kúi chhì-thàm." 
Matthew4:2 Iâ-so͘ kìm-chia̍h sì-cha̍p mî-ji̍t, āu-lâi chiū iau." 
Matthew4:3 Chhì-thàm-chiá óa-lâi tùi I kóng, “Kì-jiân lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, bēng-lēng chiah-ê chio̍h-thâu pìⁿ-chòe piáⁿ!”" 
Matthew4:4 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Lâng teh oa̍h m̄-nā óa-khò piáⁿ, sī óa-khò tùi Siōng-tè ê chhùi só͘ chhut ê ta̍k-kù ōe.”" 
Matthew4:5 Jiân-āu, Mô͘-kúi chhōa Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, hō͘ I khiā tī Sèng-tiān chhù-téng siōng-koân ê só͘-chāi," 
Matthew4:6 tùi I kóng, “Kì-jiân lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, thiàu,lo̍h-khì! In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Siōng-tè ōe ūi-tio̍h lí bēng-lēng I ê thiⁿ-sài, in ōe ēng chhiú hû lí, hō͘ lí ê kha bōe kha̍p-tio̍h chio̍h-thâu.”" 
Matthew4:7 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sèng-keng koh ū kì-chài: M̄-thang chhì-thàm Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè.”" 
Matthew4:8 Mô͘-kúi koh chhōa Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ chi̍t ê chin-koân ê soaⁿ, chiong sè-chiūⁿ bān-kok kap in ê êng-hôa hō͘ I khòaⁿ," 
Matthew4:9 tùi I kóng, “Lí nā phak lo̍h-lâi pài góa, chiah-ê it-chhè góa lóng hō͘ lí.”" 
Matthew4:10 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sat-tàn, cháu! Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Tio̍h pài Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè, chí-ū ho̍k-sāi I.”" 
Matthew4:11 Jiân-āu Mô͘-kúi lī-khui Iâ-so͘; ū thiⁿ-sài lâi kā I sū-hāu. 
Matthew4:12 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-hān hō͘ lâng lia̍h,khì chiū thè-khì Ka-lī-lī. 
Matthew4:13 I lī-khui Ná-sat-le̍k khì tòa tī Se-pò͘-lûn kap Ná-hut-tha-lī tōe-khu, Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ ê Ka-pek-lông." 
Matthew4:14 Che sī beh èng-giām thong-kè sian-ti Í-sài-a só͘ kóng ê ōe: 
Matthew4:15 Se-pò͘-lûn ê tōe, Ná-hut-tha-lī ê tōe, iân-hái ê lō͘, Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ, Gōa-pang-lâng ê Ka-lī-lī," 
Matthew4:16 tiàm tī o͘-àm tiong ê lâng ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ tōa-kng; tiàm tī sí-ìm ê tōe,ê ū kng chiò in. 
Matthew4:17 Tùi hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ khai-sí soan-iông kóng, “Tio̍h hóe-kái, in-ūi Thian-kok teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah!”" 
Matthew4:18 Iâ-so͘ tī Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ teh kiâⁿ ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h nn̄g ê hiaⁿ-tī, kiò-chòe Pí-tek ê Se-bûn kap i ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t, tī ô͘,ni̍h teh pha-bāng, in-ūi in sī lia̍h-hî,ê." 
Matthew4:19 I tùi in kóng, “Lâi tè góa, góa beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ lia̍h-hî,ê tit-tio̍h hî.”" 
Matthew4:20 In sûi-sî kā bāng pàng,leh, khì tè Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew4:21 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ chìn-chêng, khòaⁿ-tio̍h lēng-gōa nn̄g ê hiaⁿ-tī, Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap i ê sió-tī Iok-hān. In kap lāu-pē Se-pì-thài tī chûn-téng teh chéng-lí bāng, I chiū ho͘-tiàu in." 
Matthew4:22 In sûi-sî chiong chûn kap lāu-pē pàng,leh, khì tè Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew4:23 Iâ-so͘ kàu Ka-lī-lī ta̍k só͘-chāi, tī in ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng, thoân Thian-kok ê hok-im, i-hó bîn-kan ta̍k-khoán ê pīⁿ-chèng." 
Matthew4:24 I ê miâ-siaⁿ thoân kàu Sū-lī-a ê ta̍k só͘-chāi. Lâng chiong só͘-ū ê pīⁿ-lâng, chiū-sī siâ-sîn hū-sin, iûⁿ-hîn, kap poàn-sin-put-sūi, téng, hoān-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán chèng-thâu kap pīⁿ-thiàⁿ ê lâng lóng chhōa-lâi I hia, I chiū kā in i-hó." 
Matthew4:25 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng tùi Ka-lī-lī, Te-ka-pho-lí, Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Iû-thài, kap Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ lâi tè I." 
Matthew5:1 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng, chiū peh-chiūⁿ soaⁿ. I chē,lo̍h-khì, bûn-tô͘ óa,lâi," 
Matthew5:2 chiū khai-sí kà-sī in, kóng," 
Matthew5:3 “Sim-lêng sàn-chhiah ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Thian-kok sī chit-khoán lâng ê." 
Matthew5:4 Iu-siong ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe kā in an-ùi." 
Matthew5:5 Un-jiû ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ in sêng-siū èng-ún ê thó͘-tōe." 
Matthew5:6 Iau chhùi-ta him-bō͘ Siōng-tè chí-ì si̍t-hiān ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ in pá-chiok." 
Matthew5:7 Gâu lîn-bín ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe kā in lîn-bín." 
Matthew5:8 Sim chheng-khì ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi in ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h Siōng-tè." 
Matthew5:9 Chhiok-chìn hô-pêng ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi in ōe chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Matthew5:10 Ūi-tio̍h si̍t-chián Siōng-tè ê chí-ì siū pek-hāi ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Thian-kok sī chit-khoán lâng ê." 
Matthew5:11 “Ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘, lâng kā lín bú-jio̍k, pek-hāi, kóng ta̍k-khoán pháiⁿ-ōe húi-pòng, lín chin ū hok-khì." 
Matthew5:12 Tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k, in-ūi lín tī thiⁿ-téng ê pò-siúⁿ chin tōa; lín í-chêng ê sian-ti mā bat án-ni siū pek-hāi.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Lín sī tōe-chiūⁿ ê iâm; iâm nā sit-bī, beh án-chóaⁿ hō͘ i koh kiâm? Iâm sit-bī chiū bô lō͘-ēng, chí-ū hìⁿ-sak, hō͘ lâng thún-ta̍h." 
Matthew5:14 “Lín sī sè-kan ê kng. Khí tī soaⁿ-téng ê siâⁿ khàm bōe tiâu. 
Matthew5:15 Lâng tiám-teng liáu-āu bōe ēng táu kā i khàm,khí-lâi, it-tēng ōe kā i chhāi tī teng-tâi téng, thang kā chhù-lāi só͘-ū ê lâng chiò-kng." 
Matthew5:16 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín ê kng tio̍h chiò tī lâng ê bīn-chêng, thang hō͘ in khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín ê hó hêng-ûi lâi êng-kng lín ê Thiⁿ-pē.”" 
Matthew5:17 “M̄-thang siūⁿ-kóng góa lâi sī beh hòe-tû Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat á-sī sian-ti ê kà-sī. Góa lâi m̄-sī beh hòe-tû, sī beh si̍t-hiān." 
Matthew5:18 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, thiⁿ kap tōe ōe siau-sit, Lu̍t-hoat ê chi̍t-tiám chi̍t-u̍ih choa̍t-tùi bōe siau-sit, lóng ōe si̍t-hiān." 
Matthew5:19 Só͘-í, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng hoān-tio̍h chiah-ê kài-bēng siōng-sòe ê chi̍t tiâu, koh kà lâng án-ni khì hoān, tī Thian-kok i sǹg-chòe sī siōng-sòe,ê. Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng ka-kī chun-siú, mā kà lâng chun-siú, tī Thian-kok chit-ê lâng sǹg-chòe sī siōng-tōa,ê." 
Matthew5:20 Góa kā lín kóng, lín nā bô pí keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng koh-khah tiong-si̍t chun-siú Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng ji̍p Thian-kok.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat án-ni kà-sī kó͘-chá-lâng, kóng, ‘M̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; hāi-sí lâng,ê tio̍h siū sím-phòaⁿ.’" 
Matthew5:22 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, tùi hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē hoat siū-khì, lóng tio̍h siū sím-phòaⁿ. Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng mē hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ‘hòe-jîn’, tio̍h chiūⁿ hoat-têng; mē hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ‘tòng-gōng’, tio̍h siū tōe-ge̍k ê hé sio." 
Matthew5:23 Só͘-í, lí tī chè-tôaⁿ beh hiàn lé-mi̍h ê sî, nā siūⁿ-tio̍h lí ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē tùi lí ū put-móa," 
Matthew5:24 tio̍h chiong lé-mi̍h pàng-hē tī chè-tôaⁿ chêng, seng khì kap i hô-hó, jiân-āu chiah lâi hiàn lé-mi̍h." 
Matthew5:25 “Lâng kā lí khòng-kò, beh thoa lí khì hoat-têng, iáu tī lō͘-tiong ê sî tio̍h kóaⁿ-kín kap i hô-kái, chiah bián hō͘ khòng-kò lí ê lâng kā lí kau hō͘ phòaⁿ-koaⁿ, phòaⁿ-koaⁿ kā lí kau hō͘ hoat-kéng khì koaiⁿ-kaⁿ. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lí kóng, chòe-āu ê chi̍t-sián-gō͘-lî bô hêng chheng-chhó, lí choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng chhut-kaⁿ.”" 
Matthew5:26  
Matthew5:27 “Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat án-ni kà-sī kóng, ‘M̄-thang kan-îm.’" 
Matthew5:28 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, lâng nā ēng siâ-liām khòaⁿ hū-lú, í-keng tī sim-lāi hoān kan-îm." 
Matthew5:29 Lí ê chiàⁿ-ba̍k nā ín-khí lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h kā i ó͘ hiat-ka̍k, lêng-khó sit-khì seng-khu ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn, pí kui seng-khu hó-hó hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k khah hó." 
Matthew5:30 Lí ê chiàⁿ-chhiú nā ín-khí lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h kā i chām hiat-ka̍k, lêng-khó sit-khì seng-khu ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn, pí kui seng-khu hó-hó hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k khah hó.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Koh ū Lu̍t-hoat án-ni kóng, ‘Lâng nā beh lî i ê bó͘, tio̍h hō͘ i lî-hun-su.’" 
Matthew5:32 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, nā m̄-sī in-ūi bó͘ put-cheng, m̄-thang kā i lî, in-ūi i nā koh khì kè chiū-sī hāi i hoān kan-îm; chhōa chit-ê lî-hun ê hū-lú ê lâng mā-sī hoān kan-îm.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Lín koh ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat án-ni kà-sī kó͘-chá-lâng, kóng, ‘M̄-thang ûi-pōe só͘ hē ê goān, tī Chú bīn-chêng hē-goān tio̍h si̍t-hêng.’" 
Matthew5:34 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, lóng m̄-thang chiù-chōa. M̄-thang kí thiⁿ chiù-chōa, in-ūi thiⁿ sī Siōng-tè ê pó-chō;" 
Matthew5:35 mā m̄-thang kí tōe chiù-chōa, in-ūi tōe sī Siōng-tè ê kha-tiam; mā m̄-thang kí Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiù-chōa, in-ūi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sī tōa Kun-ông ê siâⁿ." 
Matthew5:36 Mā m̄-thang kí lí ê thâu-khak chiù-chōa, in-ūi lí bōe-tàng hō͘ chi̍t ki thâu-mn̂g pìⁿ-o͘ á-sī pìⁿ-pe̍h." 
Matthew5:37 Lín kóng-ōe, sī, chiū kóng sī, m̄-sī, chiū kóng m̄-sī; kî-tha ke kóng,ê sī tùi Siâ-ok-chiá chhut,lâi-ê.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat án-ni kà-sī kóng, ‘Ba̍k-chiu pê ba̍k-chiu; chhùi-khí pê chhùi-khí.’" 
Matthew5:39 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, m̄-thang tí-khòng choh-ok ê lâng. Lâng nā siàn lí chiàⁿ-pêng ê chhùi-phóe, liân tò-pêng mā oa̍t hō͘ i siàn." 
Matthew5:40 Lâng nā kò lí, beh the̍h lí ê lāi-saⁿ, liân gōa-saⁿ mā hō͘ i." 
Matthew5:41 Chiàm-léng-kun ê kun-jîn nā kiông-pek lí kiâⁿ chi̍t lí lō͘, tio̍h kap i kiâⁿ nn̄g lí." 
Matthew5:42 Lâng nā tùi lí kiû, tio̍h hō͘ i; kā lí chioh, m̄-thang kū-choa̍t.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán kà-sī, ‘Tio̍h thiàⁿ lí ê chhù-piⁿ, oàn-hūn lí ê tùi-te̍k.’" 
Matthew5:44 M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, tio̍h thiàⁿ lín ê tùi-te̍k, thòe pek-hāi lín ê lâng kî-tó." 
Matthew5:45 Án-ni, lín chiah ōe-tàng chiâⁿ-chòe lín Thiⁿ-pē ê kiáⁿ-jî, in-ūi I hō͘ ji̍t-thâu chhut-lâi chiò pháiⁿ-lâng kap hó-lâng, mā lo̍h-hō͘ hō͘ gī-lâng kap put-gī ê lâng." 
Matthew5:46 In-ūi lín nā kan-ta thiàⁿ hiah-ê thiàⁿ lín ê lâng, ū sím-mi̍h pò-siúⁿ? Kiám m̄-sī liân hiah-ê ba̍uh-sè,ê mā án-ni chòe?" 
Matthew5:47 Lín nā chí-ū tùi ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē chhéng-an, ū sím-mi̍h pí pa̍t-lâng khah te̍k-pia̍t? Kiám m̄-sī liân Gōa-pang-lâng mā án-ni chòe?" 
Matthew5:48 Kì-jiân lín ê Thiⁿ-pē sī oân-choân, lín mā tio̍h oân-choân.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ chiah kò͘-ì tī lâng ê bīn-chêng tián lín ê kèng-khiân; án-ni chòe bōe-tàng tùi lín ê Thiⁿ-pē tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ." 
Matthew6:2 “Só͘-í, lí chín-chè ê sî, m̄-thang seng pûn lat-pah pò lâng chai, chhin-chhiūⁿ ké-hó ê lâng tī hōe-tn̂g kap koe-lō͘ án-ni chòe, ài hō͘ lâng o-ló. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, in í-keng tit-tio̍h in ê pò-siúⁿ lah." 
Matthew6:3 Lí chín-chè ê sî, m̄-thang hō͘ lí ê tò-chhiú chai chiàⁿ-chhiú ê só͘-chòe," 
Matthew6:4 hō͘ lí thang tiām-tiām-á chín-chè, tiām-tiām-á teh khòaⁿ ê lí ê Pē ōe kā lí pò-siúⁿ.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Lín kî-tó ê sî, m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ ké-hó ê lâng, in-ūi in ài hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ, kò͘-ì khiā tī hōe-tn̂g á-sī lō͘-kháu kî-tó. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, in í-keng tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ lah." 
Matthew6:6 Lí kî-tó ê sî, tio̍h ji̍p-khì pâng-keng lāi, koaiⁿ-mn̂g, tùi lí tiām-tiām-á teh khòaⁿ ê Pē kiû, án-ni tiām-tiām-á teh khòaⁿ ê lí ê Pē ōe kā lí pò-siúⁿ." 
Matthew6:7 “Lín kî-tó ê sî, m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ Gōa-pang-lâng kóng-liáu koh kóng, in-ūi in siūⁿ, kóng khah chōe ōe Siōng-tè chiah ōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Matthew6:8 Lín m̄-thang kap in siâng-khoán; in-ūi iáu-bē kiû í-chêng, lín ê Pē í-keng chai lín ê su-iàu." 
Matthew6:9 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h án-ni kî-tó: Goán ê Thiⁿ-pē: Goān lí ê sèng-miâ siū chun-chông." 
Matthew6:10 Goān lí si-hêng chú-koân; goān lí ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān, tī tōe-chiūⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ tī thiⁿ-téng." 
Matthew6:11 Kiû lí kin-á-ji̍t sù goán su-iàu ê chia̍h-mi̍h. 
Matthew6:12 Kiû lí sià-bián goán ê ko͘-hū, chhin-chhiūⁿ goán mā ū sià-bián ko͘-hū goán ê lâng." 
Matthew6:13 Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ goán hām-lo̍h tam-tng bōe khí ê chhì-thàm, kiù goán thoat-lī hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
Matthew6:14 “Lín nā sià-bián lâng ê kè-sit, lín ê Thiⁿ-pē mā ōe sià-bián lín;" 
Matthew6:15 lín nā bô sià-bián lâng, lín ê Thiⁿ-pē mā bōe sià-bián lín ê kè-sit.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Lín kìm-chia̍h ê sî, m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ ké-hó ê lâng iu-thâu-kat-bīn; in-ūi in kò͘-ì hō͘ bīn pháiⁿ-khòaⁿ, ài hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chhut in teh kìm-chia̍h. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, in í-keng tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ lah." 
Matthew6:17 Lí kìm-chia̍h ê sî, thâu-mn̂g tio̍h boah-iû, bīn tio̍h sóe," 
Matthew6:18 hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ bōe chhut lí teh kìm-chia̍h, chí-ū hō͘ tiām-tiām-á teh khòaⁿ ê Pē khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, án-ni tiām-tiām-á teh khòaⁿ ê lí ê Pē ōe kā lí pò-siúⁿ.”" 
Matthew6:19 “M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h ka-kī chek-chū châi-pó tī tōe-chiūⁿ, tī chia ū thâng kā, ōe siⁿ-sian, chha̍t ōe ó͘-khang thau-the̍h." 
Matthew6:20 Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h ka-kī chek-chū châi-pó tī thiⁿ-téng, tī hia bô thâng kā, bōe siⁿ-sian, bô chha̍t ó͘-khang thau-the̍h." 
Matthew6:21 In-ūi lí ê châi-pó tī tó-ūi, lí ê sim mā ōe tī hia.”" 
Matthew6:22 “Ba̍k-chiu sī seng-khu ê teng. Lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā kim, kui seng-khu chiū kng-bêng;" 
Matthew6:23 lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā hoe, kui seng-khu chiū o͘-àm. Án-ni, lí lāi-bīn ê kng nā pìⁿ-chòe àm, chit-ê o͘-àm sī jōa-á-ni̍h giâm-tiōng!”" 
Matthew6:24 “Bô lâng ōe-tàng ho̍k-sāi nn̄g ê chú-lâng; i nā m̄-sī oàn-hūn chit-ê, thiàⁿ hit-ê, chiū-sī khòaⁿ-tāng chit-ê, khòaⁿ-khin hit-ê. Lín bōe-tàng siâng-sî ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè koh ho̍k-sāi chîⁿ-châi." 
Matthew6:25 “Só͘-í, góa kā lín kóng, m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h lín ê sìⁿ-miā beh chia̍h sím-mi̍h, beh lim sím-mi̍h teh chhau-hoân; mā m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h lín ê seng-khu beh chhēng sím-mi̍h teh chhau-hoân. Sìⁿ-miā kiám m̄-sī pí chia̍h-mi̍h khah tiōng-iàu? Seng-khu kiám m̄-sī pí i-ho̍k khah tiōng-iàu?" 
Matthew6:26 Lín khòaⁿ khong-tiong ê pe-chiáu, in bô chèng-choh, bô siu-sêng, mā bô tún-chek niû-si̍t tī chhng-khò͘, lín ê Thiⁿ-pē mā teh kā in iúⁿ-chhī. Lín kiám bô pí in khah kùi-tiōng?" 
Matthew6:27 Lín kiám ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng chhau-hoân ōe-tàng hō͘ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā ke oa̍h chi̍t-sî-á kú? 
Matthew6:28 “Lín ná tio̍h in-ūi beh chhēng sím-mi̍h chhau-hoân? Lín siūⁿ-khòaⁿ soaⁿ-iá ê hoe án-chóaⁿ teh tōa-châng; in bô lô-khó͘, mā bô pháng-chit." 
Matthew6:29 Put-kò góa kā lín kóng, liân Só͘-lô-bûn siōng êng-hôa ê sî, i chhēng ê saⁿ to bô pí chiah-ê hoe ê chi̍t lúi koh-khah súi." 
Matthew6:30 Soaⁿ-iá ê hoe-chháu kin-á-ji̍t teh oa̍h, bîn-á-chài hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h hé-lô͘, Siōng-tè to án-ni kā in chng-thāⁿ, I kiám bōe koh-khah kā lín chng-thāⁿ? Lín ná chiah-ni̍h bô sìn-sim!" 
Matthew6:31 “Só͘-í, lín m̄-bián chhau-hoân kóng ‘Goán beh chia̍h sím-mi̍h’ á-sī ‘Goán beh lim sím-mi̍h, beh chhēng sím-mi̍h’." 
Matthew6:32 Chiah-ê lóng sī Gōa-pang-lâng teh tui-kiû,ê. Lín ê Thiⁿ-pē chai chiah-ê lóng sī lín só͘ su-iàu,ê. 
Matthew6:33 Tio̍h seng tui-kiû I ê chú-koân kap I ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān, chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiū ōe lóng sòa hō͘ lín." 
Matthew6:34 Só͘-í, m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h bîn-á-chài chhau-hoân; bîn-á-chài ê tāi-chì bîn-á-chài chiah chhau-hoân. Chi̍t ji̍t ê kan-khó͘ chi̍t ji̍t tng.”" 
Matthew7:1 “M̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ lâng, chiah bián siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ." 
Matthew7:2 In-ūi lín ēng sím-mi̍h phiau-chún phoe-phòaⁿ lâng, Siōng-tè mā ōe chiàu án-ni kā lín sím-phòaⁿ; lín ēng sím-mi̍h niû niû hō͘ lâng, Siōng-tè mā ōe chiàu án-ni niû hō͘ lín." 
Matthew7:3 Lí ná kan-ta teh khòaⁿ hiaⁿ-tī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á, ia̍h bô chù-ì tio̍h ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-kho͘?" 
Matthew7:4 Lí ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-kho͘, ná ōe-tàng kā lí ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng ‘Lí ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-iù-á, góa kā lí the̍h,chhut-lâi’?" 
Matthew7:5 Ké-hó ê lâng, ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-kho͘ tio̍h seng the̍h,chhut-lâi, chiah ōe-tàng khòaⁿ chheng-chhó thang kā hiaⁿ-tī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á the̍h,chhut-lâi." 
Matthew7:6 “M̄-thang the̍h sîn-sèng ê mi̍h hō͘ káu, in ōe oa̍t kè-lâi kā lín; mā m̄-thang chiong lín ê chin-chu hiat tī ti ê bīn-chêng, in ōe ēng kha thún-ta̍h.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Kiû, ōe tit,tio̍h; chhē, ōe chhē,tio̍h; phah-mn̂g, ōe kā lín khui." 
Matthew7:8 In-ūi kiû,ê, chiū tit,tio̍h; chhē,ê, chiū chhē,tio̍h; phah-mn̂g,ê, chiū kā i khui." 
Matthew7:9 Lín tiong-kan kiám ū lâng, in kiáⁿ kā i thó mī-pau, ōe the̍h chio̍h-thâu hō͘ i?" 
Matthew7:10 Kā i thó hî, ōe lia̍h chôa hō͘ i?" 
Matthew7:11 Lín sui-jiân pháiⁿ, iáu ōe-hiáu the̍h hó-mi̍h hō͘ lín ê kiáⁿ-jî, hô-hòng lín ê Thiⁿ-pē, I it-tēng ōe the̍h hó-mi̍h hō͘ tùi I kî-kiû ê lâng!" 
Matthew7:12 “Só͘-í, lín ài lâng án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lín, mā tio̍h án-ni tùi-thāi in. Che chiū-sī Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê kà-sī.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Lín tio̍h tùi hit-ê oe̍h ê mn̂g ji̍p,khì; in-ūi thàng kàu bia̍t-bông hit-ê mn̂g khoah, hit-tiâu lō͘ hó kiâⁿ, ji̍p,khì ê lâng chin chōe." 
Matthew7:14 Thàng kàu oa̍h-miā hit-ê mn̂g oe̍h, hit-tiâu lō͘ sòe, chhē,tio̍h ê lâng chin chió.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Tio̍h hông-pī ké sian-ti. In lâi lín chia, gōa-piáu chhin-chhiūⁿ mî-iûⁿ, lāi-bīn khiok sī hiong-ok ê chhâi-lông." 
Matthew7:16 Lín ōe-tàng tùi in ê ké-chí lâi bat in. Kiám ōe-tàng tùi chhì-phè bán phû-tô? Á-sī tùi chi̍t-lê bán bû-hoa-kó? 
Matthew7:17 Án-ni, hó-chhiū kiat hó ké-chí; pháiⁿ-chhiū kiat pháiⁿ ké-chí." 
Matthew7:18 Hó-chhiū bōe kiat pháiⁿ ké-chí; pháiⁿ-chhiū mā bōe kiat hó ké-chí. 
Matthew7:19 Bōe kiat hó ké-chí ê chhiū lóng tio̍h chhò,khí-lâi, hiat-lo̍h hé." 
Matthew7:20 Án-ni, lín ōe-tàng tùi in ê ké-chí lâi bat in.”" 
Matthew7:21 “Chheng-ho͘ góa ‘Chú ah, Chú ah’ ê lâng, bōe lóng ji̍p Thian-kok; chí-ū si̍t-hêng góa ê Thiⁿ-pē ê chí-ì ê lâng chiah ōe." 
Matthew7:22 Tī Hit-ji̍t, ū chin chōe lâng ōe tùi góa kóng, ‘Chú ah, Chú ah, goán kiám m̄-sī bat hōng lí ê miâ thoân sìn-sit, bat hōng lí ê miâ kóaⁿ-kúi, bat hōng lí ê miâ kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah?’" 
Matthew7:23 Hit-sî góa ōe bêng-bêng tùi in kóng, ‘Góa lóng m̄ bat lín. Lín chiah-ê chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng, lóng lī-khui góa!’”" 
Matthew7:24 “Só͘-í, thiaⁿ góa chiah-ê ōe koh si̍t-hêng ê lâng lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ chhong-bêng ê lâng kā chhù khí tī chio̍h-pôaⁿ téng," 
Matthew7:25 hō͘ phoah, tōa-chúi lâi, hong sàu, chhiong-tio̍h chhù, chhù mā bōe tó, in-ūi khí tī chio̍h-pôaⁿ téng." 
Matthew7:26 “Thiaⁿ góa chiah-ê ōe bô si̍t-hêng ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ gōng-lâng kā chhù khí tī soa-téng," 
Matthew7:27 hō͘ phoah, tōa-chúi lâi, hong sàu, chhiong-tio̍h chhù, chhù chiū tó, koh tó kah chin lī-hāi.”" 
Matthew7:28 Iâ-so͘ chiah-ê ōe kóng soah, kûn-chiòng tùi I ê kà-sī kám-kak hui-siông hi-kî," 
Matthew7:29 in-ūi I ê kà-sī chin ū koân-ui, kap in ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su bô kâng-khoán." 
Matthew8:1 Iâ-so͘ tùi soaⁿ-téng lo̍h,lâi ê sî, ū kui tōa-tīn ê lâng tè I." 
Matthew8:2 Tú hit-sî, ū chi̍t ê bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng kiâⁿ óa,lâi, kūi lo̍h-khì I ê bīn-chêng, kóng, “Chú ah, lí nā khéng, ōe-tàng hō͘ góa chheng-khì.”" 
Matthew8:3 Iâ-so͘ chhun-chhiú kā i bong, kóng, “Góa khéng, hō͘ lí chheng-khì!” I ê bâ-hong-pīⁿ sûi-sî chheng-khì." 
Matthew8:4 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Tio̍h chù-ì, lóng m̄-thang kā lâng kóng. Put-kò tio̍h khì hō͘ chè-si giām, koh chiàu Mô͘-se ê kui-tēng hiàn lé-mi̍h, thang tùi chèng-lâng chèng-bêng.”" 
Matthew8:5 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Ka-pek-lông ê sî, ū chi̍t ê Lô-má kun-koaⁿ kiâⁿ óa-lâi kā I khún-kiû," 
Matthew8:6 kóng, “Chú ah, góa ê po̍k-jîn poàn-sin-put-sūi tó tī chhù-lāi, hui-siông kan-khó͘.”" 
Matthew8:7 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa lâi-khì kā i i-tī.”" 
Matthew8:8 Kun-koaⁿ ìn kóng, “Chú ah, lí lâi goán tau, góa bōe-kham,tit. Lí kan-ta kóng chi̍t kù ōe, góa ê po̍k-jîn chiū ōe hó." 
Matthew8:9 In-ūi góa sī hō͘ lâng koán ê lâng, mā ū peng hō͘ góa koán. Góa kā chit-ê kóng ‘Khì’, i chiū khì; kā pa̍t-ê kóng ‘Lâi’, i chiū lâi; kā góa ê po̍k-jîn kóng ‘Lí chòe chit-ê’, i chiū khì chòe.”" 
Matthew8:10 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-liáu kám-kak chin ì-gōa, chiū tùi hiah-ê tè I ê lâng kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, liân tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan, góa to iáu m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán ê sìn-sim." 
Matthew8:11 Góa kā lín kóng, ū chin chōe lâng ōe tùi tang tùi sai lâi kap A-pek-la-hán, Í-sat, Ngá-kok tī Thian-kok chē-toh." 
Matthew8:12 Put-kò hiah-ê pún-lâi sī Thian-kok ê kiáⁿ-jî,ê, hoán-tńg ōe siū kóaⁿ chhut-khì gōa-bīn o͘-àm ê só͘-chāi, tī hia thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí.”" 
Matthew8:13 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ tùi hit-ê kun-koaⁿ kóng, “Lí khì, hō͘ lí só͘ sìn,ê si̍t-hiān!” Tú-tú hit-sî, po̍k-jîn ê pīⁿ chiū hó,khì." 
Matthew8:14 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Pí-tek in tau, khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê tiūⁿ-ḿ hoat-jia̍t, tó tī bîn-chhn̂g." 
Matthew8:15 Iâ-so͘ bong i ê chhiú, jia̍t thè,khì, i chiū khí-lâi sū-hāu I." 
Matthew8:16 Hông-hun ê sî, ū chi̍t-kóa lâng chhōa chin chōe hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia. I ēng chi̍t kù ōe chiū kā siâ-sîn lóng kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, koh i-hó só͘-ū ê pīⁿ-lâng." 
Matthew8:17 Che sī beh èng-giām thong-kè sian-ti Í-sài-a só͘ kóng ê ōe: I sêng-siū lán ê loán-jio̍k, tam-tng lán ê pīⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
Matthew8:18 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng ûi tī I chiu-ûi, chiū hoan-hù bûn-tô͘ kè-khì ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ." 
Matthew8:19 Ū chi̍t ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kiâⁿ óa-lâi kā I kóng, “Lāu-su, lí bô-lūn khì tó-ūi, góa lóng beh tè lí.”" 
Matthew8:20 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Hô͘-lî ū khang, khong-tiong ê chiáu ū siū, put-kò Jîn-chú liân khòa thâu-khak ê só͘-chāi to bô.”" 
Matthew8:21 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, thèng-hāu goán sī-tōa-lâng pah-hè-nî-lāu, góa chiū lâi tè lí. ”" 
Matthew8:22 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lâi tè góa, hō͘ sí-lâng khì bâi-chòng in ka-kī ê sí-lâng!”" 
Matthew8:23 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-chûn, I ê bûn-tô͘ tè I khì." 
Matthew8:24 Hut-jiân, ô͘ khí tōa hong-éng, chûn soah hō͘ éng khàm kah beh tîm,lo̍h-khì, m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ teh khùn." 
Matthew8:25 Bûn-tô͘ khì kā I kiò-chhíⁿ, kóng, “Chú ah, kiù,leh-o͘h, lán teh-beh bô-miā lo͘h!”" 
Matthew8:26 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Sió-sìn ê lâng, lín ná chiah bô-táⁿ?” I chiū khí,lâi, chek-pī hong kap éng, ô͘ chiū chēng-chēng-chēng." 
Matthew8:27 Hiah-ê lâng tio̍h-kiaⁿ kóng, “Chit-ê sī sím-mi̍h khoán lâng, liân hong kap éng to sūn-ho̍k!”" 
Matthew8:28 Iâ-so͘ kè-khì ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ, kàu Ka-tāi-lia̍p -lâng ê tōe-khu, ū nn̄g ê hō͘ kúi hū-sin ê lâng tùi bōng-á-po͘ chhut,lâi, tú-tio̍h I. In hiông-kài-kài, só͘-í bô lâng káⁿ tùi hit-tiâu lō͘ keng-kè." 
Matthew8:29 In hut-jiân tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, lí mài chhap,goán! Sî iáu-bē kàu, lí chiū lâi beh kā goán khó͘-chhó͘ sī,bô?”" 
Matthew8:30 Hit-sî, lī in ū hiah,hn̄g-ah ê só͘-chāi, ū chi̍t tōa-kûn ti teh thó-chia̍h." 
Matthew8:31 Kúi kiû Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí nā beh kā goán kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, tio̍h chhe goán chìn-ji̍p hit-kûn ti.”" 
Matthew8:32 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín khì!” Kúi chiū chhut,khì, chìn-ji̍p ti-kûn; hut-jiân kui-kûn ti lóng tùi soaⁿ-phiâⁿ chông lo̍h-khì ô͘,ni̍h, tū-sí tī chúi-lāi." 
Matthew8:33 Chhī ti ê lâng chiū tô-cháu, cháu ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi, chiong it-chhè só͘ hoat-seng í-ki̍p hō͘ kúi hū-sin ê lâng só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì lóng pò lâng chai." 
Matthew8:34 Choân-siâⁿ ê lâng lóng chhut-lâi beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘; in chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, chiū khún-kiû I lī-khui in ê tōe-khu." 
Matthew9:1 Iâ-so͘ chē-chûn kè ô͘, tńg-khì ka-kī ê siâⁿ." 
Matthew9:2 Ū lâng ēng chhn̂g kng chi̍t ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia. I khòaⁿ-kìⁿ in ê sìn-sim, chiū tùi hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng, “Siàu-liân-lâng, an-sim, lí ê chōe sià-bián lah!”" 
Matthew9:3 Ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su sim-lāi siūⁿ, “Chit-ê lâng teh siat-to̍k Siōng-tè!”" 
Matthew9:4 Iâ-so͘ chai in ê sim-su chiū mn̄g in, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín sim-lāi ū chit-khoán pháiⁿ liām-thâu?" 
Matthew9:5 Tùi chit-ê lâng kóng ‘Lí ê chōe sià-bián lah’, á-sī kóng ‘Lí khí-lâi kiâⁿ’, tó chi̍t hāng khah kán-tan?" 
Matthew9:6 Put-kò góa beh hō͘ lín chai, Jîn-chú tī tōe-chiūⁿ ū sià-chōe ê koân-pèng.” Jiân-āu I tùi hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng, “Khí,lâi, giâ lí ê chhn̂g, tńg-khì lín tau!”" 
Matthew9:7 Hit-ê lâng chiū khí,lâi, tńg-khì in tau." 
Matthew9:8 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ,tio̍h chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè, in-ūi I ū chiong chit-khoán koân-pèng sù hō͘ lâng." 
Matthew9:9 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hia ǹg thâu-chêng kiâⁿ ê sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng, miâ kiò-chòe Má-thài, chē tī sè-koan. Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lâi tè góa!” I chiū khí-lâi tè I." 
Matthew9:10 Iâ-so͘ tī Má-thài ê chhù chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, ū chin chōe ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chōe-jîn mā lâi kap Iâ-so͘ í-ki̍p I ê bûn-tô͘ chòe-hé chia̍h." 
Matthew9:11 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng khòaⁿ,tio̍h chiū tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín lāu-su kap ba̍uh-sè,ê í-ki̍p chōe-jîn chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g?”" 
Matthew9:12 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kóng, “Kiān-khong,ê bô su-iàu i-seng, phòa-pīⁿ,ê chiah ū su-iàu." 
Matthew9:13 Lín khì ha̍k-si̍p chit-kù Sèng-keng ê ōe, ‘Góa ài lîn-bín, bô ài chè-mi̍h.’ In-ūi góa lâi, m̄-sī beh chio gī-lâng, sī beh chio chōe-jîn.”" 
Matthew9:14 Ū chi̍t piàn, Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, tùi I kóng, “Goán kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng siông-siông kìm-chia̍h, sī-án-chóaⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ bô kìm-chia̍h?”" 
Matthew9:15 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sin-lông iáu kap hun-iàn ê lâng-kheh chòe-hé ê sî, lâng-kheh kiám ōe ai-siong? Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, sin-lông ōe hō͘ lâng tùi in tiong-kan lia̍h,khì, hit-sî in chiū ōe kìm-chia̍h." 
Matthew9:16 “Bô lâng ēng bô kiu-chúi ê pò͘ khì pó͘ kū-saⁿ, in-ūi pó͘,ê hit-tè ōe kā saⁿ kiù-li̍h, tian-tò phòa koh-khah tōa-khang." 
Matthew9:17 Mā bô lâng chiong sin-chiú ji̍p tī kū phê-tē. Nā án-ni chòe, phê-tē ōe piak-phòa, chiú lâu,chhut-lâi, phê-tē mā pháiⁿ,khì. Sin-chiú eng-kai ji̍p tī sin phê-tē, án-ni nn̄g hāng chiū lóng pó-choân.”" 
Matthew9:18 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, ū chi̍t ê hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán lâi kūi tī I ê bīn-chêng, kóng, “Góa ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tú-á sí,khì, chhiáⁿ lí lâi kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú, i chiū ōe oa̍h,khí-lâi.”" 
Matthew9:19 Iâ-so͘ chiū khí,lâi, tè i khì; I ê bûn-tô͘ mā khì." 
Matthew9:20 Tú hit-sî, ū chi̍t ê tì-tio̍h hiat-lāu-pīⁿ cha̍p-jī nî kú ê hū-jîn-lâng kiâⁿ óa-khì Iâ-so͘ ê āu-bīn, bong I saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu." 
Matthew9:21 In-ūi i sim-lāi siūⁿ, “Góa kan-ta bong-tio̍h I ê saⁿ, pīⁿ chiū ōe hó.”" 
Matthew9:22 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t kè-lâi khòaⁿ i, kā i kóng, “Cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ, an-sim; lí ê sìn-sim hō͘ lí hó,khì lah!” Hū-jîn-lâng sûi-sî tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Matthew9:23 Iâ-so͘ lâi kàu hōe-tn̂g chú-koán ê chhù, khòaⁿ-tio̍h pûn phín-á,ê kap kui tōa-tīn lâng lōng-lōng-kún," 
Matthew9:24 chiū kā in kóng, “Lín lóng chhut,khì, chit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á m̄-sī sí,khì, sī teh khùn.” In chiū kā I thí-chhiò." 
Matthew9:25 Kóaⁿ kûn-chiòng chhut,khì liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì cha-bó͘ gín-á ê pâng-keng, khan i ê chhiú, cha-bó͘ gín-á chiū khí,lâi." 
Matthew9:26 Tùi án-ni, chit-ê siau-sit thoân kàu hit tōe-khu ê ta̍k só͘-chāi." 
Matthew9:27 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hia ê sî, ū nn̄g ê bông-jîn tè I khì; in tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín goán!”" 
Matthew9:28 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi, bông-jîn chiū kiâⁿ óa,khì. Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Lín sìn góa ōe-tàng kā lín chòe chit-ê tāi-chì sī,bô?” In ìn kóng, “Chú ah, lí ōe.”" 
Matthew9:29 Jiân-āu, Iâ-so͘ bong in ê ba̍k-chiu, kóng, “Chiàu lín ê sìn-sim hō͘ lín si̍t-hiān.”" 
Matthew9:30 In ê ba̍k-chiu chiū khui, ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. Iâ-so͘ giâm-giâm hoan-hù in kóng, “Chhian-bān m̄-thang hō͘ lâng chai chit-ê tāi-chì.”" 
Matthew9:31 M̄-kú in chi̍t-ē chhut,khì, soah chiong Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì thoân-piàn hit tōe-khu ê ta̍k só͘-chāi." 
Matthew9:32 In chhut,khì ê sî, ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê hō͘ kúi hū-sin bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia." 
Matthew9:33 Kúi chi̍t-ē hō͘ Iâ-so͘ kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, hit-ê bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng chiū kóng-ōe. Kûn-chiòng lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Tī Í-sek-lia̍t goán m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán tāi-chì.”" 
Matthew9:34 Put-kò Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kóng, “I sī khò kúi-ông teh kóaⁿ-kúi.”" 
Matthew9:35 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ-thàu chiu-ûi só͘-ū ê siâⁿ-chhī kap chng-siā, tī in ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng, thoân Thian-kok ê hok-im, i-hó ta̍k-khoán ê chèng-thâu kap pīⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
Matthew9:36 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah tōa-tīn ê lâng, chiū khó-lîn in, in-ūi in chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ bô bo̍k-chiá, khùn-khó͘, bô lâng chiàu-kò͘." 
Matthew9:37 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Thang siu-sêng,ê chin chōe, choh-kang ê lâng chin chió." 
Matthew9:38 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h kî-kiû koán siu-sêng ê Chú phài kang-lâng khì siu-sêng.”" 
Matthew10:1 Iâ-so͘ tiàu-chi̍p I cha̍p-jī ê bûn-tô͘ lâi, hō͘ in ū koân-pèng thang kóaⁿ siâ-sîn, i-tī ta̍k-khoán ê chèng-thâu kap pīⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
Matthew10:2 Chit cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê miâ chiū-sī chiah-ê: Tē-it sī Se-bûn, mā kiò-chòe Pí-tek, kap i ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t; Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap i ê sió-tī Iok-hān;" 
Matthew10:3 Hui-le̍k kap Pa-to-lô-mái; To-má kap ba̍uh-sè ê Má-thài; Ta̍t-thài kap A-le̍k-hui ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok; 
Matthew10:4 Kek-chìn-tóng ê Se-bûn kap chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi. 
Matthew10:5 Iâ-so͘ chhe chit cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chhut,khì, hoan-hù in kóng, “Lín m̄-thang khì Gōa-pang-lâng ê tōe-khu; m̄-thang chìn-ji̍p Sat-má-lī-a -lâng ê siâⁿ," 
Matthew10:6 chí-ū tio̍h khì chhē Í-sek-lia̍t -ke sit-bê ê iûⁿ. 
Matthew10:7 Lín khì ê sî tio̍h soan-iông kóng, ‘Thian-kok teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah!’" 
Matthew10:8 Lín tio̍h i-hó phòa-pīⁿ ê lâng, hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, hō͘ bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng chheng-khì, koh kóaⁿ-chhut siâ-sîn. Lín pe̍h-pe̍h tit,tio̍h, mā tio̍h pe̍h-pe̍h hō͘ lâng." 
Matthew10:9 Io-tòa lāi-bīn m̄-bián tòa kim-pè, gûn-pè, á-sī tâng-pè;" 
Matthew10:10 chhut-mn̂g m̄-bián tòa lú-hêng-tē á-sī nn̄g niá lāi-saⁿ, mā m̄-bián tòa liâng-ôe á-sī gia̍h koáiⁿ-á; in-ūi kang-lâng tit-tio̍h chia̍h-mi̍h sī eng-kai." 
Matthew10:11 “Lín bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t ê siâⁿ tó chi̍t ê chng-siā, tio̍h thàm-thiaⁿ khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h-lâng goān-ì chiap-thāi lín, chiah khì tòa hia, tòa kàu lī-khui." 
Matthew10:12 Lín ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi ê sî, tio̍h kā in chhéng-an." 
Matthew10:13 Chit-ke ê lâng nā goān-ì chiap-thāi lín, tio̍h chiong lín ê pêng-an hō͘ in; nā bô goān-ì chiap-thāi lín, tio̍h chiong pêng-an siu-hôe." 
Matthew10:14 M̄ chiap-thāi lín, m̄ thiaⁿ lín ê ōe ê lâng, lín lī-khui hit-keng chhù á-sī hit-ê siâⁿ ê sî, tio̍h chiong lín kha,ni̍h ê thô͘-hún pōaⁿ hō͘ i chheng-khì." 
Matthew10:15 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t, Só͘-to-má kap Gô-mô͘-la tōe-khu só͘ siū ê hêng-hoa̍t ōe pí hit-ê siâⁿ só͘ siū,ê koh-khah hó jím-siū.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Tio̍h chai, góa chhe lín chhut,khì, chhin-chhiūⁿ sàng iûⁿ ji̍p-khì chhâi-lông ê tiong-kan. Só͘-í, tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ chôa hiah-ni̍h lêng-khiáu, chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu hiah-ni̍h sûn-liông." 
Matthew10:17 Lín tio̍h tî-hông, in-ūi ū lâng ōe kā lín lia̍h-khì kau hō͘ gī-hōe, tī in ê hōe-tn̂g ēng piⁿ kā lín phah." 
Matthew10:18 Koh ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘, lín ōe hō͘ lâng thoa kàu chóng-tok kap kun-ông ê bīn-chêng, lâi tùi in kap Gōa-pang-lâng chòe kiàn-chèng." 
Matthew10:19 M̄-kú, lín hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì sím-mn̄g ê sî, m̄-bián hoân-ló beh án-chóaⁿ kóng, á-sī beh kóng sím-mi̍h; hit-sî lín só͘ tio̍h kóng,ê, ōe kā lín chí-sī," 
Matthew10:20 in-ūi teh kóng,ê m̄-sī lín ka-kī, sī lín Thiⁿ-pē ê Sîn thong-kè lín teh kóng." 
Matthew10:21 “Hiaⁿ-tī ōe chhut-bōe hiaⁿ-tī, hō͘ i sí; lāu-pē mā ōe án-ni tùi-thāi kiáⁿ-jî. Kiáⁿ-jî ōe khí-lâi kong-kek pē-bú, kā in hāi-sí." 
Matthew10:22 Lín ōe in-ūi góa ê miâ hō͘ chèng-lâng oàn-hūn, m̄-kú jím-nāi kàu chòe-āu,ê ōe tit-tio̍h kiù." 
Matthew10:23 In tī chit-ê siâⁿ pek-hāi lín, tio̍h tô-cháu khì pa̍t-ê siâⁿ. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, Í-sek-lia̍t ê siâⁿ-chhī lín kiâⁿ iáu-bē thàu, Jîn-chú chiū lâi!" 
Matthew10:24 “Ha̍k-seng bōe chhiau-kè lāu-su; po̍k-jîn mā bōe chhiau-kè chú-lâng. 
Matthew10:25 Ha̍k-seng tú,tio̍h ê pek-hāi kap lāu-su kâng-khoán, po̍k-jîn tú,tio̍h-ê kap chú-lâng kâng-khoán, án-ni chiū ū-kàu. Lâng to kā chit-ke ê chú-lâng kiò-chòe Pia̍t-se-pok, hô-hòng i ke-lāi ê lâng.”" 
Matthew10:26 “Só͘-í, m̄-bián kiaⁿ in; in-ūi bô chi̍t hāng am-khàm,ê bōe lō͘-hiān; mā bô chi̍t hāng pì-bi̍t,ê bōe hō͘ lâng chai." 
Matthew10:27 Góa tī àm-tiong kā lín kóng,ê, lín tio̍h tī kng-bêng tiong kóng,chhut-lâi; lín tī hī-khang piⁿ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, tio̍h tī chhù-bé-téng soan-pò͘." 
Matthew10:28 Ōe hāi-sí seng-khu khiok bōe hāi-sí lêng-hûn,ê, lín m̄-bián kiaⁿ; tian-tò tio̍h kiaⁿ ōe chiong lêng-hûn kap seng-khu hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k húi-bia̍t ê Siōng-tè." 
Matthew10:29 Nn̄g chiah chhek-chiáu-á kiám m̄-sī bōe chi̍t kak gûn nā-tiāⁿ? Lín ê Thiⁿ-pē nā bô ún-chún, liân chi̍t chiah to bōe poa̍h-lo̍h tōe." 
Matthew10:30 Lín leh, liân lín ê thâu-mn̂g to lóng ū sǹg,kè." 
Matthew10:31 Só͘-í, m̄-bián kiaⁿ, lín pí kui-kûn chhek-chiáu-á koh-khah kùi-tiōng!”" 
Matthew10:32 “Só͘-í, tī lâng ê bīn-chêng soan-jīn góa,ê, góa tī góa Thiⁿ-pē ê bīn-chêng mā ōe jīn i." 
Matthew10:33 Tī lâng ê bīn-chêng m̄ jīn góa,ê, góa tī góa Thiⁿ-pē ê bīn-chêng mā m̄ jīn i.”" 
Matthew10:34 “M̄-thang siūⁿ-kóng góa lâi sī beh tòa hô-pêng hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ; góa tòa,lâi-ê m̄-sī hô-pêng, sī to-kiàm." 
Matthew10:35 In-ūi góa lâi sī beh hō͘ lâng hun-lia̍t: Lâng tùi-khòng lāu-pē, cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tùi-khòng lāu-bú, sin-pū tùi-khòng ta-ke." 
Matthew10:36 Lâng ê tùi-te̍k sī ka-kī ke-lāi ê lâng. 
Matthew10:37 “Thiàⁿ pē-bú iâⁿ-kè thiàⁿ góa,ê, bô chu-keh tè góa; thiàⁿ kiáⁿ á-sī cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ iâⁿ-kè thiàⁿ góa,ê, bô chu-keh tè góa." 
Matthew10:38 M̄ giâ ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè lâi tè góa,ê, mā bô chu-keh tè góa." 
Matthew10:39 Beh tit-tio̍h ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; ūi-tio̍h góa sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Chiap-la̍p lín,ê chiū-sī chiap-la̍p góa; chiap-la̍p góa,ê chiū-sī chiap-la̍p chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi. 
Matthew10:41 Chiap-la̍p sian-ti chòe sian-ti,ê, ōe tit-tio̍h sian-ti èng-tit ê pò-siúⁿ; chiap-la̍p gī-lâng chòe gī-lâng,ê, ōe tit-tio̍h gī-lâng èng-tit ê pò-siúⁿ." 
Matthew10:42 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, kan-ta the̍h chi̍t poe léng-chúi hō͘ chiah-ê siōng bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê lim, in-ūi siōng bî-sòe,ê sī góa ê bûn-tô͘, chit-ê lâng it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ.”" 
Matthew11:1 Iâ-so͘ kà-sī cha̍p-jī ê bûn-tô͘ í-āu lī-khui hit só͘-chāi, khì hù-kūn ê siâⁿ-chhī kà-sī lâng kap thoân hok-im." 
Matthew11:2 Iok-hān tī kaⁿ,ni̍h thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ki-tok só͘ chòe ê sū, chiū chhe i ê bûn-tô͘ khì" 
Matthew11:3 mn̄g I, “Lí chiū-sī teh-beh lâi Hit-ūi, á-sī goán tio̍h thèng-hāu pa̍t-lâng?”" 
Matthew11:4 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín chiong só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h-ê khì kā Iok-hān kóng," 
Matthew11:5 chiū-sī sit-bêng ê lâng koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, kha-pái ê lâng kiâⁿ-lō͘, bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng chheng-khì, hī-khang bōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, sàn-chhiah-lâng ū hó-siau-sit thoân hō͘ in." 
Matthew11:6 Tùi góa bô sit-khì sìn-sim ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!” 
Matthew11:7 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ lī-khui liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ chiah tùi kûn-chiòng kóng-khí Iok-hān ê sū. I kóng, “Lín chhut-khì khòng-iá sī beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ hō͘ hong chhe iô-lâi-iô-khì ê lô͘-úi sī,bô?" 
Matthew11:8 Nā m̄-sī, lín chhut,khì beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ chhēng ko-kùi i-ho̍k ê lâng sī,bô? Lín khòaⁿ, chhēng ko-kùi i-ho̍k ê lâng sī tī ông-kiong." 
Matthew11:9 Án-ni, lín chhut,khì beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ sian-ti sī,bô? Sī, m̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, i pí sian-ti koh-khah úi-tāi." 
Matthew11:10 Koan-hē Iok-hān, Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài: Khòaⁿ ah, góa chhe góa ê sù-chiá chòe lí ê sian-hong; i beh tī lí ê thâu-chêng kā lí khui-lō͘." 
Matthew11:11 “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, hū-jîn-lâng só͘ siⁿ,ê bô chi̍t ê pí Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān khah úi-tāi; m̄-kú, tī Thian-kok siōng bî-sòe,ê iáu pí i koh-khah úi-tāi." 
Matthew11:12 Tùi Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān ê ji̍t kàu hiān-chāi, Thian-kok it-ti̍t siū kiông-lia̍t ê kong-kek, hiong-béng ê lâng ēng pō-le̍k kā i chhiúⁿ,khì." 
Matthew11:13 Sian-ti kap Lu̍t-hoat só͘-ū ê ū-giân kàu Iok-hān ûi-chí. 
Matthew11:14 Lín nā goān-ì chiap-siū chiah-ê ū-giân, chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k Iok-hān chiū-sī hit-ê teh-beh lâi ê Í-lī-a." 
Matthew11:15 Ū hī-khang,ê, tio̍h thiaⁿ!" 
Matthew11:16 “Góa beh ēng sím-mi̍h pí-phēng chit sè-tāi? In chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tīn gín-á chē tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu tùi lēng-gōa chi̍t tīn hoah: 
Matthew11:17 Goán tùi lín pûn phín-á, lín bô thiàu-bú! Goán chhiùⁿ ai-ko, lín mā bô pi-siong!" 
Matthew11:18 Iok-hān lâi, bô chia̍h bô lim, lâng chiū kóng, ‘I hō͘ kúi hū-sin!’" 
Matthew11:19 Jîn-chú lâi, mā chia̍h mā lim, lâng chiū kóng, ‘I sī tham-chia̍h hò͘ⁿ-chiú ê lâng, sī ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chōe-jîn ê pêng-iú!’ Put-kò, si̍t-chāi ê tì-hūi tùi hêng-ûi tit-tio̍h chèng-si̍t.”" 
Matthew11:20 Iâ-so͘ ū tī chi̍t-kóa siâⁿ-chhī kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah, m̄-kú hiah-ê siâⁿ-chhī ê lâng lóng bô hóe-kái, I chiū kā in chek-pī." 
Matthew11:21 I kóng, “ Ko-lia̍p-sìn, lí chhám ah! Pek-sài-tāi, lí chhám ah! Góa tī lín tiong-kan kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah nā tī Thài-ní kap Se-tùn kiâⁿ, in chá chiū chhēng môa-saⁿ sám hé-hu hóe-kái lah." 
Matthew11:22 Góa kā lín kóng, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t, Thài-ní kap Se-tùn siū ê hêng-hoa̍t ōe pí lín tio̍h siū,ê khah hó jím-siū." 
Matthew11:23 Lí leh, Ka-pek-lông, Lí ài lâng kā lí hû-chiūⁿ thiⁿ sī,bô? Bōe, Siōng-tè ōe kā lí hiat-lo̍h Im-hú. Tī lí hia kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah nā tī Só͘-to-má kiâⁿ, Só͘-to-má it-tēng iáu lâu kàu kin-á-ji̍t." 
Matthew11:24 Chóng-sī góa kā lín kóng, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t, Só͘-to-má tōe-khu siū ê hêng-hoa̍t pí lí tio̍h siū,ê khah hó jím-siū.”" 
Matthew11:25 Hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Pē ah, thiⁿ-tōe ê Chú, góa kám-siā lí, in-ūi lí ū chiong chiah-ê sū tùi ū tì-hūi ū ha̍k-būn ê lâng khàm,khí-lâi, m̄-kú tùi sòe-hàn gín-á khé-sī." 
Matthew11:26 Pē ah, sī lah, in-ūi che sī lí ê hó chí-ì." 
Matthew11:27 “Góa ê Pē í-keng ū chiong it-chhè lóng kau-thok góa. Pē í-gōa bô lâng bat Kiáⁿ; Kiáⁿ kap Kiáⁿ ài-beh khé-sī ê lâng í-gōa mā bô lâng bat Pē. 
Matthew11:28 “Lô-khó͘ pē tāng-tàⁿ ê lâng lóng tio̍h lâi góa chia, góa beh hō͘ lín an-hioh." 
Matthew11:29 Tio̍h pē góa ê taⁿ, lâi tùi góa o̍h, in-ūi góa ê sim un-jiû khiam-sùn. Án-ni, lín ê sim-sîn chiū ōe tit-tio̍h an-hioh." 
Matthew11:30 Góa ê taⁿ ha̍h-ēng, góa ê tàⁿ chin khin.”" 
Matthew12:1 Kè bô jōa kú, tī An-hioh-ji̍t Iâ-so͘ tùi be̍h-hn̂g keng-kè. I ê bûn-tô͘ pak-tó͘ iau, chiū tiah be̍h-sūi lâi chia̍h." 
Matthew12:2 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng khòaⁿ,tio̍h, tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ, lí ê bûn-tô͘ tī An-hioh-ji̍t chòe bōe-ēng-tit chòe ê tāi-chì.”" 
Matthew12:3 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng pak-tó͘ iau ê sî só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì?" 
Matthew12:4 I ji̍p-khì Siōng-tè ê tiān chia̍h hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ, chit-khoán piáⁿ chí-ū chè-si chiah thang chia̍h, i kap tè i ê lâng lóng bōe-ēng-tit chia̍h." 
Matthew12:5 Lēng-gōa, lín kiám bô tha̍k-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat ê kì-chài, chiū-sī An-hioh-ji̍t chè-si tī Sèng-tiān hoān-tio̍h An-hioh-ji̍t ê kui-kú mā sǹg bô chōe." 
Matthew12:6 Góa kā lín kóng, tī chia ū chi̍t ê pí Sèng-tiān khah tiōng-iàu,ê." 
Matthew12:7 Sèng-keng ū kóng, ‘Góa ài lîn-bín, bô ài chè-mi̍h.’ Lín nā liáu-kái chit-kù ōe ê ì-sù, chiū bōe kā bô chōe ê lâng tēng-chōe." 
Matthew12:8 In-ūi Jîn-chú sī An-hioh-ji̍t ê Chú.” 
Matthew12:9 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hit só͘-chāi, ji̍p-khì in ê hōe-tn̂g." 
Matthew12:10 Tú-hó ū chi̍t ê chi̍t ki chhiú khê,khì ê lâng tī hia. Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siūⁿ-beh khòng-kò Iâ-so͘, chiū mn̄g I kóng, “Tī An-hioh-ji̍t i-pīⁿ ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô?”" 
Matthew12:11 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín tiong-kan ū lâng ū chi̍t chiah iûⁿ, tú-hó tī An-hioh-ji̍t poa̍h-lo̍h khut-á, i kiám bōe kā i khiú,khí-lâi?" 
Matthew12:12 Lâng pí iûⁿ ke jōa-á-ni̍h kùi-tiōng! Só͘-í, tī An-hioh-ji̍t chòe hó-sū ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat.”" 
Matthew12:13 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā hit-ê lâng kóng, “Chhiú chhun,chhut-lâi!” Chit-ê lâng chhiú chhun,chhut-lâi, chiū ho̍k-goân, oân-choân hó,khì, kap lēng-gōa hit-ki chhiú kâng-khoán." 
Matthew12:14 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhut,khì, chiū kè-bô͘ beh tùi-hù Iâ-so͘, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ kā I hāi-sí." 
Matthew12:15 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ in ê kè-bô͘ chiū lī-khui hia; ū chin chōe lâng tè I khì, I chiū i-hó in tiong-kan só͘-ū ê pīⁿ-lâng." 
Matthew12:16 I bēng-lēng in m̄-thang tùi lâng thoân-iông I ê tāi-chì. 
Matthew12:17 Che sī beh èng-giām thong-kè sian-ti Í-sài-a só͘ kóng ê ōe: 
Matthew12:18 Lín khòaⁿ, góa só͘ kéng-soán ê po̍k-jîn, góa só͘ thiàⁿ, só͘ ì-ài,ê. Góa beh sù góa ê Sîn hō͘ I; I beh tùi bān-bîn soan-kò góa ê kong-gī." 
Matthew12:19 I bōe cheng-piān, bōe soan-jióng; tī koe-lō͘ bô lâng ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê siaⁿ." 
Matthew12:20 Siū-siong ê lô͘-úi, I bōe at-tn̄g; beh hoa ê teng-hé, I bōe pûn-sit, ti̍t-kàu I hō͘ kong-gī tek-sèng." 
Matthew12:21 Bān-bîn lóng ōe chiong ǹg-bāng kau-thok I. 
Matthew12:22 Hit-sî, ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê hō͘ kúi hū-sin, sit-bêng koh bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia; Iâ-so͘ kā i i-hó, hit-ê bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng chiū ōe kóng-ōe, koh ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Matthew12:23 Kûn-chiòng lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng káⁿ sī Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ ho͘hⁿ?”" 
Matthew12:24 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kóng, “Chit-ê lâng sī khò kúi-ông Pia̍t-se-pok teh kóaⁿ-kúi.”" 
Matthew12:25 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ in ê sim-su chiū kā in kóng, “Kok-ka ka-kī hun-cheng, ōe hong-hòe; siâⁿ-chhī á-sī ka-têng ka-kī hun-cheng, khiā bōe tiâu." 
Matthew12:26 Sat-tàn nā kóaⁿ Sat-tàn, sī ka-kī hun-cheng, i ê kok beh ná khiā ōe tiâu?" 
Matthew12:27 Góa nā khò Pia̍t-se-pok kóaⁿ-kúi, lín ê chú-tē sī khò sím-mi̍h-lâng kóaⁿ-kúi? Án-ni, lín ka-kī ê chú-tē ōe kā lín phòaⁿ-chōe." 
Matthew12:28 Put-kò góa nā-sī khò Siōng-tè ê Sîn kóaⁿ-kúi, Siōng-tè ê chú-koân chiū í-keng tī lín tiong-kan si̍t-hiān lah." 
Matthew12:29 “Lâng án-chóaⁿ chiah ōe-tàng ji̍p-khì ióng-sū ê chhù chhiúⁿ i ê châi-bu̍t, kiám m̄-sī tio̍h seng kā i pa̍k,khí-lâi?" 
Matthew12:30 “Bô ūi góa,ê chiū-sī hoán-tùi góa; bô kap góa chòe-hé siu-chi̍p,ê chiū-sī teh phah-sòaⁿ. 
Matthew12:31 Só͘-í, góa kā lín kóng, lâng it-chhè ê chōe kap húi-pòng lóng ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián, m̄-kú siat-to̍k Sèng Sîn bōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Matthew12:32 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng kóng-ōe kong-kek Jîn-chú, ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián, m̄-kú bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng kóng-ōe kong-kek Sèng Sîn, tī hiān-chāi kap chiong-lâi lóng bōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Hó-chhiū kiat hó ké-chí; pháiⁿ-chhiū kiat pháiⁿ ké-chí; tùi só͘ kiat ê ké-chí thang chai chhiū ê hó-pháiⁿ. 
Matthew12:34 Lín chiah-ê to̍k-chôa, lín pún-lâi sī pháiⁿ,ê, beh ná ōe kóng hó-ōe? In-ūi lâng sim-lāi chhiong-móa sím-mi̍h, chhùi chiū kóng sím-mi̍h." 
Matthew12:35 Hó-lâng tùi só͘ chek-chū ê hó hoat-chhut hó; pháiⁿ-lâng tùi só͘ chek-chū ê pháiⁿ hoat-chhut pháiⁿ. 
Matthew12:36 “Góa kā lín kóng, lâng só͘ kóng it-chhè ê êng-á-ōe, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t ta̍k-kù lóng tio̍h hū-chek." 
Matthew12:37 In-ūi Siōng-tè beh ēng lí ê ōe lâi phòaⁿ lí bô-chōe, mā beh ēng lí ê ōe lâi tēng lí ū-chōe.”" 
Matthew12:38 Hit-sî, ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, goán ài lí kiâⁿ chi̍t ê sîn-jiah hō͘ goán khòaⁿ.”" 
Matthew12:39 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Siâ-ok kan-îm ê sè-tāi iau-kiû sîn-jiah, m̄-kú sian-ti Iok-ná ê sîn-jiah í-gōa, bōe koh ū sîn-jiah hō͘ in." 
Matthew12:40 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Iok-ná saⁿ mî saⁿ ji̍t tī tōa-hî ê pak-tó͘ lāi, Jîn-chú mā ōe saⁿ mî saⁿ ji̍t tī tōe chhim ê só͘-chāi." 
Matthew12:41 Tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Nî-nî-bî -lâng ōe kap chit sè-tāi ê lâng chòe-hé khí,lâi, kā chit sè-tāi ê lâng tēng-chōe, in-ūi Nî-nî-bî -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-ná ê thoân-tō liáu-āu lóng ū hóe-kái. Lín khòaⁿ, ū pí Iok-ná koh-khah úi-tāi,ê tī chia!" 
Matthew12:42 Tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Lâm-hng ê lú-ông ōe kap chit sè-tāi ê lâng chòe-hé khí,lâi, kā chit sè-tāi ê lâng tēng-chōe, in-ūi i ū tùi tōe ê ke̍k-thâu lâi thiaⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn tì-hūi ê ōe. Lín khòaⁿ, ū pí Só͘-lô-bûn koh-khah úi-tāi,ê tī chia!”" 
Matthew12:43 “Siâ-sîn lī-khui só͘ hū-sin ê lâng liáu-āu, tī bô-chúi ê tōe-khu kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu, beh chhē chi̍t ê hioh-khùn ê só͘-chāi, chhē lóng bô," 
Matthew12:44 chiū kóng, ‘Góa beh tńg-lâi-khì góa chhut,lâi hit-keng chhù.’ I tńg,khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chhù khang-khang, sàu kah chin chheng-khì, koh chéng-lí hó-sè." 
Matthew12:45 Āu-lâi, i khì chhōa chhit ê pí i khah pháiⁿ ê siâ-sîn kap i chòe-hé lâi, ji̍p-khì hia tòa. Án-ni, hit-ê lâng ê kiat-kio̍k pí khí-thâu koh-khah chhám. Chit-ê siâ-ok ê sè-tāi mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni.”" 
Matthew12:46 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh tùi chèng-lâng kóng-ōe ê sî, I ê lāu-bú kap hiaⁿ-tī lâi khiā tī gōa-bīn, ài-beh kap I kóng-ōe." 
Matthew12:47 Ū lâng kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ, lí ê lāu-bú kap hiaⁿ-tī khiā tī gōa-bīn, ài-beh kap lí kóng-ōe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Iâ-so͘ kā hit-ê lâng kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī góa ê lāu-bú? Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī góa ê hiaⁿ-tī?”" 
Matthew12:49 Jiân-āu I chhun-chhiú kí I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, góa ê lāu-bú, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī!" 
Matthew12:50 Si̍t-hêng góa Thiⁿ-pē chí-ì ê lâng chiū-sī góa ê hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, kap lāu-bú.”" 
Matthew13:1 Siâng hit-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tùi chhù,ni̍h chhut,khì, tī ô͘-piⁿ chē." 
Matthew13:2 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng chū-chi̍p óa-lâi I hia, I soah tio̍h khì chē tī chûn-téng, kui tōa-tīn lâng lóng khiā tī hōaⁿ-téng." 
Matthew13:3 I chiū ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng chin chōe hāng sū. I kóng: “Ū chi̍t ê iā chéng-chí ê lâng chhut-khì iā chéng-chí. 
Matthew13:4 I iā ê sî, ū-ê chéng-chí lak tī lō͘-piⁿ, chiáu-á pe,lâi, kā in chia̍h-liáu-liáu." 
Matthew13:5 Ū-ê lak tī chio̍h-thâu tōe, thô͘ chió ê só͘-chāi, in-ūi thô͘ bô chhim, chin kín chiū puh-gê;" 
Matthew13:6 put-kò ji̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē chhut, kā in pha̍k,tio̍h, in-ūi bô kun chiū ta,khì." 
Matthew13:7 Ū-ê lak tī chhì-phè lāi, chhì-á tōa-châng,khí-lâi chiū kā in hip,sí." 
Matthew13:8 Put-kò ū-ê lak tī hó thó͘-tōe, chiū kiat-si̍t; ū-ê chi̍t-pah pē, ū-ê la̍k-cha̍p pē, ū-ê saⁿ-cha̍p pē." 
Matthew13:9 Ū hī-khang,ê, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Matthew13:10 Bûn-tô͘ lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lí tùi kûn-chiòng lóng ēng phì-jū kā in kóng?”" 
Matthew13:11 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Thian-kok ê ò-pì í-keng ū hō͘ lín chai, m̄-kú bô hō͘ in chai." 
Matthew13:12 In-ūi ū,ê, beh hō͘ i koh-khah chōe, chōe kàu ū-chhun; bô,ê, liân i só͘-ū,ê mā beh kā i chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi." 
Matthew13:13 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê iân-kò͘, góa ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng, in-ūi: In khòaⁿ mā khòaⁿ bô, thiaⁿ mā thiaⁿ bô, koh bōe liáu-kái." 
Matthew13:14 Í-sài-a ê ū-giân tú tī in sin-chiūⁿ èng-giām: Lín thiaⁿ koh thiaⁿ mā bōe liáu-kái; lín khòaⁿ koh khòaⁿ mā bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. 
Matthew13:15 In-ūi chit-ê chú-bîn ê sim í-keng tūn, hī-khang tāng, ba̍k-chiu khoeh. Nā m̄-sī án-ni, in ê ba̍k-chiu ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hī-khang ōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, sim ōe bêng-pe̍k, ōe hôe-sim-tńg-ì, góa chiū kā in i-hó." 
Matthew13:16 “M̄-kú lín chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi lín ba̍k-chiu ū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hī-khang ū thiaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Matthew13:17 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, í-chêng ū chin chōe sian-ti kap gī-lâng ài-beh khòaⁿ lín só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê ia̍h bô khòaⁿ,tio̍h, beh thiaⁿ lín só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê ia̍h bô thiaⁿ,tio̍h.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Só͘-í, lín tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ chit-ê iā chéng-chí ê phì-jū." 
Matthew13:19 Só͘-ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Thian-kok ê sìn-sit bô bêng-pe̍k,ê, sī chhin-chhiūⁿ iā tī lō͘-piⁿ ê chéng-chí, hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá lâi, kā iā tī i sim-lāi ê chéng-chí chhiúⁿ,khì." 
Matthew13:20 Iā tī chio̍h-thâu tōe,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, sûi-sî hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū," 
Matthew13:21 m̄-kú tī i ê sim-lāi tèng-kun bô chhim, tòng bōe kú, chi̍t-ē ūi-tio̍h sìn-sit tú-tio̍h hoān-lān á-sī pek-hāi, sûi-sî chiū pàng-sak." 
Matthew13:22 Iā tī chhì-phè lāi,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit liáu-āu, seng-oa̍h ê khòa-lū kap chîⁿ-châi ê bê-he̍k kā só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit hip,sí, soah bōe kiat-si̍t." 
Matthew13:23 Iā tī hó thó͘-tōe,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, ū liáu-kái, chin-chiàⁿ ū kiat-si̍t; ū-ê chi̍t-pah pē, ū-ê la̍k-cha̍p pē, ū-ê saⁿ-cha̍p pē.”" 
Matthew13:24 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi in kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū: “Thian-kok thang phì-jū chòe ū chi̍t ê lâng iā hó chéng-chí tī ka-kī ê hn̂g,ni̍h. 
Matthew13:25 Lâng teh khùn ê sî, tùi-te̍k lâi, chiong phōe-á iā tī be̍h-á ê tiong-kan, chiū lī-khui." 
Matthew13:26 Be̍h-á hoat,khí-lâi, chhut-sūi ê sî, phōe-á mā hoat,chhut-lâi." 
Matthew13:27 Po̍k-jîn lâi kìⁿ chú-lâng kóng, ‘Thâu-ke, lí kiám m̄-sī iā hó ê chéng-chí tī hn̂g,ni̍h? Ná ōe ū chiah-ê phōe-á?’" 
Matthew13:28 Chú-lâng ìn kóng, ‘Che sī tùi-te̍k chòe,ê.’ Po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Án-ni, goán lâi-khì kā hiah-ê phōe-á khau,khí-lâi hó,bô?’" 
Matthew13:29 Chú-lâng ìn kóng, ‘M̄ thang, lín khau phōe-á ê sî, m̄-tú-hó liân be̍h-á soah khau-khau,khí-lâi." 
Matthew13:30 Hō͘ phōe-á kap be̍h-á tâng-chôe tōa-châng, siu-sêng ê sî góa chiah hoan-hù siu-koah ê lâng seng kā phōe-á khau,khí-lâi, khún kui-pé khì sio, jiân-āu kā be̍h-á siu ji̍p-khì góa ê chhng-khò͘.’”" 
Matthew13:31 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū: “Thian-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t lia̍p kòa-chhài-chí, lâng kā i the̍h-khì iā tī ka-kī ê hn̂g,ni̍h." 
Matthew13:32 Kòa-chhài-chí sī só͘-ū chéng-chí tiong siōng sòe-lia̍p,ê, tōa-châng,khí-lâi, pí só͘-ū ê chhài-soe koh-khah tōa-châng, chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t châng chhiū, liân khong-tiong ê chiáu-á to lâi tī chhiū-ki chòe siū.”" 
Matthew13:33 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū: “Thian-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ kàⁿ-bú, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng the̍h-khì lām tī saⁿ táu mī-hún chòe-hé chhiau, chòe-āu kui-ê lóng hoat,khí-lâi.”" 
Matthew13:34 Chiah-ê it-chhè ê kà-sī Iâ-so͘ lóng ēng phì-jū tùi chèng-lâng kóng; I bô ēng pa̍t-khoán ê hong-sek, chí-ū ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng." 
Matthew13:35 I án-ni chòe sī beh èng-giām Chú thong-kè sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe: Góa beh khui-chhùi kóng phì-jū, kóng chhòng-sè í-lâi ún-ba̍t ê sū." 
Matthew13:36 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui chèng-lâng, ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi. I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi kā I kóng, “Chhiáⁿ kā goán kóe-seh hn̂g,ni̍h ê phōe-á ê phì-jū.”" 
Matthew13:37 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Hit-ê iā hó chéng-chí,ê sī Jîn-chú;" 
Matthew13:38 hn̂g sī sè-kài; hó chéng-chí sī Thian-kok ê kiáⁿ-jî; phōe-á sī hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá ê kiáⁿ-jî; 
Matthew13:39 iā phōe-á hit-ê te̍k-jîn sī Mô͘-kúi; siu-koah sī chí kim-sè ê chiong-kio̍k; siu-koah,ê sī thiⁿ-sài. 
Matthew13:40 Tī kim-sè ê chiong-kio̍k, pháiⁿ-lâng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ phōe-á hō͘ lâng khioh kui-pé ēng hé kā in sio." 
Matthew13:41 Jîn-chú ōe chhe I ê thiⁿ-sài lâi, tùi I ê kok-lāi chiong it-chhè hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó hoān-chōe kap put-hoat ê lâng lóng lia̍h,lâi," 
Matthew13:42 kā in hiat-lo̍h hé-lô͘, tī hia in ōe thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí." 
Matthew13:43 Hit-sî, gī-lâng tī in ê Pē ê Kok-tō͘ ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ ji̍t-thâu hoat-kng. Ū hī-khang,ê, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Matthew13:44 “Thian-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ pó-pòe chhàng tī hn̂g,ni̍h, ū lâng chhē,tio̍h, kā i khàm,khí-lâi, chin hoaⁿ-hí khì bōe it-chhè só͘ ū,ê lâi bóe hit-khu hn̂g." 
Matthew13:45 “Thian-kok mā chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t ê seng-lí-lâng teh chhē súi ê chin-chu. 
Matthew13:46 I chi̍t-ē chhē-tio̍h chi̍t lia̍p chin ta̍t-chîⁿ ê chin-chu, chiū khì bōe it-chhè só͘ ū,ê lâi bóe hit-lia̍p chin-chu.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Thian-kok mā chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng tī ô͘,ni̍h pha-bāng, lia̍h ta̍k-khoán hî;" 
Matthew13:48 bāng móa chiū thoa-chiūⁿ hōaⁿ, chē,lo̍h-lâi, kéng hó,ê khǹg lo̍h-khì tháng-á lāi, bái,ê hiat-ka̍k." 
Matthew13:49 Kim-sè ê chiong-kio̍k mā chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni; thiⁿ-sài beh chhut,khì, tùi gī-lâng ê tiong-kan kā pháiⁿ-lâng hun-pia̍t,chhut-lâi," 
Matthew13:50 hiat-lo̍h hé-lô͘; tī hia in ōe thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí.”" 
Matthew13:51 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Chiah-ê lín lóng ū bêng-pe̍k bô?” In ìn kóng, “Ū.”" 
Matthew13:52 I chiū kā in kóng, “Só͘-í, ta̍k-ê ha̍k-si̍p Thian-kok tō-lí ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t ke ê chú-lâng tùi chhng-khò͘ kā sin kap kū ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ lóng poaⁿ,chhut-lâi.”" 
Matthew13:53 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê phì-jū liáu-āu lī-khui hia," 
Matthew13:54 tò-khì ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong. I tī in ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng, in lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng tùi tó-ūi tit-tio̍h chit-khoán ê tì-hūi kap kiâⁿ sîn-jiah ê khùi-la̍t?" 
Matthew13:55 I kiám m̄-sī hit-ê ba̍k-chhiūⁿ ê kiáⁿ? I ê lāu-bú kiám m̄-sī kiò-chòe Má-lī-a? I ê hiaⁿ-tī kiám m̄-sī Ngá-kok, Iok-sek, Se-bûn, kap Iû-tāi?" 
Matthew13:56 I ê sió-bē kiám m̄-sī lóng kap lán tī chia? Án-ni, chit-ê lâng tùi tó-ūi tit-tio̍h chit-khoán ê tì-hūi kap khùi-la̍t?”" 
Matthew13:57 In soah tùi Iâ-so͘ khí hoán-kám. Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Sian-ti tī ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong ka-kī ê ka-cho̍k í-gōa, it-tēng ōe siū chun-tiōng.”" 
Matthew13:58 In-ūi in m̄ sìn, Iâ-so͘ tī hia bô kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah." 
Matthew14:1 Hit-sî, Ka-lī-lī hun-hong ê ông Hi-lu̍t thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê miâ-siaⁿ," 
Matthew14:2 chiū tùi i ê pō͘-hā kóng, “Chit-ê lâng sī Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān, i í-keng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, só͘-í chiah ū koân-lêng kiâⁿ chiah-ê sîn-jiah.”" 
Matthew14:3 Goân-lâi, Hi-lu̍t ūi-tio̍h i ê sió-tī Hui-le̍k ê bó͘ Hi-lô-tí ê iân-kò͘ ū lia̍h Iok-hān, kā i liān,khí-lâi, koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ." 
Matthew14:4 In-ūi Iok-hān tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ tùi i kóng, “Lí chhōa chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chòe bó͘ bô ha̍p-hoat.”" 
Matthew14:5 Hi-lu̍t siūⁿ-beh kā i thâi, put-kò kiaⁿ kûn-chiòng, in-ūi in lóng siūⁿ-kóng i sī sian-ti." 
Matthew14:6 Hi-lu̍t choh-siⁿ-ji̍t ê sî, Hi-lô-tí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tī lâi-pin bīn-chêng thiàu-bú; Hi-lu̍t chin hoaⁿ-hí," 
Matthew14:7 chiū chiù-chōa tah-èng hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h lóng beh hō͘ i. 
Matthew14:8 Cha-bó͘ gín-á hō͘ lāu-bú sái-lōng, chiū kóng, “Chhiáⁿ chiong Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān ê thâu-khak khǹg tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h hō͘ góa.”" 
Matthew14:9 Ông ê sim chin kan-khó͘, put-kò in-ūi í-keng tī kùi-pin ê bīn-chêng chiù-chōa, chiū bēng-lēng chiàu só͘ kiû,ê hō͘ i." 
Matthew14:10 Ông chhe lâng khì kaⁿ,ni̍h chām Iok-hān ê thâu," 
Matthew14:11 chiong thâu-khak hē tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h, kau hō͘ cha-bó͘ gín-á, cha-bó͘ gín-á chiū phâng-khì hō͘ i ê lāu-bú." 
Matthew14:12 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ lâi siu i ê sin-si khì bâi-chòng, jiân-āu khì kā Iâ-so͘ pò-kò." 
Matthew14:13 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siau-sit chiū lī-khui hia, kan-ta ka-kī chē-chûn thè-khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi. Chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū tùi ta̍k siâⁿ-chhī kiâⁿ-lō͘ tè I." 
Matthew14:14 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng chiū khó-lîn in, i-hó in ê pīⁿ." 
Matthew14:15 Hông-hun-àm, bûn-tô͘ óa-lâi kā I kóng, “Chia sī phian-phiah ê só͘-chāi, thiⁿ mā teh àm ah; chhiáⁿ kā kûn-chiòng kái-sàn, hō͘ in thang ka-kī khì hù-kūn ê chng-siā bóe chia̍h-mi̍h.”" 
Matthew14:16 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “In m̄-bián khì, lín hō͘ in chia̍h.”" 
Matthew14:17 Bûn-tô͘ tùi I kóng, “Lán chia chí-ū gō͘ ê piáⁿ, nn̄g bé hî.”" 
Matthew14:18 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “The̍h-lâi chia hō͘ góa.”" 
Matthew14:19 I chiū kiò chèng-lâng chē tī chháu-po͘, jiân-āu the̍h hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ kap nn̄g bé hî, ǹg thiⁿ kám-siā; piáⁿ peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘, bûn-tô͘ chiū pun hō͘ chèng-lâng." 
Matthew14:20 Tāi-ke lóng chia̍h, chia̍h kàu pá. Bûn-tô͘ khioh chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á, móa cha̍p-jī nâ." 
Matthew14:21 Chia̍h ê lâng, hū-jîn-lâng kap gín-á bô sǹg, iok ū gō͘-chheng ê ta-po͘-lâng." 
Matthew14:22 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî pek bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn seng kè-khì tùi-bīn hōaⁿ, I ka-kī lâu teh kái-sàn kûn-chiòng." 
Matthew14:23 Kûn-chiòng sì-sòaⁿ liáu-āu, I ka-kī chiūⁿ-soaⁿ kî-tó. Thiⁿ àm ê sî, I iáu ka-kī chi̍t ê tī hia." 
Matthew14:24 Hit-sî, chûn í-keng lī hōaⁿ chin hn̄g, in-ūi chìⁿ-hong hō͘ éng poah-lâi-poah-khì." 
Matthew14:25 Thiⁿ beh kng ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn ǹg bûn-tô͘ hia kiâⁿ,khì." 
Matthew14:26 Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn teh kiâⁿ, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Sī kúi!” In kiaⁿ kah tōa-siaⁿ hoah,chhut-lâi." 
Matthew14:27 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî kā in kóng, “An-sim, sī góa, m̄-bián kiaⁿ!”" 
Matthew14:28 Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Chú ah, nā chin-chiàⁿ sī lí, bēng-lēng góa kiâⁿ chúi-bīn khì lí hia.”" 
Matthew14:29 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lâi!” Pí-tek chiū tùi chûn-téng lo̍h,lâi, kiâⁿ chúi-bīn khì Iâ-so͘ hia." 
Matthew14:30 Pí-tek chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h hong hiah-ni̍h tōa chiū kiaⁿ, soah beh tîm,lo̍h-khì, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chú ah, kiù,leh-o͘h!”" 
Matthew14:31 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî chhun-chhiú kā i khiú,teh, kóng, “Sió-sìn ê lâng, sī-án-chóaⁿ teh giâu-gî?”" 
Matthew14:32 In chiūⁿ-chûn, hong chiū tiām,khì." 
Matthew14:33 Chûn-téng ê lâng kūi lo̍h-khì pài I, kóng, “Lí chin-chiàⁿ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ!”" 
Matthew14:34 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ kè ô͘ liáu-āu, tī Kek-nî-sat-le̍k chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ." 
Matthew14:35 Hit só͘-chāi ê lâng chi̍t-ē jīn-chhut Iâ-so͘, chiū phài lâng khì sì-chiu-ûi kā só͘-ū ê pīⁿ-lâng lóng chhōa-lâi I hia." 
Matthew14:36 In khún-kiû Iâ-so͘ hō͘ pīⁿ-lâng kan-ta bong I saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu chiū hó; só͘-ū bong,tio̍h ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h i-hó. 
Matthew15:1 Ū Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, mn̄g I kóng," 
Matthew15:2 “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ bô seng sóe-chhiú chiū chia̍h-pn̄g, ûi-hoān kó͘-chá-lâng ê thoân-thóng?”" 
Matthew15:3 I ìn kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ in-ūi lín ê thoân-thóng lâi ûi-hoān Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng?" 
Matthew15:4 Siōng-tè kóng ‘Tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú’; koh kóng ‘Mē lāu-pē á-sī mē lāu-bú ê lâng eng-kai chhú-sí’. 
Matthew15:5 M̄-kú lín kóng, ‘Lâng nā tùi ka-kī ê lāu-pē á-sī lāu-bú kóng: Góa eng-kai hō͘ lí,ê í-keng hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè," 
Matthew15:6 i chiū bô su-iàu hàu-kèng lāu-pē.’ Án-ni, lín in-ūi ka-kī ê thoân-thóng hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê ōe." 
Matthew15:7 Lín ké-hó ê lâng, Í-sài-a só͘ kóng koan-hē lín ê ū-giân chin tio̍h; i kóng:" 
Matthew15:8 Chit-ê chú-bîn ēng chhùi-tûn chun-kèng góa, in ê sim khiok lī-khui góa hn̄g-hn̄g." 
Matthew15:9 In ēng lâng ê kui-lē chòe góa ê kà-sī kà-sī lâng; in kèng-pài góa lóng bô-chhái-kang.” 
Matthew15:10 Iâ-so͘ kiò chèng-lâng lâi, kā in kóng, “Tio̍h thiaⁿ, tio̍h liáu-kái:" 
Matthew15:11 M̄-sī tùi chhùi ji̍p,khì-ê hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì, sī tùi chhùi chhut,lâi-ê chiah hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì.”" 
Matthew15:12 Bûn-tô͘ lâi tùi I kóng, “Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí chit-ê ōe chin hoán-kám, lí chai,bô?”" 
Matthew15:13 I ìn kóng, “M̄-sī góa ê Thiⁿ-pē chai-chèng,ê, lóng beh kā i khau,khí-lâi." 
Matthew15:14 Chhut-chāi in kóng. In sī chhiⁿ-mî teh khan chhiⁿ-mî; nā chhiⁿ-mî khan chhiⁿ-mî, nn̄g ê lóng ōe poa̍h-lo̍h khut-á.”" 
Matthew15:15 Pí-tek ìn I kóng, “Chhiáⁿ lí kā goán kóe-seh chit-ê phì-jū.”" 
Matthew15:16 I chiū kóng, “Liân lín to iáu bô bêng-pe̍k o͘h?" 
Matthew15:17 Lín kiám bô liáu-kái, só͘-ū tùi chhùi ji̍p,ê lóng ji̍p-khì pak-tó͘ lāi, āu-lâi pàng lo̍h-khì piān-só͘?" 
Matthew15:18 Tùi chhùi chhut,lâi-ê sī tùi sim chhut, che chiah ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì." 
Matthew15:19 In-ūi tùi sim chhut,lâi-ê ū pháiⁿ liām-thâu, hiong-sat, su-thong, kan-îm, thau-the̍h, gūi-chèng, kap húi-pòng." 
Matthew15:20 Chiah-ê chiah ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì; bô sóe-chhiú chiū chia̍h-pn̄g, bōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì.”" 
Matthew15:21 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hit só͘-chāi, thè-khì Thài-ní kap Se-tùn ê kéng-lāi." 
Matthew15:22 Tú-hó ū chi̍t ê Ka-lâm ê hū-jîn-lâng tùi hit tōe-khu lâi, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chú ah, Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín góa! Góa ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ kúi hū-sin, chin kan-khó͘.”" 
Matthew15:23 Iâ-so͘ bô kā i ìn pòaⁿ-kù. I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi kiû I kóng, “Kā i kóaⁿ-cháu, i tè tī lán āu-bīn ti̍t-ti̍t teh hoah.”" 
Matthew15:24 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa siū chhe-phài chí-ū sī beh chhē Í-sek-lia̍t -ke sit-lo̍h ê iûⁿ.”" 
Matthew15:25 M̄-kú hū-jîn-lâng lâi kūi tī I ê bīn-chêng, kóng, “Chú ah, chhiáⁿ pang-chān góa!”" 
Matthew15:26 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “The̍h gín-á ê chia̍h-mi̍h hiat hō͘ káu-á chia̍h, m̄ hó.”" 
Matthew15:27 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Chú, sī lah, káu-á mā ū chia̍h chú-lâng toh-téng lak,lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ-iù-á.”" 
Matthew15:28 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng, lí ê sìn-sim chin tōa. Hō͘ lí ê sim-goān si̍t-hiān!” I ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tī hit-chūn chiū tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Matthew15:29 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hit só͘-chāi, iân Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ kiâⁿ, āu-lâi chiūⁿ-soaⁿ, tī hia chē." 
Matthew15:30 Ū chin tōa-tīn ê lâng chhōa kha-chhiú khê,khì, kha-pái, ba̍k-chiu bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chhùi bōe kóng-ōe, kap chin chōe ū pa̍t-khoán pīⁿ ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, hē tī I ê kha-chêng, I chiū kā in i-hó." 
Matthew15:31 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng ōe kóng-ōe, chhiú khê,khì ê lâng ho̍k-goân, kha-pái ê lâng ōe kiâⁿ, bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, chiū kui êng-kng hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè." 
Matthew15:32 Iâ-so͘ kiò I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi, kā in kóng, “Góa chin khó-lîn chit-tīn lâng, in-ūi in í-keng kap góa chòe-hé saⁿ ji̍t kú, hiān-chāi bô mi̍h thang chia̍h lah. Góa m̄-kam hō͘ in sì-sòaⁿ iau-iau tńg,khì, kiaⁿ-liáu in tī lō͘-tiong hūn-tó.”" 
Matthew15:33 Bûn-tô͘ kā I kóng, “Tī chit-ê phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi, goán beh khì tó-ūi the̍h hiah chōe piáⁿ lâi hō͘ chiah chōe lâng chia̍h?”" 
Matthew15:34 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in kóng, “Lín ū jōa-chōe piáⁿ?” In kóng, “Chhit ê; mā ū kúi-bé-á sòe bé hî.”" 
Matthew15:35 I bēng-lēng kûn-chiòng chē lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha," 
Matthew15:36 jiân-āu the̍h hit chhit ê piáⁿ kap hiah-ê hî, kám-siā, peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘, bûn-tô͘ chiū the̍h hō͘ kûn-chiòng." 
Matthew15:37 Chèng-lâng lóng chia̍h, chia̍h kàu pá; in khioh chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á, tóe-móa chhit láng." 
Matthew15:38 Chia̍h ê lâng, hū-jîn-lâng kap gín-á bô sǹg, kan-ta ta-po͘-lâng chiū ū sì-chheng." 
Matthew15:39 Iâ-so͘ kái-sàn kûn-chiòng liáu-āu, chiūⁿ-chûn khì Má-ka-tan tōe-khu." 
Matthew16:1 Ū Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘, iau-kiû I hō͘ in khòaⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi ê sîn-jiah." 
Matthew16:2 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Hông-hun ê sî, lín kóng ‘Bîn-á-chài ōe hó-thiⁿ, in-ūi thiⁿ-sek âng’." 
Matthew16:3 Chá-khí-sî lín kóng ‘Kin-á-ji̍t ū hong-hō͘, in-ūi thiⁿ-sek àm koh âng’. Lín to khòaⁿ ōe chhut thiⁿ ê kéng-siōng, ná khòaⁿ bōe chhut chit-ê sî-tāi ê tiāu-thâu." 
Matthew16:4 Siâ-ok kan-îm ê sè-tāi iau-kiû sîn-jiah; Iok-ná ê sîn-jiah í-gōa, bōe koh ū sîn-jiah hō͘ chit sè-tāi ê lâng.” Kóng-liáu, Iâ-so͘ chiū lī-khui in khì pa̍t-ūi." 
Matthew16:5 Bûn-tô͘ kàu ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ chiah chai in bōe-kì-tit tòa piáⁿ. 
Matthew16:6 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Tio̍h chù-ì, tio̍h tî-hông Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê kàⁿ.”" 
Matthew16:7 In hō͘-siōng gī-lūn kóng, “Sī in-ūi lán bô tòa piáⁿ sī,bô?”" 
Matthew16:8 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ chiū kóng, “Sió-sìn ê lâng, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ teh gī-lūn bô tòa piáⁿ ê tāi-chì?" 
Matthew16:9 Lín kiám iáu-bē bêng-pe̍k, kiám bōe-kì-tit góa ēng gō͘ ê piáⁿ hō͘ gō͘-chheng lâng chia̍h, chia̍h chhun,ê lín ū khioh kúi nâ?" 
Matthew16:10 Lín kiám bōe-kì-tit góa ēng chhit ê piáⁿ hō͘ sì-chheng lâng chia̍h, chia̍h chhun,ê lín ū khioh kúi láng?" 
Matthew16:11 Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín bô bêng-pe̍k góa kā lín kóng,ê m̄-sī koan-hē piáⁿ ê tāi-chì? Tio̍h tî-hông Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê kàⁿ!” 
Matthew16:12 Chit-sî bûn-tô͘ chiah bêng-pe̍k Iâ-so͘ m̄-sī kóng tio̍h tî-hông piáⁿ ê kàⁿ, sī tio̍h tî-hông Hoat-lī-sài-phài kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê kà-sī." 
Matthew16:13 Iâ-so͘ lâi kàu Khái-sat-lī-a Hui-li̍p-pí kéng-lāi ê sî, mn̄g I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lâng kóng Jîn-chú sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
Matthew16:14 In ìn kóng, “Ū lâng kóng sī Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān; ū lâng kóng sī Í-lī-a; mā ū lâng kóng sī Iâ-lī-bí á-sī sian-ti tiong ê chi̍t ūi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in kóng, “Lín leh, lín kóng góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
Matthew16:16 Se-bûn Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Lí sī Ki-tok, éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.”" 
Matthew16:17 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng, “ Se-bûn Pa-iok-ná, lí chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi kā lí khé-sī,ê m̄-sī lâng, sī góa ê Thiⁿ-pē." 
Matthew16:18 Góa koh kā lí kóng, lí sī Pí-tek, sī chio̍h-pôaⁿ, góa beh tī chit-ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ téng khí-chō góa ê kàu-hōe, Im-hú sí-bông ê koân-sè to bōe iâⁿ-kè i." 
Matthew16:19 Góa beh chiong Thian-kok ê só-sî hō͘ lí; lí tī tōe-chiūⁿ kìm-chí,ê, tī thiⁿ-téng mā ōe kìm-chí; lí tī tōe-chiūⁿ ún-chún,ê, tī thiⁿ-téng mā ōe ún-chún.”" 
Matthew16:20 Āu-lâi, I bēng-lēng bûn-tô͘ m̄-thang kā lâng kóng I chiū-sī Ki-tok." 
Matthew16:21 Hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ khai-sí tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ piáu-sī I it-tēng tio̍h khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, tùi tiúⁿ-ló, chè-si-tiúⁿ, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su siū chin chōe khó͘-lān, koh hō͘ lâng hāi-sí, tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ I koh-oa̍h." 
Matthew16:22 Pí-tek chiū khiú Iâ-so͘ khì piⁿ,á, kā I chek-pī kóng, “Chú ah, choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang! Lí bōe-ēng-tit ū chit-khoán tāi-chì!”" 
Matthew16:23 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t-tńg-sin tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Sat-tàn, siám-khui! Lí teh kā góa tîⁿ-kha-pòaⁿ-chhiú; lí siūⁿ,ê m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê sū, sī lâng ê sū.”" 
Matthew16:24 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Beh tè góa ê lâng, tio̍h oân-choân hó͘-tēng ka-kī, giâ ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè lâi tè góa." 
Matthew16:25 In-ūi beh kiù ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘ sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā."
