Matthew16:26 Lâng nā tit-tio̍h choân sè-kài soah sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek? Lâng ōe-tàng ēng sím-mi̍h tāi-kè lâi kau-ōaⁿ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā? 
Matthew16:27 Jîn-chú teh-beh tī I ê Pē ê êng-iāu tiong kap I ê thiⁿ-sài lâi-lîm, hit-sî I ōe chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê hêng-ûi kā in pò-siúⁿ á-sī hêng-hoa̍t." 
Matthew16:28 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, khiā tī chia ê lâng, ū-ê iáu-bē sí í-chêng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú choh-ông lâi-lîm.”" 
Matthew17:1 La̍k ji̍t āu, Iâ-so͘ chhōa Pí-tek, Ngá-kok, kap Ngá-kok ê sió-tī Iok-hān, kan-ta in ka-kī peh-chiūⁿ chi̍t chō koân soaⁿ." 
Matthew17:2 Tī in bīn-chêng, Iâ-so͘ ê hêng-siōng kái-piàn: I ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ ji̍t-thâu hoat-kng; I ê saⁿ piàn kah chhin-chhiūⁿ kng hiah-ni̍h pe̍h." 
Matthew17:3 Hut-jiân-kan, Mô͘-se kap Í-lī-a tùi in hián-hiān, kap Iâ-so͘ kóng-ōe." 
Matthew17:4 Pí-tek tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, lán tī chia chin hó! Lí nā beh, góa tī chia tah saⁿ keng liâu-á, chi̍t keng hō͘ lí, chi̍t keng hō͘ Mô͘-se, chi̍t keng hō͘ Í-lī-a.”" 
Matthew17:5 I iáu-teh kóng ê sî, hut-jiân ū chi̍t phìⁿ chhàn-lān ê hûn kā in tà,leh, ū siaⁿ tùi hûn chhut,lâi, kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, I, góa chin ì-ài, lín tio̍h thiaⁿ-thàn I.”" 
Matthew17:6 Bûn-tô͘ chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū phak,lo̍h-khì, hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Matthew17:7 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa,khì, kā in bong, kóng, “Khí,lâi, m̄-bián kiaⁿ!”" 
Matthew17:8 In chi̍t-ē gia̍h-ba̍k khòaⁿ, chí-ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, í-gōa bô pa̍t-lâng." 
Matthew17:9 In lo̍h-soaⁿ ê sî, Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in, kóng, “Jîn-chú tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h í-chêng, lín m̄-thang kā lâng kóng-khí só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê īⁿ-siōng.”" 
Matthew17:10 Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g I, kóng, “Nā án-ni, sī-án-chóaⁿ keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kóng Í-lī-a it-tēng tio̍h seng lâi?”" 
Matthew17:11 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “ Í-lī-a it-tēng tio̍h lâi têng-sin chéng-lí it-chhè." 
Matthew17:12 Góa kā lín kóng, Í-lī-a í-keng lâi lah, m̄-kú lâng m̄ bat i, hoán-tńg chiàu in ê ì-sù tùi-thāi i. Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, Jîn-chú mā teh-beh tī in ê chhiú-ē siū-khó͘.”" 
Matthew17:13 Hit-sî bûn-tô͘ chiah bêng-pe̍k I tùi in kóng,ê sī chí Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān. 
Matthew17:14 In lâi kàu kûn-chiòng hia, ū chi̍t ê lâng lâi, kūi tī Iâ-so͘ ê kha-chêng," 
Matthew17:15 tùi I kóng, “Chú ah, lîn-bín góa ê kiáⁿ! In-ūi i tì-tio̍h iûⁿ-hîn, hui-siông kan-khó͘, put-sî poa̍h-lo̍h hé, mā put-sî poa̍h-lo̍h chúi." 
Matthew17:16 Góa chhōa i khì lí ê bûn-tô͘ hia, in bô hoat-tō͘ kā i i-hó.”" 
Matthew17:17 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Ài ah, m̄-sìn koh hú-pāi ê sè-tāi, góa tio̍h kap lín tòa jōa kú? Góa tio̍h koh jím-nāi lín jōa kú? Kā i chhōa-lâi góa chia.”" 
Matthew17:18 Iâ-so͘ chek-pī kúi, kúi chiū tùi gín-á chhut,khì; i ê pīⁿ sûi-sî hó,khì." 
Matthew17:19 Āu-lâi, bûn-tô͘ su-hā lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ goán bô hoat-tō͘ kā kúi kóaⁿ,chhut-khì?”" 
Matthew17:20 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Sī in-ūi lín sió-sìn. Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín ê sìn-sim nā ū kòa-chhài-chí hiah tōa, lín tùi chit-chō soaⁿ kóng ‘Tùi chia sóa-khì hia’, soaⁿ mā ōe sóa,khì; bô chi̍t hāng sū lín chòe bōe kàu.”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Bûn-tô͘ chū-chi̍p tī Ka-lī-lī ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Jîn-chú teh-beh hō͘ lâng chhut-bōe." 
Matthew17:23 In ōe kā I hāi-sí, tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ I koh-oa̍h.” Bûn-tô͘ chiū hui-siông siong-sim." 
Matthew17:24 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu Ka-pek-lông ê sî, ū chi̍t-kóa siu sèng-tiān-sè ê lâng khì mn̄g Pí-tek, “Lín lāu-su ū la̍p sèng-tiān-sè bô?”" 
Matthew17:25 I kóng, “Ū.” Pí-tek ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi ê sî, Iâ-so͘ seng mn̄g i kóng, “Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông sī tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng siu koan-sè á-sī lâng-thâu-sè? Sī tùi pún-kok-lâng á-sī gōa-kok-lâng? Se-bûn, lí siūⁿ án-chóaⁿ?”" 
Matthew17:26 Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Tùi gōa-kok-lâng.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Án-ni, pún-kok-lâng chiū m̄-bián la̍p-sè lo͘h." 
Matthew17:27 Put-kò, lán ūi-tio̍h bô ài tek-chōe chiah-ê lâng, lí khì ô͘,ni̍h tiò hî, tiò,khí-lâi ê thâu chi̍t bé, kā hî ê chhùi peh-khui chiū ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê gûn-á, the̍h-khì hō͘ in, thòe góa kap lí la̍p sèng-tiān-sè.”" 
Matthew18:1 Hit-sî, bûn-tô͘ lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Tī Thian-kok sím-mi̍h-lâng siōng tōa?”" 
Matthew18:2 Iâ-so͘ kiò chi̍t ê gín-á lâi, hō͘ i khiā tī in tiong-kan," 
Matthew18:3 kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín nā bô kái-piàn pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á, choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng ji̍p Thian-kok." 
Matthew18:4 Só͘-í, lâng ka-kī khiam-pi chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-ê gín-á, chit-ê lâng tī Thian-kok chiū-sī siōng tōa." 
Matthew18:5 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ chiap-la̍p chit-khoán gín-á chiū-sī chiap-la̍p góa.”" 
Matthew18:6 “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ sìn góa ê lâng tiong-kan bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê hoān-chōe, lêng-khó hō͘ lâng ēng tōa chio̍h-bō pa̍k tī ām-kún thiām-lo̍h chhim-hái." 
Matthew18:7 Chit-ê sè-kan chhám ah, in-ūi ū hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó hoān-chōe. Hō͘ lâng hoān-chōe ê sū it-tēng ū, m̄-kú ín-khí lâng hoān-chōe ê lâng chhám ah." 
Matthew18:8 “Lí ê chi̍t ki chhiú á-sī chi̍t ki kha nā hō͘ lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h kā i chām khí-lâi tàn hiat-ka̍k. Lêng-khó chi̍t-kha chi̍t-chhiú ji̍p éng-oán-oa̍h, pí siang-kha siang-chhiú hó-hó hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h éng-oán ê hé khah hó." 
Matthew18:9 Lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā hō͘ lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h kā i ó͘ chhut-lâi tàn hiat-ka̍k. Lêng-khó kiám chi̍t lúi ba̍k-chiu ji̍p éng-oán-oa̍h, pí nn̄g lúi ba̍k-chiu hó-hó, hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h hé teh to̍h ê tōe-ge̍k khah hó.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Lín tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang khòaⁿ-khin chiah-ê bî-sòe ê lâng ê chi̍t ê. Góa kā lín kóng, in ê thiⁿ-sài tī thiⁿ-téng sî-siông teh kìⁿ góa Thiⁿ-pē ê bīn." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 “Lín siūⁿ siáⁿ-khoán? Ū chi̍t ê lâng ū chi̍t-pah chiah iûⁿ, kî-tiong chi̍t chiah sit-bê, i kiám bōe chiong káu-cha̍p-káu chiah pàng tī soaⁿ-téng, khì chhē hit-chiah sit-bê,ê?" 
Matthew18:13 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, i nā chhē-tio̍h hit-chiah sit-bê ê iûⁿ, it-tēng chin hoaⁿ-hí, pí ū káu-cha̍p-káu chiah bô sit-bê,ê koh-khah hoaⁿ-hí." 
Matthew18:14 Siâng-khoán, lín ê Thiⁿ-pē m̄-kam chiah-ê bî-sòe ê lâng ê chi̍t ê bia̍t-bông.”" 
Matthew18:15 “Lí ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē nā tek-chōe lí, tio̍h khì chhē i, kan-ta lín nn̄g lâng chòe-hé ê sî su-hā kā i chí-chhut chhò-gō͘. I nā beh thiaⁿ, chiū hôe-ho̍k lí kap i chòe hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê koan-hē." 
Matthew18:16 I nā m̄ thiaⁿ, tio̍h chhōa chi̍t nn̄g ê lâng kap lí khì, án-ni ta̍k-kù ōe ū nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê lâng thang choh-chèng." 
Matthew18:17 I nā iáu m̄ thiaⁿ, tio̍h kā kàu-hōe kóng; i nā liân kàu-hōe to m̄ thiaⁿ, chiū kā i khòaⁿ-chòe Gōa-pang-lâng á-sī ba̍uh-sè,ê.”" 
Matthew18:18 “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín tī tōe-chiūⁿ kìm-chí,ê, tī thiⁿ-téng mā ōe kìm-chí; lín tī tōe-chiūⁿ ún-chún,ê, tī thiⁿ-téng mā ōe ún-chún." 
Matthew18:19 “Góa koh kā lín kóng, lín tiong-kan nā ū nn̄g ê lâng tī tōe-chiūⁿ tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì kî-kiû, góa ê Thiⁿ-pē lóng ōe kā in sêng-choân." 
Matthew18:20 In-ūi, ū nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê lâng hōng góa ê miâ chū-hōe, góa chiū tī in tiong-kan.”" 
Matthew18:21 Pí-tek lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Chú ah, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē tek-chōe góa, góa tio̍h sià-bián i kúi piàn? Kàu chhit piàn sī,bô?”" 
Matthew18:22 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “M̄-sī. Góa m̄-sī kā lí kóng tio̍h kàu chhit piàn, sī tio̍h kàu chhit-cha̍p ê chhit piàn." 
Matthew18:23 “Án-ni, Thian-kok thang ēng chit-ê phì-jū lâi soat-bêng: Ū chi̍t ê kok-ông beh kap i ê po̍k-jîn kiat-siàu," 
Matthew18:24 i khai-sí sǹg-siàu ê sî, ū lâng chiong khiàm kúi-nā pah-bān gûn-á ê lâng chhōa-lâi i ê bīn-chêng." 
Matthew18:25 Hit-ê lâng bōe-tàng hêng, chú-lâng chiū bēng-lēng lâng chiong hit-ê lâng kap i ê bó͘-kiáⁿ í-ki̍p it-chhè só͘ ū,ê lóng khì bōe lâi hêng-chè." 
Matthew18:26 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn chiū kūi lo̍h-khì kiû kóng, ‘Chhiáⁿ hō͘ góa ān chi̍t-ē, góa ōe lóng hêng.’" 
Matthew18:27 Po̍k-jîn ê chú-lâng chiū khó-lîn i, chhat-siau i ê chè, pàng i khì." 
Matthew18:28 “Hit-ê po̍k-jîn chhut,khì, tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn,ê, hit-ê lâng chí-ū khiàm i kúi ê gûn-á, chiū kā i lia̍h,teh, tīⁿ i ê ām-kún, kóng, ‘Lí só͘ khiàm,ê, lóng tio̍h hêng!’" 
Matthew18:29 Pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn,ê kūi lo̍h-khì kiû i kóng, ‘Pài-thok hō͘ góa ān chi̍t-ē, góa ōe lóng hêng.’" 
Matthew18:30 I m̄-khéng, tian-tò chiong chit-ê lâng koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, koaiⁿ kàu só͘ khiàm,ê lóng hêng chheng-chhó." 
Matthew18:31 Lēng-gōa pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn,ê khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hui-siông thòng-sim, chiū chiong só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ê tāi-chì khì kā chú-lâng pò-kò." 
Matthew18:32 Chú-lâng chiū kiò hit-ê po̍k-jîn lâi, tùi i kóng, ‘Lí chit-ê pháiⁿ po̍k-jîn, in-ūi lí tùi góa kiû, góa chiū chiong lí só͘ khiàm ê chè lóng chhat-siau." 
Matthew18:33 Góa ū lîn-bín lí, lí kiám m̄ eng-kai chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni lîn-bín hit-ê pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn,ê?’" 
Matthew18:34 I ê chú-lâng chin siū-khì, chiū kā i koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ siū-hêng, koaiⁿ kàu i chiong it-chhè ê chè-bū lóng hêng chheng-chhó." 
Matthew18:35 “Lín ta̍k-ê lâng nā bô tùi sim-tóe sià-bián ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, góa ê Thiⁿ-pē mā ōe án-ni tùi-thāi lín, bōe kā lín sià-bián.”" 
Matthew19:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, lī-khui Ka-lī-lī khì Iok-tàn-hô tùi-hōaⁿ ê Iû-thài tōe-khu." 
Matthew19:2 Ū kui tōa-tīn ê lâng tè I, I chiū tī hia i-hó in ê pīⁿ." 
Matthew19:3 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng lâi chhì-thàm I, kóng, “Lâng bô-lūn sím-mi̍h lí-iû to thang lî i ê bó͘, ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô?”" 
Matthew19:4 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín kiám bô tha̍k-tio̍h Chhòng-chō-chú tī khí-thâu chhòng-chō lâng ū lâm ū lú?" 
Matthew19:5 Siōng-tè kóng, ‘In-ūi chit-ê lí-iû, lâng ōe lī-khui pē-bú, kap i ê bó͘ kiat-ha̍p, nn̄g lâng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé.’" 
Matthew19:6 Án-ni, in í-keng m̄-sī nn̄g ê, sī chi̍t-thé. Só͘-í, Siōng-tè só͘ phòe-ha̍p,ê, lâng m̄-thang thiah-khui.”" 
Matthew19:7 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng mn̄g I kóng, “Nā án-ni, Mô͘-se sī-án-chóaⁿ bēng-lēng lâng hō͘ i ê bó͘ chi̍t tiuⁿ lî-hun-su chiū thang kā i lî?”" 
Matthew19:8 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “In-ūi lín ê sim ngī, Mô͘-se chiah iông-ún lín lî lín ê bó͘. Khí-thâu chhòng-chō ê sî Siōng-tè ê ì-sù pèng m̄-sī án-ni." 
Matthew19:9 Góa kā lín kóng, nā m̄-sī in-ūi bó͘ put-cheng, bōe-ēng-tit kā i lî, nā kā i lî koh chhōa pa̍t-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī hoān kan-îm.”" 
Matthew19:10 Bûn-tô͘ kā I kóng, “Kì-jiân hu-hū ê koan-hē sī án-ni, lêng-khó mài kiat-hun khah hó.”" 
Matthew19:11 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Chit-ê ōe m̄-sī ta̍k-ê lâng lóng ōe-tàng chiap-siū, chí-ū ū chit-khoán un-sù ê lâng chiah ōe." 
Matthew19:12 Ū lâng tùi chhut-sì chiū bô sek-ha̍p kiat-hun; ū lâng sī jîn-ûi ê goân-in bōe-tàng kiat-hun; mā ū lâng sī ūi-tio̍h Thian-kok ê iân-kò͘ bô ài kiat-hun. Ōe-tàng chiap-siū ê lâng tio̍h chiap-siū.” 
Matthew19:13 Ū lâng chhōa gín-á lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, ài I kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú kî-tó. Bûn-tô͘ chek-pī hiah-ê lâng." 
Matthew19:14 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Hō͘ gín-á lâi góa chia, m̄-thang kā in chó͘-tòng, in-ūi Thian-kok sī chit-khoán lâng ê.”" 
Matthew19:15 I chiū kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú chiok-hok, jiân-āu lī-khui hia." 
Matthew19:16 Ū chi̍t piàn, ū chi̍t ê lâng lâi chhē Iâ-so͘, tùi I kóng, “Lāu-su, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h hó-sū chiah ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā?”" 
Matthew19:17 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí ná ōe mn̄g góa koan-hē hó ê sū? Chí-ū Chi̍t-ūi sī hó. Lí nā ài chìn-ji̍p éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā, tio̍h chun-siú kài-bēng.”" 
Matthew19:18 I mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Sī tó chi̍t tiâu kài-bēng?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “M̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang choh gūi-chèng;" 
Matthew19:19 tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú; tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī.” 
Matthew19:20 Chit-ê siàu-liân-lâng kā I kóng, “Chiah-ê góa it-ti̍t ū teh chun-siú, iáu khiàm sím-mi̍h?”" 
Matthew19:21 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí nā ài chòe oân-choân ê lâng, lí khì, khì bōe lí ê châi-sán, pun hō͘ sàn-chhiah-lâng, lí tī thiⁿ-téng chiū ū châi-pó, jiân-āu lâi tè góa.”" 
Matthew19:22 Siàu-liân-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe, chiū iu-iu-chhiû-chhiû lī-khui; in-ūi i châi-sán chin chōe." 
Matthew19:23 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Thian-kok si̍t-chāi chin khùn-lân!" 
Matthew19:24 Góa koh kā lín kóng, lo̍k-tô chhng-kè chiam-phīⁿ mā pí hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok koh-khah kán-tan.”" 
Matthew19:25 Bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Nā án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h kiù?”" 
Matthew19:26 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k kā in khòaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê sū, lâng chòe bōe kàu, m̄-kú Siōng-tè ta̍k-hāng lóng ōe.”" 
Matthew19:27 Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Goán í-keng pàng-sak it-chhè lâi tè lí lah, goán ōe tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h?”" 
Matthew19:28 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chiong-lâi ê sin sè-kài, Jîn-chú chē tī I êng-kng ê pó-chō ê sî, lín tè góa ê lâng ōe chē tī cha̍p-jī ê pó-chō lâi sím-phòaⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t ê cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k." 
Matthew19:29 Ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ pàng-sak ka-kī ê chhù, hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, pē-bú, kiáⁿ-jî, á-sī chhân-hn̂g ê lâng, lóng ōe tit-tio̍h pah-pē ê pò-siúⁿ, koh sêng-siū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Matthew19:30 Chóng-sī chin chōe chòe thâu-chêng,ê ōe chòe siōng lō͘-bé; siōng lō͘-bé,ê ōe chòe siōng thâu-chêng.” 
Matthew20:1 “Thian-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t ê hn̂g-chú thàu-chá chhut-khì chhiàⁿ kang-lâng lâi i ê phû-tô-hn̂g chòe kang. 
Matthew20:2 I kap kang-lâng iok-tēng chi̍t ji̍t chi̍t ê gûn, chiū chhe in khì phû-tô-hn̂g chòe kang." 
Matthew20:3 Chá-khí-sî káu tiám chó-iū i koh chhut,khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chi̍t-kóa lâng tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu teh khiā, bô tāi-chì chòe," 
Matthew20:4 chiū tùi in kóng, ‘Lín mā khì phû-tô-hn̂g chòe kang, góa ōe hō͘ lín kong-tō ê kang-chîⁿ.’" 
Matthew20:5 In chiū khì. Tiong-tàu cha̍p-jī tiám kap ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám chó-iū i koh chhut,khì, mā án-ni chòe." 
Matthew20:6 Ē-po͘ gō͘ tiám, i koh chhut,khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chi̍t-kóa lâng khiā tī hia, chiū tùi in kóng, ‘Lín ná kui-ji̍t khiā tī chia, bô tāi-chì chòe?’" 
Matthew20:7 In kā i kóng, ‘In-ūi bô lâng chhiàⁿ goán.’ Chú-lâng kā in kóng, ‘Lín mā khì phû-tô-hn̂g chòe kang.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Hông-hun ê sî, hn̂g-chú kā i ê koán-ke kóng, ‘Lí khì kiò kang-lâng lâi, hoat kang-chîⁿ hō͘ in, tùi lō͘-bé lâi,ê seng hoat, jiân-āu chiah hoat hō͘ tāi-seng lâi,ê.’" 
Matthew20:9 Hiah-ê ē-po͘ gō͘ tiám chiah lâi,ê, ta̍k-ê lâng niá-tio̍h chi̍t ê gûn." 
Matthew20:10 Tāi-seng lâi choh-kang ê lâng siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī ōe niá khah chōe, m̄-kú ta̍k-ê lâng mā chí-ū niá chi̍t ê gûn." 
Matthew20:11 In niá liáu, tùi chú-lâng bâi-oàn," 
Matthew20:12 kóng, ‘Chiah-ê chòe-āu lâi ê lâng chí-ū chòe chi̍t tiám-cheng nā-tiāⁿ, goán hō͘ ji̍t-thâu pha̍k kui-ji̍t, lô-khó͘ kang-chok, lí kèng-jiân hō͘ in kap goán niá pîⁿ chōe!’" 
Matthew20:13 Chú-lâng ìn kî-tiong chi̍t ê lâng kóng, ‘Pêng-iú, góa tùi lí m̄-sī bô kong-tō. Lí kiám m̄-sī kap góa iok-tēng chi̍t ji̍t chi̍t ê gûn?" 
Matthew20:14 The̍h lí ê kang-chîⁿ, tńg,khì! Góa beh hō͘ siōng-bé lâi,ê kap lí niá pîⁿ chōe." 
Matthew20:15 Góa ēng ka-kī ê mi̍h chòe góa ài chòe,ê kiám bōe-ēng,tit? Góa khóng-khài, lí teh ba̍k-kháng-chhiah sī,bô?’" 
Matthew20:16 “Án-ni, siōng lō͘-bé,ê ōe chòe tē-it; tē-it,ê ōe chòe siōng lō͘-bé.”" 
Matthew20:17 Iâ-so͘ tī chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lō͘-tiong kiò cha̍p-jī ê bûn-tô͘ lâi, su-hā tùi in kóng," 
Matthew20:18 “Taⁿ lán beh chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Jîn-chú ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ōe kā I tēng sí-chōe," 
Matthew20:19 āu-lâi chiong I kau hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, kā I hì-lāng, piⁿ-phah, tèng si̍p-jī-kè; tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ I koh-oa̍h.”" 
Matthew20:20 Hit-sî, Se-pì-thài ê bó͘ chhōa i nn̄g ê kiáⁿ lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, kūi lo̍h-khì I bīn-chêng, kiû chi̍t hāng tāi-chì." 
Matthew20:21 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i kóng, “Lí ài sím-mi̍h?” I ìn kóng, “Lí choh-ông ê sî, chhiáⁿ lí hō͘ góa chit nn̄g ê kiáⁿ chi̍t ê chē lí ê chiàⁿ-pêng, chi̍t ê chē lí ê tò-pêng.”" 
Matthew20:22 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín m̄ chai ka-kī teh kiû sím-mi̍h. Góa teh-beh lim ê poe, lín ōe-tàng lim bōe?” In kóng, “Goán ōe.”" 
Matthew20:23 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa ê poe lín beh lim, put-kò chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng tò-pêng m̄-sī góa ōe-tàng hō͘ lâng,ê. Góa ê Pē ūi-tio̍h sím-mi̍h-lâng chún-pī chiū hō͘ hit-ê lâng.”" 
Matthew20:24 Kî-tha hit cha̍p ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū tùi hit nn̄g ê hiaⁿ-tī siū-khì." 
Matthew20:25 Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi, kā in kóng, “Lín chai Gōa-pang-lâng ū thóng-tī-chiá teh kā in koán-hat, ū léng-siù teh kā in chi-phòe." 
Matthew20:26 Lín tiong-kan chiū m̄ eng-kai án-ni. Lín tiong-kan ài chòe tōa,ê tio̍h chòe lín ê chhe-ēng; 
Matthew20:27 ài chòe tē-it,ê, tio̍h chòe lín ê po̍k-jîn;" 
Matthew20:28 tú chhin-chhiūⁿ Jîn-chú lâi, m̄-sī beh hō͘ lâng ho̍k-sāi, hoán-tńg sī beh kā lâng ho̍k-sāi, sīm-chì hi-seng ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā lâi sio̍k-hôe chin chōe lâng.”" 
Matthew20:29 In lī-khui Iâ-lī-ko ê sî, ū chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng tè Iâ-so͘ khì." 
Matthew20:30 Tú ū nn̄g ê bông-jîn chē tī lō͘-piⁿ, thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tùi hia keng-kè, chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín goán!”" 
Matthew20:31 Kûn-chiòng kā in chek-pī, kiò in tiām-tiām, m̄-kú in koh-khah tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chú — Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín goán!”" 
Matthew20:32 Iâ-so͘ thêng-kha, kiò in, kóng, “Lín ài góa kā lín chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
Matthew20:33 In kóng, “Chú ah, goán ài ba̍k-chiu ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ.”" 
Matthew20:34 Iâ-so͘ khó-lîn in, bong in ê ba̍k-chiu, in sûi-sî koh ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chiū tè I khì." 
Matthew21:1 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, lâi kàu Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ hù-kūn ê Pek-hoat-kî. Hit-sî I chhe nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘," 
Matthew21:2 kā in kóng, “Lín khì tùi-bīn ê chng-siā, kàu hia sûi-sî ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah lû pa̍k,teh, koh ū chi̍t chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ kap i tī hia; lín kā in tháu-khui, khan-lâi góa chia." 
Matthew21:3 Nā ū lâng tùi lín kóng sím-mi̍h, lín chiū kóng, ‘Chú beh ēng in.’ Hit-ê lâng ōe sûi-sî chún lín khan,lâi.”" 
Matthew21:4 Chit-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng sī beh èng-giām Siōng-tè thong-kè sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe: 
Matthew21:5 Tio̍h kā Sek-an ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng: Khòaⁿ leh, lín ê Ông beh lâi lín chia; I khiam-sùn khiâ lû-á, khiâ lû-á-kiáⁿ." 
Matthew21:6 Bûn-tô͘ chiū khì, chiàu Iâ-so͘ ê chí-sī khì chòe." 
Matthew21:7 In khan lû-á kap lû-á-kiáⁿ lâi, chiong gōa-saⁿ phoa̍h tī in téng-bīn, Iâ-so͘ chiū peh-khí-khì khiâ." 
Matthew21:8 Tōa-pō͘-hūn ê kûn-chiòng chiong in ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ pho͘ tī lō͘,ni̍h, mā ū lâng chhò chhiū-oe pho͘ tī lō͘,ni̍h kā I hoan-gêng." 
Matthew21:9 Chêng-kiâⁿ-āu-tè ê kûn-chiòng hoah kóng: Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, hô-sàn-ná! Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè, hô-sàn-ná!" 
Matthew21:10 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē chìn-ji̍p Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, choân-siâⁿ lóng hán,khí-lâi, kóng, “Chit-ê sī siáⁿ-lâng?”" 
Matthew21:11 Chèng-lâng kóng, “Chit-ê sī tùi Ka-lī-lī ê Ná-sat-le̍k lâi ê sian-ti Iâ-so͘.”" 
Matthew21:12 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, chiong tiān-lāi só͘-ū teh bóe-bōe ê lâng lóng kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, koh chhia-tó ōaⁿ-chîⁿ ê lâng ê toh kap bōe hún-chiáu ê lâng ê í." 
Matthew21:13 I tùi in kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa ê chhù beh kiò-chòe kî-tó ê tiān, lín soah kā i pìⁿ-chòe thó͘-húi-á khut.”" 
Matthew21:14 Ū bông-jîn kap kha-pái ê lâng lâi Sèng-tiān chhē Iâ-so͘, I chiū kā in i-hó." 
Matthew21:15 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ kiâⁿ ê kî-sū, koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ sòe-hàn gín-á tī Sèng-tiān tōa-siaⁿ hoah “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, hô-sàn-ná”, chiū chin siū-khì," 
Matthew21:16 kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h in teh hoah sím-mi̍h bô?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Ū. Lín kiám bô tha̍k-tio̍h Sèng-keng ê ōe: Lí hō͘ gín-á kap eⁿ-á ê chhùi tōa-siaⁿ chhiùⁿ-chhut o-ló.”" 
Matthew21:17 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ lī-khui in, chhut-siâⁿ khì Pek-tāi-nî, tī hia kè-mî." 
Matthew21:18 Keh-chá-khí, beh tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî, Iâ-so͘ pak-tó͘ iau." 
Matthew21:19 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h lō͘-piⁿ ū chi̍t châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū, chiū kiâⁿ óa,khì, m̄-kú chhiū-téng lóng bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h pòaⁿ-hāng, chí-ū hio̍h nā-tiāⁿ. I tùi hit-châng chhiū kóng, “Lí éng-oán bōe koh kiat ké-chí.” Hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū sûi-sî ta,khì." 
Matthew21:20 Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū ná ōe hut-jiân-kan ta,khì?”" 
Matthew21:21 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín nā ū sìn-sim, bô giâu-gî, m̄-nā ōe-tàng chòe góa tùi chit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì, sīm-chì bēng-lēng chit-chō soaⁿ kóng ‘Khí,lâi, khì thiām-hái’ mā it-tēng ōe si̍t-hiān." 
Matthew21:22 Kî-tó ê sî, lín só͘ kiû ê it-chhè, ū sìn chiū ōe tit,tio̍h.”" 
Matthew21:23 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī lâng ê sî, chè-si-tiúⁿ kap bîn-kan ê tiúⁿ-ló lâi I hia, tùi I kóng, “Lí khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ lí chit-ê koân-pèng?”" 
Matthew21:24 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa mā beh mn̄g lín chi̍t kù ōe, lín nā kā góa ìn, góa chiah kā lín kóng góa khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì." 
Matthew21:25 Iok-hān kā lâng sóe-lé ê koân-pèng tùi tó-ūi lâi, sī tùi Thiⁿ á-sī tùi lâng?” In hō͘-siōng gī-lūn kóng, “Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi Thiⁿ’, I ōe kā lán kóng ‘Án-ni, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ bô sìn Iok-hān?’" 
Matthew21:26 Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi lâng’, khióng-kiaⁿ kûn-chiòng hoán-kám, in-ūi in lóng siūⁿ-kóng Iok-hān sī sian-ti.”" 
Matthew21:27 In chiū ìn Iâ-so͘, “Goán m̄ chai.” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Án-ni, góa mā m̄ kā lín kóng góa khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì.”" 
Matthew21:28 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín siūⁿ án-chóaⁿ? Ū chi̍t ê lâng ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ; i khì kā tōa-kiáⁿ kóng, ‘Kiáⁿ ah, lí kin-á-ji̍t khì phû-tô-hn̂g chòe kang.’" 
Matthew21:29 Tōa-kiáⁿ ìn kóng ‘Góa m̄ khì’, āu-lâi kái-piàn sim-ì ū khì." 
Matthew21:30 Lāu-pē mā khì kā tē-jī kiáⁿ kóng siâng-khoán ê ōe. Tē-jī kiáⁿ ìn kóng ‘A-pa, góa lâi-khì’, āu-lâi bô khì." 
Matthew21:31 Chit nn̄g ê kiáⁿ tó chi̍t ê ū chiàu lāu-pē ê ì-sù khì chòe?” In kóng, “Tōa-kiáⁿ.” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chhiong-ki ōe pí lín seng chìn-ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok." 
Matthew21:32 In-ūi Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān lâi lín chia, chí-sī lín kiâⁿ chiàⁿ-lō͘, lín bô sìn i, m̄-kú ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chhiong-ki ū sìn. Sīm-chì lín khòaⁿ,tio̍h liáu-āu mā bô hóe-kái lâi sìn i.”" 
Matthew21:33 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín koh thiaⁿ chi̍t ê phì-jū. Ū chi̍t ê hn̂g-chú khai-khún chi̍t khu phû-tô-hn̂g, sì-bīn ûi lî-pa, lāi-bīn ó͘ chi̍t ê chiú-khut, khí chi̍t ê siú-bōng-tâi, chiong chit-khu hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ tiān-lông, āu-lâi chhut-gōa khì chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi." 
Matthew21:34 Siu-sêng ké-chí ê sî kàu, hn̂g-chú chhe po̍k-jîn khì tiān-lông hia, beh tùi in siu ké-chí." 
Matthew21:35 Tiān-lông kā chiah-ê po̍k-jîn lia̍h,khí-lâi, chi̍t ê kā i phah, chi̍t ê kā i thâi,sí, chi̍t ê ēng chio̍h-thâu kā i tìm,sí." 
Matthew21:36 Hn̂g-chú koh chhe lēng-gōa chi̍t-kóa po̍k-jîn khì, pí thâu chi̍t piàn khah chōe lâng. Tiān-lông mā chiàu án-ni tùi-thāi in." 
Matthew21:37 Chòe-āu, hn̂g-chú chhe ka-kī ê kiáⁿ khì in hia, siūⁿ-kóng ‘In ōe chun-tiōng góa ê kiáⁿ’." 
Matthew21:38 M̄-kú tiān-lông chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê kiáⁿ chiū chham-siông kóng, ‘Chit-ê sī i ê kè-sêng-jîn. Lâi, lán lâi kā thâi,sí, thang tit i ê châi-sán!’" 
Matthew21:39 In chiū kā i lia̍h,khí-lâi, hiat chhut-khì phû-tô-hn̂g ê gōa-bīn, kā i thâi,sí." 
Matthew21:40 “Án-ni, phû-tô-hn̂g ê chú-lâng tò,lâi ê sî ōe án-chóaⁿ chhú-lí hiah-ê tiān-lông?”" 
Matthew21:41 In kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “I it-tēng ōe chiong hiah-ê pháiⁿ-lâng thiat-tóe siau-bia̍t, chiong phû-tô-hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ pa̍t-ê ōe chiàu kùi-chiat la̍p ké-chí-cho͘ ê tiān-lông.”" 
Matthew21:42 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h, í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h. Che sī Chú ê chok-ûi, tùi lán lâi khòaⁿ si̍t-chāi chin kî-biāu!" 
Matthew21:43 “Só͘-í, góa kā lín kóng, Siōng-tè ōe chiong Siōng-tè-kok tùi lín chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi, kau hō͘ ōe kiat ké-chí ê lâng." 
Matthew21:44 Hit-ê siak lo̍h-khì chit-tè chio̍h-thâu téng ê lâng, ōe siak kah chhùi-kut-hun-si; hō͘ hit-tè chio̍h-thâu teh,tio̍h ê lâng, ōe teh kah chhùi-kô͘-kô͘. ”" 
Matthew21:45 Chiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê phì-jū, chai-iáⁿ I sī teh kóng in." 
Matthew21:46 In chiū chhē khang-phāng beh kā I lia̍h, m̄-kú kiaⁿ kûn-chiòng, in-ūi in khòaⁿ I sī sian-ti." 
Matthew22:1 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū kā in kóng: 
Matthew22:2 “Thian-kok thang phì-jū chòe chi̍t ê kok-ông kā i ê kiáⁿ pān hun-iàn. 
Matthew22:3 I chhe po̍k-jîn khì kiò só͘ chhiáⁿ ê lâng-kheh lâi hù hun-iàn, put-kò in m̄ lâi." 
Matthew22:4 Kok-ông koh chhe kî-tha ê po̍k-jîn, kā in kóng, ‘Lín khì kā hiah-ê siū iau-chhiáⁿ ê lâng kóng, góa ê iàn-se̍k í-keng chún-pī hó-sè; góa ê gû kap pûi ê gû-á-kiáⁿ mā í-keng thâi, it-chhè lóng chún-pī hó-sè lah, chhiáⁿ lín lâi hù hun-iàn.’" 
Matthew22:5 M̄-kú hiah-ê siū iau-chhiáⁿ ê lâng bô khòaⁿ-chòe iàu-kín, chòe in khì; chi̍t ê khì hn̂g,ni̍h chòe kang; chi̍t ê khì chòe seng-lí;" 
Matthew22:6 kî-tha,ê lia̍h i ê po̍k-jîn, kā in lêng-jio̍k, sòa kā in thâi-sí." 
Matthew22:7 Kok-ông hui-siông siū-khì, chiū phài peng khì châu-bia̍t hiah-ê hiong-siú, pàng-hé sio in ê siâⁿ." 
Matthew22:8 Jiân-āu i kā po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Hun-iàn chún-pī hó lah, m̄-kú só͘ iau-chhiáⁿ,ê lóng put-phòe hō͘ lán chhiáⁿ." 
Matthew22:9 Só͘-í, lín khì koe-lō͘-kháu, tú,tio̍h ê lâng lóng kā in chhiáⁿ-lâi hù hun-iàn.’" 
Matthew22:10 Hiah-ê po̍k-jîn chiū chhut-khì koe,ni̍h, tú,tio̍h-ê bô-lūn hó-lâng pháiⁿ-lâng lóng kā in chhiáⁿ,lâi; hun-iàn ê só͘-chāi lâng-kheh chiū chē kàu móa-móa." 
Matthew22:11 “Kok-ông ji̍p,lâi khòaⁿ hiah-ê lâng-kheh, khòaⁿ-tio̍h tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng bô chhēng hun-iàn ê lé-ho̍k," 
Matthew22:12 chiū kā i mn̄g, ‘Pêng-iú ah, lí ji̍p-lâi chia ná bô chhēng hun-iàn ê lé-ho̍k?’ Hit-ê lâng lóng bô ìn." 
Matthew22:13 Kok-ông chiū tùi chhe-ēng,ê kóng, ‘Kha-chhiú kā pa̍k,khí-lâi, kā i hiat chhut-khì gōa-bīn o͘-àm ê só͘-chāi. Tī hia, i ōe thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Siū ho͘-tiàu,ê chin chōe, m̄-kú siū kéng-soán,ê chin chió.”" 
Matthew22:15 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhut,khì, chòe-hé chham-siông beh án-chóaⁿ lia̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe-phāng thang kā I hām-hāi." 
Matthew22:16 In chhe ka-kī ê bûn-tô͘ kap Hi-lu̍t-tóng ê lâng khì Iâ-so͘ hia, tùi I kóng, “Lāu-su, goán chai lí chin sêng-si̍t, chiàu-si̍t chiong Siōng-tè ê tō-lí kà-sī lâng, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h khoán lâng, lí tùi-thāi in lóng bô chha-pia̍t." 
Matthew22:17 La̍p-sè hō͘ Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô? Chhiáⁿ kā goán kóng lí ê siūⁿ-hoat siáⁿ-khoán.” 
Matthew22:18 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ in ê ok-ì, chiū tùi in kóng, “Ké-hó ê lâng, sī-án-chóaⁿ beh kā góa chhì-thàm?" 
Matthew22:19 The̍h chi̍t ê la̍p-sè ê gûn-pè hō͘ góa khòaⁿ.” In chiū the̍h chi̍t ê gûn-pè hō͘ I. 
Matthew22:20 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Che sī sím-mi̍h-lâng ê siōng, sím-mi̍h-lâng ê jī-hō?”" 
Matthew22:21 In kóng, “Khái-sat ê.” Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng, “Án-ni, Khái-sat ê mi̍h hō͘ Khái-sat; Siōng-tè ê mi̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè.”" 
Matthew22:22 In thiaⁿ-liáu chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, chiū lī-khui." 
Matthew22:23 Siâng hit-ji̍t, chi̍t-kóa chú-tiuⁿ bô koh-oa̍h ê Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, mn̄g I kóng," 
Matthew22:24 “Lāu-su, Mô͘-se kóng, ‘Ū lâng bô siⁿ-kiáⁿ chiū sí,khì, sió-tī tio̍h chhōa hiaⁿ-só thòe hiaⁿ-ko thoân-chong-chiap-tāi.’" 
Matthew22:25 Í-chêng goán chia bat ū chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī; siōng-tōa,ê kiat-hun, bô lâu hō͘-tāi chiū sí,khì, pàng bó͘ hō͘ sió-tī." 
Matthew22:26 Tē-jī,ê, tē-saⁿ,ê, kàu tē-chhit,ê lóng siâng-khoán." 
Matthew22:27 In lóng sí liáu-āu, hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng mā sí,khì." 
Matthew22:28 Án-ni, koh-oa̍h ê sî, chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī chit chhit ê lâng tiong-kan tó chi̍t ê ê bó͘? In-ūi in lóng bat chhōa i.”" 
Matthew22:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín m̄-tio̍h. Lín m̄ bat Sèng-keng, mā m̄ bat Siōng-tè ê koân-lêng." 
Matthew22:30 In-ūi koh-oa̍h ê sî, in kap thiⁿ-téng ê thiⁿ-sài siâng-khoán, bô kè bô chhōa." 
Matthew22:31 Koan-hē sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū, lín kiám bô tha̍k-tio̍h Siōng-tè tùi lín kóng ê ōe:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Góa chiū-sī A-pek-la-hán ê Siōng-tè, Í-sat ê Siōng-tè, Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè’? I m̄-sī sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè, sī oa̍h-lâng ê Siōng-tè.”" 
Matthew22:33 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h, tùi I ê kà-sī kám-kak chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Matthew22:34 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ hō͘ Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng bô ōe thang ìn, chiū chū-chi̍p chòe-hé." 
Matthew22:35 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su lâi mn̄g chi̍t ê būn-tôe, beh kā I chhì-thàm, kóng," 
Matthew22:36 “Lāu-su, Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat tó chi̍t tiâu sī siōng-tōa ê kài-bēng?”" 
Matthew22:37 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí tio̍h choân-sim, choân-chêng, choân-ì thiàⁿ Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè." 
Matthew22:38 Che sī siōng-tōa koh tē-it ê kài-bēng. 
Matthew22:39 Tē-jī ê mā siâng-khoán: Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī. 
Matthew22:40 Choân-pō͘ Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê kà-sī lóng ēng chit nn̄g tiâu chòe kun-kù.” 
Matthew22:41 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chū-chi̍p ê sî, Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in," 
Matthew22:42 “Koan-hē Ki-tok, I sī sím-mi̍h-lâng ê hō͘-tāi, lín siūⁿ án-chóaⁿ?” In kóng, “I sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Nā-sī án-ni, sī-án-chóaⁿ Tāi-pi̍t siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng ê sî chheng Ki-tok chòe Chú, kóng:" 
Matthew22:44 Chú kā góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng, kàu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē." 
Matthew22:45 Kì-jiân Tāi-pi̍t chheng-ho͘ Ki-tok chòe ‘Chú’, Ki-tok ná ōe sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi?”" 
Matthew22:46 Bô lâng ōe-tàng hôe-tap pòaⁿ-kù. Tùi hit-ji̍t khí, bô lâng káⁿ koh kā I mn̄g sím-mi̍h būn-tôe." 
Matthew23:1 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ tùi kûn-chiòng kap I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng," 
Matthew23:2 “Keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chē Mô͘-se ê ūi kóe-seh Lu̍t-hoat. 
Matthew23:3 Só͘-í, in só͘ kā lín kóng,ê, lín lóng tio̍h chòe, tio̍h chun-siú; put-kò m̄-thang o̍h in ê hêng-ûi, in-ūi in ōe-kóng bōe-chòe." 
Matthew23:4 In chiong lâng taⁿ bô hoat ê tāng-tàⁿ khún hō͘ lâng taⁿ, ka-kī liân chi̍t ki chńg-thâu-á to m̄-khéng tín-tāng." 
Matthew23:5 In só͘-ū ê hêng-ûi lóng sī beh chòe hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ, in-ūi in chiong ka-kī ê keng-bûn-tē chòe khah khoah, saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu chòe khah tn̂g." 
Matthew23:6 In ài tī iàn-hōe chē tōa-ūi, tī hōe-tn̂g chē koân-ūi," 
Matthew23:7 tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu hō͘ lâng chhéng-an, hō͘ lâng chheng-ho͘ ‘lia̍p-pí’." 
Matthew23:8 M̄-kú lín m̄-thang hō͘ lâng chheng-chòe ‘lia̍p-pí’, in-ūi lín chí-ū chi̍t ūi ‘Lāu-su’, lín lóng sī hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē." 
Matthew23:9 Tī tōe-chiūⁿ, lín m̄-thang chheng-ho͘ lâng chòe ‘lāu-pē’, in-ūi lín chí-ū chi̍t ūi ‘Lāu-pē’, chiū-sī tī thiⁿ-téng Hit-ūi." 
Matthew23:10 Lín mā m̄-thang hō͘ lâng chheng-chòe ‘kàu-su’, in-ūi lín chí-ū chi̍t ūi ‘Kàu-su’, chiū-sī Ki-tok." 
Matthew23:11 Lín tiong-kan siōng-tōa,ê tio̍h chòe lín ê chhe-ēng. 
Matthew23:12 Thê-ko ka-kī,ê, ōe siū kàng-kē; khut-kē ka-kī,ê, ōe siū ko-seng.”" 
Matthew23:13 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! Lín chiong Thian-kok ê mn̂g koaiⁿ,khí-lâi, m̄ hō͘ lâng ji̍p,khì; lín ka-kī m̄ ji̍p,khì, liân beh ji̍p,khì ê lâng mā m̄ hō͘ in ji̍p,khì." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! Lín ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ chi̍t ê lâng kái-chong ji̍p-kàu, thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu. Hit-ê lâng ji̍p-kàu liáu-āu, lín soah hō͘ i pìⁿ-chòe tōe-ge̍k ê kiáⁿ, pí lín têng-pē pháiⁿ." 
Matthew23:16 “Chhiⁿ-mî chòe chhōa-lō͘,ê, lín chhám ah! Lín kóng, ‘Lâng kí Sèng-tiān chiù-chōa bô chún-sǹg, m̄-kú nā kí tiān-lāi ê kim-khì chiù-chōa chiū tio̍h siú.’" 
Matthew23:17 Lín chiah-ê tòng-gōng koh chhiⁿ-mî ê lâng ah, tó chi̍t hāng khah tiōng-iàu? Sī kim-khì á-sī hō͘ kim-khì chiâⁿ-chòe sîn-sèng ê Sèng-tiān?" 
Matthew23:18 Lín koh kóng, ‘Lâng kí chè-tôaⁿ chiù-chōa bô chún-sǹg, nā kí chè-tôaⁿ téng ê chè-mi̍h chiù-chōa chiū tio̍h siú.’" 
Matthew23:19 Lín chiah-ê chhiⁿ-mî ê lâng ah, sī chè-mi̍h á-sī hō͘ chè-mi̍h chiâⁿ-chòe sîn-sèng ê chè-tôaⁿ, tó chi̍t hāng khah tiōng-iàu?" 
Matthew23:20 Só͘-í, lâng kí chè-tôaⁿ chiù-chōa, chiū-sī kí chè-tôaⁿ kap hit téng-bīn só͘-ū ê chè-mi̍h chiù-chōa." 
Matthew23:21 Lâng kí Sèng-tiān chiù-chōa, chiū-sī kí Sèng-tiān kap tiàm tī hit lāi-bīn ê Siōng-tè chiù-chōa." 
Matthew23:22 Lâng kí thiⁿ chiù-chōa, chiū-sī kí Siōng-tè ê pó-chō kap chē tī hit téng-bīn ê Siōng-tè chiù-chōa." 
Matthew23:23 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! In-ūi lín liân phang-liāu, po̍k-hô, poeh-kak, sió-hôe-hiong to hiàn cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ Siōng-tè, Lu̍t-hoat só͘ tiōng-sī ê chèng-gī, jîn-chû, kap sìn-si̍t, lín tian-tò hut-lio̍k. Chiah-ê chiah sī lín eng-kai si̍t-hêng,ê; téng-bīn hiah-ê mā m̄-thang hut-lio̍k." 
Matthew23:24 Lín chiah-ê chhiⁿ-mî chòe chhōa-lō͘,ê, chi̍t chiah sòe chiah báng-thâng lín to kā lū,chhut-lâi, lo̍k-tô tian-tò kui-chiah kā thun,lo̍h-khì." 
Matthew23:25 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! In-ūi lín chiong poe kap pôaⁿ ê gōa-bīn sóe chheng-khì, lāi-bīn khiok tóe-móa tham-io̍k kap hòng-chhiòng." 
Matthew23:26 Lín chiah-ê chhiⁿ-mî ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ah, tio̍h seng kā poe ê lāi-bīn sóe chheng-khì, gōa-bīn chū-jiân chiū chheng-khì." 
Matthew23:27 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! In-ūi lín chhin-chhiūⁿ chhat pe̍h-pe̍h ê bōng, gōa-bīn hó-khòaⁿ, lāi-bīn khiok tóe-móa sí-lâng ê kut-thâu kap ta̍k-hāng ê ù-òe." 
Matthew23:28 Lín mā chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, gōa-bīn hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe gī-lâng, lāi-bīn khiok chhiong-móa ké-hó kap put-hoat." 
Matthew23:29 “Ké-hó ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, lín chhám ah! In-ūi lín chō sian-ti ê bōng, chéng-siu gī-lâng ê kì-liām-pi," 
Matthew23:30 koh kóng ‘Goán nā oa̍h tī goán chó͘-sian ê sî-tāi, it-tēng bōe kap in chòe-hé sat-hāi sian-ti’." 
Matthew23:31 Án-ni, lín sī teh chèng-si̍t lín ka-kī sī sat-hāi sian-ti ê lâng ê kiáⁿ-sun." 
Matthew23:32 Lín chó͘-sian chòe ê pháiⁿ-tāi, chòe lín khì oân-sêng hó lah!" 
Matthew23:33 Lín chiah-ê to̍k-chôa ê kiáⁿ-sun, kan-kúi ê lâng ah, lín kiám ōe-tàng tô-siám tōe-ge̍k ê hêng-hoa̍t?" 
Matthew23:34 Só͘-í, góa beh chhe sian-ti, tì-hūi ê lâng, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khì lín hia; in ū-ê ōe hō͘ lín sat-hāi á-sī tèng si̍p-jī-kè, ū-ê ōe hō͘ lín tī lín ê hōe-tn̂g piⁿ-phah, hō͘ lín tùi chit-ê siâⁿ kóaⁿ kàu hit-ê siâⁿ." 
Matthew23:35 Án-ni, lín tī tōe-chiūⁿ thâi-sí gī-lâng ê huih-chè lóng kui tī lín sin-chiūⁿ; chiū-sī tùi gī-lâng A-pek lâu ê huih kàu Pí-lī-ka ê kiáⁿ Sat-ka-lī-a tī sèng-só͘ kap chè-tôaⁿ ê tiong-kan lâu ê huih, lóng kui tī lín sin-chiūⁿ." 
Matthew23:36 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chiah-ê chè lóng ōe kui tī chit sè-tāi ê lâng.”" 
Matthew23:37 “ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah, Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah, lí thâi-sí sian-ti, koh ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm-sí Siōng-tè chhe-lâi lí chia ê sù-chiá. Góa jōa-chōe piàn ài-beh chū-chi̍p lí ê kiáⁿ-jî, chhin-chhiūⁿ koe-bú chū-chi̍p koe-á-kiáⁿ kā in áⁿ tī si̍t-kó͘-ē, lín lóng bô ài!" 
Matthew23:38 Lín khòaⁿ, lín ê chhù ōe hong-hòe, bô lâng tòa." 
Matthew23:39 Góa kā lín kóng, tùi taⁿ í-āu lín choa̍t-tùi khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h góa, ti̍t-kàu lín kóng, ‘Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn!’”" 
Matthew24:1 Iâ-so͘ tùi Sèng-tiān chhut,lâi, tú-beh lī-khui ê sî, bûn-tô͘ óa,lâi, pò I khòaⁿ Sèng-tiān ê kiàn-tio̍k-bu̍t." 
Matthew24:2 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Chiah-ê lín kiám m̄-sī lóng ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h? Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, tī chia it-chhè lóng ōe siū thiah-húi, thiah kah bô nn̄g tè chio̍h sio-tha̍h.”" 
Matthew24:3 Iâ-so͘ tī Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ téng teh chē ê sî, bûn-tô͘ su-hā lâi mn̄g I, “Chhiáⁿ kā goán kóng, chit-ê tāi-chì sím-mi̍h sî ōe hoat-seng? Lí ê lâi-lîm kap kim-sè ê kiat-kio̍k ū sím-mi̍h tiāu-thâu?”" 
Matthew24:4 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bián siū bê-he̍k." 
Matthew24:5 In-ūi ū chin chōe lâng ōe lī-iōng góa ê miâ lâi, kóng ‘Góa chiū-sī Ki-tok’ lâi bê-he̍k chin chōe lâng." 
Matthew24:6 Lín ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiàn-cheng í-ki̍p chiàn-cheng ê hong-siaⁿ. Tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-bián kiaⁿ. Chiah-ê tāi-chì it-tēng ōe hoat-seng, m̄-kú chiong-kio̍k iáu-bē kàu." 
Matthew24:7 In-ūi bîn-cho̍k ōe khí-lâi kong-kek bîn-cho̍k, kok-ka kong-kek kok-ka; chin chōe só͘-chāi ū ki-hng kap tōe-tāng." 
Matthew24:8 Che it-chhè ê tāi-chì put-kò sī chhui-chūn thàng-thiàⁿ ê khai-sí. 
Matthew24:9 “Hit-sî, lín ōe hō͘ lâng lia̍h,khì, siū khó͘-chhó͘, sat-hāi; lín ōe in-ūi góa ê miâ hō͘ bān-bîn oàn-hūn." 
Matthew24:10 Hit-sî, chin chōe lâng ōe sit-khì sìn-sim, hō͘-siōng chhut-bōe, pí-chhú oàn-hūn." 
Matthew24:11 Ū chin chōe ké sian-ti ōe chhut-hiān lâi bê-he̍k chin chōe lâng. 
Matthew24:12 Put-hoat ê tāi-chì ná ke-thiⁿ, chin chōe lâng ê thiàⁿ-sim ōe chiām-chiām léng-tām." 
Matthew24:13 M̄-kú jím-nāi kàu chòe-āu ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù. 
Matthew24:14 Chit-ê Thian-kok ê hok-im ōe thoân kàu phó͘-thiⁿ-ē, tùi bān-bîn chòe kiàn-chèng, chòe-āu chiong-kio̍k chiah ōe kàu.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Só͘-í, tng lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng-tè thong-kè sian-ti Tān-í-lí só͘ kóng hit-ê ‘Khó-ò͘ⁿ ê Húi-bia̍t-chiá’ khiā tī sîn-sèng ê só͘-chāi — tha̍k ê lâng tio̍h bêng-pe̍k chit-kù ōe ê ì-sù —" 
Matthew24:16 hit-sî tī Iû-thài ê lâng tio̍h tô-cháu khì soaⁿ-lāi; 
Matthew24:17 tī chhù-téng,ê, m̄-thang lo̍h-lâi the̍h chhù-lāi ê mi̍h;" 
Matthew24:18 tī hn̂g,ni̍h-ê, m̄-thang tńg-khì hiahⁿ gōa-saⁿ." 
Matthew24:19 Tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, ū sin-īn,ê kap hō͘ eⁿ-á chia̍h-lin ê hū-jîn-lâng hui-siông put-hēng!" 
Matthew24:20 Tio̍h kî-tó, lín chiah bián tī tang-thiⁿ á-sī An-hioh-ji̍t tô-lān." 
Matthew24:21 In-ūi tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí teh-beh ū tōa chai-lān, sī chhòng-chō ú-tiū í-lâi m̄-bat ū,ê, chiong-lâi mā bōe koh ū." 
Matthew24:22 Siōng-tè nā bô kiám-chió hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, bô lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù; m̄-kú ūi-tio̍h I ê soán-bîn, Siōng-tè ōe kiám-chió hiah-ê ji̍t-chí." 
Matthew24:23 “Hit-sî, nā ū lâng kā lín kóng ‘Lín khòaⁿ, Ki-tok tī chia’, á-sī kóng ‘I tī hia’, m̄-thang siong-sìn." 
Matthew24:24 In-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa ké Ki-tok kap ké sian-ti ōe chhut-hiān, kiâⁿ tōa sîn-jiah kap kî-sū lâi bê-he̍k lâng, nā ōe-tàng, liân soán-bîn to beh kā in bê-he̍k." 
Matthew24:25 Góa í-keng seng kā lín kóng lah. 
Matthew24:26 “Só͘-í, nā ū lâng kā lín kóng ‘Lín khòaⁿ, Ki-tok tī khòng-iá’, m̄-thang chhut,khì; á-sī kóng ‘Lín khòaⁿ, I tī pâng-keng lāi’, mā m̄-thang siong-sìn." 
Matthew24:27 Sih-nà tùi tang-pêng sih kàu sai-pêng, Jîn-chú ê lâi-lîm mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni." 
Matthew24:28 “Si-thé tī tó-ūi, thuh-thâu-eng lóng ōe khîⁿ óa-khì hia.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Chit-ê chai-lān ê ji̍t-chí chi̍t-ē kè,khì, ji̍t ōe pìⁿ o͘-àm, ge̍h bōe hoat-kng, chhiⁿ ōe tùi thiⁿ-téng lak,lo̍h-lâi, thiⁿ-téng ê kng-thé lóng ōe iô-choah." 
Matthew24:30 Hit-sî, Jîn-chú ê tiāu-thâu ōe tī thiⁿ-téng chhut-hiān. Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-cho̍k bān-bîn lóng ōe thî-khàu; in ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú chhiong-móa koân-lêng kap tōa êng-kng chē thiⁿ-téng ê hûn lâi-lîm." 
Matthew24:31 I ōe chhe I ê thiⁿ-sài pûn hiáng-liāng ê lat-pah, tùi thiⁿ ê chit-pêng kàu thiⁿ ê hit-pêng, tùi sì-hng chū-chi̍p I ê soán-bîn.”" 
Matthew24:32 “Tio̍h tùi bû-hoa-kó-chhiū ha̍k-si̍p: Ki puh-íⁿ hoat-hio̍h ê sî, lín chiū chai joa̍h-thiⁿ teh-beh kàu ah." 
Matthew24:33 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h che it-chhè ê tāi-chì ê sî chiū chai Jîn-chú í-keng chiap-kūn, kàu mn̂g-kháu lah." 
Matthew24:34 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit sè-tāi iáu-bē kè,khì, che it-chhè lóng ōe hoat-seng." 
Matthew24:35 Thiⁿ kap tōe ōe siau-sit, m̄-kú góa ê ōe choa̍t-tùi bōe siau-sit.”" 
Matthew24:36 “Koan-hē hit-ê ji̍t, hit-ê sî, bô lâng chai; thiⁿ-téng ê thiⁿ-sài m̄ chai, Kiáⁿ mā m̄ chai, chí-ū Pē chai nā-tiāⁿ." 
Matthew24:37 In-ūi Jîn-chú ê lâi-lîm mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ Ná-a ê sî ê chêng-kéng. 
Matthew24:38 Tōa-chúi lâi í-chêng kàu Ná-a chìn-ji̍p tōa-chûn hit-ji̍t, lâng chiàu-siông lim-chia̍h kè-chhōa." 
Matthew24:39 In hô͘-lí-hô͘-tô͘ lóng m̄ chai, tōa-chúi hut-jiân lâi, kā in lóng chhiong-cháu. Jîn-chú ê lâi-lîm mā ōe án-ni." 
Matthew24:40 Hit-sî, ū nn̄g ê lâng tī hn̂g,ni̍h, chi̍t ê siū chiap,khì; chi̍t ê pàng,teh." 
Matthew24:41 Nn̄g ê hū-jîn-lâng tī oe-bō-keng teh oe chio̍h-bō, chi̍t ê siū chiap,khì; chi̍t ê pàng,teh." 
Matthew24:42 “Tio̍h kéng-séng, in-ūi lín m̄ chai lín ê Chú sím-mi̍h ji̍t ōe lâi-lîm." 
Matthew24:43 Lín tio̍h chai, chit-ke ê chú-lâng nā chai àm-sî kúi tiám chha̍t-á ōe lâi, it-tēng ōe kéng-séng, bōe hō͘ chha̍t-á ó͘ piah-khang ji̍p-lâi chhù-lāi." 
Matthew24:44 Só͘-í, lín mā tio̍h chún-pī piān-piān, in-ūi Jîn-chú ōe tī lín siūⁿ bōe kàu ê sî-chūn lâi-lîm.”" 
Matthew24:45 “Nā-sī án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng sī tiong-si̍t koh chhong-bêng ê po̍k-jîn? Chiū-sī chú-lâng kau-tài i koán ke-lāi kî-tha ê po̍k-jîn, chiàu-sî pun chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ in hit-ê lâng." 
Matthew24:46 Chú-lâng tńg,lâi ê sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chiàu án-ni teh chòe hit-ê po̍k-jîn si̍t-chāi ū hok-khì! 
Matthew24:47 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chú-lâng ōe phài chit-ê po̍k-jîn koán-lí i lóng-chóng ê châi-sán." 
Matthew24:48 Hit-ê pháiⁿ ê po̍k-jîn nā sim-lāi siūⁿ-kóng ‘Góa ê chú-lâng bōe hiah kín tńg,lâi’," 
Matthew24:49 chiū phah pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn,ê, koh kap chiú-chùi,ê chòe-hé ia̍h-lim-ia̍h-chia̍h." 
Matthew24:50 Chú-lâng ōe tī i bô àn-sǹg ê ji̍t, m̄-chai ê sî tńg,lâi." 
Matthew24:51 Chú-lâng ōe giâm-giâm kā i chhú-hoa̍t, kā i kap ké-hó ê lâng hē chòe-tui; tī hia in ōe thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Thian-kok thang phì-jū chòe cha̍p ê chāi-sek-lú gia̍h teng chhut-khì gêng-chiap sin-lông. 
Matthew25:2 Kî-tiong ū gō͘ ê gōng,ê, gō͘ ê khiáu,ê." 
Matthew25:3 Hiah-ê gōng,ê gia̍h teng, bô lēng-gōa tòa iû," 
Matthew25:4 m̄-kú khiáu,ê gia̍h teng, ū lēng-gōa tòa kúi-nā koàn iû." 
Matthew25:5 Sin-lông khah òaⁿ kàu, in soah lóng tuh-ku khùn,khì." 
Matthew25:6 “Pòaⁿ-mî, ū lâng tōa-siaⁿ hoah, ‘Sin-lông lâi lah, chhut-lâi gêng-chiap!’" 
Matthew25:7 Hit-sî, hiah-ê chāi-sek-lú lóng chhíⁿ,khí-lâi, siu-chéng in ê teng." 
Matthew25:8 Gōng,ê kā khiáu,ê kóng, ‘Goán ê teng teh-beh hoa,khì lah, lín ê iû pun chi̍t-kóa hō͘ goán.’" 
Matthew25:9 Khiáu,ê ìn kóng, ‘Kiaⁿ-liáu iû bô-kàu pun lín ēng, siōng-hó lín ka-kī khì kā bōe-iû,ê bóe.’" 
Matthew25:10 In khì bóe ê sî sin-lông kàu-ūi, hiah-ê chún-pī hó-sè,ê kap i ji̍p-khì hù hun-iàn, mn̂g chiū koaiⁿ,khí-lâi." 
Matthew25:11 “Āu-lâi hiah-ê gōng ê chāi-sek-lú mā lâi, kóng, ‘Sian-siⁿ, sian-siⁿ, chhiáⁿ kā goán khui-mn̂g!’" 
Matthew25:12 Sin-lông ìn kóng, ‘Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, góa m̄ bat lín!’" 
Matthew25:13 “Só͘-í, tio̍h kéng-séng, in-ūi hit-ê ji̍t hit-ê sî lín m̄ chai.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Thian-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ ū chi̍t ê lâng beh chhut-gōa lú-hêng, kiò ka-kī ê po̍k-jîn lâi, chiong châi-sán kau-tài in." 
Matthew25:15 I chiàu ta̍k-lâng ê châi-tiāu kau kim-pè hō͘ in, chi̍t ê gō͘-chheng, chi̍t ê nn̄g-chheng, chi̍t ê chi̍t-chheng, chiū chhut-gōa,khì." 
Matthew25:16 Hit-ê niá gō͘-chheng,ê sûi-sî the̍h-khì chòe seng-lí, koh thàn gō͘-chheng." 
Matthew25:17 Siâng-khoán, hit-ê niá nn̄g-chheng,ê mā koh thàn nn̄g-chheng." 
Matthew25:18 M̄-kú hit-ê niá chi̍t-chheng,ê chhut,khì, tī thô͘-kha ó͘ chi̍t khang, kā chú-lâng ê kim-pè chhàng,khí-lâi." 
Matthew25:19 “Kè chin kú, hiah-ê po̍k-jîn ê chú-lâng tńg,lâi, kap in sǹg-siàu." 
Matthew25:20 Hit-ê niá gō͘-chheng,ê kiâⁿ chìn-chêng, lēng-gōa the̍h gō͘-chheng lâi, kóng, ‘Thâu-ke, lí kau-tài góa gō͘-chheng ê kim-pè, chhiáⁿ khòaⁿ, góa ū koh thàn gō͘-chheng.’" 
Matthew25:21 Chú-lâng kā i kóng, ‘Chin hó, hó koh tiong-si̍t ê po̍k-jîn, lí kì-jiân tī chió,ê ū tiong-si̍t, góa beh phài lí koán khah chōe,ê; ji̍p-lâi kap chú-lâng chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Niá nn̄g-chheng,ê mā lâi, kóng, ‘Thâu-ke, lí kau-tài góa nn̄g-chheng ê kim-pè, chhiáⁿ lí khòaⁿ, góa ū koh thàn nn̄g-chheng.’" 
Matthew25:23 Chú-lâng kā i kóng, ‘Chin hó, hó koh tiong-si̍t ê po̍k-jîn, lí kì-jiân tī chió,ê ū tiong-si̍t, góa beh phài lí koán khah chōe,ê; ji̍p-lâi kap chú-lâng chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Chit-sî, hit-ê niá chi̍t-chheng,ê mā kiâⁿ chìn-chêng, kóng, ‘Thâu-ke, góa chai lí sī giâm-hat ê lâng, bô iā-chéng mā beh siu-koah, bô chèng-choh mā beh siu-sêng." 
Matthew25:25 Góa chin kiaⁿ, chiah chiong lí ê kim-pè the̍h-khì chhàng tī thô͘-kha-tóe. Taⁿ lí ê kim-pè hêng lí.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Chú-lâng ìn kóng, ‘Pháiⁿ koh pîn-tōaⁿ ê po̍k-jîn, lí kì-jiân chai góa bô iā-chéng mā beh siu-koah, bô chèng-choh mā beh siu-sêng," 
Matthew25:27 lí eng-kai chiong góa ê kim-pè kià gûn-hâng, góa tńg,lâi ê sî thang liân-pún-tài-lī siu-hôe.’" 
Matthew25:28 Kā i ê kim-pè the̍h,lâi, kau hō͘ ū chi̍t-bān kim-pè hit-ê lâng." 
Matthew25:29 In-ūi ū,ê, beh hō͘ i koh-khah chōe, sīm-chì ū chhun; bô,ê, liân i só͘-ū,ê mā beh kā i chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi." 
Matthew25:30 Chit-ê bô lō͘-ēng ê po̍k-jîn, kā i kóaⁿ chhut-khì gōa-bīn o͘-àm ê só͘-chāi; tī hia i ōe thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí.”" 
Matthew25:31 “Jîn-chú choh-ông chhōa chèng thiⁿ-sài lâi-lîm ê sî, I ōe chē tī êng-iāu ê pó-chō." 
Matthew25:32 Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn lóng ōe chū-chi̍p tī I ê bīn-chêng. I ōe chiong in hun-chòe nn̄g pêng, chhin-chhiūⁿ bo̍k-chiá chiong mî-iûⁿ kap soaⁿ-iûⁿ hun-khui;" 
Matthew25:33 kā mî-iûⁿ an-pâi tī chiàⁿ-pêng, soaⁿ-iûⁿ tī tò-pêng." 
Matthew25:34 Āu-lâi, Ông ōe kā chiàⁿ-pêng ê lâng kóng, ‘Lâi, lín chiah-ê siū góa ê Pē chiok-hok,ê, lâi sêng-siū tùi chhòng-chō ú-tiū í-lâi chiū ūi-tio̍h lín chún-pī ê kok-tō͘." 
Matthew25:35 In-ūi góa iau, lín ū hō͘ góa chia̍h; góa chhùi-ta, lín ū hō͘ góa lim; góa choh chhut-gōa-lâng, lín ū kā góa siu-liû;" 
Matthew25:36 góa chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé, lín ū hō͘ góa chhēng; góa phòa-pīⁿ, lín ū kā góa chiàu-kò͘; góa tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, lín ū lâi thàm góa.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Hit-sî, gī-lâng ōe ìn I kóng, ‘Chú ah, sím-mi̍h sî goán khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí iau ū hō͘ lí chia̍h, chhùi-ta ū hō͘ lí lim?" 
Matthew25:38 Sím-mi̍h sî goán khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí choh chhut-gōa-lâng ū kā lí siu-liû, chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé ū hō͘ lí chhēng?" 
Matthew25:39 Sím-mi̍h sî goán khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí phòa-pīⁿ á-sī tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, goán ū khì thàm lí?’" 
Matthew25:40 Ông ōe ìn kóng, ‘Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín ū án-ni tùi-thāi góa hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē siōng bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê, chiū-sī hó khoán-thāi góa.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Āu-lâi, Ông ōe kā tò-pêng ê lâng kóng, ‘Lín chiah-ê siū chiù-chó͘ ê lâng, lī-khui góa, ji̍p-khì ūi-tio̍h Mô͘-kúi kap i ê sù-chiá só͘ chún-pī éng-oán ê hé,ni̍h." 
Matthew25:42 In-ūi góa iau, lín bô hō͘ góa chia̍h; góa chhùi-ta, lín bô hō͘ góa lim;" 
Matthew25:43 góa choh chhut-gōa-lâng, lín bô kā góa siu-liû; góa chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé, lín bô hō͘ góa chhēng; góa phòa-pīⁿ á-sī tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, lín bô lâi thàm góa.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Hit-sî, in mā ōe ìn kóng, ‘Chú ah, sím-mi̍h sî goán khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí iau, chhùi-ta, choh chhut-gōa-lâng, chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé, phòa-pīⁿ, á-sī tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, bô kā lí chiàu-kò͘?’" 
Matthew25:45 Ông ōe kā in kóng, ‘Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín bô án-ni tùi-thāi siōng bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê, chiū-sī bô hó khoán-thāi góa.’" 
Matthew25:46 Chiah-ê lâng ōe siū éng-oán ê hêng-hoa̍t, chóng-sī gī-lâng ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā.”" 
Matthew26:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng," 
Matthew26:2 “Lín chai koh nn̄g ji̍t chiū-sī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh, Jîn-chú ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ lâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè.”" 
Matthew26:3 Hit-sî, chè-si-tiúⁿ kap bîn-kan ê tiúⁿ-ló chū-chi̍p tī tōa-chè-si Kai-a-hoat ê kong-koán." 
Matthew26:4 In chham-siông beh ēng kè-bô͘ lia̍h Iâ-so͘, kā I hāi-sí." 
Matthew26:5 M̄-kú in kóng, “M̄-thang tī choeh-kî tiong, kiaⁿ-liáu bîn-chiòng khí pō-tōng.”" 
Matthew26:6 Iâ-so͘ tī Pek-tāi-nî bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng Se-bûn ê chhù teh chē-toh chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng the̍h chi̍t koàn ge̍k-pân, lāi-bīn tóe hui-siông ko-kùi ê phang-iû, kiâⁿ óa,lâi, chiong phang-iû tò tī Iâ-so͘ ê thâu-khak téng." 
Matthew26:7  
Matthew26:8 Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h chin siū-khì, kóng, “Ná tio̍h chiah lōng-hùi?" 
Matthew26:9 Chit-koàn phang-iû ōe-tàng bōe chin chōe chîⁿ lâi kiù-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng.” 
Matthew26:10 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ, chiū tùi in kóng, “Lín ná beh tiau-lân chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng? I ū ūi-tio̍h góa chòe chi̍t hāng hó-sū." 
Matthew26:11 Put-sî ū sàn-chhiah-lâng kap lín chòe-hé, put-kò góa bōe put-sî kap lín chòe-hé." 
Matthew26:12 I tò phang-iû tī góa ê seng-khu sī kā góa chún-pī bâi-chòng. 
Matthew26:13 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit-ê hok-im bô-lūn thoân kàu choân sè-kài sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi, lâng lóng ōe kóng-khí chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lâi kì-liām i.”" 
Matthew26:14 Cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê, kiò-chòe Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi, khì kìⁿ hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ," 
Matthew26:15 kóng, “Góa nā chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ lín, lín beh hō͘ góa sím-mi̍h?” In chiū the̍h saⁿ-cha̍p ê gûn-á hō͘ i." 
Matthew26:16 Tùi hit-sî khí, Iû-tāi it-ti̍t teh chhē ki-hōe beh chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew26:17 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh ê thâu chi̍t ji̍t, bûn-tô͘ lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí ài goán tī tó-ūi kā lí chún-pī chia̍h Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan?”" 
Matthew26:18 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín ji̍p-siâⁿ khì chhē hit-ê bó͘-lâng, kā i kóng, ‘Lāu-su kóng: Góa ê sî í-keng kàu, góa beh kap góa ê bûn-tô͘ tī lí ê chhù siú Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh.’”" 
Matthew26:19 Bûn-tô͘ chiū chiàu Iâ-so͘ ê hoan-hù khì chún-pī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan. 
Matthew26:20 Hông-hun ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kap cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chē-toh." 
Matthew26:21 In teh chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê lâng beh kā góa chhut-bōe.”" 
Matthew26:22 In chin siong-sim, chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā I mn̄g, “Chú ah, m̄-sī góa ho͘hⁿ?”" 
Matthew26:23 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Chhun-chhiú kap góa siâng-sî the̍h chia̍h-mi̍h tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h teh ùn hit-ê lâng beh kā góa chhut-bōe." 
Matthew26:24 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, Jîn-chú ōe siū hāi, put-kò chhut-bōe Jîn-chú hit-ê lâng chhám ah! Hit-ê lâng lêng-khó bô chhut-sì khah hó.”" 
Matthew26:25 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê Iû-tāi mā kā I mn̄g, “Lia̍p-pí, m̄-sī góa ho͘hⁿ?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Che sī lí kóng,ê.”" 
Matthew26:26 In teh chia̍h ê sî, Iâ-so͘ the̍h piáⁿ, kám-siā liáu-āu peh-khui, pun hō͘ bûn-tô͘, kóng, “The̍h-khì chia̍h; che sī góa ê seng-khu.”" 
Matthew26:27 Jiân-āu I phâng-poe, kám-siā liáu-āu the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘, kóng, “Lín lóng tio̍h lim chit-poe," 
Matthew26:28 in-ūi che sī góa ê huih, sī li̍p-iok ê huih, ūi-tio̍h chin chōe lâng lâu-chhut,ê, beh hō͘ in ê chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Matthew26:29 Góa kā lín kóng, tī góa ê Pē ê Kok kap lín lim sin ê phû-tô-chiú hit-ji̍t í-chêng, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe koh lim chit-ê chiú.”" 
Matthew26:30 In gîm-si liáu-āu chiū chhut,khì, khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ." 
Matthew26:31 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Kim-mî lín lóng ōe pàng-sak góa, in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa beh phah bo̍k-chiá, kui-kûn iûⁿ chiū sì-sòaⁿ." 
Matthew26:32 M̄-kú góa koh-oa̍h í-āu ōe pí lín seng khì Ka-lī-lī.” 
Matthew26:33 Pí-tek tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Sui-jiân in tāi-ke lóng pàng-sak lí, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe pàng-sak lí!”" 
Matthew26:34 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lí kóng, kim-mî koe thî í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa.”" 
Matthew26:35 Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Nā it-tēng tio̍h kap lí chòe-hé sí, góa mā choa̍t-tùi bōe m̄ jīn lí!” Kî-tha ê bûn-tô͘ mā lóng án-ni kóng." 
Matthew26:36 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe Khek-se-má-nî. I kā bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Góa khì hia kî-tó, lín tiàm chia chē.”" 
Matthew26:37 I chiū chhōa Pí-tek kap Se-pì-thài ê nn̄g ê kiáⁿ chòe-hé khì. I pi-siong, hui-siông thòng-khó͘," 
Matthew26:38 tùi in kóng, “Góa sim iu-siong kàu beh sí. Lín tiàm chia, kap góa chòe-hé kéng-séng.”" 
Matthew26:39 I kiâⁿ khah chìn-chêng, bīn phak,lo̍h-khì, kî-tó kóng, “Góa ê Pē ah, nā ōe-tàng, kiû lí hō͘ góa bián lim chit-ê poe, m̄-kú m̄-sī chiàu góa ê ì-sù, tio̍h chiàu lí ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān.”" 
Matthew26:40 I tńg-lâi bûn-tô͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h in teh khùn, chiū tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Lín chin-chiàⁿ bōe-tàng kap góa kéng-séng chi̍t tiám-cheng kú sī,bô?" 
Matthew26:41 Tio̍h kéng-séng, tio̍h kî-tó, chiah bōe hām-lo̍h iú-he̍k. Lín sui-jiân sim chin ì-ài, m̄-kú jio̍k-thé loán-jio̍k.”" 
Matthew26:42 Iâ-so͘ tē-jī piàn koh khì kî-tó, kóng, “Góa ê Pē ah, chit-ê poe nā bōe-tàng bián, góa it-tēng tio̍h lim, goān lí ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān.”" 
Matthew26:43 I koh tńg,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h in in-ūi ba̍k-chiu siap iáu-teh khùn." 
Matthew26:44 Iâ-so͘ koh lī-khui in, tē-saⁿ piàn khì kî-tó, mā-sī kóng siâng-khoán ê ōe." 
Matthew26:45 Jiân-āu I koh tńg-lâi bûn-tô͘ hia, tùi in kóng, “Lín iáu-teh khùn, iáu-teh hioh-khùn o͘h? Lín khòaⁿ, sî-kan chiap-kūn lah; Jîn-chú siū chhut-bōe kau tī chōe-jîn ê chhiú-thâu lah." 
Matthew26:46 Khí,lâi, lán lâi-khì. Lín khòaⁿ, chhut-bōe góa ê lâng lâi lah.”" 
Matthew26:47 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî, cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê — Iû-tāi lâi, chè-si-tiúⁿ kap bîn-kan ê tiúⁿ-ló phài,lâi ê chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng gia̍h to gia̍h kùn kap i tàu-tīn lâi." 
Matthew26:48 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê lâng ū hō͘ in chi̍t ê àm-hō, kóng, “Góa kā I chim hit-ê chiū-sī; lín kā lia̍h.”" 
Matthew26:49 Iû-tāi sûi-sî kiâⁿ-óa Iâ-so͘, tùi I kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, pêng-an!” chiū kā I chim." 
Matthew26:50 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Pêng-iú, lí ná tī chia?” Hiah-ê lâng chiū óa,khì, hē-chhiú lia̍h Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew26:51 Hut-jiân, ū chi̍t ê kap Iâ-so͘ tàu-tīn ê lâng chhun-chhiú pu̍ih to tùi tōa-chè-si ê po̍k-jîn phut,lo̍h-khì, kā i chi̍t pêng ê hī-á siah,khí-lâi." 
Matthew26:52 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “To siu,khí-lâi, in-ūi gia̍h-to,ê lóng ōe sí tī to-ē." 
Matthew26:53 Lí siūⁿ-kóng góa bōe-tàng khún-kiû góa ê Pē sûi-sî chhe cha̍p-jī iâⁿ khah ke ê thiⁿ-sài lâi sī,bô? 
Matthew26:54 Góa nā án-ni chòe, Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài it-tēng tio̍h hoat-seng ê tāi-chì ná ōe èng-giām?”" 
Matthew26:55 Hit-sî Iâ-so͘ tùi kûn-chiòng kóng, “Lín gia̍h to gia̍h kùn chhut-lâi lia̍h góa, sī beh lia̍h kiông-tō sī,bô? Góa ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān chē-teh kà-sī lâng, lín bô kā góa lia̍h." 
Matthew26:56 Put-kò che it-chhè ê tāi-chì lóng í-keng si̍t-hiān, sī beh èng-giām sian-ti tī Sèng-keng só͘ kóng ê ōe.” Jiân-āu, só͘-ū ê bûn-tô͘ lóng pàng-sak Iâ-so͘ tô-cháu." 
Matthew26:57 Hiah-ê lia̍h Iâ-so͘ ê lâng kā I chhōa-khì tōa-chè-si Kai-a-hoat hia; keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap tiúⁿ-ló lóng í-keng chū-chi̍p tī hia. 
Matthew26:58 Pí-tek lī hn̄g-hn̄g teh tè Iâ-so͘, tè kàu tōa-chè-si kong-koán ê tiâⁿ. I ji̍p-khì lāi-bīn kap kéng-ōe chòe-hé chē, beh khòaⁿ tāi-chì ê kiat-kio̍k." 
Matthew26:59 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap choân gī-hōe it-ti̍t teh chhē ké chèng-kù beh kò Iâ-so͘, thang kā I chhú-sí." 
Matthew26:60 Sui-jiân ū chin chōe lâng chhut-lâi kā I bû-kò, m̄-kú in lóng chhē bô chèng-kù. Āu-lâi ū nn̄g ê lâng chhut,lâi," 
Matthew26:61 kóng, “Chit-ê lâng bat kóng ‘Góa ū hoat-tō͘ húi-hoāi Siōng-tè ê Sèng-tiān, saⁿ ji̍t lāi koh kā i khí,khí-lâi’.”" 
Matthew26:62 Tōa-chè-si khiā khí-lâi tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chiah-ê lâng teh kā lí kò sím-mi̍h, lí ná lóng bô tap-piān?”" 
Matthew26:63 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ lóng tiām-tiām. Tōa-chè-si koh chi̍t piàn tùi I kóng, “Góa kí éng-oán-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè bēng-lēng lí kā goán kóng, lí sī Ki-tok, Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ á m̄-sī.”" 
Matthew26:64 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí í-keng kóng lah. M̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, tùi taⁿ í-āu lín ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú chē tī Choân-lêng-chiá ê chiàⁿ-pêng, chē thiⁿ-téng ê hûn lâi-lîm.”" 
Matthew26:65 Tōa-chè-si chiū thiah-li̍h ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ, kóng, “I í-keng siat-to̍k Siōng-tè. Lán iáu su-iàu sím-mi̍h chèng-jîn? Taⁿ lín í-keng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I siat-to̍k Siōng-tè." 
Matthew26:66 Lín siūⁿ án-chóaⁿ?” In ìn kóng, “I kai sí!”" 
Matthew26:67 Āu-lâi in phùi-nōa tī Iâ-so͘ ê bīn, kā I cheng, koh ū lâng kā I siàn," 
Matthew26:68 kóng, “Ki-tok ah, lí sī sian-ti, kā goán kóng khòaⁿ-bāi, siáⁿ-lâng kā lí phah?”" 
Matthew26:69 Pí-tek tī kong-koán gōa-bīn ê tiâⁿ teh chē, ū chi̍t ê lú-pī kiâⁿ óa,khì, kóng, “Lí mā lóng ū teh kap hit-ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé.”" 
Matthew26:70 Pí-tek tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng m̄ jīn, kóng, “Góa m̄ chai lí teh kóng sím-mi̍h.”" 
Matthew26:71 Pí-tek kiâⁿ chhut-khì kàu tōa mn̂g-kháu ê sî, ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lú-pī khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, chiū kā tī hia ê lâng kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ū teh kap Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé.”" 
Matthew26:72 Pí-tek koh chi̍t piàn chiù-chōa m̄ jīn, kóng, “Góa m̄ bat hit-ê lâng.”" 
Matthew26:73 Kè bô jōa kú, khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng óa,lâi, tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Lí khak-si̍t mā-sī in hit-tīn ê lâng, thiaⁿ lí ê khiuⁿ chiū chai.”" 
Matthew26:74 I chiū chiù-chōa kóng, “Góa m̄ bat hit-ê lâng. Góa nā kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, goān Thiⁿ chek-hoa̍t góa!” Koe sûi-sî thî." 
Matthew26:75 Pí-tek siūⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng ê ōe “Koe thî í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa”, chiū chhut-khì gōa-bīn tōa-siaⁿ thî-khàu." 
Matthew27:1 Thàu-chá, só͘-ū ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap bîn-kan ê tiúⁿ-ló tàu-tīn chham-siông beh hām-hāi Iâ-so͘, kā I chhú sí-hêng." 
Matthew27:2 In kā Iâ-so͘ pa̍k,khí-lâi, ah-khì kau hō͘ Lô-má chóng-tok Pí-lia̍p-to." 
Matthew27:3 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê Iû-tāi khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ í-keng siū tēng-chōe, chiū hō͘-hóe, the̍h hit saⁿ-cha̍p ê gûn-á khì hêng hō͘ hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló," 
Matthew27:4 kóng, “Chhut-bōe bû-ko͘ ê lâng, góa ū chōe lah!” In ìn kóng, “Bô goán ê tāi-chì, lí ka-kī hū-chek!”" 
Matthew27:5 Iû-tāi chiong hiah-ê gûn-á hiat tī Sèng-tiān ê lāi-bīn chiū lī-khui, khì tiàu,sí." 
Matthew27:6 Hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ chiong gûn-á khioh,khí-lâi, kóng, “Che sī huih-chîⁿ, bô eng-kai khǹg-ji̍p Sèng-tiān ê kim-khò͘.”" 
Matthew27:7 In chham-siông liáu, koat-tēng ēng chiah-ê chîⁿ khì bóe sio-hûi-lâng ê hn̂g, thang bâi-chòng chhut-gōa-lâng." 
Matthew27:8 Só͘-í hit-ê hn̂g kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu kiò-chòe Huih-hn̂g. 
Matthew27:9 Chit-ê tāi-chì èng-giām Siōng-tè thong-kè sian-ti Iâ-lī-bí só͘ kóng ê ōe: “In the̍h hit saⁿ-cha̍p ê gûn-á, chiū-sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ūi-tio̍h i kó͘-kè ê kè-chîⁿ," 
Matthew27:10 chiàu Chú só͘ bēng-lēng góa,ê, khì bóe hit-khu sio-hûi-lâng ê hn̂g.”" 
Matthew27:11 Iâ-so͘ khiā tī chóng-tok ê bīn-chêng, chóng-tok mn̄g I kóng, “Lí sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông sī,bô?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Che sī lí kóng,ê.”" 
Matthew27:12 Hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló khòng-kò Iâ-so͘ ê sî, I lóng bô ìn." 
Matthew27:13 Āu-lâi Pí-lia̍p-to tùi I kóng, “In kā lí khòng-kò chiah chōe hāng tāi-chì, lí kiám bô thiaⁿ,kìⁿ?”" 
Matthew27:14 Iâ-so͘ iû-goân bô kā i ìn, liân chi̍t kù mā bô, chóng-tok soah kám-kak hui-siông kî-koài." 
Matthew27:15 Ta̍k-nî ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh, chiàu koàn-lē chóng-tok lóng ū pàng chi̍t ê kûn-chiòng ài pàng ê hoān-lâng." 
Matthew27:16 Hit-sî tú-hó ū chi̍t ê tāi-ke lóng bat ê hoān-lâng, miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘ Pa-lia̍p-pa." 
Matthew27:17 Só͘-í, kûn-chiòng chū-chi̍p ê sî, Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g in kóng, “Lín ài góa pàng tó chi̍t ê hō͘ lín? Iâ-so͘ Pa-lia̍p-pa, á-sī chheng-chòe Ki-tok ê Iâ-so͘?”" 
Matthew27:18 Pí-lia̍p-to chai in sī in-ūi oàn-tò͘ chiah chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ i. 
Matthew27:19 Pí-lia̍p-to khui-têng sím-mn̄g ê sî, i ê hu-jîn chhe lâng lâi kā i kóng, “Hit-ê gī-lâng ê tāi-chì, lí chhian-bān m̄-thang chhap; chā-àm góa tī bîn-bāng tiong in-ūi I siū chin chōe khó͘.”" 
Matthew27:20 Hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló siàn-tōng bîn-chiòng, kah in tio̍h iau-kiû pàng Pa-lia̍p-pa, kā Iâ-so͘ chhú sí-hêng." 
Matthew27:21 Chóng-tok koh mn̄g in, “Chit nn̄g ê lâng lín ài góa pàng tó chi̍t ê hō͘ lín?” In ìn, “ Pa-lia̍p-pa!”" 
Matthew27:22 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g in, “Án-ni, hit-ê chheng-chòe Ki-tok ê Iâ-so͘, lín ài góa án-chóaⁿ chhú-lí?” Kûn-chiòng lóng ìn, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!”" 
Matthew27:23 Pí-lia̍p-to kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ? I ū chòe sím-mi̍h pháiⁿ tāi-chì?” In koh-khah tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pí-lia̍p-to khòaⁿ í-keng bô-chhái-kang, kiông-beh ín-khí pō-tōng, chiū the̍h chúi tī kûn-chiòng bīn-chêng sóe-chhiú, kóng, “Lín ka-kī hū-chek. ”" 
Matthew27:25 Bîn-chiòng lóng ìn kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ê huih-chè, goán kap goán ê kiáⁿ-sun lâi sêng-tam.”" 
Matthew27:26 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū pàng Pa-lia̍p-pa hō͘ in, koh bēng-lēng lâng ēng piⁿ phah Iâ-so͘, jiân-āu kau I khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè." 
Matthew27:27 Chóng-tok ê peng-sū ah Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì chóng-tok-hú, tiàu-chi̍p choân-tūi ê peng kā I ûi,khí-lâi." 
Matthew27:28 In chiong Iâ-so͘ ê saⁿ thǹg,khí-lâi, kā I chhēng chu-âng-sek ê tn̂g-phàu," 
Matthew27:29 koh ēng chhì-á pīⁿ chi̍t téng ông-koan kā tì tī thâu-khak téng, chiong chi̍t ki lô͘-tek-á hō͘ I gia̍h tī chiàⁿ-chhiú. In koh kūi tī I ê bīn-chêng hì-lāng, kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông bān-sòe!”" 
Matthew27:30 In koh kā I phùi chhùi-nōa, gia̍h hit-ki lô͘-tek-á sut I ê thâu-khak." 
Matthew27:31 In kā I hì-lāng liáu-āu, chiong hit-niá tn̂g-phàu kā thǹg,khí-lâi, koh chiong I ka-kī ê saⁿ kā chhēng tò-tńg,khì, jiân-āu kau I khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè." 
Matthew27:32 In chhut,khì ê sî tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê Kó͘-lī-nāi -lâng, miâ kiò-chòe Se-bûn. In kiông-pek i giâ Iâ-so͘ ê si̍p-jī-kè." 
Matthew27:33 In kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe Kok-kok-tha, chiū-sī “ Thâu-khak-óaⁿ-niá ”," 
Matthew27:34 chiū ēng chham khó͘-táⁿ ê chiú hō͘ Iâ-so͘ lim; I tam chi̍t-ē, m̄ lim." 
Matthew27:35 Peng-sū tèng Iâ-so͘ tī si̍p-jī-kè liáu-āu thiu-chhiam pun I ê saⁿ," 
Matthew27:36 jiân-āu chē tī hia kò͘-siú. 
Matthew27:37 In tī I ê thâu-khak téng tèng chi̍t ê chōe-chn̄g, siá kóng, “Chit-ê sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông Iâ-so͘.”" 
Matthew27:38 Ū nn̄g ê kiông-tō kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè, chi̍t ê tī chiàⁿ-pêng, chi̍t ê tī tò-pêng." 
Matthew27:39 Tùi hia keng-kè ê lâng kā I bú-jio̍k, iô-thâu," 
Matthew27:40 kóng, “Lí chit-ê lâng, kóng beh thiah-húi Sèng-tiān saⁿ ji̍t lāi koh khí,khí-lâi, tio̍h kiù lí ka-kī. Lí nā-sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, tio̍h tùi si̍p-jī-kè lo̍h,lâi!”" 
Matthew27:41 Chè-si-tiúⁿ, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, kap tiúⁿ-ló mā lóng án-ni kā I thí-chhiò, kóng," 
Matthew27:42 “I kiù pa̍t-lâng, bô hoat-tō͘ kiù ka-kī. I sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê Ông, hiān-chāi tio̍h tùi si̍p-jī-kè lo̍h,lâi, lán chiū sìn I." 
Matthew27:43 I sìn-khò Siōng-tè; Siōng-tè nā beh kiù I, hiān-chāi tio̍h kiù I, in-ūi I kóng, ‘Góa sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.’”" 
Matthew27:44 Kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè hit nn̄g ê kiông-tō mā kâng-khoán kā I bú-jio̍k. 
Matthew27:45 Tùi tiong-tàu khí sòa kàu ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám, choân-tōe lóng o͘-àm." 
Matthew27:46 Ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám chó-iū, Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Í-lī, Í-lī, la-má sat-pak-tāi-nî?” Ì-sù sī “Góa ê Siōng-tè, góa ê Siōng-tè, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ pàng-sak góa?”" 
Matthew27:47 Ū chi̍t-kóa khiā tī hia ê lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng teh kiò Í-lī-a.”" 
Matthew27:48 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lâng sûi-sî cháu-khì the̍h hái-mî, chìm sng-chiú, pa̍k tī lô͘-tek-á bé, tu-khì hō͘ Iâ-so͘ suh." 
Matthew27:49 Kî-tha ê lâng kóng, “Tán,chi̍t-ē! Khòaⁿ Í-lī-a ōe lâi kā I kiù bōe.”" 
Matthew27:50 Iâ-so͘ koh tōa-siaⁿ hoah chi̍t siaⁿ, khùi chiū tn̄g." 
Matthew27:51 Hut-jiân, Sèng-tiān lāi ê tiùⁿ-lî tùi téng kàu ē li̍h-chòe nn̄g pêng; tōe tōa tín-tāng, chio̍h-pôaⁿ piak-li̍h;" 
Matthew27:52 bōng mā khui; ū chin chōe í-keng sí,khì ê Siōng-tè chú-bîn ê si-thé lóng koh-oa̍h,khí-lâi. 
Matthew27:53 Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h í-āu hiah-ê lâng tùi bōng chhut,lâi, ji̍p-khì Sèng-siâⁿ, chhut-hiān hō͘ chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Matthew27:54 Hit-ê kun-koaⁿ kap chòe-hé kò͘-siú Iâ-so͘ ê peng-sū khòaⁿ-tio̍h tōe-tāng kap só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê khak-si̍t sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ!”" 
Matthew27:55 Tī hia ū chin chōe hū-jîn-lâng tùi hn̄g-hn̄g teh khòaⁿ; in sī tùi Ka-lī-lī tè Iâ-so͘ lâi sū-hāu I,ê," 
Matthew27:56 kî-tiong ū Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a, Ngá-kok kap Iok-sek ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a, koh ū Se-pì-thài nn̄g ê kiáⁿ ê lāu-bú." 
Matthew27:57 Hông-hun ê sî, ū chi̍t ê A-lī-má-thài ê hó-gia̍h-lâng lâi, i miâ kiò-chòe Iok-sek, mā-sī Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘." 
Matthew27:58 Chit-ê lâng khì kìⁿ Pí-lia̍p-to, chhéng-kiû chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé hō͘ i. Pí-lia̍p-to chiū hoan-hù lâng chiong ûi-thé hō͘ i." 
Matthew27:59 Iok-sek kā Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé siu,lo̍h-lâi í-āu, ēng chheng-khì ê iù-môa-pò͘ pau,khí-lâi," 
Matthew27:60 jiân-āu kā I an-chòng tī ka-kī ê sin bōng, chiū-sī Iok-sek phah tī chio̍h-piah,ni̍h ê bōng. I koh kō chi̍t tè tōa tè chio̍h lâi that tī bōng-kháu chiah lī-khui." 
Matthew27:61 Hit-sî, ū Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a kap pa̍t-ê Má-lī-a tī hia, chē tī bōng ê tùi-bīn." 
Matthew27:62 Keh-ji̍t, chiū-sī Pī-pān-ji̍t āu hit-ji̍t, hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chòe-hé khì kìⁿ Pí-lia̍p-to," 
Matthew27:63 kóng, “Tāi-jîn, goán ōe-kì-tit hit-ê pián-sian-á iáu oa̍h,teh ê sî bat kóng, ‘Saⁿ ji̍t āu, góa ōe koh-oa̍h.’" 
Matthew27:64 Só͘-í, chhiáⁿ lí hā-lēng giâm-siú hûn-bōng kàu tē-saⁿ ji̍t, chiah bōe hō͘ I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi thau-the̍h I ê sin-si, soah kā bîn-chiòng kóng ‘I í-keng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h’. Nā án-ni, chit-ê chòe-āu ê khi-phiàn ōe pí thâu chi̍t piàn ê koh-khah giâm-tiōng.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pí-lia̍p-to kā in kóng, “Lín chhōa ōe-peng khì, chīn só͘-ōe giâm-bi̍t kò͘-siú hit-ê bōng.”" 
Matthew27:66 In chiū khì, ēng hong-tiâu hong hit-tè chio̍h-thâu, lâu ōe-peng tī hia kò͘-siú." 
Matthew28:1 An-hioh-ji̍t kè-liáu, Lé-pài-ji̍t thiⁿ beh kng ê sî, Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a kap pa̍t-ê Má-lī-a khì thàm-bōng." 
Matthew28:2 Hut-jiân, ū tōa tōe-tāng, in-ūi Chú ê chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ kàng-lîm, chiong hit-tè chio̍h-thâu kō-khui, chē tī hit téng-bīn." 
Matthew28:3 I ê bīn-māu chhin-chhiūⁿ sih-nà, i ê saⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ seh hiah-ni̍h pe̍h." 
Matthew28:4 Hiah-ê kò͘-siú ê ōe-peng kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah, soah pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ sí-lâng." 
Matthew28:5 Hit-ê thiⁿ-sài kā hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ; góa chai lín teh chhē hō͘ lâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê Iâ-so͘." 
Matthew28:6 I bô tī chia, chiàu I só͘ kóng, I í-keng koh-oa̍h. Lâi, lâi khòaⁿ I tó ê só͘-chāi." 
Matthew28:7 Lín kóaⁿ-kín khì kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, ‘I í-keng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h lah. I pí lín seng khì Ka-lī-lī, tī hia lín ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h I.’ Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit góa í-keng ū kā lín kóng lah.”" 
Matthew28:8 In chiū kóaⁿ-kín lī-khui bōng, iā kiaⁿ iā tōa hoaⁿ-hí, cháu-khì kā Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ kóng." 
Matthew28:9 Hut-jiân, Iâ-so͘ chhut-hiān, tùi in kóng, “Tāi-ke pêng-an!” In kiâⁿ chìn-chêng lám I ê kha, kā I pài." 
Matthew28:10 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ! Khì kā góa ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng, kiò in khì Ka-lī-lī, tī hia in ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h góa.”" 
Matthew28:11 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng lī-khui ê sî, ū chi̍t-kóa kò͘-siú bōng ê ōe-peng ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi, chiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì lóng kā chè-si-tiúⁿ pò-kò." 
Matthew28:12 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló chū-chi̍p chham-siông liáu-āu, the̍h chin chōe gûn-á hō͘ hiah-ê peng," 
Matthew28:13 kóng, “Lín tio̍h án-ni kóng, ‘I ê bûn-tô͘ àm-sî lâi, tī goán teh khùn ê sî chiong I ê sin-si thau-the̍h,khì.’" 
Matthew28:14 Bān-it chóng-tok thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì, goán ōe khì kā i an-tah, pau lín bô tāi-chì.”" 
Matthew28:15 Ōe-peng chiū the̍h hiah-ê gûn-á chiàu in só͘ hoan-hù,ê khì chòe. Chit-ê tāi-chì kàu kin-á-ji̍t iáu tī Iû-thài -lâng ê tiong-kan teh liû-thoân. 
Matthew28:16 Cha̍p-it ê bûn-tô͘ khì Ka-lī-lī, kàu Iâ-so͘ chí-tēng in khì hit-chō soaⁿ-téng." 
Matthew28:17 In kìⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū kā I pài, put-kò ū lâng iáu-teh giâu-gî." 
Matthew28:18 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa-khì kā in kóng, “Siōng-tè í-keng chiong thiⁿ-téng tōe-ē it-chhè ê koân-pèng lóng hō͘ góa." 
Matthew28:19 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h khì chio bān-bîn lâi chòe bûn-tô͘, kā in sóe-lé, hō͘ in kui tī Pē, Kiáⁿ, Sèng Sîn ê miâ," 
Matthew28:20 kà-sī in chun-siú góa só͘ hō͘ lín it-chhè ê bēng-lēng. Tio̍h ōe-kì,tit, góa ta̍k-ji̍t kap lín tông-chāi, ti̍t-kàu kim-sè ê kiat-sok.”" 
Mark1:1 Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê hok-im án-ni khai-sí. 
Mark1:2 Sian-ti Í-sài-a ê chheh ū kì-chài: Siōng-tè kóng: Khòaⁿ leh, góa chhe góa ê sù-chiá chòe lí ê sian-hong, i beh kā lí khui-lō͘." 
Mark1:3 Ū siaⁿ tī khòng-iá teh hoah: Tio̍h ūi Chú chún-pī tō-lō͘, ūi-tio̍h I siu-ti̍t sió-lō͘." 
Mark1:4 Kó-jiân, Iok-hān tī khòng-iá chhut-hiān, kā lâng sóe-lé, soan-iông kóng, “Tio̍h hóe-kái, niá-siū sóe-lé, Siōng-tè chiū sià-bián lín ê chōe.”" 
Mark1:5 Iû-thài ta̍k só͘-chāi ū chin chōe lâng kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘-ū ê lâng lóng chhut,lâi, khì Iok-hān hia, kò-pe̍k ka-kī ê chōe, tī Iok-tàn-hô tùi i niá-siū sóe-lé." 
Mark1:6 Iok-hān chhēng lo̍k-tô-mn̂g ê saⁿ, io hâ phê-tòa, chia̍h chháu-meh kap iá-bi̍t." 
Mark1:7 I soan-iông kóng, “Ū chi̍t ūi pí góa khah ū koân-lêng,ê tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi, góa liân khû lo̍h-khì kā I tháu ôe-tòa to bōe-kham,tit." 
Mark1:8 Góa ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé, m̄-kú I beh ēng Sèng Sîn kā lín sóe-lé.”" 
Mark1:9 Kè bô kúi ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tùi Ka-lī-lī ê Ná-sat-le̍k lâi, tī Iok-tàn-hô tùi Iok-hān niá-siū sóe-lé." 
Mark1:10 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē tùi chúi,ni̍h khí,lâi, chiū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ li̍h,khui, Sèng Sîn chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu kàng-lo̍h tī I sin-chiūⁿ." 
Mark1:11 Koh tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng: Lí sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, lí, góa chin ì-ài." 
Mark1:12 Sèng Sîn sûi-sî chhui-pek Iâ-so͘ khì khòng-iá. 
Mark1:13 I tī khòng-iá sì-cha̍p ji̍t kú siū Sat-tàn chhì-thàm; I it-ti̍t lóng kap iá-siù chòe-hé, m̄-kú ū thiⁿ-sài teh kā I sū-hāu." 
Mark1:14 Iok-hān siū lia̍h liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ khì Ka-lī-lī soan-iông Siōng-tè ê hok-im," 
Mark1:15 kóng, “Sî-ki kàu ah, Siōng-tè-kok teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah, tio̍h hóe-kái, sìn hok-im.”" 
Mark1:16 Iâ-so͘ tùi Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ keng-kè ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Se-bûn kap i ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t tī ô͘,ni̍h teh pha-bāng, in-ūi in sī lia̍h-hî,ê." 
Mark1:17 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Lâi tè góa, góa beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ lia̍h-hî,ê tit-tio̍h hî.”" 
Mark1:18 In sûi-sî kā bāng pàng,leh, khì tè Iâ-so͘." 
Mark1:19 Kiâⁿ bô jōa hn̄g, Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap i ê sió-tī Iok-hān tī chûn-téng teh chéng-lí bāng." 
Mark1:20 I sûi-sî ho͘-tiàu in, in chiū chiong lāu-pē Se-pì-thài kap chhiàⁿ ê kang-lâng pàng tī chûn-téng, tè Iâ-so͘ khì." 
Mark1:21 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ khì Ka-pek-lông; An-hioh-ji̍t chi̍t-ē kàu, I sûi-sî ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g kà-sī." 
Mark1:22 Chèng-lâng tùi I ê kà-sī kám-kak hui-siông hi-kî, in-ūi I ê kà-sī chin ū koân-ui, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su bô sio-siâng." 
Mark1:23 Hit-sî, hōe-tn̂g lāi ū chi̍t ê siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng hiông-hiông hoah,chhut-lâi," 
Mark1:24 “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘, lí mài chhap,goán! Lí lâi beh húi-bia̍t goán sī,bô? Góa chai lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng; lí sī Siōng-tè ê Sèng-chiá.”" 
Mark1:25 Iâ-so͘ kā i chek-pī kóng, “Tiām-tiām! Tùi chit-ê lâng chhut,khì!”" 
Mark1:26 Siâ-sîn hō͘ hit-ê lâng thiu-chhoah, tōa-siaⁿ hoah chi̍t siaⁿ, chiū tùi i chhut,khì." 
Mark1:27 Chèng-lâng tio̍h-kiaⁿ, gī-lūn-hun-hun kóng, “Che sī sím-mi̍h tāi-chì? Sī ū koân-pèng ê sin kà-sī! I bēng-lēng siâ-sîn, in lóng hâng-ho̍k.”" 
Mark1:28 Iâ-so͘ ê miâ-siaⁿ sûi-sî thoân kàu Ka-lī-lī kap chiu-ûi ta̍k só͘-chāi. 
Mark1:29 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē lī-khui hōe-tn̂g, sûi-sî chhōa Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān khì Se-bûn kap An-tek-lia̍t in tau." 
Mark1:30 Se-bûn ê tiūⁿ-ḿ tú-teh hoat-jia̍t, tó tī bîn-chhn̂g, in sûi-sî chiong i ê chêng-hêng kā Iâ-so͘ kóng." 
Mark1:31 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa-khì khan i ê chhiú, kā i hû,khí-lâi; i ê jia̍t thè,khì, chiū kā in sū-hāu." 
Mark1:32 Hông-hun, ji̍t lo̍h ê sî, chèng-lâng chiong ta̍k-chióng pīⁿ-lâng kap kúi hū-sin ê lâng lóng chhōa-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia." 
Mark1:33 Thong-siâⁿ ê lâng lóng chū-chi̍p tī mn̂g-kháu. 
Mark1:34 Iâ-so͘ i-hó chin chōe hoān-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán pīⁿ ê lâng, koh kóaⁿ-chhut chin chōe kúi. I m̄-chún kúi kóng-ōe, in-ūi in chai I sī sím-mi̍h-lâng." 
Mark1:35 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá, thiⁿ iáu-bē kng, Iâ-so͘ chiū khí,lâi, chhut-khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi, tī hia kî-tó." 
Mark1:36 Se-bûn kap tâng-phōaⁿ khì chhē I. 
Mark1:37 In chhē,tio̍h chiū kā I kóng, “Ta̍k-ê lóng teh chhē lí.”" 
Mark1:38 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lán lâi-khì hù-kūn ê chng-siā, góa mā thang tī hia thoân-tō, in-ūi che sī góa chhut,lâi ê bo̍k-te̍k.”" 
Mark1:39 Iâ-so͘ khì Ka-lī-lī ta̍k só͘-chāi, tī in ê hōe-tn̂g thoân-tō koh kóaⁿ-kúi." 
Mark1:40 Ū chi̍t ê bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng lâi khún-kiû Iâ-so͘, kūi lo̍h-khì tùi I kóng, “Lí nā khéng, ōe-tàng hō͘ góa chheng-khì.”" 
Mark1:41 Iâ-so͘ móa-sim lîn-bín, chhun-chhiú kā i bong, kóng, “Góa khéng, hō͘ lí chheng-khì!”" 
Mark1:42 I ê bâ-hong sûi-sî bô,khì, i chiū chheng-khì." 
Mark1:43 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî kiò i lī-khui, giâm-giâm kā i hoan-hù," 
Mark1:44 kóng, “Chhian-bān m̄-thang kā lâng kóng. Put-kò lí tio̍h khì hō͘ chè-si giām, koh chiàu Mô͘-se ê kui-tēng ūi-tio̍h lí ū tit-tio̍h chheng-khì hiàn chè-mi̍h, thang tùi chèng-lâng chèng-bêng.”" 
Mark1:45 M̄-kú i chi̍t-ē chhut,khì, chiū sì-kòe soan-thoân pò-iông chit-ê siau-sit, tì-kàu Iâ-so͘ bōe-tàng kong-khai ji̍p-siâⁿ, soah tio̍h tòa tī siâⁿ-gōa phian-phiah ê só͘-chāi. Chèng-lâng iû-goân tùi ta̍k só͘-chāi khì chhē I." 
Mark2:1 Kúi ji̍t āu, Iâ-so͘ koh khì Ka-pek-lông, ū siau-sit thoân kóng I tī chhù-lāi,"
