Mark2:2 chiū ū chin chōe lâng chū-chi̍p óa,lâi, soah lóng bô khang-ūi, liân mn̂g-kháu to bô. Iâ-so͘ tùi in teh káng-tō ê sî," 
Mark2:3 ū sì ê lâng kng chi̍t ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng lâi I hia. 
Mark2:4 In-ūi lâng chin chōe, bōe-tàng kng-khì kàu Iâ-so͘ ê bīn-chêng, in chiū tī I téng-bīn ê chhù-téng thiah chi̍t khang, hō͘ hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng tó tī chhn̂g-pho͘ lūi,lo̍h-khì." 
Mark2:5 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-kìⁿ in ê sìn-sim, chiū tùi hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng, “Siàu-liân-lâng, lí ê chōe sià-bián lah!”" 
Mark2:6 Ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su chē tī hia, sim-lāi teh gī-lūn," 
Mark2:7 “Chit-ê lâng ná ōe án-ni kóng? I teh siat-to̍k Siōng-tè! To̍k-it ê Siōng-tè í-gōa, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng sià-chōe?”" 
Mark2:8 Iâ-so͘ lāi-sim sûi-sî chai-iáⁿ in án-ni teh gī-lūn, chiū tùi in kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín sim-lāi teh chit-būn chit-ê tāi-chì?" 
Mark2:9 Tùi poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng ‘Lí ê chōe sià-bián lah’, á-sī kóng ‘Khí,lâi, giâ lí ê chhn̂g-pho͘ khí-lâi kiâⁿ’, tó chi̍t hāng khah kán-tan?" 
Mark2:10 Put-kò góa beh hō͘ lín chai Jîn-chú tī tōe-chiūⁿ ū sià-chōe ê koân-pèng.” Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng," 
Mark2:11 “Góa kā lí kóng, khí,lâi, giâ lí ê chhn̂g-pho͘, tńg-khì lín tau!”" 
Mark2:12 I chiū khí,lâi, sûi-sî giâ i ê chhn̂g-pho͘, tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kiâⁿ,chhut-khì. Chèng-lâng lóng tōa tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè kóng, “Goán chêng-kàu-taⁿ m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán tāi-chì!”" 
Mark2:13 Iâ-so͘ koh khì Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ, ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng lâi I hia, I chiū kā in kà-sī." 
Mark2:14 Iâ-so͘ keng-kè ê sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-le̍k-hui ê kiáⁿ Lī-bī chē tī sè-koan, chiū tùi i kóng, “Lâi tè góa!” Lī-bī chiū khí-lâi tè Iâ-so͘." 
Mark2:15 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ tī Lī-bī in tau chia̍h-pn̄g. Ū chin chōe ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chōe-jîn mā kap Iâ-so͘ í-ki̍p I ê bûn-tô͘ chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g, in-ūi ū chin chōe lâng teh tè Iâ-so͘." 
Mark2:16 Chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kap chōe-jîn í-ki̍p ba̍uh-sè,ê chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g, chiū tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ I kap ba̍uh-sè,ê í-ki̍p chōe-jîn chòe-hé chia̍h?”" 
Mark2:17 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kā in kóng, “Kiān-khong,ê bô su-iàu i-seng, phòa-pīⁿ,ê chiah ū su-iàu. Góa lâi, m̄-sī beh chio gī-lâng, sī beh chio chōe-jîn.”" 
Mark2:18 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng teh kìm-chia̍h. Ū lâng lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “ Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê bûn-tô͘ kìm-chia̍h, sī-án-chóaⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ bô kìm-chia̍h?”" 
Mark2:19 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sin-lông iáu kap hun-iàn ê lâng-kheh chòe-hé ê sî, lâng-kheh kiám ōe kìm-chia̍h? In iáu kap sin-lông chòe-hé ê sî bōe kìm-chia̍h." 
Mark2:20 Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, sin-lông ōe hō͘ lâng tùi in tiong-kan lia̍h,khì, hit-sî in chiū ōe kìm-chia̍h." 
Mark2:21 “Bô lâng ēng bô kiu-chúi ê pò͘ khì pó͘ kū-saⁿ. Nā án-ni chòe, hit-tè sin-pò͘ ōe kiù-li̍h kū-saⁿ, tian-tò phòa koh-khah tōa-khang." 
Mark2:22 Mā bô lâng chiong sin-chiú ji̍p tī kū phê-tē. Nā án-ni chòe, sin-chiú ōe kā phê-tē piak-phòa, chiú lâu,chhut-lâi, phê-tē mā pháiⁿ,khì. Sin-chiú eng-kai ji̍p tī sin phê-tē!”" 
Mark2:23 Ū chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tùi be̍h-hn̂g keng-kè. I ê bûn-tô͘ ná kiâⁿ ná tiah be̍h-sūi." 
Mark2:24 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ! In sī-án-chóaⁿ tī An-hioh-ji̍t chòe bōe-ēng-tit chòe ê tāi-chì?”" 
Mark2:25 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng pak-tó͘ iau su-iàu chia̍h-mi̍h ê sî só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì?" 
Mark2:26 A-pí-a-tha chòe tōa-chè-si ê sî, Tāi-pi̍t ji̍p-khì Siōng-tè ê tiān chia̍h hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ, mā hō͘ tè i ê lâng chia̍h; chit-khoán piáⁿ chè-si í-gōa ê lâng bōe-ēng-tit chia̍h.”" 
Mark2:27 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “An-hioh-ji̍t sī ūi-tio̍h lâng lâi siat-li̍p; lâng m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h An-hioh-ji̍t lâi chhòng-chō." 
Mark2:28 Só͘-í, Jîn-chú mā-sī An-hioh-ji̍t ê Chú.”" 
Mark3:1 Iâ-so͘ koh ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g, tī hia ū chi̍t ê chi̍t ki chhiú khê,khì ê lâng." 
Mark3:2 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng teh tng-tán khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ tī An-hioh-ji̍t ōe kā chit-ê lâng i-tī á bōe, thang kā I kò." 
Mark3:3 Iâ-so͘ tùi hit-ê chhiú khê,khì ê lâng kóng, “Khí,lâi, lâi tiong-ng chia.”" 
Mark3:4 Jiân-āu I mn̄g chèng-lâng, “Tī An-hioh-ji̍t, chòe hó-sū á-sī chòe pháiⁿ-sū, kiù sìⁿ-miā á-sī hāi sìⁿ-miā, tó chi̍t hāng ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat?” In lóng tiām-tiām." 
Mark3:5 Iâ-so͘ siū-khì, chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā in khòaⁿ, ūi-tio̍h in ê ngī-sim iu-siong, chiū tùi hit-ê lâng kóng, “Chhiú chhun,chhut-lâi!” I chhiú chhun,chhut-lâi, chiū ho̍k-goân." 
Mark3:6 Hiah-ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chiū lī-khui hōe-tn̂g, sûi-sî kap Hi-lu̍t-tóng ê lâng tàu-tīn kè-bô͘ tùi-hù Iâ-so͘, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ kā I hāi-sí." 
Mark3:7 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ thè-khì Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ, ū chi̍t tōa-tīn Ka-lī-lī -lâng tè I khì; koh ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì, tùi Iû-thài, Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Í-thó͘-mái, Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ, í-ki̍p Thài-ní kap Se-tùn chiu-ûi lâi chhē I." 
Mark3:8  
Mark3:9 In-ūi lâng chin chōe, Iâ-so͘ hoan-hù bûn-tô͘ kā I chún-pī chi̍t chiah chûn, chiah bián hō͘ lâng kā I khoeh píⁿ,khì." 
Mark3:10 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ bat i-hó chin chōe pīⁿ-lâng, só͘-í só͘-ū ê pīⁿ-lâng lóng khoeh óa-lâi beh kā I bong." 
Mark3:11 Hiah-ê siâ-sîn chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, chiū phak tī I ê bīn-chêng, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ!”" 
Mark3:12 Iâ-so͘ giâm-giâm bēng-lēng in m̄-thang tùi lâng thoân-iông I ê tāi-chì. 
Mark3:13 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-soaⁿ, tiàu-chi̍p I só͘ ì-ài ê lâng, in chiū lâi." 
Mark3:14 I siat-li̍p cha̍p-jī lâng, chheng in chòe sù-tô͘, sī beh hō͘ in kap I chòe-hé, koh chhe in khì thoân-tō," 
Mark3:15 mā hō͘ in ū koân-pèng kóaⁿ-kúi. 
Mark3:16 I só͘ jīm-bēng ê cha̍p-jī lâng chiū-sī: Se-bûn — Iâ-so͘ kā i kiò-chòe Pí-tek," 
Mark3:17 Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap i ê sió-tī Iok-hān — Iâ-so͘ kā in kiò-chòe Poàn-nî-kî, ì-sù sī “Lûi-kong-á-kiáⁿ”," 
Mark3:18 koh ū An-tek-lia̍t, Hui-le̍k, Pa-to-lô-mái, Má-thài, To-má, A-le̍k-hui ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok, Ta̍t-thài, Kek-chìn-tóng ê Se-bûn," 
Mark3:19 kap chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi. 
Mark3:20 Iâ-so͘ tńg-khì chhù,ni̍h. Ū chi̍t tīn lâng koh chū-chi̍p óa,lâi, Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ soah liân pn̄g to bōe-kò͘-tit chia̍h." 
Mark3:21 I ê chhin-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì chiū chhut-lâi beh kā I chó͘-chí, in-ūi in kóng “I cheng-sîn sit-siông!”" 
Mark3:22 Tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lo̍h,lâi ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kóng, “I sī hō͘ Pia̍t-se-pok hū-sin, khò kúi-ông teh kóaⁿ-kúi.”" 
Mark3:23 Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi, ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng, “Sat-tàn ná ōe kóaⁿ Sat-tàn?" 
Mark3:24 Kok-ka nā ka-kī hun-cheng, hit-ê kok-ka chiū khiā bōe tiâu." 
Mark3:25 Ka-têng nā ka-kī hun-cheng, hit-ê ka-têng mā khiā bōe tiâu." 
Mark3:26 Sat-tàn nā ka-kī kong-kek, hun-cheng, i khiā bōe tiâu, it-tēng ōe bia̍t-bông." 
Mark3:27 “Bô lâng ōe-tàng ji̍p-khì ióng-sū ê chhù chhiúⁿ i ê châi-bu̍t; tio̍h seng kā i pa̍k,khí-lâi, chiah ōe-tàng kiap i ê chhù." 
Mark3:28 “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lâng bô-lūn hoān sím-mi̍h chōe, kóng sím-mi̍h pòng-to̍k ê ōe, lóng ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Mark3:29 M̄-kú bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng siat-to̍k Sèng Sîn, éng-oán bōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián, i sī hoān-tio̍h éng-oán ê chōe.”" 
Mark3:30 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe sī in-ūi in kóng “I hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin”. 
Mark3:31 Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú kap I ê hiaⁿ-tī lâi, khiā tī gōa-bīn, chhe lâng khì kiò I." 
Mark3:32 Ū chi̍t tīn lâng chē tī Iâ-so͘ chiu-ûi; ū lâng kā I kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ, lí ê lāu-bú kap lí ê sió-tī sió-bē tī gōa-bīn beh chhē lí!”" 
Mark3:33 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī góa ê lāu-bú, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī?”" 
Mark3:34 Jiân-āu I tùi chē tī chiu-ûi ê lâng chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā in khòaⁿ, kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, góa ê lāu-bú, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī!" 
Mark3:35 Si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè chí-ì ê lâng chiū-sī góa ê hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, kap lāu-bú.”" 
Mark4:1 Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn tī Ka-lī-lī ô͘-piⁿ teh kà-sī lâng. Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng chū-chi̍p óa-lâi I hia, I soah tio̍h khì chē tī chûn-téng; chûn tī ô͘,ni̍h, kui tōa-tīn lâng tī hōaⁿ-téng." 
Mark4:2 Iâ-so͘ ēng phì-jū kà-sī in chin chōe hāng sū. I kà-sī ê sî kā in kóng: 
Mark4:3 “Tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ! Ū chi̍t ê iā chéng-chí ê lâng chhut-khì iā chéng-chí. 
Mark4:4 I iā ê sî, ū-ê chéng-chí lak tī lō͘-piⁿ, chiáu-á pe,lâi, kā i chia̍h-liáu-liáu." 
Mark4:5 Ū-ê lak tī chio̍h-thâu tōe, thô͘ chió ê só͘-chāi, in-ūi thô͘ bô chhim, chin kín chiū puh-gê," 
Mark4:6 ji̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē chhut, kā in pha̍k,tio̍h, in-ūi bô kun chiū ta,khì." 
Mark4:7 Ū-ê lak tī chhì-phè lāi, chhì-á tōa-châng,khí-lâi, kā i hip,sí, chiū bô kiat-si̍t." 
Mark4:8 Ū-ê lak tī hó thó͘-tōe, chiū hoat-íⁿ, sêng-tióng, kiat-si̍t; ū-ê kiat saⁿ-cha̍p pē, ū-ê la̍k-cha̍p pē, ū-ê chi̍t-pah pē.”" 
Mark4:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Ū hī-khang thang thiaⁿ ê lâng, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Mark4:10 Iâ-so͘ ka-kī chi̍t ê ê sî, tī I chiu-ûi ê lâng kap cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ lâi mn̄g I chiah-ê phì-jū ê ì-sù." 
Mark4:11 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng, “Siōng-tè-kok ê ò-pì í-keng ū hō͘ lín, m̄-kú tùi gōa-lâng ta̍k-hāng lóng sī ēng phì-jū," 
Mark4:12 beh hō͘ In khòaⁿ koh khòaⁿ, mā khòaⁿ bô, thiaⁿ koh thiaⁿ, mā bô liáu-kái; nā m̄-sī án-ni, in ōe hôe-sim-tńg-ì, Siōng-tè chiū kā in sià-bián.”" 
Mark4:13 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g in kóng, “Chit-ê phì-jū lín bōe liáu-kái sī,bô? Án-ni lín ná ōe bêng-pe̍k kî-tha só͘-ū ê phì-jū?" 
Mark4:14 Iā chéng-chí,ê sī iā Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit. 
Mark4:15 Iā tī lō͘-piⁿ,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, Sat-tàn sûi-sî lâi, kā iā tī in sim-lāi ê sìn-sit chhiúⁿ,khì." 
Mark4:16 Siâng-khoán, iā tī chio̍h-thâu tōe,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, sûi-sî hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū," 
Mark4:17 put-kò tī in ê sim-lāi tèng-kun bô chhim, tòng bōe kú, chi̍t-ē ūi-tio̍h sìn-sit tú-tio̍h hoān-lān á-sī pek-hāi, sûi-sî pàng-sak." 
Mark4:18 Iā tī chhì-phè lāi,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit liáu-āu," 
Mark4:19 in-ūi seng-oa̍h ê khòa-lū, chîⁿ-châi ê bê-he̍k, kap kî-tha ta̍k-khoán ê su-io̍k ji̍p-khì sim-lāi, kā só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit hip,sí, soah bōe kiat-si̍t." 
Mark4:20 Hiah-ê iā tī hó thó͘-tōe,ê, sī chí lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū chiū kiat-si̍t; ū-ê saⁿ-cha̍p pē, ū-ê la̍k-cha̍p pē, ū-ê chi̍t-pah pē.”" 
Mark4:21 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in kóng, “Kiám ū lâng tiám-teng ēng táu khàm,khí-lâi á-sī khǹg tī bîn-chhn̂g kha, bô kā i chhāi tī teng-tâi téng?" 
Mark4:22 In-ūi it-chhè ún-ba̍t,ê bô chi̍t hāng bōe hián-lō͘; it-chhè am-khàm,ê bô chi̍t hāng bōe lō͘-hiān. 
Mark4:23 Ū hī-khang thang thiaⁿ ê lâng, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Mark4:24 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Tio̍h chù-ì lín thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê. Lín ēng sím-mi̍h niû niû hō͘ lâng, Siōng-tè ōe ēng siâng-khoán ê niû niû hō͘ lín, sīm-chì hō͘ lín koh-khah chōe." 
Mark4:25 In-ūi ū,ê, beh hō͘ i koh-khah chōe; bô,ê, liân i só͘-ū,ê mā beh kā i chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi.”" 
Mark4:26 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Siōng-tè-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng chiong chéng-chí iā tī tōe,ni̍h." 
Mark4:27 I àm-sî khì khùn, ji̍t,sî khí,lâi, chéng-chí teh puh-gê tōa-châng, i m̄ chai sī-án-chóaⁿ ōe án-ni." 
Mark4:28 Thó͘-tōe chū-jiân seng-sán ngó͘-kok, tāi-seng puh-gê, āu-lâi thò͘-sūi, chòe-āu pá-sūi." 
Mark4:29 Ngó͘-kok sek ê sî, sûi-sî ēng liâm-le̍k-á siu-koah, in-ūi siu-sêng ê sî kàu lah.”" 
Mark4:30 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g kóng, “Lán beh ēng sím-mi̍h lâi pí-phēng Siōng-tè-kok, beh ēng sím-mi̍h phì-jū lâi soat-bêng?" 
Mark4:31 Siōng-tè-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t lia̍p kòa-chhài-chí, iā-lo̍h tōe ê sî sī tōe-chiūⁿ chéng-chí tiong siōng sòe-lia̍p,ê;" 
Mark4:32 iā,lo̍h-khì, tōa-châng,khí-lâi, pí só͘-ū ê chhài-soe koh-khah tōa-châng, hoat-chhut tōa-ki oe, sīm-chì khong-tiong ê chiáu-á to ōe-tàng tī chhiū-ńg ē chòe siū.”" 
Mark4:33 Iâ-so͘ ēng chin chōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-khoán ê phì-jū tùi chèng-lâng soan-káng sìn-sit, lóng chiàu in ōe bêng-pe̍k,ê kā in kóng." 
Mark4:34 I bô ēng pa̍t-khoán ê hong-sek, chí-ū ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng, put-kò kan-ta kap ka-kī ê bûn-tô͘ chòe-hé ê sî chiah ta̍k-hāng kā in soat-bêng." 
Mark4:35 Hit-ji̍t thiⁿ àm ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lán kè lâi-khì hit-pêng hōaⁿ.”" 
Mark4:36 Bûn-tô͘ chiū lī-khui kûn-chiòng chiūⁿ-chûn, kap í-keng tī chûn-téng ê Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé khì. Ū kúi-nā chiah chûn mā chòe-hé khì." 
Mark4:37 Hut-jiân khí tōa-hong, éng phoah-ji̍p chûn-lāi, chûn soah hō͘ chúi im kàu beh móa." 
Mark4:38 Iâ-so͘ tī chûn-bé khòa chím-thâu teh khùn; bûn-tô͘ kā I kiò-chhíⁿ, kóng, “Lāu-su, lán teh-beh bô-miā lo͘h, lí bô iàu-kín o͘h?”" 
Mark4:39 Iâ-so͘ khí,lâi, chek-pī hong, koh bēng-lēng éng, kóng, “Chēng,lo̍h-khì! Tiāⁿ,lo̍h-lâi!” Hong tiām,khì, ô͘ chiū chēng-chēng-chēng." 
Mark4:40 Iâ-so͘ tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín ná hiah-ni̍h kiaⁿ? Lín iáu bô sìn-sim sī,bô?”" 
Mark4:41 In hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “Chit-ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng, liân hong kap éng to sūn-ho̍k!”" 
Mark5:1 Iâ-so͘ kè-khì Ka-lī-lī-ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ, Kek-la-sim -lâng ê tōe-khu." 
Mark5:2 I chi̍t-ē lo̍h-chûn, ū chi̍t ê hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng tú tùi bōng-á-po͘ chhut,lâi, tú-tio̍h I." 
Mark5:3 Chit-ê lâng lóng tòa tī bōng-á-po͘, lâng ēng thih-liān to kā i liān bōe tiâu." 
Mark5:4 Chin chōe piàn lâng ēng thih-liān kap kha-khàu kā i khún-pa̍k, thih-liān hō͘ i chhoah-tn̄g, kha-khàu hō͘ i kòng-chhùi, bô lâng ū khùi-la̍t kā i chè-ho̍k." 
Mark5:5 I mî-ji̍t tī bōng-á-po͘ á-sī soaⁿ-phiâⁿ loān jióng, koh ēng chio̍h-thâu siong-hāi ka-kī." 
Mark5:6 I tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, chiū cháu-lâi kūi tī I ê bīn-chêng," 
Mark5:7 tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘, lí mài chhap,góa! Góa kí Siōng-tè ê miâ khún-kiû lí m̄-thang khó͘-chhó͘ góa.”" 
Mark5:8 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ ū tùi i kóng, “Siâ-sîn, tùi chit-ê lâng chhut,khì!”" 
Mark5:9 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i, “Lí sím-mi̍h miâ?” I ìn kóng, “Góa ê miâ sī ‘Kun-thoân’, in-ūi goán chin tōa-tīn.”" 
Mark5:10 I pek-chhiat ai-kiû Iâ-so͘ m̄-thang kóaⁿ in lī-khui hit-ê tōe-khu. 
Mark5:11 Hit-sî, hù-kūn ê soaⁿ-phiâⁿ ū chi̍t tōa-kûn ti teh thó-chia̍h." 
Mark5:12 Siâ-sîn kiû Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Hō͘ goán khì ti-kûn hia, thang ji̍p-khì in lāi-bīn.”" 
Mark5:13 Iâ-so͘ chún in. Siâ-sîn chiū chhut,khì, chìn-ji̍p hit-kûn ti; kui-kûn ti, iok ū nn̄g-chheng chiah, tùi soaⁿ-phiâⁿ chông lo̍h-khì ô͘,ni̍h, hō͘ chúi tū-sí." 
Mark5:14 Chhī ti ê lâng chiū kiaⁿ kah cháu-khì siâⁿ-lāi kap hiong-chhoan pò chit-ê siau-sit. Chèng-lâng chiū chhut-lâi beh khòaⁿ ū hoat-seng sím-mi̍h tāi-chì. 
Mark5:15 In lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê hō͘ kúi hū-sin, chiū-sī bat hō͘ “Kun-thoân” tîⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng chē tī hia, ū chhēng-saⁿ, cheng-sîn chèng-siông, chiū chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Mark5:16 Khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng chiū chiong hō͘ kúi hū-sin ê lâng kap ti-kûn só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì kā lâng kóng. 
Mark5:17 In chiū iau-kiû Iâ-so͘ lī-khui in ê tōe-khu. 
Mark5:18 Iâ-so͘ beh chiūⁿ-chûn ê sî, bat hō͘ kúi hū-sin hit-ê lâng kiû Iâ-so͘ chún i chòe-hé khì." 
Mark5:19 Iâ-so͘ m̄-chún, kā i kóng, “Tńg-khì lín tau, lín chhin-lâng hia, chiong Chú lîn-bín lí, tùi lí só͘ chòe hiah-ni̍h tōa ê tāi-chì lóng pò in chai.”" 
Mark5:20 Hit-ê lâng chiū lī-khui, tī Te-ka-pho-lí thoân-iông Iâ-so͘ tùi i só͘ chòe hiah-ni̍h tōa ê tāi-chì; só͘-ū ê lâng lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ kî-koài." 
Mark5:21 Iâ-so͘ koh chē-chûn kè-khì ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ; I tī ô͘-piⁿ, ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng chū-chi̍p óa,lâi." 
Mark5:22 Ū chi̍t ê hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán kiò-chòe Ia̍p-ló͘ lâi, chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū phak tī I ê kha-chêng," 
Mark5:23 khún-kiû I, kóng, “Góa ê sòe-hàn cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ teh-beh sí ah, chhiáⁿ lí lâi kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú, i-hó, hō͘ i ōe oa̍h.”" 
Mark5:24 Iâ-so͘ chiū kap i khì; ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng mā oe-oe-khoeh-khoeh tè I khì. 
Mark5:25 Ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng tì-tio̍h hiat-lāu-pīⁿ cha̍p-jī nî kú; 
Mark5:26 i ū hō͘ chin chōe i-seng khòaⁿ,kè, siū-tio̍h chin chōe thòng-khó͘, koh chîⁿ lóng khai-liáu-liáu, i ê pīⁿ m̄-nā bô khah hó, tian-tò ná siong-tiōng." 
Mark5:27 I ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì, chiū khoeh ji̍p-khì kûn-chiòng lāi-bīn, kiâⁿ óa-khì Iâ-so͘ ê āu-bīn, bong I ê saⁿ." 
Mark5:28 I siūⁿ-kóng, “Góa kan-ta bong-tio̍h I ê saⁿ, pīⁿ chiū ōe hó.”" 
Mark5:29 I ê hiat-lāu sûi-sî chí, kám-kak seng-khu ê pīⁿ í-keng hó." 
Mark5:30 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî chai ū khùi-la̍t tùi I chhut,khì, chiū oa̍t,kè-lâi, mn̄g kûn-chiòng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng bong góa ê saⁿ?”" 
Mark5:31 Bûn-tô͘ ìn kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ kui-tīn lâng teh kā lí khoeh, lí ná ōe kóng ‘Sím-mi̍h-lâng kā góa bong’?”" 
Mark5:32 Iâ-so͘ sì-kho͘-lìn-tńg khòaⁿ chi̍t-ē, ài chai sím-mi̍h-lâng kā I bong." 
Mark5:33 Hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chai tī i sin-chiūⁿ só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah, chiū phak tī Iâ-so͘ kha-chêng, chiong lóng-chóng ê si̍t-chêng kóng,chhut-lâi." 
Mark5:34 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ, lí ê sìn-sim hō͘ lí hó,khì lah, pêng-an tò,khì, lí ê pīⁿ í-keng hó ah.”" 
Mark5:35 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî, ū lâng tùi hōe-tn̂g chú-koán ê chhù lâi, kā Ia̍p-ló͘ kóng, “Lí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ í-keng sí,khì, ná tio̍h koh lô-hoân lāu-su.”" 
Mark5:36 Iâ-so͘ ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h in kóng ê ōe, chiū tùi hōe-tn̂g chú-koán kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ, chí-ū tio̍h sìn!”" 
Mark5:37 I chiū chhōa Pí-tek, Ngá-kok, kap Ngá-kok ê sió-tī Iok-hān chòe-hé khì, í-gōa m̄-chún pa̍t-lâng tè,khì." 
Mark5:38 In lâi kàu hōe-tn̂g chú-koán ê chhù, Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h tiûⁿ-bīn chin loān, ū lâng teh háu, ū lâng tōa-siaⁿ teh khàu." 
Mark5:39 I chi̍t-ē ji̍p,khì chiū kā in kóng, “Lín ná khàu kah loān-chhau-chhau? Chit-ê gín-á m̄-sī sí,khì, sī teh khùn.”" 
Mark5:40 In chiū kā I thí-chhiò, m̄-kú I kā in lóng kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, jiân-āu chhōa gín-á ê pē-bú kap hit saⁿ ê bûn-tô͘ ji̍p-khì gín-á ê pâng-keng." 
Mark5:41 I khan gín-á ê chhiú, tùi i kóng, “Tāi-lī-tāi kó͘-bí!” ì-sù chiū-sī “Cha-bó͘ gín-á, góa kā lí kóng, khí,lâi!”" 
Mark5:42 Cha-bó͘ gín-á sûi-sî peh khí-lâi kiâⁿ, in-ūi i í-keng cha̍p-jī hè. In hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Mark5:43 Iâ-so͘ giâm-giâm kéng-kài in m̄-thang chiong chit-ê tāi-chì hō͘ lâng chai, koh kiò in the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ cha-bó͘ gín-á chia̍h." 
Mark6:1 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hia, tò-khì ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong, bûn-tô͘ tè I khì." 
Mark6:2 An-hioh-ji̍t, I tī hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng. Chin chōe lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê kà-sī, lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ê pún-sū tùi tó-ūi lâi? I tit,tio̍h-ê tàu-tóe sī sím-mi̍h khoán ê tì-hūi? I ê chhiú ná ōe-tàng kiâⁿ chit-khoán sîn-jiah?" 
Mark6:3 I kiám m̄-sī ba̍k-chhiūⁿ? Kiám m̄-sī Má-lī-a ê kiáⁿ, Ngá-kok, Iok-se, Iû-tāi, kap Se-bûn ê hiaⁿ-tī? I ê sió-bē kiám m̄-sī kap lán tòa tī chia?” In soah tùi Iâ-so͘ khí hoán-kám." 
Mark6:4 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Sian-ti tī ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong, ka-kī ê chhin-lâng, ka-kī ê ka-cho̍k í-gōa, it-tēng ōe siū chun-tiōng.”" 
Mark6:5 I tī hia bōe-tàng kiâⁿ sím-mi̍h sîn-jiah, chí-ū kā kúi-ê-á pīⁿ-lâng hōaⁿ-chhiú, kā in i-hó." 
Mark6:6 Iâ-so͘ tùi in ê m̄ sìn kám-kak chin kî-koài. Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ-thàu chiu-ûi ê chng-siā kà-sī lâng. 
Mark6:7 I tiàu-chi̍p cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ lâi, chhe in nn̄g-ê nn̄g-ê chhut,khì, hō͘ in ū koân-pèng thang chè-ap siâ-sîn." 
Mark6:8 I hoan-hù in, chhut-mn̂g ê sî koáiⁿ-á í-gōa sím-mi̍h lóng m̄-thang tòa; m̄-thang tòa chia̍h-mi̍h; m̄-thang tòa lú-hêng-tē; io-tòa lāi-bīn m̄-thang tòa chîⁿ;" 
Mark6:9 chí-ū chhēng liâng-ôe; m̄-thang chhēng nn̄g niá lāi-saⁿ. 
Mark6:10 I koh kā in kóng, “Lín bô-lūn ji̍p-khì sím-mi̍h-lâng ê chhù, tio̍h tòa hia kàu lī-khui hit só͘-chāi." 
Mark6:11 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi, lâng nā m̄ chiap-la̍p lín, m̄ thiaⁿ lín ê kà-sī, lín lī-khui ê sî tio̍h chiong kha,ni̍h ê thô͘-hún pōaⁿ-tiāu, piáu-sī tùi in kéng-kò.”" 
Mark6:12 Sù-tô͘ chiū chhut-khì thoân-tō, khǹg lâng hóe-kái." 
Mark6:13 In koh kóaⁿ-chhut chin chōe kúi, mā ēng iû boah chin chōe pīⁿ-lâng, kā in i-hó." 
Mark6:14 Hi-lu̍t -ông ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê sū, in-ūi I ê miâ thoân-piàn ta̍k só͘-chāi. Ū lâng kóng, “I sī Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, só͘-í ū koân-lêng kiâⁿ chiah-ê sîn-jiah.”" 
Mark6:15 M̄-kú mā ū lâng kóng, “I sī Í-lī-a ”; koh ū lâng kóng, “I sī sian-ti, chhin-chhiūⁿ kó͘-chá ê chi̍t ê sian-ti.”" 
Mark6:16 Hi-lu̍t thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kóng, “Sī góa kā i chām-thâu hit-ê Iok-hān, i ū koh-oa̍h.”" 
Mark6:17 Hi-lu̍t ū phài lâng khì lia̍h Iok-hān, kā i liān tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, goân-in sī Hi-lu̍t ū chhōa sió-tī Hui-le̍k ê bó͘ Hi-lô-tí chòe bó͘;" 
Mark6:18 in-ūi Iok-hān tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ tùi Hi-lu̍t kóng, “Lí chhōa sió-tī ê bó͘ bô ha̍p-hoat!”" 
Mark6:19 Hi-lô-tí sim-lāi tùi Iok-hān khioh-hūn, siūⁿ-beh kā i thâi, m̄-kú bōe-tàng chiàu sim-goān," 
Mark6:20 in-ūi Hi-lu̍t kiaⁿ Iok-hān, chai-iáⁿ i sī chèng-gī koh sèng-kiat ê lâng, ū kā i pó-hō͘. Hi-lu̍t ta̍k-piàn thiaⁿ Iok-hān ê ōe, hui-siông put-an, iáu-kú chin ài thiaⁿ." 
Mark6:21 Hi-lô-tí ê ki-hōe lâi lah. Hi-lu̍t choh-siⁿ-ji̍t ê sî, pān iàn-se̍k chhiáⁿ bûn-bú-pah-koaⁿ kap Ka-lī-lī bîn-kan ê léng-siù." 
Mark6:22 Hi-lô-tí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ji̍p-lâi thiàu-bú, hō͘ Hi-lu̍t kap chāi-chō ê kùi-pin hoaⁿ-hí. Ông kā hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á kóng, “Khòaⁿ lí ài sím-mi̍h, chòe lí kiû, góa lóng beh hō͘ lí.”" 
Mark6:23 Hi-lu̍t koh tùi i soan-sè kóng, “Lí bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h, liân góa ông-kok ê chi̍t-pòaⁿ mā ōe hō͘ lí.”" 
Mark6:24 Cha-bó͘ gín-á chhut-khì mn̄g i ê lāu-bú, “Góa tio̍h kiû sím-mi̍h?” I ê lāu-bú kā i kóng, “Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān ê thâu.”" 
Mark6:25 I sûi-sî kóaⁿ tò-tńg,lâi, tùi ông iau-kiû kóng, “Chhiáⁿ lí sûi-sî chiong Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān ê thâu-khak khǹg tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h hō͘ góa.”" 
Mark6:26 Ông ê sim hui-siông kan-khó͘, put-kò in-ūi í-keng tī kùi-pin ê bīn-chêng chiù-chōa, chiū bô kā i kū-choa̍t." 
Mark6:27 Ông sûi-sî chhe chi̍t ê kéng-ōe khì the̍h Iok-hān ê thâu. Kéng-ōe chiū khì kaⁿ,ni̍h chām Iok-hān ê thâu," 
Mark6:28 chiong thâu-khak hē tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h phâng-lâi hō͘ cha-bó͘ gín-á, cha-bó͘ gín-á chiū hō͘ i ê lāu-bú." 
Mark6:29 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū lâi siu i ê sin-si, kā i bâi-chòng tī bōng,ni̍h." 
Mark6:30 Sù-tô͘ tńg-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, chiong in só͘ chòe só͘ kà-sī,ê lóng kā I pò-kò." 
Mark6:31 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Án-ni, lín mā tio̍h ka-kī khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi sió-khóa hioh-khùn chi̍t-ē.” In-ūi chhut-chhut-ji̍p-ji̍p ê lâng chin chōe, in liân chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî-kan to bô." 
Mark6:32 In chiū chē-chûn kan-ta in ka-kī khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi. 
Mark6:33 Chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h in lī-khui, jīn-chhut sī in, chiū tùi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī sūn lio̍k-lō͘ cháu chìn-chêng, pí in tāi-seng kàu hit só͘-chāi." 
Mark6:34 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng chiū khó-lîn in, in-ūi in chhin-chhiūⁿ bô bo̍k-chiá ê iûⁿ. I chiū kà-sī in chin chōe hāng sū." 
Mark6:35 Sî-kan í-keng chin òaⁿ, bûn-tô͘ óa-lâi kā I kóng, “Chit-ê só͘-chāi chin phian-phiah, sî-kan mā chin òaⁿ lah." 
Mark6:36 Chhiáⁿ kā in kái-sàn, hō͘ in khì hù-kūn ê hiong-chhoan chng-siā ka-kī bóe mi̍h-kiāⁿ chia̍h.”" 
Mark6:37 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín hō͘ in chia̍h.” Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g kóng, “Goán tio̍h khì bóe nn̄g-pah ê gûn-á ê piáⁿ hō͘ in chia̍h o͘h?”" 
Mark6:38 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín ū jōa-chōe piáⁿ, khì khòaⁿ-bāi leh!” In khòaⁿ-liáu chiū kóng, “Ū gō͘ ê; mā ū nn̄g bé hî.”" 
Mark6:39 Iâ-so͘ hoan-hù bûn-tô͘ kā chèng-lâng hun-cho͘, hō͘ in chē tī chhiⁿ-chhùi ê chháu-po͘." 
Mark6:40 Chèng-lâng chiū chi̍t-cho͘ chi̍t-cho͘ chē,lo̍h-khì, ū ê chi̍t-pah ê, ū ê gō͘-cha̍p ê." 
Mark6:41 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ the̍h hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ kap nn̄g bé hî, ǹg thiⁿ kám-siā, peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘ khì pun hō͘ chèng-lâng. I koh chiong hit nn̄g bé hî pun hō͘ chèng-lâng." 
Mark6:42 Tāi-ke lóng chia̍h, chia̍h kàu pá." 
Mark6:43 Bûn-tô͘ khioh chia̍h chhun ê piáⁿ-iù-á kap hî-sut-á, móa cha̍p-jī nâ." 
Mark6:44 Chia̍h-piáⁿ,ê, kan-ta ta-po͘-lâng chiū ū gō͘-chheng." 
Mark6:45 Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî pek I ê bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn seng kè-khì tùi-bīn hōaⁿ, khì Pek-sài-tāi, ka-kī lâu teh kái-sàn kûn-chiòng." 
Mark6:46 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui kûn-chiòng liáu-āu chiū chiūⁿ-soaⁿ kî-tó. 
Mark6:47 Thiⁿ àm ê sî, chûn kiâⁿ kàu ô͘ ê tiong-ng; Iâ-so͘ ka-kī chi̍t ê tī hōaⁿ-téng." 
Mark6:48 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h bûn-tô͘ chìⁿ-hong teh kò-chiúⁿ, kò kah chin kan-khó͘. Thiⁿ beh kng ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn ǹg in hia kiâⁿ,khì, siūⁿ-beh tùi piⁿ,á kè,khì." 
Mark6:49 Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn teh kiâⁿ, siūⁿ-kóng sī kúi, chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah," 
Mark6:50 in-ūi tāi-ke lóng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, chin kiaⁿ. Iâ-so͘ sûi-sî kā in kóng, “An-sim, sī góa, bián kiaⁿ!”" 
Mark6:51 Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-chûn khì kap in chòe-hé, hong chiū tiām,khì. Bûn-tô͘ hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ," 
Mark6:52 in-ūi in bô bêng-pe̍k hit-ê piáⁿ ê ì-gī, sim iáu chin tūn." 
Mark6:53 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ kè ô͘ liáu-āu tī Kek-nî-sat-le̍k chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ, kā chûn pha tī hōaⁿ-piⁿ." 
Mark6:54 In chi̍t-ē lo̍h-chûn, chèng-lâng sûi-sî jīn-chhut Iâ-so͘," 
Mark6:55 chiū sì-kòe kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu, thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tī tó-ūi chiū ēng chhn̂g-pho͘ kng pīⁿ-lâng khì hia." 
Mark6:56 Iâ-so͘ bô-lūn kiâⁿ kàu sím-mi̍h chng-siā, siâⁿ-chhī, hiong-chhoan, lâng chiū kā pīⁿ-lâng kng-lâi khǹg tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu, khún-kiû Iâ-so͘ siōng-bô mā hō͘ pīⁿ-lâng bong-tio̍h I saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu; só͘-ū bong,tio̍h ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Mark7:1 Ū hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap chi̍t-kóa tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lâi ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tàu-tīn lâi chhē Iâ-so͘. 
Mark7:2 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ ū lâng ēng bô chheng-khì ê chhiú, chiū-sī bô sóe-chhiú chiū chia̍h-pn̄g." 
Mark7:3 Goân-lâi Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng chip-siú chó͘-sian ê thoân-thóng, nā bô chiàu hoat-tō͘ sóe-chhiú chiū bô chia̍h-pn̄g;" 
Mark7:4 tùi chhī-tiûⁿ tò,lâi, nā bô sóe mā bô chia̍h. In koh chun-siú kî-tha chin chōe thoân-thóng ê kui-lē, chhin-chhiūⁿ sóe poe-á, koàn-á, tâng-khì, kap chhn̂g-pho͘, téng." 
Mark7:5 Só͘-í, Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ ēng bô chheng-khì ê chhiú chia̍h-pn̄g, ûi-hoān chó͘-sian ê thoân-thóng?”" 
Mark7:6 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “ Í-sài-a só͘ kóng koan-hē lín chiah-ê ké-hó ê lâng ê ū-giân chin tio̍h; i án-ni siá: Chit-ê chú-bîn ēng chhùi-tûn chun-kèng góa, in ê sim khiok lī-khui góa hn̄g-hn̄g." 
Mark7:7 In ēng lâng ê kui-lē chòe góa ê kà-sī kà-sī lâng; in kèng-pài góa lóng bô-chhái-kang. 
Mark7:8 Lín kèng-jiân pàng-sak Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng, khì chip-siú lâng ê thoân-thóng.”" 
Mark7:9 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Lín ūi-tio̍h beh chip-siú thoân-thóng, ēng kháu-biāu ê hong-hoat lâi kū-choa̍t Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng." 
Mark7:10 Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín ‘Tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú’, koh kóng ‘Mē lāu-pē á-sī mē lāu-bú ê lâng eng-kai chhú-sí’." 
Mark7:11 M̄-kú lín kóng, lâng nā tùi ka-kī ê lāu-pē á-sī lāu-bú kóng ‘Góa eng-kai hō͘ lí,ê í-keng chòe Kok-ní-pán’ — Kok-ní-pán ê ì-sù chiū-sī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè ê lé-mi̍h," 
Mark7:12 lín chiū chún i bián hōng-ióng ka-kī ê pē-bú. 
Mark7:13 Lín ēng lín só͘ thoân-siū ê thoân-thóng lâi hòe-tû Siōng-tè ê ōe. Lín koh chòe chin chōe chit-khoán ê tāi-chì.” 
Mark7:14 Iâ-so͘ koh kiò chèng-lâng lâi, kā in kóng, “Lín tāi-ke lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ góa ê ōe, tio̍h liáu-kái:" 
Mark7:15 Tùi gōa-bīn ji̍p-khì lâng lāi-bīn ê mi̍h, bô chi̍t hāng ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì; tùi lāi-bīn chhut,lâi-ê, chiah ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì.”" 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui chèng-lâng, ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi, I ê bûn-tô͘ chiū mn̄g I chit-ê phì-jū ê ì-sù." 
Mark7:18 I kā in kóng, “Án-ni liân lín to bô bêng-pe̍k o͘h? Lín kiám bô liáu-kái, tùi gōa-bīn ji̍p-khì lâng lāi-bīn,ê lóng bōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì?" 
Mark7:19 In-ūi tùi gōa-bīn ji̍p,khì-ê m̄-sī ji̍p-khì sim-lāi, sī ji̍p-khì pak-tó͘ lāi, āu-lâi pàng lo̍h-khì piān-só͘.” Iâ-so͘ án-ni kóng sī chí só͘-ū ê chia̍h-mi̍h lóng chheng-khì." 
Mark7:20 I koh kóng, “Tùi lâng lāi-bīn chhut,lâi-ê chiah ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì." 
Mark7:21 In-ūi tùi lāi-bīn chhut,lâi-ê, chiū-sī tùi lâng ê sim chhut,ê, ū pháiⁿ liām-thâu, su-thong, thau-the̍h, hiong-sat," 
Mark7:22 kan-îm, tham-sim, siâ-ok, kan-chà, hòng-chhiòng, oàn-tò͘, húi-pòng, kiau-ngō͘, bōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t sī-hui." 
Mark7:23 Chiah-ê it-chhè siâ-ok ê sū lóng sī tùi lāi-bīn chhut,lâi-ê, che chiah ōe hō͘ lâng bô chheng-khì.”" 
Mark7:24 Iâ-so͘ tùi hia chhut-hoat khì Thài-ní tōe-khu. I ji̍p-khì chi̍t keng chhù, bô ài lâng chai, put-kò bô hoat-tō͘ pó-bi̍t." 
Mark7:25 Sûi-sî ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì, chiū lâi kūi tī I ê kha-chêng; i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin." 
Mark7:26 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī chhut-sì tī Sū-lī-a Hui-nî-ki ê Hi-la̍h -lâng. I kiû Iâ-so͘ kā i ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kóaⁿ-kúi. 
Mark7:27 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Tio̍h seng hō͘ gín-á chia̍h; the̍h gín-á ê chia̍h-mi̍h hiat hō͘ káu-á chia̍h, m̄ hó.”" 
Mark7:28 Hū-jîn-lâng ìn kóng, “Chú ah, toh-á kha ê káu-á to chia̍h gín-á ê piáⁿ-iù-á.”" 
Mark7:29 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “In-ūi lí chit-kù ōe, lí thang tńg,khì; kúi í-keng lī-khui lí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ lah!”" 
Mark7:30 Hū-jîn-lâng tńg-khì in tau, khòaⁿ-tio̍h cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tó tī chhn̂g,ni̍h, kúi í-keng lī-khui." 
Mark7:31 Iâ-so͘ koh lī-khui Thài-ní tōe-khu, keng-kè Se-tùn í-ki̍p Te-ka-pho-lí tōe-khu, lâi kàu Ka-lī-lī-ô͘." 
Mark7:32 Ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê bōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ koh bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, khún-kiû Iâ-so͘ kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú." 
Mark7:33 Iâ-so͘ chhōa hit-ê lâng lī-khui chèng-lâng khì piⁿ,á, chhng chńg-thâu-á ji̍p-khì i siang-pêng ê hī-khang, koh phùi-nōa boah i ê chi̍h," 
Mark7:34 jiân-āu ǹg thiⁿ, thó͘-khùi, kā i kóng, “Í-hoat-tāi”, ì-sù chiū-sī “Khui!”" 
Mark7:35 Hit-lâng ê hī-khang sûi-sî khui, chi̍h-kun lēng, kóng-ōe kóng kah chin chheng-chhó." 
Mark7:36 Iâ-so͘ giâm-giâm bēng-lēng in m̄-thang kā lâng kóng, m̄-kú I jú kìm-chí, in jú chhut-la̍t pò-iông." 
Mark7:37 Tāi-ke lóng hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “I ta̍k-hāng lóng chòe kah chin hó, liân bōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng to ōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng to ōe kóng-ōe!”" 
Mark8:1 Kè bô kúi ji̍t, koh ū chi̍t tōa-tīn kûn-chiòng chū-chi̍p. In bô mi̍h thang chia̍h, Iâ-so͘ chiū kiò I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi, kā in kóng," 
Mark8:2 “Góa chin khó-lîn chit-tīn lâng, in-ūi in í-keng kap góa chòe-hé saⁿ ji̍t kú, hiān-chāi bô mi̍h thang chia̍h lah." 
Mark8:3 Góa nā hō͘ in sì-sòaⁿ iau-iau tńg-khì in tau, in ōe tī lō͘-tiong hūn-tó, in-ūi ū lâng tùi chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi lâi.”" 
Mark8:4 Bûn-tô͘ kā I kóng, “Tī chit-ê phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi, beh khì tó-ūi chhē chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ chiah-ê lâng chia̍h pá?”" 
Mark8:5 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Lín ū jōa-chōe piáⁿ?” In kóng, “Chhit ê.”" 
Mark8:6 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng kûn-chiòng chē lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha, jiân-āu the̍h hit chhit ê piáⁿ, kám-siā, peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘ khì pun, in chiū pun hō͘ kûn-chiòng." 
Mark8:7 In mā ū kúi-nā bé sòe bé hî, Iâ-so͘ kám-siā liáu, kiò bûn-tô͘ the̍h-khì pun." 
Mark8:8 In lóng chia̍h, chia̍h kàu pá, koh khioh chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á, lóng-chóng khioh chhit láng." 
Mark8:9 Jîn-sò͘ iok ū sì-chheng. Iâ-so͘ kā in kái-sàn," 
Mark8:10 jiân-āu sûi-sî kap bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn, khì Tāi-má-ló͘-tha ê kéng-lāi." 
Mark8:11 Chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng lâi chhē Iâ-so͘, kap I piān-lūn. In siūⁿ-beh kā I chhì-thàm, iau-kiû I kiâⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi ê sîn-jiah." 
Mark8:12 Iâ-so͘ tùi sim-tóe thó͘ chi̍t ê tōa-khùi, kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ chit sè-tāi ê lâng kiû sîn-jiah? Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, bōe koh ū sîn-jiah hō͘ chit sè-tāi ê lâng.”" 
Mark8:13 I chiū lī-khui in, koh chiūⁿ-chûn kè-khì ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ." 
Mark8:14 Bûn-tô͘ bōe-kì-tit tòa piáⁿ, put-kò in tī chûn-lāi ū chi̍t ê piáⁿ." 
Mark8:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kéng-kò, “Tio̍h chù-ì, tio̍h tî-hông Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê kàⁿ kap Hi-lu̍t ê kàⁿ!”" 
Mark8:16 Bûn-tô͘ hō͘-siōng gī-lūn, “Sī in-ūi lán bô piáⁿ sī,bô?”" 
Mark8:17 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ chiū kā in kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ teh gī-lūn bô tòa piáⁿ ê tāi-chì? Lín kiám iáu bô liáu-kái, iáu bô bêng-pe̍k? Lín ê sim kiám hiah-ni̍h tūn?" 
Mark8:18 Lín ū ba̍k-chiu, kiám bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ? Lín ū hī-khang, kiám bô thiaⁿ,kìⁿ? Lín kiám bōe-kì,tit," 
Mark8:19 góa peh gō͘ ê piáⁿ hō͘ gō͘-chheng lâng chia̍h ê sî, chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á, lín ū khioh móa kúi nâ?” In kóng, “Cha̍p-jī nâ.”" 
Mark8:20 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g, “Góa peh chhit ê piáⁿ hō͘ sì-chheng lâng chia̍h ê sî, chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á, lín ū khioh kúi láng?” In kóng, “Chhit láng.”" 
Mark8:21 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng, “Án-ni, lín kiám iáu bô bêng-pe̍k?”" 
Mark8:22 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu Pek-sài-tāi. Ū lâng chhōa chi̍t ê bông-jîn lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, khún-kiû Iâ-so͘ kā i bong." 
Mark8:23 Iâ-so͘ khan hit-ê bông-jîn ê chhiú, chhōa i chhut-khì chng-gōa, jiân-āu chiong chhùi-nōa phùi tī i ê ba̍k-chiu, koh ēng siang-chhiú kā i bong, mn̄g kóng, “Lí ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h sím-mi̍h?”" 
Mark8:24 I gia̍h-thâu khí-lâi khòaⁿ, kóng, “Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng, khòaⁿ,khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ chhiū-á teh kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì.”" 
Mark8:25 Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn ēng siang-chhiú bong i ê ba̍k-chiu, i chù-sîn khòaⁿ, sī-le̍k chiū ho̍k-goân, ta̍k-hāng lóng khòaⁿ kah chin chheng-chhó." 
Mark8:26 Iâ-so͘ kiò i tńg-khì in tau, kā i kóng, “Lí liân chng-lāi to m̄-thang ji̍p,khì.”" 
Mark8:27 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ khì Khái-sat-lī-a Hui-li̍p-pí hù-kūn ê hiong-chhoan. Tī lō͘-tiong, I mn̄g in kóng, “Lâng kóng góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
Mark8:28 In ìn kóng, “Ū lâng kóng lí sī Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān; ū lâng kóng sī Í-lī-a; mā ū lâng kóng sī sian-ti tiong ê chi̍t ê.”" 
Mark8:29 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g in kóng, “Lín leh, lín kóng góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Lí sī Ki-tok.”" 
Mark8:30 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in chhian-bān m̄-thang tùi lâng kóng-khí I ê tāi-chì. 
Mark8:31 Iâ-so͘ khai-sí kà-sī bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Jîn-chú it-tēng tio̍h siū chin chōe khó͘-lān, hō͘ tiúⁿ-ló, chè-si-tiúⁿ, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kū-choa̍t, koh hō͘ lâng hāi-sí, saⁿ ji̍t āu koh-oa̍h.”" 
Mark8:32 I chiong chit-ê tāi-chì chheng-chheng-chhó-chhó kā in kóng. Pí-tek chiū khiú Iâ-so͘ khì piⁿ,á, kā I chek-pī." 
Mark8:33 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t kè-lâi khòaⁿ bûn-tô͘, chek-pī Pí-tek, kóng, “Sat-tàn, siám-khui! Lí siūⁿ,ê m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê sū, sī lâng ê sū.”" 
Mark8:34 Jiân-āu, Iâ-so͘ kā kûn-chiòng kap bûn-tô͘ kiò óa,lâi, tùi in kóng, “Beh tè góa ê lâng, tio̍h oân-choân hó͘-tēng ka-kī, giâ ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè lâi tè góa." 
Mark8:35 In-ūi beh kiù ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; ūi-tio̍h góa kap hok-im ê iân-kò͘ sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe kiù-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā." 
Mark8:36 Lâng tit-tio̍h choân sè-kài soah sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek? 
Mark8:37 Lâng ōe-tàng ēng sím-mi̍h tāi-kè lâi kau-ōaⁿ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā? 
Mark8:38 Tī chit-ê îm-loān siâ-ok ê sè-tāi, lâng nā in-ūi góa kap góa ê ōe kám-kak kiàn-siàu, Jîn-chú tī I ê Pē ê êng-kng tiong kap sèng thiⁿ-sài lâi-lîm ê sî mā ōe in-ūi i kám-kak kiàn-siàu.”" 
Mark9:1 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, khiā tī chia ê lâng, ū-ê iáu-bē sí í-chêng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè-kok í-keng chhiong-móa tōa lêng-le̍k lâi-lîm.”" 
Mark9:2 La̍k ji̍t āu, Iâ-so͘ chhōa Pí-tek, Ngá-kok, kap Iok-hān, kan-ta in ka-kī peh-chiūⁿ chi̍t chō koân soaⁿ. Tī in ê bīn-chêng, Iâ-so͘ ê hêng-siōng hut-jiân kái-piàn." 
Mark9:3 I ê saⁿ piàn-kàu kng-iàⁿ-iàⁿ, hui-siông pe̍h, tōe-chiūⁿ ê phiò-pò͘ sai-hū mā bōe-tàng phiò kàu hiah-ni̍h pe̍h." 
Mark9:4 Hit-sî Í-lī-a kap Mô͘-se chòe-hé chhut-hiān, kap Iâ-so͘ kóng-ōe." 
Mark9:5 Pí-tek tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, lán tī chia chin hó, goán lâi tah saⁿ keng liâu-á, chi̍t keng hō͘ lí, chi̍t keng hō͘ Mô͘-se, chi̍t keng hō͘ Í-lī-a.”" 
Mark9:6 Pí-tek m̄-chai tio̍h kóng sím-mi̍h, in-ūi in hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Mark9:7 Hit-sî, ū chi̍t phìⁿ hûn kā in tà,teh, koh ū siaⁿ tùi hûn chhut,lâi, kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, lín tio̍h thiaⁿ-thàn I.”" 
Mark9:8 In kóaⁿ-kín sì-chiu-ûi khòaⁿ chi̍t lìn, chí-ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, bô pa̍t-lâng tī hia." 
Mark9:9 In lo̍h-soaⁿ ê sî, Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in, kóng, “Jîn-chú tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h í-chêng, m̄-thang chiong só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê sū kā lâng kóng.”" 
Mark9:10 In chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ōe khǹg tī sim-lāi, su-hā teh gī-lūn tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h chit-kù ōe sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù." 
Mark9:11 In mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kóng Í-lī-a it-tēng tio̍h seng lâi?”" 
Mark9:12 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “ Í-lī-a it-tēng tio̍h seng lâi hôe-ho̍k it-chhè. Án-ni, Sèng-keng ná ōe kì-chài kóng Jîn-chú it-tēng tio̍h siū chin chōe khó͘-lān koh hō͘ lâng biáu-sī?" 
Mark9:13 Góa kā lín kóng, tú-tú chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, Í-lī-a í-keng lâi lah, lâng chiàu in ê ì-sù tùi-thāi i.”" 
Mark9:14 In lâi kàu kî-tha ê bûn-tô͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng kā in ûi,teh, ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap in teh piān-lūn." 
Mark9:15 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, sûi-sî cháu óa-khì kā I chhéng-an." 
Mark9:16 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín kap in teh piān-lūn sím-mi̍h?”" 
Mark9:17 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê ìn I kóng, “Lāu-su, góa chhōa góa ê kiáⁿ lâi chhē lí, i hō͘ kúi hū-sin bōe kóng-ōe." 
Mark9:18 Bô-lūn tī tó-ūi, kúi chi̍t-ē hū-sin, kā i siak-tó, i chiū phū pe̍h-pho-nōa, kā chhùi-khí-kun, kui seng-khu ngī-khok-khok. Góa chhiáⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ kā kúi kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, in lóng bô hoat-tō͘.”" 
Mark9:19 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Ài ah, m̄-sìn ê sè-tāi! Góa tio̍h kap lín tòa jōa kú? Góa tio̍h koh jím-nāi lín jōa kú? Kā i chhōa-lâi góa chia.”" 
Mark9:20 In chiū kā i chhōa,lâi. Hit-ê kúi chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, sûi-sî hō͘ hit-ê gín-á thiu-chhoah, tó tī thô͘-kha kō-lâi-kō-khì, phū pe̍h-pho-nōa." 
Mark9:21 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i ê lāu-pē, “I án-ni jōa kú ah?” I ìn kóng, “Tùi sòe-hàn chiū án-ni." 
Mark9:22 Kúi tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ kā i hiat-lo̍h hé, chhia-lo̍h chúi, beh kā i hāi-sí. Lí nā ōe, kiû lí khó-lîn goán, pang-chān goán!”" 
Mark9:23 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ná kóng ‘Lí nā ōe’? Ū sìn ê lâng ta̍k-hāng lóng ōe.”" 
Mark9:24 Gín-á ê lāu-pē sûi-sî hoah kóng, “Góa sìn! Góa ê sìn bô-kàu, kiû lí pang-chān!”" 
Mark9:25 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h kûn-chiòng cháu óa,lâi, giâm-giâm chek-pī hit-ê siâ-sîn, kóng, “Lí chit-ê é-káu koh chhàu-hī ê kúi, góa bēng-lēng lí tùi chit-ê gín-á chhut,lâi, m̄-chún lí koh ji̍p,khì!”" 
Mark9:26 Kúi tōa-siaⁿ hoah, hō͘ hit-ê gín-á tōa thiu-chhoah chiah chhut,khì. Hit-ê gín-á pìⁿ-chòe kap sí-lâng siâng-khoán, só͘-í tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng kóng, “I sí,khì lah.”" 
Mark9:27 Chóng-sī Iâ-so͘ khan gín-á ê chhiú, kā i hû,khí-lâi, i chiū khí,lâi." 
Mark9:28 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi, i ê bûn-tô͘ su-hā kā I mn̄g, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ goán bô hoat-tō͘ kā kúi kóaⁿ,chhut-khì?”" 
Mark9:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Chit-chióng kúi chí-ū khò kî-tó chiah kóaⁿ ōe chhut,khì.”" 
Mark9:30 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lī-khui hia, keng-kè Ka-lī-lī. Iâ-so͘ bô ài lâng chai I tī tó-ūi," 
Mark9:31 in-ūi I tú-teh kà-sī bûn-tô͘, tùi in kóng, “Jîn-chú ōe hō͘ lâng chhut-bōe, in ōe kā I hāi-sí, sí-liáu saⁿ ji̍t āu ōe koh-oa̍h.”" 
Mark9:32 In bōe bêng-pe̍k chit-kù ōe, koh m̄-káⁿ kā I mn̄g." 
Mark9:33 In lâi kàu Ka-pek-lông. Iâ-so͘ tī chhù,ni̍h ê sî mn̄g bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín tī lō͘-tiong teh gī-lūn sím-mi̍h?”" 
Mark9:34 In lóng tiām-tiām, in-ūi tī lō͘-tiong in hō͘-siōng teh cheng-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng siōng tōa." 
Mark9:35 Iâ-so͘ chē,lo̍h-khì, kiò cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ lâi, tùi in kóng, “Nā ū lâng beh chòe tē-it, tio̍h chòe chèng-lâng ê siōng lō͘-bé, chòe chèng-lâng ê chhe-ēng.”" 
Mark9:36 I chiū khan chi̍t ê gín-á lâi, hō͘ i khiā tī in tiong-kan, kā i phō,khí-lâi, tùi in kóng," 
Mark9:37 “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng nā ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ chiap-la̍p chi̍t ê chit-khoán gín-á, chiū-sī chiap-la̍p góa. Chiap-la̍p góa,ê, m̄-sī chiap-la̍p góa, sī chiap-la̍p chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi.”" 
Mark9:38 Iok-hān tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, goán ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng hōng lí ê miâ kóaⁿ-kúi, goán kā i chó͘-tòng, in-ūi i bô teh tè lán.”" 
Mark9:39 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “M̄-thang kā i chó͘-tòng, in-ūi bô lâng ōe hōng góa ê miâ kiâⁿ sîn-jiah, sûi-sî koh kóng góa ê pháiⁿ-ōe." 
Mark9:40 Bô hoán-tùi lán,ê chiū-sī ūi lán. 
Mark9:41 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, in-ūi lín sio̍k Ki-tok, ēng chi̍t poe chúi hō͘ lín lim, i it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ.”" 
Mark9:42 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ sìn góa ê lâng tiong-kan bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê hoān-chōe, i khah hó hō͘ lâng ēng tōa chio̍h-bō kā i tiàu tī ām-kún, hiat-lo̍h hái." 
Mark9:43 “Lí ê chhiú nā hō͘ lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h chām hiat-ka̍k, lêng-khó kiám chi̍t ki chhiú ji̍p éng-oán-oa̍h, pí siang-chhiú hó-hó lo̍h tōe-ge̍k hō͘ bōe hoa ê hé sio khah hó." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Lí ê kha nā hō͘ lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h chām hiat-ka̍k, lêng-khó kiám chi̍t ki kha ji̍p éng-oán-oa̍h, pí siang-kha hó-hó hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k khah hó." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā hō͘ lí hoān-chōe, tio̍h ó͘ hiat-ka̍k, lêng-khó kiám chi̍t lúi ba̍k-chiu ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok, pí nn̄g lúi ba̍k-chiu hó-hó hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k khah hó." 
Mark9:48 Tī tōe-ge̍k, thâng bōe sí, hé bōe hoa." 
Mark9:49 “Ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tio̍h ēng hé liān, chhin-chhiūⁿ ēng iâm sīⁿ." 
Mark9:50 Iâm chin ū lō͘-ēng; m̄-kú iâm nā sit-khì kiâm-bī, beh án-chóaⁿ koh hō͘ i kiâm? Lín ka-kī tio̍h ū iâm ê chok-iōng, hō͘-siōng hô-hó.”" 
Mark10:1 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hit só͘-chāi ji̍p-khì Iû-thài tōe-khu, kè-khì Iok-tàn-hô ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ. Kûn-chiòng koh chū-chi̍p khì I hia, I koh chiàu-siông kà-sī in." 
Mark10:2 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng beh chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘, óa-lâi mn̄g I kóng, “Tiōng-hu lî i ê bó͘ ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô?”" 
Mark10:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “ Mô͘-se ū hō͘ lín sím-mi̍h bēng-lēng?”" 
Mark10:4 In kóng, “ Mô͘-se ún-chún lâng siá lî-hun-su chiū thang lî i ê bó͘.”" 
Mark10:5 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “ Mô͘-se sī in-ūi lín ê sim ngī chiah siá chit-tiâu kài-bēng hō͘ lín." 
Mark10:6 M̄-kú khí-thâu chhòng-chō ê sî, Siōng-tè chō lâng, ū lâm ū lú." 
Mark10:7 In-ūi chit-ê lí-iû, lâng ōe lī-khui i ê pē-bú, kap i ê bó͘ kiat-ha̍p," 
Mark10:8 nn̄g lâng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé. Án-ni, in í-keng m̄-sī nn̄g ê, sī chi̍t-thé." 
Mark10:9 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè só͘ phòe-ha̍p,ê, lâng m̄-thang thiah-khui.”" 
Mark10:10 In ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi ê sî, bûn-tô͘ koh mn̄g Iâ-so͘ chit-ê tāi-chì." 
Mark10:11 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, lî i ê bó͘ khì chhōa pa̍t-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī hoān kan-îm, ko͘-hū i ê bó͘;" 
Mark10:12 bó͘ nā lî i ê tiōng-hu khì kè pa̍t-lâng mā-sī hoān kan-îm.” 
Mark10:13 Ū lâng chhōa gín-á lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, ài I kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú chiok-hok; bûn-tô͘ kā in chek-pī." 
Mark10:14 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chin siū-khì, tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Hō͘ gín-á lâi góa chia, m̄-thang kā in chó͘-tòng, in-ūi Siōng-tè-kok sī chit-khoán lâng ê." 
Mark10:15 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lâng nā bô chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á án-ni chiap-siū Siōng-tè-kok, choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng ji̍p,khì.”" 
Mark10:16 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in phō, hōaⁿ-chhiú chiok-hok." 
Mark10:17 Iâ-so͘ tú-beh chhut-gōa ê sî, ū chi̍t ê lâng cháu,lâi, kūi tī I ê bīn-chêng, mn̄g I kóng, “Hó ê Lāu-su, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h chiah ōe-tàng sêng-siū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā?”" 
Mark10:18 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ná ōe kóng góa sī hó? Siōng-tè í-gōa, bô chi̍t ê sī hó." 
Mark10:19 Chiah-ê kài-bēng lí lóng bat: M̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang choh gūi-chèng; m̄-thang chà-khi; tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú.” 
Mark10:20 Hit-ê lâng ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, chiah-ê kài-bēng góa tùi sòe-hàn chiū it-ti̍t ū teh chun-siú.”" 
Mark10:21 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ i, thiàⁿ i, kā i kóng, “Lí iáu khiàm chi̍t hāng; lí khì, khì bōe só͘-ū,ê lâi pun hō͘ sàn-chhiah-lâng, lí tī thiⁿ-téng chiū ū châi-pó, jiân-āu lâi tè góa.”" 
Mark10:22 Hit-ê lâng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-kù ōe, bīn sit-sek, iu-iu-chhiû-chhiû lī-khui; in-ūi i châi-sán chin chōe." 
Mark10:23 Iâ-so͘ sì-chiu-ûi khòaⁿ chi̍t lìn, kā bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Ū-chîⁿ-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok jōa-á-ni̍h khùn-lân!”" 
Mark10:24 Bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h I só͘ kóng ê ōe, hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ. Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Sòe-kiáⁿ ah, ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok chin-chiàⁿ khùn-lân!" 
Mark10:25 Lo̍k-tô chhng-kè chiam-phīⁿ mā pí hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok koh-khah kán-tan.” 
Mark10:26 Bûn-tô͘ koh-khah tio̍h-kiaⁿ, tāi-ke kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “Nā án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h kiù?”" 
Mark10:27 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k kā in khòaⁿ, kóng, “Chit-ê sū, lâng chòe bōe kàu, Siōng-tè chiū m̄-sī án-ni, in-ūi Siōng-tè ta̍k-hāng lóng ōe.”" 
Mark10:28 Pí-tek chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Goán í-keng pàng-sak it-chhè lâi tè lí.”" 
Mark10:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, nā ūi-tio̍h góa kap hok-im ê iân-kò͘ pàng-sak chhù-the̍h, hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, lāu-bú, lāu-pē, kiáⁿ-jî, á-sī chhân-hn̂g," 
Mark10:30 tī kim-sè ōe tit-tio̍h pah-pē ê chhù-the̍h, hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, lāu-bú, kiáⁿ-jî, kap chhân-hn̂g, koh ū pek-hāi; tī lâi-sè ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Mark10:31 Chóng-sī chin chōe chòe thâu-chêng,ê ōe chòe siōng lō͘-bé; siōng lō͘-bé,ê ōe chòe siōng thâu-chêng.” 
Mark10:32 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lō͘-tiong, I kiâⁿ tī thâu-chêng; bûn-tô͘ kám-kak chin kî-koài, tè ê lâng chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ. Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn chhōa cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ khì piⁿ,á, chiong I teh-beh tú,tio̍h ê sū kā in kóng," 
Mark10:33 “Taⁿ lán beh chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; Jîn-chú ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ōe kā I tēng sí-chōe, āu-lâi chiong I kau hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng." 
Mark10:34 In ōe kā I hì-lāng, phùi-nōa, piⁿ-phah, hāi,sí; saⁿ ji̍t āu, I ōe koh-oa̍h.”" 
Mark10:35 Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān kiâⁿ chìn-chêng, kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, goán só͘ kiû,ê, chhiáⁿ lí kā goán sêng-choân.”" 
Mark10:36 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g kóng, “Lín ài góa kā lín chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
Mark10:37 In kóng, “Lí tit-tio̍h êng-kng ê sî, chhiáⁿ hō͘ goán chi̍t ê chē lí ê chiàⁿ-pêng, chi̍t ê chē lí ê tò-pêng.”" 
Mark10:38 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín m̄ chai ka-kī teh kiû sím-mi̍h. Góa lim ê poe, lín ōe-tàng lim bōe? Góa siū ê sóe, lín ōe-tàng siū bōe?”" 
Mark10:39 In kóng, “Goán ōe!” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa só͘ lim ê poe, lín beh lim; góa só͘ siū ê sóe, lín beh siū," 
Mark10:40 put-kò chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng tò-pêng m̄-sī góa ōe-tàng hō͘ lâng,ê. Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h sím-mi̍h-lâng chún-pī chiū hō͘ hit-ê lâng.” 
Mark10:41 Kî-tha hit cha̍p ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū tùi Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān siū-khì." 
Mark10:42 Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi, kā in kóng, “Lín chai, tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan, hiah-ê hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe thóng-tī-chiá,ê chòe chú kā in koán-hat, in ê léng-siù kā in chi-phòe." 
Mark10:43 Put-kò lín tiong-kan chiū m̄ eng-kai án-ni. Lín tiong-kan ài chòe tōa,ê tio̍h chòe lín ê chhe-ēng; 
Mark10:44 ài chòe tē-it,ê tio̍h chòe chèng-lâng ê po̍k-jîn. 
Mark10:45 In-ūi Jîn-chú lâi, m̄-sī beh hō͘ lâng ho̍k-sāi, hoán-tńg sī beh kā lâng ho̍k-sāi, sīm-chì hi-seng ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā lâi sio̍k-hôe chin chōe lâng.”" 
Mark10:46 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu Iâ-lī-ko. In kap chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng beh tùi Iâ-lī-ko chhut,khì ê sî, ū chi̍t ê sit-bêng ê khit-chia̍h, Tí-mái ê kiáⁿ Pa-tí-mái, chē tī lō͘-piⁿ." 
Mark10:47 I thiaⁿ-kóng Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ tùi hia kè, chiū hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘, lîn-bín góa!”" 
Mark10:48 Chin chōe lâng kā i chek-pī, kiò i tiām-tiām, m̄-kú i jú tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín góa!”" 
Mark10:49 Iâ-so͘ thêng-kha, kóng, “Kiò i lâi!” In chiū khì kiò hit-ê bông-jîn, kā i kóng, “An-sim, khí,lâi! I teh kiò lí.”" 
Mark10:50 Bông-jîn chiū chiong gōa-saⁿ hiat-tiāu, thiàu,khí-lâi, lâi kàu Iâ-so͘ hia." 
Mark10:51 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ài góa kā lí chòe sím-mi̍h?” Bông-jîn ìn kóng, “Lia̍p-pho-nî, góa ài koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ!”" 
Mark10:52 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí tńg,khì. Lí ê sìn-sim hō͘ lí tit-tio̍h i-hó!” Bông-jîn sûi-sî koh ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chiū kui-lō͘ tè Iâ-so͘." 
Mark11:1 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, lâi kàu Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ soaⁿ-kha ê Pek-hoat-kî kap Pek-tāi-nî ê sî, I chhe nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘," 
Mark11:2 kā in kóng, “Lín khì tùi-bīn ê chng-siā, ji̍p,khì, sûi-sî ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah m̄-bat hō͘ lâng khiâ,kè ê lû-á-kiáⁿ pa̍k tī hia; lín kā i tháu-khui, khan-lâi chia." 
Mark11:3 Nā ū lâng mn̄g lín sī-án-chóaⁿ án-ni chòe, tio̍h kā i kóng, ‘Chú beh ēng i, liâm-piⁿ ōe koh khan tńg-lâi hêng.’”" 
Mark11:4 In khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h lō͘-piⁿ ū chi̍t chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ pa̍k tī mn̂g-kháu, chiū kā i tháu-khui." 
Mark11:5 Ū chi̍t-kóa khiā tī hia ê lâng mn̄g in kóng, “Lín tháu lû-á-kiáⁿ beh chhòng sím-mi̍h?”" 
Mark11:6 In chiàu Iâ-so͘ só͘ hoan-hù,ê kā in hôe-tap; hiah-ê lâng chiū chún in khan,khì. 
Mark11:7 In khan hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, chiong ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ phoa̍h tī lû-á téng, Iâ-so͘ chiū peh-khí-khì khiâ." 
Mark11:8 Ū chin chōe lâng ēng in ê gōa-saⁿ pho͘ tī lō͘,ni̍h, mā ū lâng tùi iá-gōa chhò chhiū-oe pho͘ tī lō͘,ni̍h kā I hoan-gêng." 
Mark11:9 Chêng-kiâⁿ-āu-tè ê lâng tōa-siaⁿ hoah: Hô-sàn-ná! Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! 
Mark11:10 Teh-beh lâi lán chó͘-sian Tāi-pi̍t ê ông-kok eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè, hô-sàn-ná!" 
Mark11:11 Iâ-so͘ chìn-ji̍p Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, ta̍k-hāng khòaⁿ chi̍t lìn. In-ūi thiⁿ í-keng àm, I chiū kap cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chhut siâⁿ khì Pek-tāi-nî." 
Mark11:12 Keh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ tùi Pek-tāi-nî chhut,lâi ê sî, Iâ-so͘ pak-tó͘ iau." 
Mark11:13 I tī hn̄g-hn̄g khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t châng ū chin chōe hio̍h ê bû-hoa-kó-chhiū, chiū kiâⁿ óa-khì beh khòaⁿ ū ké-chí á bô. I kiâⁿ kàu hia, chhiū-téng hio̍h-á í-gōa, lóng bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h pòaⁿ-hāng, in-ūi m̄-sī bû-hoa-kó ê kùi-chiat." 
Mark11:14 I chiū tùi hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kóng, “Éng-oán bô lâng ōe koh chia̍h lí ê ké-chí!” I ê bûn-tô͘ lóng ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h." 
Mark11:15 Āu-lâi in lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, khí-chhiú chiong tī tiān-lāi teh bóe-bōe ê lâng kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, koh chhia-tó ōaⁿ-chîⁿ ê lâng ê toh kap bōe hún-chiáu ê lâng ê í." 
Mark11:16 I mā m̄-chún lâng the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ ēng Sèng-tiān chòe thong-lō͘ kè-lâi-kè-khì. 
Mark11:17 I kà-sī in kóng, “Sèng-keng kiám bô kì-chài: Góa ê chhù beh kiò-chòe bān-bîn kî-tó ê tiān, lín soah kā i pìⁿ-chòe thó͘-húi-á khut.”" 
Mark11:18 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū it-ti̍t siūⁿ pān-hoat beh hāi-sí Iâ-so͘, m̄-kú in kiaⁿ I, in-ūi kûn-chiòng tùi I ê kà-sī lóng chin kám-ho̍k." 
Mark11:19 Hông-hun ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ chhut-khì siâⁿ-gōa." 
Mark11:20 Keh-chá-khí, Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ tùi hia keng-kè ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kui-châng lóng ta,khì." 
Mark11:21 Pí-tek ōe-kì,tit, chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, lí khòaⁿ, lí chiù-chó͘ hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū í-keng ta,khì.”" 
Mark11:22 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín tio̍h sìn Siōng-tè." 
Mark11:23 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng tùi chit-chō soaⁿ kóng ‘Khí,lâi, khì thiām-hái’, i sim nā bô giâu-gî, sìn só͘ kóng,ê it-tēng ōe si̍t-hiān, mā ōe án-ni hō͘ i si̍t-hiān." 
Mark11:24 Só͘-í, góa kā lín kóng, lín kî-tó ê sî bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h, sìn í-keng tit,tio̍h chiū ōe tit,tio̍h." 
Mark11:25 Lín khiā-teh kî-tó ê sî, nā tùi bó͘-lâng sim ū put-pêng, tio̍h kā i sià-bián; án-ni, lín ê Thiⁿ-pē mā ōe sià-bián lín ê kè-sit.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 In koh lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān teh kiâⁿ ê sî, chè-si-tiúⁿ, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, kap tiúⁿ-ló lâi I hia," 
Mark11:28 mn̄g I kóng, “Lí khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ lí chit-ê koân-pèng lâi chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì?”" 
Mark11:29 Iâ-so͘ kā in ìn kóng, “Góa beh mn̄g lín chi̍t kù ōe. Lín kā góa ìn-tap, góa chiah kā lín kóng góa khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì." 
Mark11:30 Iok-hān sóe-lé ê koân-pèng sī tùi Thiⁿ á-sī tùi lâng lâi,ê? Lín kā góa kóng.” 
Mark11:31 In hō͘-siōng gī-lūn kóng, “Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi Thiⁿ’, I ōe kóng ‘Án-ni lín sī-án-chóaⁿ bô sìn Iok-hān?’" 
Mark11:32 M̄-kú lán nā kóng ‘Tùi lâng’, khióng-kiaⁿ kûn-chiòng hoán-kám, in-ūi in lóng siūⁿ-kóng Iok-hān chin-chiàⁿ sī sian-ti.”" 
Mark11:33 In chiū ìn Iâ-so͘, “Goán m̄ chai.” Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Án-ni, góa mā m̄ kā lín kóng góa khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì.”" 
Mark12:1 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng khai-khún chi̍t khu phû-tô-hn̂g, sì-bīn ûi lî-pa, ó͘ chi̍t ê chiú-khut, khí chi̍t ê siú-bōng-tâi, chiong chit-khu hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ tiān-lông, āu-lâi chhut-gōa khì chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi." 
Mark12:2 Siu-sêng ê sî kàu, i chhe chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn khì tiān-lông hia, beh kā in siu hn̂g,ni̍h ê ké-chí." 
Mark12:3 In lia̍h hit-ê po̍k-jîn, kā i phah, kóaⁿ i khang-chhiú tò,khì." 
Mark12:4 I koh chhe lēng-gōa chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn khì, in siong-hāi i ê thâu-khak, kā i bú-jio̍k." 
Mark12:5 Āu-lâi, hn̂g-chú koh chhe pa̍t-ê po̍k-jîn khì, in kā i thâi-sí. I koh chhe chin chōe po̍k-jîn khì, ū-ê hō͘ in phah, ū-ê hō͘ in thâi-sí." 
Mark12:6 I iáu ū chi̍t ê, chiū-sī só͘ thiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ, chòe-āu mā chhe i khì tiān-lông hia, siūⁿ-kóng ‘In ōe chun-tiōng góa ê kiáⁿ’." 
Mark12:7 M̄-kú hiah-ê tiān-lông chham-siông kóng, ‘Chit-ê sī i ê kè-sêng-jîn. Lâi, lán lâi kā thâi-sí, i ê châi-sán chiū pìⁿ-chòe lán ê.’" 
Mark12:8 In chiū kā i lia̍h,khí-lâi, kā i thâi-sí, kā hiat chhut-khì phû-tô-hn̂g ê gōa-bīn." 
Mark12:9 “Án-ni, phû-tô-hn̂g ê chú-lâng ōe án-chóaⁿ chhú-lí? I ōe lâi châu-bia̍t chiah-ê tiān-lông, chiong phû-tô-hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ pa̍t-lâng." 
Mark12:10 Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h chit-tōaⁿ Sèng-keng ê kì-chài: Khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h. 
Mark12:11 Che sī Chú ê chok-ûi, tùi lán lâi khòaⁿ si̍t-chāi chin kî-biāu.”" 
Mark12:12 Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-tō-chiá chai-iáⁿ Iâ-so͘ kóng chit-ê phì-jū sī teh chí in, chiū siūⁿ-beh kā I lia̍h, m̄-kú kiaⁿ kûn-chiòng, chiū lī-khui." 
Mark12:13 In chhe kúi-nā ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap Hi-lu̍t-tóng ê lâng khì Iâ-so͘ hia, beh chhē I ê ōe-pìⁿ thang kā I hām-hāi." 
Mark12:14 In chiū khì, tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, goán chai lí chin sêng-si̍t, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h khoán lâng, lí tùi-thāi in lóng bô chha-pia̍t, lí chí-ū tiong-si̍t kà-sī Siōng-tè ê tō-lí. Án-ni, la̍p-sè hō͘ Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô? Goán tio̍h la̍p-sè á m̄-bián?”" 
Mark12:15 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-chhut in ê khúi-kè, chiū tùi in kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ beh kā góa chhì-thàm? The̍h chi̍t ê gûn-pè hō͘ góa khòaⁿ-bāi leh.”" 
Mark12:16 In chiū the̍h chi̍t ê gûn-pè lâi. Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Che sī sím-mi̍h-lâng ê siōng, sím-mi̍h-lâng ê jī-hō?” In ìn kóng, “Khái-sat ê.”" 
Mark12:17 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Khái-sat ê mi̍h hō͘ Khái-sat; Siōng-tè ê mi̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè.” In tùi Iâ-so͘ kám-kak chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Mark12:18 Ū chi̍t-kóa chú-tiuⁿ bô koh-oa̍h ê Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, mn̄g I kóng," 
Mark12:19 “Lāu-su, Mô͘-se só͘ siá ê Lu̍t-hoat kā goán kóng, ‘Nā ū lâng i ê hiaⁿ-ko sí,khì, pàng bó͘ bô pàng kiáⁿ, i choh sió-tī,ê tio̍h chhōa hiaⁿ-só thòe hiaⁿ-ko thoân-chong-chiap-tāi.’" 
Mark12:20 Í-chêng bat ū chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī, siōng-tōa,ê chhōa-bó͘, bô lâu hō͘-tāi chiū sí,khì." 
Mark12:21 Tē-jī,ê chhōa i ê hiaⁿ-só, mā bô lâu hō͘-tāi chiū sí,khì. Tē-saⁿ,ê mā siâng-khoán." 
Mark12:22 Chit chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī lóng bô lâu hō͘-tāi, chòe-āu chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng mā sí,khì." 
Mark12:23 Koh-oa̍h ê sî, in lóng koh-oa̍h, án-ni chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī tó chi̍t ê lâng ê bó͘? In-ūi chit chhit ê lóng bat chhōa i chòe bó͘.”" 
Mark12:24 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín m̄-tio̍h, in-ūi lín m̄ bat Sèng-keng, mā m̄ bat Siōng-tè ê koân-lêng." 
Mark12:25 In tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê sî, kap thiⁿ-téng ê thiⁿ-sài siâng-khoán, bô kè bô chhōa." 
Mark12:26 Koan-hē sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h Mô͘-se ê chheh ‘Teh to̍h ê chhì-phè’ hit-tōaⁿ? Siōng-tè tùi Mô͘-se kóng, ‘Góa sī A-pek-la-hán ê Siōng-tè, Í-sat ê Siōng-tè, Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè.’" 
Mark12:27 I m̄-sī sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè, sī oa̍h-lâng ê Siōng-tè. Lín oân-choân m̄-tio̍h!”" 
Mark12:28 Ū chi̍t ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su lâi, thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng teh piān-lūn, khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ ìn liáu chin tio̍h, chiū mn̄g I, “Só͘-ū ê kài-bēng tiong, tó chi̍t tiâu tē-it tiōng-iàu?”" 
Mark12:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Tē-it sī: Í-sek-lia̍t ah, lín tio̍h thiaⁿ! Chú — lán ê Siōng-tè sī to̍k-it ê Chú." 
Mark12:30 Lí tio̍h choân-sim, choân-chêng, choân-ì, choân-le̍k thiàⁿ Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè." 
Mark12:31 Tē-jī sī: Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī. Bô pa̍t-ê kài-bēng pí chiah-ê koh-khah tiōng-iàu.” 
Mark12:32 Hit-ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, lí só͘ kóng,ê chin tio̍h. Lí kóng Siōng-tè chí-ū chi̍t ūi, I í-gōa bô pa̍t-ê;" 
Mark12:33 koh kóng tio̍h ēng choân-sim, choân-tì, choân-le̍k thiàⁿ Siōng-tè, koh thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī sī pí hiàn lóng-chóng ê sio-hòa-chè kap chè-mi̍h koh-khah iàu-kín.”" 
Mark12:34 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ìn liáu chin ū tì-hūi, chiū kā i kóng, “Lí lī Siōng-tè-kok bô hn̄g.” Hit-sî í-āu, bô lâng káⁿ koh mn̄g Iâ-so͘ sím-mi̍h būn-tôe." 
Mark12:35 Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī ê sî, mn̄g kóng, “Keng-ha̍k-kàu-su ná ōe kóng Ki-tok sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi?" 
Mark12:36 Tāi-pi̍t pún-sin siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng kóng: Chú kā góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng, kàu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē." 
Mark12:37 Tāi-pi̍t pún-sin chheng-ho͘ Ki-tok chòe ‘Chú’, Ki-tok ná ōe sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi?” Ū chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng ài thiaⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê kà-sī." 
Mark12:38 Iâ-so͘ kà-sī kóng, “Tio̍h tî-hông keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ài chhēng tn̂g-saⁿ kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì, tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu hō͘ lâng chhéng-an," 
Mark12:39 tī hōe-tn̂g chē koân-ūi, tī iàn-hōe chē tōa-ūi." 
Mark12:40 In chhim-chiàm kóaⁿ-hū ê ke-hé, thiau-kò͘-ì kî-tó chin tn̂g. In ōe siū koh-khah tāng ê hêng-hoa̍t.”" 
Mark12:41 Iâ-so͘ chē tī Sèng-tiān hōng-hiàn-kūi ê tùi-bīn teh khòaⁿ lâng hiàn chîⁿ lo̍h,khì. Chin chōe hó-gia̍h-lâng hiàn chin chōe chîⁿ. 
Mark12:42 Ū chi̍t ê sàn-chhiah ê kóaⁿ-hū lâi, hiàn nn̄g ê tâng-chîⁿ-á, chiū-sī chi̍t kak gûn." 
Mark12:43 Iâ-so͘ kiò bûn-tô͘ lâi, kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit-ê sàn-chhiah ê kóaⁿ-hū hiàn ji̍p-khì hōng-hiàn-kūi,ê, pí chèng-lâng hiàn,ê koh-khah chōe." 
Mark12:44 In-ūi in lóng sī hiàn ēng chhun,ê, m̄-kú chit-ê kóaⁿ-hū sui-jiân chin sàn-chhiah, iáu-kú the̍h só͘-ū,ê, chiū-sī choân-pō͘ ê seng-oa̍h-hùi lóng hiàn,lo̍h-khì.”" 
Mark13:1 Iâ-so͘ tùi Sèng-tiān chhut,lâi ê sî, ū chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ tùi I kóng, “Lāu-su, lí khòaⁿ, chio̍h chiah-ni̍h tōa tè! Kiàn-tio̍k-bu̍t chiah-ni̍h tông-hông!”" 
Mark13:2 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín teh khòaⁿ chiah-ê tōa ê kiàn-tio̍k-bu̍t o͘h. Tī chia, chiah-ê lóng ōe siū thiah-húi, thiah kah bô chi̍t tè chio̍h ōe tha̍h tī pa̍t-tè téng-bīn.”" 
Mark13:3 Iâ-so͘ tī Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ -téng, bīn ǹg Sèng-tiān teh chē ê sî, Pí-tek, Ngá-kok, Iok-hān, kap An-tek-lia̍t su-hā kā I mn̄g," 
Mark13:4 “Chhiáⁿ kā goán kóng, chit-ê tāi-chì sím-mi̍h sî ōe hoat-seng? Chiah-ê it-chhè ê tāi-chì teh-beh oân-sêng ê sî ū sím-mi̍h tiāu-thâu?”" 
Mark13:5 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng, “Tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bián siū bê-he̍k." 
Mark13:6 Ū chin chōe lâng ōe lī-iōng góa ê miâ lâi, kóng ‘Góa chiū-sī Ki-tok’ lâi bê-he̍k chin chōe lâng." 
Mark13:7 Lín thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiàn-cheng í-ki̍p chiàn-cheng ê hong-siaⁿ ê sî, m̄-bián kiaⁿ. Chiah-ê tāi-chì it-tēng ōe hoat-seng, m̄-kú chiong-kio̍k iáu-bē kàu." 
Mark13:8 In-ūi bîn-cho̍k ōe khí-lâi kong-kek bîn-cho̍k, kok-ka kong-kek kok-ka. Chin chōe só͘-chāi ū tōe-tāng, ū ki-hng. Chiah-ê tāi-chì put-kò sī chhui-chūn thàng-thiàⁿ ê khai-sí." 
Mark13:9 “Lín ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn, lín ōe hō͘ lâng kau hō͘ gī-hōe, tī hōe-tn̂g siū piⁿ-phah. Lín ōe ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘ khiā tī chóng-tok kap kun-ông ê bīn-chêng, tùi in chòe kiàn-chèng." 
Mark13:10 M̄-kú hok-im it-tēng tio̍h tāi-seng thoân hō͘ bān-bîn. 
Mark13:11 In kā lín lia̍h-khì kau hō͘ hoat-têng ê sî, m̄-bián seng hoân-ló beh kóng sím-mi̍h, hit-sî lín tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h chí-sī chiū chiàu án-ni kóng, in-ūi teh kóng,ê m̄-sī lín ka-kī, sī Sèng Sîn." 
Mark13:12 Hiaⁿ-tī ōe chhut-bōe hiaⁿ-tī, hō͘ i sí; lāu-pē mā ōe án-ni tùi-thāi kiáⁿ-jî. Kiáⁿ-jî ōe khí-lâi kong-kek pē-bú, kā in hāi-sí." 
Mark13:13 Lín ōe in-ūi góa ê miâ hō͘ chèng-lâng oàn-hūn, m̄-kú jím-nāi kàu chòe-āu ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù.”" 
Mark13:14 “Tng lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê ‘Khó-ò͘ⁿ ê Húi-bia̍t-chiá’ khiā tī m̄ eng-kai khiā ê só͘-chāi — tha̍k ê lâng tio̍h bêng-pe̍k chit-kù ōe ê ì-sù — hit-sî tī Iû-thài ê lâng tio̍h tô-cháu khì soaⁿ-lāi; 
Mark13:15 tī chhù-téng,ê, m̄-thang lo̍h,lâi, mā m̄-thang ji̍p-khì chhù-lāi the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ;" 
Mark13:16 tī hn̂g,ni̍h-ê, m̄-thang tńg-khì hiahⁿ gōa-saⁿ." 
Mark13:17 Tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, ū sin-īn,ê kap hō͘ eⁿ-á chia̍h-lin ê hū-jîn-lâng hui-siông put-hēng!" 
Mark13:18 Tio̍h kî-tó, chiah-ê tāi-chì chiah bián tī tang-thiⁿ hoat-seng." 
Mark13:19 In-ūi tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí teh-beh ū chai-lān, sī tùi Siōng-tè chhòng-chō bān-mi̍h í-lâi m̄-bat ū,ê, chiong-lâi mā bōe koh ū." 
Mark13:20 Chú nā bô kiám-chió hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, bô lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù; m̄-kú ūi-tio̍h I só͘ kéng ê soán-bîn, I í-keng ū kiám-chió hiah-ê ji̍t-chí." 
Mark13:21 “Hit-sî, nā ū lâng kā lín kóng ‘Lín khòaⁿ, Ki-tok tī chia’, á-sī kóng ‘Lín khòaⁿ, I tī hia’, m̄-thang siong-sìn." 
Mark13:22 In-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa ké Ki-tok kap ké sian-ti ōe chhut-hiān, kiâⁿ sîn-jiah kî-sū, nā ōe-tàng, liân soán-bîn to beh kā in bê-he̍k." 
Mark13:23 Tio̍h kín-sīn; góa í-keng chiong it-chhè lóng seng kā lín kóng lah.” 
Mark13:24 “Tī hit-ê chai-lān kè-liáu hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, ji̍t ōe pìⁿ o͘-àm, ge̍h bōe hoat-kng," 
Mark13:25 chhiⁿ ōe tùi thiⁿ-téng lak,lo̍h-lâi, thiⁿ-téng ê kng-thé lóng ōe iô-choah." 
Mark13:26 Hit-sî, lâng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú chhiong-móa tōa koân-lêng kap êng-kng chē-hûn lâi-lîm." 
Mark13:27 I ōe chhe-khián thiⁿ-sài tùi sì-hng, tùi tōe ê chit-pêng kàu thiⁿ ê hit-pêng chū-chi̍p I ê soán-bîn.”" 
Mark13:28 “Tio̍h tùi bû-hoa-kó-chhiū ha̍k-si̍p: Ki puh-íⁿ hoat-hio̍h ê sî, lín chiū chai joa̍h-thiⁿ teh-beh kàu." 
Mark13:29 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî chiū chai Jîn-chú í-keng chiap-kūn, kàu mn̂g-kháu lah." 
Mark13:30 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit sè-tāi iáu-bē kè,khì, che it-chhè lóng ōe hoat-seng." 
Mark13:31 Thiⁿ kap tōe ōe siau-sit, m̄-kú góa ê ōe choa̍t-tùi bōe siau-sit.”" 
Mark13:32 “Koan-hē hit-ê ji̍t, hit-ê sî, bô lâng chai; thiⁿ-téng ê thiⁿ-sài m̄ chai, Kiáⁿ mā m̄ chai, chí-ū Pē chai." 
Mark13:33 Tio̍h kín-sīn, tio̍h kéng-séng, in-ūi lín m̄ chai hit-ê sî-khek sím-mi̍h sî ōe kàu." 
Mark13:34 Chhin-chhiūⁿ ū chi̍t ê lâng beh chhut-gōa, chiong koân kau hō͘ po̍k-jîn, hun-phòe kang-chok hō͘ ta̍k-ê lâng, koh hoan-hù siú-ōe sió-sim kò͘-siú." 
Mark13:35 Só͘-í, tio̍h kéng-séng, chiah bián chit-ke ê chú-lâng hut-jiân tńg,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín teh khùn, in-ūi lín m̄ chai i sím-mi̍h sî ōe tńg,lâi, sī hông-hun á-sī pòaⁿ-mî, sī thiⁿ beh kng á-sī ji̍t chhut ê sî." 
Mark13:36  
Mark13:37 Góa kā lín kóng ê ōe mā beh tùi chèng-lâng kóng: Tio̍h kéng-séng!” 
Mark14:1 Koh nn̄g ji̍t chiū-sī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh kap Tû-kàⁿ-choeh. Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su teh chhē-khòaⁿ beh ēng sím-mi̍h kè-bô͘ thang lia̍h Iâ-so͘, kā I hāi-sí;" 
Mark14:2 put-kò in kóng, “M̄-thang tī choeh-kî tiong, kiaⁿ-liáu bîn-chiòng khí pō-tōng.”" 
Mark14:3 Iâ-so͘ tī Pek-tāi-nî bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng Se-bûn ê chhù teh chē-toh chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi, the̍h chi̍t koàn ge̍k-pân, lāi-bīn tóe-móa sûn koh kùi ê Ná-ta̍t phang-iû. I kòng-phòa ge̍k-pân, chiong phang-iû tò tī Iâ-so͘ ê thâu-khak téng." 
Mark14:4 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng chin siū-khì, hō͘-siōng gī-lūn kóng, “Ná tio̍h án-ni lōng-hùi phang-iû?" 
Mark14:5 Chit-koàn phang-iû ōe-tàng bōe saⁿ-pah gōa ê gûn lâi kiù-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng!” In chiū kā i chek-pī. 
Mark14:6 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kóng, “M̄-thang kā i tòng! Ná beh kā i tiau-lân? I ū ūi-tio̍h góa chòe chi̍t hāng hó-sū." 
Mark14:7 Put-sî ū sàn-chhiah-lâng kap lín chòe-hé, lín nā beh, put-koán-sî to ōe-tàng pang-chān in; put-kò góa bōe put-sî kap lín chòe-hé." 
Mark14:8 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng í-keng chīn-la̍t chòe lah; i seng ēng phang-iû boah góa ê seng-khu chún-pī góa ê bâi-chòng. 
Mark14:9 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit-ê hok-im bô-lūn thoân kàu choân sè-kài sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi, lâng lóng ōe kóng-khí chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lâi kì-liām i.”" 
Mark14:10 Cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê, Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi, khì kìⁿ hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ, beh chiong Iâ-so͘ chhut-bōe hō͘ in." 
Mark14:11 In thiaⁿ,tio̍h chin hoaⁿ-hí, tah-èng beh chîⁿ hō͘ i. Iû-tāi chiū it-ti̍t teh chhē ki-hōe, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ thang chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘." 
Mark14:12 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh ê thâu chi̍t ji̍t, chiū-sī thâi Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê iûⁿ-ko hit-ji̍t, bûn-tô͘ lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí ài goán khì tó-ūi kā lí chún-pī chia̍h Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan?”" 
Mark14:13 Iâ-so͘ chhe nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘, hoan-hù in kóng, “Lín ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi, ōe tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê the̍h chúi-pân ê ta-po͘-lâng, lín tè i khì." 
Mark14:14 I bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t keng chhù, lín tio̍h kā hit-ke ê chú-lâng kóng, ‘Lāu-su teh mn̄g, I kap i ê bûn-tô͘ beh chia̍h Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh boán-chhan ê kheh-thiaⁿ tī tó-ūi?’" 
Mark14:15 I ōe pò lín khòaⁿ lâu-téng chi̍t keng khoán hó-sè ê tōa-thiaⁿ, lín chiū tī hia ūi-tio̍h lán chún-pī.”" 
Mark14:16 Hit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ chiū chhut,khì, kàu siâⁿ-lāi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h ta̍k-hāng kap Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng,ê lóng siâng-khoán; in chiū tī hia chún-pī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan." 
Mark14:17 Hông-hun ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kap cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chòe-hé lâi." 
Mark14:18 In teh chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lín chiah-ê kap góa chòe-hé teh chia̍h ê lâng tiong-kan, ū chi̍t ê beh kā góa chhut-bōe.”" 
Mark14:19 In chin siong-sim, chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā I mn̄g, “M̄-sī góa ho͘hⁿ?”" 
Mark14:20 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Sī lín cha̍p-jī lâng tiong ê chi̍t ê, chiū-sī the̍h piáⁿ kap góa tī pôaⁿ,ni̍h teh ùn hit-ê." 
Mark14:21 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, Jîn-chú ōe siū hāi, put-kò chhut-bōe Jîn-chú hit-ê lâng chhám ah! Hit-ê lâng lêng-khó bô chhut-sì khah hó!”" 
Mark14:22 In teh chia̍h ê sî, Iâ-so͘ the̍h piáⁿ, kám-siā liáu-āu peh-khui, pun hō͘ bûn-tô͘, kóng, “The̍h,khì; che sī góa ê seng-khu.”" 
Mark14:23 Āu-lâi I phâng-poe, kám-siā liáu-āu the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘, in chiū lóng lim hit-poe." 
Mark14:24 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Che sī góa ê huih, sī li̍p-iok ê huih, ūi-tio̍h chin chōe lâng lâu-chhut,ê." 
Mark14:25 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, tī Siōng-tè-kok lim sin ê phû-tô-chiú hit-ji̍t í-chêng, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe koh lim chit-ê chiú.”" 
Mark14:26 In gîm-si liáu-āu chiū chhut,khì, khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ." 
Mark14:27 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín lóng ōe pàng-sak góa, in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa beh phah bo̍k-chiá, iûⁿ chiū sì-sòaⁿ." 
Mark14:28 Put-kò góa koh-oa̍h í-āu ōe pí lín seng khì Ka-lī-lī.” 
Mark14:29 Pí-tek kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chèng-lâng nā lóng pàng-sak lí, góa it-tēng bōe!”" 
Mark14:30 Iâ-so͘ kā Pí-tek kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lí kóng, kin-á-ji̍t, chiū-sī kim-mî, koe thî nn̄g piàn í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa.”" 
Mark14:31 M̄-kú Pí-tek kian-chhî kóng, “Nā it-tēng tio̍h kap lí chòe-hé sí, góa mā choa̍t-tùi bōe m̄ jīn lí!” Kî-tha ê lâng mā lóng án-ni kóng." 
Mark14:32 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ lâi kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi, kiò-chòe Khek-se-má-nî. I kā bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Góa khì kî-tó, lín tiàm chia chē.”" 
Mark14:33 I chiū chhōa Pí-tek, Ngá-kok, Iok-hān chòe-hé khì. I chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, hui-siông thòng-khó͘," 
Mark14:34 tùi in kóng, “Góa sim iu-siong kàu beh sí, lín tiàm chia, tio̍h kéng-séng!”" 
Mark14:35 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ khah chìn-chêng, phak tī thô͘-kha kî-kiû, khòaⁿ ōe-tàng hō͘ I bián keng-kè chit-ê thòng-khó͘ ê sî-kan bōe." 
Mark14:36 I kiû kóng, “A-pa Pē ah, lí ta̍k-hāng lóng ōe. Chit-ê poe kiû lí kā góa the̍h-khui, m̄-kú m̄-sī chiàu góa ê ì-sù, tio̍h chiàu lí ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān.”" 
Mark14:37 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ tńg,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h bûn-tô͘ teh khùn, chiū kā Pí-tek kóng, “ Se-bûn, lí teh khùn o͘h? Lí bōe-tàng kéng-séng chi̍t tiám-cheng kú sī,bô?" 
Mark14:38 Tio̍h kéng-séng, tio̍h kî-tó, chiah bōe hām-lo̍h iú-he̍k. Lín sui-jiân sim chin ì-ài, m̄-kú jio̍k-thé loán-jio̍k.”" 
Mark14:39 Iâ-so͘ koh khì kî-tó, mā-sī kóng siâng-khoán ê ōe." 
Mark14:40 I koh tńg,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h in in-ūi ba̍k-chiu chin siap iáu-teh khùn; in m̄ chai beh kā Iâ-so͘ ìn sím-mi̍h." 
Mark14:41 Iâ-so͘ tē-saⁿ piàn tńg,lâi, tùi in kóng, “Lín iáu-teh khùn, iáu-teh hioh-khùn o͘h? Kàu-gia̍h lah! Sî-kan í-keng kàu; lín khòaⁿ, Jîn-chú siū chhut-bōe kau tī chōe-jîn ê chhiú-thâu lah." 
Mark14:42 Khí,lâi, lán lâi-khì. Lín khòaⁿ, chhut-bōe góa ê lâng lâi lah.”" 
Mark14:43 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî, cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê — Iû-tāi sûi-sî lâi, chè-si-tiúⁿ, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, kap tiúⁿ-ló phài,lâi ê chi̍t tīn lâng gia̍h to gia̍h kùn kap i tàu-tīn lâi." 
Mark14:44 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê lâng ū hō͘ in chi̍t ê àm-hō, kóng, “Góa kā I chim hit-ê chiū-sī; lín kā lia̍h, giâm-bi̍t khàn-siú, kā I ah,khì.”" 
Mark14:45 Iû-tāi chi̍t-ē kàu, sûi-sî kiâⁿ-óa Iâ-so͘, kiò “Lia̍p-pí”, chiū kā I chim," 
Mark14:46 in chiū hē-chhiú lia̍h Iâ-so͘. 
Mark14:47 Ū chi̍t ê khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng pu̍ih to tùi tōa-chè-si ê po̍k-jîn phut,lo̍h-khì, kā i chi̍t pêng ê hī-á siah,khí-lâi." 
Mark14:48 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín gia̍h to gia̍h kùn chhut-lâi lia̍h góa, sī beh lia̍h kiông-tō sī,bô?" 
Mark14:49 Góa ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī lâng, lín mā ū tī hia, lín bô kā góa lia̍h. M̄-kú che sī beh hō͘ Sèng-keng ê ōe tit-tio̍h èng-giām.”" 
Mark14:50 Hit-sî, só͘-ū ê bûn-tô͘ lóng pàng-sak Iâ-so͘, tô-cháu." 
Mark14:51 Ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng teh tè Iâ-so͘, seng-khu chí-ū moa chi̍t tè iù-môa-pò͘. In beh kā i lia̍h," 
Mark14:52 m̄-kú i kā iù-môa-pò͘ pàng,leh, thǹg-pak-theh tô-cháu." 
Mark14:53 In kā Iâ-so͘ chhōa-khì tōa-chè-si hia; só͘-ū ê chè-si-tiúⁿ, tiúⁿ-ló, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su lóng chū-chi̍p tī hia." 
Mark14:54 Pí-tek lī hn̄g-hn̄g tè Iâ-so͘, tè ji̍p-khì tōa-chè-si kong-koán ê tiâⁿ, kap hiah-ê kéng-ōe chòe-hé chē-teh hang-hé." 
Mark14:55 Hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap choân gī-hōe it-ti̍t teh chhē chèng-kù beh kò Iâ-so͘, thang kā I chhú-sí, m̄-kú chhē lóng bô." 
Mark14:56 In-ūi ū chin chōe lâng kā Iâ-so͘ bû-kò, in ê chèng-sû bô it-tì." 
Mark14:57 Ū kúi-nā ê lâng khí-lâi kā I bû-kò, kóng" 
Mark14:58 “Goán bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ I kóng, ‘Góa beh thiah-húi chit-keng lâng ê chhiú só͘ khí ê Sèng-tiān, saⁿ ji̍t lāi beh koh lēng-gōa khí chi̍t keng m̄-sī lâng ê chhiú khí,ê.’”" 
Mark14:59 Liân chit-ê, in ê chèng-sû mā bô it-tì." 
Mark14:60 Tōa-chè-si tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng khiā,khí-lâi, mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Chiah-ê lâng teh kā lí kò sím-mi̍h? Lí ná lóng bô tap-piān?”" 
Mark14:61 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ tiām-tiām, lóng bô ìn pòaⁿ-kù. Tōa-chè-si koh mn̄g I kóng, “Lí sī Ki-tok, sī eng-kai tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn Hit-ūi ê Kiáⁿ á m̄-sī?”" 
Mark14:62 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa sī. Lín ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú chē tī Choân-lêng-chiá ê chiàⁿ-pêng, chē thiⁿ-téng ê hûn lâi-lîm.”" 
Mark14:63 Tōa-chè-si chiū thiah-li̍h ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ, kóng, “Lán iáu su-iàu sím-mi̍h chèng-jîn?" 
Mark14:64 Lín í-keng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I siat-to̍k Siōng-tè. Lín phah-sǹg án-chóaⁿ?” In lóng phòaⁿ I ū-chōe, eng-kai chhú-sí." 
Mark14:65 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kā Iâ-so͘ phùi chhùi-nōa, ng I ê bīn, ēng kûn-thâu-bú kā I cheng, koh tùi I kóng, “Sian-ti ah, kóng khòaⁿ-bāi, siáⁿ-lâng kā lí cheng?” Kéng-ōe kā I lia̍h-teh ti̍t-ti̍t siàn." 
Mark14:66 Pí-tek iáu tī tōa-chè-si kong-koán ē-bīn ê tiâⁿ, ū chi̍t ê tōa-chè-si ê lú-pī lâi." 
Mark14:67 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek teh hang-hé, ti̍t-ti̍t kā i siòng, kóng, “Lí mā lóng ū teh kap hit-ê Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé.”" 
Mark14:68 Pí-tek m̄ jīn, kóng, “Góa m̄ chai, mā thiaⁿ bô lí teh kóng sím-mi̍h.” I chiū chhut-khì tiâⁿ ê gōa-bīn. Hit-sî koe chiū thî." 
Mark14:69 Hit-ê lú-pī khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, koh kā khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng kóng, “Chit-ê lâng sī in hit-tīn ê lâng.”" 
Mark14:70 Pí-tek koh-chài m̄ jīn. Kè bô jōa kú, hiah-ê khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng koh tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Lí khak-si̍t sī in hit-tīn ê lâng, in-ūi lí mā-sī Ka-lī-lī -lâng.”" 
Mark14:71 Pí-tek chiū chiù-chōa kóng, “Lín teh kóng hit-ê lâng, góa m̄ bat. Góa nā kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, goān Siōng-tè chek-hoa̍t góa!”" 
Mark14:72 Hit-sî, koe tē-jī piàn thî. Pí-tek siūⁿ-khí Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng ê ōe “Koe thî nn̄g piàn í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa”, chiū chhut-siaⁿ khàu." 
Mark15:1 Thiⁿ chi̍t-ē kng, hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ, tiúⁿ-ló, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, í-ki̍p choân gī-hōe ê lâng tàu-tīn chham-siông. In kā Iâ-so͘ pa̍k,khí-lâi, ah-khì kau hō͘ Pí-lia̍p-to." 
Mark15:2 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông sī,bô?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Che sī lí kóng,ê.”" 
Mark15:3 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kò Iâ-so͘ chin chōe hāng tāi-chì.
