Mark15:4 Pí-lia̍p-to koh mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí khòaⁿ, in kā lí kò chiah chōe hāng, lí ná lóng bô tap-piān?”" 
Mark15:5 Iâ-so͘ iû-goân bô ìn pòaⁿ-kù, Pí-lia̍p-to soah kám-kak chin kî-koài." 
Mark15:6 Ta̍k-nî tī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê sî, Pí-lia̍p-to lóng ū chiàu bîn-chiòng ê iau-kiû pàng chi̍t ê hoān-lâng hō͘ in." 
Mark15:7 Ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Pa-lia̍p-pa, i kap chi̍t-kóa poān-tô͘ chòe-hé koaiⁿ-kaⁿ; in bat tī pō-loān tiong thâi-sí lâng." 
Mark15:8 Kûn-chiòng chū-chi̍p óa,lâi, iau-kiû Pí-lia̍p-to chiàu koàn-lē pān-lí." 
Mark15:9 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g in kóng, “Lín ài góa pàng Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông hō͘ lín bô?”" 
Mark15:10 In-ūi i chai hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ sī ūi-tio̍h oàn-tò͘ chiah chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ i. 
Mark15:11 Hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng, tian-tò iau-kiû Pí-lia̍p-to pàng Pa-lia̍p-pa hō͘ in." 
Mark15:12 Pí-lia̍p-to koh chi̍t piàn mn̄g in kóng, “Án-ni, lín chheng-chòe ‘ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông’ ê, lín ài góa án-chóaⁿ chhú-lí?”" 
Mark15:13 In koh tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!”" 
Mark15:14 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g in kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ? I ū chòe sím-mi̍h pháiⁿ tāi-chì?” In koh-khah tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!”" 
Mark15:15 Pí-lia̍p-to ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ kûn-chiòng hoaⁿ-hí, chiū pàng Pa-lia̍p-pa hō͘ in, koh bēng-lēng lâng ēng piⁿ phah Iâ-so͘, jiân-āu kau I khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè." 
Mark15:16 Peng-sū tòa Iâ-so͘ khì chóng-tok-hú ê tiâⁿ-lāi, āu-lâi tiàu-chi̍p choân-tūi ê peng." 
Mark15:17 In kā Iâ-so͘ chhēng chi̍t niá chí-sek ê gōa-phàu, koh ēng chhì-á pīⁿ chi̍t téng ông-koan kā I tì." 
Mark15:18 In kā I kiâⁿ-lé, hoah kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông bān-sòe!”" 
Mark15:19 In koh ēng chi̍t ki lô͘-tek-á sut I ê thâu-khak, kā I phùi chhùi-nōa, kūi lo̍h-khì pài I." 
Mark15:20 In hì-lāng I liáu-āu, hit-niá chí-sek ê gōa-phàu kā thǹg,khí-lâi, koh chiong I ka-kī ê saⁿ kā chhēng tò-tńg,khì, jiân-āu ah I chhut-khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè." 
Mark15:21 Ū chi̍t ê Kó͘-lī-nāi -lâng Se-bûn, sī A-le̍k-san-tāi kap Ló͘-hu ê lāu-pē, i tùi chng-kha lâi, tú-hó tùi hia keng-kè; peng-sū kiông-pek i giâ Iâ-so͘ ê si̍p-jī-kè." 
Mark15:22 In kā Iâ-so͘ ah-kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe Kok-kok-tha, hoan-e̍k sī “ Thâu-khak-óaⁿ-niá ”." 
Mark15:23 In ēng chham bu̍t-io̍h ê chiú hō͘ Iâ-so͘ lim, m̄-kú I bô lim." 
Mark15:24 Jiân-āu in kā I tèng si̍p-jī-kè, koh pun I ê saⁿ, thiu-chhiam koat-tēng ta̍k-ê lâng tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h." 
Mark15:25 In tèng Iâ-so͘ tī si̍p-jī-kè ê sî sī chá-khí-sî káu tiám. 
Mark15:26 Ū chi̍t ê pâi-á siá I ê chōe-chn̄g: “ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông”. 
Mark15:27 Ū nn̄g ê kiông-tō kap I chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè, chi̍t ê tī I ê chiàⁿ-pêng, chi̍t ê tī tò-pêng." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Tùi hia keng-kè ê lâng kā I bú-jio̍k, iô-thâu, kóng, “Ài ah, lí chit-ê lâng, kóng beh thiah-húi Sèng-tiān saⁿ ji̍t lāi koh khí,khí-lâi," 
Mark15:30 tio̍h kiù lí ka-kī, tùi si̍p-jī-kè lo̍h,lâi!”" 
Mark15:31 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su mā án-ni kā I thí-chhiò, kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “I kiù pa̍t-lâng, bô hoat-tō͘ kiù ka-kī!" 
Mark15:32 I sī Ki-tok, Í-sek-lia̍t ê Ông, hiān-chāi tio̍h tùi si̍p-jī-kè lo̍h,lâi, hō͘ lán thang khòaⁿ, thang sìn.” Kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè hiah-ê kiông-tō mā kā I bú-jio̍k." 
Mark15:33 Tiong-tàu ê sî, choân-tōe lóng o͘-àm, sòa kàu ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám." 
Mark15:34 Saⁿ tiám ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Í-lô-i, Í-lô-i, la-má sat-pak-tāi-nî?” Ì-sù sī “Góa ê Siōng-tè, góa ê Siōng-tè, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ pàng-sak góa?”" 
Mark15:35 Ū chi̍t-kóa khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h, kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, I teh kiò Í-lī-a!”" 
Mark15:36 Ū chi̍t ê lâng cháu-khì the̍h hái-mî, chìm sng-chiú, pa̍k tī lô͘-tek-á bé, tu-khì hō͘ Iâ-so͘ suh, kóng, “Tán chi̍t-ē! Khòaⁿ Í-lī-a ōe lâi kā I kiù bōe.”" 
Mark15:37 Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah chi̍t siaⁿ, chiū tn̄g-khùi." 
Mark15:38 Hit-sî Sèng-tiān lāi ê tiùⁿ-lî tùi téng kàu ē li̍h-chòe nn̄g pêng. 
Mark15:39 Khiā tī Iâ-so͘ tùi-bīn ê kun-koaⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I tn̄g-khùi ê chêng-hêng, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng khak-si̍t sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ!”" 
Mark15:40 Mā ū chi̍t-kóa hū-jîn-lâng tùi hn̄g-hn̄g teh khòaⁿ, kî-tiong ū Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a, sió Ngá-kok kap Iok-se ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a, í-ki̍p Sat-lô-bí." 
Mark15:41 In sī Iâ-so͘ tī Ka-lī-lī ê sî chiū tè I koh ho̍k-sāi I ê hū-jîn-lâng. Lēng-gōa koh ū chin chōe kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê hū-jîn-lâng mā tī hia. 
Mark15:42 Í-keng hông-hun, in-ūi hit-ji̍t sī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê Pī-pān-ji̍t, sī An-hioh-ji̍t ê chêng chi̍t ji̍t," 
Mark15:43 A-lī-má-thài ê Iok-sek lâi, hó-táⁿ khì kìⁿ Pí-lia̍p-to, chhéng-kiû chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé hō͘ i. Iok-sek sī chi̍t ê siū lâng chun-kèng ê gī-oân, pún-sin mā ū teh kî-thāi Siōng-tè-kok ê lâi-lîm." 
Mark15:44 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ í-keng sí, kám-kak kî-koài, chiū kiò kun-koaⁿ lâi, mn̄g-khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ sī m̄-sī í-keng sí,khì." 
Mark15:45 I tùi kun-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ khak-si̍t sí ê siau-sit, chiū chiong ûi-thé kau hō͘ Iok-sek." 
Mark15:46 Iok-sek bóe chi̍t tè iù-môa-pò͘, jiân-āu chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé tùi si̍p-jī-kè sóa,lo̍h-lâi, ēng hit-tè iù-môa-pò͘ kā I pau, an-chòng tī í-keng phah hó tī chio̍h-piah lāi ê bōng, koh kō chi̍t tè chio̍h lâi that tī bōng-kháu." 
Mark15:47 Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a kap Iok-se ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h an-chòng Iâ-so͘ ê só͘-chāi. 
Mark16:1 An-hioh-ji̍t kè-liáu, Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a, Ngá-kok ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a, kap Sat-lô-bí bóe phang-liāu beh khì boah Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé." 
Mark16:2 Lé-pài-ji̍t thàu-chá, ji̍t tú-á chhut ê sî, in chiū khì bōng-tōe." 
Mark16:3 In hō͘-siōng kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng beh thòe lán chiong bōng-kháu hit-tè chio̍h kō-khui?”" 
Mark16:4 Hit-tè chio̍h hui-siông tōa tè. In chi̍t-ē gia̍h-thâu, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-tè chio̍h í-keng kō-khui." 
Mark16:5 In ji̍p-khì bōng-lāi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ ê siàu-liân-lâng chē tī chiàⁿ-pêng, hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Mark16:6 Hit-ê siàu-liân-lâng tùi in kóng, “Bián kiaⁿ! Góa chai lín teh chhē hō͘ lâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘; I í-keng koh-oa̍h, bô tī chia. Lâi khòaⁿ khǹg I ê só͘-chāi." 
Mark16:7 Lín khì, khì kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kap Pí-tek kóng, ‘I pí lín seng khì Ka-lī-lī, tī hia lín ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h I, tú-tú chiàu I kā lín kóng,ê.’”" 
Mark16:8 In kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah, m̄-chai beh án-chóaⁿ, chiū tùi bōng,ni̍h chhut,lâi, ti̍t-ti̍t cháu. In lóng bô tùi lâng kóng sím-mi̍h, in-ūi in chin kiaⁿ." 
Mark16:9 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng khì Pí-tek kap i ê pêng-iú hia, tùi in kán-tan pò-kò só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì. Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Iâ-so͘ pún-sin chhe-khián I ê bûn-tô͘, tùi tang kàu sai soan-iông sîn-sèng, put-bia̍t, hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h éng-oán chín-kiù ê sìn-sit. Amen! Lé-pài-ji̍t thàu-chá, Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h liáu-āu, tāi-seng tùi Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a hián-hiān; Iâ-so͘ bat kā i kóaⁿ-chhut chhit ê kúi." 
Mark16:10 I khì kā hiah-ê tè Iâ-so͘ ê lâng pò-kò, hit-sî in teh ai-siong thî-khàu." 
Mark16:11 In thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h koh ū hō͘ Má-lī-a khòaⁿ,tio̍h, in iáu m̄ sìn." 
Mark16:12 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu, ū nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ kiâⁿ-lō͘ beh khì chng-kha ê sî, Iâ-so͘ ēng pa̍t-khoán ê hêng-siōng tùi in hián-hiān." 
Mark16:13 In tńg-khì kā kî-tha ê lâng pò-kò, m̄-kú hiah-ê lâng lóng m̄ sìn." 
Mark16:14 Āu-lâi, cha̍p-it ê sù-tô͘ teh chia̍h-pn̄g ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tùi in hián-hiān. I chek-pī in m̄ sìn kap ngī-sim, in-ūi in bô sìn khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h ê lâng kā in kóng ê ōe." 
Mark16:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín tio̍h khì choân sè-kài tùi só͘-ū pī-chō,ê soan-iông hok-im." 
Mark16:16 Sìn lâi niá-siū sóe-lé ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù; m̄-sìn ê lâng ōe siū tēng-chōe. 
Mark16:17 Sìn ê lâng ōe kiâⁿ ē-bīn chiah-ê sîn-jiah: In ōe hōng góa ê miâ kóaⁿ-kúi; in ōe kóng sin ê gú-giân; 
Mark16:18 in lia̍h chôa á-sī lim to̍k mā bōe siū siong-hāi; in kā pīⁿ-lâng hōaⁿ-chhiú, pīⁿ-lâng ōe tit-tio̍h i-hó.”" 
Mark16:19 Chú Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ, chē tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Mark16:20 Bûn-tô͘ chhut-khì ta̍k só͘-chāi thoân hok-im. Chú kap in tâng-kang, ēng in só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah chèng-si̍t in só͘ thoân ê tō-lí." 
Luke1:1 Só͘ chun-kèng ê Thê-o-hui-lô sian-siⁿ: Tī goán tiong-kan só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, í-keng ū chin chōe lâng chéng-lí koh phian-siá;" 
Luke1:2 chiah-ê tāi-chì sī chiàu hiah-ê tùi khí-thâu chiū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng kap thoân-tō ê lâng só͘ thoân-siū hō͘ goán,ê. 
Luke1:3 Chiah-ê lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì, góa ū tùi thâu kàu bé siông-sè chhâ-khó, chiah siūⁿ-kóng tio̍h ūi-tio̍h lí chiàu sūn-sū siá,chhut-lâi," 
Luke1:4 hō͘ lí thang bêng-pe̍k só͘ ha̍k-si̍p ê tō-lí sī khak-si̍t. 
Luke1:5 Hi-lu̍t chòe Iû-thài -ông ê sî, ū chi̍t ê A-pí-ngá pan ê chè-si, miâ kiò-chòe Sat-ka-lī-a; i ê bó͘ I-lī-sa-pe̍k mā-sī chè-si A-lûn ê hō͘-tāi." 
Luke1:6 In nn̄g lâng oân-choân chun-siú Chú it-chhè ê kài-bēng kap kui-lē, hō͘ Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe gī-lâng." 
Luke1:7 In bô kiáⁿ, in-ūi I-lī-sa-pe̍k bōe siⁿ, in nn̄g lâng mā lóng í-keng chin lāu." 
Luke1:8 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, Sat-ka-lī-a ti̍t-pan, tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng chip-hêng chè-si ê chit-bū." 
Luke1:9 Chiàu chè-si-chit ê kui-lē, i thiu-tio̍h chhiam ji̍p-khì Chú ê sèng-só͘ sio-hiuⁿ." 
Luke1:10 I teh sio-hiuⁿ ê sî, kui tōa-tīn bîn-chiòng tī gōa-bīn teh kî-tó." 
Luke1:11 Ū Chú ê chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài hián-hiān, khiā tī hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Luke1:12 Sat-ka-lī-a chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, hui-siông put-an." 
Luke1:13 Thiⁿ-sài kā i kóng, “ Sat-ka-lī-a, m̄-bián kiaⁿ, in-ūi Siōng-tè í-keng thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí ê kî-tó; lí ê bó͘ I-lī-sa-pe̍k ōe kā lí siⁿ chi̍t ê hāu-siⁿ. Lí tio̍h kā i hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iok-hān." 
Luke1:14 Lí ōe hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k; chin chōe lâng mā ōe in-ūi i ê chhut-sì lâi hoaⁿ-hí," 
Luke1:15 in-ūi i tī Chú ê bīn-chêng ōe chòe tōa-jîn-bu̍t. Po̍h-chiú kāu-chiú i lóng bōe-ēng-tit lim. I iáu tī bú-thai chiū hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa. 
Luke1:16 I ōe hō͘ chin chōe Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun kui-ǹg Chú — in ê Siōng-tè. 
Luke1:17 I ōe ēng sian-ti Í-lī-a ê cheng-sîn kap lêng-le̍k lâi chòe Chú ê sian-hong. I ōe hō͘ pē-bú kap kiáⁿ-jî hô-hó, hō͘ pōe-ge̍k ê lâng choán-ǹg lâi tè gī-lâng ê ì-liām, hō͘ chú-bîn chún-pī hó-sè thang gêng-chiap Chú.”" 
Luke1:18 Sat-ka-lī-a tùi thiⁿ-sài kóng, “Góa tio̍h án-chóaⁿ chiah ōe chai chit-ê tāi-chì? Góa í-keng lāu, góa ê bó͘ mā hiah chōe hè ah.”" 
Luke1:19 Thiⁿ-sài ìn kóng, “Góa sī teh sū-hāu Siōng-tè ê Ka-pek-lia̍t, siū phài lâi thoân-ōe, tùi lí pò chit-ê hó siau-sit." 
Luke1:20 Lí ōe é-káu bōe kóng-ōe, it-ti̍t kàu chiah-ê tāi-chì èng-giām hit-ji̍t, in-ūi lí bô siong-sìn góa só͘ kóng sî kàu ōe si̍t-hiān chiah-ê ōe.”" 
Luke1:21 Hit-sî, bîn-chiòng teh thèng-hāu Sat-ka-lī-a, in chin kî-koài i ná ōe ji̍p-khì sèng-só͘ hiah-ni̍h kú." 
Luke1:22 I chhut-lâi ê sî soah bōe-tàng tùi in kóng-ōe, in chiah chai i tī sèng-só͘ ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng. I bōe kóng-ōe, it-ti̍t tùi in pí-chhiú." 
Luke1:23 Sat-ka-lī-a ho̍k-sāi ê ji̍t-kî kè-liáu chiū tńg-khì chhù,ni̍h. 
Luke1:24 Kè bô jōa kú, i ê bó͘ I-lī-sa-pe̍k hoâi-īn, gō͘ ge̍h-ji̍t kú bô chhut-mn̂g." 
Luke1:25 I-lī-sa-pe̍k kóng, “Chú chiah-ni̍h khòaⁿ-kò͘ góa, kā góa tû-khì tī lâng bīn-chêng ê kiàn-siàu.”" 
Luke1:26 I-lī-sa-pe̍k hoâi-īn tē-la̍k kò-ge̍h, thiⁿ-sài Ka-pek-lia̍t hōng Siōng-tè chhe-phài kàu Ka-lī-lī chi̍t ê siâⁿ, kiò-chòe Ná-sat-le̍k," 
Luke1:27 khì kìⁿ chi̍t ê chāi-sek-lú, miâ kiò-chòe Má-lī-a. Chit-ê chāi-sek-lú í-keng kap Tāi-pi̍t -ke chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Iok-sek ê lâng tēng-hun." 
Luke1:28 Thiⁿ-sài kàu Má-lī-a hia, tùi i kóng, “Pêng-an! Lí sī chèng hū-lú tiong-kan siōng ū hok-khì,ê; Chú kap lí tông-chāi!”" 
Luke1:29 Má-lī-a in-ūi chiah-ê ōe hui-siông put-an, sim-lāi it-ti̍t teh siūⁿ chit-ê chhéng-an sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù." 
Luke1:30 Thiⁿ-sài tùi i kóng, “ Má-lī-a, m̄-bián kiaⁿ, in-ūi lí ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè sù-hok." 
Luke1:31 Lí ōe hoâi-īn siⁿ chi̍t ê hāu-siⁿ, lí tio̍h kā I hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘." 
Luke1:32 I ōe chòe tōa-jîn-bu̍t, lâng ōe chheng-ho͘ I chòe Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ. Chú Siōng-tè ōe chiong I chó͘-sian Tāi-pi̍t ê ông-ūi hō͘ I." 
Luke1:33 I ōe éng-oán thóng-tī Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ-sun; I ê ông-kok bû-kiông-chīn.” 
Luke1:34 Má-lī-a tùi thiⁿ-sài kóng, “Góa iáu-bē chhut-kè, ná ōe ū chit-khoán tāi-chì?”" 
Luke1:35 Thiⁿ-sài ìn kóng, “Sèng Sîn beh lîm-kàu lí, Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê koân-lêng beh tì-ìm lí. In-ūi án-ni, hit-ê teh-beh chhut-sì ê eⁿ-á sī sèng,ê, lâng ōe chheng-ho͘ I chòe Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ." 
Luke1:36 Lí khòaⁿ, lí ê chhin-chiâⁿ I-lī-sa-pe̍k, i sui-jiân nî-lāu, mā í-keng hoâi-īn beh siⁿ chi̍t ê hāu-siⁿ. Lâng kóng i bōe siⁿ, m̄-kú i í-keng ū-sin la̍k ge̍h-ji̍t." 
Luke1:37 In-ūi Siōng-tè bô chi̍t hāng tāi-chì chòe bōe kàu.” 
Luke1:38 Má-lī-a kóng, “Góa sī Chú ê lú-pī, goān chiàu lí ê ōe tī góa sin-chiūⁿ si̍t-hiān.” Thiⁿ-sài chiū lī-khui i." 
Luke1:39 Kè bô jōa kú, Má-lī-a chhut-hoat, kóaⁿ-kín khì Iû-tāi soaⁿ-tōe ê chi̍t ê siâⁿ." 
Luke1:40 I ji̍p-khì Sat-ka-lī-a ê chhù, kā I-lī-sa-pe̍k chhéng-an." 
Luke1:41 I-lī-sa-pe̍k thiaⁿ-tio̍h Má-lī-a ê chhéng-an, pak-tó͘ lāi ê eⁿ-á chiū tiô-thiàu. I-lī-sa-pe̍k hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa," 
Luke1:42 tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng tiong lí siōng siū chiok-hok! Lí pak-tó͘ lāi ê gín-á mā siū chiok-hok!" 
Luke1:43 Góa ê Chú ê lāu-bú lâi hóng-būn góa, góa ná ōe-kham,tit?" 
Luke1:44 In-ūi góa chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí chhéng-an ê siaⁿ, pak-tó͘ lāi ê eⁿ-á chiū hoaⁿ-hí tiô-thiàu." 
Luke1:45 Siong-sìn Chú kóng ê ōe it-tēng ōe si̍t-hiān hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chin ū hok-khì!” 
Luke1:46 Má-lī-a kóng: Góa ê sim chun Chú chòe tōa; 
Luke1:47 Góa ê sîn in-ūi Siōng-tè — góa ê Kiù-chú lâi hoaⁿ-hí. 
Luke1:48 In-ūi Chú ū khòaⁿ-kò͘ I pi-bî ê lú-pī. Tùi taⁿ í-āu, bān sè-tāi ê lâng lóng ōe kóng góa ū hok-khì," 
Luke1:49 in-ūi Choân-lêng ê Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h góa chòe úi-tāi ê tāi-chì; I ê miâ sī sèng. 
Luke1:50 Tùi kèng-ùi I ê lâng, I lîn-bín in kàu sè-sè-tāi-tāi." 
Luke1:51 I chhun-chhut koân-lêng ê chhiú, kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ sim kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng." 
Luke1:52 I chiong chiáng-koân,ê tùi pó-chō thoa,lo̍h-lâi, pi-bî ê lâng kā in ko-seng." 
Luke1:53 Iau-gō ê lâng, I ēng hó-mi̍h hō͘ in pá-chiok; hó-gia̍h ê lâng, I kóaⁿ in khang-chhiú chhut,khì." 
Luke1:54 I hû-chō͘ I ê po̍k-jîn Í-sek-lia̍t, ōe-kì-tit kā in lîn-bín;" 
Luke1:55 chiàu I tùi lán chó͘-sian ê èng-ún, lîn-bín A-pek-la-hán kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun kàu éng-oán." 
Luke1:56 Má-lī-a kap I-lī-sa-pe̍k chòe-hé tòa chha-put-to saⁿ kò-ge̍h, jiân-āu tńg-khì in tau." 
Luke1:57 I-lī-sa-pe̍k seng-sán ê ji̍t-kî í-keng kàu, chiū siⁿ chi̍t ê hāu-siⁿ." 
Luke1:58 Chhù-piⁿ kap chhin-cho̍k thiaⁿ-kóng Chú ū tōa-tōa lîn-bín i, chiū kap i chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí." 
Luke1:59 Gín-á chhut-sì tē-poeh ji̍t, in lâi beh kā i kat-lé, koh chiàu in lāu-pē ê miâ kiò i chòe Sat-ka-lī-a." 
Luke1:60 Chóng-sī i ê lāu-bú kóng, “M̄-thang! Tio̍h kā i hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iok-hān.”" 
Luke1:61 In tùi i kóng, “Lín chhin-cho̍k tiong bô lâng hō chit-ê miâ.”" 
Luke1:62 In chiū ēng chhiú pí, mn̄g gín-á ê lāu-pē khòaⁿ beh kā i hō sím-mi̍h miâ." 
Luke1:63 Sat-ka-lī-a kā in thó chi̍t tè siá-jī-pán, siá kóng, “I ê miâ sī Iok-hān.” Tāi-ke lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Luke1:64 Sat-ka-lī-a sûi-sî khui-chhùi kóng-ōe, chheng-chàn Siōng-tè." 
Luke1:65 Chhù-piⁿ-keh-piah lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ; choân Iû-thài ê soaⁿ-tōe lóng teh tâm-lūn chit-hāng tāi-chì. 
Luke1:66 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì ê lâng siūⁿ-kóng, “Chit-ê eⁿ-á chiong-lâi ōe chiâⁿ-chòe sím-mi̍h khoán lâng?” In-ūi ū Chú ê koân-lêng kap i tông-chāi." 
Luke1:67 Iok-hān ê lāu-pē Sat-ka-lī-a hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, ū-giân kóng:" 
Luke1:68 Tio̍h chheng-chàn Chú — Í-sek-lia̍t ê Siōng-tè! In-ūi I ū khòaⁿ-kò͘ koh kiù-sio̍k I ê chú-bîn. 
Luke1:69 I tùi I ê po̍k-jîn Tāi-pi̍t ê ke, kā lán siat-li̍p chi̍t ūi ū tōa khùi-la̍t ê Chín-kiù-chiá." 
Luke1:70 Chiàu I tī kó͘-chá thong-kè I sèng sian-ti ê chhùi èng-ún kóng: 
Luke1:71 I beh chín-kiù lán thoat-lī lán ê tùi-te̍k, thoat-lī it-chhè oàn-hūn lán ê lâng ê chhiú." 
Luke1:72 I èng-ún beh lîn-bín lán ê chó͘-sian, koh ōe-kì-tit I só͘ li̍p sîn-sèng ê iok," 
Luke1:73 chiū-sī I tùi lán ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán só͘ li̍p ê iok. I beh kiù lán thoat-lī tùi-te̍k ê chhiú, hō͘ lán bô kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, chi̍t-sì-lâng tī I ê bīn-chêng ēng sèng-kiat kong-gī ho̍k-sāi I." 
Luke1:74  
Luke1:75  
Luke1:76 Sòe-kiáⁿ ah, lí ōe hō͘ lâng chheng-ho͘ chòe Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê sian-ti; in-ūi lí ōe chòe Chú ê sian-hong lâi chún-pī I beh kiâⁿ ê lō͘," 
Luke1:77 hō͘ I ê chú-bîn in-ūi chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián, thang bêng-pe̍k Siōng-tè ê chín-kiù." 
Luke1:78 In-ūi lán ê Siōng-tè un-jiû chû-pi; I hō͘ chheng-chá ê ji̍t-thâu tùi thiⁿ-téng chiò lán," 
Luke1:79 chiò lán chiah-ê tiàm tī o͘-àm kap sí-bông ìm-ńg-ē ê lâng, ín-chhōa lán ê kha kiâⁿ-ji̍p hô-pêng ê lō͘." 
Luke1:80 Chit-ê gín-á chiām-chiām tōa-hàn, sim-lêng ji̍t-ji̍t ióng-chòng. I tòa khòng-iá, it-ti̍t kàu i tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan kong-khai chhut-hiān hit-ji̍t." 
Luke2:1 Hit-sî, Lô-má hông-tè Ò-kó͘-su-to͘ pan-pò͘ bēng-lēng, kiò choân-kok ê jîn-bîn lóng teng-kì hō͘-kháu." 
Luke2:2 Chit-ê thâu chi̍t piàn ê hō͘-kháu-phó͘-cha sī Ku-lí-liú chòe Sū-lī-a chóng-tok ê sî si̍t-si,ê. 
Luke2:3 Chèng-lâng lóng tńg-khì ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong teng-kì hō͘-kháu. 
Luke2:4 Iok-sek mā tùi Ka-lī-lī ê Ná-sat-le̍k khì Iû-thài ê Pek-lī-hêng, chiū-sī Tāi-pi̍t chhut-sì ê siâⁿ, in-ūi i sio̍k Tāi-pi̍t ê ke, sī Tāi-pi̍t ê sè-hē." 
Luke2:5 Iok-sek kap i ê bī-hun-chhe Má-lī-a chòe-hé khì teng-kì. Hit-sî, Má-lī-a í-keng hoâi-īn." 
Luke2:6 In tī hia ê sî, Má-lī-a seng-sán ê sî kàu," 
Luke2:7 chiū siⁿ thâu-chiūⁿ-kiáⁿ; i ēng pò͘ kā I pau, hō͘ I khùn tī chô,ni̍h, in-ūi kheh-koán bô só͘-chāi thang hō͘ in tòa." 
Luke2:8 Hit tōe-khu ū chi̍t-kóa kò͘-iûⁿ ê lâng tī iá-gōa, mî,sî lûn-liû teh kò͘ in ê iûⁿ-kûn." 
Luke2:9 Chú ê chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi in chhut-hiān; Chú ê êng-kng sì-bīn kā in chiò, in chiū hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Luke2:10 Thiⁿ-sài kā in kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ! Góa kā lín pò chi̍t ê beh hō͘ bān-bîn tōa hoaⁿ-hí ê hó siau-sit." 
Luke2:11 Kin-á-ji̍t, tī Tāi-pi̍t -siâⁿ ū chi̍t ūi Kiù-chú ūi-tio̍h lín chhut-sì, chiū-sī Chú Ki-tok." 
Luke2:12 Lín ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê eⁿ-á ēng pò͘ pau,teh tó tī chô,ni̍h; che hō͘ lín chòe kì-hō.” 
Luke2:13 Hut-jiân, ū chi̍t tōa-tīn thian-kun kap hit-ê thiⁿ-sài chòe-hé siōng-chàn Siōng-tè kóng:" 
Luke2:14 Goān êng-kng kui tī chì-koân ê Siōng-tè; goān I sù hô-pêng hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ I só͘ ì-ài ê lâng. 
Luke2:15 Chiah-ê thiⁿ-sài lī-khui in chiūⁿ-thiⁿ ê sî, kò͘-iûⁿ,ê lóng kóng, “Lán lâi-khì Pek-lī-hêng, khòaⁿ Chú pò lán chai chit-ê só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì.”" 
Luke2:16 In chiū kóaⁿ-kín khì, chhē-tio̍h Má-lī-a kap Iok-sek, í-ki̍p tó tī chô,ni̍h ê eⁿ-á." 
Luke2:17 In khòaⁿ-liáu, chiū chiong thiⁿ-sài tùi in kóng chit-ê eⁿ-á ê tāi-chì pò lâng chai." 
Luke2:18 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h kò͘-iûⁿ,ê só͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe ê lâng lóng kám-kak chin kî-koài. 
Luke2:19 Put-kò Má-lī-a chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng khǹg tī sim-lāi, put-sî teh siūⁿ." 
Luke2:20 Kò͘-iûⁿ,ê tńg,khì, in-ūi só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h it-chhè ê tāi-chì lóng kap thiⁿ-sài tùi in kóng,ê oân-choân kâng-khoán, chiū chiong êng-kng chheng-chàn kui hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Luke2:21 Eⁿ-á chhut-sì tē-poeh ji̍t, kā I kat-lé ê ji̍t kàu, in chiū kā I hō-miâ kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘; chit-ê miâ sī Má-lī-a iáu-bē hoâi-īn ê sî thiⁿ-sài kā I hō,ê." 
Luke2:22 Chiàu Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, kiat-chēng-lé ê ji̍t kè-liáu, Iok-sek kap Má-lī-a phō eⁿ-á khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh chiong I hiàn hō͘ Chú." 
Luke2:23 Chiàu Chú ê Lu̍t-hoat kì-chài, “Thâu-chi̍t-the ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ lóng tio̍h sèng-pia̍t kui hō͘ Chú.”" 
Luke2:24 Koh chiàu Chú ê Lu̍t-hoat kui-tēng tio̍h hiàn chi̍t tùi pan-kah, á-sī nn̄g chiah hún-chiáu-á-kiáⁿ chòe seng-lé." 
Luke2:25 Hit-sî, tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Se-biān. Chit-ê lâng gī koh kèng-khiân, it-ti̍t teh kî-thāi Í-sek-lia̍t ê ho̍k-heng. Sèng Sîn ū kap i tông-chāi." 
Luke2:26 I tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn ê khé-sī, chai-iáⁿ i sí í-chêng it-tēng ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chú só͘ èng-ún ê Ki-tok." 
Luke2:27 I hō͘ Sèng Sîn kám-tōng ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān. Tú hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ ê pē-bú phō eⁿ-á Iâ-so͘ ji̍p,lâi, beh chiàu Lu̍t-hoat ê koàn-lē kā I kú-hêng gî-sek." 
Luke2:28 Se-biān ēng siang-chhiú phō eⁿ-á, chheng-chàn Siōng-tè kóng:" 
Luke2:29 Chú ah, taⁿ chiàu lí ê ōe, hō͘ lí ê po̍k-jîn pêng-pêng-an-an lī-khui sè-kan;" 
Luke2:30 in-ūi góa í-keng ū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí ê chín-kiù," 
Luke2:31 chiū-sī lí ūi bān-bîn só͘ chún-pī,ê. 
Luke2:32 I chòe khé-sī Gōa-pang-lâng ê kng, chòe lí ê chú-bîn Í-sek-lia̍t ê êng-kng." 
Luke2:33 Iâ-so͘ ê pē-bú thiaⁿ-tio̍h Se-biān kóng-khí koan-hē eⁿ-á ê sū, chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Luke2:34 Se-biān kā in chiok-hok, koh tùi eⁿ-á ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a kóng, “Chit-ê eⁿ-á siū soán-li̍p sī beh hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t tiong chin chōe lâng poa̍h-tó, chin chōe lâng peh,khí-lâi, koh chiâⁿ-chòe siū kong-kek ê kì-hō," 
Luke2:35 hō͘ chin chōe lâng sim-lāi ê ì-liām lō͘-hiān; lí pún-sin ê sim mā ōe hō͘ lāi-kiàm chha̍k thàng,kè.” 
Luke2:36 Koh ū chi̍t ê lú sian-ti An-ná, sī A-siat chi-cho̍k ê Hoat-lōe-le̍k ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ. I í-keng chin lāu. I kiat-hun liáu kap tiōng-hu seng-oa̍h chhit nî," 
Luke2:37 hiān-chāi í-keng poeh-cha̍p-sì hè. I lóng bô lī-khui Sèng-tiān, mî-ji̍t ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè, kìm-chia̍h kî-tó." 
Luke2:38 Tú hit-sî, i mā lâi kám-siā Siōng-tè, tùi só͘-ū teh kî-thāi Siōng-tè kiù-sio̍k Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng kóng-khí chit-ê eⁿ-á ê sū." 
Luke2:39 Iok-sek kap Má-lī-a chiàu Chú ê Lu̍t-hoat oân-sêng it-chhè ê kui-tēng chiū tńg-khì Ka-lī-lī, kàu in ê kò͘-hiong Ná-sat-le̍k." 
Luke2:40 Chit-ê gín-á chiām-chiām tōa-hàn, ji̍t-ji̍t ióng-chòng, chhiong-móa tì-hūi; Siōng-tè ê un-hūi kap I tông-chāi." 
Luke2:41 Iâ-so͘ ê pē-bú ta̍k-nî lóng ū khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siú Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh. 
Luke2:42 Iâ-so͘ cha̍p-jī hè ê sî, in mā chiàu koàn-lē chiūⁿ,khì." 
Luke2:43 Choeh-kî soah, in chhut-hoat beh tńg,khì, gín-á Iâ-so͘ lâu tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. I ê pē-bú lóng m̄ chai," 
Luke2:44 siūⁿ-chòe I sī tī chòe-hé kiâⁿ hit-tīn lâng ê tiong-kan. In kiâⁿ chi̍t ji̍t ê lō͘-thêng liáu-āu, chiah khai-sí tī chhin-cho̍k kap se̍k-sāi-lâng ê tiong-kan teh chhē." 
Luke2:45 In chhē bô, chiū tò-tńg-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chhē," 
Luke2:46 saⁿ ji̍t āu chiah tī Sèng-tiān khòaⁿ-tio̍h I chē tī kàu-su ê tiong-kan, iā teh thiaⁿ iā teh mn̄g." 
Luke2:47 Só͘-ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I kóng-ōe ê lâng lóng in-ūi I chhong-bêng ê ìn-tap kám-kak tio̍h-kiaⁿ kî-koài. 
Luke2:48 I ê pē-bú khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ. I ê lāu-bú tùi I kóng, “Kiáⁿ ah, lí ná thang án-ni tùi-thāi goán? Lí khòaⁿ, lí ê lāu-pē kap góa chin hoân-ló, it-ti̍t teh chhē lí!”" 
Luke2:49 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín ná tio̍h chhē góa? Kiám m̄ chai góa it-tēng tio̍h tī góa ê Pē ê chhù?”" 
Luke2:50 Put-kò in bōe liáu-kái I tùi in kóng ê ōe. 
Luke2:51 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ kap in chòe-hé tńg-khì Ná-sat-le̍k, sū-sū sūn-thàn in. I ê lāu-bú chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng khǹg tī sim-lāi." 
Luke2:52 Iâ-so͘ ê tì-hūi kap nî-hè ná ke-thiⁿ; Siōng-tè kap lâng mā ná thiàⁿ I. 
Luke3:1 Lô-má hông-tè Thê-pì-liû thóng-tī tē-cha̍p-gō͘ nî, Pâng-siu Pí-lia̍p-to choh Iû-thài chóng-tok, Hi-lu̍t choh Ka-lī-lī hun-hong ê ông, i ê sió-tī Hui-le̍k choh Í-thó͘-lī-a kap Te̍k-lia̍p-khó-nî tōe-hng hun-hong ê ông, Lū-sat-liap choh A-pí-lī-nî hun-hong ê ông," 
Luke3:2 A-ná kap Kai-a-hoat choh tōa-chè-si ê sî, Siōng-tè ê ōe lîm-kàu Sat-ka-lī-a ê kiáⁿ Iok-hān, hit-sî i tī khòng-iá." 
Luke3:3 Iok-hān chiū khì Iok-tàn-hô it-tài ta̍k só͘-chāi soan-iông kóng, “Tio̍h hóe-kái, niá-siū sóe-lé, Siōng-tè chiū sià-bián lín ê chōe!”" 
Luke3:4 Chiàu sian-ti Í-sài-a ê chheh kì-chài: Ū siaⁿ tī khòng-iá teh hoah: Tio̍h ūi Chú chún-pī tō-lō͘, ūi-tio̍h I siu-ti̍t sió-lō͘." 
Luke3:5 It-chhè ê soaⁿ-kok tio̍h thūn hō͘ tīⁿ; só͘-ū tōa-soaⁿ sió-soaⁿ tio̍h siah hō͘ kē; oan-khiau ê lō͘ tio̍h kái hō͘ ti̍t; khâm-khia̍t ê lō͘ tio̍h siu hō͘ pîⁿ! 
Luke3:6 Bān-bîn lóng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê chín-kiù. 
Luke3:7 Iok-hān kā lâi beh niá-siū sóe-lé hiah-ê kûn-chiòng kóng, “Lín chiah-ê to̍k-chôa, sím-mi̍h-lâng kéng-kò lín siám-pī Siōng-tè teh-beh hoat ê siū-khì?" 
Luke3:8 Tio̍h ēng hêng-ûi chèng-bêng lín ū hóe-kái! Lín m̄-thang ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng ‘ A-pek-la-hán sī goán ê chó͘-sian’, góa kā lín kóng, Siōng-tè ōe-tàng ēng chiah-ê chio̍h-thâu chō kiáⁿ-sun hō͘ A-pek-la-hán." 
Luke3:9 Pó͘-thâu í-keng khòa tī chhiū-thâu; só͘-ū bô kiat hó ké-chí ê chhiū lóng beh kā chhò,khí-lâi, hiat-lo̍h hé.”" 
Luke3:10 Chèng-lâng mn̄g Iok-hān, “Án-ni, goán tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
Luke3:11 I ìn kóng, “Ū nn̄g niá saⁿ,ê, tio̍h pun hō͘ bô,ê; ū chia̍h-mi̍h,ê, mā tio̍h án-ni chòe.”" 
Luke3:12 Ū chi̍t-kóa ba̍uh-sè,ê mā lâi beh niá-siū sóe-lé. In mn̄g Iok-hān, “Lāu-su, goán tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
Luke3:13 I kā in kóng, “Kui-tēng ê sè-kim í-gōa m̄-thang ke siu.”" 
Luke3:14 Ū chi̍t-kóa kun-jîn mā mn̄g i, “Goán tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h?” I kā in kóng, “M̄-thang kā lâng khióng-hat the̍h-chîⁿ; mā m̄-thang kā lâng khà-iû; só͘ niá ê sin-súi tio̍h boán-chiok.”" 
Luke3:15 Bîn-chiòng teh kî-thāi, tāi-ke sim-lāi siūⁿ-kóng Iok-hān kiám-chhái sī Ki-tok ê sî," 
Luke3:16 Iok-hān tùi tāi-ke kóng, “Góa ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé; m̄-kú ū chi̍t ūi pí góa khah ū koân-lêng,ê teh-beh lâi, góa liân kā I tháu ôe-tòa to bōe-kham,tit. I beh ēng Sèng Sîn kap hé kā lín sóe-lé." 
Luke3:17 I ê chhiú the̍h pòa-ki beh chiong be̍h-tiâⁿ ê be̍h pòa chheng-khì, be̍h-á siu-ji̍p chhng-khò͘, be̍h-hiūⁿ chiū ēng bōe hoa ê hé kā i sio-tiāu.”" 
Luke3:18 Iok-hān tùi bîn-chiòng thoân hok-im, ēng chin chōe bô kâng-khoán ê kóng-hoat kā in khoàn-bián." 
Luke3:19 Put-kò Iok-hān chek-pī hun-hong ê ông Hi-lu̍t, in-ūi i ū chhōa tē-hū Hi-lô-tí chòe bó͘, koh in-ūi i ū chòe chin chōe pháiⁿ tāi-chì." 
Luke3:20 Chiah-ê í-gōa, i ū chòe chi̍t hāng koh-khah pháiⁿ ê tāi-chì, chiū-sī kā Iok-hān koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ." 
Luke3:21 Bîn-chiòng lóng niá-siū sóe-lé liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ mā lâi niá-siū sóe-lé. I teh kî-tó ê sî, thiⁿ khui," 
Luke3:22 Sèng Sîn kàng-lo̍h tī I téng-bīn, hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu; koh tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng: Lí sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, lí, góa chin ì-ài." 
Luke3:23 Iâ-so͘ khai-sí thoân-tō ê sî, iok saⁿ-cha̍p hè. Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ I chòe Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ, Iok-sek sī Hi-lí ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:24 Hi-lí sī Má-thah ê kiáⁿ, Má-thah sī Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ, Lī-bī sī Be̍k-ki ê kiáⁿ, Be̍k-ki sī Ngá-ná ê kiáⁿ, Ngá-ná sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:25 Iok-sek sī Má-tha-thê-a ê kiáⁿ, Má-tha-thê-a sī A-mô͘-su ê kiáⁿ, A-mô͘-su sī Ná-hông ê kiáⁿ, Ná-hông sī Í-su-lī ê kiáⁿ, Í-su-lī sī Ná-kai ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:26 Ná-kai sī Má-ap ê kiáⁿ, Má-ap sī Má-tha-thê-a ê kiáⁿ, Má-tha-thê-a sī Se-bí ê kiáⁿ, Se-bí sī Iok-sek-khek ê kiáⁿ, Iok-sek-khek sī Iok-tāi ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:27 Iok-tāi sī Iok-a-ná ê kiáⁿ, Iok-a-ná sī Lī-sat ê kiáⁿ, Lī-sat sī Só͘-lô-pa-pek ê kiáⁿ, Só͘-lô-pa-pek sī Sat-lia̍p-thiat ê kiáⁿ, Sat-lia̍p-thiat sī Nî-lī ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:28 Nî-lī sī Be̍k-ki ê kiáⁿ, Be̍k-ki sī A-tí ê kiáⁿ, A-tí sī Ko-song ê kiáⁿ, Ko-song sī Í-mô͘-tong ê kiáⁿ, Í-mô͘-tong sī Ní ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:29 Ní sī Iok-sè ê kiáⁿ, Iok-sè sī Í-lī-í-siā ê kiáⁿ, Í-lī-í-siā sī Iok-lēng ê kiáⁿ, Iok-lēng sī Má-thah ê kiáⁿ, Má-thah sī Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:30 Lī-bī sī Se-biān ê kiáⁿ, Se-biān sī Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ, Iû-tāi sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ, Iok-sek sī Iok-lâm ê kiáⁿ, Iok-lâm sī Í-lī-a-kèng ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:31 Í-lī-a-kèng sī Bí-lī-a ê kiáⁿ, Bí-lī-a sī Mái-lâm ê kiáⁿ, Mái-lâm sī Má-ta̍t-tha ê kiáⁿ, Má-ta̍t-tha sī Ná-tan ê kiáⁿ, Ná-tan sī Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:32 Tāi-pi̍t sī Iâ-se ê kiáⁿ, Iâ-se sī Gô-pī-tek ê kiáⁿ, Gô-pī-tek sī Pho-a-su ê kiáⁿ, Pho-a-su sī Sat-bûn ê kiáⁿ, Sat-bûn sī Ná-sūn ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:33 Ná-sūn sī A-bí-ná-ta̍t ê kiáⁿ, A-bí-ná-ta̍t sī A-bîn ê kiáⁿ, A-bîn sī A-nî ê kiáⁿ, A-nî sī Hi-su-lûn ê kiáⁿ, Hi-su-lûn sī Hoat-le̍k-su ê kiáⁿ, Hoat-le̍k-su sī Iû-tāi ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:34 Iû-tāi sī Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ, Ngá-kok sī Í-sat ê kiáⁿ, Í-sat sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ, A-pek-la-hán sī Tha-la ê kiáⁿ, Tha-la sī Ná-ho̍k ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:35 Ná-ho̍k sī Se-lo̍k ê kiáⁿ, Se-lo̍k sī La-gô͘ ê kiáⁿ, La-gô͘ sī Hoat-le̍k ê kiáⁿ, Hoat-le̍k sī Hi-pek ê kiáⁿ, Hi-pek sī Sa-la ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:36 Sa-la sī Kai-lâm ê kiáⁿ, Kai-lâm sī A-hoat-sat ê kiáⁿ, A-hoat-sat sī Siám ê kiáⁿ, Siám sī Ná-a ê kiáⁿ, Ná-a sī La-be̍k ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:37 La-be̍k sī Má-thó͘-sat-la ê kiáⁿ, Má-thó͘-sat-la sī Í-lo̍k ê kiáⁿ, Í-lo̍k sī Ngá-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ, Ngá-lia̍t sī Má-le̍k-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ, Má-le̍k-lia̍t sī Kai-lâm ê kiáⁿ," 
Luke3:38 Kai-lâm sī Í-ná-sū ê kiáⁿ, Í-ná-sū sī Sài-te̍k ê kiáⁿ, Sài-te̍k sī A-tong ê kiáⁿ, A-tong sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ." 
Luke4:1 Iâ-so͘ siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, tùi Iok-tàn-hô tńg,lâi. I hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhōa-khì khòng-iá," 
Luke4:2 tī hia sì-cha̍p ji̍t kú siū Mô͘-kúi chhì-thàm. Hit-ê kî-kan I lóng bô chia̍h sím-mi̍h, hiah-ê ji̍t-chí kè-liáu, pak-tó͘ chiū iau." 
Luke4:3 Mô͘-kúi tùi I kóng, “Kì-jiân lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, bēng-lēng chit-tè chio̍h-thâu pìⁿ-chòe piáⁿ!”" 
Luke4:4 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: ‘Lâng teh oa̍h m̄-nā óa-khò piáⁿ.’”" 
Luke4:5 Jiân-āu Mô͘-kúi chhōa Iâ-so͘ khì kàu koân ê só͘-chāi, chi̍t-ba̍k-nih-kú chiong thiⁿ-ē bān-kok hō͘ I khòaⁿ," 
Luke4:6 kā I kóng, “Chiah-ê it-chhè ê koân-sè kap êng-hôa, góa lóng beh hō͘ lí; in-ūi chiah-ê it-chhè í-keng lóng kau hō͘ góa, góa beh hō͘ sím-mi̍h-lâng chiū hō͘ hit-ê lâng." 
Luke4:7 Só͘-í, lí nā kūi lo̍h-lâi pài góa, chiah-ê it-chhè lóng-chóng sī lí ê.”" 
Luke4:8 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Tio̍h pài Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè, chí-ū ho̍k-sāi I.”" 
Luke4:9 Mô͘-kúi koh chhōa Iâ-so͘ khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, hō͘ I khiā tī Sèng-tiān siōng-koân ê só͘-chāi, kā I kóng, “Kì-jiân lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, tùi chia thiàu,lo̍h-khì," 
Luke4:10 in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: ‘Siōng-tè ōe ūi-tio̍h lí bēng-lēng I ê thiⁿ-sài lâi pó-hō͘ lí’; 
Luke4:11 koh kóng: In ōe ēng chhiú kā lí hû,teh, hō͘ lí ê kha bōe kha̍p-tio̍h chio̍h-thâu.”" 
Luke4:12 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: ‘M̄-thang chhì-thàm Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè.’”" 
Luke4:13 Só͘-ū ê chhì-thàm lóng ēng-liáu, Mô͘-kúi chiū lī-khui Iâ-so͘, thèng-hāu āu-piàn ê ki-hōe." 
Luke4:14 Iâ-so͘ siū Sèng Sîn ê koân-lêng chhiong-móa, tńg-khì Ka-lī-lī. I ê miâ-siaⁿ thoân kàu sì-ûi ta̍k tōe-khu." 
Luke4:15 I tī ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng, siū chèng-lâng chun-kèng." 
Luke4:16 Iâ-so͘ tò-khì I tióng-tōa ê só͘-chāi Ná-sat-le̍k, chiàu si̍p-koàn tī An-hioh-ji̍t ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g. I khiā khí-lâi beh tha̍k Sèng-keng." 
Luke4:17 Ū lâng the̍h chi̍t kńg sian-ti Í-sài-a ê chheh hō͘ I, I chiū thí-khui, chhē-tio̍h chi̍t só͘-chāi ū kì-chài:" 
Luke4:18 Chú ê Sîn lîm-kàu góa, in-ūi I ēng iû boah góa, hō͘ góa thoân hó-siau-sit hō͘ sàn-chhiah-lâng. I chhe-phài góa soan-pò͘: Siū-lia̍h,ê tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng, bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, siū ap-pek,ê tit-tio̍h chū-iû," 
Luke4:19 soan-pò͘ Chú Un-hūi ê Nî. 
Luke4:20 Iâ-so͘ kā chheh kńg,khí-lâi, hêng hō͘ hōe-tn̂g ê chō͘-lí, chiū chē,lo̍h-khì. Hōe-tn̂g lāi ê chèng-lâng lóng chù-ba̍k kā I khòaⁿ." 
Luke4:21 I chiū kā in kóng, “Chit-tōaⁿ Sèng-keng, kin-á-ji̍t lín teh thiaⁿ ê sî í-keng si̍t-hiān lah.”" 
Luke4:22 Tāi-ke lóng chheng-chàn Iâ-so͘, tùi I só͘ kóng jîn-chû ê ōe kám-kak kî-koài, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng kiám m̄-sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ?”" 
Luke4:23 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Lín it-tēng ōe ín-iōng ‘I-seng ah, tio̍h i-tī lí ka-kī’ chit-kù sio̍k-gú lâi tùi góa kóng, ‘Goán ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí tī Ka-pek-lông chòe chin chōe tāi-chì, taⁿ mā tio̍h tī lí ê kò͘-hiong chòe.’”" 
Luke4:24 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, sian-ti bô chi̍t ê tī ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong siū hoan-gêng." 
Luke4:25 Góa kā lín kóng si̍t-ōe, tī Í-lī-a ê sî-tāi ū khòng-hān saⁿ nî pòaⁿ kú, ta̍k só͘-chāi ū tōa ki-hng, hit-sî Í-sek-lia̍t tiong ū chin chōe kóaⁿ-hū;" 
Luke4:26 Í-lī-a pèng bô siū chhe khì in hia, chí-ū khì Se-tùn Sat-le̍k-hoat chi̍t ê kóaⁿ-hū hia." 
Luke4:27 Sian-ti Í-lī-sa ê sî, Í-sek-lia̍t tiong ū chin chōe bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng, tû-khì Sū-lī-a -lâng Nái-bān í-gōa, bô chi̍t ê tit-tio̍h chheng-khì.”" 
Luke4:28 Hōe-tn̂g lāi só͘-ū ê lâng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chin siū-khì. 
Luke4:29 In khiā,khí-lâi, kā Iâ-so͘ kóaⁿ-chhut siâⁿ-gōa, khiú kàu soaⁿ-khàm, beh kā I chhia,lo̍h-khì; in ê siâⁿ sī khí tī soaⁿ-téng." 
Luke4:30 Iâ-so͘ khiok tùi in tiong-kan kiâⁿ,kè, chòe I khì." 
Luke4:31 Iâ-so͘ lo̍h-khì Ka-lī-lī ê Ka-pek-lông -siâⁿ, ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t lóng ū teh kà-sī lâng." 
Luke4:32 In tùi I ê kà-sī kám-kak hui-siông hi-kî, in-ūi I ê ōe ū koân-ui." 
Luke4:33 Hōe-tn̂g lāi ū chi̍t ê hō͘ bô chheng-khì ê kúi-sîn hū-sin ê lâng, i tōa-siaⁿ hoah," 
Luke4:34 “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘, lí mài chhap,goán! Lí lâi beh húi-bia̍t goán sī,bô? Góa chai lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng; lí sī Siōng-tè ê Sèng-chiá.”" 
Luke4:35 Iâ-so͘ kā i chek-pī kóng, “Tiām-tiām! Tùi chit-ê lâng chhut,khì!” Kúi tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kā i siak-tó, chiū tùi i chhut,khì, lóng bô kā i siong-hāi,tio̍h." 
Luke4:36 Chèng-lâng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “I ê ōe ná hiah lī-hāi? I ēng koân-ui kap lêng-le̍k bēng-lēng siâ-sîn, in chiū chhut,khì.”" 
Luke4:37 Iâ-so͘ ê miâ-siaⁿ chiū thoân kàu sì-ûi ta̍k só͘-chāi. 
Luke4:38 Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hōe-tn̂g, ji̍p-khì Se-bûn in tau. Se-bûn ê tiūⁿ-ḿ phòa-pīⁿ, hoat-jia̍t chin sio; ū lâng kā Iâ-so͘ kóng chit-ê tāi-chì." 
Luke4:39 Iâ-so͘ khiā óa-khì i ê piⁿ,á, chek-pī jia̍t-pīⁿ, jia̍t chiū thè; hū-jîn-lâng sûi-sî khí-lâi kā in sū-hāu." 
Luke4:40 Ji̍t lo̍h ê sî, chèng-lâng chiong ū ta̍k-chióng pīⁿ ê lâng lóng chhōa-lâi chhē Iâ-so͘. Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú, lóng kā in i-hó." 
Luke4:41 Mā ū kúi tùi chin chōe lâng ê seng-khu chhut,lâi, hoah kóng, “Lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ!” Iâ-so͘ kā in chek-pī, m̄-chún in kóng, in-ūi in chai Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok." 
Luke4:42 Thiⁿ chi̍t-ē kng, Iâ-so͘ chiū chhut siâⁿ khì phian-phiah bô lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi. Kui-tīn lâng teh chhē I, chhē,tio̍h chiū kā I lâu,teh, bô ài I lī-khui." 
Luke4:43 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa mā tio̍h khì pa̍t-ê siâⁿ-chhī thoân Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im; che sī Siōng-tè chhe-phài góa lâi ê bo̍k-te̍k.”" 
Luke4:44 I chiū kè-sio̍k tī Iû-thài ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g thoân-tō. 
Luke5:1 Ū chi̍t piàn, Iâ-so͘ khiā tī Kek-nî-sat-le̍k ô͘-piⁿ, ū chi̍t tīn lâng khoeh óa-khì beh thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe." 
Luke5:2 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h nn̄g chiah chûn thêng tī ô͘-piⁿ, lia̍h-hî,ê lī-khui chûn teh sóe-bāng." 
Luke5:3 Kî-tiong chi̍t chiah sī Se-bûn ê; Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ hit-chiah chûn, kiò i kò sió-khóa lī-khui hōaⁿ, jiân-āu chē,lo̍h-khì, tùi chûn-téng kà-sī chèng-lâng." 
Luke5:4 Iâ-so͘ kóng soah, tùi Se-bûn kóng, “Kā chûn kò-khì chhim ê só͘-chāi, pha-bāng lo̍h-khì lia̍h-hî.”" 
Luke5:5 Se-bûn ìn kóng, “Lāu-su, goán piàⁿ kui-mî lia̍h lóng bô, m̄-kú lí to teh kóng ah, góa chiū lâi lo̍h-bāng.”" 
Luke5:6 In chi̍t-ē pàng,lo̍h-khì, bāng-tio̍h chin chōe hî, bāng soah kiông-beh phòa,khì." 
Luke5:7 In ia̍t-chhiú kiò pa̍t-chiah chûn ê tâng-phōaⁿ lâi tàu-kha-chhiú. In chiū lâi, chiong hî tóe tī nn̄g chiah chûn, tóe kàu móa-móa soah kiông-beh tîm,lo̍h-khì." 
Luke5:8 Se-bûn Pí-tek chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kūi lo̍h-khì Iâ-so͘ ê kha-chêng, kóng, “Chú ah, chhiáⁿ lī-khui góa! Góa sī chi̍t ê ū-chōe ê lâng.”" 
Luke5:9 Se-bûn kap i ê tâng-phōaⁿ in-ūi lia̍h-tio̍h hiah chōe hî chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ. 
Luke5:10 Se-bûn ê tâng-phōaⁿ Se-pì-thài ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān mā chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ. Iâ-so͘ kā Se-bûn kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ, tùi taⁿ í-āu, lí ōe tit-tio̍h lâng.”" 
Luke5:11 In thoa chûn óa-hōaⁿ liáu-āu, chiong it-chhè pàng,leh, khì tè Iâ-so͘." 
Luke5:12 Ū chi̍t piàn Iâ-so͘ tī chi̍t ê siâⁿ, tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng kui seng-khu jiám-tio̍h bâ-hong. I khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū phak lo̍h-khì kî-kiû kóng, “Chú ah, lí nā khéng, ōe-tàng hō͘ góa chheng-khì.”" 
Luke5:13 Iâ-so͘ chhun-chhiú kā i bong, kóng, “Góa khéng, hō͘ lí chheng-khì!” I ê bâ-hong sûi-sî bô,khì." 
Luke5:14 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng i, kóng, “M̄-thang kā lâng kóng; tio̍h khì hō͘ chè-si giām, koh chiàu Mô͘-se ê kui-tēng, ūi-tio̍h lí ū tit-tio̍h chheng-khì hiàn chè-mi̍h, thang tùi chèng-lâng chèng-bêng.”" 
Luke5:15 Iâ-so͘ ê miâ-siaⁿ ná thoân ná khoah; kui tōa-tīn lâng chū-chi̍p lâi beh thiaⁿ tō-lí, koh kiû I hō͘ in ê pīⁿ tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Luke5:16 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ thè-khì phian-phiah ê só͘-chāi kî-tó. 
Luke5:17 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ teh kà-sī lâng ê sî, ū Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su tī hia teh chē. In sī tùi Ka-lī-lī kap Iû-thài ta̍k chng-siā, í-ki̍p Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lâi,ê. Chú ê koân-lêng kap Iâ-so͘ tông-chāi, hō͘ I ōe-tàng i-hó pīⁿ-lâng." 
Luke5:18 Hit-sî, ū lâng ēng chhn̂g kng chi̍t ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng lâi, siūⁿ-beh kng ji̍p-khì hē tī Iâ-so͘ ê bīn-chêng;" 
Luke5:19 m̄-kú in-ūi lâng chin chōe, chhē bô lō͘ thang kng,ji̍p-khì, chiū peh-khì chhù-téng, thiah chhù-hiā, chiong hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi,ê liân chhn̂g lūi lo̍h-khì chèng-lâng ê tiong-kan, hē tī Iâ-so͘ ê bīn-chêng." 
Luke5:20 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-kìⁿ in ê sìn-sim, chiū kóng, “Pêng-iú ah, lí ê chōe sià-bián lah.”" 
Luke5:21 Hiah-ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng gī-lūn kóng, “Chit-ê teh siat-to̍k Siōng-tè ê sī siáⁿ-lâng? Siōng-tè í-gōa, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng sià-chōe?”" 
Luke5:22 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ in teh chit-būn sím-mi̍h, chiū tùi in kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín sim-lāi teh chit-būn?" 
Luke5:23 Kóng ‘Lí ê chōe sià-bián lah’, á-sī kóng ‘Khí-lâi kiâⁿ’, tó chi̍t hāng khah kán-tan?" 
Luke5:24 Put-kò góa beh hō͘ lín chai Jîn-chú tī tōe-chiūⁿ ū sià-chōe ê koân-pèng.” Iâ-so͘ tùi hit-ê poàn-sin-put-sūi ê lâng kóng, “Góa kā lí kóng, khí,lâi, giâ lí ê chhn̂g, tńg-khì lín tau!”" 
Luke5:25 Hit-ê lâng sûi-sî tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng peh,khí-lâi, giâ i só͘ tó ê chhn̂g tńg-khì in tau, ná kiâⁿ ná kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Luke5:26 Chèng-lâng lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè, sim-lāi chhiong-móa kèng-ùi kóng, “Goán kin-á-ji̍t ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h kî-biāu ê tāi-chì!”" 
Luke5:27 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Iâ-so͘ chhut,khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê ba̍uh-sè,ê, miâ kiò-chòe Lī-bī, chē tī sè-koan, chiū tùi i kóng, “Lâi tè góa!”" 
Luke5:28 Lī-bī chiū pàng-sak it-chhè, khí-lâi tè I." 
Luke5:29 Lī-bī tī in tau ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ pān tōa iàn-se̍k. Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn ba̍uh-sè,ê í-ki̍p kî-tha ê lâng kap in chòe-hé chē-toh chia̍h-pn̄g. 
Luke5:30 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap sio̍k in ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ bâi-oàn, kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín kap ba̍uh-sè,ê í-ki̍p chōe-jîn chòe-hé lim-chia̍h?”" 
Luke5:31 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Kiān-khong,ê bô su-iàu i-seng, phòa-pīⁿ,ê chiah ū su-iàu." 
Luke5:32 Góa lâi, m̄-sī beh chio gī-lâng, sī beh chio chōe-jîn hóe-kái.”" 
Luke5:33 Āu-lâi in tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “ Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ siông-siông kìm-chia̍h kî-tó, Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê bûn-tô͘ mā-sī án-ni, m̄-kú lí ê bûn-tô͘ ia̍h-chia̍h-ia̍h-lim.”" 
Luke5:34 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Sin-lông iáu kap hun-iàn ê lâng-kheh chòe-hé ê sî, lín kiám ōe hō͘ lâng-kheh kìm-chia̍h?" 
Luke5:35 Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, sin-lông ōe hō͘ lâng tùi in tiong-kan lia̍h,khì, tī hiah-ê ji̍t in chiū ōe kìm-chia̍h.”" 
Luke5:36 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng chi̍t ê phì-jū kā in kóng, “Bô lâng thiah sin-saⁿ lâi pó͘ kū-saⁿ, nā án-ni chòe, m̄-nā sin-saⁿ thiah-phòa, thiah,khí-lâi hit-tè sin-pò͘ kap kū-saⁿ mā bōe ha̍h." 
Luke5:37 Mā bô lâng chiong sin-chiú ji̍p tī kū phê-tē. Nā án-ni chòe, sin-chiú ōe kā phê-tē piak-phòa, chiú lâu,chhut-lâi, phê-tē mā pháiⁿ,khì." 
Luke5:38 Sin-chiú tio̍h ji̍p tī sin phê-tē. 
Luke5:39 Bô lâng lim kū-chiú liáu-āu ài lim sin-chiú, lâng lóng ōe kóng ‘Iáu-sī kū-chiú khah hó.’”" 
Luke6:1 Ū chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tùi be̍h-hn̂g keng-kè. I ê bûn-tô͘ tiah be̍h-sūi, ēng chhiú jôe lâi chia̍h." 
Luke6:2 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kā in kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ chòe An-hioh-ji̍t bōe-ēng-tit chòe ê tāi-chì?”" 
Luke6:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín kiám m̄-bat tha̍k-tio̍h Tāi-pi̍t kap tè i ê lâng pak-tó͘ iau ê sî só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì?" 
Luke6:4 I ji̍p-khì Siōng-tè ê tiān the̍h hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ lâi chia̍h, mā hō͘ tè i ê lâng chia̍h. Chit-khoán piáⁿ chí-ū chè-si chiah thang chia̍h.”" 
Luke6:5 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Jîn-chú sī An-hioh-ji̍t ê Chú.”" 
Luke6:6 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g kà-sī; tī hia ū chi̍t ê chiàⁿ-chhiú khê,khì ê lâng." 
Luke6:7 Ū chi̍t-kóa keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng teh tng-tán khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ tī An-hioh-ji̍t ōe kā i i-tī á bōe, thang chhē khang-phāng lâi kò I." 
Luke6:8 Iâ-so͘ chai in teh siūⁿ sím-mi̍h, chiū kā hit-ê chhiú khê,khì ê lâng kóng, “Khí,lâi, lâi khiā tī tiong-ng!” I chiū khí,lâi, khiā tī hia." 
Luke6:9 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Góa mn̄g lín, tī An-hioh-ji̍t chòe hó-sū á-sī chòe pháiⁿ-sū, kiù sìⁿ-miā á-sī hāi sìⁿ-miā, tó chi̍t hāng ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat?”" 
Luke6:10 Iâ-so͘ chiū chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kā in khòaⁿ, jiân-āu tùi hit-ê lâng kóng, “Chhiú chhun,chhut-lâi!” I chiàu án-ni chòe, chhiú chiū ho̍k-goân." 
Luke6:11 Hiah-ê lâng hui-siông siū-khì, chham-siông beh án-chóaⁿ tùi-hù Iâ-so͘." 
Luke6:12 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ chhut-khì soaⁿ,ni̍h kî-tó, thong-mî tùi Siōng-tè kî-kiû." 
Luke6:13 Thiⁿ-kng ê sî, I kiò bûn-tô͘ lâi, tùi in tiong-kan kéng-soán cha̍p-jī ê, chheng in chòe sù-tô͘," 
Luke6:14 chiū-sī Se-bûn — Iâ-so͘ koh kā i hō-miâ kiò-chòe Pí-tek — kap i ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t, Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān, Hui-le̍k kap Pa-to-lô-mái," 
Luke6:15 Má-thài kap To-má, A-le̍k-hui ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok kap chheng-chòe Kek-chìn-tóng ê Se-bûn," 
Luke6:16 Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi kap āu-lâi chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi. 
Luke6:17 Iâ-so͘ kap sù-tô͘ lo̍h-soaⁿ, lâi khiā tī pîⁿ-tōe, tī hia ū chi̍t tōa-tīn I ê bûn-tô͘, koh ū chi̍t tōa-tīn bîn-chiòng. Chiah-ê lâng sī tùi Iû-thài choân-tōe kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, í-ki̍p Thài-ní kap Se-tùn iân-hái lâi,ê." 
Luke6:18 In beh thiaⁿ Iâ-so͘ kóng tō-lí, mā beh hō͘ I i-pīⁿ. Hiah-ê hō͘ siâ-sîn kiáu-jiáu ê lâng mā lâi, lóng tit-tio̍h i-tī." 
Luke6:19 Kui tōa-tīn ê lâng lóng siūⁿ-beh kā I bong, in-ūi ū koân-lêng tùi I hoat-chhut, hō͘ in lóng tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Luke6:20 Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ I ê bûn-tô͘, kóng, “Lín chiah-ê sàn-chhiah-lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi lín sī Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn." 
Luke6:21 Lín hiān-chāi teh iau ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ lín pá-chiok. Lín hiān-chāi teh thî-khàu ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ lín chhiò." 
Luke6:22 “Lâng oàn-hūn lín, ūi-tio̍h Jîn-chú ê iân-kò͘ kā lín khì-sak, kā lín bú-jio̍k, kā lín khòaⁿ-chòe pháiⁿ-lâng, lín chin ū hok-khì." 
Luke6:23 “Hit-ji̍t lín tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí tiô-thiàu, in-ūi lín tī thiⁿ,ni̍h ê pò-siúⁿ chin tōa. Chá-chêng chiah-ê lâng ê chó͘-sian mā án-ni tùi-thāi sian-ti." 
Luke6:24 M̄-kú lín chiah-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng chhám ah, in-ūi lín í-keng hióng-siū an-lo̍k." 
Luke6:25 Lín hiān-chāi pá-chiok ê lâng chhám ah, in-ūi lín ōe iau-gō. Lín hiān-chāi teh chhiò ê lâng chhám ah, in-ūi lín ōe ai-siong thî-khàu." 
Luke6:26 “Chèng-lâng lóng teh o-ló lín ê sî, lín chhám ah, in-ūi in ê chó͘-sian mā bat án-ni tùi-thāi ké sian-ti.”" 
Luke6:27 “Lín chiah-ê teh thiaⁿ ê lâng, góa kā lín kóng: Tio̍h thiàⁿ lín ê tùi-te̍k, hó khoán-thāi oàn-hūn lín ê lâng." 
Luke6:28 Tio̍h chiok-hok lóe-mē lín ê lâng; tio̍h ūi-tio̍h bú-jio̍k lín ê lâng kî-tó. 
Luke6:29 Ū lâng siàn lí ê chhùi-phóe, lēng-gōa chi̍t pêng mā hō͘ i siàn. Ū lâng pak lí ê gōa-saⁿ, lāi-saⁿ mā sòa hō͘ i." 
Luke6:30 Ū lâng kā lí kiû sím-mi̍h, tio̍h hō͘ i. Ū lâng chhiúⁿ lí ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ, m̄-thang kā i thó." 
Luke6:31 Lín ài lâng án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lín, mā tio̍h án-ni tùi-thāi in." 
Luke6:32 “Lín nā chí-ū thiàⁿ hiah-ê thiàⁿ,lín ê lâng, ū sím-mi̍h kong-lô? In-ūi liân pháiⁿ-lâng mā thiàⁿ hiah-ê thiàⁿ,in ê lâng." 
Luke6:33 Lín nā chí-ū hó khoán-thāi hiah-ê hó khoán-thāi lín ê lâng, ū sím-mi̍h kong-lô? Liân pháiⁿ-lâng mā án-ni chòe." 
Luke6:34 Lín nā chîⁿ chioh hō͘ hiah-ê lín ǹg-bāng ōe hêng ê lâng, ū sím-mi̍h kong-lô? Liân pháiⁿ-lâng mā chioh hō͘ hiah-ê ōe lóng-chóng hêng ê pháiⁿ-lâng." 
Luke6:35 Chóng-sī lín tio̍h thiàⁿ lín ê tùi-te̍k, hó khoán-thāi in; chioh,lâng mā m̄-thang ǹg-bāng beh siu-hôe. Án-ni, lín chiū ōe tit-tio̍h chin tōa ê pò-siúⁿ, koh ōe chiâⁿ-chòe Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, in-ūi I tùi bông-un-pōe-gī kap siâ-ok ê lâng chin chû-pi." 
Luke6:36 Lín ê Thiⁿ-pē sī jîn-chû, lín mā tio̍h jîn-chû.”" 
Luke6:37 “M̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ lâng, chiah bōe siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ; m̄-thang kā lâng tēng-chōe, chiah bōe siū Siōng-tè tēng-chōe. Tio̍h sià-bián lâng, chiah ōe siū Siōng-tè sià-bián." 
Luke6:38 Tio̍h hō͘ lâng, Siōng-tè chiū ōe hō͘ lín; I ōe ji̍h koh iô, hō͘ i cha̍t, koh niû kàu móa-móa, tò lo̍h-khì lín ê saⁿ-á-phè. Lín ēng sím-mi̍h niû niû hō͘ lâng, Siōng-tè mā ōe chiàu án-ni niû tò-tńg hō͘ lín.”" 
Luke6:39 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū tùi in kóng, “Bông-jîn kiám ōe khan bông-jîn? Kiám bōe nn̄g ê lóng poa̍h-lo̍h khut-á?" 
Luke6:40 Ha̍k-seng bōe chhiau-kè lāu-su, put-kò ha̍k-seng nā o̍h ū khí, i chiū ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lāu-su." 
Luke6:41 “Lí ná kan-ta teh khòaⁿ hiaⁿ-tī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á, ia̍h bô chù-ì tio̍h ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-kho͘?" 
Luke6:42 Lí bô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ū chhâ-kho͘, ná ōe-tàng kā lí ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng, ‘Hiaⁿ-tī ah, lí ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á góa lâi kā lí the̍h,chhut-lâi.’ Ké-hó ê lâng, ka-kī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-kho͘ tio̍h seng the̍h,chhut-lâi, chiah ōe-tàng khòaⁿ chheng-chhó, thang kā hiaⁿ-tī ba̍k-chiu lāi ê chhâ-iù-á the̍h,chhut-lâi.”" 
Luke6:43 “Hó-chhiū bōe kiat pháiⁿ ké-chí; pháiⁿ-chhiū mā bōe kiat hó ké-chí. 
Luke6:44 Ta̍k-châng chhiū tùi só͘ kiat ê ké-chí lâi chai i ê hó-pháiⁿ. Bōe-tàng tùi chhì-phè bán bû-hoa-kó, mā bōe-tàng tùi chháu-chhì siu phû-tô." 
Luke6:45 Hó-lâng tùi sim-lāi só͘ chek-chū ê hó hoat-chhut hó; pháiⁿ-lâng tùi só͘ chek-chū ê pháiⁿ hoat-chhut pháiⁿ. In-ūi lâng sim-lāi chhiong-móa sím-mi̍h, chhùi chiū kóng sím-mi̍h.”" 
Luke6:46 “Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín chheng-ho͘ góa ‘Chú ah, Chú ah’ khiok bô si̍t-hêng góa ê kà-sī?" 
Luke6:47 Lâi góa chia thiaⁿ góa ê ōe, koh si̍t-hêng ê lâng, góa kā lín kóng, i chhin-chhiūⁿ sím-mi̍h." 
Luke6:48 I chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khí-chhù, thô͘ ku̍t chin chhim, tōe-ki hē tī chio̍h-pôaⁿ téng; tōa-chúi lâi, chúi chhiong-tio̍h chhù, chhù mā bōe iô-tāng, in-ūi chhù khí chin kian-kò͘." 
Luke6:49 M̄-kú thiaⁿ góa chiah-ê ōe bô si̍t-hêng ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng khí-chhù bô hē tōe-ki, chúi chi̍t-ē chhiong, chhù sûi-sî tó,lo̍h-khì, sīm-chì tó kah chin lī-hāi.”" 
Luke7:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng hō͘ bîn-chiòng thiaⁿ ê ōe lóng kóng soah, chiū ji̍p-khì Ka-pek-lông." 
Luke7:2 Ū chi̍t ê Lô-má kun-koaⁿ, i só͘ tiōng-iōng ê po̍k-jîn phòa-pīⁿ, pīⁿ kah teh-beh sí." 
Luke7:3 Kun-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì, chiū chhe kúi-nā ê Iû-thài -lâng ê tiúⁿ-ló khì Iâ-so͘ hia, chhiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ lâi i-tī i ê po̍k-jîn." 
Luke7:4 Chiah-ê tiúⁿ-ló kàu Iâ-so͘ hia, khún-chhiat kiû I kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ōe-kham-tit lí kā i pang-chān," 
Luke7:5 in-ūi i ài-hō͘ lán Iû-thài -lâng, koh kā lán khí hōe-tn̂g.”" 
Luke7:6 Iâ-so͘ chiū kap in khì. Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu i ê chhù ê sî, hit-ê kun-koaⁿ chhe kúi-nā ê pêng-iú lâi kā I kóng, “Chú ah, m̄-thang lô-hoân lí, lí lâi goán tau, góa bōe-kham,tit." 
Luke7:7 Só͘-í góa chiah m̄-káⁿ ka-kī lâi kìⁿ lí. Lí chí-ū kóng chi̍t kù ōe, góa ê po̍k-jîn chiū ōe hó." 
Luke7:8 In-ūi góa sī hō͘ lâng koán ê lâng, mā ū peng hō͘ góa koán. Góa kā chit-ê kóng ‘Khì’, i chiū khì; kā pa̍t-ê kóng ‘Lâi’, i chiū lâi; kā góa ê po̍k-jîn kóng ‘Lí chòe chit-ê’, i chiū khì chòe.”" 
Luke7:9 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe tùi i kám-kak chin ì-gōa, oa̍t-tńg-sin kā tè I ê kûn-chiòng kóng, “Góa kā lín kóng, liân tī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiong-kan, góa to iáu m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán ê sìn-sim.”" 
Luke7:10 Siū chhe ê lâng tńg-khì kun-koaⁿ ê chhù, khòaⁿ-tio̍h po̍k-jîn í-keng hó,khì." 
Luke7:11 Kè bô jōa kú, Iâ-so͘ khì chi̍t ê siâⁿ, kiò-chòe Ná-in. I ê bûn-tô͘ kap kui tōa-tīn lâng tè I khì." 
Luke7:12 Iâ-so͘ beh kàu siâⁿ-mn̂g ê sî, tú-hó ū lâng kng chi̍t ê sí-lâng chhut,lâi, i ê lāu-bú ko͘-ko͘ siⁿ chit-ê kiáⁿ, koh sī kóaⁿ-hū. Ū chi̍t tīn siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng chhut-lâi sàng-chòng." 
Luke7:13 Chú chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê kóaⁿ-hū chiū khó-lîn i, kā i kóng, “M̄-thang khàu!”" 
Luke7:14 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa-khì hōaⁿ kng sin-si ê kè, kng ê lâng chiū thêng-kha. Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Siàu-liân-lâng, góa kā lí kóng, ‘Khí,lâi!’”" 
Luke7:15 Hit-ê sí-lâng chiū peh khí-lâi chē, khui-chhùi kóng-ōe. Iâ-so͘ chiū chiong i kau hō͘ i ê lāu-bú." 
Luke7:16 Chèng-lâng lóng hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, chiong êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè, kóng, “Lán tiong-kan ū chhut-hiān chi̍t ūi tōa sian-ti lah!” Koh kóng, “Siōng-tè ū khòaⁿ-kò͘ I ê chú-bîn!”" 
Luke7:17 Koan-hē Iâ-so͘ chit-ê hong-siaⁿ thoân kàu choân Iû-thài kap chiu-ûi ta̍k tōe-khu. 
Luke7:18 Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng kā Iok-hān pò-kò. Iok-hān chiū kiò nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ lâi," 
Luke7:19 chhe in khì kìⁿ Chú, kóng, “Lí chiū-sī teh-beh lâi Hit-ūi, á-sī goán tio̍h thèng-hāu pa̍t-lâng?”" 
Luke7:20 Chiah-ê lâng lâi kàu Iâ-so͘ hia, chiū kóng, “Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān chhe goán lâi mn̄g lí kóng ‘Lí chiū-sī teh-beh lâi Hit-ūi, á-sī goán tio̍h thèng-hāu pa̍t-lâng?’”" 
Luke7:21 Tú hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ ū i-hó chin chōe sin-khó͘-pīⁿ-thiàⁿ kap hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng, koh hō͘ chin chōe sit-bêng ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Luke7:22 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín tńg-khì kā Iok-hān pò-kò lín só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h kap thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, chiū-sī sit-bêng ê lâng koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, kha-pái ê lâng kiâⁿ-lō͘, bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng chheng-khì, hī-khang bōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, sàn-chhiah-lâng ū hó-siau-sit thoân hō͘ in." 
Luke7:23 Tùi góa bô sit-khì sìn-sim ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!” 
Luke7:24 Iok-hān chhe,lâi ê lâng lī-khui liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ chiah tùi kûn-chiòng kóng-khí Iok-hān ê sū. I kóng, “Lín chhut-khì khòng-iá sī beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ hō͘ hong chhe iô-lâi-iô-khì ê lô͘-úi sī,bô?" 
Luke7:25 Nā m̄-sī, lín chhut,khì beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ chhēng ko-kùi i-ho̍k ê lâng sī,bô? Lín khòaⁿ, chhēng chhia-hoa ê i-ho̍k seng-oa̍h chhia-chhí ê lâng sī tī ông-kiong." 
Luke7:26 Án-ni, lín chhut,khì beh khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h? Beh khòaⁿ sian-ti sī,bô? Sī, m̄-kú góa kā lín kóng, i pí sian-ti koh-khah úi-tāi." 
Luke7:27 Koan-hē Iok-hān, Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài: Khòaⁿ ah, góa chhe góa ê sù-chiá chòe lí ê sian-hong; i beh tī lí ê thâu-chêng kā lí khui-lō͘." 
Luke7:28 Góa kā lín kóng, hū-jîn-lâng só͘ siⁿ,ê bô chi̍t ê pí Iok-hān khah úi-tāi; m̄-kú, tī Siōng-tè-kok siōng bî-sòe,ê iáu pí i koh-khah úi-tāi!”" 
Luke7:29 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe ê bîn-chiòng kap ba̍uh-sè,ê mā lóng sêng-jīn Siōng-tè sī kong-gī, in-ūi in ū niá-siū Iok-hān ê sóe-lé." 
Luke7:30 M̄-kú Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su lóng kū-choa̍t Siōng-tè tùi in só͘ tēng ê chí-ì, bô niá-siū Iok-hān ê sóe-lé." 
Luke7:31 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Án-ni, chit sè-tāi ê lâng góa beh ēng sím-mi̍h lâi pí-phēng? In chhin-chhiūⁿ sím-mi̍h?" 
Luke7:32 In chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tīn gín-á chē tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu tùi tâng-phōaⁿ hō͘-siōng hoah: Goán tùi lín pûn phín-á, lín bô thiàu-bú! Goán chhiùⁿ ai-ko, lín mā bô khàu!" 
Luke7:33 Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān lâi, bô chia̍h-pn̄g, bô lim-chiú, lín chiū kóng, ‘I hō͘ kúi hū-sin!’" 
Luke7:34 Jîn-chú lâi, mā chia̍h mā lim, lín chiū kóng, ‘I sī tham-chia̍h hò͘ⁿ-chiú ê lâng, sī ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chōe-jîn ê pêng-iú.’" 
Luke7:35 Tì-hūi sī tùi ū tì-hūi ê lâng tit-tio̍h chèng-si̍t.” 
Luke7:36 Ū chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ chia̍h-pn̄g, Iâ-so͘ chiū ji̍p-khì hit-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ê chhù chē-toh chia̍h-pn̄g." 
Luke7:37 Hit-ê siâⁿ-lāi ū chi̍t ê ū-chōe ê hū-jîn-lâng, i chai Iâ-so͘ tī hit-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ê chhù teh chia̍h-pn̄g, chiū tòa chi̍t koàn tóe phang-iû ê ge̍k-pân lâi." 
Luke7:38 I khiā tī Iâ-so͘ ê āu-bīn, óa I ê kha teh khàu, ba̍k-sái tih-tâm I ê kha, chiū ēng ka-kī ê thâu-mn̂g kā chhit, koh ti̍t-ti̍t chim I ê kha, ēng phang-iû kā boah." 
Luke7:39 Chhiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h, sim-lāi siūⁿ, “Chit-ê lâng nā-sī sian-ti, it-tēng ōe chai teh kā I bong,ê sī siáⁿ-lâng, sī sím-mi̍h khoán cha-bó͘-lâng, in-ūi i sī chōe-jîn.”" 
Luke7:40 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi i kóng, “ Se-bûn, góa ū ōe beh kā lí kóng.” Se-bûn kóng, “Lāu-su, chhiáⁿ kóng.”" 
Luke7:41 Iâ-so͘ chiū kóng, “Ū nn̄g ê lâng tùi chi̍t ê chè-chú chioh-chîⁿ, chi̍t ê khiàm i gō͘-pah ê gûn-á, iáu chi̍t ê khiàm i gō͘-cha̍p." 
Luke7:42 In bô hoat-tō͘ thang hêng, chè-chú chiū chhat-siau in ê chè. Án-ni, tó chi̍t ê ōe khah thiàⁿ chè-chú?”" 
Luke7:43 Se-bûn ìn kóng, “Góa siūⁿ sī chè siū chhat-siau khah chōe hit-ê.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ê phòaⁿ-toàn chin tio̍h.”" 
Luke7:44 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ oa̍t-thâu ǹg hū-jîn-lâng, tùi Se-bûn kóng, “Lí ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng bô? Góa ji̍p lí ê chhù, lí bô ēng chúi hō͘ góa sóe-kha, m̄-kú i ēng ba̍k-sái tih-tâm góa ê kha, koh ēng i ê thâu-mn̂g chhit." 
Luke7:45 Lí bô kā góa chim, m̄-kú góa ji̍p,lâi liáu-āu, i ti̍t-ti̍t chim góa ê kha." 
Luke7:46 Lí bô ēng iû boah góa ê thâu-khak, m̄-kú i ēng phang-iû boah góa ê kha." 
Luke7:47 Só͘-í, góa kā lí kóng, i thiàⁿ khah chōe, piáu-sī i chin chōe ê chōe-kò í-keng ū tit-tio̍h sià-bián. Tit-tio̍h sià-bián khah chió, thiàⁿ chiū chió.”" 
Luke7:48 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Lí ê chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián lah.”" 
Luke7:49 Kâng-toh hiah-ê lâng sim-lāi siūⁿ, “Chit-ê tàu-tóe sī sím-mi̍h-lâng, I kèng-jiân sià-bián lâng ê chōe!”" 
Luke7:50 Iâ-so͘ kā hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Lí ê sìn-sim ū kiù lí; pêng-an tò,khì.”" 
Luke8:1 Kè bô jōa kú, Iâ-so͘ ta̍k siâⁿ-chhī ta̍k chng-siā kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu thoân-tō, soan-iông Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im. Cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ kap I chòe-tīn," 
Luke8:2 ū chi̍t-kóa bat hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin á-sī phòa-pīⁿ hō͘ Iâ-so͘ i-hó ê hū-jîn-lâng mā kap I chòe-hé khì, kî-tiong ū Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a — Iâ-so͘ bat tùi i sin-chiūⁿ kóaⁿ-chhut chhit ê kúi," 
Luke8:3 Hi-lu̍t ê koán-ke Khó͘-sat ê bó͘ Iok-a-ná, kap So͘-sat-ná, í-ki̍p kî-tha chin chōe hū-jîn-lâng, in bat ēng ka-kī ê châi-bu̍t ho̍k-sāi Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘." 
Luke8:4 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng tùi ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī it-ti̍t chū-chi̍p lâi Iâ-so͘ hia ê sî, I ēng phì-jū kā in kóng:" 
Luke8:5 “Ū chi̍t ê iā chéng-chí ê lâng chhut-khì iā chéng-chí. I iā ê sî, ū-ê lak tī lō͘-piⁿ, hō͘ lâng ta̍h, khong-tiong ê chiáu kā i chia̍h-liáu-liáu." 
Luke8:6 Ū-ê lak tī chio̍h-thâu tōe, in-ūi bô chúi-hun, hoat,chhut-lâi chiū ta,khì." 
Luke8:7 Ū-ê lak tī chhì-phè lāi, chhì-á kap chéng-chí pîⁿ-pîⁿ tōa-châng,khí-lâi, soah kā i hip,sí." 
Luke8:8 Ū-ê lak lo̍h-khì hó thó͘-tōe, tōa-châng,khí-lâi, kiat-si̍t chi̍t-pah pē.” Chiah-ê ōe kóng soah, Iâ-so͘ koh tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Ū hī-khang thang thiaⁿ ê lâng, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Luke8:9 Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ mn̄g I chit-ê phì-jū sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù. 
Luke8:10 I kóng, “Siōng-tè-kok ê ò-pì í-keng ū hō͘ lín chai, m̄-kú tùi pa̍t-lâng chiū ēng phì-jū, beh hō͘ In khòaⁿ, mā khòaⁿ bô, thiaⁿ, mā bô liáu-kái.”" 
Luke8:11 “Chit-ê phì-jū ê ì-sù sī án-ni: Chéng-chí sī Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit. 
Luke8:12 Lak tī lō͘-piⁿ,ê, sī lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, Mô͘-kúi sûi-sî lâi, tùi in sim-lāi chiong sìn-sit chhiúⁿ,khì, chiah bōe hō͘ in sìn lâi tit-kiù." 
Luke8:13 Lak tī chio̍h-thâu tōe,ê, sī lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, sûi-sî hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū, put-kò bô tèng-kun, chí-ū chiām-sî sìn, chi̍t-ē tú-tio̍h chhì-liān chiū pàng-sak." 
Luke8:14 Lak tī chhì-phè lāi,ê, sī lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit liáu-āu, siū-tio̍h seng-oa̍h ê khòa-lū, chîⁿ-châi kap hióng-lo̍k ê chó͘-gāi, sìn-sit siū hip,sí soah bōe sêng-se̍k." 
Luke8:15 Lak tī hó thó͘-tōe,ê, sī lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit, ēng sêng-si̍t siān-liông ê sim chiap-siū, nāi-sim thèng-hāu kàu kiat-si̍t.”" 
Luke8:16 “Bô lâng teng tiám liáu ēng àng-á khàm,khí-lâi á-sī khǹg tī bîn-chhn̂g kha, sī kā i chhāi tī teng-tâi téng, thang hō͘ ji̍p,lâi ê lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h kng." 
Luke8:17 In-ūi bô chi̍t hāng ún-ba̍t,ê bōe hián-lō͘; bô chi̍t hāng am-khàm,ê bōe lō͘-hiān, bōe hō͘ lâng chai." 
Luke8:18 “Só͘-í, tio̍h chù-ì beh án-chóaⁿ thiaⁿ; in-ūi ū,ê, beh hō͘ i koh-khah chōe; bô,ê, liân i ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng ū,ê mā beh kā i chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi.”" 
Luke8:19 Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú kap hiaⁿ-tī lâi chhē I, m̄-kú lâng chin chōe, bōe-tàng óa,khì." 
Luke8:20 Ū lâng kā I kóng, “Lí ê lāu-bú kap hiaⁿ-tī khiā tī gōa-bīn beh kìⁿ lí.”" 
Luke8:21 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe ū khì si̍t-hêng ê lâng chiū-sī góa ê lāu-bú, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī.”" 
Luke8:22 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ chiūⁿ-chûn ê sî kā in kóng, “Lán kè lâi-khì hit-pêng hōaⁿ.” In chiū khui-chûn." 
Luke8:23 Chûn teh kiâⁿ ê sî, Iâ-so͘ khùn,khì. Hut-jiân ū chi̍t chūn tōa-hong sàu lo̍h-lâi ô͘,ni̍h, chûn hō͘ chúi im kàu beh móa, chin gûi-hiám." 
Luke8:24 Bûn-tô͘ khì kā I kiò-chhíⁿ, kóng, “Lāu-su, lāu-su, lán beh bô-miā lo͘h!” Iâ-so͘ chhíⁿ,khí-lâi, chek-pī hong kap tōa-éng, hong-éng tiāⁿ, it-chhè chiū chēng-chēng." 
Luke8:25 Iâ-so͘ tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín ná hiah-ni̍h bô sìn-sim?” In kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ koh kî-koài, tāi-ke kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “Chit-ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? I chi̍t-ē bēng-lēng, liân hong kap éng lóng sūn-ho̍k.”" 
Luke8:26 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ chē-chûn khì Ka-lī-lī ê tùi-bīn hōaⁿ, Kek-la-sim -lâng ê tōe-khu." 
Luke8:27 Iâ-so͘ lo̍h-chûn chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ; ū chi̍t ê kúi hū-sin ê lâng tùi siâⁿ,ni̍h chhut,lâi tú-tio̍h I. Chit-ê lâng í-keng chin kú bô chhēng-saⁿ, mā bô tòa tī chhù-lāi, lóng tòa tī bōng-á-po͘." 
Luke8:28 I chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, chiū phak tī I ê bīn-chêng, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘, lí mài chhap,góa! Góa khún-kiû lí, m̄-thang kā góa khó͘-chhó͘!”" 
Luke8:29 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ ū bēng-lēng siâ-sîn tùi chit-ê lâng chhut,khì. Siâ-sîn bat chin chōe pái kā i lia̍h,teh, lâng kā i koaiⁿ,khí-lâi, ēng thih-liān kā i liān, ēng kha-khàu kā i khàu, m̄-kú i kā só-liān lóng chhoah-tn̄g, koh hō͘ kúi kóaⁿ-khì khòng-iá." 
Luke8:30 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i, “Lí kiò-chòe sím-mi̍h miâ?” I ìn kóng, “Kun-thoân”, in-ūi ū chin chōe kúi kā i hū-sin." 
Luke8:31 Kúi ai-kiû Iâ-so͘ m̄-thang bēng-lēng in ji̍p-khì chhim-ian. 
Luke8:32 Hit-sî, hù-kūn ê soaⁿ-phiâⁿ ū chi̍t tōa-kûn ti teh thó-chia̍h, kúi chiū kiû Iâ-so͘ hō͘ in ji̍p-khì ti-kûn. Iâ-so͘ chún,in." 
Luke8:33 Kúi chiū tùi hit-ê lâng chhut,khì, chìn-ji̍p ti-kûn. Kui-kûn ti chiū tùi soaⁿ-phiâⁿ chông lo̍h-khì ô͘,ni̍h tū-sí." 
Luke8:34 Hiah-ê chhī ti ê lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, kiaⁿ kah cháu-khì siâⁿ-lāi kap hiong-chhoan pò lâng chai." 
Luke8:35 Chèng-lâng chiū chhut-lâi beh khòaⁿ hoat-seng sím-mi̍h tāi-chì. In lâi kàu Iâ-so͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâ-sîn í-keng tùi i chhut,khì hit-ê lâng ū chhēng-saⁿ, cheng-sîn chèng-siông, chē tī Iâ-so͘ ê kha-chêng, in chiū chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Luke8:36 Khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì ê lâng chiū chiong hit-ê hō͘ kúi hū-sin ê lâng án-chóaⁿ tit-tio̍h i-hó ê tāi-chì kā chèng-lâng pò-kò. 
Luke8:37 Kek-la-sim hù-kūn só͘-ū ê lâng kiû Iâ-so͘ lī-khui in hia, in-ūi in hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ. Iâ-so͘ chiū chē-chûn tò-tńg,khì." 
Luke8:38 Kúi tùi i chhut,khì hit-ê lâng kiû Iâ-so͘, ài-beh tè I khì. M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kiò i tńg,khì, kóng," 
Luke8:39 “Tńg-khì lín tau, chiong Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h lí só͘ chòe it-chhè ê tāi-chì pò hō͘ lâng chai.” Hit-ê lâng chiū tńg,khì, chiong Iâ-so͘ ūi-tio̍h i só͘ chòe hiah-ni̍h tōa ê tāi-chì thoân-iông hō͘ choân-siâⁿ ê lâng chai." 
Luke8:40 Iâ-so͘ tńg,lâi ê sî, ū chi̍t tīn lâng kā I hoan-gêng, in-ūi in lóng teh thèng-hāu I." 
Luke8:41 Ū chi̍t ê hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán miâ kiò-chòe Ia̍p-ló͘ lâi, i chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū phak tī I ê kha-chêng, khún-kiû I khì in tau." 
Luke8:42 In-ūi i cha̍p-jī-hè ê to̍k-siⁿ cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ teh-beh sí ah. Iâ-so͘ chiū kap i khì; ū kui tōa-tīn lâng mā oe-oe-khoeh-khoeh tè I khì. 
Luke8:43 Hit-sî, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng tì-tio̍h hiat-lāu-pīⁿ í-keng cha̍p-jī nî kú, sui-jiân kheng-ka-tōng-sán chhē i-seng, m̄-kú bô lâng ōe-tàng kā i i-hó." 
Luke8:44 I kiâⁿ óa-khì Iâ-so͘ ê āu-bīn, bong I saⁿ-á-ku ê chhiu, i ê hiat-lāu sûi-sî chí." 
Luke8:45 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng kā góa bong?” Tāi-ke lóng kóng bô. Pí-tek kóng, “Lāu-su, sī kûn-chiòng khoeh-lâi-khoeh-khì ê sî kā lí khoeh,tio̍h.”" 
Luke8:46 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Ū lâng kā góa bong,tio̍h, in-ūi góa chai ū tōa lêng-le̍k tùi góa chhut,khì.”" 
Luke8:47 Hū-jîn-lâng chai-iáⁿ am-khàm bōe tiâu, chiū phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah, lâi phak tī Iâ-so͘ ê kha-chêng, tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kóng i sī-án-chóaⁿ bong Iâ-so͘, koh i ê pīⁿ án-chóaⁿ sûi-sî hó,khì." 
Luke8:48 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ, lí ê sìn-sim hō͘ lí hó,khì lah, pêng-an tò,khì.”" 
Luke8:49 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî, ū lâng tùi hōe-tn̂g chú-koán ê chhù lâi, kā Ia̍p-ló͘ kóng, “Lí ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ í-keng sí,khì, m̄-thang koh lô-hoân lāu-su.”" 
Luke8:50 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kā Ia̍p-ló͘ kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ, chí-ū sìn, i ōe hó,khí-lâi.”" 
Luke8:51 Iâ-so͘ lâi kàu in tau ê sî, Pí-tek, Iok-hān, Ngá-kok, kap gín-á ê pē-bú í-gōa, m̄-chún pa̍t-lâng kap I chòe-hé ji̍p,khì." 
Luke8:52 Tāi-ke lóng ūi-tio̍h sí,khì ê cha-bó͘ gín-á teh háu teh khàu. Iâ-so͘ kóng, “M̄-thang khàu, in-ūi i m̄-sī sí,khì, sī teh khùn.”" 
Luke8:53 In-ūi in lóng chai hit-ê cha-bó͘ gín-á í-keng sí,khì, chiū kā I thí-chhiò." 
Luke8:54 Iâ-so͘ khan cha-bó͘ gín-á ê chhiú, tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Cha-bó͘ gín-á, khí,lâi!”" 
Luke8:55 I chiū hôe-hûn, sûi-sî peh,khí-lâi. Iâ-so͘ hoan-hù in tio̍h hō͘ cha-bó͘ gín-á chia̍h." 
Luke8:56 I ê pē-bú hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ. Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in m̄-thang chiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì pò lâng chai. 
Luke9:1 Iâ-so͘ tiàu-chi̍p cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘, hō͘ in ū lêng-le̍k kap koân-pèng thang chè-ap lóng-chóng ê kúi, koh i-hó chin chōe pīⁿ-chèng." 
Luke9:2 Jiân-āu I chhe in chhut-khì soan-káng Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im, koh i-tī pīⁿ-lâng." 
Luke9:3 I kau-tài in, kóng, “Chhut-mn̂g ê sî sím-mi̍h lóng m̄-thang tòa: M̄-thang tòa koáiⁿ-á; m̄-thang tòa lú-hêng-tē; m̄-thang tòa chia̍h-mi̍h; m̄-thang tòa chîⁿ; mā m̄-thang ū nn̄g niá lāi-saⁿ." 
Luke9:4 Lín bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t keng chhù, tio̍h tòa tī hia, iā tùi hia lī-khui." 
Luke9:5 In nā m̄ chiap-la̍p lín, lín lī-khui hit-ê siâⁿ ê sî, tio̍h chiong kha,ni̍h ê thô͘-hún pōaⁿ-tiāu, piáu-sī tùi in kéng-kò.”" 
Luke9:6 In chhut,khì, chi̍t-chng kè chi̍t-chng thoân hok-im, koh tī ta̍k só͘-chāi i-hó pīⁿ-lâng." 
Luke9:7 Ka-lī-lī hun-hong ê ông Hi-lu̍t thiaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng it-chhè ê tāi-chì, sim-lāi hui-siông put-an, in-ūi ū lâng kóng Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān í-keng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h;" 
Luke9:8 mā ū lâng kóng Í-lī-a ū chhut-hiān; koh ū lâng kóng kó͘-chá ê chi̍t ê sian-ti ū koh-oa̍h. 
Luke9:9 Hi-lu̍t kóng, “ Iok-hān, góa í-keng kā i chām-thâu lah, án-ni góa thiaⁿ lín teh kóng chit-ê tàu-tóe sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” I chiū ài-beh kìⁿ Iâ-so͘." 
Luke9:10 Sù-tô͘ tńg-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, chiong in só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lóng kā I pò-kò. Iâ-so͘ chiū kan-ta chhōa in thè-khì chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Pek-sài-tāi ê siâⁿ." 
Luke9:11 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t-ē chai chiū tè I khì. Iâ-so͘ hoan-gêng in, kóng Siōng-tè-kok ê sū hō͘ in thiaⁿ, koh i-hó hiah-ê su-iàu i-tī ê lâng." 
Luke9:12 Ji̍t beh àm ê sî, cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ lâi kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chhiáⁿ kā kûn-chiòng kái-sàn, thang hō͘ in khì hù-kūn ê chng-siā chhē chia̍h-mi̍h kap tòa ê só͘-chāi, in-ūi lán tī chia phian-phiah bô lâng tòa.”" 
Luke9:13 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín hō͘ in chia̍h.” In kóng, “Lán chí-ū gō͘ ê piáⁿ, nn̄g bé hî, nā bô khì bóe ná ū-kàu thang hō͘ chiah chōe lâng chia̍h?”" 
Luke9:14 Tī hia chha-put-to ū gō͘-chheng ê ta-po͘-lâng. Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Kiò in hun-cho͘ chē,lo̍h-khì, ta̍k-cho͘ chha-put-to gō͘-cha̍p ê lâng.”" 
Luke9:15 In chiàu án-ni chòe, kiò chèng-lâng lóng chē,lo̍h-khì." 
Luke9:16 Iâ-so͘ the̍h hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ kap nn̄g bé hî, ǹg thiⁿ kám-siā, peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ bûn-tô͘ khì pun hō͘ kûn-chiòng." 
Luke9:17 Tāi-ke lóng chia̍h, chia̍h kàu pá. Bûn-tô͘ chiong só͘ chhun ê chhùi-sut-á lóng khioh,khí-lâi, lóng-chóng móa cha̍p-jī nâ." 
Luke9:18 Ū chi̍t piàn, Iâ-so͘ ka-kī chi̍t ê teh kî-tó ê sî, bûn-tô͘ lâi chhē I. I mn̄g in kóng, “Chèng-lâng kóng góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
Luke9:19 In ìn kóng, “Ū lâng kóng lí sī Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān; m̄-kú ū lâng kóng sī Í-lī-a; mā ū lâng kóng sī kó͘-chá ê chi̍t ê sian-ti koh-oa̍h.”" 
Luke9:20 Iâ-so͘ koh mn̄g in kóng, “Lín leh, lín kóng góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Lí sī Siōng-tè siat-li̍p ê Ki-tok!”" 
Luke9:21 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng in m̄-thang tùi lâng kóng-khí chit-ê tāi-chì. 
Luke9:22 I kóng, “Jîn-chú it-tēng tio̍h siū chin chōe khó͘-lān, hō͘ tiúⁿ-ló, chè-si-tiúⁿ, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kū-choa̍t, koh hō͘ lâng hāi-sí, tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ I koh-oa̍h.”" 
Luke9:23 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi chèng-lâng kóng, “Beh tè góa ê lâng, tio̍h hó͘-tēng ka-kī, ta̍k-ji̍t giâ ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè lâi tè góa." 
Luke9:24 In-ūi beh kiù ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘ sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, i ōe kiù-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā." 
Luke9:25 Lâng tit-tio̍h choân sè-kài soah sòng-sit ka-kī, á-sī húi-bia̍t ka-kī, ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek?" 
Luke9:26 Tùi góa kap góa ê ōe kám-kak kiàn-siàu ê lâng, Jîn-chú tī I ka-kī kap Pē í-ki̍p sèng thiⁿ-sài ê êng-kng tiong lâi-lîm ê sî, mā ōe in-ūi chit-ê lâng kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
Luke9:27 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, khiā tī chia ê lâng, ū-ê iáu-bē sí í-chêng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè-kok.”" 
Luke9:28 Chiah-ê ōe kóng-liáu, chha-put-to poeh ji̍t āu, Iâ-so͘ chhōa Pí-tek, Iok-hān, kap Ngá-kok chiūⁿ-soaⁿ khì kî-tó." 
Luke9:29 I teh kî-tó ê sî, bīn-māu kái-piàn, I ê saⁿ piàn kah pe̍h-siak-siak." 
Luke9:30 Hut-jiân-kan, ū nn̄g ê lâng, chiū-sī Mô͘-se kap Í-lī-a, lâi kap Iâ-so͘ kóng-ōe." 
Luke9:31 In tī êng-kng tiong chhut-hiān, tâm-lūn Iâ-so͘ teh-beh tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sí lâi oân-sêng sú-bēng ê sū." 
Luke9:32 Pí-tek kap i ê tâng-phōaⁿ thiám kah khùn,khì. In chi̍t-ē chhíⁿ, khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê êng-kng í-ki̍p kap I khiā chòe-hé hit nn̄g ê lâng." 
Luke9:33 In teh-beh lī-khui Iâ-so͘ ê sî, Pí-tek kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, lán tī chia chin hó, goán lâi tah saⁿ keng liâu-á, chi̍t keng hō͘ lí, chi̍t keng hō͘ Mô͘-se, chi̍t keng hō͘ Í-lī-a.” I m̄ chai ka-kī teh kóng sím-mi̍h." 
Luke9:34 I teh kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, ū chi̍t phìⁿ hûn lâi, kā in tà,teh; in hō͘ hûn pau-ûi ê sî, khí kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Luke9:35 Ū siaⁿ tùi hûn chhut,lâi, kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa ê Kiáⁿ, góa só͘ kéng-soán,ê, lín tio̍h thiaⁿ-thàn I.”" 
Luke9:36 Hit-ê siaⁿ kóng-liáu, kan-ta chhun Iâ-so͘ chi̍t ê tī hia. Ū chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan, bûn-tô͘ lóng tiām-tiām, bô kā lâng kóng-khí in só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê tāi-chì." 
Luke9:37 Keh-ji̍t, in tùi soaⁿ-téng lo̍h,lâi ê sî, ū kui tōa-tīn lâng lâi gêng-chiap Iâ-so͘." 
Luke9:38 Hit-sî, kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê lâng hoah kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, góa chit-ê hāu-siⁿ kiû lí kā i khòaⁿ,chi̍t-ē, i sī góa ê ko͘-kiáⁿ." 
Luke9:39 Kúi chi̍t-ē hū-sin, i sûi-sî loān hoah. Kúi hō͘ i thiu-chhoah, phū pe̍h-pho-nōa, koh kā i siong-hāi, lóng m̄ pàng i soah." 
Luke9:40 Góa ū chhiáⁿ lí ê bûn-tô͘ kā kúi kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, in lóng bô hoat-tō͘.”" 
Luke9:41 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Ài ah, m̄-sìn koh hú-pāi ê sè-tāi! Góa tio̍h kap lín tòa jōa kú? Góa tio̍h jím-nāi lín jōa kú? Kā lí ê hāu-siⁿ chhōa-lâi chia.”" 
Luke9:42 I hō͘ lâng chhōa,lâi ê sî, kúi kā i siak-tó, hō͘ i thiu-chhoah. Iâ-so͘ chiū chek-pī siâ-sîn, i-hó hit-ê gín-á, chiong i kau hō͘ lāu-pē." 
Luke9:43 Chèng-lâng tùi Siōng-tè úi-tāi ê koân-lêng kám-kak chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ. Chèng-lâng tùi Iâ-so͘ só͘ chòe it-chhè ê tāi-chì iáu-teh tio̍h-kiaⁿ ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng," 
Luke9:44 “Chiah-ê ōe lín tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ: Jîn-chú teh-beh hō͘ lâng chhut-bōe kau tī lâng ê chhiú-thâu.” 
Luke9:45 Put-kò bûn-tô͘ bô bêng-pe̍k chit-kù ōe, in-ūi ì-sù ū tùi in khàm,khí-lâi hō͘ in bōe liáu-kái, in mā m̄-káⁿ mn̄g Iâ-so͘ chit-kù ōe ê ì-sù." 
Luke9:46 Bûn-tô͘ hō͘-siōng cheng-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng siōng tōa. 
Luke9:47 Iâ-so͘ chai in sim-lāi teh cheng-lūn sím-mi̍h, chiū khan chi̍t ê gín-á lâi khiā tī I sin-piⁿ," 
Luke9:48 jiân-āu kā in kóng, “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ chiap-la̍p chit-ê gín-á, chiū-sī chiap-la̍p góa; chiap-la̍p góa,ê chiū-sī chiap-la̍p chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi. Lín chèng-lâng tiong-kan siōng-sòe,ê chiū-sī siōng tōa.”" 
Luke9:49 Iok-hān kóng, “Lāu-su, goán ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng hōng lí ê miâ kóaⁿ-kúi, goán kā i chó͘-tòng, in-ūi i bô kap goán tè lí.”" 
Luke9:50 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “M̄-thang kā i chó͘-tòng, in-ūi bô hoán-tùi lín,ê chiū-sī ūi lín.”" 
Luke9:51 Iâ-so͘ siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ ê ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, chiū koat-ì beh khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Luke9:52 I chhe-phài sù-chiá tāi-seng khì. In ji̍p-khì Sat-má-lī-a -lâng ê chng-thâu, ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chún-pī." 
Luke9:53 Hit só͘-chāi ê lâng bô hoan-gêng Iâ-so͘, in-ūi I beh khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Luke9:54 I ê bûn-tô͘ Ngá-kok kap Iok-hān khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kóng, “Chú ah, goán tùi thiⁿ-téng kiò hé lo̍h-lâi kā in húi-bia̍t hó,bô?”" 
Luke9:55 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t,kè-lâi, kā in chek-pī." 
Luke9:56 In chiū khì pa̍t-ê chng-thâu. 
Luke9:57 In tī lō͘-tiong ê sî, ū chi̍t ê lâng tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí bô-lūn khì tó-ūi, góa lóng beh tè lí.”" 
Luke9:58 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Hô͘-lî ū khang, khong-tiong ê chiáu ū siū, put-kò Jîn-chú liân khòa thâu-khak ê só͘-chāi to bô.”" 
Luke9:59 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâng kóng, “Lâi tè góa!” Hit-ê lâng ìn kóng, “Chú ah, thèng-hāu goán sī-tōa-lâng pah-hè-nî-lāu, góa chiū lâi tè lí. ”" 
Luke9:60 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Hō͘ sí-lâng khì bâi-chòng in ka-kī ê sí-lâng. Put-kò, lí tio̍h khì soan-káng Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im.”" 
Luke9:61 Koh ū chi̍t ê lâng kóng, “Chú ah, góa beh tè lí; put-kò hō͘ góa tāi-seng tńg-khì chhù,ni̍h kap ke-lāi ê lâng saⁿ-sî.”" 
Luke9:62 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Chhiú hōaⁿ tī lôe-bé iáu ti̍t-ti̍t oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ āu-bīn ê lâng bô sek-ha̍p Siōng-tè-kok.”" 
Luke10:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu, Chú lēng-gōa kéng chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng, chhe in nn̄g-ê nn̄g-ê seng khì I pún-sin siūⁿ-beh khì ê ta̍k-ê siâⁿ ta̍k-ê só͘-chāi." 
Luke10:2 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Thang siu-sêng,ê chin chōe, choh-kang ê lâng chin chió. Só͘-í, lín tio̍h kî-kiû koán siu-sêng ê Chú phài kang-lâng khì siu-sêng." 
Luke10:3 Khì! Góa chhe lín chhut,khì, chhin-chhiūⁿ sàng iûⁿ-á ji̍p-khì chhâi-lông ê lāi-bīn." 
Luke10:4 M̄-thang tòa chîⁿ-tē, m̄-thang tòa lú-hêng-tē, mā m̄-thang tòa ôe, tī lō͘,ni̍h m̄-thang kā lâng chhéng-an." 
Luke10:5 Lín bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t keng chhù, tio̍h tāi-seng kóng ‘Goān lín chit-ke pêng-an!’" 
Luke10:6 Tī hia nā ū ài pêng-an ê lâng, lín ê pêng-an ōe lâu tī in hia; nā bô, hit-ê pêng-an ōe tò-tńg-lâi kui lín." 
Luke10:7 Lín tio̍h tiàm hit-ê ke. In chún-pī sím-mi̍h, lín chiū chia̍h sím-mi̍h, lim sím-mi̍h, in-ūi choh-kang ê lâng eng-kai tit-tio̍h kang-chîⁿ. Lín m̄-thang tùi chit-ke sóa-kè hit-ke." 
Luke10:8 Lín bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t ê siâⁿ, lâng nā chiap-thāi lín, phâng sím-mi̍h chhut,lâi, lín chiū chia̍h sím-mi̍h." 
Luke10:9 Siâⁿ-lāi ū pīⁿ ê lâng tio̍h kā in i, sòa kā in kóng, ‘Siōng-tè ê chú-koân teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah.’" 
Luke10:10 “Bô-lūn ji̍p-khì tó chi̍t ê siâⁿ, lâng nā bô hoan-gêng lín, lín tio̍h chhut-khì tōa koe-lō͘ kóng," 
Luke10:11 ‘Liân lín chit-ê siâⁿ tiâu tī goán kha ê thô͘-hún, goán to beh pōaⁿ-tiāu kā lín kéng-kò; put-kò lín tio̍h chai Siōng-tè ê chú-koân teh-beh si̍t-hiān lah.’" 
Luke10:12 Góa kā lín kóng, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t, Só͘-to-má só͘ siū ê hêng-hoa̍t ōe pí hit-ê siâⁿ só͘ siū,ê koh-khah hó jím-siū.”" 
Luke10:13 “ Ko-lia̍p-sìn, lí chhám ah! Pek-sài-tāi, lí chhám ah! Góa tī lín tiong-kan kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah nā tī Thài-ní kap Se-tùn kiâⁿ, in chá chiū chhēng môa-saⁿ, chē tī hé-hu téng hóe-kái lah." 
Luke10:14 Tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Thài-ní kap Se-tùn siū ê hêng-hoa̍t ōe pí lín tio̍h siū,ê khah hó jím-siū." 
Luke10:15 Lí leh, Ka-pek-lông, Lí ài lâng kā lí hû-chiūⁿ thiⁿ sī,bô? Bōe, Siōng-tè ōe kā lí hiat-lo̍h Im-hú!" 
Luke10:16 “Thiaⁿ-thàn lín,ê chiū-sī thiaⁿ-thàn góa, kū-choa̍t lín,ê chiū-sī kū-choa̍t góa; kū-choa̍t góa,ê chiū-sī kū-choa̍t chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi.”" 
Luke10:17 Hit chhit-cha̍p-jī lâng hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí tò,lâi, pò-kò kóng, “Chú ah, goán hōng lí ê miâ bēng-lēng, liân kúi to ho̍k-chiông goán!”" 
Luke10:18 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Sat-tàn chhin-chhiūⁿ sih-nà tùi thiⁿ-téng siak,lo̍h-lâi."
