Luke10:19 Tio̍h chai, góa ū sù lín koân-pèng thang ta̍h chôa kap giat-á-thâng, koh thang chè-ho̍k tùi-te̍k it-chhè ê lêng-le̍k; bô chi̍t hāng ōe kā lín siong-hāi." 
Luke10:20 Put-kò, m̄-thang in-ūi chiah-ê siâ-sîn hâng-ho̍k lín, lín chiū hoaⁿ-hí; tio̍h in-ūi lín ê miâ kì-chài tī thiⁿ-téng lâi hoaⁿ-hí.”" 
Luke10:21 Hit-sî, Iâ-so͘ hō͘ Sèng Sîn kám-tōng móa-sim hoaⁿ-hí, kóng, “Pē ah, thiⁿ-tōe ê Chú, góa kám-siā lí, in-ūi lí ū chiong chiah-ê sū tùi ū tì-hūi ū ha̍k-būn ê lâng khàm,khí-lâi, m̄-kú tùi sòe-hàn gín-á khé-sī. Pē ah, sī lah, in-ūi che sī lí ê hó chí-ì." 
Luke10:22 “Góa ê Pē í-keng ū chiong it-chhè lóng kau-thok góa. Pē í-gōa bô lâng bat Kiáⁿ sī sím-mi̍h-lâng; Kiáⁿ kap Kiáⁿ ài-beh khé-sī ê lâng í-gōa mā bô lâng bat Pē sī sím-mi̍h-lâng.” 
Luke10:23 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t-tńg-sin su-hā tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Ū ba̍k-chiu thang khòaⁿ lín só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê, hit-ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!" 
Luke10:24 Góa kā lín kóng, í-chêng ū chin chōe sian-ti kap kun-ông ài-beh khòaⁿ lín só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê ia̍h bô khòaⁿ,tio̍h, beh thiaⁿ lín só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê ia̍h bô thiaⁿ,tio̍h.”" 
Luke10:25 Ū chi̍t ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su khiā khí-lâi chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘, kóng, “Lāu-su, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h chiah ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā?”" 
Luke10:26 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng, “Lu̍t-hoat ū siá sím-mi̍h? Lí án-chóaⁿ liáu-kái?”" 
Luke10:27 Hit-ê lâng ìn kóng, “Lí tio̍h choân-sim, choân-chêng, choân-le̍k, choân-ì thiàⁿ Chú — lí ê Siōng-tè; koh tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī.”" 
Luke10:28 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ìn liáu chin tio̍h. Chiàu án-ni khì chòe chiū ōe tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā.”" 
Luke10:29 Hit-ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su ūi-tio̍h beh piáu-bêng ka-kī sī tio̍h, chiū koh mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī góa ê chhù-piⁿ?”" 
Luke10:30 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lo̍h-khì Iâ-lī-ko, tú-tio̍h kiông-tō; in pak i ê saⁿ, koh kā i phah kàu pòaⁿ-sí, jiân-āu kā i pàng hē,teh, chòe in khì." 
Luke10:31 Tú-hó ū chi̍t ê chè-si tùi hit-tiâu lō͘ lo̍h,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê lâng chiū siám tùi lō͘ ê hit-pêng kè,khì." 
Luke10:32 Siâng-khoán, ū chi̍t ê Lī-bī -lâng lâi kàu hit-ê só͘-chāi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê lâng mā siám tùi lō͘ ê hit-pêng kè,khì." 
Luke10:33 Chóng-sī, ū chi̍t ê Sat-má-lī-a -lâng tùi hia keng-kè, chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê lâng chiū sim chin m̄-kam," 
Luke10:34 kiâⁿ óa,khì, ēng iû kap chiú boah i ê khang-chhùi, koh ēng pò͘ kā i pau-chat, jiân-āu kā i hû-khì khiâ ka-kī ê lû-á, chhōa i khì lú-koán, kā i chiàu-kò͘." 
Luke10:35 Keh-ji̍t, i the̍h nn̄g ê gûn-á kau hō͘ lú-koán ê thâu-ke, kau-tài kóng, ‘Chhiáⁿ lí chiàu-kò͘ chit-ê lâng, só͘-hùi nā tio̍h khah chōe, góa tò,lâi ê sî ōe pó͘,lí.’”" 
Luke10:36 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g hit-ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su, “Lí siūⁿ, chit saⁿ ê lâng tó chi̍t ê sī hō͘ kiông-tō chhiúⁿ hit-ê lâng ê chhù-piⁿ?”" 
Luke10:37 I ìn kóng, “Kā i lîn-bín hit-ê.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí khì, chiàu án-ni khì chòe.”" 
Luke10:38 Iâ-so͘ kap bûn-tô͘ kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ. Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì chi̍t ê chng-thâu, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng, kiò-chòe Má-tāi, kā I chiap-thāi." 
Luke10:39 Má-tāi ū chi̍t ê sió-bē, kiò-chòe Má-lī-a, chē tī Chú ê kha-chêng thiaⁿ I ê kà-sī." 
Luke10:40 Má-tāi ūi-tio̍h chiap-thāi, tāi-chì chōe sim ak-chak, chiū lâi kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, góa ê sió-bē pàng góa ka-kī chi̍t ê teh bong, lí ná bô-iàu-bô-kín? Kiò i lâi kā góa tàu-kha-chhiú.”" 
Luke10:41 Chú ìn i kóng, “ Má-tāi, Má-tāi, lí ūi-tio̍h tāi-chì chōe teh khòa-lū chhau-hoân;" 
Luke10:42 só͘ su-iàu,ê chí-ū chi̍t hāng. Má-lī-a í-keng kéng-tio̍h siōng-hó hit-hūn, bô lâng ōe-tàng kā i chhiúⁿ,khì.”" 
Luke11:1 Ū chi̍t piàn, Iâ-so͘ tī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi teh kî-tó. I kî-tó soah ê sî, ū chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ kā I kóng, “Chú ah, Iok-hān ū kà i ê bûn-tô͘ kî-tó, chhiáⁿ lí mā kà goán kî-tó.”" 
Luke11:2 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín kî-tó ê sî, tio̍h án-ni kóng: Pē ah, goān lí ê sèng-miâ siū chun-chông. Goān lí si-hêng chú-koân." 
Luke11:3 Kiû lí ta̍k-ji̍t sù goán só͘ su-iàu ê chia̍h-mi̍h. 
Luke11:4 Kiû lí sià-bián goán ê chōe, in-ūi goán ka-kī mā ū sià-bián só͘-ū ko͘-hū goán ê lâng. Kiû lí m̄-thang hō͘ goán hām-lo̍h tam-tng bōe khí ê chhì-thàm.”" 
Luke11:5 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín tiong-kan ū sím-mi̍h-lâng pòaⁿ-mî khì pêng-iú hia, kā i kóng, ‘Pêng-iú, chhiáⁿ lí chioh góa saⁿ tè piáⁿ," 
Luke11:6 in-ūi góa ū chi̍t ê pêng-iú lú-hêng lâi kàu goán chia, góa bô mi̍h-kiāⁿ thang chhiáⁿ i.’" 
Luke11:7 Lí ê pêng-iú ōe tùi chhù-lāi ìn kóng, ‘Mài kā góa chhá, mn̂g í-keng koaiⁿ, góa kap gín-á tī bîn-chhn̂g teh khùn lah, bōe-tàng khí-lâi the̍h hō͘ lí.’" 
Luke11:8 Góa kā lí kóng, sui-jiân hit-ê lâng bōe in-ūi i sī pêng-iú khí-lâi the̍h piáⁿ hō͘ i, mā ōe in-ūi i pek-chhiat khún-kiû, khí-lâi the̍h só͘ su-iàu ê mi̍h hō͘ i." 
Luke11:9 “Só͘-í, góa kā lín kóng: Kiû, ōe tit,tio̍h; chhē, ōe chhē,tio̍h; phah-mn̂g, ōe kā lín khui." 
Luke11:10 In-ūi kiû,ê, chiū tit,tio̍h; chhē,ê, chiū chhē,tio̍h; phah-mn̂g,ê, chiū kā i khui." 
Luke11:11 Lín tiong-kan choh lāu-pē,ê, ka-kī ê kiáⁿ kā lín thó hî, kiám ōe lia̍h chôa hō͘ i?" 
Luke11:12 Á-sī kā lín thó nn̄g, kiám ōe lia̍h giat-á-thâng hō͘ i?" 
Luke11:13 Lín sui-jiân pháiⁿ, iáu ōe-hiáu the̍h hó-mi̍h hō͘ lín ê kiáⁿ-jî, hô-hòng lín ê Thiⁿ-pē, I it-tēng ōe chiong Sèng Sîn sù hō͘ tùi I kî-kiû ê lâng!”" 
Luke11:14 Iâ-so͘ kóaⁿ chi̍t ê é-káu-kúi; kúi chi̍t-ē chhut,khì, hit-ê bōe kóng-ōe ê lâng chiū kóng-ōe, kûn-chiòng lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Luke11:15 M̄-kú, kî-tiong ū lâng kóng, “I khò kúi-ông Pia̍t-se-pok kóaⁿ-kúi.”" 
Luke11:16 Koh ū chi̍t-kóa lâng beh chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘, it-ti̍t iau-kiû I kiâⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi ê sîn-jiah." 
Luke11:17 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ in teh siūⁿ sím-mi̍h, chiū kā in kóng, “Kok-ka ka-kī hun-cheng, ōe hong-hòe; ka-têng ka-kī hun-cheng, ōe tó-hoāi." 
Luke11:18 Sat-tàn nā ka-kī hun-cheng, Sat-tàn ê kok ná khiā ōe tiâu? Lín kóng góa sī óa-khò Pia̍t-se-pok kóaⁿ-kúi." 
Luke11:19 Góa nā khò Pia̍t-se-pok kóaⁿ-kúi, lín ê chú-tē sī khò sím-mi̍h-lâng kóaⁿ-kúi? Án-ni, lín ka-kī ê chú-tē ōe kā lín phòaⁿ-chōe." 
Luke11:20 Put-kò góa nā-sī khò Siōng-tè ê khùi-la̍t teh kóaⁿ-kúi, Siōng-tè ê chú-koân chiū í-keng tī lín tiong-kan si̍t-hiān lah." 
Luke11:21 “Ióng-sū bú-chong choân-pī kò͘-siú ka-kī ê chhù, i ê châi-bu̍t chiū an-choân." 
Luke11:22 M̄-kú ū chi̍t ê pí i khah ióng ê lâng lâi kong-kek, phah-iâⁿ, chiū chiong i só͘ óa-khò ê bú-khì chhiúⁿ,khì, koh chiong só͘ chhiúⁿ ê châi-bu̍t pun-liáu-liáu." 
Luke11:23 “Bô ūi góa,ê chiū-sī hoán-tùi góa; bô kap góa chòe-hé siu-chi̍p,ê chiū-sī teh phah-sòaⁿ.” 
Luke11:24 “Siâ-sîn lī-khui só͘ hū-sin ê lâng liáu-āu, tī bô-chúi ê tōe-khu kiâⁿ-thàu-thàu, beh chhē chi̍t ê hioh-khùn ê só͘-chāi, chhē lóng bô, chiū kóng, ‘Góa beh tńg-lâi-khì góa chhut,lâi hit-keng chhù.’" 
Luke11:25 I tńg,khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chhù-lāi sàu kah chin chheng-khì, koh chéng-lí hó-sè." 
Luke11:26 Āu-lâi, i khì chhōa chhit ê pí i khah pháiⁿ ê siâ-sîn lâi, ji̍p-khì hia tòa. Án-ni, hit-ê lâng ê kiat-kio̍k pí khí-thâu koh-khah chhám.”" 
Luke11:27 Iâ-so͘ teh kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, kûn-chiòng lāi-bīn ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng tōa-siaⁿ tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Siⁿ lí, hō͘ lí suh-lin ê hū-jîn-lâng chin ū hok-khì!”" 
Luke11:28 Put-kò Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe koh chun-siú ê lâng koh-khah ū hok-khì!”" 
Luke11:29 Kûn-chiòng jú lâi jú chōe, Iâ-so͘ chiū kóng, “Chit sè-tāi chin-chiàⁿ sī siâ-ok ê sè-tāi! In iau-kiû sîn-jiah, m̄-kú Iok-ná ê sîn-jiah í-gōa, bōe koh ū sîn-jiah hō͘ in." 
Luke11:30 Tú chhin-chhiūⁿ Iok-ná chiâⁿ-chòe Nî-nî-bî -lâng ê sîn-jiah, Jîn-chú mā beh chiâⁿ-chòe chit sè-tāi ê lâng ê sîn-jiah." 
Luke11:31 Tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Lâm-hng ê lú-ông ōe kap chit sè-tāi ê lâng chòe-hé khí-lâi kā in tēng-chōe, in-ūi i ū tùi tōe ê ke̍k-thâu lâi thiaⁿ Só͘-lô-bûn tì-hūi ê ōe. Lín khòaⁿ, ū pí Só͘-lô-bûn koh-khah úi-tāi,ê tī chia!" 
Luke11:32 Tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Nî-nî-bî -lâng ōe kap chit sè-tāi ê lâng chòe-hé khí-lâi kā in tēng-chōe, in-ūi Nî-nî-bî -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iok-ná ê thoân-tō liáu-āu lóng ū hóe-kái. Lín khòaⁿ, ū pí Iok-ná koh-khah úi-tāi,ê tī chia!”" 
Luke11:33 “Bô lâng tiám-teng hē tī lâng khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h ê só͘-chāi, á-sī khàm tī táu-ē; it-tēng sī hē tī teng-tâi téng, thang hō͘ ji̍p,lâi ê lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h kng." 
Luke11:34 Lí ê ba̍k-chiu sī seng-khu ê teng. Lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā kim, kui seng-khu chiū kng-bêng; lí ê ba̍k-chiu nā hoe, kui seng-khu chiū o͘-àm." 
Luke11:35 Só͘-í, tio̍h sió-sim, m̄-thang hō͘ lí lāi-bīn ê kng pìⁿ-chòe àm." 
Luke11:36 Lí kui seng-khu nā lóng kng-bêng, liân chi̍t-tiám-á o͘-àm to bô, chiū ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ teng kng-iàⁿ-iàⁿ teh kā lí chiò, oân-choân kng-bêng.”" 
Luke11:37 Iâ-so͘ teh kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, ū chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhiáⁿ I chia̍h-pn̄g, I chiū ji̍p-khì chē-toh." 
Luke11:38 Hit-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h I chia̍h-pn̄g bô seng sóe-chhiú, kám-kak chin kî-koài." 
Luke11:39 Chú chiū kā i kóng, “Lín Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chí-ū chiong poe kap pôaⁿ ê gōa-bīn sóe chheng-khì, m̄-kú lín ê lāi-bīn chhiong-móa tham-io̍k kap siâ-ok!" 
Luke11:40 Lín chiah-ê gōng-lâng! Hit-ūi chhòng-chō gōa-bīn ê Siōng-tè kiám m̄-sī mā ū chhòng-chō lāi-bīn? 
Luke11:41 Tio̍h the̍h poe kap pôaⁿ lāi-bīn ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ khì chín-chè, án-ni lín ê it-chhè chiū lóng chheng-khì." 
Luke11:42 “Lín chiah-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chhám ah! In-ūi lín chiong po̍k-hô, ûn-hiong, kap ta̍k-khoán chhài-soe hōng-hiàn cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ Siōng-tè, m̄-kú bô tiōng-sī kong-gī kap thiàⁿ Siōng-tè. Kî-si̍t chiah-ê chiah sī lín eng-kai si̍t-hêng,ê, kî-tha,ê mā m̄-thang hut-lio̍k." 
Luke11:43 “Lín chiah-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chhám ah! In-ūi lín ài tī hōe-tn̂g chē koân-ūi, tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu hō͘ lâng kā lín chhéng-an." 
Luke11:44 Lín chhám ah! In-ūi lín chhin-chhiūⁿ khòaⁿ bōe chhut ê bōng, lâng tùi téng-bīn kiâⁿ,kè mā m̄ chai.”" 
Luke11:45 Ū chi̍t ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, lí kóng chiah-ê ōe mā-sī teh bú-jio̍k goán!”" 
Luke11:46 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng, “Liân lín chiah-ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su mā chhám ah! In-ūi lín chiong taⁿ bô hoat ê tāng-tàⁿ hō͘ lâng taⁿ, ka-kī liân chi̍t ki chńg-thâu-á to m̄-khéng tín-tāng lâi kiám-khin in ê tāng-tàⁿ." 
Luke11:47 Lín chhám ah! Lín ê chó͘-sian thâi-sí hiah-ê sian-ti, lín kā in chō bōng." 
Luke11:48 Án-ni, lín ka-kī chèng-si̍t, mā chàn-sêng chó͘-sian só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì, in-ūi in thâi-sí sian-ti, lín kā in chō bōng." 
Luke11:49 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè ê Tì-hūi mā ū kóng, ‘Góa beh chhe sian-ti kap sù-tô͘ khì in hia, kî-tiong ū-ê ōe hō͘ in thâi-sí, ū-ê ōe hō͘ in pek-hāi.’" 
Luke11:50 Án-ni, tùi chhòng-chō thiⁿ-tōe í-lâi, chiū-sī tùi A-pek khí ti̍t-kàu tī chè-tôaⁿ kap sèng-só͘ ê tiong-kan hō͘ lâng sat-hāi ê Sat-ka-lī-a ûi-chí, in só͘ lâu ê huih, chit sè-tāi ê lâng lóng tio̍h hêng. Tio̍h, góa kā lín kóng, hiah-ê chè lóng ōe kā lín chit sè-tāi ê lâng thó." 
Luke11:51  
Luke11:52 “Lín chiah-ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su chhám ah! In-ūi lín chiong khui tì-sek ê mn̂g ê só-sî kā lâng the̍h-cháu, ka-kī m̄ ji̍p,khì, beh ji̍p,khì ê lâng, lín soah kā in chó͘-tòng!”" 
Luke11:53 Iâ-so͘ tùi hia chhut,lâi ê sî, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū ke̍k-le̍k kā I kong-kek, pek I kóng khah chōe ōe," 
Luke11:54 tng-tán I kóng m̄-tio̍h, thang lia̍h I ê ōe-phāng." 
Luke12:1 Hit-sî, ū kúi-nā chheng lâng khoeh chòe-hé, tì-kàu hō͘-siōng thún-ta̍h. Iâ-so͘ chiū seng tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Tio̍h tî-hông Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê kàⁿ, chiū-sī ké-hó." 
Luke12:2 Bô chi̍t hāng am-khàm,ê bōe lō͘-hiān; mā bô chi̍t hāng pì-bi̍t,ê bōe hō͘ lâng chai. 
Luke12:3 Só͘-í, lín tī àm-tiong kóng,ê, ōe tī kng-bêng tiong hō͘ lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h; lín tī pâng-keng lāi hī-khang piⁿ kóng,ê, ōe hō͘ lâng tī chhù-bé-téng soan-pò͘.”" 
Luke12:4 “Pêng-iú, góa kā lín kóng, hāi-sí lín ê seng-khu liáu-āu, bōe-tàng koh tùi lín chòe sím-mi̍h,ê, m̄-bián kiaⁿ." 
Luke12:5 Góa beh chí-sī lín eng-kai kiaⁿ,ê sī tó chi̍t ūi. Lín eng-kai kiaⁿ Siōng-tè; I hō͘ lâng sí liáu-āu, iáu ū koân thang kā lâng hiat-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k. Sī! Góa kā lín kóng, tio̍h kiaⁿ Chit-ūi!" 
Luke12:6 “Gō͘ chiah chhek-chiáu-á kiám m̄-sī bōe nn̄g kak gûn nā-tiāⁿ? Siōng-tè liân chi̍t chiah to bô bōe-kì,tit. 
Luke12:7 Liân lín ê thâu-mn̂g to lóng ū sǹg,kè. M̄-bián kiaⁿ! Lín pí kui-kûn chhek-chiáu-á koh-khah kùi-tiōng!” 
Luke12:8 “Góa kā lín kóng, tī lâng ê bīn-chêng soan-jīn góa,ê, Jîn-chú tī Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài bīn-chêng mā ōe jīn i." 
Luke12:9 M̄-kú tī lâng ê bīn-chêng m̄ jīn góa,ê, Jîn-chú tī Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài bīn-chêng mā m̄ jīn i." 
Luke12:10 “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng kóng-ōe te̍k-tùi Jîn-chú, ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián. M̄-kú siat-to̍k Sèng Sîn ê, bōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Luke12:11 “Lín hō͘ lâng lia̍h kàu hōe-tn̂g, tī thóng-tī-chiá á-sī koaⁿ-oân bīn-chêng ê sî, m̄-bián hoân-ló tio̍h án-chóaⁿ tap-piān, á-sī tio̍h kóng sím-mi̍h." 
Luke12:12 In-ūi hit-ê sî Sèng Sîn ōe kà lín tio̍h kóng sím-mi̍h.” 
Luke12:13 Chèng-lâng ê tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê lâng kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, chhiáⁿ lí kah góa ê hiaⁿ-tī kap góa pun ke-hé.”" 
Luke12:14 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí chit-ê lâng, siáⁿ-lâng jīm-bēng góa chòe lín ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ á-sī kong-chhin?”" 
Luke12:15 I chiū tùi chèng-lâng kóng, “Tio̍h kín-sīn, tio̍h tî-hông ta̍k-khoán ê tham-sim, in-ūi lâng ê sìⁿ-miā m̄-sī chāi-tī châi-sán ê chōe-chió.”" 
Luke12:16 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ ēng chi̍t ê phì-jū kā in kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê hó-gia̍h-lâng, i ê chhân-hn̂g tōa hong-siu." 
Luke12:17 I sim-lāi siūⁿ-lâi-siūⁿ-khì, kóng, ‘Góa bô-kàu só͘-chāi thang tún ngó͘-kok, taⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ?’" 
Luke12:18 I chiū kóng, ‘Góa tio̍h án-ni chòe. Góa beh kā chhng-khò͘ thiah,khí-lâi koh khí khah tōa keng, thang lâi tún ngó͘-kok kap it-chhè ê châi-bu̍t," 
Luke12:19 jiân-āu tùi góa ka-kī kóng: Eh, lí í-keng chek-chū chin chōe châi-bu̍t, ū-kàu thang ēng chin chōe nî. Taⁿ chheng-êng lah, lâi lim, lâi chia̍h, lâi hióng-siū!’" 
Luke12:20 M̄-kú Siōng-tè kā i kóng, ‘Gōng-lâng! Kim-mî chiū beh siu-hôe lí ê sìⁿ-miā; lí só͘ chek-chū ê it-chhè beh lâu hō͘ siáⁿ-lâng?’" 
Luke12:21 Kâng-khoán, ūi-tio̍h ka-kī chek-chū châi-hù, bô hō͘ Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe hó-gia̍h,ê mā ōe án-ni.”" 
Luke12:22 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Só͘-í góa kā lín kóng, m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h lín ê sìⁿ-miā beh chia̍h sím-mi̍h teh chhau-hoân; mā m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h lín ê seng-khu beh chhēng sím-mi̍h teh chhau-hoân." 
Luke12:23 In-ūi sìⁿ-miā pí chia̍h-mi̍h khah tiōng-iàu; seng-khu pí i-ho̍k khah tiōng-iàu. 
Luke12:24 Lín khòaⁿ o͘-a, in sui-jiân bô chèng-choh, bô siu-sêng, bô chhek-chhng mā bô chhng-khò͘, Siōng-tè mā teh kā in iúⁿ-chhī, lín kiám bô pí hiah-ê chiáu-á koh-khah kùi-tiōng!" 
Luke12:25 Lín kiám ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng chhau-hoân ōe-tàng hō͘ ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā ke oa̍h chi̍t-sî-á kú? 
Luke12:26 Kì-jiân liân chiah-ni̍h sòe-hāng tāi-chì lín to bô châi-tiāu chòe, ná tio̍h ūi kî-tha ê sū chhau-hoân?" 
Luke12:27 Lín khòaⁿ soaⁿ-iá ê hoe, in án-chóaⁿ teh tōa-châng? In bô lô-khó͘, mā bô pháng-chit. Put-kò góa kā lín kóng, liân Só͘-lô-bûn siōng êng-hôa ê sî, i chhēng ê saⁿ to bô pí chiah-ê hoe ê chi̍t lúi koh-khah súi." 
Luke12:28 Soaⁿ-iá ê hoe-chháu kin-á-ji̍t teh oa̍h, bîn-á-chài hō͘ lâng hiat-lo̍h hé-lô͘, Siōng-tè to án-ni kā in chng-thāⁿ, I koh-khah ōe kā lín chng-thāⁿ! Lín ná chiah-ni̍h bô sìn-sim!" 
Luke12:29 “Só͘-í, lín m̄-thang kan-ta teh siūⁿ-beh chia̍h sím-mi̍h, lim sím-mi̍h; mā m̄-thang chhau-hoân." 
Luke12:30 Chiah-ê lóng sī chit sè-kan bô sìn ê lâng só͘ teh tui-kiû,ê. Lín ê Pē chai lín ū su-iàu chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ. 
Luke12:31 Tian-tò tio̍h tāi-seng tui-kiû I chú-koân ê si̍t-hiān, chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiū ōe lóng sòa hō͘ lín.”" 
Luke12:32 “Lín sòe-sòe ê iûⁿ-kûn ah, m̄-bián kiaⁿ, in-ūi lín ê Pē hoaⁿ-hí chiong I ê kok hō͘ lín." 
Luke12:33 Tio̍h bōe lín ê châi-sán lâi chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng. Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h lín ka-kī chún-pī ēng bōe phòa ê chîⁿ-tē lâi chek-chū ēng bōe liáu ê châi-pó tī thiⁿ-téng; tī hia chha̍t-á the̍h bōe tio̍h, chiù-thâng mā kā bōe tio̍h." 
Luke12:34 In-ūi lín ê châi-pó tī tó-ūi, lín ê sim mā ōe tī hia.”" 
Luke12:35 “Saⁿ tio̍h chhēng hó-sè; teng tio̍h tiám hō͘ to̍h. 
Luke12:36 Tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ po̍k-jîn teh thèng-hāu chú-lâng tùi hun-iàn tńg,lâi; chú-lâng tńg,lâi, chi̍t-ē phah-mn̂g thang sûi-sî kā i khui." 
Luke12:37 Chú-lâng tńg,lâi ê sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h po̍k-jîn chhíⁿ-chhíⁿ, hiah-ê po̍k-jîn chin ū hok-khì! Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chú-lâng ōe ka-kī saⁿ chhēng hó-sè, chhiáⁿ in chē-toh, lâi kā in sū-hāu." 
Luke12:38 Chú-lâng nā tī pòaⁿ-mî á-sī thiⁿ beh kng ê sî tńg,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h po̍k-jîn chhíⁿ-chhíⁿ, hiah-ê po̍k-jîn chin ū hok-khì!" 
Luke12:39 Chit-ke ê chú-lâng nā chai chha̍t-á sím-mi̍h sî-chūn ōe lâi, it-tēng bōe hō͘ chha̍t-á chhim-ji̍p i ê chhù." 
Luke12:40 Só͘-í, lín mā tio̍h chún-pī piān-piān, in-ūi Jîn-chú ōe tī lín siūⁿ bōe kàu ê sî-chūn lâi-lîm.”" 
Luke12:41 Pí-tek kóng, “Chú ah, lí chit-ê phì-jū sī tùi goán kóng, á-sī tùi chèng-lâng kóng?”" 
Luke12:42 Chú kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī tiong-si̍t koh chhong-bêng ê koán-ke? Chiū-sī chú-lâng kau-tài i koán-lí kî-tha ê po̍k-jîn, chiàu-sî pun chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ in hit-ê lâng." 
Luke12:43 Chú-lâng tńg,lâi ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chiàu án-ni teh chòe hit-ê po̍k-jîn si̍t-chāi ū hok-khì!" 
Luke12:44 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chú-lâng ōe phài chit-ê po̍k-jîn koán-lí i lóng-chóng ê châi-sán." 
Luke12:45 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn nā sim-lāi siūⁿ-kóng ‘Góa ê chú-lâng bōe hiah kín tńg,lâi’, chiū khí-chhiú phah kî-tha ê po̍k-jîn lú-pī, ia̍h-chia̍h-ia̍h-lim, koh lim kàu chiú-chùi." 
Luke12:46 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn ê chú-lâng ōe tī i bô àn-sǹg ê ji̍t, m̄-chai ê sî tńg,lâi. Chú-lâng ōe giâm-giâm kā i chhú-hoa̍t, kā i kap bô tiong-si̍t ê lâng khǹg chòe-tui." 
Luke12:47 “Po̍k-jîn chai chú-lâng ê ì-sù khiok bô khì chún-pī, á-sī bô chiàu chú-lâng ê ì-sù khì chòe, i ōe hō͘ chú-lâng phah chin thiám." 
Luke12:48 Put-kò m̄ chai chú-lâng ê ì-sù khì chòe eng-kai siū chhú-hoa̍t ê tāi-chì, hit-ê po̍k-jîn ōe hō͘ chú-lâng phah khah khin. Hō͘ i khah chōe, chiū tùi i the̍h khah chōe; kau-tài i khah chōe, chiū tùi i iau-kiû khah chōe.”" 
Luke12:49 “Góa lâi sī beh chiong hé hiat-lo̍h tōe-chiūⁿ, góa jōa-á-ni̍h ài hé í-keng to̍h,khí-lâi!" 
Luke12:50 Góa ū eng-kai siū ê sóe-lé; chit-ê sóe-lé iáu-bē siū í-chêng, góa si̍t-chāi chin kan-khó͘!" 
Luke12:51 Lín siūⁿ-kóng góa lâi sī beh hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ hô-pêng sī,bô? Góa kā lín kóng, m̄-sī, tian-tò sī hun-lia̍t." 
Luke12:52 Tùi taⁿ í-āu, chi̍t ke ū gō͘ ê lâng, in ōe hun-lia̍t, saⁿ ê tùi nn̄g ê, nn̄g ê tùi saⁿ ê." 
Luke12:53 In ōe hun-lia̍t, lāu-pē tùi hāu-siⁿ, hāu-siⁿ tùi lāu-pē; lāu-bú tùi cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ, cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ tùi lāu-bú; ta-ke tùi sin-pū, sin-pū tùi ta-ke.”" 
Luke12:54 Iâ-so͘ koh kā chèng-lâng kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h hûn tùi sai-pêng khí,lâi ê sî, sûi-sî kóng ‘Teh-beh lo̍h-hō͘ lah’, kó-jiân chiū lo̍h-hō͘." 
Luke12:55 Thàu lâm-hong ê sî, lín kóng ‘Teh-beh sio-joa̍h lah’, chiū chin-chiàⁿ sio-joa̍h." 
Luke12:56 Ké-hó ê lâng, lín to ōe-hiáu phòaⁿ-toàn thiⁿ kap tōe ê kéng-siōng, ná bōe-hiáu phòaⁿ-toàn chit-ê sî-tāi?”" 
Luke12:57 “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ m̄ ka-kī phòaⁿ-toàn sím-mi̍h sī ha̍p-lí? 
Luke12:58 Lí kap khòng-kò lí ê lâng khì kìⁿ koaⁿ-tiúⁿ ê sî, tio̍h tī lō͘-tiong siat-hoat kap i hô-kái; nā bô, i ōe thoa lí khì kìⁿ phòaⁿ-koaⁿ, phòaⁿ-koaⁿ chiong lí kau hō͘ hoat-kéng, hoat-kéng chiū kā lí koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ." 
Luke12:59 Góa kā lí kóng, chòe-āu ê chi̍t-sián-gō͘-lî bô hêng chheng-chhó, lí choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng chhut-kaⁿ.”" 
Luke13:1 Tú hit-ê sî, ū kúi-nā ê lâng lâi, tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng-khí Pí-lia̍p-to thâi-sí tī chè-tôaⁿ hiàn-chè ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng ê tāi-chì." 
Luke13:2 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “In-ūi chiah-ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng siū chit-khoán ê chai-lān, lín chiū siūⁿ-kóng in pí kî-tha ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng ū hoān khah-tāng ê chōe sī,bô?" 
Luke13:3 Góa kā lín kóng, m̄-sī, lín nā bô hóe-kái, lóng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ in án-ni bia̍t-bông." 
Luke13:4 Kiám-chhái lín mā siūⁿ-kóng, Se-lô-a ê thah tó,lo̍h-khì ê sî, hō͘ i teh-sí hit cha̍p-poeh ê lâng pí tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lóng-chóng ê lâng ū hoān khah-tāng ê chōe." 
Luke13:5 Góa kā lín kóng, m̄-sī, lín nā bô hóe-kái, lóng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ in án-ni bia̍t-bông.”" 
Luke13:6 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng chit-ê phì-jū. I kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng tī i ê phû-tô-hn̂g chèng chi̍t châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū. I lâi hit-châng chhiū chhē ké-chí, m̄-kú chhē lóng bô." 
Luke13:7 I chiū tùi kò͘-hn̂g ê lâng kóng, ‘Lí khòaⁿ, góa liân-sòa saⁿ nî lâi chit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū chia chhē ké-chí, chhē lóng bô. Kā i chhò,khí-lâi! Ná tio̍h lâu-teh tìn só͘-chāi?’" 
Luke13:8 Hit-ê kò͘-hn̂g,ê ìn kóng, ‘Chú-lâng ah, koh kā i lâu chi̍t nî, góa lâi ku̍t sì-piⁿ ê thô͘, koh lo̍h-pûi;" 
Luke13:9 mê-nî nā ū kiat ké-chí chiū hó, nā bô, chiah kā i chhò,khí-lâi.’”" 
Luke13:10 Ū chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tī chi̍t ê hōe-tn̂g lāi teh kà-sī lâng." 
Luke13:11 Ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin, phòa-pīⁿ cha̍p-poeh nî, seng-khu oan-khiau chhun bōe ti̍t." 
Luke13:12 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kiò i lâi, kā i kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng, lí ê pīⁿ í-keng hó lah!”" 
Luke13:13 Iâ-so͘ ēng siang-chhiú kā i hōaⁿ; i ê seng-khu sûi-sî chhun-ti̍t, chiū kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Luke13:14 Put-kò hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán, in-ūi Iâ-so͘ tī An-hioh-ji̍t kā lâng i-pīⁿ, chiū chin siū-khì, tùi chèng-lâng kóng, “Lán ū la̍k ji̍t thang chòe kang, beh i-pīⁿ tio̍h tī chit tiong-kan lâi i, m̄ eng-kai tī An-hioh-ji̍t.”" 
Luke13:15 Chú ìn kóng, “Ké-hó ê lâng, lín ta̍k-ê lâng kiám bô tī An-hioh-ji̍t tùi tiâu,ni̍h tháu gû á-sī lû, khan-khì lim-chúi?" 
Luke13:16 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun, í-keng siū Sat-tàn sok-pa̍k cha̍p-poeh nî kú, tī An-hioh-ji̍t kā i tháu-pàng kiám m̄ eng-kai?”" 
Luke13:17 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, I ê tùi-te̍k lóng kám-kak kiàn-siàu; só͘-ū ê kûn-chiòng in-ūi I só͘ chòe it-chhè kî-biāu ê tāi-chì lóng chin hoaⁿ-hí." 
Luke13:18 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Siōng-tè-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ sím-mi̍h? Góa tio̍h ēng sím-mi̍h lâi pí-phēng?" 
Luke13:19 Siōng-tè-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t lia̍p kòa-chhài-chí, ū lâng the̍h-khì iā tī ka-kī ê hn̂g,ni̍h. Kòa-chhài chiām-chiām tōa-châng, chiâⁿ-chòe chhiū, khong-tiong ê chiáu-á mā tī chhiū-ki chòe siū.”" 
Luke13:20 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Góa beh ēng sím-mi̍h lâi pí-phēng Siōng-tè-kok?" 
Luke13:21 Siōng-tè-kok chhin-chhiūⁿ kàⁿ-bú, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng the̍h-khì lām tī saⁿ táu mī-hún chòe-hé chhiau, chòe-āu kui-ê lóng hoat,khí-lâi.”" 
Luke13:22 Iâ-so͘ keng-kè siâⁿ-chhī kap chng-kha khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, iân-lō͘ kà-sī lâng." 
Luke13:23 Ū lâng mn̄g I kóng, “Chú ah, ōe tit-tio̍h kiù ê lâng chin chió sī,bô?” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng," 
Luke13:24 “Tio̍h chīn-la̍t tùi oe̍h ê mn̂g ji̍p,khì. Góa kā lín kóng, ū chin chōe lâng siūⁿ-beh ji̍p,khì ia̍h bōe-tàng ji̍p." 
Luke13:25 Chú-lâng khí-lâi koaiⁿ-mn̂g liáu-āu, lín chiah khiā tī mn̂g gōa phah-mn̂g, kóng, ‘Sian-siⁿ, chhiáⁿ kā goán khui-mn̂g!’ I ōe ìn kóng, ‘Góa m̄ chai lín sī tó-ūi lâi ê lâng.’" 
Luke13:26 Hit-sî, lín ōe kóng, ‘Goán bat kap lí chòe-hé lim-chia̍h; lí mā bat tī goán ê koe-lō͘ kà-sī.’" 
Luke13:27 M̄-kú I ōe kóng, ‘Góa kā lín kóng, góa m̄ chai lín sī tó-ūi lâi ê lâng. Lín chiah-ê choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng lóng lī-khui góa!’" 
Luke13:28 Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-pek-la-hán, Í-sat, Ngá-kok, kap só͘-ū ê sian-ti tī Siōng-tè-kok ê lāi-bīn, ka-kī khiok siū kóaⁿ chhut-khì gōa-bīn, hit-sî lín ōe tī hia thî-khàu, kā-gê-chhiat-chhí." 
Luke13:29 Lâng ōe tùi tang sai lâm pak lâi, tī Siōng-tè-kok chē-toh chham-ka iàn-hōe." 
Luke13:30 Án-ni, siōng lō͘-bé,ê ōe chòe tē-it; tē-it,ê ōe chòe siōng lō͘-bé.”" 
Luke13:31 Tú hit-ê sî, ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng óa-lâi kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí tio̍h lī-khui chia khì pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi, in-ūi Hi-lu̍t siūⁿ-beh thâi lí.”" 
Luke13:32 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín khì kā hit-chiah hô͘-lî kóng, ‘Lí khòaⁿ, kin-á-ji̍t, bîn-á-chài góa kóaⁿ-kúi, i-pīⁿ, tē-saⁿ ji̍t oân-sêng góa ê kang-chok." 
Luke13:33 Sui-jiân sī án-ni, kin-á-ji̍t, bîn-á-chài, kap āu,ji̍t, góa it-tēng tio̍h kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ góa ê lō͘, in-ūi sian-ti bô eng-kai tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng í-gōa ê só͘-chāi hō͘ lâng thâi-sí.’" 
Luke13:34 “ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah, Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ah, lí thâi-sí sian-ti, koh ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm-sí Siōng-tè chhe-lâi lí chia ê sù-chiá. Góa jōa-chōe piàn ài-beh chū-chi̍p lí ê kiáⁿ-jî, chhin-chhiūⁿ koe-bú chū-chi̍p koe-á-kiáⁿ kā in áⁿ tī si̍t-kó͘-ē, lín lóng bô ài." 
Luke13:35 Lín khòaⁿ, lín ê chhù ōe hong-hòe! Góa kā lín kóng, tùi taⁿ í-āu lín choa̍t-tùi khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h góa, ti̍t-kàu lín kóng ‘Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn!’”" 
Luke14:1 Ū chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ khì chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê léng-siù in tau chia̍h-pn̄g. Tāi-ke chù-ì teh kā I khòaⁿ." 
Luke14:2 Hit-sî, tī I ê bīn-chêng ū chi̍t ê kó͘-tiòng-pīⁿ ê lâng." 
Luke14:3 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng kóng, “Tī An-hioh-ji̍t i-pīⁿ ū ha̍p-hoat bô?”" 
Luke14:4 In lóng bô ìn. Iâ-so͘ chiū khan hit-ê lâng lâi, kā i i-hó, hō͘ i tńg,khì." 
Luke14:5 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín tiong-kan kiám ū lâng ka-kī ê kiáⁿ á-sī gû tī An-hioh-ji̍t poa̍h-lo̍h kó͘-chíⁿ, bōe sûi-sî kā i khiú,khí-lâi?”" 
Luke14:6 In tùi Iâ-so͘ só͘ mn̄g ê ōe lóng bōe-hiáu ìn. 
Luke14:7 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng-kheh teh kéng tōa-ūi, chiū ēng chi̍t ê phì-jū kā in kóng:" 
Luke14:8 “Lín hō͘ lâng chhiáⁿ-khì hù hun-iàn ê sî, m̄-thang chē tōa-ūi, kiaⁿ-liáu ū pí lí khah chun-kùi ê lâng-kheh mā lâi hō͘ i chhiáⁿ." 
Luke14:9 Hit-sî, chhiáⁿ i kap lí hit-ê chú-lâng ōe lâi kā lí kóng, ‘Chhiáⁿ niū-ūi hō͘ chit-ê lâng-kheh.’ Hit-chūn, lí ōe kám-kak chin pháiⁿ-sè, soah tio̍h khì chē siōng-sòe ê ūi." 
Luke14:10 Lí hō͘ lâng chhiáⁿ ê sî, lêng-khó khì chē siōng-sòe ê ūi. Án-ni, chhiáⁿ lí ê chú-lâng ōe lâi kā lí kóng, ‘Pêng-iú, chhiáⁿ lâi chē tōa-ūi.’ Hit-chūn, lí tī kâng-toh ê lâng-kheh bīn-chêng chiū ū thé-biān." 
Luke14:11 In-ūi thê-ko ka-kī,ê, ōe siū kàng-kē; m̄-kú khut-kē ka-kī,ê, ōe siū thê-ko.”" 
Luke14:12 Jiân-āu, Iâ-so͘ mā kā chhiáⁿ I ê chú-lâng kóng, “Lí chhiáⁿ lâng chia̍h tiong-tàu-tǹg á-sī àm-tǹg ê sî, m̄-thang chhiáⁿ lí ê pêng-iú, hiaⁿ-tī, chhin-cho̍k, hó-gia̍h ê chhù-piⁿ, chiah bián in kā lí chhiáⁿ tò-tńg, lí soah siū pò-tap." 
Luke14:13 Lí chhiáⁿ lâng-kheh ê sî, lêng-khó chhiáⁿ sàn-chhiah-lâng, hêng-tōng bô hong-piān ê lâng, kha-pái ê lâng, sit-bêng ê lâng." 
Luke14:14 Án-ni, lí it-tēng ōe siū chiok-hok, in-ūi in bōe-tàng kā lí pò-tap. Tī gī-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sî, Siōng-tè ōe kā lí pò-tap.”" 
Luke14:15 Kâng-toh ū chi̍t ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Ōe-tàng tī Siōng-tè-kok lim-chia̍h ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!”" 
Luke14:16 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng pān tōa iàn-se̍k, chhiáⁿ chin chōe lâng-kheh." 
Luke14:17 Beh khui-toh ê sî, i chhe po̍k-jîn khì kā siū chhiáⁿ ê lâng-kheh kóng, ‘Chhiáⁿ lín lâi; ta̍k-hāng lóng chún-pī hó-sè lah.’" 
Luke14:18 M̄-kú in chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê the-sî. Thâu chi̍t ê kā i kóng, ‘Góa ū bóe chi̍t tè tōe, tio̍h khì khòaⁿ-bāi leh. Chhiáⁿ lí liōng-kái.’" 
Luke14:19 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê kóng, ‘Góa ū bóe gō͘ tùi gû, tio̍h khì chhì-ēng khòaⁿ-bāi leh. Chhiáⁿ lí liōng-kái.’" 
Luke14:20 Koh chi̍t ê kóng, ‘Góa tú chhōa-bó͘, só͘-í bōe-tàng khì.’" 
Luke14:21 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn tńg-lâi kā chú-lâng pò-kò chiah-ê tāi-chì. Hit-ke ê chú-lâng chiū siū-khì, kā po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Kóaⁿ-kín chhut-khì siâⁿ-lāi koe-thâu-hāng-bé, chhōa hiah-ê sàn-chhiah-lâng, hêng-tōng put-piān ê lâng, sit-bêng ê lâng, kha-pái ê lâng lâi.’" 
Luke14:22 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Chú-lâng, lí só͘ hoan-hù,ê góa í-keng lóng ū chòe, m̄-kú iáu ū khang-ūi.’" 
Luke14:23 Chú-lâng chiū kā po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Chhut-khì tōa-lō͘ kap lî-pa piⁿ kiông-pek lâng ji̍p,lâi, thang hō͘ góa ê chhù chē móa." 
Luke14:24 Góa kā lín kóng, tāi-seng chhiáⁿ hiah-ê lâng, bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng chia̍h góa ê iàn-se̍k.’”" 
Luke14:25 Chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-tīn kiâⁿ-lō͘, Iâ-so͘ oa̍t kè-lâi kā in kóng," 
Luke14:26 “Tè góa ê lâng nā thiàⁿ ka-kī ê pē-bú, bó͘-kiáⁿ, hiaⁿ-tī, chí-bē, sīm-chì ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā iâⁿ-kè thiàⁿ góa, bōe-tàng chòe góa ê bûn-tô͘." 
Luke14:27 Bô giâ ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè lâi tè góa,ê bōe-tàng chòe góa ê bûn-tô͘. 
Luke14:28 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng siūⁿ-beh khí chi̍t ê thah, kiám bô tāi-seng chē lo̍h-lâi kó͘-kè khòaⁿ ū-kàu chîⁿ thang oân-sêng kang-thêng á bô?" 
Luke14:29 Nā bô án-ni chòe, i phah tōe-ki liáu-āu soah bōe-tàng oân-sêng kang-thêng, só͘-ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng ōe kā i thí-chhiò," 
Luke14:30 kóng, ‘Chit-ê lâng ū khai-sí khí, soah bōe-tàng oân-sêng!’" 
Luke14:31 Á-sī, ū chi̍t ê kok-ông beh khì kap pa̍t-ê kok-ông kau-chiàn, i kiám bōe seng chē,lo̍h-lâi, siūⁿ-khòaⁿ i ōe-tàng ēng chi̍t-bān ê peng tí-khòng ū nn̄g-bān ê peng ê kok-ông á bōe?" 
Luke14:32 Nā chai-iáⁿ bōe, i ōe thàn hit-ê kok-ông iáu tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê sî, chhe sù-chiá khì kap i kóng-hô." 
Luke14:33 Kâng-khoán, lín tiong-kan bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, nā bô pàng-sak ka-kī só͘ ū ê it-chhè, bōe-tàng chòe góa ê bûn-tô͘.”" 
Luke14:34 “Iâm chin ū lō͘-ēng, m̄-kú nā sit-bī, beh án-chóaⁿ hō͘ i koh kiâm?" 
Luke14:35 Sit-bī ê iâm bōe-tàng lo̍h-chhân, mā bōe-tàng kauh-pûi, chí-ū hìⁿ-sak. Ū hī-khang thang thiaⁿ,ê, tio̍h thiaⁿ!”" 
Luke15:1 Ū chi̍t piàn, chin chōe ba̍uh-sè,ê kap chōe-jîn óa-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia beh thiaⁿ I káng-tō." 
Luke15:2 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su nga̍uh-nga̍uh-liām, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng chiap-la̍p chōe-jîn, kap in chia̍h-pn̄g!”" 
Luke15:3 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng chit-ê phì-jū: 
Luke15:4 “Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ū chi̍t-pah chiah iûⁿ phah-m̄-kìⁿ chi̍t chiah, i kiám bōe pàng hit káu-cha̍p-káu chiah tī khòng-iá, khì chhē phah-m̄-kìⁿ hit-chiah, chhē kàu tio̍h?" 
Luke15:5 Chi̍t-ē chhē,tio̍h, i chiū chin hoaⁿ-hí, chiong hit-chiah iûⁿ phāiⁿ tī keng-thâu." 
Luke15:6 I tńg-lâi kàu chhù, kiò pêng-iú kap chhù-piⁿ lâi, kā in kóng, ‘Lâi tàu hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi phah-m̄-kìⁿ hit-chiah iûⁿ í-keng chhē,tio̍h.’" 
Luke15:7 Góa kā lín kóng, chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, ūi-tio̍h ū chi̍t ê hóe-kái ê chōe-jîn, pí ū káu-cha̍p-káu ê m̄-bián hóe-kái ê gī-lâng, tī thiⁿ-téng ê hoaⁿ-hí ōe koh-khah tōa.”" 
Luke15:8 “Á-sī, ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng ū cha̍p ê gûn-oân, phah-m̄-kìⁿ chi̍t ê, kiám bōe tiám-teng, sàu chhù-lāi, phah-piàⁿ chhē, chhē kàu tio̍h?" 
Luke15:9 I chi̍t-ē chhē,tio̍h, chiū kiò pêng-iú kap chhù-piⁿ lâi, kā in kóng, ‘Lâi tàu hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi phah-m̄-kìⁿ hit-ê gûn-oân í-keng chhē,tio̍h.’" 
Luke15:10 Góa kā lín kóng, chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài ōe ūi-tio̍h chi̍t ê chōe-jîn hóe-kái lâi hoaⁿ-hí.”" 
Luke15:11 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ;" 
Luke15:12 sòe-hàn,ê kā lāu-pē kóng, ‘A-pa, góa eng-kai tit ê châi-sán, chhiáⁿ lí pun hō͘ góa.’ Lāu-pē chiū chiong châi-sán pun hō͘ in nn̄g ê." 
Luke15:13 Kè bô kúi ji̍t, sòe-hàn kiáⁿ chiong só͘ tit,tio̍h choân-pō͘ ê châi-sán lóng ōaⁿ chòe hiān-kim, jiân-āu chhut-gōa khì chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi, tī hia hòng-tōng, chîⁿ o͘-pe̍h khai." 
Luke15:14 I só͘ ū,ê lóng khai-liáu-liáu ê sî, tú-hó hit só͘-chāi hoat-seng tōa ki-hng, i chiah chai khiàm-kheh ê kan-khó͘." 
Luke15:15 I chiū khì hō͘ hit só͘-chāi ê chi̍t ê lâng chhiàⁿ. Hit-ê lâng kiò i khì hn̂g,ni̍h chhī ti. 
Luke15:16 I iau kah siūⁿ-beh the̍h ti teh chia̍h ê tāu-ngoeh chí-ki, m̄-kú liân che lâng mā bô hō͘ i." 
Luke15:17 “Āu-lâi, i kak-chhíⁿ, kóng, ‘Goán lāu-pē ū hiah-ni̍h chōe chhiàⁿ-kang, in lóng ū mi̍h thang chia̍h, koh chia̍h kàu ū-chhun, m̄-kú góa tī chia teh-beh gō-sí." 
Luke15:18 Góa beh khí,lâi, tńg-khì góa ê lāu-pē hia, kā i kóng: A-pa, góa ū tek-chōe Thiⁿ, mā ū tek-chōe lí," 
Luke15:19 í-keng bô chu-keh chòe lí ê kiáⁿ. Chhiáⁿ hō͘ góa chòe lí ê chhiàⁿ-kang chiū hó.’ 
Luke15:20 I chiū chhut-hoat tńg-khì lāu-pē hia. “I lī in tau iáu chin hn̄g, lāu-pē chiū khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, sim chin m̄-kam, kóaⁿ-kín cháu óa-khì kā i lám,teh, ti̍t-ti̍t kā i chim." 
Luke15:21 Kiáⁿ chiū tùi lāu-pē kóng, ‘A-pa, góa ū tek-chōe Thiⁿ, mā ū tek-chōe lí. Góa í-keng bô chu-keh chòe lí ê kiáⁿ.’" 
Luke15:22 M̄-kú, lāu-pē kā po̍k-jîn kóng, ‘Kóaⁿ-kín hiahⁿ siōng-hó ê gōa-phàu lâi kā i chhēng, kā i kòa chhiú-chí, koh kā i chhēng-ôe," 
Luke15:23 sòa khan hit-chiah pûi ê gû-á-kiáⁿ lâi thâi, lâi khèng-chiok." 
Luke15:24 In-ūi góa chit-ê kiáⁿ sī sí,khì ū koh-oa̍h, sit-lo̍h ū koh tit,tio̍h.’ In chiū khai-sí khèng-chiok." 
Luke15:25 “Hit-sî, tōa-kiáⁿ tī hn̂g,ni̍h. I tńg,lâi, teh-beh kàu chhù ê sî thiaⁿ-tio̍h chàu-ga̍k kap thiàu-bú ê siaⁿ." 
Luke15:26 I kiò chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn lâi, mn̄g-khòaⁿ tàu-tóe sī sím-mi̍h tāi-chì." 
Luke15:27 Hit-ê po̍k-jîn kā i kóng, ‘Lín sió-tī tńg,lâi; lín lāu-pē in-ūi i pêng-an bô-sū tò,lâi, chiū thâi hit-chiah pûi ê gû-á-kiáⁿ.’" 
Luke15:28 Tōa-kiáⁿ hui-siông siū-khì, m̄ ji̍p,khì. I ê lāu-pē chhut-lâi kā i khó͘-khǹg." 
Luke15:29 M̄-kú i ìn lāu-pē kóng, ‘Lí siūⁿ-khòaⁿ leh, góa choh lô͘-châi ho̍k-sāi lí chiah chōe nî, m̄-bat ûi-pōe lí ê bēng-lēng, lí liân chi̍t chiah soaⁿ-iûⁿ-á to m̄-bat hō͘ góa kap pêng-iú chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí!" 
Luke15:30 M̄-kú, lí chit-ê kiáⁿ ūi-tio̍h chhiong-ki kā lí ê châi-sán khai-liáu-liáu, i chi̍t-ē tńg,lâi, lí chiū ūi-tio̍h i thâi hit-chiah pûi ê gû-á-kiáⁿ.’" 
Luke15:31 I ê lāu-pē ìn kóng, ‘Kiáⁿ ah, lí put-sî to kap góa chòe-hé, góa só͘-ū,ê lóng sī lí ê." 
Luke15:32 Chóng-sī lí chit-ê sió-tī, i sī sí,khì ū koh-oa̍h, sit-lo̍h ū koh tit,tio̍h, lán eng-kai hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí lâi khèng-chiok.’”" 
Luke16:1 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng chin hó-gia̍h, i ū chi̍t ê koán-ke; ū lâng tùi chú-lâng kiám-kú chit-ê koán-ke lōng-hùi i ê châi-sán." 
Luke16:2 Chú-lâng kiò i lâi, kā i mn̄g, ‘Góa ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí chit-ê tāi-chì, tàu-tóe sī án-chóaⁿ? Lí só͘ koán-lí ê siàu-phō͘ kau,chhut-lâi, m̄ hō͘ lí koh choh koán-ke.’" 
Luke16:3 Hit-ê koán-ke ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng, ‘Chú-lâng beh kā góa sî thâu-lō͘, m̄ hō͘ góa koh choh koán-ke, taⁿ góa beh án-chóaⁿ? Gia̍h tî-thâu bô khùi-la̍t, choh khit-chia̍h koh kiaⁿ kiàn-siàu." 
Luke16:4 Taⁿ, góa chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ chòe, bô choh koán-ke í-āu chiah ū pêng-iú thang kā góa siu-liû.’" 
Luke16:5 “Koán-ke chiū chiong chú-lâng ê chè-bū-jîn chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê kiò,lâi, kā thâu chi̍t ê kóng, ‘Lí khiàm goán chú-lâng jōa-chōe?’" 
Luke16:6 I ìn kóng, ‘Chi̍t-pah tháng kaⁿ-ná-iû.’ Koán-ke kā i kóng, ‘Lí ê chioh-tiâu tī chia, kóaⁿ-kín chē,lo̍h-lâi, kā kái-chòe gō͘-cha̍p.’" 
Luke16:7 Koán-ke koh kā lēng-gōa chi̍t ê kóng, ‘Lí khiàm jōa-chōe?’ I ìn kóng, ‘Chi̍t-pah chio̍h be̍h-á.’ Koán-ke kā i kóng, ‘Lí ê chioh-tiâu tī chia, kā kái-chòe poeh-cha̍p.’" 
Luke16:8 “Chú-lâng po-chióng chit-ê bô láu-si̍t ê koán-ke chòe-liáu chin khiáu, in-ūi sio̍k sè-kan ê lâng chhú-lí sè-sū pí sio̍k kng-bêng ê lâng khah ū piàn-khiàu.”" 
Luke16:9 Iâ-so͘ kè-sio̍k kóng, “Góa kā lín kóng: Tio̍h ēng put-gī ê chîⁿ-châi ūi-tio̍h ka-kī kiat-kau pêng-iú, án-ni chîⁿ-châi bô,khì ê sî, in ōe chiap-la̍p lín ji̍p-khì éng-oán khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi." 
Luke16:10 Tùi chin sòe-hāng tāi-chì tiong-si̍t ê lâng, tùi tōa-hāng tāi-chì mā ōe tiong-si̍t; tùi chin sòe-hāng tāi-chì bô láu-si̍t ê lâng, tùi tōa-hāng tāi-chì mā bōe láu-si̍t." 
Luke16:11 Só͘-í, lín tùi put-gī ê chîⁿ-châi nā bô láu-si̍t, siáⁿ-lâng beh chiong chin-chiàⁿ ê châi-pó kau-tài lín?" 
Luke16:12 Lín tùi pa̍t-lâng ê mi̍h nā bô láu-si̍t, siáⁿ-lâng beh chiong lín ê mi̍h hō͘ lín?" 
Luke16:13 “Bô chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn ōe-tàng ho̍k-sāi nn̄g ê chú-lâng; i nā m̄-sī oàn-hūn chit-ê, thiàⁿ hit-ê, chiū-sī khòaⁿ-tāng chit-ê, khòaⁿ-khin hit-ê. Lín bōe-tàng siâng-sî ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè koh ho̍k-sāi chîⁿ-châi.”" 
Luke16:14 Hiah-ê tham-châi ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe chiū kā I thí-chhiò. 
Luke16:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín chiah-ê lâng tī lâng ê bīn-chêng chū-chheng chòe gī, m̄-kú Siōng-tè chai lín ê lāi-sim, in-ūi lâng khòaⁿ-chòe chun-kùi,ê, tùi Siōng-tè lâi khòaⁿ sī thang iàm-ò͘ⁿ,ê." 
Luke16:16 “ Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê kà-sī kàu Si-sóe-chiá Iok-hān kiat-sok. Tùi hit-sî khí, Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im chiū thoân,chhut-khì, lâng-lâng lóng ngī-beh chiⁿ,ji̍p-khì." 
Luke16:17 M̄-kú thiⁿ-tōe siau-sit pí hòe-tû Lu̍t-hoat ê chi̍t-u̍ih koh-khah kán-tan. 
Luke16:18 “Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, lî i ê bó͘ khì chhōa pa̍t-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī hoān kan-îm; chhōa hō͘ lâng lî-hun ê hū-jîn-lâng mā-sī hoān kan-îm.”" 
Luke16:19 “Ū chi̍t ê lâng chin hó-gia̍h, i chhēng chí-sek chin ko-kùi ê i-ho̍k, ta̍k-ji̍t chhia-hoa iàn-lo̍k." 
Luke16:20 Koh ū chi̍t ê khit-chia̍h, miâ kiò-chòe Lia̍p-sat-lō͘, kui seng-khu siⁿ-chhng, tó tī hit-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng ê mn̂g-kháu," 
Luke16:21 beh khioh hó-gia̍h-lâng toh-téng lak,lo̍h-lâi ê sap-á chí-ki; káu mā lâi chī i ê chhng. 
Luke16:22 “Āu-lâi, chit-ê khit-chia̍h sí,khì, thiⁿ-sài kā i chhōa-khì A-pek-la-hán ê seng-khu piⁿ. Hit-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng mā sí,khì, koh bâi-chòng." 
Luke16:23 I tī Im-hú siū chin tōa ê thòng-khó͘, gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ, khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-pek-la-hán tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi, Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ tī i ê seng-khu piⁿ." 
Luke16:24 I chiū chhut-siaⁿ kiò, ‘Góa ê chó͘ A-pek-la-hán, lîn-bín góa! Chhiáⁿ lí chhe Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ ēng chńg-thâu-á-bé ùn chúi lâi hō͘ góa ê chhùi-chi̍h liâng,chi̍t-ē, in-ūi góa tī chit-ê hé-iām tiong teh siū khó͘-chhó͘.’" 
Luke16:25 “M̄-kú A-pek-la-hán kóng, ‘Kiáⁿ ah, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit lí chāi-siⁿ hióng-siū it-chhè ê khoài-lo̍k, m̄-kú Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ chāi-siⁿ siū-chīn thòng-khó͘, I hiān-chāi tī chia tit-tio̍h an-ùi, lí tī hia teh siū khó͘-chhó͘." 
Luke16:26 M̄-nā án-ni, goán kap lín ê tiong-kan ū tōa chhim-ian keh-khui, án-ni tùi chia bô lâng ōe-tàng kè-khì lín hia, mā bô lâng ōe-tàng tùi lín hia kè-lâi goán chia.’" 
Luke16:27 Hit-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng chiū kóng, ‘Góa ê chó͘ ah, kì-jiân sī án-ni, góa khún-kiû lí chhe Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ khì goán lāu-pē ê chhù;" 
Luke16:28 góa ū gō͘ ê hiaⁿ-tī tī hia, i thang khì kā in kéng-kò, chiah bián in mā lâi kàu chit-ê hui-siông thòng-khó͘ ê só͘-chāi.’" 
Luke16:29 “M̄-kú A-pek-la-hán ìn kóng, ‘Lí ê hiaⁿ-tī ū Mô͘-se kap sian-ti, in eng-kai khì thiaⁿ in ê ōe.’" 
Luke16:30 Hit-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng ìn kóng, ‘Góa ê chó͘ A-pek-la-hán, in bōe lah. Nā ū lâng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h khì chhē in, in chiū ōe hóe-kái.’" 
Luke16:31 A-pek-la-hán kā i kóng, ‘In nā m̄ thiaⁿ Mô͘-se kap sian-ti ê ōe, ū lâng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, in mā bōe siong-sìn.’”" 
Luke17:1 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Ín-khí lâng hoān-chōe ê sū it-tēng ū, put-kò chō-sêng chit-ê sū ê lâng chhám ah!" 
Luke17:2 Lêng-khó ēng tōa chio̍h-bō kā i tiàu tī ām-kún hiat-lo̍h hái, mā m̄-thang hō͘ bî-sòe ê chi̍t ê poa̍h-tó hoān-chōe." 
Luke17:3 Lín ka-kī mā tio̍h kín-sīn! “Lí ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē nā hoān-chōe, tio̍h kā i chek-pī, i nā hóe-kái, tio̍h kā i sià-bián." 
Luke17:4 Nā ū lâng chi̍t ji̍t tek-chōe lí chhit piàn, chhit piàn lóng oa̍t tò-tńg lâi kā lí kóng ‘Góa hóe-kái lah’, lí mā lóng tio̍h kā i sià-bián.”" 
Luke17:5 Sù-tô͘ tùi Chú kóng, “Kiû lí ke-thiⁿ goán ê sìn-sim!”" 
Luke17:6 Chú kóng, “Lín nā ū chhin-chhiūⁿ kòa-chhài-chí hiah tōa ê sìn-sim, kā chit-châng sng-châi-chhiū kóng ‘Liân kun pu̍ih,khí-lâi, khì chai tī hái,ni̍h’, hit-châng chhiū mā ōe ho̍k-chiông lín." 
Luke17:7 “Lín tiong-kan kiám ū sím-mi̍h-lâng, i ê po̍k-jîn khì choh-hn̂g á-sī chhī iûⁿ, tùi hn̂g,ni̍h tńg,lâi ê sî, ōe kā po̍k-jîn kóng ‘Kóaⁿ-kín chē lo̍h-lâi chia̍h-pn̄g’?" 
Luke17:8 I kiám bōe kā i kóng ‘Kā góa chún-pī àm-tǹg; hâ ûi-kûn lâi sū-hāu góa chia̍h-pn̄g, āu-lâi lí chiah chia̍h chiah lim’?" 
Luke17:9 Po̍k-jîn chòe chú-lâng só͘ hoan-hù ê tāi-chì, chú-lâng kiám tio̍h kā i soeh-siā?" 
Luke17:10 Lín mā-sī án-ni, lín chòe siū kau-tài ê tāi-chì liáu-āu, tio̍h kóng ‘Goán sī bô lō͘-ēng ê po̍k-jîn, goán put-kò chīn pún-hūn chòe nā-tiāⁿ’.”" 
Luke17:11 Iâ-so͘ khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lō͘-tiong, keng-kè Sat-má-lī-a kap Ka-lī-lī ê kau-kài." 
Luke17:12 I ji̍p-khì chi̍t ê chng-siā ê sî tú-tio̍h cha̍p ê bâ-hong pīⁿ-lâng. In khiā tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi," 
Luke17:13 tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Iâ-so͘ lāu-su ah, lîn-bín goán!”" 
Luke17:14 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kā in kóng, “Lín khì hō͘ chè-si kiám-cha!” In tī lō͘-tiong, chiū tit-tio̍h chheng-khì." 
Luke17:15 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê khòaⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī ê pīⁿ í-keng hó, chiū tò-tńg-lâi tōa-siaⁿ o-ló Siōng-tè," 
Luke17:16 phak tī Iâ-so͘ ê kha-chêng, kā I kám-siā. Chit-ê sī Sat-má-lī-a -lâng." 
Luke17:17 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g kóng, “Kiám m̄-sī ū cha̍p ê lâng tit-tio̍h i-hó? Iáu hit káu ê tī tó-ūi?" 
Luke17:18 Chit-ê gōa-cho̍k ê lâng í-gōa kiám bô lâng tńg-lâi kám-siā Siōng-tè?” 
Luke17:19 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā hit-ê lâng kóng, “Khí,lâi, tńg,khì. Lí ê sìn-sim ū kiù lí.”" 
Luke17:20 Ū chi̍t piàn, chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng mn̄g Iâ-so͘, Siōng-tè-kok sím-mi̍h sî ōe lâi-lîm. Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Siōng-tè-kok ê lâi-lîm m̄-sī lâng khòaⁿ ōe chhut,lâi," 
Luke17:21 mā bô lâng ōe-tàng kóng ‘Lí khòaⁿ, tī hia’, á-sī kóng ‘Lí khòaⁿ, tī chia’, in-ūi Siōng-tè-kok sī tī lín tiong-kan.”" 
Luke17:22 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, lín siūⁿ-beh khòaⁿ Jîn-chú lâi-lîm ê ji̍t-chí, liân chi̍t ji̍t mā khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h." 
Luke17:23 Ū lâng ōe kā lín kóng ‘Lí khòaⁿ, tī hia’, á-sī kóng ‘Lí khòaⁿ, tī chia’. M̄-thang chhut,khì, mā m̄-thang tè in khì." 
Luke17:24 Sih-nà tùi thiⁿ chit-pêng sih, chiò kàu thiⁿ hit-pêng, Jîn-chú tī hit-ji̍t mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni lâi-lîm." 
Luke17:25 Put-kò, I it-tēng tio̍h seng siū chin chōe khó͘-lān, koh hō͘ chit sè-tāi ê lâng kū-choa̍t." 
Luke17:26 Jîn-chú lâi-lîm ê ji̍t-chí ōe kap Ná-a ê sî kâng-khoán; 
Luke17:27 hit-sî lâng chiàu-siông lim-chia̍h kè-chhōa, it-ti̍t kàu Ná-a ji̍p-khì tōa-chûn hit-ji̍t. Tōa-chúi kàu, kā in lóng siau-bia̍t." 
Luke17:28 Hit-ji̍t mā kap Lô-tek ê ji̍t-chí kâng-khoán, lâng chiàu-siông lim-chia̍h, bóe-bōe, chèng-choh, khí-chhù," 
Luke17:29 m̄-kú Lô-tek tùi Só͘-to-má chhut,khì hit-ji̍t, tùi thiⁿ ū lo̍h hé kap liû-hông, kā in lóng siau-bia̍t." 
Luke17:30 Jîn-chú hián-hiān ê ji̍t mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni. 
Luke17:31 “Hit-ji̍t, tī chhù-téng,ê, m̄-thang lo̍h-lâi the̍h chhù-lāi ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ; tī hn̂g,ni̍h-ê, mā m̄-thang tò-tńg,khì." 
Luke17:32 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Lô-tek ê bó͘ só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì! 
Luke17:33 Só͘-ū siūⁿ-beh pó-chûn ka-kī sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; só͘-ū sòng-sit ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā." 
Luke17:34 Góa kā lín kóng, tī hit-àm, ū nn̄g ê lâng khùn kâng chi̍t téng bîn-chhn̂g, chi̍t ê ōe siū chhōa,khì, lēng-gōa chi̍t ê ōe lâu,teh." 
Luke17:35 Ū nn̄g ê hū-jîn-lâng chòe-hé teh oe chio̍h-bō, chi̍t ê siū chhōa,khì, chi̍t ê lâu,teh." 
Luke17:36 Ū nn̄g ê lâng tī hn̂g,ni̍h, chi̍t ê siū chiap,khì, chi̍t ê lâu,teh.”" 
Luke17:37 Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, ōe tī tó-ūi hoat-seng?” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Si-thé tī tó-ūi, thuh-thâu-eng lóng ōe khîⁿ óa-khì hia.”" 
Luke18:1 Iâ-so͘ koh tùi bûn-tô͘ kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū, kà-sī in tio̍h siông-siông kî-tó, m̄-thang hoe-sim." 
Luke18:2 I kóng, “Bó͘ chi̍t ê siâⁿ ū chi̍t ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ, i bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè, mā bô chun-tiōng lâng." 
Luke18:3 Tī hit-ê siâⁿ ū chi̍t ê kóaⁿ-hū it-ti̍t lâi chhē i, kóng, ‘Góa ū chi̍t ê sò͘-siōng ê tùi-thâu, chhiáⁿ lí thòe góa chú-chhî kong-tō.’" 
Luke18:4 Chit-ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ chin kú lóng m̄ tah-èng, āu-lâi i ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng, ‘Góa sui-jiân m̄ kiaⁿ Siōng-tè, mā bô chun-tiōng lâng," 
Luke18:5 m̄-kú in-ūi chit-ê kóaⁿ-hū it-ti̍t lâi kā góa chhá, góa beh thòe i chú-chhî kong-tō, chiah bián i it-ti̍t lâi kô-kô-tîⁿ.’”" 
Luke18:6 Chú koh kóng, “Lín tio̍h thiaⁿ chit-ê put-gī ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ só͘ kóng ê ōe!" 
Luke18:7 Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê lâng mî-ji̍t tùi I ai-kiû, I kiám bōe thòe in chú-chhî kong-tō? I kiám ōe thoa-iân chin kú?" 
Luke18:8 Góa kā lín kóng, I chin kín chiū ōe thòe in chú-chhî kong-tō. Chóng-sī, Jîn-chú lâi-lîm ê sî, I tī tōe-chiūⁿ kiám ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-khoán ê sìn-sim?”" 
Luke18:9 Iâ-so͘ tùi hiah-ê khòaⁿ ka-kī chòe gī-lâng koh khòaⁿ-khin pa̍t-lâng ê lâng ū kóng chit-ê phì-jū: 
Luke18:10 “Ū nn̄g ê lâng chiūⁿ Sèng-tiān kî-tó; chi̍t ê sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng, lēng-gōa chi̍t ê sī ba̍uh-sè,ê." 
Luke18:11 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng khiā-thêng-thêng ka-kī kî-tó kóng, ‘Siōng-tè ah, góa kám-siā lí, in-ūi góa bô chhin-chhiūⁿ kî-tha ê lâng khióng-hat chhú-châi, put-gī, îm-loān, mā bô chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-ê ba̍uh-sè,ê." 
Luke18:12 Góa chi̍t lé-pài kìm-chia̍h nn̄g piàn, koh hōng-hiàn choân-pō͘ siu-ji̍p ê cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t.’" 
Luke18:13 M̄-kú hit-ê ba̍uh-sè,ê khiā tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi, liân gia̍h-thâu khí-lâi khòaⁿ thiⁿ to m̄-káⁿ, chí-ū tûi-heng kóng, ‘Siōng-tè ah, lîn-bín góa chit-ê ū-chōe ê lâng!’" 
Luke18:14 Góa kā lín kóng, chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián tńg-khì in tau,ê sī chit-ê lâng, m̄-sī hit-ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng; in-ūi thê-ko ka-kī,ê, ōe siū kàng-kē; khut-kē ka-kī,ê, ōe siū thê-ko.”" 
Luke18:15 Ū lâng liân eⁿ-á mā phō-lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, beh hō͘ I hōaⁿ-chhiú chiok-hok; bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kā in chek-pī." 
Luke18:16 M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ kiò in lâi, kóng, “Hō͘ gín-á lâi góa chia, m̄-thang kā in chó͘-tòng, in-ūi Siōng-tè-kok sī chit-khoán lâng ê." 
Luke18:17 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lâng nā bô chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á án-ni chiap-siū Siōng-tè-kok, choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng ji̍p,khì.”" 
Luke18:18 Ū chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-tō-chiá lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Hó ê lāu-su, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h chiah ōe-tàng sêng-siū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā?”" 
Luke18:19 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ná ōe kóng góa sī hó? Siōng-tè í-gōa, bô chi̍t ê sī hó." 
Luke18:20 Chiah-ê kài-bēng lí lóng bat: ‘M̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang choh gūi-chèng; tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú.’” 
Luke18:21 Hit-ê lâng kóng, “Chiah-ê kài-bēng góa tùi sòe-hàn chiū it-ti̍t ū teh chun-siú.”" 
Luke18:22 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe, chiū kā i kóng, “Lí iáu khiàm chi̍t hāng. Khì bōe só͘-ū,ê, tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ lóng pun hō͘ sàn-chhiah-lâng, lí tī thiⁿ-téng chiū ū châi-pó, jiân-āu lâi tè góa.”" 
Luke18:23 Hit-ê lâng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe, chin siong-sim, in-ūi i hui-siông hó-gia̍h." 
Luke18:24 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ hit-ê lâng chiū kóng, “Ū-chîⁿ-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok jōa-á-ni̍h khùn-lân!" 
Luke18:25 Lo̍k-tô chhng-kè chiam-phīⁿ mā pí hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok koh-khah kán-tan!” 
Luke18:26 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe ê lâng mn̄g I kóng, “Nā án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h kiù?”" 
Luke18:27 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lâng chòe bōe kàu,ê, Siōng-tè lóng ōe.”" 
Luke18:28 Pí-tek kóng, “Goán í-keng pàng-sak goán só͘-ū,ê lâi tè lí lah.”" 
Luke18:29 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, lâng nā ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè-kok pàng-sak chhù-the̍h, bó͘, hiaⁿ-tī, pē-bú á-sī kiáⁿ-jî," 
Luke18:30 tī kim-sè it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h koh-khah chōe, tī lâi-sè tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā.”" 
Luke18:31 Iâ-so͘ chhōa cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ khì piⁿ,á, kā in kóng, “Taⁿ lán beh chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, sian-ti só͘ kì-chài koan-hē Jîn-chú ê it-chhè lóng ōe èng-giām." 
Luke18:32 I ōe siū chhut-bōe hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng; in ōe kā I hì-lāng, bú-jio̍k, phùi-nōa." 
Luke18:33 In ōe ēng piⁿ kā I phah, kā I hāi,sí, tē-saⁿ ji̍t I ōe koh-oa̍h.”" 
Luke18:34 M̄-kú sù-tô͘ tùi chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng bô liáu-kái; chiah-ê ōe ê ì-sù ū tùi in khàm,teh, in m̄ chai Iâ-so͘ teh kóng sím-mi̍h." 
Luke18:35 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lī-ko ê sî, ū chi̍t ê bông-jîn chē tī lō͘-piⁿ teh kiû-khit." 
Luke18:36 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h kûn-chiòng tùi hia keng-kè, chiū mn̄g lâng khòaⁿ sī sím-mi̍h tāi-chì." 
Luke18:37 In kā i kóng, “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ teh-beh tùi chia keng-kè.”" 
Luke18:38 I chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘, lîn-bín góa!”" 
Luke18:39 Tī thâu-chêng teh kiâⁿ ê lâng kā i chek-pī, kiò i tiām-tiām, m̄-kú i jú tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Tāi-pi̍t ê Kiáⁿ, lîn-bín góa!”" 
Luke18:40 Iâ-so͘ chiū thêng-kha, kiò lâng chhōa i lâi. I óa,lâi ê sî, Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i kóng:" 
Luke18:41 “Lí ài góa kā lí chòe sím-mi̍h?” I kóng, “Chú ah, góa ài koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ!”" 
Luke18:42 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Hó, hō͘ lí koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ! Lí ê sìn-sim hō͘ lí tit-tio̍h i-hó!”" 
Luke18:43 I sûi-sî koh ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chiū tè Iâ-so͘, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè. Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì, lóng chheng-chàn Siōng-tè." 
Luke19:1 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Iâ-lī-ko, tùi hia teh keng-kè." 
Luke19:2 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Sat-kai; i sī ba̍uh-sè ê thâu-lâng, chin hó-gia̍h." 
Luke19:3 I ài-beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ sī sím-mi̍h khoán lâng, put-kò in-ūi lâng chin chōe, i ê sin-châi koh óe, khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h." 
Luke19:4 I chiū cháu chìn-chêng, peh-chiūⁿ chi̍t châng sng-châi-chhiū beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘, in-ūi Iâ-so͘ teh-beh tùi hia keng-kè." 
Luke19:5 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ kàu hit-ê só͘-chāi, gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ, tùi i kóng, “ Sat-kai, kóaⁿ-kín lo̍h,lâi; kin-á-ji̍t góa it-tēng beh tòa lín tau.”" 
Luke19:6 Sat-kai chiū kóaⁿ-kín lo̍h,lâi, hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí chiap-thāi Iâ-so͘." 
Luke19:7 Chèng-lâng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ,tio̍h, nga̍uh-nga̍uh-liām kóng, “Chit-ê lâng soah ji̍p-khì chōe-jîn ê chhù tòa!”" 
Luke19:8 Sat-kai khiā,teh, tùi Chú kóng, “Chú ah, góa beh the̍h châi-sán ê chi̍t-pòaⁿ chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng. Góa nā ū kā lâng pián-chîⁿ, beh sì pē hêng i.”" 
Luke19:9 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Kin-á-ji̍t chín-kiù í-keng lîm-kàu chit-ê ke, in-ūi i mā-sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun." 
Luke19:10 Jîn-chú lâi sī beh tui-chhē koh chín-kiù sit-lo̍h ê lâng.” 
Luke19:11 Chèng-lâng teh thiaⁿ chiah-ê ōe ê sî, Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng chi̍t ê phì-jū, in-ūi I teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, koh hiah-ê lâng siūⁿ-kóng Siōng-tè-kok liâm-piⁿ ōe si̍t-hiān." 
Luke19:12 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê kùi-cho̍k khì chin hn̄g ê só͘-chāi beh siū hong choh-ông chiah tńg,lâi." 
Luke19:13 I tiàu-chi̍p cha̍p ê po̍k-jîn lâi, hō͘ in cha̍p ê kim-pè, chi̍t lâng chi̍t ê, kā in kóng, ‘Góa tńg,lâi í-chêng, lín ēng chiah-ê kim-pè khì chòe seng-lí.’" 
Luke19:14 Pún-kok ê jîn-bîn oàn-hūn i, chhe chi̍t ê sù-chiá tè i ê āu-bīn khì, tùi hông-tè chàu kóng, ‘Goán bô ài chit-ê lâng chòe goán ê ông.’" 
Luke19:15 “Chit-ê kùi-cho̍k siū hong choh-ông tńg,lâi ê sî, kiò hiah-ê niá-tio̍h chîⁿ ê po̍k-jîn lâi, ài chai in ta̍k-ê lâng thàn jōa-chōe." 
Luke19:16 Thâu chi̍t ê lâi i ê bīn-chêng, kóng, ‘Chú ah, góa ū ēng lí hit-ê kim-pè thàn cha̍p ê.’" 
Luke19:17 Chú-lâng kā i kóng, ‘Chin hó, hó ê po̍k-jîn! Lí kì-jiân tī sió-sū tiong-si̍t, góa beh hō͘ lí ū koân koán-lí cha̍p ê siâⁿ.’" 
Luke19:18 Tē-jī ê lâi, kóng, ‘Chú ah, góa ū ēng lí hit-ê kim-pè thàn gō͘ ê.’" 
Luke19:19 Chú-lâng mā án-ni kā chit-ê lâng kóng, ‘Góa beh hō͘ lí koán-lí gō͘ ê siâⁿ.’" 
Luke19:20 “Koh lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâi, kóng, ‘Chú ah, lí khòaⁿ, lí ê kim-pè tī chia. Góa ēng chhiú-kun kā i pau khí-lâi khǹg." 
Luke19:21 Góa chin kiaⁿ lí, in-ūi lí sī chi̍t ūi giâm-hat ê lâng, bô kià, lí mā beh niá; bô chèng, lí mā beh siu.’" 
Luke19:22 Chú-lâng kā i kóng, ‘Lí chit-ê khó-ò͘ⁿ ê po̍k-jîn, góa beh chiàu lí ka-kī só͘ kóng,ê kā lí tēng-chōe. Lí kì-jiân chai góa sī giâm-hat ê lâng, bô kià mā beh niá, bô chèng mā beh siu," 
Luke19:23 lí ná bô chiong góa ê chîⁿ kià tī gûn-hâng, tán góa tńg,lâi ê sî thang niá bú-chîⁿ kap lī-sek?’" 
Luke19:24 “Chú-lâng chiū kā khiā tī piⁿ,á ê lâng kóng, ‘Kā i ê kim-pè the̍h,lâi, kau hō͘ hit-ê ū cha̍p ê kim-pè,ê!’" 
Luke19:25 In chiū tùi i kóng, ‘Chú ah, i í-keng ū cha̍p ê kim-pè lah.’" 
Luke19:26 Chú-lâng kóng, ‘Góa kā lín kóng, í-keng ū,ê, beh koh-khah chōe hō͘ i; bô,ê, liân i só͘-ū,ê mā beh kā i chhiúⁿ,khí-lâi." 
Luke19:27 M̄-kú hiah-ê tùi-te̍k góa, bô ài góa chòe in ê ông,ê, kā in thoa-lâi chia, tī góa ê bīn-chêng kā in thâi-sí!’”" 
Luke19:28 Kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ chòe-chêng chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Luke19:29 I teh-beh kàu Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ soaⁿ-kha ê Pek-hoat-kî kap Pek-tāi-nî ê sî, chhe nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘," 
Luke19:30 hoan-hù in, kóng, “Lín khì tùi-bīn ê chng-siā, ji̍p,khì ê sî ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah m̄-bat hō͘ lâng khiâ,kè ê lû-á-kiáⁿ pa̍k tī hia. Lín kā i tháu-khui, khan-lâi chia." 
Luke19:31 Nā ū lâng mn̄g, ‘Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ teh tháu lû-á-kiáⁿ?’ Lín tio̍h kóng, ‘Chú beh ēng i.’”" 
Luke19:32 In chiū khì, só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì ta̍k-hāng kap Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng,ê siâng-khoán." 
Luke19:33 In teh tháu hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ ê sî, chú-lâng mn̄g in kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ teh tháu chit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ?”" 
Luke19:34 In ìn kóng, “Chú beh ēng i.”" 
Luke19:35 In chiū khan hit-chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, chiong ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ phoa̍h tī lû-á téng, kā Iâ-so͘ hû-khí-khì khiâ." 
Luke19:36 Iâ-so͘ khiâ lû-á-kiáⁿ chìn-chêng kiâⁿ ê sî, chèng-lâng chiong ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ pho͘ tī lō͘,ni̍h kā I hoan-gêng." 
Luke19:37 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh lo̍h Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ ê só͘-chāi, kui tōa-tīn ê bûn-tô͘ in-ūi khòaⁿ-tio̍h it-chhè kî-biāu ê sū chiū lóng hoaⁿ-hí, tōa-siaⁿ o-ló Siōng-tè kóng:" 
Luke19:38 Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi ê Ông eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Goān thiⁿ-téng ū hô-pêng, êng-kng kui hō͘ chì-koân ê Siōng-tè!" 
Luke19:39 Chèng-lâng tiong-kan, ū kúi-nā ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, tio̍h chek-pī lí ê bûn-tô͘!”" 
Luke19:40 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa kā lín kóng, in nā tiām-tiām, chiah-ê chio̍h-thâu mā ōe tōa-siaⁿ hoah,chhut-lâi.”" 
Luke19:41 Iâ-so͘ teh-beh kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâⁿ, chiū ūi-tio̍h siâⁿ ai-khàu," 
Luke19:42 kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi chin ài lí kin-á-ji̍t chai án-chóaⁿ chiah ōe kiâⁿ ǹg hô-pêng! M̄-kú chit-ê sū hiān-chāi tùi lí khàm,teh, hō͘ lí khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h." 
Luke19:43 In-ūi ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, hit-sî lí ê tùi-te̍k ōe tī lí ê chiu-ûi chō thô͘-tui pau-ûi, tùi sì-bīn kā lí kong-kek." 
Luke19:44 In ōe chiong lí kap lí siâⁿ-lāi ê jîn-bîn choân-pō͘ húi-bia̍t, bô lâu nn̄g tè chio̍h sio-tha̍h, in-ūi lí khòaⁿ bōe chhut Siōng-tè chín-kiù lí ê sî-ki.”" 
Luke19:45 Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, chiū khí-chhiú kóaⁿ hiah-ê bōe mi̍h-kiāⁿ ê lâng chhut,khì." 
Luke19:46 I kā in kóng, “Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa ê chhù eng-kai sī kî-tó ê tiān, lín soah kā i pìⁿ-chòe thó͘-húi-á khut.”" 
Luke19:47 Iâ-so͘ ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng. Chè-si-tiúⁿ, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, kap jîn-bîn ê thâu-lâng it-ti̍t siūⁿ pān-hoat beh hāi-sí Iâ-so͘," 
Luke19:48 m̄-kú chhē bô hoat-tō͘, in-ūi chèng-lâng lóng chin chù-ì teh thiaⁿ I ê ōe." 
Luke20:1 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī lâng koh thoân hok-im. Ū chè-si-tiúⁿ, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, kap tiúⁿ-ló chòe-hé lâi," 
Luke20:2 mn̄g I, “Kā goán kóng, lí khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ lí chit-ê koân-pèng?”" 
Luke20:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa mā beh mn̄g lín chi̍t kù ōe. Lín kā góa ìn." 
Luke20:4 Iok-hān kā lâng sóe-lé ê koân-pèng sī tùi Thiⁿ á-sī tùi lâng lâi,ê?” 
Luke20:5 In hō͘-siōng gī-lūn, “Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi Thiⁿ’, I ōe kóng ‘Án-ni, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ bô sìn Iok-hān?’" 
Luke20:6 Lán nā kóng ‘Tùi lâng’, chèng-lâng ōe ēng chio̍h-thâu kā lán tìm, in-ūi in lóng sìn Iok-hān sī sian-ti.”" 
Luke20:7 Só͘-í in ìn kóng m̄ chai tùi tó-ūi lâi. 
Luke20:8 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Án-ni, góa mā m̄ kā lín kóng góa khò sím-mi̍h koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì.”" 
Luke20:9 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng chi̍t ê phì-jū kā chèng-lâng kóng, “Ū chi̍t ê lâng khai-khún chi̍t khu phû-tô-hn̂g. I chiong chit-khu hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ tiān-lông, āu-lâi chhut-gōa chin kú." 
Luke20:10 Siu-sêng ê sî kàu, i chhe chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn khì tiān-lông hia, beh kā in siu hn̂g,ni̍h ê ké-chí. Tiān-lông kā i phah, hō͘ i khang-chhiú tò,khì." 
Luke20:11 Chú-lâng koh chhe pa̍t-ê po̍k-jîn khì. In mā kā i phah, kā i bú-jio̍k, kóaⁿ i khang-chhiú tò,khì." 
Luke20:12 Chú-lâng chiū chhe tē-saⁿ ê po̍k-jîn khì. In mā kā i siong-hāi, kā i kóaⁿ,chhut-khì." 
Luke20:13 Āu-lâi phû-tô-hn̂g ê chú-lâng kóng, ‘Taⁿ góa tio̍h án-chóaⁿ chòe? Góa beh chhe góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ khì. In tāi-khài ōe kā i chun-tiōng.’" 
Luke20:14 M̄-kú tiān-lông khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, chiū chham-siông kóng, ‘Chit-ê sī i ê kè-sêng-jîn. Lán lâi kā i thâi-sí, án-ni i ê châi-sán chiū pìⁿ-chòe lán ê.’" 
Luke20:15 In chiū kā i hiat chhut-khì phû-tô-hn̂g ê gōa-bīn, kā i thâi-sí. “Án-ni, phû-tô-hn̂g ê chú-lâng ōe án-chóaⁿ kā in chhú-lí?" 
Luke20:16 I ōe lâi châu-bia̍t chiah-ê tiān-lông, chiong phû-tô-hn̂g cho͘ hō͘ pa̍t-lâng.” Chèng-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe, chiū kóng, “Chhian-bān m̄-thang ū chit-khoán tāi-chì!”" 
Luke20:17 Iâ-so͘ chù-ì kā in khòaⁿ, kóng, “Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài,ê sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù: Khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h." 
Luke20:18 Só͘-ū siak lo̍h-khì hit-tè chio̍h-thâu téng ê lâng, ōe siak kah chhùi-kut-hun-si; hō͘ hit-tè chio̍h-thâu teh,tio̍h ê lâng, ōe teh kah chhùi-kô͘-kô͘.”" 
Luke20:19 Hit-sî, keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap chè-si-tiúⁿ chai-iáⁿ Iâ-so͘ kóng chit-ê phì-jū sī teh chí in, chiū siūⁿ-beh tong-tiûⁿ hē-chhiú lia̍h Iâ-so͘, put-kò kiaⁿ chèng-lâng." 
Luke20:20 Só͘-í, in chiū chhē ki-hōe, phài bi̍t-thàm ké-chòe láu-si̍t-lâng, beh lia̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe-phāng, chiong I kau hō͘ chóng-tok thang ēng i ê koân-pèng i-hoat pān-lí." 
Luke20:21 Chiah-ê bi̍t-thàm lâi mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, goán chai lí só͘ kóng só͘ kà-sī,ê lóng chin tio̍h, bô phian-sim, chí-ū tiong-si̍t kà-sī Siōng-tè ê tō-lí." 
Luke20:22 Goán la̍p-sè hō͘ Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ū ha̍h Lu̍t-hoat bô?” 
Luke20:23 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-chhut in ê khúi-kè, chiū tùi in kóng," 
Luke20:24 “The̍h chi̍t ê gûn-pè hō͘ góa khòaⁿ. Che ū sím-mi̍h-lâng ê siōng kap jī-hō?” In ìn kóng, “Khái-sat ê.”" 
Luke20:25 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Án-ni, Khái-sat ê mi̍h hō͘ Khái-sat; Siōng-tè ê mi̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè.”" 
Luke20:26 In tī kong-chiòng bīn-chêng lia̍h bōe tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe-phāng, koh I ê ìn-tap hō͘ in chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, chiū tiām,khì." 
Luke20:27 Ū chi̍t-kóa chú-tiuⁿ bô koh-oa̍h ê Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi Iâ-so͘ hia, mn̄g I kóng," 
Luke20:28 “Lāu-su, Mô͘-se só͘ siá ê Lu̍t-hoat kā goán kóng, ‘Nā ū lâng i ê hiaⁿ sí,khì, bó͘ iáu oa̍h,teh m̄-kú bô kiáⁿ, i choh sió-tī,ê tio̍h chhōa hiaⁿ-só thòe hiaⁿ thoân-chong-chiap-tāi.’" 
Luke20:29 Í-chêng bat ū chhit ê hiaⁿ-tī, siōng-tōa,ê chhōa-bó͘, bô kiáⁿ chiū sí,khì." 
Luke20:30 Tē-jī,ê," 
Luke20:31 tē-saⁿ,ê mā chhōa in hiaⁿ-só. Chhit ê lóng án-ni, bô kiáⁿ chiū sí,khì." 
Luke20:32 Āu-lâi, hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng mā sí,khì." 
Luke20:33 Án-ni, koh-oa̍h ê sî, chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng sī tó chi̍t ê lâng ê bó͘? In-ūi chit chhit ê lóng bat chhōa i chòe bó͘.”" 
Luke20:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Kim-sè ê lâng ū kè ū chhōa;" 
Luke20:35 put-kò ōe-kham-tit tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h koh chìn-ji̍p lâi-sè ê lâng chiū bô kè bô chhōa. 
Luke20:36 In-ūi in sī koh-oa̍h ê lâng, bōe koh sí, kap thiⁿ-sài siâng-khoán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Luke20:37 Koan-hē sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū, Mô͘-se í-keng tī ‘Teh to̍h ê chhì-phè’ hit-tōaⁿ keng-chat ū chí-bêng, mā chheng-ho͘ Chú sī A-pek-la-hán ê Siōng-tè, Í-sat ê Siōng-tè, Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè." 
Luke20:38 I m̄-sī sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè, sī oa̍h-lâng ê Siōng-tè. In-ūi tùi Siōng-tè lâi khòaⁿ, in lóng teh oa̍h.”" 
Luke20:39 Ū kúi-nā ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, lí kóng-liáu chin hó.”" 
Luke20:40 In chiū m̄-káⁿ koh kā I mn̄g sím-mi̍h. 
Luke20:41 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Lâng ná ōe kóng Ki-tok sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi?" 
Luke20:42 Tāi-pi̍t pún-sin tī Si-phian kóng: Chú kā góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng," 
Luke20:43 thèng-hāu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē. 
Luke20:44 Tāi-pi̍t to chheng-ho͘ Ki-tok chòe ‘Chú’, Ki-tok ná ōe sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi?”" 
Luke20:45 Chèng-lâng teh thiaⁿ ê sî, Iâ-so͘ tùi I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng," 
Luke20:46 “Tio̍h tî-hông keng-ha̍k-kàu-su. In ài chhēng tn̂g-saⁿ kiâⁿ-lâi-kiâⁿ-khì, tī chhī-tiûⁿ-kháu hō͘ lâng chhéng-an, tī hōe-tn̂g chē koân-ūi, tī iàn-hōe chē tōa-ūi." 
Luke20:47 In chhim-chiàm kóaⁿ-hū ê ke-hé, thiau-kò͘-ì kî-tó chin tn̂g. In ōe siū koh-khah tāng ê hêng-hoa̍t.”" 
Luke21:1 Iâ-so͘ gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h hó-gia̍h-lâng chiong in ê hiàn-kim hiàn lo̍h-khì hōng-hiàn-kūi. 
Luke21:2 I koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê sàn-chhiah ê kóaⁿ-hū hiàn nn̄g ê tâng-chîⁿ-á lo̍h,khì. 
Luke21:3 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit-ê sàn-chhiah ê kóaⁿ-hū hiàn,ji̍p-khì,ê pí chèng-lâng hiàn,ê koh-khah chōe." 
Luke21:4 In-ūi in lóng sī hiàn in ēng chhun,ê, m̄-kú chit-ê kóaⁿ-hū sui-jiân chin sàn-chhiah, iáu-kú the̍h só͘-ū ê seng-oa̍h-hùi lóng hiàn,lo̍h-khì.”" 
Luke21:5 Ū lâng teh tâm-lūn Sèng-tiān sī ēng hó chio̍h kap hōng-hiàn ê mi̍h lâi chong-sek,ê. Iâ-so͘ kóng," 
Luke21:6 “Ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, lín teh khòaⁿ ê chiah-ê it-chhè lóng ōe siū thiah-húi, thiah kah bô nn̄g tè chio̍h sio-tha̍h.”" 
Luke21:7 Bûn-tô͘ mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lāu-su, chit-ê tāi-chì sím-mi̍h sî ōe hoat-seng? Chit-ê tāi-chì beh hoat-seng ê sî ū sím-mi̍h tiāu-thâu?”" 
Luke21:8 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang siū bê-he̍k. In-ūi ū chin chōe lâng ōe lī-iōng góa ê miâ lâi, kóng ‘Góa chiū-sī Ki-tok’, koh kóng ‘Sî-ki teh-beh kàu lah’. Lín m̄-thang tè in khì." 
Luke21:9 Lín thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiàn-cheng kap pō-loān ê siau-sit, m̄-bián kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ. Chiah-ê tāi-chì it-tēng ōe tāi-seng hoat-seng, m̄-kú chiong-kio̍k bōe sûi-sî kàu.”" 
Luke21:10 Iâ-so͘ kè-sio̍k kā in kóng, “Bîn-cho̍k ōe khí-lâi kong-kek bîn-cho̍k, kok-ka kong-kek kok-ka." 
Luke21:11 Ū tōa tōe-tāng, chin chōe só͘-chāi ū ki-hng kap un-e̍k, koh ū thang-kiaⁿ ê kéng-siōng kap tōa kî-chek tùi thiⁿ-téng chhut-hiān." 
Luke21:12 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng í-chêng, lâng ōe lia̍h lín, pek-hāi lín, kā lín kau hō͘ hōe-tn̂g kap kaⁿ-ga̍k. Lín ōe ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘ hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì kun-ông kap chóng-tok ê bīn-chêng." 
Luke21:13 Chit-ê sī lín chòe kiàn-chèng ê ki-hōe. 
Luke21:14 Só͘-í, lín ê sim tio̍h lia̍h hō͘ tiāⁿ, m̄-bián seng siūⁿ-beh án-chóaⁿ piān-bêng." 
Luke21:15 In-ūi góa beh sù lín kháu-châi kap tì-hūi, hō͘ lín ê tùi-te̍k bô chi̍t ê ōe-tàng tùi-khòng á-sī hoán-pok." 
Luke21:16 Liân lín ê pē-bú, hiaⁿ-tī, chhin-cho̍k, kap pêng-iú mā ōe kā lín chhut-bōe; lín tiong-kan ū lâng ōe hō͘ in hāi-sí." 
Luke21:17 Lín ōe in-ūi góa ê miâ hō͘ chèng-lâng oàn-hūn. 
Luke21:18 Put-kò lín liân chi̍t ki thâu-mn̂g to bōe sit-lo̍h. 
Luke21:19 Tio̍h jím-nāi chiah ōe tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā.” 
Luke21:20 “Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hō͘ kun-tūi pau-ûi ê sî, chiū chai chit-ê siâⁿ teh-beh húi-bia̍t lah." 
Luke21:21 Hit-sî, tī Iû-thài ê lâng tio̍h tô-cháu khì soaⁿ-lāi; tī siâⁿ-lāi,ê tio̍h lī-khui; tī chng-kha,ê m̄-thang ji̍p-siâⁿ." 
Luke21:22 In-ūi che sī Pò-èng ê Ji̍t-chí, sī beh èng-giām Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài ê it-chhè." 
Luke21:23 Tī hiah-ê ji̍t-chí, ū sin-īn,ê kap hō͘ eⁿ-á chia̍h-lin ê hū-jîn-lâng hui-siông put-hēng! In-ūi tōa chai-hō teh-beh lîm-kàu chit-ê tōe; Siōng-tè ê tōa siū-khì teh-beh lîm-kàu chit-ê jîn-bîn." 
Luke21:24 In ōe hō͘ to-kiàm thâi-sí, mā ōe hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì ta̍k-kok. Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ōe hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng thún-ta̍h, ti̍t-kàu Gōa-pang-lâng ê kî-hān móa.”" 
Luke21:25 “Hit-sî, ji̍t, ge̍h, chhiⁿ lóng ōe hián-chhut tiāu-thâu. Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn ōe in-ūi hái-éng hōa-hōa-háu kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ put-an." 
Luke21:26 Lâng ōe in-ūi chit sè-kài teh-beh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì kiaⁿ kah hūn,khì, in-ūi thiⁿ-téng ê kng-thé lóng ōe iô-choah." 
Luke21:27 Hit-sî, lâng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Jîn-chú chhiong-móa koân-lêng kap tōa êng-kng chē-hûn lâi-lîm." 
Luke21:28 Chiah-ê tāi-chì teh-beh hoat-seng ê sî, lín tio̍h gia̍h-thâu théng-sin, in-ūi lín ê chín-kiù teh-beh kàu lah.”" 
Luke21:29 Iâ-so͘ koh ēng phì-jū kā in kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kap it-chhè ê chhiū." 
Luke21:30 Lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê chhiū puh-íⁿ ê sî chiū chai joa̍h-thiⁿ teh-beh kàu. 
Luke21:31 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî chiū chai Siōng-tè ê chú-koân teh-beh si̍t-hiān." 
Luke21:32 Góa si̍t-chāi kā lín kóng, chit sè-tāi iáu-bē kè,khì, chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng ōe hoat-seng." 
Luke21:33 Thiⁿ kap tōe ōe siau-sit, m̄-kú góa ê ōe choa̍t-tùi bōe siau-sit.”" 
Luke21:34 “Lín ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bián in-ūi tham-chia̍h, chiú-chùi, kap seng-oa̍h ê khòa-lū hō͘ lín ê sim bâ-pì, tì-kàu hit-ji̍t chhin-chhiūⁿ lô-bāng hut-jiân lîm-kàu lín, in-ūi hit-ji̍t ōe lîm-kàu tòa tī choân sè-kài ta̍k só͘-chāi ê lâng." 
Luke21:35  
Luke21:36 Tio̍h put-sî kéng-séng, kî-tó, hō͘ lín ū khùi-la̍t thang tô-pī it-chhè teh-beh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, thang khiā tī Jîn-chú ê bīn-chêng.”" 
Luke21:37 Chit kúi ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ ji̍t,sî lóng tī Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng, mî,sî chhut-siâⁿ khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ kè-mî." 
Luke21:38 Chèng-lâng lóng thàu-chá chiū khì Sèng-tiān thiaⁿ Iâ-so͘ kóng tō-lí. 
Luke22:1 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh, iā kiò-chòe Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh, teh-beh kàu." 
Luke22:2 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su in-ūi kiaⁿ bîn-chiòng, só͘-í teh chhē-khòaⁿ ū sím-mi̍h hoat-tō͘ thang hāi-sí Iâ-so͘." 
Luke22:3 Sat-tàn ji̍p-khì hit-ê kiò-chòe Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi ê sim-lāi; i sī cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê. 
Luke22:4 I khì kap chè-si-tiúⁿ í-ki̍p Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ chham-siông, khòaⁿ beh ēng sím-mi̍h hoat-tō͘ chiong Iâ-so͘ chhut-bōe hō͘ in." 
Luke22:5 In chin hoaⁿ-hí, iok beh hō͘ i chîⁿ." 
Luke22:6 Iû-tāi tông-ì, chiū it-ti̍t teh chhē ki-hōe, thang tī kûn-chiòng bô tī in tiong-kan ê sî chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘." 
Luke22:7 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh, chiū-sī tio̍h thâi Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê iûⁿ-ko hit-ji̍t, kàu lah." 
Luke22:8 Iâ-so͘ chhe Pí-tek kap Iok-hān, kā in kóng, “Lín khì chún-pī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan, lán thang chia̍h.”" 
Luke22:9 In kā I mn̄g, “Lí ài goán tī tó-ūi chún-pī?”" 
Luke22:10 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi, ōe tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê the̍h chúi-pân ê ta-po͘-lâng, lín tè i khì i beh ji̍p,khì hit-keng chhù," 
Luke22:11 kā hit-ke ê chú-lâng kóng, ‘Lāu-su teh mn̄g, I kap I ê bûn-tô͘ beh chia̍h Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh boán-chhan ê kheh-thiaⁿ tī tó-ūi?’" 
Luke22:12 Hit-ê lâng ōe pò lín khòaⁿ lâu-téng chi̍t keng khoán hó-sè ê tōa-thiaⁿ. Lín chiū tī hia chún-pī.” 
Luke22:13 In khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h ta̍k-hāng kap Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng,ê lóng siâng-khoán; in chiū tī hia chún-pī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan." 
Luke22:14 Boán-chhan ê sî-kan kàu, Iâ-so͘ chiū chē-toh; sù-tô͘ kap I chòe-hé chē." 
Luke22:15 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa siū-lān í-chêng chin ài kap lín chia̍h chit-ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan." 
Luke22:16 Góa kā lín kóng, chit-ê Boán-chhan tī Siōng-tè-kok oân-choân si̍t-hiān í-chêng, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe koh chia̍h.”" 
Luke22:17 Iâ-so͘ chiong poe chiap,kè-lâi, kám-siā liáu-āu, kóng, “Lín phâng chit-ê poe, pun hō͘ tāi-ke lim." 
Luke22:18 Góa kā lín kóng, tùi hiān-chāi khí ti̍t-kàu Siōng-tè-kok lâi-lîm, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe koh lim chit-ê phû-tô-chiú.”" 
Luke22:19 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ the̍h piáⁿ, kám-siā liáu-āu peh-khui, the̍h hō͘ in, kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa ê seng-khu, sī ūi-tio̍h lín hiàn,ê. Lín tio̍h chòe chit-ê lâi kì-liām góa.”" 
Luke22:20 Chia̍h liáu-āu I koh chiàu án-ni phâng poe, kóng, “Chit-ê poe sī sin ê iok, ēng góa ūi-tio̍h lín lâu-chhut ê huih siat-li̍p,ê." 
Luke22:21 “Lín khòaⁿ! Chhut-bōe góa hit-ê lâng chit-chūn kap góa chòe-hé chhun-chhiú tī toh-téng. 
Luke22:22 In-ūi Jîn-chú ōe chiàu Siōng-tè ê koat-tēng lī-khui sè-kan; m̄-kú chhut-bōe Jîn-chú hit-ê lâng chhám ah!” 
Luke22:23 In chiū mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì, ài chai in tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe chòe chit-ê tāi-chì." 
Luke22:24 Bûn-tô͘ tiong-kan ū khí cheng-lūn, khòaⁿ sím-mi̍h-lâng sǹg siōng tōa." 
Luke22:25 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Gōa-pang-lâng ê kun-ông choh-chú koán-hat jîn-bîn; thóng-tī-chiá hō͘ lâng chheng-chòe un-chú." 
Luke22:26 Chóng-sī lín m̄-sī án-ni. Lín tiong-kan siōng-tōa,ê tian-tò tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe siōng-sòe,ê; choh léng-siù,ê tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe ho̍k-sāi,ê. 
Luke22:27 Án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng khah tōa? Sī chē-toh chia̍h-pn̄g,ê á-sī ho̍k-sāi,ê? Kiám m̄-sī chē-toh,ê? M̄-kú góa tī lín tiong-kan sī hit-ê ho̍k-sāi,ê." 
Luke22:28 “Lín chiah-ê lâng tī góa ê chhì-liān tiong it-ti̍t kap góa chòe-hé. 
Luke22:29 Góa ê Pē chiong ông ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ góa, góa mā án-ni chiong ông ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ lín," 
Luke22:30 hō͘ lín thang tī góa ê Kok-tō͘ kap góa chē-toh, lim-chia̍h, koh chē tī pó-chō sím-phòaⁿ Í-sek-lia̍t ê cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k.”" 
Luke22:31 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “ Se-bûn, Se-bûn, Sat-tàn í-keng tùi Siōng-tè iau-kiû beh chhin-chhiūⁿ pòa be̍h-á án-ni kā lín pòa." 
Luke22:32 Put-kò góa ū ūi-tio̍h lí kî-tó, hō͘ lí bōe sit-khì sìn-sim. Lí hôe-thâu tńg,lâi liáu-āu, tio̍h kian-kò͘ lí ê hiaⁿ-tī ê sìn-sim.”" 
Luke22:33 Pí-tek ìn I kóng, “Chú ah, góa í-keng chún-pī piān-piān beh kap lí chē-kaⁿ, kap lí chòe-hé sí!”" 
Luke22:34 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “ Pí-tek, góa kā lí kóng, kin-á-ji̍t koe thî í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa.”" 
Luke22:35 Iâ-so͘ koh kā bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Í-chêng góa chhe lín chhut,khì, kiò lín chîⁿ-tē, lú-hêng-tē, kap ôe lóng bián tòa, lín kiám ū khiàm sím-mi̍h?” In ìn kóng, “Lóng bô.”" 
Luke22:36 I chiū kā in kóng, “M̄-kú hiān-chāi, ū chîⁿ-tē,ê tio̍h tòa leh; ū lú-hêng-tē,ê mā tio̍h tòa leh; bô to,ê tio̍h bōe ka-kī ê gōa-phàu khì bóe." 
Luke22:37 Góa kā lín kóng, Sèng-keng kì-chài ‘I hō͘ lâng sǹg-chòe put-hoat ê lâng’ chit-kù ōe it-tēng tio̍h tī góa ê sin-chiūⁿ èng-giām. Sèng-keng kì-chài koan-hē góa ê tāi-chì í-keng teh èng-giām lah.”" 
Luke22:38 Bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Chú ah, lí khòaⁿ, chia ū nn̄g ki to.” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Kàu-gia̍h lah!”" 
Luke22:39 Iâ-so͘ chhut,khì, chiàu-siông khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ; bûn-tô͘ tè I khì." 
Luke22:40 Kàu hit-ê só͘-chāi, I kā in kóng, “Tio̍h kî-tó chiah bōe hām-lo̍h chhì-thàm.”" 
Luke22:41 Jiân-āu I lī-khui in kàu hiat chio̍h-thâu ōe kàu hiah-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi, kūi lo̍h-khì kî-tó," 
Luke22:42 kóng, “Pē ah, lí nā khéng, kiû lí chiong chit-ê poe kā góa the̍h-khui! Chóng-sī m̄-thang chiàu góa ê ì-sù, tio̍h chiàu lí ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān.”" 
Luke22:43 Ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ chhut-hiān, lâi chān I ê la̍t." 
Luke22:44 Iâ-so͘ hui-siông thòng-khó͘, jú jia̍t-chhiat kî-tó; I ê kōaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa tiám huih tih-lo̍h tōe." 
Luke22:45 Kî-tó soah, Iâ-so͘ khiā,khí-lâi, tò-khì bûn-tô͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h in in-ūi iu-siong soah khùn,khì." 
Luke22:46 I chiū kā in kóng, “Lín ná teh khùn? Khí-lâi kî-tó chiah bōe hām-lo̍h chhì-thàm.”" 
Luke22:47 Iâ-so͘ iáu-teh kóng ê sî, hut-jiân ū chi̍t tīn lâng lâi; cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê, kiò-chòe Iû-tāi ,ê, chòe-chêng chhōa-lō͘. I kiâⁿ-óa Iâ-so͘, beh kā i chim." 
Luke22:48 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “ Iû-tāi, lí ēng chhùi chim lâi chhut-bōe Jîn-chú o͘h?”" 
Luke22:49 Iâ-so͘ sin-piⁿ ê bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h teh hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, chiū kóng, “Chú ah, goán ēng to kā in thâi hó,bô?”" 
Luke22:50 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê kā tōa-chè-si ê po̍k-jîn phut,lo̍h-khì, kā i chiàⁿ-pêng ê hī-á siah,khí-lâi." 
Luke22:51 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “M̄-thang koh tāng-chhiú!” Iâ-so͘ bong hit-ê po̍k-jîn ê hī-á, kā i i-hó." 
Luke22:52 Iâ-so͘ kā hiah-ê lâi beh lia̍h I ê chè-si-tiúⁿ, Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ, kap tiúⁿ-ló kóng, “Lín gia̍h to gia̍h kùn chhut,lâi, sī teh lia̍h kiông-tō sī,bô?" 
Luke22:53 Góa ta̍k-ji̍t kap lín tī Sèng-tiān, lín bô hē-chhiú kā góa lia̍h. M̄-kú, che sī lín ê sî, o͘-àm teh chiáng-koân lah.”" 
Luke22:54 In lia̍h Iâ-so͘, ah I ji̍p-khì tōa-chè-si ê kong-koán. Pí-tek lī hn̄g-hn̄g teh tè Iâ-so͘." 
Luke22:55 In tī tiâⁿ ê tiong-ng khí hé, ûi tī hé piⁿ chòe-hé teh chē; Pí-tek mā chē tī in tiong-kan." 
Luke22:56 Ū chi̍t ê lú-pī khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek ǹg hé teh chē, kim-kim kā i siòng, kóng, “Chit-ê mā-sī Iâ-so͘ in hit-tīn ê lâng.”" 
Luke22:57 Pí-tek m̄ jīn, kóng, “Lí chit-ê cha-bó͘-lâng, góa m̄ bat I.”" 
Luke22:58 Kè bô jōa kú, lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, kóng, “Lí mā-sī in hit-tīn ê lâng.” Pí-tek kóng, “Lí chit-ê lâng, góa m̄-sī!”" 
Luke22:59 Chha-put-to kè chi̍t tiám-cheng, koh ū chi̍t ê lâng kian-chhî kóng, “Chit-ê lâng khak-si̍t ū teh kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé, in-ūi i mā-sī Ka-lī-lī -lâng.”" 
Luke22:60 M̄-kú Pí-tek kóng, “Lí chit-ê lâng, góa m̄ chai lí teh kóng sím-mi̍h!” I iáu-teh kóng ê sî, koe sûi-sî thî." 
Luke22:61 Hit-sî Chú oa̍t-thâu khòaⁿ Pí-tek, Pí-tek chiū siūⁿ-khí Chú tùi i kóng ê ōe, “Kin-á-ji̍t koe thî í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa.”" 
Luke22:62 I chiū chhut-khì gōa-bīn tōa-siaⁿ thî-khàu. 
Luke22:63 Hiah-ê khàn-siú Iâ-so͘ ê lâng kā I hì-lāng, koh kā I phah." 
Luke22:64 In ng I ê ba̍k-chiu, mn̄g I kóng, “Sian-ti, lí kā goán kóng, siáⁿ-lâng kā lí phah?”" 
Luke22:65 In koh kóng chin chōe ōe kā I bú-jio̍k. 
Luke22:66 Thiⁿ-kng, Iû-thài -lâng ê tiúⁿ-ló, chè-si-tiúⁿ, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su chū-chi̍p. In kā Iâ-so͘ ah-khì in ê gī-hōe," 
Luke22:67 kā I kóng, “Lí nā-sī Ki-tok, tio̍h kā goán kóng.” Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa nā kā lín kóng, lín mā m̄ sìn." 
Luke22:68 Góa mn̄g lín, lín mā m̄ ìn." 
Luke22:69 Tùi hiān-chāi khí, Jîn-chú ōe chē tī Choân-lêng Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng.”"
