Luke22:70 Chèng-lâng kóng, “Án-ni lí chiū-sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ lo͘h?” Iâ-so͘ ìn in kóng, “Góa sī, sī lín kóng,ê.”" 
Luke22:71 In chiū kóng, “Lán iáu su-iàu sím-mi̍h chèng-kù? Lán í-keng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I chhin-chhùi kóng lah!”" 
Luke23:1 Choân-thé gī-oân lóng khiā,khí-lâi, kā Iâ-so͘ ah-khì Pí-lia̍p-to bīn-chêng." 
Luke23:2 In chiū khòng-kò kóng, “Goán ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê lâng teh bê-he̍k goán ê bîn-cho̍k, kìm-chí lâng la̍p-sè hō͘ Khái-sat, koh chū-chheng sī Ki-tok, sī Ông.”" 
Luke23:3 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí sī ‘ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông’ sī,bô?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Che sī lí kóng,ê.”" 
Luke23:4 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū tùi hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap kûn-chiòng kóng, “Góa chhâ bōe chhut chit-ê lâng ū sím-mi̍h chōe.”" 
Luke23:5 M̄-kú in kian-chhî kóng, “I tùi Ka-lī-lī kàu chia, tī Iû-thài choân-tōe kà-sī lâng, siàn-tōng bîn-chiòng.”" 
Luke23:6 Pí-lia̍p-to chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū mn̄g-khòaⁿ chit-ê lâng sī Ka-lī-lī -lâng á m̄-sī." 
Luke23:7 I chi̍t-ē chai Iâ-so͘ sio̍k Hi-lu̍t -ông ê koán-hat, chiū kā I sàng-khì Hi-lu̍t hia; hit-sî Hi-lu̍t pún-lâng mā tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Luke23:8 Hi-lu̍t khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi i bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì, it-ti̍t ài-beh kìⁿ I, koh ǹg-bāng ōe-tàng khòaⁿ-tio̍h I kiâⁿ sîn-jiah." 
Luke23:9 I mn̄g Iâ-so͘ chin chōe tāi-chì, Iâ-so͘ lóng bô ìn i." 
Luke23:10 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khiā,khí-lâi, ke̍k-le̍k kā I khòng-kò." 
Luke23:11 Hi-lu̍t kap i ê peng mā kā I bú-jio̍k, hì-lāng, jiân-āu koh kā I chhēng chi̍t niá chin súi ê tn̂g-phàu, chiah kā I sàng tńg-khì hō͘ Pí-lia̍p-to." 
Luke23:12 Hi-lu̍t kap Pí-lia̍p-to pún-lâi ū oan-siû, tī hit chi̍t ji̍t soah pìⁿ-chòe pêng-iú." 
Luke23:13 Pí-lia̍p-to tiàu-chi̍p chè-si-tiúⁿ, koaⁿ-oân, kap bîn-chiòng lâi," 
Luke23:14 kā in kóng, “Lín ah chit-ê lâng lâi góa chia, khòng-kò I siàn-tōng bîn-chiòng. Taⁿ góa tī lín ê bīn-chêng ū kā I sím-mn̄g, chhâ lóng bô lín só͘ khòng-kò ê chōe." 
Luke23:15 Hi-lu̍t mā jīn-tēng I bô chōe, chiah chiong I sàng tò-lâi lán chia. Khó-kiàn I bô chòe sím-mi̍h kai-sí ê tāi-chì." 
Luke23:16 Só͘-í, góa beh ēng piⁿ kā I kà-sī chi̍t-ē, chiah pàng I khì.”" 
Luke23:17 Ta̍k-nî ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh, chóng-tok tio̍h chiàu kûn-chiòng ê iau-kiû pàng chi̍t ê hoān-lâng hō͘ in." 
Luke23:18 Kûn-chiòng lóng hoah, “Chit-ê lâng tio̍h hō͘ I sí! Pàng Pa-lia̍p-pa hō͘ goán.”" 
Luke23:19 Chit-ê Pa-lia̍p-pa in-ūi tī siâⁿ-lāi chok-loān koh thâi-lâng chiah siū koaiⁿ-kaⁿ. 
Luke23:20 Pí-lia̍p-to siūⁿ-beh pàng Iâ-so͘, chiū koh sòe-ho̍k chèng-lâng." 
Luke23:21 M̄-kú in tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè! Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!”" 
Luke23:22 Pí-lia̍p-to tē-saⁿ piàn tùi in kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ? I ū chòe sím-mi̍h pháiⁿ tāi-chì? Góa chhâ bōe chhut I ū kai-sí ê chōe. Só͘-í, góa beh ēng piⁿ kā I kà-sī chi̍t-ē, chiah pàng I khì.”" 
Luke23:23 Put-kò kûn-chiòng kian-chhî, tōa-siaⁿ iau-kiû kā Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè, chòe-āu in ê siaⁿ soah khah iâⁿ." 
Luke23:24 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū soan-phòaⁿ, chiàu in ê iau-kiû khì chip-hêng," 
Luke23:25 pàng in só͘ iau-kiû hit-ê in-ūi chok-loān, thâi-lâng, hō͘ lâng koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê Pa-lia̍p-pa, kā Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ in, chiàu in ê ì-sù khì chhú-lí." 
Luke23:26 Hiah-ê peng-sū ah Iâ-so͘ chhut,khì ê sî, tú-hó ū chi̍t ê Kó͘-lī-nāi -lâng miâ kiò-chòe Se-bûn tùi chng-kha lâi. In kā i lia̍h,lâi, chiong si̍p-jī-kè khǹg tī i ê keng-thâu hō͘ i giâ, tè Iâ-so͘ ê āu-bīn kiâⁿ." 
Luke23:27 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn bîn-chiòng tè Iâ-so͘, kî-tiong ū chi̍t-kóa hū-jîn-lâng ūi-tio̍h I tûi-heng pi-siong thî-khàu." 
Luke23:28 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t-thâu tùi in kóng, “ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê hū-jîn-lâng ah, m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h góa thî-khàu; tio̍h ūi lín ka-kī kap lín ê kiáⁿ-jî thî-khàu!" 
Luke23:29 In-ūi ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, lâng ōe kóng, ‘Bōe hoâi-īn, m̄-bat siⁿ-kiáⁿ, m̄-bat hō͘ gín-á chia̍h-lin ê hū-jîn-lâng chin ū hok-khì!’" 
Luke23:30 Hit-sî, lâng ōe tùi tōa-soaⁿ kóng: Kā goán teh,lo̍h-lâi! Tùi sió-soaⁿ kóng: Kā goán khàm,lo̍h-lâi!" 
Luke23:31 In-ūi in tùi oa̍h,teh ê chhiū-ba̍k to ōe án-ni chòe, tùi ta,khì ê chhiū-ba̍k kiám bōe koh-khah lī-hāi?”" 
Luke23:32 Lēng-gōa nn̄g ê hoān-lâng mā hō͘ lâng ah-khì kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé chhú sí-hêng. 
Luke23:33 In kàu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe “ Thâu-khak-óaⁿ ”, chiū tī hia kā Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè, mā tèng hit nn̄g ê hoān-lâng, chi̍t ê tī chiàⁿ-pêng, chi̍t ê tī tò-pêng." 
Luke23:34 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Pē ah, sià-bián in, in-ūi in m̄ chai in teh chòe sím-mi̍h.” Āu-lâi in thiu-chhiam pun Iâ-so͘ ê saⁿ." 
Luke23:35 Bîn-chiòng khiā tī hia teh khòaⁿ. Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù kā I thí-chhiò, kóng, “I kiù pa̍t-lâng; I nā-sī Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê Ki-tok, tio̍h kiù ka-kī!”" 
Luke23:36 Hiah-ê peng-sū mā kā I hì-lāng, kiâⁿ óa,khì, the̍h chhò͘ hō͘ I," 
Luke23:37 kóng, “Lí nā-sī ‘ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông’, tio̍h kiù lí ka-kī!”" 
Luke23:38 Tī I ê thâu-khak téng ū chōe-chn̄g ê pâi-á siá “Chit-ê sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông”. 
Luke23:39 Chòe-hé tèng ê hoān-lâng, ū chi̍t ê it-ti̍t kā Iâ-so͘ bú-jio̍k kóng, “Lí kiám m̄-sī Ki-tok? Kiù lí ka-kī mā kiù goán.”" 
Luke23:40 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê kā i chek-pī kóng, “Lí kap I siâng-khoán siū-hêng, lí kiám m̄ kiaⁿ Siōng-tè?" 
Luke23:41 Lán siū-hêng sī kong-tō, in-ūi lán só͘ siū,ê sī chōe-kai-èng-tit, m̄-kú chit-ê lâng lóng m̄-bat chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h.”" 
Luke23:42 I chiū tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Iâ-so͘ ah, lí choh-ông lâi-lîm ê sî, chhiáⁿ ōe-kì-tit góa!”" 
Luke23:43 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa si̍t-chāi kā lí kóng, kin-á-ji̍t lí ōe kap góa chòe-hé tī Lo̍k-hn̂g.”" 
Luke23:44 Chha-put-to tiong-tàu ê sî, o͘-àm jia-khàm choân-tōe kàu ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám, ji̍t-thâu sit kng," 
Luke23:45 Sèng-tiān lāi ê tiùⁿ-lî li̍h-chòe nn̄g pêng. 
Luke23:46 Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Pē ah, góa chiong góa ê lêng-hûn kau-tài lí.” Kóng soah, chiū tn̄g-khùi." 
Luke23:47 Chi̍t ê kun-koaⁿ khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè kóng, “Chit-ê lâng chin-chiàⁿ sī gī-lâng!”" 
Luke23:48 Chū-chi̍p tī hia teh khòaⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì ê chèng-lâng, khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, lóng ná kiâⁿ ná tûi-heng pi-siong tńg,khì." 
Luke23:49 Hiah-ê bat Iâ-so͘ ê lâng, í-ki̍p tùi Ka-lī-lī tè,lâi ê hū-jîn-lâng, lóng khiā tī hn̄g-hn̄g ê só͘-chāi khòaⁿ chiah-ê tāi-chì." 
Luke23:50 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Iok-sek; i sī gī-oân, sī chi̍t ê siān-liông chèng-gī ê lâng." 
Luke23:51 I bô chàn-sêng kî-tha gī-oân ê kè-bô͘ kap hêng-tōng. I sī Iû-thài -lâng ê siâⁿ A-lī-má-thài ê lâng, it-ti̍t teh kî-thāi Siōng-tè-kok ê lâi-lîm." 
Luke23:52 Chit-ê lâng khì kìⁿ Pí-lia̍p-to, chhéng-kiû chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé hō͘ i." 
Luke23:53 I chiong ûi-thé siu,lo̍h-lâi, ēng iù-môa-pò͘ pau, jiân-āu kā I an-chòng tī phah hó tī chio̍h-piah ê bōng lāi-bīn; chit-ê bōng lóng iáu m̄-bat ū lâng ēng." 
Luke23:54 Hit-ji̍t sī Pī-pān-ji̍t, An-hioh-ji̍t tú-beh khai-sí." 
Luke23:55 Tùi Ka-lī-lī kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé lâi hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng tè Iok-sek khì. In chim-chiok khòaⁿ hit-ê bōng, khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé án-chóaⁿ hē," 
Luke23:56 chiū tńg-khì chún-pī phang-liāu kap phang-iû. An-hioh-ji̍t, hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiàu Lu̍t-hoat ê kui-tēng hioh-khùn." 
Luke24:1 Lé-pài-ji̍t thàu-chá, thiⁿ beh kng ê sî, hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng tòa in só͘ chún-pī ê phang-liāu khì bōng-tōe." 
Luke24:2 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h chio̍h-thâu í-keng tùi bōng kō-khui," 
Luke24:3 chiū ji̍p,khì, m̄-kú chhē bô Chú Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé." 
Luke24:4 In ūi-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì gāng,khì m̄ chai beh án-chóaⁿ ê sî, hut-jiân ū nn̄g ê lâng chhēng kng-iàⁿ-iàⁿ ê saⁿ khiā tī in sin-piⁿ." 
Luke24:5 Chiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ, bīn phak-lo̍h thô͘-kha. Hit nn̄g ê lâng kā in kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ tī sí-lâng ê tiong-kan teh chhē oa̍h-lâng? I bô tī chia, i í-keng koh-oa̍h." 
Luke24:6 Lín tio̍h ōe-kì-tit I iáu tī Ka-lī-lī ê sî kā lín kóng ê ōe," 
Luke24:7 ‘Jîn-chú it-tēng ōe siū chhut-bōe tī chōe-jîn ê chhiú, hō͘ in tèng si̍p-jī-kè, tē-saⁿ ji̍t koh-oa̍h.’”" 
Luke24:8 Hiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū siūⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe. 
Luke24:9 In lī-khui bōng tńg,khì, chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng tùi cha̍p-it ê sù-tô͘ kap kî-tha lóng-chóng ê lâng pò-kò." 
Luke24:10 Tùi sù-tô͘ pò-kò chiah-ê tāi-chì,ê, chiū-sī Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a, Iok-a-ná, Ngá-kok ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a, í-ki̍p kî-tha kap in chòe-tīn ê hū-jîn-lâng." 
Luke24:11 Sù-tô͘ siūⁿ-kóng chiah-ê hū-jîn-lâng só͘ kóng ê ōe bô-iáⁿ-bô-chiah, só͘-í bô siong-sìn." 
Luke24:12 M̄-kú Pí-tek khí,lâi, cháu-khì bōng,ni̍h, àⁿ lo̍h-khì khòaⁿ, chí-ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h iù-môa-pò͘ nā-tiāⁿ. I chiū tńg,khì, tùi só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì kám-kak chin kî-koài." 
Luke24:13 Siâng hit-ji̍t, bûn-tô͘ tiong ū nn̄g ê lâng beh khì chi̍t ê chng-thâu, kiò-chòe Í-má-ngó͘-su, chit-ê só͘-chāi lī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng iok cha̍p-it kong-lí." 
Luke24:14 In tī lō͘-tiong hō͘-siōng teh tâm-lūn só͘ hoat-seng lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì. 
Luke24:15 In tâm-lūn lâi tâm-lūn khì ê sî, Iâ-so͘ chhin-sin kiâⁿ óa-lâi kap in chòe-tīn kiâⁿ." 
Luke24:16 In khòaⁿ,tio̍h, m̄-kú bōe jīn,tit." 
Luke24:17 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Lín ná kiâⁿ ná teh gī-lūn,ê sī sím-mi̍h tāi-chì?” In chiū thêng,lo̍h-lâi, móa-bīn iu-chhiû." 
Luke24:18 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Kek-liû-pa ìn I kóng, “Chit kúi ji̍t tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, tùi gōa-tōe lâi tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng, sī-án-chóaⁿ kan-ta lí chi̍t ê m̄ chai?”" 
Luke24:19 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Sím-mi̍h tāi-chì?” In kā I kóng, “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì. I sī sian-ti, tī Siōng-tè kap chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng, bô-lūn kóng-ōe á-sī chòe tāi-chì lóng chin ū koân-lêng." 
Luke24:20 Goán ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap léng-siù kā I sàng-khì hō͘ lâng phòaⁿ sí-hêng, tèng si̍p-jī-kè." 
Luke24:21 I chiū-sī goán só͘ teh kî-thāi beh lâi chín-kiù Í-sek-lia̍t Hit-ūi. M̄-nā án-ni, chit-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng kàu kin-á-ji̍t í-keng tē-saⁿ ji̍t lah." 
Luke24:22 Koh goán tiong-kan ū kúi-nā ê hū-jîn-lâng hō͘ goán chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ. In thiⁿ phú-kng chiū kàu bōng,ni̍h," 
Luke24:23 m̄-kú chhē bô Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé. In tńg-lâi pò-kò kóng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h thiⁿ-sài chhut-hiān, kā in kóng I koh-oa̍h lah." 
Luke24:24 Goán tiong-kan mā ū kúi-nā ê lâng khì bōng,ni̍h, khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê tāi-chì ta̍k-hāng kap hū-jîn-lâng só͘ kóng,ê lóng siâng-khoán, in mā bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘.”" 
Luke24:25 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Ài ah, lín ná chiah-ni̍h gōng, sim ná chiah-ni̍h tūn, bōe siong-sìn sian-ti só͘ kóng it-chhè ê ōe!" 
Luke24:26 Ki-tok kiám m̄-sī eng-kai tio̍h siū chiah-ê khó͘-lān chiah lâi ji̍p I ê êng-kng?” 
Luke24:27 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi Mô͘-se kap chèng sian-ti khí, kā in kóe-seh Sèng-keng tiong só͘-ū koan-hē I pún-sin ê kì-chài." 
Luke24:28 In teh-beh kàu só͘ beh khì hit-ê chng-thâu, Iâ-so͘ ná-chhin-chhiūⁿ beh kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ," 
Luke24:29 put-kò in nn̄g ê kiông-kiông kā I lâu, kóng, “Ji̍t-thâu í-keng lo̍h-soaⁿ, thiⁿ àm lah, chhiáⁿ kap goán tòa.” Iâ-so͘ chiū ji̍p-khì kap in tòa." 
Luke24:30 Iâ-so͘ kap in chē-toh ê sî, the̍h piáⁿ kám-siā, jiân-āu peh-khui, pun hō͘ in." 
Luke24:31 In ê ba̍k-chiu khui, jīn-tio̍h I; I hut-jiân tùi in bīn-chêng siau-sit." 
Luke24:32 In chiū hō͘-siōng kóng, “I tī lō͘-tiong kap lán kóng-ōe, kā lán soat-bêng Sèng-keng ê sî, lán ê sim kiám bô chhin-chhiūⁿ hé teh to̍h?”" 
Luke24:33 In sûi-sî chhut-hoat, tò-tńg-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit cha̍p-it ê sù-tô͘ kap kî-tha ê lâng chū-chi̍p tī hia," 
Luke24:34 teh kóng, “Chú chin-chiàⁿ koh-oa̍h lah! I í-keng ū chhut-hiān hō͘ Se-bûn khòaⁿ.”" 
Luke24:35 Hit nn̄g ê lâng chiū chiong tī lō͘-tiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, kap Iâ-so͘ teh peh-piáⁿ ê sî in chiah jīn-tio̍h I ê keng-kè, lóng kā in kóng." 
Luke24:36 Hit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ teh kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì ê sî, Iâ-so͘ chhin-sin khiā tī in tiong-kan, tùi in kóng, “Goān lín pêng-an!”" 
Luke24:37 In ia̍h-kiaⁿ-ia̍h-chhoah, siūⁿ-kóng sī khòaⁿ-tio̍h kúi." 
Luke24:38 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín sī-án-chóaⁿ put-an, sim-lāi ná ōe teh giâu-gî?" 
Luke24:39 Khòaⁿ góa ê chhiú, góa ê kha; khak-si̍t sī góa. Lín bong chiū chai, in-ūi kúi bô-kut bô-bah; bong khòaⁿ-bāi leh, góa lóng ū!”" 
Luke24:40 I kóng-liáu chiū chiong I ê kha kap chhiú chhun hō͘ in khòaⁿ. 
Luke24:41 In hoaⁿ-hí kah m̄-káⁿ siong-sìn, iáu kám-kak kî-koài ê sî, Iâ-so͘ mn̄g in, “Lín chia ū sím-mi̍h thang chia̍h,bô?”" 
Luke24:42 In the̍h chi̍t bé hang hó ê hî hō͘ I," 
Luke24:43 I chiū tī in ê bīn-chêng chiap-khì chia̍h. 
Luke24:44 Āu-lâi Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “ Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê chheh, í-ki̍p Si-phian kì-chài koan-hē góa ê tāi-chì, it-tēng tio̍h èng-giām. Chiah-ê ōe góa iáu kap lín chòe-hé ê sî í-keng ū kā lín kóng lah.”" 
Luke24:45 Iâ-so͘ chiū khui in ê sim-khiàu, hō͘ in bêng-pe̍k Sèng-keng," 
Luke24:46 tùi in kóng, “Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài: Ki-tok tio̍h siū khó͘-lān, tē-saⁿ ji̍t tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h," 
Luke24:47 koh lín tio̍h hōng I ê miâ thoân hóe-kái lâi tit-tio̍h sià-chōe ê tō-lí, tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khí, thoân kàu bān-kok." 
Luke24:48 Lín chiū-sī chiah-ê tāi-chì ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. 
Luke24:49 Góa chiong góa ê Pē só͘ èng-ún,ê kau hō͘ lín; tio̍h tī chit-ê siâⁿ thèng-hāu, kàu lín tit-tio̍h tùi téng-bīn lâi ê lêng-le̍k.”" 
Luke24:50 Iâ-so͘ chhōa in chhut,khì, it-ti̍t kàu Pek-tāi-nî, jiân-āu gia̍h siang-chhiú kā in chiok-hok." 
Luke24:51 I teh kā in chiok-hok ê sî lī-khui in, siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ." 
Luke24:52 In chiū kā I pài, jiân-āu hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí tńg-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng," 
Luke24:53 kè-sio̍k tī Sèng-tiān chheng-chàn Siōng-tè. 
John1:1 Chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū ū Tō, Tō kap Siōng-tè tông-chāi, Tō sī Siōng-tè." 
John1:2 I tī chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū kap Siōng-tè tông-chāi. 
John1:3 Siōng-tè thong-kè I chhòng-chō bān-iú; it-chhè pī-chō ê ta̍k-hāng lóng sī thong-kè Tō lâi chhòng-chō. 
John1:4 Tī I lāi-bīn ū oa̍h-miā; chit-ê oa̍h-miā sī jîn-lūi ê kng. 
John1:5 Chit-ê kng tī o͘-àm tiong teh chiò, o͘-àm m̄-bat iâⁿ-kè kng." 
John1:6 Ū Siōng-tè chhe,lâi ê chi̍t ê lâng, miâ kiò-chòe Iok-hān." 
John1:7 Chit-ê lâng lâi sī beh choh-chèng, ūi-tio̍h kng choh-chèng, beh hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng thong-kè i lâi sìn." 
John1:8 I pún-sin m̄-sī hit-ê kng, sī beh ūi-tio̍h hit-ê kng choh-chèng." 
John1:9 Ū chin ê kng chìn-ji̍p sè-kan lâi chiò choân jîn-lūi. 
John1:10 I tī sè-kan; sè-kan thong-kè I lâi chhòng-chō, m̄-kú sè-kan m̄ bat I." 
John1:11 I lâi kàu ka-kī ê só͘-chāi, ka-kī ê lâng bô chiap-la̍p I." 
John1:12 Hiah-ê chiap-la̍p I,ê, chiū-sī sìn I ê lâng, I sù in ū koân chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
John1:13 In m̄-sī tùi hiat-thóng, m̄-sī tùi jio̍k-io̍k, mā m̄-sī tùi ta-po͘-lâng ê ì-liām, sī tùi Siōng-tè siⁿ,ê." 
John1:14 Tō chiâⁿ-chòe lâng, tiàm tī lán tiong-kan, chhiong-móa un-tián kap chin-lí; goán ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê êng-iāu, sī Thiⁿ-pē to̍k-it ê Kiáⁿ chiah ū ê êng-iāu." 
John1:15 Iok-hān ūi-tio̍h I choh-chèng, hoah kóng, “Chit-ūi chiū-sī góa bat kā lín kóng,ê, I tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi, khiok pí góa khah tōa; in-ūi góa iáu-bē chhut-sì, I chiū chûn-chāi.”" 
John1:16 Tùi I ê hong-hù lán lóng niá-siū un-tián, un-siōng-ka-un." 
John1:17 Lu̍t-hoat thong-kè Mô͘-se pan-pò͘; un-tián kap chin-lí sī thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lâi,ê. 
John1:18 Bô lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè, chí-ū Pē sim-hoâi tiong to̍k-it ê Kiáⁿ ū kā I hián-sī,chhut-lâi." 
John1:19 Í-hā sī Iok-hān ê kiàn-chèng: Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k phài chè-si kap Lī-bī -lâng khì mn̄g Iok-hān ê sî, kóng, “Lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
John1:20 I bô kū-choa̍t hôe-tap, kong-khai seng-bêng “Góa m̄-sī Ki-tok”." 
John1:21 In koh mn̄g i, “Nā án-ni, lí sī Í-lī-a sī,bô?” Iok-hān ìn kóng, “Góa m̄-sī.” In koh mn̄g, “Lí sī hit-ūi Sian-ti sī,bô?” Iok-hān ìn kóng, “M̄-sī.”" 
John1:22 In chiū kā i kóng, “Án-ni lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Chhiáⁿ kā goán kóng, hō͘ goán thang hôe-tap phài goán lâi ê lâng. Lí kóng, tàu-tóe lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
John1:23 Iok-hān ín-iōng sian-ti Í-sài-a ê ōe, kóng: Góa chiū-sī tī khòng-iá teh hoah ê siaⁿ, kóng: Tio̍h ūi Chú siu-ti̍t tō-lō͘." 
John1:24 Hiah-ê lâng sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhe,lâi-ê. 
John1:25 In koh mn̄g Iok-hān, kóng, “Lí nā m̄-sī Ki-tok, m̄-sī Í-lī-a, mā m̄-sī hit-ūi Sian-ti, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ kā lâng sóe-lé?”" 
John1:26 Iok-hān ìn kóng, “Góa ēng chúi kā lâng sóe-lé; m̄-kú ū chi̍t ūi lín m̄ bat,ê khiā tī lín tiong-kan." 
John1:27 I tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi, góa liân kā I tháu ôe-tòa to bōe-kham,tit.”" 
John1:28 Chiah-ê sū tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ ê Pek-tāi-nî hoat-seng, Iok-tàn-hô chiū-sī Iok-hān teh kā lâng sóe-lé ê só͘-chāi." 
John1:29 Keh-ji̍t, Iok-hān khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa,lâi, chiū kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, Siōng-tè ê Iûⁿ-ko, I beh tû-khì sè-kan-lâng ê chōe." 
John1:30 Koan-hē I ê tāi-chì, góa bat kā lín kóng, I pí góa khah bān lâi, chóng-sī pí góa khah tōa, in-ūi góa iáu-bē chhut-sì, I chiū chûn-chāi." 
John1:31 Góa ka-kī mā m̄ bat I, m̄-kú góa lâi ēng chúi kā lâng sóe-lé, sī beh hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng jīn-bat I.”" 
John1:32 Iok-hān koh choh-chèng, kóng, “Góa ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sèng Sîn chhin-chhiūⁿ hún-chiáu tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi, hioh tī I téng-bīn." 
John1:33 Góa ka-kī mā m̄ bat I, m̄-kú chhe góa ēng chúi kā lâng sóe-lé hit-ūi Siōng-tè ū tùi góa kóng, ‘Lí khòaⁿ-tio̍h Sèng Sîn kàng lo̍h-lâi hioh tī I téng-bīn hit-ê, I chiū-sī beh ēng Sèng Sîn kā lâng sóe-lé Hit-ūi.’" 
John1:34 Góa ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, koh choh-chèng, chit-ūi chiū-sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.”" 
John1:35 Keh-ji̍t, Iok-hān koh kap i nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ khiā tī hia;" 
John1:36 i khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ keng-kè, chiū kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, Siōng-tè ê Iûⁿ-ko!”" 
John1:37 Chit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h i án-ni kóng, chiū khì tè Iâ-so͘." 
John1:38 Iâ-so͘ oa̍t,kè-lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h in teh tè I, chiū mn̄g in, “Lín teh chhē sím-mi̍h?” In kā I kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, lí tòa tó-ūi?” Lia̍p-pí ê ì-sù sī lāu-su." 
John1:39 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín lâi khòaⁿ!” In chiū khì khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ tòa ê só͘-chāi, hit-ji̍t kap I chòe-hé tòa. Hit-sî tāi-iok ē-po͘ sì tiám." 
John1:40 Thiaⁿ Iok-hān ê ōe lâi tè Iâ-so͘ hit nn̄g lâng, chi̍t ê sī Se-bûn Pí-tek ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t." 
John1:41 I seng khì chhē i ê hiaⁿ-ko Se-bûn, tùi i kóng, “Goán í-keng ū tú-tio̍h Bí-sài-a.” Bí-sài-a ê ì-sù sī Ki-tok." 
John1:42 I chiū chhōa Se-bûn khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘. Iâ-so͘ chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ, kóng, “Lí sī Iok-hān ê kiáⁿ Se-bûn, góa beh kā lí kiò-chòe Ki-hoat.” Ki-hoat kap Pí-tek siâng ì-sù, chiū-sī chio̍h-pôaⁿ." 
John1:43 Keh-ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ koat-tēng beh khì Ka-lī-lī. I tú-tio̍h Hui-le̍k, tùi i kóng, “Lâi tè góa!”" 
John1:44 Hui-le̍k sī Pek-sài-tāi -lâng, An-tek-lia̍t kap Pí-tek ê tông-hiong." 
John1:45 Hui-le̍k tú-tio̍h Ná-tàn-gia̍p, tùi i kóng, “ Mô͘-se tī Lu̍t-hoat-su só͘ siá, í-ki̍p sian-ti só͘ kì-chài Hit-ūi, goán í-keng ū tú,tio̍h, chiū-sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘.”" 
John1:46 Ná-tàn-gia̍p ìn kóng, “ Ná-sat-le̍k hit-khoán só͘-chāi kiám ōe chhut sím-mi̍h hó-mi̍h?” Hui-le̍k kā i kóng, “Lí lâi khòaⁿ!”" 
John1:47 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Ná-tàn-gia̍p kiâⁿ óa,lâi, chiū kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, i sī chin-chiàⁿ ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, lóng bô hu-ké!”" 
John1:48 Ná-tàn-gia̍p mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí ná ōe bat góa?” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “ Hui-le̍k iáu-bē kiò lí, góa chiū khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí tī hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kha.”" 
John1:49 Ná-tàn-gia̍p ìn kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, lí sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ! Lí sī Í-sek-lia̍t ê Ông!”" 
John1:50 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “In-ūi góa kā lí kóng góa ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí tī hit-châng bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kha, lí chiū sìn o͘h? Lí ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h pí che koh-khah tōa ê sū.”" 
John1:51 Iâ-so͘ koh kā i kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, lín ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ khui, Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài tī Jîn-chú ê sin-chiūⁿ chiūⁿ-lo̍h óng-lâi.”" 
John2:1 Nn̄g ji̍t āu, tī Ka-lī-lī ê Ka-ná ū hun-lé; Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú ū tī hia." 
John2:2 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ mā siū iau-chhiáⁿ khì chham-ka. 
John2:3 Chiú ēng-liáu ê sî, Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú tùi I kóng, “In í-keng bô chiú lah.”" 
John2:4 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “A-bú, che kap lí góa ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē; góa ê sî iáu-bē kàu.”" 
John2:5 I ê lāu-bú hoan-hù chhe-ēng ê lâng kóng, “I kā lín kóng sím-mi̍h, chiàu án-ni khì chòe.”" 
John2:6 Chiàu Iû-thài -lâng kiat-chēng ê kui-lē, tī hia ū la̍k ê chio̍h-àng, ta̍k-ê ōe-tàng tóe chha-put-to chi̍t-pah kong-seng." 
John2:7 Iâ-so͘ kā hiah-ê chhe-ēng kóng, “Chiah-ê chúi-àng, chúi lóng tò hō͘ i tīⁿ.” In chiū chiong chúi tò ji̍p-khì chúi-àng, tò kàu móa." 
John2:8 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Taⁿ lín kā chúi iúⁿ,chhut-lâi, the̍h hō͘ pān-toh ê chóng-koán.” In chiū phâng-khì hō͘ i." 
John2:9 Pān-toh ê chóng-koán chi̍t-ē tam-tio̍h í-keng pìⁿ-chòe chiú ê chúi, m̄ chai chit-ê chiú tùi tó-ūi lâi, put-kò iúⁿ-chúi ê chhe-ēng chai; chóng-koán chiū kiò sin-lông lâi," 
John2:10 tùi i kóng, “Lâng lóng seng chhut hó chiú, tán lâng-kheh lim kàu chùi chiah chhut khah bái ê chiú, lí tian-tò chiong hó chiú lâu kàu chit-chūn.”" 
John2:11 Iâ-so͘ tī Ka-lī-lī ê Ka-ná kiâⁿ chit-ê tē-it ê sîn-jiah, tī hia hián-sī I ê êng-kng; I ê bûn-tô͘ lóng sìn I." 
John2:12 Chit-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Iâ-so͘ kap I ê lāu-bú, hiaⁿ-tī, í-ki̍p bûn-tô͘ lo̍h-khì Ka-pek-lông, tī hia tòa kúi-nā ji̍t." 
John2:13 Iû-thài -lâng ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh teh-beh kàu, Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
John2:14 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū lâng tī Sèng-tiān ê gōa-tiâⁿ teh bōe gû, iûⁿ, hún-chiáu; mā ū ōaⁿ-chîⁿ ê lâng teh hō͘ lâng ōaⁿ-chîⁿ." 
John2:15 Iâ-so͘ chiū ēng soh-á chòe piⁿ, chiong gû, iûⁿ lóng tùi Sèng-tiān kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, chhia-tó chîⁿ-toh-á, kā in ê chîⁿ iā-sòaⁿ." 
John2:16 I koh tùi bōe hún-chiáu ê lâng kóng, “Chiah-ê lóng poaⁿ-poaⁿ,chhut-khì; m̄-thang kā góa ê Pē ê chhù pìⁿ-chòe bóe-bōe ê chhù!”" 
John2:17 I ê bûn-tô͘ ōe-kì-tit Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Siōng-tè ah, góa ūi-tio̍h lí ê tiān sim hé-jia̍t, kui-ê lâng lóng hō͘ thun,lo̍h-khì.”" 
John2:18 Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k ê lâng hoán-mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí beh ēng sím-mi̍h sîn-jiah kā goán chèng-bêng lí ū koân-pèng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì?”" 
John2:19 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín thiah-húi chit-keng Sèng-tiān, saⁿ ji̍t lāi góa beh koh kā i khí,khí-lâi.”" 
John2:20 In kóng, “Chit-keng Sèng-tiān sì-cha̍p-la̍k nî kú chiah khí hó, lí saⁿ ji̍t lāi chiū beh khí,khí-lâi o͘h?”" 
John2:21 Kî-si̍t, Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng ê Sèng-tiān sī chí I ê seng-khu." 
John2:22 I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h í-āu, I ê bûn-tô͘ chiah ōe-kì-tit I bat án-ni kóng, in chiū sìn Sèng-keng kap Iâ-so͘ kóng ê ōe." 
John2:23 Iâ-so͘ tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kè Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê sî, chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h I kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah chiū sìn I." 
John2:24 Put-kò Iâ-so͘ bô sìn-jīm in, in-ūi I liáu-kái só͘-ū ê lâng." 
John2:25 Koan-hē lâng ê tāi-chì, I bô su-iàu lâng kā I soat-bêng, in-ūi I chin-chiàⁿ liáu-kái lâng ê lāi-sim." 
John3:1 Ū chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Nî-ko-tek-bō͘, sī Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-tō-chiá." 
John3:2 Ū chi̍t àm, chit-ê lâng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, goán chai lí sī Siōng-tè chhe,lâi ê kàu-su. Nā m̄-sī Siōng-tè tông-chāi, bô lâng ōe-tàng kiâⁿ lí só͘ kiâⁿ chiah-ê sîn-jiah.”" 
John3:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lí kóng, lâng nā bô têng chhut-sì, chiū bōe-tàng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè-kok.”" 
John3:4 Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ mn̄g kóng, “Lâng í-keng lāu, ná ōe-tàng têng chhut-sì? Kiám kóng i ōe-tàng koh chi̍t piàn ji̍p-khì bú-thai lâi chhut-sì?”" 
John3:5 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lí kóng, lâng nā bô tùi chúi kap Sèng Sîn lâi chhut-sì, chiū bōe-tàng chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn." 
John3:6 Tùi jio̍k-thé siⁿ,ê, sī jio̍k-thé; tùi Sèng Sîn siⁿ,ê, sī sîn-lêng." 
John3:7 M̄-thang in-ūi góa kóng ‘lín tio̍h têng chhut-sì’ lâi kî-koài. 
John3:8 Hong beh chhe-khì tó-ūi chiū chhe-khì tó-ūi, lí ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h siaⁿ, m̄-kú m̄ chai i tùi tó-ūi lâi, tùi tó-ūi khì. Ta̍k-ê tùi Sèng Sîn siⁿ,ê mā-sī án-ni.”" 
John3:9 Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chit-khoán tāi-chì ná ū khó-lêng?”" 
John3:10 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê kàu-su, liân che to m̄ chai o͘h?" 
John3:11 “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lí kóng, goán kóng goán só͘ chai,ê, mā ūi-tio̍h goán só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h-ê choh-chèng, m̄-kú lín m̄ chiap-siū goán ê kiàn-chèng." 
John3:12 Góa kā lín kóng chit sè-kan ê tāi-chì, lín to m̄ sìn, góa nā kā lín kóng thiⁿ-téng ê tāi-chì, lín ná beh sìn?" 
John3:13 Tùi thiⁿ-téng kàng-lîm ê Jîn-chú í-gōa, bô lâng bat chiūⁿ-thiⁿ." 
John3:14 “Chhin-chhiūⁿ Mô͘-se tī khòng-iá kú-khí tâng-chôa, Jîn-chú mā it-tēng tio̍h án-ni siū kú-khí," 
John3:15 hō͘ ta̍k-ê sìn I ê lâng tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā. 
John3:16 Siōng-tè liân I to̍k-it ê Kiáⁿ to sù hō͘ sè-kan, beh hō͘ ta̍k-ê sìn I ê lâng bián bia̍t-bông, hoán-tńg tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā, I chiah-ni̍h thiàⁿ sè-kan!" 
John3:17 In-ūi Siōng-tè chhe I ê Kiáⁿ lâi sè-kan, m̄-sī beh sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan, sī beh thong-kè I lâi chín-kiù sè-kan." 
John3:18 “Sìn Kiáⁿ ê lâng bōe siū tēng-chōe; m̄-sìn ê lâng í-keng siū tēng-chōe, in-ūi i m̄ sìn Siōng-tè to̍k-it ê Kiáⁿ." 
John3:19 Siōng-tè ê sím-phòaⁿ sī án-ni: Kng chìn-ji̍p sè-kan, sè-kan-lâng khah ài o͘-àm, khah bô ài kng-bêng, in-ūi in ê hêng-ûi siâ-ok." 
John3:20 Chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng lóng oàn-hūn kng, m̄ chiap-kūn kng, án-ni i ê hêng-ûi chiah bōe lō͘-hiān." 
John3:21 M̄-kú si̍t-hêng chin-lí ê lâng chiap-kūn kng, sī beh hián-bêng i ê hêng-ûi sī sūn-thàn Siōng-tè lâi chòe,ê.”" 
John3:22 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ khì Iû-thài tōe-khu, I kap in chiām-sî tòa hia, koh kā lâng sóe-lé." 
John3:23 Iok-hān mā tī Sat-léng hù-kūn ê Ai-loán teh kā lâng sóe-lé, in-ūi hia ū chin chōe chúi, chèng-lâng sòa-chiap lâi chiap-siū Iok-hān ê sóe-lé." 
John3:24 Hit-sî Iok-hān iáu-bē hō͘ lâng koaiⁿ-kaⁿ. 
John3:25 Kúi-nā ê Iok-hān ê bûn-tô͘ kap chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng ūi-tio̍h kiat-chēng ê lé-gî piān-lūn. 
John3:26 In lâi kìⁿ Iok-hān, tùi i kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, í-chêng tī Iok-tàn-hô tang-hōaⁿ kap lí chòe-hé, lí bat ūi-tio̍h I choh-chèng Hit-ūi, lí khòaⁿ, I hiān-chāi teh kā lâng sóe-lé, chèng-lâng lóng khì I hia.”" 
John3:27 Iok-hān ìn kóng, “Nā m̄-sī thiⁿ siúⁿ-sù, lâng bōe-tàng tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h." 
John3:28 Góa bat kóng ‘Góa m̄-sī Ki-tok, put-kò sī siū phài chòe I ê sian-hong’. Chit-ê tāi-chì, lín pún-sin sī góa ê kiàn-chèng-jîn." 
John3:29 Chhōa sin-niû,ê sī sin-lông; sin-lông ê pêng-iú khiā tī piⁿ,á, chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h sin-lông ê siaⁿ chiū hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí. Só͘-í, góa ê hoaⁿ-hí móa-móa." 
John3:30 I it-tēng ná heng-ōng, góa it-tēng ná soe-bî.”" 
John3:31 Tùi téng-bīn lâi,ê, tī bān-iú ê téng-bīn; tùi tōe-chiūⁿ lâi,ê, sio̍k tōe-chiūⁿ, só͘ kóng,ê sī tōe-chiūⁿ ê sū. Tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi,ê, tī bān-iú ê téng-bīn." 
John3:32 I ūi-tio̍h só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê kap só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê choh-chèng, put-kò bô lâng chiap-siū I ê kiàn-chèng." 
John3:33 Chiap-siū I kiàn-chèng ê lâng chèng-bêng Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t. 
John3:34 Siōng-tè só͘ chhe-khián Hit-ūi kóng Siōng-tè só͘ kóng ê ōe, in-ūi Siōng-tè bû-hān-liōng sù Sèng Sîn hō͘ I." 
John3:35 Pē thiàⁿ Kiáⁿ, í-keng chiong it-chhè lóng kau tī I ê chhiú-tiong." 
John3:36 Sìn Kiáⁿ ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; m̄ sūn-ho̍k Kiáⁿ ê lâng m̄-nā bōe tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā, hoán-tńg kè-sio̍k hō͘ Siōng-tè siū-khì." 
John4:1 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ pí Iok-hān chio khah chōe bûn-tô͘, koh kā khah chōe lâng sóe-lé." 
John4:2 Kî-si̍t Iâ-so͘ m̄-bat kā lâng sóe-lé, sī I ê bûn-tô͘ kā lâng sóe-lé." 
John4:3 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì chiū lī-khui Iû-thài, tńg-khì Ka-lī-lī;" 
John4:4 I tio̍h keng-kè Sat-má-lī-a. 
John4:5 Iâ-so͘ lâi kàu Sat-má-lī-a ê chi̍t ê siâⁿ, kiò-chòe Sū-ka, chit-ê siâⁿ óa-kūn Ngá-kok hō͘ i ê kiáⁿ Iok-sek hit-tè tōe." 
John4:6 Ngá-kok -chíⁿ tī hia. Iâ-so͘ in-ūi kiâⁿ-lō͘ chin siān chiū chē tī chíⁿ-piⁿ. Hit-sî chha-put-to sī tiong-tàu. 
John4:7 Ū chi̍t ê Sat-má-lī-a ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi chhiūⁿ-chúi. Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Chhiáⁿ chi̍t-sut-á chúi hō͘ góa lim.”" 
John4:8 Hit-sî I ê bûn-tô͘ í-keng ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi bóe chia̍h-mi̍h. 
John4:9 Sat-má-lī-a ê hū-jîn-lâng ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí sī Iû-thài -lâng, ná ōe tùi góa chit-ê Sat-má-lī-a ê cha-bó͘-lâng thó chúi lim?” Goân-lâi Iû-thài -lâng kap Sat-má-lī-a -lâng bô lâi-óng." 
John4:10 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí nā liáu-kái Siōng-tè hō͘ lâng ê un-sù, koh ū tùi lí kóng ‘Chhiáⁿ chi̍t-sut-á chúi hō͘ góa lim’ hit-ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng, lí chá chiū ōe kā I kiû, I chá chiū ōe chiong oa̍h-chúi hō͘ lí.”" 
John4:11 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, lí bô chhiūⁿ-chúi ê khì-khū, chíⁿ koh chhim, lí beh án-chóaⁿ tit-tio̍h oa̍h-chúi?" 
John4:12 Goán ê chó͘-sian Ngá-kok lâu chit-ê chíⁿ hō͘ goán, i ka-kī, i ê kiáⁿ-sun, kap i ê cheng-siⁿ, lóng lim chit-ê chíⁿ-chúi, lí kiám ōe pí i khah gâu?”" 
John4:13 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lim chit-ê chíⁿ-chúi ê lâng lóng ōe koh chhùi-ta;" 
John4:14 put-kò lim góa só͘ beh hō͘ i ê chúi,ê bōe koh chhùi-ta. In-ūi góa beh hō͘ i ê chúi tī i ê lāi-bīn ōe chiâⁿ-chòe chúi-chôaⁿ, it-ti̍t chhèng-chhut oa̍h-chúi, hō͘ i tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā.”" 
John4:15 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, chhiáⁿ hō͘ góa chit-ê chúi, góa chiah bōe koh chhùi-ta, mā bián koh lâi chia chhiūⁿ-chúi.”" 
John4:16 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí khì kiò lí ê tiōng-hu, chhōa i lâi chia.”" 
John4:17 Hū-jîn-lâng ìn kóng, “Góa bô tiōng-hu.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí kóng ‘Góa bô tiōng-hu’ ū-iáⁿ." 
John4:18 Lí bat ū gō͘ ê tiōng-hu, hiān-chāi chit-ê m̄-sī lí ê tiōng-hu, lí kóng,ê sī sū-si̍t.”" 
John4:19 Hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, góa khòaⁿ lí sī sian-ti." 
John4:20 Goán Sat-má-lī-a -lâng ê chó͘-sian tī chit-ê soaⁿ-téng kèng-pài Siōng-tè; lín Iû-thài -lâng kóng Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiah sī kèng-pài Siōng-tè ê só͘-chāi.” 
John4:21 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng, tio̍h sìn góa. Sî teh-beh kàu, hit-sî lín bōe tī chit-ê soaⁿ-téng, mā bōe tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kèng-pài Pē." 
John4:22 Lín Sat-má-lī-a -lâng kèng-pài lín só͘ m̄ bat,ê; goán Iû-thài -lâng kèng-pài goán só͘ bat,ê; in-ūi chín-kiù tùi Iû-thài -lâng chhut,lâi. 
John4:23 Put-kò, sî teh-beh kàu, hiān-chāi chiū-sī, chin-chiàⁿ kèng-pài Pē ê lâng ōe ēng sim-lêng kap chin-sêng kèng-pài. In-ūi Pē ài chit-khoán ê lâng kèng-pài I." 
John4:24 Siōng-tè sī Sîn, kèng-pài I ê lâng tio̍h ēng sim-lêng kap chin-sêng kèng-pài.”" 
John4:25 Hū-jîn-lâng tùi I kóng, “Góa chai hit-ūi chheng-chòe Ki-tok ê Bí-sài-a teh-beh lâi, I lâi ê sî ōe chiong it-chhè ê tāi-chì kā goán kóng.”" 
John4:26 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa, chit-ê teh kap lí kóng-ōe,ê chiū-sī.”" 
John4:27 Tú chit-ê sî, Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ tńg,lâi. In khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kap hū-jîn-lâng teh kóng-ōe, kám-kak chin kî-koài, put-kò bô lâng mn̄g hū-jîn-lâng “Lí beh chhòng sím-mi̍h”, á-sī mn̄g Iâ-so͘ “Lí ná teh kap hū-jîn-lâng kóng-ōe”." 
John4:28 Hū-jîn-lâng chiū chiong chúi-pân pàng-hē,teh, tńg-khì siâⁿ-lāi, tùi lâng kóng," 
John4:29 “Lâi-khì khòaⁿ, chit-ê lâng chiong góa kè-khì só͘ chòe ê it-chhè lóng kā góa kóng,chhut-lâi. I káⁿ sī Ki-tok ho͘hⁿ?”" 
John4:30 Tāi-ke chiū chhut-siâⁿ khì khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘. 
John4:31 Hit-sî bûn-tô͘ kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, chhiáⁿ lâi chia̍h.”" 
John4:32 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa ū lín m̄-chai ê chia̍h-mi̍h.”" 
John4:33 Bûn-tô͘ chiū mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì kóng, “Kiám ū lâng the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ I chia̍h?”" 
John4:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa ê chia̍h-mi̍h chiū-sī si̍t-hêng chhe góa Hit-ūi ê chí-ì, koh oân-sêng I ê kang-chok." 
John4:35 Lín kiám bô án-ni kóng ‘Koh sì kò-ge̍h chiū ū thang siu-sêng’? Góa kā lín kóng, ba̍k-chiu peh hō͘ kim, khòaⁿ sì-bīn ê chhân-hn̂g; ngó͘-kok í-keng sek, thang siu-sêng lah." 
John4:36 Hiān-chāi siu-koah ê lâng í-keng teh niá kang-chîⁿ, koh teh siu-sêng hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h éng-oán oa̍h-miā ê ngó͘-kok, hō͘ iā-chéng,ê kap siu-koah,ê chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí." 
John4:37 In-ūi sio̍k-gú kóng ‘Chi̍t ê iā-chéng, chi̍t ê siu-koah’, kóng-liáu chin tio̍h." 
John4:38 Lín bô sin-khó͘ keng-choh,ê, góa chhe lín khì siu-sêng; pa̍t-lâng sin-khó͘, lín hióng-siū in sin-khó͘ ê sêng-kó.”" 
John4:39 Hit-ê siâⁿ ū chin chōe Sat-má-lī-a -lâng sìn Iâ-so͘, in-ūi hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng choh-chèng kóng, “I chiong góa kè-khì só͘ chòe ê it-chhè lóng kā góa kóng,chhut-lâi.”" 
John4:40 Só͘-í hiah-ê Sat-má-lī-a -lâng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, kiû I tòa in hia, I chiū tī hia tòa nn̄g ji̍t." 
John4:41 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng ê ōe, ū koh-khah chōe lâng lâi sìn." 
John4:42 Hiah-ê lâng kā hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng kóng, “Hiān-chāi goán sìn, m̄-sī in-ūi lí só͘ kóng ê ōe, sī in-ūi goán ū chhin-hī thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê ōe, chai-iáⁿ I chin-chiàⁿ sī sè-kan ê Kiù-chú.”" 
John4:43 Nn̄g ji̍t āu, Iâ-so͘ lī-khui hia khì Ka-lī-lī." 
John4:44 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ ka-kī bat kóng, “Sian-ti tī ka-kī ê kò͘-hiong bōe siū chun-tiōng.”" 
John4:45 Iâ-so͘ kàu Ka-lī-lī ê sî, Ka-lī-lī -lâng ū kā I hoan-gêng, in-ūi in khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kè Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê sî, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I tī choeh-kî tiong só͘ chòe it-chhè ê tāi-chì." 
John4:46 Iâ-so͘ koh tńg-khì Ka-lī-lī ê Ka-ná, chiū-sī I bat ēng chúi pìⁿ-chòe chiú ê só͘-chāi. Tī hia ū chi̍t ê Ka-pek-lông ê koaⁿ-oân, i ê kiáⁿ phòa-pīⁿ." 
John4:47 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tùi Iû-thài lâi kàu Ka-lī-lī, chiū khì kiû Iâ-so͘ lo̍h-khì Ka-pek-lông i-tī i ê kiáⁿ, in-ūi i ê kiáⁿ teh-beh sí lah." 
John4:48 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lín nā bô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sîn-jiah kî-sū, it-tēng bōe sìn.”" 
John4:49 Hit-ê koaⁿ-oân ìn kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, chhiáⁿ lí tī góa ê sòe-kiáⁿ iáu-bē sí í-chêng lo̍h,lâi-khì.”" 
John4:50 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Tńg,khì, lí ê kiáⁿ bōe sí.” Hit-ê lâng sìn Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng ê ōe, chiū tńg,khì." 
John4:51 Tī lō͘-tiong, i ê po̍k-jîn tú,tio̍h, kā i kóng i ê sòe-kiáⁿ oa̍h,khí-lâi lah." 
John4:52 I chiū mn̄g in i ê kiáⁿ sím-mi̍h sî hó,khí-lâi. In ìn kóng, “Chā-hng ē-po͘ chi̍t tiám jia̍t chiū thè,khì.”" 
John4:53 Lāu-pē chai-iáⁿ, tú-tú hit-ê sî Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng “Lí ê kiáⁿ bōe sí”. I ka-kī sìn, choân-ke ê lâng mā lóng sìn." 
John4:54 Che sī Iâ-so͘ tùi Iû-thài lâi Ka-lī-lī í-āu só͘ kiâⁿ ê tē-jī ê sîn-jiah. 
John5:1 Chiah-ê tāi-chì í-āu, ū chi̍t ê Iû-thài -lâng ê choeh-kî, Iâ-so͘ chiūⁿ-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
John5:2 Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, kūn Iûⁿ-mn̂g ê só͘-chāi ū chi̍t ê chúi-tî, Hi-pek-lâi-ōe kiò-chòe Pit-sū-tāi, chúi-tî piⁿ ū gō͘ ê cháu-lông." 
John5:3 Tī cháu-lông ū chin chōe pīⁿ-lâng tó tī hia; ū sit-bêng,ê, kha-pái,ê, kap poàn-sin-put-sūi,ê." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê phòa-pīⁿ saⁿ-cha̍p-poeh nî kú ê lâng. 
John5:6 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h i tī hia, chai-iáⁿ i í-keng tī hia tó chin kú, chiū kā i kóng, “Lí ài hó,khí-lâi,bô?”" 
John5:7 Hit-ê pīⁿ-lâng ìn kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, chúi tín-tāng ê sî bô lâng kā góa phō lo̍h-khì chúi-tî, góa siūⁿ-beh lo̍h,khì ê sî, pa̍t-lâng pí góa seng lo̍h,khì lah.”" 
John5:8 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Khí,lâi, giâ lí ê chhn̂g-pho͘ khí-lâi kiâⁿ.”" 
John5:9 Hit-ê lâng sûi-sî hó,khí-lâi, chiū giâ i ê chhn̂g-pho͘ khí-lâi kiâⁿ. Hit-ji̍t sī An-hioh-ji̍t," 
John5:10 só͘-í Iû-thài -lâng tùi hit-ê hō͘ Iâ-so͘ i-hó ê lâng kóng, “Kin-á-ji̍t sī An-hioh-ji̍t, lí giâ chhn̂g-pho͘ bô ha̍p-hoat.”" 
John5:11 I ìn kóng, “I-hó góa hit-ê lâng kā góa kóng, ‘Giâ lí ê chhn̂g-pho͘ khí-lâi kiâⁿ.’”" 
John5:12 In chiū mn̄g i, “Kiò lí giâ chhn̂g-pho͘ khí-lâi kiâⁿ hit-ê sī siáⁿ-lâng?”" 
John5:13 I m̄ chai hit-ê kā i i-hó,ê sī siáⁿ-lâng, in-ūi ū chin chōe lâng tī hia, koh Iâ-so͘ ia̍h í-keng tiām-tiām-á lī-khui." 
John5:14 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān tú-tio̍h i, kā i kóng, “Lí í-keng hó lah, m̄-thang koh hoān-chōe, chiah bōe tú-tio̍h koh-khah chhám ê tāi-chì.”" 
John5:15 Hit-ê lâng lī-khui liáu-āu tùi Iû-thài -lâng kóng, kā i i-hó,ê sī Iâ-so͘." 
John5:16 In-ūi án-ni, in khai-sí pek-hāi Iâ-so͘, in-ūi I tī An-hioh-ji̍t kā lâng i-pīⁿ." 
John5:17 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Góa ê Pē kàu hiān-chāi it-ti̍t teh kang-chok, góa mā teh kang-chok.”" 
John5:18 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni, Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k koh-khah siūⁿ-beh hāi-sí Iâ-so͘; in-ūi Iâ-so͘ m̄-nā ûi-hoān An-hioh-ji̍t ê kui-tēng, koh chheng Siōng-tè chòe I ka-kī ê Pē, khòaⁿ ka-kī kap Siōng-tè pêng-téng." 
John5:19 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, Kiáⁿ bōe-tàng chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe tāi-chì, chí-ū khòaⁿ Pē chòe sím-mi̍h, I chiah chiàu án-ni chòe. Pē só͘ chòe,ê, Kiáⁿ mā chiàu án-ni chòe." 
John5:20 In-ūi Pē thiàⁿ Kiáⁿ, chiong ka-kī só͘ teh chòe ê it-chhè lóng chí-sī Kiáⁿ, mā ōe chiong pí chiah-ê khah-tōa ê sū chí-sī I, beh hō͘ lín kám-kak kî-koài." 
John5:21 Pē án-chóaⁿ hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, sù in oa̍h-miā, chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, Kiáⁿ mā beh chiong oa̍h-miā sù hō͘ ka-kī só͘ ài ê lâng." 
John5:22 Pē lóng bô kā lâng sím-phòaⁿ. I í-keng chiong sím-phòaⁿ ê koân-pèng lóng kau hō͘ Kiáⁿ," 
John5:23 sī beh hō͘ chèng-lâng chun-kèng Kiáⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ chun-kèng Pē. Bô chun-kèng Kiáⁿ chiū-sī bô chun-kèng chhe I lâi ê Pē." 
John5:24 “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, thiaⁿ góa ê ōe koh sìn chhe góa Hit-ūi ê lâng ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; i í-keng chhut-sí-ji̍p-oa̍h, m̄-bián siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
John5:25 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, sî teh-beh kàu, hiān-chāi chiū-sī, sí-lâng ōe thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê siaⁿ, thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng ōe oa̍h,khí-lâi." 
John5:26 In-ūi Pē pún-sin sī oa̍h-miā ê kun-goân, I mā án-ni hō͘ Kiáⁿ chiâⁿ-chòe oa̍h-miā ê kun-goân." 
John5:27 I í-keng chiong sím-phòaⁿ ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ Kiáⁿ, in-ūi Kiáⁿ sī Jîn-chú." 
John5:28 Chit-ê sū lín m̄-thang kám-kak kî-koài, in-ūi sî teh-beh kàu, só͘-ū sí,khì ê lâng lóng ōe thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Kiáⁿ ê siaⁿ," 
John5:29 in ōe tùi bōng,ni̍h chhut,lâi: Choh-hó,ê koh-oa̍h, tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā; choh-pháiⁿ,ê koh-oa̍h, siū tēng-chōe.”" 
John5:30 “Góa bōe-tàng chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe sím-mi̍h; góa chí-ū chiàu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê lâi sím-phòaⁿ. Góa ê sím-phòaⁿ kong-chèng, in-ūi góa m̄-sī thàn ka-kī ê ì-sù, sī chiàu chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi ê chí-ì." 
John5:31 “Góa nā ūi-tio̍h ka-kī choh-chèng, góa ê kiàn-chèng chiū bô chin-si̍t." 
John5:32 Ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê lâng teh ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng, góa chai i ūi-tio̍h góa só͘ chòe ê kiàn-chèng sī chin-si̍t." 
John5:33 Lín bat phài lâng khì kìⁿ Iok-hān, i ū ūi-tio̍h chin-lí choh-chèng." 
John5:34 M̄-sī kóng góa su-iàu lâng ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng; kî-si̍t góa kóng chiah-ê sū sī beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h kiù. 
John5:35 Iok-hān sī teh to̍h teh chiò-kng ê teng, lín hoaⁿ-hí chiām-sî hióng-siū i ê kng." 
John5:36 Put-kò góa ū pí Iok-hān khah ū-la̍t ê kiàn-chèng. Pē kau-tài góa oân-sêng ê kang-chok, chiū-sī góa hiān-chāi teh chòe ê kang-chok, ōe-tàng ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng, piáu-sī Pē ū chhe góa." 
John5:37 Koh chhe góa ê Pē í-keng chhin-sin ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng. Lín iáu m̄-bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê siaⁿ, mā m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h I ê hêng-chōng." 
John5:38 Lín bô chiong I ê ōe khǹg tī sim-lāi, in-ūi lín m̄ sìn I só͘ chhe Hit-ūi." 
John5:39 Lín gián-kiù Sèng-keng, in-ūi lín siūⁿ, tī hit lāi-bīn ōe chhē-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā. Kî-si̍t, chiū-sī Sèng-keng teh ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng." 
John5:40 Án-ni, lín iáu-kú m̄-khéng lâi góa chia tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā." 
John5:41 “Góa bô chiap-siū lâng ê chheng-chàn. 
John5:42 M̄-kú góa chin-chiàⁿ liáu-kái lín, tī lín lāi-bīn bô thiàⁿ Siōng-tè ê sim." 
John5:43 Góa hōng góa ê Pē ê miâ lâi, lín bô chiap-la̍p góa; nā ū pa̍t-lâng hōng ka-kī ê miâ lâi, lín tian-tò kā i chiap-la̍p." 
John5:44 Lín hō͘-siōng chheng-chàn, chóng-sī bô tui-kiû tùi î-it ê Siōng-tè lâi ê chheng-chàn, án-ni lín ná ōe-tàng sìn góa?" 
John5:45 M̄-thang siūⁿ-kóng góa ōe tī Pē ê bīn-chêng khòng-kò lín. Teh khòng-kò lín,ê sī lín it-ti̍t teh gióng-bōng ê Mô͘-se. 
John5:46 Lín nā chin-chiàⁿ ū sìn Mô͘-se, mā ōe sìn góa; in-ūi i ū siá góa ê tāi-chì." 
John5:47 I siá ê chheh lín to m̄ sìn, ná ōe sìn góa kóng ê ōe?”" 
John6:1 Chit-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ kè-khì Ka-lī-lī-ô͘, chiū-sī Thê-pí-lí-a-ô͘ ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ." 
John6:2 Ū chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng tè I khì, in-ūi in ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ i-hó pīⁿ-lâng ê sîn-jiah." 
John6:3 Iâ-so͘ peh-chiūⁿ soaⁿ, kap I ê bûn-tô͘ tī hia chē." 
John6:4 Hit-sî Iû-thài -lâng ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh teh-beh kàu. 
John6:5 Iâ-so͘ gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t tōa-tīn lâng it-ti̍t ǹg I hia teh lâi, chiū kā Hui-le̍k kóng, “Lán beh khì tó-ūi bóe chia̍h-mi̍h thang hō͘ chiah-ê lâng chia̍h?”" 
John6:6 I kóng án-ni sī teh chhì-giām Hui-le̍k; kî-si̍t, I ka-kī í-keng chai teh-beh chòe ê tāi-chì." 
John6:7 Hui-le̍k ìn kóng, “Ēng nn̄g pah ê gûn-á khì bóe piáⁿ mā bô-kàu hō͘ ta̍k-ê lâng chia̍h chi̍t-sut-á.”" 
John6:8 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘, chiū-sī Se-bûn Pí-tek ê sió-tī An-tek-lia̍t, kā Iâ-so͘ kóng," 
John6:9 “Chia ū chi̍t ê gín-á, i ū gō͘ ê tōa-be̍h-piáⁿ kap nn̄g bé hî; m̄-kú lâng chiah-ni̍h chōe, kan-ta chiah-ê ná ū-kàu?”" 
John6:10 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín kiò chèng-lâng chē,lo̍h-khì.” Hit-ê só͘-chāi chháu chin chōe. Chèng-lâng chiū chē,lo̍h-khì; kan-ta ta-po͘-lâng chiū ū gō͘-chheng." 
John6:11 Jiân-āu Iâ-so͘ the̍h hiah-ê piáⁿ, kám-siā liáu-āu pun hō͘ chē tī hia ê lâng; hî mā án-ni pun, chhut-chāi in chia̍h." 
John6:12 In chia̍h pá liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ kā I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Chiong chia̍h chhun ê chhùi-sut-á khioh,khí-lâi, m̄-thang phah-sńg.”" 
John6:13 In chiū chiong hit gō͘ ê piáⁿ ê sut-á, chiū-sī tāi-ke chia̍h chhun,ê, khioh,khí-lâi, lóng-chóng móa cha̍p-jī nâ." 
John6:14 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah, chiū kóng, “Chit-ê chin-chiàⁿ sī beh lâi chit sè-kan hit-ūi Sian-ti!”" 
John6:15 Iâ-so͘ chai-iáⁿ chèng-lâng teh-beh kiông-pek I choh-ông, chiū ka-kī chi̍t ê koh thè-khì soaⁿ,ni̍h." 
John6:16 Hông-hun ê sî, I ê bûn-tô͘ lo̍h-khì ô͘-piⁿ," 
John6:17 chiūⁿ-chûn beh kè ô͘ khì Ka-pek-lông. Hit-sî thiⁿ í-keng àm, Iâ-so͘ iáu-bē kàu in hia." 
John6:18 Hut-jiân, in-ūi thàu tōa-hong, ô͘ khí tōa-éng." 
John6:19 Bûn-tô͘ kò-chûn, tāi-iok kò gō͘ la̍k kong-lí ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tī ô͘ ê téng-bīn teh kiâⁿ, kiâⁿ óa-kūn chûn, in chiū khí kiaⁿ." 
John6:20 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Sī góa, bián kiaⁿ!”" 
John6:21 Bûn-tô͘ chiū hoaⁿ-hí chiap I chiūⁿ-chûn; chûn liâm-piⁿ kàu in beh khì ê só͘-chāi. 
John6:22 Keh-ji̍t, iáu tī ô͘ tùi-bīn hōaⁿ hit-tīn lâng hoat-kak tī hia chí-ū chi̍t chiah chûn nā-tiāⁿ; Iâ-so͘ mā bô kap bûn-tô͘ chòe-hé chē-chûn, kan-ta bûn-tô͘ ka-kī kè,khì." 
John6:23 M̄-kú ū kúi-nā chiah chûn tùi Thê-pí-lí-a lâi kàu óa-kūn Chú kám-siā liáu-āu hō͘ chèng-lâng chia̍h-piáⁿ hit-ê só͘-chāi. 
John6:24 Chèng-lâng chi̍t-ē hoat-kak Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ lóng bô tī hia, chiū chē hiah-ê chûn kè-khì Ka-pek-lông chhē Iâ-so͘." 
John6:25 Chèng-lâng tī ô͘ ê tùi-bīn hōaⁿ chhē-tio̍h Iâ-so͘, chiū kā I mn̄g, “Lia̍p-pí, lí sím-mi̍h sî lâi chia?”" 
John6:26 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, lín chhē góa, sī in-ūi ū piáⁿ chia̍h kàu pá, m̄-sī in-ūi khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sîn-jiah." 
John6:27 M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h ōe pāi-hoāi ê chia̍h-mi̍h phah-piàⁿ, tio̍h ūi-tio̍h kú-tn̂g chûn-chāi, ōe-tàng hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā hit-ê chia̍h-mi̍h lâi phah-piàⁿ, chiū-sī Jîn-chú beh hō͘ lín,ê; in-ūi Pē Siōng-tè í-keng kā I khàm-ìn jīn-tēng.”" 
John6:28 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Beh oân-sêng Siōng-tè ê kang-chok, goán tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
John6:29 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sìn Siōng-tè só͘ chhe Hit-ūi chiū-sī chòe Siōng-tè ê kang.”" 
John6:30 In chiū kóng, “Lí beh kiâⁿ sím-mi̍h sîn-jiah hō͘ goán khòaⁿ lâi sìn lí? Lí beh chòe sím-mi̍h?" 
John6:31 Goán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chia̍h má-ná, tú-tú chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: ‘I ū chiong tùi thiⁿ lâi ê piáⁿ hō͘ in chia̍h.’”" 
John6:32 Iâ-so͘ chiū kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, m̄-sī Mô͘-se chiong tùi thiⁿ lâi ê piáⁿ hō͘ lín, sī góa ê Pē chiong tùi thiⁿ lâi chin ê piáⁿ hō͘ lín." 
John6:33 In-ūi Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê piáⁿ chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi, sù oa̍h-miā hō͘ sè-kan,ê.”" 
John6:34 In chiū kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, chhiáⁿ lí put-sî chiong chit-ê piáⁿ hō͘ goán.”" 
John6:35 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa chiū-sī hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā ê piáⁿ; lâi góa chia ê lâng it-tēng bōe iau, sìn góa ê lâng it-tēng bōe chhùi-ta." 
John6:36 M̄-kú góa bat kā lín kóng, lín í-keng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa, iáu-kú m̄ sìn." 
John6:37 Pē só͘ hō͘ góa ê lâng lóng ōe lâi góa chia; lâi góa chia ê lâng, góa choa̍t-tùi bōe kā i khì-sak;" 
John6:38 in-ūi góa tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi, m̄-sī beh chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chòe tāi-chì, sī beh si̍t-hêng chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi ê chí-ì." 
John6:39 Chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi ê chí-ì sī án-ni: I só͘ hō͘ góa ê lâng, góa liân chi̍t ê to bōe sòng-sit, tī Boa̍t-ji̍t góa ōe hō͘ in koh-oa̍h." 
John6:40 In-ūi góa ê Pē ê chí-ì sī beh hō͘ só͘-ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Kiáⁿ lâi sìn Kiáⁿ ê lâng lóng ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; tī Boa̍t-ji̍t góa ōe hō͘ in koh-oa̍h.” 
John6:41 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ kóng “Góa sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ”, Iû-thài -lâng chiū su-hā gī-lūn," 
John6:42 kóng, “Chit-ê lâng kiám m̄-sī Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘? Lán bat I ê pē-bú, hiān-chāi I ná ōe kóng ‘góa sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi,ê’?”" 
John6:43 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Lín mài teh su-hā gī-lūn." 
John6:44 Nā m̄-sī chhe góa ê Pē ín-chhōa, bô lâng ōe lâi góa chia. Lâi góa chia,ê, tī Boa̍t-ji̍t góa ōe hō͘ i koh-oa̍h." 
John6:45 Sian-ti ê chheh ū kì-chài, ‘Chèng-lâng lóng ōe chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê kàu-tō.’ Só͘-ū thiaⁿ-thàn Pē, tùi I ha̍k-si̍p ê lâng, ōe lâi góa chia." 
John6:46 Che m̄-sī kóng ū lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Pē; chí-ū tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi Hit-ūi bat khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. 
John6:47 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng: Sìn ê lâng ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā. 
John6:48 Góa chiū-sī hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā ê piáⁿ. 
John6:49 Lín ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chia̍h má-ná mā sí,khì. 
John6:50 Che chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ, hō͘ lâng chia̍h-liáu bōe sí." 
John6:51 Góa chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi hit-ê oa̍h-miā ê piáⁿ. Lâng nā chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ ōe éng-oán oa̍h,teh. Góa beh hō͘ lâng ê piáⁿ chiū-sī góa ê bah, sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ sè-kan-lâng ū oa̍h-miā hiàn,ê.”" 
John6:52 Tùi án-ni, Iû-thài -lâng hō͘-siōng cheng-lūn kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ná ōe-tàng ēng I ê bah hō͘ lán chia̍h?”" 
John6:53 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, lín nā bô chia̍h Jîn-chú ê bah, bô lim I ê huih, lín lāi-bīn chiū bô oa̍h-miā." 
John6:54 Chia̍h góa ê bah, lim góa ê huih ê lâng, chiū ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; tī Boa̍t-ji̍t góa ōe hō͘ i koh-oa̍h." 
John6:55 Góa ê bah chin-chiàⁿ ōe-chia̍h,tit, góa ê huih chin-chiàⁿ ōe-lim,tit." 
John6:56 Chia̍h góa ê bah, lim góa ê huih ê lâng, tiàm tī góa lāi-bīn, góa mā tiàm tī i lāi-bīn." 
John6:57 Éng-oa̍h ê Pē chhe góa, góa mā in-ūi Pē lâi oa̍h; chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, chia̍h góa ê lâng mā ōe in-ūi góa lâi oa̍h." 
John6:58 Che chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ kàng,lo̍h-lâi ê piáⁿ; m̄-sī chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê chó͘-sian só͘ chia̍h ê piáⁿ, in chia̍h-liáu mā sí,khì; chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ ê lâng ōe éng-oán oa̍h,teh.”" 
John6:59 Chiah-ê sī Iâ-so͘ tī Ka-pek-lông ê hōe-tn̂g kà-sī lâng ê sî kóng ê ōe. 
John6:60 Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘ tiong ū chin chōe lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kóng, “Chit-ê ōe chin khùn-lân liáu-kái, siáⁿ-lâng thiaⁿ ōe lo̍h,khì?”" 
John6:61 Iâ-so͘ sim-lāi chai-iáⁿ I ê bûn-tô͘ su-hā teh gī-lūn chit-ê sū, chiū tùi in kóng, “Chit-ê ōe kā lín jiá,tio̍h sī,bô?" 
John6:62 Án-ni, lín nā khòaⁿ-tio̍h Jîn-chú seng-koân khì kàu I goân-lâi ê só͘-chāi, lín beh án-chóaⁿ?" 
John6:63 Sù oa̍h-miā,ê sī Siōng-tè ê Sîn; jio̍k-thé lóng bô kong-hāu. Góa kā lín kóng chiah-ê ōe sī Sîn, sī oa̍h-miā." 
John6:64 M̄-kú lín tiong-kan ū lâng m̄ sìn.” In-ūi Iâ-so͘ tùi khí-thâu chiū chai sím-mi̍h-lâng m̄ sìn, sím-mi̍h-lâng beh kā I chhut-bōe." 
John6:65 I koh kóng, “In-ūi án-ni, góa bat kā lín kóng, nā m̄-sī Pē ún-chún, bô lâng ōe-tàng lâi góa chia.”" 
John6:66 In-ūi án-ni, I ê bûn-tô͘ tiong ū chin chōe lâng lī-khui, bô koh tè I." 
John6:67 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ kóng, “Lín mā beh lī-khui o͘h?”" 
John6:68 Se-bûn Pí-tek ìn kóng, “Chú ah, lí ū éng-oán-oa̍h ê ōe, goán beh khì tè siáⁿ-lâng?" 
John6:69 Goán í-keng sìn, koh khak-si̍t chai lí sī Siōng-tè ê Sèng-chiá.”" 
John6:70 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa kiám m̄-sī kéng-soán lín cha̍p-jī lâng? Lín tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê sī mô͘-kúi.”" 
John6:71 I án-ni kóng sī teh chí Í-su-ka-lio̍k Se-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi, i sī cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê, teh-beh chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘." 
John7:1 Chit-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Iâ-so͘ khì Ka-lī-lī kéng-lāi ta̍k só͘-chāi; I bô ài khì Iû-thài, in-ūi Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù chhē ki-hōe beh kā I thâi." 
John7:2 Iû-thài -lâng ê Tah-liâu-choeh teh-beh kàu. 
John7:3 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ ê hiaⁿ-tī kā I kóng, “Lí tio̍h lī-khui chia khì Iû-thài, hō͘ lí ê bûn-tô͘ mā thang khòaⁿ lí teh chòe ê tāi-chì." 
John7:4 Lâng beh chhut-miâ bōe tiām-tiām-á chòe. Kì-jiân lí teh chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì, tio̍h khì chòe hō͘ sè-kan-lâng khòaⁿ.”" 
John7:5 In-ūi liân I ê hiaⁿ-tī to bô sìn I. 
John7:6 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa ê sî iáu-bē kàu; put-kò lín ta̍k-sî lóng piān-piān." 
John7:7 Sè-kan-lâng bô lí-iû oàn-hūn lín; in oàn-hūn góa, in-ūi góa put-sî teh chí-chhut in ê hêng-ûi siâ-ok." 
John7:8 Lín chòe lín chiūⁿ-khì siú-choeh; góa bô ài chiūⁿ-khì siú chit-ê choeh, in-ūi góa ê sî-ki iáu-bē sêng-se̍k.”" 
John7:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu kè-sio̍k lâu tī Ka-lī-lī. 
John7:10 Iâ-so͘ ê hiaⁿ-tī chiūⁿ-khì siú-choeh, I mā khì, m̄-sī kong-khai, sī tiām-tiām-á khì." 
John7:11 Choeh-kî ê tiong-kan, Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù teh chhē Iâ-so͘, mn̄g kóng, “I tī sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi?”" 
John7:12 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng su-hā teh gī-lūn Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì. Ū lâng kóng, “I sī hó-lâng.” Mā ū lâng kóng, “M̄-sī, I sī teh siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng.”" 
John7:13 M̄-kú in kiaⁿ Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù, bô lâng káⁿ kong-jiân kóng-khí I ê tāi-chì." 
John7:14 Choeh-kî kè chi̍t-pòaⁿ, Iâ-so͘ chiah chiūⁿ-khì Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng." 
John7:15 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù kám-kak kî-koài, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng bô siū-kè kàu-io̍k, ná hiah-ni̍h ū ha̍k-būn?”" 
John7:16 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa ê kà-sī m̄-sī góa ka-kī ê, sī chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi ê kà-sī." 
John7:17 Lâng nā goān-ì si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, chiū ōe chai góa ê kà-sī sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi á-sī chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù teh kóng." 
John7:18 Óa-khò ka-kī kóng,ê sī teh kiû ka-kī ê êng-kng; kiû chhe i Hit-ūi ê êng-kng ê lâng sī chin-si̍t, i ê lāi-bīn lóng bô put-gī." 
John7:19 Mô͘-se kiám bô hō͘ lín Lu̍t-hoat? Put-kò lín tiong-kan bô kah chi̍t ê chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat. Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín siūⁿ-beh thâi góa?” 
John7:20 Kûn-chiòng ìn kóng, “Lí m̄-teh khòaⁿ-tio̍h kúi. Siáⁿ-lâng siūⁿ-beh thâi lí?”" 
John7:21 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Góa kan-ta chòe chi̍t hāng tāi-chì, lín chiū lóng kám-kak kî-koài." 
John7:22 Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lín kiâⁿ kat-lé, lín mā tī An-hioh-ji̍t kā lâng kiâⁿ kat-lé. Sū-si̍t, chit-ê lé-gî m̄-sī tùi Mô͘-se, sī tùi lín chó͘-sian khai-sí." 
John7:23 Kì-jiân lín ūi-tio̍h beh chun-siú Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, tī An-hioh-ji̍t kā chi̍t ê ta-po͘ gín-á kiâⁿ kat-lé, án-ni góa tī An-hioh-ji̍t hō͘ chi̍t ê pīⁿ-lâng oân-choân hó,khí-lâi, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ tùi góa siū-khì?" 
John7:24 M̄-thang khòaⁿ gōa-piáu lâi phòaⁿ-toàn sī-hui, tio̍h chiàu kong-chèng phòaⁿ-toàn.”" 
John7:25 Ū chi̍t-kóa Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng teh kóng, “Chit-ê kiám m̄-sī in siūⁿ-beh sat-hāi hit-ê lâng?" 
John7:26 Lí khòaⁿ, I kong-khai teh kóng-ōe, in mā bô kóng sím-mi̍h kā I hoán-tùi. Kiám kóng chiah-ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ chin-chiàⁿ chai chit-ê lâng sī Ki-tok?" 
John7:27 M̄-kú chit-ê lâng ê lâi-le̍k lán lóng chai; Ki-tok lâi ê sî, bô lâng ōe chai I tùi tó-ūi lâi.”" 
John7:28 Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī ê sî, tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Lín bat góa, mā chai góa ê lâi-le̍k; put-kò góa m̄-sī chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù lâi. Chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi sī chin-si̍t, lín khiok m̄ bat I." 
John7:29 Góa bat I, in-ūi góa tùi I hia lâi, I chhe-khián góa lâi.”" 
John7:30 In chiū siūⁿ-beh kā I lia̍h, put-kò bô lâng hē-chhiú, in-ūi I ê sî iáu-bē kàu." 
John7:31 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng sìn I, kóng, “Ki-tok lâi ê sî, kiám ōe pí chit-ê lâng kiâⁿ khah chōe sîn-jiah?”" 
John7:32 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h kûn-chiòng su-hā teh gī-lūn Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì, chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū phài Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe khì lia̍h Iâ-so͘." 
John7:33 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa koh kap lín chòe-hé bô jōa kú chiū beh tńg-khì chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi hia." 
John7:34 Lín ōe chhē góa, m̄-kú chhē bōe tio̍h, in-ūi góa khì ê só͘-chāi, lín bōe-tàng khì.”" 
John7:35 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù hō͘-siōng kóng, “Chit-ê lâng beh khì tó-ūi hō͘ lán chhē bōe tio̍h? I siūⁿ-beh khì sì-sòaⁿ tī Hi-la̍h siâⁿ-chhī ê Iû-thài kiâu-bîn hia, khì kà-sī Hi-la̍h -lâng sī,bô?" 
John7:36 I kóng ‘Lín ōe chhē góa, m̄-kú chhē bōe tio̍h’, koh kóng ‘Góa khì ê só͘-chāi, lín bōe-tàng khì’, che sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù?”" 
John7:37 Choeh-kî ê chòe-āu hit-ji̍t, mā-sī siōng tiōng-iàu ê ji̍t, Iâ-so͘ khiā,khí-lâi, tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Chhùi-ta ê lâng tio̍h lâi góa chia lim." 
John7:38 Sìn góa ê lâng, chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kóng, ‘Ū oa̍h-chúi ê khoe ōe tùi i ê pak-lāi chhèng,chhut-lâi.’”" 
John7:39 Iâ-so͘ án-ni kóng sī chí sìn I ê lâng teh-beh niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn. Hit-sî, Siōng-tè iáu-bē sù Sèng Sîn, in-ūi Iâ-so͘ iáu-bē tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John7:40 Kûn-chiòng ê tiong-kan ū lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū kóng, “Chit-ê lâng chin-chiàⁿ sī hit-ūi Sian-ti.”" 
John7:41 Koh ū lâng kóng, “Chit-ê lâng sī Ki-tok.” Put-kò mā ū lâng kóng, “Ki-tok ná ōe tùi Ka-lī-lī chhut?" 
John7:42 Sèng-keng kiám m̄-sī kóng Ki-tok sī Tāi-pi̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun, sī tùi Tāi-pi̍t ê kò͘-hiong Pek-lī-hêng chhut?”" 
John7:43 Án-ni, kûn-chiòng in-ūi Iâ-so͘ ê iân-kò͘ khí hun-cheng." 
John7:44 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siūⁿ-beh lia̍h Iâ-so͘, m̄-kú bô lâng hē-chhiú." 
John7:45 Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe tńg-khì kìⁿ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng. In chiū mn̄g kéng-ōe kóng, “Lín ná bô kā I ah,lâi?”" 
John7:46 Kéng-ōe ìn kóng, “M̄-bat ū lâng kóng-ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-ê lâng.”" 
John7:47 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū tùi in kóng, “Lín mā hō͘ I bê,khì o͘h?" 
John7:48 Lán ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ á-sī Hoat-lī-sài-lâng kiám ū lâng sìn I? 
John7:49 Chit-tīn m̄ bat Lu̍t-hoat ê kûn-chiòng sī siū chiù-chó͘,ê.” 
John7:50 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ê tiong-kan bat khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ kā in kóng," 
John7:51 “Chiàu lán ê Lu̍t-hoat, bô seng sím-mn̄g koh chhâ-bêng lâng ū chòe sím-mi̍h, kiám ōe-tàng kā i tēng-chōe?”" 
John7:52 In ìn kóng, “Lí mā-sī Ka-lī-lī lâi,ê sī,bô? Lí chhâ-khó Sèng-keng chiū chai Ka-lī-lī m̄-bat chhut sian-ti.” {" 
John7:53 Chèng-lâng lóng tńg-khì ka-kī ê chhù," 
John8:1 m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ khì Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ. 
John8:2 Keh-ji̍t thàu-chá, Iâ-so͘ koh khì Sèng-tiān. Bîn-chiòng lóng óa-lâi I hia, I chiū chē lo̍h-khì kā in kà-sī." 
John8:3 Hit-sî keng-ha̍k-kàu-su kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chhōa chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng lâi, i teh hoān kan-îm ê sî hō͘ lâng lia̍h,tio̍h. In hō͘ i khiā tī tiong-ng," 
John8:4 mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lāu-su, chit-ê cha-bó͘-lâng hoān kan-îm ê sî hō͘ lâng lia̍h,tio̍h." 
John8:5 Kun-kù Lu̍t-hoat, Mô͘-se bēng-lēng lán tio̍h ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm-sí chit-khoán cha-bó͘-lâng. Lí ū sím-mi̍h ì-kiàn?”" 
John8:6 In án-ni kóng sī beh chhì-thàm Iâ-so͘, thang chhē khang-phāng kā I kò. Iâ-so͘ khû,lo̍h-khì, ēng chńg-thâu-á tī thô͘-kha siá-jī." 
John8:7 In ti̍t-ti̍t kā I mn̄g, Iâ-so͘ chiū khiā,khí-lâi, tùi in kóng, “Lín tiong-kan bô chōe ê lâng seng the̍h chio̍h-thâu kā i tìm.”" 
John8:8 Jiân-āu I koh khû lo̍h-khì tī thô͘-kha siá-jī. 
John8:9 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe, tùi lāu,ê khai-sí chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê liu,chhut-khì, chhun Iâ-so͘ chi̍t ê, hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng iáu khiā tī hia." 
John8:10 Iâ-so͘ khiā,khí-lâi, kā i kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng, in tī tó-ūi? Bô lâng kā lí tēng-chōe sī,bô?”" 
John8:11 I ìn kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, bô.” Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa mā bô kā lí tēng-chōe. Lí tńg,khì, í-āu m̄-thang koh hoān-chōe.”}" 
John8:12 Iâ-so͘ koh kā chèng-lâng kóng, “Góa sī sè-kan ê kng; tè góa ê lâng bōe tī o͘-àm tiong seng-oa̍h, hoán-tńg ū oa̍h-miā ê kng.”" 
John8:13 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chiū tùi I kóng, “Lí teh ūi ka-kī choh-chèng, lí ê kiàn-chèng bô-hāu.”" 
John8:14 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Sui-jiân góa ūi ka-kī choh-chèng, góa ê kiàn-chèng ū-hāu, in-ūi góa chai góa tùi tó-ūi lâi, beh khì tó-ūi; m̄-kú lín m̄ chai góa tùi tó-ūi lâi, beh khì tó-ūi." 
John8:15 Lín ēng lâng ê phiau-chún phoe-phòaⁿ lâng, góa bô kā lâng phoe-phòaⁿ." 
John8:16 Góa nā phoe-phòaⁿ, góa ê phòaⁿ-toàn chèng-khak, in-ūi góa m̄-sī ka-kī chi̍t ê teh phòaⁿ-toàn, sī chhe góa ê Pē kap góa chòe-hé phòaⁿ-toàn." 
John8:17 Koh lín ê Lu̍t-hoat ū kì-chài, ū nn̄g ê lâng choh-chèng, in ê kiàn-chèng chiah ū-hāu." 
John8:18 Góa ūi ka-kī choh-chèng, chhe góa ê Pē mā ūi góa choh-chèng.”" 
John8:19 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí ê Pē tī tó-ūi?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín m̄ bat góa, mā m̄ bat góa ê Pē. Lín nā bat góa, mā ōe bat góa ê Pē.”" 
John8:20 Chiah-ê ōe sī Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng ê sî, tī khǹg hōng-hiàn-kūi hia kóng,ê. Put-kò bô lâng kā I lia̍h, in-ūi I ê sî iáu-bē kàu." 
John8:21 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Góa beh lī-khui lah. Lín ōe chhē góa, m̄-kú lín ōe in-ūi ka-kī ê chōe lâi sí; góa khì ê só͘-chāi, lín bōe-tàng khì.”" 
John8:22 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù kóng, “I kóng ‘Góa khì ê só͘-chāi, lín bōe-tàng khì’, kiám kóng I beh khì chū-sat?”" 
John8:23 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín tùi ē-bīn lâi, góa tùi téng-bīn lâi. Lín sio̍k chit sè-kan, góa bô sio̍k chit sè-kan." 
John8:24 Só͘-í góa chiah kā lín kóng lín ōe in-ūi ka-kī ê chōe lâi sí; in-ūi lín nā m̄ sìn góa chiū-sī ‘Chū-iú-éng-iú’ Hit-ūi, lín ōe in-ūi ka-kī ê chōe lâi sí.”" 
John8:25 In chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa tùi khí-thâu chiū kā lín kóng lah." 
John8:26 Koan-hē lín, góa ū chin chōe thang kóng, thang tēng-chōe. M̄-kú chhe góa Hit-ūi sī chin-si̍t, góa chiong tùi I thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê thoân hō͘ sè-kan-lâng.”" 
John8:27 In bô liáu-kái Iâ-so͘ sī teh tùi in kóng Pē ê tāi-chì. 
John8:28 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lín kú-khí Jîn-chú liáu-āu chiū ōe chai, góa chiū-sī ‘Chū-iú-éng-iú’ Hit-ūi, koh góa chòe tāi-chì bô chi̍t hāng sī chiàu góa ka-kī ê ì-sù, chí-ū chiàu Pē kà-sī góa,ê lâi kóng." 
John8:29 Chhe góa Hit-ūi kap góa tông-chāi; I m̄-bat pàng góa ka-kī chi̍t ê, in-ūi góa put-sî teh chòe I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê tāi-chì.”" 
John8:30 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe ê sî, ū chin chōe lâng sìn I." 
John8:31 Iâ-so͘ tùi sìn I hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng, “Lín nā kè-sio̍k chun-siú góa ê ōe, chiū si̍t-chāi sī góa ê bûn-tô͘;" 
John8:32 lín ōe bat chin-lí, chin-lí ōe hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h chū-iû.”" 
John8:33 In ìn kóng, “Goán sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun, m̄-bat chòe lâng ê lô͘-lē. Lí ná ōe kóng ‘Lín ōe tit-tio̍h chū-iû’?”" 
John8:34 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, ta̍k-ê hoān-chōe ê lâng chiū-sī chōe ê lô͘-lē." 
John8:35 Lô͘-lē bô éng-oán sio̍k tī chú-lâng ê ka-têng, kiáⁿ chiū éng-oán ū." 
John8:36 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ nā hō͘ lín chū-iû, lín chiū si̍t-chāi ū chū-iû." 
John8:37 Góa chai lín sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun; m̄-kú lín siūⁿ-beh thâi góa, in-ūi lín m̄ chiap-siū góa ê ōe." 
John8:38 Góa sī teh kóng tùi góa ê Pē hia khòaⁿ,tio̍h-ê; lín sī teh chòe tùi lín ê pē hia thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê.” 
John8:39 In ìn Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Goán ê pē sī A-pek-la-hán.” Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Lín nā-sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun, lín ōe chòe A-pek-la-hán só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì." 
John8:40 Hiān-chāi góa chiong tùi Siōng-tè thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê chin-lí kā lín kóng, lín soah siūⁿ-beh thâi góa. A-pek-la-hán pèng bô chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì." 
John8:41 Lín sī teh chòe lín ê pē só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì.” In ìn kóng, “Goán m̄-sī su-seng-chú; Siōng-tè sī goán î-it ê Pē.”" 
John8:42 Iâ-so͘ chiū tùi in kóng, “Siōng-tè nā chin-chiàⁿ sī lín ê Pē, lín ōe thiàⁿ góa, in-ūi góa tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi, hiān-chāi tī chia. Góa m̄-sī chiàu góa ka-kī ê ì-sù lâi, sī Siōng-tè chhe-khián góa lâi." 
John8:43 Sī-án-chóaⁿ lín bô bêng-pe̍k góa ê ōe? Sī in-ūi góa ê ōe lín thiaⁿ bōe ji̍p,khì. 
John8:44 Lín ê pē sī Mô͘-kúi; lín kan-ta siūⁿ-beh si̍t-hêng lín ê pē ê io̍k-bōng. I tùi khí-thâu chiū-sī sat-jîn-hoān, bô chun-siú chin-lí, in-ūi i ê lāi-bīn bô chin-lí. Kóng pe̍h-chha̍t sī i ê pún-sèng, in-ūi i sī kóng pe̍h-chha̍t,ê, mā-sī kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ê lâng ê pē." 
John8:45 In-ūi góa kóng chin-lí, lín m̄ sìn góa." 
John8:46 Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng chí-chèng góa ū-chōe? Kì-jiân góa kóng chin-lí, sī-án-chóaⁿ lín m̄ sìn góa?" 
John8:47 Sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê ōe; lín m̄ thiaⁿ, in-ūi lín m̄-sī sio̍k Siōng-tè.”" 
John8:48 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Goán kóng lí sī Sat-má-lī-a -lâng, koh hoān-tio̍h kúi, kiám m̄-tio̍h?”" 
John8:49 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa bô hoān-tio̍h kúi; góa chun-kèng góa ê Pē, lín khiok bô chun-kèng góa." 
John8:50 Góa bô tui-kiû ka-kī ê êng-kng, put-kò ū Chi̍t-ūi ūi-tio̍h góa tui-kiû, ūi-tio̍h góa chhâi-koat." 
John8:51 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, chun-siú góa ê ōe ê lâng it-tēng éng-oán bōe sí.”" 
John8:52 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù ìn kóng, “Taⁿ goán khak-si̍t chai lí hoān-tio̍h kúi. A-pek-la-hán í-keng sí, chèng sian-ti mā sí,khì, lí ná kóng ‘chun-siú góa ê ōe ê lâng éng-oán bōe sí’?" 
John8:53 Lí kiám pí goán ê pē A-pek-la-hán khah úi-tāi? I í-keng sí, chèng sian-ti mā sí,khì. Lí siūⁿ lí sī siáⁿ-lâng?”" 
John8:54 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa nā êng-iāu góa ka-kī, góa ê êng-kng chiū bô kè-ta̍t. Êng-iāu góa,ê sī góa ê Pē, chiū-sī lín kóng ‘I sī goán ê Siōng-tè’ Hit-ūi." 
John8:55 Lín m̄ bat I, m̄-kú góa bat I. Góa nā kóng góa m̄ bat I, góa chiū kap lín kâng-khoán sī pe̍h-chha̍t. M̄-kú góa bat I, koh chun-siú I ê ōe." 
John8:56 Lín ê pē A-pek-la-hán hoaⁿ-hí teh thèng-hāu góa lâi-lîm ê ji̍t-chí; i ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, khòaⁿ-liáu chin hoaⁿ-hí.”" 
John8:57 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù tùi Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí iáu-bē gō͘-cha̍p hè, kiám bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h A-pek-la-hán?”" 
John8:58 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, A-pek-la-hán iáu-bē chhut-sì, góa í-keng chûn-chāi.”" 
John8:59 In chiū the̍h chio̍h-thâu beh kā I tìm; m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ siám-khui, lī-khui Sèng-tiān." 
John9:1 Iâ-so͘ teh kiâⁿ-lō͘ ê sî, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng ê lâng." 
John9:2 I ê bûn-tô͘ kā I mn̄g, “Lia̍p-pí, chit-ê lâng chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng, sī siáⁿ-lâng hoān-chōe, sī i pún-sin á-sī i ê pē-bú?”" 
John9:3 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “M̄-sī in-ūi chit-ê lâng hoān-chōe, mā m̄-sī i ê pē-bú hoān-chōe, sī beh thong-kè i lâi hián-bêng Siōng-tè ê chok-ûi." 
John9:4 Thàn iáu-sī ji̍t,sî, lán tio̍h chòe chhe góa Hit-ūi ê kang; àm-sî chi̍t-ē kàu, bô lâng ōe-tàng chòe kang." 
John9:5 Góa tī sè-kan ê sî, sī sè-kan ê kng.”" 
John9:6 Chiah-ê ōe kóng-liáu, I phùi chhùi-nōa tī thô͘-kha, ēng chhùi-nōa chhiau thô͘, jiân-āu ēng thô͘ kô͘ hit-ê lâng ê ba̍k-chiu," 
John9:7 kā i kóng, “Lí khì Se-lô-a-tî sóe.” — Se-lô-a ê ì-sù sī “Hōng chhe-khián” — I chiū khì sóe, tńg,lâi ê sî í-keng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
John9:8 I ê chhù-piⁿ kap bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h i í-chêng teh chòe khit-chia̍h ê lâng, kóng, “Chit-ê kiám m̄-sī put-sî chē-teh kā lâng pun hit-ê lâng?”" 
John9:9 Ū lâng kóng, “I chiū-sī.” Koh ū lâng kóng, “M̄-sī; sī chhin-chhiūⁿ i.” M̄-kú hit-ê lâng ka-kī kóng, “Góa chiū-sī.”" 
John9:10 In koh mn̄g i, “Lí ê ba̍k-chiu án-chóaⁿ ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ?”" 
John9:11 I ìn kóng, “Kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê lâng chhiau thô͘ kô͘ góa ê ba̍k-chiu, kā góa kóng, ‘Lí khì Se-lô-a-tî sóe’; góa khì, chi̍t-ē sóe, chiū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ.”" 
John9:12 In mn̄g i, “Hit-ê lâng tī tó-ūi?” I kóng, “Góa m̄ chai.”" 
John9:13 In chiū chhōa í-chêng sit-bêng hit-ê lâng khì Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng hia. 
John9:14 Iâ-so͘ chhiau thô͘ lâi khui i ê ba̍k-chiu hit-ji̍t sī An-hioh-ji̍t. 
John9:15 Só͘-í, Hoat-lī-sài-lâng koh chi̍t piàn mn̄g i sī-án-chóaⁿ ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. I kā in kóng, “I ēng thô͘ kô͘ góa ê ba̍k-chiu, góa khì sóe, chiū ū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ.”" 
John9:16 Ū chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-lâng kóng, “Chit-ê lâng m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi,ê, in-ūi I bô siú An-hioh-ji̍t.” Koh ū pa̍t-ê lâng kóng, “Chi̍t ê ū-chōe ê lâng ná ōe-tàng kiâⁿ chit-khoán sîn-jiah?” In tiong-kan soah khí hun-lia̍t." 
John9:17 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng chiū mn̄g hit-ê sit-bêng ê lâng, “Kì-jiân I hō͘ lí ê ba̍k-chiu ū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, lí kóng I sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” I ìn kóng, “I sī sian-ti.”" 
John9:18 Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù it-ti̍t bô siong-sìn i í-chêng sit-bêng, hiān-chāi ū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, chiū tiàu i ê pē-bú lâi," 
John9:19 mn̄g in kóng, “Chit-ê sī lín kóng chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng hit-ê kiáⁿ sī,bô? I hiān-chāi ná ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ?”" 
John9:20 I ê pē-bú ìn kóng, “Goán chai i sī goán kiáⁿ, mā chai i chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng." 
John9:21 M̄-kú i hiān-chāi án-chóaⁿ ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, goán m̄ chai; mā m̄ chai sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ i ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. Lín kā mn̄g, i í-keng tōa-hàn, ka-kī ōe-hiáu ìn.”" 
John9:22 I ê pē-bú án-ni kóng, sī in-ūi kiaⁿ Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù; in-ūi in í-keng chham-siông hó-sè, nā ū lâng sêng-jīn Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok, tio̍h kā i tùi hōe-tn̂g kek-chhut." 
John9:23 In-ūi án-ni, i ê pē-bú chiah kóng, “I í-keng tōa-hàn, lín kā mn̄g.”" 
John9:24 Hoat-lī-sài-lâng tē-jī piàn kiò hit-ê chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng,ê lâi, kā i kóng, “Tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng tio̍h chiàu-si̍t kóng. Goán chai chit-ê lâng sī ū-chōe ê lâng.”" 
John9:25 I ìn kóng, “I sī ū-chōe ê lâng á m̄-sī, góa m̄ chai. Góa chí-ū chai chi̍t hāng tāi-chì, góa chêng sit-bêng, taⁿ ū khòaⁿ,kìⁿ.”" 
John9:26 In chiū mn̄g i, “I kā lí chòe sím-mi̍h? I án-chóaⁿ hō͘ lí ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ?”" 
John9:27 I ìn kóng, “Góa í-keng kā lín kóng lah, lín m̄ thiaⁿ, ná beh koh thiaⁿ? Lín mā siūⁿ-beh chòe I ê bûn-tô͘ sī,bô?”" 
John9:28 In chiū kā i mē, “Lí chiah sī hit-ê lâng ê bûn-tô͘; goán sī Mô͘-se ê bûn-tô͘." 
John9:29 Goán chai Siōng-tè bat tùi Mô͘-se kóng-ōe, m̄-kú chit-ê lâng, i tùi tó-ūi lâi, goán m̄ chai.”" 
John9:30 Hit-ê lâng ìn kóng, “Án-ni ū-kàu kî-koài! I i-hó góa ê ba̍k-chiu, lín iáu-kú m̄ chai I tùi tó-ūi lâi?" 
John9:31 Lán chai Siōng-tè bô thiaⁿ chōe-jîn ê kî-kiû; m̄-kú lâng nā kèng-ùi Siōng-tè, si̍t-hêng I ê chí-ì, Siōng-tè chiū kā i thiaⁿ." 
John9:32 Tùi chhòng-sè í-lâi, iáu m̄-bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ kóng ū lâng hō͘ chhut-sì chiū sit-bêng ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
John9:33 Chit-ê lâng nā m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi, bōe-tàng chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì.”" 
John9:34 In chiū tùi i kóng, “Lí chhut-sì chiū ū chōe, tī chōe tiong tōa-hàn, koh káⁿ beh kà-sī goán!” In chiū kā i kek-chhut hōe-tn̂g." 
John9:35 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h in kā i kek-chhut hōe-tn̂g, āu-lâi chhē-tio̍h i, chiū kā i mn̄g, “Lí ū sìn Jîn-chú bô?”" 
John9:36 I ìn kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, sím-mi̍h-lâng sī Jîn-chú, góa thang sìn I?”" 
John9:37 Iâ-so͘ tùi i kóng, “Lí í-keng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h I; chit-chūn teh kap lí kóng-ōe,ê chiū-sī I.”" 
John9:38 I kóng, “Chú ah, góa sìn!” Chiū kūi lo̍h-khì kā I pài." 
John9:39 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa ūi-tio̍h sím-phòaⁿ lâi kàu chit sè-kan, thang hō͘ sit-bêng,ê khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hō͘ ba̍k-kng,ê pìⁿ-chòe sit-bêng.”" 
John9:40 Chi̍t-kóa Hoat-lī-sài-lâng thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Lí sī kóng goán mā sit-bêng o͘h?”" 
John9:41 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lín nā sit-bêng chiū bô chōe; m̄-kú lín kóng ‘Goán sī ba̍k-kng,ê’, án-ni lín iáu ū chōe.”" 
John10:1 “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, beh ji̍p-khì iûⁿ-tiâu, bô tùi mn̂g ji̍p, tùi pa̍t só͘-chāi pôaⁿ,kè-khì,ê, sī chha̍t, sī kiông-tō." 
John10:2 Tùi mn̂g ji̍p,khì-ê chiah sī iûⁿ ê bo̍k-chiá. 
John10:3 Kò͘-mn̂g,ê kā bo̍k-chiá khui-mn̂g; iûⁿ ōe-jīn-tit bo̍k-chiá ê siaⁿ. I kā ka-kī ê iûⁿ chi̍t-chiah chi̍t-chiah kiò-miâ, chhōa in chhut,lâi." 
John10:4 I chhōa ka-kī ê iûⁿ chhut,lâi liáu-āu, kiâⁿ tī iûⁿ ê thâu-chêng, iûⁿ chiū tè i kiâⁿ, in-ūi ōe-jīn-tit i ê siaⁿ." 
John10:5 In it-tēng bōe tè siⁿ-hūn-lâng, tian-tò ōe cháu-siám, in-ūi in m̄ bat siⁿ-hūn-lâng ê siaⁿ.”" 
John10:6 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng chit-ê phì-jū, m̄-kú in m̄ chai I teh kā in kóng sím-mi̍h." 
John10:7 Só͘-í, Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, góa sī iûⁿ ê mn̂g." 
John10:8 Só͘-ū pí góa khah tāi-seng lâi,ê lóng sī chha̍t, sī kiông-tō, iûⁿ bōe thiaⁿ in." 
John10:9 Góa sī mn̂g; thong-kè góa chit-ê mn̂g ji̍p,lâi-ê, ōe an-choân, thang chhut-chhut-ji̍p-ji̍p, koh ōe chhē-tio̍h chháu-po͘." 
John10:10 Chha̍t lâi, it-tēng sī beh thau-lia̍h, beh thâi, beh húi-bia̍t. Góa lâi sī beh hō͘ in tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā, tit kah chin hong-sēng." 
John10:11 “Góa sī hó ê bo̍k-chiá. Hó ê bo̍k-chiá ūi-tio̍h iûⁿ pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā. 
John10:12 Hō͘ lâng chhiàⁿ,ê m̄-sī bo̍k-chiá, iûⁿ m̄-sī ka-kī ê, i chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h chhâi-lông lâi chiū kā iûⁿ pàng,teh, tô-cháu; chhâi-lông chiong iûⁿ kā,khì, kā in kóaⁿ-sòaⁿ." 
John10:13 I tô-cháu, in-ūi i sī hō͘ lâng chhiàⁿ,ê, bô chin-chiàⁿ koan-sim iûⁿ-kûn." 
John10:14 Góa sī hó ê bo̍k-chiá; góa bat góa ka-kī ê iûⁿ, góa ê iûⁿ mā bat góa." 
John10:15 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Pē bat góa, góa mā bat Pē. Góa ūi-tio̍h iûⁿ pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā." 
John10:16 Góa iáu ū kî-tha ê iûⁿ bô sio̍k chit-ê iûⁿ-tiâu; góa mā it-tēng tio̍h chhōa in lâi. In ōe thiaⁿ góa ê siaⁿ, mā ōe chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t kûn, kui-sio̍k chi̍t ê bo̍k-chiá." 
John10:17 “Pē thiàⁿ góa, in-ūi góa pàng-sak ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā, thang koh tit-tio̍h sìⁿ-miā." 
John10:18 Bô lâng chhiúⁿ góa ê sìⁿ-miā, sī góa chū-goān pàng-sak. Góa ū koân pàng-sak, mā ū koân the̍h,tńg-lâi. Che sī góa tùi Pē chiap-siū ê bēng-lēng.”" 
John10:19 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ só͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe, Iû-thài -lâng koh khí hun-lia̍t." 
John10:20 In tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng kóng, “I hoān-tio̍h kúi, cheng-sîn sit-siông, ná tio̍h thiaⁿ I ê ōe?”" 
John10:21 Lēng-gōa ū lâng kóng, “Hoān-tio̍h kúi ê lâng bōe kóng chiah-ê ōe. Kúi kiám ōe khui sit-bêng ê lâng ê ba̍k-chiu?”" 
John10:22 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tú-teh khèng-chiok Hiàn-tiān-choeh, hit-sî sī tang-thiⁿ." 
John10:23 Iâ-so͘ tī Sèng-tiān ê Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông teh kiâⁿ. 
John10:24 Iû-thài -lâng kā Iâ-so͘ ûi,teh, tùi I kóng, “Lí beh hō͘ goán chhai-gî jōa kú? Lí nā-sī Ki-tok, tio̍h chiàu-si̍t kā goán kóng.”" 
John10:25 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa í-keng ū kā lín kóng, lín m̄ sìn. Góa hōng góa ê Pē ê miâ só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì teh ūi góa choh-chèng." 
John10:26 M̄-kú lín m̄ sìn, in-ūi lín m̄-sī góa ê iûⁿ." 
John10:27 Góa ê iûⁿ thiaⁿ góa ê siaⁿ, góa bat in, in tè góa." 
John10:28 Góa sù in éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; in éng-oán bōe bia̍t-bông; bô lâng ōe tùi góa ê chhiú kā in chhiúⁿ,khì. 
John10:29 Chiong iûⁿ sù hō͘ góa ê Pē pí it-chhè khah úi-tāi; bô lâng ōe-tàng kā iûⁿ tùi Pē ê chhiú chhiúⁿ,khì. 
John10:30 Góa kap Pē sī chi̍t-ê.” 
John10:31 Iû-thài -lâng koh the̍h chio̍h-thâu beh kā I tìm. 
John10:32 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Pē ū kiò góa chòe chin chōe hó tāi-chì, góa lóng ū chòe hō͘ lín khòaⁿ, lín sī ūi-tio̍h tó chi̍t hāng beh ēng chio̍h-thâu kā góa tìm?”" 
John10:33 Iû-thài -lâng ìn kóng, “Goán beh ēng chio̍h-thâu kā lí tìm, m̄-sī in-ūi lí chòe ê hó tāi-chì, sī in-ūi lí siat-to̍k Siōng-tè. Lí put-kò sī lâng, iáu-kú chū-chheng chòe Siōng-tè.”" 
John10:34 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lín ê Lu̍t-hoat kiám m̄-sī ū kì-chài ‘Góa kóng: Lín sī sîn’?" 
John10:35 Sèng-keng ê ōe éng-oán bōe kái-piàn. Kì-jiân Siōng-tè chheng-ho͘ hiah-ê chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê ōe ê lâng chòe sîn," 
John10:36 án-ni, góa sī Pē hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng, koh chhe-khián ji̍p sè-kan,ê, sī-án-chóaⁿ góa kóng ‘Góa sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ’, lín chiū kóng góa siat-to̍k Siōng-tè?" 
John10:37 Góa nā m̄-sī teh chòe góa ê Pē ê tāi-chì, lín m̄-bián sìn góa;" 
John10:38 góa nā teh chòe Pē ê tāi-chì, sui-jiân lín m̄ sìn góa, mā tio̍h sìn góa só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì, thang hō͘ lín khak-si̍t chai Pē tī góa lāi-bīn, góa tī Pē lāi-bīn.”" 
John10:39 In koh siūⁿ-beh kā I lia̍h, I chiū thoat-chhut in ê chhiú lī-khui." 
John10:40 Iâ-so͘ koh kè-khì Iok-tàn-hô tùi-hōaⁿ, kàu khah-chá Iok-hān kā lâng sóe-lé ê só͘-chāi, tī hia tòa." 
John10:41 Ū chin chōe lâng lâi kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, kóng, “Sui-jiân Iok-hān bô kiâⁿ sîn-jiah, i só͘ kóng it-chhè koan-hē chit-ê lâng ê tāi-chì lóng khak-si̍t.”" 
John10:42 Tī hia ū chin chōe lâng sìn Iâ-so͘. 
John11:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Lia̍p-sat-lō͘, phòa-pīⁿ, tòa tī Pek-tāi-nî, chiū-sī Má-lī-a kap i ê a-chí Má-tāi tòa ê chng-siā." 
John11:2 Chit-ê Má-lī-a bat ēng phang-iû boah Chú, koh ēng thâu-mn̂g chhit I ê kha; i ê sió-tī Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ phòa-pīⁿ." 
John11:3 Chit nn̄g ê chí-bē chhe lâng khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘, kóng, “Chú ah, lí só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng teh phòa-pīⁿ.”" 
John11:4 Iâ-so͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū kóng, “Chit-ê pīⁿ bōe tì-kàu sí; sī beh hián-bêng Siōng-tè ê êng-kng, thang hō͘ Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ tùi chit-hāng tāi-chì tit-tio̍h êng-kng.”" 
John11:5 Iâ-so͘ chin thiàⁿ Má-tāi kap i ê sió-bē, í-ki̍p Lia̍p-sat-lō͘."
