John11:6 I thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ phòa-pīⁿ, kè-sio̍k tī hit só͘-chāi tòa nn̄g ji̍t." 
John11:7 Āu-lâi, I kā bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Lán koh lâi-khì Iû-thài.”" 
John11:8 Bûn-tô͘ ìn kóng, “Lia̍p-pí, Iû-thài -lâng tú-á chiah teh chhē ki-hōe beh ēng chio̍h-thâu kā lí tìm, lí kiám beh koh khì hia?”" 
John11:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Ji̍t,sî kiám m̄-sī ū cha̍p-jī tiám-cheng? Lâng nā tī ji̍t,sî kiâⁿ chiū bōe poa̍h-tó, in-ūi ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit sè-kài ê kng." 
John11:10 Lâng nā tī àm-sî kiâⁿ ōe poa̍h-tó, in-ūi i bô kng.”" 
John11:11 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu, koh kā in kóng, “Lán ê pêng-iú Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ khùn,khì lah, góa beh lâi-khì kā i kiò-chhíⁿ.”" 
John11:12 Bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Chú ah, i nā-sī khùn,khì chiū ōe hó,khí-lâi.”" 
John11:13 Iâ-so͘ sī kóng Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ í-keng sí,khì, m̄-kú in siūⁿ-chòe i chin-chiàⁿ teh khùn." 
John11:14 Só͘-í Iâ-so͘ bêng-bêng kā in kóng, “ Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ sí,khì lah." 
John11:15 Ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lín sìn góa, góa bô tī hia tian-tò hó. Taⁿ, lán lâi-khì i hia.”" 
John11:16 Hit-ê kiò-chòe Siang-siⁿ-á ê To-má kā bûn-tô͘-phōaⁿ kóng, “Lán mā lâi-khì kap I chòe-hé sí!”" 
John11:17 Iâ-so͘ kàu Pek-tāi-nî ê sî chiah chai Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ í-keng chòng tī bōng-lāi sì ji̍t. 
John11:18 Pek-tāi-nî lī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chha-put-to saⁿ kong-lí; 
John11:19 ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng in-ūi Má-tāi kap Má-lī-a sió-tī ê tāi-chì lâi an-ùi in. 
John11:20 Má-tāi thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ kàu-ūi chiū chhut-khì kā I gêng-chiap; Má-lī-a iû-goân chē tī chhù-lāi. 
John11:21 Má-tāi kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, lí nā ū tī chia, góa ê sió-tī chiū bōe sí." 
John11:22 Sīm-chì hiān-chāi, góa chai lí bô-lūn tùi Siōng-tè kiû sím-mi̍h, I lóng ōe hō͘ lí!”" 
John11:23 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí ê sió-tī ōe koh-oa̍h,khí-lâi.”" 
John11:24 Má-tāi ìn kóng, “Góa chai tī Boa̍t-ji̍t koh-oa̍h ê sî, i ōe koh-oa̍h.”" 
John11:25 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa sī koh-oa̍h, sī oa̍h-miā; sìn góa ê lâng sui-jiân sí, iáu-kú ōe oa̍h." 
John11:26 Só͘-ū hiān-chāi teh oa̍h lâi sìn góa ê lâng éng-oán bōe sí. Lí ū sìn bô?” 
John11:27 Má-tāi ìn kóng, “Chú ah, góa sìn lí sī Ki-tok, sī hit-ūi teh-beh lâi sè-kan ê Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.”" 
John11:28 Má-tāi kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu chiū tńg,khì, kiò i ê sió-bē Má-lī-a lâi, su-hā kā i kóng, “Lāu-su lâi lah, I teh kiò lí.”" 
John11:29 Má-lī-a chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h, kóaⁿ-kín khí,lâi, khì Iâ-so͘ hia." 
John11:30 Hit-sî Iâ-so͘ iáu-bē kàu chng-lāi, iáu tī Má-tāi khì gêng-chiap I ê só͘-chāi." 
John11:31 Tī chhù-lāi teh an-ùi Má-lī-a ê Iû-thài -lâng, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Má-lī-a kóaⁿ-kín peh,khí-lâi koh cháu,chhut-khì, chiū tè i khì, siūⁿ-kóng i beh khì bōng hia khàu." 
John11:32 Má-lī-a kàu Iâ-so͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, chiū phak lo̍h-khì I ê kha-chêng, tùi I kóng, “Chú ah, lí nā ū tī chia, góa ê sió-tī chiū bōe sí.”" 
John11:33 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h i teh khàu, koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h kap i chòe-hé lâi hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng mā teh khàu, sim chin pi-siong kek-tōng," 
John11:34 mn̄g in kóng, “Lín kā i chòng tī tó-ūi?” In ìn kóng, “Chú ah, lâi-khì khòaⁿ.”" 
John11:35 Iâ-so͘ lâu ba̍k-sái. 
John11:36 Iû-thài -lâng kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ, I hiah-ni̍h thiàⁿ i!”" 
John11:37 In tiong-kan ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kóng, “I bat hō͘ sit-bêng ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, kiám bōe-tàng hō͘ chit-ê lâng bô sí?”" 
John11:38 Iâ-so͘ iū koh chin pi-siong, lâi kàu bōng hia; hit-ê bōng sī chi̍t ê tōng-hia̍t, ū chi̍t tè chio̍h that,teh." 
John11:39 Iâ-so͘ bēng-lēng, kóng, “Kā hit-tè chio̍h sóa-khui!” Sí,khì hit-ê lâng ê a-chí Má-tāi kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, i sí sì ji̍t lah, í-keng chhàu ah.”" 
John11:40 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa kiám bô kā lí kóng, lí nā sìn, ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê êng-kng?”" 
John11:41 In chiū chiong hit-tè chio̍h sóa-khui. Iâ-so͘ gia̍h-ba̍k ǹg thiⁿ kóng, “Pē ah, góa kám-siā lí, in-ūi lí í-keng ū thiaⁿ góa ê kî-tó." 
John11:42 Góa chai lí put-sî lóng ū teh thiaⁿ góa ê kî-tó, m̄-kú góa án-ni kóng sī ūi-tio̍h khiā tī chiu-ûi ê kûn-chiòng, thang hō͘ in sìn lí ū chhe góa.”" 
John11:43 Kóng soah, Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Lia̍p-sat-lō͘, chhut,lâi!”" 
John11:44 Hit-ê sí,khì ê lâng chiū chhut,lâi; i ê kha-chhiú chat pò͘, bīn ēng kun-á pau,teh. Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Kā i tháu,khui, hō͘ i kiâⁿ!”" 
John11:45 Lâi thàm Má-lī-a ê Iû-thài -lâng, ū chin chōe lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê só͘-chòe chiū sìn I." 
John11:46 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng khì chhē Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng, kā in pò-kò Iâ-so͘ só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì." 
John11:47 In-ūi án-ni, hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng tiàu-khui gī-hōe, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng kiâⁿ chiah-ni̍h chōe sîn-jiah, lán beh án-chóaⁿ tùi-hù?" 
John11:48 Lán nā pàng I kè-sio̍k án-ni chòe, tāi-ke lóng ōe khì sìn I, Lô-má -lâng ōe lâi húi-hoāi lán ê Sèng-tiān, koh húi-bia̍t lán ê bîn-cho̍k.”" 
John11:49 Kî-tiong ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe Kai-a-hoat, sī hit-nî ê tōa-chè-si, i kā in kóng, “Lín m̄ bat pòaⁿ-hāng." 
John11:50 Lín bōe-hiáu siūⁿ, lêng-khó hō͘ chi̍t ê lâng thòe chèng-lâng sí, chiah bián hō͘ choân bîn-cho̍k bia̍t-bông, án-ni tùi lín sī khah hó.”" 
John11:51 I án-ni kóng m̄-sī ka-kī ê ì-sù, sī i chòe hit-nî ê tōa-chè-si teh ū-giân Iâ-so͘ teh-beh ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bîn-cho̍k lâi sí;" 
John11:52 m̄-nā ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bîn-cho̍k, mā beh chiong Siōng-tè sì-sòaⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî chū-chi̍p chòe chi̍t ê." 
John11:53 Tùi hit-ji̍t khí, Iû-thài -kàu ê léng-siù kè-bô͘ beh thâi Iâ-so͘." 
John11:54 In-ūi án-ni, Iâ-so͘ bô koh kong-jiân tī Iû-thài -lâng ê tiong-kan chhut-ji̍p; I lī-khui hia, khì óa-kūn khòng-iá ê só͘-chāi, kàu chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Í-hoat-liân ê siâⁿ, kap I ê bûn-tô͘ tī hia tòa." 
John11:55 Iû-thài -lâng ê Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh teh-beh kàu. Choeh-kî chêng, ū chin chōe lâng tùi hiong-chhoan lâi kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng beh siú kiat-chēng-lé." 
John11:56 In teh chhē Iâ-so͘, khiā tī Sèng-tiān lāi hō͘-siōng mn̄g kóng, “Lín siūⁿ án-chóaⁿ? I it-tēng bōe lâi kè-choeh ho͘hⁿ?”" 
John11:57 In-ūi hiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ū hoat bēng-lēng, nā ū lâng chai Iâ-so͘ tī tó-ūi, tio̍h lâi pò-kò, hō͘ in thang khì kā I lia̍h." 
John12:1 Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê la̍k ji̍t chêng, Iâ-so͘ khì Pek-tāi-nî, chiū-sī Iâ-so͘ hō͘ hit-ê tùi sí koh-oa̍h ê Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ tòa ê só͘-chāi." 
John12:2 Ū lâng tī hia ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chún-pī àm-tǹg. Má-tāi teh chiau-thāi; Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ sī kap Iâ-so͘ kâng-toh ê chi̍t ê. 
John12:3 Má-lī-a the̍h chi̍t koàn sûn ê ko-kùi ná-ta̍t phang-iû lâi boah Iâ-so͘ ê kha, koh ēng ka-kī ê thâu-mn̂g kā I chhit; iû ê phang-bī hō͘ kui chhù-lāi phang-kòng-kòng." 
John12:4 Iâ-so͘ ê chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘, chiū-sī āu-lâi chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Í-su-ka-lio̍k ê Iû-tāi, kóng," 
John12:5 “Ná m̄ the̍h chit-ê phang-iû khì bōe saⁿ-pah ê gûn-á lâi chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng?” 
John12:6 I án-ni kóng m̄-sī i koan-sim sàn-chhiah-lâng, sī in-ūi i sī chha̍t, koh siông-siông thau-the̍h i teh koán-lí ê kong-khóaⁿ." 
John12:7 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “M̄-thang kā i tòng! Chit-ê phang-iû sī i ūi-tio̍h góa bâi-chòng ê ji̍t chún-pī,ê." 
John12:8 Put-sî ū sàn-chhiah-lâng kap lín chòe-hé, put-kò góa bōe put-sî kap lín chòe-hé.”" 
John12:9 Ū chi̍t tōa-kûn Iû-thài -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ tī Pek-tāi-nî chiū khì hia; in m̄-nā ūi-tio̍h beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘, mā siūⁿ-beh khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ hō͘ i tùi sí koh-oa̍h hit-ê Lia̍p-sat-lō͘." 
John12:10 Só͘-í, chiah-ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kè-bô͘ liân Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ ia̍h beh kā i thâi," 
John12:11 in-ūi ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng ūi-tio̍h Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ ê iân-kò͘ lī-khui in khì sìn Iâ-so͘. 
John12:12 Keh-ji̍t, lâi kè-choeh ê chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ beh lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng," 
John12:13 chiū gia̍h chang-chhiū-ki chhut-khì gêng-chiap, hoah kóng: Hô-sàn-ná! Hōng Chú ê miâ lâi Hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn! Í-sek-lia̍t ê Ông eng-kai siū chheng-chàn!" 
John12:14 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah lû-á-kiáⁿ, chiū khan-lâi khiâ. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài:" 
John12:15 Sek-an ê hū-jîn-lâng ah, m̄-bián kiaⁿ! Khòaⁿ, lín ê Ông khiâ lû-á-kiáⁿ teh lâi lah!" 
John12:16 I ê bûn-tô͘ goân-lâi bōe liáu-kái chit-hāng tāi-chì, m̄-kú Iâ-so͘ tit-tio̍h êng-kng ê sî, in chiah siūⁿ-tio̍h Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài chit-hāng tāi-chì sī teh chí Iâ-so͘; tāi-chì mā chiàu án-ni hoat-seng tī I sin-chiūⁿ." 
John12:17 Iâ-so͘ kiò Lia̍p-sat-lō͘ chhut bōng hō͘ i tùi sí koh-oa̍h hit-sî, kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé tī hia hit-kûn lâng ū kè-sio̍k teh chòe kiàn-chèng." 
John12:18 Chèng-lâng mā chhut-khì gêng-chiap Iâ-so͘, in-ūi in ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I kiâⁿ chit-ê sîn-jiah." 
John12:19 Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chiū hō͘-siōng kóng, “Lán khah chòe mā bô-chhái-kang. Lín khòaⁿ, choân sè-kài lóng tè I khì lah!”" 
John12:20 Choeh-kî tiong khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tiâu-pài,ê ū kúi-nā ê Hi-la̍h -lâng. 
John12:21 Chiah-ê lâng lâi kìⁿ Ka-lī-lī ê Pek-sài-tāi -lâng Hui-le̍k, kā i kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, goán ài kìⁿ Iâ-so͘.”" 
John12:22 Hui-le̍k khì kā An-tek-lia̍t kóng, An-tek-lia̍t kap Hui-le̍k chiū chòe-hé khì kā Iâ-so͘ kóng." 
John12:23 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Jîn-chú tit-tio̍h êng-kng ê sî kàu lah." 
John12:24 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, chi̍t lia̍p be̍h-á nā bô lo̍h tōe sí, iû-goân sī chi̍t lia̍p nā-tiāⁿ; nā sí, chiū kiat chin chōe be̍h-á." 
John12:25 Thiàⁿ-sioh ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; tī chit sè-kan kam-goān hi-seng ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā,ê, ōe pó-siú sìⁿ-miā ti̍t-kàu éng-oán-oa̍h." 
John12:26 Lâng nā beh ho̍k-sāi góa, tio̍h tè góa; góa tī tó-ūi, ho̍k-sāi góa ê lâng mā ōe tī hia. Lâng nā ho̍k-sāi góa, góa ê Pē ōe kā i chun-tiōng.”" 
John12:27 “Chit-chūn, góa ê sim loān-chhau-chhau, góa beh kóng sím-mi̍h? Kiám beh kóng ‘Pē ah, kiù góa thoat-chhut chit-ê sî-khek’? M̄-sī. Góa sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê sî-khek chiah lâi." 
John12:28 Pē ah, goān lí êng-iāu lí ê miâ.” Jiân-āu ū siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi, kóng, “Góa í-keng ū êng-iāu góa ê miâ, beh koh-chài êng-iāu.”" 
John12:29 Khiā tī hia ê kûn-chiòng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siaⁿ, siūⁿ-kóng “Lûi teh tân”; mā ū lâng kóng “Thiⁿ-sài ū tùi I kóng-ōe”." 
John12:30 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Chit-ê siaⁿ m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h góa, sī beh hō͘ lín thiaⁿ,ê." 
John12:31 Hiān-chāi sī chit-ê sè-kan siū sím-phòaⁿ ê sî; hiān-chāi chit sè-kan ê thóng-tī-chiá teh-beh siū thui-hoan. 
John12:32 Góa tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siū kú-khí ê sî, ōe khip-ín bān-bîn kui-óa góa.”" 
John12:33 Iâ-so͘ án-ni kóng sī piáu-bêng I teh-beh án-chóaⁿ sí. 
John12:34 Kûn-chiòng ìn I kóng, “Goán thiaⁿ-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat ū kì-chài, Ki-tok éng-oán chûn-chāi. Lí ná ōe kóng Jîn-chú tio̍h siū kú-khí? Chit-ê Jîn-chú sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
John12:35 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Kng iáu ōe tī lín tiong-kan chi̍t-sî-á kú. Lín tio̍h thàn ū kng ê sî kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ, chiah bōe hō͘ o͘-àm jia-khàm. Tī o͘-àm tiong teh kiâⁿ ê lâng m̄ chai ōe kiâⁿ-khì tó-ūi." 
John12:36 Thàn ū kng ê sî, lín tio̍h sìn kng, hō͘ lín thang chiâⁿ-chòe kng-bêng ê lâng.” Chiah-ê ōe kóng soah, Iâ-so͘ lī-khui in, bih,khí-lâi." 
John12:37 Sui-jiân Iâ-so͘ tī in bīn-chêng ū kiâⁿ hiah chōe sîn-jiah, in iáu m̄ sìn I." 
John12:38 Che sī beh èng-giām sian-ti Í-sài-a ê ōe, kóng: Chú ah, sím-mi̍h-lâng sìn goán só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit? Chú ê koân-lêng ū tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng hián-sī?" 
John12:39 In bōe-tàng siong-sìn ê goân-in, Í-sài-a ū koh án-ni kóng:" 
John12:40 Siōng-tè hō͘ in ê ba̍k-chiu bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hō͘ in ê sim ngī, chiah bián in ê ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, in ê sim bêng-pe̍k, lâi kui-ǹg góa, góa chiū kā in i-hó." 
John12:41 Í-sài-a án-ni kóng, sī in-ūi i ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê êng-iāu, chiah kóng koan-hē I ê tāi-chì." 
John12:42 Sui-jiân sī án-ni, iáu-kú ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù sìn Iâ-so͘; put-kò in-ūi in kiaⁿ Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, m̄-káⁿ kong-khai sêng-jīn, chiah bián siū kek-chhut hōe-tn̂g." 
John12:43 In ài lâng ê chheng-chàn iâⁿ-kè Siōng-tè ê chheng-chàn. 
John12:44 Iâ-so͘ tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Sìn góa ê lâng m̄-sī sìn góa, sī sìn chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi." 
John12:45 Khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa chiū-sī khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi. 
John12:46 Góa choh-kng lâi kàu chit sè-kan, sī beh hō͘ sìn góa ê lâng lóng bōe tiàm tī o͘-àm." 
John12:47 Thiaⁿ góa ê ōe bô chun-siú ê lâng, góa bōe kā i sím-phòaⁿ. In-ūi góa m̄-sī lâi beh sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan-lâng, sī beh chín-kiù sè-kan-lâng." 
John12:48 Kū-choa̍t góa, m̄ chiap-siū góa ê ōe ê lâng, ū chi̍t ê sím-phòaⁿ-chiá ōe kā i sím-phòaⁿ. Tī Boa̍t-ji̍t, góa só͘ kóng ê ōe ōe kā i sím-phòaⁿ." 
John12:49 In-ūi góa m̄-sī chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù kóng, sī chiàu chhe góa lâi ê Pē hō͘ góa ê bēng-lēng chiah kóng sím-mi̍h, thoân sím-mi̍h." 
John12:50 Góa chai I ê bēng-lēng ōe hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā. Só͘-í, góa kóng,ê lóng sī chiàu Pē kā góa kóng,ê.”" 
John13:1 Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh chêng, Iâ-so͘ chai I lī-khui chit sè-kan tńg-khì Pē hia ê sî-kan í-keng kàu. I it-ti̍t ū thiàⁿ chit sè-kan sio̍k I ka-kī ê lâng, chiū thiàⁿ in kàu-tóe." 
John13:2 Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ teh chia̍h àm-tǹg ê sî, Mô͘-kúi í-keng chiong chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê ì-sù hē tī Í-su-ka-lio̍k Se-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi ê sim." 
John13:3 Iâ-so͘ chai Pē í-keng chiong it-chhè kau tī I ê chhiú, mā chai ka-kī tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi, beh koh tńg-khì Siōng-tè hia," 
John13:4 chiū lī-khui toh, thǹg gōa-saⁿ, the̍h chi̍t tiâu kun-á hâ tī io,ni̍h," 
John13:5 jiân-āu chiong chúi tò tī chúi-phûn, kā bûn-tô͘ sóe-kha, koh ēng hâ tī io,ni̍h ê kun-á kā in chhit." 
John13:6 I sóe kàu Se-bûn Pí-tek hia, Pí-tek kā I kóng, “Chú ah, lí beh kā góa sóe-kha o͘h?”" 
John13:7 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa teh chòe,ê, lí hiān-chāi m̄ chai, āu-lâi chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k.”" 
John13:8 Pí-tek kā I kóng, “Lí choa̍t-tùi bōe-ēng-tit kā góa sóe-kha.” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa nā bô kā lí sóe-kha, lí chiū kap góa bô koan-hē.”" 
John13:9 Se-bûn Pí-tek kā I kóng, “Chú ah, m̄-nā kha, liân chhiú kap thâu-khak mā kā góa sóe.”" 
John13:10 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lâng seng-khu sóe liáu, kui seng-khu lóng chheng-khì; kan-ta sóe-kha chiū hó. Lín í-keng chheng-khì, m̄-kú m̄-sī ta̍k-ê lóng án-ni.”" 
John13:11 In-ūi Iâ-so͘ chai sím-mi̍h-lâng teh-beh kā I chhut-bōe, só͘-í chiah kóng “Lín m̄-sī ta̍k-ê lóng chheng-khì”." 
John13:12 Iâ-so͘ kā in sóe-kha liáu-āu, chhēng gōa-saⁿ, tò-tńg-khì I ê chē-ūi. I mn̄g in kóng, “Lín kiám ū bêng-pe̍k góa tùi lín só͘ chòe,ê?" 
John13:13 Lín chheng-ho͘ góa ‘Lāu-su’, mā chheng-ho͘ góa ‘Chú’; lín án-ni chheng-ho͘ chin tio̍h, in-ūi góa chiū-sī." 
John13:14 Góa choh Chú, choh Lāu-su, to kā lín sóe-kha, lín mā tio̍h hō͘-siōng sóe-kha." 
John13:15 Góa ū lâu bô͘-iūⁿ hō͘ lín, sī beh hō͘ lín thang chiàu góa tùi lín só͘ chòe,ê khì chòe." 
John13:16 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, po̍k-jîn bōe pí chú-lâng khah tōa; hōng chhe-phài,ê mā bōe pí chhe-phài i,ê khah tōa." 
John13:17 Kì-jiân lín bêng-pe̍k chit-ê sū, nā khì si̍t-hêng chiū chin ū hok-khì." 
John13:18 “Góa m̄-sī chí lín choân-thé teh kóng; góa jīn-bat góa só͘ kéng-soán,ê. Put-kò che sī beh hō͘ Sèng-keng só͘ kóng ‘Kap góa chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g ê lâng kèng-jiân pōe-ge̍k góa’ chit-kù ōe ōe èng-giām. 
John13:19 Taⁿ tāi-chì iáu-bē hoat-seng, góa seng kā lín kóng, hō͘ lín tī tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî thang sìn góa chiū-sī hit-ūi ‘Chū-iú-éng-iú’ ê." 
John13:20 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, chiap-la̍p góa só͘ chhe,ê chiū-sī chiap-la̍p góa; chiap-la̍p góa,ê chiū-sī chiap-la̍p chhe góa Hit-ūi.”" 
John13:21 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, sim-lāi hui-siông kek-tōng, chiū bêng-bêng kóng, “Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, lín tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê lâng beh kā góa chhut-bōe.”" 
John13:22 Bûn-tô͘ lí-khòaⁿ-góa góa-khòaⁿ-lí, m̄ chai I sī teh kóng sím-mi̍h-lâng." 
John13:23 Bûn-tô͘ tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê sī Iâ-so͘ só͘ thiàⁿ,ê, i chē tī Iâ-so͘ ê sin-piⁿ." 
John13:24 Se-bûn Pí-tek chiū ǹg hit-ê bûn-tô͘ tìm-thâu piáu-sī, kiò i mn̄g-khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘ sī teh kóng sím-mi̍h-lâng." 
John13:25 Hit-ê bûn-tô͘ chiū the-óa Iâ-so͘, kā I mn̄g, “Chú ah, sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
John13:26 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa beh ùn chit-tè piáⁿ the̍h hō͘ chi̍t ê lâng, hit-ê lâng chiū-sī.” I chiū the̍h hit-tè piáⁿ ùn chiùⁿ, jiân-āu the̍h hō͘ Í-su-ka-lio̍k Se-bûn ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi." 
John13:27 I chi̍t-ē chiap-tio̍h hit-tè piáⁿ, Sat-tàn chiū ji̍p i ê sim. Iâ-so͘ kā Iû-tāi kóng, “Lí siūⁿ-beh chòe,ê, kóaⁿ-kín khì chòe!”" 
John13:28 Tâng chē-toh ê lâng bô chi̍t ê chai sī-án-chóaⁿ Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng chit-kù ōe. 
John13:29 In-ūi Iû-tāi sī koán-chîⁿ,ê, ū lâng siūⁿ-chòe Iâ-so͘ sī teh kiò i khì bóe siú-choeh beh ēng ê mi̍h, á-sī kiò i khì chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng." 
John13:30 Iû-tāi chiap hit-tè piáⁿ liáu-āu sûi-sî chhut,khì. Hit-sî sī àm-sî. 
John13:31 Iû-tāi chhut,khì liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Taⁿ Jîn-chú í-keng tit-tio̍h êng-kng; Siōng-tè mā thong-kè Jîn-chú tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John13:32 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè thong-kè Jîn-chú tit-tio̍h êng-kng, Siōng-tè ka-kī mā beh êng-iāu Jîn-chú, koh beh sûi-sî hō͘ I tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John13:33 Sòe-kiáⁿ, góa kap lín chòe-hé chhun bô jōa kú lah. Lín ōe chhē góa, chiàu góa bat kā Iû-thài -lâng kóng, taⁿ góa kā lín kóng, ‘Góa beh khì ê só͘-chāi, lín bōe-tàng khì.’" 
John13:34 Góa hō͘ lín chi̍t tiâu sin ê kài-bēng: Lín tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ; chiàu góa thiàⁿ lín án-ni, lín mā tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
John13:35 Lín nā saⁿ-thiàⁿ, chèng-lâng ōe tùi che lâi chai lín sī góa ê bûn-tô͘.”" 
John13:36 Se-bûn Pí-tek mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Chú ah, lí beh khì tó-ūi?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa beh khì ê só͘-chāi, lí hiān-chāi bōe-tàng tè góa khì, put-kò āu-lâi ōe tè góa khì.”" 
John13:37 Pí-tek kóng, “Chú ah, sī-án-chóaⁿ góa hiān-chāi bōe-tàng tè lí khì? Góa kam-goān ūi-tio̍h lí pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā!”" 
John13:38 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí beh ūi-tio̍h góa pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā o͘h? Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lí kóng, koe thî í-chêng, lí ōe saⁿ piàn m̄ jīn góa.”" 
John14:1 Iâ-so͘ koh kóng, “Lín ê sim m̄-thang tio̍h-kip put-an. Tio̍h sìn Siōng-tè, mā tio̍h sìn góa." 
John14:2 Tī góa ê Pē ê chhù ū chin chōe pâng-keng, góa khì sī beh kā lín chún-pī só͘-chāi. Nā m̄-sī án-ni, góa bōe kā lín kóng chit-ê tāi-chì." 
John14:3 Góa khì kā lín pī-pān só͘-chāi liáu-āu, ōe koh lâi chhōa lín khì góa hia; góa tī hia, lín mā ōe tī hia." 
John14:4 Góa beh khì ê hit-tiâu lō͘, lín chai.”" 
John14:5 To-má kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, goán to m̄ chai lí beh khì tó-ūi, beh ná ōe chai hit-tiâu lō͘?”" 
John14:6 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Góa chiū-sī tō-lō͘, chin-lí, oa̍h-miā. Nā m̄-sī thong-kè góa, bô lâng ōe-tàng khì Pē hia." 
John14:7 Lín nā bat góa, mā ōe bat góa ê Pē. Tùi taⁿ í-āu, lín bat I, in-ūi lín í-keng ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I.”" 
John14:8 Hui-le̍k kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, chiong Pē hián-sī hō͘ goán khòaⁿ, goán chiū boán-chiok.”" 
John14:9 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “ Hui-le̍k, góa kap lín chòe-hé chiah-ni̍h kú, lí iáu m̄ bat góa o͘h? Khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa, chiū-sī khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Pē. Lí ná ōe kóng ‘Chiong Pē hián-sī hō͘ goán khòaⁿ’?" 
John14:10 Góa tī Pē lāi-bīn, Pē mā tī góa lāi-bīn, lí bô sìn sī,bô? Góa kā lín kóng ê ōe m̄-sī chhut tī góa ka-kī, sī tiàm tī góa lāi-bīn ê Pē teh chòe I ka-kī ê tāi-chì." 
John14:11 Tio̍h sìn góa tī Pē lāi-bīn, Pē tī góa lāi-bīn; nā bô, mā tio̍h in-ūi góa só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì lâi sìn." 
John14:12 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng: Sìn góa ê lâng ōe chòe góa só͘ chòe ê sū, sīm-chì ōe chòe koh-khah tōa,ê, in-ūi góa beh khì Pē hia." 
John14:13 Lín hōng góa ê miâ bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h, góa it-tēng ōe kā lín chòe, thang hō͘ Pē tùi Kiáⁿ tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John14:14 Lín nā hōng góa ê miâ bô-lūn kiû sím-mi̍h, góa it-tēng ōe kā lín chòe.”" 
John14:15 “Lín nā thiàⁿ góa, chiū ōe chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng." 
John14:16 Góa beh tùi Pē kiû, I ōe sù lín lēng-gōa chi̍t ūi Ùi-chō͘-chiá, thang kap lín éng-oán tông-chāi." 
John14:17 I sī chin-lí ê Sîn, sè-kan-lâng bōe-tàng chiap-siū,ê, in-ūi in bô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I, mā m̄ bat I. M̄-kú lín bat I, in-ūi I kap lín tông-chāi, ōe kè-sio̍k tī lín lāi-bīn." 
John14:18 “Góa bōe pàng lín chòe ko͘-jî; góa ōe koh tò-tńg-lâi lín chia. 
John14:19 Koh bô jōa kú, sè-kan-lâng bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa, put-kò lín ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa, in-ūi góa oa̍h, lín mā ōe oa̍h." 
John14:20 Kàu hit-ji̍t, lín ōe chai góa tī góa ê Pē lāi-bīn, lín tī góa lāi-bīn, góa mā tī lín lāi-bīn." 
John14:21 “Chiap-siū góa ê bēng-lēng koh chun-siú,ê chiū-sī thiàⁿ góa ê lâng. Thiàⁿ góa,ê, góa ê Pē ōe thiàⁿ i; góa mā ōe thiàⁿ i, koh chiong pún-sin hián-hiān hō͘ i khòaⁿ.”" 
John14:22 Iû-tāi — m̄-sī hit-ê Í-su-ka-lio̍k — mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Chú ah, sī-án-chóaⁿ lí beh chiong pún-sin tùi goán hián-hiān, m̄ tùi sè-kan-lâng hián-hiān?”" 
John14:23 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Thiàⁿ góa ê lâng ōe chun-siú góa ê ōe. Góa ê Pē ōe thiàⁿ i; góa ê Pē kap góa ōe lâi i hia, kap i chòe-hé tòa." 
John14:24 Bô thiàⁿ góa ê lâng bōe chun-siú góa ê ōe. Lín só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê m̄-sī góa ka-kī ê ōe, sī chhe góa lâi ê Pē ê ōe." 
John14:25 “Góa iáu kap lín chòe-hé ê sî, í-keng ū chiong chiah-ê ōe kā lín kóng." 
John14:26 M̄-kú Ùi-chō͘-chiá, chiū-sī Pē ēng góa ê miâ beh chhe,lâi ê Sèng Sîn, ōe chiong it-chhè ê tāi-chì kà-sī lín, mā ōe hō͘ lín ōe-kì-tit góa kā lín kóng it-chhè ê ōe." 
John14:27 “Góa chiong pêng-an lâu hō͘ lín; góa chiong góa ê pêng-an sù hō͘ lín. Góa sù hō͘ lín,ê kap chit sè-kan teh hō͘ lâng,ê bô kâng-khoán. Lín ê sim m̄-thang tio̍h-kip put-an, mā m̄-thang kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
John14:28 Lín í-keng ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ góa kā lín kóng, ‘Góa khì, beh koh tńg-lâi lín chia.’ Lín nā ū thiàⁿ góa, ōe in-ūi góa beh khì Pē hia lâi hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi Pē pí góa khah tōa." 
John14:29 Taⁿ tāi-chì iáu-bē hoat-seng, góa seng kā lín kóng, hō͘ lín tī tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî thang sìn." 
John14:30 Góa bōe koh kap lín kóng chin chōe ōe, in-ūi chit sè-kài ê thóng-tī-chiá teh lâi lah. I choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng tùi góa chòe sím-mi̍h," 
John14:31 m̄-kú beh hō͘ sè-kan-lâng chai góa thiàⁿ Pē, ū chiàu Pē ê bēng-lēng khì chòe. “Khí,lâi, lán lâi-khì.”" 
John15:1 “Góa sī chin ê phû-tô-chhiū, góa ê Pē sī chèng phû-tô,ê." 
John15:2 Liân tī góa koh bô kiat ké-chí ê ki, I chiū kā i chián,khí-lâi; ū kiat ké-chí ê ki, I chiū kā i siu-chián, hō͘ i kiat khah chōe ké-chí." 
John15:3 Góa tùi lín kóng ê ōe í-keng hō͘ lín chheng-khì lah. 
John15:4 Lín tio̍h put-sî kap góa kiat-liân, góa chiū put-sî kap lín kiat-liân. Ki bô liân tī phû-tô-chhiū, ka-kī bōe kiat ké-chí; lín nā bô kap góa kiat-liân mā-sī án-ni." 
John15:5 “Góa sī phû-tô-chhiū, lín sī ki. Kap góa kiat-liân, góa mā kap i kiat-liân,ê, ōe kiat chin chōe ké-chí, in-ūi bô góa, lín bōe-tàng chòe sím-mi̍h." 
John15:6 Lâng nā bô kap góa kiat-liân, ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ ta,khì ê ki hō͘ lâng hiat chhut-khì gōa-bīn, khioh kui-tui, hiat-lo̍h hé sio." 
John15:7 Lín nā kap góa kiat-liân, góa ê ōe tī lín lāi-bīn, lín bô-lūn ài sím-mi̍h, kiû chiū kā lín si̍t-hiān." 
John15:8 Lín nā kiat chin chōe ké-chí, piáu-sī lín sī góa ê bûn-tô͘, góa ê Pē ōe in-ūi án-ni tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John15:9 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Pē ū thiàⁿ góa, góa mā ū thiàⁿ lín, lín tio̍h put-sî tiàm tī góa ê thiàⁿ lāi-bīn." 
John15:10 Lín nā chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng, lín ōe put-sî tiàm tī góa ê thiàⁿ lāi-bīn, chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ū chun-siú góa ê Pē ê bēng-lēng, put-sî tiàm tī I ê thiàⁿ lāi-bīn." 
John15:11 “Góa kā lín kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì, sī beh hō͘ góa ê hoaⁿ-hí tī lín lāi-bīn, koh hō͘ lín ê hoaⁿ-hí móa-móa." 
John15:12 Chhin-chhiūⁿ góa ū thiàⁿ lín, lín tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ; che sī góa ê bēng-lēng." 
John15:13 Lâng ūi-tio̍h pêng-iú hi-seng sìⁿ-miā, bô pí che khah-tōa ê thiàⁿ." 
John15:14 Lín nā chun-siú góa ê bēng-lēng chiū-sī góa ê pêng-iú. 
John15:15 Góa bô koh kiò lín chòe po̍k-jîn, in-ūi po̍k-jîn m̄ chai chú-lâng teh chòe sím-mi̍h; taⁿ góa í-keng kiò lín chòe pêng-iú, in-ūi góa tùi góa ê Pē só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê lóng ū kā lín kóng lah." 
John15:16 M̄-sī lín kéng-soán góa, sī góa kéng-soán lín, koh jīm-bēng lín, hō͘ lín khì kiat ké-chí, hō͘ lín ê ké-chí ōe-tàng éng-oán pó-chûn. Án-ni, lín hōng góa ê miâ bô-lūn tùi Pē kiû sím-mi̍h, I ōe hō͘ lín." 
John15:17 Che sī góa hō͘ lín ê bēng-lēng: Lín tio̍h pí-chhú saⁿ-thiàⁿ.” 
John15:18 “Sè-kan-lâng nā oàn-hūn lín, tio̍h chai in oàn-hūn lín í-chêng seng oàn-hūn góa lah." 
John15:19 Lín nā sio̍k chit sè-kan, sè-kan-lâng ōe khòaⁿ lín chòe ka-kī ê lâng kā lín thiàⁿ. Put-kò góa í-keng tùi sè-kan kā lín kéng-soán,chhut-lâi, lín m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan, in-ūi án-ni sè-kan-lâng oàn-hūn lín." 
John15:20 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit góa kā lín kóng ê ōe, ‘Po̍k-jîn bōe pí chú-lâng khah tōa.’ Sè-kan-lâng nā pek-hāi góa, mā ōe pek-hāi lín; in nā chun-siú góa ê ōe, mā ōe chun-siú lín ê ōe." 
John15:21 Put-kò ūi-tio̍h góa ê iân-kò͘, in ōe tùi lín chòe chiah-ê lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì, in-ūi in m̄ bat chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi." 
John15:22 Góa nā bô lâi, bô kā in kóng, in chiū bô chōe; put-kò in hiān-chāi bô hoat-tō͘ ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê chōe piān-kái." 
John15:23 Oàn-hūn góa ê lâng mā oàn-hūn góa ê Pē. 
John15:24 Góa tī in tiong-kan nā bô chòe pa̍t-lâng m̄-bat chòe ê tāi-chì, in chiū bô chōe; hiān-chāi in ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê só͘-chòe, iáu-kú oàn-hūn góa kap góa ê Pē." 
John15:25 Che sī beh si̍t-hiān in ê Lu̍t-hoat só͘ kì-chài ê ōe, ‘In bô-iân-bô-kò͘ oàn-hūn góa.’" 
John15:26 “Góa beh tùi Pē hia chhe chi̍t ūi Ùi-chō͘-chiá lâi lín chia, I chiū-sī tùi Pē hia lâi hit-ūi khé-sī chin-lí ê Sîn, I lâi ê sî ōe ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng." 
John15:27 Lín mā tio̍h ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng, in-ūi lín tùi khai-sí chiū kap góa chòe-hé.”" 
John16:1 “Góa í-keng ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng, sī beh hō͘ lín ê sìn-sim bōe iô-tāng." 
John16:2 Lâng ōe kā lín kóaⁿ-chhut hōe-tn̂g; sî teh-beh kàu, beh thâi lín ê lâng lóng ōe siūⁿ-kóng in sī teh ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè." 
John16:3 In ōe chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì, sī in-ūi in m̄ bat Pē, mā m̄ bat góa." 
John16:4 M̄-kú góa í-keng ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng, sī beh hō͘ lín sî kàu ōe-kì-tit góa ū kā lín kóng.” “Góa bô tùi khí-thâu chiū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng, sī in-ūi góa it-ti̍t lóng ū kap lín chòe-hé." 
John16:5 Hiān-chāi góa teh-beh tńg-khì chhe góa lâi Hit-ūi hia, lín tiong-kan bô lâng mn̄g góa ‘Lí beh khì tó-ūi?’" 
John16:6 Góa chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng, lín soah móa-sim iu-būn." 
John16:7 Put-kò, góa tio̍h chiong si̍t-chêng kā lín kóng: Góa khì, sī tùi lín ū lī-ek, in-ūi góa nā bô khì, Ùi-chō͘-chiá chiū bōe lâi lín chia; góa nā khì, góa ōe chhe I lâi lín chia." 
John16:8 I lâi ê sî, ōe kā sè-kan-lâng chí-chèng in tùi chōe, tùi gī, tùi sím-phòaⁿ ê koan-liām ū chhò-gō͘." 
John16:9 Tùi chōe, in-ūi in m̄ sìn góa;" 
John16:10 tùi gī, in-ūi góa teh-beh khì Pē hia, lín bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa;" 
John16:11 tùi sím-phòaⁿ, in-ūi chit sè-kan ê thóng-tī-chiá í-keng siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
John16:12 “Góa iáu ū chin chōe tāi-chì beh kā lín kóng, m̄-kú lín hiān-chāi iáu bōe-tàng liáu-kái." 
John16:13 Chin-lí ê Sîn lâi ê sî, I ōe chhōa lín liáu-kái it-chhè ê chin-lí. I bōe chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù kóng, ōe chiàu só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê lâi kóng, mā ōe kā lín thoân-ta̍t teh-beh lâi ê sū." 
John16:14 I ōe chiong êng-iāu kui hō͘ góa, in-ūi I ōe chiong góa kau-tài I,ê kā lín thoân-ta̍t." 
John16:15 Góa ê Pē só͘-ū ê lóng sī góa ê; in-ūi án-ni, góa chiah kóng Sèng Sîn ōe chiong góa kau-tài I,ê kā lín thoân-ta̍t.”" 
John16:16 “Koh bô jōa kú, lín bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa; iū koh bô jōa kú, lín ōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa.”" 
John16:17 Ū kúi-nā ê bûn-tô͘ kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “I kā lán kóng ‘Koh bô jōa kú, lín bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa; iū koh bô jōa kú, lín ōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa’, koh kóng ‘In-ūi góa teh-beh khì Pē hia’, chiah-ê ōe sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù?”" 
John16:18 Só͘-í in it-ti̍t mn̄g, “I só͘ kóng ‘Koh bô jōa kú’ sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Lán m̄ chai I teh kóng sím-mi̍h.”" 
John16:19 Iâ-so͘ chai in ài-beh mn̄g I, chiū kā in kóng, “Lín in-ūi góa kóng ‘Koh bô jōa kú, lín bōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa; iū koh bô jōa kú, lín ōe koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ góa’ teh mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì sī,bô?" 
John16:20 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng, lín ōe thî-khàu ai-siong, m̄-kú sè-kan-lâng ōe hoaⁿ-hí; lín ōe iu-chhiû, m̄-kú lín ê iu-chhiû ōe pìⁿ-chòe hoaⁿ-hí." 
John16:21 Sán-hū siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê sî ū iu-chhiû, in-ūi sán-kî í-keng kàu; eⁿ-á chi̍t-ē chhut-sì chiū bô koh kì-tit seng-sán ê thòng-khó͘, i ōe in-ūi eⁿ-á í-keng chhut-sì tī sè-kan lâi hoaⁿ-hí." 
John16:22 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, hiān-chāi lín ū iu-chhiû, put-kò góa ōe koh kìⁿ-tio̍h lín, lín ê sim chiū ōe hoaⁿ-hí; lín ê hoaⁿ-hí bô lâng ōe kā lín chhiúⁿ,khì." 
John16:23 “Tī hit-ji̍t, lín bōe koh kā góa mn̄g sím-mi̍h. Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lín kóng: Lín hōng góa ê miâ bô-lūn tùi Pē kiû sím-mi̍h, I ōe sù hō͘ lín." 
John16:24 Kàu hiān-chāi, lín iáu m̄-bat hōng góa ê miâ kiû sím-mi̍h. Lín tio̍h kiû, chiū ōe tit,tio̍h, thang hō͘ lín ê hoaⁿ-hí móa-móa.”" 
John16:25 “Chiah-ê tāi-chì góa í-keng ēng phì-jū kā lín kóng lah. Sî teh-beh kàu, góa bōe koh-chài ēng phì-jū, ōe bêng-bêng tùi lín kóng-khí Pē ê sū." 
John16:26 Tī hit-ji̍t, lín ōe hōng góa ê miâ kî-kiû; góa pèng bô kā lín kóng góa ōe thòe lín tùi Pē khún-kiû." 
John16:27 Pē pún-sin thiàⁿ lín, in-ūi lín ū thiàⁿ góa, koh ū sìn góa sī tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi,ê." 
John16:28 Góa tùi Pē hia chhut,lâi, lâi kàu sè-kan; hiān-chāi góa beh lī-khui sè-kan, tńg-khì Pē hia.”" 
John16:29 I ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Hiān-chāi lí bêng-bêng kóng, bô koh ēng phì-jū lâi kóng." 
John16:30 Taⁿ goán chai lí bû-só͘-put-ti, bô su-iàu lâng kā lí mn̄g; in-ūi án-ni goán sìn lí sī tùi Siōng-tè hia lâi,ê.”" 
John16:31 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Chit-chūn lín ū sìn,bô?" 
John16:32 Lín khòaⁿ, sî teh-beh kàu, taⁿ í-keng kàu, lín ōe hun-sòaⁿ, ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tńg-khì ka-kī ê só͘-chāi, pàng góa ka-kī chi̍t ê. Kî-si̍t góa m̄-sī ka-kī chi̍t ê, in-ūi ū Pē kap góa tông-chāi." 
John16:33 Góa ū chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā lín kóng, sī beh hō͘ lín tī góa lāi-bīn ū pêng-an. Tī sè-kan lín ū khó͘-lān, m̄-kú tio̍h ióng-kám, góa í-keng khah iâⁿ sè-kan.”" 
John17:1 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, gia̍h-ba̍k ǹg thiⁿ kóng, “Pē ah, sî í-keng kàu, goān lí êng-iāu lí ê Kiáⁿ, hō͘ Kiáⁿ thang êng-iāu lí." 
John17:2 Lí ū chiong thóng-tī bān-bîn ê koân-pèng sù hō͘ Kiáⁿ, hō͘ I thang chiong éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā sù hō͘ it-chhè lí kau-tài I ê lâng." 
John17:3 Éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā chiū-sī: Jīn-bat lí sī to̍k-it chin Sîn, koh jīn-bat lí chhe,lâi ê Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok." 
John17:4 Góa í-keng tī tōe-chiūⁿ ū oân-sêng lí kau-tài góa ê kang-chok lâi êng-iāu lí. 
John17:5 Pē ah, hiān-chāi kiû lí hō͘ góa tī lí bīn-chêng tit-tio̍h êng-kng, chiū-sī chhòng-sè í-chêng góa kap lí í-keng ū ê êng-kng." 
John17:6 “Lí tùi chit sè-kan kéng chhut-lâi hō͘ góa ê lâng, góa í-keng ū chiong lí tùi in hián-bêng. In sī lí ê, lí ū chiong in hō͘ góa; in í-keng ū chun-siú lí ê ōe." 
John17:7 Hiān-chāi in chai, lí hō͘ góa ê ta̍k-hāng lóng sī tùi lí lâi,ê." 
John17:8 In-ūi góa ū chiong lí hō͘ góa ê sìn-sit hō͘ in; in í-keng chiap-siū koh chin-chiàⁿ chai góa tùi lí hia lâi, koh ū sìn lí chhe góa." 
John17:9 “Góa ūi-tio̍h in kî-kiû, m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h sè-kan-lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h lí hō͘ góa ê lâng kî-kiû, in-ūi in sī lí ê." 
John17:10 Góa só͘ ū ê it-chhè lóng sī lí ê, lí só͘ ū,ê mā-sī góa ê; góa ū thong-kè in tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
John17:11 Góa bô koh tiàm chit sè-kan; put-kò in iáu tiàm tī chit sè-kan. Sèng ê Pē ah, kiû lí ēng lí hō͘ góa ê miâ pó-siú in, thang hō͘ in chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê, chhin-chhiūⁿ lán sī chi̍t-ê." 
John17:12 Góa kap in chòe-hé ê sî, góa ū ēng lí hō͘ góa ê miâ pó-siú in. Góa ū pó-hō͘ in, tû-khì chù-tiāⁿ bia̍t-bông hit-ê lâng í-gōa, chi̍t ê mā bōe bia̍t-bông, thang hō͘ Sèng-keng ê ōe èng-giām." 
John17:13 Hiān-chāi góa teh-beh khì lí hia; góa iáu tī chit sè-kan kóng chiah-ê ōe, sī beh hō͘ in sim-lāi chhiong-móa góa ê hoaⁿ-hí." 
John17:14 Góa ū chiong lí ê ōe hō͘ in; sè-kan-lâng oàn-hūn in, in-ūi in m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan, chhin-chhiūⁿ góa m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan." 
John17:15 Góa m̄-sī kiû lí chhōa in lī-khui chit sè-kan, sī kiû lí pó-siú in thoat-lī hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
John17:16 In m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan, chhin-chhiūⁿ góa m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan." 
John17:17 Kiû lí ēng chin-lí kā in sèng-hòa. Lí ê ōe chiū-sī chin-lí. 
John17:18 Chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ū chhe góa ji̍p sè-kan, góa mā chhe in ji̍p sè-kan." 
John17:19 Ūi-tio̍h in ê iân-kò͘, góa ka-kī hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng hō͘ lí ēng, hō͘ in mā thang thong-kè chin-lí hun-pia̍t-choh-sèng hō͘ lí ēng." 
John17:20 “Góa m̄-nā ūi-tio̍h lí tùi sè-kan kéng chhut-lâi hō͘ góa hiah-ê lâng kî-kiû, mā ūi-tio̍h tùi in só͘ kóng ê ōe lâi sìn góa hiah-ê lâng kî-kiû," 
John17:21 thang hō͘ in lóng-chóng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê. Pē ah, chhin-chhiūⁿ lí tī góa lāi-bīn, góa mā tī lí lāi-bīn, kiû lí hō͘ in tī lán lāi-bīn, thang hō͘ sè-kan-lâng sìn sī lí chhe góa lâi." 
John17:22 Lí hō͘ góa ê êng-kng, góa mā ū hō͘ in, thang hō͘ in chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê, chhin-chhiūⁿ lán sī chi̍t-ê." 
John17:23 Góa tī in lāi-bīn, lí tī góa lāi-bīn, sī beh hō͘ in oân-choân chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê, thang hō͘ sè-kan-lâng chai sī lí chhe góa lâi, mā chai lí thiàⁿ in, chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ū thiàⁿ góa." 
John17:24 “Pē ah, lí só͘ hō͘,góa hiah-ê lâng, góa tī tó-ūi, góa mā ài in kap góa chòe-hé tī hia, thang hō͘ in khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lí sù hō͘ góa ê êng-kng, in-ūi lí tī chhòng-sè í-chêng í-keng thiàⁿ góa." 
John17:25 Kong-gī ê Pē ah, sè-kan-lâng m̄ bat lí, m̄-kú góa bat lí; chiah-ê lâng chai lí í-keng ū chhe-khián góa." 
John17:26 Góa í-keng ū hō͘ in bat lí ê miâ, mā beh kè-sio̍k hō͘ in bat, thang hō͘ lí tùi góa ê thiàⁿ tī in lāi-bīn, góa mā tī in lāi-bīn.”" 
John18:1 Iâ-so͘ kî-tó soah, chiū kap I ê bûn-tô͘ chhut,khì, kè-khì Khip-lûn-khoe ê hit-pêng. Tī hia ū chi̍t khu hn̂g, Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ ji̍p,khì." 
John18:2 Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê Iû-tāi mā chai hit só͘-chāi, in-ūi Iâ-so͘ kap I ê bûn-tô͘ siông-siông tī hia chū-chi̍p." 
John18:3 Só͘-í Iû-tāi chiū chhōa chi̍t tūi Lô-má peng, í-ki̍p chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng só͘ phài Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe khì kàu hia, chhiú gia̍h teng, hé-pé, kap bú-khì." 
John18:4 Iâ-so͘ chai I só͘ beh tú-tio̍h it-chhè ê tāi-chì, chiū kiâⁿ chìn-chêng, tùi in kóng, “Lín teh chhē sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
John18:5 In ìn kóng, “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘.” Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa chiū-sī.” Chhut-bōe Iâ-so͘ ê Iû-tāi mā kap in khiā chòe-hé." 
John18:6 Iâ-so͘ chi̍t-ē kā in kóng “Góa chiū-sī”, in chiū tò-thè, tó lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha." 
John18:7 Iâ-so͘ koh chi̍t piàn mn̄g in, “Lín teh chhē sím-mi̍h-lâng?” In ìn kóng, “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘.”" 
John18:8 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Góa í-keng kā lín kóng góa chiū-sī. Lín nā-sī teh chhē góa, chiah-ê lâng tio̍h pàng in khì.”" 
John18:9 Chit-ê ōe sī beh èng-giām I í-chêng só͘ kóng,ê, “Lí só͘ hō͘ góa ê lâng, chi̍t ê to bōe bia̍t-bông.”" 
John18:10 Se-bûn Pí-tek ū tòa chi̍t ki to, chiū pu̍ih,chhut-lâi, tùi tōa-chè-si ê po̍k-jîn phut,lo̍h-khì, kā i chiàⁿ-pêng ê hī-á siah,khí-lâi; hit-ê po̍k-jîn ê miâ kiò-chòe Má-le̍k-kó͘." 
John18:11 Iâ-so͘ kā Pí-tek kóng, “To siu-ji̍p siù! Pē só͘ hō͘ góa ê khó͘-poe, góa kiám ōe-tàng bô lim?”" 
John18:12 Āu-lâi, hit-tūi Lô-má peng kap tūi-tiúⁿ, í-ki̍p Iû-thài -lâng ê kéng-ōe lia̍h Iâ-so͘, kā I pa̍k,khí-lâi." 
John18:13 In seng kā I ah-khì hō͘ A-ná, in-ūi A-ná sī hit-nî ê tōa-chè-si Kai-a-hoat ê tiūⁿ-lâng." 
John18:14 Chit-ê Kai-a-hoat í-chêng bat tùi Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k kiàn-gī, kóng “Lêng-khó hō͘ chi̍t ê lâng thòe chèng-lâng sí sī khah hó”." 
John18:15 Se-bûn Pí-tek kap lēng-gōa chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ tè Iâ-so͘ khì; hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kap tōa-chè-si ū se̍k-sāi, só͘-í tè Iâ-so͘ ji̍p-khì tōa-chè-si kong-koán ê lāi-bīn-tiâⁿ," 
John18:16 m̄-kú Pí-tek khiā tī mn̂g-kháu. Kap tōa-chè-si se̍k-sāi hit-ê bûn-tô͘ chhut,lâi, kā kò͘-mn̂g ê lú-pī kóng,chi̍t-ē, chiū chhōa Pí-tek ji̍p,khì." 
John18:17 Kò͘-mn̂g ê lú-pī tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Lí mā-sī hit-ê lâng ê bûn-tô͘ ho͘hⁿ?” I kóng, “Góa m̄-sī!”" 
John18:18 In-ūi thiⁿ-khì léng, hiah-ê po̍k-jîn kap kéng-ōe sio hé-thòaⁿ, khiā-teh hang-sio; Pí-tek mā kap in chòe-hé khiā-teh hang." 
John18:19 Tōa-chè-si sím-mn̄g Iâ-so͘ koan-hē I ê bûn-tô͘ kap I ê kàu-hùn ê tāi-chì. 
John18:20 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa lóng kong-khai tùi sè-kan-lâng kóng-ōe. Góa siông-siông tī Iû-thài -lâng chū-chi̍p ê hōe-tn̂g kap Sèng-tiān lāi kà-sī lâng; góa m̄-bat pì-bi̍t kóng." 
John18:21 Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ sím-mn̄g góa? Lí khì mn̄g bat thiaⁿ góa kóng-ōe ê lâng, khòaⁿ góa tùi in kóng sím-mi̍h, in chai góa só͘ kóng,ê.”" 
John18:22 Iâ-so͘ kóng-liáu, khiā tī piⁿ,á ê chi̍t ê kéng-ōe kā I siàn chhùi-phóe, kóng, “Lí káⁿ án-ni ìn tōa-chè-si?”" 
John18:23 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng, “Góa nā kóng m̄-tio̍h, lí tio̍h chí-chhut chhò-gō͘; nā kóng tio̍h, sī-án-chóaⁿ kā góa phah?”" 
John18:24 Jiân-āu A-ná chiong hō͘ lâng pa̍k,teh ê Iâ-so͘ ah-khì hō͘ tōa-chè-si Kai-a-hoat. 
John18:25 Se-bûn Pí-tek iáu khiā-teh hang-hé. Ū lâng mn̄g i, “Lí mā-sī hit-ê lâng ê bûn-tô͘ ho͘hⁿ?” Pí-tek m̄ jīn, kóng, “Góa m̄-sī!”" 
John18:26 Tōa-chè-si ê chi̍t ê po̍k-jîn, sī hī-á hō͘ Pí-tek siah,khí-lâi hit-ê lâng ê chhin-chiâⁿ, tùi i kóng, “Góa kiám m̄-sī ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí kap I tī hn̂g-lāi?”" 
John18:27 Pí-tek koh-chài m̄ jīn; hit-sî, koe sûi-sî thî." 
John18:28 Thàu-chá, Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù chiong Iâ-so͘ tùi Kai-a-hoat hia ah-khì chóng-tok-hú; in ka-kī bô ji̍p,khì, in-ūi kiaⁿ bak-tio̍h lâ-sâm soah bōe-tàng chia̍h Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê boán-chhan." 
John18:29 Só͘-í, Pí-lia̍p-to chhut-lâi kìⁿ in, mn̄g in kóng, “Lín kò chit-ê lâng sím-mi̍h chōe?”" 
John18:30 In ìn kóng, “Chit-ê lâng nā bô chòe pháiⁿ tāi-chì, goán bōe kā I kau hō͘ lí.”" 
John18:31 Pí-lia̍p-to kā in kóng, “Lín ka-kī khì pān, chiàu lín ê Lu̍t-hoat kā I sím-phòaⁿ.” In tùi i kóng, “Goán bô koân kā lâng phòaⁿ sí-hêng.”" 
John18:32 Che sī beh èng-giām Iâ-so͘ í-chêng só͘ kóng ê ōe, piáu-sī I teh-beh án-chóaⁿ sí." 
John18:33 Pí-lia̍p-to koh ji̍p-khì chóng-tok-hú, tiàu Iâ-so͘ lâi, mn̄g I kóng, “Lí sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông sī,bô?”" 
John18:34 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí án-ni mn̄g góa sī lí ka-kī ê ì-sù, á-sī thiaⁿ-tio̍h pa̍t-lâng kā lí kóng góa ê tāi-chì?”" 
John18:35 Pí-lia̍p-to kóng, “Góa kiám sī Iû-thài -lâng? Lí pún-cho̍k ê lâng kap chè-si-tiúⁿ chiong lí kau hō͘ góa. Lí ū chòe sím-mi̍h tāi-chì?”" 
John18:36 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Góa ê Kok-tō͘ m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan. Góa ê Kok-tō͘ nā sio̍k chit sè-kan, góa ê pō͘-hā ōe ūi góa cheng-chiàn, bián tì-kàu góa siū chhut-bōe hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù. Kî-si̍t, góa ê Kok-tō͘ m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan.”" 
John18:37 Pí-lia̍p-to chiū mn̄g I kóng, “Án-ni lí sī ông lo͘h?” Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Lí kóng góa sī ông. Góa ūi-tio̍h chit-ê chhut-sì, ūi-tio̍h chit-ê lâi sè-kan, sī beh ūi chin-lí choh-chèng. Sio̍k chin-lí ê lâng lóng ōe thiaⁿ góa ê siaⁿ.”" 
John18:38 Pí-lia̍p-to mn̄g I kóng, “Sím-mi̍h sī chin-lí?” Kóng soah, Pí-lia̍p-to chiū koh chhut-khì gōa-bīn tùi in kóng, “Góa chhâ bōe chhut I ū sím-mi̍h chōe." 
John18:39 Lín ū chi̍t ê koàn-lē, tī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh góa tio̍h pàng chi̍t ê hoān-lâng hō͘ lín. Án-ni, lín ài góa pàng Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông hō͘ lín,bô?”" 
John18:40 In koh tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “M̄-sī chit-ê lâng, goán ài Pa-lia̍p-pa!” Pa-lia̍p-pa sī chi̍t ê pō-tô͘." 
John19:1 Āu-lâi, Pí-lia̍p-to kiò lâng chhōa Iâ-so͘ chhut-khì ēng piⁿ kā I phah." 
John19:2 Hiah-ê peng ēng chhì-á pīⁿ chi̍t téng ông-koan kā I tì tī thâu-khak téng, koh kā I moa chi̍t niá chí-sek ê tn̂g-phàu." 
John19:3 In óa,khì, tùi I kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông bān-sòe!” jiân-āu kā I siàn chhùi-phóe." 
John19:4 Pí-lia̍p-to koh chhut-lâi gōa-bīn, tùi hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ, góa chhōa I chhut-lâi hō͘ lín, hō͘ lín chai góa chhâ bōe chhut I ū-chōe.”" 
John19:5 Iâ-so͘ chiū chhut,lâi, tì chhì-á ê ông-koan, moa chí-sek ê tn̂g-phàu. Pí-lia̍p-to kā in kóng, “Khòaⁿ, chit-ê lâng!”" 
John19:6 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Sèng-tiān ê kéng-ōe khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chiū tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè! Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!” Pí-lia̍p-to tùi in kóng, “Lín ka-kī kā I chhōa-khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè, in-ūi góa chhâ bōe chhut I ū-chōe.”" 
John19:7 Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng ìn kóng, “Goán ū Lu̍t-hoat, chiàu Lu̍t-hoat I eng-kai sí, in-ūi I hong ka-kī chòe Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.”" 
John19:8 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h in án-ni kóng chiū jú kiaⁿ. 
John19:9 I koh ji̍p-khì chóng-tok-hú, mn̄g Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Lí tùi tó-ūi lâi?” M̄-kú Iâ-so͘ bô kā i ìn." 
John19:10 Pí-lia̍p-to tùi I kóng, “Lí m̄ kā góa kóng o͘h? Kiám m̄ chai góa ū koân thang pàng lí, mā ū koân kā lí tèng si̍p-jī-kè?”" 
John19:11 Iâ-so͘ ìn kóng, “Nā m̄-sī Siōng-tè sù lí koân-pèng, lí bô koân thang pān góa. In-ūi án-ni, kā góa kau hō͘ lí hit-ê lâng, i ê chōe koh-khah tāng.”" 
John19:12 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe jú siūⁿ-beh pàng Iâ-so͘, m̄-kú hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng it-ti̍t hoah kóng, “Lí nā pàng chit-ê lâng, lí chiū m̄-sī Lô-má -hông-tè Khái-sat ê pêng-iú. Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng hong ka-kī choh-ông chiū-sī pōe-poān Khái-sat.”" 
John19:13 Pí-lia̍p-to thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū chhōa Iâ-so͘ chhut,lâi, ka-kī chē tī sím-phòaⁿ-se̍k. Hit-ê só͘-chāi kiò-chòe “Pho͘-chio̍h-tōe”, Hi-pek-lâi-ōe kiò-chòe Ka-pa-tāi." 
John19:14 Hit-ji̍t sī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê chêng-ji̍t, sî-kan chha-put-to tiong-tàu. Pí-lia̍p-to tùi hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng, “Khòaⁿ, lín ê ông!”" 
John19:15 In chiū hoah kóng, “Hō͘ sí, hō͘ sí! Kā tèng si̍p-jī-kè!” Pí-lia̍p-to tùi in kóng, “Lín ài góa chiong lín ê ông tèng si̍p-jī-kè o͘h?” Chè-si-tiúⁿ kóng, “Khái-sat í-gōa, goán bô ông!”" 
John19:16 Āu-lâi Pí-lia̍p-to chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ in khì tèng si̍p-jī-kè. In chiū kā Iâ-so͘ ah,khì. 
John19:17 Iâ-so͘ chhut,lâi, pē ka-kī ê si̍p-jī-kè, lâi kàu hit-ê kiò-chòe “Thâu-khak-óaⁿ-niá” ê só͘-chāi, Hi-pek-lâi-ōe kiò-chòe Kok-kok-tha." 
John19:18 In tī hia kā Iâ-so͘ tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè; í-gōa ū nn̄g ê lâng kap I chòe-hé tèng, chi̍t pêng chi̍t ê, Iâ-so͘ tī tiong-ng." 
John19:19 Pí-lia̍p-to siá chi̍t tè chōe-chn̄g, tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè téng, téng-bīn siá, “ Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘, Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông.”" 
John19:20 Ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng tha̍k-tio̍h chōe-chn̄g, in-ūi Iâ-so͘ hō͘ lâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê só͘-chāi óa-kūn Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, koh chōe-chn̄g sī ēng Hi-pek-lâi-bûn, La-teng-bûn, Hi-la̍h-bûn siá,ê." 
John19:21 Iû-thài -kàu ê chè-si-tiúⁿ tùi Pí-lia̍p-to kóng, “M̄-thang siá ‘ Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông’, tio̍h siá ‘Chit-ê lâng chū-chheng: Góa sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Ông’.”" 
John19:22 Pí-lia̍p-to ìn kóng, “Góa só͘ siá,ê í-keng siá lah, bô beh kái!”" 
John19:23 Hiah-ê peng chiong Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè liáu-āu, the̍h I ê gōa-phàu pun-chòe sì hūn, chi̍t lâng chi̍t hūn. In koh the̍h I ê lāi-saⁿ; chit-niá lāi-saⁿ bô kap-chōa, téng-ē chit-chòe chi̍t tè." 
John19:24 Só͘-í, in chham-siông kóng, “Chit-niá mài thiah-khui, lán lâi thiu-chhiam khòaⁿ sī siáⁿ-lâng ê.” Che sī beh èng-giām Sèng-keng ê ōe: In pun góa ê gōa-phàu, ūi-tio̍h góa ê saⁿ thiu-chhiam. Chiah-ê peng tú chiàu án-ni chòe." 
John19:25 Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú, I ê a-î, Kek-lô-pa ê bó͘ Má-lī-a, kap Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a lóng khiā tī Iâ-so͘ ê si̍p-jī-kè piⁿ." 
John19:26 Iâ-so͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h I ê lāu-bú, koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h I só͘ thiàⁿ hit-ê bûn-tô͘ khiā tī piⁿ,á, chiū tùi I ê lāu-bú kóng, “A-bú, khòaⁿ, lí ê kiáⁿ!”" 
John19:27 Āu-lâi I tùi hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kóng, “Khòaⁿ, lí ê lāu-bú!” Tùi hit-sî khí, hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kā Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú chiap tńg-khì in tau." 
John19:28 Chit-ê sū í-āu, Iâ-so͘ chai it-chhè ê tāi-chì í-keng oân-sêng, ūi-tio̍h beh èng-giām Sèng-keng ê ōe chiū kóng, “Góa chhùi-ta.”" 
John19:29 Tī hia ū chi̍t ê tóe-móa sng-chiú ê pân, in chiū ēng hái-mî chìm chiú, pa̍k tī gû-chhek-chháu bé, tu kàu I ê chhùi." 
John19:30 Tam liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Oân-sêng lah!” Kóng-liáu, thâu kau,lo̍h-khì, khùi chiū tn̄g." 
John19:31 Hit-ji̍t sī pài-gō͘, sī Pī-pān-ji̍t. In-ūi keh-ji̍t sī te̍k-pia̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù ūi-tio̍h bô ài tī An-hioh-ji̍t lâu sin-si tī si̍p-jī-kè téng, chiū kiû Pí-lia̍p-to kah lâng kòng-tn̄g siū-hêng-chiá ê kha-kut, thang chiong sin-si siu,lo̍h-lâi." 
John19:32 Hiah-ê peng chiū khì, chiong kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè thâu chi̍t ê kap lēng-gōa chi̍t ê ê kha-kut kòng-tn̄g." 
John19:33 In lâi kàu Iâ-so͘ hia, khòaⁿ-tio̍h I í-keng sí, chiū bô kā I ê kha-kut kòng-tn̄g." 
John19:34 M̄-kú ū chi̍t ê peng ēng chhiuⁿ chha̍k Iâ-so͘ ê hia̍p-ē, sûi-sî ū huih kap chúi lâu,chhut-lâi." 
John19:35 Khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng í-keng ū choh-chèng, sī beh hō͘ lín mā sìn; i ê kiàn-chèng sī chin-si̍t, i chai i só͘ kóng,ê sī sū-si̍t." 
John19:36 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng sī beh èng-giām Sèng-keng ê ōe, “I ê kut liân chi̍t ki to bōe kòng-tn̄g.”" 
John19:37 Koh lēng-gōa ū chi̍t kù keng-bûn kóng, “In ōe gióng-bōng in ēng chhiuⁿ kā i chha̍k ê lâng.”" 
John19:38 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu, ū chi̍t ê A-lī-má-thài -lâng Iok-sek lâi kiû Pí-lia̍p-to chún i khì siu Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé. I in-ūi kiaⁿ Iû-thài -kàu tong-kio̍k, só͘-í pì-bi̍t choh Iâ-so͘ ê bûn-tô͘. Pí-lia̍p-to ún-chún, Iok-sek chiū khì siu Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé." 
John19:39 Koh í-chêng bat tī àm-sî khì kìⁿ Iâ-so͘ hit-ê Nî-ko-tek-bō͘ mā tòa iok saⁿ-cha̍p kong-kun ê bu̍t-io̍h chhiau tîm-hiuⁿ ê phang-liāu lâi. 
John19:40 In nn̄g lâng chiong Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé siu,lo̍h-lâi, chiàu Iû-thài -lâng an-chòng ê koàn-lē kā I boah phang-liāu, koh ēng iù-môa-pò͘ kā I pau-chat." 
John19:41 Iâ-so͘ tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê só͘-chāi ū chi̍t khu hn̂g, hn̂g-lāi ū chi̍t ê iáu m̄-bat chòng-kè lâng ê sin bōng." 
John19:42 In-ūi hit-ji̍t sī pài-gō͘, sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Pī-pān-ji̍t, bōng koh bô hn̄g, in chiū kā Iâ-so͘ an-chòng tī hia." 
John20:1 Lé-pài-ji̍t thàu-chá, thiⁿ iáu-bē kng, Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a khì bōng-tōe, khòaⁿ-tio̍h bōng-kháu ê chio̍h í-keng sóa-khui." 
John20:2 I chiū cháu-khì chhē Se-bûn Pí-tek, koh khì chhē Iâ-so͘ só͘ thiàⁿ hit-ê bûn-tô͘, kā in kóng, “Ū lâng chiong Chú tùi bōng,ni̍h sóa-cháu; goán m̄ chai in kā I khǹg tī tó-ūi.”" 
John20:3 Pí-tek kap hit-ê bûn-tô͘ chiū khì bōng-tōe. 
John20:4 Nn̄g ê lâng chòe-hé cháu, hit-ê bûn-tô͘ pí Pí-tek cháu khah kín, seng kàu bōng,ni̍h." 
John20:5 I àⁿ lo̍h-khì khòaⁿ bōng-lāi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h iù-môa-pò͘ khǹg tī hia, put-kò bô ji̍p,khì." 
John20:6 Se-bûn Pí-tek tè-āu mā kàu, ji̍p-khì bōng-lāi. I khòaⁿ-tio̍h iù-môa-pò͘ khǹg tī hia," 
John20:7 mā khòaⁿ-tio̍h pau-chat Iâ-so͘ thâu-khak ê kun bô kap iù-môa-pò͘ khǹg chòe-hé, kńg,teh, lēng-gōa khǹg." 
John20:8 Seng kàu bōng hit-ê bûn-tô͘ mā ji̍p,khì, khòaⁿ-liáu chiū sìn." 
John20:9 In iáu-bē liáu-kái Sèng-keng ê ōe, kóng I it-tēng tio̍h tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h." 
John20:10 Jiân-āu, hit nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ tńg-khì in tau." 
John20:11 Má-lī-a khiā tī bōng-gōa teh khàu. I ná khàu ná àⁿ lo̍h-khì khòaⁿ bōng-lāi," 
John20:12 khòaⁿ-tio̍h nn̄g ê chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài chē tī goân-lâi hē Iâ-so͘ ê ûi-thé ê só͘-chāi, chi̍t ê tī thâu chit-pêng, chi̍t ê tī kha hit-pêng." 
John20:13 In mn̄g i kóng, “Hū-jîn-lâng, lí ná teh khàu?” I ìn kóng, “Ū lâng kā góa ê Chú sóa-cháu, góa m̄ chai in kā I khǹg tī tó-ūi.”" 
John20:14 Kóng soah, Má-lī-a oa̍t-tńg-sin, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ khiā tī hia, m̄-kú m̄ chai I sī Iâ-so͘." 
John20:15 Iâ-so͘ mn̄g i, “Hū-jîn-lâng, lí ná teh khàu? Lí teh chhē sím-mi̍h-lâng?” Má-lī-a siūⁿ-chòe I sī kò͘-hn̂g,ê, chiū ìn kóng, “Thâu-ke, lí nā ū kā I sóa-cháu, chhiáⁿ kā góa kóng lí kā I khǹg tī tó-ūi, góa thang khì kā I siu,tńg-lâi.”" 
John20:16 Iâ-so͘ kā i kiò, “ Má-lī-a!” Má-lī-a oa̍t-tńg-sin, ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe kiò Iâ-so͘, “Lia̍p-pho-nî!” ì-sù chiū-sī “Lāu-su”." 
John20:17 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “M̄-thang kā góa khîⁿ,teh, in-ūi góa iáu-bē chiūⁿ-khì Pē hia. Lí tio̍h khì kā góa ê hiaⁿ-tī kóng, ‘Góa beh chiūⁿ-khì góa ê Pē, mā-sī lín ê Pē, góa ê Siōng-tè, mā-sī lín ê Siōng-tè hia.’”" 
John20:18 Boa̍t-tāi-lia̍p ê Má-lī-a chiū khì kā bûn-tô͘ pò-kò kóng “Góa í-keng kìⁿ-tio̍h Chú”; koh kóng Chú ū kā i kóng chiah-ê ōe. 
John20:19 Kâng hit-ê lé-pài-ji̍t àm-sî, bûn-tô͘ chū-chi̍p ê só͘-chāi mn̂g lóng koaiⁿ,teh, in-ūi in kiaⁿ Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù. Iâ-so͘ lâi, khiā tī in tiong-ng, tùi in kóng, “Goān lín pêng-an!”" 
John20:20 I kóng-liáu, chiong siang-chhiú kap hia̍p-ē hō͘ in khòaⁿ. Bûn-tô͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chú, chin hoaⁿ-hí." 
John20:21 Iâ-so͘ koh kā in kóng, “Goān lín pêng-an! Chhin-chhiūⁿ Pē ū chhe góa, góa mā chhe lín.”" 
John20:22 Kóng soah, I tùi in pûn-khùi, kóng, “Niá-siū Sèng Sîn!" 
John20:23 Lín sià-bián sím-mi̍h-lâng ê chōe, in chiū tit-tio̍h sià-bián; lín bô sià-bián sím-mi̍h-lâng ê chōe, in chiū bô tit-tio̍h sià-bián.”" 
John20:24 To-má, mā kiò-chòe Siang-siⁿ-á, i sī cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê chi̍t ê, Iâ-so͘ lâi hit-sî bô kap in chòe-hé tī hia." 
John20:25 Só͘-í kî-tha ê bûn-tô͘ kā i kóng, “Goán í-keng kìⁿ-tio̍h Chú lah.” To-má kā in kóng, “Góa nā bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h I chhiú-tiong ê teng-jiah, ēng chńg-thâu-á bong teng-jiah, koh ēng chhiú bong I ê hia̍p-ē, góa choa̍t-tùi m̄ sìn.”" 
John20:26 Chi̍t lé-pài āu, bûn-tô͘ koh chū-chi̍p tī chhù-lāi, To-má mā kap in chòe-hé. Mn̂g koaiⁿ,teh, Iâ-so͘ lâi, khiā tī in tiong-ng, kóng, “Goān lín pêng-an!”" 
John20:27 Jiân-āu, I kā To-má kóng, “Chhun chńg-thâu-á lâi chia, thàm góa ê chhiú; chhun-chhiú lâi bong góa ê hia̍p-ē. M̄-thang bô-sìn, tio̍h sìn!”" 
John20:28 To-má kóng, “Góa ê Chú, góa ê Siōng-tè!”" 
John20:29 Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa chiah sìn o͘h? Bô khòaⁿ,tio̍h lâi sìn ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!”" 
John20:30 Iâ-so͘ tī bûn-tô͘ ê bīn-chêng iáu kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah, bô kì-chài tī chit-pún chheh." 
John20:31 Kì-chài chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok, sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, koh hō͘ lín thong-kè sìn, khò I ê miâ tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā." 
John21:1 Āu-lâi, Iâ-so͘ koh tī Thê-pí-lí-a ô͘-piⁿ tùi bûn-tô͘ hián-hiān. Hián-hiān ê keng-kè sī án-ni:" 
John21:2 Se-bûn Pí-tek, kiò-chòe Siang-siⁿ-á ê To-má, Ka-lī-lī ê Ka-ná -lâng Ná-tàn-gia̍p, Se-pì-thài ê nn̄g ê kiáⁿ, kap lēng-gōa nn̄g ê bûn-tô͘ lóng chòe-hé." 
John21:3 Se-bûn Pí-tek kā in kóng, “Góa beh lâi-khì lia̍h-hî.” In kā i kóng, “Goán mā beh kap lí khì.” In chhut,khì, chiūⁿ-chûn; hit-àm, in lia̍h lóng bô." 
John21:4 Thiⁿ phú-kng, Iâ-so͘ khiā tī hōaⁿ-téng; put-kò bûn-tô͘ jīn bōe chhut I sī Iâ-so͘." 
John21:5 Iâ-so͘ tùi in kóng, “Siàu-liân-lâng, lín lia̍h ū hî bô?” In ìn kóng, “Bô.”" 
John21:6 I kā in kóng, “Kā bāng pha lo̍h-khì chûn ê chiàⁿ-pêng chiū ōe lia̍h,tio̍h.” In chiū pha,lo̍h-khì; in-ūi pha-tio̍h chin chōe hî, soah thoa bōe khí,lâi." 
John21:7 Iâ-so͘ só͘ thiàⁿ hit-ê bûn-tô͘ kā Pí-tek kóng, “Sī Chú!” Se-bûn Pí-tek chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h sī Chú, in-ūi thǹg-pak-theh, kín chiong gōa-saⁿ moa,teh, thiàu-lo̍h chúi." 
John21:8 Kî-tha ê bûn-tô͘, in-ūi in lī lio̍k-tōe bô hn̄g, iok chi̍t-pah kong-chhioh, chiū kò hit-chiah sòe-chiah chûn kā kui-bāng ê hî thoa óa-hōaⁿ." 
John21:9 In chi̍t-ē chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hia ū hé-thòaⁿ hé, téng-bīn ū hî, koh ū piáⁿ." 
John21:10 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Tú-chiah lia̍h,tio̍h ê hî, lia̍h kúi-bé-á lâi.”" 
John21:11 Se-bûn Pí-tek peh-khì chûn-téng, thoa bāng khí-lâi hōaⁿ-téng, kui-bāng lóng sī tōa bé hî, lóng-chóng chi̍t-pah gō͘-cha̍p-saⁿ bé, sui-jiân hiah-ni̍h chōe, bāng mā bô phòa,khì." 
John21:12 Iâ-so͘ kā in kóng, “Lâi chia̍h chá-tǹg!” Bûn-tô͘ bô lâng káⁿ kā I mn̄g, “Lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” In-ūi in chai I sī Chú." 
John21:13 Iâ-so͘ kiâⁿ óa,lâi, the̍h piáⁿ, pun hō͘ in, hî mā chiàu án-ni pun hō͘ in." 
John21:14 Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h í-āu tùi bûn-tô͘ hián-hiān, che sī tē-saⁿ piàn." 
John21:15 In chia̍h chá-tǹg liáu-āu, Iâ-so͘ mn̄g Se-bûn Pí-tek, “ Iok-hān ê kiáⁿ Se-bûn, lí ū thiàⁿ góa iâⁿ-kè chiah-ê,bô?” I ìn kóng, “Chú ah, ū, lí chai góa ū thiàⁿ lí.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Iúⁿ-chhī góa ê iûⁿ-á-kiáⁿ!”" 
John21:16 Iâ-so͘ tē-jī piàn mn̄g i kóng, “ Iok-hān ê kiáⁿ Se-bûn, lí ū thiàⁿ góa,bô?” I ìn kóng, “Chú ah, ū, lí chai góa ū thiàⁿ lí.” Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Bo̍k-ióng góa ê iûⁿ!”" 
John21:17 Iâ-so͘ tē-saⁿ piàn kā i mn̄g, “ Iok-hān ê kiáⁿ Se-bûn, lí ū thiàⁿ góa,bô?” Pí-tek in-ūi Iâ-so͘ tē-saⁿ piàn mn̄g kóng “Lí ū thiàⁿ góa,bô”, chiū chin siong-sim, kā Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Chú ah, lí ta̍k-hāng lóng chai, lí chai góa ū thiàⁿ lí.” Iâ-so͘ chiū kā i kóng, “Iúⁿ-chhī góa ê iûⁿ!" 
John21:18 Góa si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi kā lí kóng, lí siàu-liân ê sî ka-kī hâ io-tòa khì ài khì ê só͘-chāi; m̄-kú nî-lāu ê sî, lí ōe chhun siang-chhiú hō͘ lâng pa̍k, kā lí thoa kàu lí bô ài khì ê só͘-chāi.”" 
John21:19 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe sī chí Pí-tek ōe án-chóaⁿ sí lâi êng-iāu Siōng-tè. Kóng soah, Iâ-so͘ kā i kóng, “Lâi tè góa!”" 
John21:20 Pí-tek oa̍t-tńg-sin, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ só͘ thiàⁿ hit-ê bûn-tô͘ tè tī āu-bīn. I bat tī boán-chhan ê sî the-óa Iâ-so͘ ê heng-chêng, mn̄g kóng, “Chú ah, sī sím-mi̍h-lâng beh chhut-bōe lí?”" 
John21:21 Pí-tek chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h i chiū mn̄g Iâ-so͘, “Chú ah, chit-ê lâng ōe án-chóaⁿ?”" 
John21:22 Iâ-so͘ ìn i kóng, “Góa nā ài i oa̍h kàu góa lâi, kap lí ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē. Lí lâi tè góa!”" 
John21:23 Tùi án-ni, chit-ê ōe tī bûn-tô͘ ê tiong-kan liû-thoân kóng chit-ê bûn-tô͘ bōe sí. Kî-si̍t, Iâ-so͘ m̄-sī kóng i bōe sí, sī kóng “Góa nā ài i oa̍h kàu góa lâi, kap lí ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē”." 
John21:24 Chit-ê bûn-tô͘ chiū-sī ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì choh-chèng, koh chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì siá,khí-lâi ê lâng. Lán chai i ê kiàn-chèng sī chin-si̍t." 
John21:25 Iâ-so͘ koh ū chòe kî-tha chin chōe tāi-chì, nā beh chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì chi̍t-hāng chi̍t-hāng siá,khí-lâi, só͘ siá ê chheh, góa siūⁿ choân sè-kài mā tóe bōe liáu." 
Acts1:1 Thê-o-hui-lô sian-siⁿ: Tī góa só͘ siá ê thâu chi̍t pún chheh, góa í-keng ū chiong Iâ-so͘ só͘ chòe só͘ kà-sī it-chhè ê tāi-chì, tùi I khai-sí kang-chok ti̍t-kàu chiūⁿ-thiⁿ hit-ji̍t, lóng ū kóng-khí. I chiūⁿ-thiⁿ í-chêng, ū thong-kè Sèng Sîn chiong chin chōe tāi-chì chí-sī só͘ kéng-soán ê sù-tô͘." 
Acts1:2  
Acts1:3 I siū-hāi í-āu, ū ēng chin chōe chèng-kù hián-bêng I pún-sin oa̍h,teh, tī sì-cha̍p ji̍t ê tiong-kan ū hián-hiān hō͘ sù-tô͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, tùi in káng-lūn Siōng-tè-kok ê sū." 
Acts1:4 Iâ-so͘ kap in chòe-hé ê sî ū hoan-hù in, “M̄-thang lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, chiàu góa bat kā lín kóng, tio̍h thèng-hāu Pē ê èng-ún." 
Acts1:5 Iok-hān ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé, m̄-kú koh bô kúi ji̍t, lín ōe niá-siū Sèng Sîn ê sóe-lé.”" 
Acts1:6 Sù-tô͘ kap Iâ-so͘ chū-chi̍p ê sî, mn̄g I kóng, “Chú ah, lí beh tī chit-ê sî chiong chú-koân hôe-ho̍k hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t sī,bô?”" 
Acts1:7 I kā in kóng, “Pē ēng ka-kī ê koân-pèng koat-tēng ê sî-kan kap ki-hōe, m̄-sī lín thang chai,ê." 
Acts1:8 M̄-kú Sèng Sîn lîm-kàu lín ê sî, lín ōe tit-tio̍h lêng-le̍k, tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, choân Iû-thài kap Sat-má-lī-a, ti̍t-kàu thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak ūi-tio̍h góa chòe kiàn-chèng.”" 
Acts1:9 Iâ-so͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, tī in teh khòaⁿ ê sî siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ; ū chi̍t phìⁿ hûn kā I chiap,khì, in chiū khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h." 
Acts1:10 In iáu-teh chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ thiⁿ ê sî, hut-jiân ū nn̄g ê chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ ê lâng khiā tī in sin-piⁿ," 
Acts1:11 kóng, “ Ka-lī-lī -lâng ah, lín ná khiā tī chia teh khòaⁿ thiⁿ? Chit-ūi lī-khui lín siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ ê Iâ-so͘, lín khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I án-ni chiūⁿ-thiⁿ, I mā ōe chiàu án-ni koh-lâi.”" 
Acts1:12 Āu-lâi, sù-tô͘ tùi hit-ê kiò-chòe Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ ê só͘-chāi tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; Kaⁿ-ná-soaⁿ lī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng bô jōa hn̄g, chha-put-to chi̍t kong-lí, chiū-sī An-hioh-ji̍t ōe-ēng-tit kiâⁿ ê lō͘-thêng." 
Acts1:13 In ji̍p-siâⁿ liáu-āu, peh-khí-khì in só͘ tòa hit-keng chhù lâu-téng ê thiaⁿ; Pí-tek, Iok-hān, Ngá-kok, An-tek-lia̍t, Hui-le̍k kap To-má, Pa-to-lô-mái kap Má-thài, A-le̍k-hui ê kiáⁿ Ngá-kok, Kek-chìn-tóng ê Se-bûn, kap Ngá-kok ê kiáⁿ Iû-tāi tī hia." 
Acts1:14 In kap kúi-nā ê hū-jîn-lâng, mā ū Iâ-so͘ ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a í-ki̍p I ê hiaⁿ-tī, lóng kè-sio̍k tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì pek-chhiat kî-tó." 
Acts1:15 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu, chha-put-to ū chi̍t-pah jī-cha̍p ê sìn-tô͘ chū-chi̍p. Pí-tek khiā,khí-lâi, kóng," 
Acts1:16 “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, Sèng Sîn thong-kè Tāi-pi̍t ê chhùi tī Sèng-keng só͘ ū-giân, koan-hē Iû-tāi chhōa lâng lia̍h Iâ-so͘ ê tāi-chì it-tēng tio̍h èng-giām." 
Acts1:17 I pún-lâi sī lán tiong-kan ê chi̍t ê, siū soán lâi hun-tam chit-ê chit-hūn." 
Acts1:18 “ Iû-tāi ēng i chòe put-gī ê tāi-chì só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ bóe chi̍t tè tōe; I tī hia tò-thâu-chai siak-sí, pak-tó͘ piak-li̍h, tn̂g-á lóng lâu,chhut-lâi." 
Acts1:19 Tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng lóng chai chit-hāng tāi-chì, só͘-í chiàu in pún-tōe ê ōe kā hit-tè tōe kiò-chòe A-kek-tāi-má, ì-sù sī ‘Huih-hn̂g’." 
Acts1:20 “In-ūi Si-phian ū kì-chài: Tio̍h hō͘ i ê chhù hong-hòe, bô lâng tī hia khiā-khí. Koh ū kì-chài: Tio̍h hō͘ pa̍t-lâng tāi-thòe i léng-tō ê chit-ūi." 
Acts1:21 “Só͘-í, tio̍h ū chi̍t ê lâng lâi ka-ji̍p, kap goán chòe-hé choh Chú Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. Chit-ê lâng tio̍h tī Chú Iâ-so͘ kap lán chòe-hé chhut-ji̍p ê sî, chiū-sī tùi Iok-hān si-sóe khí, kàu Iâ-so͘ lī-pia̍t lán siū chiap chiūⁿ-thiⁿ hit-ji̍t, put-sî kap lán chòe-tīn.”" 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 In chiū thê-miâ nn̄g ê lâng, chiū-sī kiò-chòe Pa-sat-pa, mā chheng-chòe Iû-sū-to͘ ê Iok-sek, kap Má-thê-a." 
Acts1:24 In kî-tó kóng, “Chú ah, lí chai ta̍k-ê lâng ê sim. Kiû lí chí-sī goán, chit nn̄g lâng tiong-kan tó chi̍t ê sī lí só͘ kéng-soán," 
Acts1:25 beh lâi tam-tng sù-tô͘ ê chit-hūn,ê, in-ūi Iû-tāi í-keng pàng-sak chit-ê chit-hūn, khì i eng-kai khì ê só͘-chāi.”" 
Acts1:26 Jiân-āu, in thiu-chhiam, thiu-tio̍h Má-thê-a, i chiū ka-ji̍p cha̍p-it ê sù-tô͘ ê thoân-thé." 
Acts2:1 Gō͘-sûn-choeh ê ji̍t kàu, bûn-tô͘ lóng chū-chi̍p tī chi̍t só͘-chāi." 
Acts2:2 Hut-jiân ū siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi, chhin-chhiūⁿ thàu tōa-hong, chhiong-móa in teh chē ê kui-keng chhù." 
Acts2:3 Koh ū chhin-chhiūⁿ hun-khui ê hé-chi̍h tùi in chhut-hiān, hioh tī ta̍k-ê lâng ê téng-bīn." 
Acts2:4 In lóng siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, chiàu Sèng Sîn hō͘ in ê châi-lêng khai-sí kóng pa̍t-chióng gú-giân." 
Acts2:5 Hit-sî, ū chi̍t-kóa khiân-sêng ê Iû-thài -lâng tùi sè-kài ta̍k-kok lâi, tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts2:6 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siaⁿ hiáng, chèng-lâng chiū lóng chū-chi̍p óa,lâi. In-ūi ta̍k-ê lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h bûn-tô͘ ēng in ê pún-tōe-ōe tùi in kóng-ōe, soah gāng,khì." 
Acts2:7 In tio̍h-kiaⁿ koh kî-koài, kóng, “Lí khòaⁿ, chiah-ê teh kóng-ōe,ê kiám m̄-sī lóng Ka-lī-lī -lâng?" 
Acts2:8 Lán ná ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h in lóng ēng lán ta̍k-ê lâng tòa ê só͘-chāi ê gú-giân teh kóng-ōe? 
Acts2:9 Lán chiah-ê Phà-thê-a -lâng, Bí-tí-a -lâng, Í-lân -lâng, í-ki̍p tùi Bí-soh-put-ta̍t-bí-a, Iû-thài kap Ka-phà-to-ka, Pún-to͘ kap A-sè-a," 
Acts2:10 Hut-lū-ka kap Pông-hui-lī-a, Ai-ki̍p kap óa-kūn Kó͘-lī-nāi ê Lī-pí-a tōe-khu lâi ê lâng, mā ū tùi Lô-má lâi ê chhut-gōa-lâng, lāi-bīn ū" 
Acts2:11 Iû-thài -lâng kap kái-chong ji̍p Iû-thài -kàu ê lâng, koh ū Khek-lí-te̍k -lâng kap A-la-pek -lâng, lán kèng-jiân thiaⁿ-tio̍h in lóng ēng lán chāi-tōe ê ōe kóng-khí Siōng-tè só͘ chòe úi-tāi ê tāi-chì.”" 
Acts2:12 Tāi-ke tio̍h-kiaⁿ koh gông-ngia̍h, mn̄g-lâi-mn̄g-khì, “Che sī sím-mi̍h tāi-chì?”" 
Acts2:13 Ū lâng thí-chhiò kóng, “Chiah-ê lâng sī lim sin-chiú teh chùi.”" 
Acts2:14 Chit-ê sî, Pí-tek kap cha̍p-it ê sù-tô͘ khiā,khí-lâi, tōa-siaⁿ tùi chèng-lâng kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng kap só͘-ū tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng, lín tio̍h chai, chù-ì thiaⁿ góa ê ōe." 
Acts2:15 Chiah-ê lâng m̄-sī chiàu lín só͘ siūⁿ teh chiú-chùi, chit-chūn chiah chá-khí-sî káu tiám." 
Acts2:16 Kî-si̍t che chiū-sī sian-ti Iok-ní só͘ kóng,ê. 
Acts2:17 Siōng-tè kóng: Tī chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí, Góa beh chiong góa ê Sîn piàⁿ lo̍h-khì hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng. Lín ê kiáⁿ, cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ ōe kóng ū-giân; lín ê siàu-liân-lâng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng; lín ê lāu-lâng ōe choh-bāng." 
Acts2:18 Koh tī hiah-ê ji̍t, góa mā beh chiong góa ê Sîn piàⁿ lo̍h-khì hō͘ góa ê po̍k-jîn kap lú-pī; in ōe kóng ū-giân." 
Acts2:19 Góa beh tī thiⁿ-téng hián-chhut kî-sū, tī tōe-chiūⁿ kiâⁿ sîn-jiah, ū huih, hé, kap ian-bū." 
Acts2:20 Tī Chú tōa koh êng-iāu ê Ji̍t lâi-lîm í-chêng, ji̍t-thâu ōe pìⁿ-chòe o͘-àm, ge̍h pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ huih hiah-ni̍h âng." 
Acts2:21 Hit-sî, só͘-ū kiû-kiò Chú ê miâ ê lâng lóng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù." 
Acts2:22 “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, lín tio̍h thiaⁿ chiah-ê ōe. Chiàu lín só͘ chai, Siōng-tè thong-kè Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ tī lín tiong-kan kiâⁿ koân-lêng, kî-sū, kap sîn-jiah, lâi tùi lín chèng-bêng I sī Siōng-tè só͘ chí-phài,ê." 
Acts2:23 Siōng-tè chiàu I ū-tēng ê chí-ì kap kè-ōe, chiong Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ lín; lín ēng bô Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng ê chhiú chiong I tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè téng, kā I sat-hāi." 
Acts2:24 Siōng-tè kā I kái-tû sí ê thòng-khó͘, hō͘ I koh-oa̍h, in-ūi sí bô hoat-tō͘ kā I khòng-chè." 
Acts2:25 Tāi-pi̍t bat chí I kóng: Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Chú put-sî tī góa ê bīn-chêng, I tī góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng, hō͘ góa bōe tōng-iâu;" 
Acts2:26 in-ūi án-ni, góa ê sim hoaⁿ-hí, góa ê chi̍h khoài-lo̍k; góa chit-ê ōe hiú-nōa ê jio̍k-thé ōe khò ǹg-bāng lâi oa̍h." 
Acts2:27 In-ūi lí bōe kā góa pàng-sak tī Im-hú, mā bōe hō͘ lí ê Sèng-chiá hiú-nōa." 
Acts2:28 Lí í-keng chí-sī góa oa̍h-miā ê tō-lō͘, hō͘ góa tī lí ê bīn-chêng chhiong-móa hoaⁿ-hí." 
Acts2:29 “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, koan-hē sian-chó͘ Tāi-pi̍t ê sū, góa hó-táⁿ kā lín kóng. I í-keng sí, koh bâi-chòng lah, i ê bōng kin-á-ji̍t iáu tī lán chia." 
Acts2:30 I sī sian-ti, chai Siōng-tè ū tùi i giâm-siok èng-ún, beh tùi i ê kiáⁿ-sun jīm-bēng chi̍t ê choh-ông lâi chē i ê pó-chō." 
Acts2:31 Tāi-pi̍t seng khòaⁿ-chhut chit-ê tāi-chì, koan-hē Ki-tok ê koh-oa̍h ū kóng: I bô siū pàng-sak tī Im-hú; I ê jio̍k-thé mā bô hiú-nōa." 
Acts2:32 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘, Siōng-tè í-keng ū hō͘ I koh-oa̍h. Goán lóng sī chit-hāng sū ê kiàn-chèng-jîn." 
Acts2:33 I í-keng siū ko-seng kàu Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng, koh tùi Pē niá-siū só͘ èng-ún ê Sèng Sîn, I hiān-chāi chiong chit-ūi Sèng Sîn piàⁿ lo̍h-lâi hō͘ goán, chiū-sī lín hiān-chāi só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ koh thiaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê." 
Acts2:34 Tāi-pi̍t m̄-bat chiūⁿ-thiⁿ, m̄-kú i kóng: Chú tùi góa ê Chú kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng," 
Acts2:35 thèng-hāu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē. 
Acts2:36 “Só͘-í, Í-sek-lia̍t choân-ke tio̍h khak-si̍t chai, lín kā I tèng si̍p-jī-kè chit-ūi Iâ-so͘, Siōng-tè í-keng jīm-bēng I chòe Chú, chòe Ki-tok lah!”" 
Acts2:37 Chèng-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe, sim chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ chhì chha̍k,tio̍h, tùi Pí-tek kap kî-tha ê sù-tô͘ kóng, “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, goán eng-kai chòe sím-mi̍h?”" 
Acts2:38 Pí-tek tùi in kóng, “Tio̍h hóe-kái, ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tio̍h hōng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ siū sóe-lé, hō͘ lín ê chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián, chiū ōe niá-siū Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê Sèng Sîn." 
Acts2:39 In-ūi chit-ê èng-ún sī beh hō͘ lín kap lín ê kiáⁿ-sun, í-ki̍p it-chhè tī hn̄g ê só͘-chāi ê lâng, chiū-sī lán ê Chú Siōng-tè só͘ ho͘-tiàu lâi kui I ê lâng.”" 
Acts2:40 Pí-tek koh ēng chin chōe ōe chhut-la̍t chòe kiàn-chèng, khoàn-bián in, kóng, “Tio̍h kiù ka-kī thoat-lī chit-ê siâ-ok ê sè-tāi.”" 
Acts2:41 Tùi án-ni, niá-siū i ê sìn-sit ê lâng lóng siū sóe-lé; hit-ji̍t sìn-tô͘ tāi-iok ke-thiⁿ saⁿ-chheng lâng." 
Acts2:42 In choân-sim niá-siū sù-tô͘ ê kà-sī, chham-ú thoân-khè seng-oa̍h, peh-piáⁿ, kî-tó." 
Acts2:43 Sù-tô͘ kiâⁿ chin chōe kî-sū sîn-jiah, ín-khí chèng-lâng kèng-ùi ê sim." 
Acts2:44 Só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ lóng chòe-hé seng-oa̍h, só͘-ū ê mi̍h kong-ke ēng," 
Acts2:45 koh bōe ka-sán châi-bu̍t, chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê su-iàu pun hō͘ tāi-ke." 
Acts2:46 In ta̍k-ji̍t tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì tī Sèng-tiān chū-hōe, koh tī chi̍t-ke chi̍t-ke peh-piáⁿ, ēng hoaⁿ-hí sêng-sim chòe-hé lim-chia̍h," 
Acts2:47 siōng-chàn Siōng-tè, koh tit-tio̍h chèng-lâng hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p. Chú chiong tit-kiù ê lâng ji̍t-ji̍t ke-thiⁿ hō͘ in." 
Acts3:1 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, ē-po͘-sî saⁿ tiám kî-tó ê sî-kan, Pí-tek kap Iok-hān chiūⁿ Sèng-tiān." 
Acts3:2 Ū chi̍t ê chhut-sì kha chiū pái ê lâng, ta̍k-ji̍t hō͘ lâng kng-lâi hē tī Sèng-tiān hit-ê kiò-chòe “ Súi-mn̂g ” ê mn̂g-kháu, thang tùi ji̍p Sèng-tiān ê lâng kiû-khit." 
Acts3:3 I chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek kap Iok-hān teh-beh ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān, chiū kiû in siá-sì." 
Acts3:4 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ, Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “Khòaⁿ goán!”" 
Acts3:5 I chiū chù-sîn khòaⁿ in, khòaⁿ ōe-tàng tùi in tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h." 
Acts3:6 Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “Kim gûn góa lóng bô, góa chiong góa só͘ ū,ê hō͘ lí. Góa hōng Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ bēng-lēng lí, khí-lâi kiâⁿ!”" 
Acts3:7 Jiân-āu Pí-tek khan i ê chiàⁿ-chhiú, kā i hû,khí-lâi. I ê kha kap kha-ba̍k sûi-sî ū la̍t," 
Acts3:8 chiū thiàu khí-lâi khiā,teh, koh kiâⁿ, kap in chòe-hé chìn-ji̍p Sèng-tiān, ná kiâⁿ ná thiàu, ná o-ló Siōng-tè." 
Acts3:9 Chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ná kiâⁿ ná siōng-chàn Siōng-tè," 
Acts3:10 koh jīn-tit i sī pêng-siông chē tī “ Súi-mn̂g ” ê mn̂g-kháu teh kiû-khit hit-ê lâng, chiū tùi tī i sin-chiūⁿ só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì kám-kak chin kî-koài tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Acts3:11 Tī Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông, hit-ê tit-tio̍h i-hó ê lâng kā Pí-tek kap Iok-hān khiú-tiâu-tiâu, chèng-lâng tōa kî-koài, lóng cháu óa,lâi." 
Acts3:12 Pí-tek khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê lâng, chiū kā in kóng, “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ tùi chit-hāng tāi-chì kám-kak kî-koài? Sī-án-chóaⁿ chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ goán, siūⁿ-kóng goán sī khò ka-kī ê lêng-le̍k á-sī khiân-sêng hō͘ chit-ê lâng khí-lâi kiâⁿ?" 
Acts3:13 A-pek-la-hán, Í-sat, Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè, chiū-sī lán chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè, í-keng hō͘ I ê po̍k-jîn Iâ-so͘ tit-tio̍h êng-kng. Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ lín kā I kau hō͘ koaⁿ-hú; Pí-lia̍p-to koat-tēng beh pàng I ê sî, lín tong-tiûⁿ kū-choa̍t." 
Acts3:14 Lín kū-choa̍t hit-ūi Sèng koh Kong-gī,ê, iau-kiû Pí-lia̍p-to pàng chi̍t ê sat-jîn-hoān hō͘ lín." 
Acts3:15 Lín thâi-sí oa̍h-miā ê Goân-thâu, chiū-sī Siōng-tè hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h Hit-ūi. Goán sī chit-ê tāi-chì ê kiàn-chèng-jîn." 
Acts3:16 Tùi sìn-khò chit-ê miâ, chiū-sī Iâ-so͘ ê miâ, lín só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ só͘ bat chit-ê kha-pái ê lâng, ū tit-tio̍h khùi-la̍t. Tùi Iâ-so͘ só͘ sù ê sìn-sim, chit-ê lâng oân-choân hó,khí-lâi. Chit-hāng tāi-chì lín tāi-ke lóng ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h." 
Acts3:17 “Hiaⁿ-tī, taⁿ góa chai, lín kap lín ê léng-tō-chiá án-ni chòe sī in-ūi m̄ chai." 
Acts3:18 Siōng-tè ū thong-kè chèng sian-ti ê chhùi ū-giân I ê Ki-tok tio̍h siū-khó͘, chit-ê tāi-chì kó-jiân èng-giām lah." 
Acts3:19 Só͘-í, tio̍h hóe-kái kui-ǹg Siōng-tè, thang hō͘ lín ê chōe tit-tio̍h chhat-siau." 
Acts3:20 Án-ni, Chú chiū ōe sù lín keng-sin ê ji̍t-chí, koh chhe-khián chá chiū kéng hó-sè ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lâi." 
Acts3:21 Chiàu Siōng-tè thong-kè kó͘-chá sèng sian-ti ê chhùi só͘ soan-pò͘,ê, I it-tēng tio̍h tiàm tī thiⁿ-téng ti̍t-kàu bān-mi̍h ho̍k-heng ê sî." 
Acts3:22 Mô͘-se bat kóng, ‘Chú — lín ê Siōng-tè beh tùi lín tông-pau ê tiong-kan kā lín jīm-bēng chi̍t ūi chhin-chhiūⁿ góa chit-khoán ê sian-ti. I kā lín kóng ê ōe, lín lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ-thàn." 
Acts3:23 M̄ thiaⁿ chit-ūi sian-ti ê ōe ê lâng, ōe tùi chú-bîn tiong lóng kā in tû-bia̍t.’" 
Acts3:24 Tùi Sat-bó-ní kàu í-āu só͘-ū thoân sìn-sit ê sian-ti lóng ū kóng-khí chiah-ê ji̍t-chí. 
Acts3:25 Lín sī sian-ti ê kiáⁿ-sun, mā-sī Siōng-tè kap lín ê chó͘-sian só͘ li̍p ê iok ê kè-sêng-jîn. I bat tùi A-pek-la-hán kóng, ‘Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-cho̍k lóng ōe in-ūi lí ê hō͘-tāi tit-tio̍h hok-khì.’" 
Acts3:26 Siōng-tè jīm-bēng I ê Po̍k-jîn, seng chhe I lâi lín chia, kā lín sù-hok, hō͘ lín ta̍k-ê lâng oa̍t tò-tńg lī-khui siâ-ok.”" 
Acts4:1 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān tùi kûn-chiòng teh kóng-ōe ê sî, ū chè-si, Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ, kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng lâi." 
Acts4:2 In hui-siông siū-khì, in-ūi chit nn̄g ê sù-tô͘ teh kà-sī chèng-lâng, kun-kù Iâ-so͘ ê koh-oa̍h soan-káng sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū." 
Acts4:3 In chiū lia̍h chit nn̄g ê sù-tô͘, kā in khu-liû kàu keh-ji̍t, in-ūi thiⁿ í-keng àm." 
Acts4:4 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h sìn-sit,ê ū chin chōe lâng sìn, ta-po͘-lâng ê jîn-sò͘ chha-put-to ū gō͘-chheng." 
Acts4:5 Keh-ji̍t, Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù, tiúⁿ-ló, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su chū-chi̍p tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts4:6 Tōa-chè-si A-ná kap Kai-a-hoat, Iok-hān, A-le̍k-san-tāi, kap tōa-chè-si ê ka-cho̍k mā lóng tī hia." 
Acts4:7 In kiò sù-tô͘ lâi khiā tī in tiong-kan, mn̄g kóng, “Lín khò sím-mi̍h koân-lêng, hōng sím-mi̍h miâ, chòe chit-hāng tāi-chì?”" 
Acts4:8 Hit-sî Pí-tek siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, ìn kóng, “Kok-ūi bîn-kan ê léng-siù kap tiúⁿ-ló," 
Acts4:9 goán kin-á-ji̍t nā-sī ūi-tio̍h hō͘ chit-ê kha-pái ê lâng tit-tio̍h i-hó chit-hāng hó-sū siū chhâ-mn̄g," 
Acts4:10 lín tāi-ke kap só͘-ū Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng tio̍h chai, chit-ê lâng oân-choân ióng-kiāⁿ khiā tī lín bīn-chêng, sī khò Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ. Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘, lín kā I tèng si̍p-jī-kè, m̄-kú Siōng-tè hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h." 
Acts4:11 I chiū-sī Sèng-keng só͘ kóng: Lín chiah-ê khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h, í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h." 
Acts4:12 Iâ-so͘ í-gōa lóng bô chín-kiù, in-ūi tī thiⁿ-ē jîn-kan, Siōng-tè bô sù pa̍t-ê miâ hō͘ lán thang óa-khò lâi tit-kiù.”" 
Acts4:13 Gī-hōe ê gī-oân khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek kap Iok-hān hiah-ni̍h ióng-kám, chai in sī bô tha̍k-chheh ê phó͘-thong-lâng, chiū chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ, koh jīn-tit in bat kap Iâ-so͘ chòe-hé," 
Acts4:14 mā khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê tit-tio̍h i-hó ê lâng khiā tī in sin-piⁿ, chiū bô ōe thang hoán-pok." 
Acts4:15 Gī-oân chiū kiò in lī-khui gī-hōe, jiân-āu chham-siông" 
Acts4:16 kóng, “Lán tio̍h án-chóaⁿ lâi tùi-hù chiah-ê lâng? In só͘ kiâⁿ chit-ê kî-īⁿ ê sîn-jiah, tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng lóng chai, lán bô hoat-tō͘ hó͘-jīn." 
Acts4:17 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh pī-bián chit-ê tāi-chì tī bîn-kan ná thoân ná khoah, lán tio̍h kéng-kò in tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng to m̄-thang koh hōng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ káng-lūn.”" 
Acts4:18 Āu-lâi, in kiò hit nn̄g ê sù-tô͘ lâi, bēng-lēng in bōe-ēng-tit koh hōng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ káng-lūn á-sī kà-sī." 
Acts4:19 M̄-kú Pí-tek kap Iok-hān ìn kóng, “Thiaⁿ-thàn lín chiah tio̍h á-sī thiaⁿ-thàn Siōng-tè chiah tio̍h, tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng lín ka-kī phòaⁿ-toàn." 
Acts4:20 Goán só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, bōe-tàng bô kóng.”" 
Acts4:21 Hiah-ê gī-oân m̄ chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ kā in chhú-hoa̍t, chiū giâm-giâm kā in kéng-kò, liáu-āu pàng in khì, in-ūi bîn-chiòng lóng teh ūi-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Acts4:22 Tùi chit-ê sîn-jiah tit-tio̍h i-hó hit-ê lâng í-keng sì-cha̍p gōa hè. 
Acts4:23 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān siū tháu-pàng, chiū tò-khì tâng-phōaⁿ hia, chiong chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló kā in kóng ê ōe lóng tùi in pò-kò." 
Acts4:24 In thiaⁿ-liáu chiū tâng-sim tōa-siaⁿ tùi Siōng-tè kî-tó kóng, “Chhòng-chō thiⁿ, tōe, hái, kap kî-tiong bān-mi̍h ê Chú-cháiⁿ," 
Acts4:25 lí bat thong-kè Sèng Sîn ēng lí ê po̍k-jîn goán ê chó͘-sian Tāi-pi̍t ê chhùi kóng: Gōa-pang sī-án-chóaⁿ háng-hoah? Bān-bîn sī-án-chóaⁿ kè-bô͘ bô hāu-kó ê sū? 
Acts4:26 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông lóng pâi-tīn beh kau-chiàn; thóng-tī-chiá liân-ha̍p,khí-lâi, beh kong-kek Chú kap I soán-li̍p ê Ki-tok." 
Acts4:27 Hi-lu̍t kap Pâng-siu Pí-lia̍p-to kó-jiân tī chit-ê siâⁿ-lāi kap Gōa-pang-lâng í-ki̍p Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng liân-ha̍p lâi kong-kek lí só͘ soán-li̍p sèng ê po̍k-jîn Iâ-so͘. 
Acts4:28 In chū-chi̍p beh chòe lí ê koân-lêng kap lí ê chí-ì ū-tēng ōe hoat-seng it-chhè ê sū. 
Acts4:29 Taⁿ Chú ah, in teh kā goán khióng-hat, kiû lí kàm-chhat, hō͘ lí ê po̍k-jîn koh-khah ū ióng-khì thang soan-káng lí ê sìn-sit." 
Acts4:30 Kiû lí chhun-chhiú i-tī, koh thong-kè lí sèng ê po̍k-jîn Iâ-so͘ ê miâ hō͘ goán kiâⁿ sîn-jiah kî-sū.”" 
Acts4:31 Kî-tó soah, chū-hōe ê só͘-chāi iô-tāng; in lóng siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, ióng-kám soan-káng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit." 
Acts4:32 Choân-thé sìn-tô͘ lóng tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì, bô chi̍t ê lâng kóng i ê châi-bu̍t sī ka-kī ê; só͘-ū ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ kong-ke ēng." 
Acts4:33 Sù-tô͘ ēng tōa lêng-le̍k kiàn-chèng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê koh-oa̍h, chèng-lâng lóng tit-tio̍h tōa un-tián." 
Acts4:34 In tiong-kan bô lâng ū khiàm-kheh, in-ūi ū chhân-hn̂g chhù-the̍h ê lâng lóng bōe,chhut-khì," 
Acts4:35 só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ the̍h-lâi kau hō͘ sù-tô͘, chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê su-iàu hun-phòe." 
Acts4:36 Ū chi̍t ê chhut-sì tī Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su ê Lī-bī -lâng Iok-sek, sù-tô͘ kā i kiò-chòe Pa-ná-pa, ì-sù chiū-sī An-ùi-chiá." 
Acts4:37 I bōe ka-kī ê chhân-hn̂g, chîⁿ the̍h-lâi kau hō͘ sù-tô͘." 
Acts5:1 Ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a, i kap i ê bó͘ Sat-hui-lat bōe chi̍t-kóa chhân-hn̂g;" 
Acts5:2 i tit-tio̍h bó͘ ê tông-ì, chiong só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ lâu chi̍t-kóa khí,lâi, chhun,ê the̍h-lâi kau hō͘ sù-tô͘."
