Acts5:3 Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “ A-ná-nî-a, lí ná hō͘ Sat-tàn khòng-chè lí ê sim lâi khi-phiàn Sèng Sîn, kā bōe chhân-hn̂g ê chîⁿ lâu chi̍t-pō͘-hūn khí,lâi?" 
Acts5:4 Chhân-hn̂g iáu-bē bōe sī lí ê, bōe liáu só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ lí ū koân thang chhú-lí, lí ná chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì? Lí m̄-sī khi-phiàn lâng, sī khi-phiàn Siōng-tè!”" 
Acts5:5 A-ná-nî-a chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe, lek,lo̍h-khì chiū sí. Thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê tāi-chì ê lâng lóng chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Acts5:6 Ū kúi-nā ê siàu-liân-lâng lâi, kā i ê si-thé pau,khí-lâi, kng chhut-khì bâi-chòng." 
Acts5:7 Chha-put-to saⁿ tiám-cheng āu, i ê bó͘ ji̍p,lâi, m̄ chai só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì." 
Acts5:8 Pí-tek mn̄g i, “Lí kā góa kóng, lín bōe chhân-hn̂g só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chîⁿ kan-ta chiah-ê sī,bô?” I ìn kóng, “Sī, chiah-ê nā-tiāⁿ.”" 
Acts5:9 Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “Lín ná tâng-sim chhì-thàm Chú ê Sîn? Lí khòaⁿ, bâi-chòng lí ê tiōng-hu ê lâng tú tńg-lâi kàu mn̂g-kháu, in mā beh kā lí kng,chhut-khì!”" 
Acts5:10 Sat-hui-lat sûi-sî lek,lo̍h-khì, tī Pí-tek ê kha-chêng sí,khì. Hiah-ê siàu-liân-lâng ji̍p,lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h i í-keng sí, chiū kā i kng,chhut-khì, bâi-chòng tī i tiōng-hu ê sin-piⁿ." 
Acts5:11 Choân kàu-hōe kap thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì ê lâng lóng chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ. 
Acts5:12 Sù-tô͘ tī bîn-kan kiâⁿ chin chōe sîn-jiah kî-sū. Sìn-tô͘ lóng tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì tī Só͘-lô-bûn Cháu-lông chū-hōe. 
Acts5:13 Bîn-chiòng lóng chin chun-tiōng in, m̄-kú m̄-káⁿ kap in chiap-kūn." 
Acts5:14 Sìn Chú ê lâng it-ti̍t ke-thiⁿ, lâm,ê lú,ê lóng chin chōe." 
Acts5:15 Ū lâng chiong pīⁿ-lâng khǹg tī bîn-chhn̂g á-sī chhn̂g-pho͘, kng chhut-lâi hē tī lō͘-piⁿ, tī Pí-tek keng-kè ê sî thang hō͘ i ê iáⁿ ìm,tio̍h." 
Acts5:16 Koh ū kui-kûn lâng chhōa phòa-pīⁿ,ê í-ki̍p hō͘ siâ-sîn khó͘-chhó͘ ê lâng tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiu-ûi ê hiong-tìn chū-chi̍p óa,lâi, in lóng ū tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Acts5:17 Tōa-chè-si í-ki̍p kap i kâng-tóng, chiū-sī Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng, tùi sù-tô͘ móa-sim oàn-tò͘." 
Acts5:18 In hē-chhiú lia̍h sù-tô͘, kā in koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ." 
Acts5:19 Hit-mî, Chú ê thiⁿ-sài phah-khui kaⁿ-mn̂g, kā in chhōa,chhut-lâi, tùi in kóng," 
Acts5:20 “Lín khì, khiā tī Sèng-tiān chiong chit-ê sù oa̍h-miā ê sìn-sit choân-pō͘ tùi bîn-chiòng soan-káng.”" 
Acts5:21 Sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ i ê ōe, thiⁿ beh kng ê sî ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān kà-sī lâng. Tōa-chè-si kap i kâng-tóng ê lâng kàu-ūi, chiū tiàu-chi̍p só͘-ū Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tiúⁿ-ló khui-hōe, jiân-āu chhe lâng khì kaⁿ-ga̍k chhōa sù-tô͘ lâi." 
Acts5:22 Siú-ōe kàu ê sî, hoat-kiàn sù-tô͘ bô tī kaⁿ,ni̍h, chiū tò-lâi pò-kò kóng," 
Acts5:23 “Goán hoat-kiàn kaⁿ-pâng só-tiâu-tiâu, khàn-siú khiā tī mn̂g-kháu, goán chi̍t-ē khui kaⁿ-mn̂g, lāi-bīn lóng bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h pòaⁿ-lâng.”" 
Acts5:24 Sèng-tiān ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ kap chè-si-tiúⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê pò-kò, m̄ chai tāi-chì ōe án-chóaⁿ ián-piàn chiū chin tio̍h-kip." 
Acts5:25 Hit-sî, ū chi̍t ê lâng ji̍p-lâi kā in kóng, “Lín kā in lia̍h-khì koaiⁿ tī kaⁿ,ni̍h hiah-ê lâng, hiān-chāi khiā tī Sèng-tiān teh kà-sī bîn-chiòng!”" 
Acts5:26 Hit-ê siú-ōe-koaⁿ kap i ê pō͘-hā chiū khì kā sù-tô͘ chhōa,lâi; in bô ēng pō-le̍k, in-ūi kiaⁿ bîn-chiòng ēng chio̍h-thâu kā in tìm." 
Acts5:27 In chhōa sù-tô͘ ji̍p,lâi, hō͘ in khiā tī gī-hōe bīn-chêng. Tōa-chè-si chiū kā in sím-mn̄g," 
Acts5:28 kóng, “Goán ū giâm-giâm kìm-chí lín m̄-thang hōng chit-ê miâ kà-sī lâng, lín tian-tò chiong chit-ê tō-lí thoân-piàn Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, siūⁿ-beh chiong lâu chit-ê lâng ê huih ê chek-jīm kui hō͘ goán.”" 
Acts5:29 Pí-tek kap kî-tha ê sù-tô͘ ìn kóng, “Goán tio̍h sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè, m̄-sī sūn-ho̍k lâng." 
Acts5:30 Lín kā I tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè téng ê Iâ-so͘, lán chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I koh-oa̍h." 
Acts5:31 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘, Siōng-tè ko-kú I chē tī ka-kī ê chiàⁿ-pêng, choh Siú-léng, choh Kiù-chú, thang hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng hóe-kái, chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Acts5:32 Goán sī chiah-ê tāi-chì ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. Siōng-tè sù hō͘ sūn-ho̍k I ê lâng ê Sèng Sîn mā ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì choh chèng-jîn.” 
Acts5:33 Gī-hōe ê gī-oân thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì, ài-beh thâi in." 
Acts5:34 M̄-kú in tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng, kiò-chòe Ka-má-lia̍t, sī chèng-lâng chun-kèng ê lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su. I khiā,khí-lâi, hoan-hù sù-tô͘ chiām-sî chhut,khì," 
Acts5:35 jiân-āu tùi gī-hōe kóng, “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, lín beh pān chiah-ê lâng tio̍h chin kín-sīn!" 
Acts5:36 Í-chêng Tō͘-ta̍t khí,lâi, chū-chheng tōa-jîn-bu̍t, iok ū sì-pah lâng tè i, āu-lâi i hō͘ lâng thâi-sí, só͘-ū tè i ê lâng lóng sì-sòaⁿ, siau-sit,khì." 
Acts5:37 Āu-lâi ū chi̍t ê Ka-lī-lī -lâng Iû-tāi tī hō͘-kháu-phó͘-cha ê sî chhut-hiān, chhōa chi̍t-kóa lâng tè i, i mā hō͘ lâng thâi-sí; tè i ê lâng lóng sì-sòaⁿ." 
Acts5:38 Taⁿ koan-hē chit-hāng tāi-chì, góa kā lín kóng, chiah-ê lâng lín m̄-thang chhap, chhut-chāi in khì. In só͘ kè-ōe só͘ chòe,ê nā chhut tī lâng, it-tēng ōe sit-pāi;" 
Acts5:39 nā chhut tī Siōng-tè, lín chiū bōe-tàng kā in siau-bia̍t, kiaⁿ-liáu lín soah kap Siōng-tè choh tùi-thâu!” Gī-hōe chiap-la̍p i ê ì-kiàn." 
Acts5:40 In kiò sù-tô͘ ji̍p,lâi, ēng piⁿ kā in phah, bēng-lēng in bōe-ēng-tit koh hōng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ káng-tō, jiân-āu pàng in chhut,khì." 
Acts5:41 Sù-tô͘ lī-khui gī-hōe, móa-sim hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi in hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe ōe-kham-tit ūi-tio̍h Chú ê miâ siū lêng-jio̍k." 
Acts5:42 In ta̍k-ji̍t tī Sèng-tiān kap jîn-ke-chhù kè-sio̍k kà-sī lâng, thoân Ki-tok Iâ-so͘." 
Acts6:1 Kè bô-jōa-kú, bûn-tô͘ ê jîn-sò͘ it-ti̍t ke-thiⁿ, kóng Hi-la̍h-gú ê Iû-thài -lâng bâi-oàn hiah-ê kóng Hi-pek-lâi-gú ê Iû-thài -lâng, in-ūi tī hun-phòe ji̍t-siông seng-oa̍h ê su-iàu ū hut-lio̍k in ê kóaⁿ-hū." 
Acts6:2 Cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ chiū tiàu-chi̍p choân-thé bûn-tô͘, tùi in kóng, “Goán chiong soan-káng Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê kang-chok pàng-hē,teh, khì koán hun-phòe ji̍t-siông seng-oa̍h ê su-iàu bô ha̍h." 
Acts6:3 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī ah, tio̍h tùi lín tiong-kan soán chhit ê ū hó miâ-siaⁿ, siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, koh ū tì-hūi ê lâng, goán thang jīm-bēng in pān-lí chit-ê tāi-chì." 
Acts6:4 Goán beh choan-sim tī kî-tó kap thoân-tō ê kang-chok.” 
Acts6:5 Sù-tô͘ ê ì-kiàn tit-tio̍h choân hōe-chiòng chàn-sêng, in chiū soán Sū-thê-hoán, i sī chhiong-móa sìn-sim kap Sèng Sîn ê lâng; koh soán Hui-le̍k, Pek-lô-ko-lô, Nî-ka-ná, Thê-bûn, Pa-bí-ná, kap kái-chong ji̍p Iû-thài -kàu ê An-thê-o -lâng Nî-ko-la." 
Acts6:6 In hō͘ chiah-ê lâng khiā tī sù-tô͘ bīn-chêng, sù-tô͘ chiū ūi-tio̍h in kî-tó, kā in àn-chhiú." 
Acts6:7 Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit kè-sio̍k thoân-khui; tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng bûn-tô͘ ê jîn-sò͘ ke-thiⁿ chin chōe, koh ū chin chōe chè-si mā thiaⁿ-thàn chit-ê sìn-gióng." 
Acts6:8 Sū-thê-hoán chhiong-móa un-sù kap lêng-le̍k, tī bîn-chiòng ê tiong-kan kiâⁿ tōa kî-sū kap sîn-jiah." 
Acts6:9 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng khí-lâi kap Sū-thê-hoán piān-lūn, in sī tùi Kó͘-lī-nāi kap A-le̍k-san-tāi lâi, sio̍k “Chū-iû-jîn” hōe-tn̂g ê hōe-oân, í-ki̍p tùi Ki-lī-ka kap A-sè-a lâi ê lâng." 
Acts6:10 Sèng Sîn sù tì-hūi hō͘ Sū-thê-hoán, hō͘ in bô hoat-tō͘ thang piān-pok." 
Acts6:11 Āu-lâi, in bóe-siu chi̍t-kóa lâng chhut-lâi kóng, “Goán bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h i kóng húi-pòng Mô͘-se kap siat-to̍k Siōng-tè ê ōe.”" 
Acts6:12 In siàn-tōng bîn-chiòng, tiúⁿ-ló, kap keng-ha̍k-kàu-su, chhiong-khì lia̍h Sū-thê-hoán, kā i kau hō͘ gī-hōe." 
Acts6:13 In kiò chi̍t-kóa ké chèng-jîn chhut,lâi, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng put-sî kóng-ōe kong-kek chit-ê Sèng-tiān kap Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat." 
Acts6:14 Goán bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h i kóng, chit-ê Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ beh húi-hoāi chit-ê Sèng-tiān, koh kái-piàn Mô͘-se thoân hō͘ lán ê kui-lē.”" 
Acts6:15 Hit-sî chē tī gī-hōe ê lâng lóng chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ Sū-thê-hoán, khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ thiⁿ-sài ê bīn-māu." 
Acts7:1 Tōa-chè-si mn̄g Sū-thê-hoán, “Sū-si̍t sī án-ni sī,bô?”" 
Acts7:2 Sū-thê-hoán ìn kóng, “Kok-ūi hū-ló hiaⁿ-tī, chhiáⁿ thiaⁿ! Lán ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán sóa-khì Hap-lân í-chêng, iáu tòa tī Bí-soh-put-ta̍t-bí-a ê sî, êng-kng ê Siōng-tè tùi i hián-hiān," 
Acts7:3 kā i kóng, ‘Tio̍h lī-khui lí ê kò͘-hiong kap chhin-cho̍k, khì góa beh chí-sī lí ê só͘-chāi.’" 
Acts7:4 A-pek-la-hán chiū lī-khui Ka-le̍k-tí -lâng ê tōe-hng, khì tòa tī Hap-lân. I ê lāu-pē sí liáu-āu, Siōng-tè tùi hia kā i chhian-sóa lâi hiān-chāi lín teh tòa chit-ê tōe." 
Acts7:5 M̄-kú Siōng-tè lóng bô sán-gia̍p hō͘ i, liân li̍p-chiok-chi-tōe to bô. Sui-jiân hit-sî i iáu bô kiáⁿ, m̄-kú Siōng-tè èng-ún beh sù i chit-ê thó͘-tōe, hō͘ i kap i ê hō͘-tāi chòe sán-gia̍p." 
Acts7:6 Siōng-tè ū án-ni kóng, ‘Lí ê hō͘-tāi ōe khì kià-ku tī gōa-kok, chòe lô͘-châi siū ge̍k-thāi sì-pah nî kú.’" 
Acts7:7 I koh kóng, ‘M̄-kú góa beh sím-phòaⁿ hit-ê hō͘ in chòe lô͘-châi ê kok-ka, āu-lâi góa ōe hō͘ in chhut,lâi, tī chit-ê só͘-chāi kèng-pài góa.’" 
Acts7:8 Jiân-āu Siōng-tè ū kap i li̍p-iok, ēng kat-lé chòe kì-hō. In-ūi án-ni, A-pek-la-hán siⁿ Í-sat liáu-āu tē-poeh ji̍t kā i kat-lé. Āu-lâi Í-sat siⁿ Ngá-kok, Ngá-kok siⁿ cha̍p-jī ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ." 
Acts7:9 “Chiah-ê cho̍k-tiúⁿ oàn-tò͘ Iok-sek, kā i bōe-khì Ai-ki̍p, m̄-kú Siōng-tè kap i tông-chāi," 
Acts7:10 kiù i thoat-lī it-chhè ê chai-lān, koh sù i tì-hūi, hō͘ i tit-tio̍h Ai-ki̍p -ông Hoat-ló ê koan-ài, chí-phài i chòe Ai-ki̍p ê siú-siòng kap ông-kiong ê chóng-koán." 
Acts7:11 Āu-lâi Ai-ki̍p kap Ka-lâm choân-tōe hoat-seng ki-hng, ín-khí tōa chai-lān, lán ê chó͘-sian bô niû-si̍t thang chia̍h." 
Acts7:12 Ngá-kok thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ai-ki̍p ū niû-si̍t, chiū chhe lán ê chó͘-sian khì hia; che sī thâu chi̍t piàn." 
Acts7:13 Tē-jī piàn in khì ê sî, Iok-sek tùi i ê hiaⁿ-tī piáu-pe̍k i ê sin-hūn; tùi án-ni Hoat-ló chiah bat Iok-sek ê ka-cho̍k." 
Acts7:14 Iok-sek chhe lâng khì chhiáⁿ i ê lāu-pē Ngá-kok kap choân ka-cho̍k chhit-cha̍p-gō͘ ê lâng lóng khì Ai-ki̍p. 
Acts7:15 Ngá-kok chiū lo̍h-khì Ai-ki̍p, āu-lâi i kap lán ê chó͘-sian lóng sí tī hia;" 
Acts7:16 in ê ûi-thé hō͘ lâng ūn kàu Sī-kiàm, bâi-chòng tī A-pek-la-hán ēng chîⁿ tùi Hap-boat ê kiáⁿ-sun bóe hit-ê bōng-tōe." 
Acts7:17 “Siōng-tè tùi A-pek-la-hán ê èng-ún teh-beh si̍t-hiān ê sî, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tī Ai-ki̍p ê jîn-kháu ke-thiⁿ chin chōe." 
Acts7:18 Āu-lâi ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê m̄ bat Iok-sek ê ông khí-lâi thóng-tī Ai-ki̍p. 
Acts7:19 I ēng khúi-kè tùi-hù lán ê bîn-cho̍k, ge̍k-thāi lán ê chó͘-sian, kiông-pek in kā eⁿ-á tàn tī gōa-bīn, hō͘ in sí." 
Acts7:20 Tú chit-ê sî Mô͘-se chhut-sì, siⁿ-chòe hui-siông chheng-siù tit-lâng-thiàⁿ. I tī lāu-pē ê chhù siū iúⁿ-chhī saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú." 
Acts7:21 I siū pàng-sak ê sî, Hoat-ló ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ kā i khioh-khì chòe ka-kī ê kiáⁿ iúⁿ-chhī." 
Acts7:22 I siū chai-pôe ha̍k-si̍p Ai-ki̍p it-chhè ê tì-hūi, kóng-ōe chòe tāi-chì lóng ū châi-lêng." 
Acts7:23 “ Mô͘-se móa sì-cha̍p hè ê sî, siūⁿ-beh khì thàm ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī Í-sek-lia̍t tông-pau." 
Acts7:24 I khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī hō͘ Ai-ki̍p -lâng khi-hū, chiū khì kā i pó-hō͘, phah-sí hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng, thòe i pò-ho̍k." 
Acts7:25 I siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī ōe liáu-kái Siōng-tè beh ēng i ê chhiú lâi kái-kiù in, m̄-kú in bô liáu-kái." 
Acts7:26 Keh-ji̍t, i khòaⁿ-tio̍h nn̄g ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng teh oan-ke, siūⁿ-beh kā in tiâu-kái, kóng, ‘Pêng-iú, lín sī hiaⁿ-tī, ná teh hō͘-siōng siong-hāi?’" 
Acts7:27 M̄-kú hit-ê teh khi-hū lâng,ê kā Mô͘-se sak,khui, kóng, ‘Siáⁿ-lâng jīm-bēng lí choh goán ê thâu-lâng, choh goán ê phòaⁿ-koaⁿ?" 
Acts7:28 Lí mā beh thâi góa chhin-chhiūⁿ chā-hng thâi hit-ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng o͘h?’ 
Acts7:29 Mô͘-se chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê ōe chiū tô-cháu, khì Bí-tiân -lâng ê tōe kià-ku; i tī hia siⁿ nn̄g ê kiáⁿ." 
Acts7:30 “Sì-cha̍p nî āu, tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ ê khòng-iá ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tī chhì-phè ê hé-iām tiong tùi Mô͘-se hián-hiān." 
Acts7:31 Mô͘-se khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê kéng-siōng kám-kak chin hi-kî, beh kiâⁿ óa-khì khòaⁿ khah siông-sè ê sî, thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Chú ê siaⁿ kóng," 
Acts7:32 ‘Góa sī lín chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè, sī A-pek-la-hán, Í-sat, Ngá-kok ê Siōng-tè.’ Mô͘-se kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah, m̄-káⁿ khòaⁿ." 
Acts7:33 Chú tùi i kóng, ‘Ôe thǹg,khí-lâi, in-ūi lí só͘ khiā ê só͘-chāi sī sîn-sèng ê tōe." 
Acts7:34 Góa ê chú-bîn tī Ai-ki̍p só͘ siū ê thòng-khó͘, góa khak-si̍t ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, mā ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h in ê ai-kiò, góa lo̍h-lâi beh chín-kiù in. Taⁿ lí lâi, góa beh chhe lí khì Ai-ki̍p.’" 
Acts7:35 “Chit-ê Mô͘-se, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bat kā i kū-choa̍t, mn̄g i kóng ‘Siáⁿ-lâng jīm-bēng lí choh thâu-lâng, choh phòaⁿ-koaⁿ’; chit-ê lâng Siōng-tè khiok thong-kè tī hé-iām tiong hián-hiān ê thiⁿ-sài chhe-phài i choh léng-siù, choh chín-kiù-chiá." 
Acts7:36 I chhōa in chhut,lâi, tī Ai-ki̍p, tī Âng-hái, tī khòng-iá sì-cha̍p nî kú, kiâⁿ chin chōe kî-sū sîn-jiah." 
Acts7:37 Chit-ê Mô͘-se bat tùi Í-sek-lia̍t kiáⁿ-sun kóng, ‘Siōng-tè beh tùi lín tông-pau ê tiong-kan kā lín heng-khí chi̍t ê chhin-chhiūⁿ góa chit-khoán ê sian-ti.’" 
Acts7:38 Mô͘-se mā bat kap tī Se-nāi-soaⁿ tùi i kóng-ōe hit-ê thiⁿ-sài í-ki̍p lán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá chū-hōe; i ū chiong só͘ niá-siū oa̍h ê sìn-sit thoân hō͘ lán. 
Acts7:39 Lán ê chó͘-sian m̄-khéng thiaⁿ-thàn, tian-tò kā i kū-choa̍t, siūⁿ-beh tò-tńg-khì Ai-ki̍p." 
Acts7:40 In tùi A-lûn kóng, ‘Lí tio̍h chō chi̍t-kóa sîn-bêng lâi kā goán chhōa-lō͘, in-ūi chhōa goán chhut Ai-ki̍p hit-ê Mô͘-se m̄-chai tú-tio̍h sím-mi̍h tāi-chì.’" 
Acts7:41 Hit-sî in chō chi̍t ê gû-á-kiáⁿ ê siōng, tùi hit-ê ngó͘-siōng hiàn-chè, ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê chhiú só͘ chō ê ngó͘-siōng khèng-chiok." 
Acts7:42 M̄-kú Siōng-tè oa̍t-thâu m̄ khòaⁿ in, chhut-chāi in khì pài thiⁿ-téng ê chhiⁿ-sîn, chiàu sian-ti-su só͘ kóng: Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ah, lín tī khòng-iá sì-cha̍p nî kú, kiám bat hiàn seng-lé á-sī chè-mi̍h hō͘ góa?" 
Acts7:43 Lín kng Mô͘-lo̍k ê pò͘-pîⁿ, í-ki̍p Lí-hoan -sîn ê chhiⁿ, chiū-sī lín chō lâi pài ê siōng; só͘-í góa beh kā lín hòng-tio̍k khì Pa-pí-lûn hit-pêng!" 
Acts7:44 “Lán ê chó͘-sian tī khòng-iá ū kiàn-chèng Siōng-tè tông-chāi ê hōe-bō͘, chiū-sī Siōng-tè tùi Mô͘-se kóng-ōe ê sî chí-sī i, chiàu i só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê bô͘-hêng kiàn-chō,ê." 
Acts7:45 Āu-lâi lán ê chó͘-sian sêng-chiap chit-ê hōe-bō͘. Siōng-tè tùi in bīn-chêng kā gōa-cho̍k kóaⁿ-cháu; in chiàm-léng hit-ê thó͘-tōe í-āu chiah kap Iok-su-a chiong hōe-bō͘ sóa-khì hia, it-ti̍t kàu Tāi-pi̍t ê sî-tāi." 
Acts7:46 Tāi-pi̍t ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí, thang kiû Siōng-tè chún i ūi-tio̍h Ngá-kok ê ke chhē chi̍t ê khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi." 
Acts7:47 M̄-kú āu-lâi ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè khí Sèng-tiān,ê sī Só͘-lô-bûn. 
Acts7:48 “Kî-si̍t Chì-koân ê Siōng-tè pèng bô tòa tī lâng ê chhiú só͘ khí ê chhù, chhin-chhiūⁿ sian-ti só͘ kóng:" 
Acts7:49 Chú kóng: Thiⁿ sī góa ê pó-chō, tōe sī góa ê kha-tiam. Lín beh kā góa khí sím-mi̍h khoán chhù? Tó-ūi sī góa an-hioh ê só͘-chāi?" 
Acts7:50 Che it-chhè kiám m̄-sī góa chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō,ê? 
Acts7:51 “Lín chiah-ni̍h kò͘-chip! Lín ê sim ngī, hī-khang m̄ thiaⁿ! Lín kap lín ê chó͘-sian sio-siâng, put-sî hoán-khòng Sèng Sîn!" 
Acts7:52 Tó chi̍t ê sian-ti bô siū-tio̍h lín ê chó͘-sian pek-hāi? Ū-giân hit-ê Kong-gī ê Po̍k-jîn lâi-lîm hiah-ê lâng lóng hō͘ lín thâi-sí. Taⁿ lín chiâⁿ-chòe chhut-bōe koh thâi-sí hit-ūi Po̍k-jîn ê lâng. 
Acts7:53 Lín sī tùi thiⁿ-sài niá-siū Siōng-tè Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng, kèng-jiân bô chun-siú!”" 
Acts7:54 In thiaⁿ-tio̍h Sū-thê-hoán chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì, tùi i kā-gê-chhiat-chhí." 
Acts7:55 M̄-kú Sū-thê-hoán hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, gia̍h-thâu khòaⁿ thiⁿ, khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê êng-kng, mā khòaⁿ-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ khiā tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Acts7:56 I kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ! Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ khui, Jîn-chú khiā tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng!”" 
Acts7:57 Chèng-lâng ng hī-khang, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, chòe-hé chhi̍h óa,khì," 
Acts7:58 kā i thoa chhut-khì siâⁿ-gōa, ēng chio̍h-thâu kā i tìm. Hiah-ê chèng-jîn chiong ka-kī ê gōa-saⁿ kau hō͘ chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Sò-lô ê siàu-liân-lâng kò͘." 
Acts7:59 In ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm Sū-thê-hoán ê sî, Sū-thê-hoán kiû-kiò kóng, “Chú Iâ-so͘, kiû lí chiap-la̍p góa ê lêng-hûn!”" 
Acts7:60 I koh kūi,lo̍h-khì, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chú ah, m̄-thang chiong chit-ê chōe kui hō͘ in!” I kóng-liáu chiū sí." 
Acts8:1 Thâi-sí Sū-thê-hoán ê tāi-chì Sò-lô mā chàn-sêng. Kâng hit-ji̍t, Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê kàu-hōe siū-tio̍h chin tōa ê pek-hāi. Sù-tô͘ í-gōa só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ lóng hun-sòaⁿ khì Iû-thài kap Sat-má-lī-a ê ta̍k só͘-chāi." 
Acts8:2 M̄-kú ū chi̍t-kóa khiân-sêng ê lâng kā Sū-thê-hoán bâi-chòng, ūi-tio̍h i tōa pi-siong." 
Acts8:3 Hit-sî Sò-lô hē-chhiú chân-hāi kàu-hōe, chi̍t-hō͘ chi̍t-hō͘ ji̍p,khì, bô-lūn lâm lú lóng thoa,chhut-lâi, kā in sàng-khì koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ." 
Acts8:4 Hiah-ê hun-sòaⁿ ê sìn-tô͘ khì ta̍k só͘-chāi thoân-tō. 
Acts8:5 Hui-le̍k khì Sat-má-lī-a ê chi̍t ê siâⁿ, tùi hia ê lâng soan-iông Ki-tok." 
Acts8:6 Kûn-chiòng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-le̍k só͘ kóng ê ōe, koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h i só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah, chiū choan-sim thiaⁿ i só͘ kóng ê ōe." 
Acts8:7 Ū chin chōe lâng hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin, hiah-ê siâ-sîn tōa-siaⁿ hoah, tùi in só͘ hū-sin ê lâng chhut,khì. Ū chin chōe poàn-sin-put-sūi,ê kap kha-pái,ê mā tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Acts8:8 Hit-ê siâⁿ ê lâng lóng tōa hoaⁿ-hí. 
Acts8:9 Ū chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Se-bûn, í-chêng bat tī hit-ê siâⁿ kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t, ka-kī chū-khoa choh-tōa, hō͘ Sat-má-lī-a ê lâng tio̍h-kiaⁿ kî-koài." 
Acts8:10 Siâⁿ-lāi ê lâng tōa-tōa-sòe-sòe lóng choan-sim thiaⁿ-thàn i, kóng, “Chit-ê lâng ū Siōng-tè ê koân-lêng, sī lâng teh kóng ê ‘Tāi-lêng-chiá’.”" 
Acts8:11 In lóng choan-sim thiaⁿ-thàn i, in-ūi i chin kú ū ēng siâ-su̍t hō͘ in tio̍h-kiaⁿ kî-koài." 
Acts8:12 Put-kò in sìn Hui-le̍k só͘ thoân Siōng-tè-kok ê hok-im kap Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ liáu-āu, lâm,ê lú,ê lóng chiap-siū sóe-lé." 
Acts8:13 Liân Se-bûn pún-sin mā sìn; i siū sóe-lé í-āu chiū kā Hui-le̍k tè-tiâu-tiâu. I khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Hui-le̍k só͘ kiâⁿ ê sîn-jiah kap só͘ chòe tōa koân-lêng ê kî-sū, kám-kak chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Acts8:14 Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Sat-má-lī-a -lâng í-keng chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit, chiū phài Pí-tek kap Iok-hān khì in hia." 
Acts8:15 In lo̍h,khì, chiū ūi-tio̍h hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ kî-tó, hō͘ in thang tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn," 
Acts8:16 in-ūi hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ tú siū sóe-lé, kui tī Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ; Sèng Sîn iáu-bē kàng-lo̍h tī in tiong-kan jīm-hô-lâng." 
Acts8:17 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú, in chiū tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn." 
Acts8:18 Se-bûn khòaⁿ-tio̍h sù-tô͘ hōaⁿ-chhiú ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn, chiū the̍h chîⁿ hō͘ in," 
Acts8:19 kóng, “Chhiáⁿ lín mā chiong chit-ê koân-lêng hō͘ góa, hō͘ góa só͘ hōaⁿ-chhiú ê lâng lóng ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn.”" 
Acts8:20 Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “Lí ê chîⁿ kap lí chòe-hé khì sí! Lí káⁿ siūⁿ-beh ēng chîⁿ bóe Siōng-tè ê un-sù!" 
Acts8:21 Che bô lí ê hūn, kap lí bô koan-hē; in-ūi tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng lí chûn-sim put-liông." 
Acts8:22 Só͘-í, tio̍h hóe-kái tû-khì chit-ê siâ-liām, kî-kiû Chú hō͘ lí sim-lāi ê ì-liām ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Acts8:23 Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí sim-lāi chhiong-móa tham-sim oàn-tò͘, siū-tio̍h chōe-ok khu-sok.”" 
Acts8:24 Se-bûn ìn kóng, “Chhiáⁿ lí ūi-tio̍h góa tùi Chú kî-kiû, hō͘ lí só͘ kóng ê tāi-chì bōe lîm-kàu góa.”" 
Acts8:25 Pí-tek kap Iok-hān chòe kiàn-chèng, soan-káng Chú ê sìn-sit, jiân-āu tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, iân-lō͘ tī Sat-má-lī-a ê chin chōe chng-siā thoân hok-im." 
Acts8:26 Chú ê thiⁿ-sài kā Hui-le̍k kóng, “Khí,lâi, ǹg lâm-pêng khì, kiâⁿ tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lo̍h-khì Ka-sat hit-tiâu lō͘.” Hit-tiâu lō͘ í-keng hong-hòe." 
Acts8:27 Hui-le̍k khí,lâi, chiū khì. I tī lō͘-tiong tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê I-soh-phit-a ê thài-kàm; chit-ê lâng sī I-soh-phit-a lú-ông Kam-tāi-ki ê châi-bū tāi-sîn. I chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khì kèng-pài Siōng-tè, tú-beh tò,khì, chē tī chhia-téng teh tha̍k sian-ti Í-sài-a ê chheh." 
Acts8:28  
Acts8:29 Sèng Sîn kā Hui-le̍k kóng, “Lí chìn-chêng óa-khì tè hit-tâi chhia.”" 
Acts8:30 Hui-le̍k cháu óa,khì, thiaⁿ-tio̍h i teh tha̍k sian-ti Í-sài-a ê chheh, chiū mn̄g, “Lí teh tha̍k,ê, ū liáu-kái,bô?”" 
Acts8:31 I ìn kóng, “Bô lâng kā góa kóe-seh, góa ná ōe liáu-kái?” Thài-kàm chiū chhiáⁿ Hui-le̍k chiūⁿ-chhia, kap i chòe-hé chē." 
Acts8:32 I teh tha̍k ê hit-tōaⁿ keng-bûn sī án-ni: I chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ hō͘ lâng khan-khì thâi, chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-á tī chián-mn̂g ê lâng bīn-chêng bô chhut-siaⁿ, lóng bô khui-chhùi." 
Acts8:33 I jím-siū lêng-jio̍k ê sî bô lâng thòe I chú-chhî kong-tō. Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng soat-bêng I ê sè-hē? In-ūi I ê sìⁿ-miā tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siau-bia̍t. 
Acts8:34 Thài-kàm mn̄g Hui-le̍k, “Chhiáⁿ mn̄g, sian-ti chit-ê ōe sī chí sím-mi̍h-lâng kóng,ê? Sī chí i ka-kī á-sī chí pa̍t-lâng?”" 
Acts8:35 Hui-le̍k chiū tùi hit-tōaⁿ keng-bûn khai-sí tùi i thoân Iâ-so͘ ê hok-im. 
Acts8:36 In tùi hit-tiâu lō͘ lo̍h,khì, kàu ū chúi ê só͘-chāi, thài-kàm kóng, “Chia ū chúi, góa kiám bōe-ēng-tit tī chia niá-siū sóe-lé?”" 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Thài-kàm kiò chhia thêng,teh, Hui-le̍k kap thài-kàm nn̄g ê chòe-hé lo̍h-khì chúi,ni̍h, Hui-le̍k chiū kā i sóe-lé." 
Acts8:39 In tùi chúi,ni̍h khí,lâi ê sî, Chú ê Sîn kā Hui-le̍k chiap,khì; thài-kàm bô koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, m̄-kú iáu hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí kè-sio̍k i ê lú-thêng." 
Acts8:40 Āu-lâi ū lâng tī A-só-to͘ khòaⁿ-tio̍h Hui-le̍k; i iân-lō͘ tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī thoân hok-im it-ti̍t kàu Khái-sat-lī-a. 
Acts9:1 Sò-lô kè-sio̍k khióng-hat beh sat-hāi Chú ê bûn-tô͘. I khì kìⁿ tōa-chè-si," 
Acts9:2 iau-kiû tōa-chè-si siá kong-hâm hō͘ Tāi-má-sū-kek ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g, chún i so͘-cha, nā ū chhē-tio̍h sìn-hōng chit-ê Tō-lō͘ ê lâng, bô-lūn lâm lú, thang kā in pa̍k,khí-lâi, ah-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts9:3 I chiū khì, teh-beh kàu Tāi-má-sū-kek ê sî, hut-jiân ū kng tùi thiⁿ lâi, sì-bīn kā i chiò." 
Acts9:4 I chiū poa̍h-lo̍h thô͘-kha, thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ū siaⁿ tùi i kóng, “ Sò-lô, Sò-lô, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ teh pek-hāi góa?”" 
Acts9:5 I mn̄g kóng, “Chú ah, lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?” Hit-ê siaⁿ ìn kóng, “Góa chiū-sī lí teh pek-hāi ê Iâ-so͘." 
Acts9:6 Khí,lâi, ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi, lí tio̍h chòe ê sū, ū lâng ōe kā lí kóng.”" 
Acts9:7 Tâng-kiâⁿ ê lâng chiū khiā,teh, gāng-gāng bōe kóng-ōe; in ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h siaⁿ, m̄-kú bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng." 
Acts9:8 Sò-lô tùi thô͘-kha peh,khí-lâi, ba̍k-chiu thí-khui, soah sím-mi̍h lóng khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h. In chiū khan i ê chhiú, chhōa i ji̍p-khì Tāi-má-sū-kek." 
Acts9:9 I saⁿ ji̍t kú bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, mā bô chia̍h, bô lim." 
Acts9:10 Tī Tāi-má-sū-kek ū chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ miâ kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a. Tī īⁿ-siōng tiong Chú kā i kiò, “ A-ná-nî-a!” I ìn kóng, “Chú ah, góa tī chia.”" 
Acts9:11 Chú kóng, “Khí,lâi, khì hit-tiâu Ti̍t-koe, tī Iû-tāi ê chhù chhē chi̍t ê Tāi-sò͘ -lâng kiò-chòe Sò-lô; i tú-teh kî-tó." 
Acts9:12 I tī īⁿ-siōng tiong ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a ji̍p-lâi kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú, hō͘ i ōe-tàng koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ.”" 
Acts9:13 A-ná-nî-a ìn kóng, “Chú ah, góa ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chin chōe lâng kóng-khí chit-ê lâng tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tùi lí ê sìn-tô͘ chòe chin chōe ok-to̍k ê tāi-chì." 
Acts9:14 I ū chè-si-tiúⁿ ê siū-koân thang lia̍h só͘-ū kiû-kiò lí ê miâ ê lâng, hiān-chāi lâi tī chia.”" 
Acts9:15 Chú tùi i kóng, “Lí khì, i sī góa kéng-soán ê khì-khū, beh tùi Gōa-pang-lâng, kun-ông, kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng soan-iông góa ê miâ." 
Acts9:16 Góa mā beh hō͘ i chai, ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ i it-tēng tio̍h siū chin chōe khó͘-lān.”" 
Acts9:17 A-ná-nî-a chiū khì, ji̍p-khì hit-keng chhù, kā Sò-lô hōaⁿ-chhiú, kóng, “ Sò-lô hiaⁿ-tī, lí lâi ê lō͘-tiong tùi lí hián-hiān ê Chú Iâ-so͘, chhe góa lâi beh hō͘ lí ōe-tàng koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, koh siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa.”" 
Acts9:18 Sûi-sî ū chhin-chhiūⁿ hî-lân ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ tùi Sò-lô ê ba̍k-chiu lak,lo̍h-lâi, i chiū koh ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. I khí,lâi, niá-siū sóe-lé;" 
Acts9:19 chia̍h pá liáu-āu, thé-le̍k chiū ho̍k-goân. Sò-lô kap tī Tāi-má-sū-kek ê bûn-tô͘ chòe-hé tòa kúi-nā ji̍t." 
Acts9:20 I sûi-sî tī ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g soan-káng Iâ-so͘, kóng, “I sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ.”" 
Acts9:21 Thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng lóng tio̍h-kiaⁿ, kóng, “Tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siau-bia̍t kiû-kiò chit-ê miâ,ê, kiám m̄-sī chit-ê lâng? I lâi chia kiám m̄-sī beh lia̍h sìn-tô͘, kā in ah-khì kau hō͘ chè-si-tiúⁿ?”" 
Acts9:22 Sò-lô ná kóng ná ū la̍t, chèng-bêng Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok, hō͘ tòa tī Tāi-má-sū-kek ê Iû-thài -lâng bô thang piān-pok." 
Acts9:23 Chin chōe ji̍t āu, Iû-thài -lâng tàu-tīn kè-bô͘ beh thâi Sò-lô," 
Acts9:24 in ê kè-bô͘ ū hō͘ Sò-lô thiaⁿ,tio̍h. In mî-ji̍t tī siâⁿ-mn̂g tng-tán beh kā i thâi. 
Acts9:25 M̄-kú i ê bûn-tô͘ tī àm-sî kā i chhōa,chhut-lâi, ēng chi̍t ê nâ-á tùi siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ téng kā i lūi,lo̍h-khì." 
Acts9:26 Sò-lô kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, siūⁿ-beh kap bûn-tô͘ kau-pôe, in lóng kiaⁿ i, in-ūi bô siong-sìn i sī bûn-tô͘." 
Acts9:27 Put-kò Pa-ná-pa chiap-la̍p i, chhōa i khì kìⁿ sù-tô͘, kā in soat-bêng Sò-lô tī lō͘-tiong khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Chú ê keng-kè, kap Chú tùi i kóng-ōe, í-ki̍p i tī Tāi-má-sū-kek jōa-á-ni̍h ióng-kám hōng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ thoân-tō ê tāi-chì." 
Acts9:28 Sò-lô tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kap sù-tô͘ ū chhut-ji̍p lâi-óng, hōng Chú ê miâ hó-táⁿ thoân-tō." 
Acts9:29 I mā ū kap kóng Hi-la̍h-gú ê Iû-thài -lâng kóng-ōe piān-lūn, in iáu-kú put-sî kè-bô͘ beh kā i thâi." 
Acts9:30 Sìn-tô͘ chai-iáⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì, chiū chhōa i lo̍h-khì Khái-sat-lī-a, tùi hia sàng i khì Tāi-sò͘." 
Acts9:31 Hit-sî, Iû-thài, Ka-lī-lī, kap Sat-má-lī-a ta̍k só͘-chāi ê kàu-hōe lóng ū pêng-an, ná kian-kò͘ hoat-tián, só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe kèng-ùi Chú, tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn ê kó͘-lē, jîn-sò͘ it-ti̍t ke-thiⁿ." 
Acts9:32 Pí-tek khì ta̍k só͘-chāi hóng-būn, mā ū hóng-būn tiàm tī Lū-tāi ê sìn-tô͘." 
Acts9:33 I tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Í-nî-ngá; chit-ê lâng poàn-sin-put-sūi, í-keng tó-chhn̂g poeh nî kú." 
Acts9:34 Pí-tek tùi i kóng, “ Í-nî-ngá, Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kā lí i-hó lah. Khí,lâi, chéng-lí ka-kī ê bîn-chhn̂g.” Í-nî-ngá sûi-sî khí,lâi." 
Acts9:35 Só͘-ū tòa tī Lū-tāi kap Sa-lûn ê lâng lóng ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū sìn lâi kui Chú." 
Acts9:36 Tī Iok-phà ū chi̍t ê lú sìn-tô͘, miâ kiò-chòe Tāi-pí-tāi, Hi-la̍h-gú sī To-ka, i ū chòe chin chōe hó-sū, chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng." 
Acts9:37 I phòa-pīⁿ sí,khì, lâng sóe i ê si-thé liáu-āu, kā i hē tī lâu-téng ê pâng-keng." 
Acts9:38 In-ūi Lū-tāi lī Iok-phà bô hn̄g, bûn-tô͘ thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek tī hia, chiū chhe nn̄g ê lâng khì hia, kiû i kóng, “Chhiáⁿ lí kóaⁿ-kín lâi goán hia.”" 
Acts9:39 Pí-tek chiū khí,lâi, kap in chòe-hé khì. I chi̍t-ē kàu-ūi, ū lâng chhōa i khì lâu-téng ê pâng-keng. Só͘-ū ê kóaⁿ-hū lóng ûi tī Pí-tek ê sin-piⁿ thî-khàu, the̍h To-ka siⁿ-chêng chòe ê lāi-saⁿ gōa-saⁿ hō͘ i khòaⁿ." 
Acts9:40 Pí-tek kiò tāi-ke lóng chhut,khì, chiū kūi lo̍h-khì kî-tó, jiân-āu oa̍t kè-khì tùi si-thé kóng, “ Tāi-pí-tāi, khí,lâi!” To-ka ba̍k-chiu thí-khui, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek chiū khí-lâi chē." 
Acts9:41 Pí-tek chhun-chhiú kā i hû,khí-lâi, āu-lâi kiò hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ kap kóaⁿ-hū lóng ji̍p,lâi, hō͘ koh oa̍h,khí-lâi ê To-ka kap in kìⁿ-bīn." 
Acts9:42 Chit-ê siau-sit thoân-piàn Iok-phà, chiū ū chin chōe lâng lâi sìn Chú." 
Acts9:43 Pí-tek tī Iok-phà chi̍t ê hoan-phê sai-hū Se-bûn ê chhù tòa chin chōe ji̍t. 
Acts10:1 Tī Khái-sat-lī-a ū chi̍t ê lâng, miâ kiò-chòe Ko-nî-liû, sī Lô-má kun-tūi kiò-chòe “ Ì-tāi-lī -iâⁿ” ê kun-koaⁿ." 
Acts10:2 I sī khiân-sêng ê lâng, kap choân-ke lóng kèng-ùi Siōng-tè; i khóng-khài chín-chè sàn-chhiah ê Iû-thài -lâng, koh put-sî tùi Siōng-tè kî-tó." 
Acts10:3 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, chha-put-to ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám, i tī īⁿ-siōng tiong bêng-bêng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài ji̍p,lâi, kā i kiò, “ Ko-nî-liû!”" 
Acts10:4 I kā thiⁿ-sài ti̍t-ti̍t siòng, hui-siông kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, kóng, “Chú ah, sím-mi̍h tāi-chì?” Thiⁿ-sài kóng, “Lí ê kî-tó kap chín-chè í-keng lóng tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p." 
Acts10:5 Taⁿ tio̍h chhe lâng khì Iok-phà, chhiáⁿ hit-ê chheng-chòe Pí-tek ê Se-bûn lâi." 
Acts10:6 I choh lâng-kheh tòa tī hoan-phê sai-hū Se-bûn ê chhù; i ê chhù tī hái-piⁿ.” 
Acts10:7 Tùi i kóng-ōe ê thiⁿ-sài lī-khui liáu-āu, Ko-nî-liû kiò nn̄g ê po̍k-jîn kap chi̍t ê pêng-siông teh sū-hāu i kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê peng lâi," 
Acts10:8 chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng kā in kóng, chiū chhe in khì Iok-phà." 
Acts10:9 Keh-ji̍t, chha-put-to tiong-tàu, chit saⁿ ê lâng kiâⁿ beh kàu Iok-phà ê sî, Pí-tek peh-khì chhù-téng kî-tó." 
Acts10:10 I pak-tó͘ iau, siūⁿ-beh chia̍h. Lâng teh ūi i chún-pī chia̍h-mi̍h ê sî, i ji̍p-sîn," 
Acts10:11 khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ khui, ū chi̍t ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tè tōa tè pò͘, sì-kak-thâu tiàu,teh, lūi lo̍h-lâi thô͘-kha," 
Acts10:12 lāi-bīn ū tōe-chiūⁿ ta̍k-chióng ê cháu-siù, thâng-thōa, kap khong-tiong ê chiáu-lūi." 
Acts10:13 Ū siaⁿ tùi i kóng, “ Pí-tek, khí,lâi, thâi lâi chia̍h.”" 
Acts10:14 M̄-kú Pí-tek kóng, “Chú ah, choa̍t-tùi bōe-ēng,tit! Góa m̄-bat chia̍h ù-òe bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h.”" 
Acts10:15 Hit-ê siaⁿ tē-jī piàn tùi i kóng, “Siōng-tè hō͘ i chheng-khì,ê, lí m̄-thang khòaⁿ-chòe ù-òe.”" 
Acts10:16 Chit-ê tāi-chì kè-sio̍k ū saⁿ piàn, hit-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ sûi-sî koh siu tò-khì thiⁿ-téng." 
Acts10:17 Pí-tek kám-kak kî-koài, tú-teh siūⁿ chit-ê īⁿ-siōng sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù ê sî, Ko-nî-liû chhe,lâi ê lâng í-keng chhē-tio̍h Se-bûn ê chhù, lâi khiā tī mn̂g-kháu," 
Acts10:18 tōa-siaⁿ mn̄g, “Ū chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Pí-tek ê Se-bûn tòa tī chia,bô?”" 
Acts10:19 Pí-tek iáu-teh siūⁿ chit-ê īⁿ-siōng sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù ê sî, Sèng Sîn kā i kóng, “Ū saⁿ ê lâng lâi beh chhē lí!" 
Acts10:20 Lí khí,lâi, lo̍h,khì, kap in chòe-hé khì; m̄-thang tiû-tû, in-ūi in sī góa chhe,lâi-ê.”" 
Acts10:21 Pí-tek chiū lo̍h-khì kìⁿ hiah-ê lâng, kā in kóng, “Góa chiū-sī lín teh chhē ê lâng. Lín lâi ū sím-mi̍h kùi-sū?”" 
Acts10:22 In ìn kóng, “Goán ê tiúⁿ-koaⁿ Ko-nî-liû chhe goán lâi, i sī chèng-ti̍t koh kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng, siū choân-thé Iû-thài -lâng ê chun-kèng. I tit-tio̍h sèng thiⁿ-sài ê chí-sī, lâi chhiáⁿ lí khì in tau beh niá-siū lí ê kà-sī.”" 
Acts10:23 Pí-tek chiū chhiáⁿ in ji̍p,khì, lâu in tòa hia kè-mî. Keh-ji̍t, Pí-tek khí-lâi kap in chòe-hé khì; mā ū kúi-nā ê Iok-phà ê sìn-tô͘ chòe-hé khì." 
Acts10:24 Koh keh-ji̍t, in kàu Khái-sat-lī-a, Ko-nî-liû í-keng iau-chhiáⁿ i ê chhin-lâng kap pêng-iú teh thèng-hāu." 
Acts10:25 Pí-tek ji̍p,khì, Ko-nî-liû chiū chìn-chêng gêng-chiap, phak tī i ê kha-chêng kā i pài." 
Acts10:26 Pí-tek kā i khan,khí-lâi, kóng, “Khí,lâi, góa ka-kī mā-sī lâng.”" 
Acts10:27 Pí-tek kap i ná kiâⁿ ná kóng-ōe ji̍p-khì lāi-bīn, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chin chōe lâng í-keng chū-chi̍p tī hia," 
Acts10:28 chiū tùi in kóng, “Lín chai-iáⁿ, chiàu goán ê kui-tēng, Iû-thài -lâng bōe-ēng-tit kap Gōa-pang-lâng kau-pôe lâi-óng, m̄-kú Siōng-tè í-keng chí-sī góa, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h cho̍k-kûn ê lâng to m̄-thang khòaⁿ i chòe bô chheng-khì á-sī ù-òe." 
Acts10:29 Só͘-í lín chhiáⁿ góa lâi, góa bô the-sî chiū lâi. Taⁿ chhiáⁿ mn̄g, lín ūi-tio̍h sím-mi̍h tāi-chì chhiáⁿ góa lâi?”" 
Acts10:30 Ko-nî-liû kóng, “Sì ji̍t chêng, tú chit-ê sî-chūn, chha-put-to ē-po͘ saⁿ tiám, góa tī chhù-lāi teh kî-tó ê sî, hut-jiân ū chi̍t ê lâng chhēng kng-iàⁿ-iàⁿ ê saⁿ khiā tī góa ê bīn-chêng," 
Acts10:31 kóng, ‘ Ko-nî-liû! Siōng-tè í-keng ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ lí ê kî-tó, mā ōe-kì-tit lí só͘ chòe chín-chè lâng ê sū." 
Acts10:32 Lí tio̍h chhe lâng khì Iok-phà, chhiáⁿ kiò-chòe Pí-tek ê Se-bûn lâi; i choh lâng-kheh tòa tī hái-piⁿ hoan-phê sai-hū Se-bûn in tau.’" 
Acts10:33 Góa chiū sûi-sî chhe lâng khì chhiáⁿ lí lâi; taⁿ lí lâi lah, si̍t-chāi chin hó. Hiān-chāi goán lóng chū-chi̍p tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng, beh thiaⁿ Chú bēng-lēng lí só͘ beh kóng lóng-chóng ê ōe.”" 
Acts10:34 Pí-tek khui-chhùi kóng, “Taⁿ góa khak-si̍t chai, Siōng-tè bô phian-thāi lâng." 
Acts10:35 Bô-lūn tó chi̍t ê bîn-cho̍k, kèng-ùi I, hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t ê lâng, I lóng hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p." 
Acts10:36 Lín chai: Í-chêng Siōng-tè ū thong-kè bān-bîn ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thoân hô-pêng ê hok-im; Iok-hān thoân sóe-lé ê tō-lí í-āu, chit-ê hok-im ū tùi Ka-lī-lī khai-sí thoân-piàn Iû-thài choân-tōe;" 
Acts10:37  
Acts10:38 chiū-sī, Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘, Siōng-tè ū án-chóaⁿ ēng Sèng Sîn kap tōa lêng-le̍k kā I boah-iû jīm-bēng, ū án-chóaⁿ hō͘ I khì ta̍k só͘-chāi chòe hó-sū, i-hó só͘-ū siū Mô͘-kúi ap-chè ê lâng, in-ūi Siōng-tè kap I tông-chāi." 
Acts10:39 Goán chiū-sī I tī Iû-thài ta̍k só͘-chāi kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘ chòe ê sū ê kiàn-chèng-jîn. In kā I tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè téng," 
Acts10:40 tē-saⁿ ji̍t Siōng-tè hō͘ I koh-oa̍h, koh hō͘ I hián-hiān," 
Acts10:41 m̄-sī tùi só͘-ū ê lâng, chí-ū tùi goán chiah-ê siū Siōng-tè kéng-soán lâi chòe kiàn-chèng ê lâng hián-hiān; goán bat tī I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h liáu-āu kap I chòe-hé lim-chia̍h." 
Acts10:42 I bēng-lēng goán thoân hok-im hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng, chèng-si̍t I sī Siōng-tè só͘ jīm-bēng choh oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê sím-phòaⁿ-chiá." 
Acts10:43 Só͘-ū ê sian-ti lóng ūi-tio̍h I chòe kiàn-chèng kóng, sìn I ê lâng lóng ōe in-ūi I ê miâ tit-tio̍h sià-chōe.”" 
Acts10:44 Pí-tek iáu-teh kóng-ōe ê sî, Sèng Sîn kàng-lîm tī só͘-ū thiaⁿ tō-lí ê lâng." 
Acts10:45 Kap Pí-tek tùi Iok-phà chòe-hé lâi hiah-ê siū kat-lé ê sìn-tô͘ lóng tōa tio̍h-kiaⁿ, in-ūi Sèng Sîn ê un-sù mā ū piàⁿ-lo̍h tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê sin-chiūⁿ;" 
Acts10:46 in-ūi in ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê lâng kóng lêng-gú koh chheng-chàn Siōng-tè ê úi-tāi. Jiân-āu Pí-tek kóng," 
Acts10:47 “Chiah-ê lâng kap lán kâng-khoán í-keng ū niá-siū Sèng Sîn, kiám ū lâng ōe-tàng kìm-chí in niá-siū chúi ê sóe-lé?”" 
Acts10:48 I chiū bēng-lēng in hōng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé. Āu-lâi, in chhiáⁿ Pí-tek kap in koh tòa kúi-nā ji̍t." 
Acts11:1 Sù-tô͘ kap tòa tī Iû-thài ê sìn-tô͘ lóng ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Gōa-pang-lâng mā chiap-siū Siōng-tè ê tō. 
Acts11:2 Pí-tek chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî, hiah-ê siū kat-lé ê Iû-thài -lâng sìn-tô͘ kā i phoe-phêng, kóng," 
Acts11:3 “Lí kèng-jiân ji̍p-khì bô siū kat-lé ê lâng ê chhù kap in chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g!” 
Acts11:4 Pí-tek chiū chiong só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì tùi thâu chi̍t-hāng chi̍t-hāng kā in soat-bêng: 
Acts11:5 “Góa tī Iok-phà -siâⁿ teh kî-tó ê sî ū ji̍p-sîn khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng, ū chi̍t ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tè tōa tè pò͘, sì-kak-thâu tiàu,teh, tùi thiⁿ-téng lūi lo̍h-lâi kàu góa bīn-chêng." 
Acts11:6 Góa siông-sè khòaⁿ, lāi-bīn ū tōe-chiūⁿ ê cheng-siⁿ, iá-siù, thâng-thōa, kap khong-tiong ê chiáu-lūi." 
Acts11:7 Góa koh thiaⁿ-tio̍h ū siaⁿ kā góa kóng, ‘ Pí-tek, khí,lâi, thâi lâi chia̍h!’" 
Acts11:8 Góa kóng, ‘Chú ah, choa̍t-tùi bōe-ēng,tit! Góa m̄-bat chia̍h ù-òe bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h.’" 
Acts11:9 Hit-ê siaⁿ tē-jī piàn tùi thiⁿ-téng ìn góa kóng, ‘Siōng-tè hō͘ i chheng-khì,ê, lí m̄-thang khòaⁿ-chòe ù-òe.’" 
Acts11:10 Chit-ê tāi-chì kè-sio̍k ū saⁿ piàn, hiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiū lóng koh siu tò-tńg-khì thiⁿ-téng." 
Acts11:11 Tú hit-sî, tùi Khái-sat-lī-a phài-lâi chhē góa hit saⁿ ê lâng lâi kàu goán teh tòa hit-keng chhù." 
Acts11:12 Sèng Sîn kiò góa tio̍h kap in khì, m̄-thang tiû-tû. Hit la̍k ê sìn-tô͘ mā kap góa chòe-hé khì Khái-sat-lī-a. Goán chiū lóng ji̍p-khì Ko-nî-liû ê chhù." 
Acts11:13 Ko-nî-liû kā goán kóng i ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī i ê chhù-lāi, tùi i kóng, ‘Tio̍h chhe lâng khì Iok-phà chhiáⁿ hit-ê kiò-chòe Pí-tek ê Se-bûn lâi." 
Acts11:14 I ū ōe beh kā lí kóng, thang hō͘ lí kap lí ê choân-ke lóng tit-tio̍h kiù.’" 
Acts11:15 Góa khai-sí kóng-ōe ê sî, Sèng Sîn kàng-lîm tī in sin-chiūⁿ, kap tong-chho͘ kàng-lîm tī lán sin-chiūⁿ kâng-khoán." 
Acts11:16 Góa chiū siūⁿ-khí Chú só͘ kóng ê ōe: Iok-hān ēng chúi kā lín sóe-lé, m̄-kú lín ōe niá-siū Sèng Sîn ê sóe-lé." 
Acts11:17 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè ū chiong lán sìn Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sî só͘ niá-siū siâng-khoán ê un-sù sù hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, góa sǹg siáⁿ-lâng, ná ōe-tàng chó͘-tòng Siōng-tè ê só͘-chòe?”" 
Acts11:18 In thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe chiū tiām,khì, kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè, kóng, “Siōng-tè mā ū hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng hóe-kái lâi tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā.”" 
Acts11:19 In-ūi Sū-thê-hoán ê tāi-chì siū pek-hāi sì-sòaⁿ ê sìn-tô͘, ū-ê kàu Hui-nî-ki, Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su, kap An-thê-o, in bô tùi pa̍t-lâng, chí-ū tùi Iû-thài -lâng thoân-tō." 
Acts11:20 M̄-kú kî-tiong ū chi̍t-kóa Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su kap Kó͘-lī-nāi ê sìn-tô͘ kàu An-thê-o, mā ǹg Hi-la̍h -lâng thoân, tùi in kóng-khí Chú Iâ-so͘ ê hok-im." 
Acts11:21 Chú ê khùi-la̍t kap in tông-chāi, sìn lâi kui Chú ê lâng-gia̍h chin chōe." 
Acts11:22 Chit-ê siau-sit thoân kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê kàu-hōe, in chiū phài Pa-ná-pa khì An-thê-o." 
Acts11:23 I chi̍t-ē kàu-ūi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng-tè ū sù in un-hūi, chiū hoaⁿ-hí, khoàn-bián in tāi-ke tio̍h choân-sim chi̍t-ì sìn-khò Chú." 
Acts11:24 Pa-ná-pa sī hó-lâng, hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, koh ū sìn-sim. Hit-sî ū chin chōe lâng sìn Chú." 
Acts11:25 Āu-lâi, Pa-ná-pa khì Tāi-sò͘ chhē Sò-lô," 
Acts11:26 chhē,tio̍h chiū chhōa i khì An-thê-o. Chiok-chiok chi̍t nî kú, in nn̄g ê kap kàu-hōe ê lâng chū-hōe, kà-sī chin chōe lâng. Bûn-tô͘ kiò-chòe “Ki-tok-tô͘” sī tùi An-thê-o khai-sí." 
Acts11:27 Hit-sî, ū kúi-nā ê sian-ti tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lo̍h-khì An-thê-o." 
Acts11:28 Kî-tiong chi̍t ê miâ kiò-chòe A-ka-pò͘; i tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn ê chí-sī, khiā khí-lâi ū-giân kóng choân sè-kài teh-beh ū tōa ki-hng. Chit-ê tāi-chì tī Khek-lô-tē thóng-tī ê nî-kan kó-jiân hoat-seng." 
Acts11:29 Bûn-tô͘ chiū koat-tēng ta̍k-ê lâng chiàu ka-kī ê lêng-le̍k koan-hiàn, thang sàng-khì chín-chè tòa tī Iû-thài ê sìn-tô͘." 
Acts11:30 In chiū chiàu án-ni chòe, chiong koan-hiàn thok Pa-ná-pa kap Sò-lô kau hō͘ hia ê tiúⁿ-ló." 
Acts12:1 Chha-put-to hit-ê sî, Hi-lu̍t -ông hē-chhiú pek-hāi kàu-hōe ê chi̍t-kóa lâng," 
Acts12:2 ēng to thâi-sí Iok-hān ê hiaⁿ-ko Ngá-kok. 
Acts12:3 I khòaⁿ-chhut chit-ê tāi-chì ū hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng hoaⁿ-hí, chiū sòa lo̍h-khì lia̍h Pí-tek. Chit-ê tāi-chì tī Tû-kàⁿ-choeh ê kî-kan hoat-seng." 
Acts12:4 I lia̍h Pí-tek, kā i koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, kau hō͘ sì pan ê kéng-ōe kò͘-siú, ta̍k-pan ū sì ê peng. Hi-lu̍t àn-sǹg beh tī Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh āu kā i ah chhut-lâi tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng sím-phòaⁿ." 
Acts12:5 Pí-tek chiū án-ni hō͘ lâng koaiⁿ tī kaⁿ,ni̍h; kàu-hōe ūi-tio̍h i tùi Siōng-tè pek-chhiat kî-tó. 
Acts12:6 Hi-lu̍t beh ah Pí-tek chhut-lâi sím-phòaⁿ ê chêng chi̍t àm, Pí-tek khùn tī nn̄g ê kéng-ōe ê tiong-kan, hō͘ lâng ēng nn̄g tiâu thih-liān liān,teh, koh ū kéng-ōe tī mn̂g-gōa kò͘-siú." 
Acts12:7 Hut-jiân Chú ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī hia, ū kng teh chiò kaⁿ-pâng. Thiⁿ-sài tah Pí-tek ê keng-thâu, kā i kiò-chhíⁿ, kóng, “Kín khí,lâi!” Thih-liān chiū tùi i ê chhiú lak,lo̍h-khì." 
Acts12:8 Thiⁿ-sài tùi i kóng, “Io-tòa hâ,leh, ôe chhēng,leh.” Pí-tek chiū chiàu án-ni chòe. Thiⁿ-sài koh kóng, “Gōa-saⁿ moa,leh, tè góa lâi!”" 
Acts12:9 Pí-tek chiū tè i chhut,khì, m̄ chai-iáⁿ thiⁿ-sài teh chòe ê sī chin,ê, siūⁿ-chòe sī teh khòaⁿ īⁿ-siōng." 
Acts12:10 In keng-kè kéng-ōe-só͘ tē-it koan kap tē-jī koan, lâi kàu thàng ji̍p-siâⁿ hit-ê thih-mn̂g, mn̂g chū-tōng khui, in chiū chhut,khì, kiâⁿ-kè chi̍t tiâu koe; thiⁿ-sài sûi-sî lī-khui Pí-tek." 
Acts12:11 Pí-tek chi̍t-ē chhíⁿ, kóng, “Taⁿ góa chin-chiàⁿ chai, Chú chhe I ê thiⁿ-sài lâi kiù góa thoat-lī Hi-lu̍t ê chhiú kap Iû-thài -lâng it-chhè ê kè-bô͘.”" 
Acts12:12 I bêng-pe̍k chit-ê chêng-hêng, chiū khì Iok-hān, mā kiò-chòe Má-khó ê lāu-bú Má-lī-a ê chhù; tī hia ū chin chōe lâng chū-chi̍p teh kî-tó." 
Acts12:13 Pí-tek phah gōa-mn̂g, ū chi̍t ê lú-pī kiò-chòe Lô-tāi chhut-lâi beh khui-mn̂g." 
Acts12:14 I jīn-tit Pí-tek ê siaⁿ, hoaⁿ-hí kah bōe-kò͘-tit khui-mn̂g, chiū cháu ji̍p-khì pò-kò kóng Pí-tek khiā tī mn̂g-kháu." 
Acts12:15 In kóng, “Lí teh khí-kông!” I kian-chhî kóng ū-iáⁿ. In chiū kóng, “Án-ni it-tēng sī i ê thiⁿ-sài.”" 
Acts12:16 Pí-tek it-ti̍t phah-mn̂g. In khui-mn̂g, khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pí-tek, hui-siông tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Acts12:17 Pí-tek pí-chhiú kiò in an-chēng, kā in soat-bêng Chú chhōa i tùi kaⁿ-ga̍k chhut,lâi ê keng-kè. Pí-tek koh hoan-hù in chiong chit-ê siau-sit pò-kò Ngá-kok kap chèng sìn-tô͘, chiū lī-khui khì pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi." 
Acts12:18 Thiⁿ-kng ê sî, peng-sū m̄ chai Pí-tek khì tó-ūi, chiū loān-chhau-chhau." 
Acts12:19 Hi-lu̍t kiò lâng khì chhē, m̄-kú chhē bô, chiū sím-mn̄g khàn-siú, hā-lēng kā in chhú-sí. Chit-ê tāi-chì í-āu, Hi-lu̍t lī-khui Iû-thài khì Khái-sat-lī-a, tòa tī hia." 
Acts12:20 Tng-sî, Hi-lu̍t tùi Thài-ní kap Se-tùn ê jîn-bîn hui-siông siū-khì, in chiū phài tāi-piáu cho͘-thoân khì kìⁿ i. In tāi-seng sòe-ho̍k kiong-têng ê chóng-koán Pek-la-su-to͘, siat-hoat hō͘ in thang khì kìⁿ Hi-lu̍t, tùi i kiû-hô, in-ūi in ê niû-si̍t khò ông koán-hat ê tōe-khu teh kiong-èng." 
Acts12:21 Tī iok-tēng ê ji̍t-chí, Hi-lu̍t chhēng ông-ho̍k, chē tī chō-ūi, tùi jîn-bîn ián-káng." 
Acts12:22 Chèng-lâng it-ti̍t hoah kóng, “Che sī sîn-bêng ê siaⁿ, m̄-sī lâng ê siaⁿ!”" 
Acts12:23 Chú ê thiⁿ-sài sûi-sî kā Hi-lu̍t phah-tó, in-ūi i bô kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè; āu-lâi i hō͘ thâng kā, chiū sí,khì." 
Acts12:24 Siōng-tè ê tō jú thoân-khui jú heng-ōng. 
Acts12:25 Pa-ná-pa kap Sò-lô oân-sêng in ê jīm-bū, chiū chhōa kiò-chòe Má-khó ê Iok-hān chòe-hé lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts13:1 An-thê-o ê kàu-hōe ū kúi-nā ê sian-ti kap kàu-su, chiū-sī Pa-ná-pa, hō͘ lâng kiò-chòe “O͘-lâng” ê Se-biān, Kó͘-lī-nāi -lâng Lō͘-kiû, kap hun-hong ê ông Hi-lu̍t chòe-hé tōa-hàn ê Má-liām, í-ki̍p Sò-lô." 
Acts13:2 In teh kèng-pài Chú, kìm-chia̍h ê sî, Sèng Sîn kā in kóng, “Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h góa chí-phài Pa-ná-pa kap Sò-lô khì chòe góa ho͘-tiàu in chòe ê kang-chok.”" 
Acts13:3 In kìm-chia̍h kî-tó liáu-āu, kā in àn-chhiú, chhe-phài in chhut,khì." 
Acts13:4 Pa-ná-pa kap Sò-lô í-keng siū Sèng Sîn chhe-phài, chiū lo̍h-khì Se-liû-ki, tùi hia chē-chûn khì Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su." 
Acts13:5 In kàu Sat-lia̍p-bí, chiū tī Iû-thài -lâng ê hōe-tn̂g soan-káng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit. Iok-hān Má-khó mā khì hia kā in hia̍p-chō͘." 
Acts13:6 In kiâⁿ-thàu choân-tó, lâi kàu Phà-hut, tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê kiâⁿ hoat-su̍t ê lâng, sī Iû-thài -lâng ê ké sian-ti, kiò-chòe Pa-iâ-so͘." 
Acts13:7 I kap chóng-tok Sū-kiû Pó-lô ū kau-pôe; chit-ê chóng-tok sī hiân-bêng ê lâng, i chhiáⁿ Pa-ná-pa kap Sò-lô lâi, beh tùi in thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit." 
Acts13:8 Put-kò hit-ê kiâⁿ hoat-su̍t ê Í-lū-má — Í-lū-má sī i ê Hi-la̍h-miâ — hoán-tùi in nn̄g lâng, siūⁿ-beh chó͘-tòng chóng-tok chiap-siū chit-ê sìn-gióng." 
Acts13:9 M̄-kú Sò-lô, mā kiò-chòe Pó-lô, hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa, ti̍t-ti̍t kā i siòng," 
Acts13:10 kóng, “Lí chit-ê mô͘-kúi-á-kiáⁿ, lí sī it-chhè kong-gī ê tùi-te̍k, chhiong-móa ta̍k-khoán siâ-ok kap khúi-chà, kò͘-ì oai-khiok Chú ê chèng-ti̍t ê tō-lō͘!" 
Acts13:11 Taⁿ, lí khòaⁿ, Chú beh kā lí hêng-hoa̍t, lí ōe chhiⁿ-mî, chiām-sî bōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ji̍t-kng.” Í-lū-má ê ba̍k-chiu sûi-sî hō͘ o͘-àm tà,teh, khí ian-n̄g; i sì-kòe bong, chhē lâng kā i khan." 
Acts13:12 Chóng-tok khòaⁿ-tio̍h só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì chiū sìn, tùi Chú ê kà-sī kám-kak chin hi-kî." 
Acts13:13 Pó-lô kap i ê tâng-phōaⁿ tùi Phà-hut khui-chûn, kàu Pông-hui-lī-a ê Pia̍t-ka; Iok-hān Má-khó tī hia lī-khui in, tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts13:14 In tùi Pia̍t-ka kè-sio̍k hêng-thêng lâi kàu Pí-se-tí ê An-thê-o. Tī An-hioh-ji̍t in ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g, chē,lo̍h-khì." 
Acts13:15 Tha̍k Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti-su liáu-āu, hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán chhe lâng lâi kā in kóng, “Hiaⁿ-tī, lín nā ū ōe beh khoàn-bián tāi-ke, chhiáⁿ lín kóng.”" 
Acts13:16 Pó-lô chiū khiā,khí-lâi, pí chhiú-sè, kóng: “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê chèng-lâng, chhiáⁿ thiaⁿ!" 
Acts13:17 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê Siōng-tè ū kéng-soán lán ê chó͘-sian, tī in kià-ku Ai-ki̍p ê sî hō͘ in chiâⁿ-chòe tōa ê bîn-cho̍k, ēng I tōa koân-lêng ê chhiú chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p," 
Acts13:18 koh tī khòng-iá khoan-iông in sì-cha̍p nî kú. 
Acts13:19 I húi-bia̍t Ka-lâm tōe-khu chhit ê bîn-cho̍k liáu-āu, chiong hit-ê thó͘-tōe hō͘ in chòe sán-gia̍p," 
Acts13:20 iok sì-pah gō͘-cha̍p nî kú. “Í-āu Siōng-tè ū ūi-tio̍h in siat-li̍p sū-su, it-ti̍t kàu sian-ti Sat-bó-ní ê sî." 
Acts13:21 Āu-lâi in iau-kiû ài ū chi̍t ê ông, Siōng-tè chiū tùi Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k soán-chhut Ki-sū ê kiáⁿ Sò-lô, hō͘ i choh-ông sì-cha̍p nî kú." 
Acts13:22 Siōng-tè hòe Sò-lô liáu-āu, jīm-bēng Tāi-pi̍t chòe in ê ông. Koan-hē Tāi-pi̍t, I ū án-ni kóng, ‘Góa chhē-tio̍h Iâ-se ê hō͘-tāi Tāi-pi̍t, i sī ha̍h góa sim-ì ê lâng, ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì chun-thàn góa ê chí-ì.’" 
Acts13:23 Siōng-tè chiàu I ê èng-ún, tùi Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chi̍t ūi Kiù-chú, chiū-sī Iâ-so͘." 
Acts13:24 Iâ-so͘ chhut,lâi í-chêng, Iok-hān tùi chèng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng thoân-tō, kiò in tio̍h hóe-kái lâi niá-siū sóe-lé." 
Acts13:25 Iok-hān teh-beh kiat-sok i ê kang-chok ê sî, tùi chèng-lâng kóng, ‘Lín siūⁿ góa sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Góa m̄-sī lín teh thèng-hāu Hit-ūi, m̄-kú ū chi̍t ūi tè tī góa āu-bīn teh lâi, góa liân kā I tháu ôe-tòa to bōe-kham,tit.’" 
Acts13:26 “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun kap lín tiong-kan kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê chèng-lâng, chit-ê chín-kiù ê sìn-sit í-keng ū thoân hō͘ lán." 
Acts13:27 In-ūi tòa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng kap in ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ m̄ bat Iâ-so͘, mā bô bêng-pe̍k ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t só͘ tha̍k sian-ti ê ōe, chiū kā I tēng-chōe, che tú èng-giām sian-ti ê ū-giân." 
Acts13:28 Sui-jiân in chhē bōe chhut kā I tēng sí-chōe ê lí-iû, iáu-kú iau-kiû Pí-lia̍p-to kā I chhú sí-hêng." 
Acts13:29 Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài koan-hē Iâ-so͘ it-chhè ê sū lóng oân-sêng, in chiū chiong I tùi si̍p-jī-kè téng hû,lo̍h-lâi, hē tī bōng,ni̍h." 
Acts13:30 Chóng-sī Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h," 
Acts13:31 ū chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan, I hián-hiān hō͘ hiah-ê tùi Ka-lī-lī tè I lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. Chiah-ê lâng hiān-chāi tī chèng-lâng tiong teh choh Iâ-so͘ ê kiàn-chèng-jîn." 
Acts13:32 Goán chiong Siōng-tè èng-ún hō͘ chó͘-sian ê hok-im thoân hō͘ lín," 
Acts13:33 in-ūi I hō͘ Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h, chit-ê èng-ún í-keng ū tùi lán chiah-ê choh kiáⁿ-sun,ê èng-giām, chhin-chhiūⁿ Si-phian tē-jī phiⁿ só͘ kì-chài: Lí sī góa ê Kiáⁿ, góa kin-á-ji̍t siⁿ lí." 
Acts13:34 Koan-hē hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h bô koh hiú-nōa ê sū, Siōng-tè kóng: Góa beh chiong tùi Tāi-pi̍t só͘ èng-ún hit-ê sîn-sèng khó-khò ê un-tián sù hō͘ lín." 
Acts13:35 Só͘-í, tī Si-phian pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi mā án-ni kóng: Lí bōe hō͘ lí ê Sèng-chiá hiú-nōa." 
Acts13:36 Tāi-pi̍t chāi-siⁿ ê sî ū chun-thàn Siōng-tè ê kè-ōe. I sí liáu-āu bâi-chòng tī chó͘-sian ê piⁿ,á, hiú-nōa lah." 
Acts13:37 M̄-kú Siōng-tè hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h Hit-ūi bô hiú-nōa. 
Acts13:38 Só͘-í, kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, lín eng-kai chai, sià-chōe ê sìn-sit sī tùi chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ thoân hō͘ lín; lín khò Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat bōe-tàng hō͘ lín thoat-lī chōe, m̄-kú só͘-ū sìn Iâ-so͘ ê lâng lóng ōe-tàng tùi chōe tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Só͘-í lín tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bián hō͘ sian-ti só͘ kóng,ê lîm-kàu lín:" 
Acts13:41 Biáu-sī Siōng-tè ê lâng ah, tio̍h khòaⁿ, tio̍h kiaⁿ, tio̍h bia̍t-bông! In-ūi tī lín ê sî-tāi góa só͘ chòe ê sū, ū lâng kā lín soat-bêng, lín mā m̄ sìn.”" 
Acts13:42 Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa tùi hōe-tn̂g chhut,khì ê sî, chèng-lâng iau-chhiáⁿ in tī ē chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t koh lâi kóng chiah-ê tāi-chì hō͘ in thiaⁿ." 
Acts13:43 Sòaⁿ-hōe āu, chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng kap kái-chong ji̍p Iû-thài -kàu hiah-ê khiân-sêng ê Gōa-pang-lâng chiū tè Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa chhut,khì. Nn̄g ê sù-tô͘ kap in tâm-ōe, khoàn-bián in tio̍h khîⁿ-tiâu Siōng-tè ê un-tián." 
Acts13:44 Koh lo̍h-khì ê An-hioh-ji̍t, choân-siâⁿ ê lâng lóng chū-chi̍p, beh thiaⁿ Chú ê tō." 
Acts13:45 Iû-thài -lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h lâng hiah chōe, sim-lāi chhiong-móa oàn-tò͘, hoán-pok Pó-lô só͘ kóng ê ōe, koh kā i bú-jio̍k." 
Acts13:46 M̄-kú Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa ióng-kám soan-káng kóng, “Siōng-tè ê tō tio̍h seng thoân hō͘ lín, lín kèng-jiân kū-choa̍t, ka-kī toàn-tēng bô chu-keh tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā, só͘-í goán chiah choán-ǹg Gōa-pang-lâng." 
Acts13:47 In-ūi Chú bat án-ni bēng-lēng goán kóng: Góa í-keng chí-tēng lí chòe Gōa-pang-lâng ê kng, thang hō͘ lí chiong góa ê chín-kiù tòa kàu thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak.”" 
Acts13:48 Gōa-pang-lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe lóng chin hoaⁿ-hí, kui êng-kng hō͘ Chú ê sìn-sit. Hiah-ê í-keng siū Siōng-tè kéng-soán thang tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā ê lâng lóng chiâⁿ-chòe sìn-tô͘." 
Acts13:49 Tùi án-ni Chú ê sìn-sit thoân-piàn hit tōe-hng. 
Acts13:50 M̄-kú Iû-thài -lâng siàn-tōng khiân-sêng chun-kùi ê hū-lú kap siâⁿ-lāi ū tōe-ūi ê jîn-sū lâi pek-hāi Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa, chiong in kóaⁿ chhut-kéng." 
Acts13:51 In nn̄g lâng chiū tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kā kha,ni̍h ê thô͘-hún pōaⁿ hiat-ka̍k piáu-sī khòng-gī, jiân-āu khì Í-ko-liām." 
Acts13:52 Bûn-tô͘ móa-sim hoaⁿ-hí, koh siū Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa." 
Acts14:1 Siâng-khoán ê tāi-chì mā hoat-seng tī Í-ko-liām. Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa ji̍p-khì Iû-thài -lâng ê hōe-tn̂g káng-tō, kiat-kó ū chin chōe Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng lâi sìn." 
Acts14:2 M̄-kú hiah-ê m̄-sìn ê Iû-thài -lâng siàn-tōng Gōa-pang-lâng, hō͘ in iàm-ò͘ⁿ sìn-tô͘, tùi in khí hoán-kám." 
Acts14:3 Put-kò in nn̄g lâng tī hia tòa chin kú, khò Chú ióng-kám soan-káng; Chú sù in lêng-le̍k kiâⁿ sîn-jiah kî-sū, chèng-bêng in só͘ thoân un-tián ê sìn-sit sī chin-si̍t." 
Acts14:4 Siâⁿ-lāi ê kûn-chiòng soah hun-lia̍t, ū-ê óa Iû-thài -lâng, ū-ê óa sù-tô͘." 
Acts14:5 Hit-sî, Gōa-pang-lâng kap Iû-thài -lâng í-ki̍p in ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ kè-bô͘ siong-hāi sù-tô͘, beh ēng chio̍h-thâu kā in tìm." 
Acts14:6 Sù-tô͘ chai chit-ê tāi-chì, chiū tô-pī khì Lū-ko-nî ê Lō͘-su-tek kap Te̍k-pì nn̄g ê siâⁿ í-ki̍p chiu-ûi ê tōe-hng," 
Acts14:7 tī hia kè-sio̍k thoân hok-im. 
Acts14:8 Tī Lō͘-su-tek, ū chi̍t ê lâng nńg-kha, put-sî chē,teh, tùi chhut-sì chiū bōe kiâⁿ." 
Acts14:9 I thiaⁿ Pó-lô káng-tō; Pó-lô chù-ba̍k kā i khòaⁿ, khòaⁿ-kìⁿ i ū sìn-sim thang tit-tio̍h i-tī," 
Acts14:10 chiū tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Khiā,khí-lâi, khiā ti̍t-ti̍t!” Hit-ê lâng chiū thiàu khí-lâi kiâⁿ." 
Acts14:11 Kûn-chiòng khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô ê só͘-chòe, chiū ēng Lū-ko-nî ê ōe tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Ū sîn-bêng hòa-sin chòe lâng kàng-lîm tī lán tiong-kan lah!”" 
Acts14:12 In chheng-ho͘ Pa-ná-pa chòe Tiū-su, chheng Pó-lô chòe Hi-ní-bí, in-ūi i sī chú-káng-chiá." 
Acts14:13 Siâⁿ-gōa ū chi̍t ê Tiū-su -biō ê chè-si, i khan gû koh the̍h hoe-khoân lâi kàu siâⁿ-mn̂g-kháu, beh kap chèng-lâng chòe-hé hiàn-chè." 
Acts14:14 Pa-ná-pa kap Pó-lô nn̄g ê sù-tô͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū thiah-phòa saⁿ, chông ji̍p-khì kûn-chiòng lāi-bīn, hoah kóng," 
Acts14:15 “Lín ná teh chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì? Goán mā-sī lâng, kap lín lóng kâng-khoán. Goán lâi chia thoân hok-im sī beh hō͘ lín lī-khui hu-ké ê ngó͘-siōng, lâi kui-ǹg hit-ūi oa̍h-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè; I sī thiⁿ, tōe, hái, kap kî-tiong bān-mi̍h ê Chhòng-chō-chú." 
Acts14:16 Chá-chêng ê sè-tāi, I iông-ún bān-bîn kiâⁿ ka-kī ê lō͘." 
Acts14:17 Put-kò I it-ti̍t ū thong-kè só͘ chòe ê hó-sū lâi hián-bêng I ka-kī, chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ lo̍h-hō͘, hō͘ lín chiàu-sî siu-sêng, chia̍h-mi̍h chhiong-chiok, sim-lāi hoaⁿ-hí boán-chiok.”" 
Acts14:18 Sù-tô͘ kóng chiah-ê ōe chiah lím-lím-á chó͘-chí kûn-chiòng tùi in hiàn-chè. 
Acts14:19 Ū chi̍t-kóa tùi Pí-se-tí ê An-thê-o kap Í-ko-liām lâi ê Iû-thài -lâng siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm Pó-lô, siūⁿ-kóng i í-keng sí, chiū kā i thoa chhut-khì siâⁿ-gōa." 
Acts14:20 Bûn-tô͘ ûi óa-lâi ê sî, i khiā,khí-lâi, kiâⁿ ji̍p-khì siâⁿ-lāi. Keh-ji̍t, i kap Pa-ná-pa chòe-hé khì Te̍k-pì." 
Acts14:21 Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa tī Te̍k-pì thoân hok-im, hō͘ chin chōe lâng chiâⁿ-chòe bûn-tô͘. Āu-lâi in tò-khì Lō͘-su-tek, Í-ko-liām, kap An-thê-o," 
Acts14:22 iân-lō͘ kian-kò͘ bûn-tô͘ ê sìn-sim, kó͘-lē in chhî-siú sìn-gióng, koh tùi in kóng, “Lán tio̍h keng-kè chin chōe khó͘-lān chiah ōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p Siōng-tè-kok.”" 
Acts14:23 In nn̄g lâng tī ta̍k-ê kàu-hōe soán-phài tiúⁿ-ló, ēng kìm-chia̍h kî-tó chiong in kau-thok hō͘ só͘ sìn ê Chú." 
Acts14:24 In nn̄g lâng keng-kè Pí-se-tí lâi kàu Pông-hui-lī-a," 
Acts14:25 tī Pia̍t-ka káng-tō liáu-āu lo̍h-khì A-tāi-lī," 
Acts14:26 tùi hia chē-chûn tò-khì An-thê-o; chiū-sī tī chia kàu-hōe ū chiong in kau-thok tī Siōng-tè ê un-tián, chhe in chhut-khì chòe hiān-chāi í-keng oân-sêng ê kang-chok." 
Acts14:27 In kàu An-thê-o chiū tiàu-chi̍p kàu-hōe ê chèng sìn-tô͘, chiong Siōng-tè kap in chòe-hé chòe ê it-chhè, í-ki̍p I kā Gōa-pang-lâng khui sìn-gióng ê mn̂g ê keng-kè, lóng tùi in pò-kò." 
Acts14:28 Āu-lâi in kap chèng bûn-tô͘ tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan. 
Acts15:1 Ū kúi-nā ê lâng tùi Iû-thài lo̍h-lâi An-thê-o teh kà-sī sìn-tô͘ kóng, “Lín nā bô chiàu Mô͘-se ê kui-kú siū kat-lé chiū bōe tit-tio̍h kiù.”" 
Acts15:2 Pó-lô í-ki̍p Pa-ná-pa kap in ū ke̍k-lia̍t ê cheng-piān. Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê būn-tôe, tāi-ke koat-tēng phài Pó-lô, Pa-ná-pa, kap in tiong-kan kúi-nā ê lâng chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khì kìⁿ sù-tô͘ í-ki̍p tiúⁿ-ló, kap in chham-siông." 
Acts15:3 Kàu-hōe ê lâng sàng in chhut-hoat. In keng-kè Hui-nî-ki kap Sat-má-lī-a, tùi chèng sìn-tô͘ pò-kò Gōa-pang-lâng kui Chú ê sū. Tāi-ke thiaⁿ-liáu lóng chin hoaⁿ-hí." 
Acts15:4 In kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî, siū-tio̍h kàu-hōe, sù-tô͘, kap tiúⁿ-ló hoan-gêng. In chiong Siōng-tè kap in tông-chāi só͘ chòe it-chhè ê sū kā tāi-ke pò-kò." 
Acts15:5 Put-kò ū kúi-nā ê sio̍k Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê sìn-tô͘ khiā khí-lâi kóng, “Gōa-pang-lâng it-tēng tio̍h siū kat-lé, koh tio̍h bēng-lēng in chun-siú Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat.”" 
Acts15:6 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê būn-tôe, sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló khui-hōe thó-lūn." 
Acts15:7 Piān-lūn chin kú liáu-āu, Pí-tek khiā,khí-lâi, kóng, “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, lín chai Siōng-tè chá chiū tùi lín tiong-kan kéng-soán góa, thang hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng thiaⁿ góa só͘ thoân hok-im ê sìn-sit lâi sìn." 
Acts15:8 Hit-ūi chai lâng lāi-sim ê Siōng-tè sù Sèng Sîn hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, kap ū sù hō͘ lán kâng-khoán, chèng-bêng I ū chiap-la̍p in." 
Acts15:9 Tùi sìn, I ū kā in ê sim sóe chheng-khì; I tùi-thāi lán kap in lóng bô chha-pia̍t." 
Acts15:10 Kì-jiân sī án-ni, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ iáu-teh chhì-thàm Siōng-tè, chiong lán ê chó͘-sian kap lán taⁿ bōe khí ê tàⁿ khòa tī hiah-ê bûn-tô͘ ê keng-thâu téng?" 
Acts15:11 M̄ eng-kai án-ni, lán siong-sìn tio̍h thong-kè Chú Iâ-so͘ ê un-tián chiah ōe tit-tio̍h kiù; in mā-sī án-ni.”" 
Acts15:12 Tāi-ke lóng chēng-chēng thiaⁿ Pa-ná-pa kap Pó-lô kóng-khí Siōng-tè thong-kè in tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan só͘ kiâⁿ it-chhè ê sîn-jiah kî-sū. 
Acts15:13 In kóng soah, Ngá-kok kóng, “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, chhiáⁿ thiaⁿ góa kóng." 
Acts15:14 Tú-chiah Se-bûn ū kóng-tio̍h Siōng-tè tong-chho͘ án-chóaⁿ khòaⁿ-kò͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, tùi in tiong-kan kéng lâng lâi kui-sio̍k I ka-kī." 
Acts15:15 Sian-ti ū kóng-khí kap chit-ê siâng-khoán ì-sù ê ōe. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: 
Acts15:16 Chú kóng: Chiah-ê sū í-āu góa beh tò-tńg,lâi, beh tiông-kiàn í-keng tó-hoāi ê Tāi-pi̍t ê ke. Góa beh tùi hong-hòe tiong koh kā i khí-chō, beh têng-sin kā i kiàn-li̍p,khí-lâi," 
Acts15:17 thang hō͘ só͘ chhun ê lâng, chiū-sī só͘-ū siū ho͘-tiàu kui góa ê Gōa-pang-lâng, lóng ōe chhē-kiû Chú. Hit-ūi chiong chiah-ê sū tùi kó͘-chá chiū hō͘ lâng chai ê Chú án-ni soan-pò͘." 
Acts15:18  
Acts15:19 “Só͘-í, chiàu góa ê phòaⁿ-toàn, lán m̄-thang kā hiah-ê kui-ǹg Siōng-tè ê Gōa-pang-lâng tiau-lân," 
Acts15:20 put-kò tio̍h siá-phoe hoan-hù in m̄-thang chia̍h pài ngó͘-siōng bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h; m̄-thang îm-loān; m̄-thang chia̍h ni̍h-sí ê cheng-siⁿ kap huih. 
Acts15:21 In-ūi tùi kó͘-chá í-lâi, Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī lóng ū lâng soan-káng, ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t, tī ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g lóng ū lâng soan-tho̍k.”" 
Acts15:22 Hit-sî, sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló, í-ki̍p choân kàu-hōe koat-tēng beh tùi in tiong-kan kéng lâng, chhe in kap Pó-lô, Pa-ná-pa chòe-hé khì An-thê-o. In só͘ soán-phài,ê sī kiò-chòe Pa-sat-pa ê Iû-tāi kap Se-la. Chit nn̄g ê lâng tī hiaⁿ-tī ê tiong-kan sī léng-tō jîn-bu̍t." 
Acts15:23 Sù-tô͘ kau-tài in tòa,khì ê phoe án-ni siá: “Goán chiah-ê choh sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló ê hiaⁿ-tī, kā tòa tī An-thê-o, Sū-lī-a, kap Ki-lī-ka ê Gōa-pang-lâng sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an!" 
Acts15:24 Thiaⁿ-kóng ū tùi goán chia chhut,khì ê lâng khì lín hia, in ēng goán bô chí-sī in kóng ê ōe kā lín kiáu-jiáu, hō͘ lín ê sim siū-tio̍h jiáu-loān." 
Acts15:25 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni, goán tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì koat-tēng kéng lâng, chhe in kap goán só͘ kèng-ài ê Pó-lô í-ki̍p Pa-ná-pa khì lín hia;" 
Acts15:26 chit nn̄g ê lâng ūi-tio̍h lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kam-goān hiàn sìⁿ-miā. 
Acts15:27 Só͘-í, goán chhe-phài Iû-tāi kap Se-la khì, in ōe chhin-chhùi kā lín kóng kap phoe-lāi só͘ siá kâng-khoán ê tāi-chì." 
Acts15:28 In-ūi Sèng Sîn kap goán koat-tēng, ē-bīn chiah-ê tiōng-iàu sū-hāng í-gōa, bô koh ke-thiⁿ lín ê hū-tam:" 
Acts15:29 Chiū-sī m̄-thang chia̍h pài ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h; m̄-thang chia̍h huih kap ni̍h-sí ê cheng-siⁿ; mā m̄-thang îm-loān. Chiah-ê tāi-chì lín nā bô hoān,tio̍h chiū hó. Goān lín pêng-an!” 
Acts15:30 In siū-phài lo̍h-khì An-thê-o, tī hia tiàu-chi̍p choân-thé sìn-tô͘, chiong phoe kau hō͘ in." 
Acts15:31 Chèng-lâng tha̍k-tio̍h hit-tiuⁿ phoe, in-ūi kó͘-lē ê ōe móa-sim hoaⁿ-hí." 
Acts15:32 Iû-tāi kap Se-la, in pún-sin mā-sī sian-ti, ū tùi sìn-tô͘ kóng chin chōe kó͘-lē ê ōe, kian-kò͘ in ê sìn-sim." 
Acts15:33 In tī hia tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan liáu-āu, siū sìn-tô͘ hoan-sàng, pêng-an tò-khì chhe in lâi ê lâng ê só͘-chāi." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Pó-lô kap Pa-ná-pa kè-sio̍k tòa tī An-thê-o; in kap kî-tha chin chōe lâng chòe-hé kà-sī koh soan-káng Chú ê sìn-sit. 
Acts15:36 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu, Pó-lô tùi Pa-ná-pa kóng, “Lán koh lâi-khì chêng thoân Chú ê sìn-sit hiah-ê siâⁿ-chhī thàm sìn-tô͘, khòaⁿ in ê chêng-hêng.”" 
Acts15:37 Pa-ná-pa ài-beh chhōa kiò-chòe Má-khó ê Iok-hān chòe-hé khì," 
Acts15:38 m̄-kú Pó-lô siūⁿ-kóng bô sek-ha̍p, in-ūi Má-khó bat tī Pông-hui-lī-a lī-khui in, bô kè-sio̍k kap in chòe kang." 
Acts15:39 In nn̄g ê lâng ì-kiàn ke̍k-lia̍t chhiong-tu̍t, tì-kàu tio̍h hun-khui. Pa-ná-pa chhōa Má-khó chē-chûn khì Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su;" 
Acts15:40 Pó-lô kéng Se-la, sìn-tô͘ chiong i kau-thok tī Chú ê un-tián, i chiū chhut-hoat." 
Acts15:41 I kiâⁿ-thàu Sū-lī-a kap Ki-lī-ka, kian-kò͘ ta̍k kàu-hōe ê sìn-sim." 
Acts16:1 Pó-lô koh khì Te̍k-pì kap Lō͘-su-tek, tī hia ū chi̍t ê bûn-tô͘ kiò-chòe Thê-mô͘-thài, lāu-bú sī Iû-thài -lâng, sī sìn-tô͘, lāu-pē sī Hi-la̍h -lâng." 
Acts16:2 Lō͘-su-tek kap Í-ko-liām ê sìn-tô͘ lóng chheng-chàn i. 
Acts16:3 Pó-lô siūⁿ-beh chhōa i chòe-hé khì, chiū kā i kiâⁿ kat-lé, in-ūi hit só͘-chāi ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng chai i ê lāu-pē sī Hi-la̍h -lâng." 
Acts16:4 In chi̍t ê siâⁿ kè chi̍t ê siâⁿ chiong Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sù-tô͘ kap tiúⁿ-ló só͘ gī-koat ê kui-lē kau hō͘ in khì chun-siú. 
Acts16:5 Tùi án-ni, ta̍k kàu-hōe ê sìn-sim ná kian-kò͘, jîn-sò͘ ji̍t-ji̍t ke-thiⁿ." 
Acts16:6 In-ūi Sèng Sîn chó͘-chí Pó-lô kap Se-la tī A-sè-a -séng thoân-tō, in chiū tùi Hut-lū-ka kap Ka-lia̍p-thài ê tōe-hng keng-kè." 
Acts16:7 In lâi kàu Múi-se-a pian-kài ê sî, siūⁿ-beh ji̍p-khì Pì-chhui-nî -séng, put-kò Iâ-so͘ ê Sîn m̄-chún," 
Acts16:8 in chiū se̍h-kè Múi-se-a, lo̍h-khì Te̍k-lô-a." 
Acts16:9 Hit-àm, Pó-lô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng, ū chi̍t ê Má-kî-tùn -lâng khiā,teh, kā i khún-kiû kóng, “Chhiáⁿ kè-lâi Má-kî-tùn pang-chān goán!”" 
Acts16:10 Pó-lô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê īⁿ-siōng liáu-āu, goán sûi-sî chún-pī beh khì hia, in-ūi khak-sìn Siōng-tè ū ho͘-tiàu goán khì thoân hok-im hō͘ Má-kî-tùn -lâng." 
Acts16:11 Goán tùi Te̍k-lô-a khui-chûn, ti̍t-ti̍t khui-khì Sat-mô͘-te̍k-lat, keh-ji̍t kàu Nî-a-pho-lí." 
Acts16:12 Goán tùi hia lâi kàu Má-kî-tùn tē-it khu ê siâⁿ Hui-li̍p-pí; chit-ê siâⁿ sī Lô-má ê si̍t-bîn-khu. Goán tī hia tòa kúi-nā ji̍t. 
Acts16:13 Tī An-hioh-ji̍t, goán chhut-siâⁿ khì hô-piⁿ, siūⁿ-kóng tī hia ū kî-tó ê só͘-chāi. Goán chē,lo̍h-khì, chiū tùi chū-chi̍p tī hia ê hū-lú kóng tō-lí." 
Acts16:14 Ū chi̍t ê bōe chí-sek-pò͘ ê Chhui-ngá-chhui-lat ê hū-lú, miâ kiò-chòe Lū-tí-a, sī kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng, i mā lâi thiaⁿ. Chú khui i ê sim, hō͘ i choan-sim thiaⁿ Pó-lô só͘ kóng ê ōe." 
Acts16:15 I kap choân-ke lóng siū sóe-lé, āu-lâi i khún-kiû goán kóng, “Lín nā khòaⁿ góa ū chin-si̍t sìn Chú, chhiáⁿ lâi tòa goán tau.” I án-ni kā goán kiông lâu,teh, goán chiū lâu,lo̍h-lâi." 
Acts16:16 Ū chi̍t ji̍t, goán beh khì kî-tó ê só͘-chāi, ū tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê hō͘ pok-kòa ê sîn hū-sin ê cha-bó͘ lô͘-lē, i khò pok-kòa hō͘ chú-lâng thàn chin chōe chîⁿ." 
Acts16:17 I tè tī Pó-lô kap goán āu-bīn, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chiah-ê lâng sī Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê po̍k-jîn, beh tùi lín soan-pò͘ tit-kiù ê tō-lō͘.”" 
Acts16:18 I chin chōe ji̍t lóng án-ni hoah; Pó-lô kám-kak chin thó-ià, chiū oa̍t kè-khì kā hit-ê siâ-sîn kóng, “Góa hōng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ bēng-lēng lí tùi i chhut,khì!” Siâ-sîn sûi-sî tùi i chhut,khì." 
Acts16:19 Cha-bó͘ lô͘-lē ê chú-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h in thàn-chîⁿ ê ǹg-bāng lóng bô,khì, chiū kā Pó-lô kap Se-la khiú,teh, thoa in khì chhī-tiong-sim kìⁿ koaⁿ-oân," 
Acts16:20 kau hō͘ Lô-má koaⁿ-tiúⁿ, khòng-kò in, kóng, “Chiah-ê lâng lâi teh jiáu-loān lán ê siâⁿ; in sī Iû-thài -lâng," 
Acts16:21 teh thoân lán Lô-má -lâng m̄ eng-kai chiap-siū á-sī chun-siú ê hong-sio̍k si̍p-koàn.” 
Acts16:22 Kûn-chiòng chham-teh kong-kek, koaⁿ-tiúⁿ chiū pak Pó-lô kap Se-la ê saⁿ, bēng-lēng lâng ēng kùn-á kā in kòng." 
Acts16:23 Peng-teng kā in kòng chin chōe ē liáu-āu, kā in koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, koh bēng-lēng kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng giâm-bi̍t khàn-siú." 
Acts16:24 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chiap-tio̍h bēng-lēng, chiū kā in koaiⁿ-lo̍h lāi-kaⁿ, siang-kha khàu tī chhâ-kông." 
Acts16:25 Chha-put-to pòaⁿ-mî, Pó-lô kap Se-la teh kî-tó, gîm-si o-ló Siōng-tè, kî-tha ê hoān-lâng lóng chù-ì teh thiaⁿ." 
Acts16:26 Hut-jiân ū tōa tōe-tāng, tì-kàu kaⁿ-ga̍k ê tōe-ki iô-choah; só͘-ū ê kaⁿ-mn̂g sûi-sî khui, hoān-lâng ê só-liān lóng lak,khì." 
Acts16:27 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chhíⁿ,khí-lâi, khòaⁿ-tio̍h kaⁿ-mn̂g khui-khui, siūⁿ-kóng hoān-lâng lóng tô-cháu, chiū pu̍ih to beh chū-sat." 
Acts16:28 Pó-lô tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “M̄-thang siong-hāi ka-kī, goán lóng tī chia.”" 
Acts16:29 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng kiò lâng gia̍h-teng lâi, chông,ji̍p-khì, phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah phak tī Pó-lô kap Se-la ê kha-chêng," 
Acts16:30 jiân-āu chhōa in chhut,khì, mn̄g kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h chiah ōe tit-tio̍h kiù?”" 
Acts16:31 In kóng, “Tio̍h sìn Chú Iâ-so͘, lí kap lí ê ke chiū ōe tit-tio̍h kiù.”" 
Acts16:32 In chiū chiong Chú ê tō-lí kóng hō͘ i kap in choân-ke ê lâng thiaⁿ. 
Acts16:33 Hit-mî, kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chhōa Pó-lô kap Se-la khì sóe khang-chhùi, jiân-āu i kap choân-ke ê lâng lóng sûi-sî siū sóe-lé." 
Acts16:34 I chhōa in ji̍p-khì i ê chhù, chún-pī mi̍h-kiāⁿ hō͘ in chia̍h. I kap choân-ke lóng tōa hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi in í-keng sìn Siōng-tè." 
Acts16:35 Keh-chá-khí, Lô-má ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ phài kéng-koaⁿ lâi, kóng, “Kā hit nn̄g ê lâng pàng,chhut-khì.”" 
Acts16:36 Kò͘-kaⁿ ê lâng chiong chiah-ê ōe kā Pó-lô kóng, “Koaⁿ-tiúⁿ ū kau-tài beh pàng lín chhut,khì; taⁿ lín chhut,lâi, pêng-an lī-khui.”" 
Acts16:37 M̄-kú Pó-lô tùi kéng-koaⁿ kóng, “Goán sī Lô-má kong-bîn, bô siū sím-mn̄g chiū tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng ēng kùn-á kā goán kòng, koh kā goán koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, chit-chūn in beh tiām-tiām-á kā goán kóaⁿ,chhut-khì sī,bô? Bōe-ēng,tit! Kiò Lô-má koaⁿ-tiúⁿ chhin-sin lâi chhōa goán chhut,khì!”" 
Acts16:38 Kéng-koaⁿ chiong chiah-ê ōe tùi Lô-má ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ pò-kò. In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô kap Se-la sī Lô-má kong-bîn chiū chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ," 
Acts16:39 lâi kaⁿ,ni̍h khǹg in, chhōa in chhut,lâi, chhiáⁿ in lī-khui hit-ê siâⁿ." 
Acts16:40 Pó-lô kap Se-la lī-khui kaⁿ-ga̍k, chiū khì Lū-tí-a in tau, kap sìn-tô͘ kìⁿ-bīn, kā in kó͘-lē liáu-āu chiah lī-khui." 
Acts17:1 Pó-lô kap Se-la keng-kè Àm-hui-pho-lí kap A-pho-lô-nî-a, lâi kàu Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka, tī hia ū Iû-thài -lâng ê hōe-tn̂g." 
Acts17:2 Pó-lô chiàu si̍p-koàn ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g, liân-sòa saⁿ ê An-hioh-ji̍t, ín-iōng Sèng-keng kap lâng piān-lūn." 
Acts17:3 I káng-kái koh chèng-bêng Ki-tok it-tēng tio̍h siū-hāi, jiân-āu tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h. I kóng, “Góa tùi lín soan-iông ê chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ chiū-sī Ki-tok.”" 
Acts17:4 In tiong-kan ū lâng siū sòe-ho̍k lâi sìn, chiū khì tè Pó-lô kap Se-la; kî-tiong ū chi̍t tōa-tīn kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê Hi-la̍h -lâng, koh ū bōe chió kùi-hu-jîn." 
Acts17:5 M̄-kú Iû-thài -lâng khí oàn-tò͘, chiū chio chi̍t-kóa koe-thâu ê húi-lūi, ká-kûn kiat-tóng, jiáu-loān choân-chhī, kong-kek Iâ-sun ê chhù, chhē Pó-lô kap Se-la, beh kā in lia̍h-khì kau hō͘ bîn-chiòng." 
Acts17:6 In chhē bô, chiū chiong Iâ-sun kap chi̍t-kóa sìn-tô͘ thoa-khì kìⁿ tōe-hng-koaⁿ, hoah kóng, “Chiah-ê kā thian-hā péng-lìn-tńg ê lâng mā lâi kàu lán chia lo͘h!" 
Acts17:7 Iâ-sun kèng-jiân kā in siu-liû. In ûi-pōe Lô-má hông-tè Khái-sat ê hoat-lēng, kóng lēng-gōa ū chi̍t ê ông kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘.”" 
Acts17:8 Kûn-chiòng kap tōe-hng-koaⁿ thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe tio̍h-kip put-an. 
Acts17:9 Koaⁿ-oân tùi Iâ-sun kap kî-tha ê lâng siu chîⁿ kau-pó liáu-āu pàng in chhut,khì. 
Acts17:10 Hit-àm, sìn-tô͘ thàu-mî sàng Pó-lô kap Se-la khì Pì-lí-a. In chi̍t-ē kàu-ūi chiū ji̍p-khì Iû-thài -lâng ê hōe-tn̂g." 
Acts17:11 Chiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng pí Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka ê Iû-thài -lâng khah khai-bêng, hui-siông jia̍t-sim niá-siū tō-lí, ta̍k-ji̍t chhâ-khó Sèng-keng, khòaⁿ Pó-lô só͘ kóng,ê ū khak-si̍t,bô." 
Acts17:12 In tiong-kan ū chin chōe chun-kùi ê Hi-la̍h hū-jîn-lâng kap ta-po͘-lâng sìn. 
Acts17:13 M̄-kú Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka ê Iû-thài -lâng chi̍t-ē chai-iáⁿ Pó-lô mā tī Pì-lí-a teh thoân Siōng-tè ê tō, chiū khì hia siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng, ín-khí jiáu-loān." 
Acts17:14 Sìn-tô͘ sûi-sî sàng Pó-lô khì hái-piⁿ; Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài lâu tī hia. 
Acts17:15 In chi̍t-lō͘ hō͘-sàng Pó-lô kàu Ngá-tián. Pó-lô hoan-hù in kiò Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài chīn-liōng kóaⁿ-kín khì kap i hōe-ha̍p, jiân-āu in chiū lī-khui." 
Acts17:16 Pó-lô tī Ngá-tián teh thèng-hāu Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài ê tiong-kan, khòaⁿ-tio̍h móa-siâⁿ lóng sī ngó͘-siōng, sim chin kan-khó͘." 
Acts17:17 I tī hōe-tn̂g kap Iû-thài -lâng í-ki̍p kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê Gōa-pang-lâng tâm-lūn, mā ta̍k-ji̍t tī chhī-tiong-sim kap só͘ tú,tio̍h ê lâng tâm-lūn." 
Acts17:18 Ū chi̍t-kóa I-phek-khiu-ló͘ kap Su-to-a ha̍k-phài ê tiat-ha̍k-ka lâi kap i piān-lūn. Ū lâng kóng, “Chit-ê ài kóng-ōe,ê teh o͘-pe̍h kóng sím-mi̍h?” Ū lâng kóng, “I chhin-chhiūⁿ teh thoân gōa-kok ê kúi-sîn.” In án-ni kóng sī in-ūi Pó-lô thoân Iâ-so͘ kap I koh-oa̍h ê hok-im." 
Acts17:19 In chiū kā Pó-lô thoa kàu A-lio̍k Pa-kó͘ gī-tiûⁿ, tùi i kóng, “Lí teh káng-lūn ê sin ha̍k-soat ōe-tàng hō͘ goán chai bōe?" 
Acts17:20 Ū chi̍t-kóa tāi-chì goán thiaⁿ-liáu koài-koài, goán ài chai sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù.”" 
Acts17:21 Goân-lâi só͘-ū Ngá-tián -lâng kap tòa tī hia ê gōa-kok-lâng ēng chin chōe sî-kan tâm-lūn kap thiaⁿ sin-kî ê sū. 
Acts17:22 Pó-lô khiā tī A-lio̍k Pa-kó͘ gī-tiûⁿ ê tiong-ng, kóng, “Kok-ūi Ngá-tián -lâng, góa khòaⁿ-chhut lín tī ta̍k hong-bīn ū kiông-lia̍t ê chong-kàu jia̍t-sêng." 
Acts17:23 Góa tī siâⁿ-lāi teh kiâⁿ, koan-chhat lín kèng-pài ê só͘-chāi, mā ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chō tôaⁿ, téng-bīn siá: ‘Hiàn hō͘ m̄-bat ê sîn’. Lín só͘ teh kèng-pài m̄-bat ê sîn, hiān-chāi góa pò lín chai." 
Acts17:24 Chit-ūi chhòng-chō ú-tiū kap kî-tiong bān-mi̍h ê Siōng-tè sī thiⁿ-tōe ê Chú, bô tòa tī lâng ê chhiú khí ê biō-sī," 
Acts17:25 mā bô khiàm-ēng lâng ê chhiú só͘ hiàn ê mi̍h, kî-si̍t I lóng bô su-iàu, I ka-kī tian-tò chiong sìⁿ-miā, kap khùi, í-ki̍p bān-mi̍h sù hō͘ jîn-lūi." 
Acts17:26 I tùi chi̍t ê lâng chō-chhut ta̍k chióng-cho̍k ê lâng, hō͘ in khiā-khí tī tōe-bīn-chiūⁿ ta̍k só͘-chāi, koh tāi-seng kā in tēng nî-hān kap khiā-khí ê tōe-kài." 
Acts17:27 Siōng-tè án-ni chòe sī beh hō͘ in chhē I, in nā chhiau-chhē chiū ōe chhē,tio̍h, kî-si̍t I kap lán ta̍k-ê lâng saⁿ-lī bô hn̄g." 
Acts17:28 In-ūi ‘lán khò I seng-oa̍h, hêng-tōng, chûn-chāi’; chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê si-jîn ū-ê án-ni kóng, ‘In-ūi lán mā-sī I ê kiáⁿ-sun.’" 
Acts17:29 Kì-jiân lán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-sun, bô eng-kai chiong I ê sîn-sèng khòaⁿ-chòe kap ngó͘-siōng kâng-khoán, sī khò lâng ê chhiú-gē, ēng kim, gûn, á-sī chio̍h-thâu tiau-khek,chhut-lâi,ê." 
Acts17:30 Jîn-lūi iáu oa̍h tī bû-ti ê sî-tāi, Siōng-tè bô tui-kiù, m̄-kú hiān-chāi I bēng-lēng choân jîn-lūi tio̍h hóe-kái." 
Acts17:31 In-ūi I í-keng koat-tēng ji̍t-chí, beh ēng I só͘ chí-tēng ê lâng chiàu kong-gī lâi sím-phòaⁿ choân sè-kài; I hō͘ chi̍t ê lâng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, ēng chit-ê chòe pîn-kù, hō͘ choân jîn-lūi thang sìn.”" 
Acts17:32 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū, ū lâng kā i thí-chhiò, mā ū lâng kóng, “Koan-hē chit-ê sū goán ài koh thiaⁿ lí kóng.”" 
Acts17:33 Jiân-āu Pó-lô tùi in tiong-kan chhut,khì. 
Acts17:34 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng tè i khì, chiâⁿ-chòe sìn-tô͘, kî-tiong ū A-lio̍k Pa-kó͘ ê gī-oân Tō͘-nî-siu, koh ū chi̍t ê lú-sū kiò-chòe Tāi-má-lí, í-ki̍p chi̍t-kóa kap in chòe-hé ê lâng." 
Acts18:1 Chit-ê sū í-āu, Pó-lô lī-khui Ngá-tián khì Ko-lîm-to." 
Acts18:2 I tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t ê tī Pún-to͘ chhut-sì ê Iû-thài -lâng, miâ kiò A-ku-la, chòe-kūn chiah kap i ê bó͘ Pek-ki-la tùi Ì-tāi-lī lâi, in-ūi hông-tè Khek-lô-tē ū bēng-lēng só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng lī-khui Lô-má. Pó-lô khì chhē in," 
Acts18:3 in-ūi kâng hâng-gia̍p, lóng sī teh chòe pò͘-pîⁿ, chiū kap in tòa, chòe-hé chòe kang." 
Acts18:4 Ta̍k-ê An-hioh-ji̍t, Pó-lô lóng tī hōe-tn̂g kap lâng piān-lūn, khó͘-khǹg Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng sìn Chú." 
Acts18:5 Se-la kap Thê-mô͘-thài tùi Má-kî-tùn lâi liáu-āu, Pó-lô chiū choân-sim thoân-tō, tùi Iû-thài -lâng kiàn-chèng Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok." 
Acts18:6 In kā i hoán-tùi koh húi-pòng ê sî, Pó-lô kā saⁿ,ni̍h ê thô͘-hún pōaⁿ hiat-ka̍k, tùi in kóng, “Lín ka-kī beh thó-sí, bô góa ê tāi-chì! Tùi taⁿ í-āu góa beh khì Gōa-pang-lâng hia.”" 
Acts18:7 Jiân-āu Pó-lô lī-khui in, khì tòa tī chi̍t ê kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê Gōa-pang-lâng kiò-chòe Thê-to Iû-sū-to͘ ê chhù; i ê chhù tī hōe-tn̂g ê keh-piah." 
Acts18:8 Hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán Ki-lī-sū-pò͘ kap i ê choân-ke lóng sìn Chú; koh ū chin chōe Ko-lîm-to -lâng thiaⁿ-liáu lâi sìn, mā siū sóe-lé." 
Acts18:9 Ū chi̍t àm, tī īⁿ-siōng tiong Chú tùi Pó-lô kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ, tio̍h kè-sio̍k kóng, m̄-thang tiām,khì," 
Acts18:10 in-ūi góa kap lí tông-chāi, bô lâng ōe hē-chhiú kā lí siong-hāi; góa ū chin chōe chú-bîn tī chit-ê siâⁿ-lāi.”" 
Acts18:11 Pó-lô tī hia tòa chi̍t nî pòaⁿ kú, chiong Siōng-tè ê tō kà-sī in." 
Acts18:12 Ka-liû choh A-kai-a chóng-tok ê sî, Iû-thài -lâng liân-ha̍p kong-kek Pó-lô, kā i lia̍h-khì hoat-têng," 
Acts18:13 kò i kóng, “Chit-ê lâng siàn-tōng lâng ēng ûi-pōe Lu̍t-hoat ê hong-sek kèng-pài Siōng-tè!”" 
Acts18:14 Pó-lô tú-beh khui-chhùi, Ka-liû tùi Iû-thài -lâng kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng, che nā-sī hoān-hoat ê hêng-ûi á-sī ok-chit ê hoān-chōe, góa tong-jiân tio̍h nāi-sim thiaⁿ lín ê khòng-sò͘." 
Acts18:15 Só͘ cheng-lūn,ê kì-jiân sī koan-hē lín Lu̍t-hoat ê jī-gán kap bêng-chheng, lín ka-kī khì kái-koat; góa m̄ pān chit-khoán tāi-chì!”" 
Acts18:16 I kā in kóaⁿ-chhut hoat-têng. 
Acts18:17 Chèng-lâng chiū lia̍h hōe-tn̂g ê chú-koán Só͘-thê-nî, tī hoat-têng chêng kā i phah. Chit-hāng tāi-chì Ka-liû lóng bô chhap." 
Acts18:18 Pó-lô tī Ko-lîm-to kap sìn-tô͘ koh tòa chin chōe ji̍t liáu-āu lī-khui in, kap Pek-ki-la í-ki̍p A-ku-la chòe-hé chē-chûn khì Sū-lī-a. Chhut-hoat chêng, Pó-lô in-ūi ū hē-goān, tī Kian-kek-lí chián thâu-mn̂g." 
Acts18:19 In kàu Í-hut-só͘, Pó-lô kap in hun-khui, ka-kī ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g kap Iû-thài -lâng piān-lūn." 
Acts18:20 Tāi-ke chhiáⁿ i lâu lo̍h-lâi ke tòa kúi-ji̍t-á, i bô tah-èng." 
Acts18:21 Beh lī-khui ê sî, i kā in kóng “Nā-sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, góa ōe koh tńg-lâi lín chia”, jiân-āu chē-chûn lī-khui Í-hut-só͘." 
Acts18:22 I tī Khái-sat-lī-a lo̍h-chûn, tùi hia chiūⁿ-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, kā kàu-hōe chhéng-an, jiân-āu lo̍h-khì An-thê-o." 
Acts18:23 Pó-lô tī hia tòa chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan liáu-āu koh chhut-hoat, keng-kè Ka-lia̍p-thài kap Hut-lū-ka tōe-khu, kian-kò͘ chèng bûn-tô͘ ê sìn-sim." 
Acts18:24 Ū chi̍t ê tī A-le̍k-san-tāi chhut-sì ê Iû-thài -lâng, kiò-chòe A-pho-lô, lâi kàu Í-hut-só͘; i ū chin hó ê kháu-châi, tùi Sèng-keng mā cheng-thong." 
Acts18:25 I tùi Chú ê Tō-lō͘ ū siū-kè hùn-liān, jia̍t-sim soan-káng, chèng-khak kà-sī Iâ-so͘ ê sū, put-kò chí-ū chai Iok-hān ê sóe-lé nā-tiāⁿ."
