Acts18:26 I tī hōe-tn̂g hó-táⁿ khai-sí káng-tō. Pek-ki-la kap A-ku-la thiaⁿ-tio̍h i ê káng-tō chiū chhōa i khì in tau, koh-khah chèng-khak kā i kóe-seh Siōng-tè ê Tō-lō͘." 
Acts18:27 Āu-lâi A-pho-lô koat-tēng beh khì A-kai-a, Í-hut-só͘ ê sìn-tô͘ chiū kā i kó͘-lē, siá-phoe hō͘ A-kai-a ê bûn-tô͘, chhiáⁿ in kā i chiap-thāi. I kàu hia í-āu, hiah-ê tùi Siōng-tè ê un-hūi lâi sìn Chú ê lâng siū-tio̍h chin tōa ê pang-chān," 
Acts18:28 in-ūi tī kong-khai ê piān-lūn, i ēng ū-la̍t ê ōe piān-tó Iû-thài -lâng, kun-kù Sèng-keng chèng-bêng Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok." 
Acts19:1 A-pho-lô tī Ko-lîm-to ê sî, Pó-lô keng-kè lōe-lio̍k ê tōe-khu, lâi kàu Í-hut-só͘, tī hia ū tú-tio̍h kúi-nā ê bûn-tô͘." 
Acts19:2 I mn̄g in, “Lín sìn Chú ê sî ū niá-siū Sèng Sîn bô?” In ìn kóng, “Bô, goán kàu taⁿ m̄-bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h kóng ū Sèng Sîn.”" 
Acts19:3 Pó-lô koh mn̄g kóng, “Án-ni, lín niá-siū,ê sī sím-mi̍h sóe-lé?” In ìn kóng, “Sī Iok-hān ê sóe-lé.”" 
Acts19:4 Pó-lô kóng, “ Iok-hān ê sóe-lé sī hóe-kái ê sóe-lé; i kiò Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tio̍h sìn tè tī i āu-bīn lâi Hit-ūi, chiū-sī tio̍h sìn Iâ-so͘.”" 
Acts19:5 In thiaⁿ-liáu chiū hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé. 
Acts19:6 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē kā in hōaⁿ-chhiú, Sèng Sîn chiū kàng-lîm tī in sin-chiūⁿ, in chiū ēng lêng-gú kóng-ōe, koh soan-káng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit." 
Acts19:7 In lóng-chóng ū cha̍p-jī ê lâng. 
Acts19:8 Pó-lô liân-sòa saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú ji̍p-khì hōe-tn̂g hó-táⁿ thoân-tō, kap lâng piān-lūn Siōng-tè-kok ê sū, khó͘-khǹg in sìn Chú." 
Acts19:9 Put-kò ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kò͘-chip m̄ sìn, tī hōe-chiòng bīn-chêng húi-pòng Chú ê Tō-lō͘. Pó-lô chiū chhōa bûn-tô͘ lī-khui in, ta̍k-ji̍t tī Chhui-lat-lô͘ ê káng-tn̂g kap lâng tâm-lūn." 
Acts19:10 Án-ni kè-sio̍k nn̄g nî kú, só͘-ū tòa tī A-sè-a -séng ê lâng, bô-lūn Iû-thài -lâng á-sī Hi-la̍h -lâng, lóng ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Chú ê sìn-sit." 
Acts19:11 Siōng-tè ēng Pó-lô ê chhiú kiâⁿ kî-īⁿ ê sîn-jiah; 
Acts19:12 sīm-chì ū lâng the̍h Pó-lô ēng,kè ê chhiú-kun á-sī ûi-kûn khǹg tī pīⁿ-lâng sin-chiūⁿ, in ê pīⁿ chiū hó,khì, siâ-sîn chiū tùi in chhut,khì." 
Acts19:13 Hit-sî ū kúi-nā ê kiâⁿ-kang-ô͘ teh kóaⁿ-kúi ê Iû-thài -lâng, mā siūⁿ-beh chioh Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ chè-ap siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng, kóng, “Góa hōng Pó-lô só͘ thoân Iâ-so͘ ê miâ bēng-lēng lín chhut,khì!”" 
Acts19:14 Iû-thài ê chè-si-tiúⁿ Sū-ki-óa ê chhit ê kiáⁿ mā teh chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì. 
Acts19:15 M̄-kú siâ-sîn ìn kóng, “Iâ-so͘ góa bat, Pó-lô góa mā bat, lín leh, lín sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?”" 
Acts19:16 Hit-ê hō͘ siâ-sîn hū-sin ê lâng chhi̍h óa-khì kong-kek hiah-ê kiâⁿ-kang-ô͘,ê, kā in chè-ho̍k, hō͘ in siū-siong, chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé tùi hit-keng chhù tô-cháu." 
Acts19:17 Tòa tī Í-hut-só͘ só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì lóng chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ; Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ tōa siū chun-chông. 
Acts19:18 Ū chin chōe í-keng sìn ê lâng chhut,lâi, kong-khai sêng-jīn koh pò lâng chai in kè-khì só͘ chòe ê tāi-chì." 
Acts19:19 Ū chin chōe kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t ê lâng the̍h in ê chheh lâi, khǹg kui-tui, tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng pàng-hé sio. In kè-sǹg chheh ê kè-ta̍t, tāi-iok ū gō͘-bān ê gûn-goân." 
Acts19:20 Tùi án-ni, Chú ê sìn-sit it-ti̍t thoân-khui, tōa-tōa heng-ōng." 
Acts19:21 Chiah-ê tāi-chì liáu-āu, Pó-lô siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, koat-tēng beh keng-kè Má-kî-tùn kap A-kai-a khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. I kóng, “Góa kàu hia í-āu mā it-tēng tio̍h khì hóng-būn Lô-má.”" 
Acts19:22 I chiū chhe nn̄g ê chō͘-chhiú Thê-mô͘-thài kap Í-la-to͘ khì Má-kî-tùn, ka-kī chiām-sî lâu tī A-sè-a." 
Acts19:23 Tú hit-sî, koan-hē Chú ê Tō-lō͘ tī Í-hut-só͘ ín-khí giâm-tiōng ê jiáu-loān." 
Acts19:24 Ū chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Tí-bí-te̍k ê phah-kim sai-hū, i ēng gûn chō lú-sîn A-tí-bí ê biō ê bô͘-hêng, hō͘ chi̍t-kóa sai-hū thàn bōe chió chîⁿ." 
Acts19:25 Tí-bí-te̍k kā hiah-ê sai-hū kap só͘-ū ê tông-gia̍p chi̍p óa,lâi, tùi in kóng, “Kok-ūi, lín chai lán sī khò chit-ê kang-gē teh thàn-chîⁿ." 
Acts19:26 Hiān-chāi lín ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h koh ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê Pó-lô teh chòe ê tāi-chì. I kóng, ‘Lâng ê chhiú só͘ chō,ê lóng m̄-sī sîn.’ Chiah-ê ōe m̄-nā tī Í-hut-só͘, mā chha-put-to tī choân A-sè-a -séng, ū hō͘ chin chōe lâng siū kiau-so khì tè in." 
Acts19:27 Án-ni, m̄-nā lán chit-ê sū-gia̍p ōe phah-pháiⁿ miâ-siaⁿ, liân úi-tāi ê lú-sîn A-tí-bí ê biō to ōe hō͘ lâng khin-sī, choân A-sè-a -séng kap choân sè-kài só͘ teh pài chit-ê lú-sîn ê chun-giâm mā ōe siū phò-hoāi!”" 
Acts19:28 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê ōe hui-siông siū-khì, tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Í-hut-só͘ -lâng ê A-tí-bí chin úi-tāi!”" 
Acts19:29 Choân-siâⁿ lóng loān,khí-lâi; chèng-lâng thoa Pó-lô ê tâng-phōaⁿ Má-kî-tùn -lâng Kai-iû kap A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘, kui-tīn chòe-chi̍t-ē chhiong ji̍p-khì kio̍k-tiûⁿ." 
Acts19:30 Pó-lô siūⁿ-beh ji̍p-khì kûn-chiòng lāi-bīn, m̄-kú bûn-tô͘ kā i chó͘-chí." 
Acts19:31 Ū kúi-nā ê A-sè-a -séng ê koaⁿ-oân, sī Pó-lô ê pêng-iú, mā chhe lâng khì khǹg Pó-lô m̄-thang ji̍p-khì kio̍k-tiûⁿ." 
Acts19:32 Hit-sî kui-ê hōe-tiûⁿ loān-chhau-chhau, chi̍t lâng hoah chi̍t hāng; tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng m̄ chai in sī-án-chóaⁿ teh chū-chi̍p." 
Acts19:33 Kûn-chiòng tiong-kan ū lâng chiong jiáu-loān ê chek-jīm kui hō͘ A-le̍k-san-tāi, in-ūi Iû-thài -lâng kā i sak chhut-khì thâu-chêng. A-le̍k-san-tāi chiū pí chhiú-sè kiò in an-chēng, siūⁿ-beh kā in piān-bêng." 
Acts19:34 In chi̍t-ē jīn-chhut i sī Iû-thài -lâng, chiū lóng chôe-siaⁿ hoah, “ Í-hut-só͘ -lâng ê A-tí-bí chin úi-tāi!” Án-ni ti̍t-ti̍t hoah, hoah nn̄g tiám-cheng kú." 
Acts19:35 Hit-ê siâⁿ ê su-kì-koaⁿ hō͘ kûn-chiòng lóng an-chēng liáu-āu, kóng, “ Í-hut-só͘ -lâng, siáⁿ-lâng m̄ chai Í-hut-só͘ -siâⁿ sī úi-tāi ê A-tí-bí -biō kap tùi thiⁿ lak,lo̍h-lâi hit-tè sèng-chio̍h ê siú-hō͘-chiá?" 
Acts19:36 Kì-jiân bô lâng ōe-tàng hó͘-jīn chit-ê tāi-chì, lín eng-kai an-chēng, m̄-thang chhiong-tōng." 
Acts19:37 Lín thoa chiah-ê lâng lâi chia, m̄-kú in pèng bô chhiúⁿ sī-biō, mā bô siat-to̍k lán ê lú-sîn." 
Acts19:38 Tí-bí-te̍k kap i ê sai-hū nā beh khòng-kò, ū khui-têng ê ji̍t-chí kap chú-chhî sò͘-siōng ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ, in thang thê-chhut kò-sò͘." 
Acts19:39 Lín nā ū kî-tha ê iau-kiû, thang tī tēng-kî ê hōe-gī kái-koat." 
Acts19:40 Kin-á-ji̍t só͘ hoat-seng ê tāi-chì, lán kiaⁿ-liáu ōe hō͘ lâng tui-kiù chek-jīm, koh tùi chit-khoán ê hūn-loān, lán mā the̍h bōe chhut lí-iû thang piān-kái.”" 
Acts19:41 Kóng chiah-ê ōe liáu-āu, I chiū soan-pò͘ sòaⁿ-hōe." 
Acts20:1 Jiáu-loān pêng-chēng liáu-āu, Pó-lô tiàu-chi̍p bûn-tô͘, kā in bián-lē, kap in saⁿ-sî, chiū lī-khui hia khì Má-kî-tùn." 
Acts20:2 I keng-kè hiah-ê tōe-khu, kóng chin chōe ōe bián-lē sìn-tô͘, jiân-āu khì Hi-la̍h," 
Acts20:3 tī hia tòa saⁿ kò-ge̍h. I chún-pī beh chē-chûn khì Sū-lī-a ê sî, Iû-thài -lâng kè-bô͘ beh hāi i, chiū koat-tēng keng-kè Má-kî-tùn tńg,khì." 
Acts20:4 Kap i chòe-hé khì,ê, ū Pì-lí-a -lâng Pit-lô-su ê kiáⁿ Só͘-pa-te̍k, koh ū Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka -lâng A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘ kap Se-kong-to͘, Te̍k-pì -lâng Kai-iû, koh ū Thê-mô͘-thài kap A-sè-a -lâng Chhui-ki-kó͘ kap Te̍k-lô-hui-mô͘." 
Acts20:5 Chiah-ê lâng seng chhut-hoat, tī Te̍k-lô-a teh thèng-hāu goán." 
Acts20:6 Tû-kàⁿ-choeh kè-liáu, goán tùi Hui-li̍p-pí khui-chûn, gō͘ ji̍t āu kàu Te̍k-lô-a kap in hōe-ha̍p, tī hia tòa chhit ji̍t." 
Acts20:7 Pài-la̍k àm, goán tāi-ke chū-hōe peh-piáⁿ ê sî, Pó-lô kap tāi-ke tâm-lūn, in-ūi keh-ji̍t chiū beh lī-khui, só͘-í kóng kàu pòaⁿ-mî." 
Acts20:8 Goán teh chū-hōe hit-keng lâu-téng ê pâng-keng ū tiám chin chōe teng-hé. 
Acts20:9 Ū chi̍t ê siàu-liân-lâng, kiò-chòe Iû-chhui-kó͘, chē tī thang-á-mn̂g, Pó-lô kè-sio̍k kóng chin kú, i soah khùn tāng-bîn, tùi saⁿ-lâu poa̍h,lo̍h-khì, tāi-ke kā i hû,khí-lâi ê sî í-keng sí." 
Acts20:10 Pó-lô lo̍h-khì, phak tī i ê seng-khu, kā i lám,teh, kóng, “M̄-bián tio̍h-kip, i iáu ū khùi.”" 
Acts20:11 Jiân-āu i koh peh-khì lâu-téng, peh-piáⁿ, chia̍h, kè-sio̍k kap in tâm-lūn chin kú, kàu thiⁿ-kng chiah lī-khui." 
Acts20:12 In kā hit-ê oa̍h,khí-lâi ê siàu-liân-lâng chhōa,tńg-khì, tāi-ke siū chin tōa ê an-ùi." 
Acts20:13 Goán seng chiūⁿ-chûn, khui-khì A-sok, thang tī hia chiap Pó-lô chiūⁿ-chûn; in-ūi i beh kiâⁿ lio̍k-lō͘ khì hia, só͘-í ū án-ni an-pâi." 
Acts20:14 I tī A-sok kap goán hōe-ha̍p, goán chiū chiap i chiūⁿ-chûn khì Bí-chhui-lī-nî." 
Acts20:15 Goán tùi hia khui-chûn, keh-ji̍t kàu Ki-o ê tùi-bīn-hōaⁿ, chi̍t ji̍t āu tī Sat-mô͘ khò-hōaⁿ, koh keh-ji̍t kàu Bí-lī-to͘." 
Acts20:16 Pó-lô í-keng koat-tēng bô ài tī Í-hut-só͘ thêng-liû, chiah bián tī A-sè-a chhiân sî-kan. I beh kóaⁿ-kín khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, khòaⁿ ōe-tàng tī Gō͘-sûn-choeh í-chêng kàu-ūi bōe." 
Acts20:17 Pó-lô tùi Bí-lī-to͘ chhe lâng khì Í-hut-só͘, tiàu-chi̍p kàu-hōe ê tiúⁿ-ló lâi." 
Acts20:18 In kàu-ūi ê sî, Pó-lô tùi in kóng, “Tùi góa lâi kàu A-sè-a hit-ji̍t khí it-ti̍t kàu hiān-chāi, góa kap lín án-chóaⁿ chòe-hé seng-oa̍h, lín lóng chai." 
Acts20:19 Sui-jiân góa ū tùi Iû-thài -lâng ê kè-bô͘ siū-tio̍h chhì-liān, iáu-kú hui-siông khiam-pi koh lâu ba̍k-sái teh ho̍k-sāi Chú." 
Acts20:20 Bô-lūn tī kong-kiōng ê tiûⁿ-ha̍p á-sī kò-pia̍t ê ka-têng, nā tùi lín ū lī-ek,ê, góa m̄-bat bô tùi lín thoân, bô kā lín kà;" 
Acts20:21 tùi Iû-thài -lâng kap Hi-la̍h -lâng, góa lóng giâm-giâm khoàn-kò in tio̍h hóe-kái kui-ǹg Siōng-tè, koh sìn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘." 
Acts20:22 Hiān-chāi, góa sūn-ho̍k Sèng Sîn beh khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, tī hia ōe tú-tio̍h sím-mi̍h tāi-chì, góa m̄ chai," 
Acts20:23 put-kò góa chai, Sèng Sîn kā góa kéng-kò, kóng tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī ū kaⁿ-ga̍k kap hoān-lān teh thèng-hāu góa." 
Acts20:24 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh kiâⁿ-oân góa ê lō͘-thêng, oân-sêng Chú Iâ-so͘ kau-tài góa ê jīm-bū, thang kiàn-chèng Siōng-tè un-tián ê hok-im, góa oân-choân bô sioh ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā." 
Acts20:25 “Góa it-ti̍t tī lín tiong-kan chhut-ji̍p teh soan-iông Siōng-tè-kok, hiān-chāi góa chai, í-āu lín bōe-tàng koh kìⁿ-tio̍h góa." 
Acts20:26 Só͘-í, kin-á-ji̍t góa kā lín kóng chheng-chhó, lín tiong-kan nā ū lâng tîm-lûn, m̄-sī góa ê chek-jīm," 
Acts20:27 in-ūi góa í-keng chiong Siōng-tè ê chí-ì lóng-chóng thoân hō͘ lín lah. 
Acts20:28 Lín ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn, mā tio̍h chiàu-kò͘ Sèng Sîn kau-thok hō͘ lín lóng-chóng ê iûⁿ-kûn, choh kam-tok lâi bo̍k-ióng Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, chiū-sī I ēng ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ ê sí lâi sio̍k-hôe,ê." 
Acts20:29 Góa chai góa lī-khui liáu-āu ū hiong-ok ê chhâi-lông ōe ji̍p-lâi lín tiong-kan siong-hāi iûⁿ-kûn. 
Acts20:30 Sīm-chì tī lín tiong-kan ū lâng ōe chhut-lâi khiok-kái chin-lí, ín-iú bûn-tô͘ khì tè in." 
Acts20:31 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h kéng-séng, ōe-kì-tit góa saⁿ nî kú mî-ji̍t lâu ba̍k-sái khoàn-kài lín ta̍k-ê lâng." 
Acts20:32 “Hiān-chāi góa chiong lín kau-thok hō͘ Siōng-tè, thang tùi I un-tián ê sìn-sit tit-tio̍h chō-chiū, hō͘ lín kap sèng-hòa kui Chú ê lâng lóng thang kè-sêng I só͘ sù ê hok-hūn." 
Acts20:33 Góa m̄-bat tham lâng ê kim, gûn, á-sī i-ho̍k." 
Acts20:34 Lín ka-kī chai, góa ēng chit nn̄g ki chhiú chòe kang lâi kiong-kip ka-kī kap tâng-phōaⁿ ê su-iàu." 
Acts20:35 Ta̍k-hāng sū góa lóng ū chòe hō͘ lín khòaⁿ, ài lín it-tēng tio̍h phah-piàⁿ chòe kang lâi pang-chān loán-jio̍k ê lâng. Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Chú Iâ-so͘ ka-kī só͘ kóng ê ōe: ‘Hō͘-lâng,ê pí niá-siū,ê khah ū hok-khì.’”" 
Acts20:36 Chiah-ê ōe kóng soah, Pó-lô kap in tāi-ke lóng kūi lo̍h-khì kî-tó." 
Acts20:37 Tāi-ke tōa-siaⁿ háu, kā i lám, kā i chim;" 
Acts20:38 in-ūi Pó-lô kóng “Í-āu bōe-tàng koh saⁿ-kìⁿ” chit-kù ōe hō͘ in hui-siông siong-sim. Jiân-āu in sàng i chiūⁿ-chûn. 
Acts21:1 Lī-pia̍t chèng-lâng liáu-āu, goán khui-chûn it-ti̍t kàu Ko-sū, keh-ji̍t kàu Lô-tí, tùi hia khì Phà-tāi-lat," 
Acts21:2 tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t chiah beh kè-khì Hui-nî-ki ê chûn, goán chiū chiūⁿ-chûn chhut-hoat." 
Acts21:3 Goán lâi kàu khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su ê sî, tùi lâm-pêng se̍h,kè, khì Sū-lī-a, tī Thài-ní lo̍h-chûn, in-ūi chûn beh tī hia lo̍h-hè." 
Acts21:4 Goán chhē-tio̍h chi̍t-kóa bûn-tô͘, tī hia kap in tòa chhit ji̍t. In tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn ê chí-sī, khǹg Pó-lô m̄-thang chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts21:5 Goán kap in lī-pia̍t ê sî-kan kàu chiū lī-khui, kè-sio̍k goán ê lō͘-thêng. In lóng chhōa in ê bó͘-kiáⁿ sàng goán kàu siâⁿ-gōa, tī hái-piⁿ kūi lo̍h-khì kî-tó," 
Acts21:6 hō͘-siōng saⁿ-sî liáu-āu goán chiūⁿ-chûn, in tò-khì in tau." 
Acts21:7 Goán kè-sio̍k hâng-thêng tùi Thài-ní khì kàu To-lī-mái, tī hia kā sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an, kap in tòa chi̍t ji̍t." 
Acts21:8 Keh-ji̍t, goán chhut-hoat khì Khái-sat-lī-a, tī hia tòa tī thoân hok-im ê Hui-le̍k ê chhù, i sī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hit chhit ê chip-sū ê chi̍t ê." 
Acts21:9 I ū sì ê iáu-bē kiat-hun ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ, lóng chòe sian-ti ōe kóng ū-giân." 
Acts21:10 Goán tòa tī hia kúi-nā ji̍t ê tiong-kan, ū chi̍t ê sian-ti kiò-chòe A-ka-pò͘ tùi Iû-thài lo̍h,lâi." 
Acts21:11 I lâi chhē goán, the̍h Pó-lô ê io-tòa pa̍k ka-kī ê kha kap chhiú, kóng, “Sèng Sîn án-ni kóng, ‘Chit-tiâu io-tòa ê chú-lâng ōe tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng pa̍k,khí-lâi, jiân-āu kau hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng.’”" 
Acts21:12 Goán chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h, chiū kap hit só͘-chāi ê lâng khó͘-khǹg Pó-lô m̄-thang chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts21:13 Pó-lô ìn kóng, “Lín ná khàu kah án-ni, hō͘ góa ê sim kiông-beh chhùi,khì? Góa ūi-tio̍h Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ, m̄-nā tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng hō͘ lâng pa̍k, sīm-chì tī hia sí mā kam-goān.”" 
Acts21:14 I m̄ siū khó͘-khǹg, goán chiū tiām-tiām, chí-ū kóng, “Goān Chú ê chí-ì si̍t-hiān!”" 
Acts21:15 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu, goán chún-pī hó-sè, chiū chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts21:16 Ū chi̍t-kóa tùi Khái-sat-lī-a lâi ê bûn-tô͘ mā kap goán khì, chhōa goán khì Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su -lâng Ná-sun ê chhù tòa; i sī chá-kî ê bûn-tô͘." 
Acts21:17 Goán kàu Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî, sìn-tô͘ jia̍t-sêng chiap-thāi goán." 
Acts21:18 Keh-ji̍t, Pó-lô kap goán khì hóng-būn Ngá-kok; kàu-hōe ê chèng tiúⁿ-ló lóng tī hia." 
Acts21:19 Pó-lô kā in chhéng-an, jiân-āu chiong Siōng-tè thong-kè i tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan só͘ chòe ê kang-chok chi̍t-hāng chi̍t-hāng tùi in pò-kò." 
Acts21:20 In thiaⁿ-liáu lóng kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè, tùi Pó-lô kóng, “Hiaⁿ-tī, lí chai, tī chia ū kúi-nā bān Iû-thài -lâng chiâⁿ-chòe sìn-tô͘, in lóng jia̍t-sim chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat." 
Acts21:21 In ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí kà-sī tòa tī Gōa-pang ê Iû-thài -lâng, kiò in hòng-khì Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, m̄-bián kā in ê gín-á kiâⁿ kat-lé, mā m̄-bián siú Iû-thài -lâng ê hong-sio̍k si̍p-koàn." 
Acts21:22 In it-tēng ōe thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí lâi chia ê siau-sit, án-ni beh án-chóaⁿ?" 
Acts21:23 Taⁿ tio̍h chiàu goán kā lí kóng,ê khì chòe. Chia ū sì ê hē-goān ê ta-po͘-lâng; 
Acts21:24 lí chhōa in chòe-hé khì chham-ka kiat-chēng-lé, thòe in la̍p só͘-hùi, hō͘ in thang thì-thâu. Lí án-ni chòe, chèng-lâng chiū chai, in só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h koan-hē lí ê sū m̄-sī sū-si̍t, koh chai lí ka-kī mā ū teh chun-siú Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat." 
Acts21:25 Put-kò tùi í-keng chòe sìn-tô͘ ê Gōa-pang-lâng, goán í-keng ū siá-phoe kā in kóng, goán ū chhâi-koat kiò in m̄-thang chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h, huih, kap ni̍h-sí ê cheng-siⁿ, mā m̄-thang ū îm-loān.”" 
Acts21:26 Keh-ji̍t, Pó-lô chhōa hit sì ê ta-po͘-lâng kap in chòe-hé khì chham-ka kiat-chēng-lé, jiân-āu ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān pò-kò kiat-chēng-lé sím-mi̍h sî móa, thang ūi-tio̍h in ta̍k-ê lâng hiàn chè-mi̍h." 
Acts21:27 Chhit ji̍t ê kî teh-beh móa ê sî, chi̍t-kóa tùi A-sè-a lâi ê Iû-thài -lâng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô tī Sèng-tiān lāi, chiū siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng lia̍h Pó-lô," 
Acts21:28 hoah kóng, “ Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, lâi tàu-saⁿ-kāng chi̍t-ē! Chit-ê lâng ta̍k só͘-chāi kà lâng hoán-tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, mā hoán-tùi chit-ê Sèng-tiān. Hiān-chāi i koh káⁿ chhōa Hi-la̍h -lâng chìn-ji̍p Sèng-tiān, ù-jiám chit-ê sîn-sèng ê só͘-chāi.”" 
Acts21:29 In-ūi in ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h Í-hut-só͘ -lâng Te̍k-lô-hui-mô͘ kap Pó-lô chòe-hé tī siâⁿ-lāi, siūⁿ-kóng Pó-lô ū chhōa i ji̍p-khì Sèng-tiān." 
Acts21:30 Choân-siâⁿ jiáu-loān,khí-lâi, bîn-chiòng lóng cháu óa,lâi; in lia̍h Pó-lô, kā i thoa chhut-khì Sèng-tiān ê gōa-bīn, tiān ê mn̂g sûi-sî koaiⁿ,khí-lâi." 
Acts21:31 In tú siūⁿ-beh thâi Pó-lô ê sî, ū siau-sit thoân kàu Lô-má kun-iâⁿ ê chí-hui-koaⁿ hia, kóng choân Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng teh khí jiáu-loān." 
Acts21:32 Chí-hui-koaⁿ sûi-sî tòa peng kap kun-koaⁿ cháu kàu bîn-chiòng hia. Bîn-chiòng chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h chí-hui-koaⁿ kap peng chiū thêng-chhiú, bô koh phah Pó-lô." 
Acts21:33 Chí-hui-koaⁿ óa-khì lia̍h Pó-lô, kiò lâng ēng nn̄g tiâu thih-liān kā i liān,teh, koh mn̄g i sī siáⁿ-lâng, ū chòe sím-mi̍h tāi-chì." 
Acts21:34 Kûn-chiòng chi̍t ê hoah chi̍t khoán, in-ūi loān-chhau-chhau, chí-hui-koaⁿ bô hoat-tō͘ thang chai si̍t-chêng, chiū bēng-lēng peng ah Pó-lô ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng." 
Acts21:35 Pó-lô teh-beh peh gîm-á ê sî, in-ūi kûn-chiòng hiông-kài-kài, peng soah tio̍h kā Pó-lô kng,ji̍p-khì." 
Acts21:36 Kûn-chiòng tè tī āu-bīn hoah kóng, “Hō͘ i sí!”" 
Acts21:37 Pó-lô tú-beh hō͘ lâng ah ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng ê sî tùi chí-hui-koaⁿ kóng, “Góa ōe-tàng kā lí kóng chi̍t kù ōe bōe?” Chí-hui-koaⁿ mn̄g kóng, “Lí bat Hi-la̍h-gú o͘h!" 
Acts21:38 Án-ni lí chiū m̄-sī hit-ê bô kú í-chêng chō-hoán, chhōa sì chheng ê sat-chhiú cháu-khì khòng-iá ê Ai-ki̍p -lâng lo͘h.”" 
Acts21:39 Pó-lô ìn kóng, “Góa sī Iû-thài -lâng, chhut-sì tī Ki-lī-ka ê Tāi-sò͘, sī chi̍t ê put-chí ū-miâ ê siâⁿ-chhī ê chhī-bîn. Chhiáⁿ lí chún góa tùi bîn-chiòng kóng-ōe.”" 
Acts21:40 Chí-hui-koaⁿ ún-chún, Pó-lô chiū khiā tī gîm-á téng tùi bîn-chiòng pí chhiú-sè. Chèng-lâng lóng tiām,lo̍h-khì, Pó-lô chiū ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe tùi in kóng-ōe." 
Acts22:1 Pó-lô kóng, “Kok-ūi hū-ló hiaⁿ-tī, chhiáⁿ thiaⁿ góa chit-chūn beh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘ ê ōe.”" 
Acts22:2 In chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h Pó-lô ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe tùi in kóng-ōe, chiū koh-khah an-chēng. Pó-lô kóng:" 
Acts22:3 “Góa sī Iû-thài -lâng, tī Ki-lī-ka ê Tāi-sò͘ chhut-sì, tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tōa-hàn, chòe Ka-má-lia̍t ê ha̍k-seng, kap kin-á-ji̍t tī chia ê chu-ūi kâng-khoán ū siū lán chó͘-sian Lu̍t-hoat giâm-keh ê kàu-io̍k, jia̍t-sim ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè." 
Acts22:4 Góa bat pek-hāi sìn-hōng chit-ê Tō-lō͘ ê lâng, hō͘ in tì-kàu sí, bô-lūn lâm, lú, lóng kā in lia̍h-khì koaiⁿ-kaⁿ." 
Acts22:5 Tōa-chè-si kap gī-hōe lóng-chóng ê tiúⁿ-ló ōe-tàng ūi góa choh-chèng. Góa mā ū tùi in tit-tio̍h hō͘ Tāi-má-sū-kek Iû-thài tông-pau ê phoe. Āu-lâi góa ū khì hia beh pa̍k tòa tī hia ê sìn-tô͘, kā in lia̍h-lâi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siū hêng-hoa̍t." 
Acts22:6 “Góa kiâⁿ beh kàu Tāi-má-sū-kek ê sî, chha-put-to sī tiong-tàu, hut-jiân ū chin kiông ê kng tùi thiⁿ-téng chiò tī góa ê chiu-ûi." 
Acts22:7 Góa poa̍h lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha, thiaⁿ-tio̍h ū siaⁿ tùi góa kóng, ‘ Sò-lô, Sò-lô! Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ teh pek-hāi góa?’" 
Acts22:8 Góa mn̄g kóng, ‘Chú ah, lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?’ I ìn góa kóng, ‘Góa chiū-sī lí teh pek-hāi ê Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘.’" 
Acts22:9 Hiah-ê kap góa chòe-tīn kiâⁿ ê lâng ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê kng, bô thiaⁿ-tio̍h tùi góa kóng-ōe Hit-ūi ê siaⁿ." 
Acts22:10 Góa koh mn̄g kóng, ‘Chú ah, góa tio̍h chòe sím-mi̍h?’ Chú tùi góa kóng, ‘Khí,lâi, ji̍p-khì Tāi-má-sū-kek, tī hia ū lâng ōe chiong góa beh chí-phài lí khì chòe lóng-chóng ê tāi-chì kā lí kóng.’" 
Acts22:11 In-ūi hit-ê kng chin chha̍k-ba̍k, góa soah bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, góa ê tâng-phōaⁿ chiū khan góa ji̍p-khì Tāi-má-sū-kek." 
Acts22:12 “Tī hia ū chi̍t ê lâng kiò-chòe A-ná-nî-a, sī chi̍t ê chun-siú Mô͘-se Lu̍t-hoat khiân-sêng ê lâng, put-chí siū Tāi-má-sū-kek ê Iû-thài -lâng chun-kèng." 
Acts22:13 I lâi chhē góa, khiā tī góa ê sin-piⁿ, kóng, ‘ Sò-lô hiaⁿ-tī, hō͘ lí ōe koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ!’ Hit-chūn góa sûi-sî ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h i." 
Acts22:14 I kóng, ‘Lán chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè í-keng kéng-soán lí, hō͘ lí chai I ê chí-ì, thang khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I hit-ūi Kong-gī ê Po̍k-jîn, koh thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê chhùi só͘ chhut ê siaⁿ," 
Acts22:15 in-ūi lí ōe chiong lí só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê tùi bān-bîn chòe kiàn-chèng. 
Acts22:16 Ná iáu-teh iân-chhiân, khí-lâi niá-siū sóe-lé, kiû-kiò I ê miâ thang hō͘ lí ê chōe tit-tio̍h chheng-khì!’”" 
Acts22:17 “Āu-lâi, góa tò-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; tī Sèng-tiān teh kî-tó ê sî ji̍p-sîn," 
Acts22:18 khòaⁿ-tio̍h Chú kā góa kóng, ‘Kóaⁿ-kín, sûi-sî lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, in-ūi chit só͘-chāi ê lâng bōe chiap-siū lí ūi-tio̍h góa só͘ chòe ê kiàn-chèng.’" 
Acts22:19 Góa ìn kóng, ‘Chú ah, in ka-kī chai góa í-chêng khì ta̍k-ê hōe-tn̂g lia̍h sìn lí ê lâng koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, koh kā in phah." 
Acts22:20 Lí ê kiàn-chèng-jîn Sū-thê-hoán hō͘ lâng sat-hāi ê sî, góa mā khiā tī piⁿ,á, chàn-tông in, koh kā hāi-sí i ê lâng kò͘ gōa-saⁿ.’" 
Acts22:21 Chú tùi góa kóng, ‘Lí khì, in-ūi góa beh chhe lí khì hn̄g-hn̄g ê Gōa-pang-lâng hia.’”" 
Acts22:22 Chèng-lâng it-ti̍t chù-ì thiaⁿ, kàu Pó-lô kóng chit-kù ōe ê sî, in tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Chit-khoán lâng tio̍h tùi tōe-chiūⁿ siau-bia̍t! M̄-thang hō͘ i oa̍h!”" 
Acts22:23 In tōa-siaⁿ jióng, thiah-phòa gōa-saⁿ, ǹg khong-tiong iā thô͘-hún ê sî," 
Acts22:24 Lô-má ê chí-hui-koaⁿ bēng-lēng lâng chiong Pó-lô ah ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng, ēng piⁿ kā i phah, ūi-tio̍h beh khak-si̍t chai Iû-thài -lâng sī-án-chóaⁿ teh kā i jióng." 
Acts22:25 In kā i pa̍k khí-lâi beh piⁿ-phah ê sî, Pó-lô tùi khiā tī piⁿ,á ê kun-koaⁿ kóng, “Tùi chi̍t ê bô siū phòaⁿ-chōe ê Lô-má kong-bîn, lín ēng piⁿ kā i phah kiám ū ha̍p-hoat?”" 
Acts22:26 Hit-ê kun-koaⁿ chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ,tio̍h chiū khì kìⁿ chí-hui-koaⁿ, tùi i kóng, “Taⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ? Chit-ê lâng sī Lô-má kong-bîn!”" 
Acts22:27 Chí-hui-koaⁿ khì kìⁿ Pó-lô, mn̄g i kóng, “Kā góa kóng, lí sī Lô-má ê kong-bîn sī,bô?” Pó-lô ìn kóng, “Sī.”" 
Acts22:28 Chí-hui-koaⁿ kóng, “Góa ēng chin chōe chîⁿ chiah tit-tio̍h chit-ê kong-bîn-koân.” Pó-lô kóng, “Góa chhut-sì chiū-sī Lô-má kong-bîn.”" 
Acts22:29 Hiah-ê beh sím-mn̄g Pó-lô ê lâng sûi-sî lī-khui. Chí-hui-koaⁿ chi̍t-ē chai Pó-lô sī Lô-má kong-bîn, koh in-ūi kā i pa̍k,teh, chiū chin kiaⁿ." 
Acts22:30 Keh-ji̍t, Chí-hui-koaⁿ ài chai Iû-thài -lâng khòng-kò Pó-lô khak-si̍t ê lí-iû, chiū kā i tháu-khui, koh bēng-lēng chè-si-tiúⁿ kap choân gī-hōe chū-chi̍p, chhōa Pó-lô chhut,lâi, hō͘ i khiā tī in bīn-chêng." 
Acts23:1 Pó-lô chù-ba̍k khòaⁿ gī-oân, kóng, “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, góa tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng chiàu oân-choân chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim seng-oa̍h, ti̍t-kàu kin-á-ji̍t.”" 
Acts23:2 Tōa-chè-si A-ná-nî-a bēng-lēng khiā tī Pó-lô sin-piⁿ ê lâng kā i siàn chhùi-phóe. 
Acts23:3 Pó-lô tùi i kóng, “Lí chit-ê chhat kah pe̍h-pe̍h ê chhiûⁿ, Siōng-tè beh phah lí! Lí khui-têng eng-kai chiàu hoat-lu̍t kā góa sím-phòaⁿ, lí kèng-jiân ûi-hoat bēng-lēng lâng phah góa!”" 
Acts23:4 Khiā tī Pó-lô piⁿ,á ê lâng kóng, “Lí káⁿ mē Siōng-tè ê tōa-chè-si?”" 
Acts23:5 Pó-lô ìn kóng, “Hiaⁿ-tī ah, góa m̄ chai i sī tōa-chè-si; Sèng-keng ū kì-chài kóng, ‘M̄-thang bú-jio̍k tī-lí jîn-bîn ê tiúⁿ-koaⁿ.’”" 
Acts23:6 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē chai-iáⁿ in tiong-kan ū-ê sī Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng, ū-ê sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng, chiū tī gī-hōe hoah kóng, “Hiaⁿ-tī, góa sī Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng, sī Hoat-lī-sài-lâng ê kiáⁿ, góa siū sím-mn̄g sī in-ūi ǹg-bāng sí-lâng ê koh-oa̍h!”" 
Acts23:7 I chi̍t-ē án-ni kóng, Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng kap Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng chiū khí cheng-lūn, gī-hōe mā hun-lia̍t." 
Acts23:8 In-ūi Sat-to͘-kai-phài ê lâng kóng bô koh-oa̍h, bô thiⁿ-sài, mā bô kúi-sîn, m̄-kú Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê lâng chit saⁿ hāng lóng ū sìn." 
Acts23:9 Soan-jióng ê siaⁿ ná lâi ná tōa, kúi-nā ê Hoat-lī-sài-phài ê keng-ha̍k-kàu-su khiā,khí-lâi, ke̍k-le̍k khòng-gī kóng, “Goán chhē bōe chhut chit-ê lâng ū sím-mi̍h chhò-gō͘. Káⁿ chin-chiàⁿ ū kúi-sîn á-sī thiⁿ-sài tùi i kóng-ōe ô͘?”" 
Acts23:10 Cheng-lūn ná lâi ná ke̍k-lia̍t, chí-hui-koaⁿ kiaⁿ-liáu Pó-lô hō͘ in thiah-chhùi, chiū bēng-lēng peng lo̍h-khì tùi chèng-lâng tiong-kan kā Pó-lô chhiúⁿ,chhut-lâi, chhōa ji̍p-khì iâⁿ-pâng." 
Acts23:11 Hit-mî, Chú khiā tī Pó-lô ê sin-piⁿ, kóng, “Tio̍h ióng-kám! Lí í-keng ū tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ūi-tio̍h góa chòe kiàn-chèng, mā it-tēng tio̍h tī Lô-má ūi-tio̍h góa chòe kiàn-chèng.”" 
Acts23:12 Keh-chá-khí, Iû-thài -lâng tàu-tīn kè-bô͘, chiù-chōa nā bô thâi-sí Pó-lô m̄-chia̍h-m̄-lim." 
Acts23:13 Ū sì-cha̍p gōa ê lâng chham-ka chit-ê im-bô͘. 
Acts23:14 In khì kìⁿ chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló, kóng, “Goán í-keng chiù tāng-chōa, nā bô thâi-sí Pó-lô lóng m̄ chia̍h!" 
Acts23:15 Hiān-chāi lín kap gī-hōe tio̍h iau-kiû chí-hui-koaⁿ chhōa Pó-lô lâi hō͘ lín, ké-chòe beh khah siông-sè chhâ-mn̄g i ê àn-kiāⁿ; goán ōe chún-pī hó-sè, tī i kàu chia í-chêng kā i thâi-sí.”" 
Acts23:16 Pó-lô ê gōe-seng thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê bâi-ho̍k ê im-bô͘, chiū ji̍p-khì peng-iâⁿ kā Pó-lô kóng." 
Acts23:17 Pó-lô chiū chhiáⁿ chi̍t ê kun-koaⁿ lâi, kā i kóng, “Chhiáⁿ chhōa chit-ê siàu-liân-lâng khì kìⁿ chí-hui-koaⁿ, i ū tāi-chì beh kā i pò-kò.”" 
Acts23:18 Kun-koaⁿ chiū chhōa siàu-liân-lâng khì kìⁿ chí-hui-koaⁿ, kóng, “Hit-ê hoān-lâng Pó-lô kiò góa lâi, iau-kiû góa chhōa chit-ê siàu-liân-lâng lâi kìⁿ lí, in-ūi i ū tāi-chì beh kā lí kóng.”" 
Acts23:19 Chí-hui-koaⁿ khan i ê chhiú khì piⁿ,á mn̄g i, “Lí ū sím-mi̍h tāi-chì beh kā góa pò-kò?”" 
Acts23:20 I kóng, “ Iû-thài -lâng í-keng kóng hó-sè, ké-chòe beh koh-khah siông-sè tiâu-cha Pó-lô ê àn-kiāⁿ, beh chhiáⁿ lí bîn-á-chài kā i sàng-khì gī-hōe." 
Acts23:21 Chhiáⁿ lí m̄-thang thiaⁿ in ê ōe, in-ūi ū sì-cha̍p gōa ê lâng bâi-ho̍k teh tán i. In chiù-chōa, nā bô thâi-sí Pó-lô m̄-chia̍h-m̄-lim. Hiān-chāi in lóng chún-pī hó-sè, teh thèng-hāu lí ún-chún.”" 
Acts23:22 Chí-hui-koaⁿ chiū hoan-hù siàu-liân-lâng kóng “M̄-thang tùi lâng kóng lí ū pò góa chai chit-hāng tāi-chì”, jiân-āu kiò i tńg,khì." 
Acts23:23 Chí-hui-koaⁿ kiò nn̄g ê kun-koaⁿ lâi, kā in kóng, “Khì chún-pī pō͘-peng nn̄g-pah ê, bé-peng chhit-cha̍p ê, kap gia̍h-chhiuⁿ ê peng nn̄g-pah ê, thang tī kim-àm káu tiám chhut-hoat khì Khái-sat-lī-a." 
Acts23:24 Koh khì chún-pī bé hō͘ Pó-lô khiâ, hō͘-sàng i an-choân kàu Hui-le̍k-su chóng-tok hia.”" 
Acts23:25 Chí-hui-koaⁿ chiū siá chi̍t tiuⁿ phoe án-ni kóng: 
Acts23:26 “ Khek-lô-tē Lū-se-a kā chóng-tok Hui-le̍k-su kok-hā chhéng-an. 
Acts23:27 Chit-ê lâng hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng lia̍h,khì, teh-beh hō͘ in thâi-sí ê sî, góa chi̍t-ē chai i sī Lô-má kong-bîn, chiū tòa peng khì kā i kiù." 
Acts23:28 Góa siūⁿ-beh bêng-pe̍k in khòng-kò i ê lí-iû chiū sàng i khì in ê gī-hōe. 
Acts23:29 Góa hoat-kiàn i hō͘ lâng kò sī koan-hē in Lu̍t-hoat ê cheng-lūn, pèng bô hoān-tio̍h sím-mi̍h kai-sí á-sī tio̍h koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê chōe." 
Acts23:30 Āu-lâi ū lâng kā góa pò-kò Iû-thài -lâng kè-bô͘ beh hāi i, só͘-í góa sûi-sî sàng i khì lí hia, siâng-sî bēng-lēng kò i ê lâng mā tio̍h tī lí ê bīn-chêng kā i khòng-kò.”" 
Acts23:31 Pō͘-peng chip-hêng bēng-lēng, thàu-mî chiong Pó-lô tòa-khì An-thê-phà-tí." 
Acts23:32 Keh-ji̍t pō͘-peng tńg-khì iâⁿ,ni̍h, hō͘ bé-peng kè-sio̍k hō͘-sàng." 
Acts23:33 In kàu Khái-sat-lī-a, chiong hit-tiuⁿ phoe the̍h hō͘ chóng-tok, mā chiong Pó-lô kau hō͘ i." 
Acts23:34 Chóng-tok tha̍k hit-tiuⁿ phoe liáu, mn̄g Pó-lô sī tó chi̍t séng ê lâng, chai-iáⁿ sī Ki-lī-ka -séng ê lâng," 
Acts23:35 chiū kóng, “Kò lí ê lâng kàu-ūi ê sî, góa chiah chhú-lí lí ê àn-kiāⁿ.” Āu-lâi chóng-tok bēng-lēng chiong Pó-lô khu-liû tī Hi-lu̍t ê kong-sú." 
Acts24:1 Gō͘ ji̍t āu, tōa-chè-si A-ná-nî-a kap kúi-nā ê tiúⁿ-ló, í-ki̍p chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Thiap-thó͘-lô ê lu̍t-su lâi kàu Khái-sat-lī-a. In tī Hui-le̍k-su chóng-tok bīn-chêng kò Pó-lô." 
Acts24:2 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē siū tiàu chhut-têng, Thiap-thó͘-lô chiū kā i khòng-kò, kóng: “ Hui-le̍k-su kok-hā, in-ūi lí hiân-bêng ê tī-lí hō͘ goán hióng-siū thài-pêng, só͘ si-hêng ê chōe-chōe kái-kek mā hō͘ kok-ka tit-tio̍h chìn-pō͘. Lí ê tek-chèng hō͘ goán ta̍k-sî ta̍k-ūi kám-siā put-chīn." 
Acts24:3  
Acts24:4 Góa m̄-káⁿ tam-gō͘ lí siuⁿ kú, kiû lí khoan-iông lâi thiaⁿ goán kán-iàu ê sin-sò͘." 
Acts24:5 Goán khòaⁿ chit-ê lâng sī chi̍t ê gûi-hiám jîn-bu̍t, tī choân sè-kài ê Iû-thài -lâng tiong-kan chok-loān, sī Ná-sat-le̍k-tóng ê siú-léng." 
Acts24:6 I siūⁿ-beh ù-jiám Sèng-tiān, goán chiū kā i lia̍h,khí-lâi." 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Lí chhin-sin sím-mn̄g chit-ê lâng chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k goán khòng-kò i it-chhè ê tāi-chì.” 
Acts24:9 Chāi-tiûⁿ ê Iû-thài -lâng mā lóng chi-chhî chit-ê khòng-kò, kóng sū-chêng khak-si̍t sī án-ni." 
Acts24:10 Chóng-tok tùi Pó-lô sī-ì, kiò i hoat-giân, Pó-lô chiū kóng: “Góa chai lí tī pún-kok phòaⁿ-àn chin chōe nî, góa goān-ì tī lí bīn-chêng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘." 
Acts24:11 Lí tiâu-cha chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k, tùi góa chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kèng-pài kàu kin-á-ji̍t chí-ū cha̍p-jī ji̍t." 
Acts24:12 Iû-thài -lâng pèng bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa tī Sèng-tiān kap lâng piān-lūn, mā bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa tī hōe-tn̂g á-sī chhī-lāi siàn-tōng kûn-chiòng." 
Acts24:13 In mā bōe-tàng tùi lí thê-chhut hiān-chāi teh khòng-kò góa ê chèng-kù. 
Acts24:14 Put-kò góa tio̍h tùi lí sêng-jīn chi̍t hāng sū, chiū-sī góa chiàu in khòaⁿ-chòe sī īⁿ-toan ê Tō-lō͘ kèng-pài goán chó͘-sian ê Siōng-tè, siong-sìn Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê chheh só͘ kì-chài ê it-chhè." 
Acts24:15 Góa tùi Siōng-tè ū khǹg kap in kâng-khoán ê ǹg-bāng, chiū-sī bô-lūn hó-lâng á-sī pháiⁿ-lâng lóng ōe tùi sí koh-oa̍h." 
Acts24:16 In-ūi án-ni, góa tùi Siōng-tè kap lâng lóng chīn-la̍t pó-chhî chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim." 
Acts24:17 “Góa lī-khui Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kúi-nā nî āu koh tńg,khì, sī the̍h chi̍t-kóa chîⁿ beh khì kiù-chè tông-pau, koh hiàn chè-mi̍h." 
Acts24:18 In tī Sèng-tiān khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê sî, góa í-keng oân-sêng kiat-chēng-lé teh hiàn-chè, hit-sî bô kûn-chiòng, mā bô jiáu-loān," 
Acts24:19 kan-ta ū kúi-nā ê tùi A-sè-a lâi ê Iû-thài -lâng tī hia. In nā beh khòng-kò góa, eng-kai ka-kī lâi lí ê bīn-chêng kò góa chiah tio̍h." 
Acts24:20 Nā bô, góa tī gī-hōe sin-sò͘ ê sî, in tio̍h chí-chhut góa ū chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h." 
Acts24:21 Chí-ū chi̍t hāng sū in ōe-tàng kā góa khòng-kò, chiū-sī góa bat khiā tī in tiong-kan tōa-siaⁿ kóng, ‘Góa kin-á-ji̍t siū lín sím-phòaⁿ, sī ūi-tio̍h sí-lâng ê koh-oa̍h.’”" 
Acts24:22 Hui-le̍k-su tùi chit-ê Tō-lō͘ siong-tong chheng-chhó, chiū soan-pò͘ thè-têng, tùi in kóng, “Thèng-hāu chí-hui-koaⁿ Lū-se-a lâi, góa chiah phòaⁿ-koat lín ê àn-kiāⁿ.”" 
Acts24:23 Jiân-āu Hui-le̍k-su bēng-lēng hit-ê kun-koaⁿ kò͘-siú Pó-lô, hō͘ i ū tām-po̍h chū-iû, koh chún i ê pêng-iú tòa i só͘ khiàm-ēng ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ lâi hō͘ i." 
Acts24:24 Kúi-nā ji̍t āu, Hui-le̍k-su kap i ê Iû-thài hu-jîn Thó͘-se-la lâi. I chhe lâng kiò Pó-lô chhut,lâi, beh thiaⁿ i káng-lūn koan-hē sìn Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sū." 
Acts24:25 Pó-lô kóng-kàu kong-gī, chiat-chè, kap chiong-lâi ê Sím-phòaⁿ, Hui-le̍k-su kám-kak kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, chiū tùi Pó-lô kóng, “Chit-pái kàu chia chiū hó, ū ki-hōe góa chiah koh tiàu lí lâi.”" 
Acts24:26 Siâng-sî i mā ū teh kî-thāi Pó-lô ōe sàng-chîⁿ hō͘ i, só͘-í siông-siông kiò Pó-lô chhut,lâi, kap i tâm-lūn." 
Acts24:27 Keng-kè nn̄g nî, Pho-kiû Hui-su-to͘ chiap Hui-le̍k-su choh chóng-tok. Hui-le̍k-su ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng hoaⁿ-hí, kè-sio̍k kā Pó-lô koaiⁿ tī kaⁿ,ni̍h." 
Acts25:1 Hui-su-to͘ chiū-jīm saⁿ ji̍t āu, tùi Khái-sat-lī-a chiūⁿ-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Acts25:2 Chè-si-tiúⁿ kap Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù tùi i khòng-kò Pó-lô. In chhéng-kiû Hui-su-to͘," 
Acts25:3 pài-thok i chiong Pó-lô sàng-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng. In kè-bô͘ tī lō͘-tiong bâi-ho̍k beh kā i thâi-sí. 
Acts25:4 Hui-su-to͘ ìn kóng, “ Pó-lô koaiⁿ tī Khái-sat-lī-a, góa ka-kī mā liâm-piⁿ beh tńg-khì hia." 
Acts25:5 Só͘-í lín tiong-kan chòe thâu ê lâng thang kap góa chòe-hé khì Khái-sat-lī-a, chit-ê lâng nā ū chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h, in thang tī hia kā i kò.”" 
Acts25:6 Hui-su-to͘ tòa hia chiâⁿ-cha̍p ji̍t, chiū tò-khì Khái-sat-lī-a. Keh-ji̍t, i khui-têng, bēng-lēng lâng tòa Pó-lô lâi." 
Acts25:7 Pó-lô chi̍t-ē chhut-têng, tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng lo̍h,lâi hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng óa-lâi khiā tī i ê chiu-ûi, ēng chin chōe giâm-tiōng ê chōe-miâ kā i khòng-kò, m̄-kú the̍h bōe chhut chèng-kù." 
Acts25:8 Pó-lô ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘, kóng, “Góa tùi Iû-thài -lâng ê Lu̍t-hoat, á-sī Sèng-tiān, á-sī Lô-má hông-tè lóng m̄-bat chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h ê tāi-chì.”" 
Acts25:9 M̄-kú Hui-su-to͘ ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng hoaⁿ-hí, chiū mn̄g Pó-lô, “Lí goān-ì chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, tī hia ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê kò-sò͘ chiap-siū góa ê sím-phòaⁿ,bô?”" 
Acts25:10 Pó-lô kóng, “Góa hiān-chāi khiā tī hông-tè ê hoat-têng, tong-jiân tio̍h tī chia siū sím-phòaⁿ. Lí bêng-bêng chai, góa pèng bô tek-chōe Iû-thài -lâng." 
Acts25:11 Góa nā ū chòe m̄-tio̍h, hoān-tio̍h kai-sí ê chōe, chiū-sī tio̍h sí, góa mā choa̍t-tùi bōe tô-pī. M̄-kú in ê khòng-kò nā bô sū-si̍t, bô lâng ōe-tàng kā góa kau hō͘ in. Góa beh tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘.”" 
Acts25:12 Hui-su-to͘ kap kò͘-būn chham-siông liáu-āu, ìn kóng, “Kì-jiân lí í-keng tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘, chiū khì hông-tè hia.”" 
Acts25:13 Kè kúi-nā ji̍t, A-ki-phà -ông kap Pek-nî-ki lâi Khái-sat-lī-a, tùi Hui-su-to͘ piáu-sī kèng-ì." 
Acts25:14 In tī hia tòa kúi-nā ji̍t liáu-āu, Hui-su-to͘ chiong Pó-lô ê àn-kiāⁿ kóng hō͘ A-ki-phà -ông thiaⁿ. I kóng, “Tī chia ū chi̍t ê Hui-le̍k-su lâu,lo̍h-lâi ê hoān-lâng." 
Acts25:15 Góa khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê sî, Iû-thài -lâng ê chè-si-tiúⁿ kap tiúⁿ-ló ū kā i kò, iau-kiû góa kā i tēng-chōe." 
Acts25:16 Góa kā in kóng, chiàu Lô-má -lâng ê koàn-lē, pī-kò iáu-bē kap goân-kò bīn-tùi-bīn tùi-chí, iáu bô ki-hōe ūi ka-kī piān-hō͘, bōe-tàng kā i tēng-chōe." 
Acts25:17 Só͘-í, in lóng kàu-ūi, góa sûi-sî tī keh-ji̍t khui-têng, bēng-lēng tòa hit-ê lâng lâi." 
Acts25:18 Goân-kò khiā khí-lâi khòng-kò, m̄-kú só͘ kò,ê bô chi̍t hāng sī góa só͘ siūⁿ,ê hiah-ni̍h pháiⁿ." 
Acts25:19 In kap i cheng-lūn,ê sī in ka-kī ê chong-kàu būn-tôe, í-ki̍p chi̍t ê kiò-chòe Iâ-so͘ ê lâng ê tāi-chì. I í-keng sí, m̄-kú Pó-lô chú-tiuⁿ I iáu-teh oa̍h." 
Acts25:20 Chiah-ê būn-tôe góa m̄ chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ tiâu-cha, só͘-í mn̄g Pó-lô khòaⁿ goān-ì chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng tī hia ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì siū sím-phòaⁿ á bô." 
Acts25:21 M̄-kú Pó-lô chhéng-kiû kè-sio̍k kā i khàu-liû, thèng-hāu hông-tè chhâi-koat, só͘-í góa bēng-lēng kā i khàu-liû kàu sàng-kau hō͘ hông-tè.”" 
Acts25:22 A-ki-phà kā Hui-su-to͘ kóng, “Góa ka-kī mā ài thiaⁿ chit-ê lâng kóng-ōe.” Hui-su-to͘ kóng, “Bîn-á-chài lí ōe-tàng thiaⁿ i kóng.”" 
Acts25:23 Keh-ji̍t, A-ki-phà kap Pek-nî-ki hui-siông chhia-iāⁿ ji̍p-tiûⁿ, chhōa chí-hui-koaⁿ kap chhī-lāi ê iàu-jîn chìn-ji̍p tōa-thiaⁿ. Hui-su-to͘ hā-lēng, Pó-lô chiū hō͘ lâng chhōa,ji̍p-lâi." 
Acts25:24 Hui-su-to͘ kóng, “ A-ki-phà -ông kap chāi-chō kok-ūi! Lín khòaⁿ chit-ê lâng! Tī chia kap tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng tùi góa chhéng-kiû, hoah kóng tio̍h hō͘ i sí." 
Acts25:25 M̄-kú góa chhâ bōe chhut i ū hoān-tio̍h sím-mi̍h kai-sí ê chōe. I kì-jiân ka-kī tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘, góa chiū koat-tēng kā i sàng,khì." 
Acts25:26 Koan-hē chit-ê lâng, góa bô khak-si̍t ê chu-liāu thang tùi hông-siōng thêng-chàu. In-ūi án-ni góa chiah kā i chhōa-lâi kok-ūi bīn-chêng, te̍k-pia̍t tī A-ki-phà -ông lí ê bīn-chêng, cha-bêng àn-chêng liáu-āu thang tit-tio̍h chu-liāu thêng-chàu." 
Acts25:27 In-ūi chiàu góa khòaⁿ, ah-sàng siû-hoān, bô chí-bêng i ê chōe-miâ sī bô ha̍p-lí.”" 
Acts26:1 A-ki-phà tùi Pó-lô kóng, “Chún lí ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘.” Pó-lô chiū chhun-chhiú khai-sí piān-hō͘:" 
Acts26:2 “ A-ki-phà -ông, kin-á-ji̍t ōe-tàng tī lí ê bīn-chêng ūi-tio̍h Iû-thài -lâng khòng-kò góa it-chhè ê sū sin-piān, góa kám-kak bān-hēng." 
Acts26:3 In-ūi lí tùi Iû-thài -lâng ê koàn-lē kap cheng-lūn ê būn-tôe te̍k-pia̍t cheng-thong, só͘-í góa khún-kiû lí nāi-sim thiaⁿ." 
Acts26:4 “Góa tùi siàu-liân kàu taⁿ, khí-thâu tī góa pún-kok, āu-lâi tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, choh-lâng án-chóaⁿ, só͘-ū ê Iû-thài -lâng lóng chai." 
Acts26:5 In í-keng bat góa chin kú, nā khéng, ōe-tàng ūi-tio̍h góa choh-chèng. Góa choh chi̍t ê Hoat-lī-sài-lâng, ū chiàu goán ê chong-kàu siōng giâm-keh kàu-phài ê iau-kiû teh seng-oa̍h." 
Acts26:6 Hiān-chāi góa khiā tī chia siū sím-phòaⁿ, sī in-ūi góa ǹg-bāng Siōng-tè tùi goán chó͘-sian ê èng-ún ōe si̍t-hiān;" 
Acts26:7 goán cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k ê tông-pau mî-ji̍t jia̍t-sim kèng-pài mā-sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ chit-ê ǹg-bāng si̍t-hiān. Ông ah, ūi-tio̍h chit-ê ǹg-bāng, góa chiah siū Iû-thài -lâng khòng-kò." 
Acts26:8 Siōng-tè hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì, lín sī-án-chóaⁿ toàn-tēng bōe-tàng siong-sìn?" 
Acts26:9 “Í-chêng góa pún-sin mā siūⁿ-kóng tio̍h ēng ta̍k-khoán ê hong-hoat lâi hoán-tùi Ná-sat-le̍k -lâng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ. 
Acts26:10 Góa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khak-si̍t ū án-ni chòe, m̄-nā ū tùi chè-si-tiúⁿ niá-siū koân-pèng lia̍h chin chōe sìn-tô͘ koaiⁿ-kaⁿ, koh tī in siū chhú-sí ê sî mā piáu-sī chàn-sêng." 
Acts26:11 Góa sî-siông tī kok-tōe ê hōe-tn̂g kā in hêng-hoa̍t, kiông-pek in siat-to̍k chit-ê sìn-gióng, koh ēng pō-le̍k tùi-thāi in, sīm-chì khì kàu gōa-kok ê siâⁿ-chhī kā in pek-hāi.”" 
Acts26:12 “Ū chi̍t piàn, góa tòa chè-si-tiúⁿ ê koân-pèng kap bēng-lēng khì Tāi-má-sū-kek." 
Acts26:13 Ông ah, tī pòaⁿ-lō͘, tiong-tàu ê sî, góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h pí ji̍t-thâu koh-khah kiông ê kng tùi thiⁿ-téng chiò,lo̍h-lâi, kā góa kap tâng-kiâⁿ ê lâng tà,teh." 
Acts26:14 Goán lóng poa̍h lo̍h-khì thô͘-kha. Góa ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t ê siaⁿ, ēng Hi-pek-lâi-ōe tùi góa kóng, ‘ Sò-lô, Sò-lô, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ teh pek-hāi góa? Lí án-ni chòe, chhin-chhiūⁿ ēng kûn-thâu-bú teh cheng chio̍h-sai, ka-kī thó phê thiàⁿ.’" 
Acts26:15 Góa mn̄g kóng, ‘Chú ah, lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?’ Chú kóng, ‘Góa chiū-sī lí teh pek-hāi ê Iâ-so͘." 
Acts26:16 Khí,lâi, khiā,teh; góa tùi lí hián-hiān sī beh phài lí chòe góa ê po̍k-jîn ūi-tio̍h só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ koan-hē góa ê sū, í-ki̍p chiong-lâi beh tùi lí hián-hiān ê sū choh-chèng." 
Acts26:17 Góa beh tùi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan kā lí kiù,chhut-lâi, chhe-khián lí khì in hia," 
Acts26:18 khui in ê ba̍k-chiu, hō͘ in lī-khui o͘-àm chìn-ji̍p kng-bêng, lī-khui Sat-tàn ê koân-sè kui-ǹg Siōng-tè, hō͘ in tùi sìn góa tit-tio̍h sià-chōe, koh sêng-siū choh Siōng-tè soán-bîn ê tōe-ūi.’”" 
Acts26:19 “Só͘-í, A-ki-phà -ông, góa bô ûi-pōe tùi thiⁿ lâi ê īⁿ-siōng." 
Acts26:20 Góa tāi-seng tùi Tāi-má-sū-kek kap Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê lâng, āu-lâi tùi Iû-thài choân-tōe ê lâng, mā tùi Gōa-pang-lâng thoân-tō, khǹg in tio̍h hóe-kái lâi kui-ǹg Siōng-tè, koh tio̍h ēng hêng-ûi chèng-bêng in ū chin-chiàⁿ hóe-kái." 
Acts26:21 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê iân-kò͘, Iû-thài -lâng tī Sèng-tiān lāi lia̍h góa, siūⁿ-beh thâi góa." 
Acts26:22 Kàu kin-á-ji̍t, góa tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê pang-chān, ōe-tàng khiā tī chia tùi chun-kùi kap pi-bî ê lâng chòe kiàn-chèng. Góa só͘ kóng,ê, kap sian-ti í-ki̍p Mô͘-se só͘ kóng,ê kâng-khoán, sī koan-hē chiong-lâi beh hoat-seng ê sū," 
Acts26:23 chiū-sī Ki-tok it-tēng tio̍h siū-khó͘, chiâⁿ-chòe thâu chi̍t ê tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h,ê, thang chiong chín-kiù ê kng thoân hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng.”" 
Acts26:24 Pó-lô án-ni ūi-tio̍h ka-kī teh piān-hō͘ ê sî, Hui-su-to͘ tùi i tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “ Pó-lô, lí khí-kông lah; lí ê phok-ha̍k hō͘ lí khí-kông lah!”" 
Acts26:25 Pó-lô kóng, “ Hui-su-to͘ kok-hā! Góa pèng bô khí-kông; góa só͘ kóng ê ōe chin-si̍t koh ha̍p-lí." 
Acts26:26 In-ūi ông chai chiah-ê tāi-chì, góa chiah káⁿ tōa-táⁿ tùi ông kóng. Góa siong-sìn ông tùi chiah-ê tāi-chì lóng chin chheng-chhó, in-ūi só͘ hoat-seng chiah-ê tāi-chì bô lâng m̄ chai." 
Acts26:27 A-ki-phà -ông, lí ū siong-sìn sian-ti,bô? Góa chai lí ū.”" 
Acts26:28 A-ki-phà tùi Pó-lô kóng, “Lí kóng kúi-kù-á ōe chiū beh sòe-ho̍k góa chòe Ki-tok-tô͘ o͘h!”" 
Acts26:29 Pó-lô ìn kóng, “Bô-lūn kúi-kù-á ōe á-sī chin chōe ōe, góa kî-kiû Siōng-tè, m̄-nā sī lí, liân kin-á-ji̍t tī chia só͘-ū thiaⁿ góa kóng-ōe ê lâng mā lóng ōe kap góa kâng-khoán, m̄-kú bô chhin-chhiūⁿ góa hō͘ lâng ēng thih-liān liān,teh.”" 
Acts26:30 Ông, chóng-tok, Pek-nî-ki, kap tâng chē ê lâng lóng khiā,khí-lâi." 
Acts26:31 In thè-chhut liáu-āu hō͘-siōng tâm-lūn kóng, “Chit-ê lâng pèng bô hoān-tio̍h sím-mi̍h kai-sí á-sī tio̍h koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê chōe.”" 
Acts26:32 A-ki-phà tùi Hui-su-to͘ kóng, “Chit-ê lâng nā bô tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘, chá chiū thang kā i pàng lah.”" 
Acts27:1 Hui-su-to͘ í-keng koat-tēng goán tio̍h chē-chûn khì Ì-tāi-lī, in chiū chiong Pó-lô kap kî-tha ê hoān-lâng kau hō͘ hông-ka kìm-ōe-kun chi̍t ê miâ kiò Iû-liû ê kun-koaⁿ." 
Acts27:2 Goán chē chi̍t chiah tùi A-tāi-bí-tiân lâi ê chûn; chit-chiah chûn tú-á beh iân A-sè-a -séng kúi-nā ê káng-kháu khui-chûn. Ū chi̍t ê tùi Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka lâi ê Má-kî-tùn -lâng A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘ kap goán chòe-hé khì. 
Acts27:3 Keh-ji̍t goán kàu Se-tùn. Iû-liû chin chhin-chhiat tùi-thāi Pó-lô, chún i khì kìⁿ i ê pêng-iú, siū in chiau-thāi." 
Acts27:4 Goán tùi hia koh khui-chûn, in-ūi ge̍k-hong, chiū sūn Sài-phó͘-lō͘-su -tó óa siám-hong hit-pêng kiâⁿ." 
Acts27:5 Goán keng-kè Ki-lī-ka kap Pông-hui-lī-a ê gōa-hái, lâi kàu Lū-ka ê Múi-la." 
Acts27:6 Tī hia, kun-koaⁿ Iû-liû chhē-tio̍h chi̍t chiah tùi A-le̍k-san-tāi lâi ê chûn beh khui-khì Ì-tāi-lī, chiū kiò goán chiūⁿ hit-chiah chûn." 
Acts27:7 Liân-sòa kúi-nā ji̍t, chûn kiâⁿ chin bān, bián-kióng chiah lâi kàu Kek-nî-thó͘ ê gōa-hái. In-ūi siū-tio̍h hong ê chó͘-tòng, goán chiū sūn Khek-lí-te̍k -tó lâm-pêng óa siám-hong hit-pêng hōaⁿ kiâⁿ tùi Sat-mô͘-nî -kak kè,khì." 
Acts27:8 Goán ê chûn sūn hái-kîⁿ kiâⁿ, bián-kióng lâi kàu lī La-se-a bô jōa hn̄g chi̍t ê kiò-chòe An-choân-káng ê só͘-chāi." 
Acts27:9 Goán í-keng chhiân chin chōe ji̍t, koh in-ūi kìm-chia̍h ê choeh-kî mā kè-liáu, kiâⁿ-chûn gûi-hiám, só͘-í Pó-lô khǹg tāi-ke," 
Acts27:10 kóng, “Kok-ūi sian-siⁿ, góa khòaⁿ lán kè-sio̍k kiâⁿ-chûn, m̄-nā hè-mi̍h kap chûn, liân lán ê sìⁿ-miā to ōe tú-tio̍h gûi-hiám koh tōa sún-sit.”" 
Acts27:11 M̄-kú kun-koaⁿ lêng-khó siong-sìn chûn-tiúⁿ kap chûn-chú, m̄ thiaⁿ Pó-lô kóng ê ōe." 
Acts27:12 Koh chit-ê káng-kháu mā bô sek-ha̍p kè tang-thiⁿ, tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng chàn-sêng khui-chûn, ǹg-bāng ōe-tàng kóaⁿ-khì Hui-nî-ki kè tang-thiⁿ. Hui-nî-ki sī Khek-lí-te̍k -tó ê chi̍t ê káng-kháu, chi̍t bīn ǹg sai-lâm, chi̍t bīn ǹg sai-pak." 
Acts27:13 Hit-sî, lâm-hong bî-bî-á chhe,lâi, tāi-ke siūⁿ-kóng ōe sūn-lī kàu bo̍k-te̍k-tōe chiū khí-tiàⁿ, óa Khek-lí-te̍k -tó ê hái-kîⁿ kiâⁿ." 
Acts27:14 Bô kú ū chi̍t chūn kiò-chòe Iú-la-kek-lô ê tang-pak tōa-hong tùi Khek-lí-te̍k -tó sàu,lo̍h-lâi. 
Acts27:15 Chûn hō͘ hong sàu, sái bōe kiâⁿ, chiū chhut-chāi i phiau-liû." 
Acts27:16 Goán lâi kàu chi̍t ê sió-tó kiò-chòe Ko-tāi ê lâm-pêng, siám-hong ê hit-pêng hōaⁿ, bián-kióng chiong kiù-seng-thêng pa̍k hó-sè." 
Acts27:17 Jiân-āu chúi-siú chiong kiù-seng-thêng thoa khí-lâi chûn-téng, ēng tōa-soh kā i khún,teh. In kiaⁿ-liáu chûn tī Sài-ní-tí ê soa-chiu khò-chhián, chiū lo̍h-phâng, chhut-chāi i phiau-liû." 
Acts27:18 Pō-hong kè-sio̍k chhe, keh-ji̍t in khai-sí chiong hè-mi̍h tàn-lo̍h hái." 
Acts27:19 Tē-saⁿ ji̍t, in koh chhin-chhiú chiong chûn-téng ê khì-khū tàn-tiāu." 
Acts27:20 Chin chōe ji̍t, ji̍t-thâu khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h, chhiⁿ mā khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h; hong-éng kè-sio̍k phah kah chin lī-hāi, chòe-āu goán oân-choân hòng-khì tit-kiù ê ǹg-bāng." 
Acts27:21 Chèng-lâng chin kú lóng bô chia̍h, Pó-lô khiā tī in tiong-ng, kóng, “Kok-ūi sian-siⁿ, lín chá nā thiaⁿ góa ê ōe, bô tùi Khek-lí-te̍k khui-chûn, chiū bōe tú-tio̍h chit-khoán ê gûi-hiám kap sún-sit." 
Acts27:22 Hiān-chāi góa khǹg lín tio̍h ióng-kám; lín tiong-kan bô kah chi̍t ê lâng ōe sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā; kan-ta ōe sit-lo̍h chit-chiah chûn nā-tiāⁿ. 
Acts27:23 In-ūi góa só͘ sio̍k só͘ kèng-pài ê Siōng-tè, chā-àm ū chhe I ê thiⁿ-sài lâi tùi góa" 
Acts27:24 kóng, ‘ Pó-lô, bián kiaⁿ! Lí it-tēng tio̍h khiā tī hông-tè bīn-chêng. Siōng-tè í-keng chiong chûn-lāi lóng-chóng ê lâng kau-thok lí lah.’" 
Acts27:25 Só͘-í, tio̍h ióng-kám, in-ūi góa siong-sìn tāi-chì it-tēng ōe chiàu Siōng-tè kā góa kóng án-ni si̍t-hiān." 
Acts27:26 Put-kò lán it-tēng ōe tī chi̍t ê tó-sū khò-chhián.” 
Acts27:27 Kàu tē-cha̍p-sì ji̍t ê àm-sî, goán iáu tī A-tek-lí-a-hái teh phiau-liû. Kàu pòaⁿ-mî, chúi-siú siūⁿ-kóng goán teh-beh óa-kūn lio̍k-tōe," 
Acts27:28 chiū tàn chhek-liōng-soh lo̍h-khì thàm, thàm-chhut ū sì-cha̍p kong-chhioh chhim; khah chìn-chêng, koh thàm chi̍t piàn, thàm-chhut ū saⁿ-cha̍p kong-chhioh chhim." 
Acts27:29 In kiaⁿ-liáu chûn lôe-tio̍h àm-chiau, chiū tùi chûn-bé pha sì ê tiàⁿ, pek-chhiat thèng-hāu thiⁿ kín kng." 
Acts27:30 Chúi-siú siūⁿ-beh pàng-sak chûn tô-cháu, chiong kiù-seng-thêng lūi lo̍h-khì hái,ni̍h, ké-chòe beh tùi chûn-thâu pha-tiàⁿ." 
Acts27:31 Pó-lô tùi kun-koaⁿ kap peng-teng kóng, “Chiah-ê lâng nā bô lâu tī chûn-téng, lín chiū bô kiù.”" 
Acts27:32 Peng-teng chiū chām-tn̄g kiù-seng-thêng ê soh, hō͘ i lâu,khì." 
Acts27:33 Thiⁿ beh kng ê sî, Pó-lô khǹg chèng-lâng tio̍h chia̍h. I kóng, “Lín í-keng thèng-hāu cha̍p-sì ji̍t kú lóng bô chia̍h," 
Acts27:34 só͘-í góa khǹg lín tio̍h chia̍h chi̍t-kóa mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiah ōe-tàng oa̍h,lo̍h-khì. Lín liân chi̍t ki thâu-mn̂g to bōe sit-lo̍h.” 
Acts27:35 Pó-lô kóng liáu-āu, the̍h piáⁿ, tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kám-siā Siōng-tè, peh-khui, chia̍h." 
Acts27:36 Chèng-lâng sim chiū tiāⁿ,lo̍h-lâi, the̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ chia̍h." 
Acts27:37 Kap goán tâng-chûn ê lâng lóng-chóng ū nn̄g-pah chhit-cha̍p-la̍k ê. 
Acts27:38 Tāi-ke chia̍h pá liáu-āu, chiong be̍h-á tàn-lo̍h hái, hō͘ chûn khah khin." 
Acts27:39 Thiⁿ-kng ê sî, chúi-siú m̄ bat hit-ê só͘-chāi, put-kò in khòaⁿ-tio̍h ū chi̍t ê hái-oan ū soa-than, chiū siūⁿ-khòaⁿ ōe-tàng chiong chûn sái chiūⁿ-than á bōe." 
Acts27:40 In kā soh chām-tn̄g, chiong tiàⁿ hiat-lo̍h hái, koh tháu-khui chûn-tōa ê soh, kā chûn-thâu ê phâng tiàu,khí-lâi, hō͘ i chia̍h-hong, hō͘ chûn sái-chiūⁿ than." 
Acts27:41 M̄-kú chûn lôe-tio̍h soa-phiâⁿ soah khò-chhián; chûn-thâu kā tiâu,teh bōe tín-tāng, chûn-bé hō͘ tōa-éng phah-phòa." 
Acts27:42 Peng-teng kiaⁿ-liáu hoān-lâng siû-chúi tô-cháu, siūⁿ-beh kā in lóng thâi-sí." 
Acts27:43 M̄-kú kun-koaⁿ ài-beh kiù Pó-lô, chiū kā in chó͘-chí. I bēng-lēng ōe-hiáu siû ê lâng seng thiàu-lo̍h chúi, siû chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ;" 
Acts27:44 kî-tha ê lâng chiah lī-iōng chûn-pang á-sī chûn ê phòa-phìⁿ chiūⁿ-lio̍k. Chòe-āu, chèng-lâng lóng an-choân chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ." 
Acts28:1 Goán an-choân chiūⁿ-lio̍k liáu-āu chiah chai hit-ê tó-sū kiò-chòe Má-ní-tha. 
Acts28:2 Tong-tōe ê goân-chū-bîn tùi goán hui-siông chhin-chhiat, in-ūi lo̍h-hō͘ koh kôaⁿ, chiū khí-hé kā goán chiap-thāi." 
Acts28:3 Pó-lô khioh chi̍t khún chhâ, hiat-lo̍h hé, hit-chūn ū chi̍t bé to̍k-chôa in-ūi hé sio sô,chhut-lâi, tîⁿ tī i ê chhiú." 
Acts28:4 Tong-tōe ê goân-chū-bîn khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-bé chôa tiàu tī Pó-lô ê chhiú,ni̍h, chiū kóng-lâi-kóng-khì, “Chit-ê lâng it-tēng sī sat-jîn-hoān, sui-jiân tùi hái,ni̍h khioh-tio̍h miā, thian-lí bô iông-ún i oa̍h.”" 
Acts28:5 Pó-lô chiong hit-bé chôa hiù-lo̍h hé,ni̍h, lóng bô siū-siong." 
Acts28:6 Hiah-ê lâng lóng kim-kim teh khòaⁿ i ê chhiú ōe chéng,khí-lâi, á-sī i ōe hut-jiân lek,lo̍h-khì, sí,khì á bōe. In thèng-hāu chin kú, khòaⁿ i lóng bô tāi-chì, chiū tian-tò siūⁿ-kóng i sī sîn-bêng." 
Acts28:7 Hái-sū ê thâu-ba̍k Pō͘-pek-liû ū chi̍t tè tōe lī hit só͘-chāi bô jōa hn̄g. I hoan-gêng goán tī hia tòa saⁿ ji̍t, chin chhin-chhiat chiap-thāi goán." 
Acts28:8 Tng-sî, Pō͘-pek-liû ê lāu-pē hoān-tio̍h jia̍t-pīⁿ kap chhiah-lī, tó tī bîn-chhn̂g. Pó-lô ji̍p,khì, kā i hōaⁿ-chhiú kî-tó, kā i i-hó." 
Acts28:9 In-ūi chit-ê tāi-chì, tong-tōe kî-tha ê pīⁿ-lâng mā lâi, mā lóng tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Acts28:10 In sàng goán chin chōe lé-mi̍h; goán beh khui-chûn ê sî, chiong goán su-iàu ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ sàng kàu chûn-téng hō͘ goán." 
Acts28:11 Saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t āu, goán chē tùi A-le̍k-san-tāi lâi, miâ kiò-chòe “Siang-siⁿ-á-sîn” ê chûn chhut-hoat. Chit-chiah chûn tú tī chit-ê tó-sū kè tang-thiⁿ." 
Acts28:12 Goán tī Sū-la-kó͘ chiūⁿ-hōaⁿ, tī hia thêng-liû saⁿ ji̍t," 
Acts28:13 āu-lâi tùi hia khui-chûn kàu Lī-ki-ong, keh-ji̍t ū thàu lâm-hong, tē-jī ji̍t chiū kàu Pō͘-tiu-lī." 
Acts28:14 Goán tī hia tú-tio̍h chi̍t-kóa hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, in chhiáⁿ goán kap in tòa chi̍t lé-pài. Āu-lâi goán lâi kàu Lô-má." 
Acts28:15 Lô-má ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē thiaⁿ-tio̍h siau-sit, chiū lâi A-pí-o͘ -chhī kap Sam-koán gêng-chiap. Pó-lô kìⁿ-tio̍h in chiū kám-siā Siōng-tè, koh-khah ū ióng-khì." 
Acts28:16 Goán kàu Lô-má liáu-āu, Pó-lô tit-tio̍h ún-chún kap kò͘-siú i ê peng lēng-gōa tòa." 
Acts28:17 Saⁿ ji̍t āu, Pó-lô chhiáⁿ tong-tōe Iû-thài -lâng ê léng-siù lâi. In chū-chi̍p ê sî, i tùi in kóng, “Kok-ūi hiaⁿ-tī, góa sui-jiân bô chòe ûi-pōe tông-pau ê tāi-chì á-sī chó͘-sian ê kui-lē, m̄-kú tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng siū lia̍h, sàng-kau hō͘ Lô-má tong-kio̍k." 
Acts28:18 In sím-mn̄g góa, khòaⁿ góa bô hoān-tio̍h kai-sí ê chōe, ū siūⁿ-beh pàng góa;" 
Acts28:19 put-kò Iû-thài -lâng hoán-tùi, góa chiah ko͘-put-chiong tùi hông-tè siōng-sò͘; kî-si̍t góa bô ì-sù beh khòng-kò ka-kī ê tông-pau." 
Acts28:20 In-ūi án-ni, góa chiah iau-kiû kap lín kìⁿ-bīn, kap lín tâm-lūn. Góa sī ūi-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘ ǹg-bāng Hit-ūi chiah siū thih-liān liān,teh.”" 
Acts28:21 In tùi i kóng, “Koan-hē lí ê tāi-chì, goán pèng bô tùi Iû-thài chiap-tio̍h phoe-sìn, mā bô hiaⁿ-tī lâi tùi goán pò-kò, á-sī kóng lí ê pháiⁿ-ōe." 
Acts28:22 Put-kò goán ài thiaⁿ lí ê kiàn-kái, in-ūi goán chai lín chit-phài ê lâng tī ta̍k só͘-chāi hō͘ lâng hoán-tùi.”" 
Acts28:23 In kap Pó-lô iok-tēng chi̍t ji̍t, kàu sî ū chin chōe lâng lâi Pó-lô tòa ê só͘-chāi. Tùi chá kàu àm, Pó-lô ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè-kok chòe kiàn-chèng, ín-iōng Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti ê chheh khǹg in sìn Iâ-so͘." 
Acts28:24 I só͘ kóng ê ōe ū lâng sìn, ū lâng m̄ sìn." 
Acts28:25 In tiong-kan ê ì-kiàn bô it-tì; in lī-khui í-chêng, Pó-lô kóng chit-kù ōe: “Sèng Sîn thok sian-ti Í-sài-a tùi lín ê chó͘-sian kóng-liáu chin tio̍h!" 
Acts28:26 I kóng: Lí khì kā chit-ê chú-bîn kóng: Lín thiaⁿ koh thiaⁿ mā bōe liáu-kái; lín khòaⁿ koh khòaⁿ mā bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. 
Acts28:27 In-ūi chit-ê chú-bîn ê sim í-keng tūn, hī-khang tāng, ba̍k-chiu khoeh. Nā m̄-sī án-ni, in ê ba̍k-chiu ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hī-khang ōe thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, sim ōe bêng-pe̍k, ōe hôe-sim-tńg-ì, góa chiū kā in i-hó." 
Acts28:28 “Só͘-í, lín tio̍h chai, Siōng-tè chit-ê chín-kiù ê sìn-sit í-keng thoân hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng. In ōe thiaⁿ-thàn!”" 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Pó-lô tòa tī ka-kī cho͘ ê chhù chiok-chiok nn̄g nî kú. Lâi hóng-būn ê lâng, i lóng kā in chiap-thāi." 
Acts28:31 I hó-táⁿ soan-iông Siōng-tè-kok ê sìn-sit, koh kà-sī koan-hē Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sū, lóng bô siū chó͘-tòng." 
Romans1:1 Góa sī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê po̍k-jîn Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè soán-tiàu choh sù-tô͘, te̍k-phài lâi thoân I ê hok-im." 
Romans1:2 Chit-ê hok-im sī Siōng-tè chá-chêng thong-kè I ê chèng sian-ti kì tī Sèng-keng ê èng-ún," 
Romans1:3 teh kóng-khí I ê Kiáⁿ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok: Tùi jîn-sèng lâi kóng, I sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi; tùi sèng-kiat ê sîn-sèng lâi kóng, Siōng-tè hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, ēng tōa lêng-le̍k hián-bêng I sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ." 
Romans1:4  
Romans1:5 Goán tùi I tit-tio̍h un-sù choh sù-tô͘, ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê miâ beh hō͘ bān-bîn sìn lâi sūn-thàn," 
Romans1:6 mā pau-hâm lín chiah-ê siū soán-tiàu kui-sio̍k Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê lâng. 
Romans1:7 Góa siá chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lín só͘-ū tòa tī Lô-má, Siōng-tè só͘ thiàⁿ, só͘ soán-tiàu choh I sìn-tô͘ ê lâng. Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an!" 
Romans1:8 Tāi-seng, góa thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lín chèng-lâng kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè, in-ūi lín ê sìn-tek í-keng thoân-piàn choân sè-kài." 
Romans1:9 Góa soan-iông I ê Kiáⁿ ê hok-im, ēng sim-lêng teh ho̍k-sāi hit-ūi Siōng-tè thang kā góa choh-chèng, góa siông-siông siàu-liām lín," 
Romans1:10 put-sî tī kî-tó tiong khún-kiû Siōng-tè chiàu I ê hó chí-ì kā góa khui-lō͘, hō͘ góa bô kú chiū ōe-tàng sūn-lī khì lín hia." 
Romans1:11 Góa chin ài kìⁿ lín, thang kap lín hun-hióng chi̍t-kóa sio̍k-lêng ê un-sù, hō͘ lín kian-kiông;" 
Romans1:12 chiū-sī góa kàu lín tiong-kan ê sî, lín thong-kè góa ê sìn-gióng, góa thong-kè lín ê sìn-gióng, hō͘-siōng tit-tio̍h kó͘-lē." 
Romans1:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa chin ài lín chai, góa chin chōe piàn kè-ōe beh khì lín hia, thang kap tī kî-tha Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan kâng-khoán, mā tī lín tiong-kan siu-sêng chi̍t-kóa ké-chí, m̄-kú kàu taⁿ iáu ū chó͘-tòng." 
Romans1:14 Bô-lūn sím-mi̍h khoán lâng, khai-hòa á-sī bī-khai-hòa,ê, ū tì-hūi á-sī bô tì-hūi,ê, góa lóng khiàm in ê chè." 
Romans1:15 Só͘-í, góa pek-chhiat ǹg-bāng mā ōe-tàng chiong hok-im thoân hō͘ lín tī Lô-má ê lâng." 
Romans1:16 Góa bô khòaⁿ hok-im chòe kiàn-siàu, in-ūi chit-ê hok-im sī Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k, beh chín-kiù só͘-ū sìn ê lâng, tāi-seng Iû-thài -lâng, āu-lâi Gōa-pang-lâng." 
Romans1:17 In-ūi chit-ê hok-im ū khé-sī Siōng-tè ê gī, chit-ê gī tùi thâu kàu bé lóng sī thong-kè sìn lâi tit-tio̍h. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, “Gī ê lâng ōe tùi sìn lâi oa̍h.”" 
Romans1:18 Siōng-tè tùi thiⁿ-téng hoat-chhut siū-khì, khiàn-chek só͘-ū put-khiân put-gī ê lâng; in ê put-gī chó͘-tòng lâng bat chin-lí." 
Romans1:19 In-ūi Siōng-tè ū tùi in hián-bêng I pún-sin, só͘-í in eng-kai tùi Siōng-tè ū chheng-chhó ê jīm-sek chiah tio̍h." 
Romans1:20 Tùi chhòng-sè í-lâi, Siōng-tè éng-oán ê tōa lêng-le̍k kap sîn-sèng, sui-jiân jio̍k-gán khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h, m̄-kú thong-kè siū-chō ê mi̍h ōe-tàng chheng-chhó khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, só͘-í in lóng bōe-tàng the chek-jīm." 
Romans1:21 In-ūi in sui-jiân bat Siōng-tè ia̍h bô chun-tiōng I chòe Siōng-tè, mā bô kā I kám-siā; in ê su-siúⁿ hoán-tńg pìⁿ-chòe khang-khang, sim-su gû-gōng, chhiong-móa o͘-àm." 
Romans1:22 In chū-chheng chhong-bêng, kî-si̍t gû-gōng." 
Romans1:23 In bô chiong êng-kng kui hō͘ bōe-sí-bia̍t ê Siōng-tè, hoán-tńg khì pài ōe-sí-bia̍t ê lâng, pe-chiáu, khîm-siù, thâng-thōa téng ê siōng." 
Romans1:24 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè chhut-chāi in thàn ka-kī sim-lāi ê io̍k-bōng khì chòe bô chheng-khì ê tāi-chì, tì-kàu pí-chhú chau-that ka-kī ê sin-thé." 
Romans1:25 In ēng hu-ké thòe-ōaⁿ Siōng-tè ê chin-lí. In kèng-pài, ho̍k-sāi pī-chō-bu̍t, bô kèng-pài hit-ūi Chō-bu̍t-chú — I chiah eng-kai éng-oán tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn. Amen!" 
Romans1:26 In-ūi án-ni, Siōng-tè chhut-chāi in hòng-chhiòng thang kiàn-siàu ê jio̍k-io̍k: Cha-bó͘-lâng kap cha-bó͘-lâng ēng ûi-hoán chū-jiân ê sèng-koan-hē tāi-thòe kap ta-po͘-lâng chū-jiân ê koan-hē;" 
Romans1:27 ta-po͘-lâng mā kâng-khoán pàng-sak kap cha-bó͘-lâng chū-jiân ê sèng-koan-hē, pí-chhú io̍k-hé-kong-sim; ta-po͘-lâng kap ta-po͘-lâng chòe kiàn-siàu ê tāi-chì, kiat-kó tio̍h siū phian-chha ê hêng-ûi kai siū ê pò-èng." 
Romans1:28 Kì-jiân in bô beh chin-chiàⁿ jīn-bat Siōng-tè, Siōng-tè chiū chhut-chāi in ê sim-su pāi-hoāi, khì chòe bô eng-kai chòe ê tāi-chì." 
Romans1:29 In chhiong-móa ta̍k-khoán ê put-gī, pháiⁿ-sim, tham-sim, ok-to̍k, móa-sim oàn-tò͘, bô͘-sat, tò͘-cheng, kan-chà, im-bô͘, kóng ka-chiah-āu-ōe," 
Romans1:30 húi-pòng, oàn-hūn Siōng-tè, bú-jio̍k lâng, kiau-ngō͘, khoa-kháu, chè-chō sī-hui, ngó͘-ge̍k pē-bú," 
Romans1:31 bô bêng-lí, bô siú-iok, bô chêng, bô lîn-bín." 
Romans1:32 In sui-jiân chai, chiàu Siōng-tè kong-gī ê phòaⁿ-toàn, chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì ê lâng eng-kai sí; in m̄-nā ka-kī chòe, sīm-chì mā chàn-sêng pa̍t-lâng án-ni chòe." 
Romans2:1 Só͘-í, lí chit-ê phoe-phòaⁿ lâng,ê, bô-lūn lí sī sím-mi̍h-lâng lóng bōe-tàng the chek-jīm; lí phoe-phòaⁿ pa̍t-lâng sī teh phoe-phòaⁿ ka-kī, in-ūi lí phoe-phòaⁿ pa̍t-lâng chòe ê tāi-chì, ka-kī mā ta̍k-hāng lóng khì chòe." 
Romans2:2 Lán chai, chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì ê lâng, Siōng-tè ōe chiàu sū-si̍t kā in sím-phòaⁿ." 
Romans2:3 Lí chit-ê lâng, lí phoe-phòaⁿ pa̍t-lâng chòe chiah-ê tāi-chì, ka-kī mā khì chòe kâng-khoán ê tāi-chì, lí siūⁿ-kóng lí ōe-tàng siám-pī Siōng-tè ê sím-phòaⁿ sī,bô?" 
Romans2:4 Á-sī kóng lí khòaⁿ-khin Siōng-tè ke̍k-tōa ê jîn-chû, khoan-iông, kap thun-lún. Lí kiám m̄ chai I ê jîn-chû sī beh chhōa lí hóe-kái?" 
Romans2:5 Lí ngī-sim, m̄ hóe-kái, sī teh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī lúi-chek Siōng-tè ê siū-khì; chit-ê siū-khì ōe tī I kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ hit-ji̍t hián-bêng." 
Romans2:6 Siōng-tè ōe chiàu ta̍k-lâng ê hêng-ûi kā in pò-èng. 
Romans2:7 Hiah-ê kian-chhî chòe hó-sū, tui-kiû êng-kng, chun-kùi, kap bōe-pāi-hoāi ê sìⁿ-miā ê lâng, Siōng-tè ōe sù in éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Romans2:8 Hiah-ê chū-su, bô chun-thàn chin-lí, khì thàn put-gī ê lâng, Siōng-tè ê siū-khì kap hêng-hoa̍t ōe lîm-kàu in." 
Romans2:9 Só͘-ū chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng ōe siū-tio̍h hoān-lān khùn-khó͘, tāi-seng sī Iû-thài -lâng, āu-lâi chiah Gōa-pang-lâng." 
Romans2:10 Put-kò só͘-ū chòe hó ê lâng ōe tit-tio̍h êng-kng, chun-kùi, kap pêng-an, tāi-seng sī Iû-thài -lâng, āu-lâi chiah Gōa-pang-lâng;" 
Romans2:11 in-ūi Siōng-tè bô phian-thāi lâng. 
Romans2:12 Gōa-pang-lâng bô Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, nā hoān-chōe mā ōe siū Lu̍t-hoat-gōa ê sím-phòaⁿ lâi bia̍t-bông; Iû-thài -lâng ū Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, nā hoān-chōe ōe chiàu Lu̍t-hoat siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
Romans2:13 In-ūi, m̄-sī thiaⁿ Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng sī gī-lâng, chí-ū si̍t-hêng Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng chiah ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè soan-phòaⁿ chòe gī-lâng." 
Romans2:14 Bô Lu̍t-hoat ê Gōa-pang-lâng nā chiàu pún-sèng chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat ê kui-tēng, in sui-jiân bô Lu̍t-hoat, ka-kī chiū-sī lu̍t-hoat;" 
Romans2:15 án-ni piáu-sī Lu̍t-hoat ê iau-kiû ū khek tī in sim-lāi. In ê liông-sim mā chèng-si̍t, in ê sim-su ū-sî ka-kī chek-pī, ū-sî ka-kī piān-hō͘." 
Romans2:16 Án-ni, tī hit-ji̍t, chiàu góa só͘ thoân ê hok-im, Siōng-tè ōe thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lâi sím-phòaⁿ lâng ún-ba̍t ê sū." 
Romans2:17 Án-ni lí leh, lí chū-chheng Iû-thài -lâng, óa-khò Lu̍t-hoat, koh ēng Siōng-tè chòe khoa-kháu." 
Romans2:18 Lí bêng-pe̍k Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, ū siū-kè Lu̍t-hoat ê kàu-tō, ōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t sī-hui." 
Romans2:19 Lí chū-sìn ka-kī sī teh kā sit-bêng ê lâng chhōa-lō͘, sī o͘-àm tiong ê lâng ê kng," 
Romans2:20 gōng-lâng ê tō-su, iù-tī ê lâng ê lāu-su. Lí siūⁿ-kóng kì-jiân ū Lu̍t-hoat, tùi tì-sek kap chin-lí chiū ū pá-ak." 
Romans2:21 Lí kà-sī pa̍t-lâng, sī-án-chóaⁿ bô kà-sī ka-kī? Lí kà lâng m̄-thang thau-the̍h, ka-kī ū thau-the̍h,bô?" 
Romans2:22 Lí kóng m̄-thang hoān kan-îm, ka-kī ū hoān,tio̍h-bô? Lí iàm-ò͘ⁿ ngó͘-siōng, ka-kī ū chhiúⁿ biō-sī,bô?" 
Romans2:23 Lí khoa-kháu ū Lu̍t-hoat, ka-kī ū hoān-hoat lâi bú-jio̍k Siōng-tè bô?" 
Romans2:24 Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “In-ūi lín ê iân-kò͘, Siōng-tè ê miâ tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan siū siat-to̍k.”" 
Romans2:25 Lí nā chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat, kat-lé chiū ū kè-ta̍t; lí nā hoān-hoat, ū kat-lé pìⁿ-chòe bô kat-lé." 
Romans2:26 Bô siū kat-lé ê lâng nā chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat ê kui-tēng, Siōng-tè kiám bô kā i sǹg-chòe ū kat-lé?" 
Romans2:27 Jio̍k-thé bô siū kat-lé m̄-kú ū chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng ōe kā lí tēng-chōe, in-ūi lí ū Lu̍t-hoat ê tiâu-bûn koh siū kat-lé, m̄-kú tian-tò ûi-pōe Lu̍t-hoat." 
Romans2:28 Kî-si̍t, gōa-piáu choh Iû-thài -lâng,ê m̄-sī chin-chiàⁿ ê Iû-thài -lâng; tī jio̍k-thé só͘ siū gōa-piáu ê kat-lé mā m̄-sī chin-chiàⁿ ê kat-lé." 
Romans2:29 Chin-chiàⁿ ê Iû-thài -lâng sī lōe-chāi,ê; chin-chiàⁿ ê kat-lé sī sim ê kat-lé, sī Sèng Sîn ê chok-ûi, m̄-sī khò Lu̍t-hoat ê tiâu-bûn. Chit-khoán lâng siū chheng-chàn m̄-sī tùi lâng, sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi." 
Romans3:1 Án-ni kóng, choh Iû-thài -lâng ū sím-mi̍h iu-tiám? Kat-lé ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek?" 
Romans3:2 Tī ta̍k hong-bīn lóng ū chin chōe hó-chhù. Tē-it, Siōng-tè ū chiong I ê ōe kau-thok in." 
Romans3:3 In tiong-kan nā ū lâng bô sìn-si̍t, in ê bô sìn-si̍t kiám ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè ê sìn-si̍t pìⁿ-chòe bô-hāu?" 
Romans3:4 Choa̍t-tùi bōe! Sīm-chì só͘-ū ê lâng lóng pe̍h-chha̍t, Siōng-tè ia̍h it-tēng sī chin-si̍t. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Lí chek-pī ê sî, hián-chhut kong-gī; lí siū khòng-kò ê sî, ōe sèng-sò͘." 
Romans3:5 Put-kò, lán ê put-gī nā ōe-tàng hián-bêng Siōng-tè ê gī, lán ōe-tàng kóng sím-mi̍h? Góa chiàu lâng ê siūⁿ-hoat kóng, Siōng-tè tùi lán siū-khì sī put-gī sī,bô?" 
Romans3:6 Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī! Nā-sī, Siōng-tè ná ōe-tàng sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan?" 
Romans3:7 Góa ê hu-ké nā ōe-tàng hō͘ Siōng-tè ê chin-si̍t koh-khah bêng-hián, hō͘ I koh-khah ū êng-kng, góa ná iáu hō͘ I soan-phòaⁿ chòe chōe-jîn?" 
Romans3:8 Án-ni, ná m̄ kóng “Lán lâi chòe pháiⁿ hō͘ hó-sū si̍t-hiān”? Khak-si̍t ū lâng án-ni kóng lâi kā góa tiòng-siong, in eng-kai siū tēng-chōe." 
Romans3:9 Nā án-ni, lán Iû-thài -lâng kiám ū khah iâⁿ Gōa-pang-lâng? Bô! Góa í-keng ū chí-chek Iû-thài -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng lóng siū chōe koán-hat." 
Romans3:10 Tú chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Lóng bô gī-lâng, liân chi̍t ê to bô!" 
Romans3:11 Bô hiáu-ngō͘ ê lâng; lóng bô lâng chhē-kiû Siōng-tè. 
Romans3:12 Lâng lóng pōe-poān Siōng-tè, lóng kiâⁿ bê-lō͘; lóng bô lâng chòe hó-sū, liân chi̍t ê to bô!" 
Romans3:13 In ê nâ-âu chhin-chhiūⁿ khui-khui ê bōng; in ê chhùi-chi̍h kan-chà; in ê chhùi-tûn ū to̍k-chôa ê to̍k. 
Romans3:14 In chhùi-lāi chhiong-móa ok-to̍k chiù-chó͘. 
Romans3:15 In cháu chin kín, kip beh thâi-lâng lâu-huih;" 
Romans3:16 in cháu,kè ê lō͘ lóng ū húi-bia̍t pi-chhám. 
Romans3:17 Pêng-an ê lō͘ in m̄ bat," 
Romans3:18 tùi Siōng-tè, sim bô chûn kèng-ùi." 
Romans3:19 Taⁿ lán liáu-kái, Lu̍t-hoat it-chhè ê iau-kiû sī tùi tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē ê lâng kóng,ê, hō͘ lâng lóng bōe-tàng piān-kái, hō͘ choân sè-kài lóng siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ." 
Romans3:20 Só͘-í bô lâng khò siú Lu̍t-hoat ê tiâu-bûn ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè soan-phòaⁿ chòe gī-lâng; tùi Lu̍t-hoat, lâng chiah chai sím-mi̍h sī chōe." 
Romans3:21 Hiān-chāi, Siōng-tè í-keng kā lán chí-sī, lán m̄-bián khò Lu̍t-hoat ōe-tàng kap I kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē; Lu̍t-hoat kap sian-ti lóng ūi-tio̍h che chòe kiàn-chèng." 
Romans3:22 Kap Siōng-tè kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē sī thong-kè sìn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok. Siōng-tè án-ni tùi-thāi só͘-ū sìn Ki-tok ê lâng, lóng bô chha-pia̍t." 
Romans3:23 In-ūi só͘-ū ê lâng lóng hoān-chōe, tì-kàu Siōng-tè ê êng-kng tit bōe tio̍h;" 
Romans3:24 put-kò, tùi Siōng-tè só͘ sù pe̍h-pe̍h ê un-tián, thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ oân-sêng ê kiù-sio̍k, lâng thang kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans3:25 Siōng-tè li̍p Iâ-so͘ choh sio̍k-chōe-chè, thong-kè I ê sí, hō͘ lâng tùi sìn lâi tit-tio̍h sià-chōe. Siōng-tè ēng án-ni lâi hián-bêng I ê gī. Tī kè-khì, I ēng nāi-sim tùi-thāi lâng, khoan-iông in í-chêng só͘ hoān ê chōe," 
Romans3:26 beh tī hiān-kim chit-ê sî hián-bêng I ka-kī sī gī, koh hō͘ sìn Iâ-so͘ ê lâng kap I ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans3:27 Nā án-ni, lán iáu ū sím-mi̍h thang khoa-kháu? Lóng bô! Khò sím-mi̍h hoat-chek? Khò hêng-ûi sī,bô? M̄-sī! Sī khò sìn ê hoat-chek." 
Romans3:28 Só͘-í, goán jīn-tēng, lâng kap Siōng-tè kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, m̄-sī khò siú Lu̍t-hoat ê hêng-ûi, chí-ū tùi sìn." 
Romans3:29 Siōng-tè kiám chí-ū sī Iû-thài -lâng ê Siōng-tè? I kiám m̄-sī Gōa-pang-lâng ê Siōng-tè? Sī, I mā-sī Gōa-pang-lâng ê Siōng-tè." 
Romans3:30 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè chí-ū chi̍t ūi, I hō͘ siū kat-lé ê Iû-thài -lâng tùi sìn lâi kap I kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, mā hō͘ bô siū kat-lé ê Gōa-pang-lâng tùi sìn lâi kap I kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans3:31 Án-ni kóng, lán in-ūi chit-ê sìn soah hō͘ Lu̍t-hoat sit-khì hāu-le̍k sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī! Lán tian-tò sī teh khak-li̍p Lu̍t-hoat." 
Romans4:1 Án-ni, koan-hē lán hiat-thóng ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán, lán beh kóng sím-mi̍h?" 
Romans4:2 A-pek-la-hán nā-sī tùi hêng-ûi siū chheng-chòe gī-lâng, i chiū ū thang khoa-kháu, m̄-kú tùi Siōng-tè khòaⁿ, i bô thang khoa-kháu." 
Romans4:3 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “ A-pek-la-hán sìn Siōng-tè, in-ūi án-ni, Siōng-tè chiū kā i sǹg-chòe gī.”" 
Romans4:4 Lâng chòe kang tit-tio̍h kang-chîⁿ bô sǹg un-tián, sī eng-kai." 
Romans4:5 M̄-kú bô khò hêng-ûi, chí-ū sìn hit-ūi soan-phòaⁿ chōe-jîn chòe bô chōe ê Siōng-tè ê lâng, i in-ūi ū chit-ê sìn, Siōng-tè chiū kā i sǹg-chòe gī." 
Romans4:6 Tāi-pi̍t mā ū kóng-khí bô khò hêng-ûi hō͘ Siōng-tè kā i sǹg-chòe gī ê lâng ū hok-khì. I kóng: 
Romans4:7 Kè-sit tit-tio̍h sià-bián, chōe-kò tit-tio̍h chhat-siau, chit-khoán lâng chin ū hok-khì!" 
Romans4:8 Chú bô sǹg i ū-chōe,ê, chit-khoán lâng chin ū hok-khì!" 
Romans4:9 Án-ni, chit-ê hok-khì chí-ū hō͘ siū kat-lé ê lâng sī,bô? M̄-sī, mā hō͘ bô siū kat-lé ê lâng. In-ūi lán í-keng ū kóng, “ A-pek-la-hán in-ūi sìn, Siōng-tè chiū kā i sǹg-chòe gī.”" 
Romans4:10 Sī án-chóaⁿ sǹg? Sī i siū kat-lé í-chêng, á-sī í-āu? Sī kat-lé í-chêng, m̄-sī kat-lé í-āu." 
Romans4:11 Āu-lâi i ū siū kat-lé; chit-ê kat-lé sī chi̍t chióng kì-hō, ìn-chèng i iáu-bē siū kat-lé í-chêng chiū tùi sìn hō͘ Siōng-tè chiap-la̍p chòe gī-lâng. Hiah-ê bô siū kat-lé ê lâng in-ūi sìn, Siōng-tè ū chiap-la̍p in chòe gī-lâng, thang hō͘ A-pek-la-hán choh hiah-ê bô siū kat-lé ê sìn-tô͘ ê chó͘-sian." 
Romans4:12 I mā-sī siū kat-lé ê lâng ê chó͘-sian; in m̄-nā siū kat-lé, mā ū chiàu lán ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán siū kat-lé í-chêng sìn-sim ê bô͘-hoān teh seng-oa̍h." 
Romans4:13 Siōng-tè èng-ún A-pek-la-hán kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun beh hō͘ in sêng-siū sè-kài chòe sán-gia̍p; chit-ê èng-ún m̄-sī thong-kè Lu̍t-hoat, sī thong-kè sìn lâi tit,tio̍h ê gī." 
Romans4:14 Nā chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng chiah ōe-tàng sêng-siū Siōng-tè ê èng-ún, sìn chiū khang-khang, èng-ún mā bô lō͘-ēng." 
Romans4:15 Lu̍t-hoat ōe jiá-khí Siōng-tè ê siū-khì; bô Lu̍t-hoat chiū bô ûi-hoat. 
Romans4:16 In-ūi án-ni, èng-ún sī ēng sìn chòe kun-kù, beh pó-chèng èng-ún sī tùi Siōng-tè pe̍h-pe̍h ê un-tián, hō͘ A-pek-la-hán só͘-ū ê kiáⁿ-sun, m̄-nā ū siū kat-lé ê lâng, mā pau-hâm hiah-ê kap A-pek-la-hán siâng-khoán ū sìn Siōng-tè ê lâng. I sī lán chèng-lâng ê chó͘-sian;" 
Romans4:17 chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, “Góa ū hō͘ lí choh bān-bîn ê chó͘-sian.” Chit-ê èng-ún tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ū-hāu. A-pek-la-hán sìn chit-ūi hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, koh hō͘ bô pìⁿ-chòe ū ê Siōng-tè." 
Romans4:18 I tī bô thang ǹg-bāng ê sî iáu khǹg ǹg-bāng, sìn kóng i ōe chiâⁿ-chòe bān-bîn ê chó͘-sian, chiàu só͘ èng-ún ê ōe kóng, “Lí it-tēng ū chin chōe kiáⁿ-sun.”" 
Romans4:19 I í-keng chiâⁿ-pah hè, siūⁿ-tio̍h ka-kī ê seng-khu ná-chhin-chhiūⁿ sí,khì, Sa-la ia̍h í-keng bōe siⁿ-kiáⁿ, m̄-kú A-pek-la-hán bô in-ūi án-ni sit-khì sìn-sim." 
Romans4:20 I tùi Siōng-tè ê èng-ún bô hoâi-gî, sìn-sim hoán-tńg ná kian-tēng, chiong êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Romans4:21 I khak-sìn Siōng-tè it-tēng ōe si̍t-hiān ka-kī ê èng-ún. 
Romans4:22 Só͘-í, A-pek-la-hán in-ūi sìn, Siōng-tè kā i sǹg-chòe gī." 
Romans4:23 M̄-kú, “Kā i sǹg-chòe gī” chit-kù ōe m̄-sī kan-ta ūi-tio̍h i," 
Romans4:24 mā-sī ūi-tio̍h lán chiah-ê lâng siá,ê, in-ūi lán ū sìn Siōng-tè hō͘ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, lán mā ōe siū sǹg-chòe gī." 
Romans4:25 Ūi-tio̍h lán ê chōe-kò, Siōng-tè chiong Chú Iâ-so͘ kau hō͘ lâng hāi-sí, koh ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lán kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I koh-oa̍h." 
Romans5:1 Kì-jiân, lán tùi sìn siū chheng-chòe gī-lâng, chiū thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kap Siōng-tè ū hô-bo̍k ê koan-hē." 
Romans5:2 Lán tùi sìn, thong-kè Ki-tok thang chìn-ji̍p hiān-chāi teh hióng-siū chit-ê un-tián, hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí ǹg-bāng thang hun-hióng Siōng-tè ê êng-kng." 
Romans5:3 M̄-nā án-ni, tī hoān-lān tiong, lán iû-goân hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí, in-ūi lán chai, hoān-lān siⁿ-chhut jím-nāi," 
Romans5:4 jím-nāi siⁿ-chhut láu-liān, láu-liān siⁿ-chhut ǹg-bāng," 
Romans5:5 ǹg-bāng bōe tì-kàu kiàn-siàu, in-ūi Siōng-tè thong-kè sù hō͘ lán ê Sèng Sîn chiong I ê thiàⁿ koàn-ji̍p lán ê sim." 
Romans5:6 Lán iáu loán-jio̍k ê sî, Ki-tok tī Siōng-tè só͘ chí-tēng ê ji̍t-chí ūi-tio̍h ū-chōe ê lâng sí." 
Romans5:7 Thòe gī-lâng sí, chha-put-to bô; thòe hó-lâng sí, kiám-chhái iáu ū lâng káⁿ." 
Romans5:8 Put-kò Siōng-tè tùi lán chèng-bêng I thiàⁿ lán, lán iáu-sī chōe-jîn ê sî, Ki-tok ū thòe lán sí." 
Romans5:9 Hiān-chāi Ki-tok í-keng ūi-tio̍h lán lâu-huih hi-seng, hō͘ lán kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, I koh-khah ōe kiù lán thoat-lī Siōng-tè ê siū-khì." 
Romans5:10 In-ūi, lán iáu-kú choh Siōng-tè tùi-te̍k ê sî, I hō͘ ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ thòe lán sí, hō͘ lán kap I koh hô-hó. Kì-jiân koh hô-hó, lán koh-khah ōe in-ūi Ki-tok ê oa̍h lâi tit-tio̍h chín-kiù." 
Romans5:11 M̄-nā án-ni, lán hiān-chāi í-keng thong-kè Ki-tok kap Siōng-tè koh hô-hó, mā ōe thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ēng Siōng-tè chòe khoa-kháu." 
Romans5:12 Chōe tùi chi̍t ê lâng chìn-ji̍p sè-kan, sí mā tè,ji̍p-lâi; kiat-kó, só͘-ū ê lâng lóng ōe sí, in-ūi só͘-ū ê lâng lóng ū hoān-chōe." 
Romans5:13 Iáu-bē ū Lu̍t-hoat í-chêng, chōe í-keng tī sè-kan; put-kò bô Lu̍t-hoat, chōe chiū bô sǹg-chòe chōe." 
Romans5:14 M̄-kú tùi A-tong kàu Mô͘-se hit-tōaⁿ kî-kan, sí teh chi-phòe choân jîn-lūi, liân bô hoān-tio̍h A-tong só͘ hoān ê kè-sit ê lâng mā tio̍h sí. A-tong sī teh-beh lâi Hit-ūi ê ū-piáu." 
Romans5:15 Put-kò A-tong ê kè-sit kap Siōng-tè pe̍h-pe̍h ê un-sù bōe-pí,tit. In-ūi, nā tùi chi̍t ê lâng ê chōe-kò chèng-lâng lóng tio̍h sí, Siōng-tè ê un-tián, chiū-sī I thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chi̍t ê lâng pe̍h-pe̍h sù hō͘ chèng-lâng ê un-sù, it-tēng koh-khah hong-hù!" 
Romans5:16 Chi̍t ê lâng só͘ hoān ê chōe kap Siōng-tè pe̍h-pe̍h ê un-sù bōe-pí,tit. Chiàu sím-phòaⁿ, liân chi̍t piàn ê kè-sit mā soan-phòaⁿ “Ū chōe”; m̄-kú chiàu pe̍h-pe̍h ê un-sù, chōe-chōe piàn ê kè-sit mā soan-phòaⁿ “Bô chōe”." 
Romans5:17 Nā in-ūi chi̍t ê lâng ê kè-sit, sí thong-kè chit chi̍t ê lâng chi-phòe jîn-lūi, án-ni, Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chi̍t ê lâng só͘ sêng-chiū,ê it-tēng koh-khah tōa; só͘-ū niá-siū Siōng-tè hong-hù ê un-tián, chiū-sī pe̍h-pe̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè soan-phòaⁿ bô chōe ê lâng, ōe-tàng thong-kè Ki-tok lâi chi-phòe ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā." 
Romans5:18 In-ūi chi̍t ê lâng hoān-chōe, chèng-lâng lóng siū tēng-chōe; kâng-khoán, in-ūi chi̍t ê lâng gī ê hêng-ûi, chèng-lâng lóng siū phòaⁿ bô chōe lâi tit-tio̍h oa̍h." 
Romans5:19 In-ūi chi̍t ê lâng pōe-ge̍k, chèng-lâng lóng chiâⁿ-chòe chōe-jîn; kâng-khoán, chi̍t ê lâng sūn-ho̍k, chèng-lâng lóng chiâⁿ-chòe gī-lâng." 
Romans5:20 Lu̍t-hoat ê chè-tēng hō͘ chōe-kò ke-thiⁿ; m̄-kú chōe ke-thiⁿ, Siōng-tè ê un-tián koh-khah ke-thiⁿ." 
Romans5:21 Án-ni, chōe thong-kè sí lâi chi-phòe, Siōng-tè ê un-tián sī thong-kè gī lâi chi-phòe, hō͘ lán tùi lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Romans6:1 Án-ni, lán beh kóng sím-mi̍h? Lán sī tio̍h kè-sio̍k tī chōe-ok tiong seng-oa̍h, thang hō͘ un-tián koh-khah ke-thiⁿ sī,bô?" 
Romans6:2 Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī! Lán chiah-ê ǹg chōe í-keng sí ê lâng kiám thang kè-sio̍k tī chōe-ok tiong seng-oa̍h? 
Romans6:3 Lín kiám m̄ chai, lán lóng siū sóe-lé lâi kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-ha̍p, sī siū sóe-lé lâi kap I sí?" 
Romans6:4 Kì-jiân lán thong-kè sóe-lé kap I sí, chòe-hé bâi-chòng, só͘-í, chhin-chhiūⁿ Ki-tok thong-kè Thiⁿ-pē êng-kng ê koân-lêng tùi sí koh-oa̍h, lán mā tio̍h kè sin ê seng-oa̍h." 
Romans6:5 Kì-jiân lán kap Ki-tok chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé lâi keng-giām I ê sí, lán it-tēng mā ōe kap I kiat-ha̍p lâi koh-oa̍h." 
Romans6:6 Lán chai, lán kū ê chū-ngó͘ í-keng kap Ki-tok chòe-hé tèng si̍p-jī-kè, sī beh hō͘ siū chōe khu-sok hit-ê kū ê lâng húi-bia̍t, hō͘ lán bô koh chòe chōe ê lô͘-lē." 
Romans6:7 In-ūi lâng it-tàn sí,khì chiū tùi chōe tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng. 
Romans6:8 Kì-jiân lán í-keng kap Ki-tok chòe-hé sí, lán siong-sìn lán mā ōe kap I chòe-hé oa̍h." 
Romans6:9 Lán chai Ki-tok í-keng tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, bōe koh sí, sí bōe koh chi-phòe I." 
Romans6:10 In-ūi I ū sí, chi̍t piàn chiū oân-choân kā chōe chè-ap; I hiān-chāi teh oa̍h, sī ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè teh oa̍h." 
Romans6:11 Án-ni, lín mā tio̍h khòaⁿ ka-kī í-keng kap chōe toān-choa̍t koan-hē, kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-ha̍p, ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè teh oa̍h." 
Romans6:12 Só͘-í, m̄-thang chiong lín ōe-sí ê seng-khu kau hō͘ chōe chi-phòe, khì sūn-thàn pún-sèng ê io̍k-bōng." 
Romans6:13 Mā m̄-thang chiong lín seng-khu ê chi-thé kau hō͘ chōe khì chòe put-gī ê kang-khū. Hoán-tńg tio̍h chòe chi̍t ê tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê lâng, chiong ka-kī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè, chiong seng-khu ê kok chi-thé hiàn hō͘ I chòe gī ê kang-khū."
