Romans6:14 M̄-thang hō͘ chōe kā lín chi-phòe, in-ūi lín m̄-sī oa̍h tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē, sī oa̍h tī un-tián-ē." 
Romans6:15 Nā án-ni, in-ūi lán m̄-sī tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē, sī tī un-tián-ē, lán chiū thang hoān-chōe sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang!" 
Romans6:16 Kiám m̄ chai lín nā chiong ka-kī kau hō͘ bó͘-lâng choh lô͘-lē sūn-thàn i, lín chiū-sī hit-ê lâng ê lô͘-lē; án-ni kóng, lín sī choh chōe ê lô͘-lē tì-kàu sí, á-sī choh Siōng-tè ê lô͘-po̍k sūn-thàn I tì-kàu kap I ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē?" 
Romans6:17 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, sui-jiân lín bat choh chōe ê lô͘-lē, hiān-chāi í-keng tùi sim-tóe sūn-thàn hit-ê thoân-siū hō͘ lín chòe tián-hoān ê kà-sī." 
Romans6:18 Lín í-keng tùi chōe tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng, chiâⁿ-chòe gī ê lô͘-po̍k." 
Romans6:19 Kiaⁿ-liáu lín bōe liáu-kái, góa ēng it-poaⁿ-lâng ê ōe kā lín kóng. Chhin-chhiūⁿ lín í-chêng bat chiong seng-khu oân-choân kau hō͘ ù-òe kap put-hoat, hō͘ put-hoat ke-thiⁿ, hiān-chāi lín tio̍h chiong lín seng-khu ê ta̍k pō͘-hūn hiàn hō͘ gī chòe sèng-kiat ê lō͘-ēng." 
Romans6:20 Lín choh chōe ê lô͘-lē hit-sî, lín bô siū gī iok-sok." 
Romans6:21 Hit-sî lín chòe hiān-chāi khòaⁿ-chòe kiàn-siàu ê tāi-chì, kiat-kó sī-án-chóaⁿ? Kiat-kio̍k sī sí." 
Romans6:22 Hiān-chāi lín í-keng tùi chōe tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng, chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê lô͘-po̍k, hit-ê kiat-kó sī chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat; kiat-kio̍k sī éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Romans6:23 In-ūi chōe ê tāi-kè sī sí, m̄-kú Siōng-tè thong-kè lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ pe̍h-pe̍h sù hō͘ lán ê un-tián sī éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Romans7:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa sī tùi lín bat Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng teh kóng, lín kiám m̄ chai, lâng oa̍h,teh ê sî chiah siū Lu̍t-hoat iok-sok?" 
Romans7:2 Kú chi̍t ê lē lâi kóng, kiat-hun ê hū-jîn-lâng, tiōng-hu iáu oa̍h,teh chiū siū Lu̍t-hoat iok-sok kui-sio̍k tiōng-hu; tiōng-hu nā sí chiū bô koh siū chit-ê Lu̍t-hoat iok-sok." 
Romans7:3 Só͘-í, tiōng-hu iáu oa̍h,teh, hū-jîn-lâng nā kap pa̍t-ê ta-po͘-lâng chòe-hé tòa, ōe hō͘ lâng kiò-chòe îm-hū; tiōng-hu nā sí, i chiū bô siū chit-ê Lu̍t-hoat iok-sok, i kap pa̍t-ê ta-po͘-lâng chòe-hé tòa mā m̄-sī îm-hū." 
Romans7:4 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín kap Ki-tok ê seng-khu kiat-ha̍p kap I tâng-sí, í-keng kap Lu̍t-hoat toān-choa̍t koan-hē, bô siū iok-sok, ōe-tàng kui-sio̍k pa̍t-lâng, chiū-sī hit-ūi tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê Ki-tok, hō͘ lán thang ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè kiat ké-chí." 
Romans7:5 Lán chiàu lâng jio̍k-thé ê pún-sèng teh oa̍h ê sî, lán hoān-chōe ê io̍k-liām siū Lu̍t-hoat kek-khí, tī lán seng-khu ê kok chi-thé ūn-chok, kiat sí-bông ê ké-chí." 
Romans7:6 M̄-kú, hiān-chāi lán í-keng thoat-lī Lu̍t-hoat, kap hit-ê sok-pa̍k lán,ê toān-choa̍t koan-hē. Án-ni, lán ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè, m̄-sī chiàu Lu̍t-hoat ê kū hong-sek, sī chiàu Sèng Sîn ê sin hong-sek." 
Romans7:7 Án-ni, lán beh kóng sím-mi̍h? Lu̍t-hoat sī chōe sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī! Put-kò nā bô Lu̍t-hoat, góa chiū m̄ chai sím-mi̍h sī chōe. Lu̍t-hoat nā bô kóng “M̄-thang tham-sim”, góa chiū m̄ chai sím-mi̍h sī tham-sim." 
Romans7:8 Chōe lī-iōng kài-bēng chhē ki-hōe tī góa sim-lāi ín-khí ta̍k-khoán ê tham-sim. Bô Lu̍t-hoat, chōe chiū bô chok-iōng." 
Romans7:9 Í-chêng bô Lu̍t-hoat, góa mā teh oa̍h; kài-bēng chi̍t-ē lâi, chōe oa̍h,khí-lâi," 
Romans7:10 góa chiū sí,khì. Tùi góa lâi kóng, pún-lâi beh hō͘ lâng oa̍h ê kài-bēng, tian-tò hō͘ lâng sí." 
Romans7:11 In-ūi chōe lī-iōng kài-bēng chhē ki-hōe khi-phiàn góa, mā lī-iōng kài-bēng hāi-sí góa." 
Romans7:12 Só͘-í, Lu̍t-hoat sī sîn-sèng; kài-bēng mā-sī sîn-sèng, kong-chèng, koh liông-siān." 
Romans7:13 Nā án-ni kóng, hit-ê liông-siān,ê hāi-sí góa sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī! Sī chōe lī-iōng hit-ê liông-siān,ê hāi-sí góa, hō͘ chōe-ok ê pún-chit hián-lō͘; án-ni, chōe lī-iōng kài-bēng hō͘ i ke̍k-kî ok-to̍k ê pún-chit koh-khah hián-lō͘ chhut,lâi." 
Romans7:14 Lán chai, Lu̍t-hoat sī sio̍k-lêng,ê, m̄-kú góa sī sio̍k jio̍k-thé,ê, í-keng chhut-bōe hō͘ chōe choh lô͘-lē." 
Romans7:15 Góa bô bêng-pe̍k ka-kī ê só͘-chòe, in-ūi góa ài chòe,ê, bô khì chòe; góa bô ài chòe,ê, tian-tò khì chòe." 
Romans7:16 Góa nā chòe góa bô ài chòe,ê, chiū-sī sêng-jīn Lu̍t-hoat sī hó." 
Romans7:17 Án-ni, teh chòe góa bô ài chòe,ê m̄-sī góa, sī tiàm tī góa lāi-bīn ê chōe." 
Romans7:18 Góa chai, tī góa pún-sèng lāi-bīn bô liông-siān; góa ū chòe hó ê ì-goān, m̄-kú bô chòe hó ê khùi-la̍t." 
Romans7:19 Só͘ ì-ài ê hó, góa bô khì chòe, bô ì-ài ê pháiⁿ, góa tian-tò khì chòe." 
Romans7:20 Góa nā chòe góa bô ì-ài,ê, chiū m̄-sī góa pún-sin teh chòe, sī tiàm tī góa lāi-bīn ê chōe teh chòe." 
Romans7:21 Án-ni, góa ū hoat-kiàn chi̍t ê hoat-chek, chiū-sī, góa siūⁿ-beh chòe hó ê sî, pháiⁿ kā góa tîⁿ,teh." 
Romans7:22 Góa lāi-bīn ê hit-ê lâng ì-ài Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat," 
Romans7:23 m̄-kú góa khòaⁿ-chhut, tī góa ê seng-khu ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê hoat-chek kap góa sim-su ê hoat-chek teh kau-chiàn, lia̍h góa chòe siû-hoān lâi hâng-ho̍k góa seng-khu lāi-bīn ê chōe ê hoat-chek." 
Romans7:24 Góa chit-ê lâng ū-kàu chhiⁿ-chhám! Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng kiù góa thoat-lī chit-ê tì-kàu sí ê seng-khu? 
Romans7:25 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok I ū kiù góa! Án-ni, góa ê chhù-kéng, chi̍t hong-bīn sī ēng sim-su sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat, lēng-gōa chi̍t hong-bīn sī ēng jio̍k-thé sūn-ho̍k chōe ê hoat-chek." 
Romans8:1 Án-ni hiah-ê kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân ê lâng chiū bô siū tēng-chōe. 
Romans8:2 In-ūi thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, hit-ê sù oa̍h-miā ê Sèng Sîn ê hoat-chek í-keng ū tháu-pàng lán thoat-lī chōe kap sí ê hoat-chek." 
Romans8:3 In-ūi lâng ê pún-sèng loán-jio̍k, Lu̍t-hoat chòe bōe kàu,ê, Siōng-tè ū chòe-chiâⁿ: I chhe ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ chhú kap lâng kâng-khoán ōe hoān-chōe ê pún-sèng, soan-phòaⁿ lâng pún-sèng ê chōe chòe ū-chōe, lâi chhú-lí chōe." 
Romans8:4 Siōng-tè án-ni chòe, sī beh hō͘ Lu̍t-hoat chèng-tong ê iau-kiû ōe-tàng si̍t-hiān tī lán chiah-ê bô chiàu pún-sèng, sī chiàu Sèng Sîn ê ín-chhōa teh seng-oa̍h ê lâng." 
Romans8:5 In-ūi sūn-thàn pún-sèng ê lâng ì-hiòng pún-sèng ê sū; m̄-kú sūn-thàn Sèng Sîn ê lâng ì-hiòng Sèng Sîn ê sū. 
Romans8:6 Ì-hiòng pún-sèng, kiat-kó sī sí; ì-hiòng Sèng Sîn, ōe tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā kap hô-bo̍k." 
Romans8:7 Án-ni, ì-hiòng pún-sèng sī tí-te̍k Siōng-tè, in-ūi bô sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat; kî-si̍t mā bô hoat-tō͘ sūn-ho̍k." 
Romans8:8 Sūn-ho̍k pún-sèng ê lâng bōe-tàng hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí. 
Romans8:9 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè ê Sîn ū tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, lín chiū m̄-sī sio̍k pún-sèng, sī sio̍k Sèng Sîn. Lâng nā bô Ki-tok ê Sîn chiū bô sio̍k Ki-tok." 
Romans8:10 Ki-tok nā tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, sui-jiân lín ê seng-khu in-ūi chōe sí, Siōng-tè ê Sîn ōe hō͘ lín oa̍h, in-ūi lín í-keng kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans8:11 Siōng-tè ê Sîn ū hō͘ Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h; chit-ê Sîn nā tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, chit-ūi hō͘ Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè, ōe thong-kè tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn ê Sèng Sîn, hō͘ lín ōe sí ê seng-khu tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā." 
Romans8:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, án-ni khòaⁿ, lán ū khiàm-chè, put-kò m̄-sī khiàm pún-sèng ê chè thàn pún-sèng teh oa̍h." 
Romans8:13 Lín nā thàn pún-sèng oa̍h ōe tì-kàu sí; lín nā khò Sèng Sîn tû-bia̍t jio̍k-io̍k ê hêng-ûi chiū ōe oa̍h. 
Romans8:14 Hō͘ Siōng-tè ê Sîn ín-chhōa ê lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî. 
Romans8:15 In-ūi lín tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn m̄-sī beh hō͘ lín koh tò-tńg-khì choh lô͘-lē, iáu seng-oa̍h tī kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ tiong; lín niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn sī beh hō͘ lín chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, khò chit-ūi Sèng Sîn lán thang tōa-siaⁿ kiò, “A-pa, Pē ah!”" 
Romans8:16 Sèng Sîn pún-sin kap lán ê sîn chòe-hé choh-chèng, kóng lán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Romans8:17 Kì-jiân lán sī kiáⁿ-jî, chiū-sī kè-sêng-jîn, sī Siōng-tè ê kè-sêng-jîn, kap Ki-tok pîⁿ-pîⁿ choh kè-sêng-jîn. Kì-jiân lán kap Ki-tok tâng siū-khó͘, sī beh hō͘ lán mā kap I tâng siū êng-kng." 
Romans8:18 Góa siūⁿ, hiān-kim chit-ê sî ê khó͘-lān kap chiong-lâi teh-beh tùi lán hián-hiān ê êng-kng bōe-pí,tit." 
Romans8:19 Pī-chō-bu̍t pek-chhiat teh thèng-hāu Siōng-tè chèng kiáⁿ-jî ê hián-hiān. 
Romans8:20 In-ūi pī-chō-bu̍t bōe-tàng ta̍t-kàu siū-chō ê bo̍k-te̍k, m̄-sī chhut tī in ê pún-ì, sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì. Put-kò pī-chō-bu̍t iáu-teh ǹg-bāng," 
Romans8:21 ū chi̍t ji̍t in pún-sin mā ōe siū tháu-pàng lâi thoat-lī ōe pāi-hoāi ê khu-sok, thang kap Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî hun-hióng êng-kng ê chū-iû." 
Romans8:22 Lán chai, só͘-ū pī-chō-bu̍t kàu hiān-chāi iáu chòe-hé teh thòng-khó͘ ai-kiò, chòe-hé keng-giām chhui-chūn ê khó͘-thàng." 
Romans8:23 M̄-nā pī-chō-bu̍t, liân lán chiah-ê tit-tio̍h Sèng Sîn choh thâu-chúi ê ké-chí,ê mā teh thó͘-khùi thèng-hāu Siōng-tè chiap-la̍p lán choh I ê kiáⁿ-jî, hō͘ lán kui-ê lâng lóng tit-tio̍h sio̍k-hôe." 
Romans8:24 In-ūi lán khò chit-khoán ǹg-bāng tit-tio̍h kiù. Khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h ê ǹg-bāng m̄-sī ǹg-bāng. Khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h,ê ná tio̍h ǹg-bāng? 
Romans8:25 Lán nā ǹg-bāng hit-ê khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h,ê chiū ōe jím-nāi thèng-hāu. 
Romans8:26 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lán loán-jio̍k ê sî Sèng Sîn mā ū teh kā lán hû-chhî; in-ūi lán m̄ chai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ kî-tó, m̄-kú Sèng Sîn ka-kī ēng ōe bōe-tàng piáu-ta̍t ê thó͘-khùi thòe lán kî-kiû." 
Romans8:27 Liáu-kái lâng lāi-sim ê Siōng-tè bêng-pe̍k Sèng Sîn ê ì-sù, in-ūi Sèng Sîn chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì thòe sìn-tô͘ kî-kiû." 
Romans8:28 Lán chai, bān-hāng-sū hō͘-siōng ūn-chok, hō͘ hiah-ê thiàⁿ Siōng-tè ê lâng, chiū-sī chiàu I ka-kī ê chí-ì soán-tiàu,ê, lóng ū lī-ek." 
Romans8:29 In-ūi Siōng-tè ū-sian bat ê lâng, mā ū-sian koat-tēng hō͘ in kap I ê Kiáⁿ ê hêng-siōng saⁿ-tâng, thang hō͘ I ê Kiáⁿ tī chōe-chōe hiaⁿ-tī tiong choh Tōa-kiáⁿ." 
Romans8:30 Koh I ū-sian koat-tēng ê lâng, I mā kā in kéng-tiàu; I kéng-tiàu ê lâng, I mā kā in soan-phòaⁿ chòe gī-lâng; I soan-phòaⁿ chòe gī-lâng,ê, I mā hō͘ in tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
Romans8:31 Koan-hē chiah-ê tāi-chì, lán beh án-chóaⁿ kóng? Siōng-tè nā ūi lán, siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng tí-te̍k lán?" 
Romans8:32 I kì-jiân bô sioh ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ, hō͘ I ūi-tio̍h lán chèng-lâng hi-seng, kiám bōe chiong bān-mi̍h mā pe̍h-pe̍h sù hō͘ lán?" 
Romans8:33 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng khòng-kò Siōng-tè ê soán-bîn? Soan-phòaⁿ in chòe gī-lâng,ê sī Siōng-tè! 
Romans8:34 Nā án-ni, siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kā in tēng-chōe? Bô! Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ í-keng sí, koh Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, taⁿ chē tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng teh thòe lán kî-kiû." 
Romans8:35 Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng chhiat-tn̄g Ki-tok tùi lán ê thiàⁿ? Sī hoān-lān, sī khùn-khó͘, sī pek-hāi, sī iau-gō, sī sàn-chhiah, sī gûi-hiám, á-sī chhám-sí?" 
Romans8:36 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: In-ūi lí ê iân-kò͘, goán kui-ji̍t biān-tùi sí ê ui-hia̍p; lâng khòaⁿ goán chhin-chhiūⁿ beh hō͘ lâng thâi ê iûⁿ." 
Romans8:37 Lóng m̄-sī! Tī chiah-ê it-chhè ê tāi-chì, lán khò thiàⁿ lán ê Siōng-tè tek-sèng kàu ū-chhun!" 
Romans8:38 In-ūi góa khak-sìn, bô-lūn sī sí, sī oa̍h, sī thiⁿ-sài, sī lêng-kài ê thóng-léng-chiá á-sī koân-le̍k-chiá, sī hiān-kim á-sī chiong-lâi,ê," 
Romans8:39 sī thiⁿ-téng á-sī tōe-ē ê sîn-lêng, á-sī kî-tha ê pī-chō-bu̍t, lóng bōe-tàng chhiat-tn̄g Siōng-tè thong-kè lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tùi lán ê thiàⁿ!" 
Romans9:1 Góa choh chi̍t ê sio̍k Ki-tok ê lâng kóng si̍t-ōe, bô pe̍h-chha̍t; góa ê liông-sim siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng kā góa choh-chèng:" 
Romans9:2 Góa hui-siông iu-siong, sim-lāi thòng-khó͘ bô-thêng." 
Romans9:3 Góa ūi-tio̍h tông-pau, góa ê kut-jio̍k chì-chhin, pún-sin nā tio̍h siū chiù-chó͘ kap Ki-tok keh-khui mā kam-goān." 
Romans9:4 In sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng; Siōng-tè kéng-soán in chòe kiáⁿ-jî, sù in êng-kng, iok, Lu̍t-hoat, lé-gî, kap èng-ún." 
Romans9:5 In sī cho̍k-tiúⁿ ê kiáⁿ-sun; chiàu hiat-thóng, Ki-tok kap in tâng-cho̍k. Goān chhiau-oa̍t bān-mi̍h ê Siōng-tè tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn kàu bān sè-tāi. Amen!" 
Romans9:6 Án-ni m̄-sī kóng Siōng-tè ê èng-ún bô si̍t-hiān. In-ūi m̄-sī só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê soán-bîn. 
Romans9:7 A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun mā bô lóng sī èng-ún ê kiáⁿ-jî. Siōng-tè bat tùi A-pek-la-hán kóng, “Tùi Í-sat siⁿ,ê chiah thang sǹg-chòe lí ê kiáⁿ-sun.”" 
Romans9:8 Án-ni sī kóng hiat-thóng ê kiáⁿ-jî bô it-tēng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî; chí-ū tùi Siōng-tè ê èng-ún siⁿ,ê chiah sǹg sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-sun. 
Romans9:9 In-ūi èng-ún ê ōe sī án-ni kóng, “Sî-ki kàu, góa ōe koh lâi, Sa-la ōe siⁿ chi̍t ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ.”" 
Romans9:10 M̄-nā án-ni, Lē-pek-ka ê siang-siⁿ-kiáⁿ mā-sī tùi kâng chi̍t ê lâng, chiū-sī lán ê chó͘-sian Í-sat lâi hoâi-īn." 
Romans9:11 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh piáu-sī Siōng-tè khak-si̍t kun-kù ka-kī ê bo̍k-te̍k lâi kéng-soán lâng, I tùi Lē-pek-ka kóng, “Tōa,ê ōe ho̍k-sāi sòe,ê.” Chit-kù ōe sī tī in iáu-bē chhut-sì, iáu-bē chòe hó á-sī chòe pháiⁿ í-chêng, Siōng-tè só͘ kóng,ê. Án-ni, Siōng-tè ê kéng-soán m̄-sī kun-kù lâng ê hêng-ûi, sī kun-kù I ka-kī ê soán-tiàu." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Chiàu Sèng-keng kì-chài, “ Ngá-kok, góa kah-ì; Í-sò, góa bô kah-ì.”" 
Romans9:14 Án-ni, lán beh kóng sím-mi̍h? Siōng-tè bô kong-tō sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī!" 
Romans9:15 I bat tùi Mô͘-se kóng: Góa beh lîn-bín góa ài lîn-bín ê lâng; góa beh thé-thiap góa ài thé-thiap ê lâng. 
Romans9:16 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè ê kéng-soán m̄-sī kun-kù lâng ê ì-goān á-sī lô-le̍k, sī chhut tī I ê lîn-bín." 
Romans9:17 Sèng-keng kì-chài Siōng-tè ū tùi Hoat-ló kóng, “Góa siat-li̍p lí choh-ông, bo̍k-te̍k sī beh ēng lí lâi hián-bêng góa ê koân-lêng, hō͘ góa ê miâ thoân kàu choân sè-kài.”" 
Romans9:18 Só͘-í, Siōng-tè beh lîn-bín sím-mi̍h-lâng chiū kā i lîn-bín, beh hō͘ sím-mi̍h-lâng sim ngī chiū hō͘ i sim ngī." 
Romans9:19 Án-ni, lí ōe kā góa mn̄g, “Kì-jiân sī án-ni, sī-án-chóaⁿ Siōng-tè iáu-teh chek-pī lâng? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng hoán-khòng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì?”" 
Romans9:20 Lí chit-ê lâng, lí sǹg siáⁿ, káⁿ kā Siōng-tè tú-chhùi! Siū sok-chō ê mi̍h kiám ōe tùi sok-chō,ê kóng, “Lí sī-án-chóaⁿ kā góa chō kah án-ni?”" 
Romans9:21 Sio-hûi,ê kiám bô koân thang ēng kâng chi̍t tè liâm-thô͘ chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chō chi̍t ê kùi-khì ê khì-khū, chi̍t ê chho͘-sio̍k ê khì-khū?" 
Romans9:22 Sui-jiân Siōng-tè beh piáu-sī I ê siū-khì hō͘ lâng chai I ê koân-lêng, iáu-kú ēng chin tōa ê khoan-iông thun-lún hiah-ê jiá I siū-khì eng-kai bia̍t-bông ê lâng." 
Romans9:23 I ūi-tio̍h só͘ ū-pī lâi chiap-siū I ê êng-kng hiah-ê lâng, chiū-sī I lîn-bín ê tùi-siōng, I koh-khah ōe hō͘ in chai I hong-hù ê êng-kng." 
Romans9:24 Lán lóng sī I só͘ ho͘-tiàu,ê, m̄-nā tùi Iû-thài -lâng, mā tùi Gōa-pang-lâng tiong-kan ho͘-tiàu." 
Romans9:25 Chiàu I tī Hô-se-a-su só͘ kóng: Pún-lâi m̄-sī góa ê chú-bîn,ê, góa beh chheng-ho͘ in chòe “góa ê chú-bîn”. Pún-lâi m̄-sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ,ê, góa beh hō͘ in chòe “góa só͘ thiàⁿ,ê”." 
Romans9:26 Tī hit-ê só͘-chāi, góa bat tùi in kóng “Lín m̄-sī góa ê chú-bîn”; siâng-khoán tī hia, in ōe kiò-chòe “éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî”." 
Romans9:27 Koan-hē Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, Í-sài-a bat soan-pò͘ kóng, “Sui-jiân Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-soa hiah-ni̍h chōe, m̄-kú chí-ū só͘ chhun ê chió-sò͘ ōe tit-tio̍h kiù," 
Romans9:28 in-ūi Chú tī tōe-chiūⁿ ōe chin kín koh thiat-tóe chip-hêng sím-phòaⁿ.” 
Romans9:29 Che sī chiàu Í-sài-a í-chêng só͘ kóng: Nā m̄-sī Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe kā lán lâu chéng, lán chá chiū chhin-chhiūⁿ Só͘-to-má, mā chhin-chhiūⁿ Gô-mô͘-la." 
Romans9:30 Án-ni, lán beh kóng sím-mi̍h? Gōa-pang-lâng bô tui-kiû kap Siōng-tè kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, khiok tùi sìn kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans9:31 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tui-kiû tùi Lu̍t-hoat hō͘ Siōng-tè jīn-tēng in chòe gī-lâng, hoán-tńg bô tit-tio̍h." 
Romans9:32 Ná ōe án-ni? In-ūi in m̄-sī tùi sìn, sī tùi khò hêng-ûi. In khì that-tio̍h hit-tè hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó ê chio̍h poa̍h-tó." 
Romans9:33 Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài: Khòaⁿ leh, góa chiong hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó ê chio̍h, hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó ê tōa chio̍h khǹg tī Sek-an; sìn I ê lâng bōe tì-kàu sit-bāng." 
Romans10:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ê sim jia̍t-chhiat ǹg-bāng, koh tùi Siōng-tè kî-kiû,ê, chiū-sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ōe tit-tio̍h kiù." 
Romans10:2 Góa ōe-tàng ūi-tio̍h in choh-chèng: In tùi Siōng-tè ū jia̍t-sim, m̄-kú m̄-sī kun-kù chèng-khak ê liáu-kái." 
Romans10:3 In-ūi in bô bêng-pe̍k Siōng-tè ê gī, beh ēng ka-kī ê hong-hoat tui-kiû kap Siōng-tè kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, soah bô sūn-thàn Siōng-tè hō͘ lâng chiâⁿ-chòe gī-lâng ê hong-hoat." 
Romans10:4 Kî-si̍t, Ki-tok í-keng oân-sêng Lu̍t-hoat ê bo̍k-te̍k, hō͘ sìn ê lâng ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Romans10:5 Koan-hē tùi khò Lu̍t-hoat tit,tio̍h ê gī, Mô͘-se ū án-ni siá, “Siú Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng khò Lu̍t-hoat lâi oa̍h.”" 
Romans10:6 M̄-kú koan-hē tùi sìn chheng-gī, Sèng-keng ū án-ni kóng, “Lí m̄-thang sim-lāi kóng ‘Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe peh-chiūⁿ thiⁿ’ — chiū-sī kóng, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe chiong Ki-tok chhōa,lo̍h-lâi?" 
Romans10:7 Mā m̄-thang kóng ‘Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe lo̍h-khì chhim-ian’ — chiū-sī kóng, sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe chiong Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong chhōa,khí-lâi?”" 
Romans10:8 Chiah-ê ōe tàu-tóe sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Ì-sù sī: Siōng-tè ê ōe kap lí chin kūn, tī lí ê chhùi,ni̍h, tī lí ê sim-lāi. Che chiū-sī goán só͘ soan-iông ê sìn ê sìn-sit." 
Romans10:9 Lí nā ēng chhùi soan-jīn “Iâ-so͘ sī Chú”, sim sìn Siōng-tè ū hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, chiū ōe tit-tio̍h kiù." 
Romans10:10 In-ūi lâng sim sìn chiū tit-tio̍h chheng-gī; chhùi soan-jīn chiū tit-tio̍h kiù. 
Romans10:11 Sèng-keng ū án-ni kì-chài, “Sìn I ê lâng bōe tì-kàu sit-bāng.”" 
Romans10:12 Iû-thài -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng lóng bô chha-pia̍t, in-ūi ū kâng chi̍t ūi Siōng-tè sī bān-bîn ê Chú, I ōe hong-hong-hù-hù sù-hok hō͘ só͘-ū kiû-kiò I ê lâng." 
Romans10:13 In-ūi “Só͘-ū kiû-kiò Chú ê miâ ê lâng lóng ōe tit-kiù.” 
Romans10:14 M̄-kú in to bô sìn I, ná ōe kiû-kiò I? To bô thiaⁿ,tio̍h, ná ōe sìn I? To bô lâng thoân, ná ōe thiaⁿ,tio̍h?" 
Romans10:15 To bô chhe-phài, ná ōe thoân? Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, “Thoân-pò͘ hok-im ê lâng, in ê kha-jiah jōa-á-ni̍h súi!”" 
Romans10:16 M̄-kú, m̄-sī só͘-ū ê lâng lóng sūn-thàn chit-ê hok-im. Í-sài-a kóng, “Chú ah, sím-mi̍h-lâng sìn goán só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit?”" 
Romans10:17 Só͘-í, sìn sī tùi thiaⁿ, thiaⁿ sī tùi thiaⁿ Ki-tok ê ōe." 
Romans10:18 Put-kò góa beh mn̄g, in kiám chin-chiàⁿ lóng m̄-bat thiaⁿ,tio̍h? Tong-jiân bat! Sèng-keng án-ni kì-chài: In ê siaⁿ-im thoân-piàn choân-tōe; in ê ōe thoân kàu thiⁿ-piⁿ-hái-kak." 
Romans10:19 Góa beh koh mn̄g, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kiám chin-chiàⁿ m̄ chai? Tāi-seng, Mô͘-se thòe Siōng-tè án-ni kóng: Góa beh ēng m̄-sī góa chú-bîn ê lâng lâi ín-khí lín oàn-tò͘, ēng gû-gōng ê chú-bîn lâi kek-khí lín siū-khì." 
Romans10:20 Āu-lâi Í-sài-a mā chin hó-táⁿ thòe Siōng-tè kóng: Bô chhē góa ê lâng, góa ū hō͘ in chhē,tio̍h; bô kiû góa ê lâng, góa ū tùi in hián-hiān." 
Romans10:21 M̄-kú koan-hē Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, I ū kóng, “Ngī-sim pōe-ge̍k ê chú-bîn, góa kui-ji̍t chhun siang-chhiú hoan-gêng.”" 
Romans11:1 Án-ni, góa beh mn̄g, Siōng-tè kiám ū pàng-sak I ê chú-bîn? Choa̍t-tùi bô! Góa pún-sin mā-sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, sī A-pek-la-hán ê hō͘-tāi, sio̍k Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k." 
Romans11:2 Siōng-tè m̄-bat pàng-sak I chá chiū kéng-soán ê chú-bîn. Lín kiám m̄ chai Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, Í-lī-a tùi Siōng-tè khòng-kò Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng," 
Romans11:3 kóng, “Chú ah, in thâi-sí lí ê sian-ti, thiah-húi lí ê chè-tôaⁿ, chí-ū chhun góa chi̍t lâng, in mā teh siàu-siūⁿ góa ê sìⁿ-miā.”" 
Romans11:4 M̄-kú Siōng-tè án-chóaⁿ ìn-tap? I kóng, “Góa ū ūi-tio̍h ka-kī lâu chhit-chheng ê m̄-bat kūi-pài Pa-le̍k ê lâng.”" 
Romans11:5 Hiān-kim chit-ê sî ê chêng-hêng mā-sī án-ni, Siōng-tè ū lâu ēng un-tián kéng-soán ê chió-sò͘-lâng." 
Romans11:6 Kì-jiân sī Siōng-tè ê un-tián, chiū m̄-sī kun-kù lâng ê hêng-ûi; nā kun-kù lâng ê hêng-ûi, un-tián chiū m̄-sī un-tián!" 
Romans11:7 Nā án-ni, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bô tit-tio̍h in teh tui-chhē,ê, chí-ū Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê chió-sò͘-lâng ū tit,tio̍h. Kî-tha ê lâng sim ngī m̄ thiaⁿ," 
Romans11:8 chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Siōng-tè hō͘ in ê sim-lêng bâ-pì, ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ bōe kìⁿ, hī-khang thiaⁿ bōe tio̍h, ti̍t-kàu kin-á-ji̍t." 
Romans11:9 Tāi-pi̍t kóng: Tio̍h hō͘ in ê iàn-se̍k chiâⁿ-chòe hām-khiⁿ, lô-bāng, hō͘ in poa̍h-tó, chòe in ê pò-èng." 
Romans11:10 Tio̍h hō͘ in ê ba̍k-chiu hoe, bōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ, hō͘ in ê ka-chiah-phiaⁿ éng-oán khiau-ku." 
Romans11:11 Án-ni, góa beh kóng, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng tó,lo̍h-khì, kiám lóng peh bōe khí,lâi? It-tēng bōe án-ni! Tian-tò in-ūi in ê kè-sit, chín-kiù lîm-kàu Gōa-pang-lâng, lâi kek-khí Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê oàn-tò͘." 
Romans11:12 Kì-jiân Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê kè-sit ōe hō͘ sè-kan-lâng tit-tio̍h hong-hù ê chiok-hok, in ê sit-pāi ōe hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng tit-tio̍h hong-hù ê chiok-hok, hô-hòng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng nā choân-sò͘ tit-tio̍h kiù, hit-ê chiok-hok kiám bōe koh-khah hong-hù?" 
Romans11:13 Hiān-chāi góa tùi lín Gōa-pang-lâng kóng. Kì-jiân góa sī Gōa-pang-lâng ê sù-tô͘, góa khòaⁿ góa ê chit-hūn chòe êng-kng," 
Romans11:14 án-ni thang kek-khí góa ê tông-pau ê oàn-tò͘, lâi kiù in tiong-kan chi̍t-kóa lâng." 
Romans11:15 Í-sek-lia̍t tông-pau siū khì-sak nā ōe hō͘ sè-kan-lâng kap Siōng-tè koh hô-hó, in koh siū chiap-la̍p kiám m̄-sī chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng tùi sí koh-oa̍h?" 
Romans11:16 Thâu chi̍t tè mī-oân nā sèng-pia̍t kui hō͘ Siōng-tè, kui-sn̂g mā lóng ōe án-ni; chhiū-kun nā sèng-pia̍t kui hō͘ Siōng-tè, ki mā lóng ōe án-ni." 
Romans11:17 Lâng kā kaⁿ-ná-chhiū-ki chián,khí-lâi, chiong lín chiah-ê iá-seng ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū-ki chiap,lo̍h-khì, lâi chiap-siū kâng hit-châng chhiū-kun ê êng-ióng-hūn," 
Romans11:18 lín chiū m̄-thang tùi chián,khí-lâi ê chhiū-ki khoa-kháu. Lín nā beh khoa-kháu, tio̍h chai, m̄-sī kun teh óa-khò lín, sī lín teh óa-khò kun." 
Romans11:19 Lí kiám-chhái beh kóng, “Chiah-ê chhiū-ki chián,khí-lâi sī beh kā góa chiap,lo̍h-khì.”" 
Romans11:20 Tio̍h! In m̄ sìn chiah siū chián,khí-lâi, lí tùi sìn chiah khiā ōe tiâu. Lí m̄-thang kiau-ngō͘, tio̍h kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Romans11:21 In-ūi Siōng-tè nā bô lâu goân-lâi ê chhiū-ki, mā bô it-tēng ōe lâu lí." 
Romans11:22 Só͘-í, tio̍h chai Siōng-tè ê chû-ài kap giâm-hat, tùi tūi-lo̍h ê lâng, I chin giâm-hat, m̄-kú lí nā kè-sio̍k óa-khò I ê chû-ài, I chiū ēng chû-ài tùi-thāi lí; nā bô, lí mā ōe siū chián-tn̄g sit-khì I ê chû-ài." 
Romans11:23 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng nā m̄-sī kian-chhî m̄ sìn, chiū ōe siū chiap tò-tńg,khì, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe-tàng koh kā in chiap tò-tńg,khì." 
Romans11:24 Lín chiah-ê tùi iá-seng ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū chián,khí-lâi ê chhiū-ki, Siōng-tè to ōe-tàng ûi-hoán chū-jiân kā lín chiap tī hó ê kaⁿ-ná-chhiū, hiah-ê goân-lâi ê chhiū-ki kiám bōe koh-khah eng-kai chiap tò-tńg,khì?" 
Romans11:25 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ài lín chai chit-ê ò-biāu ê chin-lí, chiah bōe siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī sī chhong-bêng. Chit-ê ò-biāu chiū-sī chi̍t-pō͘-hūn ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chiām-sî ngī-sim, kàu Gōa-pang-lâng kui Chú ê sò͘-bo̍k móa ûi-chí." 
Romans11:26 Án-ni, só͘-ū ê Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng lóng ōe tit-kiù. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Chín-kiù-chiá ōe tùi Sek-an chhut,lâi, I ōe tû-khì Ngá-kok ê put-khiân put-gī." 
Romans11:27 Hit-sî góa beh tû-khì in ê chōe; Che sī góa kap in só͘ li̍p ê iok. 
Romans11:28 Chi̍t hong-bīn, tùi hok-im ê koan-tiám lâi kóng, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng in-ūi lín ê iân-kò͘ chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê tùi-te̍k. Lēng-gōa chi̍t hong-bīn, tùi kéng-soán ê koan-tiám lâi kóng, in-ūi in chó͘-sian ê iân-kò͘, in chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng;" 
Romans11:29 in-ūi Siōng-tè ê un-sù kap kéng-soán bōe kái-piàn. 
Romans11:30 Lín Gōa-pang-lâng í-chêng bô sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè, hiān-chāi in-ūi Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng bô sūn-ho̍k, lín chiah tit-tio̍h lîn-bín." 
Romans11:31 Kâng-khoán, in-ūi lín ū tit-tio̍h lîn-bín, in hiān-chāi bô sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè, sī beh hō͘ in mā ōe tit-tio̍h lîn-bín." 
Romans11:32 Siōng-tè chiong só͘-ū ê lâng lóng koaiⁿ tī bô sūn-ho̍k ê chōng-thāi, sī ūi-tio̍h beh lîn-bín só͘-ū ê lâng." 
Romans11:33 Siōng-tè ê hong-sēng, tì-hūi, chai-bat, jōa-á-ni̍h chhim-tîm ah! I ê phòaⁿ-toàn oh-tit thui-chhek; I ê tō-lō͘ oh-tit chhē,tio̍h!" 
Romans11:34 Sím-mi̍h-lâng chai Chú ê sim-ì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng thòe I chhut chú-ì? 
Romans11:35 Sím-mi̍h-lâng bat seng hō͘ I sím-mi̍h, I tio̍h pò-tap in?" 
Romans11:36 In-ūi bān-mi̍h lóng chhut tī I, óa-khò I, kui tī I; goān I tit-tio̍h êng-kng ti̍t-kàu éng-oán. Amen!" 
Romans12:1 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, in-ūi Siōng-tè ê lîn-bín, góa khǹg lín tio̍h chiong ka-kī ê seng-khu hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè chòe oa̍h-oa̍h ê chè, sī sèng-kiat, I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê; che sī lín ha̍p-gî ê kèng-pài." 
Romans12:2 M̄-thang hō͘ sè-sio̍k tông-hòa, tian-tò tio̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè kā lín kái-chō, sim-chì tit-tio̍h keng-sin, hō͘ lín thang piān-pia̍t sím-mi̍h sī Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí, khòaⁿ-chòe hó, koh oân-choân ê chí-ì." 
Romans12:3 Khò Siōng-tè hō͘ góa ê un-sù, góa tùi lín ta̍k-ê lâng kóng: M̄-thang chiong ka-kī khòaⁿ siuⁿ koân, tio̍h chiàu Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lín ta̍k-ê lâng sìn-sim ê hūn-liōng sīn-tiōng phêng-kè ka-kī." 
Romans12:4 Chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t ê seng-khu ū chin chōe chi-thé, ta̍k-ê chi-thé kok ū bô sio-siâng ê kong-lêng." 
Romans12:5 Sui-jiân lán ū chin chōe lâng, m̄-kú tī Ki-tok sī chi̍t-thé, hō͘-siōng chòe chi-thé." 
Romans12:6 Chiàu Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lán ê un-tián, lán ta̍k-ê lâng ū tit-tio̍h bô sio-siâng ê un-sù: Soan-káng sìn-sit ê lâng tio̍h hû-ha̍p sìn-sim soan-káng;" 
Romans12:7 ho̍k-sāi ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim ho̍k-sāi; kàu-tō ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim kàu-tō; 
Romans12:8 khoàn-bián ê lâng tio̍h choân-sim khoàn-bián; chín-chè ê lâng tio̍h khóng-khài; léng-tō ê lâng tio̍h jia̍t-sêng; chòe chû-siān ê lâng tio̍h kam-sim lo̍k-ì. 
Romans12:9 Thiàⁿ tio̍h sêng-sim sêng-ì; tio̍h oàn-hūn pháiⁿ, kian-chhî hó." 
Romans12:10 Tio̍h ēng hiaⁿ-tī-ài hō͘-siōng saⁿ-thiàⁿ; tio̍h chin-sim saⁿ kèng-tiōng. 
Romans12:11 M̄-thang pîn-tōaⁿ; sim-chì tio̍h jia̍t-sêng, kè-sio̍k ho̍k-sāi Chú." 
Romans12:12 Tio̍h khǹg ǹg-bāng lâi hoaⁿ-hí; tio̍h jím-siū hoān-lān; tio̍h put-sî kî-tó. 
Romans12:13 Tio̍h pang-chān lín tiong-kan sàn-chhiah ê sìn-tô͘; tio̍h hó khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng. 
Romans12:14 Tio̍h chiok-hok pek-hāi lín ê lâng; tio̍h chiok-hok, m̄-thang chiù-chó͘." 
Romans12:15 Tio̍h kap hoaⁿ-hí ê lâng chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí, kap ai-khàu ê lâng chòe-hé ai-khàu." 
Romans12:16 Tio̍h tâng-sim-ha̍p-ì; m̄-thang kiau-ngō͘; tio̍h chòe pîn-chiān ê lâng ê tâng-phōaⁿ; m̄-thang chū-chok-chhong-bêng. 
Romans12:17 M̄-thang ēng pháiⁿ pò pháiⁿ; tio̍h chòe chèng-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe hó ê sū. 
Romans12:18 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe kap chèng-lâng hô-bo̍k siong-chhù. 
Romans12:19 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h ka-kī pò-oan, lêng-khó hō͘ Siōng-tè thòe lín siū-khì, in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Chú kóng: Sin-oan chāi-tī góa, góa ōe pò-èng.”" 
Romans12:20 M̄-kú Sèng-keng mā ū kì-chài, “Lí ê tùi-te̍k nā iau, tio̍h hō͘ i chia̍h, chhùi-ta, tio̍h hō͘ i lim; in-ūi lí án-ni chòe, ná-chún chiong teh to̍h ê hé-thòaⁿ thia̍p tī i ê thâu-khak téng, hō͘ i bīn âng chai thang kiàn-siàu.”" 
Romans12:21 Só͘-í, m̄-thang hō͘ pháiⁿ iâⁿ-kè lín; tio̍h ēng hó khah iâⁿ pháiⁿ." 
Romans13:1 Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h sūn-ho̍k tī téng-bīn ê koân-pèng, in-ūi koân-pèng lóng sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi. Chiáng-koân-chiá ê koân-pèng lóng sī Siōng-tè chè-tēng,ê." 
Romans13:2 Só͘-í, hoán-khòng koân-pèng sī ûi-pōe Siōng-tè só͘ chè-tēng ê chè-tō͘; hoán-khòng ê lâng ōe siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
Romans13:3 Thóng-tī-chiá m̄-sī beh hō͘ choh-hó ê lâng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, sī beh hō͘ choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ. Lí kiám bô ài chòe chi̍t ê bián kiaⁿ ū koân-pèng ê lâng? Nā ài, tio̍h choh-hó, lí chiū ōe tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn;" 
Romans13:4 in-ūi i sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng, i ê chit-chek sī beh pang-chān lí. M̄-kú lí nā choh-pháiⁿ, tio̍h kiaⁿ i, in-ūi i tòa kiàm m̄-sī bô bo̍k-te̍k. I sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng, sī sin-oan-chiá, beh thòe Siōng-tè hêng-hoa̍t choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng." 
Romans13:5 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h sūn-ho̍k, m̄-sī kan-ta in-ūi kiaⁿ Siōng-tè siū-khì, mā-sī ūi-tio̍h liông-sim ê iân-kò͘." 
Romans13:6 Lín la̍p-sè mā-sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê lí-iû, in-ūi i sī ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè ê lâng, teh chip-hêng i ê chit-bū." 
Romans13:7 Tio̍h tùi chèng-lâng chīn lín ê gī-bū; lín khiàm,ê, tio̍h hêng; eng-kai la̍p,ê, tio̍h la̍p; eng-kai kiaⁿ-ùi,ê, tio̍h kiaⁿ-ùi; eng-kai chun-kèng,ê, tio̍h chun-kèng." 
Romans13:8 Hō͘-siōng saⁿ-thiàⁿ ê chè í-gōa, choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang khiàm lâng sím-mi̍h; in-ūi thiàⁿ pa̍t-lâng,ê, í-keng ū oân-sêng Lu̍t-hoat ê iau-kiû." 
Romans13:9 Lu̍t-hoat ê iau-kiû sī: “M̄-thang kan-îm; m̄-thang hāi-sí lâng; m̄-thang thau-the̍h; m̄-thang tham-sim.” Chiah-ê kap kî-tha ê iau-kiû lóng pau-hâm tī “Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī” chit-kù ōe. 
Romans13:10 Thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê lâng bōe siong-hāi pa̍t-lâng. Só͘-í, thiàⁿ sêng-choân Lu̍t-hoat." 
Romans13:11 Án-ni, lín chai chit-ê sî-chūn sī lín eng-kai khùn-chhíⁿ ê sî, in-ūi hiān-chāi pí lán tú-tú sìn ê sî koh-khah chiap-kūn chín-kiù." 
Romans13:12 Mî,sî í-keng chhim, ji̍t,sî teh-beh kàu. Só͘-í, lán tio̍h thǹg-tiāu o͘-àm ê hêng-ûi, chhēng kng-bêng ê chong-pī." 
Romans13:13 Lán ê hêng-ûi tio̍h toan-chèng, chhin-chhiūⁿ tī ji̍t,sî teh seng-oa̍h. M̄-thang hòng-chhiòng, chiú-chùi; m̄-thang hò͘ⁿ-sek, hòng-tōng; m̄-thang saⁿ-chiⁿ, oàn-tò͘." 
Romans13:14 Tio̍h chhēng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chong-pī ka-kī; m̄-thang chí-ū tô͘-bô͘ jio̍k-thé ê sū lâi boán-chiok su-io̍k. 
Romans14:1 Sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng tio̍h kā i chiap-la̍p, m̄-thang kap i piān-lūn ū cheng-gī ê sū." 
Romans14:2 Sìn-sim kian-kiông ê lâng sìn ta̍k-hāng lóng thang chia̍h, m̄-kú loán-jio̍k ê lâng chí-ū chia̍h chhài-soe." 
Romans14:3 Ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng m̄-thang khòaⁿ-khin bô ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng; bô ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng mā m̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ ta̍k-hāng chia̍h ê lâng, in-ūi Siōng-tè í-keng ū chiap-la̍p i." 
Romans14:4 Lí sǹg siáⁿ, ná káⁿ phoe-phòaⁿ pa̍t-lâng ê po̍k-jîn? I chòe-liáu hó á-sī bô hó, i ê chú-lâng ōe kā i sím-phòaⁿ. I ōe chòe hó-sè, in-ūi Chú ōe kā i pang-chān." 
Romans14:5 Ū lâng khòaⁿ chit-ji̍t pí hit-ji̍t khah tiōng-iàu; mā ū lâng khòaⁿ ta̍k-ji̍t pîⁿ-pîⁿ tiōng-iàu. Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h ū ka-kī bêng-khak ê kiàn-kái. 
Romans14:6 Siú te̍k-pia̍t ji̍t-chí ê lâng sī ūi-tio̍h Chú lâi siú; ū chia̍h-bah ê lâng mā-sī ūi-tio̍h Chú lâi chia̍h, in-ūi i ū kám-siā Siōng-tè. Bô chia̍h-bah ê lâng sī ūi-tio̍h Chú bô chia̍h, i mā-sī ū kám-siā Siōng-tè." 
Romans14:7 Lán bô lâng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī teh oa̍h, mā bô lâng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī lâi sí." 
Romans14:8 Lán nā oa̍h, sī ūi-tio̍h Chú teh oa̍h; nā sí, mā-sī ūi-tio̍h Chú lâi sí. Só͘-í, bô-lūn oa̍h á-sī sí, lán lóng sī sio̍k Chú ê lâng." 
Romans14:9 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bo̍k-te̍k Ki-tok ū sí, mā ū koh-oa̍h, thang siâng-sî chòe sí-lâng kap oa̍h-lâng ê Chú." 
Romans14:10 Án-ni, sī-án-chóaⁿ lí teh phoe-phòaⁿ lí ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē? Sī-án-chóaⁿ teh khòaⁿ-khin lí ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē? In-ūi lán chèng-lâng lóng tio̍h khiā tī Siōng-tè ê sím-phòaⁿ-tâi chêng." 
Romans14:11 Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Chú kóng: góa sī éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè; ta̍k-ê kha-thâu-u ōe kā góa kūi-pài, ta̍k-ê chhùi ōe soan-jīn góa sī Siōng-tè." 
Romans14:12 Án-ni, lán ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h chiong ka-kī ê tāi-chì tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng kau-tài chheng-chhó." 
Romans14:13 Só͘-í, lán m̄-thang koh-chài hō͘-siōng phoe-phòaⁿ, hoán-tńg tio̍h koat-sim bô chòe hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê sìn-gióng siū chó͘-gāi, poa̍h-tó ê sū." 
Romans14:14 Góa chai, koh Chú Iâ-so͘ hō͘ góa khak-sìn, ta̍k-hāng mi̍h pún-sin lóng chheng-khì; lâng nā siūⁿ-kóng bô chheng-khì, tùi hit-ê lâng lâi kóng hit-hāng mi̍h chiū bô chheng-khì." 
Romans14:15 Lí nā in-ūi só͘ chia̍h ê mi̍h hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē sim kan-khó͘, lí ê hêng-ûi chiū m̄-sī chhut tī thiàⁿ-sim. Lí m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h ka-kī só͘ chia̍h ê mi̍h hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē tì-kàu bia̍t-bông, in-ūi Ki-tok í-keng ūi-tio̍h in sí." 
Romans14:16 Só͘-í, m̄-thang hō͘ lín khòaⁿ-chòe hó,ê chiâⁿ-chòe lâng ê húi-pòng." 
Romans14:17 Siōng-tè chú-koân ê si̍t-hiān m̄-sī khò lim-chia̍h, sī khò Sèng Sîn só͘ sù ê kong-gī, hô-pêng, kap hoaⁿ-hí." 
Romans14:18 Ēng án-ni lâi ho̍k-sāi Ki-tok ê lâng ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí, mā ōe tit-tio̍h lâng ê chheng-chàn." 
Romans14:19 Só͘-í, lán tio̍h tui-kiû hô-bo̍k kap hō͘-siōng chō-chiū ê sū." 
Romans14:20 M̄-thang ūi-tio̍h chia̍h-mi̍h phò-hoāi Siōng-tè ê kang-chok. Bān-mi̍h lóng chheng-khì, m̄-kú lâng nā in-ūi chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ pa̍t-lâng ê sìn-gióng siū chó͘-gāi chiū m̄ hó." 
Romans14:21 Khah hó sī bô chia̍h-bah, bô lim-chiú, bô chòe hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē sit-khì sìn-gióng ê tāi-chì." 
Romans14:22 Lí tùi chi̍t hāng sū ê sìn-liām sī lí kap Siōng-tè tiong-kan ê tāi-chì. Tùi ka-kī khòaⁿ-chòe tio̍h ê sū bô chū-chek ê lâng chin ū hok-khì. 
Romans14:23 M̄-kú sim ū giâu-gî lâi chia̍h ê lâng ōe siū tēng-chōe, in-ūi m̄-sī chhut-tī sìn-sim. M̄-sī chhut-tī sìn-sim lâi chòe,ê lóng sī chōe." 
Romans15:1 Lán chiah-ê sìn-sim kian-kiông ê lâng eng-kai kā sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng tàu taⁿ tāng-tàⁿ. M̄-thang kiû hō͘ ka-kī hoaⁿ-hí; 
Romans15:2 lán ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h kiû hō͘ chhù-piⁿ hoaⁿ-hí, hō͘ in tit-tio̍h lī-ek thang kiàn-li̍p sìn-sim." 
Romans15:3 In-ūi Ki-tok bô kiû hō͘ ka-kī hoaⁿ-hí, hoán-tńg chhin-chhiūⁿ Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, “Bú-jio̍k lí ê lâng ê bú-jio̍k lóng kui tī góa.”" 
Romans15:4 Chá-chêng só͘ siá,ê lóng sī ūi-tio̍h beh kà-sī lán lâi siá,ê, hō͘ lán tùi jím-nāi kap Sèng-keng ê an-ùi tit-tio̍h ǹg-bāng." 
Romans15:5 Goān sù jím-nāi kap an-ùi ê Siōng-tè hō͘ lín tâng sim-chì ha̍k-si̍p Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê bô͘-iūⁿ," 
Romans15:6 thang tâng-sim tâng-siaⁿ êng-iāu lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! 
Romans15:7 Só͘-í, ūi-tio̍h êng-iāu Siōng-tè, lín tio̍h hō͘-siōng chiap-la̍p, chhin-chhiūⁿ Ki-tok ū chiap-la̍p lín." 
Romans15:8 Góa kā lín kóng, Ki-tok chiâⁿ-chòe siū kat-lé ê lâng ê chhe-ēng, sī beh hián-sī Siōng-tè ê sìn-si̍t, thang chèng-bêng Siōng-tè tùi lán chó͘-sian ê èng-ún ū si̍t-hiān," 
Romans15:9 mā beh hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng in-ūi Siōng-tè ê lîn-bín thang kui êng-kng hō͘ I. Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Só͘-í, góa beh tī Gōa-pang-lâng tiong-kan soan-jīn lí, chhiùⁿ-koa o-ló lí ê miâ." 
Romans15:10 I koh kóng: Gōa-pang-lâng ah, tio̍h kap Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí." 
Romans15:11 I koh kóng: Bān-kok ah, tio̍h o-ló Chú; bān-bîn ah, tio̍h siōng-chàn I." 
Romans15:12 Í-sài-a koh-chài kóng: Iâ-se ê kun ōe puh-íⁿ, I ōe khí-lâi thóng-tī gōa-pang; Gōa-pang-lâng lóng ōe chiong ǹg-bāng kau-thok I." 
Romans15:13 Goān sù ǹg-bāng ê Siōng-tè, in-ūi lín tùi I ê sìn-sim, hō͘ lín chhiong-móa ta̍k-khoán ê hoaⁿ-hí kap pêng-an, koh hō͘ lín tùi Sèng Sîn ê lêng-le̍k chhiong-móa ǹg-bāng!" 
Romans15:14 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ka-kī khak-sìn lín hui-siông liông-siān, chhiong-móa ta̍k-khoán ê tì-sek, koh ōe-hiáu hō͘-siōng khó͘-khǹg." 
Romans15:15 M̄-kú góa hó-táⁿ siá chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lín, kā lín thê-chhíⁿ kúi tiám; in-ūi Siōng-tè ū sù góa te̍k-pia̍t ê un-tián," 
Romans15:16 thang tī Gōa-pang-lâng ê tiong-kan ho̍k-sāi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, choh chè-si soan-káng Siōng-tè ê hok-im, thang hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng chiâⁿ-chòe Sèng Sîn só͘ sèng-hòa, Siōng-tè chiap-la̍p ê chè-mi̍h." 
Romans15:17 Só͘-í, in-ūi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê iân-kò͘, góa khòaⁿ ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè chòe êng-kng." 
Romans15:18 Góa m̄-káⁿ kóng pa̍t-hāng tāi-chì, chí-ū beh kóng chit-hāng, chiū-sī Ki-tok thong-kè góa ê giân-gú kap hêng-ûi, ēng sîn-jiah kî-sū ê lêng-le̍k, kap Siōng-tè ê Sîn ê lêng-le̍k, hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè. Só͘-í tùi Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chiu-ûi it-ti̍t kàu Í-lī-lí-kó͘ tōe-khu, góa ta̍k só͘-chāi khì soan-iông Ki-tok ê hok-im." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 Góa koat-ì bô beh tī í-keng thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ki-tok ê miâ ê só͘-chāi thoân hok-im, chiah bōe tī pa̍t-lâng ê tōe-ki téng khí-chhù." 
Romans15:21 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: M̄-bat thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê tāi-chì ê lâng ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ; m̄-bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê lâng ōe bêng-pe̍k. 
Romans15:22 Góa ū chin chōe piàn tú-tio̍h chó͘-tòng, bōe-tàng khì lín hia." 
Romans15:23 M̄-kú taⁿ tī chiah-ê tōe-khu bô pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi thang khì, koh kúi-nā nî lâi, góa it-ti̍t teh ǹg-bāng ōe-tàng khì lín hia." 
Romans15:24 Chit-piàn beh khì Se-pan-gâ ê lō͘-tiong, góa ǹg-bāng ōe keng-kè lín hia khì khòaⁿ lín, seng kap lín ū chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan hoaⁿ-hí ê kau-pôe, jiân-āu chiah hō͘ lín kā góa sòng-hêng kè-sio̍k khì Se-pan-gâ." 
Romans15:25 M̄-kú góa hiān-chāi tio̍h seng khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng kiong-kip hiah-ê sìn-tô͘ ê su-iàu," 
Romans15:26 in-ūi Má-kî-tùn kap A-kai-a ê kàu-hōe hoaⁿ-hí hiàn chi̍t pit chîⁿ pang-chān Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng chi̍t-kóa sàn-chhiah ê sìn-tô͘. 
Romans15:27 Che sī in hoaⁿ-hí chòe,ê, kî-si̍t mā-sī in só͘ khiàm ê chè. Kì-jiân Iû-thài sìn-tô͘ ū kap Gōa-pang-lâng hun-hióng sio̍k-lêng ê hok-khì, Gōa-pang ê sìn-tô͘ eng-kai tī bu̍t-chit-siōng pang-chān in." 
Romans15:28 Thèng-hāu góa chit-hāng tāi-chì chòe hó-sè, chiong koan-bō͘ ê chit-pit chîⁿ kau hō͘ in liáu-āu, chiah keng-kè lín hia khì Se-pan-gâ." 
Romans15:29 Góa chai góa khì lín hia ê sî, mā ōe chiong Ki-tok hong-hù ê un-tián tòa-khì hō͘ lín." 
Romans15:30 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kap Sèng Sîn só͘ sù ê thiàⁿ-sim, góa chhiáⁿ lín chīn-la̍t kap góa chòe-hé ūi-tio̍h góa kî-kiû Siōng-tè," 
Romans15:31 hō͘ góa bián siū-tio̍h Iû-thài m̄-sìn ê lâng ê hām-hāi, koh hō͘ góa tī Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng pān-lí kiong-kip ê tāi-chì ōe tit-tio̍h sìn-tô͘ chiap-la̍p." 
Romans15:32 Án-ni, góa chiū thang hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì khì lín hia, kap lín chòe-hé têng-sin tit-tio̍h khùi-la̍t." 
Romans15:33 Goān sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi. Amen! 
Romans16:1 Góa tùi lín chhui-chiàn lán ê chí-bē Hui-pí, i sī Kian-kek-lí kàu-hōe ê chip-sū." 
Romans16:2 Chhiáⁿ lín in-ūi Chú ê iân-kò͘, chiàu sìn-tô͘ ê pún-hūn kā i chiap-thāi. I ū sím-mi̍h su-iàu, chhiáⁿ lín kā i pang-chān. I it-ti̍t jia̍t-sim pang-chān chin chōe lâng, pau-hâm góa pún-sin." 
Romans16:3 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā Pek-ki-la kap A-ku-la chhéng-an; in kap góa sī tī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lāi-bīn ê tâng-kang. 
Romans16:4 In bat ūi-tio̍h góa mō͘ sìⁿ-miā ê gûi-hiám; m̄-nā góa, liân só͘-ū Gōa-pang ê kàu-hōe mā lóng beh kā in kám-siā." 
Romans16:5 Mā kā tī in tau teh chū-chi̍p ê kàu-hōe chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Í-pài-nî-thó͘; i sī A-sè-a thâu chi̍t ê kui-sìn Ki-tok ê lâng. 
Romans16:6 Mā chhéng-an ūi-tio̍h lín siū chin chōe lô-khó͘ ê Má-lī-a. 
Romans16:7 Koh kā góa ê chhin-cho̍k, kap góa chòe-hé koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê An-to-nî-kó͘ kap Iû-nî-a chhéng-an; in tī sù-tô͘ tiong sī ū bêng-bōng ê lâng, pí góa khah tāi-seng kui-sìn Ki-tok." 
Romans16:8 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an Chú-lāi góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Àm-pek-lī. 
Romans16:9 Chhéng-an tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn ê tâng-kang Ní-pa-ló͘ kap góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Sū-tāi-kó͘. 
Romans16:10 Chhéng-an tī Ki-tok keng-kè khó-giām ê A-pí-lī. Kā A-lī-to-pò͘ ke-lāi ê lâng chhéng-an. 
Romans16:11 Kā góa ê chhin-cho̍k Hi-lô-thian chhéng-an. Kā Ná-kî-sò͘ ke-lāi sìn Chú ê lâng chhéng-an. 
Romans16:12 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa chhéng-an ūi-tio̍h Chú siū chin chōe lô-khó͘ ê Thó͘-hui-ná kap Thó͘-hù-sat. Kā só͘ thiàⁿ ê Pí-sek chhéng-an; i bat ūi-tio̍h Chú lô-khó͘ kang-chok. 
Romans16:13 Chhéng-an tī Chú siū kéng-soán ê Ló͘-hu kap i ê lāu-bú; i ê lāu-bú mā-sī góa ê lāu-bú. 
Romans16:14 Kā A-sùn-kî-thó͘, Hut-le̍k-kan, Hek-bí, Pat-lô-pa, Hek-má, í-ki̍p kap in chòe-hé ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē chhéng-an." 
Romans16:15 Kā Hui-lô-lô-kó͘ kap Iû-lī-a, Nî-lī-a kap i ê chí-bē, kap O-lîm-pa, í-ki̍p kap in chòe-hé ê chèng sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an." 
Romans16:16 Lín tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an. Ki-tok ê chèng kàu-hōe lóng kā lín chhéng-an. 
Romans16:17 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa khó͘-khǹg lín, tio̍h sió-sim thê-hông hiah-ê chè-chō hun-lia̍t, hō͘ lín hoān-chōe, ûi-pōe lín só͘ niá-siū ê kà-sī hiah-ê lâng." 
Romans16:18 In-ūi chit-khoán lâng m̄-sī choh po̍k-jîn teh ho̍k-sāi lán ê Chú Ki-tok, sī teh kò͘ ka-kī ê pak-tó͘, ēng hoa-giân-kháu-gú iú-he̍k láu-si̍t-lâng ê sim." 
Romans16:19 In-ūi lín ê sūn-ho̍k, chèng-lâng í-keng lóng chai, só͘-í góa ūi-tio̍h lín hoaⁿ-hí. Góa ài lín tùi hó-sū tio̍h khiáu, tùi pháiⁿ-sū tio̍h gōng." 
Romans16:20 Sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè chin kín chiū ōe chiong Sat-tàn ta̍h-chhùi, hō͘ i khut-ho̍k tī lín kha-ē. Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê un-hūi kap lín tông-chāi!" 
Romans16:21 Góa ê tâng-kang Thê-mô͘-thài í-ki̍p góa ê chhin-cho̍k Lō͘-kiû, Iâ-sun, Só͘-se-pa-tek kā lín chhéng-an." 
Romans16:22 Góa Tek-thê, chiū-sī chit-tiuⁿ phoe ê tāi-pit-jîn, tī Chú-lāi kā lín chhéng-an." 
Romans16:23 Chiap-thāi góa kap choân kàu-hōe ê Kai-iû kā lín chhéng-an. Chit-ê siâⁿ ê kòe-kè-tiúⁿ Í-la-to͘ kap lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Koat-thó͘ mā kā lín chhéng-an. 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè! I ōe chiàu góa só͘ thoân ê hok-im, chiū-sī só͘ soan-iông ê Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, lâi kian-kò͘ lín ê sìn-sim. Chit-ê hok-im sī bān-kó͘ í-lâi só͘ ún-ba̍t ê ò-biāu," 
Romans16:26 taⁿ í-keng chiàu éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng, thong-kè chèng sian-ti ê chheh hián-bêng,chhut-lâi, beh hō͘ bān-bîn chai, thang sìn lâi sūn-thàn." 
Romans16:27 Goān êng-kng thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kui tī to̍k-it choân-tì ê Siōng-tè, ti̍t-kàu éng-oán. Amen!" 
1Corinthians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì siū tiàu choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘. Góa kap lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Só͘-thê-nî" 
1Corinthians1:2 siá-phoe hō͘ tī Ko-lîm-to Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, chiū-sī hiah-ê kap tī ta̍k só͘-chāi ho͘-kiò lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ, kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân siū tiàu choh sìn-tô͘ kui-sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng; Ki-tok sī in ê Chú, mā-sī lán ê Chú." 
1Corinthians1:3 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
1Corinthians1:4 Góa sî-siông ūi-tio̍h lín teh kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè, in-ūi I thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù lín un-tián," 
1Corinthians1:5 hō͘ lín thong-kè Ki-tok ta̍k-hāng tit-tio̍h hù-chiok, chhiong-móa ta̍k-khoán kháu-châi kap tì-sek." 
1Corinthians1:6 Ki-tok ê sìn-sit í-keng tī lín tiong-kan kian-kò͘ kiàn-li̍p," 
1Corinthians1:7 hō͘ lín lóng bô khiàm sím-mi̍h un-sù, thèng-hāu lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hián-hiān." 
1Corinthians1:8 I mā ōe hō͘ lín kian-kò͘ ti̍t-kàu chòe-āu, tī lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Ji̍t bô thang hiâm." 
1Corinthians1:9 Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t, I ho͘-tiàu lín, beh hō͘ lín kap I ê Kiáⁿ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kiat-liân." 
1Corinthians1:10 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa hōng lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ khǹg lín tāi-ke, kóng-ōe tio̍h it-tì; lín tiong-kan mā m̄-thang hun-lia̍t. Tio̍h thoân-kiat, ū siâng-khoán ê siūⁿ-hoat kap kiōng-tông ê bo̍k-phiau." 
1Corinthians1:11 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, Kek-lâi in tau ê lâng ū tùi góa kóng-khí lín tiong-kan ū hun-cheng." 
1Corinthians1:12 Góa án-ni kóng sī in-ūi lín tiong-kan ì-kiàn hun-hun; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Pó-lô ”; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k A-pho-lô ”; ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Pí-tek ”; mā ū-ê kóng “Góa sio̍k Ki-tok”. 
1Corinthians1:13 Ki-tok kèng-jiân hō͘ lâng hun-koah lah! Pó-lô kiám ū thòe lín tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè? Lín kiám ū hōng Pó-lô ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé? 
1Corinthians1:14 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, Ki-lī-sū-pò͘ kap Kai-iû í-gōa, góa bô kā lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng sóe-lé." 
1Corinthians1:15 Án-ni bô lâng ōe-tàng kóng, lín ū hōng góa ê miâ niá-siū sóe-lé." 
1Corinthians1:16 Ū lah, góa mā ū kā Sū-thê-hoat-ná chi̍t ke ê lâng sóe-lé, kî-tha ū kā pa̍t-lâng sóe-lé á bô, góa bōe-kì,tit." 
1Corinthians1:17 Ki-tok bô chhe góa kā lâng sóe-lé, sī beh thoân hok-im, m̄-sī ēng tì-hūi ê giân-sû thoân, chiah bián hō͘ Ki-tok ê si̍p-jī-kè sit-khì hāu-le̍k." 
1Corinthians1:18 Si̍p-jī-kè ê sìn-sit, tùi hiah-ê ǹg bia̍t-bông teh kiâⁿ ê lâng sī gû-gōng, put-kò tùi lán chiah-ê ǹg tit-kiù teh kiâⁿ ê lâng sī Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k." 
1Corinthians1:19 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Góa beh siau-bia̍t tì-hūi ê lâng ê tì-hūi; góa beh khì-sak chhong-bêng ê lâng ê chhong-bêng. 
1Corinthians1:20 Án-ni tì-hūi ê lâng tī tó-ūi? Keng-ha̍k-kàu-su tī tó-ūi? Chit sè-tāi ê hiông-piān-ka tī tó-ūi? Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ chit sè-kan ê tì-hūi pìⁿ-chòe gû-gōng lah! 
1Corinthians1:21 Kì-jiân sè-kan-lâng bōe-tàng khò ka-kī ê tì-hūi jīn-bat Siōng-tè, Siōng-tè chiū tùi I ê tì-hūi hoaⁿ-hí ēng goán só͘ thoân gû-gōng ê sìn-sit lâi chín-kiù sìn I ê lâng." 
1Corinthians1:22 Iû-thài -lâng kiû sîn-jiah, Hi-la̍h -lâng chhē tì-hūi," 
1Corinthians1:23 put-kò goán soan-iông tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê Ki-tok. Chit-ê sìn-sit tùi Iû-thài -lâng sī chó͘-gāi, tùi Gōa-pang-lâng sī gû-gōng," 
1Corinthians1:24 m̄-kú tùi Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-tiàu ê lâng, bô-lūn sī Iû-thài -lâng á-sī Hi-la̍h -lâng, chit-ê sìn-sit sī Ki-tok; I sī Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k, sī Siōng-tè ê tì-hūi." 
1Corinthians1:25 In-ūi Siōng-tè ê gû-gōng iâⁿ-kè lâng ê tì-hūi, Siōng-tè ê loán-jio̍k pí lâng khah ióng-chòng." 
1Corinthians1:26 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu lín ê sî, chiàu lâng ê phiau-chún, lín tiong-kan bô jōa-chōe lâng ū tì-hūi, bô jōa-chōe lâng ū lêng-le̍k, bô jōa-chōe lâng sio̍k siōng-liû kai-kip." 
1Corinthians1:27 Siōng-tè kò͘-ì ēng sè-kan-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe gōng ê tāi-chì lâi hō͘ khiáu ê lâng kiàn-siàu; Siōng-tè ēng sè-kan-lâng khòaⁿ-chòe jio̍k ê tāi-chì lâi hō͘ kiông ê lâng kiàn-siàu. 
1Corinthians1:28 Siōng-tè ēng pi-chiān,ê, sè-kan-lâng só͘ biáu-sī,ê, khòaⁿ m̄ chiūⁿ-ba̍k ê tāi-chì lâi phò-hoāi lâng só͘ khòaⁿ-tāng,ê;" 
1Corinthians1:29 tùi án-ni, sè-kan chiū bô lâng ōe-tàng tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng khoa-kháu." 
1Corinthians1:30 M̄-kú Siōng-tè hō͘ lín kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân, hō͘ Ki-tok chiâⁿ-chòe lán tùi Siōng-tè lâi ê tì-hūi, chiū-sī hō͘ lán kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, siâng-sî chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè sèng-kiat ê chú-bîn, koh tit-tio̍h chū-iû." 
1Corinthians1:31 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, “Beh khoa-kháu ê lâng tio̍h khoa-kháu Chú!”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa í-chêng khì lín hia ê sî bô ēng súi ê giân-sû á-sī tì-hūi soan-káng Siōng-tè ê ò-pì." 
1Corinthians2:2 In-ūi góa koat-tēng, tī lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h to m̄ kóng, chí-ū beh kóng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok í-ki̍p I siū tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè ê sū." 
1Corinthians2:3 Góa tī lín hia ê sî, loán-jio̍k koh kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah." 
1Corinthians2:4 Góa só͘ kóng ê ōe, só͘ soan-káng ê sìn-sit, lóng bô ēng kháu-biāu tì-hūi ê giân-sû, sī khò Siōng-tè ê Sîn ê tōa lêng-le̍k lâi chèng-si̍t," 
1Corinthians2:5 sī beh hō͘ lín ê sìn-gióng m̄-sī khò lâng ê tì-hūi, sī khò Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k." 
1Corinthians2:6 Sui-jiân sī án-ni, tùi hiah-ê lêng-sèng sêng-se̍k ê lâng góa mā ū kóng tì-hūi, put-kò m̄-sī chit sè-kan ê tì-hūi, mā m̄-sī chit sè-kan chù-tiāⁿ ōe sit-sè ê thóng-tī-chiá ê tì-hūi." 
1Corinthians2:7 Góa só͘ kóng,ê sī Siōng-tè ò-pì ê tì-hūi, sī tùi lâng ún-ba̍t,ê, sī Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lán tit-tio̍h êng-kng, tī chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū seng koat-tēng,ê." 
1Corinthians2:8 Chit sè-kan ê thóng-tī-chiá bô chi̍t ê jīn-bat chit-ê tì-hūi, in nā bat chiū bōe chiong êng-iāu ê Chú tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè." 
1Corinthians2:9 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h thiàⁿ I ê lâng chún-pī,ê, sī ba̍k-chiu m̄-bat khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hī-khang m̄-bat thiaⁿ,tio̍h, mā m̄-bat ū lâng siūⁿ,tio̍h-ê." 
1Corinthians2:10 M̄-kú Siōng-tè í-keng ū thong-kè Sèng Sîn chiong chiah-ê sū tùi lán khé-sī. Sèng Sîn thiat-tóe chai bān-sū, liân Siōng-tè chhim-tîm ê chí-ì mā chai." 
1Corinthians2:11 Chí-ū lâng ka-kī lāi-bīn ê sîn chiah chai ka-kī ê sū; chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, chí-ū Siōng-tè ê Sîn chiah chai Siōng-tè ê sū." 
1Corinthians2:12 Lán niá-siū,ê m̄-sī sè-kan ê sîn, sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi ê Sîn, beh hō͘ lán chai Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lán ê un-sù." 
1Corinthians2:13 Só͘-í, goán tùi sio̍k-lêng ê lâng kóe-seh sio̍k Sèng Sîn ê sū, m̄-sī ēng lâng só͘ kà ê tì-hūi, sī ēng Sèng Sîn só͘ kà ê ōe." 
1Corinthians2:14 Sio̍k hiat-khì ê lâng bōe-tàng niá-siū tùi Siōng-tè ê Sîn lâi ê un-sù, chiah-ê un-sù tùi i lâi kóng sī gû-gōng,ê, bô hoat-tō͘ liáu-kái, in-ūi chí-ū sio̍k-lêng ê lâng chiah ōe-tàng léng-ngō͘." 
1Corinthians2:15 Sio̍k Sèng Sîn ê lâng ōe-hiáu phòaⁿ-toàn bān-sū, put-kò i pún-sin ê sū bô lâng ōe-tàng kā i phòaⁿ-toàn." 
1Corinthians2:16 Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Sím-mi̍h-lâng chai Chú ê sim-ì? Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng thòe I chhut chú-ì? M̄-kú lán ū Ki-tok ê sim-ì. 
1Corinthians3:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa kàu taⁿ tùi lín kóng-ōe, bōe-tàng khòaⁿ lín chòe sio̍k Sèng Sîn ê, sī sio̍k-sè,ê, sī Ki-tok sìn-gióng ê eⁿ-á." 
1Corinthians3:2 Góa ēng lin chhī lín, bô ēng pn̄g, in-ūi lín iáu bōe-tàng chia̍h-pn̄g, kàu hiān-chāi mā iáu bōe-tàng," 
1Corinthians3:3 in-ūi lín iáu-kú sī sio̍k-sè ê lâng. Lín tiong-kan ū oàn-tò͘, ū hun-cheng; án-ni kiám m̄-sī chèng-bêng lín sī sio̍k-sè,ê, sī chiàu sè-kan-lâng ê hong-sek teh seng-oa̍h?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng kóng “Góa sio̍k Pó-lô ”; mā ū lâng kóng “Góa sio̍k A-pho-lô ”. Án-ni lín kap sè-kan-lâng ū sím-mi̍h bô kâng-khoán? 
1Corinthians3:5 A-pho-lô sǹg siáⁿ? Pó-lô sǹg siáⁿ? Goán put-kò sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng, ín-chhōa lín siong-sìn; ta̍k-ê lâng chiàu Chú só͘ hō͘ goán ê chit-hūn teh chòe." 
1Corinthians3:6 Góa iā-chéng, A-pho-lô ak-chúi, m̄-kú Siōng-tè hō͘ i tōa-châng." 
1Corinthians3:7 Iā-chéng,ê kap ak-chúi,ê lóng bô tiōng-iàu, chí-ū hō͘ i tōa-châng ê Siōng-tè chiah tiōng-iàu." 
1Corinthians3:8 Iā-chéng,ê kap ak-chúi,ê lóng kâng-khoán, Siōng-tè ōe chiàu ta̍k-lâng ê kang-chok kā in pò-siúⁿ." 
1Corinthians3:9 Goán sī Siōng-tè ê tâng-kang; lín sī Siōng-tè ê chhân-hn̂g. Lín mā-sī Siōng-tè ê kiàn-tio̍k-bu̍t. 
1Corinthians3:10 Chiàu Siōng-tè hō͘ góa ê un-sù, góa choh chi̍t ê gâu ê kiàn-tio̍k-su hē tōe-ki, pa̍t-lâng tī hit téng-bīn khí-chō. M̄-kú ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h khòaⁿ ka-kī án-chóaⁿ teh khí-chō." 
1Corinthians3:11 In-ūi Siōng-tè í-keng ū hē Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chòe î-it ê tōe-ki, I í-gōa bô pa̍t-ê tōe-ki." 
1Corinthians3:12 Tī chit-ê tōe-ki téng, lâng nā ēng kim, gûn, pó-chio̍h, bo̍k-châi, chháu, á-sī tiū-kó khí-chō," 
1Corinthians3:13 ta̍k-ê lâng kang-thêng ê hó-bái, tī Ki-tok lâi-lîm ê Ji̍t, ōe hō͘ hé kā i lō͘-hiān chhut,lâi, in-ūi hé ōe chhì-giām ta̍k-ê lâng kang-thêng ê phín-chit." 
1Corinthians3:14 Lâng só͘ khí-chō,ê nā hō͘ hé sio bōe khì, i chiū ōe tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ." 
1Corinthians3:15 Lâng só͘ khí-chō,ê nā hō͘ hé sio,khì, i chiū ōe sún-sit; put-kò i pún-sin ōe tit-tio̍h kiù, chhin-chhiūⁿ tùi hé-tiong tô-miā cháu,chhut-lâi." 
1Corinthians3:16 Kiám m̄ chai, lín sī Siōng-tè ê tiān, Siōng-tè ê Sîn tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Nā ū lâng húi-hoāi Siōng-tè ê tiān, Siōng-tè ōe kā i húi-bia̍t; in-ūi Siōng-tè ê tiān sī sîn-sèng,ê, lín chiū-sī hit-ê tiān." 
1Corinthians3:18 M̄-thang phiàn ka-kī. Lín tiong-kan nā ū lâng ēng sè-kan ê phiau-chún khòaⁿ ka-kī chòe ū tì-hūi, ūi-tio̍h beh chiâⁿ-chòe chin-chiàⁿ ū tì-hūi, i tian-tò tio̍h chòe gû-gōng,ê." 
1Corinthians3:19 In-ūi chit sè-kan ê tì-hūi, tùi Siōng-tè lâi khòaⁿ sī gû-gōng. Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Siōng-tè hō͘ tì-hūi ê lâng tiòng-tio̍h ka-kī ê khúi-kè.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Pa̍t-ê só͘-chāi koh kóng, “Chú chai tì-hūi ê lâng ê sim-su bô lō͘-ēng.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Só͘-í, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng lóng m̄-thang ēng lâng chòe khoa-kháu. Kî-si̍t it-chhè lóng sī lín ê:" 
1Corinthians3:22 bô-lūn Pó-lô, A-pho-lô, Pí-tek, chit sè-kài, siⁿ á-sī sí, hiān-chāi á-sī chiong-lâi, che it-chhè lóng sī lín ê;" 
1Corinthians3:23 lín sī Ki-tok ê, Ki-tok sī Siōng-tè ê." 
1Corinthians4:1 Án-ni, lâng tio̍h khòaⁿ goán choh Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn, sī Siōng-tè ò-pì ê koán-ke." 
1Corinthians4:2 Tùi koán-ke ê iau-kiû sī tio̍h tùi chú-lâng tiong-si̍t. 
1Corinthians4:3 Góa siū lín á-sī pa̍t-lâng phêng-toàn, lóng khòaⁿ-chòe sió-sū; liân góa mā bô phêng-toàn ka-kī." 
1Corinthians4:4 Góa kám-kak ka-kī ê liông-sim chheng-pe̍k, put-kò m̄-sī án-ni chiū chèng-bêng góa bô chōe. Sím-phòaⁿ góa,ê sī Chú." 
1Corinthians4:5 Só͘-í, sî-ki iáu-bē kàu, lín m̄-thang phoe-phòaⁿ lâng. Tán kàu Chú lâi-lîm, hit-sî I ōe ēng kng chiò o͘-àm tiong ê pì-bi̍t, kā ún-chông tī lâng sim-lāi ê tōng-ki po̍k-lō͘,chhut-lâi. Hit-sî, ta̍k-ê lâng ōe tùi Siōng-tè tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn." 
1Corinthians4:6 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, ūi-tio̍h lín ê iân-kò͘, góa chiong chiah-ê sū chòe lē ēng tī góa pún-sin kap A-pho-lô ê sin-chiūⁿ, hō͘ lín thang tùi goán ha̍k-si̍p “m̄-thang chhiau-kè Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài” chit-kù ōe ê ì-sù. Lín tiong-kan bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng to m̄-thang phô͘-tháⁿ chit-ê, khòaⁿ-khin hit-ê." 
1Corinthians4:7 Sím-mi̍h-lâng hō͘ lí siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī pí pa̍t-lâng khah gâu? Lí só͘-ū,ê kiám m̄-sī lóng tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū? Nā án-ni, lí sī-án-chóaⁿ teh chū-khoa, ná-chún m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū." 
1Corinthians4:8 Lín í-keng ta̍k-hāng lóng ū! Lín í-keng hù-chiok! Lín kā goán sak tī piⁿ,á, ka-kī choh-ông. Lín nā chin-chiàⁿ choh-ông m̄-chai jōa-á-ni̍h hó leh, án-ni góa mā thang kap lín chòe-hé choh-ông!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Góa siūⁿ, Siōng-tè chiong goán chiah-ê sù-tô͘ pâi tī bé-liu, chhin-chhiūⁿ sí-hêng-hoān hō͘ lâng thoa chhut-lâi sī-chiòng, hō͘ sè-kài, thiⁿ-sài, kap lâng khòaⁿ." 
1Corinthians4:10 Goán ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘ chòe gōng-lâng, lín khiok kap Ki-tok kiat-liân chòe khiáu-lâng; goán loán-jio̍k, lín ióng-chòng; lín siū chun-tiōng, goán siū khòaⁿ-khin." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kàu hiān-chāi, goán iáu koh teh chhùi-ta, chhēng phòa-saⁿ, siông-siông hō͘ lâng phah, ta̍k só͘-chāi liû-lōng;" 
1Corinthians4:12 goán khò siang-chhiú thoa-bôa tō͘-oa̍h. Goán hō͘ lâng mē, hoán-tńg kā in chiok-hok; hō͘ lâng pek-hāi, goán jím-siū;" 
1Corinthians4:13 hō͘ lâng bú-jio̍k, goán ēng hó-ōe hôe-tap. Kàu hiān-chāi, goán iáu hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe sè-kan ê pùn-sò, jîn-kan ê che-tái." 
1Corinthians4:14 Góa siá chiah-ê hō͘ lín, m̄-sī beh hō͘ lín kiàn-siàu, sī khòaⁿ lín chòe ka-kī chhin-ài ê kiáⁿ-jî teh kā lín kà-sī." 
1Corinthians4:15 Lín sui-jiân ū kui-bān ê kàu-tok ê lâng teh kà lín bat Ki-tok, m̄-kú lāu-pē chí-ū chi̍t ê. Thong-kè hok-im, góa tī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ chiâⁿ-chòe lín ê lāu-pē." 
1Corinthians4:16 Só͘-í góa khǹg lín, tio̍h o̍h góa." 
1Corinthians4:17 In-ūi án-ni, góa chhe Thê-mô͘-thài khì lín hia. Tī Chú ê lāi-bīn i sī góa chhin-ài koh tiong-si̍t ê kiáⁿ; i ōe chiong góa kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân ê bô͘-hoān, chiū-sī góa tī ta̍k só͘-chāi ta̍k kàu-hōe só͘ kà-sī ê sū kā lín thê-chhíⁿ." 
1Corinthians4:18 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng góa bōe khì lín hia, chiū chū-ko chū-tāi." 
1Corinthians4:19 Nā-sī Chú ê ì-sù, góa liâm-piⁿ ōe khì lín hia. Hit-sî, góa chiū ōe chai hiah-ê kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng teh kóng sím-mi̍h, mā ōe chai in ōe-tàng chòe sím-mi̍h." 
1Corinthians4:20 In-ūi Siōng-tè-kok ê si̍t-hiān m̄-sī khò giân-sû, sī khò koân-lêng." 
1Corinthians4:21 Lín ài tó chi̍t hāng? Góa khì lín hia ê sî, lín ài góa gia̍h chhê-á á-sī tòa un-jiû thiàⁿ-thàng ê sim?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Góa khak-si̍t ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h tī lín tiong-kan ū îm-loān ê sū; chit-khoán îm-loān liân kàu-hōe-gōa mā bô, in-ūi ū lâng kap i ê āu-bú tông-ku." 
1Corinthians5:2 Án-ni, lín iáu ū sím-mi̍h thang phòng-hong! Lín kiám m̄ eng-kai kám-kak siong-sim, kā chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì ê lâng tùi lín tiong-kan khai-tû?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Sui-jiân góa lâng kap lín saⁿ-lī, sim khiok kap lín chòe-hé. Góa í-keng hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ kā chòe chit-khoán khó-ò͘ⁿ ê tāi-chì ê lâng phòaⁿ-chōe lah. Lín chū-chi̍p ê sî, góa ê sim mā kap lín chòe-hé, thang khò lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê tōa lêng-le̍k," 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5 chiong chit-ê lâng kau hō͘ Sat-tàn húi-bia̍t i ê seng-khu, hō͘ i ê lêng-hûn thang tī lán ê Chú ê Ji̍t tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Corinthians5:6 Lín teh khoa-kháu bô eng-kai! Lín kiám m̄ chai “Chi̍t-sut-á kàⁿ-bú ōe hō͘ kui-oân ê mī-oân hoat,khí-lâi”? 
1Corinthians5:7 Kū ê kàⁿ tio̍h tû hō͘ chheng-khì, lín chiah ōe chiâⁿ-chòe sin ê mī-oân, sū-si̍t lín sī bô kàⁿ ê mī-oân. Lán Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh ê iûⁿ-ko Ki-tok í-keng hiàn-chòe seng-lé." 
1Corinthians5:8 Só͘-í, lán m̄-thang ēng ok-to̍k siâ-ok ê kū kàⁿ-bú, tio̍h ēng sûn-choân chin-si̍t ê bô-kàⁿ-piáⁿ chòe chè-mi̍h lâi siú-choeh." 
1Corinthians5:9 Góa chêng kià hō͘ lín ê phoe ū kéng-kài lín m̄-thang kap îm-loān ê lâng lâi-óng. 
1Corinthians5:10 Góa m̄-sī chí chit sè-kan hiah-ê îm-loān, tham-loân, chà-khi, kap pài ngó͘-siōng ê lâng; nā m̄-sī lī-khui chit-ê sè-kài chiū bōe-tàng bô kap chiah-ê lâng lâi-óng." 
1Corinthians5:11 Góa taⁿ án-ni siá, sī kóng m̄-thang kap hiah-ê chū-chheng Ki-tok-tô͘, khiok sī îm-loān, tham-loân, pài ngó͘-siōng, húi-pòng pa̍t-lâng, chiú-chùi, á-sī chà-khi ê lâng lâi-óng; liân kap chiah-ê lâng tâng-toh chia̍h-pn̄g to m̄-thang." 
1Corinthians5:12 Phoe-phòaⁿ kàu-hōe-gōa ê lâng m̄-sī góa ê tāi-chì; Siōng-tè ōe kā in sím-phòaⁿ. Lín kiám m̄-sī tio̍h phoe-phòaⁿ kàu-hōe-lāi ê lâng? Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Tio̍h tùi lín tiong-kan chiong siâ-ok ê lâng khai-tû!”" 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng kap pa̍t-ê sìn-tô͘ ū kiù-hun, bô tī sìn-tô͘ bīn-chêng kā i kò, ná káⁿ tùi bô-sìn ê lâng kò i?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Lín kiám m̄ chai sìn-tô͘ beh sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan? Kì-jiân lín beh sím-phòaⁿ sè-kan, kiám bōe-hiáu kái-koat sió-khóa tāi-chì?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Lín kiám m̄ chai liân thiⁿ-sài lán to beh sím-phòaⁿ, chit sè-kan ji̍t-siông ê tāi-chì koh-khah m̄-bián kóng." 
1Corinthians6:4 Chit-khoán tāi-chì, lín kiám thang kau hō͘ bô siū kàu-hōe chun-tiōng ê gōa-lâng chhú-lí?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Lín si̍t-chāi chin kiàn-siàu! Lín tiong-kan kiám chin-chiàⁿ bô chi̍t ê ū tì-hūi ê lâng thang phòaⁿ-toàn sìn-tô͘ tiong-kan ê sī-hui? 
1Corinthians6:6 Lín kèng-jiân ū sìn-tô͘ kò sìn-tô͘, sīm-chì kò kàu bô-sìn ê lâng bīn-chêng!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Kî-si̍t lín sio-kò, piáu-sī lín í-keng lóng su lah. Lín ná m̄ lêng-khó siū oan-óng? Ná m̄ lêng-khó siū khek-khui?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Lín tian-tò oan-óng lâng, khek-khui lâng, sīm-chì tùi hōe-lāi ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē mā án-ni chòe!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Kiám m̄ chai put-gī ê lâng bōe-tàng chòe Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn? M̄-thang phiàn ka-kī; bô-lūn sī îm-loān,ê, pài ngó͘-siōng,ê, choh lâm-chhiong,ê, hò͘ⁿ lâm-sek,ê," 
1Corinthians6:10 chòe chha̍t,ê, tham-sim,ê, chiú-chùi,ê, húi-pòng,ê, chà-khi,ê, lóng bōe-tàng chòe Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn." 
1Corinthians6:11 Lín tiong-kan ū lâng í-chêng sī án-ni. M̄-kú lín í-keng sóe chheng-khì, í-keng sèng-hòa kui Siōng-tè, í-keng thong-kè Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ, koh thong-kè lán ê Siōng-tè ê Sîn, kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ū lâng kóng, “Ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì góa lóng thang chòe.” M̄-kú m̄-sī ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì lóng ū lī-ek. Góa mā thang kóng, “Ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì góa lóng thang chòe.” M̄-kú góa bô beh hō͘ jīm-hô tāi-chì khòng-chè." 
1Corinthians6:13 Ū lâng kóng, “Chia̍h-mi̍h sī ūi-tio̍h pak-tó͘, pak-tó͘ sī ūi-tio̍h chia̍h-mi̍h.” Tio̍h, m̄-kú chit nn̄g hāng, Siōng-tè lóng ōe kā in húi-hoāi. Seng-khu m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h îm-loān, sī ūi-tio̍h ho̍k-sāi Chú; Chú ōe kiong-kip lán seng-khu ê su-iàu." 
1Corinthians6:14 Siōng-tè ū hō͘ Chú tùi sí koh-oa̍h, I mā ōe ēng I ê tōa lêng-le̍k hō͘ lán koh-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians6:15 Kiám m̄ chai lín ê seng-khu sī Ki-tok ê chi-thé? Án-ni, góa kiám thang chiong Ki-tok ê chi-thé hō͘ i pìⁿ-chòe ki-lú ê chi-thé? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Kiám m̄ chai, kap ki-lú hoat-seng jio̍k-thé koan-hē chiū-sī kap i chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé? In-ūi Sèng-keng kóng, “Nn̄g ê lâng beh chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 M̄-kú kap Chú kiat-ha̍p ê lâng, chiū tī sim-lêng kap I chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé." 
1Corinthians6:18 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t îm-loān. Lâng bô-lūn hoān sím-mi̍h chōe, lóng bô éng-hióng ka-kī ê seng-khu, put-kò hoān îm-loān,ê sī hoān-chōe hāi-tio̍h ka-kī ê seng-khu." 
1Corinthians6:19 Kiám m̄ chai lín ê seng-khu sī Sèng Sîn ê tiān? Chit-ūi Sèng Sîn tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, sī lín tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū,ê. Lín m̄-sī sio̍k ka-kī, sī sio̍k Siōng-tè," 
1Corinthians6:20 in-ūi lín sī I hù-chhut tāi-kè bóe,lâi-ê. Só͘-í, tio̍h ēng lín ê seng-khu êng-iāu Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians7:1 Koan-hē lín tī phoe ê lāi-bīn só͘ siá ê būn-tôe: Ta-po͘-lâng bô chhin-kūn cha-bó͘-lâng khah hó. 
1Corinthians7:2 M̄-kú ūi-tio̍h pī-bián îm-loān ê tāi-chì, ta̍k-ê ta-po͘-lâng eng-kai ū ka-kī ê bó͘; ta̍k-ê cha-bó͘-lâng eng-kai ū ka-kī ê ang." 
1Corinthians7:3 Ta-po͘-lâng tùi bó͘ eng-kai chīn choh-ang ê gī-bū; cha-bó͘-lâng tùi ang eng-kai chīn choh-bó͘ ê gī-bū. 
1Corinthians7:4 Bó͘ tùi ka-kī ê seng-khu bô koân, m̄-kú ang ū; siâng-khoán, ang tùi ka-kī ê seng-khu bô koân, m̄-kú bó͘ ū." 
1Corinthians7:5 M̄-thang hut-lio̍k tùi-hong ê su-iàu; nā ūi-tio̍h beh choan-sim kî-tó, thang tông-ì chiām-sî hun-khui; chóng-sī í-āu tio̍h koh hôe-ho̍k chèng-siông ê koan-hē, chiah bián in-ūi bōe-tàng khòng-chè ka-kī tì-kàu siū Sat-tàn iú-he̍k." 
1Corinthians7:6 Góa kóng thang chiām-sî hun-khui, sī bián-kióng tông-ì, m̄-sī bēng-lēng." 
1Corinthians7:7 Sū-si̍t, góa ài ta̍k-ê lâng lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ góa. M̄-kú ta̍k-ê lâng tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū bô kâng-khoán ê un-sù, chit-ê lâng chit-khoán, hit-ê lâng hit-khoán." 
1Corinthians7:8 Hiān-chāi, góa tùi bô kiat-hun,ê kap kóaⁿ-hū kóng, nā ōe-tàng chhin-chhiūⁿ góa siú to̍k-sin sī khah hó;" 
1Corinthians7:9 m̄-kú nā bōe-tàng khòng-chè ka-kī, chiū tio̍h kiat-hun. Lêng-khó kiat-hun, pí hō͘ io̍k-hé sio khah hó." 
1Corinthians7:10 Í-keng kiat-hun ê lâng, góa bēng-lēng lín — kî-si̍t m̄-sī góa, sī Chú ê bēng-lēng: Cha-bó͘-lâng m̄-thang lī-khui tiōng-hu," 
1Corinthians7:11 nā lī-khui, tio̍h siú to̍k-sin; nā bô, tio̍h koh kap tiōng-hu hô-hó. Tiōng-hu mā m̄-thang pàng-sak bó͘." 
1Corinthians7:12 Tùi kî-tha ê lâng, góa kóng — m̄-sī Chú kóng,ê: Lâm ê sìn-tô͘ nā chhōa bô sìn Chú ê lâng chòe bó͘, bó͘ tông-ì kè-sio̍k kap i tòa, i chiū m̄-thang kā i pàng-sak." 
1Corinthians7:13 Nā ū lú ê sìn-tô͘ kap bô sìn Chú ê lâng kiat-hun, tiōng-hu tông-ì kè-sio̍k kap i tòa, i mā m̄-thang pàng-sak tiōng-hu." 
1Corinthians7:14 Bô sìn Chú ê tiōng-hu ōe in-ūi sìn Chú ê bó͘ tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè chiap-la̍p. Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, bô sìn Chú ê bó͘ mā ōe in-ūi sìn Chú ê tiōng-hu tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè chiap-la̍p. Nā m̄-sī án-ni, in ê kiáⁿ-jî chiū bô sio̍k Siōng-tè; kî-si̍t, in sī sio̍k Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians7:15 M̄-kú, bô sìn Chú ê lâng nā beh lī-khui, chiū chhut-chāi i lī-khui. Tī chit-khoán ê chêng-hêng, sìn Chú ê tiōng-hu á-sī bó͘ chiū bô siū hun-in ê iok-sok. Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu lín, sī ài lín hô-bo̍k khiā-khí." 
1Corinthians7:16 Tio̍h chai, sìn Chú ê cha-bó͘-lâng kiám-chhái ōe kiù ka-kī ê tiōng-hu. Tio̍h chai, sìn Chú ê tiōng-hu kiám-chhái ōe kiù ka-kī ê bó͘." 
1Corinthians7:17 Bô-lūn án-chóaⁿ, ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h chiàu Chú pun hō͘ lín ê un-sù, chiàu Siōng-tè kéng-tiàu ê bo̍k-te̍k lâi seng-oa̍h. Che sī góa hō͘ ta̍k-ê kàu-hōe ê kui-tēng." 
1Corinthians7:18 Kat-lé liáu-āu chiah siū ho͘-tiàu ê lâng, m̄-bián am-khàm kat-lé ê kì-hō; siū ho͘-tiàu ê sî iáu-bē kat-lé ê lâng mā m̄-bián siū kat-lé." 
1Corinthians7:19 In-ūi ū kat-lé bô kat-lé lóng bô iàu-kín, iàu-kín,ê sī tio̍h chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng." 
1Corinthians7:20 Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h pó-chhî siū tiàu ê sî ê sin-hūn. 
1Corinthians7:21 Lí siū tiàu ê sî sī lô͘-lē sī,bô, m̄-bián khòa-ì; put-kò lí nā ū ki-hōe tit-tio̍h chū-iû, tio̍h pá-ak ki-hōe." 
1Corinthians7:22 In-ūi siū Chú ho͘-tiàu ê lô͘-lē sī Chú só͘ tháu-pàng ê chū-iû-jîn; siâng-khoán, siū Chú ho͘-tiàu ê chū-iû-jîn sī Ki-tok ê lô͘-po̍k." 
1Corinthians7:23 Lín sī Siōng-tè hù-chhut tāi-kè bóe,lâi-ê, m̄-thang chiâⁿ-chòe lâng ê lô͘-lē." 
1Corinthians7:24 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng pó-chhî siū tiàu ê sî ê sin-hūn." 
1Corinthians7:25 Koan-hē chāi-sek-lú ê būn-tôe, góa bô tùi Chú tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h bēng-lēng, put-kò chòe chi̍t ê tit-tio̍h Chú ê lîn-bín chiâⁿ-chòe thang sìn-jīm ê lâng, góa thê-chhut ka-kī ê ì-kiàn." 
1Corinthians7:26 Khó-lū ba̍k-chêng kan-lân ê chhù-kéng, góa siūⁿ lâng pó-chhî hiān-chōng sī khah hó." 
1Corinthians7:27 Í-keng chhōa-bó͘, m̄-thang siūⁿ-beh chū-iû; iáu-bē chhōa-bó͘, m̄-thang siūⁿ-beh chhōa." 
1Corinthians7:28 M̄-kú nā chhōa-bó͘, bô sǹg hoān-chōe; siàu-lú nā chhut-kè, mā bô sǹg hoān-chōe. Put-kò kiat-hun ê lâng ōe ke-thiⁿ seng-oa̍h siōng ê thoa-lūi, góa khah ài lín bián tú-tio̍h chit-khoán tāi-chì." 
1Corinthians7:29 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ê ì-sù sī, sî-kan pek-kūn lah, tùi taⁿ í-āu, ū bó͘,ê tio̍h ná-chún bô bó͘;" 
1Corinthians7:30 teh khàu,ê ná-chún bô teh khàu; teh hoaⁿ-hí,ê ná-chún bô teh hoaⁿ-hí; bóe-mi̍h,ê ná-chún bô tit-tio̍h pòaⁿ-hāng; 
1Corinthians7:31 chhap sè-kan-sū,ê, ná-chún bô teh chhap. In-ūi chit sè-kan ê hiān-chōng teh kè,khì." 
1Corinthians7:32 Góa ài lín lóng bô khòa-lū. Bô chhōa-bó͘ ê lâng koan-sim Chú ê sū, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ hō͘ Chú hoaⁿ-hí." 
1Corinthians7:33 Chhōa-bó͘ ê lâng koan-sim sè-kan ê sū, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ hō͘ bó͘ hoaⁿ-hí," 
1Corinthians7:34 soah hun-sim. Bô kè ê cha-bó͘-lâng á-sī siàu-lú koan-sim Chú ê sū, sī beh hō͘ seng-khu kap sim-lêng sèng-kiat; put-kò kè-ang ê cha-bó͘-lâng koan-sim sè-kan ê sū, khòaⁿ beh án-chóaⁿ hō͘ tiōng-hu hoaⁿ-hí." 
1Corinthians7:35 Góa tùi lín án-ni kóng sī ūi-tio̍h lín ê lī-ek, m̄-sī beh kā lín sok-pa̍k, sī ài lín chòe ha̍p-gî ê sū, thang choan-sim ho̍k-sāi Chú." 
1Corinthians7:36 Nā ū lâng tēng-hun liáu koat-tēng bô beh chhōa, āu-lâi in-ūi chêng-io̍k kiông, bōe-tàng khòng-chè ka-kī, ōe tùi bī-hun-chhe chòe-chhut bô ha̍p-gî ê sū, i tio̍h kiat-hun, án-ni chòe m̄-sī hoān-chōe." 
1Corinthians7:37 Put-kò i nā m̄-sī in-ūi gōa-lâi ê ap-le̍k, sī chhut tī ka-kī ê koat-sim, koh ōe-tàng khòng-chè ka-kī ê ì-chì, koat-tēng bô beh kap bī-hun-chhe kiat-hun, hō͘ i pó-chhî chāi-sek-lú ê sin-hūn, i án-ni chòe sī hó." 
1Corinthians7:38 Chóng kóng, kap bī-hun-chhe kiat-hun sī hó, bô kap i kiat-hun koh-khah hó." 
1Corinthians7:39 Tiōng-hu iáu oa̍h,teh ê sî, cha-bó͘-lâng bô chū-iû; tiōng-hu sí-liáu, cha-bó͘-lâng thang chū-iû kap kah-ì ê lâng kiat-hun, put-kò, chí-ū thang kè hō͘ sìn Chú ê lâng." 
1Corinthians7:40 I nā bô koh kè sī koh-khah ū hok-khì, che sī góa ê ì-kiàn, chóng-sī góa siūⁿ góa mā ū Siōng-tè ê Sîn ê chí-sī." 
1Corinthians8:1 Koan-hē chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h, lán chai “lán lóng ū tì-sek”. Kî-si̍t tì-sek ōe hō͘ lâng kiau-ngō͘; m̄-kú thiàⁿ-sim ōe chō-chiū lâng." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ka-kī siūⁿ-kóng ū tì-sek,ê, si̍t-chè-siōng eng-kai chai,ê, i iáu m̄ chai." 
1Corinthians8:3 Lâng nā thiàⁿ Siōng-tè, i sī Siōng-tè só͘ bat ê lâng." 
1Corinthians8:4 Só͘-í, koan-hē chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h, lán chai, sè-kan ê ngó͘-siōng lóng m̄-sī chin,ê, lán mā chai chí-ū chi̍t ūi Siōng-tè, í-gōa bô pa̍t-ê." 
1Corinthians8:5 Sui-jiân tī thiⁿ-téng á-sī tōe-chiūⁿ ū só͘-ūi ê sîn-bêng, koh sui-jiân ū chin chōe “sîn” á-sī “chú”," 
1Corinthians8:6 m̄-kú lán chí-ū chi̍t ūi Siōng-tè, chiū-sī Thiⁿ Pē; bān-iú tùi I lâi chhòng-chō, lán ūi-tio̍h I lâi oa̍h. Lán chí-ū chi̍t ūi Chú, chiū-sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok; bān-iú thong-kè I chhòng-chō, lán mā thong-kè I lâi chûn-chāi." 
1Corinthians8:7 M̄-kú, m̄-sī ta̍k-ê lâng lóng ū chit-khoán tì-sek. Ū lâng pài ngó͘-siōng koàn-sì, kàu kin-á-ji̍t chia̍h mi̍h ê sî iáu siūⁿ-kóng sī teh chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h; in ê liông-sim loán-jio̍k, siūⁿ-kóng ōe hō͘ hit-khoán chia̍h-mi̍h bak lâ-sâm." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kî-si̍t chia̍h-mi̍h bōe hō͘ lán khah chiap-kūn Siōng-tè; bô chia̍h bô sún-sit, chia̍h mā bô khah ū lī-ek." 
1Corinthians8:9 M̄-kú tio̍h sòe-jī, m̄-thang in-ūi lín chū-iû ê hêng-ûi chiâⁿ-chòe loán-jio̍k ê lâng sìn-gióng ê chó͘-gāi." 
1Corinthians8:10 Nā ū lâng liông-sim loán-jio̍k, khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín só͘-ūi “ū tì-sek” ê lâng tī ngó͘-siōng ê biō-lāi lim-chia̍h, án-ni lín kiám m̄-sī teh kó͘-lē in chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Án-ni, chit-ê loán-jio̍k ê sìn-tô͘ mā-sī Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h i sí ê lâng, ōe in-ūi lín ê “tì-sek” lâi bia̍t-bông." 
1Corinthians8:12 Lín án-ni chòe sī tek-chōe lín ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, siong-hāi tio̍h in ê liông-sim chiū-sī tek-chōe Ki-tok." 
1Corinthians8:13 Só͘-í, nā chia̍h-mi̍h ōe hō͘ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê sìn-gióng siū chó͘-gāi, góa choa̍t-tùi m̄ chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê bah, chiah bián hō͘ góa ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê sìn-gióng siū chó͘-gāi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Góa kiám m̄-sī chū-iû ê lâng? Góa kiám m̄-sī sù-tô͘? Góa kiám m̄-bat kìⁿ-tio̍h lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘? Lín kiám m̄-sī góa ūi-tio̍h Chú kang-chok ê sêng-kó? 
1Corinthians9:2 Tùi pa̍t-lâng lâi khòaⁿ, góa kiám-chhái m̄-sī sù-tô͘, m̄-kú tùi lín lâi khòaⁿ, góa khak-si̍t sī. In-ūi lín kap Chú kiat-liân chiū-sī góa choh sù-tô͘ ê chèng-kù." 
1Corinthians9:3 Tùi hiah-ê phoe-phêng góa ê lâng, góa án-ni piān-bêng:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Goán kiám bô koân thang chia̍h, thang lim?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Goán kiám bô koân kap kî-tha ê sù-tô͘, Chú ê hiaⁿ-tī, í-ki̍p Pí-tek kâng-khoán, chhōa lú sìn-tô͘ chòe bó͘ chòe-hé lú-hêng?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Kiám kan-ta góa kap Pa-ná-pa it-tēng tio̍h chòe kang chiah ōe-tàng seng-oa̍h? 
1Corinthians9:7 Kiám ū lâng choh-peng koh teh chia̍h ka-kī? Kiám ū lâng chèng-choh phû-tô-hn̂g bô chia̍h hn̂g-lāi chhut-sán ê phû-tô? Kiám ū lâng chhī iûⁿ bô lim ka-kī ê iûⁿ-lin? 
1Corinthians9:8 Góa kóng chiah-ê kiám sī kun-kù lâng ê siūⁿ-hoat? Lu̍t-hoat kiám m̄-sī mā án-ni kóng? 
1Corinthians9:9 Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat kui-tēng, “Gû teh lún ngó͘-kok ê sî, m̄-thang kā i kòa gû-chhùi-lam.” Siōng-tè koan-sim,ê kiám sī gû?" 
1Corinthians9:10 I kiám m̄-sī oân-choân ūi-tio̍h lán kóng,ê? Tong-jiân sī! In-ūi keng-choh ê lâng khǹg ǹg-bāng keng-choh, siu-koah ê lâng khǹg ǹg-bāng siu-koah, in lóng sī kî-thāi tit-tio̍h ngó͘-kok." 
1Corinthians9:11 Goán nā ū tī lín tiong-kan iā sio̍k-lêng ê chéng-chí, tùi lín tit-tio̍h bu̍t-chit siōng ê kiong-kip kiám ū kè-hūn?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Pa̍t-lâng nā ū koân thang tùi lín iau-kiû, goán kiám m̄-sī koh-khah ū? M̄-kú goán lóng m̄-bat ēng chit-ê koân, hoán-tńg jím-siū it-chhè, chiah bián hō͘ Ki-tok ê hok-im siū chó͘-gāi." 
1Corinthians9:13 Lín it-tēng chai, tī Sèng-tiān teh kang-chok ê lâng tùi Sèng-tiān tit-tio̍h chia̍h-mi̍h; tī chè-tôaⁿ teh hiàn-chè ê lâng pun-tio̍h tôaⁿ-téng ê chè-mi̍h." 
1Corinthians9:14 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, Chú ū hoan-hù: Thoân hok-im ê lâng eng-kai khò hok-im seng-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians9:15 M̄-kú góa lóng m̄-bat ēng chiah-ê koân. Góa hiān-chāi siá chiah-ê ōe mā m̄-sī beh cheng-chhú chit-khoán ê koân. Góa lêng-khó sí mā bô ài hō͘ góa só͘ khoa-kháu,ê lo̍k-khong! 
1Corinthians9:16 Góa thoân hok-im pèng bô sím-mi̍h thang khoa-kháu; góa sī hōng-bēng teh thoân. Góa nā bô thoân chiū ū chai-hō. 
1Corinthians9:17 Góa nā kam-goān chòe chit-ê kang, chiū ū pò-siúⁿ; góa nā m̄-sī chhut-tī kam-goān, mā tio̍h chip-hêng Siōng-tè kau-tài ê jīm-bū." 
1Corinthians9:18 Án-ni, góa ê pò-siúⁿ sī sím-mi̍h? Chiū-sī góa thoân hok-im hō͘ lâng pe̍h-pe̍h tit-tio̍h, m̄-kú ka-kī bô beh hióng-siū thoân hok-im eng-kai ū ê koân-lī." 
1Corinthians9:19 Góa sī chū-iû ê lâng, bô siū lâng ê sok-pa̍k, m̄-kú ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h khah chōe lâng lâi sìn Chú, góa chiâⁿ-chòe chèng-lâng ê po̍k-jîn." 
1Corinthians9:20 Tùi Iû-thài -lâng, góa chiū choh Iû-thài -lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h Iû-thài -lâng. Sui-jiân góa bô siū Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat khu-sok, khiok choh Lu̍t-hoat-ē ê lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat-ē ê lâng." 
1Corinthians9:21 Tùi Lu̍t-hoat-gōa ê lâng, góa chiū choh Lu̍t-hoat-gōa ê lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h Lu̍t-hoat-gōa ê lâng. Án-ni m̄-sī kóng góa bô chun-siú Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat; kî-si̍t góa sī siū Ki-tok Lu̍t-hoat iok-sok ê lâng." 
1Corinthians9:22 Tùi sìn-sim loán-jio̍k ê lâng, góa chiâⁿ-chòe loán-jio̍k, sī ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h loán-jio̍k ê lâng. Tùi tó chi̍t khoán lâng, góa chiū choh hit-khoán lâng, ēng ta̍k-khoán hong-hoat thang ke kiù chi̍t-kóa lâng." 
1Corinthians9:23 Góa chòe chiah-ê lóng sī ūi-tio̍h hok-im, bo̍k-te̍k sī beh kap lâng hun-hióng hok-im." 
1Corinthians9:24 Lín it-tēng chai, tī ūn-tōng-tiûⁿ chham-ka kèng-sài ê lâng lóng lo̍h-khì cháu, m̄-kú chí-ū chi̍t ê tit-tio̍h siúⁿ. Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h siúⁿ, lín tio̍h phah-piàⁿ cháu."
