1Corinthians9:25 Ta̍k-ê soán-chhiú lóng ū chiap-siū giâm-keh ê hùn-liān; in án-ni chòe sī beh tit-tio̍h ōe pāi-hoāi ê hoa-koan; m̄-kú lán ài tit,tio̍h-ê sī bōe pāi-hoāi ê hoa-koan. 
1Corinthians9:26 Án-ni, góa cháu m̄-sī bô bo̍k-phiau, phah-kûn m̄-sī teh phah khong-khì." 
1Corinthians9:27 Góa giâm-keh chhau-liān ka-kī ê seng-khu kàu ōe-tàng oân-choân khòng-chè, chiah bián góa chiong hok-im thoân hō͘ pa̍t-lâng, ka-kī tian-tò siū kū-choa̍t." 
1Corinthians10:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ài lín ōe-kì,tit, lán ê chó͘-sian lóng kun-tè Mô͘-se, tī hûn ê pó-hō͘-ē kè Âng-hái." 
1Corinthians10:2 In tī hûn-lāi, tī hái,ni̍h, siū sóe kui tī Mô͘-se." 
1Corinthians10:3 In lóng chia̍h kâng-khoán sio̍k-lêng ê chia̍h-mi̍h," 
1Corinthians10:4 lóng lim kâng-khoán sio̍k-lêng ê chôaⁿ-chúi, chit-ê chôaⁿ-chúi sī tùi kap in tâng-kiâⁿ hit-ê sio̍k-lêng ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ lâu,chhut-lâi,ê; hit-ê chio̍h-pôaⁿ chiū-sī Ki-tok." 
1Corinthians10:5 M̄-kú in tiong-kan tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng bô hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí, lóng siū húi-bia̍t, tó kah kui khòng-iá." 
1Corinthians10:6 Chiah-ê tāi-chì hō͘ lán chòe kàm-kài, kiò lán m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ in tham-loân pháiⁿ-tāi." 
1Corinthians10:7 M̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ in tiong-kan ū chi̍t-kóa lâng khì pài ngó͘-siōng; chiàu Sèng-keng kì-chài, “Chiah-ê chú-bîn chē,lo̍h-khì, tōa-chia̍h tōa-lim; khiā,khí-lâi, tian-kông loān-sńg.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Lán m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ in ū chi̍t-kóa lâng îm-loān, soah tī chi̍t ji̍t lāi sí nn̄g-bān saⁿ-chheng lâng." 
1Corinthians10:9 M̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ in tiong-kan ū chi̍t-kóa lâng chhì-thàm Chú, soah hō͘ chôa kā-sí." 
1Corinthians10:10 M̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ in tiong-kan ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kóng oàn-giân, soah hō͘ Húi-bia̍t-chiá châu-bia̍t." 
1Corinthians10:11 In só͘ tú,tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì thang chòe pa̍t-lâng ê kàm-kài, koh kì-lio̍k,lo̍h-lâi thang kéng-kài lán chiah-ê oa̍h tī boa̍t-sè ê lâng." 
1Corinthians10:12 Só͘-í, siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī khiā-chāi,ê tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bōe poa̍h-tó." 
1Corinthians10:13 Lín só͘ tú,tio̍h ê khó-giām lóng sī lâng ōe tú,tio̍h-ê. Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t,ê, I bōe hō͘ lín tú-tio̍h tam-tng bōe khí ê khó-giām. Lín tú-tio̍h khó-giām ê sî, I ōe kā lín khui chi̍t tiâu chhut-lō͘, hō͘ lín jím-siū ōe tiâu." 
1Corinthians10:14 Só͘-í, chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, pài ngó͘-siōng ê sū lóng m̄-thang chhap,tio̍h." 
1Corinthians10:15 Góa khòaⁿ lín chòe bêng-pe̍k sū-lí ê lâng kap lín kóng-ōe; góa só͘ kóng,ê lín ka-kī thang phòaⁿ-toàn. 
1Corinthians10:16 Lán teh lim hit-ê kám-siā ê poe, kiám m̄-sī teh hun-hióng Ki-tok ê huih? Lán teh chia̍h hit-ê peh-khui ê piáⁿ, kiám m̄-sī teh hun-hióng Ki-tok ê seng-khu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 In-ūi piáⁿ chí-ū chi̍t tè, lán sui-jiân chin chōe lâng, iáu-kú sī chi̍t-thé, in-ūi lán chòe-hé chia̍h kâng chi̍t tè piáⁿ." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ēng Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chòe lē, hiah-ê chia̍h chè-mi̍h ê lâng kap chè-tôaⁿ ū koan-hē." 
1Corinthians10:19 Án-ni góa teh kóng,ê sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Sī kóng ngó͘-siōng ū sím-mi̍h tiōng-iàu, chè-mi̍h ū sím-mi̍h iàu-kín sī,bô?" 
1Corinthians10:20 M̄-sī, góa sī teh kóng, hiàn tī īⁿ-kàu chè-tôaⁿ téng ê chè-mi̍h sī hiàn hō͘ kúi, m̄-sī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè. Góa bô ài lín kap kúi kau-chhap." 
1Corinthians10:21 Lín lim Chú ê poe, bōe-ēng-tit koh lim kúi ê poe; lín chham-ka Chú ê iàn-se̍k, bōe-ēng-tit koh chham-ka kúi ê iàn-se̍k." 
1Corinthians10:22 Lán beh kek Chú oàn-tò͘ sī,bô? Lán pí I khah kiông sī,bô? 
1Corinthians10:23 Ū lâng kóng “Ta̍k-hāng lóng thang chòe”, put-kò m̄-sī ta̍k-hāng lóng ū lī-ek. “Ta̍k-hāng lóng thang chòe”, put-kò m̄-sī ta̍k-hāng sū lóng ōe-tàng pang-chān lâng." 
1Corinthians10:24 Ta̍k-ê lâng lóng m̄-thang kiû ka-kī ê lī-ek, tio̍h kiû pa̍t-lâng ê lī-ek." 
1Corinthians10:25 Chhī-tiûⁿ teh bōe ê bah lóng thang bóe lâi chia̍h, m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h liông-sim ê iân-kò͘ mn̄g-tang-mn̄g-sai." 
1Corinthians10:26 In-ūi Sèng-keng kóng, “Tōe kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê bān-mi̍h lóng sio̍k tī Chú.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Nā ū bī-sìn-chiá chhiáⁿ lín chia̍h-pn̄g, lín nā khì, pâi tī lín bīn-chêng ê mi̍h chòe lín chia̍h, m̄-bián ūi-tio̍h liông-sim ê iân-kò͘ mn̄g-tang-mn̄g-sai." 
1Corinthians10:28 M̄-kú nā ū lâng kā lín kóng “Chiah-ê chia̍h-mi̍h ū chè-kè ngó͘-siōng”, lín chiū ūi-tio̍h hit-ê kā lín kóng ê lâng kap liông-sim ê iân-kò͘, mài chia̍h hit-ê chia̍h-mi̍h." 
1Corinthians10:29 Góa só͘ chí ê sī hit-ê lâng ê liông-sim, m̄-sī lín ê liông-sim. Kiám-chhái ū lâng ōe mn̄g, “Góa ê chū-iû ná tio̍h siū pa̍t-lâng ê liông-sim phoe-phòaⁿ?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Góa nā kám-siā lâi chia̍h, ná tio̍h in-ūi chia̍h kám-siā ê mi̍h siū húi-pòng?”" 
1Corinthians10:31 Só͘-í, lín bô-lūn sī chia̍h sī lim, á-sī chòe sím-mi̍h, lóng tio̍h ūi-tio̍h êng-iāu Siōng-tè lâi chòe." 
1Corinthians10:32 Bô-lūn sī tùi Iû-thài -lâng, Gōa-pang-lâng, á-sī Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, lín lóng m̄-thang chiâⁿ-chòe in ê chó͘-gāi." 
1Corinthians10:33 Lín tio̍h chiàu góa só͘ chòe,ê khì chòe. Góa ūi-tio̍h hō͘ tāi-ke hoaⁿ-hí, m̄-bat kiû ka-kī ê lī-ek, sī kiû tāi-ke ê lī-ek, thang hō͘ in tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Corinthians11:1 Lín tio̍h o̍h góa, chhin-chhiūⁿ góa o̍h Ki-tok." 
1Corinthians11:2 Lín put-sî ōe-kì-tit góa, koh chun-thàn góa thoân-siū hō͘ lín ê kà-sī, lín si̍t-chāi thang hō͘ góa o-ló." 
1Corinthians11:3 Put-kò góa ài lín bêng-pe̍k, ta̍k-ê ta-po͘-lâng ê thâu sī Ki-tok, hū-jîn-lâng ê thâu sī tiōng-hu, Ki-tok ê thâu sī Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians11:4 Ta-po͘-lâng tī kong-kiōng tiûⁿ-só͘ kî-tó á-sī soan-káng Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê sî, nā tà thâu-kun sī bú-jio̍k i ê thâu Ki-tok." 
1Corinthians11:5 M̄-kú cha-bó͘-lâng tī kî-tó á-sī soan-káng Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê sî, nā bô tà thâu-kun sī bú-jio̍k ka-kī ê thâu, chiū-sī i ê tiōng-hu. Chit-khoán ê hū-jîn-lâng kap thâu-mn̂g hō͘ lâng thì,khí-lâi ê cha-bó͘-lâng bô sím-mi̍h chha-pia̍t." 
1Corinthians11:6 Cha-bó͘-lâng nā m̄ tà thâu-kun, thâu-mn̂g tio̍h chián,khí-lâi; kì-jiân khòaⁿ thì kng-thâu á-sī chián thâu-mn̂g chòe kiàn-siàu ê sū, chiū tio̍h tà thâu-kun." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ta-po͘-lâng bô eng-kai tà thâu-kun, in-ūi i sī Siōng-tè ê hêng-siōng kap êng-iāu; cha-bó͘-lâng sī ta-po͘-lâng ê êng-iāu." 
1Corinthians11:8 In-ūi ta-po͘-lâng m̄-sī tùi cha-bó͘-lâng chō,chhut-lâi,ê, cha-bó͘-lâng sī tùi ta-po͘-lâng chō,chhut-lâi,ê." 
1Corinthians11:9 Ta-po͘-lâng m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h cha-bó͘-lâng chō,ê, m̄-kú cha-bó͘-lâng sī ūi-tio̍h ta-po͘-lâng chō,ê." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ūi-tio̍h thiⁿ-sài ê iân-kò͘, cha-bó͘-lâng ê thâu eng-kai tà koân-ui ê kì-hō." 
1Corinthians11:11 Chóng-sī tī Chú ê lāi-bīn, ta-po͘-lâng su-iàu cha-bó͘-lâng, cha-bó͘-lâng mā su-iàu ta-po͘-lâng." 
1Corinthians11:12 In-ūi cha-bó͘-lâng sī tùi ta-po͘-lâng chō,chhut-lâi,ê, ta-po͘-lâng sī thong-kè cha-bó͘-lâng siⁿ,ê, m̄-kú bān-mi̍h lóng sī tùi Siōng-tè chhut,lâi-ê." 
1Corinthians11:13 Lín tio̍h ka-kī phòaⁿ-toàn: Cha-bó͘-lâng bô tà thâu-kun tùi Siōng-tè kî-tó ū ha̍p-gî,bô? 
1Corinthians11:14 Chū-jiân ê pún-sèng kà lán, lâu tn̂g thâu-mn̂g sī ta-po͘-lâng ê kiàn-siàu," 
1Corinthians11:15 m̄-kú cha-bó͘-lâng lâu tn̂g thâu-mn̂g sī i ê êng-iāu. In-ūi tn̂g thâu-mn̂g thang chòe cha-bó͘-lâng ê jia-phè. 
1Corinthians11:16 Nā ū lâng ài piān-pok, góa chí-ū ōe-tàng kóng, tī lán kap Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe pèng bô kî-tha ê kui-kú." 
1Corinthians11:17 Góa tī chia beh kóng ê ōe m̄-sī beh kā lín o-ló, in-ūi lín ê chū-hōe sún-hāi pí lī-ek khah chōe." 
1Corinthians11:18 Tē-it, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ kóng, lín tī kàu-hōe chū-hōe ê sî kiat-tóng hun-phài, góa siong-sìn ū chi̍t-pō͘-hūn sī sū-si̍t." 
1Corinthians11:19 Lín tiong-kan lân-bián ū hun-lia̍t, án-ni chiah ōe-tàng khòaⁿ-chhut sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe thong-kè khó-giām." 
1Corinthians11:20 Lín chū-chi̍p ê sî, m̄-sī teh chia̍h Chú ê Boán-chhan." 
1Corinthians11:21 In-ūi lín ta̍k-ê lâng kóaⁿ-kín chia̍h ka-kī tòa,lâi ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ, kiat-kó ū-ê iau, ū-ê chiú-chùi." 
1Corinthians11:22 Lín kiám bô chhù thang chia̍h, thang lim? Lín sī teh biáu-sī Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, ia̍h teh hō͘ bô mi̍h thang chia̍h ê lâng kiàn-siàu sī,bô? Góa beh tùi lín kóng sím-mi̍h? Góa kiám tio̍h kā lín o-ló? Bōe, tī chit-hāng sū góa bōe kā lín o-ló!" 
1Corinthians11:23 Góa tùi Chú só͘ niá-siū,ê, góa mā thoân hō͘ lín: Chú Iâ-so͘ hō͘ lâng chhut-bōe hit-mî, I the̍h piáⁿ," 
1Corinthians11:24 kám-siā Siōng-tè liáu-āu, peh-khui, kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa ê seng-khu, ūi-tio̍h lín hi-seng,ê; lín tio̍h chòe chit-ê lâi kì-liām góa.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Chiàu án-ni, chia̍h liáu-āu, I koh phâng poe, kóng, “Chit-ê poe sī sin ê iok, ēng góa ê huih siat-li̍p,ê, lín ta̍k-pái lim ê sî tio̍h chòe chit-ê lâi kì-liām góa.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Án-ni, lín ta̍k-pái chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ, lim chit-ê poe, sī teh soan-kò Chú ê sí, ti̍t-kàu I lâi-lîm." 
1Corinthians11:27 Só͘-í, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, nā bô ēng ha̍p-gî ê thài-tō͘ chia̍h Chú ê piáⁿ, lim Chú ê poe, sī tek-chōe Chú ê sin-thé kap huih." 
1Corinthians11:28 Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h séng-chhat ka-kī chiah thang chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ, lim chit-ê poe." 
1Corinthians11:29 Lín chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ, lim chit-ê poe, nā bô khak-si̍t bêng-pe̍k Chú ê seng-khu ê ì-sù, chia̍h chit-ê piáⁿ lim chit-ê poe sī ka-kī jiá sím-phòaⁿ." 
1Corinthians11:30 In-ūi án-ni, tī lín tiong-kan ū chin chōe lâng loán-jio̍k, phòa-pīⁿ, mā ū lâng tì-kàu sí." 
1Corinthians11:31 Lán nā seng séng-chhat ka-kī, chiū bōe tì-kàu siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
1Corinthians11:32 Put-kò lán siū Chú sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, sī teh siū koán-kàu, hō͘ lán bián tì-kàu kap sè-kan tâng siū tēng-chōe." 
1Corinthians11:33 Só͘-í, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín chū-chi̍p chia̍h Chú ê Boán-chhan ê sî, tio̍h hō͘-siōng thèng-hāu." 
1Corinthians11:34 Nā ū lâng iau, tio̍h tī chhù,ni̍h seng chia̍h, chiah bián lín chū-hōe tian-tò siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ. Kî-tha ê tāi-chì, góa khì lín hia ê sî chiah chhú-lí." 
1Corinthians12:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, koan-hē Sèng Sîn ê un-sù, góa ài lín liáu-kái." 
1Corinthians12:2 Lín chai, lín iáu-sī īⁿ-kàu-tô͘ ê sî chhut-chāi lâng chhōa-khì pài bōe kóng-ōe ê ngó͘-siōng." 
1Corinthians12:3 Só͘-í góa ài lín liáu-kái, só͘-ū siū Siōng-tè ê Sîn kám-tōng ê lâng, bô lâng ōe kóng “Iâ-so͘ tio̍h siū chiù-chó͘”; nā bô siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, mā bô lâng ōe kóng “Iâ-so͘ sī Chú”." 
1Corinthians12:4 Un-sù ū chin chōe khoán, m̄-kú sù un-sù,ê sī kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn." 
1Corinthians12:5 Sū-hōng ū chin chōe khoán, m̄-kú sī sū-hōng kâng chi̍t ūi Chú." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kang-chok ū chin chōe khoán, m̄-kú pang-chān ta̍k-ê lâng khì chòe ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì,ê sī kâng chi̍t ūi Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians12:7 Sèng Sîn tī ta̍k-ê lâng sin-chiūⁿ hián-bêng,ê, sī beh hō͘ tāi-ke tit-tio̍h lī-ek." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ū lâng thong-kè Sèng Sîn tit-tio̍h thoân sìn-sit ê tì-hūi; ū lâng kun-kù kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn tit-tio̍h thoân sìn-sit ê tì-sek; 
1Corinthians12:9 ū lâng tùi kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn tit-tio̍h sìn-sim; ū lâng tùi kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn tit-tio̍h i-pīⁿ ê un-sù; 
1Corinthians12:10 ū lâng tit-tio̍h kiâⁿ sîn-jiah ê un-sù; ū lâng tit-tio̍h thoân Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù; ū lâng tit-tio̍h hun-piān Siōng-tè ê Sîn kap pa̍t-ê sîn ê un-sù; ū lâng tit-tio̍h kóng lêng-gú ê un-sù; ū lâng tit-tio̍h kóe-seh lêng-gú ê un-sù. 
1Corinthians12:11 Chiah-ê it-chhè lóng sī kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn ê ūn-chok, I chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù chiong bô kâng-khoán ê un-sù pun hō͘ ta̍k-ê lâng." 
1Corinthians12:12 Chhin-chhiūⁿ seng-khu sī chi̍t ê, m̄-kú ū chin chōe chi-thé; seng-khu sui-jiân ū chin chōe chi-thé, m̄-kú seng-khu chí-ū chi̍t ê; Ki-tok mā-sī án-ni." 
1Corinthians12:13 Bô-lūn sī Iû-thài -lâng á-sī Gōa-pang-lâng, lô͘-lē á-sī chū-iû ê lâng, lán lóng tùi kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn niá-siū sóe-lé, chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé, koh lán mā lóng lim kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn lâi tit-tio̍h lūn-te̍k." 
1Corinthians12:14 Seng-khu m̄-sī chí-ū chi̍t ê chi-thé, sī ū chin chōe chi-thé." 
1Corinthians12:15 Kha nā kóng “Góa m̄-sī chhiú, só͘-í bô sio̍k seng-khu”, kha m̄-sī án-ni kóng chiū bô sio̍k seng-khu." 
1Corinthians12:16 Hī-á nā kóng “Góa m̄-sī ba̍k-chiu, só͘-í bô sio̍k seng-khu”, hī-á m̄-sī án-ni kóng chiū bô sio̍k seng-khu." 
1Corinthians12:17 Choân seng-khu nā lóng sī ba̍k-chiu, beh ēng sím-mi̍h lâi thiaⁿ? Choân seng-khu nā lóng sī hī-á, beh ēng sím-mi̍h lâi phīⁿ?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Án-ni, Siōng-tè chiàu I ê chí-ì chiong ta̍k-khoán chi-thé an-tì tī seng-khu." 
1Corinthians12:19 Choân-pō͘ nā chí-ū sī chi̍t ê chi-thé, ná ōe-tàng sǹg-chòe seng-khu?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Án-ni, chi-thé ū chin chōe, m̄-kú seng-khu chí-ū chi̍t ê." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ba̍k-chiu bōe-tàng kā chhiú kóng “Góa bô su-iàu lí!” Thâu mā bōe-tàng tùi kha kóng “Góa bô su-iàu lí!” 
1Corinthians12:22 Kî-si̍t, lán ê seng-khu hiah-ê khòaⁿ,khí-lâi khah loán-jio̍k ê chi-thé tian-tò khah ū pit-iàu." 
1Corinthians12:23 Lán khòaⁿ khah m̄ chiūⁿ-ba̍k ê chi-thé, tian-tò khah tio̍h kā in khòaⁿ-tāng; khah pháiⁿ-khòaⁿ ê chi-thé, tian-tò khah tio̍h kā in chng-thāⁿ;" 
1Corinthians12:24 hiah-ê khah hó-khòaⁿ ê chi-thé chiū bô su-iàu chng-thāⁿ. Siōng-tè chiong seng-khu an-pâi hó-sè, hō͘ hiah-ê khah bô tiōng-iàu ê chi-thé tit-tio̍h khah-tōa ê chun-tiōng," 
1Corinthians12:25 thang hō͘ seng-khu bián tì-kàu hun-lia̍t, tian-tò hō͘ ta̍k-ê chi-thé hō͘-siōng chiàu-kò͘." 
1Corinthians12:26 Chi̍t ê chi-thé siū-khó͘, kî-tha ê chi-thé chiū chòe-hé siū-khó͘; chi̍t ê chi-thé tit-tio̍h êng-kng, kî-tha ê chi-thé chiū chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí." 
1Corinthians12:27 Lín sī Ki-tok ê seng-khu, ta̍k-ê lâng sī seng-khu ê chi-thé." 
1Corinthians12:28 Siōng-tè tī kàu-hōe só͘ an-tì,ê, tē-it sī sù-tô͘, tē-jī sī sian-ti, tē-saⁿ sī kàu-su, koh ū kiâⁿ sîn-jiah,ê, koh ū i-pīⁿ un-sù,ê, pang-chān lâng,ê, koán-lí sū-bū,ê, kóng ta̍k-khoán lêng-gú,ê." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ta̍k-ê lâng kiám lóng sī sù-tô͘? Kiám lóng sī sian-ti? Kiám lóng sī kàu-su? Kiám lóng sī kiâⁿ sîn-jiah,ê? 
1Corinthians12:30 Kiám lóng sī ū i-pīⁿ un-sù,ê? Kiám lóng sī kóng lêng-gú,ê? Kiám lóng sī kóe-seh lêng-gú,ê? 
1Corinthians12:31 Lín tio̍h jia̍t-chhiat him-bō͘ hiah-ê koh-khah tiōng-iàu ê un-sù. Taⁿ góa kā lín chí-sī chi̍t tiâu siōng-hó ê lō͘. 
1Corinthians13:1 Góa nā ōe-hiáu kóng lâng ê gú-giân, sīm-chì thiⁿ-sài ê gú-giân, nā bô jîn-ài, góa chiū chhin-chhiūⁿ lô teh tân, poa̍h teh hiáng." 
1Corinthians13:2 Góa nā ū thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù, ōe liáu-kái ta̍k-khoán ê ò-pì kap ta̍k-khoán ê tì-sek; góa nā ū kàu-gia̍h ê sìn-sim thang î-san-tó-hái, nā bô jîn-ài, góa chiū bô lō͘-ēng." 
1Corinthians13:3 Góa nā the̍h só͘-ū ê châi-sán khì kiù-chè, á-sī hiàn seng-khu hō͘ hé sio, nā bô jîn-ài, tùi góa lóng bô lī-ek." 
1Corinthians13:4 Jîn-ài sī khoan-iông; jîn-ài sī chû-pi; ū jîn-ài chiū bōe oàn-tò͘, bōe khoa-kháu, bōe kiau-ngō͘," 
1Corinthians13:5 bōe chòe kiàn-siàu ê tāi-chì, bōe kiû ka-kī ê lī-ek, bōe khoài siū-khì, bōe khioh-hūn," 
1Corinthians13:6 bōe ài put-gī, chí-ū ài chin-lí." 
1Corinthians13:7 Jîn-ài ōe pau-iông it-chhè, tùi it-chhè ū sìn-sim, tùi it-chhè ū ǹg-bāng, tùi it-chhè ū nāi-sim." 
1Corinthians13:8 Jîn-ài éng-oán chûn-chāi. Thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù ōe kiat-sok; kóng lêng-gú ê un-sù ōe thêng-chí; tì-sek mā ōe siau-sit. 
1Corinthians13:9 Lán só͘ bat,ê iú-hān; lán thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù mā iú-hān. 
1Corinthians13:10 M̄-kú hit-ê oân-choân,ê chi̍t-ē lâi, hit-ê iú-hān,ê chiū siau-sit." 
1Corinthians13:11 Góa choh gín-á ê sî, kóng-ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á, ì-kiàn chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á, siūⁿ-hoat mā chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á; góa kì-jiân sêng-jîn, chiū chiong gín-á ê sū lóng pàng-sak." 
1Corinthians13:12 Lán hiān-chāi chhin-chhiūⁿ chiò-kiàⁿ teh khòaⁿ, bū-bū bô-bêng, chiong-lâi ōe bīn-tùi-bīn khòaⁿ chheng-chhó. Góa hiān-chāi chí-ū chai chi̍t-pō͘-hūn, chiong-lâi ōe oân-choân liáu-kái, chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè oân-choân liáu-kái góa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Án-ni, sìn, ǹg-bāng, jîn-ài chit saⁿ hāng kè-sio̍k chûn-chāi, kî-tiong siōng tiōng-iàu,ê sī jîn-ài." 
1Corinthians14:1 Tio̍h tui-kiû jîn-ài; tio̍h jia̍t-chhiat him-bō͘ sio̍k-lêng ê un-sù, te̍k-pia̍t sī thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kóng lêng-gú ê lâng m̄-sī teh tùi lâng kóng, sī teh tùi Siōng-tè kóng, in-ūi bô lâng thiaⁿ ū; i sī khò Sèng Sîn teh kóng ò-pì ê sū." 
1Corinthians14:3 Put-kò thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê lâng sī teh tùi lâng kóng, beh hō͘ in tit-tio̍h chō-chiū, kó͘-lē, an-ùi." 
1Corinthians14:4 Kóng lêng-gú ê lâng chí-ū chō-chiū ka-kī, put-kò thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê lâng chō-chiū choân kàu-hōe." 
1Corinthians14:5 Góa ài lín ta̍k-ê lâng lóng ōe kóng lêng-gú, koh-khah ài lín ōe thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit. Kóng lêng-gú nā m̄-sī ū lâng kóe-seh, hō͘ kàu-hōe tit-tio̍h chō-chiū, án-ni, thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit pí kóng lêng-gú khah tiōng-iàu." 
1Corinthians14:6 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa khì lín hia, nā kan-ta kóng lêng-gú, bô thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè ê khé-sī, á-sī tì-sek, á-sī sìn-sit, á-sī kà-sī, tùi lín ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Bô sìⁿ-miā ê ga̍k-khì chhin-chhiūⁿ phín-á á-sī khîm, in só͘ hoat-chhut ê im nā bô koân-kē piàn-hòa, lâng ná ōe chai sī teh chàu sím-mi̍h?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Lat-pah ê siaⁿ nā bô chún-khak, lâng ná chai thang chún-pī sio-chiàn?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lín só͘ kóng ê lêng-gú, ì-sù nā bô chheng-chhó, lâng ná ōe lí-kái lín teh kóng sím-mi̍h? Án-ni lín sī teh tùi khong-khì kóng-ōe." 
1Corinthians14:10 Sè-kan ū chin chōe bô kâng-khoán ê gú-giân, ta̍k-ê lóng ū ì-sù." 
1Corinthians14:11 Góa nā m̄ bat bó͘ chi̍t ê gú-giân, tùi teh kóng chit-ê gú-giân ê lâng lâi khòaⁿ góa sī gōa-kok-lâng; teh kóng chit-ê gú-giân ê lâng tùi góa lâi khòaⁿ mā-sī gōa-kok-lâng." 
1Corinthians14:12 Lín mā-sī án-ni, kì-jiân lín jia̍t-chhiat him-bō͘ sio̍k-lêng ê un-sù, tio̍h koh-khah chhut-la̍t tui-kiû hiah-ê ōe chō-chiū kàu-hōe ê un-sù." 
1Corinthians14:13 Só͘-í, kóng lêng-gú ê lâng tio̍h kî-kiû ōe-tàng kóe-seh ê lêng-le̍k." 
1Corinthians14:14 Góa nā ēng lêng-gú kî-tó, sī góa ê lêng teh kî-tó, m̄-kú góa ê lí-tì bô chok-iōng." 
1Corinthians14:15 Án-ni góa beh án-chóaⁿ? Góa beh ēng lêng kî-tó, mā beh ēng lí-tì kî-tó. Góa beh ēng lêng gîm-si, mā beh ēng lí-tì gîm-si." 
1Corinthians14:16 Nā bô, lín nā chí-ū ēng lêng kám-siā Siōng-tè, chham-ka chū-hōe hiah-ê bô liáu-kái lêng-gú ê sìn-tô͘ m̄ chai lín teh kóng sím-mi̍h, beh ná ōe tùi lín ê kám-siā kóng “Amen”?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Lín ê kám-siā kiám-chhái chin hó, m̄-kú bô hō͘ pa̍t-lâng tit-tio̍h chō-chiū." 
1Corinthians14:18 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, góa pí lín chèng-lâng kóng koh-khah chōe lêng-gú." 
1Corinthians14:19 M̄-kú tī kàu-hōe tiong, góa lêng-khó kóng gō͘ kù ū lí-tì ê ōe thang kà-sī pa̍t-lâng, mā bô ài kóng chi̍t-bān kù lêng-gú." 
1Corinthians14:20 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín siūⁿ tāi-chì m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ gín-á; tùi pháiⁿ tāi-chì tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ eⁿ-á, siūⁿ tāi-chì tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-lâng." 
1Corinthians14:21 Tī Lu̍t-hoat-su ū kì-chài: Chú kóng: Góa beh ēng kóng gōa-kok-ōe ê lâng, ēng īⁿ-pang-lâng ê chhùi-tûn, tùi góa ê chú-bîn kóng-ōe, m̄-kú in iáu m̄ thiaⁿ." 
1Corinthians14:22 Án-ni, kóng lêng-gú m̄-sī beh hō͘ sìn-tô͘, sī beh hō͘ bô-sìn ê lâng chòe kì-hō. M̄-kú thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù m̄-sī beh hō͘ bô-sìn ê lâng, sī beh hō͘ sìn-tô͘ chòe kì-hō." 
1Corinthians14:23 Choân kàu-hōe chū-chi̍p ê sî, tāi-ke nā lóng teh kóng lêng-gú, ū bô liáu-kái lêng-gú ê sìn-tô͘ á-sī bô-sìn ê lâng ji̍p,lâi, kiám bōe kóng lín sī teh khí-siáu?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Tāi-ke nā lóng teh thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit, ū bô-sìn ê lâng á-sī bô liáu-kái lêng-gú ê sìn-tô͘ ji̍p,lâi, thiaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê ōe chiū hiáu-ngō͘ chai-chōe," 
1Corinthians14:25 sim-lāi ê pì-bi̍t hián-lō͘ chhut,lâi, ōe phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài Siōng-tè, soan-kò kóng, “Siōng-tè chin-chiàⁿ tī lín tiong-kan!”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, án-ni beh án-chóaⁿ? Lín chū-hōe ê sî, ū lâng chhiùⁿ sèng-si, ū lâng kà-sī, ū lâng soan-káng Siōng-tè ê khé-sī, ū lâng kóng lêng-gú, mā ū lâng kóe-seh lêng-gú. Ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì lóng tio̍h ūi-tio̍h chō-chiū kàu-hōe lâi chòe." 
1Corinthians14:27 Nā ū lâng kóng lêng-gú, chí-ū nn̄g ê, siōng chōe saⁿ ê lûn-liû kóng, koh tio̍h ū lâng kóe-seh." 
1Corinthians14:28 Nā-sī bô lâng thang kóe-seh, in tī chū-hōe tiong tio̍h chēng-chēng, chí-ū tùi ka-kī kap Siōng-tè kóng." 
1Corinthians14:29 Soan-káng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit, thang hō͘ nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê kóng, kî-tha ê lâng thang phòaⁿ-toàn in só͘ kóng,ê." 
1Corinthians14:30 Put-kò chāi-chō ê lâng nā ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê khé-sī, tú-teh kóng ê lâng tio̍h chēng-chēng." 
1Corinthians14:31 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng lóng thang lûn-liû soan-káng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit, thang chòe-hé ha̍k-si̍p, hō͘-siōng bián-lē." 
1Corinthians14:32 Soan-káng Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê lâng tio̍h ōe-hiáu iok-sok ka-kī ê un-sù," 
1Corinthians14:33 in-ūi Siōng-tè m̄-sī hūn-loān ê Siōng-tè, sī hô-hâi ê Siōng-tè. Kap só͘-ū Siōng-tè chú-bîn ê kàu-hōe kâng-khoán," 
1Corinthians14:34 hū-jîn-lâng tī chū-hōe tiong tio̍h chēng-chēng, bōe-ēng-tit kóng-ōe. Chiàu Iû-thài Lu̍t-hoat só͘ kóng, hū-jîn-lâng tio̍h sūn-ho̍k." 
1Corinthians14:35 In nā ài o̍h sím-mi̍h, tio̍h tī chhù,ni̍h mn̄g ka-kī ê tiōng-hu; hū-jîn-lâng tī chū-hōe tiong kóng-ōe bô thé-biān." 
1Corinthians14:36 Ná án-ni kóng! Siōng-tè ê ōe kiám tùi lín lâi, kiám kan-ta thoân hō͘ lín?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Nā ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī sī thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê lâng, á-sī sio̍k-lêng ê lâng, tio̍h chai góa teh siá hō͘ lín,ê sī Chú ê bēng-lēng." 
1Corinthians14:38 Nā ū lâng bô khòaⁿ chit-ê tāi-chì chòe iàu-kín, mā m̄-bián kā i khòaⁿ-chòe iàu-kín." 
1Corinthians14:39 Só͘-í, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h jia̍t-chhiat him-bō͘ thoân-ta̍t Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê un-sù, put-kò mā m̄-thang kìm-chí lâng kóng lêng-gú." 
1Corinthians14:40 Hoān-sū tio̍h kui-kui-kú-kú, chiàu tia̍t-sū chòe." 
1Corinthians15:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa beh kā lín thê-chhíⁿ: Góa thoân hō͘ lín ê hok-im lín ū chiap-siū, mā ēng che chòe sìn-gióng ê ki-chhó͘." 
1Corinthians15:2 Lín nā ū kian-siú góa só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit, m̄-sī khang-khang sìn, chiū ōe khò chit-ê hok-im tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Corinthians15:3 Góa í-keng ū chiong góa pún-sin só͘ niá-siū hit-ê siōng tiōng-iàu ê sìn-sit thoân hō͘ lín, chiū-sī chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán ê chōe sí," 
1Corinthians15:4 bâi-chòng; koh chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài, I tē-saⁿ ji̍t koh-oa̍h;" 
1Corinthians15:5 I ū tùi Pí-tek hián-hiān, koh tùi cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ hián-hiān." 
1Corinthians15:6 Āu-lâi I ū chi̍t pái tùi gō͘-pah gōa ê hiaⁿ-tī hián-hiān; hiah-ê lâng ū ê í-keng sí, m̄-kú tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng iáu oa̍h,teh." 
1Corinthians15:7 Āu-lâi I ū tùi Ngá-kok hián-hiān, koh tùi só͘-ū ê sù-tô͘ hián-hiān." 
1Corinthians15:8 Chòe-āu, I mā tùi góa chit-ê ná-chún bô kàu-ge̍h chiū chhut-sì ê lâng hián-hiān." 
1Corinthians15:9 Góa sī sù-tô͘ tiong siōng bî-sòe,ê, bōe-kham-tit chheng-chòe sù-tô͘, in-ūi góa bat pek-hāi Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe." 
1Corinthians15:10 M̄-kú ū Siōng-tè ê un-tián chiah ū kin-á-ji̍t ê góa, I sù hō͘ góa ê un-tián bô lo̍k-khong. Góa tian-tò pí kî-tha ê sù-tô͘ koh-khah phah-piàⁿ kang-chok, kî-si̍t m̄-sī góa ka-kī, sī Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap góa tông-chāi." 
1Corinthians15:11 Só͘-í, bô-lūn sī góa á-sī in, che sī goán só͘ teh thoân, lín í-keng ū teh sìn,ê." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kì-jiân goán só͘ soan-iông,ê sī Ki-tok í-keng ū tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, lín tiong-kan ná ū lâng kóng bô sí-lâng koh-oa̍h chit-khoán tāi-chì?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Nā bô sí-lâng koh-oa̍h, án-ni Ki-tok chiū bô koh-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians15:14 Nā Ki-tok bô koh-oa̍h, án-ni goán só͘ soan-iông,ê sī khang-khang, lín ê sìn mā-sī khang-khang." 
1Corinthians15:15 Án-ni goán chiū-sī teh ūi Siōng-tè chòe ké kiàn-chèng, in-ūi goán kiàn-chèng Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ Ki-tok koh-oa̍h; sí-lâng nā bô koh-oa̍h, Siōng-tè chiū bô hō͘ Ki-tok koh-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians15:16 Nā sí-lâng bô koh-oa̍h, Ki-tok chiū bô koh-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians15:17 Ki-tok nā bô koh-oa̍h, lín ê sìn chiū bô lō͘-ēng, lín chiū iáu tī chōe-ok tiong." 
1Corinthians15:18 Án-ni, hiah-ê sìn Ki-tok liáu-āu sí,khì ê lâng mā lóng bia̍t-bông lah." 
1Corinthians15:19 Lán sìn Ki-tok ê lâng nā kan-ta tī hiān-sè ū ǹg-bāng, lán sī só͘-ū ê lâng ê tiong-kan siōng thang khó-lîn,ê." 
1Corinthians15:20 M̄-kú, hiān-chāi Siōng-tè í-keng ū hō͘ Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, thang chòe í-keng sí,khì ê lâng koh-oa̍h ê pó-chèng." 
1Corinthians15:21 In-ūi sí thong-kè chi̍t ê lâng lâi, sí-lâng ê koh-oa̍h mā-sī thong-kè chi̍t ê lâng lâi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Tùi A-tong chèng-lâng lóng tio̍h sí, án-ni, tùi Ki-tok chèng-lâng mā lóng ōe koh-oa̍h." 
1Corinthians15:23 Put-kò ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī ê sūn-sū koh-oa̍h: Thâu chi̍t ê sī Ki-tok, sòa,lo̍h-khì sī Ki-tok lâi-lîm ê sî sio̍k I ê lâng," 
1Corinthians15:24 koh-lâi chiah sī boa̍t-kî; hit-sî I ōe siau-bia̍t it-chhè ê thóng-léng-chiá, chiáng-koân-chiá, kap koân-le̍k-chiá, jiân-āu chiong thóng-tī-koân kau hō͘ Pē Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians15:25 In-ūi Ki-tok it-tēng tio̍h thóng-tī, ti̍t-kàu Siōng-tè hō͘ it-chhè ê tùi-te̍k lóng khut-ho̍k tī I ê kha-ē." 
1Corinthians15:26 Chòe-āu siū húi-bia̍t ê tùi-te̍k sī sí. 
1Corinthians15:27 In-ūi Sèng-keng kì-chài kóng, “Siōng-tè hō͘ bān-iú lóng khut-ho̍k tī I ê kha-ē.” Chin bêng-hián, chia só͘ kóng ê “bān-iú” pèng bô pau-hâm hō͘ bān-iú khut-ho̍k tī Ki-tok kha-ē ê Siōng-tè." 
1Corinthians15:28 Kàu bān-iú lóng khut-ho̍k Ki-tok ê sî, Kiáⁿ pún-sin mā ōe khut-ho̍k tī hō͘ bān-iú lóng khut-ho̍k ê Siōng-tè, thang hō͘ Siōng-tè oân-choân thóng-hat it-chhè." 
1Corinthians15:29 Nā m̄-sī án-ni, lâng thòe sí-lâng siū sóe ū sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Nā bô sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê sū, sī-án-chóaⁿ beh thòe sí-lâng siū sóe?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Goán sī-án-chóaⁿ tio̍h sî-sî-khek-khek mō͘-hiám? 
1Corinthians15:31 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa hōng lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tùi lín chiah-ê góa só͘ khoa-kháu ê lâng hó-táⁿ kóng: Góa ta̍k-ji̍t biān-tùi sí." 
1Corinthians15:32 Góa tī Í-hut-só͘ kap “iá-siù” tò͘-cheng, nā sûn-chhùi sī chhut tī lâng ê tōng-ki, tùi góa ū sím-mi̍h lī-ek? Sí-lâng nā bô koh-oa̍h, ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng teh kóng, “Lán lâi chia̍h, lâi lim, bîn-á-chài to beh sí lah!”" 
1Corinthians15:33 M̄-thang hō͘ lâng phiàn,khì. “Kau-tio̍h pháiⁿ pêng-iú ōe phò-hoāi phín-tek!” 
1Corinthians15:34 Tio̍h kak-chhíⁿ, siūⁿ hō͘ chheng-chhó, m̄-thang koh hoān-chōe, in-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa lâng iáu m̄ bat Siōng-tè, góa kóng chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín chai thang kiàn-siàu." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kiám-chhái ū lâng beh mn̄g, “Sí-lâng án-chóaⁿ koh-oa̍h? In ōe ēng sím-mi̍h khoán ê thé lâi?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Gōng-lâng! Lín iā-lo̍h tōe ê chéng-chí nā bô sí,khì, kiám ōe oa̍h,khí-lâi?" 
1Corinthians15:37 Lín só͘ iā,ê, bô-lūn sī be̍h-á á-sī pa̍t-khoán ngó͘-kok, put-kò sī chéng-chí, m̄-sī āu-lâi tōa-châng ê hêng-thé." 
1Corinthians15:38 Siōng-tè chiàu I ê chí-ì hō͘ chéng-chí ū hêng-thé; ta̍k-khoán chéng-chí ū ka-kī ê hêng-thé. 
1Corinthians15:39 Ta̍k-khoán tōng-bu̍t ê jio̍k-thé mā lóng bô kâng-khoán: Lâng ê jio̍k-thé chi̍t khoán, siù-lūi chi̍t khoán, chiáu-lūi chi̍t khoán, hî-lūi koh chi̍t khoán." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ū thiⁿ-téng ê thé, ū tōe-chiūⁿ ê thé; thian-thé ê kng kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê thé ê kng bô kâng-khoán." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ji̍t-thâu ū ji̍t-thâu ê kng, ge̍h ū ge̍h ê kng, chhiⁿ ū chhiⁿ ê kng; sīm-chì ta̍k-lia̍p chhiⁿ ê kng to lóng bô kâng-khoán." 
1Corinthians15:42 Sí-lâng ê koh-oa̍h mā-sī án-ni. Tâi,lo̍h-khì,ê ōe hiú-nōa, koh-oa̍h,ê bōe hiú-nōa;" 
1Corinthians15:43 tâi,lo̍h-khì,ê sī pi-chiān,ê, koh-oa̍h,ê sī êng-iāu,ê; tâi,lo̍h-khì,ê sī loán-jio̍k,ê, koh-oa̍h,ê sī ióng-chòng,ê;" 
1Corinthians15:44 tâi,lo̍h-khì,ê sī hiat-jio̍k ê thé, koh-oa̍h,ê sī sio̍k-lêng ê thé. Kì-jiân ū hiat-jio̍k ê thé, chiū ū sio̍k-lêng ê thé." 
1Corinthians15:45 Só͘-í Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Thâu chi̍t ê lâng A-tong siū-chō chòe ū oa̍h-miā ê lâng”, m̄-kú lō͘-bé ê A-tong sī sù oa̍h-miā ê Sîn." 
1Corinthians15:46 Tāi-seng ū,ê m̄-sī sio̍k-lêng,ê, sī hiat-jio̍k,ê, āu-lâi chiah ū sio̍k-lêng,ê." 
1Corinthians15:47 Thâu chi̍t ê lâng sī tùi tōe chhut, sī thô͘ chō,ê; tē-jī ê lâng sī tùi thiⁿ lâi,ê." 
1Corinthians15:48 Só͘-ū ēng thô͘ chō ê lâng lóng kap hit-ê thâu chi̍t ê ēng thô͘ chō ê lâng kâng-khoán; só͘-ū sio̍k-thiⁿ ê lâng mā kap hit-ê lō͘-bé lâi sio̍k-thiⁿ ê lâng kâng-khoán. 
1Corinthians15:49 Tú chhin-chhiūⁿ lán ū hit-ê thâu chi̍t ê ēng thô͘ chō ê lâng ê hêng-siōng, mā ōe ū hit-ê lō͘-bé lâi sio̍k-thiⁿ ê lâng ê hêng-siōng." 
1Corinthians15:50 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa kā lín kóng: Hiat-jio̍k ê thé bōe-tàng sêng-siū Siōng-tè-kok; ōe hiú-nōa,ê mā bōe-tàng sêng-siū bōe hiú-nōa,ê." 
1Corinthians15:51 Góa beh kā lín kóng chi̍t hāng ò-pì: Lán bōe lóng sí, put-kò tī chi̍t-sùn-kan, chi̍t-ba̍k-nih-kú, chòe-āu ê lat-pah chi̍t-ē tân, lán lóng ōe kái-piàn; lat-pah tân, sí-lâng ōe koh-oa̍h, pìⁿ-chòe bōe hiú-nōa,ê, lán mā lóng ōe kái-piàn." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 In-ūi chit-ê ōe hiú-nōa,ê it-tēng tio̍h pìⁿ-chòe bōe hiú-nōa,ê, ōe-sí,ê pìⁿ-chòe bōe-sí,ê." 
1Corinthians15:54 Tng ōe hiú-nōa,ê pìⁿ-chòe bōe hiú-nōa,ê, ōe-sí,ê pìⁿ-chòe bōe-sí,ê hit-sî, Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài ê ōe chiū ōe èng-giām: Sí hō͘ sèng-lī thun,lo̍h-khì lah!" 
1Corinthians15:55 Sí ah, lí ê sèng-lī tī tó-ūi? Sí ah, lí ê to̍k-chhì tī tó-ūi?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Sí ê to̍k-chhì sī chōe, chōe ê ui-le̍k sī tùi Lu̍t-hoat lâi,ê." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, I thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hō͘ lán tit-tio̍h sèng-lī." 
1Corinthians15:58 Só͘-í, chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h khiā-chāi, m̄-thang tōng-iâu. Tio̍h siông-siông chīn-la̍t ūi Chú chòe kang, in-ūi lín chai ūi Chú tio̍h-bôa chòe kang it-tēng bōe lo̍k-khong." 
1Corinthians16:1 Koan-hē koan-hiàn pang-chān sìn-tô͘ ê tāi-chì, lín mā tio̍h chiàu góa kā Ka-lia̍p-thài ê chèng kàu-hōe só͘ chí-sī ê khì chòe." 
1Corinthians16:2 Múi lé-pài ê thâu chi̍t ji̍t, ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī ê siu-ji̍p the̍h chi̍t-kóa khí-lâi khǹg, chiah bián góa khì lín hia ê sî chiah khai-sí bō͘-koan." 
1Corinthians16:3 Góa kàu-ūi ê sî, ōe chiong kài-siāu ê phoe kap lín ê koan-hiàn kau hō͘ lín ōe sìn-jīm,tit ê lâng, phài in tòa-khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nā-sī góa mā tio̍h khì khah hó, in ōe kap góa chòe-hé khì." 
1Corinthians16:5 Góa siūⁿ-beh keng-kè Má-kî-tùn, àn-sǹg keng-kè Má-kî-tùn liáu-āu beh khì lín hia," 
1Corinthians16:6 tāi-khài ōe tòa lín hia kap lín chòe-hé kè tang-thiⁿ. Án-ni, bô-lūn beh koh khì tó-ūi, lín thang sàng góa chhut-hoat." 
1Corinthians16:7 Góa bô ài tī kè-lō͘ ê sî chiah sūn-sòa khì khòaⁿ lín; Chú nā ún-chún, góa ǹg-bāng kap lín tòa chi̍t-chām-á." 
1Corinthians16:8 Góa ōe tī Í-hut-só͘ tòa kàu Gō͘-sûn-choeh. 
1Corinthians16:9 Tī chia sui-jiân ū chin chōe hoán-tùi ê lâng, m̄-kú mn̂g ūi góa tōa khui, thang chòe ū hāu-kó ê kang-chok." 
1Corinthians16:10 Thê-mô͘-thài kàu-ūi ê sî, lín tio̍h kā i chiap-thāi, hō͘ i ōe-tàng an-sim, in-ūi i kap góa kâng-khoán teh chòe Chú ê kang." 
1Corinthians16:11 Lín lóng m̄-thang khòaⁿ i bô khí. Tio̍h sàng i pêng-an lī-khui, hō͘ i thang tńg-lâi góa chia, in-ūi góa teh thèng-hāu i kap hiah-ê hiaⁿ-tī chòe-hé lâi." 
1Corinthians16:12 Koan-hē lán ê hiaⁿ-tī A-pho-lô, góa ū ke̍k-le̍k khǹg i kap kî-tha ê hiaⁿ-tī khì hóng-būn lín; put-kò i ba̍k-chêng lóng bô àn-sǹg beh khì, nā ū tú-hó ê ki-hōe i chiū ōe khì." 
1Corinthians16:13 Lín tio̍h kéng-séng, sìn-sim khiā-chāi, tio̍h ióng-kám, tio̍h kian-kiông." 
1Corinthians16:14 Lín só͘ chòe it-chhè ê tāi-chì tio̍h ēng thiàⁿ-sim khì chòe. 
1Corinthians16:15 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín bat Sū-thê-hoat-ná chi̍t ke ê lâng; in sī A-kai-a -séng thâu chi̍t ke kui-sìn Ki-tok ê lâng, jia̍t-sim ho̍k-bū sìn-tô͘." 
1Corinthians16:16 Góa khǹg lín tio̍h sūn-thàn chit-khoán lâng, í-ki̍p só͘-ū kap in chòe-hé tio̍h-bôa kang-chok ê lâng." 
1Corinthians16:17 Sū-thê-hoat-ná, Hok-tô͘-ná-to͘, kap A-kai-kó͘ lâi góa chia, góa chin hoaⁿ-hí. Lín bô tī chia, in thòe lín lâi pang-chān góa." 
1Corinthians16:18 In hō͘ góa kap lín pîⁿ-pîⁿ tit-tio̍h kek-lē. Só͘-í lín tio̍h kèng-tiōng chit-khoán lâng. 
1Corinthians16:19 A-sè-a -séng ê chèng kàu-hōe lóng beh kā lín chhéng-an. A-ku-la kap Pek-ki-la, í-ki̍p tī in tau teh chū-hōe ê kàu-hōe, tī Chú ê lāi-bīn beh jia̍t-chhiat kā lín chhéng-an." 
1Corinthians16:20 Só͘-ū ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē lóng beh kā lín chhéng-an. Lín tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an. 
1Corinthians16:21 Góa Pó-lô chhin-pit kā lín chhéng-an. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nā ū lâng bô thiàⁿ Chú, tio̍h siū chiù-chó͘. Chú ah, chhiáⁿ lâi!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Goān Chú Iâ-so͘ ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi! 
1Corinthians16:24 Goān góa ê thiàⁿ kap lín só͘-ū sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê lâng tông-chāi! 
2Corinthians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘. Góa kap hiaⁿ-tī Thê-mô͘-thài siá-phoe hō͘ tī Ko-lîm-to Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe kap choân A-kai-a -séng só͘-ū sìn-tô͘." 
2Corinthians1:2 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
2Corinthians1:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! I sī chû-pi ê Pē, sù ta̍k-hāng an-ùi ê Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians1:4 Tī lán it-chhè ê hoān-lān tiong, I an-ùi lán, hō͘ lán ōe-tàng ēng Siōng-tè sù lán ê an-ùi khì an-ùi hiah-ê tú-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán hoān-lān ê lâng." 
2Corinthians1:5 In-ūi Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán siū chin chōe khó͘-lān, lán mā thong-kè Ki-tok siū hiah-ni̍h chōe ê an-ùi." 
2Corinthians1:6 Goán nā tú-tio̍h hoān-lān, sī beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h an-ùi kap chín-kiù; goán nā tit-tio̍h an-ùi, mā-sī beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h an-ùi, ū khùi-la̍t thang jím-siū kap goán só͘ jím-siū siâng-khoán ê khó͘-lān." 
2Corinthians1:7 Goán tùi lín ê ǹg-bāng bōe iô-tāng; in-ūi goán chai, lín kap goán tâng siū-khó͘, lín mā ōe kap goán tâng siū an-ùi." 
2Corinthians1:8 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán ài lín chai goán tī A-sè-a -séng só͘ tú,tio̍h ê hoān-lān. Goán só͘ taⁿ ê tāng-tàⁿ hui-siông tāng, tāng kah taⁿ bōe khí, tì-kàu kiông-beh oa̍h bōe lo̍h,khì." 
2Corinthians1:9 Goán ka-kī kám-kak ū siū phòaⁿ sí-hêng; án-ni sī beh hō͘ goán bô koh óa-khò ka-kī, chí-ū óa-khò hō͘ sí-lâng koh-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians1:10 I ū kiù goán thoat-lī sí ê gûi-hiám, mā ōe kè-sio̍k kiù goán. Goán ǹg-bāng I chiong-lâi ōe koh kiù goán." 
2Corinthians1:11 Lín mā tio̍h ēng kî-tó pang-chān goán, án-ni chiū ū chin chōe lâng ōe in-ūi goán tùi lín chin chōe ê kî-tó tit-tio̍h chiok-hok lâi kám-siā Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians1:12 Goán só͘ khoa-kháu,ê sī án-ni: Goán ê liông-sim chèng-bêng, goán tī chit sè-kan ê seng-oa̍h lóng sī chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê sûn-kiat kap sêng-si̍t, m̄-sī khò sio̍k-sè ê tì-hūi, sī khò Siōng-tè ê un-tián; goán tùi-thāi lín koh-khah sī án-ni." 
2Corinthians1:13 Goán siá hō͘ lín,ê lóng sī lín ōe-hiáu tha̍k ōe-tàng liáu-kái,ê. Lín kàu taⁿ só͘ lí-kái,ê chí-ū chi̍t-pō͘-hūn, góa ǹg-bāng lín kàu lō͘-bé ōe oân-choân liáu-kái. Án-ni, tī lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê Ji̍t, lín ōe chòe goán ê khoa-kháu, goán mā chòe lín ê khoa-kháu." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 In-ūi ū chit-ê khak-sìn, góa chiah kè-ōe seng khì hóng-būn lín, thang hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h ka-pē ê chiok-hok;" 
2Corinthians1:16 chiū-sī kè-ōe khì Má-kî-tùn ê lō͘-tiong seng khì hóng-būn lín, koh tùi Má-kî-tùn tò,lâi keng-kè lín hia ê sî, hō͘ lín thang sàng góa chhut-hoat khì Iû-thài." 
2Corinthians1:17 Chit-ê kè-ōe kiám sī chhìn-chhái chòe,ê? Góa chòe chit-khoán kè-ōe kiám chhut tī chū-su ê tōng-ki, liâm-piⁿ kóng “sī” liâm-piⁿ kóng “m̄-sī”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t, góa tùi lín tah-èng ê ōe chiū m̄-sī liâm-piⁿ “sī” liâm-piⁿ “m̄-sī”." 
2Corinthians1:19 In-ūi Se-la, Thê-mô͘-thài, kap góa thoân hō͘ lín hit-ūi Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, pèng m̄-sī liâm-piⁿ “sī” liâm-piⁿ “m̄-sī” ê. Chāi-tī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chí-ū “sī” nā-tiāⁿ." 
2Corinthians1:20 Siōng-tè it-chhè ê èng-ún tī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lóng chiâⁿ-chòe “sī”, só͘-í lán chiah thong-kè I kóng “Amen” lâi kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians1:21 Hō͘ goán kap lín lâi kap Ki-tok kiat-liân, koh soán-phài goán,ê sī Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians1:22 I kā goán khàm-ìn, koh sù Sèng Sîn tī goán sim-lāi chòe pó-chèng." 
2Corinthians1:23 Góa ēng ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā khún-kiû Siōng-tè kā góa choh-chèng. Góa sī thé-thiap lín chiah bô khì Ko-lîm-to. 
2Corinthians1:24 Goán m̄-sī teh kiông-chè lín tio̍h sìn sím-mi̍h, hoán-tńg sī teh chòe lín ê tâng-kang, hō͘ lín thang hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi lín ê sìn-sim ū khiā-chāi." 
2Corinthians2:1 Só͘-í, góa koat-tēng bô beh khì lín hia, chiah bián koh-chài hō͘ lín sim kan-khó͘." 
2Corinthians2:2 Góa nā ū hō͘ lín sim kan-khó͘, lín chiah-ê kan-khó͘-sim ê lâng í-gōa iáu ū sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-tàng hō͘ góa khoài-lo̍k?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ūi-tio̍h beh pī-bián góa khì lín hia ê sî, hiah-ê eng-kai hō͘ góa hoaⁿ-hí ê lâng hoán-tńg hō͘ góa kan-khó͘-sim, góa chiah siá í-chêng hit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lín. Góa khak-sìn, góa ê hoaⁿ-hí chiū-sī lín tāi-ke ê hoaⁿ-hí." 
2Corinthians2:4 Góa hui-siông ut-chut koh thòng-sim, lâu chin chōe ba̍k-sái siá hit-tiuⁿ phoe, m̄-sī beh hō͘ lín sim kan-khó͘, sī beh hō͘ lín chai góa jōa-á-ni̍h thiàⁿ lín." 
2Corinthians2:5 Nā ū lâng hō͘ lâng kan-khó͘-sim, m̄-sī hō͘ góa kan-khó͘-sim — góa khah bô ài kóng kah kè-thâu giâm-tiōng — kàu bó͘ chi̍t ê thêng-tō͘ sī hō͘ lín tāi-ke lóng kan-khó͘-sim." 
2Corinthians2:6 Hit-khoán lâng siū lín tāi-to-sò͘ ê lâng khiàn-chek í-keng kàu-gia̍h. 
2Corinthians2:7 Lín tian-tò tio̍h kā i sià-bián, kā i kó͘-lē, chiah bián hō͘ i kè-thâu kan-khó͘-sim soah choa̍t-bāng." 
2Corinthians2:8 Só͘-í, góa khó͘-khǹg lín, tio̍h hō͘ i chai-iáⁿ lín khak-si̍t ū thiàⁿ i." 
2Corinthians2:9 Góa chêng siá hit-tiuⁿ phoe sī ài-beh chai lín jōa gâu jím-siū khó-giām, sī m̄-sī hoān-sū goān-ì sūn-ho̍k." 
2Corinthians2:10 Lín sià-bián sím-mi̍h-lâng, góa mā sià-bián i. Góa nā ū sià-bián sím-mi̍h-lâng, sī tī Ki-tok ê bīn-chêng ūi-tio̍h lín ê iân-kò͘ sià-bián i." 
2Corinthians2:11 Án-ni chiah bián hō͘ Sat-tàn kā lán phiⁿ,khì, in-ūi lán chin chheng-chhó Sat-tàn ê khúi-kè." 
2Corinthians2:12 Góa khì Te̍k-lô-a thoân Ki-tok ê Hok-im ê sî, Chú í-keng kā góa khui kang-chok ê mn̂g;" 
2Corinthians2:13 put-kò bô tú-tio̍h góa ê hiaⁿ-tī Thê-to, góa bōe an-sim, chiū kap hia ê lâng saⁿ-sî khì Má-kî-tùn." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kám-siā Siōng-tè! In-ūi kap Ki-tok kiat-liân, goán sî-siông hō͘ Siōng-tè chhōa-khì chham-ka Ki-tok khái-soân ê hâng-lia̍t. Siōng-tè koh ēng goán khì ta̍k só͘-chāi sàn-pò͘ jīn-bat Ki-tok chiah ū ê phang-bī." 
2Corinthians2:15 Bô-lūn tī tit-kiù á-sī tîm-lûn ê lâng tiong-kan, goán chiâⁿ-chòe Ki-tok ê phang-bī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè;" 
2Corinthians2:16 tùi teh-beh tîm-lûn ê lâng sī sí ê chhàu-bī, tùi teh-beh tit-kiù ê lâng sī oa̍h ê phang-bī. Sím-mi̍h-lâng ōe-kham-tit chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Goán bô chhin-chhiūⁿ chin chōe lâng chiong Siōng-tè ê ōe chòe sio̍k-hè phah-bōe, tian-tò sī chòe chi̍t ê sûn-chin ê lâng, siū Siōng-tè chhe-phài, tī I ê bīn-chêng khò Ki-tok soan-káng." 
2Corinthians3:1 Goán kiám koh teh chhui-chiàn ka-kī? Goán kiám tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t-kóa lâng siá chhui-chiàn-su hō͘ lín, á-sī su-iàu lín ê chhui-chiàn-su?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Lín pún-sin chiū-sī goán ê chhui-chiàn-su, siá tī goán ê sim-lāi, beh hō͘ chèng-lâng chai, chèng-lâng tha̍k." 
2Corinthians3:3 Chin bêng-hián, lín sī Ki-tok só͘ siá thong-kè goán lâi sàng ê phoe. Chit-tiuⁿ phoe m̄-sī ēng ba̍k-chúi siá tī chio̍h-pán, sī ēng éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê Sîn siá tī lâng ê sim-pán." 
2Corinthians3:4 Goán thong-kè Ki-tok tùi Siōng-tè ū chit-khoán ê khak-sìn chiah án-ni kóng. 
2Corinthians3:5 Che m̄-sī kóng goán ka-kī ū châi-tiāu thang chòe chit-ê tāi-chì, goán ê châi-tiāu sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê." 
2Corinthians3:6 I sù goán ū châi-tiāu thang chòe sin ê iok ê chhe-ēng; m̄-sī ēng bûn-jī siá,ê, sī Sèng Sîn ê iok. Bûn-jī hō͘ lâng sí, m̄-kú Sèng Sîn hō͘ lâng oa̍h." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ēng bûn-jī khek tī chio̍h-pán ê Lu̍t-hoat pan-pò͘ ê sî, Siōng-tè ê êng-kng ū hián-hiān. Tùi Mô͘-se ê bīn hoán-chiò,chhut-lâi ê kng sui-jiân chiām-chiām teh siau-sit, m̄-kú hit-ê kng iáu chin kiông, tì-kàu Í-sek-lia̍t kiáⁿ-sun bōe-tàng ba̍k-chiu kim-kim kā i khòaⁿ. Hō͘ lâng tì-kàu sí ê sū-kang to ū chit-khoán ê êng-kng," 
2Corinthians3:8 án-ni Sèng Sîn ê sū-kang só͘ hoat-chhut ê êng-kng kiám bōe koh-khah tōa? 
2Corinthians3:9 Hit-ê kā lâng tēng-chōe ê sū-kang nā ōe hoat-chhut chit-khoán ê êng-kng, chit-ê kā lâng soan-pò͘ bô chōe ê sū-kang só͘ hián-chhut ê êng-kng kiám bōe koh-khah tōa!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Án-ni, in-ūi hiān-chāi ê êng-kng pí í-chêng,ê koh-khah tōa, í-chêng ê êng-kng soah bô,khì." 
2Corinthians3:11 Hit-ê ōe siau-sit,ê nā ōe hoat-chhut êng-kng, chit-ê éng-chûn,ê it-tēng ōe hián-chhut koh-khah tōa ê êng-kng." 
2Corinthians3:12 In-ūi goán ū chit-khoán ê ǹg-bāng chiah chiah-ni̍h ióng-kám. 
2Corinthians3:13 Goán bô chhin-chhiūⁿ Mô͘-se tio̍h ēng phè tà ka-kī ê bīn. Mô͘-se án-ni chòe, chiah bián hō͘ Í-sek-lia̍t kiáⁿ-sun khòaⁿ-tio̍h i bīn ê êng-kng chiām-chiām siau-sit, kàu bé lóng bô,khì." 
2Corinthians3:14 M̄-kú in ê sim tūn, it-ti̍t kàu kin-á-ji̍t in tha̍k kū ê iok ê sî, in ê sim iáu hō͘ hit-tè phè tà,teh. In-ūi chí-ū kap Ki-tok kiat-liân, hit-tè phè chiah the̍h,khí-lâi." 
2Corinthians3:15 Sīm-chì kàu kin-á-ji̍t, in ta̍k-pái tha̍k Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat, hit-tè phè iáu tà tī in ê sim." 
2Corinthians3:16 M̄-kú, tng in kui-ǹg Chú ê sî, phè chiū the̍h,khí-lâi." 
2Corinthians3:17 Chit-ūi Chú chiū-sī Sèng Sîn; ū Chú ê Sîn ê só͘-chāi chiū ū chū-iû. 
2Corinthians3:18 Lán tāi-ke lóng ēng bô tà-phè ê bīn teh hoán-chiò Chú ê êng-kng; chit-ê êng-kng sī tùi Chú, chiū-sī tùi Sèng Sîn hoat,chhut-lâi ê êng-kng, teh kā lán kái-chō chiâⁿ-chòe I ê hêng-siōng, hō͘ lán ū koh-khah tōa ê êng-kng." 
2Corinthians4:1 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè ū lîn-bín goán, chiong chit-ê chit-bū kau-thok goán, goán bô sit-chì." 
2Corinthians4:2 Goán pàng-sak it-chhè bô ài lâng chai ê kiàn-siàu-tāi, bô chòe khi-phiàn lâng ê tāi-chì, bô oai-khiok Siōng-tè ê ōe, chí-ū tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng kong-khai hián-bêng chin-lí, lâi kiò-chhíⁿ chèng-lâng ê liông-sim." 
2Corinthians4:3 Goán só͘ thoân ê hok-im nā ū jia-khàm hō͘ lâng bô chheng-chhó, chí-ū tùi hiah-ê teh-beh tîm-lûn ê lâng jia-khàm nā-tiāⁿ." 
2Corinthians4:4 In m̄ sìn sī in-ūi chit sè-kan ê sîn-bêng hō͘ in ê sim-ba̍k sit-bêng, bōe-tàng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hok-im ê kng, chit-ê hok-im teh kiàn-chèng êng-kng ê Ki-tok; Ki-tok sī Siōng-tè ê hêng-siōng." 
2Corinthians4:5 Goán m̄-sī thoân ka-kī, sī thoân Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sī Chú; goán ka-kī in-ūi Iâ-so͘ ê iân-kò͘ chòe lín ê po̍k-jîn." 
2Corinthians4:6 Hit-ūi bēng-lēng kng tùi o͘-àm chiò,chhut-lâi ê Siōng-tè, chiū-sī ēng kng chiò lán lāi-sim ê Siōng-tè, hō͘ lán jīn-bat I chiò tī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê bīn hit-ê êng-kng." 
2Corinthians4:7 Put-kò, goán sī thô͘ chō ê khì-khū, lāi-bīn ū pó-pòe, beh piáu-sī hit-ê chì-tōa ê lêng-le̍k sī sio̍k tī Siōng-tè, m̄-sī tùi goán chhut,lâi." 
2Corinthians4:8 Goán siông-siông tú-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán khùn-lân, m̄-kú bô khut-ho̍k; tú-tio̍h choa̍t-kéng, m̄-kú bô choa̍t-bāng;" 
2Corinthians4:9 siū-tio̍h khún-pek, m̄-kú bô siū pàng-sak; siū phah-tó, m̄-kú bô tì-kàu sí." 
2Corinthians4:10 Goán put-sî tòa Iâ-so͘ ê sí tī goán ōe-sí ê seng-khu, hō͘ Iâ-so͘ ê oa̍h-miā mā thang tī goán ê sin-chiūⁿ hián-bêng." 
2Corinthians4:11 Goán oa̍h tī sè-kan, ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê iân-kò͘ sî-siông tú-tio̍h sí ê gûi-hiám, thang hō͘ I ê oa̍h-miā tī goán chit-ê ōe-sí ê seng-khu hián-bêng,chhut-lâi." 
2Corinthians4:12 Án-ni, sí tī goán ê lāi-bīn teh hoat-seng chok-iōng, m̄-kú oa̍h-miā tī lín ê lāi-bīn teh hoat-seng chok-iōng." 
2Corinthians4:13 Sèng-keng kóng “Góa ū sìn, só͘-í góa chiah kóng”, kun-kù chit-khoán sìn-gióng ê cheng-sîn, goán mā sìn, só͘-í goán chiah kóng." 
2Corinthians4:14 Goán chai, hō͘ Chú Iâ-so͘ koh-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè mā ōe hō͘ goán kap Iâ-so͘ tâng koh-oa̍h, koh chhōa goán kap lín chòe-hé kàu I ê bīn-chêng." 
2Corinthians4:15 Chiah-ê it-chhè lóng sī ūi-tio̍h lín, sī beh hō͘ koh-khah chōe ê lâng tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê un-tián, thang hiàn koh-khah chōe ê kám-siā lâi êng-iāu Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians4:16 In-ūi án-ni, goán bô sit-chì. Sui-jiân goán gōa-chāi ê lâng chiām-chiām teh soe-pāi, goán lōe-chāi ê lâng khiok ji̍t-ji̍t teh ōaⁿ-sin." 
2Corinthians4:17 Goán só͘ siū chit-ê chiām-sî koh sió-khóa ê kan-khó͘ sī beh hō͘ goán tit-tio̍h bōe thang pí, koh-khah tōa, éng-oán ê êng-kng." 
2Corinthians4:18 Goán só͘ tiōng-sī,ê m̄-sī khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h,ê, sī khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h,ê; in-ūi khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h,ê sī chiām-sî, khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h,ê sī éng-oán." 
2Corinthians5:1 In-ūi goán chai, lán tī tōe-chiūⁿ teh tòa chit-ê pò͘-pîⁿ ê chhù nā thiah,khí-lâi, Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ lán thiⁿ-téng ê chhù, m̄-sī lâng ê chhiú khí,ê, sī éng-oán ê chhù." 
2Corinthians5:2 Lán hiān-chāi tī chit-ê pò͘-pîⁿ teh thó͘-khùi, jia̍t-chhiat ǹg-bāng thang khì tiàm thiⁿ-téng ê chhù, chhin-chhiūⁿ saⁿ tha̍h,lo̍h-khì," 
2Corinthians5:3 nā tha̍h,lo̍h-khì chiū bōe chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé. 
2Corinthians5:4 Lán iáu tiàm tī chit-ê pò͘-pîⁿ pē tāng-tàⁿ teh thó͘-khùi; lán m̄-sī ài thǹg-khì tōe-chiūⁿ ê thé, sī beh tha̍h sio̍k-thiⁿ ê thé, thang hō͘ oa̍h-miā kā ōe-sí,ê thun,lo̍h-khì." 
2Corinthians5:5 Hō͘ lán ū chit-ê kái-piàn,ê sī Siōng-tè, I sù Sèng Sîn hō͘ lán, kā lán pó-chèng." 
2Corinthians5:6 Só͘-í, goán put-sî ū ióng-khì. Goán chai, lán iáu tòa tī chit-ê seng-khu teh oa̍h ê sî, sī kap Chú saⁿ-lī." 
2Corinthians5:7 In-ūi lán teh oa̍h, m̄-sī khò ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ, sī khò sìn-sim." 
2Corinthians5:8 Goán ū ióng-khì, khah ài lī-khui chit-ê seng-khu khì kap Chú tòa." 
2Corinthians5:9 Só͘-í, bô-lūn tī chit-ê seng-khu á-sī lī-khui chit-ê seng-khu, goán ê bo̍k-te̍k sī ài hō͘ Chú hoaⁿ-hí." 
2Corinthians5:10 In-ūi lán lóng it-tēng tio̍h khiā tī Ki-tok ê bīn-chêng siū I sím-phòaⁿ. Ta̍k-ê lâng lóng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê seng-khu só͘ chòe,ê, bô-lūn sī hó á-sī pháiⁿ, chiap-siū pò-èng." 
2Corinthians5:11 Kì-jiân goán chai-iáⁿ tio̍h kèng-ùi Chú, goán chiū khó͘-khǹg lâng. Tùi Siōng-tè lâi khòaⁿ, goán sī sím-mi̍h khoán lâng chin chheng-chhó; góa ǹg-bāng tùi lín ê liông-sim lâi khòaⁿ mā chin chheng-chhó." 
2Corinthians5:12 Goán m̄-sī beh koh tùi lín chhui-chiàn ka-kī, sī hō͘ lín ū ki-hōe ēng goán chòe khoa-kháu, hō͘ lín thang hôe-èng hiah-ê chù-tiōng gōa-piáu bô chù-tiōng lāi-sim ê lâng." 
2Corinthians5:13 Goán nā jia̍t-kông, sī ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè; goán nā chheng-chhíⁿ, sī ūi-tio̍h lín." 
2Corinthians5:14 In-ūi Ki-tok ê thiàⁿ chhui-pek goán chòe chit-ê kiat-lūn: Chi̍t lâng ūi-tio̍h chèng-lâng sí, chèng-lâng chiū lóng sí." 
2Corinthians5:15 I ūi-tio̍h chèng-lâng sí, sī beh hō͘ hiah-ê oa̍h,teh ê lâng bô koh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī oa̍h, sī ūi-tio̍h hit-ūi thòe in sí koh-oa̍h ê Ki-tok lâi oa̍h." 
2Corinthians5:16 Só͘-í, tùi taⁿ í-āu goán bô koh kun-kù lâng ê phiau-chún bat lâng. Sui-jiân goán bat ēng lâng ê phiau-chún bat Ki-tok, m̄-kú hiān-chāi bô koh án-ni bat I." 
2Corinthians5:17 Án-ni, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng, nā kap Ki-tok kiat-liân chiū-sī sin chhòng-chō ê lâng; kū,ê í-keng kè,khì, taⁿ lóng pìⁿ-chòe sin,ê." 
2Corinthians5:18 Chiah-ê it-chhè lóng sī Siōng-tè ê chok-ûi; I thong-kè Ki-tok hō͘ lán kap I koh hô-hó, koh chiong hō͘ lâng kap I hô-hó ê chit-bū kau-tài goán." 
2Corinthians5:19 Goán só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit sī án-ni: Siōng-tè thong-kè Ki-tok hō͘ sè-kan-lâng kap I hô-hó, bô koh tui-kiù in ê chōe-kò, koh chiong chit-ê hô-hó ê sìn-sit kau-thok goán." 
2Corinthians5:20 Só͘-í, goán choh Ki-tok ê tāi-sài, Siōng-tè thong-kè goán kā lín khó͘-khǹg. Goán thòe Ki-tok kā lín kiû, tio̍h kap Siōng-tè hô-hó." 
2Corinthians5:21 Siōng-tè hō͘ bô-chōe ê Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán ê iân-kò͘ chiâⁿ-chòe ū-chōe, hō͘ lán thang khò Ki-tok kap Siōng-tè kiàn-li̍p ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
2Corinthians6:1 Goán choh Siōng-tè ê tâng-kang,ê koh kā lín khó͘-khǹg, lín tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū ê un-tián m̄-thang hō͘ i lo̍k-khong." 
2Corinthians6:2 In-ūi Siōng-tè kóng: Tī thang siū chiap-la̍p ê sî, góa ū thiaⁿ lí; tī chín-kiù ê ji̍t, góa ū pang-chān lí. Tio̍h thiaⁿ! Chit-chūn sī siū chiap-la̍p ê sî; kin-á-ji̍t sī chín-kiù ê ji̍t!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Ūi-tio̍h goán sū-hōng ê kang-chok bián siū chí-chek, chó͘-gāi pa̍t-lâng ê tāi-chì goán lóng bô chòe," 
2Corinthians6:4 hoán-tńg ēng siōng-tōa ê nāi-sim, hoān-sū thong-kè hoān-lān, kan-lân, kap khùn-khó͘, piáu-sī goán sī Siōng-tè ê chhe-ēng." 
2Corinthians6:5 Goán bat siū-tio̍h piⁿ-phah, koaiⁿ-kaⁿ, pō-le̍k ê siong-hāi, lô-khó͘, bô-khùn, bô-chia̍h." 
2Corinthians6:6 Goán ēng sûn-kiat, tì-sek, khoan-iông, jîn-chû, óa-khò Sèng Sîn, ēng sûn-chin ê thiàⁿ," 
2Corinthians6:7 thoân chin-lí ê sìn-sit kap Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k, ēng kong-gī chòe bú-khì kong-kek tùi-te̍k, pó-hō͘ ka-kī." 
2Corinthians6:8 Goán siū chun-tiōng, mā siū bú-jio̍k; tit-tio̍h pháiⁿ miâ-siaⁿ, mā tit-tio̍h hó miâ-siaⁿ. Goán hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe pián-sian-á, kî-si̍t goán kóng si̍t-ōe;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ná-chún bô lâng bat, kî-si̍t lâng-lâng lóng bat; ná-chún sí,khì, kî-si̍t iáu-teh oa̍h. Goán sui-jiân siū hêng-hoa̍t, m̄-kú bô hō͘ lâng thâi-sí;" 
2Corinthians6:10 sui-jiân iu-siong, m̄-kú put-sî hoaⁿ-hí; sui-jiân sàn-chhiah, m̄-kú hō͘ chin chōe lâng hó-gia̍h; chhin-chhiūⁿ bô-pòaⁿ-hāng, m̄-kú ta̍k-hāng lóng ū." 
2Corinthians6:11 Ko-lîm-to ê pêng-iú, goán ê sim-heng í-keng phah-khui, khui-chhùi kā lín kóng lah." 
2Corinthians6:12 M̄-sī goán tùi lín bô tō͘-liōng, sī lín tùi goán tō͘-tn̂g oe̍h." 
2Corinthians6:13 Góa khòaⁿ lín chòe ka-kī ê kiáⁿ kā lín kóng: Kap goán siâng-khoán, lín ê sim-heng mā tio̍h phah khah khui leh." 
2Corinthians6:14 M̄-thang kap bī-sìn ê lâng khan-liân kau-chhap; kong-gī kap put-hoat ū sím-mi̍h koan-liân? Kng-bêng kap o͘-àm ná ōe-tàng kau-óng? 
2Corinthians6:15 Ki-tok kap Mô͘-kúi ná ōe-tàng hô-ha̍p? Sìn kap bô-sìn ê lâng ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē? 
2Corinthians6:16 Siōng-tè ê tiān kap ngó͘-siōng ná ōe-tàng pâi chòe-hé? In-ūi lán sī éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê tiān! Chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ kóng: Góa beh kap góa ê chú-bîn chòe-hé khiā-khí, tī in tiong-kan óng-lâi. Góa beh chòe in ê Siōng-tè, in beh chòe góa ê chú-bîn." 
2Corinthians6:17 Só͘-í Chú kóng: Lín tio̍h tùi in tiong-kan chhut,khì, kap in hun-lī. Bô chheng-khì,ê m̄-thang chiap-chhiok, án-ni góa chiū chiap-la̍p lín." 
2Corinthians6:18 Góa beh chòe lín ê Pē, lín beh chòe góa ê kiáⁿ, cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ. Choân-lêng ê Chú ū án-ni kóng." 
2Corinthians7:1 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, kì-jiân lán tit-tio̍h chiah-ê èng-ún, lán tio̍h kiat-chēng ka-kī, tû-khì it-chhè hō͘ seng-khu kap sim-lêng phah lâ-sâm ê sū, kèng-ùi Siōng-tè hō͘ seng-oa̍h oân-choân sèng-hòa." 
2Corinthians7:2 Lín tio̍h ēng khoan-tāi ê sim tùi-thāi goán. Goán m̄-bat khek-khui lâng, m̄-bat hāi lâng tūi-lo̍h, m̄-bat phiⁿ,lâng." 
2Corinthians7:3 Góa án-ni kóng, m̄-sī beh kā lín khiàn-chek. Góa í-chêng bat kóng, goán chin thiàⁿ lín, goān-ì kap lín tâng-sí tâng-oa̍h." 
2Corinthians7:4 Góa chin sìn-jīm lín, ēng lín chòe khoa-kháu. Góa chhiong-móa an-ùi; tī goán it-chhè ê hoān-lān tiong, góa ū móa-móa ê hoaⁿ-hí." 
2Corinthians7:5 Goán kàu Má-kî-tùn í-āu, seng-khu bô thang hioh-khùn, hoán-tńg ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì lóng tú-tio̍h khùn-lân, gōa-bīn ū hun-cheng, lāi-bīn ū kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
2Corinthians7:6 M̄-kú, an-ùi sit-chì ê lâng ê Siōng-tè ū chhe Thê-to lâi, hō͘ goán tit-tio̍h an-ùi;" 
2Corinthians7:7 m̄-nā in-ūi i ū lâi, koh in-ūi i ū kóng-khí lín án-chóaⁿ kā i kó͘-lē ê tāi-chì. I ū kā goán kóng-khí lín ài kìⁿ góa, lín ê sim kan-khó͘, kap lín tùi góa ê jia̍t-chêng, hō͘ góa koh-khah hoaⁿ-hí." 
2Corinthians7:8 Góa chêng hit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lín sim kan-khó͘, góa bô hō͘-hóe. Sui-jiân chai-iáⁿ hit-tiuⁿ phoe ū hō͘ lín chi̍t-sî sim kan-khó͘, góa bat hō͘-hóe," 
2Corinthians7:9 chóng-sī hiān-chāi góa chin hoaⁿ-hí, m̄-sī in-ūi lín sim kan-khó͘, sī in-ūi lín ê kan-khó͘-sim ū tì-kàu lín hóe-kái. Siōng-tè ū siān-iōng lín ê kan-khó͘-sim, só͘-í goán só͘ chòe,ê tùi lín bô siong-hāi." 
2Corinthians7:10 In-ūi Siōng-tè siān-iōng lín ê kan-khó͘-sim lâi hō͘ lín hóe-kái thang tit-tio̍h kiù, goán chiū bô sím-mi̍h thang hō͘-hóe; m̄-kú sio̍k-sè ê kan-khó͘-sim ōe hō͘ lâng tì-kàu sí." 
2Corinthians7:11 Lín khòaⁿ, Siōng-tè hiah-ni̍h gâu siān-iōng lín ê kan-khó͘-sim, chiah hō͘ lín hiah-ni̍h pek-chhiat piān-bêng ka-kī ê chheng-pe̍k, hiah-ni̍h hùn-khài, hiah-ni̍h ū kéng-kài-sim, hiah-ni̍h ū kî-thāi, hiah-ni̍h jia̍t-chêng, hiah-ni̍h ke̍k-lia̍t khiàn-chek put-hoat; tī ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì, lín í-keng ū chèng-bêng ka-kī ê chheng-pe̍k." 
2Corinthians7:12 Só͘-í, sui-jiân góa ū siá hit-tiuⁿ phoe, m̄-kú m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h hit-ê kā lâng khek-khui, á-sī hit-ê siū lâng khek-khui ê lâng, sī beh tùi lín piáu-bêng lín tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng tùi goán ê jia̍t-chêng ū jōa chhim." 
2Corinthians7:13 In-ūi án-ni, goán ū tit-tio̍h an-ùi. Goán m̄-nā tit-tio̍h an-ùi, mā in-ūi khòaⁿ-tio̍h Thê-to ê hoaⁿ-hí koh-khah hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi i ê sim ū tùi lín tāi-ke tit-tio̍h kek-lē." 
2Corinthians7:14 Góa bat tùi i po-chióng lín, lín bô hō͘ góa làu-khùi. Góa ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì lóng tùi lín kóng si̍t-chāi-ōe, góa tùi Thê-to po-chióng lín ê ōe mā-sī si̍t-chāi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Só͘-í, i siūⁿ-khí lín tāi-ke án-chóaⁿ sūn-ho̍k i, kiong-kiong-kèng-kèng kā i chiap-thāi, i tùi lín ê thiàⁿ-sim chiū ná chhim." 
2Corinthians7:16 Góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi góa ōe-tàng oân-choân sìn-jīm lín." 
2Corinthians8:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ài lín chai Siōng-tè sù hō͘ Má-kî-tùn chèng kàu-hōe ê un-hūi." 
2Corinthians8:2 In ū tùi hoān-lān keng-le̍k chin chōe khó-giām, iáu-kú chhiong-móa hoaⁿ-hí; sui-jiân hui-siông sàn-chhiah, iáu-kú hui-siông khóng-khài koan-hiàn." 
2Corinthians8:3 Góa ōe-tàng kā lín chèng-bêng, in í-keng chīn in só͘-ōe hōng-hiàn, sīm-chì chhiau-kè in ê khùi-la̍t." 
2Corinthians8:4 In jia̍t-chhiat kiû goán hō͘ in ū chham-ka kiù-chè Iû-thài sìn-tô͘ sū-hōng ê kong-êng. 
2Corinthians8:5 In án-ni chòe m̄-nā chhiau-kè goán ê kî-thāi, sīm-chì chun-thàn Siōng-tè ê chí-ì tāi-seng chiong ka-kī hiàn hō͘ Chú, jiân-āu kau-thok goán." 
2Corinthians8:6 Só͘-í goán khǹg Thê-to kè-sio̍k hia̍p-chō͘ lín, lâi oân-sêng i só͘ khai-sí chit-hāng chû-siān ê kang-chok." 
2Corinthians8:7 Lín ê sìn-sim, kháu-châi, tì-sek, pang-chān lâng ê jia̍t-sêng, í-ki̍p tùi goán ê thiàⁿ-sim lóng hiah-ni̍h hong-hù, goán ài lín tùi chit-hāng chû-siān ê kang-chok mā tio̍h hiah-ni̍h khóng-khài." 
2Corinthians8:8 Góa án-ni kóng m̄-sī teh bēng-lēng, sī ài lín chai pa̍t-lâng jia̍t-sim teh pang-chān lâng, lâi khó-giām lín ê thiàⁿ-sim sī m̄-sī chin,ê." 
2Corinthians8:9 Lín chai lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián: I sui-jiân hù-chiok, m̄-kú ūi-tio̍h lín chiâⁿ-chòe sàn-chhiah, sī beh hō͘ lín in-ūi I ê sàn-chhiah chiâⁿ-chòe hù-chiok." 
2Corinthians8:10 Koan-hē chit-hāng tāi-chì, góa kiàn-gī lín khah hó chit-sî tio̍h khì oân-sêng kū-nî khai-sí ê bō͘-koan; lín m̄-nā tāi-seng hêng-tōng, koh tāi-seng thê-chhiòng." 
2Corinthians8:11 Taⁿ, lín tio̍h oân-sêng chit-ê kang-chok, ēng khí-thâu kè-ōe ê sî ê jia̍t-sim, chīn lín só͘-ōe khì chòe lâi oân-sêng." 
2Corinthians8:12 Lín nā hoaⁿ-hí koan-hiàn, Siōng-tè ōe hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p lín hiàn lín só͘ ū,ê, bōe iau-kiû lín hiàn lín só͘ bô,ê." 
2Corinthians8:13 Góa m̄-sī beh ke-thiⁿ lín ê hū-tam, hō͘ pa̍t-lâng khah khin-sang. Kì-jiân lín hiān-chāi hù-chiok, tio̍h kiong-kip sàn-chhiah ê lâng. Án-ni, lín sàn-chhiah in hó-gia̍h ê sî, in mā ōe kiong-kip lín. Án-ni chiah ū kong-pîⁿ." 
2Corinthians8:14  
2Corinthians8:15 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: Chōe,ê, bô chhun; chió,ê, bô khiàm." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kám-siā Siōng-tè hō͘ Thê-to chhin-chhiūⁿ góa chiah-ni̍h jia̍t-sim pang-chān lín. 
2Corinthians8:17 I m̄-nā ū hoaⁿ-hí chiap-siū goán ê khún-kiû, koh hui-siông jia̍t-sim chū-goān pang-chān lín, koat-tēng beh khì lín hia." 
2Corinthians8:18 Goán lēng-gōa phài chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī kap Thê-to chòe-hé khì; chit-ê hiaⁿ-tī tī thoân hok-im ê kang-chok ū siū-tio̍h chèng kàu-hōe ê chheng-chàn. 
2Corinthians8:19 M̄-nā án-ni, i siū chèng kàu-hōe soán-phài chòe goán lú-hêng ê tâng-phōaⁿ, lâi chham-ka goán chit-hāng chû-siān ê kang-chok; chit-ê kang-chok sī beh kui êng-kng hō͘ Chú, koh piáu-sī goán hoaⁿ-hí kam-goān teh chòe." 
2Corinthians8:20 Goán hui-siông kín-sīn teh chhú-lí lâng khóng-khài hōng-hiàn ê chîⁿ-hāng, chiah bián ín-khí lâng ê phoe-phêng." 
2Corinthians8:21 In-ūi goán ê tōng-ki kong-bêng-chèng-tāi, m̄-nā tī Chú ê bīn-chêng, tī lâng ê bīn-chêng mā-sī án-ni chòe." 
2Corinthians8:22 Só͘-í goán beh koh phài chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī kap in chòe-hé khì. I keng-kè goán chin chōe piàn ê khó-giām, chai i tī chin chōe tāi-chì jia̍t-sim pang-chān lâng. Hiān-chāi i hui-siông sìn-jīm lín, chiū koh-khah jia̍t-sim beh pang-chān lín." 
2Corinthians8:23 Kóng-tio̍h Thê-to, i sī góa ê tâng-phōaⁿ, chòe góa ê tâng-kang pang-chān lín; kap i chòe-hé khì hiah-ê hiaⁿ-tī sī ta̍k kàu-hōe chhe-phài,ê, sī Ki-tok ê êng-kng." 
2Corinthians8:24 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h tùi ta̍k-ê kàu-hōe kong-khai chèng-si̍t lín ê thiàⁿ-sim, koh chèng-si̍t goán tùi lín ê khoa-kháu." 
2Corinthians9:1 Koan-hē chín-chè Iû-thài sìn-tô͘ ê sū, góa m̄-bián koh siá-phoe hō͘ lín." 
2Corinthians9:2 Góa chai lín kam-sim pang-chān, góa bat ūi-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì tùi Má-kî-tùn -lâng khoa-kháu kóng, “ A-kai-a ê sìn-tô͘ tī kū-nî chiū chún-pī hó-sè.” Lín ê jia̍t-sim ū kám-tōng in tōa-pō͘-hūn ê lâng." 
2Corinthians9:3 Góa ū chhe kúi-nā ê hiaⁿ-tī khì lín hia, ǹg-bāng lín chiàu góa só͘ kóng,ê chún-pī hó-sè, chiah bián góa tī chit-hāng tāi-chì ūi-tio̍h lín tùi lâng ê khoa-kháu lo̍k-khong." 
2Corinthians9:4 Nā bô, Má-kî-tùn -lâng nā kap góa khì, khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín bô chún-pī hó-sè, goán ōe in-ūi kè-thâu siong-sìn lín soah chin làu-khùi, lín kiám bōe koh-khah làu-khùi!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Só͘-í, góa siūⁿ eng-kai kó͘-lē hiah-ê hiaⁿ-tī seng khì lín hia, kiò lín chêng tah-èng beh koan-hiàn ê chîⁿ seng chún-pī hó-sè. Án-ni góa kàu-ūi ê sî lín lóng chún-pī hó lah, piáu-sī lín ê koan-hiàn m̄-sī bián-kióng, sī kam-sim lo̍k-ì." 
2Corinthians9:6 Tio̍h chai: Iā chió siu chió, iā chōe siu chōe." 
2Corinthians9:7 Só͘-í ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h chiàu ka-kī só͘ koat-tēng,ê lâi hiàn, m̄-thang m̄-kam, mā m̄-thang bián-kióng; in-ūi Siōng-tè thiàⁿ hoaⁿ-hí hōng-hiàn ê lâng." 
2Corinthians9:8 Siōng-tè ōe chiong ta̍k-hāng un-tián hong-hong-hù-hù sù-hok hō͘ lín, m̄-nā ka-kī ta̍k-hāng kàu-gia̍h, koh ōe-tàng chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū." 
2Corinthians9:9 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài: I khóng-khài chín-chè sàn-chhiah-lâng; I ê hó hêng-ûi sòa kàu éng-oán. 
2Corinthians9:10 Kiong-kip chéng-chí hō͘ iā-chéng,ê, koh siúⁿ-sù chia̍h-mi̍h hō͘ lâng chia̍h hit-ūi Siōng-tè, ōe chiong lín só͘ su-iàu ê chéng-chí kiong-kip lín, koh hō͘ chéng-chí ná chōe, mā hō͘ lín jîn-gī ê ké-chí hong-siu." 
2Corinthians9:11 I ōe hō͘ lín sū-sū hù-chiok, thang sûi-sî khóng-khài si-sià, hō͘ chin chōe lâng thong-kè goán chiap-tio̍h lín ê lé-mi̍h lâi kám-siā Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians9:12 In-ūi lín só͘ chòe chit-ê sū-hōng ê kang-chok m̄-nā kái-koat sìn-tô͘ ê su-iàu, mā hō͘ in tùi Siōng-tè ê kám-siā ke-thiⁿ kàu móa,chhut-lâi." 
2Corinthians9:13 Thong-kè lín só͘ chòe chit-ê sū-hōng chèng-si̍t lín ū sūn-thàn só͘ soan-jīn Ki-tok ê hok-im, í-ki̍p lín tùi in kap kî-tha só͘-ū ê lâng khóng-khài ê koan-hiàn, thang kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
2Corinthians9:14 Siōng-tè sù lín bû-hān ê un-tián, hō͘ in ōe koh-khah kèng-ài lín, koh ūi-tio̍h lín kî-tó." 
2Corinthians9:15 Kám-siā Siōng-tè, I ū hō͘ lán bōe-tàng hêng-iông ê un-sù!" 
2Corinthians10:1 Lâng kóng góa kap lín kìⁿ-bīn ê sî kheh-khì, kap lín saⁿ-lī ê sî giâm-hat, m̄-kú góa chit-ê Pó-lô ēng Ki-tok ê un-jiû kap jîn-chû chhin-sin khó͘-khǹg lín." 
2Corinthians10:2 Góa khì lín hia ê sî m̄-thang pek góa tùi lín giâm-hat; tùi hiah-ê phoe-phêng kóng góa ēng sio̍k-sè ê tōng-ki chòe tāi-chì ê lâng, góa it-tēng ōe tùi in bô kheh-khì." 
2Corinthians10:3 Sui-jiân goán tiàm sè-kan teh seng-oa̍h, m̄-kú bô chiàu sè-kan ê hong-sek teh cheng-chiàn." 
2Corinthians10:4 Góa cheng-chiàn teh ēng,ê m̄-sī sio̍k-sè, sī Siōng-tè ū ui-le̍k ê bú-khì, liân kian-kò͘ ê iàu-sài to ōe-tàng phò-hoāi. Goán thui-hoan in ê giân-lūn," 
2Corinthians10:5 chiong chó͘-tòng lâng jīn-bat Siōng-tè it-chhè ê kiau-ngō͘ lóng kā siau-bia̍t, koh kái-piàn it-chhè ê ì-liām, hō͘ i oân-choân kui-sūn Ki-tok." 
2Corinthians10:6 Lín oân-choân sūn-ho̍k Ki-tok liáu-āu, goán chiū chhú-hoa̍t ta̍k-ê m̄ sūn-ho̍k ê lâng." 
2Corinthians10:7 Lín kan-ta teh khòaⁿ gōa-piáu. Nā ū lâng káⁿ kóng i sio̍k Ki-tok, i ka-kī tio̍h koh siūⁿ khòaⁿ-bāi, i sio̍k Ki-tok, góa mā kâng-khoán sio̍k Ki-tok." 
2Corinthians10:8 Chú hō͘ goán ê koân-pèng sī beh kā lín kiàn-li̍p, m̄-sī beh húi-hoāi. Góa tùi chit-ê koân-pèng nā ū khah khoa-kháu, góa mā bô kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
2Corinthians10:9 Góa bô ài hō͘ lín siūⁿ-kóng góa siá-phoe teh kā lín khióng-hat. 
2Corinthians10:10 In-ūi ū lâng kóng, “ Pó-lô ê phoe giâm-hat koh kiông-ngī, m̄-kú lâng lâi ê sî khiok nńg-chiáⁿ, kóng-ōe bô hūn-liōng.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Kóng chit-khoán ōe ê lâng tio̍h chai, goán bô tī lín hia ê sî phoe án-chóaⁿ siá, goán kàu lín hia ê sî mā ōe án-ni chòe." 
2Corinthians10:12 Goán m̄-káⁿ kap gâu tián ka-kī ê lâng pâi-teh saⁿ-pí; in án-ni pí-chhú chhìn-tāng, hō͘-siōng pí-kàu, si̍t-chāi bô tì-hūi." 
2Corinthians10:13 Liân tī lín tiong-kan ê kang-chok pau-hâm chāi-lāi, goán ê khoa-kháu lóng tī Siōng-tè tēng ê hān-tō͘ lāi, lóng bô chhiau-kè." 
2Corinthians10:14 Goán bô chhiau-kè hoān-ûi, bô khì lín hia mā kóng ū khì; kî-si̍t, goán sī thâu chi̍t ê chiong Ki-tok ê hok-im thoân hō͘ lín,ê." 
2Corinthians10:15 Goán pèng bô chhiau-kè hān-tō͘, ēng pa̍t-lâng só͘ lô-khó͘,ê chòe ka-kī ê sêng-chek lâi khoa-kháu. Goán só͘ ǹg-bāng,ê sī lín ê sìn-sim ná cheng-tióng, goán tī lín tiong-kan kang-chok ê hoān-ûi mā ná khui-khoah." 
2Corinthians10:16 Án-ni, goán chiah thang chiong hok-im thoân kàu lín í-gōa ê tōe-khu, bô ēng pa̍t-lâng tī in ê hoān-ûi ê sêng-chiū chòe khoa-kháu." 
2Corinthians10:17 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kóng, “Beh khoa-kháu ê lâng, tio̍h khoa-kháu Chú!”" 
2Corinthians10:18 In-ūi m̄-sī ka-kī chhui-chiàn, sī Chú só͘ chhui-chiàn,ê chiah sī kham-tit siū chiap-la̍p ê lâng." 
2Corinthians11:1 Chhiáⁿ lín khoan-iông góa sió-khóa ê gû-gōng; chhiáⁿ khoan-iông góa! 
2Corinthians11:2 Góa thiàⁿ lín, chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè thiàⁿ lín thiàⁿ kah beh khí oàn-tò͘. In-ūi lín chhin-chhiūⁿ sûn-kiat ê chāi-sek-lú, góa ū chiong lín phòe hō͘ chi̍t ê tiōng-hu, chiū-sī Ki-tok." 
2Corinthians11:3 Chhin-chhiūⁿ Hā-oa hō͘ chôa ê khúi-chà phiàn,khì, góa mā kiaⁿ-liáu lín ê sim-su ōe siū bê-he̍k, soah khì-sak tùi Ki-tok ê sûn-kiat kap chin-sêng." 
2Corinthians11:4 In-ūi tùi ū lâng khì lín hia thoân kap goán só͘ thoân bô kâng ê Iâ-so͘, á-sī lín chiap-la̍p kap lín chêng só͘ chiap-la̍p bô kâng ê Sèng Sîn, á-sī lín chiap-siū kap lín chêng só͘ chiap-siū bô kâng ê hok-im, lín mā lóng iông-jím." 
2Corinthians11:5 Kap hiah-ê “chhiau-kip sù-tô͘” pí, góa siūⁿ góa chi̍t-sut-á to bô khah su." 
2Corinthians11:6 Kiám-chhái góa kóng-ōe khah han-bān, m̄-kú tì-sek bô pí lâng khah su, chit-hāng sū góa í-keng ū ēng ta̍k-khoán hong-hoat, lī-iōng ta̍k-chióng ki-hōe tùi lín piáu-bêng." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ūi-tio̍h beh kā lín ko-seng, góa kàng-kē ka-kī, chiong Siōng-tè ê hok-im pe̍h-pe̍h thoân hō͘ lín, án-ni kiám ū sǹg hoān-chōe?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Góa tī lín hia sū-hōng ê sî, góa ê só͘-hùi lóng sī pa̍t-ê kàu-hōe kiong-kip. Kóng,khí-lâi, góa sī teh pak-siah pa̍t-ê kàu-hōe lâi kā lín ho̍k-bū." 
2Corinthians11:9 Góa tī lín hia ê sî, ū sím-mi̍h su-iàu lóng m̄-bat kiû lín pang-chān, kā lín mâ-hoân; it-chhè ê su-iàu lóng sī Má-kî-tùn lâi ê sìn-tô͘ kā góa kiong-kip. Góa í-chêng bô kā lín mâ-hoân, í-āu mā bōe kā lín mâ-hoân." 
2Corinthians11:10 Góa chí só͘ sìn Ki-tok ê chin-lí kóng, tī choân A-kai-a -séng kéng-lāi, góa lóng káⁿ án-ni tián." 
2Corinthians11:11 Sī-án-chóaⁿ? Kiám kóng góa bô thiàⁿ lín? Góa ū, Siōng-tè chai!" 
2Corinthians11:12 Góa teh chòe,ê, góa beh kè-sio̍k chòe, sī beh hō͘ hiah-ê siūⁿ-beh kap goán siâng-khoán choh “sù-tô͘” ê bô ki-hōe thang khoa-kháu." 
2Corinthians11:13 Chit-khoán lâng sī ké sù-tô͘, chòe tāi-chì kan-chà, ké-chòe sī Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘." 
2Corinthians11:14 Che bô kî-koài, liân Sat-tàn pún-sin mā ké-chòe kng-bêng ê thiⁿ-sài." 
2Corinthians11:15 Án-ni Sat-tàn ê po̍k-jîn nā ké-chòe gī ê po̍k-jîn mā m̄-sī sím-mi̍h tōa tāi-chì. Chòe-āu in ê hêng-ûi ōe siū-tio̍h èng-tit ê pò-èng. 
2Corinthians11:16 Góa koh kóng chi̍t piàn, m̄-thang khòaⁿ góa chòe gōng-lâng; m̄-kú nā beh, kā góa chiap-la̍p chòe gōng-lâng, góa chiah thang tián,chi̍t-ē." 
2Corinthians11:17 Góa chit-chūn teh kóng,ê m̄-sī Chú ê ì-sù, sī chòe chi̍t ê gōng-lâng teh tián." 
2Corinthians11:18 Kì-jiân ū chiah-ni̍h chōe lâng teh tián sio̍k-sè ê sū, góa mā beh tián,chi̍t-ē." 
2Corinthians11:19 Lín to hiah-ni̍h khiáu, eng-kai ōe hoaⁿ-hí iông-jím góa chit-ê gōng-lâng chiah tio̍h." 
2Corinthians11:20 Nā ū lâng kā lín tòng-chòe lô͘-lē chhe-kah, kā lín phiⁿ, kā lín hām-hāi, kā lín khòaⁿ-khin, á-sī kā lín siàn chhùi-phóe, lín to ōe iông-jím." 
2Corinthians11:21 Chin kiàn-siàu, góa tio̍h sêng-jīn, chit-khoán tāi-chì goán m̄-káⁿ chòe. M̄-kú nā ū lâng káⁿ tián sím-mi̍h, chún-chòe chi̍t ê gōng-lâng lâi kóng, góa mā káⁿ." 
2Corinthians11:22 In sī Hi-pek-lâi -lâng sī,bô? Góa mā-sī. In sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng sī,bô? Góa mā-sī. In sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun sī,bô? Góa mā-sī. 
2Corinthians11:23 In sī Ki-tok ê chhe-ēng sī,bô? Góa chún-chòe siáu-lâng lâi kóng, góa koh-khah sī. Góa siū koh-khah chōe lô-khó͘, chē koh-khah chōe kaⁿ, siū sǹg bōe liáu ê piⁿ-phah, chin chōe piàn hiám-hiám-á sí." 
2Corinthians11:24 Góa gō͘ piàn hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng piⁿ-phah, ta̍k-piàn sì-cha̍p ē kiám chi̍t ē." 
2Corinthians11:25 Góa saⁿ piàn hō͘ Lô-má -lâng ēng kùn-á kòng, chi̍t piàn hō͘ lâng ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm, saⁿ piàn tú-tio̍h chûn phòa, chi̍t piàn tī hái,ni̍h phiau-liû chi̍t mî chi̍t ji̍t." 
2Corinthians11:26 Tī lú-hêng tiong góa tú-tio̍h tōa-chúi ê gûi-hiám, chhiúⁿ-kiap ê gûi-hiám, Iû-thài tông-pau kap Gōa-pang-lâng ê hām-hāi; mā ū siâⁿ-chhī ê gûi-hiám, khòng-iá ê gûi-hiám, hái-siōng ê gûi-hiám, kap ké hiaⁿ-tī ê gûi-hiám." 
2Corinthians11:27 Góa lô-lo̍k thoa-bôa, siông-siông bô khùn, iau-gō chhùi-ta, bô thang chia̍h, bô thang tòa, bô thang chhēng." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kî-tha ê tāi-chì bián kóng, kan-ta ta̍k-ji̍t ūi-tio̍h só͘-ū ê kàu-hōe khòa-lū í-keng kàu-gia̍h." 
2Corinthians11:29 Siáⁿ-lâng loán-jio̍k, góa bô loán-jio̍k? Siáⁿ-lâng hoān-chhò sit-pāi, góa bô siū-khì hé-to̍h?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Góa nā tio̍h tián, beh tián góa ê loán-jio̍k." 
2Corinthians11:31 Lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê Pē Siōng-tè — goān I éng-oán tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn — I chai góa bô kóng pe̍h-chha̍t. 
2Corinthians11:32 Góa tī Tāi-má-sū-kek ê sî, A-lí-ta̍t -ông chhiú-ē ê chóng-tok phài siú-ōe kò͘-siú siâⁿ-mn̂g, beh kā góa lia̍h," 
2Corinthians11:33 m̄-kú ū lâng ēng tōa ê nâ-á tùi siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ ê thang-á kā góa lūi,lo̍h-khì, hō͘ góa thoat-lī i ê chhiú." 
2Corinthians12:1 Góa it-tēng tio̍h tián. Sui-jiân bô lī-ek, m̄-kú góa beh kóng Chú hō͘ góa ê īⁿ-siōng kap khé-sī." 
2Corinthians12:2 Góa chai ū chi̍t ê sìn Ki-tok ê lâng tī cha̍p-sì nî chêng hō͘ Chú chhōa kàu tē-saⁿ chàn thiⁿ. Góa m̄ chai i ê seng-khu ū chiūⁿ,khì, á-sī kan-ta khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng, chí-ū Siōng-tè chai." 
2Corinthians12:3 Góa chai ū chi̍t ê lâng siū chhōa kàu Lo̍k-hn̂g. I ê seng-khu ū siū chiap chiūⁿ,khì, á-sī kan-ta khòaⁿ-kìⁿ īⁿ-siōng, góa m̄ chai, chí-ū Siōng-tè chai. Tī hia i ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ēng ōe bōe-tàng piáu-ta̍t, ēng chhùi bōe-tàng kóng-chhut ê sū." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Góa beh tián chit-ê lâng; m̄-kú góa ê loán-jio̍k í-gōa, góa bōe ūi-tio̍h ka-kī tián." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kî-si̍t, góa nā beh tián, mā bōe sǹg sī khong-khám, in-ūi góa beh kóng ê sī sū-si̍t. M̄-kú góa bōe tián ka-kī, chiah bián lâng tùi góa ê phêng-kè chhiau-kè in só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ góa bô in-ūi ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chin chōe ê khé-sī tì-kàu chū-ko tek-ì, tī góa ê seng-khu ū chi̍t ki chhì, chhin-chhiūⁿ Sat-tàn ê sù-chiá teh kā góa khó͘-chhó͘, hō͘ góa bōe siuⁿ chū-ko tek-ì." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ūi-tio̍h chit-hāng tāi-chì, góa bat saⁿ piàn khún-kiû Chú hō͘ hit-ki chhì lī-khui." 
2Corinthians12:9 I ìn góa kóng, “Góa ê un-tián ū-kàu thang boán-chiok lí ê su-iàu; in-ūi lí loán-jio̍k ê sî, góa ê khùi-la̍t chiah ōe-tàng oân-choân hoat-hui.” In-ūi án-ni, góa te̍k-pia̍t ài khoa-kháu góa ê loán-jio̍k, thang hō͘ Ki-tok ê khùi-la̍t tiàm tī góa sin-chiūⁿ." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘, góa kā loán-jio̍k, bú-jio̍k, khùn-khó͘, kan-lân, kap pek-hāi khòaⁿ-chòe hó, in-ūi góa sím-mi̍h sî loán-jio̍k, hit-sî chiū kian-kiông." 
2Corinthians12:11 Góa it-ti̍t chòe gōng-lâng, sī lín kā góa pek,ê; lín tio̍h kā góa po-chióng chiah tio̍h. Sui-jiân góa bô siū tiōng-sī, mā bô khah su hiah-ê “chhiau-kip sù-tô͘”." 
2Corinthians12:12 Góa tī lín tiong-kan ū ēng siōng-tōa ê nāi-sim kiâⁿ sîn-jiah, kî-sū, kap koân-lêng, chèng-bêng góa sī sù-tô͘." 
2Corinthians12:13 Góa bô hō͘ lín ki-hōe pang-chān góa í-gōa, góa tùi-thāi lín pí tùi-thāi kî-tha ê kàu-hōe, ū tó chi̍t hāng chòe khah bô kàu? Góa chit-ê “bô kong-tō”, chhiáⁿ lín goân-liōng." 
2Corinthians12:14 Taⁿ góa tē-saⁿ piàn chún-pī beh khì hóng-būn lín. Góa bōe chiâⁿ-chòe lín ê hū-tam; góa bōe iau-kiû lín sím-mi̍h, in-ūi góa só͘ ài,ê sī lín, m̄-sī lín ê chîⁿ. Eng-kai sī pē-bú ūi-tio̍h kiáⁿ-jî, m̄-sī kiáⁿ-jî ūi-tio̍h pē-bú chek-chū châi-bu̍t." 
2Corinthians12:15 Góa chin hoaⁿ-hí ūi-tio̍h lín hù-chhut góa só͘ ū,ê, sīm-chì liân góa pún-sin to oân-choân hù-chhut. Kiám kóng góa thiàⁿ lín jú chōe, tit-tio̍h lín ê thiàⁿ jú chió?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ū lâng kóng góa khúi-kè-to-toan, ēng khi-phiàn lī-iōng lín, góa kiám bat kā lín thoa-lūi?" 
2Corinthians12:17 Góa kiám ū phài sím-mi̍h-lâng khì kā lín phiⁿ? 
2Corinthians12:18 Góa ū khǹg Thê-to khì lín hia, koh phài chi̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī kap i chòe-hé khì. Thê-to kiám ū phiⁿ lín? Goán kiám bô kâng sim-sîn teh chòe? Kiám bô kâng pō͘-tiau teh kiâⁿ?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Lín it-ti̍t siūⁿ-kóng goán tùi lín teh ūi-tio̍h ka-kī piān-hō͘ sī,bô? M̄-sī! Goán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng kóng Ki-tok ài goán kóng ê ōe. Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, goán só͘ chòe,ê lóng sī beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h chō-chiū." 
2Corinthians12:20 Góa kiaⁿ-liáu khì lín hia ê sî khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín kap góa só͘ kî-thāi,ê bô sio-siâng; lín khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa kap lín tùi góa ê kî-thāi mā bô kâng-khoán. Góa kiaⁿ-liáu lín ū hun-cheng, oàn-tò͘, pháiⁿ sèng-tē, chū-su, húi-pòng, kóng ka-chiah-āu-ōe, kiau-ngō͘, bô tia̍t-sū." 
2Corinthians12:21 Góa kiaⁿ-liáu āu-piàn koh khì lín hia ê sî, góa ê Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ góa tī lín bīn-chêng kiàn-siàu. Góa ōe ūi-tio̍h chin chōe lâng thî-khàu, in-ūi in tùi kè-khì só͘ hoān ê chōe, chiū-sī ù-òe, îm-loān, hòng-tōng iáu-bē hóe-kái." 
2Corinthians13:1 Che sī góa tē-saⁿ piàn beh khì lín hia. Sèng-keng kóng, “Bô-lūn kò sím-mi̍h, tio̍h ū nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê chèng-jîn.”" 
2Corinthians13:2 Tùi hiah-ê í-chêng hoān-chōe kap kî-tha lóng-chóng ê lâng, tī góa tē-jī piàn hóng-būn ê sî góa ū kā lín kéng-kò, hiān-chāi góa bô tī lín hia, beh koh chi̍t piàn kā lín kéng-kò, āu-piàn góa khì ê sî, góa chiū bōe khoan-iông lín;" 
2Corinthians13:3 in-ūi lín só͘ teh chhē Ki-tok thong-kè góa kóng-ōe ê chèng-kù, lín ōe tit,tio̍h. I tùi-thāi lín pèng m̄-sī loán-jio̍k, tian-tò tī lín tiong-kan hián-chhut tōa lêng-le̍k." 
2Corinthians13:4 Sui-jiân I in-ūi loán-jio̍k siū tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè, m̄-kú I khò Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k teh oa̍h. Goán kap I kiat-liân mā pìⁿ-chòe loán-jio̍k, m̄-kú ūi-tio̍h lín, goán khò Siōng-tè ê tōa lêng-le̍k ōe kap I chòe-hé oa̍h." 
2Corinthians13:5 Lín tio̍h séng-chhat ka-kī, khòaⁿ ū chiàu sìn-gióng teh seng-oa̍h,bô? Tio̍h khó-giām ka-kī. Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tī lín lāi-bīn, lín ka-kī it-tēng chai, khó-giām nā bô thong-kè chiū bián kóng." 
2Corinthians13:6 Góa ǹg-bāng lín chai, goán khó-giām lóng ū thong-kè."
