2Corinthians13:7 Goán kî-kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ lín bōe chòe m̄-tio̍h; che m̄-sī beh piáu-sī goán khó-giām ū thong-kè, sī beh hō͘ lín chòe tio̍h ê tāi-chì, sui-jiân goán hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe khó-giām bô thong-kè mā bô iàu-kín." 
2Corinthians13:8 In-ūi goán bōe-tàng chòe ûi-pōe chin-lí ê tāi-chì, chí-ū ióng-hō͘ chin-lí." 
2Corinthians13:9 Goán loán-jio̍k, lín kian-kiông, goán chiū hoaⁿ-hí. Goán só͘ kî-kiû,ê sī lín ōe-tàng chiâⁿ-chòe oân-choân." 
2Corinthians13:10 In-ūi án-ni, thàn góa bô tī lín hia ê sî siá chit-tiuⁿ phoe, chiah bián góa khì ê sî ēng Chú hō͘ góa ê koân-pèng giâm-hat tùi-thāi lín; chit-ê koân-pèng sī beh kiàn-li̍p, m̄-sī beh thiah-húi." 
2Corinthians13:11 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chhiáⁿ pó-tiōng. Tio̍h tui-kiû oân-choân, hō͘-siōng kó͘-lē. Tio̍h tâng-sim, hô-bo̍k siong-chhù. Goān sù chû-ài kap pêng-an ê Siōng-tè kap lín tông-chāi!" 
2Corinthians13:12 Tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an! Só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ lóng beh kā lín chhéng-an! 
2Corinthians13:13 Goān Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián, Siōng-tè ê chû-ài, Sèng Sîn ê thoân-khè, kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi!" 
Galatians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô. Góa choh sù-tô͘ m̄-sī tùi lâng á-sī thong-kè lâng, sī thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kap hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê Pē Siōng-tè ê ho͘-tiàu." 
Galatians1:2 Góa kap tī chia ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē siá-phoe hō͘ Ka-lia̍p-thài ê chèng kàu-hōe. 
Galatians1:3 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
Galatians1:4 Ūi-tio̍h beh kiù lán thoat-lī hiān-kim chit-ê siâ-ok ê sè-tāi, Ki-tok ū chiàu lán ê Pē Siōng-tè ê chí-ì ūi-tio̍h lán ê chōe hiàn I pún-sin." 
Galatians1:5 Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen! 
Galatians1:6 Lín hō͘ góa chin tio̍h-kiaⁿ! Lín kèng-jiân hiah-ni̍h kín chiū pàng-sak hit-ūi thong-kè Ki-tok ê un-tián ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè, khì tè pa̍t-ê hok-im." 
Galatians1:7 Kî-si̍t bô pa̍t-khoán ê hok-im. Góa án-ni kóng sī in-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa lâng kā lín jiáu-loān, siūⁿ-beh khiok-kái Ki-tok ê hok-im." 
Galatians1:8 M̄-kú, bô-lūn sī goán á-sī tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi ê thiⁿ-sài, só͘ thoân,ê nā kap goán í-chêng thoân hō͘ lín ê hok-im bô kâng-khoán, i eng-kai siū chiù-chó͘!" 
Galatians1:9 Goán bat kóng, hiān-chāi koh kóng chi̍t piàn: Nā ū lâng só͘ thoân ê hok-im kap lín í-keng chiap-siū,ê bô kâng-khoán, i eng-kai siū chiù-chó͘!" 
Galatians1:10 Góa chit-chūn án-ni kóng, kiám sī beh tit-tio̍h lâng á-sī Siōng-tè ê chheng-chàn? Góa kiám sī beh tit-tio̍h lâng ê hoaⁿ-hí? Góa nā iáu-teh siūⁿ-beh tit-tio̍h lâng ê hoaⁿ-hí, góa chiū m̄-sī Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn." 
Galatians1:11 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ài lín chai, góa só͘ thoân ê hok-im m̄-sī lâng siūⁿ,chhut-lâi,ê." 
Galatians1:12 Chit-ê hok-im, góa m̄-sī tùi lâng niá-siū, mā m̄-sī tùi lâng ha̍k-si̍p, sī tùi Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lâi ê khé-sī." 
Galatians1:13 Lín í-keng ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ góa í-chêng choh Iû-thài kàu-tô͘ ê sî ê só͘-kiâⁿ-só͘-chòe. Góa jōa-á-ni̍h ke̍k-le̍k pek-hāi Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, beh thiat-tóe kā i húi-bia̍t." 
Galatians1:14 Góa pí kâng chi̍t pòe ê Iû-thài -lâng koh-khah chek-ke̍k chun-thàn Iû-thài kàu-kui, koh-khah jia̍t-sim chun-siú chó͘-sian ê thoân-thóng." 
Galatians1:15 M̄-kú, tùi Siōng-tè ê un-tián, góa iáu-bē chhut-sì, I chiū koat-tēng kā góa hun-pia̍t,chhut-lâi, koh soán-tiàu góa," 
Galatians1:16 tùi góa khé-sī I ê Kiáⁿ, hō͘ góa thang tùi Gōa-pang-lâng soan-iông I ê Kiáⁿ ê hok-im, góa lóng bô kā lâng chhéng-kàu," 
Galatians1:17 mā bô chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng khì kìⁿ hiah-ê pí góa khah tāi-seng choh sù-tô͘ ê lâng. Góa sûi-sî khì A-la-pek, jiân-āu koh tò-khì Tāi-má-sū-kek." 
Galatians1:18 Saⁿ nî āu, góa chiah khì Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng pài-hóng Pí-tek, kap i tòa cha̍p-gō͘ ji̍t." 
Galatians1:19 Chú ê hiaⁿ-tī Ngá-kok í-gōa, kî-tha ê sù-tô͘ góa lóng bô kìⁿ,tio̍h." 
Galatians1:20 Góa só͘ siá,ê lóng sī sū-si̍t; tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng góa bô kóng pe̍h-chha̍t. 
Galatians1:21 Āu-lâi, góa khì Sū-lī-a kap Ki-lī-ka kéng-lāi ta̍k só͘-chāi." 
Galatians1:22 Tng-sî, Iû-thài tōe-khu chèng kàu-hōe ê sìn-tô͘ lóng m̄ bat góa." 
Galatians1:23 In chí-ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h pa̍t-lâng kóng, “Hit-ê í-chêng pek-hāi lán ê lâng, hiān-chāi teh thoân i kè-khì siūⁿ-beh húi-bia̍t ê sìn-gióng!”" 
Galatians1:24 In chiū in-ūi góa kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè! 
Galatians2:1 Cha̍p-sì nî āu, góa koh chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, Pa-ná-pa kap góa chòe-hé khì, mā chhōa Thê-to chòe-hé khì." 
Galatians2:2 Góa chiūⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sī chun-thàn Chú ê khé-sī. Góa ū su-hā tùi hiah-ê léng-siù soat-bêng góa tùi Gōa-pang-lâng só͘ thoân ê hok-im, chiah bián hō͘ góa kè-khì á-sī hiān-chāi só͘ phun-pho phah-piàⁿ,ê lóng lo̍k-khong." 
Galatians2:3 Kap góa chòe-hé khì ê Thê-to, sui-jiân sī Hi-la̍h -lâng, mā bô lâng kiông-pek i chiap-siū kat-lé." 
Galatians2:4 Ū chi̍t-kóa ké sìn-tô͘ pì-bi̍t chǹg ji̍p-lâi lán tiong-kan, chhin-chhiūⁿ cheng-thàm chhàng,ji̍p-lâi, beh thàm lán tùi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ só͘ tit,tio̍h ê chū-iû, siūⁿ-beh hō͘ lán chiâⁿ-chòe lô͘-lē, sòng-sit chū-iû." 
Galatians2:5 M̄-kú, ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lín thang pó-choân hok-im ê chin-lí, goán chi̍t-si-á to bô tùi in niū-pō͘." 
Galatians2:6 M̄-kú hiah-ê hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe léng-siù,ê, bô-lūn in ê tōe-ūi sī sím-mi̍h, tùi góa lóng bô éng-hióng, in-ūi Siōng-tè bô ēng gōa-māu phòaⁿ-toàn lâng. In pèng bô lēng-gōa hō͘ góa sím-mi̍h chí-sī," 
Galatians2:7 tian-tò liáu-kái Siōng-tè ū chiong thoân hok-im hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng ê jīm-bū kau-thok góa, tú chhin-chhiūⁿ I ū chiong thoân hok-im hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng ê jīm-bū kau-thok Pí-tek." 
Galatians2:8 In-ūi Siōng-tè ū ēng I ê koân-lêng hō͘ góa chiâⁿ-chòe Gōa-pang-lâng ê sù-tô͘, tú chhin-chhiūⁿ I mā ū hō͘ Pí-tek chiâⁿ-chòe Iû-thài -lâng ê sù-tô͘." 
Galatians2:9 Ngá-kok, Pí-tek, kap Iok-hān chiah-ê hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe sī kàu-hōe thiāu-chio̍h,ê, kì-jiân chai-iáⁿ Siōng-tè ū chiong chit-ê te̍k-pia̍t ê sú-bēng kau-tài góa, chiū kap Pa-ná-pa í-ki̍p góa ak chiàⁿ-chhiú piáu-sī lóng sī tâng-kang, koh tông-ì goán tī Gōa-pang-lâng tiong-kan kang-chok, in tī Iû-thài -lâng tiong-kan kang-chok." 
Galatians2:10 In chí-ū iau-kiû goán tio̍h koan-hoâi Iû-thài -lâng tiong ê sàn-chhiah-lâng; chit-hāng tāi-chì tú-tú sī góa it-ti̍t lô-le̍k beh chòe,ê. 
Galatians2:11 Pí-tek lâi kàu An-thê-o ê sî, góa tng-bīn kā i hoán-tùi, in-ūi i ū thang chek-pī ê só͘-chāi." 
Galatians2:12 Goân-lâi ū chi̍t-kóa tùi Ngá-kok hia lâi ê lâng iáu-bē kàu í-chêng, Pí-tek ū kap Gōa-pang-lâng ê hiaⁿ-tī chòe-hé chia̍h-pn̄g, m̄-kú hiah-ê lâng kàu í-āu, i soah siám-pī Gōa-pang-lâng sìn-tô͘, m̄-káⁿ koh kap in chòe-hé, in-ūi kiaⁿ hiah-ê chú-tiuⁿ Gōa-pang-lâng tio̍h siū kat-lé ê lâng." 
Galatians2:13 Kî-tha ê Iû-thài -lâng sìn-tô͘ mā chhin-chhiūⁿ Pí-tek chòe hit-khoán hu-ké ê tāi-chì, liân Pa-ná-pa mā siū éng-hióng khì chòe kâng-khoán bô goân-chek ê tāi-chì." 
Galatians2:14 Góa chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h in bô chiàu hok-im ê chin-lí teh chòe, chiū tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng tùi Pí-tek kóng, “Sui-jiân lí sī Iû-thài -lâng, m̄-kú bô chiàu Iû-thài -lâng khiok chhin-chhiūⁿ Gōa-pang-lâng teh seng-oa̍h, lí ná thang kiông-pek Gōa-pang-lâng tio̍h o̍h Iû-thài -lâng seng-oa̍h?”" 
Galatians2:15 Lán pún-sin chhut-sì chiū-sī Iû-thài -lâng, m̄-sī “gōa-pang chōe-jîn”." 
Galatians2:16 Put-kò, lán chai lâng ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē sī khò sìn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, m̄-sī khò chun-siú Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat. Lán ka-kī mā sìn Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, sī beh hō͘ lán tùi sìn Ki-tok ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, m̄-sī khò chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat, in-ūi bô lâng ōe-tàng khò chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Galatians2:17 Lán nā siūⁿ-beh tùi óa-khò Ki-tok kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, iáu-kú hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-chòe sī chōe-jîn, án-ni Ki-tok sī chōe ê chhe-ēng sī,bô? Choa̍t-tùi m̄-sī!" 
Galatians2:18 Góa nā koh khí-chō góa í-chêng só͘ thiah-húi,ê, chiū chèng-bêng góa sī ûi-pōe Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng." 
Galatians2:19 In-ūi, chiàu Lu̍t-hoat góa í-keng sí tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē, sī beh hō͘ góa ǹg Siōng-tè lâi oa̍h. Góa í-keng kap Ki-tok tâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè;" 
Galatians2:20 án-ni, hiān-chāi teh oa̍h,ê m̄-sī góa, sī Ki-tok tī góa ê lāi-bīn teh oa̍h. Góa hiān-chāi teh oa̍h, sī khò sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ teh oa̍h; I thiàⁿ góa, ūi-tio̍h góa pàng-sak sìⁿ-miā." 
Galatians2:21 Góa bô hō͘ Siōng-tè ê un-tián sit-khì hāu-le̍k. Lâng nā khò Lu̍t-hoat ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, Ki-tok sí chiū bô-chhái-kang." 
Galatians3:1 Lín chiah-ê gōng Ka-lia̍p-thài -lâng ah, siáⁿ-lâng kā lín bê-he̍k? Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tèng si̍p-jī-kè ê sū, kiám m̄-sī chin chheng-chhó hián-sī tī lín ba̍k-chiu chêng?" 
Galatians3:2 Ū chi̍t hāng tāi-chì, góa kā lín chhéng-kàu: Lín niá-siū Sèng Sîn sī tùi siú Lu̍t-hoat á-sī tùi sìn só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê hok-im?" 
Galatians3:3 Lín ná hiah-ni̍h gōng? Lín kì-jiân tùi khò Sèng Sîn khai-sí, hiān-chāi beh khò ka-kī ê khùi-la̍t lâi oân-sêng sī,bô?" 
Galatians3:4 Lín ū hiah chōe siū-khó͘ ê keng-giām kiám lóng bô lō͘-ēng? It-tēng ū chiah tio̍h. 
Galatians3:5 Siōng-tè sù lín Sèng Sîn, koh tī lín tiong-kan kiâⁿ sîn-jiah, sī in-ūi lín siú Lu̍t-hoat, á-sī in-ūi lín sìn só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê hok-im?" 
Galatians3:6 Sèng-keng án-ni kóng, “ A-pek-la-hán sìn Siōng-tè, Siōng-tè chiū kā i sǹg-chòe gī.”" 
Galatians3:7 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h chai, sìn ê lâng chiah sī A-pek-la-hán chin-chiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ-sun." 
Galatians3:8 Sèng-keng sū-sian chiū chai, Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng tùi sìn kap I ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, só͘-í ū chiong chit-ê hó-siau-sit seng thoân hō͘ A-pek-la-hán, kóng, “Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-bîn ōe in-ūi lí tit-tio̍h chiok-hok!”" 
Galatians3:9 Án-ni it-chhè sìn ê lâng mā ōe kap ū sìn ê A-pek-la-hán chòe-hé siū chiok-hok! 
Galatians3:10 Hiah-ê khò siú Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng lóng oa̍h tī chiù-chó͘ ê ē-bīn, in-ūi Sèng-keng kóng, “Bô chun-siú kì-chài tī Lu̍t-hoat ê chheh,ni̍h só͘-ū kui-tēng ê lâng lóng tio̍h siū Siōng-tè chiù-chó͘.”" 
Galatians3:11 Án-ni, bô lâng ōe-tàng khò siú Lu̍t-hoat kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē, in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kóng, “Gī ê lâng ōe tùi sìn lâi oa̍h.”" 
Galatians3:12 M̄-kú, Lu̍t-hoat m̄-sī ēng sìn chòe kun-kù. Sèng-keng kóng, “Siú Lu̍t-hoat ê lâng khò Lu̍t-hoat lâi oa̍h.”" 
Galatians3:13 Ki-tok í-keng ūi-tio̍h lán siū chiù-chó͘, lâi kiù-sio̍k lán thoat-lī Lu̍t-hoat ê chiù-chó͘, in-ūi Sèng-keng kì-chài kóng, “Só͘-ū tiàu tī chhâ-téng ê lâng lóng tio̍h siū chiù-chó͘.”" 
Galatians3:14 Ki-tok án-ni chòe sī beh chiong Siōng-tè hō͘ A-pek-la-hán ê chiok-hok thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, mā beh hō͘ lán tùi sìn lâi niá-siū Siōng-tè só͘ èng-ún ê Sèng Sîn." 
Galatians3:15 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ēng chi̍t ê ji̍t-siông seng-oa̍h ê tāi-chì chòe lē lâi soat-bêng. Lâng só͘ li̍p ê khè-iok it-tàn sêng-li̍p, chiū bōe-ēng-tit ke-thiⁿ á-sī hòe-tû." 
Galatians3:16 Siōng-tè ū tùi A-pek-la-hán kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun èng-ún. Sèng-keng pèng m̄-sī kóng “kiáⁿ-kiáⁿ-sun-sun”, chí chin chōe lâng, sī kóng “lí ê kiáⁿ-sun”, chí chi̍t ê, chiū-sī Ki-tok." 
Galatians3:17 Góa ê ì-sù sī án-ni: Siōng-tè ū kap A-pek-la-hán li̍p-iok, koh tah-èng beh siú iok. Sì-pah saⁿ-cha̍p nî āu chiah chhut-hiān ê Lu̍t-hoat, bōe-tàng hòe-tû chit-ê iok hō͘ Siōng-tè ê èng-ún sit-hāu." 
Galatians3:18 In-ūi, sêng-chiap Siōng-tè sù ê sán-gia̍p nā-sī kun-kù Lu̍t-hoat, chiū bô koh khò èng-ún. M̄-kú Siōng-tè sī chiàu I ê èng-ún si-un hō͘ A-pek-la-hán." 
Galatians3:19 Án-ni, Lu̍t-hoat ū siáⁿ lō͘-ēng? Lu̍t-hoat sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lâng chai sím-mi̍h sī chōe-kò, thong-kè thiⁿ-sài tùi chi̍t ê tiong-kan-jîn lâi chè-tēng,ê, kong-hāu kàu só͘ èng-ún Hit-ūi “kiáⁿ-sun” lâi-lîm ê sî chiū kiat-sok." 
Galatians3:20 M̄-kú tan-hong chi̍t pêng chòe ê tāi-chì chiū bô su-iàu tiong-kan-jîn, Siōng-tè sī tan-hong chi̍t ê chòe chit-hāng tāi-chì." 
Galatians3:21 Án-ni, Lu̍t-hoat kap Siōng-tè ê èng-ún ū saⁿ tí-chhiok,bô? Choa̍t-tùi bô! In-ūi Lu̍t-hoat pan-pò͘ ê bo̍k-te̍k nā-sī beh hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā, lâng chiū ōe-tàng khò Lu̍t-hoat kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Galatians3:22 M̄-kú Sèng-keng toàn-tēng choân sè-kài lóng tī chōe-ok koán-hat ê ē-bīn, thang hō͘ Siōng-tè chiong èng-ún thong-kè sìn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù hō͘ sìn ê lâng." 
Galatians3:23 M̄-kú “sìn” ê sî-tāi lâi-lîm í-chêng, lán hō͘ Lu̍t-hoat koaiⁿ,teh, siū kàm-sī ti̍t-kàu teh-beh lâi “sìn” ê sî-tāi hián-hiān ê sî." 
Galatians3:24 Án-ni, tī Ki-tok lâi-lîm í-chêng, Lu̍t-hoat chòe lán ê kàm-hō͘-jîn, thang hō͘ lán tùi “sìn” kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē." 
Galatians3:25 Hiān-chāi “sìn” ê sî-tāi í-keng lâi-lîm, Lu̍t-hoat chiū bô koh chòe lán ê kàm-hō͘-jîn." 
Galatians3:26 Lín tāi-ke tùi sìn kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî. 
Galatians3:27 Lín só͘-ū niá-siū sóe-lé kap Ki-tok kiat-liân ê lâng í-keng chhēng Ki-tok, ū I ê oa̍h-miā." 
Galatians3:28 Án-ni, bô hun Iû-thài -lâng á-sī Gōa-pang-lâng, lô͘-lē á-sī chū-iû,ê, ta-po͘-lâng á-sī cha-bó͘-lâng, tī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê lāi-bīn lóng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé." 
Galatians3:29 Lín kì-jiân sio̍k Ki-tok, chiū-sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun, sī Siōng-tè èng-ún ê kè-sêng-jîn." 
Galatians4:1 Góa koh kóng, kè-sêng-jîn sui-jiân sī choân-pō͘ châi-sán ê só͘-iú-chiá, i tī bī-sêng-liân ê sî kap lô͘-lē bô sím-mi̍h chha-pia̍t," 
Galatians4:2 it-ti̍t kàu lāu-pē só͘ tēng ê ji̍t-chí, tio̍h siū kàm-hō͘-jîn kap koán-ke ê kàm-tok." 
Galatians4:3 Lán mā chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, tī lêng-sèng bī-sêng-liân ê sî siū ú-tiū kan ê sîn-lêng chi-phòe chòe lô͘-lē." 
Galatians4:4 M̄-kú sî-kî kàu, Siōng-tè chhe ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ, hō͘ I tùi hū-jîn-lâng lâi chhut-sì, oa̍h tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē," 
Galatians4:5 ūi-tio̍h beh kiù-sio̍k oa̍h tī Lu̍t-hoat-ē ê lâng, thang hō͘ Siōng-tè kā lán siu khí-lâi chòe kiáⁿ-jî." 
Galatians4:6 In-ūi lín sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, I ū chhe I ê Kiáⁿ ê Sîn ji̍p lín ê sim, hō͘ lín kiò “A-pa, Pē!”" 
Galatians4:7 Án-ni, lí bô koh chòe lô͘-lē, sī kiáⁿ-jî; kì-jiân sī kiáⁿ-jî, Siōng-tè chiū hō͘ lí chòe kè-sêng-jîn." 
Galatians4:8 Í-chêng, lín m̄ bat Siōng-tè ê sî, chòe hiah-ê pún-chit m̄-sī chin Sîn ê sîn-bêng ê lô͘-lē, siū in chi-phòe." 
Galatians4:9 M̄-kú hiān-chāi lín í-keng bat Siōng-tè, á-sī kóng hō͘ Siōng-tè bat, sī-án-chóaⁿ lín koh tò-khì chhē hiah-ê bô-la̍t koh bô lō͘-ēng ê sîn-lêng, chòe in ê lô͘-lē?" 
Galatians4:10 Lín siú te̍k-pia̍t ê ji̍t, ge̍h, kap nî-á-choeh-á." 
Galatians4:11 Góa kiaⁿ-liáu góa ūi-tio̍h lín só͘ chòe,ê lóng sī pe̍h-pe̍h chòe. 
Galatians4:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, in-ūi góa í-keng ū chiâⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ lín, góa khún-kiû lín mā tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ góa. Lín m̄-bat khek-khui góa." 
Galatians4:13 Lín ōe-kì,tit, góa thâu chi̍t piàn thoân hok-im hō͘ lín ê sî sī in-ūi góa seng-khu ū pīⁿ." 
Galatians4:14 Sui-jiân góa kiān-khong ê būn-tôe chiâⁿ-chòe lín ê tāng-tàⁿ, lín to bô khòaⁿ-khin góa, bô kū-choa̍t góa. Lín tian-tò chiap-thāi góa chhin-chhiūⁿ teh chiap-thāi Siōng-tè ê thiⁿ-sài, chhin-chhiūⁿ teh chiap-thāi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘." 
Galatians4:15 Lín tng-sî ê hoaⁿ-hí boán-chiok ná soah bô,khì? Góa káⁿ kóng, lín tng-sî nā tio̍h kā ba̍k-chiu ó͘ chhut-lâi hō͘ góa mā kam-goān." 
Galatians4:16 Hiān-chāi, góa tùi lín chiàu-si̍t kóng soah pìⁿ-chòe lín ê tùi-te̍k!" 
Galatians4:17 Hiah-ê lâng tùi lín jia̍t-chêng pèng m̄-sī chhut tī hó-ì, tian-tò sī siūⁿ-beh thiah-khui lín kap góa ê koan-hē, hō͘ lín thang tùi in jia̍t-chêng." 
Galatians4:18 Hó-sū m̄-sī kan-ta góa kap lín chòe-hé ê sî chiah chòe, tio̍h put-sî jia̍t-sim khì chòe." 
Galatians4:19 Góa ê sòe-kiáⁿ, ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lín ū Ki-tok ê khoán-sit, góa koh chi̍t piàn keng-kè siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê thòng-khó͘." 
Galatians4:20 Góa chin ài chit-chūn chiū khì lín hia, thang ēng bô kâng-khoán ê kháu-khì kap lín kóng-ōe. Góa si̍t-chāi m̄ chai beh án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lín!" 
Galatians4:21 Lín chiah-ê ài hō͘ Lu̍t-hoat koán-hat ê lâng, kā góa kóng, lín kiám bô beh thiaⁿ Lu̍t-hoat teh kóng sím-mi̍h?" 
Galatians4:22 In-ūi Lu̍t-hoat ū kì-chài: A-pek-la-hán ū nn̄g ê kiáⁿ, chi̍t ê sī lú-pī siⁿ,ê, koh chi̍t ê sī chū-iû ê hū-jîn-lâng siⁿ,ê." 
Galatians4:23 Lú-pī ê kiáⁿ sī thong-kè jîn-sèng siⁿ,ê; chū-iû ê hū-jîn-lâng siⁿ ê kiáⁿ sī thong-kè Siōng-tè ê èng-ún. 
Galatians4:24 Che thang ēng ē-bīn ê phì-jū lâi soat-bêng: Chit nn̄g ê hū-jîn-lâng tāi-piáu nn̄g chióng khè-iok. Chi̍t ê sī Hā-kah, tāi-piáu Se-nāi-soaⁿ ê iok, siⁿ ê kiáⁿ choh lô͘-lē." 
Galatians4:25 Hā-kah chí A-la-pek ê Se-nāi-soaⁿ, tāi-piáu hiān-chāi ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng; in-ūi i kap i ê kiáⁿ-sun lóng sī lô͘-lē." 
Galatians4:26 Put-kò thiⁿ-téng ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng sī chū-iû,ê, sī lán ê lāu-bú." 
Galatians4:27 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Bōe hoâi-īn, bōe siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê hū-jîn-lâng ah, tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí! M̄-bat keng-kè siⁿ-kiáⁿ thòng-khó͘ ê hū-jîn-lâng ah, tio̍h tōa-siaⁿ hoaⁿ-hí chhiùⁿ-koa! In-ūi siū pàng-sak ê hū-jîn-lâng pí ū tiōng-hu,ê koh-khah chōe kiáⁿ-jî!" 
Galatians4:28 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín chhin-chhiūⁿ Í-sat, sī Siōng-tè èng-ún ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Galatians4:29 Tng-sî, tùi jîn-sèng siⁿ,ê pek-hāi tùi Siōng-tè ê Sîn siⁿ,ê; hiān-chāi mā-sī án-ni." 
Galatians4:30 M̄-kú Sèng-keng án-chóaⁿ kóng? “Tio̍h kā lú-pī kap i ê kiáⁿ kóaⁿ,chhut-khì, in-ūi lú-pī ê kiáⁿ bōe-tàng kap chū-iû ê hū-jîn-lâng ê kiáⁿ pîⁿ-pîⁿ kè-sêng sán-gia̍p!”" 
Galatians4:31 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lán m̄-sī lú-pī ê kiáⁿ-jî, sī chū-iû ê hū-jîn-lâng ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Galatians5:1 Ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lán ū chū-iû, Ki-tok í-keng ū kā lán tháu-pàng. Só͘-í tio̍h khiā-chāi, m̄-thang koh siū ap-chè chòe lô͘-lē!" 
Galatians5:2 Góa Pó-lô kā lín kóng, tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ: Lín nā siū kat-lé, Ki-tok chiū tùi lín lóng bô lī-ek." 
Galatians5:3 Góa koh chi̍t piàn kā ta̍k-ê kam-goān chiap-siū kat-lé ê lâng kéng-kò, chit-ê lâng ū gī-bū chun-siú choân-pō͘ ê Lu̍t-hoat!" 
Galatians5:4 Lín chiah-ê siūⁿ-beh khò chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat tit-tio̍h kap Siōng-tè ū ha̍p-gî koan-hē ê lâng, sī kap Ki-tok toān-choa̍t koan-hē, sit-lo̍h Siōng-tè ê un-tián." 
Galatians5:5 Goán pek-chhiat teh thèng-hāu, ǹg-bāng Siōng-tè hō͘ lán kap I ū ha̍p-gî ê koan-hē; chit-ê ǹg-bāng khò Siōng-tè ê Sîn, tùi sìn chiah ōe-tàng si̍t-hiān." 
Galatians5:6 In-ūi lán nā kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân, ū siū kat-lé á-sī bô siū kat-lé lóng bô iàu-kín, iàu-kín,ê sī ū thiàⁿ ê hêng-tōng piáu-hiān,chhut-lâi ê sìn-sim." 
Galatians5:7 Lín í-keng chòe-liáu chin hó; sī siáⁿ-lâng kā lín chó͘-tòng, hō͘ lín bô sūn-ho̍k chin-lí?" 
Galatians5:8 Kiò lín án-ni chòe,ê m̄-sī hit-ūi ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè. 
Galatians5:9 Sio̍k-gú kóng, “Chi̍t-sut-á kàⁿ-bú ōe hō͘ kui-ê mī-oân hoat,khí-lâi.”" 
Galatians5:10 Tī Chú ê lāi-bīn góa siong-sìn lín bōe kap góa ū bô sio-siâng ê siūⁿ-hoat. Hiah-ê teh jiáu-loān lín,ê, bô-lūn sī sím-mi̍h-lâng, it-tēng ōe siū Siōng-tè chek-hoa̍t." 
Galatians5:11 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa nā kè-sio̍k thoân tio̍h siū kat-lé, sī-án-chóaⁿ góa iáu-teh siū pek-hāi? Góa nā án-ni chòe, Ki-tok ê si̍p-jī-kè chiū bōe chiâⁿ-chòe chó͘-gāi." 
Galatians5:12 Hiah-ê teh jiáu-loān lín ê lâng lêng-khó ka-kī iam,khí-lâi! 
Galatians5:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu lín sī beh hō͘ lín chū-iû. Put-kò m̄-thang hō͘ lín ê chū-iû pìⁿ-chòe hòng-chhiòng su-io̍k ê ki-hōe. Tio̍h ēng thiàⁿ-sim hō͘-siōng ho̍k-bū." 
Galatians5:14 In-ūi choân-pō͘ Lu̍t-hoat pau-hâm tī “Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī” chit-ê kài-bēng. 
Galatians5:15 Tio̍h sió-sim, lín nā iáu-teh sio-kā sio-thun, ōe hō͘-siōng châu-bia̍t." 
Galatians5:16 Góa ê ì-sù sī: Lín tio̍h chiàu Sèng Sîn ê ín-chhōa seng-oa̍h, choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang kiû boán-chiok pún-sèng ê io̍k-bōng." 
Galatians5:17 In-ūi lâng pún-sèng ê io̍k-bōng tùi-khòng Sèng Sîn; Sèng Sîn tùi-khòng lâng ê pún-sèng. Chit nn̄g ê hō͘-siōng te̍k-tùi, tì-kàu lín bōe-tàng chiàu ka-kī só͘ ài khì chòe." 
Galatians5:18 Lín nā hō͘ Sèng Sîn ín-chhōa, chiū bōe siū Lu̍t-hoat khòng-chè." 
Galatians5:19 Lâng pún-sèng io̍k-bōng ê hêng-ûi chin bêng-hián, chiū-sī îm-loān, ù-òe, hò͘ⁿ-sek," 
Galatians5:20 pài ngó͘-siōng, kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t, te̍k-tùi, tò͘-cheng, chi̍t-tò͘, siū-khì, chū-su, kiat-tóng, hun-phài," 
Galatians5:21 oàn-tò͘, chiú-chùi, hoa-thian-chiú-tōe, téng. Góa í-chêng bat kā lín kéng-kò, chit-chūn koh chi̍t piàn kā lín kéng-kò: Chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì ê lâng bōe-tàng chiâⁿ-chòe Siōng-tè-kok ê chú-bîn!" 
Galatians5:22 M̄-kú Sèng Sîn só͘ kiat ê ké-chí sī: Jîn-ài, hoaⁿ-hí, hô-pêng, jím-nāi, jîn-chû, liông-siān, tiong-si̍t," 
Galatians5:23 un-jiû, chiat-chè. Chit-khoán hêng-ûi it-poaⁿ ê hoat-lu̍t bô teh kìm-chí." 
Galatians5:24 Hiah-ê sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê lâng í-keng ū chiong pún-sèng kap it-chhè ê siâ-chêng su-io̍k chòe-hé tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè. 
Galatians5:25 Kì-jiân lán khò Sèng Sîn teh oa̍h, lán tio̍h sūn-thàn Sèng Sîn lâi seng-oa̍h." 
Galatians5:26 Lán m̄-thang tui-kiû hu-êng, m̄-thang pí-chhú kek-khì, hō͘-siōng oàn-tò͘." 
Galatians6:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, nā ū lâng hām-lo̍h kè-sit, lín chiah-ê sio̍k-lêng ê lâng tio̍h ēng un-hô ê sim kā i kiù-chèng. Lín ka-kī mā tio̍h sió-sim, chiah bián siū ín-iú." 
Galatians6:2 Tio̍h hun-tam tāng-tàⁿ, án-ni chòe chiah sī teh si̍t-hiān Ki-tok ê lu̍t-hoat." 
Galatians6:3 Ka-kī bô gâu siūⁿ-kóng chin gâu, sī teh khi-phiàn ka-kī." 
Galatians6:4 Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h séng-chhat ka-kī ê hêng-ûi; nā ū hó hêng-ûi, i kan-ta thang tùi ka-kī khoa-kháu, m̄-bián kap pa̍t-lâng pí-kàu." 
Galatians6:5 In-ūi ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h taⁿ ka-kī ê tàⁿ. 
Galatians6:6 Ha̍k-si̍p tō-lí ê lâng tio̍h kap kàu-tō i ê lâng hun-hióng ta̍k-hāng hó-mi̍h. 
Galatians6:7 M̄-thang phiàn ka-kī, Siōng-tè sī bōe-ēng-tit bú-bān,ê. Lâng chèng sím-mi̍h chiū siu sím-mi̍h." 
Galatians6:8 Lâng só͘ iā,ê nā-sī ūi-tio̍h boán-chiok ka-kī ê io̍k-bōng, chiū ōe siu-sêng bia̍t-bông; lâng só͘ iā,ê nā-sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ Sèng Sîn hoaⁿ-hí, chiū ōe tùi Sèng Sîn siu éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Galatians6:9 Chòe hó-sū m̄-thang siūⁿ siān; nā bô hoe-sim, sî kàu chiū thang siu-sêng." 
Galatians6:10 Só͘-í, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h sî-chūn, tio̍h pá-ak ki-hōe tùi chèng-lâng chòe hó-sū, te̍k-pia̍t sī tùi sìn-gióng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ke ê lâng." 
Galatians6:11 Lín khòaⁿ, góa chhin-pit ēng chiah-ni̍h tōa ê jī siá hō͘ lín!" 
Galatians6:12 Hiah-ê chù-tiōng gōa-piáu thé-biān ê lâng, siūⁿ-beh kiông-pek lín chiap-siū kat-lé. In án-ni chòe kan-ta sī bô ài ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê si̍p-jī-kè siū pek-hāi." 
Galatians6:13 Kî-si̍t, liân hiah-ê siū kat-lé ê lâng pún-sin mā bô chun-siú Lu̍t-hoat. In pek lín siū kat-lé, chiah ōe-tàng khoa-kháu kóng lín ū chun-siú gōa-piáu ê lé-gî." 
Galatians6:14 Góa leh, góa chí-ū beh khoa-kháu lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê si̍p-jī-kè, thong-kè chit-ê si̍p-jī-kè, tùi góa lâi kóng, sè-kài í-keng tèng-sí tī si̍p-jī-kè; tùi sè-kài lâi kóng, góa mā í-keng tèng-sí." 
Galatians6:15 Ū siū kat-lé bô siū kat-lé lóng bô tiōng-iàu; tiōng-iàu,ê sī lán tio̍h chiâⁿ-chòe sin chhòng-chō ê lâng. 
Galatians6:16 Chiàu chit-ê chún-chek seng-oa̍h ê lâng chiū-sī Siōng-tè ê Í-sek-lia̍t chú-bîn. Goān pêng-an kap lîn-bín kap in tông-chāi! 
Galatians6:17 Tùi taⁿ í-āu, bô-lūn sím-mi̍h-lâng to lóng m̄-thang kā góa kiáu-jiáu; in-ūi Iâ-so͘ ū tī góa ê seng-khu khàm-ìn chòe kì-hō, chèng-bêng góa sio̍k I." 
Galatians6:18 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi. Amen!" 
Ephesians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘; góa siá-phoe hō͘ tòa tī Í-hut-só͘, sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tiong-sìn ê sìn-tô͘." 
Ephesians1:2 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
Ephesians1:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! In-ūi I ū chiong thiⁿ-téng ta̍k-khoán sio̍k-lêng ê hok-khì, thong-kè lán kap Ki-tok kiat-liân, sù hō͘ lán." 
Ephesians1:4 Chhòng-sè í-chêng, Siōng-tè í-keng thong-kè Ki-tok kéng-soán lán, hō͘ lán tī I bīn-chêng chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat bô khoat-tiám ê lâng. In-ūi Siōng-tè thiàⁿ lán," 
Ephesians1:5 chá chiū koat-tēng beh thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hō͘ lán choh I ê kiáⁿ-jî kui I; che sī I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê, sī I ê chí-ì." 
Ephesians1:6 Lán tio̍h siōng-chàn Siōng-tè êng-iāu ê un-tián, in-ūi I ū chiong I só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ bô tiâu-kiāⁿ sù hō͘ lán!" 
Ephesians1:7 Tùi Ki-tok, thong-kè I ê sí, lán tit-tio̍h chū-iû, chōe-kò tit-tio̍h sià-bián. Siōng-tè ê un-tián si̍t-chāi chin hong-hù;" 
Ephesians1:8 I ū chiong chit-ê un-tián chhiong-chhiong-chiok-chiok sù hō͘ lán. I ēng ta̍k-khoán ê tì-hūi kap lí-kái," 
Ephesians1:9 chiàu I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê chí-ì, hō͘ lán chai I chá chiū koat-tēng thong-kè Ki-tok lâi oân-sêng ò-biāu ê kè-ōe." 
Ephesians1:10 Chit-ê kè-ōe, Siōng-tè beh tī sî-ki sêng-se̍k ê sî oân-sêng, thang hō͘ thiⁿ-téng kap tōe-chiūⁿ it-chhè ê pī-chō-bu̍t lóng chun Ki-tok choh thâu, liân-ha̍p chòe chi̍t ê." 
Ephesians1:11 Bān-iú lóng chiàu Siōng-tè ê kè-ōe kap koat-tēng lâi oân-sêng. Siōng-tè chiàu I tāi-seng koat-tēng ê chí-ì, thong-kè Ki-tok kéng-soán goán lâi sêng-chiap I ê ke-gia̍p." 
Ephesians1:12 Án-ni sī beh hō͘ goán chiah-ê tāi-seng chiong ǹg-bāng khǹg tī Ki-tok ê lâng thang siōng-chàn Siōng-tè ê êng-iāu. 
Ephesians1:13 Thong-kè Ki-tok, lín mā ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h chin-lí ê sìn-sit, chiū-sī hit-ê hō͘ lín tit-kiù ê hok-im, hit-sî lín ū sìn, Siōng-tè chiū sù lín só͘ èng-ún ê Sèng Sîn, kā lín khàm-ìn chèng-bêng lín sio̍k I." 
Ephesians1:14 Sèng Sîn pó-chèng lán thang sêng-chiap Siōng-tè só͘ èng-ún ê ke-gia̍p, ti̍t-kàu hō͘ sio̍k I ê lâng tit-tio̍h oân-choân ê chū-iû, thang siōng-chàn I ê êng-iāu." 
Ephesians1:15 In-ūi án-ni, góa chi̍t-ē thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín tùi Chú Iâ-so͘ ū sìn-sim, tùi só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ ū thiàⁿ-sim," 
Ephesians1:16 chiū ūi-tio̍h lín put-sî teh kám-siā Siōng-tè. Góa tī kî-tó tiong siàu-liām lín," 
Ephesians1:17 kî-kiû lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Siōng-tè, êng-iāu ê Thiⁿ Pē, sù Sèng Sîn hō͘ lín ū tì-hūi kap khé-sī thang jīn-bat I." 
Ephesians1:18 Góa khún-kiû Siōng-tè khui lín ê sim-gán, hō͘ lín thang chai I soán-tiàu lín lâi tit,tio̍h ê ǹg-bāng sī sím-mi̍h. I tùi I ê sìn-tô͘ só͘ èng-ún ê chiok-hok jōa-á-ni̍h hong-hù," 
Ephesians1:19 tī lán sìn I ê lâng tiong-kan teh ūn-hêng ê koân-lêng jōa-á-ni̍h tōa. I ū ūn-iōng chit-ê khùi-la̍t hō͘ Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, koh hō͘ Ki-tok tī thiⁿ-téng chē tī I ka-kī ê chiàⁿ-pêng," 
Ephesians1:20  
Ephesians1:21 tī hia chhiau-oa̍t só͘-ū ê thóng-léng-chiá, chiáng-koân-chiá, koân-le̍k-chiá, chú-chèng-chiá, í-ki̍p it-chhè hiān-chāi kap chiong-lâi ōe-tàng chheng-ho͘ ê hâm-thâu." 
Ephesians1:22 Siōng-tè hō͘ bān-iú lóng khut-ho̍k tī Ki-tok ê kha-ē, hō͘ I choh kàu-hōe ê goân-siú, thóng-tī bān-iú." 
Ephesians1:23 Kàu-hōe sī Ki-tok ê sin-thé, sī chhiong-móa bān-iú ê Ki-tok só͘ oân-choân chhiong-móa,ê." 
Ephesians2:1 Í-chêng in-ūi lín hoān-chōe pōe-ge̍k Siōng-tè, lêng-sèng í-keng sí." 
Ephesians2:2 Hit-sî, lín thàn sè-kan ê tiâu-liû, sūn-ho̍k khong-tiong ê chiáng-koân-chiá, chiū-sī hiān-chāi teh koán-hat pōe-ge̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng hit-ê siâ-sîn." 
Ephesians2:3 Kî-si̍t, goán í-chêng mā lóng kap chiah-ê lâng kâng-khoán thàn pún-sèng ê io̍k-bōng seng-oa̍h, chiàu ka-kī jio̍k-thé ê su-io̍k kap ì-liām teh hêng-tōng. Goán kap kî-tha ê lâng kâng-khoán, chù-tiāⁿ siū Siōng-tè hêng-hoa̍t." 
Ephesians2:4 M̄-kú Siōng-tè ū hong-sēng ê lîn-bín, ēng ke̍k-tōa ê chû-ài thiàⁿ lán," 
Ephesians2:5 tī lán iáu-teh pōe-ge̍k, lêng-sèng í-keng sí ê sî, I hō͘ lán kap Ki-tok chòe-hé koh-oa̍h; lín sī tùi Siōng-tè ê un-tián tit-tio̍h kiù,ê." 
Ephesians2:6 Thong-kè lán kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-ha̍p, Siōng-tè hō͘ lán kap I chòe-hé koh-oa̍h, tī thiⁿ-téng chòe-hé chiáng-koân." 
Ephesians2:7 I án-ni chòe sī beh thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tùi lán hián-sī chû-ài, thang tùi āu sè-tāi piáu-bêng I bû-hān hong-hù ê un-tián." 
Ephesians2:8 In-ūi lín sī khò Siōng-tè ê un-tián tùi sìn tit-tio̍h kiù; m̄-sī khò lín ka-kī, sī khò Siōng-tè ê un-sù." 
Ephesians2:9 Kì-jiân m̄-sī khò hêng-ûi, sím-mi̍h-lâng to bōe-tàng khoa-kháu." 
Ephesians2:10 In-ūi lán sī Siōng-tè chhòng-chō,ê; I thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ chhòng-chō lán, hō͘ lán thang chòe I chá chiū chún-pī ài lán chòe ê hó-sū." 
Ephesians2:11 Só͘-í, lín chiah-ê chhut-sì chòe Gōa-pang-lâng,ê, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit lín kè-khì ū hō͘ chū-chheng siū kat-lé,ê, chiū-sī ēng chhiú tī seng-khu kiâⁿ kat-lé ê Iû-thài -lâng, kiò-chòe bô siū kat-lé ê lâng." 
Ephesians2:12 Lín hit-sî kap Ki-tok bô koan-hē, bô sio̍k Siōng-tè ê soán-bîn, bô hūn tī Siōng-tè èng-ún ê bêng-iok, tī chit sè-kan bô ǹg-bāng, bô Siōng-tè." 
Ephesians2:13 M̄-kú lín chiah-ê í-chêng lī-khui Siōng-tè hn̄g-hn̄g ê Gōa-pang-lâng, hiān-chāi khò Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, thong-kè I ê sí, í-keng kap Siōng-tè chhin-kūn." 
Ephesians2:14 Ki-tok chhiok-chìn lán ê hô-pêng; I ū hō͘ Iû-thài -lâng kap Gōa-pang-lâng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê. I ēng ka-kī ê seng-khu thiah-húi kā in keh-khui ê chhiûⁿ, siau-tû in tiong-kan ê te̍k-tùi." 
Ephesians2:15 I hòe-tû Iû-thài Lu̍t-hoat ê kài-bēng kap kui-lē, hō͘ nn̄g pêng thong-kè I thang chhòng-chō chi̍t ê sin ê lâng lâi chhiok-chìn hô-pêng." 
Ephesians2:16 Ki-tok thong-kè si̍p-jī-kè siau-bia̍t pí-chhú ê te̍k-tùi, hō͘ nn̄g pêng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé, thang kap Siōng-tè hô-hó." 
Ephesians2:17 Án-ni, Ki-tok lâi sī beh thoân hô-pêng ê hok-im hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng, pau-koat lín chiah-ê í-chêng lī-khui Siōng-tè hn̄g-hn̄g ê Gōa-pang-lâng kap chhin-kūn Siōng-tè ê Iû-thài -lâng." 
Ephesians2:18 Thong-kè Ki-tok, lán nn̄g pêng ê lâng lóng ōe-tàng tùi kâng chi̍t ūi Sèng Sîn lâi chhin-kūn Pē." 
Ephesians2:19 Só͘-í, lín Gōa-pang-lâng í-keng m̄-sī chhut-gōa-lâng, m̄-sī kiâu-bîn, sī kap Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn pîⁿ-pîⁿ choh kok-bîn, choh Siōng-tè ke-lāi ê lâng," 
Ephesians2:20 kiàn-li̍p tī sian-ti kap sù-tô͘ só͘ hē ê tōe-ki téng, ēng Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ pún-sin chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h," 
Ephesians2:21 kui-ê kiàn-tio̍k-bu̍t khò I lâi liân-chiap kiat-ha̍p, chiām-chiām khok-tōa chiâⁿ-chòe sèng ê tiān kui-sio̍k Chú." 
Ephesians2:22 Lín kap I kiat-liân, khò Sèng Sîn ê pang-chān, mā chòe-hé siū khí-chō chòe Siōng-tè khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi." 
Ephesians3:1 In-ūi án-ni, góa Pó-lô, ūi-tio̍h lín Gōa-pang-lâng choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê siû-hoān, thòe lín tùi Siōng-tè kî-kiû." 
Ephesians3:2 Lín it-tēng ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h, ūi-tio̍h lín, Siōng-tè tùi I ê un-tián ū úi-thok góa chit-ê chit-bū." 
Ephesians3:3 Siōng-tè ū chiong I ê ò-pì khé-sī hō͘ góa chai. Góa í-keng ū kán-lio̍k siá chit-ê tāi-chì," 
Ephesians3:4 lín tha̍k liáu chiū ōe bêng-pe̍k góa tùi Ki-tok ò-pì ê liáu-kái; 
Ephesians3:5 chit-ê ò-pì, tī kè-khì ê sè-tāi bô hō͘ lâng chai, hiān-chāi Siōng-tè thong-kè Sèng Sîn í-keng ū tùi I ê sèng sù-tô͘ kap sian-ti khé-sī." 
Ephesians3:6 Chit-ê ò-pì sī án-ni: Gōa-pang-lâng thong-kè hok-im thang kap Iû-thài -lâng pîⁿ-pîⁿ choh kè-sêng-jîn, pîⁿ-pîⁿ sio̍k chi̍t ê sin-thé, kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân pîⁿ-pîⁿ sêng-siū Siōng-tè ê èng-ún." 
Ephesians3:7 Tùi Siōng-tè te̍k-pia̍t ê un-sù, thong-kè I tōa lêng-le̍k ê ūn-hêng, góa chiâⁿ-chòe hok-im ê chhe-ēng." 
Ephesians3:8 Góa tī Siōng-tè só͘-ū ê chú-bîn tiong sī tē-it bî-sòe,ê, I kèng-jiân sù góa un-tián thang chiong Ki-tok sǹg bōe liáu hong-hù ê hok-im thoân hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng," 
Ephesians3:9 thang hō͘ só͘-ū ê lâng bêng-pe̍k Siōng-tè án-chóaⁿ si̍t-hiān I ê ò-pì. Chhòng-chō bān-iú ê Siōng-tè tī kè-khì ê sè-tāi ū chiong chit-ê ò-pì ún-ba̍t,khí-lâi," 
Ephesians3:10 sī beh tī hiān-kim ê sè-tāi, thong-kè kàu-hōe, hō͘ thian-kài ê thóng-léng-chiá, koân-le̍k-chiá, lóng thang jīn-bat Siōng-tè ta̍k-khoán ê tì-hūi." 
Ephesians3:11 Siōng-tè án-ni chòe sī kun-kù I éng-oán ê chí-ì; chit-ê chí-ì í-keng thong-kè lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ si̍t-hiān lah. 
Ephesians3:12 Kap Ki-tok kiat-liân, thong-kè tùi I ê sìn, lán thang chhiong-móa sìn-sim hó-táⁿ chiū-kūn Siōng-tè." 
Ephesians3:13 Só͘-í, chhiáⁿ lín m̄-bián in-ūi góa ūi-tio̍h lín siū-khó͘ lâi sim kan-khó͘; kî-si̍t che sī lín ê kong-êng." 
Ephesians3:14 In-ūi án-ni, góa kūi-lo̍h, ǹg sù miâ-hō hō͘ thiⁿ-téng tōe-chiūⁿ só͘-ū chong-cho̍k ê Thiⁿ Pē" 
Ephesians3:15  
Ephesians3:16 kî-kiû, chiàu I hong-hù ê êng-iāu, thong-kè I ê Sèng Sîn só͘ sù ê khùi-la̍t, hō͘ lín lōe-chāi ê lâng ióng-chòng,khí-lâi." 
Ephesians3:17 Góa mā kî-kiû Ki-tok ōe in-ūi lín ê sìn lâi tiàm tī lín sim-lāi, hō͘ lín tèng-kun hē tōe-ki tī thiàⁿ," 
Ephesians3:18 ōe-tàng kap Siōng-tè só͘-ū ê chú-bîn bêng-pe̍k Ki-tok ê thiàⁿ sī jōa-á-ni̍h tn̂g, khoah, koân, chhim, koh keng-giām hit-ê chhiau-kè lâng ê tì-sek só͘ ōe-tàng liáu-kái ê thiàⁿ, hō͘ Siōng-tè ê oân-siān kā lín oân-choân chhiong-móa." 
Ephesians3:19  
Ephesians3:20 Siōng-tè ōe-tàng ēng I tī lán tiong-kan teh ūn-hêng ê tōa lêng-le̍k, tōa-tōa chhiau-kè lán só͘ kiû só͘ siūⁿ,ê, lâi sêng-chiū it-chhè." 
Ephesians3:21 Goān êng-iāu tī kàu-hōe tiong, thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kui hō͘ Siōng-tè, kàu sè-sè-tāi-tāi, bû-kiông bû-chīn. Amen!" 
Ephesians4:1 Só͘-í, chòe chi̍t ê ūi-tio̍h Chú choh siû-hoān ê lâng, góa khó͘-khǹg lín. Kì-jiân lín siū Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu, hêng-ûi tio̍h hû-ha̍p I ê ho͘-tiàu." 
Ephesians4:2 Hoān-sū tio̍h khiam-pi, un-jiû, jím-nāi, ēng thiàⁿ hō͘-siōng khoan-iông," 
Ephesians4:3 ēng hô-pêng hō͘-siōng liân-hê, chīn-la̍t pó-chhî Sèng Sîn só͘ sù ê ha̍p-it." 
Ephesians4:4 Sin-thé chí-ū chi̍t ê; Sèng Sîn chí-ū chi̍t ūi; tú chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè tiàu lán beh tit,tio̍h ê ǹg-bāng sī chi̍t ê. 
Ephesians4:5 Chú chí-ū chi̍t ūi; sìn-gióng chí-ū chi̍t ê; sóe-lé chí-ū chi̍t ê; 
Ephesians4:6 Siōng-tè chí-ū chi̍t ūi, chiū-sī bān-iú ê Pē, I tī bān-iú ê téng-bīn, koàn-chhoàn bān-iú, koh tī bān-iú tiong." 
Ephesians4:7 Lán ta̍k-ê lâng lóng chiàu Ki-tok só͘ sù ê hūn-liōng niá-siū un-sù. 
Ephesians4:8 Chiàu Sèng-keng só͘ kóng: I seng-koân kàu siōng-koân ê ūi ê sî, tòa chi̍t tōa-tūi siū-lia̍h,ê kap I khì, sù un-sù hō͘ lâng." 
Ephesians4:9 “I seng-koân” chit-kù ōe sī sím-mi̍h ì-sù? Chiū-sī: I mā bat kàng-lo̍h kàu tōe-ē siōng-chhim ê só͘-chāi. 
Ephesians4:10 Án-ni, “kàng-lo̍h” Hit-ūi chiū-sī kap “seng-koân” kàu chèng-thiⁿ ê téng-bīn lâi chhiong-móa bān-iú Hit-ūi sī kâng chi̍t ūi." 
Ephesians4:11 I só͘ sù,ê ū sù-tô͘, ū sian-ti, ū thoân-hok-im,ê, ū bo̍k-ióng,ê kap kàu-tō,ê." 
Ephesians4:12 I án-ni chòe sī beh chong-pī Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn thang chòe sū-hōng ê kang-chok, lâi kiàn-li̍p Ki-tok ê thé;" 
Ephesians4:13 chòe-āu lán lóng thang tùi Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ū it-tì ê sìn-gióng kap jīm-sek lâi tióng-tāi-sêng-jîn, ta̍t-kàu Ki-tok oân-choân ê thêng-tō͘." 
Ephesians4:14 Án-ni, lán chiū bô koh choh gín-á, hō͘ khi-phiàn-chiá phian-chō,chhut-lâi só͘-ū chhò-gō͘ ê ha̍k-soat thoa teh kiâⁿ, phiau-lâi-phiau-khì." 
Ephesians4:15 Lán hoán-tńg tio̍h ēng thiàⁿ-sim kóng chin-si̍t, tī ta̍k hong-bīn ēng choh-thâu ê Ki-tok chòe bo̍k-phiau lâi sêng-tióng." 
Ephesians4:16 Tùi I, sin-thé ê ta̍k kun-chat hō͘-siōng liân-chiap, saⁿ chi-chhî, ta̍k-ê chi-thé hoat-hui eng-kai ū ê kong-lêng, hō͘ kui-ê sin-thé tióng-tōa, ēng thiàⁿ kiàn-li̍p,khí-lâi." 
Ephesians4:17 Só͘-í, góa hōng Chú ê miâ khó͘-khǹg lín, m̄-thang kè-sio̍k chhin-chhiūⁿ Gōa-pang-lâng án-ni seng-oa̍h. In in-ūi bû-ti kap ngī-sim, sim-su o͘-àm, tì-kàu su-sióng khong-tōng, kap Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê oa̍h-miā keh-tn̄g." 
Ephesians4:18  
Ephesians4:19 In sit-khì liâm-thí ê sim, chīn-chêng hòng-chhiòng chòe ta̍k-khoán ù-òe ê tāi-chì." 
Ephesians4:20 Lín pèng m̄-sī án-ni ha̍k-si̍p Ki-tok. 
Ephesians4:21 Lín eng-kai ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h I ê tāi-chì, ū tùi I ha̍k-si̍p, in-ūi tī Iâ-so͘ chiah ū chin-lí." 
Ephesians4:22 Án-ni, tio̍h thoat-lī í-chêng ê seng-oa̍h, thǹg-khì kū ê lâng, in-ūi kū ê lâng siū su-io̍k ê bê-he̍k teh pāi-hoāi." 
Ephesians4:23 Lín ê sim-su ì-liām tio̍h oân-choân ōaⁿ-sin," 
Ephesians4:24 chiū-sī tio̍h chhēng chiàu Siōng-tè ê hêng-siōng chhòng-chō ê sin lâng, ēng kun-kù chin-lí só͘ sán-seng ê kong-gī kap sèng-kiat piáu-hiān,chhut-lâi." 
Ephesians4:25 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h thoat-lī hu-ké, tio̍h tùi chhù-piⁿ kóng chin-si̍t-ōe, in-ūi lán lóng sī Ki-tok sin-thé ê chi̍t-pō͘-hūn." 
Ephesians4:26 Lín nā siū-khì m̄-thang tì-kàu hoān-chōe. M̄-thang kàu ji̍t lo̍h iáu-teh siū-khì; 
Ephesians4:27 m̄-thang hō͘ Mô͘-kúi ū khang-phāng thang lī-iōng. 
Ephesians4:28 Bat chòe chha̍t,ê m̄-thang koh thau-the̍h; tio̍h khò siang-chhiú chhut-la̍t chòe kang tit-tio̍h chèng-tong ê siu-ji̍p, ū-la̍t thang pang-chān sàn-chhiah-lâng." 
Ephesians4:29 Pháiⁿ-ōe lóng m̄-thang kóng; tian-tò tio̍h kóng chō-chiū lâng ê hó-ōe, hō͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng tit-tio̍h lī-ek." 
Ephesians4:30 M̄-thang hō͘ Siōng-tè ê Sèng Sîn iu-siong; in-ūi Sèng Sîn sī lín sio̍k Siōng-tè ê ìn-kì, pó-chèng lín tī chín-kiù ê Ji̍t tit-tio̍h tháu-pàng." 
Ephesians4:31 Tio̍h khì-sak it-chhè ê ok-to̍k, pháiⁿ sèng-tē, siū-khì, soan-jióng, húi-pòng, í-ki̍p it-chhè ê pháiⁿ." 
Ephesians4:32 Tio̍h chhin-chhiat jîn-chû saⁿ khoán-thāi, hō͘-siōng sià-bián, tú kap Siōng-tè ū thong-kè Ki-tok sià-bián lín kâng-khoán." 
Ephesians5:1 Kì-jiân lín sī Siōng-tè só͘ thiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî, tio̍h o̍h I." 
Ephesians5:2 Giân-hêng-kú-chí tio̍h ū thiàⁿ-sim, chhin-chhiūⁿ Ki-tok thiàⁿ lán, ūi-tio̍h lán hi-seng ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā chòe phang-phang ê chè-mi̍h hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Ephesians5:3 Kì-jiân lín sī Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn, it-chhè îm-loān, ù-òe, á-sī tham-io̍k ê sū, tī lín tiong-kan liân kóng to m̄-thang." 
Ephesians5:4 Mā m̄-thang kóng siâ-îm, chho͘-sio̍k, á-sī hā-liû ê ōe, hoán-tńg tio̍h kám-siā." 
Ephesians5:5 Tio̍h khak-si̍t chai, îm-loān, ù-òe, tham-loân ê lâng — tham-loân sī chi̍t chióng ê pài ngó͘-siōng — Ki-tok kap Siōng-tè ê Kok choa̍t-tùi bô in ê hūn." 
Ephesians5:6 M̄-thang hō͘ lâng ēng khong-tōng ê ōe kā lín bê,khì; Siōng-tè ê siū-khì ōe ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê tāi-chì lîm-kàu hiah-ê pōe-ge̍k ê lâng. 
Ephesians5:7 Só͘-í, m̄-thang kap hit-khoán lâng kau-chhap." 
Ephesians5:8 Lín í-chêng tī o͘-àm tiong, m̄-kú hiān-chāi í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe sio̍k Chú ê lâng tī kng-bêng tiong, kiâⁿ-chòe tio̍h ū kng-bêng kiáⁿ-jî ê khoán-sit;" 
Ephesians5:9 kng-bêng só͘ kiat ê ké-chí sī ta̍k-khoán ê liông-siān, kong-gī, kap chin-lí." 
Ephesians5:10 Tio̍h chhâ-chhut sím-mi̍h sī Chú só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê sū. 
Ephesians5:11 M̄-thang chham-ú tī o͘-àm tiong teh chòe bô lō͘-ēng ê tāi-chì, tian-tò tio̍h kā in po̍k-lō͘,chhut-lâi." 
Ephesians5:12 In am-am-khàm-khàm teh chòe,ê, liân kóng to kiàn-siàu!" 
Ephesians5:13 It-chhè hō͘ kng po̍k-lō͘ chiū hián-bêng,chhut-lâi," 
Ephesians5:14 in-ūi kā it-chhè hián-bêng,chhut-lâi,ê sī kng. Só͘-í ū chi̍t kù ōe án-ni kóng: Teh khùn ê lâng, khí,lâi; tio̍h tùi sí-lâng tiong peh,khí-lâi! Ki-tok beh kā lí chiò-kng!" 
Ephesians5:15 Só͘-í, lín ê hêng-ûi tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang chòe bô tì-hūi ê lâng, tio̍h chòe chhong-bêng ê lâng," 
Ephesians5:16 siān-iōng ki-hōe, in-ūi hiān-kim ê sî-tāi siâ-ok." 
Ephesians5:17 Só͘-í, m̄-thang chòe hô͘-tô͘ ê lâng, tio̍h bêng-pe̍k sím-mi̍h sī Chú ê chí-ì." 
Ephesians5:18 M̄-thang chiú-chùi; chiú-chùi ōe hō͘ lín pāi-hoāi; hoán-tńg tio̍h hō͘ Sèng Sîn chhiong-móa. 
Ephesians5:19 Tio̍h ēng si-phian, sèng-si, lêng-koa tùi-chhiùⁿ, tùi sim-tóe chhiùⁿ sèng-si kap si-phian chheng-chàn Chú." 
Ephesians5:20 Tio̍h khò lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ, ūi-tio̍h ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì sî-siông kám-siā Thiⁿ Pē Siōng-tè." 
Ephesians5:21 Lín tio̍h ēng kèng-ùi Ki-tok ê sim hō͘-siōng sūn-ho̍k. 
Ephesians5:22 Choh hū-jîn-lâng,ê, tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ sūn-ho̍k Chú án-ni sūn-ho̍k tiōng-hu." 
Ephesians5:23 In-ūi tiōng-hu sī hū-jîn-lâng ê thâu, chhin-chhiūⁿ Ki-tok sī kàu-hōe ê thâu; I pún-sin sī kàu-hōe — I ê seng-khu ê Kiù-chú." 
Ephesians5:24 Chhin-chhiūⁿ kàu-hōe sūn-ho̍k Ki-tok, choh hū-jîn-lâng,ê eng-kai mā tio̍h sū-sū sūn-ho̍k tiōng-hu." 
Ephesians5:25 Choh tiōng-hu,ê, tio̍h thiàⁿ hū-jîn-lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ Ki-tok thiàⁿ kàu-hōe, ūi-tio̍h kàu-hōe hi-seng ka-kī." 
Ephesians5:26 I án-ni chòe sī beh thong-kè I ê ōe ēng chúi sóe chheng-khì lâi sèng-hòa kàu-hōe kui Siōng-tè," 
Ephesians5:27 hō͘ kàu-hōe ū êng-kng, lóng bô ù-tiám, bô jiâu-bûn, á-sī kî-tha chit-khoán ê khoat-tiám, chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat bô hâ-chhû thang hiàn hō͘ ka-kī." 
Ephesians5:28 Siâng-khoán, tiōng-hu tio̍h thiàⁿ ka-kī ê hū-jîn-lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī ê seng-khu. Thiàⁿ hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī thiàⁿ ka-kī." 
Ephesians5:29 Bô lâng oàn-hūn ka-kī ê seng-khu, tian-tò sī kā i pó-ióng, chiàu-kò͘, kap Ki-tok tùi-thāi kàu-hōe kâng-khoán," 
Ephesians5:30 in-ūi lán sī I seng-khu ê chi-thé. 
Ephesians5:31 Sèng-keng kóng, “In-ūi án-ni, lâng ōe lī-khui pē-bú, kap i ê bó͘ kiat-ha̍p, nn̄g lâng chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Chit-ê keng-bûn khé-sī chi̍t ê ke̍k-tōa ê ò-pì; chiàu góa ê lí-kái, che sī teh chí Ki-tok kap kàu-hōe ê koan-hē." 
Ephesians5:33 Chóng-sī, che mā sek-iōng tī lín ta̍k-ê lâng: Tiōng-hu tio̍h thiàⁿ ka-kī ê hū-jîn-lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī; hū-jîn-lâng tio̍h kèng-tiōng i ê tiōng-hu." 
Ephesians6:1 Choh jî-lú,ê, tio̍h sūn-ho̍k pē-bú, che sī sìn Chú ê lâng eng-kai ū ê pún-hūn." 
Ephesians6:2 “Tio̍h hàu-kèng pē-bú”, che sī thâu chi̍t tiâu hù-tài èng-ún ê kài-bēng, “án-ni chòe lín chiū ōe ta̍k-hāng hó-sè, tī chit-ê tōe kú-tn̂g khiā-khí.”" 
Ephesians6:3  
Ephesians6:4 Choh pē-bú,ê, m̄-thang kek lín ê jî-lú siū-khì, tio̍h chiàu Chú ê koán-kàu kap kà-sī kā in pôe-iúⁿ." 
Ephesians6:5 Choh lô͘-lē,ê, kap sūn-ho̍k Ki-tok kâng-khoán, tio̍h ēng kèng-ùi kap kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ choan-sim sūn-ho̍k lín tī sè-chiūⁿ ê chú-lâng." 
Ephesians6:6 M̄-thang tī lâng ê bīn-chêng kò͘-ì chòe hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ, hō͘ lâng hoaⁿ-hí; tio̍h choh Ki-tok ê lô͘-lē, tùi sim-lāi chun-thàn Siōng-tè ê chí-ì," 
Ephesians6:7 kam-sim lo̍k-ì chīn lô͘-lē ê pún-hūn, chhin-chhiūⁿ teh ho̍k-sāi Chú, m̄-sī teh ho̍k-sāi lâng." 
Ephesians6:8 Tio̍h chai, bô-lūn sī lô͘-lē á-sī chū-iû,ê, Chú lóng ōe chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê hó hêng-ûi kā in pò-tap." 
Ephesians6:9 Choh chú-lâng,ê, mā tio̍h ēng kâng-khoán ê thài-tō͘ tùi-thāi lín ê lô͘-lē; m̄-thang kā in ui-hia̍p. Tio̍h chai, lín kap lín ê lô͘-lē lóng sio̍k kâng chi̍t ūi thiⁿ-téng ê Chú-lâng; I ēng kâng-khoán ê phiau-chún tùi-thāi ta̍k-ê lâng." 
Ephesians6:10 Chòe-āu, góa khǹg lín tio̍h kap Chú kiat-liân, khò I ê tōa lêng-le̍k chòe kian-kiông ê lâng." 
Ephesians6:11 Tio̍h chhēng Siōng-tè só͘ sù choân-thò ê bú-chong, hō͘ lín khiā-chāi, thang tí-khòng Mô͘-kúi ê khúi-kè." 
Ephesians6:12 In-ūi lán m̄-sī kap ū-huih-ū-bah ê lâng teh kau-chiàn, sī kap thian-kài ê siâ-lêng, chiū-sī chit-ê o͘-àm sè-tāi ê ú-tiū thóng-léng-chiá, koân-le̍k-chiá, chiáng-koân-chiá teh kau-chiàn." 
Ephesians6:13 Só͘-í, tio̍h ēng Siōng-tè só͘ sù choân-thò ê bú-chong chong-pī ka-kī, thang tī siâ-ok ê ji̍t-chí ōe-tàng tí-khòng tùi-te̍k ê kong-kek, kian-chhî kàu-tóe chhî-siú tīn-tōe." 
Ephesians6:14 Só͘-í, tio̍h khiā-chāi, ēng chin-lí chòe tòa hâ, ēng chèng-gī chòe hō͘-heng-kah chhēng," 
Ephesians6:15 ēng chún-pī hó-sè ê hô-pêng ê hok-im chòe ôe chhēng. 
Ephesians6:16 Tio̍h put-sî ēng sìn-sim chòe tún-pâi, thang phah-hoa Siâ-ok-chiá siā,lâi hé ê chìⁿ." 
Ephesians6:17 Tio̍h ēng chín-kiù chòe thâu-khoe, ēng Sèng Sîn chòe kiàm, chiū-sī Siōng-tè ê ōe." 
Ephesians6:18 Tio̍h khò Sèng Sîn choân-sim kî-tó, siông-siông kî-kiû. Tio̍h put-sî kéng-séng, sî-siông ūi-tio̍h só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ kî-tó;" 
Ephesians6:19 mā ūi-tio̍h góa kî-tó, kiû Siōng-tè sù góa sìn-sit, thang hó-táⁿ khui-chhùi soan-iông hok-im ê ò-pì." 
Ephesians6:20 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê hok-im, góa hiān-chāi chòe chi̍t ê kòa thih-liān ê tāi-sài. Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h góa kî-tó, hō͘ góa thang hó-táⁿ soan-iông eng-kai kóng,ê." 
Ephesians6:21 Lán chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī, mā-sī Chú tiong-si̍t ê chhe-ēng Chhui-ki-kó͘, ōe pò lín chai góa ê tāi-chì kap kūn-hóng." 
Ephesians6:22 Góa chhe i khì lín hia, bo̍k-te̍k sī beh pò lín chai goán chia ê chêng-hêng, hō͘ lín ê sim tit-tio̍h kó͘-lē." 
Ephesians6:23 Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù pêng-an, jîn-ài, kap sìn-sim hō͘ chèng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē!" 
Ephesians6:24 Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap só͘-ū ēng put-piàn ê thiàⁿ lâi thiàⁿ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê lâng tông-chāi! 
Philippians1:1 Góa Pó-lô kap Thê-mô͘-thài sī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê po̍k-jîn. Goán siá-phoe hō͘ tòa tī Hui-li̍p-pí, kap sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lóng-chóng ê sìn-tô͘ í-ki̍p kok-ūi kam-tok kap chip-sū." 
Philippians1:2 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
Philippians1:3 Góa ta̍k-piàn siūⁿ-tio̍h lín ê sî lóng kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè; 
Philippians1:4 ta̍k-piàn ūi-tio̍h lín chèng-lâng kî-tó ê sî lóng ēng hoaⁿ-hí ê sim kî-kiû," 
Philippians1:5 in-ūi lín tùi thâu chi̍t ji̍t khí kàu hiān-chāi, lóng ū tâng-sim hia̍p-le̍k teh thoân hok-im." 
Philippians1:6 Góa chhim-sìn hit-ūi tī lín tiong-kan khai-sí chòe bí-hó kang-chok ê Siōng-tè, ōe kè-sio̍k kā hit-ê kang-chok oân-sêng, ti̍t-kàu Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ koh-lâi ê Ji̍t." 
Philippians1:7 Góa siông-siông teh siàu-liām lín, tùi lín chèng-lâng ū chit-khoán ê sim-chêng sī tong-jiân,ê, in-ūi bô-lūn góa hiān-chāi tī kaⁿ-ga̍k lāi á-sī í-chêng ūi-tio̍h hok-im piān-hō͘ kap choh-chèng ê sî, lín lóng ū kap góa hun-hióng Siōng-tè ê un-sù." 
Philippians1:8 Góa ēng Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê thiàⁿ-sim jōa-ni̍h siàu-liām lín tāi-ke, Siōng-tè thang kā góa choh-chèng." 
Philippians1:9 Góa só͘ kî-kiû,ê sī án-ni: Lín ê thiàⁿ ōe ná ke-thiⁿ, lín ê tì-sek kap tùi ta̍k-hāng ê phòaⁿ-toàn-le̍k mā ná chìn-pō͘," 
Philippians1:10 hō͘ lín ōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t sím-mi̍h chiah sī siōng hó, án-ni tī Ki-tok ê Ji̍t lín chiah ōe chiâⁿ-chòe sûn-kiat bô thang hiâm ê lâng," 
Philippians1:11 chhiong-móa khò Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiah ū ê hó tek-hēng, thang chiong êng-kng kap o-ló kui hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Philippians1:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa ài lín chai, góa só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì tian-tò hō͘ hok-im koh-khah chìn-tián," 
Philippians1:13 tì-kàu ông-kiong ê choân-thé kéng-ōe í-ki̍p kî-tha só͘-ū ê lâng lóng chai-iáⁿ góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ sī ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘. 
Philippians1:14 Chin chōe hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē mā in-ūi góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ tī Chú lāi-bīn koh-khah khak-sìn, koh-khah hó-táⁿ bô kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ lâi thoân Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit." 
Philippians1:15 Ū lâng thoân Ki-tok sī chhut tī oàn-tò͘ kap hò͘ⁿ cheng-lūn; mā ū lâng sī chhut tī hó ì-sù. 
Philippians1:16 Chiah-ê lâng sī chhut tī thiàⁿ-sim, chai-iáⁿ góa siū jīm-bēng sī beh ūi hok-im piān-hō͘." 
Philippians1:17 Lēng-gōa hiah-ê lâng soan-iông Ki-tok sī chhut tī iá-sim, tōng-ki bô sûn, siūⁿ-beh thàn góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê sî ke-thiⁿ góa ê kan-khó͘." 
Philippians1:18 Án-ni ū sím-mi̍h koan-hē? Sī ké-ì á-sī chin-sim, bô-lūn án-chóaⁿ, Ki-tok siū thoân-khui, góa chiū ūi-tio̍h án-ni hoaⁿ-hí! Tio̍h, góa beh kè-sio̍k hoaⁿ-hí," 
Philippians1:19 in-ūi góa chai, tùi lín ê kî-tó kap Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Sîn ê pang-chān, góa it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h chū-iû." 
Philippians1:20 Góa pek-chhiat kî-thāi kap ǹg-bāng,ê, chiū-sī bô chi̍t hāng tāi-chì ōe hō͘ góa kiàn-siàu; góa sî-sî-khek-khek, te̍k-pia̍t sī hiān-chāi, ū kàu-gia̍h ê ióng-khì, sī oa̍h á-sī sí, thang hō͘ Ki-tok thong-kè góa chit-ê lâng tit-tio̍h êng-iāu." 
Philippians1:21 In-ūi, tùi góa lâi kóng, oa̍h sī Ki-tok, sí sī lī-ek." 
Philippians1:22 Nā-sī kè-sio̍k oa̍h,teh ōe-tàng chòe khah chōe ū hāu-kó ê kang-chok, góa soah m̄ chai beh kéng sím-mi̍h." 
Philippians1:23 Góa chìn-thè-lióng-lân. Góa si̍t-chāi chin ài lī-khui chit-ê sè-kan kap Ki-tok chòe-hé, che eng-kai ke hó chiok chōe." 
Philippians1:24 Put-kò, ūi-tio̍h lín ê iân-kò͘, góa koh-khah tio̍h oa̍h,lo̍h-khì." 
Philippians1:25 Tùi chit-hāng, góa khak-sìn; góa chai góa beh oa̍h,lo̍h-khì, beh kè-sio̍k kap lín tāi-ke oa̍h,lo̍h-khì, sī beh hō͘ lín ê sìn-gióng koh-khah chìn-pō͘, koh-khah ū hoaⁿ-hí," 
Philippians1:26 án-ni góa kap lín koh saⁿ-kìⁿ ê sî, lín ōe in-ūi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ū chhiong-hun ê lí-iû thang ēng góa chòe khoa-kháu." 
Philippians1:27 Bô-lūn án-chóaⁿ, lín ê giân-hêng-kú-chí tio̍h hû-ha̍p Ki-tok ê hok-im. Án-ni, bô-lūn góa ōe-tàng koh khì kap lín saⁿ-kìⁿ á bōe, lóng ōe-tàng thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín ê tāi-chì, chai lín lóng ēng siâng chi̍t ê sim-chì khiā-chāi, tâng-sim chòe-hé ūi-tio̍h só͘ sìn ê hok-im phah-piàⁿ." 
Philippians1:28 Bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h, m̄-bián kiaⁿ hoán-tùi-chiá ê ui-hia̍p, án-ni thang chèng-bêng in ōe sit-pāi, lín ōe tek-sèng; chit-ê tek-sèng sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê." 
Philippians1:29 In-ūi Siōng-tè m̄-nā ū sù lín te̍k-pia̍t ê un-hūi lâi sìn Ki-tok, mā hō͘ lín ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok siū-khó͘," 
Philippians1:30 lâi chham-ú siâng-khoán ê cheng-chiàn; chit-ê cheng-chiàn lín ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa án-chóaⁿ chiàn, hiān-chāi koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ góa iáu-teh chiàn." 
Philippians2:1 Kì-jiân lín kap Ki-tok kiat-liân ū tit-tio̍h kek-lē; kì-jiân lín tùi I ê thiàⁿ ū tit-tio̍h an-ùi; kì-jiân lín kap Sèng Sîn ū thoân-khè; kì-jiân lín ū keng-giām Siōng-tè ê chû-pi lîn-bín; 
Philippians2:2 lín tio̍h ū siâng-khoán ê sim-chì, siâng-khoán ê thiàⁿ-sim, hô-hâi ê kám-chêng, it-tì ê siūⁿ-hoat, thang hō͘ góa chhiong-móa hoaⁿ-hí." 
Philippians2:3 M̄-thang chū-su-chū-lī, mā m̄-thang tui-kiû hu-êng; hoán-tńg tio̍h ū khiam-sùn ê sim, khòaⁿ pa̍t-lâng pí ka-kī khah gâu." 
Philippians2:4 Lín ta̍k-ê lâng m̄-thang chí-ū kò͘ ka-kī ê tāi-chì, mā tio̍h kò͘ pa̍t-lâng ê tāi-chì." 
Philippians2:5 Lín tio̍h ū Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sim-chì: 
Philippians2:6 I goân-pún ū Siōng-tè ê sin-hūn, khiok bô lām-iōng kap Siōng-tè pêng-téng ê tōe-ūi." 
Philippians2:7 I hoán-tńg piàⁿ-khang ka-kī, chhú lô͘-po̍k ê sin-hūn, chhut-sì kap lâng kâng-khoán, ēng lâng ê hêng-thé chhut-hiān." 
Philippians2:8 I chū-goān khiam-pi, sūn-ho̍k kàu sí, sīm-chì sí tī si̍p-jī-kè téng." 
Philippians2:9 In-ūi án-ni, Siōng-tè thê-seng I kàu siōng-koân ê tōe-ūi, sù I chhiau-oa̍t bān miâ ê miâ-hō." 
Philippians2:10 Án-ni, ūi-tio̍h kèng-tiōng Iâ-so͘ ê miâ, thiⁿ-téng, tōe-chiūⁿ, tōe-ē, it-chhè ê kha-thâu-u lóng ōe kūi-pài," 
Philippians2:11 ta̍k-ê chhùi lóng soan-jīn, “Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sī Chú”, lâi êng-iāu Pē Siōng-tè." 
Philippians2:12 Só͘-í, chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa tī lín hia ê sî, lín lóng ū sūn-thàn góa; hiān-chāi góa bô tī lín hia, lín koh-khah tio̍h án-ni. Tio̍h kè-sio̍k kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ngia̍uh-ngia̍uh-chhoah lâi oân-sêng lín ê tit-kiù;" 
Philippians2:13 in-ūi Siōng-tè sî-siông tī lín tiong-kan teh chòe kang, hō͘ lín ū ì-goān koh ōe si̍t-chián I ê hó chí-ì." 
Philippians2:14 Bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h tāi-chì, lóng m̄-thang bâi-oàn á-sī cheng-lūn," 
Philippians2:15 hō͘ lín thang chheng-pe̍k sûn-kiat, tī chit-ê siâ-ok hú-pāi ê sè-tāi choh Siōng-tè bô khoat-tiám ê kiáⁿ-jî. Tio̍h tī in tiong-kan hoat-kng, chhin-chhiūⁿ kng teh chiò sè-kan," 
Philippians2:16 lâi kian-siú sù oa̍h-miā ê sìn-sit, hō͘ góa tī Ki-tok ê Ji̍t thang khoa-kháu kóng ka-kī bô khang-khang phun-pho, bô khang-khang lô-khó͘." 
Philippians2:17 Góa nā tio̍h ēng ka-kī ê huih chòe tiān-chiú-chè lâm tī lín ê sìn-sim só͘ hiàn ê chè-mi̍h, góa mā hoaⁿ-hí, mā beh kap lín chòe-hé hoaⁿ-hí." 
Philippians2:18 Siâng-khoán, lín mā tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí, kap góa hun-hióng hoaⁿ-hí." 
Philippians2:19 Góa ǹg-bāng Chú Iâ-so͘ hō͘ góa ōe-tàng kín chhe Thê-mô͘-thài khì lín hia, hō͘ góa thang thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín ê siau-sit lâi tit-tio̍h kek-lē." 
Philippians2:20 Chí-ū i ū kap góa tâng-sim chin-chiàⁿ teh koan-sim lín ê tāi-chì. 
Philippians2:21 Chèng-lâng lóng teh tui-kiû ka-kī ê sū, m̄-sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sū." 
Philippians2:22 M̄-kú Thê-mô͘-thài ê choh-lâng lín lóng chai, i kap góa chhin-chhiūⁿ pē kap kiáⁿ chòe-hé ūi-tio̍h thoân hok-im teh ho̍k-sāi." 
Philippians2:23 Án-ni, góa chi̍t-ē chai góa ê tāi-chì ū sím-mi̍h kiat-kio̍k, ǹg-bāng ōe-tàng sûi-sî chhe i khì lín hia." 
Philippians2:24 Góa khak-sìn Chú mā ōe hō͘ góa chin kín khì kìⁿ lín. 
Philippians2:25 Put-kò, góa siūⁿ-kóng tio̍h chhe Í-pa-hut-thê khì lín hia; i sī góa ê hiaⁿ-tī, tâng-kang, kap chiàn-iú, tī góa su-iàu ê sî lín ū phài i lâi ho̍k-sāi góa." 
Philippians2:26 I chin siàu-liām lín tāi-ke, mā in-ūi chai-iáⁿ lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h i phòa-pīⁿ ê tāi-chì, sim chin kan-khó͘." 
Philippians2:27 I khak-si̍t ū phòa-pīⁿ, sīm-chì hiám sí,khì. M̄-kú Siōng-tè ū lîn-bín i, m̄-nā i nā-tiāⁿ, mā ū lîn-bín góa, hō͘ góa m̄-bián koh ke-thiⁿ iu-siong." 
Philippians2:28 In-ūi án-ni, góa kóaⁿ-kín beh chhe i tńg-khì lín hia, hō͘ lín ōe-tàng koh kìⁿ-tio̍h i lâi hoaⁿ-hí, mā thang kiám-chió góa ê khòa-lū." 
Philippians2:29 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h tī Chú ê lāi-bīn hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí kā i chiap-la̍p. Tio̍h chun-tiōng chhin-chhiūⁿ i chit-khoán ê lâng," 
Philippians2:30 in-ūi i ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê kang-chok mō͘ sìⁿ-miā ê gûi-hiám hiám-hiám-á sí, beh pó͘ lín chòe bô-kàu,ê, thòe lín lâi ho̍k-sāi góa." 
Philippians3:1 Chòe-āu, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tio̍h khò Chú lâi hoaⁿ-hí! Góa koh kóng-khí í-chêng só͘ siá,ê, tùi góa pèng bô mâ-hoân, tùi lín khiok ū pang-chān." 
Philippians3:2 Tio̍h chù-ì hit tīn káu, chù-ì hiah-ê choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng, chù-ì hiah-ê ka-kī koah-siong seng-khu ê lâng." 
Philippians3:3 Kî-si̍t, lán chiah sī chin-chiàⁿ siū kat-lé ê lâng. Lán thong-kè Sèng Sîn kèng-pài Siōng-tè, khoa-kháu Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, bô óa-khò gōa-piáu ê lé-gî." 
Philippians3:4 Nā kóng beh óa-khò lé-gî, góa mā ōe; nā ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng i ōe-tàng óa-khò lé-gî, góa koh-khah ōe." 
Philippians3:5 Góa chhut-sì tē-poeh ji̍t chiū siū kat-lé, sī Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng, sio̍k Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k, sī sûn-chhùi ê Hi-pek-lâi -lâng. Tùi siú Lu̍t-hoat lâi kóng, góa sio̍k Hoat-lī-sài-phài;" 
Philippians3:6 tùi jia̍t-sim lâi kóng, góa sī kàu-hōe ê pek-hāi-chiá; tùi siú Lu̍t-hoat lâi chiâⁿ-chòe gī ê phiau-chún lâi kóng, góa lóng bô sím-mi̍h thang hiâm." 
Philippians3:7 M̄-kú, í-chêng tùi góa iú-lī,ê, hiān-chāi in-ūi Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘, góa kā i khòaⁿ-chòe sún-sit." 
Philippians3:8 M̄-nā án-ni, góa chin-chiàⁿ khòaⁿ it-chhè chòe sún-sit, in-ūi góa khòaⁿ jīn-bat góa ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ chòe siōng pó-pòe. Ūi-tio̍h I góa pàng-sak it-chhè, khòaⁿ bān-sū chòe pùn-sò, sī beh tit-tio̍h Ki-tok," 
Philippians3:9 oân-choân kap I kiat-liân, bô koh ū hit-khoán khò ka-kī siú Lu̍t-hoat lâi tit,tio̍h ê gī. Góa hiān-chāi ū ê gī sī thong-kè sìn-khò Ki-tok, sī kun-kù sìn lâi tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè só͘ siúⁿ-sù ê gī." 
Philippians3:10 Góa só͘ ài,ê sī jīn-bat Ki-tok koh thé-giām I koh-oa̍h ê tōa lêng-le̍k, kap I chòe-hé siū-khó͘, keng-giām I ê sí," 
Philippians3:11 ǹg-bāng ka-kī mā ōe-tàng tùi sí koh-oa̍h. 
Philippians3:12 Án-ni, m̄-sī kóng góa í-keng tit,tio̍h á-sī í-keng ta̍t-kàu bo̍k-phiau; góa kè-sio̍k ti̍t-ti̍t cháu, ǹg-bāng thang tit-tio̍h siúⁿ; kî-si̍t Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ í-keng tit-tio̍h góa." 
Philippians3:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa bô siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī í-keng tit,tio̍h. Góa chí-ū choan-sim chi̍t hāng, chiū-sī bōe-kì-tit āu-bīn ê sū, phah-piàⁿ tui-kiû thâu-chêng ê sū," 
Philippians3:14 ǹg bo̍k-phiau ti̍t-ti̍t cháu, ūi-tio̍h beh tit-tio̍h siúⁿ, chiū-sī Siōng-tè thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tiàu góa khì niá-siū hit-ê tùi téng-bīn lâi ê oa̍h-miā." 
Philippians3:15 Só͘-í, lán tiong-kan sêng-se̍k ê lâng tio̍h ū siâng-khoán ê siūⁿ-hoat. Lín tiong-kan nā ū pa̍t-khoán ê siūⁿ-hoat, Siōng-tè mā ōe chiong chit-ê siūⁿ-hoat kā lín chí-sī." 
Philippians3:16 Bô-lūn án-chóaⁿ, lán tio̍h chiàu í-keng cháu,kè-lâi ê lō͘-sòaⁿ kè-sio̍k chiân-chìn." 
Philippians3:17 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín lóng tio̍h o̍h góa; tio̍h chù-ì khòaⁿ hiah-ê tè goán ê bô͘-iūⁿ ê lâng án-chóaⁿ teh seng-oa̍h." 
Philippians3:18 Góa í-keng ū kā lín kóng chin chōe piàn, hiān-chāi koh lâu ba̍k-sái kā lín kóng: Ū chin chōe lâng, in ê hêng-ûi hō͘ in chiâⁿ-chòe Ki-tok si̍p-jī-kè ê tùi-te̍k." 
Philippians3:19 In ê kiat-kio̍k sī bia̍t-bông; in ēng pak-tó͘ chòe sîn-bêng; in chiong kiàn-siàu khòaⁿ-chòe kong-êng; in chí-ū koan-sim tōe-chiūⁿ ê sū. 
Philippians3:20 M̄-kú, lán sī thiⁿ-téng ê kong-bîn, jia̍t-chhiat teh thèng-hāu tùi hia lâi ê Kiù-sè-chú, chiū-sī Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok." 
Philippians3:21 I ōe ēng hō͘ bān-iú khut-ho̍k ê lêng-le̍k lâi kái-piàn lán pi-chiān ê thé, hō͘ lán pìⁿ-chòe kap I siâng-khoán êng-iāu ê thé." 
Philippians4:1 Só͘-í, góa só͘ chhin-ài só͘ siàu-liām ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín sī góa ê hoaⁿ-hí, góa ê êng-kng, tio̍h óa-khò Chú lâi khiā-chāi." 
Philippians4:2 Góa khó͘-khǹg Iú-a-tia̍p, mā khó͘-khǹg Sûn-to͘-ki, lín tī Chú ê lāi-bīn tio̍h tâng-sim." 
Philippians4:3 Góa tiong-si̍t ê tâng-phōaⁿ ah, góa mā ài lí pang-chān chit nn̄g ê hū-jîn-lâng, in-ūi in kap Kek-lī-bián í-ki̍p góa kî-tha ê tâng-kang bat ūi-tio̍h hok-im kap góa chòe-hé hùn-tò͘; in ê miâ í-keng ū kì-chài tī oa̍h-miā-chheh." 
Philippians4:4 Tio̍h sî-siông kap Chú kiat-liân lâi hoaⁿ-hí! Góa koh kóng chi̍t piàn, tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí!" 
Philippians4:5 Tio̍h hō͘ chèng-lâng khòaⁿ ōe chhut lín ê khoan-iông. Chú teh-beh lâi lah. 
Philippians4:6 Lóng m̄-thang khòa-lū sím-mi̍h. Bān-sū tio̍h ēng kám-siā ê sim kî-kiû kap tāi-tó, chiong lín só͘ kiû,ê hō͘ Siōng-tè chai." 
Philippians4:7 Án-ni, Siōng-tè só͘ sù chhiau-oa̍t lâng it-chhè liáu-kái ê pêng-an, ōe thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ pó-siú lín ê sim-su ì-liām." 
Philippians4:8 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chóng kóng chi̍t kù, hiah-ê ōe kiàn-li̍p hó tek-hēng ê sū, hiah-ê ta̍t-tit chheng-chàn ê sū, chiū-sī it-chhè chin-si̍t,ê, it-chhè thang chun-kèng,ê, it-chhè kong-chèng,ê, it-chhè sûn-kiat,ê, it-chhè khó-ài,ê, it-chhè thang o-ló,ê, chiah-ê lín lóng tio̍h put-sî khǹg tī sim-lāi." 
Philippians4:9 Lín tùi góa só͘ ha̍k-si̍p koh chiap-siū,ê, thiaⁿ,tio̍h koh khòaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, chiah-ê lóng tio̍h kè-sio̍k si̍t-hêng. Án-ni, sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè chiū ōe kap lín tông-chāi." 
Philippians4:10 Góa tī Chú ê lāi-bīn hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí! In-ūi kè chi̍t tōaⁿ sî-kan liáu-āu, lín tùi góa ê koan-sim ū koh puh-íⁿ khui-hoe; kî-si̍t, lín ū teh kā góa koan-sim, put-kò sī bô ki-hōe thang piáu-sī nā-tiāⁿ." 
Philippians4:11 M̄-sī kóng góa bô-kàu ēng, in-ūi góa í-keng o̍h ōe-hiáu bô-lūn tī sím-mi̍h kéng-gū lóng ti-chiok." 
Philippians4:12 Góa chai án-chóaⁿ kè sàn-chhiah ê seng-oa̍h, mā chai án-chóaⁿ kè hù-jū ê seng-oa̍h. Sī pá á-sī iau, sī ū-chhun á-sī khiàm-kheh, góa í-keng tit-tio̍h pì-koat, chiū-sī bô-lūn sím-mi̍h sî-chūn sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi, góa lóng ti-chiok." 
Philippians4:13 Óa-khò sù góa lêng-le̍k ê Ki-tok, góa ū khùi-la̍t thang khek-ho̍k ta̍k-khoán ê kéng-gū." 
Philippians4:14 M̄-kú, lín ū hun-tam góa ê khùn-lân, án-ni si̍t-chāi chin hó." 
Philippians4:15 Lín Hui-li̍p-pí -lâng ka-kī mā lóng chai, tī góa thoân hok-im ê chho͘-kî, góa lī-khui Má-kî-tùn ê sî, chí-ū lín ê kàu-hōe ū hun-tam góa ê seng-oa̍h hùi-iōng." 
Philippians4:16 Liân góa tī Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka ê sî, lín ū kúi-nā piàn sàng mi̍h-kiāⁿ lâi kiong-kip góa ê su-iàu." 
Philippians4:17 Góa m̄-sī ài lín sàng mi̍h-kiāⁿ, sī ài lín ū khah chōe ê lī-sûn kì ji̍p-khì lín ê hō͘-thâu." 
Philippians4:18 Che sī lín hō͘ góa só͘-ū mi̍h-kiāⁿ ê siu-kù. Lín hō͘ góa,ê í-keng kàu-gia̍h koh ū-chhun. Góa ū tùi Í-pa-hut-thê siu-tio̍h lín sàng hō͘ góa ê lé-mi̍h, chhin-chhiūⁿ hoat-chhut phang-bī, Siōng-tè só͘ chiap-la̍p hoaⁿ-hí ê chè-mi̍h." 
Philippians4:19 Góa ê Siōng-tè ōe chiàu I êng-iāu ê hong-hù, thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lâi boán-chiok lín só͘-ū ê su-iàu." 
Philippians4:20 Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ lán ê Pē Siōng-tè, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
Philippians4:21 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê só͘-ū sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an. Kap góa tī chia ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē mā beh kā lín chhéng-an. 
Philippians4:22 Tī chia só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘, te̍k-pia̍t sī Khái-sat ông-kiong lāi ê sìn-tô͘, lóng beh kā lín chhéng-an." 
Philippians4:23 Goān Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi! 
Colossians1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘; góa kap lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Thê-mô͘-thài" 
Colossians1:2 siá-phoe hō͘ tòa tī Ko-lô-se ê sìn-tô͘, chiū-sī kap Ki-tok kiat-liân tiong-sìn ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē. Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an!" 
Colossians1:3 Goán ūi-tio̍h lín kî-tó ê sî put-sî teh kám-siā lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè," 
Colossians1:4 in-ūi ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín tùi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ū sìn-sim, tùi só͘-ū ê sìn-tô͘ ū thiàⁿ-sim." 
Colossians1:5 Chiah-ê lóng sī ēng hit-ê ūi-tio̍h lín khǹg tī thiⁿ-téng ê ǹg-bāng chòe kun-kù; chit-ê ǹg-bāng tong-chho͘ hok-im chin-tō thoân hō͘ lín ê sî, lín í-keng ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h." 
Colossians1:6 Chit-ê hok-im m̄-nā thoân kàu lín hia, mā thoân kàu choân sè-kài, kè-sio̍k sêng-tióng kiat ké-chí, tú kap lín í-chêng thiaⁿ,kìⁿ koh chin-chiàⁿ jīn-bat Siōng-tè ê un-tián hit-sî ê chêng-hêng kâng-khoán." 
Colossians1:7 Lín ū tùi chhin-ài ê Í-pa-hut ha̍k-si̍p chit-ê hok-im; i kap goán pîⁿ-pîⁿ choh po̍k-jîn, ūi-tio̍h lín chòe Ki-tok tiong-si̍t ê chhe-ēng," 
Colossians1:8 mā ū tùi goán kóng-khí Sèng Sîn hō͘ lín ū thiàⁿ-sim ê sū. 
Colossians1:9 In-ūi án-ni, tùi thiaⁿ-tio̍h lín ê siau-sit í-āu, goán ū kè-sio̍k teh ūi-tio̍h lín kî-tó, kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ lín ōe-tàng tùi Sèng Sîn tit-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán ê tì-hūi kap lí-kái, chhiong-hun bêng-pe̍k I ê chí-ì," 
Colossians1:10 giân-hêng-kú-chí chiàu Chú só͘ ài, hoān-sū hō͘ I hoaⁿ-hí, koh hō͘ lín chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū, kiat hó ké-chí, tùi Siōng-tè ê jīm-sek mā jú ke-thiⁿ." 
Colossians1:11 Goān lín tùi I êng-iāu ê koân-lêng tit-tio̍h kàu-gia̍h ê khùi-la̍t, ū nāi-sim thang jím-siū it-chhè, koh ēng hoaⁿ-hí ê sim kám-siā Thiⁿ-pē, in-ūi I hō͘ lín ōe-kham-tit hun-hióng I ūi-tio̍h ka-kī ê sìn-tô͘ pó-liû tī kng-bêng Kok-tō͘ ê hok-khì." 
Colossians1:12  
Colossians1:13 I kiù lán thoat-lī o͘-àm ê koân-sè, kā lán sóa ji̍p-khì I só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ ê Kok-tō͘;" 
Colossians1:14 lán tùi I ê Kiáⁿ tit-tio̍h kiù-sio̍k, chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Colossians1:15 Ki-tok sī khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h ê Siōng-tè ê hêng-siōng: I sī Tōa-kiáⁿ, pí it-chhè siū-chō,ê khah chá ū." 
Colossians1:16 In-ūi Siōng-tè thong-kè I lâi chhòng-chō bān-iú, chiū-sī tī thiⁿ-téng kap tōe-chiūⁿ, khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h,ê kap khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h,ê, lêng-kài chē-ông-ūi,ê kap chú-chèng-chiá, thóng-léng-chiá kap chiáng-koân-chiá. Siōng-tè thong-kè I, iā ūi-tio̍h I, chhòng-chō bān-iú." 
Colossians1:17 Iáu-bē ū bān-iú í-chêng I chiū chûn-chāi, bān-iú khò I liân-kiat hó-sè." 
Colossians1:18 I sī kàu-hōe, chiū-sī I ê seng-khu ê thâu. I sī goân-sí, sī Tōa-kiáⁿ; Siōng-tè hō͘ I chiâⁿ-chòe thâu chi̍t ê tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h,ê, thang tī bān-iú tiong chiâⁿ-chòe tē-it." 
Colossians1:19 In-ūi Siōng-tè chiàu ka-kī ê chí-ì, chiong ka-kī oân-chéng ê te̍k-sèng chhiong-móa tī I lāi-bīn." 
Colossians1:20 Thong-kè I ê Kiáⁿ, Siōng-tè hō͘ bān-iú, bô-lūn tī thiⁿ-téng á-sī tōe-chiūⁿ, lóng kap I hô-hó; Siōng-tè thong-kè I ê Kiáⁿ tī si̍p-jī-kè téng lâu-huih sí lâi chhiok-sêng hô-pêng." 
Colossians1:21 Lín leh, lín ū chi̍t sî kap Siōng-tè toān-choa̍t koan-hē, sim-su kap I te̍k-tùi, chòe pháiⁿ tāi-chì." 
Colossians1:22 M̄-kú hiān-chāi, Siōng-tè í-keng thong-kè ka-kī ê Kiáⁿ jio̍k-thé ê sí, hō͘ lín kap I hô-hó, chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat, bô khoat-tiám, bô thang hiâm ê chè-mi̍h hiàn tī I bīn-chêng." 
Colossians1:23 Lín tio̍h kian-chhî sìn-gióng, kian-kò͘ khiā-chāi, hō͘ lín thiaⁿ-tio̍h hok-im ê sî só͘ tit,tio̍h ê ǹg-bāng bô tōng-iâu. Chit-ê hok-im í-keng thoân hō͘ thiⁿ-ē só͘-ū ê pī-chō-bu̍t; góa — Pó-lô chiū-sī chit-ê hok-im ê chhe-ēng." 
Colossians1:24 Taⁿ góa ūi-tio̍h lín siū-khó͘ kám-kak chin hoaⁿ-hí; in-ūi góa jio̍k-thé ê siū-khó͘ sī teh oân-sêng Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h I ê seng-khu, chiū-sī kàu-hōe, siū iáu-bē liáu ê khó͘-lān." 
Colossians1:25 Góa choh kàu-hōe ê chhe-ēng; góa tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū ê jīm-bū sī ūi-tio̍h lín, beh chiong I ê sìn-sit oân-choân thoân-khui." 
Colossians1:26 Chit-ê sìn-sit sī le̍k-tāi í-lâi tùi jîn-lūi só͘ ún-ba̍t ê ò-pì, hiān-chāi í-keng tùi I ê sìn-tô͘ hián-bêng." 
Colossians1:27 Siōng-tè beh hō͘ in chai-iáⁿ, I ūi-tio̍h Gōa-pang-lâng só͘ chún-pī ê ò-pì sī jōa-ni̍h hong-hù koh êng-iāu. Chit-ê ò-pì sī Ki-tok tī lín lāi-bīn, I sī lín hun-hióng Siōng-tè êng-iāu ê ǹg-bāng." 
Colossians1:28 Só͘-í, goán tùi só͘-ū ê lâng soan-iông Ki-tok, ēng ta̍k-khoán ê tì-hūi lâi khoàn-kài koh kà-sī chèng-lâng, thang hō͘ só͘-ū tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn chiâⁿ-chòe sêng-se̍k ê lâng hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Colossians1:29 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bo̍k-te̍k, góa khò Ki-tok tī góa lāi-bīn ūn-chok ê tōa lêng-le̍k chīn-la̍t teh phah-piàⁿ." 
Colossians2:1 Ūi-tio̍h lín kap Ló-tí-ka -lâng, í-ki̍p só͘-ū iáu m̄-bat kìⁿ-tio̍h góa ê lâng, góa ài lín chai góa jōa-á-ni̍h teh phah-piàⁿ." 
Colossians2:2 Góa ê bo̍k-te̍k sī ài in ê sim siū kó͘-lē, ēng thiàⁿ saⁿ kiat-liân, thang tit-tio̍h hong-hù ê lí-kái-le̍k, ū chhiong-hun ê khak-sìn lâi hiáu-ngō͘ Siōng-tè ê ò-pì, chiū-sī Ki-tok;" 
Colossians2:3 Siōng-tè ê tì-hūi kap tì-sek ê it-chhè pó-pòe lóng ún-chông tī I lāi-bīn. 
Colossians2:4 Góa án-ni kóng sī ài lín bián hō͘ lâng ēng hoa-giân-kháu-gú kā lín chhōa-ji̍p bê-lō͘. 
Colossians2:5 Sui-jiân góa lâng bô tī lín hia, sim khiok kap lín chòe-hé. Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín ê seng-oa̍h kui-kui-kú-kú, tùi Ki-tok ê sìn-sim ū kian-tēng, kám-kak chin hoaⁿ-hí." 
Colossians2:6 Kì-jiân lín ū chiap-siū Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ chòe Chú, chiū tio̍h kap I kiat-liân lâi seng-oa̍h," 
Colossians2:7 chiàu lín só͘ siū ê kà-sī, tī I lāi-bīn tèng-kun siū khí-chō, sìn-sim tit-tio̍h kian-kò͘, chhiong-móa kám-siā." 
Colossians2:8 Tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang hō͘ lâng ēng khong-tōng hu-ké ê tiat-ha̍k kā lín bê,khì, in-ūi hiah-ê ha̍k-soat sī kun-kù lâng ê thoân-soat kap chi-phòe ú-tiū ê lêng, m̄-sī kun-kù Ki-tok." 
Colossians2:9 In-ūi Siōng-tè oân-chéng ê sîn-sèng tiàm tī khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h ê Ki-tok ê hêng-thé lāi-bīn," 
Colossians2:10 hō͘ lín kap I kiat-liân chiâⁿ-chòe oân-chéng. I sī goân-siú, chhiau-oa̍t it-chhè lêng-kài ê thóng-léng-chiá kap chiáng-koân-chiá." 
Colossians2:11 Lín mā í-keng ū chiap-siū kap Ki-tok liân-kiat ê kat-lé, m̄-sī ēng lâng ê chhiú, sī thong-kè Ki-tok ê kat-lé chiong lín chōe-sèng ê jio̍k-thé thǹg,khí-lâi." 
Colossians2:12 Tùi sóe-lé, lín ū kap Ki-tok chòe-hé bâi-chòng; koh tùi sóe-lé, thong-kè sìn hō͘ Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè ê tāi-lêng, hō͘ lín mā kap I chòe-hé koh-oa̍h." 
Colossians2:13 Lín í-chêng in-ūi hoān-chōe koh jio̍k-thé bô siū kat-lé, í-keng sí; m̄-kú hiān-chāi Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ lín kap Ki-tok chòe-hé koh-oa̍h. Siōng-tè ū sià-bián lán it-chhè ê chōe-kò," 
Colossians2:14 thiat-siau tùi lán put-lī koh ū hoat-lu̍t hāu-le̍k ê chioh-kù, kā i tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè téng, hō͘ i sit-hāu." 
Colossians2:15 Siōng-tè ū kái-tû lêng-kài ê thóng-léng-chiá kap chiáng-koân-chiá ê koân-sè, hō͘ in tī Ki-tok khái-soân ê hâng-lia̍t tiong chòe chiàn-hoān sī-chiòng." 
Colossians2:16 Só͘-í, m̄-thang tī lim-chia̍h, siú choeh-kî, chhoe-it, á-sī An-hioh-ji̍t ê būn-tôe hō͘ lâng phoe-phòaⁿ." 
Colossians2:17 Chiah-ê put-kò sī chiong-lâi ê sū ê iáⁿ; Ki-tok chiah sī si̍t-thé. 
Colossians2:18 M̄-thang siū hiah-ê ké khiam-pi, pài thiⁿ-sài ê lâng éng-hióng, hō͘ lín sit-khì èng-tit ê pò-siúⁿ. Hiah-ê lâng óa-khò hoàn-sióng, chiàu lâng ê siūⁿ-hoat, bô-kun-bô-kù chū-khoa chū-tāi," 
Colossians2:19 kap Thâu — Ki-tok toān-choa̍t koan-hē. Tùi chit-ê Thâu, choân seng-khu thong-kè kun kap chat tit-tio̍h êng-ióng, hō͘-siōng liân-chiap, chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì kè-sio̍k sêng-tióng." 
Colossians2:20 Kì-jiân lín kap Ki-tok chòe-hé sí, thoat-lī chi-phòe ú-tiū ê lêng, ná iáu chhin-chhiūⁿ sio̍k chit sè-kan ê lâng teh seng-oa̍h, chun-siú “M̄-thang the̍h”, “M̄-thang chia̍h”, “M̄-thang bong” chit-khoán ê kìm-khī?" 
Colossians2:21  
Colossians2:22 Chiah-ê put-kò sī lâng só͘ chō ê kàu-kui kap kà-sī, ēng-liáu chiū bô lō͘-ēng." 
Colossians2:23 Pài thiⁿ-sài, ké khiam-pi, kap khó͘-chhó͘ seng-khu, khòaⁿ,khí-lâi ná-chhin-chhiūⁿ ū tì-hūi, kî-si̍t tùi khòng-chè jio̍k-thé ê chêng-io̍k lóng bô lō͘-ēng." 
Colossians3:1 Kì-jiân lín í-keng kap Ki-tok chòe-hé koh-oa̍h, chiū tio̍h tui-kiû thiⁿ-téng ê sū, tī hia Ki-tok chē tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Colossians3:2 Lín tio̍h choan-sim tì-ì téng-bīn ê sū, m̄-sī tōe-chiūⁿ ê sū." 
Colossians3:3 In-ūi lín í-keng sí, lín ê oa̍h-miā kap Ki-tok chòe-hé ún-chông tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn." 
Colossians3:4 Ki-tok sī lín ê oa̍h-miā; I hián-hiān ê sî, lín mā ōe kap I chòe-hé hián-hiān lâi hun-hióng I ê êng-iāu." 
Colossians3:5 Só͘-í, tio̍h siau-bia̍t lín hiah-ê sio̍k-sè ê io̍k-bōng, chiū-sī îm-loān, ù-òe, siâ-chêng, siâ-io̍k, kap tham-loân — tham-loân sī pài ngó͘-siōng." 
Colossians3:6 In-ūi chiah-ê sū, Siōng-tè ê siū-khì beh lîm-kàu pōe-ge̍k ê lâng." 
Colossians3:7 Lín í-chêng thàn chiah-ê io̍k-bōng teh seng-oa̍h ê sî, giân-hêng-kú-chí mā siū in chi-phòe." 
Colossians3:8 M̄-kú hiān-chāi lín tio̍h khì-sak siū-khì, pháiⁿ sèng-tē, oàn-hūn, húi-pòng, kap kóng lah-sap-ōe, téng." 
Colossians3:9 M̄-thang hō͘-siōng khi-phiàn, in-ūi lín í-keng ū chiong kū ê lâng kap si̍p-koàn thǹg,khí-lâi," 
Colossians3:10 chiong sin ê lâng chhēng,lo̍h-khì; chit-ê sin ê lâng, Chhòng-chō-chú chiàu ka-kī ê hêng-siōng kè-sio̍k teh kā i keng-sin, hō͘ lín thang chin-chiàⁿ bat I." 
Colossians3:11 Án-ni, bô koh hun-pia̍t Hi-la̍h -lâng á-sī Iû-thài -lâng, siū kat-lé á-sī bô siū kat-lé, bī-khai-hòa, iá-bân, lô͘-lē á-sī chū-iû-jîn. M̄-kú Ki-tok sī it-chhè, iā tī it-chhè ê lāi-bīn." 
Colossians3:12 Lín sī Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê chú-bîn, sī I só͘ thiàⁿ,ê, só͘-í tio̍h ēng lîn-bín, chû-ài, khiam-pi, un-jiû, kap nāi-sim chòe saⁿ chhēng,lo̍h-khì." 
Colossians3:13 Lín tiong-kan nā ū kiù-hun, tio̍h hō͘-siōng khoan-iông, pí-chhú sià-bián; chhin-chhiūⁿ Chú ū sià-bián lín, lín mā tio̍h án-ni saⁿ sià-bián." 
Colossians3:14 Chiah-ê í-gōa, tio̍h koh ke tha̍h thiàⁿ-sim, in-ūi thiàⁿ ōe hō͘ it-chhè liân-kiat, oân-choân hô-ha̍p." 
Colossians3:15 Tio̍h hō͘ Ki-tok só͘ sù ê hô-pêng chi-phòe lín ê sim; ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lín ū chit-ê hô-pêng, lín siū kéng-tiàu chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t-thé. Lín koh tio̍h sî-siông kám-siā." 
Colossians3:16 Tio̍h hō͘ Ki-tok ê ōe hong-hong-hù-hù tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn. Tio̍h ēng ta̍k-khoán ê tì-hūi hō͘-siōng kà-sī, pí-chhú khoàn-kài, chhiùⁿ si-phian, sèng-si, lêng-koa, tùi sim-tóe kám-siā o-ló Siōng-tè." 
Colossians3:17 Lín bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h, kóng-ōe á-sī chòe tāi-chì, lóng tio̍h hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ lâi chòe, thong-kè I lâi kám-siā Pē Siōng-tè." 
Colossians3:18 Choh hū-jîn-lâng,ê, tio̍h sūn-ho̍k tiōng-hu, in-ūi che sī sìn Chú ê lâng ê pún-hūn." 
Colossians3:19 Choh tiōng-hu,ê, tio̍h thiàⁿ hū-jîn-lâng, m̄-thang kā in pháiⁿ khoán-thāi." 
Colossians3:20 Choh jî-lú,ê, ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì tio̍h sūn-ho̍k pē-bú, in-ūi che sī Chú só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê." 
Colossians3:21 Choh lāu-pē,ê, m̄-thang kek jî-lú siū-khì, chiah bōe hō͘ in hoe-sim sit-chì." 
Colossians3:22 Choh lô͘-lē,ê, ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì tio̍h sūn-ho̍k sè-chiūⁿ ê chú-lâng, m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ in hoaⁿ-hí chiah tī in bīn-chêng án-ni chòe, sī in-ūi kèng-ùi Chú sêng-sim chòe." 
Colossians3:23 Lín bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h, tio̍h chīn-sim chòe, m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h Chú chòe." 
Colossians3:24 Tio̍h chai, Chú ōe kā lín pò-siúⁿ, hō͘ lín tùi I tit-tio̍h sán-gia̍p; lín teh ho̍k-sāi,ê sī Chú Ki-tok." 
Colossians3:25 Choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng ōe siū pháiⁿ ê pò-èng, in-ūi Siōng-tè bōe phian-thāi lâng." 
Colossians4:1 Choh chú-lâng,ê, tio̍h kong-pêng ha̍p-lí tùi-thāi lín ê lô͘-lē, lín chai, lín tī thiⁿ-téng mā ū chi̍t ūi Chú-lâng." 
Colossians4:2 Tio̍h kè-sio̍k pek-chhiat kî-tó; kî-tó ê sî tio̍h kéng-séng, tio̍h kám-siā." 
Colossians4:3 Mā tio̍h ūi-tio̍h goán kî-tó, kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ goán ū thoân sìn-sit ê ki-hōe, thang soan-iông Ki-tok ê ò-pì; góa sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê chiah teh chē-kaⁿ." 
Colossians4:4 Tio̍h ūi-tio̍h góa kî-tó, hō͘ góa ōe-tàng chiong eng-kai kóng ê ò-pì kóng chheng-chhó." 
Colossians4:5 Tio̍h siān-iōng ki-hōe, tùi-thāi bī-sìn-chiá tio̍h ū tì-hūi." 
Colossians4:6 Kóng-ōe put-sî tio̍h un-hô, chhin-chhiūⁿ ēng iâm tiâu-bī, chai-iáⁿ tio̍h án-chóaⁿ ìn-tap ta̍k-ê lâng." 
Colossians4:7 Koan-hē góa it-chhè ê tāi-chì, chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī Chhui-ki-kó͘ ōe kā lín kóng; tī Chú ê kang-chok i kap góa chòe-hé choh po̍k-jîn, tiong-si̍t teh ho̍k-sāi." 
Colossians4:8 Góa chhe i khì lín hia, sī ài pò lín chai goán chia ê chêng-hêng, hō͘ lín ê sim tit-tio̍h kó͘-lē." 
Colossians4:9 O-nî-se-bô͘ ōe kap i chòe-hé khì; i sī lín hia ê lâng, sī tiong-si̍t koh chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī. In ōe chiong goán chia it-chhè ê tāi-chì pò lín chai." 
Colossians4:10 Kap góa chòe-hé chē-kaⁿ ê A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘ beh kā lín chhéng-an; Pa-ná-pa ê piáu-sió-tī Má-khó mā beh kā lín chhéng-an. Koan-hē Má-khó, góa í-keng ū kā lín kau-tài, i khì ê sî tio̍h kā i chiap-thāi."
