Colossians4:11 Hit-ê kiò-chòe Iû-sū-to͘ ê Iâ-so͘ mā beh kā lín chhéng-an. Tī Iû-thài -lâng sìn-tô͘ tiong chí-ū chit saⁿ ê lâng ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè-kok teh kap góa tâng-kang, in ū hō͘ góa chin tōa ê an-ùi." 
Colossians4:12 Tùi lín hia lâi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê po̍k-jîn Í-pa-hut beh kā lín chhéng-an. I sî-siông ūi-tio̍h lín pek-chhiat kî-tó, kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ lín khiā-chāi, choh sêng-se̍k ê lâng, khak-sìn Siōng-tè lóng-chóng ê chí-ì." 
Colossians4:13 Góa thang chèng-bêng, i khak-si̍t ūi-tio̍h lín kap tòa tī Ló-tí-ka í-ki̍p Hi-la-pho-lí ê lâng sin-khó͘ chòe kang." 
Colossians4:14 Chhin-ài ê i-seng Lō͘-ka kap Tí-má beh kā lín chhéng-an. 
Colossians4:15 Chhiáⁿ lín thòe góa kā Ló-tí-ka ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē kap Lêng-hoat, í-ki̍p tī in tau teh chū-hōe ê kàu-hōe chhéng-an." 
Colossians4:16 Chit-tiuⁿ phoe lín tha̍k liáu, tio̍h siat-hoat mā hō͘ Ló-tí-ka ê kàu-hōe tha̍k; lín mā tio̍h tha̍k Ló-tí-ka ê kàu-hōe choán hō͘ lín ê phoe." 
Colossians4:17 Tio̍h kā A-ki-pò͘ kóng, “Lí só͘ niá-siū ho̍k-sāi Chú ê chit-bū it-tēng tio̍h oân-sêng.”" 
Colossians4:18 Góa Pó-lô chhin-pit kā lín chhéng-an. Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit góa teh chē-kaⁿ. Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi! 
1Thessalonians1:1 Góa Pó-lô, Se-la, kap Thê-mô͘-thài siá-phoe hō͘ Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka, sio̍k Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê kàu-hōe. Goān lín tit-tio̍h un-tián kap pêng-an!" 
1Thessalonians1:2 Goán sî-siông ūi-tio̍h lín tāi-ke kám-siā Siōng-tè, tī kî-tó tiong put-sî siūⁿ-tio̍h lín." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Goán tī lán ê Pē Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng siàu-liām lín khò sìn-sim só͘ chòe ê kang, chhut tī thiàⁿ-sim ê lô-khó͘, kap tùi lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê ǹg-bāng só͘ piáu-hiān ê kian-jím." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán chai, lín sī Siōng-tè só͘ thiàⁿ, só͘ kéng-soán,ê," 
1Thessalonians1:5 in-ūi goán thoân hok-im khì kàu lín hia, m̄-sī chí-ū ēng giân-gú, mā khò tōa lêng-le̍k kap Sèng Sîn, í-ki̍p tùi hok-im ū oân-choân ê khak-sìn. Chiàu lín só͘ chai, goán tī lín tiong-kan ê sî choh-lâng sím-mi̍h khoán, lóng sī ūi-tio̍h beh hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h lī-ek." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Koh lín ū o̍h goán mā ū o̍h Chú, sui-jiân tī chin chōe khó͘-lān tiong, lín iáu-kú ēng Sèng Sîn só͘ sù ê hoaⁿ-hí lâi niá-siū sìn-sit." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tùi án-ni, lín chiâⁿ-chòe Má-kî-tùn kap A-kai-a choân-thé sìn-tô͘ ê bô͘-hoān." 
1Thessalonians1:8 In-ūi Chú ê sìn-sit sī tùi lín thoân-chhut, m̄-nā tī Má-kî-tùn kap A-kai-a, lín tùi Siōng-tè ê sìn mā thoân kàu ta̍k só͘-chāi, só͘-í m̄-bián goán koh kóng sím-mi̍h." 
1Thessalonians1:9 In ka-kī ū kóng-khí, goán tī lín hia ê sî jōa-ni̍h siū lín hoan-gêng, lín án-chóaⁿ lī-khui ngó͘-siōng kui-ǹg Siōng-tè, lâi sū-hōng oa̍h koh chin ê Siōng-tè," 
1Thessalonians1:10 thèng-hāu I ê Kiáⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi; I hō͘ Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, lâi chín-kiù lán thoat-lī beh lâi ê sím-phòaⁿ." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín ka-kī chai goán khì lín hia hóng-būn m̄-sī bô hāu-kó." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Lín chai goán khì lín hia í-chêng tī Hui-li̍p-pí sui-jiân siū-tio̍h pek-hāi kap bú-jio̍k, iáu-kú ū óa-khò lán ê Siōng-tè hó-táⁿ biān-tùi chin chōe chó͘-gāi, thoân Siōng-tè ê hok-im hō͘ lín." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Goán ê khoàn-bián m̄-sī chhut tī chhò-gō͘ á-sī bô sûn-chèng ê tōng-ki, mā m̄-sī beh phiàn lâng." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè khòaⁿ goán ōe-kham,tit, chiong hok-im kau-thok goán, goán chiū chiàu án-ni kóng, m̄-sī beh hō͘ lâng hoaⁿ-hí, sī beh hō͘ kàm-chhat goán lāi-sim ê Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Lín chai, goán m̄-bat tùi lín kóng phô͘-tháⁿ ê ōe, mā m̄-bat ū tham-sim ê liām-thâu, Siōng-tè ōe-tàng kā goán choh-chèng." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Goán mā m̄-bat tùi lâng, bô-lūn sī lín á-sī pa̍t-lâng, kiû êng-kng." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Sui-jiân choh Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘, goán pún-lâi thang iau-kiû lín chun-tiōng goán; m̄-kú goán tī lín tiong-kan ê sî un-jiû tùi-thāi lín, chhin-chhiūⁿ lin-bú teh io gín-á." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Kì-jiân goán hiah-ni̍h thiàⁿ-sioh lín, m̄-nā goān-ì kap lín hun-hióng Siōng-tè ê hok-im, liân goán ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā to kam-goān hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín sī goán só͘ thiàⁿ,ê." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit goán ê sin-khó͘ kap lô-lo̍k; goán thoân Siōng-tè ê hok-im hō͘ lín ê sî, ūi-tio̍h bô ài ke-thiⁿ lín jīm-hô-lâng ê hū-tam, goán mî-ji̍t teh chòe kang." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Lín kap Siōng-tè ōe-tàng kā goán choh-chèng, tùi lín chiah-ê sìn-tô͘, goán ê choh-lâng jōa-ni̍h sûn-kiat, chèng-ti̍t, bô thang hiâm." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Lín chai goán tùi-thāi lín ta̍k-ê lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ lāu-pē tùi-thāi ka-kī ê jî-lú." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Goán khó͘-khǹg lín, kó͘-lē lín, khoàn-bián lín, ài lín ê giân-hêng-kú-chí ōe-tàng hû-ha̍p Siōng-tè ê chí-ì; I ū tiàu lín chìn-ji̍p I ka-kī ê Kok-tō͘ kap êng-iāu." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Goán mā ūi-tio̍h chit-ê iân-kò͘ siông-siông kám-siā Siōng-tè, in-ūi lín tùi goán thiaⁿ-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê ōe ê sî, bô kā i khòaⁿ-chòe sī lâng ê ōe, tian-tò khòaⁿ-chòe khak-khak-si̍t-si̍t sī Siōng-tè ê ōe; chit-ê ōe tī lín sìn-tô͘ tiong-kan teh ūn-chok." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín ū tú-tio̍h tī Iû-thài -tōe Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, chiū-sī sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê kàu-hōe só͘ tú,tio̍h ê tāi-chì. Lín siū-tio̍h ka-kī tông-pau ê pek-hāi, tú chhin-chhiūⁿ in ū siū-tio̍h Iû-thài -lâng ê pek-hāi." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng thâi-sí Chú Iâ-so͘ kap chèng sian-ti, mā pek-hāi goán. In hō͘ Siōng-tè bô hoaⁿ-hí, mā kap chèng-lâng chòe tùi-te̍k," 
1Thessalonians2:16 sīm-chì chó͘-tòng goán thoân hok-im hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng, hō͘ in thang tit-tio̍h kiù. Hiah-ê Iû-thài -lâng kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe, ti̍t-kàu chōe-ok koàn-boán. Chòe-āu Siōng-tè ê siū-khì lîm-kàu in sin-chiūⁿ." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán siū-pek chiām-sî kap lín hun-lī, put-kò sī seng-khu saⁿ-lī, sim khiok bô lī-khui. Goán jōa-ni̍h pek-chhiat ài koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h lín ê bīn." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Goán chin ài khì lín hia. Góa Pó-lô chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn siūⁿ-beh khì hóng-būn lín, m̄-kú Sat-tàn kā goán chó͘-tòng." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ lâi-lîm ê sî, goán ê ǹg-bāng, hoaⁿ-hí, kap siōng khoa-kháu,ê sī sím-mi̍h? Kiám m̄-sī lín?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Lín si̍t-chāi sī goán ê êng-kng kap hoaⁿ-hí. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Só͘-í, goán tán bōe tiâu, koat-tēng kan-ta goán lâu tī Ngá-tián," 
1Thessalonians3:2 chiū chhe goán ê hiaⁿ-tī, mā-sī ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè thoân Ki-tok hok-im ê tâng-kang Thê-mô͘-thài, khì lín hia, lâi kó͘-lē lín, kian-kò͘ lín ê sìn-sim," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hō͘ lín tiong-kan bô lâng in-ūi só͘ tú,tio̍h ê khó͘-lān tì-kàu tōng-iâu. Lín ka-kī chai, lán tú-tio̍h khó͘-lān sī Siōng-tè ê an-pâi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Goán iáu kap lín chòe-hé ê sî, ū seng kā lín kóng-khí goán ōe siū khó͘-lān, āu-lâi chin-chiàⁿ ū hoat-seng, che sī lín só͘ chai,ê." 
1Thessalonians3:5 In-ūi án-ni, góa tán bōe tiâu chiah chhe Thê-mô͘-thài khì lín hia, ài chai lín ê sìn-sim án-chóaⁿ, chiah bián lín siū Chhì-thàm-chiá bê-he̍k, tì-kàu goán tī lín tiong-kan ê lô-khó͘ lo̍k-khong." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Hiān-chāi Thê-mô͘-thài í-keng tùi lín hia tò,lâi, chiong koan-hē lín ê sìn-sim kap thiàⁿ-sim ê hó siau-sit pò goán chai, koh kā goán kóng lín sî-siông teh siàu-liām goán, ài kap goán kìⁿ-bīn, chhin-chhiūⁿ goán ài kap lín kìⁿ-bīn." 
1Thessalonians3:7 In-ūi án-ni, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tī it-chhè ê hoān-lān kap khùn-khó͘ tiong goán ū tùi lín ê sìn-sim tit-tio̍h an-ùi." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Lín nā tùi Chú ū kian-kò͘ ê sìn-sim, goán chiah ōe-tàng kóng hiān-chāi ū chin-chiàⁿ teh oa̍h." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Goán tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng in-ūi lín lâi hoaⁿ-hí; tùi che it-chhè ê hoaⁿ-hí, goán tio̍h án-chóaⁿ kám-siā chiah ū kàu-gia̍h?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Goán mî-ji̍t pek-chhiat kî-kiû thang kìⁿ lín ê bīn, lâi pó͘-chiok lín sìn-sim ê su-iàu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Goān lán ê Thiⁿ-pē Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ kā goán khui-lō͘ thang khì lín hia. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Goān Chú hō͘ lín saⁿ-thiàⁿ kap thiàⁿ chèng-lâng ê sim it-ti̍t ke-thiⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ goán tùi lín ê thiàⁿ ū ná ke-thiⁿ." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Án-ni, I ōe hō͘ lín ê sim kian-kò͘, tī lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ kap I ê chèng sìn-tô͘ lâi-lîm ê sî, tī lán ê Pē Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng sèng-kiat, bô thang hiâm. Amen!" 
1Thessalonians4:1 Chòe-āu, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán iáu ū ōe beh kā lín kóng, lín ū chiap-siū goán ê kà-sī, chai-iáⁿ tio̍h án-chóaⁿ seng-oa̍h chiah ōe hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí, kî-si̍t lín ū chiàu án-ni teh seng-oa̍h. Put-kò goán hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ khún-kiû koh khó͘-khǹg lín tio̍h ka-pē lô-le̍k." 
1Thessalonians4:2 In-ūi lín chai goán ū hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ kā lín chí-sī sím-mi̍h. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Siōng-tè ê chí-ì sī ài lín sèng-kiat, bô îm-loān," 
1Thessalonians4:4 hō͘ lín ta̍k-ê lâng ōe-hiáu ēng sèng-kiat kap chū-chun ê sim khòng-chè ka-kī ê seng-khu," 
1Thessalonians4:5 bô chhin-chhiūⁿ m̄ bat Siōng-tè ê Gōa-pang-lâng teh hòng-chhiòng chêng-io̍k. 
1Thessalonians4:6 M̄-thang chhim-hāi, mā m̄-thang khi-hū tâng-sìn ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē. Goán í-keng ū kā lín kóng, mā ū giâm-giâm seng kā lín kéng-kò, “Chòe chit-khoán tāi-chì ê lâng, Chú ōe pò-èng.”" 
1Thessalonians4:7 Siōng-tè m̄-sī ho͘-tiàu lán kè bô chheng-khì ê seng-oa̍h, sī ho͘-tiàu lán kè sèng-kiat ê seng-oa̍h." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Só͘-í, kū-choa̍t chit-ê kà-sī,ê, m̄-sī kū-choa̍t lâng, sī kū-choa̍t sù lín Sèng Sîn ê Siōng-tè." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Koan-hē hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē saⁿ-thiàⁿ ê sū, bô su-iàu goán siá sím-mi̍h hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín ka-kī í-keng siū-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê kà-sī ài hō͘-siōng saⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Kî-si̍t, lín ū chiàu chit-ê kà-sī tùi-thāi choân Má-kî-tùn ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē. M̄-kú, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán khó͘-khǹg lín tio̍h ka-pē lô-le̍k." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Chiàu goán í-chêng só͘ hoan-hù, lín tio̍h li̍p-chì kè an-chēng ê seng-oa̍h, chīn ka-kī ê pún-hūn chhin-chhiú chòe kang." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Án-ni lín chiū ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h hōe-gōa ê lâng ê chun-kèng, bô su-iàu khò pa̍t-lâng pang-chān." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, koan-hē í-keng sí,khì ê lâng, goán ài lín chai, chiah bián chhin-chhiūⁿ hiah-ê bô ǹg-bāng ê lâng án-ni teh pi-siong." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Kì-jiân lán sìn Iâ-so͘ ū sí, ū koh-oa̍h, só͘-í lán mā sìn Siōng-tè ōe thong-kè Iâ-so͘ chhōa hiah-ê í-keng sí,khì ê lâng kap I chòe-hé lâi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Goán chiàu Chú ê ōe kā lín kóng chit-ê sū, chiū-sī lán chiah-ê tī Chú lâi-lîm ê sî iáu oa̍h,teh ê lâng, bōe pí hiah-ê í-keng sí,khì ê lâng khah tāi-seng kìⁿ-tio̍h Chú." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Bēng-lēng chi̍t-ē chhut, thiⁿ-sài-tiúⁿ ê siaⁿ chi̍t-ē hoah, Siōng-tè ê lat-pah chi̍t-ē hiáng, Chú pún-sin chiū ōe tùi thiⁿ-téng kàng-lîm, hiah-ê sí í-chêng í-keng sìn Ki-tok ê lâng ōe tāi-seng koh-oa̍h," 
1Thessalonians4:17 jiân-āu lán chiah-ê iáu oa̍h,teh ê lâng lóng ōe kap in chòe-hé siū chiap-khì hûn-lāi, tī khong-tiong kap Chú saⁿ-kìⁿ. Án-ni, lán chiū ōe it-ti̍t kap Chú chòe-hé." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h ēng chiah-ê ōe hō͘-siōng kó͘-lē." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, koan-hē chit-ê tāi-chì hoat-seng ê sî kap kî, bô su-iàu siá-phoe kā lín kóng," 
1Thessalonians5:2 in-ūi lín ka-kī chai Chú ê Ji̍t ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t-á àm-sî thau-thau-á lâi. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Lâng teh kóng “pêng-an bô-sū” ê sî, chai-lān chhin-chhiūⁿ sán-hū chhui-chūn ê thàng-thiàⁿ hut-jiân lîm-kàu in, bô hoat-tō͘ thang tô-pī." 
1Thessalonians5:4 M̄-kú, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín m̄-sī tī o͘-àm tiong, hit-ê Ji̍t bōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t-á hut-jiân lâi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 In-ūi lín lóng sī kng-bêng ê lâng, sī ji̍t,sî ê lâng; lán m̄-sī sio̍k mî,sî, m̄-sī sio̍k o͘-àm." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Só͘-í, lán m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ kî-tha ê lâng teh khùn, tio̍h chhíⁿ-chhíⁿ, tio̍h kín-sīn." 
1Thessalonians5:7 In-ūi khùn ê lâng lóng sī àm-sî teh khùn; chiú-chùi ê lâng sī àm-sî teh chùi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kì-jiân lán sī sio̍k ji̍t,sî ê lâng, tio̍h kín-sīn, ēng sìn-sim kap thiàⁿ-sim chòe hō͘-heng-kah chhēng, ēng tit-kiù ê ǹg-bāng chòe thâu-khoe tì." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Siōng-tè bô an-pâi lán tio̍h siū hêng-hoa̍t, sī beh hō͘ lán thong-kè Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lâi tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Ki-tok thòe lán sí, sī beh hō͘ lán bô-lūn sī sí á-sī oa̍h, lóng ōe-tàng kap I chòe-hé oa̍h." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Só͘-í, chhin-chhiūⁿ lín hiān-chāi án-ni, tio̍h kè-sio̍k hō͘-siōng kó͘-lē, pí-chhú chō-chiū." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chhiáⁿ lín tio̍h kèng-tiōng tī lín tiong-kan teh tio̍h-bôa, mā-sī Chú kéng-soán lâi chí-tō kap khoàn-bián lín hiah-ê lâng." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Koh tio̍h in-ūi in só͘ chòe ê kang, ēng siōng-tōa ê kèng-ì kap thiàⁿ-sim tùi-thāi in. Lín ka-kī tio̍h hô-bo̍k siong-chhù." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán khó͘-khǹg lín tio̍h kéng-kài pîn-tōaⁿ ê lâng, bián-lē bô-táⁿ ê lâng, pang-chān loán-jio̍k ê lâng; tùi chèng-lâng tio̍h khoan-iông." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Lín tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang ēng pháiⁿ pò pháiⁿ, tio̍h put-sî ūi-tio̍h pí-chhú í-ki̍p só͘-ū ê lâng chòe hó-sū." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Tio̍h put-sî hoaⁿ-hí; 
1Thessalonians5:17 tio̍h kè-sio̍k kî-tó; 
1Thessalonians5:18 bô-lūn sím-mi̍h kéng-gū lóng tio̍h kám-siā; in-ūi che sī Siōng-tè só͘ ì-ài, ài lín chiah-ê sio̍k Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê lâng án-ni chòe." 
1Thessalonians5:19 M̄-thang phah-hoa Sèng Sîn ê hé; 
1Thessalonians5:20 m̄-thang biáu-sī sian-ti ê ōe. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Sū-sū tio̍h chhat-giām; hó,ê tio̍h chhî-siú," 
1Thessalonians5:22 it-chhè ê siâ-ok tio̍h khì-sak. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Goān sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè chhin-sin kā lín oân-choân sèng-hòa, hō͘ lín ê lêng, hûn, kap thé tī lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok lâi-lîm ê sî tit-tio̍h pó-choân, bô thang hiâm!" 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t, I it-tēng ōe oân-sêng chit-ê sū." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chhiáⁿ ūi-tio̍h goán kî-tó." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Tio̍h chin-sêng kā lóng-chóng ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē chhéng-an. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Goán hōng Chú ê miâ hoan-hù lín tio̍h tha̍k chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ chèng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē thiaⁿ. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi! 
2Thessalonians1:1 Góa Pó-lô, Se-la, kap Thê-mô͘-thài siá-phoe hō͘ Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka sio̍k lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê kàu-hōe." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Goān lín tùi lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tit-tio̍h un-tián kap pêng-an! 
2Thessalonians1:3 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán eng-kai put-sî ūi-tio̍h lín kám-siā Siōng-tè; án-ni chòe sī tong-jiân, in-ūi lín ê sìn-sim ū tōa chìn-pō͘, lín chèng-lâng ê saⁿ-thiàⁿ mā it-ti̍t teh ke-thiⁿ." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Só͘-í goán tī Siōng-tè ê chèng kàu-hōe tiong ēng lín chòe khoa-kháu, in-ūi lín siū it-chhè ê pek-hāi kap jím-siū hoān-lān ê sî iáu pó-chhî kian-jím kap sìn-sim." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Che chèng-si̍t Siōng-tè phòaⁿ-tēng lín ōe-kham-tit sêng-siū Siōng-tè-kok sī kong-tō, lín chiū-sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê teh siū-khó͘." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè sī kong-tō, I ōe ēng chai-lān pò-èng hiah-ê hō͘ lín tú-tio̍h chai-lān ê lâng," 
2Thessalonians1:7 mā hō͘ lín chiah-ê tú-tio̍h chai-lān ê lâng, tī Chú Iâ-so͘ kap I ū tōa lêng-le̍k ê thiⁿ-sài tī hé-iām tiong tùi thiⁿ hián-hiān ê sî, thang kap goán pîⁿ-pîⁿ tit-tio̍h an-hioh. Hit-sî, I ōe hêng-hoa̍t hiah-ê m̄ jīn Siōng-tè kap m̄ sūn-thàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê hok-im ê lâng." 
2Thessalonians1:8  
2Thessalonians1:9 In ōe siū éng-oán húi-bia̍t ê hêng-hoa̍t, lī-khui Chú ê bīn-chêng, kap I êng-kng ê khùi-la̍t keh-tn̄g." 
2Thessalonians1:10 I lâi-lîm ê sî ōe tùi I ê sìn-tô͘ tit-tio̍h êng-kng, koh tùi só͘-ū sìn I ê lâng tit-tio̍h chun-chông. Tī hit-ji̍t lín mā ōe tī in tiong-kan, in-ūi lín ū sìn goán tùi lín só͘ chòe ê kiàn-chèng." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê bo̍k-te̍k, goán put-sî teh ūi-tio̍h lín kî-tó, khún-kiû lán ê Siōng-tè hō͘ lín ê seng-oa̍h ōe hû-ha̍p I ê ho͘-tiàu, mā sù lín khùi-la̍t lâi si̍t-hiān it-chhè siān-liông ê sim-ì kap sìn-sim ê chok-ûi," 
2Thessalonians1:12 thang hō͘ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ ê miâ tī lín tiong-kan tit-tio̍h êng-kng, lín mā tùi I tit-tio̍h êng-kng; che lóng sī lán ê Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, koan-hē lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê lâi-lîm kap lán siū chū-chi̍p khì I hia ê sū, goán iau-kiû lín," 
2Thessalonians2:2 nā ū thiaⁿ lâng kóng goán tī ū-giân, káng-tō, á-sī tī phoe,ni̍h ū kóng-khí “Chú ê Ji̍t kàu” ê sî, lín ê sim m̄-thang tōng-iâu á-sī kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Lâng bô-lūn ēng sím-mi̍h hong-hoat, lín lóng m̄-thang hō͘ in phiàn,khì, in-ūi tī hit-ji̍t kàu í-chêng it-tēng seng ū pōe-kàu ê sū, mā ū put-hoat ê lâng, chiū-sī chù-tiāⁿ bia̍t-bông ê lâng, ōe chhut-hiān." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Chit-ê te̍k-tùi-chiá thê-ko ka-kī, chhiau-kè it-chhè chheng-chòe sîn-bêng á-sī kèng-pài ê tùi-siōng, khì chē tī Siōng-tè ê tiān, chū-chheng chòe Siōng-tè." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Chit-ê tāi-chì, góa iáu kap lín chòe-hé ê sî bat kā lín kóng, lín kiám bōe-kì,tit?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Lín lóng chai, hiān-chāi sī sím-mi̍h teh khian-chè hit-ê Put-hoat-chiá; i ê sî nā kàu, i ōe chhut-hiān." 
2Thessalonians2:7 In-ūi hit-ê sîn-pì ê put-hoat sè-le̍k í-keng teh ūn-chok, put-kò tio̍h thèng-hāu kàu teh khian-chè i ê sè-le̍k sóa-khui hit-sî chiah ōe hoat-seng." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Hit-sî Put-hoat-chiá ōe chhut-hiān; Chú Iâ-so͘ ōe ēng tùi I ê chhùi thò͘,chhut-lâi ê khùi kā i thâi-sí, ēng I lâi-lîm ê sî hián-hiān ê êng-kng kā i siau-bia̍t." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Put-hoat-chiá lâi-lîm ê sî ōe ēng Sat-tàn ta̍k-khoán ê koân-lêng kiâⁿ ké sîn-jiah kap kî-sū," 
2Thessalonians2:10 koh tùi bia̍t-bông ê lâng kiâⁿ ta̍k-khoán siâ-ok ê phiàn-su̍t, in-ūi in kū-choa̍t khì ài ōe hō͘ in tit-kiù ê chin-lí." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni, Siōng-tè hō͘ in sán-seng kiông-lia̍t ê chhò-kak khì siong-sìn hu-ké," 
2Thessalonians2:12 tì-kàu it-chhè m̄ sìn chin-lí, ì-ài put-gī ê lâng lóng siū tēng-chōe." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Chú só͘ thiàⁿ ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán eng-kai put-sî ūi-tio̍h lín kám-siā Siōng-tè, in-ūi I tùi khí-thâu chiū kéng-soán lín lâi tit-kiù, tùi Sèng Sîn hō͘ lín chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat ê chú-bîn, koh hō͘ lín khak-sìn chin-lí." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê, Siōng-tè thong-kè goán só͘ thoân ê hok-im ho͘-tiàu lín lâi niá-siū lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê êng-kng." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h khiā-chāi, tio̍h kian-siú goán só͘ kà-sī ê thoân-thóng, bô-lūn sī ēng chhùi kóng,ê á-sī ēng phoe siá,ê, lóng tio̍h kian-siú." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok pún-sin kap thiàⁿ lán ê Pē Siōng-tè tùi I ê un-tián, sù lán éng-oán ê an-ùi kap bí-hó ê ǹg-bāng," 
2Thessalonians2:17 lâi an-ùi lín ê sim, hō͘ lín ū khùi-la̍t thang chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū, kóng ta̍k-hāng hó-ōe." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán iáu ū ōe beh kā lín kóng. Chhiáⁿ lín ūi-tio̍h goán kî-tó, hō͘ Chú ê sìn-sit ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ tī lín tiong-kan án-ni chin kín thoân-khui koh tit-tio̍h êng-kng." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mā chhiáⁿ lín kî-kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ goán ōe-tàng thoat-lī choh-ok-choh-to̍k ê lâng, in-ūi m̄-sī ta̍k-ê lâng lóng ū sìn." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Chú sī khó-khò,ê; I ōe hō͘ lín kian-kò͘, ōe pó-siú lín thoat-lī hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Chú hō͘ goán tùi lín ū sìn-sim, siong-sìn goán kau-tài lín ê tāi-chì, lín hiān-chāi ū teh chòe, āu-lâi mā ōe chòe." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Goān Chú ín-chhōa lín, hō͘ lín ha̍k-si̍p Siōng-tè ê thiàⁿ kap Ki-tok ê thun-lún!" 
2Thessalonians3:6 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, goán hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ bēng-lēng lín, nā ū sìn-tô͘ seng-oa̍h sàn-bān pîn-tōaⁿ, bô chun-siú goán thoân-siū hō͘ in ê kà-sī, lín tio̍h siám-khui." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Lín ka-kī mā chai lín eng-kai tio̍h án-chóaⁿ o̍h goán, in-ūi goán tī lín tiong-kan ê sî bô sàn-bān pîn-tōaⁿ." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Goán m̄-bat pe̍h-chia̍h pa̍t-lâng ê pn̄g; hoán-tńg mî-ji̍t thoa-bôa lô-khó͘, chiah bián chiâⁿ-chòe lín ê hū-tam." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Goán án-ni chòe, m̄-sī kóng goán bô koân thang iau-kiû kiong-èng, sī ài ēng goán ka-kī chòe lín ê bô͘-iūⁿ, hō͘ lín thang o̍h goán ê khoán-sit." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Goán tī lín hia ê sî bat bēng-lēng lín kóng, “M̄-khéng choh-kang ê lâng m̄-thang chia̍h.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Goán án-ni kóng, sī in-ūi goán ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ lín tiong-kan ū lâng pîn-tōaⁿ m̄ chòe kang, chí-ū ài chhap lâng ê êng-á-sū." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Chit-khoán lâng, goán hōng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ kā in kéng-kò, bēng-lēng in tio̍h an-hūn chòe kang, ka-kī thó-thàn." 
2Thessalonians3:13 M̄-kú, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chòe hó-sū m̄-thang siūⁿ-siān." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Nā ū lâng m̄-khéng ho̍k-chiông goán tī chit-tiuⁿ phoe só͘ hoan-hù ê ōe, tio̍h kā i kì,teh, m̄-thang kap i lâi-óng, hō͘ i kám-kak kiàn-siàu;" 
2Thessalonians3:15 put-kò m̄-thang kā i khòaⁿ-chòe tùi-te̍k, tio̍h khòaⁿ i chòe hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē kā i khoàn-bián." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Goān sù pêng-an ê Chú put-sî ēng ta̍k-khoán hong-hoat chhin-sin sù lín pêng-an! Goān Chú kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi! 
2Thessalonians3:17 Góa Pó-lô chhin-pit kā lín chhéng-an. Góa tī ta̍k-tiuⁿ phoe lóng ū án-ni chhiam-miâ. Góa lóng án-ni siá. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Goān lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi! 
1Timothy1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, chiàu lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè kap chòe lán ǹg-bāng ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê bēng-lēng, góa choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘," 
1Timothy1:2 siá-phoe hō͘ Thê-mô͘-thài, sìn-gióng siōng góa chin ê kiáⁿ. Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù lí un-tián, lîn-bín, kap pêng-an!" 
1Timothy1:3 Góa beh khì Má-kî-tùn ê sî, ū khǹg lí tio̍h lâu tī Í-hut-só͘, thang bēng-lēng chi̍t-kóa lâng m̄-thang thoân pa̍t-khoán kàu-gī," 
1Timothy1:4 mā m̄-thang lōng-hùi cheng-sîn tī bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat kap lò-lò-tn̂g ê cho̍k-phó͘, in-ūi chiah-ê chí-ū ōe ín-khí piān-lūn, bōe pang-chān lâng ēng sìn liáu-kái Siōng-tè ê kè-ōe." 
1Timothy1:5 Chit-ê bēng-lēng ê bo̍k-te̍k sī beh tit-tio̍h jîn-ài; chit-ê jîn-ài sī tùi chheng-khì ê sim, chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim, kap sûn-chin ê sìn sán-seng,ê." 
1Timothy1:6 Ū lâng tùi chiah-ê phian-lī, sit-bê tī khang-hu ê tâm-lūn." 
1Timothy1:7 In liân ka-kī só͘ kóng só͘ chú-tiuⁿ,ê to bô lí-kái, koh siūⁿ-beh choh lu̍t-hoat-kàu-su." 
1Timothy1:8 Lán chai, lâng nā chèng-khak sú-iōng Lu̍t-hoat, Lu̍t-hoat sī hó." 
1Timothy1:9 Lán mā chai, Lu̍t-hoat ê chè-tēng m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h chèng-ti̍t ê lâng, sī ūi-tio̍h put-hoat kap bô sūn-ho̍k, bô kèng-khiân kap hoān-chōe, bô sèng-kiat kap tham-loân sè-sio̍k, thâi-sí pē-bú kap thâi-sí lâng," 
1Timothy1:10 îm-loān, hò͘ⁿ lâm-sek, koái-iú lâng, kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, choh gūi-chèng, á-sī ûi-hoán kiān-choân ê kàu-gī chit-lūi ê lâng." 
1Timothy1:11 Chit-ê kiān-choân ê kàu-gī hû-ha̍p eng-kai tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn ê Siōng-tè só͘ kau-thok góa hit-ê êng-kng ê hok-im. 
1Timothy1:12 Góa kám-siā hō͘ góa khùi-la̍t ê lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, in-ūi I khòaⁿ góa chòe thang sìn-jīm, chí-phài góa chòe chhe-ēng." 
1Timothy1:13 Sui-jiân í-chêng góa pòng-to̍k, pek-hāi, koh kā I bú-jio̍k, iáu-kú tit-tio̍h lîn-bín, sī in-ūi góa iáu-bē sìn m̄-bat ê sî chiah án-ni chòe." 
1Timothy1:14 Lán ê Chú sù góa hong-sēng kàu móa,chhut-lâi ê un-tián, hō͘ góa tit-tio̍h kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân chiah ū ê sìn kap thiàⁿ." 
1Timothy1:15 “Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ lîm-kàu sè-kan sī beh chín-kiù chōe-jîn” chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn, ta̍t-tit oân-choân chiap-siū. Chōe-jîn tiong góa sī tē-it pháiⁿ,ê." 
1Timothy1:16 M̄-kú góa tit-tio̍h lîn-bín sī in-ūi Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok beh ēng góa chit-ê tē-it pháiⁿ ê lâng lâi hián-bêng I bû-hān ê nāi-sim, thang chòe āu-lâi sìn Iâ-so͘ lâi tit-tio̍h éng-oa̍h ê lâng ê bô͘-iūⁿ." 
1Timothy1:17 Goān chun-kùi, êng-kng kui tī bān-sè ê Kun-ông, éng-oán chûn-chāi, khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h, to̍k-it-bû-jī ê Siōng-tè, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
1Timothy1:18 Góa ê kiáⁿ Thê-mô͘-thài ah, chiàu í-chêng koan-hē lí só͘ kóng ê ū-giân, góa chiong chit-ê bēng-lēng kau-thok lí, hō͘ lí thang ēng chiah-ê ū-giân khì cheng-chiàn eng-kai iâⁿ ê chiàn-cheng." 
1Timothy1:19 Lí tio̍h chhî-siú sìn-sim kap chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim. Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng pàng-sak liông-sim, tì-kàu sìn-sim chhin-chhiūⁿ chûn khò-chhián," 
1Timothy1:20 kî-tiong ū Su-bí-nái kap A-le̍k-san-tāi; góa í-keng chiong in kau hō͘ Sat-tàn, hō͘ in siū kà-sī bô koh pòng-to̍k Siōng-tè." 
1Timothy2:1 Só͘-í, tē-it, góa khoàn-bián lí tio̍h ūi-tio̍h só͘-ū ê lâng, kun-ông, kap lóng-chóng ê koaⁿ-oân khún-kiû, kî-tó, tāi-tó, kám-un, hō͘ lán thang kè pêng-chēng an-jiân ê seng-oa̍h, hoān-sū kèng-khiân, toan-chèng." 
1Timothy2:2  
1Timothy2:3 Án-ni chòe sī eng-kai, sī lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí chiap-la̍p,ê." 
1Timothy2:4 I ài chèng-lâng tit-kiù, ta̍t-kàu jīn-bat chin-lí." 
1Timothy2:5 In-ūi Siōng-tè sī chi̍t ūi, Siōng-tè kap lâng tiong-kan ê tiong-kan-jîn mā-sī chi̍t ūi, chiū-sī choh-lâng ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘." 
1Timothy2:6 I hiàn pún-sin lâi sio̍k-hôe chèng-lâng, chit-hāng sū tī tú-hó ê sî-ki ū tit-tio̍h chèng-si̍t." 
1Timothy2:7 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni, góa siū jīm-bēng chòe thoân-tō-chiá, sù-tô͘, kap Gōa-pang-lâng ê kàu-su, hō͘ in siong-sìn Siōng-tè koh jīn-bat chin-lí. Góa teh kóng,ê sī chin,ê, m̄-sī ké,ê." 
1Timothy2:8 Góa ài ta-po͘-lâng bô siū-khì, bô cheng-lūn, tī ta̍k só͘-chāi gia̍h-khí sèng-kiat ê chhiú kî-tó." 
1Timothy2:9 Góa mā ài hū-jîn-lâng chhēng-chhah toan-chong phok-sò͘ chéng-chôe, m̄-thang ēng kî-hêng-koài-chōng ê thâu-mn̂g-hêng, kim-khì, chu-pó, á-sī chin kùi ê saⁿ chng-thāⁿ ka-kī;" 
1Timothy2:10 tio̍h ēng hó hêng-ûi chòe chng-thāⁿ, piáu-sī ka-kī sī kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê hū-jîn-lâng." 
1Timothy2:11 Hū-jîn-lâng tio̍h tiām-tiām-á o̍h, ēng sūn-chiông ê sim sū-sū sūn-ho̍k." 
1Timothy2:12 Góa m̄-chún hū-jîn-lâng kà-sī á-sī koán-hat ta-po͘-lâng; i tio̍h an-chēng. 
1Timothy2:13 In-ūi A-tong tāi-seng siū chō, āu-lâi chiah Hā-oa." 
1Timothy2:14 Koh A-tong bô siū iú-he̍k, m̄-kú hū-jîn-lâng siū iú-he̍k hām-lo̍h chōe." 
1Timothy2:15 Put-kò hū-jîn-lâng nā an-hūn siú-kí, chhî-siú sìn-gióng, jîn-ài, kap sèng-kiat, chiū ōe in-ūi siⁿ-kiáⁿ tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Timothy3:1 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn: Nā ū lâng ài choh kam-tok, i sī him-bō͘ bí-hó ê kang-chok." 
1Timothy3:2 Só͘-í, kam-tok tio̍h bô thang hiâm, chí-ū chi̍t ê bó͘, an-hūn siú-kí, chū-chè, toan-chèng, gâu khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng, gâu kà-sī;" 
1Timothy3:3 bô chiú-chùi, bô hiong-pō, hoán-tńg ài un-hô, bô saⁿ-chiⁿ, bô tham-châi," 
1Timothy3:4 gâu koán-lí ka-kī ê ka-têng, kiáⁿ-jî ū sūn-ho̍k, sū-sū toan-chong." 
1Timothy3:5 Lâng nā bōe-hiáu koán-lí ka-kī ê ka-têng, ná ōe-hiáu koàn-kò͘ Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe?" 
1Timothy3:6 Chho͘-sìn-chiá m̄-thang hō͘ i tam-jīm kam-tok, chiah bōe chū-ko chū-tāi, hām-lo̍h kap Mô͘-kúi só͘ siū kâng-khoán ê sím-phòaⁿ." 
1Timothy3:7 I tī kàu-hōe-gōa mā tio̍h ū hó kiàn-chèng, chiah bián siū húi-pòng, hām-lo̍h Mô͘-kúi ê lô-bāng." 
1Timothy3:8 Chip-sū siâng-khoán mā tio̍h toan-chong, bô siang-bīn-ōe, bô hò͘ⁿ-chiú, bô tham châi-lī," 
1Timothy3:9 tio̍h ēng chheng-khì ê liông-sim kò͘-siú sìn-gióng ê ò-pì. 
1Timothy3:10 Chit-khoán lâng mā tio̍h seng hō͘ in chiap-siū khó-giām, nā bô thang hiâm chiah hō͘ in tam-jīm chip-sū." 
1Timothy3:11 Lú chip-sū mā-sī tio̍h toan-chong, bô tiòng-siong pa̍t-lâng, an-hūn siú-kí, sū-sū tiong-si̍t." 
1Timothy3:12 Chip-sū eng-kai chí-ū chi̍t ê bó͘, gâu koán-lí kiáⁿ-jî kap ka-kī ê ka-têng." 
1Timothy3:13 Chip-sū ê kang-chok nā chòe ōe hó, pún-sin ōe tit-tio̍h hó miâ-siaⁿ, mā thang chin hó-táⁿ káng-lūn in tùi Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sìn-gióng." 
1Timothy3:14 Góa ǹg-bāng chin kín chiū ōe khì lí hia, m̄-kú kiaⁿ-liáu khah bān kàu, góa seng siá chit-tiuⁿ phoe hō͘ lí chai lán tī Siōng-tè ê ke tio̍h án-chóaⁿ seng-oa̍h; chit-ê ke chiū-sī chin-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê kàu-hōe, iā chiū-sī chin-lí ê thiāu-chio̍h kap tōe-ki." 
1Timothy3:15  
1Timothy3:16 Tāi-ke lóng soan-jīn lán sìn-gióng ê ò-pì sī jōa-ni̍h tōa: Ki-tok hián-hiān chòe lâng, Sèng Sîn jīn-tēng chòe gī, tùi thiⁿ-sài chhut-hiān, tī bān-pang tiong siū soan-iông, sè-kan-lâng siong-sìn, siū chiap-la̍p ji̍p êng-iāu." 
1Timothy4:1 Sèng Sîn bêng-bêng kóng, tī āu-lâi ê sî-kî ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ōe pōe-sìn, khì thàn bê-he̍k lâng ê siâ-lêng kap kúi-sîn ê kà-sī." 
1Timothy4:2 Chit-khoán ê kà-sī sī tùi khi-phiàn-chiá ê pe̍h-chha̍t lâi,ê; in ê liông-sim í-keng hō͘ Mô͘-kúi ēng pû-âng-âng ê thih-ìn ù kì-hō. 
1Timothy4:3 In kìm-chí kè-chhōa, kìm-kài chi̍t-kóa chia̍h-mi̍h, chiū-sī Siōng-tè chhòng-chō beh hō͘ sìn koh bêng-pe̍k chin-lí ê lâng ēng kám-siā lâi niá-siū,ê." 
1Timothy4:4 In-ūi Siōng-tè it-chhè ê chhòng-chō lóng sī hó, nā ēng kám-siā lâi niá-siū, chiū bô-pòaⁿ-hāng thang kū-choa̍t;" 
1Timothy4:5 thong-kè Siōng-tè ê ōe kap lâng ê kî-tó chiū chiâⁿ-chòe sèng. 
1Timothy4:6 Lí nā chiong ē-bīn ê sū kà-sī hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chiū ōe tùi só͘ sìn ê sìn-sit kap só͘ sūn-thàn kiān-choân ê kà-sī tit-tio̍h pôe-iúⁿ, chiâⁿ-chòe Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê hó chhe-ēng." 
1Timothy4:7 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t chho͘-sio̍k kap khong-tōng bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat. Ūi-tio̍h kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h, tio̍h kè-sio̍k chhau-liān ka-kī." 
1Timothy4:8 Chhau-liān seng-khu ū tām-po̍h lī-ek, m̄-kú kèng-khiân tùi ta̍k-hāng lóng ū lī-ek, in-ūi ū hiān-kim kap chiong-lâi oa̍h-miā ê èng-ún." 
1Timothy4:9 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn, ta̍t-tit oân-choân chiap-siū." 
1Timothy4:10 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê, lán chhut-la̍t tio̍h-bôa, in-ūi lán ê ǹg-bāng chāi-tī chin-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè; I sī chèng-lâng, te̍k-pia̍t sī sìn ê lâng ê Kiù-chú." 
1Timothy4:11 Lí tio̍h chiong chiah-ê tāi-chì kā in khoàn-bián kap kà-sī. 
1Timothy4:12 M̄-thang in-ūi lí ê siàu-liân hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-khin; tio̍h tī kóng-ōe, kiâⁿ-chòe, thiàⁿ-sim, sìn-sim, sûn-kiat, chòe sìn-tô͘ ê bô͘-hoān." 
1Timothy4:13 Tio̍h tì-ì soan-tho̍k Sèng-keng, khoàn-bián, kap kà-sī, ti̍t-kàu góa lâi." 
1Timothy4:14 M̄-thang hut-lio̍k lí só͘ niá-siū sio̍k-lêng ê un-sù, chiū-sī thong-kè sian-ti ê sìn-sit kap tiúⁿ-ló-thoân ê àn-chhiú sù hō͘ lí,ê." 
1Timothy4:15 Chiah-ê tāi-chì, lí tio̍h choan-sim tì-ì khì chòe, hō͘ chèng-lâng thang khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí ê chìn-pō͘." 
1Timothy4:16 Lí ka-kī tio̍h kín-sīn, lí ê kà-sī mā tio̍h kín-sīn; chiah-ê tāi-chì tio̍h kian-chhî khì chòe, án-ni chòe ōe kiù lí pún-sin kap thiaⁿ-thàn lí ê lâng." 
1Timothy5:1 M̄-thang chek-pī lāu-lâng, tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khǹg lāu-pē án-ni kā i khǹg; tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khǹg hiaⁿ-tī án-ni khǹg siàu-liân-lâng;" 
1Timothy5:2 tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khoán-thāi lāu-bú án-ni khoán-thāi lāu hū-jîn-lâng; tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ khoán-thāi chí-bē án-ni ēng oân-choân sûn-kiat ê sim khoán-thāi siàu-liân ê hū-jîn-lâng. 
1Timothy5:3 Tio̍h chun-tiōng chin-chiàⁿ bô i-óa ê kóaⁿ-hū. 
1Timothy5:4 Kóaⁿ-hū ū kiáⁿ-jî-sun, chiah-ê kiáⁿ-jî-sun tio̍h tāi-seng tī ka-kī ê ka-têng ha̍k-si̍p hàu-sūn ê pún-hūn, lâi pò-tap in ê sī-tōa-lâng, in-ūi che sī Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê." 
1Timothy5:5 Chin-chiàⁿ bô-i-bô-óa ê kóaⁿ-hū, chí-ū gióng-bōng Siōng-tè, mî-ji̍t kè-sio̍k khún-kiû kî-tó." 
1Timothy5:6 M̄-kú chhia-hoa ê kóaⁿ-hū, sui-jiân teh oa̍h, kî-si̍t sī sí." 
1Timothy5:7 Lí tio̍h chiong chiah-ê kā in kà-sī, in chiah bōe siū chek-pī." 
1Timothy5:8 Nā ū lâng bô chiàu-kò͘ chhin-chhek, te̍k-pia̍t sī bô chiàu-kò͘ ka-kī chhù-lāi ê lâng, i í-keng pōe-poān sìn-gióng, pí bô-sìn ê lâng koh-khah hāi." 
1Timothy5:9 Kóaⁿ-hū tio̍h chhiau-kè la̍k-cha̍p hè chiah thang teng-kì; i tio̍h chí-ū kiat-hun chi̍t piàn," 
1Timothy5:10 tio̍h ū chòe hó-sū ê chèng-kù, chhin-chhiūⁿ ióng-io̍k jî-lú, chiap-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng, kā sìn-tô͘ sóe-kha, pang-chān tú-tio̍h hoān-lān ê lâng, choan-sim chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū." 
1Timothy5:11 M̄-kú siàu-liân ê kóaⁿ-hū m̄-thang kā in teng-kì; in-ūi in chêng-io̍k chi̍t-ē chhiong-tōng lī-khui Ki-tok, chiū siūⁿ-beh kè," 
1Timothy5:12 ûi-pōe tong-chho͘ só͘ hē ê goān, tì-kàu ka-kī chhú-chōe." 
1Timothy5:13 Koh in o̍h pîn-tōaⁿ, chi̍t-ke kè chi̍t-ke se̍h-thàu-thàu; m̄-nā pîn-tōaⁿ, mā ài kóng lâng ê sī-hui, ài chhap êng-á-sū, kóng m̄ eng-kai kóng ê ōe." 
1Timothy5:14 Só͘-í góa ài siàu-liân ê kóaⁿ-hū koh kè, siⁿ-kiáⁿ, liāu-lí ka-kī ê ka-têng, chiah bōe hō͘ tùi-te̍k ū ki-hōe kóng lán ê pháiⁿ-ōe;" 
1Timothy5:15 in-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa kóaⁿ-hū í-keng lī-khui, khì tè Sat-tàn." 
1Timothy5:16 Sìn Chú ê hū-jîn-lâng chhù-lāi nā ū kóaⁿ-hū, tio̍h ka-kī kā in chiàu-kò͘, m̄-thang chiong chit-ê tàⁿ sak hō͘ kàu-hōe, kàu-hōe chiah ōe-tàng chiàu-kò͘ hiah-ê chin-chiàⁿ bô i-óa ê kóaⁿ-hū." 
1Timothy5:17 Hiah-ê gâu tī-lí kàu-hōe ê tiúⁿ-ló eng-kai tit-tio̍h ka-pē ê pò-siû, te̍k-pia̍t chīn-la̍t tī káng-tō kap kà-sī,ê koh-khah tio̍h án-ni," 
1Timothy5:18 in-ūi Sèng-keng kóng, “Gû teh lún ngó͘-kok ê sî, m̄-thang kā i kòa gû-chhùi-lam”; koh kóng, “Kang-lâng eng-kai tit-tio̍h kang-chîⁿ.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Khòng-kò tiúⁿ-ló ê àn-kiāⁿ, nā m̄-sī ū nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê chèng-jîn, m̄-thang siū-lí." 
1Timothy5:20 Kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng tio̍h tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng kā in khiàn-chek, hō͘ kî-tha ê lâng tit-tio̍h kéng-kài." 
1Timothy5:21 Góa tī Siōng-tè, Ki-tok Iâ-so͘, kap siū soán ê thiⁿ-sài ê bīn-chêng bēng-lēng lí, tio̍h chun-siú chiah-ê chí-sī, m̄-thang ū sêng-kiàn, bô-lūn chòe sím-mi̍h to m̄-thang phian-sim." 
1Timothy5:22 M̄-thang sûi-piān kā lâng kiâⁿ àn-chhiú-lé. M̄-thang chham-ú pa̍t-lâng ê chōe; tio̍h pó-siú ka-kī sûn-kiat. 
1Timothy5:23 In-ūi lí ê ūi bô hó, siông-siông phòa-pīⁿ, m̄-thang kan-ta lim-chúi, mā tio̍h lim tām-po̍h chiú." 
1Timothy5:24 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ê chōe chin bêng-hián, iáu-bē sím-phòaⁿ chiū chin chheng-chhó; ū ê lâng ê chōe āu-lâi chiah hián-lō͘." 
1Timothy5:25 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, hó hêng-ûi mā chin bêng-hián, bô bêng-hián,ê, mā khàm bōe tiâu." 
1Timothy6:1 Tī lâng ê koán-hat-ē chòe lô͘-lē,ê, tio̍h khòaⁿ ka-kī ê chú-lâng chòe kham-tit siū chhiong-hun ê chun-kèng, Siōng-tè ê miâ kap tō-lí chiah bōe siū siat-to̍k." 
1Timothy6:2 Chú-lâng nā-sī sìn Chú ê, m̄-thang in-ūi in sī Chú-lāi ê hiaⁿ-tī chiū bô kā in chun-kèng; kì-jiân tùi lô͘-lē ê ho̍k-sāi lâi tit-tio̍h lī-ek ê chú-lâng sī sìn-tô͘, mā-sī só͘ kèng-ài ê lâng, lín koh-khah tio̍h un-khûn kā in ho̍k-sāi. Lí tio̍h ēng chiah-ê sū lâi kà-sī kap khoàn-bián:" 
1Timothy6:3 Nā ū lâng kà pa̍t-khoán kàu-gī bô hû-ha̍p lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kiān-choân ê tō-lí, bô kun-kù khiân-sêng ê kàu-gī," 
1Timothy6:4 chiū-sī phòng-hong chū-tāi, oân-choân bû-ti, hò͘ⁿ piān-lūn, ài tī jī-bīn siōng cheng-lūn; tùi chiah-ê ín-khí oàn-tò͘, hun-cheng, húi-pòng, chhai-gî," 
1Timothy6:5 tì-kàu sim-su pāi-hoāi, sòng-sit chin-lí, hun-cheng bô-thêng; in siūⁿ-kóng chong-kàu sī thàn-chîⁿ ê chhiú-tōaⁿ." 
1Timothy6:6 Kèng-khiân koh ti-chiok ōe hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h tōa lī-ek. 
1Timothy6:7 Seng-put-tài-lâi, sú-put-tài-khì;" 
1Timothy6:8 ū thang chia̍h, ū thang chhēng, chiū tio̍h ti-chiok." 
1Timothy6:9 Siūⁿ-beh hoat-châi ê lâng ōe hām-lo̍h iú-he̍k, hām-chíⁿ, kap chin chōe khoán gû-gōng iú-hāi ê io̍k-bōng, hō͘ lâng tîm-lûn tì-kàu pāi-hoāi kap húi-bia̍t." 
1Timothy6:10 In-ūi tham-châi sī bān-ok ê kun-goân; ū lâng tham-ài chîⁿ-châi, siū bê phian-lī sìn-gióng, ka-kī siū-chīn khó͘-thàng." 
1Timothy6:11 M̄-kú lí chit-ê sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng, tio̍h siám-pī chiah-ê sū. Tio̍h tui-kiû chèng-gī, kèng-khiân, sìn-sim, jîn-ài, nāi-sim, kap un-jiû." 
1Timothy6:12 Sìn-gióng ê bí-hó kèng-sài tio̍h chīn-la̍t khì piàⁿ; tio̍h khak-pó éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā; ūi-tio̍h chit-ê oa̍h-miā lí ū siū kéng-tiàu, tī chin chōe kiàn-chèng-jîn ê bīn-chêng soan-jīn bí-hó ê sìn-gióng." 
1Timothy6:13 Tī sù oa̍h-miā hō͘ bān-mi̍h ê Siōng-tè, kap tùi Pâng-siu Pí-lia̍p-to soan-jīn bí-hó sìn-gióng ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ bīn-chêng," 
1Timothy6:14 góa hoan-hù lí tio̍h chun-siú só͘ niá-siū ê bēng-lēng, bô khoat-tiám, bô thang hiâm, ti̍t-kàu lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hián-hiān ê sî." 
1Timothy6:15 Tī sî-ki sêng-se̍k ê sî, hit-ūi eng-kai siū chheng-chàn to̍k-it-bû-jī ê Chú-cháiⁿ, bān-ông ê Ông, bān-chú ê Chú Siōng-tè, beh hō͘ I hián-hiān." 
1Timothy6:16 Siōng-tè sī to̍k-it bōe-sí, tiàm tī lâng bōe thang chiap-kūn ê kng-bêng tiong; bô lâng bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I, mā bô lâng ōe-tàng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I. Goān chun-kùi kap éng-oán ê chú-koân kui tī I. Amen!" 
1Timothy6:17 Tùi hiah-ê kim-sè hó-gia̍h ê lâng, lí tio̍h hoan-hù in m̄-thang kiau-ngō͘, m̄-thang chiong in ê ǹg-bāng khǹg tī bōe óa-khò,tit ê châi-bu̍t, tio̍h óa-khò chiong bān-mi̍h hong-hong-hù-hù hō͘ lán ta̍k-ê lâng hióng-siū ê Siōng-tè." 
1Timothy6:18 Tio̍h hoan-hù in chòe hó-sū, chòe khah chōe hó-sū, khóng-khài si-sià, kap lâng hun-hióng." 
1Timothy6:19 Án-ni chòe sī teh ūi ka-kī ê chiong-lâi khí-chō kian-kò͘ ê tōe-ki, khak-pó chin-chiàⁿ ê oa̍h-miā." 
1Timothy6:20 Thê-mô͘-thài ah, tio̍h chhî-siú Siōng-tè kau-thok lí ê chit-chek. Tio̍h siám-pī bô kèng-khiân ê khong-tâm kap ké tì-sek ê cheng-lūn." 
1Timothy6:21 Ū lâng chū-chheng ū chit-khoán tì-sek, tì-kàu sìn-gióng sit-lo̍h bo̍k-phiau. Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi!" 
2Timothy1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, hōng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê sù-tô͘, lâi thoân Siōng-tè só͘ èng-ún in-ūi kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân chiah ū ê oa̍h-miā." 
2Timothy1:2 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ Thê-mô͘-thài. Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù lí un-tián, lîn-bín, kap pêng-an!" 
2Timothy1:3 Góa kám-siā góa kap lia̍t-chó͘ kâng-khoán ēng chheng-khì ê liông-sim kèng-pài ê Siōng-tè. Góa mî-ji̍t kî-tó ê sî siàu-liām lí bô-soah. 
2Timothy1:4 Góa siūⁿ-tio̍h lī-pia̍t ê sî lí teh lâu ba̍k-sái, chiū chin ài kìⁿ lí, thang hō͘ góa chhiong-móa hoaⁿ-hí." 
2Timothy1:5 Góa ōe-kì-tit lí ū sûn-chin ê sìn-sim; chit-ê sìn-sim lí ê gōa-má Lô-í kap lí ê lāu-bú Iú-nî-ki seng ū, góa siong-sìn hiān-chāi lí mā ū." 
2Timothy1:6 In-ūi án-ni, góa thê-chhíⁿ lí, góa kā lí àn-chhiú ê sî Siōng-tè hō͘ lí ê un-sù, tio̍h hō͘ i chhin-chhiūⁿ hé koh to̍h,khí-lâi." 
2Timothy1:7 In-ūi Siōng-tè hō͘ lán ê m̄-sī kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê sim-lêng, sī khùi-la̍t, jîn-ài, kap chū-chè ê sim-lêng." 
2Timothy1:8 Só͘-í, ūi-tio̍h lán ê Chú chòe kiàn-chèng m̄-thang kám-kak kiàn-siàu, mā m̄-thang in-ūi góa ūi-tio̍h Chú chòe siû-hoān lâi kám-kak kiàn-siàu; tio̍h chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê khùi-la̍t ūi-tio̍h hok-im kap góa chòe-hé siū-khó͘." 
2Timothy1:9 Siōng-tè kiù lán, kéng-tiàu lán chòe I ka-kī ê chú-bîn, m̄-sī kun-kù lán ê hêng-ûi, sī chiàu I ka-kī ê chí-ì kap un-tián. Chit-ê un-tián tī bān-sè í-chêng thong-kè Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù hō͘ lán;" 
2Timothy1:10 chit-ê un-tián hiān-chāi thong-kè lán ê Kiù-chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê hián-hiān í-keng si̍t-hiān. Ki-tok í-keng húi-bia̍t sí-bông, koh thong-kè hok-im chiong bōe pāi-hoāi ê oa̍h-miā hián-bêng,chhut-lâi." 
2Timothy1:11 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê hok-im, Siōng-tè jīm-bēng góa chòe thoân-tō-chiá, sù-tô͘, kap kàu-su." 
2Timothy1:12 Só͘-í góa chiah teh siū-khó͘. Chóng-sī góa bô kám-kak kiàn-siàu, in-ūi góa bat góa só͘ sìn ê Siōng-tè, mā chhim-sìn I ōe pó-siú I só͘ kau-thok góa,ê ti̍t-kàu hit-ê Ji̍t." 
2Timothy1:13 Tio̍h ēng lí tùi góa thiaⁿ,tio̍h hiah-ê kiān-choân ê tō-lí chòe bô͘-iūⁿ, kian-chhî lán kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân lâi tit,tio̍h ê sìn-sim kap jîn-ài." 
2Timothy1:14 Tio̍h kò͘-siú thong-kè tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn ê Sèng Sîn kau-thok hō͘ lí ê bí-hó ê sìn-sit. 
2Timothy1:15 Lí chai, tī A-sè-a ê lâng lóng pōe-poān góa, kî-tiong ū Hui-kiat-lō͘ kap Hek-mô͘-kî-nî." 
2Timothy1:16 Goān Chú lîn-bín O-nî-sek-hut chi̍t ke ê lâng, in-ūi i siông-siông kā góa kó͘-lē, bô in-ūi góa kòa thih-liān kám-kak kiàn-siàu," 
2Timothy1:17 tian-tò kàu Lô-má ê sî phah-piàⁿ chhē góa chhē kàu tio̍h. 
2Timothy1:18 Goān Chú hō͘ i tī hit-ê Ji̍t tit-tio̍h lîn-bín! I tī Í-hut-só͘ hiah-ni̍h gâu ho̍k-sāi góa, lí chin chheng-chhó." 
2Timothy2:1 Só͘-í, góa ê kiáⁿ ah, lí tio̍h khò Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê un-tián kian-kiông,khí-lâi." 
2Timothy2:2 Lí tī chin chōe kiàn-chèng-jîn bīn-chêng tùi góa thiaⁿ-tio̍h chiah-ê kà-sī, tio̍h kau-thok hō͘ hiah-ê tiong-si̍t, mā ōe-kham-tit kà-sī pa̍t-lâng ê lâng." 
2Timothy2:3 Lí tio̍h choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê cheng-peng kap góa chòe-hé siū-khó͘. 
2Timothy2:4 Ho̍k-ia̍h ê peng nā beh hō͘ koaⁿ-tiúⁿ hoaⁿ-hí, chiū m̄-thang hō͘ seng-oa̍h ê tāi-chì tîⁿ-kha-pòaⁿ-chhiú." 
2Timothy2:5 Ūn-tōng-oân nā bô chiàu kui-chek pí-sài chiū bōe-tàng tit-tio̍h koan-kun ê hoa-koan. 
2Timothy2:6 Kut-la̍t chèng-choh ê lông-hu tong-jiân seng siu-sêng. 
2Timothy2:7 Góa só͘ kóng ê ōe lí tio̍h hó-hó-á siūⁿ, in-ūi Chú ōe hō͘ lí liáu-kái ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì." 
2Timothy2:8 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, I sī Tāi-pi̍t ê hō͘-tāi, Siōng-tè hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h; che sī góa só͘ thoân ê hok-im." 
2Timothy2:9 Góa ūi-tio̍h chit-ê hok-im siū-khó͘, sīm-chì chhin-chhiūⁿ hoān-lâng hō͘ lâng liān,teh; m̄-kú Siōng-tè ê ōe bô siū khún-pa̍k." 
2Timothy2:10 Só͘-í, góa ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè só͘ kéng-soán ê lâng jím-siū it-chhè, hō͘ in mā ōe tit-tio̍h Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê chín-kiù kap éng-oán ê êng-kng." 
2Timothy2:11 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn: Lán nā kap I tâng-sí, mā ōe kap I tâng-oa̍h." 
2Timothy2:12 Lán nā thun-lún, mā ōe kap I chòe-hé chiáng-koân. Lán nā m̄ jīn I, I mā ōe m̄ jīn lán." 
2Timothy2:13 Lán nā sit-sìn, I iû-goân sìn-si̍t, in-ūi I bōe-tàng ûi-pōe ka-kī." 
2Timothy2:14 Lí tio̍h thê-chhíⁿ tāi-ke, tī Chú ê bīn-chêng bēng-lēng in m̄-thang ūi-tio̍h giân-sû cheng-piān; án-ni chòe bô lī-ek, ōe hō͘ thiaⁿ ê lâng siū siong-hāi." 
2Timothy2:15 Tio̍h chīn-la̍t chòe, thang hō͘ Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe khó-chhú bô kiàn-siàu ê kang-lâng, chèng-khak kóe-seh chin-lí ê tō." 
2Timothy2:16 Tio̍h siám-pī chho͘-sio̍k bô lō͘-ēng ê ōe, in-ūi chit-khoán tāi-chì ōe hō͘ lâng ná bô kèng-khiân," 
2Timothy2:17 chit-khoán ê ōe ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ to̍k-chhng thòaⁿ-khui. Su-bí-nái kap Hui-lí-tô͘ mā-sī chit-khoán lâng; 
2Timothy2:18 in í-keng lī-khui chin-lí, kóng koh-oa̍h ê sū í-keng kè,khì, tì-kàu chi̍t-kóa lâng ê sìn-gióng oân-choân tó-hoāi." 
2Timothy2:19 Siōng-tè ê tōe-ki kian-kò͘ bōe iô-tāng, téng-bīn ū khek jī kóng, “Chú bat sio̍k I ê lâng”, koh kóng, “Kiû-kiò Chú ê miâ ê lâng lóng tio̍h lī-khui put-gī.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Tī tōa keng chhù-lāi, m̄-nā ū kim kap gûn, mā ū chhâ kap hûi ê khì-khū; ū ê chòe iù,ê, ū ê chòe chho͘ ê lō͘-ēng." 
2Timothy2:21 Lâng nā kiat-chēng ka-kī, lī-khui chiah-ê chho͘-sio̍k ê sū, chiū ōe chiâⁿ-chòe kùi-khì ê khì-khū, sèng-hòa hō͘ Chú-lâng ēng, thang chún-pī hó-sè chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū." 
2Timothy2:22 Tio̍h siám-pī siàu-liân lâng ê chêng-io̍k; tio̍h kap hiah-ê ēng chheng-khì ê sim kiû-kiò Chú ê lâng chòe-hé tui-kiû kong-gī, sìn-gióng, jîn-ài, kap hô-pêng." 
2Timothy2:23 M̄-thang ū gû-gōng bû-ti ê piān-lūn; lí chai chiah-ê tāi-chì ōe ín-khí oan-ke. 
2Timothy2:24 Chú ê po̍k-jîn bô eng-kai oan-ke, tio̍h un-hô tùi-thāi chèng-lâng, gâu kà-sī, gâu jím-siū," 
2Timothy2:25 un-jiû khoàn-kài hoán-tùi-chiá, kiám-chhái Siōng-tè ōe hō͘ in hóe-kái, bat chin-lí." 
2Timothy2:26 Án-ni in sui-jiân í-keng hō͘ Mô͘-kúi lia̍h-khì sūn-thàn i ê ì-sù, mā iáu ōe chhíⁿ-ngō͘ lâi thoat-lī i ê lô-bāng." 
2Timothy3:1 Tio̍h chai, sè-kài ê boa̍t-kî kàu ê sî ōe ū chióng-chióng ê khó͘-lān." 
2Timothy3:2 Hit-sî, lâng ōe chū-su, tham-châi, khoa-kháu, kiau-ngō͘, húi-pòng, ngó͘-ge̍k pē-bú, bông-un-pōe-gī, bô sèng-kiat," 
2Timothy3:3 bô chhin-chêng, chân-jím, tiòng-siong, hêng-ge̍k, hiong-pō, oàn-hūn hó," 
2Timothy3:4 kan-kúi, lām-sám chòe, chū-ko chū-tāi, ài hióng-lo̍k iâⁿ-kè thiàⁿ Siōng-tè," 
2Timothy3:5 ū kèng-khiân ê gōa-māu khiok bô kèng-khiân ê si̍t-chit. Lí tio̍h siám-pī chit-khoán lâng. 
2Timothy3:6 In tiong-kan ū lâng chhim-ji̍p lâng ê chhù, khòng-chè ì-chì po̍k-jio̍k ê hū-lú. Chiah-ê hū-lú siū chōe-ok ap-chè, hō͘ ta̍k-khoán ê chêng-io̍k chi-phòe;" 
2Timothy3:7 in put-sî to teh o̍h, khiok bô hoat-tō͘ bêng-pe̍k chin-lí." 
2Timothy3:8 Chhin-chhiūⁿ chá-chêng Ngá-nî kap Iông-pò͘-lûi hoán-tùi Mô͘-se, hiān-chāi chiah-ê lâng mā án-ni hoán-tùi chin-lí, tì-kàu sim-chì pāi-hoāi, sìn-gióng bô sûn-chin." 
2Timothy3:9 M̄-kú chiah-ê lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ hit nn̄g ê lâng, bōe ū sím-mi̍h éng-hióng, in-ūi in ê gû-gōng ōe tī chèng-lâng ê bīn-chêng po̍k-lō͘." 
2Timothy3:10 Lí ū o̍h góa só͘ kà-sī,ê, góa ê choh-lâng, seng-oa̍h ê bo̍k-phiau, sìn-sim, khoan-iông, thiàⁿ-sim, kian-jím," 
2Timothy3:11 í-ki̍p só͘ siū ê pek-hāi kap khó͘-lān, chiah-ê lí lóng chai, chiū-sī góa tī An-thê-o, Í-ko-liām, Lō͘-su-tek só͘ tú,tio̍h ê pek-hāi, góa án-chóaⁿ teh jím-siū; m̄-kú Chú ū kiù góa thoat-lī chiah-ê." 
2Timothy3:12 Só͘-ū ài-beh kap Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kiat-liân kè kèng-khiân seng-oa̍h ê lâng, it-tēng ōe tú-tio̍h pek-hāi." 
2Timothy3:13 Put-kò pháiⁿ-lâng kap khi-phiàn-lâng,ê ōe ná lâi ná pháiⁿ, in kā lâng phiàn, ka-kī mā hō͘ lâng phiàn." 
2Timothy3:14 Chóng-sī lí tio̍h chhî-siú só͘ ha̍k-si̍p só͘ chhim-sìn ê tō-lí, in-ūi lí chai chiah-ê sī tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng ha̍k-si̍p,ê." 
2Timothy3:15 Lí mā chai lí tùi sòe-hàn chiū bêng-pe̍k Sèng-keng, chit-ê Sèng-keng ōe-tàng hō͘ lí ū tì-hūi thang thong-kè sìn Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ tit-tio̍h chín-kiù." 
2Timothy3:16 Choân-pō͘ Sèng-keng sī Siōng-tè ê Sîn kám-tōng siá,ê, tùi kàu-tō, tùi tok-chek, tùi kiù-chèng, tùi hùn-liān lâng kiâⁿ chiàⁿ-lō͘, lóng ū lī-ek," 
2Timothy3:17 hō͘ ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè ê lâng chong-pī hó-sè, thang chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū." 
2Timothy4:1 Tī Siōng-tè kap teh-beh sím-phòaⁿ só͘-ū oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ bīn-chêng, koh in-ūi Ki-tok beh hián-hiān lâi choh-ông, góa sīn-tiōng hoan-hù lí:" 
2Timothy4:2 Tio̍h thoân tō-lí, bô-lūn sî-ki sek-ha̍p bô sek-ha̍p lóng tio̍h kian-chhî khì thoân; tio̍h ēng chòe tōa ê nāi-sim kap kàu-tō lâi khoàn-bián, tok-chek, kó͘-lē." 
2Timothy4:3 In-ūi sî-ki teh-beh kàu, hit-sî lâng thiaⁿ bōe lo̍h kiān-choân ê kà-sī, ng hī-khang m̄ thiaⁿ chin-lí, hoán-tńg thàn ka-kī ê su-io̍k, hī-khang chiūⁿ, phèng-chhiáⁿ chi̍t-ê koh chi̍t-ê kàu-su lâi kóng kah-ì thiaⁿ, bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat." 
2Timothy4:4  
2Timothy4:5 Chóng-sī lí hoān-sū tio̍h kín-sīn, jím-siū khó͘-lān, chòe thoân-tō-chiá ê kang-chok, chīn lí chòe Siōng-tè chhe-ēng ê pún-hūn." 
2Timothy4:6 Taⁿ góa hi-seng ka-kī hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè ê sî kàu lah; chit-chūn chiū-sī góa lī-khui sè-kan ê sî. 
2Timothy4:7 Bí-hó ê kèng-sài góa í-keng piàⁿ liáu; tio̍h cháu ê lō͘-thêng góa í-keng cháu oân; tio̍h siú ê sìn-gióng góa í-keng kian-siú. 
2Timothy4:8 Gī ê hoa-koan hiān-chāi í-keng ūi góa chún-pī hó-sè, Chú — kong-gī ê Sím-phòaⁿ-chiá tī hit-ê Ji̍t beh hō͘ góa; m̄-nā hō͘ góa, mā beh hō͘ lóng-chóng him-bō͘ I hián-hiān ê lâng." 
2Timothy4:9 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe kóaⁿ-kín lâi góa chia; 
2Timothy4:10 in-ūi Tí-má tham-ài hiān-sè, í-keng lī-khui góa khì Thiap-sat-lô-nî-ka; Kek-le̍k-sū mā í-keng khì Ka-lia̍p-thài, Thê-to khì That-má-thài." 
2Timothy4:11 Chí-ū Lō͘-ka kap góa chòe-hé tī chia. Lí tio̍h chhōa Má-khó chòe-hé lâi, in-ūi i tùi góa ê sū-hōng chin ū pang-chān." 
2Timothy4:12 Góa í-keng phài Chhui-ki-kó͘ khì Í-hut-só͘. 
2Timothy4:13 Góa tī Te̍k-lô-a lâu tī Ka-pò͘ in tau hit-niá gōa-saⁿ, lí lâi ê sî tio̍h tòa,lâi, mā tio̍h tòa hiah-ê chheh lâi, te̍k-pia̍t sī hiah-ê iûⁿ-phê ê chheh-kǹg." 
2Timothy4:14 Phah-tâng sai-hū A-le̍k-san-tāi kā góa hāi kah chin chhám; Chú ōe chiàu i ê só͘-chòe kā i pò-èng. 
2Timothy4:15 Lí ka-kī mā tio̍h tî-hông, in-ūi i ke̍k-le̍k hoán-tùi lán só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit." 
2Timothy4:16 Góa thâu chi̍t piàn sin-sò͘ ê sî bô lâng tī sin-piⁿ pang-chān góa, ta̍k-ê lóng kā góa pàng-sak. Goān chit-ê chōe bô kui tī in." 
2Timothy4:17 M̄-kú Chú ū khiā tī góa sin-piⁿ, hō͘ góa ū khùi-la̍t thang oân-chéng thoân-iông sìn-sit, hō͘ só͘-ū ê Gōa-pang-lâng lóng thiaⁿ,kìⁿ. Chòe-āu góa ū tùi sai ê chhùi siū kiù chhut." 
2Timothy4:18 Chú ōe kiù góa thoat-lī lóng-chóng ê pháiⁿ-tāi, mā ōe kiù góa chìn-ji̍p I thiⁿ,ni̍h ê Kok-tō͘. Goān êng-kng kui I, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
2Timothy4:19 Chhiáⁿ kā Pek-ki-la, A-ku-la, kap O-nî-sek-hut choân-ke chhéng-an." 
2Timothy4:20 Í-la-to͘ kè-sio̍k tiàm tī Ko-lîm-to; Te̍k-lô-hui-mô͘ phòa-pīⁿ, góa kā i lâu tī Bí-lī-to͘." 
2Timothy4:21 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe tī tang-thiⁿ í-chêng lâi. Iú-pò͘-lô, Pò͘-tiân, Lī-ló͘, Kek-ló-tí-a, kap chèng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē lóng beh kā lí chhéng-an." 
2Timothy4:22 Goān Chú kap lí ê sim-lêng tông-chāi! Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tông-chāi! 
Titus1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, choh Siōng-tè ê po̍k-jîn kap Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘, siū soán-phài pang-chān Siōng-tè soán-bîn ê sìn-gióng, hō͘ in jīn-bat ha̍h tī kèng-khiân ê chin-lí;" 
Titus1:2 chit-ê chin-lí hō͘ lán tùi éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā ū ǹg-bāng, chiū-sī bōe kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ê Siōng-tè tī bān-sè í-chêng èng-ún beh hō͘ lán,ê." 
Titus1:3 I tī sî-ki sêng-se̍k ê sî, thong-kè sìn-sit ê soan-káng chiong chit-ê èng-ún hián-bêng,chhut-lâi. Góa ū siū-thok, hōng lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng soan-káng chit-ê hok-im." 
Titus1:4 Thê-to, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lí, tī lán kiōng-tông ê sìn-gióng lí sī góa chin ê kiáⁿ. Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap lán ê Kiù-chú Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ sù lí un-tián kap pêng-an!" 
Titus1:5 Góa kā lí lâu tī Khek-lí-te̍k, sī beh hō͘ lí chhú-lí iáu-bē pān chheng-chhó ê tāi-chì, koh chiàu góa só͘ chí-sī, tī ta̍k-ê siâⁿ-chhī soán-phài lâng chòe tiúⁿ-ló." 
Titus1:6 Choh tiúⁿ-ló,ê tio̍h bô thang chí-chek, chí-ū chi̍t ê bó͘, kiáⁿ-jî lóng sī sìn-tô͘, koh bô lâng khòng-kò sī hòng-tōng á-sī m̄ sūn-ho̍k." 
Titus1:7 Kàu-hōe ê kam-tok, kì-jiân choh Siōng-tè ê koán-ke, it-tēng tio̍h bô thang chí-chek, bô chū-ko, bô pháiⁿ sèng-tē, bô chiú-chùi, bô hiong-pō, bô tham-châi." 
Titus1:8 Tio̍h gâu khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng, gâu chòe hó-sū, siú-kí, chèng-ti̍t, sèng-kiat, chiat-chè." 
Titus1:9 I tio̍h kian-siú hit-ê khó-khò hû-ha̍p kàu-gī ê sìn-sit, án-ni chiah ōe-tàng ēng kiān-choân ê kà-sī khoàn-bián lâng, piān-tó hoán-tùi ê lâng." 
Titus1:10 In-ūi ū chin chōe m̄ sūn-ho̍k ê lâng, te̍k-pia̍t sī hiah-ê chú-tiuⁿ tio̍h siū kat-lé ê lâng, in ài kóng bô lō͘-ēng ê ōe, koh khi-phiàn lâng." 
Titus1:11 Chit-khoán lâng it-tēng tio̍h kìm-chí in kóng-ōe, in-ūi in ūi-tio̍h beh tham put-gī ê chîⁿ-châi, ēng bô eng-kai kà-sī ê ōe phò-hoāi chi̍t-kóa ka-têng." 
Titus1:12 In Khek-lí-te̍k -lâng ū chi̍t ê sian-ti bat án-ni kóng, “ Khek-lí-te̍k -lâng ài kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, sī hiong-ok ê iá-siù, tham-chia̍h koh pîn-tōaⁿ.”" 
Titus1:13 I kóng,ê sī sū-si̍t. Só͘-í lí tio̍h giâm-keh kā in chek-pī, thang hō͘ in ū kiān-choân ê sìn-gióng," 
Titus1:14 bô thiaⁿ-thàn Iû-thài -lâng bô-iáⁿ-chiah ê thoân-soat kap pōe-ge̍k chin-lí ê lâng ê kui-lē. 
Titus1:15 Tùi chheng-khì ê lâng lâi kóng, it-chhè lóng chheng-khì; m̄-kú tùi ù-òe kap m̄-sìn ê lâng lâi kóng, bô chi̍t hāng sī chheng-khì, in-ūi in ê sim-su kap liông-ti lóng sī ù-òe." 
Titus1:16 In kong-khai kóng bat Siōng-tè, khiok ēng hêng-ûi hó͘-jīn I. In khó-ò͘ⁿ, pōe-ge̍k, bōe-tàng chòe sím-mi̍h hó-sū." 
Titus2:1 Chóng-sī lí, lí ê kàu-tō tio̍h hû-ha̍p kiān-choân ê kàu-gī." 
Titus2:2 Tio̍h khǹg lāu-lâng ài chiat-chè, ū hó phín-keh, siú-kí, tio̍h ū kiān-choân ê sìn-sim, thiàⁿ-sim, kap nāi-sim." 
Titus2:3 Lí mā tio̍h án-ni khǹg lāu hū-jîn-lâng hêng-ûi kín-sīn, m̄-thang kóng lâng ê sī-hui, m̄-thang choh chiú ê lô͘-châi, tio̍h ēng hó bô͘-hoān kà-sī lâng," 
Titus2:4 chiah thang hùn-liān siàu-liân hū-jîn-lâng thiàⁿ tiōng-hu, kap thiàⁿ kiáⁿ-jî," 
Titus2:5 koh tio̍h siú-kí, cheng-kiat, gâu lí-ke, chhin-chhiat, sūn-ho̍k tiōng-hu, Siōng-tè ê tō-lí chiah bōe siū húi-pòng." 
Titus2:6 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lí mā tio̍h khó͘-khǹg siàu-liân ta-po͘-lâng siú-kí." 
Titus2:7 Lí ka-kī hoān-sū tio̍h ū hó hêng-ûi choh hó bô͘-hoān, sêng-khún ún-tiōng kà-sī lâng," 
Titus2:8 giân-sû toan-chèng, bô thang chí-chek, hō͘ hoán-tùi ê lâng bô thang kóng lán ê pháiⁿ-ōe, ka-kī soah kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
Titus2:9 Choh lô͘-lē,ê tio̍h sūn-ho̍k ka-kī ê chú-lâng, sū-sū hō͘ in hoaⁿ-hí; m̄-thang ìn-chhùi-ìn-chi̍h;" 
Titus2:10 m̄-thang thau-the̍h, tio̍h sū-sū tiong-si̍t liông-siān, hō͘ lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè ê kà-sī tī ta̍k hong-bīn koh-khah ū kong-chhái." 
Titus2:11 In-ūi Siōng-tè í-keng hián-bêng I ê un-tián beh chín-kiù choân jîn-lūi," 
Titus2:12 hùn-liān lán khì-sak bô kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h kap sio̍k-sè ê io̍k-bōng, tī hiān-kim ê sî-tāi kè siú-kí, chèng-ti̍t, kap kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h," 
Titus2:13 thèng-hāu hit-ê chhiong-móa hok-khì ê ǹg-bāng, chiū-sī chì-chun ê Siōng-tè í-ki̍p lán ê Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok êng-iāu ê hián-hiān." 
Titus2:14 Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán hiàn ka-kī, sī beh kiù-sio̍k lán thoat-lī it-chhè ê chōe-ok, hō͘ lán chiâⁿ-chòe I sûn-kiat ê chú-bîn kui-sio̍k I, jia̍t-sim chòe hó-sū." 
Titus2:15 Chiah-ê sū, lí tio̍h kóng, tio̍h khoàn-bián, chhiong-hun ūn-iōng chit-koân chek-pī lâng. M̄-thang hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-khin." 
Titus3:1 Tio̍h thê-chhíⁿ tāi-ke ho̍k-chiông chip-chèng-chiá kap tong-koân-chiá, thang chún-pī hó-sè chòe ta̍k-hāng hó-sū." 
Titus3:2 Tio̍h khǹg in m̄-thang húi-pòng pa̍t-lâng, m̄-thang oan-ke; tio̍h hô-khì iú-siān, ēng un-hô ê thài-tō͘ tùi-thāi só͘-ū ê lâng." 
Titus3:3 In-ūi lán ka-kī í-chêng mā-sī bô tì-sek, pōe-ge̍k, kiâⁿ bê-lō͘, choh chióng-chióng chêng-io̍k kap hióng-lo̍k ê lô͘-lē, tī ok-to̍k kap oàn-tò͘ tiong teh tō͘-ji̍t, hō͘-siōng oàn-hūn, pí-chhú iàm-ò͘ⁿ." 
Titus3:4 M̄-kú lán ê Kiù-chú Siōng-tè chû-pi jîn-ài hián-bêng ê sî," 
Titus3:5 I ū chín-kiù lán; m̄-sī in-ūi lán ka-kī ū hó hêng-ûi, sī in-ūi I ū lîn-bín, thong-kè hō͘ lâng têng-sin chhut-sì ê sóe-lé kap Sèng Sîn ê keng-sin chín-kiù lán;" 
Titus3:6 thong-kè lán ê Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok Siōng-tè ū chiong Sèng Sîn hong-hong-hù-hù kā lán koàn-ak," 
Titus3:7 hō͘ lán thang khò I ê un-tián chheng-chòe gī, sêng-siū só͘ ǹg-bāng éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Titus3:8 Chit-kù ōe thang siong-sìn. Góa ài lí te̍k-pia̍t kiông-tiau chiah-ê sū, thang hō͘ sìn Siōng-tè ê lâng choân-sim chòe hó-sū; chiah-ê sū lóng chin hó, koh tùi lâng ū lī-ek." 
Titus3:9 Tio̍h siám-pī gû-gōng ê cheng-lūn, cho̍k-phó͘, hun-cheng, kap Lu̍t-hoat ê cheng-chip, in-ūi chiah-ê lóng bô lō͘-ēng, bô kè-ta̍t." 
Titus3:10 Chè-chō hun-cheng ê lâng, kā i kéng-kò chi̍t nn̄g piàn í-āu chiū m̄-thang koh kap i lâi-óng." 
Titus3:11 Lí chai, chit-khoán lâng í-keng pāi-hoāi; i kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe sī teh kā ka-kī tēng-chōe." 
Titus3:12 Góa chhe A-thê-má á-sī Chhui-ki-kó͘ khì lí hia ê sî, tio̍h kóaⁿ-kín lâi Nî-ko-pho-lí chhē góa, in-ūi góa í-keng koat-tēng beh tī hia kè tang-thiⁿ." 
Titus3:13 Tio̍h chīn só͘-ōe pang-chān Se-la̍p lu̍t-su kap A-pho-lô lú-thêng ê su-iàu, hō͘ in thang an-sim chhut-hoat." 
Titus3:14 Tio̍h hoan-hù lán ka-kī ê lâng ha̍k-si̍p chòe hó-sū lâi kiong-kip si̍t-chè ê su-iàu, chiah bián chòe bô lō͘-ēng ê lâng." 
Titus3:15 Só͘-ū kap góa tī chia ê lâng beh kā lí chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe goán kā hiah-ê tâng-sìn ê hó pêng-iú chhéng-an. Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi! 
Philemon1:1 Góa sī Pó-lô, choh Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê siû-hoān; góa kap lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Thê-mô͘-thài siá-phoe hō͘ goán só͘ thiàⁿ ê tâng-kang Hui-lī-bûn," 
Philemon1:2 goán ê chí-bē A-hui-a, goán ê chiàn-iú A-ki-pò͘, í-ki̍p tī lí ê chhù teh chū-hōe ê kàu-hōe." 
Philemon1:3 Goān lán ê Pē Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! 
Philemon1:4 Góa ta̍k-piàn kî-tó ê sî lóng ū siūⁿ-tio̍h lí, siông-siông kám-siā góa ê Siōng-tè;" 
Philemon1:5 in-ūi góa ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h lí tùi Siōng-tè só͘-ū ê chú-bîn ū thiàⁿ-sim, tùi Chú Iâ-so͘ ū sìn-sim." 
Philemon1:6 Góa khún-kiû Siōng-tè, thong-kè goán kap lín hun-hióng sìn-gióng, ōe-tàng chhiok-chìn lán tùi kap Ki-tok kiat-liân só͘ tit,tio̍h it-chhè ê chiok-hok, ū khah chhim ê liáu-kái." 
Philemon1:7 Hiaⁿ-tī ah, lí ê thiàⁿ-sim ū hō͘ góa chin tōa ê hoaⁿ-hí kap kó͘-lē! Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn lóng ū tùi lí tit-tio̍h kek-lē." 
Philemon1:8 Góa khò Ki-tok sui-jiân ōe-tàng hó-táⁿ bēng-lēng lí chòe eng-kai chòe ê tāi-chì," 
Philemon1:9 m̄-kú, in-ūi thiàⁿ ê iân-kò͘ góa lêng-khó kā lí kiû. Góa Pó-lô í-keng nî-lāu, hiān-chāi iáu-sī Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ ê siû-hoān." 
Philemon1:10 Góa thòe O-nî-se-bô͘ kā lí kiû, i sī góa koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê sî só͘ siⁿ,ê." 
Philemon1:11 I í-chêng tùi lí lóng bô lō͘-ēng, hiān-chāi tùi lí tùi góa lóng chin ū lō͘-ēng." 
Philemon1:12 Hiān-chāi góa sàng i tńg-khì lí hia; i sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ-sioh,ê. 
Philemon1:13 Góa goân-lâi siūⁿ-beh kā i lâu tī sin-piⁿ, thang tī góa ūi-tio̍h hok-im chòe siû-hoān ê tiong-kan thòe lí ho̍k-sāi góa;" 
Philemon1:14 m̄-kú bô lí ê tông-ì, góa mài án-ni chòe khah hó, hō͘ lí só͘ chòe ê hó-sū m̄-sī bián-kióng, sī kam-sim lo̍k-ì." 
Philemon1:15 Kiám-chhái in-ūi án-ni, O-nî-se-bô͘ tio̍h chiām-sî lī-khui lí, sī beh hō͘ lí éng-kiú kā i lâu,teh;" 
Philemon1:16 bô koh sī lô͘-lē, sin-hūn chhiau-kè lô͘-lē, sī só͘ thiàⁿ ê hiaⁿ-tī. Tùi góa lâi kóng te̍k-pia̍t sī án-ni, tùi lí lâi kóng koh-khah sī án-ni; i m̄-nā sī lí ke-lāi ê lâng, mā-sī Chú-lāi ê hiaⁿ-tī." 
Philemon1:17 Só͘-í, lí nā khòaⁿ góa chòe tâng-phōaⁿ, chiū tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ chiap-la̍p góa án-ni kā i chiap-la̍p." 
Philemon1:18 I nā ū tùi lí chòe sím-mi̍h m̄-tio̍h, á-sī ū khiàm lí sím-mi̍h, sǹg góa ê siàu." 
Philemon1:19 Góa Pó-lô chhin-chhiú siá: Góa hū-chek hêng. Góa eng-kai m̄-bián kā lí thê-chhíⁿ, lí khiàm,góa-ê sī lí pún-sin." 
Philemon1:20 Sī lah, hiaⁿ-tī, in-ūi Chú ê iân-kò͘, kā góa tàu-saⁿ-kāng chi̍t-ē, hō͘ góa ê sim khò Ki-tok tit-tio̍h kek-lē." 
Philemon1:21 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ lí, in-ūi khak-sìn lí ōe thiaⁿ góa ê iau-kiû; kî-si̍t, góa chai lí ōe chòe pí góa kóng,ê koh-khah chōe." 
Philemon1:22 Mā tio̍h kā góa chún-pī chi̍t keng pâng-keng, in-ūi góa ǹg-bāng Siōng-tè ōe thiaⁿ lín ê kî-tó, hō͘ góa ōe-tàng khì lín hia." 
Philemon1:23 Ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok Iâ-so͘ kap góa tâng choh siû-hoān ê Í-pa-hut beh kā lín chhéng-an. 
Philemon1:24 Góa ê tâng-kang Má-khó, A-lí-ta̍t-kó͘, Tí-má, Lō͘-ka mā beh kā lín chhéng-an." 
Philemon1:25 Goān Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián kap lín ê sim-lêng tông-chāi! 
Hebrews1:1 Siōng-tè tī kó͘-chá ū thong-kè I ê chèng sian-ti, chin chōe piàn, ēng chin chōe hong-sek tùi lán ê chó͘-sian kóng-ōe," 
Hebrews1:2 m̄-kú tī chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí, thong-kè I ê Kiáⁿ tùi lán kóng-ōe. Siōng-tè ū chí-tēng I choh bān-iú ê kè-sêng-jîn, koh ū thong-kè I chhòng-chō ú-tiū." 
Hebrews1:3 I hoán-siā Siōng-tè ê êng-iāu, sī Siōng-tè pún-chit ê chin-siōng. I ēng I koân-lêng ê ōe hû-chhî bān-iú, sóe-tû lâng ê chōe liáu-āu, chē tī Chì-chun Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Hebrews1:4 Siōng-tè ū sù Kiáⁿ pí chèng thiⁿ-sài khah chun-kùi ê miâ, hō͘ I chiâⁿ-chòe pí thiⁿ-sài khah úi-tāi." 
Hebrews1:5 Siōng-tè m̄-bat tùi jīm-hô chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Lí sī góa ê Kiáⁿ, góa kin-á-ji̍t siⁿ lí. I mā m̄-bat tùi jīm-hô chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Góa beh chòe i ê Pē, i beh chòe góa ê Kiáⁿ." 
Hebrews1:6 Koh Siōng-tè chhe-khián I ê Tōa-kiáⁿ ji̍p sè-kan ê sî, I kóng: Siōng-tè só͘-ū ê thiⁿ-sài lóng tio̍h pài I." 
Hebrews1:7 Koan-hē thiⁿ-sài, I kóng: Siōng-tè ēng hong chòe I ê thiⁿ-sài, ēng hé-iām chòe I ê chhe-ēng." 
Hebrews1:8 M̄-kú koan-hē Kiáⁿ, I kóng: Siōng-tè ah, lí ê pó-chō éng-éng-oán-oán chûn-chāi; lí ê Kok ê koân-pèng sī chèng-ti̍t ê koân-pèng." 
Hebrews1:9 Lí ì-ài kong-gī, oàn-hūn put-hoat. Só͘-í, Siōng-tè — lí ê Siōng-tè kéng-soán lí, ēng hoaⁿ-hí ê iû boah lí, chhiau-kè boah lí ê tâng-phōaⁿ." 
Hebrews1:10 I koh kóng: Chú ah, lí tī khí-thâu kā tōe hē tōe-ki; thiⁿ mā-sī lí chhin-chhiú chhòng-chō." 
Hebrews1:11 Thiⁿ-tōe lóng ōe siau-sit, m̄-kú lí éng-oán chûn-chāi. Thiⁿ-tōe lóng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ i-ho̍k chiām-chiām kū," 
Hebrews1:12 lí ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ kńg gōa-saⁿ kā in kńg,khí-lâi; in ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ i-ho̍k kái-piàn. M̄-kú lí éng-oán bōe kái-piàn; lí ê hè-siū bû-kiông-chīn. 
Hebrews1:13 Siōng-tè kiám bat tùi tó chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Lí chē góa ê chiàⁿ-pêng, thèng-hāu góa hō͘ lí ê tùi-te̍k khut-ho̍k tī lí kha-ē?" 
Hebrews1:14 Thiⁿ-sài lóng sī teh ho̍k-sāi ê sîn, siū chhe-phài khì ho̍k-bū teh-beh niá-siū chín-kiù ê lâng." 
Hebrews2:1 Só͘-í, lán it-tēng tio̍h koh-khah tì-ì só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit, chiah bián phian-lī chin-tō." 
Hebrews2:2 In-ūi thong-kè thiⁿ-sài só͘ thoân ê sìn-sit nā ū kong-hāu, pōe-ge̍k bô sūn-chiông ê lâng tio̍h siū èng-siū ê hêng-hoa̍t;" 
Hebrews2:3 án-ni lán hut-lio̍k chiah-ni̍h tōa ê chín-kiù, beh ná ōe-tàng siám-pī tio̍h siū ê hêng-hoa̍t? Chú pún-sin ū tāi-seng soan-pò͘ chit-ê chín-kiù, thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng mā ū tùi lán chèng-si̍t chit-ê sū." 
Hebrews2:4 Siōng-tè koh ū ēng sîn-jiah, kî-sū, ta̍k-khoán tōa koân-lêng ê chok-ûi, kap chiàu I ka-kī ê ì-sù só͘ hun-phòe Sèng Sîn ê un-sù chòe-hé choh-chèng." 
Hebrews2:5 Siōng-tè bô chiong lán só͘ kóng chit-ê chiong-lâi ê sè-kài kau hō͘ thiⁿ-sài koán-lí. 
Hebrews2:6 M̄-kú Sèng-keng ū chi̍t ê só͘-chāi choh-chèng kóng: Lâng sǹg sím-mi̍h, lí hiah-ni̍h koan-sim? Sè-kan-lâng sǹg sím-mi̍h, lí hiah-ni̍h chiàu-kò͘?" 
Hebrews2:7 Lí hō͘ i pí thiⁿ-sài sió-khóa khah kē; lí sù êng-kng chun-kùi chòe hoa-koan kā i tì," 
Hebrews2:8 hō͘ bān-iú lóng hâng-ho̍k tī i kha-ē. Siōng-tè kì-jiân hō͘ bān-iú lóng hâng-ho̍k i, chiū bô chi̍t hāng bô hâng-ho̍k i. M̄-kú kàu hiān-chāi lán iáu-bē khòaⁿ-kìⁿ bān-iú lóng hâng-ho̍k i." 
Hebrews2:9 Lán khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ūi pí thiⁿ-sài sió-khóa khah kē ê Iâ-so͘ í-keng keng-kè sí ê thòng-khó͘, tit-tio̍h êng-kng chun-kùi ê hoa-koan; án-ni I khò Siōng-tè ê un-tián thang ūi-tio̍h chèng-lâng sí." 
Hebrews2:10 Hit-ūi chhòng-chō koh î-chhî bān-iú ê Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h beh chhōa chin chōe kiáⁿ-jî chìn-ji̍p êng-kng, chiah tio̍h hō͘ chín-kiù ê khai-thok-chiá Iâ-so͘ keng-kè khó͘-lān chiâⁿ-chòe oân-choân." 
Hebrews2:11 Sū-si̍t, hō͘ lâng chiâⁿ-sèng,ê kap tit-tio̍h chiâⁿ-sèng,ê, lóng tùi kâng chi̍t ê goân-thâu chhut, in-ūi án-ni, Iâ-so͘ chheng-ho͘ in chòe hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē ia̍h bô kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
Hebrews2:12 I tùi Siōng-tè kóng: Góa beh tùi góa ê hiaⁿ-tī kap chí-bē pò-iông lí ê miâ, tī in ê chū-hōe tiong gîm-si o-ló lí." 
Hebrews2:13 I koh kóng: Góa beh sìn-khò I; iā kóng: Khòaⁿ leh, góa kap Siōng-tè sù hō͘ góa ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng tī chia." 
Hebrews2:14 Kì-jiân chiah-ê kiáⁿ-jî sī ū-huih-ū-bah ê lâng, I pún-sin mā kap in siâng-khoán chiâⁿ-chòe ū-huih-ū-bah ê lâng, thang thong-kè I ê sí húi-bia̍t hit-ê chiáng-koán sí-bông ê Mô͘-kúi," 
Hebrews2:15 koh tháu-pàng hiah-ê in-ūi sí-bông ê kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ it-seng chòe lô͘-châi ê lâng. 
Hebrews2:16 Tong-jiân, I teh koan-sim,ê m̄-sī thiⁿ-sài, sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun." 
Hebrews2:17 Só͘-í, I tī ta̍k hong-bīn tio̍h kap I ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē kâng-khoán, thang tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng choh jîn-chû tiong-sìn ê Tōa-chè-si, thang hō͘ chèng-lâng ê chōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
Hebrews2:18 In-ūi I ka-kī ū siū-khó͘, siū khó-giām, I ōe-tàng pang-chān hiah-ê siū chhì-thàm ê lâng." 
Hebrews3:1 Só͘-í, lín tâng siū Siōng-tè soán-tiàu sèng ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tio̍h siūⁿ lán só͘ soan-jīn hit-ūi choh sù-chiá, choh Tōa-chè-si ê Iâ-so͘." 
Hebrews3:2 I tùi chí-phài I ê Siōng-tè chīn-tiong, tú kap Mô͘-se tī Siōng-tè ê ke chīn-tiong kâng-khoán." 
Hebrews3:3 Khí-chhù ê lâng pí i khí ê chhù khah chun-kùi; án-ni, Iâ-so͘ pí Mô͘-se eng-kai siū koh-khah tōa ê êng-kng." 
Hebrews3:4 Só͘-ū ê chhù lóng sī lâng khí,ê, m̄-kú khí-chō bān-mi̍h,ê sī Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews3:5 Mô͘-se choh po̍k-jîn, tùi Siōng-tè ê choân-ke chīn-tiong, ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè āu-lâi só͘ beh kóng ê ōe choh-chèng;" 
Hebrews3:6 m̄-kú, Ki-tok choh Kiáⁿ tī-lí Siōng-tè ê ke. Tùi só͘ ǹg-bāng,ê, lán nā ēng khak-sìn kap ióng-khì lâi chhî-siú, lán chiū-sī Siōng-tè ke-lāi ê lâng." 
Hebrews3:7 Só͘-í, chiàu Sèng Sîn só͘ kóng: Kin-á-ji̍t lín nā thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê siaⁿ," 
Hebrews3:8 m̄-thang ngī-sim, chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê chó͘-sian tī pōe-ge̍k ê sî, tī khòng-iá chhì-thàm I ê ji̍t." 
Hebrews3:9 Siōng-tè kóng: Lín ê chó͘-sian sui-jiân ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h góa ê chok-ûi, in iû-goân tī hia chhì-thàm góa, khó-giām góa" 
Hebrews3:10 sì-cha̍p nî kú. Só͘-í, góa tùi hit sè-tāi ê lâng siū-khì, kóng: In ê sim sit-bê; in m̄ bat góa ê tō-lō͘." 
Hebrews3:11 Góa tī siū-khì tiong li̍p-sè, kóng: In choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p góa só͘ sù ê an-hioh." 
Hebrews3:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tio̍h chù-ì, chiah bián lín tiong-kan ū lâng sim siâ-ok m̄ sìn, tì-kàu lī-khui éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews3:13 Tio̍h thàn iáu ū hit-ê kiò-chòe “kin-á-ji̍t” ê sî, ji̍t-ji̍t saⁿ khoàn-bián, lín tiong-kan chiah bián ū lâng siū chōe-ok bê-he̍k tì-kàu ngī-sim." 
Hebrews3:14 Lán nā kian-siú tong-chho͘ ê khak-sìn kàu lō͘-bé, chiū chiâⁿ-chòe Ki-tok ê tâng-kang." 
Hebrews3:15 Sèng-keng án-ni kóng: Kin-á-ji̍t lín nā thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê siaⁿ, m̄-thang ngī-sim, chhin-chhiūⁿ lín ê chó͘-sian tī pōe-ge̍k ê sî án-ni." 
Hebrews3:16 Thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè ê siaⁿ iáu-kú pōe-ge̍k I ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Kiám m̄-sī hiah-ê Mô͘-se tùi Ai-ki̍p chhōa,chhut-lâi só͘-ū ê lâng? 
Hebrews3:17 Siōng-tè tī hit sì-cha̍p nî kú tùi sím-mi̍h-lâng hoat siū-khì? Kiám m̄-sī hiah-ê in-ūi hoān-chōe sí tī khòng-iá ê lâng? 
Hebrews3:18 Hiah-ê pōe-ge̍k ê lâng í-gōa, Siōng-tè kiám bat tùi lâng li̍p-sè kóng, in bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p I só͘ sù ê an-hioh?" 
Hebrews3:19 Án-ni, in bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p an-hioh sī in-ūi in m̄ sìn." 
Hebrews4:1 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè hō͘ lâng chìn-ji̍p an-hioh ê èng-ún iáu lâu,teh, lán tio̍h sió-sim, chiah bián lín tiong-kan ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng in tit bōe tio̍h chit-ê èng-ún." 
Hebrews4:2 Hok-im pîⁿ-pîⁿ ū thoân hō͘ in, mā ū thoân hō͘ lán; m̄-kú in só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê sìn-sit tùi in bô lī-ek, in-ūi in hiah-ê thiaⁿ ê lâng bô ēng sìn-sim niá-siū." 
Hebrews4:3 Lán chiah-ê sìn ê lâng ōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p Siōng-tè só͘ sù ê an-hioh, chiàu I kóng,ê: Góa tī siū-khì tiong li̍p-sè, kóng: In choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p góa só͘ sù ê an-hioh! Kî-si̍t Siōng-tè chhòng-chō ú-tiū ê sî, I ê kang-chok í-keng oân-sêng." 
Hebrews4:4 Koan-hē tē-chhit ji̍t, Sèng-keng chi̍t ê só͘-chāi ū án-ni kóng, “Siōng-tè tī tē-chhit ji̍t soah I it-chhè ê kang-chok lâi an-hioh.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Kâng chit-ê só͘-chāi ū koh kóng, “In choa̍t-tùi bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p góa só͘ sù ê an-hioh.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Kì-jiân tāi-seng thiaⁿ-tio̍h hok-im ê lâng in-ūi m̄ sūn-thàn bōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p an-hioh, Siōng-tè chiū ūi-tio̍h kî-tha ê lâng pó-liû chit-ê an-hioh." 
Hebrews4:7 Chin kú í-āu, tī Tāi-pi̍t ê chheh ū kì-chài, Siōng-tè siat-tēng chi̍t ji̍t kiò-chòe “kin-á-ji̍t”, chhin-chhiūⁿ téng-bīn kóng,ê: Kin-á-ji̍t lín nā thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê siaⁿ, m̄-thang ngī-sim." 
Hebrews4:8 Iok-su-a nā ū hō͘ in an-hioh, Siōng-tè chiū bōe tī āu-lâi koh kóng-khí pa̍t-ê ji̍t." 
Hebrews4:9 Án-ni, Siōng-tè iáu ūi-tio̍h I ê chú-bîn pó-liû chi̍t ê An-hioh-ji̍t ê an-hioh." 
Hebrews4:10 In-ūi chìn-ji̍p Siōng-tè só͘ sù an-hioh ê lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ Siōng-tè soah I ê kang-chok, mā soah in it-chhè ê kang-chok." 
Hebrews4:11 Só͘-í, lán tio̍h lô-le̍k chìn-ji̍p chit-ê an-hioh, chiah bián ū lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ hiah-ê m̄ sūn-ho̍k ê lâng poa̍h-tó sit-pāi." 
Hebrews4:12 Siōng-tè ê ōe sī oa̍h,ê, sī ū kong-hāu,ê, pí it-chhè siang-bīn-lāi ê kiàm khah lāi, ōe-tàng chhah-ji̍p, sīm-chì phòa-khui lâng ê lêng kap hûn, koan-chat kap kut-chhé, koh ōe-tàng phòaⁿ-toàn lâng sim-lāi ê io̍k-bōng kap ì-liām." 
Hebrews4:13 Só͘-ū pī-chō-bu̍t bô chi̍t hāng ōe-tàng tùi Siōng-tè ún-ba̍t; it-chhè lóng oân-choân po̍k-lō͘ tī I ê ba̍k-chiu chêng. Lán khiàm I ê siàu lóng tio̍h sǹg chheng-chhó. 
Hebrews4:14 Kì-jiân lán ū chi̍t ūi úi-tāi ê Tōa-chè-si — Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘, I í-keng chiūⁿ-thiⁿ kàu Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng, lán tio̍h kian-siú só͘ soan-jīn ê sìn-gióng." 
Hebrews4:15 Lán chit-ūi Tōa-chè-si m̄-sī bōe thé-thiap lán ê loán-jio̍k; I tī ta̍k hong-bīn lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ lán ū siū chhì-thàm, put-kò bô hoān-chōe." 
Hebrews4:16 Só͘-í, lán tio̍h hó-táⁿ chiū-kūn Siōng-tè un-tián ê pó-chō, thang niá-siū I ê lîn-bín kap un-tián, chòe lán su-iàu ê sî ê pang-chān." 
Hebrews5:1 Ta̍k-ê tōa-chè-si lóng sī tùi lâng ê tiong-kan kéng,chhut-lâi, siū chí-phài thòe lâng ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè, ūi-tio̍h in ê chōe hiàn lé-mi̍h kap chè-phín." 
Hebrews5:2 Tōa-chè-si, in-ūi i pún-sin tī ta̍k hong-bīn lóng loán-jio̍k, só͘-í ōe-tàng thé-liōng bû-ti kap sit-bê ê lâng." 
Hebrews5:3 In-ūi án-ni, i ū gī-bū ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn, mā tio̍h ūi ka-kī ê chōe hiàn-chè." 
Hebrews5:4 Bô lâng ka-kī tit-tio̍h tōa-chè-si chit-ê chun-kùi ê chit-hūn; chí-ū chhin-chhiūⁿ A-lûn, hō͘ Siōng-tè soán-tiàu,ê chiah ōe tit-tio̍h." 
Hebrews5:5 Siâng-khoán, Ki-tok mā m̄-sī ka-kī cheng-chhú tōa-chè-si ê êng-iāu, hoán-tńg sī Siōng-tè tùi I kóng: Lí sī góa ê Kiáⁿ, góa kin-á-ji̍t siⁿ lí." 
Hebrews5:6 Tī pa̍t-ūi I mā ū kóng: Chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù, lí éng-oán choh chè-si." 
Hebrews5:7 Iâ-so͘ chāi-sè ê sî bat tōa-siaⁿ âu-kiò koh lâu ba̍k-sái, ǹg hit-ūi ōe-tàng kiù I thoat-lī sí-bông ê Siōng-tè kî-tó khún-kiû. In-ūi I ê khiân-sêng, Siōng-tè ū thiaⁿ I ê kî-kiû." 
Hebrews5:8 Sui-jiân I sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, iáu-kú ū tùi só͘ siū ê khó͘-lān ha̍k-si̍p sūn-ho̍k." 
Hebrews5:9 Kì-jiân Siōng-tè hō͘ I ta̍t-kàu oân-choân ê tōe-pō͘, I chiū chiâⁿ-chòe só͘-ū sūn-ho̍k I ê lâng éng-oán tit-kiù ê kun-goân," 
Hebrews5:10 hō͘ Siōng-tè chí-tēng I chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù choh Tōa-chè-si. 
Hebrews5:11 Koan-hē Iâ-so͘ choh Tōa-chè-si ê sū, goán ū chin chōe ōe ài kóng, m̄-kú oh-tit soat-bêng, in-ūi lín hī-khang tūn." 
Hebrews5:12 Chiàu kóng, lín chá chiū eng-kai chòe lāu-su lah, m̄-kú lín iáu su-iàu lâng kā lín kà Siōng-tè sìn-sit ê chho͘-pō͘; lín iáu su-iàu chia̍h-lin, bōe-tàng chia̍h-pn̄g." 
Hebrews5:13 Chia̍h-lin,ê lóng sī eⁿ-á, iáu bōe-hiáu liáu-kái sī-hui ê tō-lí." 
Hebrews5:14 Tōa-lâng chiah chia̍h-pn̄g; in sio̍k-lêng ê sim-khiàu ū keng-kè si̍t-chè ê chhau-liān chiah ōe-hiáu hun-pia̍t hó-pháiⁿ. 
Hebrews6:1 Só͘-í, lán m̄-thang thêng-liû tī Ki-tok chho͘-pō͘ ê tō-lí, tio̍h tui-kiû sêng-se̍k; bô koh-chài kan-ta tī thoat-lī sí ê hêng-ûi kap sìn Siōng-tè, kiat-chēng-lé kap àn-chhiú-lé, sí-lâng ê koh-oa̍h kap éng-oán ê sím-phòaⁿ, téng ê kà-sī teh phah ki-chhó͘." 
Hebrews6:2  
Hebrews6:3 Siōng-tè nā chún, lán beh án-ni chòe." 
Hebrews6:4 Hiah-ê lâng bat hō͘ Siōng-tè ê kng chiò, bat tam-tio̍h sio̍k-thiⁿ ê un-sù, bat hun-hióng Sèng Sîn, bat thé-giām Siōng-tè ê ōe ê hó-chhù, mā bat kám-siū teh-beh lâi ê sè-tāi ê koân-pèng. Án-ni, in iáu-kú pōe-sìn! Chit-khoán lâng bô hoat-tō͘ hō͘ in têng-sin hóe-kái kiâⁿ tò-tńg; in-ūi in koh chiong Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ tèng tī si̍p-jī-kè téng, kong-jiân kā I bú-jio̍k." 
Hebrews6:5  
Hebrews6:6  
Hebrews6:7 Thó͘-tōe put-sî teh khip-siu tùi thiⁿ lo̍h,lâi ê hō͘-chúi, seng-sán chhài-soe, tùi choh-sit-lâng ū lō͘-ēng, che sī tùi Siōng-tè niá-siū ê chiok-hok." 
Hebrews6:8 M̄-kú thó͘-tōe nā hoat chháu-chhì kap cha̍p-chháu chiū bô lō͘-ēng, liâm-piⁿ ōe siū chiù-chó͘, chòe-āu hō͘ hé sio." 
Hebrews6:9 Só͘ thiàⁿ ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, sui-jiân goán án-ni kóng, iáu-kú chhim-sìn lín ê chêng-hêng pí só͘ kóng,ê khah hó, ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h kiù." 
Hebrews6:10 Siōng-tè m̄-sī bô kong-tō, I it-tēng ōe-kì-tit lín só͘ chòe ê kang-chok, chiū-sī lín ūi-tio̍h I kè-sio̍k teh ho̍k-bū sìn-tô͘ só͘ piáu-hiān ê thiàⁿ-sim." 
Hebrews6:11 Goán chin ài lín ta̍k-ê lâng tùi thâu kàu bé pó-chhî jia̍t-sim, hō͘ lín só͘ ǹg-bāng,ê ōe oân-choân si̍t-hiān." 
Hebrews6:12 Án-ni lín chiah bōe pîn-tōaⁿ, chiah ōe o̍h hiah-ê tùi sìn kap thun-lún lâi sêng-siū Siōng-tè èng-ún ê lâng." 
Hebrews6:13 Siōng-tè èng-ún A-pek-la-hán ê sî, kì-jiân bô pí I khah-tōa,ê thang li̍p-sè, chiū kí pún-sin li̍p-sè," 
Hebrews6:14 kóng, “Góa it-tēng beh sù-hok hō͘ lí, beh ke-thiⁿ kiáⁿ-sun hō͘ lí.”" 
Hebrews6:15 A-pek-la-hán gâu thun-lún, só͘-í ū tit-tio̍h só͘ èng-ún,ê." 
Hebrews6:16 In-ūi lâng sī kí pí i khah-tōa,ê lâi li̍p-sè; mā ēng li̍p-sè chòe tam-pó lâi kái-koat in tiong-kan só͘-ū ê cheng-chip. 
Hebrews6:17 Siōng-tè ài hiah-ê sêng-chiap èng-ún ê lâng khak-si̍t chai, I ê kè-ōe bōe kái-piàn, só͘-í ēng li̍p-sè lâi pó-chèng." 
Hebrews6:18 I ê èng-ún kap li̍p-sè chit nn̄g hāng lóng bōe kái-piàn, in-ūi I bōe kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, hō͘ lán chiah-ê tô-pī khì kiû I pó-hō͘ ê lâng ōe-tàng tit-tio̍h chin tōa ê kek-lē, thang chhî-siú hit-ê tī lán thâu-chêng ê ǹg-bāng." 
Hebrews6:19 Lán ū chit-ê ǹg-bāng, chhin-chhiūⁿ sìⁿ-miā ê tiàⁿ pha tī Sèng-só͘ tiùⁿ-lî ê lāi-bīn an-choân khó-khò." 
Hebrews6:20 Iâ-so͘ ūi-tio̍h lán chòe sian-hong í-keng ji̍p-khì hia, chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù choh Tōa-chè-si ti̍t-kàu éng-oán."
