Hebrews7:1 Chit-ūi Be̍k-ki-sé-tek sī Sat-léng -ông, mā-sī Chì-koân Siōng-tè ê chè-si. A-pek-la-hán thâi-sí hiah-ê ông tńg,lâi ê sî, Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ū kā i gêng-chiap koh kā i chiok-hok." 
Hebrews7:2 A-pek-la-hán ū chiong i só͘ tit,tio̍h ê cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ i. Tē-it, Be̍k-ki-sé-tek chit-ê miâ ê ì-sù sī “Chèng-gī ê ông”, i koh sī Sat-léng -ông, chiū-sī “Hô-pêng-ông”." 
Hebrews7:3 I bô pē bô bú, bô sè-hē, bô chhut-sì ê ji̍t-chí, mā bô sìⁿ-miā ê kiat-sok. I kap Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ kâng-khoán; i kè-sio̍k choh chè-si ti̍t-kàu éng-oán." 
Hebrews7:4 Lín khòaⁿ, chit-ê lâng jōa úi-tāi! Sian-chó͘ A-pek-la-hán to tio̍h chiong chiàn-lī-phín ê cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ i." 
Hebrews7:5 Ū tam-tng chè-si-chit ê Lī-bī ê kiáⁿ-sun, sui-jiân kap kî-tha Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn lóng sī A-pek-la-hán ê kiáⁿ-sun, pîⁿ-pîⁿ sī hiaⁿ-tī, iáu-kú hōng bēng-lēng chiàu Lu̍t-hoat tùi jîn-bîn siu cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t." 
Hebrews7:6 Be̍k-ki-sé-tek m̄-sī sio̍k Lī-bī ê sè-hē, m̄-kú i ū tùi A-pek-la-hán chiap-siū cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t, koh kā tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè èng-ún ê A-pek-la-hán chiok-hok." 
Hebrews7:7 Sī-sòe siū sī-tōa chiok-hok sī lí-só͘-tong-jiân. 
Hebrews7:8 Chi̍t hong-bīn, chiah-ê siu cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t,ê lóng sī ōe sí ê lâng; lēng-gōa chi̍t hong-bīn, hit-ūi siu cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t,ê, Sèng-keng ū chèng-si̍t i iáu-teh oa̍h." 
Hebrews7:9 Án-ni mā thang kóng, tùi lâng siu cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t ê Lī-bī í-keng thong-kè A-pek-la-hán tùi Be̍k-ki-sé-tek la̍p cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t." 
Hebrews7:10 In-ūi Be̍k-ki-sé-tek gêng-chiap A-pek-la-hán ê sî, Lī-bī iáu tī i ê sian-chó͘ A-pek-la-hán ê seng-khu lāi." 
Hebrews7:11 Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê Lu̍t-hoat sī kun-kù Lī-bī ê chè-si chè-tō͘ pan-hoat,ê, chit-ê chè-tō͘ nā ōe-tàng hō͘ lâng oân-choân, ná ū su-iàu m̄-sī chiàu A-lûn ê pan-chhù, sī chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek pan-chhù siat-li̍p ê lēng-gōa chi̍t ê chè-si?" 
Hebrews7:12 Kì-jiân chè-si chè-tō͘ kái-piàn, Lu̍t-hoat mā tio̍h kái-piàn." 
Hebrews7:13 In-ūi chiah-ê sū só͘ chí Hit-ūi sī sio̍k pa̍t-ê chi-cho̍k; chit-ê chi-cho̍k m̄-bat ū lâng tī chè-tôaⁿ chêng sū-hōng. 
Hebrews7:14 Lán ê Chú bêng-bêng sī Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k ê kiáⁿ-sun; koan-hē chit-ê chi-cho̍k, Mô͘-se m̄-bat kóng-khí chè-si ê sū." 
Hebrews7:15 Taⁿ, góa teh kóng ê tāi-chì koh-khah chheng-chhó, in-ūi ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ūi chhin-chhiūⁿ Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê chè-si í-keng chhut-hiān." 
Hebrews7:16 I choh Chè-si m̄-sī kun-kù lâng ê tiâu-lē kui-chek, sī kun-kù bōe húi-bia̍t ê oa̍h-miā ê koân-lêng." 
Hebrews7:17 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū án-ni choh-chèng: Chiàu Be̍k-ki-sé-tek ê pan-chhù, lí éng-oán choh chè-si." 
Hebrews7:18 Chi̍t hong-bīn, kū ê tiâu-lē in-ūi bô-la̍t, bô lō͘-ēng, soah siū hòe-bô," 
Hebrews7:19 in-ūi Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat sím-mi̍h tāi-chì to bô hoat-tō͘ sêng-choân. Lēng-gōa chi̍t hong-bīn, ū chi̍t ê khah hó ê ǹg-bāng í-keng chún-pī hó-sè, hō͘ lán thang thong-kè chit-ê ǹg-bāng chhin-kūn Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews7:20 Koh chit-ê ǹg-bāng ū keng-kè soan-sè. Lī-bī hē-thóng ê chè-si bô keng-kè soan-sè; 
Hebrews7:21 chí-ū chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ choh Chè-si ê sî ū keng-kè soan-sè; I ê Siōng-tè tùi I kóng: Chú ū soan-sè, bōe kái-piàn sim-ì; lí éng-oán choh chè-si." 
Hebrews7:22 Chiū-sī in-ūi án-ni, Iâ-so͘ chiâⁿ-chòe koh-khah hó ê iok ê pó-chèng." 
Hebrews7:23 Lī-bī hē-thóng ê chè-si ū chin chōe, in-ūi sí ê chó͘-gāi in bōe-tàng kè-sio̍k chòe;" 
Hebrews7:24 chí-ū Iâ-so͘ m̄-bián chiong chè-si-chit kau hō͘ pa̍t-lâng, in-ūi I éng-oán oa̍h,teh." 
Hebrews7:25 Án-ni, thong-kè I lâi kàu Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ê lâng, I ōe-tàng kiù in kàu-tóe, in-ūi I éng-oán oa̍h,teh teh thòe in kî-tó." 
Hebrews7:26 Chit-khoán Tōa-chè-si tú-tú ha̍h lán ê su-iàu; I sèng-kiat, bô siâ-ok, bô lâ-sâm, tùi chōe-jîn tiong siū hun-pia̍t,chhut-lâi, ko-seng kàu pí thiⁿ khah koân." 
Hebrews7:27 I bô su-iàu chhin-chhiūⁿ kî-tha ê tōa-chè-si ta̍k-ji̍t tio̍h seng ūi-tio̍h ka-kī, āu-lâi ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn ê chōe hiàn-chè. I hiàn pún-sin chòe chè-mi̍h, chi̍t piàn chiū oân-sêng." 
Hebrews7:28 Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat jīm-bēng bô oân-choân ê lâng choh tōa-chè-si; m̄-kú ū Lu̍t-hoat í-āu, Siōng-tè ēng soan-sè jīm-bēng I ê Kiáⁿ éng-oán choh oân-choân ê Tōa-chè-si." 
Hebrews8:1 Lán só͘ teh kóng siōng iàu-kín,ê sī án-ni: Lán ū chit-khoán ê Tōa-chè-si, I chē tī thiⁿ-téng Chì-tōa Siōng-tè pó-chō ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Hebrews8:2 I tī Sèng-só͘, chiū-sī chin ê tiùⁿ-bō͘, teh sū-hōng; chit-ê tiùⁿ-bō͘ m̄-sī lâng, sī Chú só͘ tah,ê." 
Hebrews8:3 Ta̍k-ê tōa-chè-si lóng sī ūi-tio̍h hiàn lé-mi̍h kap chè-phín jīm-bēng,ê; só͘-í chit-ūi Tōa-chè-si mā it-tēng tio̍h ū sím-mi̍h thang hiàn. 
Hebrews8:4 I nā tī tōe-chiūⁿ chiū bô choh chè-si, in-ūi í-keng ū chè-si chiàu Lu̍t-hoat teh hiàn lé-mi̍h." 
Hebrews8:5 In só͘ chòe ê ho̍k-sāi put-kò sī thiⁿ-téng tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê hù-pún kap iáⁿ-siōng, tú chiàu Mô͘-se beh khí-chō hōe-bō͘ ê sî, Siōng-tè ū kā i chí-sī, kóng, “Lí tio̍h kín-sīn, it-chhè tio̍h chiàu tī soaⁿ-téng kā lí chí-sī ê bô͘-sek lâi khí.”" 
Hebrews8:6 M̄-kú hiān-chāi Iâ-so͘ í-keng tit-tio̍h koh-khah chun-kùi ê sū-hōng, choh khah hó ê iok ê tiong-kan-jîn; chit-ê iok sī ēng khah hó ê èng-ún chè-tēng,ê." 
Hebrews8:7 Thâu chi̍t ê iok nā bô khoat-tiám, chiū bô su-iàu li̍p tē-jī ê iok." 
Hebrews8:8 M̄-kú Siōng-tè kā in chí-chek kóng: Chú kóng: Khòaⁿ leh, ji̍t-chí teh-beh kàu, góa beh kap Í-sek-lia̍t -ke kap Iû-tāi -ke li̍p sin ê iok." 
Hebrews8:9 Chit-ê iok bô chhin-chhiūⁿ góa í-chêng kap in ê chó͘-sian só͘ li̍p,ê, chiū-sī khan in ê chhiú, chhōa in chhut Ai-ki̍p ê sî só͘ li̍p,ê; in-ūi in bô kè-sio̍k siú góa ê iok, só͘-í góa m̄ chhap in." 
Hebrews8:10 Chú koh kóng: Hiah-ê ji̍t í-āu, góa kap Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng só͘ beh li̍p ê iok sī án-ni: Góa beh chiong góa ê Lu̍t-hoat khǹg tī in ê náu-lāi, siá tī in ê sim-lāi. Góa beh chòe in ê Siōng-tè; in beh chòe góa ê chú-bîn." 
Hebrews8:11 In lóng bōe koh kà-sī in ê tông-pau, á-sī ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē kóng: Tio̍h jīn-bat Chú, in-ūi in tùi siōng-sòe kàu siōng-tōa,ê, lóng ōe jīn-bat góa." 
Hebrews8:12 Góa beh sià-bián in ê put-gī, bōe koh kì-tit in ê chōe-ok." 
Hebrews8:13 Kì-jiân kóng-kàu sin ê iok, Siōng-tè chiū hō͘ thâu chi̍t ê iok pìⁿ-chòe kū,ê. Hit-ê chiām-chiām kū teh soe-thè ê iok liâm-piⁿ chiū siau-sit." 
Hebrews9:1 Thâu chi̍t ê iok mā ū lé-pài ê kui-tēng kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê sèng-só͘. 
Hebrews9:2 Ū chi̍t ê tah hó-sè ê tiùⁿ-bō͘, thâu-chêng-keng kiò-chòe Sèng-só͘, lāi-bīn ū teng-tâi, toh, kap hiàn-chè ê piáⁿ." 
Hebrews9:3 Tē-jī ê tiùⁿ-lî ê āu-bīn-keng kiò-chòe Chì-sèng-só͘," 
Hebrews9:4 lāi-bīn ū kim-hiuⁿ-tôaⁿ kap choân-pō͘ ēng kim pau ê iok-kūi, kūi-lāi ū tóe má-ná ê kim-ô͘, A-lûn hit-ki puh-gê ê koáiⁿ-á, kap nn̄g tè iok ê chio̍h-pán." 
Hebrews9:5 Kūi-téng ū êng-kng ê thiⁿ-sài ki-lō͘-pek, in ê si̍t jia-khàm si-un-chō. Koan-hē chiah-ê sū, hiān-chāi góa bōe-tàng siông-sè soat-bêng." 
Hebrews9:6 Chiah-ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiàu án-ni an-pâi hó-sè, chè-si chiū ta̍k-ji̍t ji̍p-khì tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê thâu-chêng-keng kú-hêng lé-pài gî-sek." 
Hebrews9:7 Āu-bīn-keng chí-ū tōa-chè-si chiah thang ji̍p,khì, m̄-kú ta̍k-nî chí-ū chi̍t piàn, ta̍k-piàn tio̍h tòa huih ji̍p,khì, ūi-tio̍h pún-sin í-ki̍p bîn-chiòng bô-ì-tiong hoān ê chōe lâi hiàn." 
Hebrews9:8 Tùi chiah-ê an-pâi Sèng Sîn ū bêng-bêng piáu-sī, tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê thâu-chêng-keng iáu chûn-chāi, chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘ ê lō͘ chiū iáu-bē khui." 
Hebrews9:9 Tiùⁿ-bō͘ ê thâu-chêng-keng phì-jū hiān-sè, sī kóng, só͘ hiàn ê lé-mi̍h kap chè-phín bōe-tàng hō͘ lé-pài ê lâng ê liông-sim chheng-pe̍k." 
Hebrews9:10 Chiah-ê kan-ta sī koan-hē lim-chia̍h kap ta̍k-khoán ê kiat-chēng-lé, sī sio̍k gōa-piáu ê kui-lē, chí-ū sek-iōng kàu Siōng-tè keng-sin bān-mi̍h ê sî." 
Hebrews9:11 M̄-kú Ki-tok í-keng lâi, choh Tōa-chè-si, ū si̍t-hiān hó-sū. I ū keng-kè khah-tōa, khah oân-choân, m̄-sī lâng ê chhiú só͘ tah, m̄-sī sio̍k chit sè-kan ê tiùⁿ-bō͘." 
Hebrews9:12 I chí-ū chi̍t piàn chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘, m̄-sī ēng soaⁿ-iûⁿ ê huih kap gû-á ê huih, sī ēng ka-kī ê huih ūi-tio̍h lán sêng-choân éng-oán ê kiù-sio̍k." 
Hebrews9:13 Soaⁿ-iûⁿ kap gû-káng ê huih, í-ki̍p gû-bú-á ê kut-hu nā hiù tī bô chheng-khì ê lâng to ōe hō͘ in sèng-hòa chheng-khì," 
Hebrews9:14 hô-hòng Ki-tok thong-kè éng-oán ê Sîn hiàn I bô hâ-chhû ê pún-sin hō͘ Siōng-tè, I ê huih kiám bōe hō͘ lán ê liông-sim koh-khah chheng-khì, thoat-lī sí ê hêng-ûi, lâi ho̍k-sāi éng-oa̍h ê Siōng-tè?" 
Hebrews9:15 In-ūi án-ni, Ki-tok chòe sin ê iok ê tiong-kan-jîn, sī beh hō͘ Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu ê lâng ōe-tit niá-siū I só͘ èng-ún éng-oán ê sán-gia̍p, in-ūi Ki-tok í-keng ēng I ê sí sio̍k-hôe in tī chêng ê iok ê sî só͘ hoān ê chōe-kò." 
Hebrews9:16 Koan-hē ûi-chiok, it-tēng tio̍h seng chèng-si̍t li̍p ûi-chiok ê lâng í-keng sí." 
Hebrews9:17 In-ūi ûi-chiok it-tēng tio̍h li̍p ûi-chiok ê lâng sí chiah ū-hāu. Li̍p ûi-chiok ê lâng iáu oa̍h,teh, ûi-chiok chiū bô-hāu." 
Hebrews9:18 Án-ni, liân thâu chi̍t ê iok mā-sī ū ēng huih lâi sêng-li̍p." 
Hebrews9:19 Mô͘-se chiàu Lu̍t-hoat chiong it-chhè ê kài-bēng tùi jîn-bîn soan-pò͘, jiân-āu phâng gû-káng kap soaⁿ-iûⁿ ê huih chham chúi, ēng chu-âng-sek ê iûⁿ-mn̂g kap gû-chhek-chháu hiù tī hit-pún chheh ê téng-bīn kap choân-thé jîn-bîn ê sin-chiūⁿ," 
Hebrews9:20 kóng, “Che sī Siōng-tè kap lín li̍p-iok ê huih.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Siâng-khoán, Mô͘-se mā chiong huih hiù tī tiùⁿ-bō͘ kap lé-pài ê sî só͘ ēng it-chhè ê khì-khū." 
Hebrews9:22 Chiàu Lu̍t-hoat, chha-put-to só͘-ū ê mi̍h lóng ēng huih kiat-chēng; bô lâu-huih chiū bô sià-chōe." 
Hebrews9:23 Chiàu thiⁿ-téng ê khoán-sit só͘ hóng-chō ê mi̍h su-iàu ēng cheng-siⁿ ê huih lâi kiat-chēng; m̄-kú thiⁿ-téng ê goân-mi̍h su-iàu ēng pí chiah-ê khah hó ê chè-mi̍h lâi kiat-chēng. 
Hebrews9:24 Ki-tok ji̍p,khì-ê pèng m̄-sī lâng ê chhiú chō ê Sèng-só͘, che put-kò sī chin Sèng-só͘ ê hù-pún; I sī ji̍p-khì thiⁿ-téng ê chin Sèng-só͘. I hiān-chāi ūi-tio̍h lán chhut-hiān tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng." 
Hebrews9:25 Ki-tok m̄-bián chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn hiàn pún-sin, chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chè-si tio̍h ta̍k-nî kè-sio̍k tòa cheng-siⁿ ê huih ji̍p-khì Chì-sèng-só͘." 
Hebrews9:26 Nā tio̍h chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn hiàn, tùi chhòng-chō sè-kài í-lâi, Ki-tok tio̍h chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn siū-khó͘. M̄-kú hiān-chāi tī chit-ê sè-tāi ê lō͘-bé, I chí-ū chhut-hiān chi̍t piàn, chiong pún-sin hiàn chòe chè lâi tû-khì chōe." 
Hebrews9:27 Chiàu só͘ chù-tiāⁿ, lâng tio̍h chi̍t piàn sí, sí-āu tio̍h siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ." 
Hebrews9:28 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, Ki-tok í-keng ū chi̍t piàn hi-seng lâi tam-tng chèng-lâng ê chōe; I ōe tē-jī piàn hián-hiān, m̄-sī beh tùi-hù chōe, sī beh chín-kiù pek-chhiat teh thèng-hāu I lâi ê lâng." 
Hebrews10:1 Kì-jiân Lu̍t-hoat m̄-sī teh-beh lâi hó-sū pún-sin ê chin-siōng, sī hó-sū ê iáⁿ, só͘-í bōe-tàng chi̍t nî kè chi̍t nî kè-sio̍k ēng siâng-khoán ê chè-mi̍h hō͘ chhin-kūn Siōng-tè ê lâng tit-tio̍h oân-choân." 
Hebrews10:2 Nā-sī ōe, hiàn-chè ê sū eng-kai í-keng thêng-chí ah, in-ūi kèng-pài ê lâng chi̍t piàn chiū oân-choân tit-tio̍h kiat-chēng, bô koh ū chōe ê ì-sek." 
Hebrews10:3 Kî-si̍t, ta̍k-nî só͘ hiàn ê chè-mi̍h chí-ū ōe hō͘ lâng siūⁿ-khí in ê chōe;" 
Hebrews10:4 in-ūi gû, iûⁿ ê huih bōe-tàng tû-khì lâng ê chōe." 
Hebrews10:5 Só͘-í, Ki-tok lâi kàu sè-kan ê sî ū kóng: Chè-sū kap lé-mi̍h, lí bô ài; m̄-kú lí ū kā góa chún-pī seng-khu." 
Hebrews10:6 Sio-hòa-chè kap sio̍k-chōe-chè, lí bô kah-ì." 
Hebrews10:7 Hit-sî góa kóng: Siōng-tè ah, góa lâi lah; góa lâi sī beh si̍t-hêng lí ê chí-ì. Góa ê sū ū kì-chài tī chheh,ni̍h." 
Hebrews10:8 Góa téng-bīn ū kóng, “Chè-sū kap lé-mi̍h, sio-hòa-chè kap sio̍k-chōe-chè lí bô ài, mā bô kah-ì; chiah-ê sī chiàu Lu̍t-hoat lâi hiàn,ê.”" 
Hebrews10:9 I sòa lo̍h-khì kóng, “Khòaⁿ ah, góa lâi sī beh si̍t-hêng lí ê chí-ì.” Án-ni, Siōng-tè hòe-tû chêng,ê, sī beh kiàn-li̍p āu,ê." 
Hebrews10:10 Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, chí-ū chi̍t piàn hiàn I ka-kī ê seng-khu chiū kàu-gia̍h hō͘ lán tit-tio̍h sèng-hòa kui Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews10:11 Chè-si ta̍k-ji̍t khiā-teh ho̍k-sāi Siōng-tè, chi̍t-piàn koh chi̍t-piàn hiàn siâng-khoán ê chè, éng-oán bōe-tàng tû-khì lâng ê chōe." 
Hebrews10:12 M̄-kú Ki-tok chí-ū chi̍t piàn hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè, jiân-āu chē tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng," 
Hebrews10:13 thèng-hāu Siōng-tè hō͘ I ê tùi-te̍k chòe I ê kha-tiam. 
Hebrews10:14 Ki-tok thong-kè chi̍t piàn ê hiàn-chè, hō͘ sèng-hòa kui Chú ê lâng éng-oán oân-choân." 
Hebrews10:15 Sèng Sîn mā ū tùi lán choh-chèng. I ū kóng: 
Hebrews10:16 Chú kóng: Hiah-ê ji̍t-chí í-āu, Góa kap in só͘ beh li̍p ê iok chiū-sī án-ni: Góa beh chiong góa ê Lu̍t-hoat khǹg tī in ê sim-lāi, siá tī in ê náu-lāi." 
Hebrews10:17 Jiân-āu I koh kóng: Góa bōe koh kì-tit in ê chōe-ok kap kè-hoān. 
Hebrews10:18 Kì-jiân chōe í-keng tit-tio̍h sià-bián, chiū m̄-bián koh hiàn sio̍k-chōe-chè." 
Hebrews10:19 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lán khò Iâ-so͘ lâu-huih sí ōe-tàng ū khak-sìn kap ióng-khì chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘." 
Hebrews10:20 I thong-kè tiùⁿ-lî, chiū-sī ka-kī ê seng-khu, kā lán khui chi̍t tiâu sin koh oa̍h ê lō͘." 
Hebrews10:21 Lán í-keng ū chi̍t ūi úi-tāi ê Chè-si teh tī-lí Siōng-tè ê ke," 
Hebrews10:22 lán tio̍h ēng chin-sêng ê sim, kian-koat ê sìn, chheng-khì bô khui-khiàm ê liông-sim kap chheng-chúi sóe,kè ê seng-khu lâi chhin-kūn Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews10:23 Lán tio̍h kian-koat chhî-siú só͘ soan-jīn ê ǹg-bāng, in-ūi èng-ún lán ê Siōng-tè khó-khò." 
Hebrews10:24 Lán tio̍h hō͘-siōng koan-sim thang kek-lē saⁿ-thiàⁿ kap chòe hó-sū. 
Hebrews10:25 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng thêng-chí chū-hōe, m̄-thang o̍h in ê si̍p-koàn, tian-tò tio̍h hō͘-siōng khoàn-bián; kì-jiân lín chai Chú ê Ji̍t teh-beh kàu, koh-khah tio̍h án-ni." 
Hebrews10:26 Lán jīn-bat chin-lí í-āu iáu kò͘-ì hoān-chōe, chiū bô koh ū thang sio̍k-chōe ê chè-mi̍h," 
Hebrews10:27 chí-ū ēng kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ ê sim thèng-hāu sím-phòaⁿ kap teh-beh sio-bia̍t te̍k-tùi Siōng-tè ê lâng ê lia̍t-hé. 
Hebrews10:28 Ûi-hoān Mô͘-se ê Lu̍t-hoat,ê, kun-kù nn̄g ê á-sī saⁿ ê lâng choh-chèng chiū thang kā i chhú-sí, lóng bô khoan-sià." 
Hebrews10:29 Án-ni, thún-ta̍h Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, biáu-sī hō͘ in sèng-hòa kui Chú ê iok ê huih, koh bú-bān si-un ê Sèng Sîn ê lâng, lín siūⁿ in eng-kai siū ê hêng-hoa̍t ōe ke jōa tāng?" 
Hebrews10:30 Lán chai, kóng “Sin-oan chāi-tī góa, góa ōe pò-èng”, koh kóng “Chú beh sím-phòaⁿ I ê chú-bîn” hit-ūi sī sím-mi̍h-lâng?" 
Hebrews10:31 Hām-lo̍h éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê chhiú si̍t-chāi chin thang kiaⁿ! 
Hebrews10:32 Lín tio̍h ōe-kì-tit kè-khì ê ji̍t-chí. Lín siū Siōng-tè ê kng chiò í-āu, ū jím-siū tōa cheng-tò͘ ê khó͘-lān;" 
Hebrews10:33 ū sî lín kong-jiân siū bú-jio̍k, ge̍k-thāi; ū sî lín kap pa̍t-lâng tâng siū ge̍k-thāi." 
Hebrews10:34 Lín kap siû-hoān tâng siū-khó͘; lín ê châi-bu̍t siū chhiúⁿ-toa̍t mā kam-goān jím-siū, in-ūi chai lín ka-kī ū koh-khah hó koh éng-oán chûn-chāi ê sán-gia̍p." 
Hebrews10:35 Só͘-í, m̄-thang sit-lo̍h ióng-khì; chit-ê ióng-khì ōe hō͘ lín tōa ê pò-siúⁿ." 
Hebrews10:36 Lín tio̍h ū nāi-sim chiah ōe-tàng si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, niá-siū I só͘ èng-ún ê hok-hūn." 
Hebrews10:37 In-ūi koh chi̍t-sî-á kú, Hit-ūi teh-beh-lâi,ê ōe kàu, bōe iân-tî." 
Hebrews10:38 M̄-kú sio̍k góa ê gī-lâng ōe tùi sìn lâi oa̍h. Nā ū lâng tiû-tû thè-āu, góa chiū bô kah-ì." 
Hebrews10:39 Lán leh, lán m̄-sī thè-āu tì-kàu tîm-lûn, sī tùi sìn tì-kàu sìⁿ-miā tit-tio̍h pó-choân." 
Hebrews11:1 Sìn sī tùi só͘ ǹg-bāng ê sū ū pá-ak, tùi bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê sū ōe-tàng khéng-tēng." 
Hebrews11:2 Kó͘-chá-lâng in-ūi chit-ê sìn tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè jīn-tēng chiap-la̍p. 
Hebrews11:3 Tùi sìn, lán chai ú-tiū sī tùi Siōng-tè ê ōe chhòng-chō,ê; án-ni khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h,ê sī tùi khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h,ê lâi chō,ê." 
Hebrews11:4 Tùi sìn, A-pek pí Kai-ún hiàn khah hó ê chè-mi̍h hō͘ Siōng-tè; tùi chit-ê sìn, i tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè jīn-tēng chòe gī-lâng, chiap-la̍p i ê chè-mi̍h. Sui-jiân A-pek í-keng sí, thong-kè chit-ê sìn, i iáu-teh kóng-ōe." 
Hebrews11:5 Tùi sìn, Í-lo̍k bô keng-giām sí, siū chhian-sóa khì Siōng-tè hia. Lâng bô koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h i, in-ūi Siōng-tè kā i chhian-sóa,khì; Í-lo̍k siū chhian-sóa í-chêng í-keng hō͘ Siōng-tè jīn-tēng chiap-la̍p." 
Hebrews11:6 Bô sìn chiū bōe-tàng hō͘ Siōng-tè hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi chhin-kūn Siōng-tè ê lâng it-tēng tio̍h sìn Siōng-tè ū chûn-chāi, koh sìn I ōe hō͘ chhē-kiû I ê lâng tit-tio̍h pò-siúⁿ." 
Hebrews11:7 Tùi sìn, Ná-a tùi iáu-bē khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê sū ū thiaⁿ Siōng-tè ê kéng-kò, chûn kèng-ùi ê sim, chō chi̍t chiah tōa-chûn kiù i choân-ke. Tùi chit-ê sìn, i tēng sè-kan-lâng ê chōe, koh kun-kù chit-ê sìn, i chiâⁿ-chòe gī ê kè-sêng-jîn." 
Hebrews11:8 Tùi sìn, A-pek-la-hán siū tiàu khì teh-beh sêng-siū chòe sán-gia̍p ê tōe ê sî, sui-jiân m̄ chai beh khì tó-ūi, iáu-kú i ū sūn-thàn chhut,khì." 
Hebrews11:9 Tùi sìn, i kià-ku tī èng-ún ê tōe, ná-chhin-chhiūⁿ tiàm tī gōa-kok, kap chòe-hé sêng-siū kâng èng-ún ê Í-sat, Ngá-kok tòa tī pò͘-pîⁿ;" 
Hebrews11:10 in-ūi i kî-thāi Siōng-tè só͘ siat-kè kap khí-chō hit-ê ū tōe-ki ê siâⁿ. 
Hebrews11:11 Tùi sìn, A-pek-la-hán sui-jiân í-keng lāu, Sa-la mā í-keng chhiau-kè seng-sán ê nî-hè, i iáu ōe-tàng choh lāu-pē, in-ūi khak-sìn èng-ún i ê Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t." 
Hebrews11:12 Só͘-í thang kóng, tùi chi̍t ê teh-beh sí ê lâng ū siⁿ-thòaⁿ kiáⁿ-sun, chhin-chhiūⁿ thiⁿ-téng ê chhiⁿ hiah-ni̍h chōe, chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-piⁿ ê soa sǹg bōe liáu." 
Hebrews11:13 Chiah-ê lóng sī kàu sí it-ti̍t ū sìn-sim ê lâng; in bô tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè kā in èng-ún,ê, m̄-kú tùi hn̄g-hn̄g khòaⁿ,kìⁿ chiū hoaⁿ-hí, sêng-jīn ka-kī put-kò sī tōe-chiūⁿ ê chhut-gōa-lâng, sī kià-ku,ê." 
Hebrews11:14 Kóng chiah-ê ōe ê lâng piáu-sī in sī teh chhē chi̍t ê ka-hiong. 
Hebrews11:15 In nā-sī teh hoâi-liām lī-khui ê só͘-chāi, iáu ū ki-hōe thang tò,khì." 
Hebrews11:16 Put-kò, hiān-chāi in teh him-bō͘,ê sī thiⁿ-téng hit-ê koh-khah hó ê só͘-chāi. Só͘-í, Siōng-tè bô in-ūi in chheng I chòe Siōng-tè lâi kám-kak kiàn-siàu. I sīm-chì í-keng ūi-tio̍h in chún-pī chi̍t ê siâⁿ." 
Hebrews11:17 Tùi sìn, A-pek-la-hán siū khó-giām ê sî hiàn Í-sat chòe chè-mi̍h, chiū-sī sêng-siū èng-ún ê A-pek-la-hán hoaⁿ-hí hiàn i ê ko͘-kiáⁿ." 
Hebrews11:18 Siōng-tè ū tùi i kóng, “Tùi Í-sat siⁿ,ê chiah thang sǹg-chòe lí ê kiáⁿ-sun.”" 
Hebrews11:19 A-pek-la-hán siūⁿ-kóng Siōng-tè ōe-tàng hō͘ Í-sat tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, só͘-í thang phì-jū kóng Í-sat sī sí koh tò-tńg,lâi." 
Hebrews11:20 Tùi sìn, Í-sat ūi-tio̍h chiong-lâi ê sū kā Ngá-kok kap Í-sò chiok-hok." 
Hebrews11:21 Tùi sìn, Ngá-kok lîm-chiong ê sî kā Iok-sek ê kiáⁿ chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê chiok-hok; i khò tī koáiⁿ-á-thâu kèng-pài Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews11:22 Tùi sìn, Iok-sek lîm-chiong ê sî ū thê-khí Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng chhut Ai-ki̍p ê sū, koh hoan-hù koan-hē i ê kut-hâi bâi-chòng ê sū." 
Hebrews11:23 Tùi sìn, Mô͘-se chhut-sì í-āu, i ê pē-bú khòaⁿ-tio̍h eⁿ-á chheng-siù, m̄ kiaⁿ ông ê bēng-lēng, chiong i chhàng saⁿ ge̍h-ji̍t kú." 
Hebrews11:24 Tùi sìn, Mô͘-se tióng-tōa í-āu, kū-choa̍t lâng kā i chheng-chòe Ai-ki̍p kong-chú ê kiáⁿ," 
Hebrews11:25 khah ài kap Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn tâng siū khó͘-lān, bô ài hióng-siū chōe tiong chi̍t-sî-á kú ê khoài-lo̍k." 
Hebrews11:26 I khòaⁿ ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok siū lêng-jio̍k pí Ai-ki̍p ê châi-pó khah pó-kùi, in-ūi i gióng-bōng chiong-lâi ê pò-siúⁿ." 
Hebrews11:27 Tùi sìn, Mô͘-se m̄ kiaⁿ ông ê siū-khì lī-khui Ai-ki̍p; i kian-chhî kàu-tóe, in-ūi i ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lâng khòaⁿ bōe tio̍h ê Siōng-tè." 
Hebrews11:28 Tùi sìn, Mô͘-se siat-li̍p Pôaⁿ-kè-choeh, hoan-hù tio̍h hiù huih tī mn̂g,ni̍h, chiah bōe hō͘ Châu-bia̍t-chiá kha̍p-tio̍h Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê tōa-kiáⁿ." 
Hebrews11:29 Tùi sìn, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng kè Âng-hái chhin-chhiūⁿ teh kiâⁿ ta-tōe; Ai-ki̍p -lâng mā siūⁿ-beh kè, soah hō͘ chúi im-sí." 
Hebrews11:30 Tùi sìn, Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng se̍h Iâ-lī-ko -siâⁿ chhit ji̍t, siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ chiū tó,lo̍h-khì." 
Hebrews11:31 Tùi sìn, chhiong-ki Lat-ha̍p chhin-chhiat chiap-thāi cheng-thàm, só͘-í bô kap hiah-ê m̄ sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng chòe-hé bia̍t-bông." 
Hebrews11:32 Góa kiám tio̍h koh kóng? Góa bô-kàu sî-kan thang thê-khí Ki-tiân, Pa-la, Chham-sun, Iâ-hut-tha, Tāi-pi̍t, Sat-bó-ní, kap chèng sian-ti ê sū." 
Hebrews11:33 Chiah-ê lâng khò sìn-sim thâi-iâⁿ lia̍t-kok. In thui-hêng chèng-gī, niá-siū Siōng-tè ê èng-ún. In hong-ba̍t sai ê chhùi," 
Hebrews11:34 phah-hoa lia̍t-hé, tô-thoat to-kiàm ê sat-hāi. In loán-jio̍k pìⁿ-chòe kian-kiông, tī chiàn-tiûⁿ pìⁿ-chòe ióng-béng, phah-iâⁿ gōa-kok ê kun-tūi." 
Hebrews11:35 Ū chi̍t-kóa hū-jîn-lâng ū chiap in ê chhin-lâng tùi sí-lâng tiong tò-tńg,lâi. Mā ū chi̍t-kóa lâng ūi-tio̍h beh koh-oa̍h, tit-tio̍h khah hó ê oa̍h-miā, kū-choa̍t tháu-pàng, kam-goān siū khok-hêng kàu sí." 
Hebrews11:36 Ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siū hì-lāng, piⁿ-phah; mā ū chi̍t-kóa lâng siū khún-pa̍k, koaiⁿ-kaⁿ." 
Hebrews11:37 In hō͘ lâng ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm,sí, ēng kù-á kù,sí, ēng to thâi,sí. In chhēng mî-iûⁿ á-sī soaⁿ-iûⁿ ê phê, ta̍k só͘-chāi phun-pho, jím-siū khiàm-kheh, pek-hāi, ge̍k-thāi." 
Hebrews11:38 Chit sè-kan bô ta̍t-tit in khiā-khí; in tī khòng-iá, soaⁿ-niá, chio̍h-tōng á-sī tōe-hia̍t, sì-kòe liû-lōng." 
Hebrews11:39 Chiah-ê lâng thong-kè in ê sìn lóng ū tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè jīn-tēng chiap-la̍p, m̄-kú bô tit-tio̍h só͘ èng-ún,ê," 
Hebrews11:40 in-ūi Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h lán ū khah hó ê an-pâi; I ê chí-ì sī ài chiah-ê lâng kap lán ū-hūn tī chit-ê an-pâi, án-ni só͘ sìn,ê chiah ōe-tàng oân-choân si̍t-hiān." 
Hebrews12:1 Kì-jiân ū chiah-ni̍h chōe ê kiàn-chèng-jîn chhin-chhiūⁿ hûn kā lán pau-ûi teh, lán tio̍h pâi-tû it-chhè ê chó͘-gāi kap it-ti̍t teh tîⁿ-pòaⁿ lán ê chōe, kian-jím pháu-cháu thâu-chêng ê lō͘-thêng." 
Hebrews12:2 Tio̍h chù-sîn khòaⁿ Iâ-so͘, I sī sìn ê chhòng-sí-chiá kap oân-sêng-chiá. I ūi-tio̍h pâi tī thâu-chêng ê hí-lo̍k, bû-sī lêng-jio̍k, jím-siū si̍p-jī-kè ê khó͘-lān, hiān-chāi í-keng chē tī Siōng-tè pó-chō ê chiàⁿ-pêng." 
Hebrews12:3 Tio̍h siông-sè siūⁿ chit-ê lâng ê só͘-chòe, lín chiah bōe hoe-sim sit-chì. I án-chóaⁿ jím-siū chōe-jîn tùi I ê ngó͘-ge̍k." 
Hebrews12:4 Lín kap chōe-ok tò͘-cheng iáu-bē tí-khòng kàu sí ê thêng-tō͘. 
Hebrews12:5 Lín kiám bōe-kì-tit Siōng-tè khó͘-khǹg lín chhin-chhiūⁿ teh khó͘-khǹg kiáⁿ-jî. I kóng: Góa ê kiáⁿ ah, m̄-thang khòaⁿ-khin Chú ê koán-kàu; siū I chek-pī mā m̄-thang hoe-sim." 
Hebrews12:6 In-ūi Chú koán-kàu I só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng, piⁿ-phah I só͘ chiap-la̍p ê ta̍k-ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Hebrews12:7 Tio̍h jím-siū koán-kàu. Siōng-tè khoán-thāi lín chhin-chhiūⁿ kiáⁿ-jî. Kiám ū kiáⁿ-jî bô siū pē-bú koán-kàu? 
Hebrews12:8 Lín nā bô siū só͘-ū ê kiáⁿ-jî só͘ siū ê koán-kàu, lín chiū-sī su-seng-chú, m̄-sī chin-chiàⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Hebrews12:9 Siū jio̍k-thé ê pē-bú koán-kàu, lán to chun-tiōng in, hô-hòng siū lêng-sèng ê Pē koán-kàu, lán kiám m̄ eng-kai koh-khah goān-ì sūn-chiông lâi tit-tio̍h oa̍h-miā?" 
Hebrews12:10 Jio̍k-thé ê pē-bú chiām-sî kú chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù koán-kàu, m̄-kú Siōng-tè ê koán-kàu sī beh hō͘ lán tit-tio̍h lī-ek, bo̍k-te̍k sī beh hō͘ lán ū-hūn tī I ê sèng-kiat." 
Hebrews12:11 Lán ta̍k-piàn siū koán-kàu bōe kám-kak hoaⁿ-hí, hoán-tńg iu-siong; m̄-kú keng-kè koán-kàu thoàn-liān liáu-āu, ōe kiat hô-pêng ê ké-chí, kiâⁿ-chòe chèng-ti̍t." 
Hebrews12:12 Só͘-í, lín chiah-ê kha-sng-chhiú-nńg ê lâng tio̍h kian-kiông,khí-lâi." 
Hebrews12:13 Tio̍h siu-ti̍t lín beh kiâⁿ ê lō͘, chiah bián hō͘ pái ê kha thu̍t-lûn, hoán-tńg tit-tio̍h i-hó." 
Hebrews12:14 Tio̍h lô-le̍k kap chèng-lâng hô-bo̍k, kè sèng-kiat ê seng-oa̍h; nā bô, bô lâng ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h Chú." 
Hebrews12:15 Tio̍h kín-sīn, chiah bián ū lâng sit-khì Siōng-tè ê un-tián; chiah bián ū to̍k-chháu hoat,khí-lâi, chō-sêng gûi-hāi, tì-kàu chin chōe lâng siū ù-jiám;" 
Hebrews12:16 chiah bián ū lâng îm-loān, bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè, chhin-chhiūⁿ Í-sò ūi-tio̍h chi̍t-tǹg-chia̍h chhut-bōe tōa-kiáⁿ ê bêng-hūn." 
Hebrews12:17 Lín chai, āu-lâi i ài tit-tio̍h chiok-hok ê sî siū kū-choa̍t; sui-jiân i lâu ba̍k-sái khún-kiû mā bô tit-tio̍h, in-ūi i chhē bô ki-hōe thang hóe-kái." 
Hebrews12:18 Lín m̄-sī lâi kàu hit-ê bong ōe tio̍h ê Se-nāi-soaⁿ, tī hia ū hé-iām, ba̍t-hûn, o͘-àm, kap pō-hong," 
Hebrews12:19 koh ū lat-pah ê hiáng-siaⁿ kap kóng-ōe ê siaⁿ. Thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng khún-kiû Siōng-tè m̄-thang koh tùi in kóng-ōe," 
Hebrews12:20 in-ūi in bōe-tàng jím-siū bēng-lēng in ê ōe, kóng, “Liân cháu-siù nā kha̍p-tio̍h soaⁿ mā tio̍h ēng chio̍h-thâu tìm,sí.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Hit-ê kéng-siōng hui-siông thang kiaⁿ, tì-kàu Mô͘-se kóng, “Góa kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah.”" 
Hebrews12:22 M̄-kú, lín sī lâi kàu Sek-an-soaⁿ, éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê siâⁿ, thiⁿ-téng ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, tī hia ū chheng-chheng-bān-bān ê thiⁿ-sài chū-chi̍p khèng-chiok." 
Hebrews12:23 Lín lâi kàu Siōng-tè ê tōa-kiáⁿ chū-chi̍p ê hōe-só͘; in ê miâ í-keng kì tī thiⁿ-téng. Lín lâi kàu sím-phòaⁿ bān-lâng ê Siōng-tè bīn-chêng, kàu í-keng tit-tio̍h kái-chō chiâⁿ-chòe oân-choân ê gī-lâng ê lêng-hûn hia." 
Hebrews12:24 Lín lâi kàu sin ê iok ê tiong-kan-jîn Iâ-so͘ ê bīn-chêng, kap só͘ hiù ê huih hia, chit-ê huih pí A-pek ê huih só͘ piáu-ta̍t,ê koh-khah hó." 
Hebrews12:25 Tio̍h kín-sīn, m̄-thang kū-choa̍t teh tùi lín kóng-ōe Hit-ūi. Hiah-ê kū-choa̍t tī tōe-chiūⁿ kéng-kài in hit-ūi ê lâng to bōe-tàng thoat-lī chōe, lán nā kū-choa̍t tùi thiⁿ-téng kéng-kài lán Hit-ūi, koh-khah bōe-tàng thoat-lī." 
Hebrews12:26 Hit-sî I ê siaⁿ iô-tāng tāi-tōe, m̄-kú taⁿ I ū èng-ún kóng, “Koh chi̍t piàn, góa m̄-nā hō͘ tōe, mā beh hō͘ thiⁿ iô-tāng.”" 
Hebrews12:27 “Koh chi̍t piàn” chit-kù ōe chí-bêng, hiah-ê siū chō ê mi̍h siū iô-tāng, siū chhian-sóa, sī beh hō͘ hiah-ê bô siū iô-tāng,ê lâu,lo̍h-lâi." 
Hebrews12:28 Só͘-í, lán tio̍h kám-siā, in-ūi lán ū tit-tio̍h hit-ê bōe siū iô-tāng ê Kok-tō͘. Lán tio̍h chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê, ēng khiân-sêng kap kèng-ùi lâi ho̍k-sāi I," 
Hebrews12:29 in-ūi lán ê Siōng-tè sī thun-bia̍t ê hé. 
Hebrews13:1 Tio̍h kè-sio̍k saⁿ-chhin saⁿ-thiàⁿ. 
Hebrews13:2 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit hó khoán-thāi chhut-gōa-lâng. In-ūi ū lâng án-ni chòe, bô-ì-tiong chiap-thāi tio̍h thiⁿ-sài." 
Hebrews13:3 Tio̍h koan-hoâi siū koaiⁿ-kaⁿ ê lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ kap in teh tâng siū koaiⁿ; tio̍h koan-hoâi siū ge̍k-thāi ê lâng, chhin-chhiūⁿ lín pún-sin teh siū ge̍k-thāi." 
Hebrews13:4 Hun-in lâng-lâng tio̍h chun-tiōng; tio̍h pó-chhî sûn-kiat ê hu-chhe koan-hē, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe sím-phòaⁿ su-thong kiâⁿ-îm ê lâng." 
Hebrews13:5 M̄-thang tham-châi, ka-kī só͘-ū ê tio̍h ti-chiok, in-ūi Siōng-tè ū kóng, “Góa bōe lī-khui lí, mā bōe pàng-sak lí.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Só͘-í lán ōe-tàng hó-táⁿ kóng: Chú sī góa ê pang-chān, góa bōe kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, lâng ōe-tàng kā góa án-chóaⁿ?" 
Hebrews13:7 Tio̍h siàu-liām ín-chhōa lín, thoân Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit hō͘ lín ê lâng, chù-ì khòaⁿ in ê seng-oa̍h kap kiat-kio̍k lâi ha̍k-si̍p in ê sìn." 
Hebrews13:8 Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chā-ji̍t, kim-ji̍t, ti̍t-kàu éng-oán lóng bōe kái-piàn." 
Hebrews13:9 Lín m̄-thang hō͘ ta̍k-khoán kî-īⁿ ê kàu-gī chhōa bê-lō͘, in-ūi sim-lêng khah hó tio̍h khò Siōng-tè ê un-tián lâi kian-kò͘, m̄-sī khò chia̍h-mi̍h. Khò chun-siú chia̍h-mi̍h kui-lē ê lâng lóng bô tit-tio̍h lī-ek." 
Hebrews13:10 Lán ū chi̍t ê chè-tôaⁿ, téng-bīn ê chè-mi̍h tī hōe-bō͘ lāi ho̍k-sāi ê lâng bô koân thang chia̍h." 
Hebrews13:11 In ê tōa-chè-si tòa cheng-siⁿ ê huih chìn-ji̍p Chì-sèng-só͘ ūi-tio̍h jîn-bîn sio̍k-chōe, cheng-siⁿ ê seng-khu khiok tī iâⁿ-gōa sio." 
Hebrews13:12 Só͘-í, ūi-tio̍h beh ēng ka-kī ê huih hō͘ jîn-bîn tit-tio̍h kiat-chēng, Iâ-so͘ mā tī iâⁿ-gōa hi-seng lâi sí." 
Hebrews13:13 Án-ni, lán tio̍h chhut-khì iâⁿ-gōa, khì I hia, kap I tâng siū lêng-jio̍k." 
Hebrews13:14 In-ūi tī chia lán bô éng-kiú ê siâⁿ; lán sī teh chhē hit-ê teh-beh lâi ê siâⁿ. 
Hebrews13:15 Só͘-í, lán tio̍h thong-kè Iâ-so͘ kè-sio̍k chiong chheng-chàn ê chè hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè, che sī soan-jīn Chú ê miâ ê lâng ê chhùi-tûn só͘ kiat ê ké-chí." 
Hebrews13:16 Tio̍h ōe-kì-tit chòe hó-sū, hō͘-siōng pang-chān, in-ūi che sī Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê chè-mi̍h." 
Hebrews13:17 Tio̍h ho̍k-chiông ín-chhōa lín ê lâng, thiaⁿ-thàn in ê ōe, in-ūi in put-sî teh khòaⁿ-kò͘ lín ê lêng-hûn, thang hō͘ in tùi Siōng-tè kau-tài chheng-chhó. Lín tio̍h hō͘ in hoaⁿ-hí kang-chok, bô thó͘-khùi; nā bô, tùi lín bô lī-ek." 
Hebrews13:18 Tio̍h kè-sio̍k ūi-tio̍h goán kî-tó; goán khak-sìn ka-kī ū chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim, ì-ài hoān-sū chiàu-khí-kang seng-oa̍h." 
Hebrews13:19 Góa khún-kiû lín tio̍h te̍k-pia̍t ūi-tio̍h góa kî-tó, kiû Siōng-tè hō͘ góa thang khah kín khì lín hia." 
Hebrews13:20 Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h. I thong-kè Iâ-so͘ só͘ lâu ê huih khak-li̍p éng-oán ê iok, hō͘ Iâ-so͘ chiâⁿ-chòe iûⁿ-kûn ê Tōa-bo̍k-chiá. Goān chit-ūi sù pêng-an ê Siōng-tè hō͘ lín tī ta̍k-hāng hó-sū oân-choân lâi kiâⁿ I ê chí-ì, thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tī lán tiong-kan sêng-chiū I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê sū! Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ Siōng-tè, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
Hebrews13:21  
Hebrews13:22 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, góa hō͘ lín ê phoe bô jōa tn̂g, góa khǹg lín nāi-sim thiaⁿ góa khoàn-bián ê ōe." 
Hebrews13:23 Góa ài lín chai, lán ê hiaⁿ-tī Thê-mô͘-thài í-keng chhut-ga̍k; i nā khah chá lâi, góa ōe sûi-sî kap i chòe-hé khì khòaⁿ lín." 
Hebrews13:24 Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā lín só͘-ū ê léng-tō-chiá kap lóng-chóng ê sìn-tô͘ chhéng-an. Tùi Ì-tāi-lī lâi ê sìn-tô͘ mā beh kā lín chhéng-an. 
Hebrews13:25 Goān Siōng-tè ê un-tián kap lín tāi-ke tông-chāi. Amen! 
James1:1 Góa Ngá-kok sī Siōng-tè kap Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn, beh kā só͘-ū hun-sòaⁿ tī ta̍k só͘-chāi Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn chhéng-an." 
James1:2 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tú-tio̍h ta̍k-khoán chhì-liān ê sî, tio̍h siūⁿ-chòe sī thang hoaⁿ-hí ê tāi-chì," 
James1:3 in-ūi chai-iáⁿ lín ê sìn-sim keng-kè khó-giām ōe sán-seng jím-nāi. 
James1:4 Lín tio̍h jím-nāi kàu lō͘-bé chiah ōe-tàng ta̍t-kàu oân-choân koh oân-chéng, lóng bô khoat-tiám." 
James1:5 Lín tiong-kan nā ū lâng khiàm-kheh tì-hūi, tio̍h tùi Siōng-tè kî-kiû, I ōe sù hō͘ lín, in-ūi Siōng-tè ōe chin khóng-khài bô pó-liû sù hō͘ lóng-chóng ê lâng." 
James1:6 Put-kò, lín tio̍h khò sìn-sim kî-kiû, m̄-thang giâu-gî; giâu-gî ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-éng hō͘ hong sàu, khí-khí-lo̍h-lo̍h." 
James1:7 Chit-khoán lâng sam-sim-lióng-ì, só͘ chòe bô tēng-sèng, bián siūⁿ-beh tùi Chú tit-tio̍h sím-mi̍h." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Sàn-chhiah ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè thê-seng, tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí;" 
James1:10 hù-jū ê lâng siū Siōng-tè kàng-kē, mā tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí. Hù-jū ê lâng ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu hoe siā,khì." 
James1:11 Ji̍t-thâu chi̍t-ē chhut, sio-hong chi̍t-ē chhe, chháu ta,khì, hoe siā,khì, i ê súi chiū siau-sit. Hù-jū ê lâng mā-sī án-ni, ōe tī bô-êng phun-pho ê tiong-kan siau-sit." 
James1:12 Jím-siū chhì-liān ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; in-ūi i ū keng-kè khó-giām, ōe niá-siū Siōng-tè èng-ún hō͘ thiàⁿ I ê lâng oa̍h-miā ê hoa-koan." 
James1:13 Lâng siū ín-iú ê sî, m̄-thang kóng “Góa hō͘ Siōng-tè ín-iú”, in-ūi Siōng-tè bōe siū siâ-ok iú-he̍k, I ka-kī mā bōe ín-iú lâng." 
James1:14 Lâng siū ín-iú, sī hō͘ ka-kī ê io̍k-bōng ín-iú hām-hāi." 
James1:15 Io̍k-bōng hoâi-īn chiū siⁿ-chhut chōe-ok; chōe-ok sêng-se̍k chiū sán-seng sí-bông. 
James1:16 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, m̄-thang siū khi-phiàn." 
James1:17 It-chhè bí-hó ê siúⁿ-sù kap it-chhè oân-choân ê un-sù sī tùi thiⁿ-téng kng-bêng ê Goân-thâu só͘ sù. I bô kái-piàn, mā bô thian-thé tńg-se̍h ín-khí ê iáⁿ." 
James1:18 I chiàu ka-kī ê chí-ì ēng chin-lí ê tō lâi chō lán, hō͘ lán tī siū-chō ê bān-mi̍h tiong ū siōng tiōng-iàu ê tōe-ūi." 
James1:19 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h chai! Ta̍k-ê lâng tio̍h kip beh thiaⁿ; m̄-thang kip beh kóng; m̄-thang kip beh siū-khì;" 
James1:20 in-ūi lâng ê siū-khì bōe-tàng si̍t-hiān Siōng-tè kong-gī ê iau-kiû. 
James1:21 Só͘-í, tio̍h siau-tû it-chhè lâ-sâm ê si̍p-koàn kap koàn-boán ê siâ-ok; tio̍h ēng un-jiû ê sim chiap-la̍p hit-ê chèng tī lín sim-lāi ōe-tàng kiù lín ê tō." 
James1:22 Tio̍h si̍t-hêng tō-lí, m̄-thang phiàn ka-kī kóng kan-ta thiaⁿ tō-lí chiū hó." 
James1:23 Nā ū lâng thiaⁿ tō-lí bô si̍t-hêng, i chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng chiò-kiàⁿ khòaⁿ ka-kī ê bīn-siòng," 
James1:24 siông-sè khòaⁿ liáu-āu, chi̍t-ē lī-khui, sûi-sî bōe-kì-tit ka-kī siⁿ-chòe siáⁿ-khoán." 
James1:25 M̄-kú ū teh siông-sè chhâ-khó hō͘ lâng tit-tio̍h chū-iû hit-ê oân-chéng ê Lu̍t-hoat, koh ū teh kian-siú ê lâng, i ê só͘-chòe it-tēng ōe tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè sù-hok, in-ūi i ū si̍t-chāi khì si̍t-hêng, m̄-sī thiaⁿ-liáu chiū bōe-kì,tit." 
James1:26 Nā ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng ka-kī chin kèng-khiân, m̄-kú bô khòng-chè ka-kī ê chhùi-chi̍h, sī teh khi-phiàn ka-kī, chit-ê lâng ê kèng-khiân lóng bô lō͘-ēng." 
James1:27 Chiàu-kò͘ khó͘-lān tiong ê ko͘-jî kóaⁿ-hū, koh pó-siú ka-kī bô jiám-tio̍h sè-sio̍k ê hú-pāi, tùi Pē Siōng-tè khòaⁿ,khí-lâi, che chiah sī sûn-choân bô khoat-tiám ê kèng-khiân." 
James2:1 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, kì-jiân lín sìn lán êng-kng ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, tio̍h m̄-thang ēng gōa-piáu tùi-thāi lâng." 
James2:2 Nā ū chi̍t ê kòa kim chhiú-chí, chhēng súi-saⁿ ê hó-gia̍h-lâng ji̍p-lâi lín ê hōe-tn̂g, koh ū chi̍t ê chhēng phòa-saⁿ ê sàn-chhiah-lâng ji̍p,lâi," 
James2:3 lín kan-ta chù-ì hit-ê chhēng súi-saⁿ,ê, tùi i kóng “Chhiáⁿ lâi chē tōa-ūi”, tùi hit-ê sàn-chhiah-lâng kóng “Lí khiā tiàm hia”, á-sī kóng “Chē góa ê kha-tiam piⁿ”," 
James2:4 án-ni lín kiám m̄-sī phian-sim, ēng pháiⁿ ê tōng-ki teh phòaⁿ-toàn lâng?" 
James2:5 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h thiaⁿ! Siōng-tè ū kéng-soán sè-kan ê sàn-chhiah-lâng, hō͘ in tī sìn-gióng siōng hù-chiok, thang sêng-chiap I èng-ún hō͘ thiàⁿ I ê lâng ê Kok-tō͘." 
James2:6 M̄-kú lín bú-jio̍k sàn-chhiah-lâng! Ap-pek lín, thoa lín chiūⁿ hoat-têng,ê, kiám m̄-sī hiah-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng?" 
James2:7 In chiah sī húi-pòng lín só͘ niá-siū chun-kùi ê miâ hiah-ê lâng! 
James2:8 Lín nā chun-thàn Sèng-keng só͘ kì-chài “Tio̍h thiàⁿ chhù-piⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ thiàⁿ ka-kī” hit-ê Siōng-tè-kok ê Lu̍t-hoat, án-ni chiū tio̍h." 
James2:9 M̄-kú lín nā khòaⁿ gōa-piáu tùi-thāi lâng chiū-sī hoān-chōe, siū Lu̍t-hoat phòaⁿ-chòe hoān-hoat." 
James2:10 Lâng nā bô siú Lu̍t-hoat tiong ê chi̍t tiâu kài-bēng, chiū-sī bô siú choân-pō͘ ê Lu̍t-hoat." 
James2:11 In-ūi Hit-ūi bēng-lēng “M̄-thang hoān kan-îm” ê, mā kóng “M̄-thang hāi-sí lâng”. Sui-jiân lí bô hoān kan-îm, lí nā hāi-sí lâng chiū-sī ûi-hoān Lu̍t-hoat." 
James2:12 Kì-jiân lín teh-beh siū hō͘ lâng chū-iû ê Lu̍t-hoat sím-phòaⁿ, tio̍h chiàu Lu̍t-hoat ê iau-kiû kóng-ōe, chòe tāi-chì." 
James2:13 In-ūi, bô ēng chû-pi tùi-thāi lâng,ê, tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî, Siōng-tè bōe ēng chû-pi tùi-thāi i; chû-pi iâⁿ-kè sím-phòaⁿ." 
James2:14 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, nā ū lâng kóng i ū sìn, m̄-kú bô ēng hêng-ûi lâi chèng-bêng, ū siáⁿ lō͘-ēng? Hit-khoán ê sìn kiám ōe kiù i?" 
James2:15 Lín tiong-kan nā ū hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē bô saⁿ thang chhēng, saⁿ-tǹg bô thang chia̍h," 
James2:16 lín kan-ta tùi in kóng, “Chiok lín pêng-an, tio̍h chhēng hō͘ sio, chia̍h hō͘ pá!” M̄-kú bô kiong-kip in jio̍k-thé só͘ su-iàu ê mi̍h, ū siáⁿ lō͘-ēng?" 
James2:17 Só͘-í, chí-ū sìn-sim, nā bô hêng-ûi, sī sí,ê." 
James2:18 M̄-kú ū lâng beh kóng, “Lí ū sìn-sim, góa ū hêng-ûi; chhiáⁿ lí hō͘ góa khòaⁿ bô hêng-ûi ê sìn-sim, góa chiū ēng hêng-ûi hō͘ lí khòaⁿ góa ê sìn-sim.”" 
James2:19 Lí sìn Siōng-tè chí-ū chi̍t ūi, án-ni chin tio̍h; liân kúi mā sìn, sīm-chì kiaⁿ kah phi̍h-phi̍h-chhoah." 
James2:20 Lí ná bōe-hiáu siūⁿ, lí ài-beh chai,bô? Bô hêng-ûi ê sìn-sim bô lō͘-ēng." 
James2:21 Lán ê chó͘-sian A-pek-la-hán hiàn ka-kī ê kiáⁿ Í-sat tī chè-tôaⁿ téng, kiám m̄-sī tùi chit-ê hêng-ûi hō͘ Siōng-tè kā i chheng-chòe gī-lâng?" 
James2:22 Khó-kiàn, sìn-sim kap i ê hêng-ûi chòe-hé ūn-chok; sìn-sim thong-kè hêng-ûi chiah oân-chéng." 
James2:23 Che sī èng-giām Sèng-keng só͘ kóng, “ A-pek-la-hán sìn Siōng-tè, in-ūi án-ni, Siōng-tè chiū kā i sǹg-chòe gī”; i mā chheng-chòe Siōng-tè ê pêng-iú." 
James2:24 Khó-kiàn, lâng siū chiap-la̍p chòe gī-lâng sī tùi hêng-ûi, m̄-sī kan-ta tùi sìn." 
James2:25 Ki-lú Lat-ha̍p ê chêng-hêng mā-sī án-ni. I chiap-la̍p Í-sek-lia̍t -lâng ê sù-chiá, pang-chān in tùi pa̍t-tiâu lō͘ tô-cháu, án-ni i kiám m̄-sī tùi hêng-ûi siū chiap-la̍p chòe gī-lâng?" 
James2:26 Seng-khu bô khùi sī sí,ê; sìn-sim bô hêng-ûi mā-sī sí,ê. 
James3:1 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tiong-kan m̄-thang ū chin chōe lâng choh kàu-su. Lán chai, lán choh kàu-su ê lâng ōe siū khah giâm-keh ê sím-phòaⁿ." 
James3:2 In-ūi lán tāi-ke lóng siông-siông hoān chin chōe chhò-gō͘; kóng-ōe bô chhò-gō͘,ê sī oân-choân ê lâng, i ōe-hiáu khòng-chè ka-kī." 
James3:3 Lán ēng bé-kā-kiuⁿ tàu tī bé ê chhùi,ni̍h, hō͘ in sûn-ho̍k, thang khòng-chè kui-chiah bé ê hêng-tōng." 
James3:4 Koh khòaⁿ, chûn sui-jiân hiah tōa chiah, hō͘ tōa-hong chhe, phah, chí-ū ēng chi̍t ki sòe-sòe ê chûn-tōa kā i khòng-chè, sái-chûn ê lâng chiū ōe-tàng chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù sái." 
James3:5 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, chhùi-chi̍h sī sòe ê khì-koan, iáu-kú ōe kóng tōa-ōe. Koh siūⁿ-khòaⁿ leh, chi̍t-tiám-á hé-chhiⁿ mā ōe hō͘ kui-ê chhiū-nâ lóng sio,khì." 
James3:6 Chhùi-chi̍h sī hé. Tī lán ê chi-thé tiong, chhùi-chi̍h sī siâ-ok ê sè-kài, ōe ù-jiám lán kui seng-khu. Chit-ê hé sī tùi tōe-ge̍k tiám-to̍h,ê, ōe hō͘ lâng kui-ê jîn-seng sio-bia̍t." 
James3:7 Lâng ōe-tàng chè-ho̍k ta̍k-chióng iá-siù, pe-chiáu, thâng-thōa, kap hî-lūi; kî-si̍t mā í-keng kā in lóng chè-ho̍k lah." 
James3:8 M̄-kú, bô lâng ōe-tàng chè-ho̍k chhùi-chi̍h; chhùi-chi̍h sī bô lâng khòng-chè ōe tiâu ê siâ-ok, chhiong-móa tì-miā ê to̍k." 
James3:9 Lán ēng chhùi-chi̍h o-ló Chú lán ê Pē, mā ēng chhùi-chi̍h chiù-chó͘ chiàu Siōng-tè ka-kī ê hêng-siōng só͘ chō ê lâng." 
James3:10 Kám-siā kap chiù-chó͘ ê ōe lóng tùi kâng chi̍t ê chhùi chhut. Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, án-ni sī bô eng-kai!" 
James3:11 Tùi kâng chi̍t ê chôaⁿ-goân kiám ōe chhèng-chhut tiⁿ,ê kap khó͘ ê chúi! 
James3:12 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, bû-hoa-kó-chhiū kiám ōe siⁿ kaⁿ-ná? Phû-tô-chhiū kiám ōe siⁿ bû-hoa-kó? Kiâm ê chúi-goân mā bōe chhut tiⁿ ê chúi!" 
James3:13 Lín tiong-kan sím-mi̍h-lâng ū tì-hūi, ū kiàn-sek? Nā ū, tio̍h ēng khiam-pi kap tì-hūi, thong-kè ka-kī ê hó phín-hēng piáu-hiān,chhut-lâi." 
James3:14 Lín sim-lāi nā ū ok-to̍k, oàn-tò͘, kap chū-su, chiū m̄-thang khoa-kháu, kóng pe̍h-chha̍t tí-te̍k chin-lí." 
James3:15 Chit-khoán tì-hūi m̄-sī tùi thiⁿ-téng lâi,ê, sī sio̍k tōe-chiūⁿ, sio̍k hiat-khì, sio̍k Mô͘-kúi." 
James3:16 In-ūi ū oàn-tò͘ kap chū-su chiū ū hūn-loān kap ta̍k-hāng pháiⁿ hêng-ûi. 
James3:17 Tùi téng-bīn lâi ê tì-hūi, thâu chi̍t hāng sī sûn-kiat, koh-lâi sī hô-pêng, un-hô, ū tō͘-liōng, chhiong-móa chû-pi, koh gâu kiat hó ké-chí, bô phian-su, bô hu-ké." 
James3:18 Kong-gī sī chhiok-chìn hô-pêng ê lâng ēng hô-pêng iā ê chéng-chí só͘ kiat ê ké-chí. 
James4:1 Lín tiong-kan ê tò͘-cheng kap cheng-chip tùi tó-ūi lâi? Kiám m̄-sī tùi lín chi-thé tiong-kan put-sî teh cheng-chip kap tò͘-cheng ê io̍k-bōng lâi? 
James4:2 Lín siūⁿ-beh tit,tio̍h, tit bōe tio̍h, chiū beh thâi-lâng. Lín io̍k-bōng móa-móa, m̄-kú bōe-tàng boán-chiok, chiū cheng-chip tò͘-cheng. Lín tit bōe tio̍h só͘ ài,ê, in-ūi bô tùi Siōng-tè kiû." 
James4:3 Lín kî-kiû, m̄-kú tit bōe tio̍h, in-ūi lín ê tōng-ki m̄ hó, só͘ kiû,ê kan-ta sī beh boán-chiok ka-kī ê khoài-lo̍k." 
James4:4 Lín chiah-ê m̄-sìn ê lâng ah, kiám m̄ chai kap sè-kan choh pêng-iú chiū-sī kap Siōng-tè choh tùi-te̍k?" 
James4:5 Sèng-keng kóng, “Siōng-tè chhim-chhim ì-ài I khǹg tī lán lāi-bīn ê Sîn”, lín siūⁿ Sèng-keng só͘ siá chit-kù ōe bô ì-sù sī,bô?" 
James4:6 Put-kò Siōng-tè sù lán ê un-tián koh-khah tōa. In-ūi án-ni, Sèng-keng ū kóng: Siōng-tè te̍k-tùi kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng, si-un hō͘ khiam-pi ê lâng." 
James4:7 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h sūn-ho̍k Siōng-tè, hoán-khòng Mô͘-kúi, Mô͘-kúi chiū ōe tô-cháu lī-khui lín." 
James4:8 Tio̍h chhin-kūn Siōng-tè, Siōng-tè chiū ōe chhin-kūn lín. Chōe-jîn ah, tio̍h sóe lín ê chhiú; bô tēng-sèng ê lâng ah, tio̍h kiat-chēng lín ê sim." 
James4:9 Tio̍h pi-siong, ai-thòng, thî-khàu; tio̍h hō͘ lín ê khoài-lo̍k pìⁿ-chòe pi-ai, hoaⁿ-hí pìⁿ-chòe iu-chhiû." 
James4:10 Tio̍h tī Chú ê bīn-chêng khiam-pi, I chiū ōe kā lín ko-seng." 
James4:11 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, m̄-thang hō͘-siōng kóng pháiⁿ-ōe. Kóng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē ê pháiⁿ-ōe, phoe-phòaⁿ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, chiū-sī kóng Lu̍t-hoat ê pháiⁿ-ōe, phoe-phòaⁿ Lu̍t-hoat. Lí nā phoe-phòaⁿ Lu̍t-hoat chiū m̄-sī Lu̍t-hoat ê chun-siú-chiá, sī Lu̍t-hoat ê phoe-phòaⁿ-chiá." 
James4:12 Lu̍t-hoat ê chè-tēng-chiá kap sím-phòaⁿ-chiá chí-ū chi̍t ūi, I ōe chín-kiù, mā ōe húi-bia̍t. Lí sī siáⁿ-lâng, ná káⁿ phoe-phòaⁿ lí ê chhù-piⁿ?" 
James4:13 Eh, lín thiaⁿ góa kóng. Ū lâng kóng “Kin-á-ji̍t á-sī bîn-á-chài goán beh khì bó͘ chi̍t ê siâⁿ, tī hia tòa chi̍t nî, chòe seng-lí thàn-chîⁿ”." 
James4:14 Lín liân bîn-á-chài sìⁿ-miā ōe pìⁿ án-chóaⁿ to m̄ chai! Lín ká-ná bông-bū chhut-hiān chi̍t-ē-á kú liâm-piⁿ chiū siau-sit. 
James4:15 Lín eng-kai án-ni kóng, “Chú nā goān-ì, goán chiū ōe oa̍h, thang chòe chit-hāng chòe hit-hāng.”" 
James4:16 Lín hiān-chāi káⁿ kiau-ngō͘ chū-tāi; chit-khoán ê kiau-ngō͘ lóng sī siâ-ok. 
James4:17 Só͘-í, lâng chai-iáⁿ tio̍h chòe hó-sū, bô khì chòe chiū-sī hoān-chōe." 
James5:1 Eh, lín chiah-ê hó-gia̍h-lâng, chù-ì thiaⁿ, tio̍h ūi-tio̍h teh-beh siū ê chai-lān ai-siong thî-khàu!" 
James5:2 Lín ê châi-hù í-keng pāi-hoāi, lín ê i-ho̍k í-keng hō͘ chiù-thâng kā-phòa." 
James5:3 Lín ê kim, gûn siⁿ-sian, chiah-ê sian ōe chiâⁿ-chòe khòng-kò lín ê chèng-kù, koh ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ hé sio-bia̍t lín ê seng-khu. Lín ūi-tio̍h chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí chek-chū chîⁿ-châi." 
James5:4 Tī lín ê chhân-hn̂g ūi lín chòe kang kā lín siu-koah ê lâng, lín bô kang-chîⁿ hō͘ in. Tio̍h thiaⁿ in kiò-khó͘ ê siaⁿ! Hiah-ê siu-koah ê kang-lâng ho͘-kiò ê siaⁿ, Chú — Bān-kun ê Thóng-sòe í-keng ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h." 
James5:5 Lín tī tōe-chiūⁿ hióng-siū chhia-hoa iàn-lo̍k. Lín ka-kī chia̍h kah pûi-chut-chut, teh tán hō͘ lâng thâi ê ji̍t." 
James5:6 Lín kā bû-ko͘ ê lâng tēng-chōe, kā i sat-hāi, i mā bô kā lín tí-khòng." 
James5:7 Só͘-í, hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h jím-nāi kàu Chú lâi-lîm. Lín khòaⁿ, lông-hu án-chóaⁿ thèng-hāu chhân,ni̍h pó-kùi ê siu-sêng; i nāi-sim thèng-hāu chhun-lîm chhiu-ú." 
James5:8 Lín mā tio̍h jím-nāi. Lín ê sim tio̍h kian-tēng, in-ūi Chú ê lâi-lîm kūn lah." 
James5:9 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, m̄-thang hō͘-siōng bâi-oàn, chiah bián siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ. Lín khòaⁿ, Sím-phòaⁿ-chiá khiā tī mn̂g-kháu lah." 
James5:10 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, tio̍h ēng hiah-ê hōng Chú ê miâ kóng-ōe ê sian-ti chòe jím-siū khó͘-lān ê bô͘-iūⁿ." 
James5:11 Hiah-ê thun-lún kàu-bé ê lâng, lán khòaⁿ in chòe ū hok-khì. Lín bat thiaⁿ-kìⁿ Iok-pek ê jím-nāi, chai Chú chòe-āu ū án-chóaⁿ kā i chiàu-kò͘, in-ūi Chú chhiong-móa lîn-bín kap chû-ài." 
James5:12 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, siōng tiōng-iàu,ê chiū-sī, m̄-thang kí thiⁿ, tōe, á-sī sím-mi̍h mi̍h-kiāⁿ chiù-chōa. “Sī” chiū kóng “sī”, “m̄-sī” chiū kóng “m̄-sī”; án-ni lín chiah bián siū Siōng-tè sím-phòaⁿ." 
James5:13 Lín tiong-kan ū thòng-khó͘ ê lâng bô? Nā ū, i tio̍h kî-tó. Lín tiong-kan ū hoaⁿ-hí ê lâng bô? Nā ū, i tio̍h chhiùⁿ chheng-chàn ê si-koa." 
James5:14 Lín tiong-kan ū phòa-pīⁿ ê lâng bô? Nā ū, i tio̍h chhiáⁿ kàu-hōe ê tiúⁿ-ló thòe i kî-tó, hōng Chú ê miâ kā i boah-iû." 
James5:15 Ū sìn-sim ê kî-tó ōe kiù pīⁿ-lâng; Chú ōe hō͘ i koh hó,khí-lâi, i só͘ hoān ê chōe mā ōe tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
James5:16 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h hō͘-siōng jīn-chōe, saⁿ-thòe kî-tó, thang hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h i-hó. Gī-lâng ê kî-tó ū tōa kong-hāu." 
James5:17 Í-lī-a kap lán pîⁿ-pîⁿ sī lâng. I pek-chhiat kî-tó m̄-thang lo̍h-hō͘, kó-jiân ū saⁿ nî pòaⁿ kú tōe-chiūⁿ bô lo̍h-hō͘." 
James5:18 I koh kî-tó, thiⁿ kó-jiân lo̍h tōa-hō͘, thó͘-tōe chiū seng-sán ngó͘-kok." 
James5:19 Góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tiong-kan nā ū lâng phian-lī chin-lí, ū lâng koh kā i chhōa tò-tńg,lâi," 
James5:20 lín tio̍h chai, hō͘ sit-bê,ê tò-tńg,lâi hit-ê lâng ōe kiù chōe-jîn ê lêng-hûn thoat-lī sí-bông, hō͘ i chin chōe ê chōe tit-tio̍h jia-khàm." 
1Peter1:1 Góa Pí-tek sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘, góa siá-phoe hō͘ siū kéng-soán hun-sòaⁿ tī Pún-to͘, Ka-lia̍p-thài, Ka-phà-to-ka, A-sè-a, Pì-chhui-nî téng só͘-chāi kià-ku ê lâng." 
1Peter1:2 Lín siū kéng-soán sī chiàu Pē Siōng-tè ū-tēng ê chí-ì, tùi Sèng Sîn chiâⁿ-chòe sèng-kiat, thang sūn-ho̍k Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, koh tùi I ê huih tit-tio̍h kiat-chēng. Goān Siōng-tè hong-hong-hù-hù sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an!" 
1Peter1:3 Tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê Pē Siōng-tè! Kun-kù I bô-hān ê jîn-chû, thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, Siōng-tè ū hō͘ lán têng-chhut-sì thang tit-tio̍h oa̍h-oa̍h ê ǹg-bāng," 
1Peter1:4 lâi sêng-siū I ūi-tio̍h lín pó-chûn tī thiⁿ,ni̍h hit-ê bōe hiú-nōa, bōe phah lâ-sâm, bōe siau-sit ê hok-khì." 
1Peter1:5 Che sī beh hō͘ lín chiah-ê thong-kè sìn siū I ê tōa lêng-le̍k pó-siú ê lâng, thang tit-tio̍h chún-pī tī chiong-boa̍t ê sî-ki ōe si̍t-hiān ê chín-kiù." 
1Peter1:6 Ūi-tio̍h án-ni, sui-jiân lín hiān-chāi chiām-sî iáu tio̍h siū chióng-chióng ê chhì-liān sim kan-khó͘, lín tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí." 
1Peter1:7 Che sī beh chèng-bêng lín ê sìn-sim kham-tit siū khó-giām, pí hō͘ hé liān,kè iáu ōe pāi-hoāi ê kim koh-khah pó-kùi, thang hō͘ lín tī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hián-hiān ê sî tit-tio̍h chheng-chàn, êng-kng, kap chun-kùi." 
1Peter1:8 Lín sui-jiân m̄-bat khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, mā thiàⁿ I; hiān-chāi bô khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I, iáu-kú sìn I. Lín ū ēng giân-gú bōe-tàng piáu-ta̍t ke̍k-tōa ê hoaⁿ-hí," 
1Peter1:9 in-ūi lín ōe tit-tio̍h sìn ê kiat-kó, chiū-sī lêng-hûn ê tit-kiù." 
1Peter1:10 Koan-hē chit-ê chín-kiù, ū-giân lín ōe tit-tio̍h un-tián hiah-ê sian-ti í-keng ū gián-kiù koh siông-sè cha-khó." 
1Peter1:11 In tit-tio̍h tī in sim-lāi Ki-tok ê Sîn tùi in ê chí-sī, cha-khó koan-hē Ki-tok ê siū-khó͘ kap āu-lâi tit-tio̍h êng-kng chit-ê ū-giân ōe tī sím-mi̍h sî, ōe án-chóaⁿ si̍t-hiān." 
1Peter1:12 Siōng-tè ū kā in khé-sī, hō͘ in chai in ê sū-hōng m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h ka-kī, sī ūi-tio̍h lín. Chiah-ê sū hiān-chāi í-keng ū khò tùi thiⁿ lâi ê Sèng Sîn, thong-kè hok-im ê sù-chiá thoân hō͘ lín; chiah-ê sū liân thiⁿ-sài mā pek-chhiat teh thèng-hāu ài chai." 
1Peter1:13 Só͘-í, lín ê sim-chì tio̍h chún-pī hó-sè, tio̍h kéng-séng, choân-sim ǹg-bāng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hián-hiān ê sî só͘ beh sù lín ê un-tián." 
1Peter1:14 Tio̍h chòe sūn-ho̍k ê kiáⁿ-jî, m̄-thang chiàu lín í-chêng m̄ bat Siōng-tè ê sî teh hòng-chhiòng su-io̍k." 
1Peter1:15 Ho͘-tiàu lín ê Siōng-tè sī sèng-kiat, lín tī it-chhè ê hêng-ûi mā tio̍h sèng-kiat." 
1Peter1:16 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài, “Lín tio̍h sèng-kiat, in-ūi góa sī sèng-kiat.”" 
1Peter1:17 Lín kì-jiân kiû-kiò ēng kâng chi̍t ê phiau-chún, chiàu ta̍k-lâng ê hêng-ûi sím-phòaⁿ lâng Hit-ūi chòe Pē, chiū tio̍h ēng kèng-ùi ê sim tī sè-kan ê ji̍t-chí choh kiâu-bîn seng-oa̍h." 
1Peter1:18 In-ūi lín chai, lín siū sio̍k-hôe thoat-lī chó͘-sian lâu hō͘ lín hit-khoán bô lō͘-ēng ê thoân-thóng, m̄-sī ēng ōe pāi-hoāi ê kim-gûn," 
1Peter1:19 sī ēng hit-ūi bô khoat-tiám bô ù-tiám ê iûⁿ-ko Ki-tok só͘ lâu ê pó-huih. 
1Peter1:20 Ki-tok tī chhòng-chō ú-tiū í-chêng seng hō͘ Siōng-tè kéng-soán, tī chit-ê boa̍t-kî chiah ūi-tio̍h lín hián-hiān." 
1Peter1:21 Lín thong-kè Ki-tok sìn hō͘ I tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h koh sù I êng-kng hit-ūi Siōng-tè; án-ni, lín ê sìn kap ǹg-bāng lóng chāi-tī Siōng-tè." 
1Peter1:22 Lín í-keng tùi sūn-thàn chin-lí lâi kiat-chēng ka-kī, ū sûn-chin ê chhiú-chiok-chi-chêng, chiū tio̍h ēng chheng-khì ê sim tùi sim-tóe jia̍t-chhiat saⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
1Peter1:23 Lín têng-chhut-sì, m̄-sī tùi ōe pāi-hoāi, sī tùi bōe pāi-hoāi ê chéng-chí, chiū-sī thong-kè Siōng-tè oa̍h-oa̍h, éng-oán bōe bô,khì ê ōe." 
1Peter1:24 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Lâng lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu, in ê êng-hôa lóng chhin-chhiūⁿ chháu hoe; chháu ōe ta, hoe ōe siā," 
1Peter1:25 chóng-sī Chú ê ōe éng-oán chûn-chāi. Che chiū-sī thoân hō͘ lín ê hok-im ê sìn-sit. 
1Peter2:1 Só͘-í, tio̍h khì-sak it-chhè ê pháiⁿ, it-chhè ê khúi-chà, ké-hó, oàn-tò͘, kap it-chhè ê húi-pòng." 
1Peter2:2 Tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ tú chhut-sì ê eⁿ-á chin ài sûn ê sio̍k-lêng ê lin, hō͘ lín thang sêng-tióng kàu tit-tio̍h kiù;" 
1Peter2:3 in-ūi lín í-keng ū tam-tio̍h Chú ê jîn-chû. 
1Peter2:4 Tio̍h chhin-kūn Chú, I sī oa̍h-chio̍h, sui-jiân hō͘ lâng khì-sak, m̄-kú siū Siōng-tè kéng-soán khòaⁿ-chòe pó-kùi." 
1Peter2:5 Lín mā tio̍h choh oa̍h-chio̍h, hō͘ Siōng-tè ēng lâi khí-chō sio̍k-lêng ê tiān, koh choh sèng-kiat ê chè-si, thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok hiàn Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí sio̍k-lêng ê chè-mi̍h." 
1Peter2:6 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Khòaⁿ leh, góa beh tī Sek-an hē chi̍t tè chio̍h, sī siū-kéng pó-kùi ê chhù-kak-chio̍h; sìn I ê lâng choa̍t-tùi bōe sit-bāng." 
1Peter2:7 Chit-tè chio̍h tùi lín chiah-ê sìn ê lâng sī pó-kùi,ê, m̄-kú tùi m̄-sìn ê lâng, Khí-chhù sai-hū só͘ khì-sak ê chio̍h, í-keng chiâⁿ-chòe siōng tiōng-iàu ê ki-chio̍h!" 
1Peter2:8 Tī pa̍t-ūi ū kì-chài: Chit-tè sī poàn-kha-chio̍h, sī hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó ê chio̍h. In m̄ sūn-thàn tō-lí lâi poa̍h-tó sī Siōng-tè ê an-pâi." 
1Peter2:9 M̄-kú lín leh, lín sī siū kéng-soán ê chióng-cho̍k, ông-ka ê chè-si, sèng-kiat ê kok-tō͘, Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn, beh hō͘ lín thang soan-iông Siōng-tè úi-tāi ê chok-ûi; chit-ūi Siōng-tè ū tiàu lín chhut o͘-àm lâi ji̍p tī I chhàn-lān ê kng-bêng." 
1Peter2:10 Sèng-keng kóng: Lín chêng m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê chú-bîn, hiān-chāi sī I ê chú-bîn; lín chêng bô tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê lîn-bín, hiān-chāi tit-tio̍h I ê lîn-bín." 
1Peter2:11 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tī sè-kan choh kiâu-bîn, choh kià-ku,ê, góa khǹg lín m̄-thang hòng-chhiòng jio̍k-thé ê chêng-io̍k; chit-ê chêng-io̍k put-sî teh kong-kek lêng-hûn." 
1Peter2:12 Lín tī bī-sìn-chiá ê tiong-kan tio̍h ū hó hêng-ûi, hō͘ hiah-ê húi-pòng lín sī pháiⁿ-lâng ê lâng thang khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín ê hó hêng-ûi, tī Chú lâi-lîm ê Ji̍t kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
1Peter2:13 Ūi-tio̍h Chú ê iân-kò͘, lín tio̍h sūn-thàn lâng it-chhè ê chè-tō͘, bô-lūn sī tùi chòe ko ê thóng-tī-chiá kun-ông," 
1Peter2:14 á-sī tùi kun-ông só͘ phài-lâi chióng-lē chòe hó ê lâng, hêng-hoa̍t chòe pháiⁿ ê lâng ê koaⁿ-tiúⁿ lóng tio̍h án-ni." 
1Peter2:15 In-ūi che sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì; I ài lín chòe hó, hō͘ bô tì-sek ê gōng-lâng bô ōe thang kóng." 
1Peter2:16 Lín choh chū-iû ê lâng, m̄-thang ēng chū-iû chòe siâ-ok ê chià-kháu, tio̍h choh Siōng-tè ê po̍k-jîn." 
1Peter2:17 Lín tio̍h chun-tiōng só͘-ū ê lâng; tio̍h thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, kèng-ùi Siōng-tè, chun-kèng kun-ông." 
1Peter2:18 Lín choh po̍k-jîn,ê, tio̍h kiong-kèng sūn-thàn lín ê chú-lâng, m̄-nā tùi siān-liông un-hô ê chú-lâng, liân khek-po̍k,ê mā tio̍h án-ni." 
1Peter2:19 Tú-tio̍h bô eng-kai siū ê thòng-khó͘, nā liáu-kái sī Siōng-tè ê ì-sù lâi jím-siū sī thang chheng-chàn,ê." 
1Peter2:20 Lín nā chòe m̄-tio̍h hō͘ lâng phah lâi jím-siū thòng-khó͘, ū sím-mi̍h thé-biān? M̄-kú lín nā choh-hó lâi jím-siū khó͘-lān, che sī Siōng-tè só͘ chheng-chàn,ê." 
1Peter2:21 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê, Siōng-tè ho͘-tiàu lín; in-ūi Ki-tok mā ū ūi-tio̍h lín siū-khó͘, lâu bô͘-iūⁿ hō͘ lín, beh hō͘ lín thang tè I ê kha-pō͘." 
1Peter2:22 I bô hoān-chōe; I ê chhùi mā bô khúi-chà. 
1Peter2:23 I siū lóe-mē, bô mē tò-tńg; siū ge̍k-thāi, mā bô kā lâng ui-hia̍p; chí-ū chiong ka-kī kau-thok hō͘ hit-ūi kong-gī ê Sím-phòaⁿ-chiá." 
1Peter2:24 Ki-tok tī si̍p-jī-kè téng chhin-sin tam-tng lán ê chōe, hō͘ lán ǹg chōe sí, ǹg gī lâi oa̍h; tùi I ê siū-siong, lín tit-tio̍h i-tī." 
1Peter2:25 Lín í-chêng chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ bê-lō͘, hiān-chāi í-keng tńg-lâi kui tī lín lêng-hûn ê Bo̍k-chiá kap Kàm-hō͘-chiá." 
1Peter3:1 Siâng-khoán, lín choh hū-jîn-lâng,ê tio̍h sūn-ho̍k ka-kī ê tiōng-hu. Án-ni, in tiong-kan nā ū lâng bô sūn-thàn tō-lí, ōe tùi lín ê hó phín-hēng siū kám-hòa; lín lóng m̄-bián kóng pòaⁿ-kù ōe," 
1Peter3:2 in-ūi in ōe khòaⁿ-chhut lín ê seng-oa̍h sûn-kiat koh kèng-khiân. 
1Peter3:3 Lín m̄-thang khò pīⁿ thâu-mn̂g, kòa kim-khì, chhēng súi-saⁿ téng chng-thāⁿ," 
1Peter3:4 tio̍h khò lōe-chāi ê súi, ēng un-jiû kap an-chēng ê sèng-chêng chòe bōe pāi-hoāi ê chng-thāⁿ; che tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng sī siōng pó-kùi,ê." 
1Peter3:5 In-ūi chá-sî gióng-bōng Siōng-tè hiah-ê sèng-kiat ê hū-jîn-lâng mā-sī án-ni chng-thāⁿ ka-kī, sūn-ho̍k in ê tiōng-hu;" 
1Peter3:6 chhin-chhiūⁿ Sa-la sūn-chiông A-pek-la-hán, chheng-ho͘ i chòe “Chú-lâng”. Lín nā chòe hó-sū, bô siū khióng-hat tì-kàu kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, chiū-sī Sa-la ê cha-bó͘-kiáⁿ." 
1Peter3:7 Kâng-khoán, lín choh tiōng-hu,ê tio̍h kap ka-kī ê hū-jîn-lâng chòe-hé seng-oa̍h, thé-thiap in jio̍k-thé siōng khah loán-jio̍k. Tio̍h kā in chun-tiōng, in-ūi in mā kap lín pîⁿ-pîⁿ sī hun-hióng Siōng-tè un-sù ê oa̍h-miā ê lâng. Án-ni, lín ê kî-tó chiah bōe siū chó͘-gāi." 
1Peter3:8 Chóng kóng, lín lóng tio̍h tâng-sim, tâng-chêng, saⁿ-thiàⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, ū jîn-chû, sim chûn khiam-pi;" 
1Peter3:9 bô ēng pháiⁿ pò pháiⁿ, á-sī ēng bú-jio̍k tùi-hù bú-jio̍k; tian-tò tio̍h ēng chiok-hok hôe-pò, in-ūi lín sī ūi-tio̍h chit-ê siū ho͘-tiàu, hō͘ lín thang sêng-siū hok-khì." 
1Peter3:10 In-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Lâng nā ài sìⁿ-miā, ài kè hó ji̍t-chí, tio̍h kìm ka-kī ê chi̍h bô kóng pháiⁿ-ōe, kìm-chí chhùi-tûn bô kóng khúi-chà." 
1Peter3:11 Tio̍h kū-choa̍t pháiⁿ, chòe hó-sū, jia̍t-sim tui-kiû hô-pêng." 
1Peter3:12 In-ūi Chú ê ba̍k-chiu khòaⁿ-kò͘ gī-lâng, I ê hī-khang thiaⁿ in ê kî-tó; m̄-kú I ōe tùi choh-pháiⁿ ê lâng pìⁿ-bīn." 
1Peter3:13 Lín nā jia̍t-sim choh-hó, siáⁿ-lâng ōe hāi lín?" 
1Peter3:14 Chóng-sī lín nā ūi-tio̍h gī siū-khó͘, chiū ū hok-khì. M̄-bián kiaⁿ lâng ê ui-hia̍p, mā m̄-bián tio̍h-kip put-an." 
1Peter3:15 Tio̍h chun-chông Ki-tok chòe Chú. Nā ū lâng mn̄g lín sim-tiong ê ǹg-bāng, tio̍h put-sî chún-pī hó-sè thang tùi in piān-bêng." 
1Peter3:16 Put-kò tio̍h ēng un-hô kap chun-tiōng ê thài-tō͘ lâi hôe-tap. Tio̍h ū chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim, thang tī lín siū bú-jio̍k ê sî hō͘ hiah-ê bú-jio̍k lín ê lâng khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín khò Ki-tok só͘ piáu-hiān ê hó phín-hēng kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
1Peter3:17 Siū-khó͘ nā-sī Siōng-tè ê chí-ì, choh-hó lâi siū-khó͘ pí choh-pháiⁿ lâi siū-khó͘ khah hó." 
1Peter3:18 In-ūi Ki-tok mā bat ūi-tio̍h chōe siū-khó͘, chi̍t piàn chiū oân-sêng; gī ê lâng thòe put-gī ê lâng siū-khó͘, sī ūi-tio̍h beh chhōa lín kàu Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng. Tī jio̍k-thé, I siū chhú-sí; tī lêng, I ū koh-oa̍h." 
1Peter3:19 Thong-kè I ê lêng, I mā ū khì tùi hiah-ê tī kaⁿ-lāi ê lêng thoân-tō," 
1Peter3:20 chiū-sī Ná-a chún-pī tōa-chûn ê sî, Siōng-tè ū nāi-sim thèng-hāu hiah-ê m̄ sūn-ho̍k I ê lâng. Tng-sî chìn-ji̍p tōa-chûn ê lâng bô kúi ê, chí-ū poeh ê, in ū tùi chúi,ni̍h tit-tio̍h kiù." 
1Peter3:21 Chit-ê chúi ū-piáu sóe-lé, m̄-sī beh sóe-tû lín seng-khu ê lah-sap, sī beh hō͘ lín ū chheng-pe̍k ê liông-sim thang tùi Siōng-tè koat-chì; chit-ê sóe-lé thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê koh-oa̍h hō͘ lín tit-tio̍h chín-kiù." 
1Peter3:22 I í-keng chiūⁿ-thiⁿ, hiān-chāi tī Siōng-tè ê chiàⁿ-pêng teh chiáng-koán chèng thiⁿ-sài í-ki̍p lêng-kài ê chiáng-koân-chiá kap koân-le̍k-chiá." 
1Peter4:1 Ki-tok kì-jiân tī jio̍k-thé siū-khó͘, lín mā tio̍h ēng kâng-khoán ê sim-chì lâi chong-pī ka-kī, in-ūi tī jio̍k-thé siū-khó͘ sī kap chōe-ok toān-choa̍t koan-hē." 
1Peter4:2 Án-ni, lín tī sè-kan só͘ chhun ê ji̍t-chí chiū bô koh chiàu lâng ê chêng-io̍k, sī chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì lâi oa̍h." 
1Peter4:3 Lín ū lōng-hùi kong-im chòe bī-sìn-chiá só͘ ài chòe ê sū, îm-loān, sek-io̍k, chiú-chùi, iàn-lo̍k, tōa-chia̍h tōa-lim, kap khó-ò͘ⁿ ê ngó͘-siōng chông-pài téng, í-keng kàu-gia̍h lah." 
1Peter4:4 In khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lín bô koh kap in kè hòng-tōng bô chiat-chè ê seng-oa̍h, chiū kî-koài soah kā lín húi-pòng." 
1Peter4:5 In tio̍h tùi teh-beh sím-phòaⁿ oa̍h-lâng kap sí-lâng ê Siōng-tè kau-siàu. 
1Peter4:6 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê iân-kò͘, hok-im sīm-chì mā ū thoân hō͘ sí,khì ê lâng, hō͘ in ê jio̍k-thé sui-jiân tio̍h chiàu it-poaⁿ-lâng ê khoán siū sím-phòaⁿ, m̄-kú in ê lêng ōe-tàng chiàu Siōng-tè ê khoán lâi oa̍h." 
1Peter4:7 Bān-iú ê chiong-kio̍k kūn lah! Só͘-í, tio̍h kín-sīn siú-kí, thang kéng-séng kî-tó." 
1Peter4:8 Siōng iàu-kín,ê, sī tio̍h jia̍t-chhiat saⁿ-thiàⁿ, in-ūi thiàⁿ ōe jia-khàm chin chōe chōe-kò." 
1Peter4:9 Tio̍h hō͘-siōng hó khoán-thāi, m̄-thang bâi-oàn." 
1Peter4:10 Choh Siōng-tè só͘ sù ta̍k-hāng un-sù ê hó koán-ke, tio̍h chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng só͘ tit,tio̍h ê un-sù hō͘-siōng ho̍k-bū." 
1Peter4:11 Kóng tō-lí,ê, tio̍h kóng Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit; sū-hōng,ê, tio̍h chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ sù un-sù ê le̍k-liōng lâi sū-hōng, hō͘ Siōng-tè thong-kè Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tī bān-sū tit-tio̍h êng-iāu. Goān êng-kng koân-pèng lóng kui I, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
1Peter4:12 Chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tú-tio̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ hé ê chhì-liān, m̄-thang ná-chún tú-tio̍h kî-koài ê sū;" 
1Peter4:13 hoán-tńg tio̍h in-ūi ū hun-tam Ki-tok ê khó͘-lān lâi hoaⁿ-hí, hō͘ lín tī I êng-iāu hián-hiān ê sî mā thang hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k." 
1Peter4:14 Lín nā ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê miâ siū lêng-jio̍k, lín chin ū hok-khì, in-ūi ū Siōng-tè êng-kng ê Sîn tiàm tī lín sin-chiūⁿ." 
1Peter4:15 Lín tiong-kan m̄-thang ū lâng in-ūi thâi-lâng, choh-chha̍t, choh-pháiⁿ, á-sī ài koán pa̍t-lâng ê tāi-chì lâi siū-khó͘." 
1Peter4:16 Nā in-ūi choh Ki-tok-tô͘ lâi siū-khó͘, m̄-bián kiàn-siàu, hoán-tńg tio̍h in-ūi ū chit-ê miâ kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
1Peter4:17 Sím-phòaⁿ ê sî kàu lah! Siōng-tè ê ke tio̍h tāi-seng siū sím-phòaⁿ; nā tùi lán khai-sí, hiah-ê m̄ sìn-thàn Siōng-tè hok-im ê lâng ê kiat-kio̍k kiám bōe koh-khah giâm-tiōng?" 
1Peter4:18 Sèng-keng ū kóng: Gī-lâng tit-kiù to chin oh, bô kèng-khiân ê lâng kap chōe-jîn kiám bōe koh-khah khùn-lân?" 
1Peter4:19 Só͘-í, hiah-ê chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì siū-khó͘ ê lâng, tio̍h chiong ka-kī kau-thok hō͘ hit-ūi thang sìn-khò ê Chō-bu̍t-chú, kè-sio̍k chòe hó-sū." 
1Peter5:1 Góa choh tiúⁿ-ló, koh choh Ki-tok siū-khó͘ ê kiàn-chèng-jîn, ū-hūn tī I teh-beh hián-hiān ê êng-kng, góa kā lín tiong-kan pîⁿ-pîⁿ teh choh tiúⁿ-ló ê lâng khó͘-khǹg." 
1Peter5:2 Tio̍h bo̍k-ióng Siōng-tè kau-tài lín ê iûⁿ-kûn, kā in koàn-kò͘, m̄-sī bián-kióng, sī chiàu Siōng-tè ê chí-ì kam-sim lo̍k-ì; m̄-sī ūi-tio̍h tham-châi, sī chū-goān jia̍t-sim lâi chòe." 
1Peter5:3 Kau-tài hō͘ lín ê iûⁿ-kûn, m̄-thang ēng koân-ui koán-hat, tio̍h chòe in ê bô͘-iūⁿ." 
1Peter5:4 Án-ni, lín tī Tōa-bo̍k-chiá hián-hiān ê sî ōe tit-tio̍h éng-oán bōe sit-khì kong-chhái êng-kng ê hoa-koan." 
1Peter5:5 Siâng-khoán, lín siàu-liân-lâng tio̍h sūn-ho̍k tióng-pòe. Lín tāi-ke tio̍h khiam-pi saⁿ tùi-thāi; in-ūi Sèng-keng ū kì-chài: Siōng-tè te̍k-tùi kiau-ngō͘ ê lâng, si-un hō͘ khiam-pi ê lâng." 
1Peter5:6 Só͘-í, lín tio̍h tī Siōng-tè tōa khùi-la̍t ê chhiú-ē khiam-pi, I kàu sî chiū ōe kā lín ko-seng." 
1Peter5:7 Lín tio̍h chiong it-chhè ê khòa-lū kau hō͘ Siōng-tè, in-ūi I koan-sim lín." 
1Peter5:8 Tio̍h kín-sīn, tio̍h kéng-séng, in-ūi lín ê tùi-te̍k Mô͘-kúi chhin-chhiūⁿ teh háu ê sai, sì-kòe kiâⁿ teh chhē thang thun-chia̍h ê lâng." 
1Peter5:9 Tio̍h khò kian-tēng ê sìn-sim lâi tí-tng i, in-ūi lín chai choân sè-kài ê chèng hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē lóng teh keng-le̍k siâng-khoán ê khó͘-lān." 
1Peter5:10 Sù it-chhè un-tián ê Siōng-tè, chiū-sī thong-kè Ki-tok lâi ho͘-tiàu lín chìn-ji̍p éng-oán ê êng-kng Hit-ūi, tī lín chiām-sî siū-khó͘ í-āu, it-tēng ōe chhin-sin kā lín têng-sin kiàn-li̍p, sù lín khùi-la̍t, hō͘ lín kian-kò͘, khiā-chāi." 
1Peter5:11 Goān koân-lêng kui hō͘ I, ti̍t-kàu éng-oán. Amen!" 
1Peter5:12 Thong-kè tiong-si̍t ê hiaⁿ-tī Se-la, góa siá chit-tiuⁿ té-té ê phoe hō͘ lín, lâi bián-lē lín, koh kiàn-chèng che sī Siōng-tè chin-si̍t ê un-tián. Tio̍h tī chit-ê un-tián téng-bīn khiā-chāi." 
1Peter5:13 Tiàm tī Pa-pí-lûn kap lín pîⁿ-pîⁿ siū kéng-tiàu ê kàu-hōe kā lín chhéng-an. Góa ê kiáⁿ Má-khó mā kā lín chhéng-an. 
1Peter5:14 Tio̍h chhin-chhiat hō͘-siōng chhéng-an. Goān pêng-an kui tī lín só͘-ū sio̍k Ki-tok ê lâng! 
2Peter1:1 Góa Se-biān Pí-tek sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn kap sù-tô͘, góa siá-phoe hō͘ hiah-ê khò lán ê Siōng-tè kap Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê gī, kap goán chòe-hé niá-siū kâng-khoán pó-kùi sìn-gióng ê lâng." 
2Peter1:2 Goān lín thong-kè jīn-bat Siōng-tè kap lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ tit-tio̍h Siōng-tè só͘ sù hong-hong-hù-hù ê un-tián kap pêng-an! 
2Peter1:3 Siōng-tè ū ēng I ê lêng-le̍k chiong kèng-khiân ê seng-oa̍h só͘ su-iàu ê it-chhè sù hō͘ lán; che sī thong-kè lán jīn-bat tiàu lán lâi hun-hióng I ê êng-kng kap liông-siān hit-ūi Siōng-tè lâi,ê. 
2Peter1:4 Án-ni, I ū chiong ke̍k-tōa koh pó-kùi ê èng-ún sù hō͘ lán, hō͘ lín thong-kè chiah-ê èng-ún thang thoat-lī sè-chiūⁿ ê io̍k-bōng só͘ chō-sêng ê hú-pāi lâi hun-hióng Siōng-tè ê pún-sèng." 
2Peter1:5 Ūi-tio̍h chit-ê, lín tio̍h chīn-la̍t phah-piàⁿ, hō͘ lín ū sìn-sim koh ū tek-hēng, ū tek-hēng koh ū tì-sek," 
2Peter1:6 ū tì-sek koh ū chiat-chè, ū chiat-chè koh ū jím-nāi, ū jím-nāi koh ū kèng-khiân," 
2Peter1:7 ū kèng-khiân koh ū chhiú-chiok-chi-chêng, ū chhiú-chiok-chi-chêng koh ū jîn-ài." 
2Peter1:8 Chiah-ê sī lín só͘ su-iàu ê phín-tek. Chiah-ê lín nā lóng ū, koh ná chhiong-si̍t, ōe hō͘ lín koh-khah chek-ke̍k, koh-khah iú-hāu jīn-bat lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok." 
2Peter1:9 Lâng nā bô chiah-ê tek-hēng, sī toán-sī, sī sit-bêng, bōe-kì-tit i í-chêng ê chōe í-keng ū sóe chheng-khì." 
2Peter1:10 Só͘-í, góa ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, lín tio̍h koh-khah lô-le̍k lâi chèng-bêng Siōng-tè tùi lín ê ho͘-tiàu kap kéng-soán sī khak-si̍t,ê; lín nā án-ni chòe chiū bōe tūi-lo̍h." 
2Peter1:11 Án-ni, Siōng-tè ōe tōa-tōa sù-hok hō͘ lín thang chìn-ji̍p lán ê Chú — Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok éng-oán ê Kok-tō͘." 
2Peter1:12 Só͘-í, sui-jiân lín í-keng chai chiah-ê tāi-chì, koh kian-tēng chip-siú lín só͘ niá-siū ê chin-lí, góa iáu-kú beh put-sî kā lín thê-chhíⁿ chiah-ê tāi-chì." 
2Peter1:13 Góa siūⁿ, góa iáu oa̍h,teh ê sî, tio̍h kā lín thê-chhíⁿ." 
2Peter1:14 Lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok í-keng ū chheng-chhó kā góa chí-sī, hō͘ góa chai bô kú chiū ōe thoat-lī chit-ê ōe pāi-hoāi ê seng-khu." 
2Peter1:15 Góa beh chīn-la̍t siūⁿ pān-hoat, hō͘ lín tī góa lī-khui sè-kan í-āu put-sî ōe-kì-tit chiah-ê tāi-chì." 
2Peter1:16 Goán tùi lín só͘ kóng Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tōa koân-lêng lâi-lîm ê sū, m̄-sī kun-kù lâng lia̍p-chō,chhut-lâi hu-ké ê thoân-soat; goán ū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê chun-êng." 
2Peter1:17 I tùi Pē Siōng-tè niá-siū chun-kùi kap êng-iāu ê sî, hit-ūi Chun-giâm ê Êng-kng — Siōng-tè chhut-siaⁿ kóng, “Chit-ê sī góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê Kiáⁿ, I, góa chin ì-ài.”" 
2Peter1:18 I tī sèng-soaⁿ ê sî goán mā tī hia, ū chhin-sin thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng chhut,lâi chit-ê siaⁿ." 
2Peter1:19 Só͘-í goán tùi sian-ti só͘ soan-pò͘ ê sìn-sit koh-khah ū khak-sìn. Lín tio̍h chù-ì thiaⁿ, in-ūi chit-ê sìn-sit chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t pha teng tī o͘-àm ê só͘-chāi teh chiò, chiò kàu thiⁿ-kng, kàu khé-bêng-chhiⁿ chhut-hiān tī lín sim-lāi ê sî." 
2Peter1:20 Siōng iàu-kín,ê tio̍h chai, Sèng-keng só͘-ū ê ū-giân m̄-thang chiàu ka-kī ê ì-sù kóe-seh." 
2Peter1:21 In-ūi ū-giân m̄-sī chhut-tī lâng ê ì-sù, sī lâng siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng kóng-chhut tùi Siōng-tè lâi ê sìn-sit." 
2Peter2:1 Í-chêng mā ū ké sian-ti tī bîn-kan chhut-hiān; kâng-khoán, hiān-chāi mā ū ké kàu-su ōe tī lín tiong-kan chhut-hiān. In àm-tiong chiong hō͘ lâng bia̍t-bông ê īⁿ-toan tòa,ji̍p-lâi, sīm-chì m̄ sêng-jīn hit-ūi sio̍k-hôe in ê Chú-cháiⁿ, tì-kàu ka-kī chin kín chiū bia̍t-bông." 
2Peter2:2 M̄-kú iáu ū chin chōe lâng o̍h in îm-loān ê seng-oa̍h, tì-kàu chin-lí ê Tō-lō͘ in-ūi in siū húi-pòng." 
2Peter2:3 Chiah-ê ké kàu-su in-ūi tham-sim, ōe ēng liap-chō ê kò͘-sū pián lín ê châi-bu̍t. Tùi chit-khoán lâng ê tēng-chōe chá chiū koat-tēng; in chin kín chiū bia̍t-bông." 
2Peter2:4 Siōng-tè bô khoan-iông hoān-chōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kā in tàn-lo̍h tōe-ge̍k, koaiⁿ tī o͘-àm ê Chhim-khiⁿ, thèng-hāu sím-phòaⁿ." 
2Peter2:5 Siōng-tè mā bô khoan-iông kó͘-tāi ê sè-kài, ēng tōa-chúi im-bia̍t bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê sè-kan-lâng, chí-ū kiù soan-iông kong-gī ê Ná-a kap kî-tha chhit ê lâng." 
2Peter2:6 Siōng-tè chhú-hoa̍t Só͘-to-má kap Gô-mô͘-la ê siâⁿ-chhī, ēng hé húi-bia̍t in, hō͘ bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng chòe kéng-kài." 
2Peter2:7 Siōng-tè ū kiù gī-lâng Lô-tek, in-ūi Lô-tek ūi-tio̍h siâ-ok ê lâng îm-loān ê só͘-chòe chhau-sim." 
2Peter2:8 Hit-ê gī-lâng Lô-tek tiàm tī in tiong-kan, ta̍k-ji̍t ū thiaⁿ,kìⁿ koh khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiah-ê siâ-ok ê tāi-chì, i chèng-gī ê sim hui-siông thòng-khó͘." 
2Peter2:9 Chú chai án-chóaⁿ kiù kèng-khiân ê lâng thoat-lī chhì-liān, mā chai kā put-gī ê lâng lâu kàu Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t siū hêng-hoa̍t, te̍k-pia̍t sī hiah-ê hòng-chhiòng jio̍k-thé ê chêng-io̍k kap biáu-sī Siōng-tè koân-ui ê lâng. Chiah-ê ké kàu-su tōa-táⁿ koh kiau-ngō͘, sīm-chì káⁿ bú-jio̍k chun-kùi ê chèng thiⁿ-sài." 
2Peter2:10  
2Peter2:11 Hiah-ê thiⁿ-sài ê khùi-la̍t kap lêng-le̍k sui-jiân pí ké kàu-su khah tōa, mā bô tī Chú ê bīn-chêng ēng bú-jio̍k ê ōe kā in khòng-kò." 
2Peter2:12 M̄-kú, chiah-ê lâng kap chhut-sì chiū thàn pún-lêng teh oa̍h, beh hō͘ lâng lia̍h-khì thâi ê iá-siù kâng-khoán, in húi-pòng ka-kī m̄-bat ê sū; iá-siù húi-bia̍t, in mā ōe án-ni siū húi-bia̍t," 
2Peter2:13 siū-tio̍h ka-kī put-gī ê hêng-ûi èng-tit ê pò-èng. In khòaⁿ tī ji̍t,sî tîm-bê tī chêng-io̍k chòe hióng-lo̍k. In kap lín chòe-hé lim-chia̍h ê sî, tōa-chia̍h tōa-lim, hòng-chhiòng iàn-lo̍k, oân-choân sit-thài." 
2Peter2:14 In ê ba̍k-chiu chí-ū ài khòaⁿ siâ-îm, bô hoān-chōe tòng bōe tiâu. In ín-iú ì-chì po̍k-jio̍k ê lâng. In ê sim chí-ū siūⁿ tham-châi. In sī Siōng-tè chiù-chó͘ ê lâng!" 
2Peter2:15 In lī-khui chiàⁿ-lō͘, kiâⁿ bê-lō͘, kiâⁿ Pí-ní ê kiáⁿ Pa-lân só͘ kiâⁿ ê lō͘. Pa-lân tham-ài put-gī ê chîⁿ-châi," 
2Peter2:16 ūi-tio̍h só͘ hoān ê chōe siū chek-pī. Chi̍t chiah bōe kóng-ōe ê lû-á kèng-jiân ēng lâng ê siaⁿ chó͘-chí sian-ti Pa-lân hong-kông ê siūⁿ-hoat. 
2Peter2:17 Chiah-ê lâng chhin-chhiūⁿ ta,khì ê chúi-chôaⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ tōa-hong chhe-sòaⁿ ê hûn-bū; Siōng-tè í-keng ū kā in tī o͘-àm ê chhim-ian lâu chi̍t ê só͘-chāi." 
2Peter2:18 In kóng khong-tōng ê gōng-ōe, ēng bōe-tàng khòng-chè ê jio̍k-thé ê chêng-io̍k, ín-iú í-keng thoat-lī sit-bê seng-oa̍h ê lâng." 
2Peter2:19 In tah-èng hō͘ lâng chū-iû, m̄-kú ka-kī chòe hú-pāi seng-oa̍h ê lô͘-lē; in-ūi lâng siū sím-mi̍h khòng-chè, chiū chiâⁿ-chòe hit-ê ê lô͘-lē." 
2Peter2:20 Lâng jīn-bat lán ê Chú — Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok thoat-lī sè-kan ê hú-pāi í-āu, nā koh hō͘ hú-pāi ê sè-le̍k tîⁿ,teh koh ap-chè, chit-khoán ê kiat-kio̍k ōe pí í-chêng koh-khah bái." 
2Peter2:21 In jīn-bat kong-gī ê Tō-lō͘, jiân-āu lī-khui só͘ thoân-siū hō͘ in sîn-sèng ê kài-bēng, án-ni lêng-khó tùi khí-thâu chiū m̄ bat khah hó." 
2Peter2:22 In ê chêng-hêng tú chhin-chhiūⁿ sio̍k-gú só͘ kóng “Káu oa̍t tńg-lâi chia̍h ka-kī thò͘,chhut-lâi ê mi̍h”, á-sī “Ti sóe chheng-khì í-āu sûi-sî koh khì kō lō͘-kô͘-bê”." 
2Peter3:1 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa hiān-chāi siá hō͘ lín,ê sī tē-jī tiuⁿ phoe. Góa siá chit nn̄g tiuⁿ phoe sī beh thê-chhíⁿ lín lâi kek-khí lín sûn-kiat ê sim-chì." 
2Peter3:2 Góa ài lín ōe-kì-tit kó͘-chá ê sèng sian-ti só͘ kóng ê ōe, kap lín ê sù-tô͘ só͘ thoân Chú — Kiù-chú hō͘ lín ê bēng-lēng." 
2Peter3:3 Siōng iàu-kín,ê, lín tio̍h chai, tī chiong-boa̍t ê ji̍t-chí ū chi̍t-kóa thàn su-io̍k seng-oa̍h ê lâng ōe chhut-hiān, kā lín thí-chhiò" 
2Peter3:4 kóng, “Chú èng-ún beh lâi-lîm, taⁿ án-chóaⁿ? I tī tó-ūi? Lán ê chó͘-sian lóng sí,khì, m̄-kú tùi chhòng-sè í-lâi it-chhè lóng kâng-khoán.”" 
2Peter3:5 In kò͘-ì bû-sī chit-ê sū-si̍t, chiū-sī tī kó͘-chá thiⁿ tùi Siōng-tè ê ōe siū chhòng-chō, tōe sī tùi chúi, mā ēng chúi lâi hêng-sêng." 
2Peter3:6 Tng-sî ê sè-kài sī hō͘ chúi im-ba̍t lâi húi-bia̍t. 
2Peter3:7 M̄-kú hiān-chāi ê thiⁿ kap tōe mā kâng-khoán tùi Siōng-tè ê ōe tit-tio̍h pó-liû kàu sím-phòaⁿ kap put-khiân ê lâng hō͘ hé húi-bia̍t ê ji̍t. 
2Peter3:8 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, ū chi̍t hāng tāi-chì chhiáⁿ lín m̄-thang bōe-kì,tit, chiū-sī tùi Chú lâi khòaⁿ, chi̍t ji̍t ná chi̍t-chheng nî, chi̍t-chheng nî ná chi̍t ji̍t." 
2Peter3:9 Ū lâng siūⁿ-kóng Chú iân-tî I tah-èng beh chòe ê sū, kî-si̍t I m̄-sī teh iân-tî, sī teh iông-jím lín, bô ài ū lâng bia̍t-bông, ài ta̍k-ê lâng lóng hóe-kái." 
2Peter3:10 M̄-kú Chú ê Ji̍t ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t-á hut-jiân lâi. Tī hit-ê Ji̍t, chiah-ê thiⁿ ōe tī tōa ê hiáng-siaⁿ tiong siau-bia̍t, thian-thé hō͘ hé siau-iûⁿ, tōe kap tōe-chiūⁿ it-chhè ê pī-chō-bu̍t lóng siau-bia̍t." 
2Peter3:11 Kì-jiân chiah-ê it-chhè ōe án-ni húi-bia̍t, lín tio̍h án-chóaⁿ choh-lâng? Lín ê seng-oa̍h tio̍h sèng-kiat, kèng-khiân," 
2Peter3:12 thèng-hāu koh chhui-pek Siōng-tè ê Ji̍t kóaⁿ-kín lâi-lîm. Tī hit-ji̍t, chiah-ê thiⁿ ōe hō͘ hé sio-bia̍t, thian-thé ōe hō͘ hé sio-iûⁿ." 
2Peter3:13 M̄-kú lán teh thèng-hāu ê sī Siōng-tè só͘ èng-ún sin ê thiⁿ sin ê tōe, tī hia kong-gī éng-oán tit-tio̍h kiàn-li̍p." 
2Peter3:14 Só͘-í, chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, kì-jiân lín teh thèng-hāu chiah-ê tāi-chì, tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng tio̍h chīn-la̍t tui-kiû hō͘ ka-kī bô khoat-tiám, bô thang chí-chek, thang kap I hô-hó." 
2Peter3:15 Tio̍h chiong lán ê Chú ê khoan-iông khòaⁿ-chòe lín tit-kiù ê ki-hōe, che mā-sī lán chhin-ài ê hiaⁿ-tī Pó-lô ēng Siōng-tè sù hō͘ i ê tì-hūi siá-phoe só͘ khoàn-bián,ê." 
2Peter3:16 I só͘-ū ê phoe lóng ū kóng-khí chiah-ê sū. I ê phoe ū chi̍t-kóa oh lí-kái ê ōe, hiah-ê gû-gōng bô tēng-sèng ê lâng ōe kā i khiok-kái, tú kap in teh khiok-kái kî-tha ê keng-bûn kâng-khoán; kiat-kó, in ka-kī thó bia̍t-bông." 
2Peter3:17 Só͘-í, chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lín kì-jiân tāi-seng chai chit-ê tāi-chì, tio̍h kín-sīn chiah bián hō͘ pháiⁿ-lâng ēng chhò-gō͘ ê giân-lūn chhōa-khì kiâⁿ chhò-gō͘ ê lō͘, lī-khui lín kian-kò͘ ê li̍p-tiûⁿ." 
2Peter3:18 Tio̍h tī lán ê Chú — Kiù-chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê un-tián-ē kap tùi I ê jīm-sek kè-sio̍k chìn-pō͘. Goān êng-kng kui hō͘ I, tùi hiān-chāi ti̍t-kàu éng-oán. Amen!" 
1John1:1 Goán beh kā lín soat-bêng chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū chûn-chāi hit-ê oa̍h-miā ê Tō; chit-ê Tō goán ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h, ū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ,tio̍h, ū siông-sè khòaⁿ,tio̍h, mā ū chhin-chhiú bong,tio̍h." 
1John1:1 Goán beh kā lín soat-bêng chhòng-sè í-chêng chiū chûn-chāi hit-ê oa̍h-miā ê Tō; chit-ê Tō goán ū thiaⁿ,tio̍h, ū chhin-ba̍k khòaⁿ,tio̍h, ū siông-sè khòaⁿ,tio̍h, mā ū chhin-chhiú bong,tio̍h." 
1John1:2 Chit-ê oa̍h-miā í-keng hián-hiān; goán ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi chòe kiàn-chèng, koh tùi lín soan-pò͘ goân-lâi kap Pē tông-chāi koh í-keng ū tùi goán hián-hiān chit-ê éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John1:2 Chit-ê oa̍h-miā í-keng hián-hiān; goán ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi chòe kiàn-chèng, koh tùi lín soan-pò͘ goân-lâi kap Pē tông-chāi koh í-keng ū tùi goán hián-hiān chit-ê éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John1:3 Goán khòaⁿ,tio̍h koh thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, hiān-chāi mā tùi lín soan-pò͘, sī beh hō͘ lín mā thang kap goán ū thoân-khè; chit-ê thoân-khè sī goán kap Pē kap I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tiong-kan ê thoân-khè." 
1John1:3 Goán khòaⁿ,tio̍h koh thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, hiān-chāi mā tùi lín soan-pò͘, sī beh hō͘ lín mā thang kap goán ū thoân-khè; chit-ê thoân-khè sī goán kap Pē kap I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tiong-kan ê thoân-khè." 
1John1:4 Goán siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lán ū oân-boán ê hoaⁿ-hí. 
1John1:4 Goán siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lán ū oân-boán ê hoaⁿ-hí. 
1John1:5 Goán tùi Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi thoân hō͘ lín ê sìn-sit sī án-ni: Siōng-tè sī kng, tī I oân-choân bô o͘-àm." 
1John1:5 Goán tùi Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ thiaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi thoân hō͘ lín ê sìn-sit sī án-ni: Siōng-tè sī kng, tī I oân-choân bô o͘-àm." 
1John1:6 Lán nā kóng lán kap I ū thoân-khè, iáu-kú kè-sio̍k tī o͘-àm tiong seng-oa̍h, sī kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, bô si̍t-hêng chin-lí." 
1John1:6 Lán nā kóng lán kap I ū thoân-khè, iáu-kú kè-sio̍k tī o͘-àm tiong seng-oa̍h, sī kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, bô si̍t-hêng chin-lí." 
1John1:7 M̄-kú, Siōng-tè tī kng-bêng tiong, lán nā chiàu án-ni tī kng-bêng tiong seng-oa̍h, lán chiū hō͘-siōng ū thoân-khè, I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê huih ōe kè-sio̍k sóe-chheng lán lóng-chóng ê chōe."
