1John1:7 M̄-kú, Siōng-tè tī kng-bêng tiong, lán nā chiàu án-ni tī kng-bêng tiong seng-oa̍h, lán chiū hō͘-siōng ū thoân-khè, I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ ê huih ōe kè-sio̍k sóe-chheng lán lóng-chóng ê chōe." 
1John1:8 Lán nā kóng lán bô chōe, sī phiàn ka-kī, chin-lí bô tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John1:8 Lán nā kóng lán bô chōe, sī phiàn ka-kī, chin-lí bô tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John1:9 Lán nā sêng-jīn lán ê chōe, Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t kong-gī, beh sià-bián lán ê chōe, sóe-chheng lán lóng-chóng ê put-gī." 
1John1:9 Lán nā sêng-jīn lán ê chōe, Siōng-tè sī sìn-si̍t kong-gī, beh sià-bián lán ê chōe, sóe-chheng lán lóng-chóng ê put-gī." 
1John1:10 Lán nā kóng lán m̄-bat hoān-chōe, sī kā Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe pe̍h-chha̍t, I ê tō bô tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John1:10 Lán nā kóng lán m̄-bat hoān-chōe, sī kā Siōng-tè khòaⁿ-chòe pe̍h-chha̍t, I ê tō bô tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John2:1 Siàu-liân-lâng, góa siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín bōe khì hoān-chōe. Nā ū lâng hoān-chōe, lán ū gī-lâng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tī Pē ê bīn-chêng chòe lán ê Piān-hō͘-jîn." 
1John2:1 Siàu-liân-lâng, góa siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín bōe khì hoān-chōe. Nā ū lâng hoān-chōe, lán ū gī-lâng Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tī Pē ê bīn-chêng chòe lán ê Piān-hō͘-jîn." 
1John2:2 I ūi-tio̍h lán ê chōe, m̄-nā lán ê chōe, mā ūi-tio̍h choân sè-kài ê chōe, choh sio̍k-chōe-chè." 
1John2:2 I ūi-tio̍h lán ê chōe, m̄-nā lán ê chōe, mā ūi-tio̍h choân sè-kài ê chōe, choh sio̍k-chōe-chè." 
1John2:3 Lán nā ū teh chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng, chiū chai lán chin-chiàⁿ bat Siōng-tè." 
1John2:3 Lán nā ū teh chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng, chiū chai lán chin-chiàⁿ bat Siōng-tè." 
1John2:4 Nā ū lâng kóng “góa bat Siōng-tè”, m̄-kú bô teh chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, chit-ê lâng sī pe̍h-chha̍t, i lāi-bīn bô chin-lí." 
1John2:4 Nā ū lâng kóng “góa bat Siōng-tè”, m̄-kú bô teh chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, chit-ê lâng sī pe̍h-chha̍t, i lāi-bīn bô chin-lí." 
1John2:5 M̄-kú lâng nā chun-siú Siōng-tè ê tō, Siōng-tè ê thiàⁿ chiū chin-chiàⁿ tī i sin-chiūⁿ oân-choân si̍t-hiān. Lâng nā kóng i tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, eng-kai chiàu Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê giân-hêng seng-oa̍h. Án-ni chiū chai lán ū tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn." 
1John2:5 M̄-kú lâng nā chun-siú Siōng-tè ê tō, Siōng-tè ê thiàⁿ chiū chin-chiàⁿ tī i sin-chiūⁿ oân-choân si̍t-hiān. Lâng nā kóng i tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, eng-kai chiàu Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê giân-hêng seng-oa̍h. Án-ni chiū chai lán ū tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn." 
1John2:6  
1John2:6  
1John2:7 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa siá hō͘ lín,ê m̄-sī sin ê kài-bēng, sī lín tùi khí-thâu chiū niá-siū hit-ê kū ê kài-bēng, sī lín bat thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit." 
1John2:7 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa siá hō͘ lín,ê m̄-sī sin ê kài-bēng, sī lín tùi khí-thâu chiū niá-siū hit-ê kū ê kài-bēng, sī lín bat thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit." 
1John2:8 Chóng-sī góa siá hō͘ lín ê kài-bēng mā thang kóng sī sin,ê, che tùi Ki-tok kap tùi lín lóng sī chin,ê; in-ūi o͘-àm teh kè,khì, chin kng í-keng teh chiò." 
1John2:8 Chóng-sī góa siá hō͘ lín ê kài-bēng mā thang kóng sī sin,ê, che tùi Ki-tok kap tùi lín lóng sī chin,ê; in-ūi o͘-àm teh kè,khì, chin kng í-keng teh chiò." 
1John2:9 Lâng nā kóng i tī kng-bêng tiong, m̄-kú oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, sū-si̍t i iáu-kú tī o͘-àm tiong." 
1John2:9 Lâng nā kóng i tī kng-bêng tiong, m̄-kú oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, sū-si̍t i iáu-kú tī o͘-àm tiong." 
1John2:10 Thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê lâng sī tī kng-bêng tiong teh seng-oa̍h, bōe tì-kàu hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó hoān-chōe." 
1John2:10 Thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê lâng sī tī kng-bêng tiong teh seng-oa̍h, bōe tì-kàu hō͘ lâng poa̍h-tó hoān-chōe." 
1John2:11 M̄-kú oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê lâng sī tī o͘-àm tiong, tī o͘-àm tiong teh seng-oa̍h, m̄ chai beh khì tó-ūi, in-ūi o͘-àm hō͘ i ê ba̍k-chiu bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
1John2:11 M̄-kú oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ê lâng sī tī o͘-àm tiong, tī o͘-àm tiong teh seng-oa̍h, m̄ chai beh khì tó-ūi, in-ūi o͘-àm hō͘ i ê ba̍k-chiu bô khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
1John2:12 Siàu-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi khò Ki-tok ê miâ lín ê chōe í-keng tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
1John2:12 Siàu-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi khò Ki-tok ê miâ lín ê chōe í-keng tit-tio̍h sià-bián." 
1John2:13 Hū-ló sī-tōa, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat tùi khí-thâu chiū chûn-chāi Hit-ūi. Chheng-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín í-keng ū iâⁿ-kè hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
1John2:13 Hū-ló sī-tōa, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat tùi khí-thâu chiū chûn-chāi Hit-ūi. Chheng-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín í-keng ū iâⁿ-kè hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
1John2:14 Sòe-kiáⁿ, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat Pē. Hū-ló sī-tōa, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat tùi khí-thâu chiū chûn-chāi Hit-ūi. Chheng-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín ióng-chòng, Siōng-tè ê tō tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, koh lín í-keng ū iâⁿ-kè hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
1John2:14 Sòe-kiáⁿ, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat Pē. Hū-ló sī-tōa, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín jīn-bat tùi khí-thâu chiū chûn-chāi Hit-ūi. Chheng-liân-lâng, góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, in-ūi lín ióng-chòng, Siōng-tè ê tō tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, koh lín í-keng ū iâⁿ-kè hit-ê Siâ-ok-chiá." 
1John2:15 M̄-thang tham-ài sè-kan á-sī sè-kan ê mi̍h. Nā ū lâng tham-ài sè-kan, i chiū bô thiàⁿ Pē." 
1John2:15 M̄-thang tham-ài sè-kan á-sī sè-kan ê mi̍h. Nā ū lâng tham-ài sè-kan, i chiū bô thiàⁿ Pē." 
1John2:16 In-ūi it-chhè sio̍k sè-kan,ê, chhin-chhiūⁿ jio̍k-thé ê io̍k-bōng, ba̍k-chiu ê io̍k-bōng, tián ka-kī ê châi-hù, téng, lóng m̄-sī tùi Pē lâi, sī tùi sè-kan lâi,ê." 
1John2:16 In-ūi it-chhè sio̍k sè-kan,ê, chhin-chhiūⁿ jio̍k-thé ê io̍k-bōng, ba̍k-chiu ê io̍k-bōng, tián ka-kī ê châi-hù, téng, lóng m̄-sī tùi Pē lâi, sī tùi sè-kan lâi,ê." 
1John2:17 Chit sè-kan kap sè-kan ê io̍k-bōng lóng teh kè,khì, chóng-sī si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè chí-ì ê lâng éng-oán seng-chûn." 
1John2:17 Chit sè-kan kap sè-kan ê io̍k-bōng lóng teh kè,khì, chóng-sī si̍t-hêng Siōng-tè chí-ì ê lâng éng-oán seng-chûn." 
1John2:18 Sòe-kiáⁿ, che sī chiong-boa̍t ê sî. Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá teh-beh lâi, hiān-chāi í-keng ū chin chōe Ki-tok ê te̍k-tùi-chiá chhut-hiān; tùi án-ni, lán chai che sī chiong-boa̍t ê sî." 
1John2:18 Sòe-kiáⁿ, che sī chiong-boa̍t ê sî. Lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá teh-beh lâi, hiān-chāi í-keng ū chin chōe Ki-tok ê te̍k-tùi-chiá chhut-hiān; tùi án-ni, lán chai che sī chiong-boa̍t ê sî." 
1John2:19 In lī-khui lán, in-ūi in m̄-sī lán ê lâng; in nā-sī lán ê lâng, ōe kè-sio̍k kap lán chòe-hé. M̄-kú in lī-khui, piáu-sī in lóng m̄-sī lán ê lâng." 
1John2:19 In lī-khui lán, in-ūi in m̄-sī lán ê lâng; in nā-sī lán ê lâng, ōe kè-sio̍k kap lán chòe-hé. M̄-kú in lī-khui, piáu-sī in lóng m̄-sī lán ê lâng." 
1John2:20 Lín í-keng ū niá-siū Sèng Sîn, lín lóng chai." 
1John2:20 Lín í-keng ū niá-siū Sèng Sîn, lín lóng chai." 
1John2:21 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, m̄-sī in-ūi lín m̄ bat chin-lí, sī in-ūi lín bat chin-lí, koh chai it-chhè ê hu-ké m̄-sī tùi chin-lí lâi." 
1John2:21 Góa siá-phoe hō͘ lín, m̄-sī in-ūi lín m̄ bat chin-lí, sī in-ūi lín bat chin-lí, koh chai it-chhè ê hu-ké m̄-sī tùi chin-lí lâi." 
1John2:22 Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī pe̍h-chha̍t,ê? It-tēng sī kū-choa̍t Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok hit-ê lâng! Kū-choa̍t Pē kap Kiáⁿ ê chiū-sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá. 
1John2:22 Sím-mi̍h-lâng sī pe̍h-chha̍t,ê? It-tēng sī kū-choa̍t Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok hit-ê lâng! Kū-choa̍t Pē kap Kiáⁿ ê chiū-sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá. 
1John2:23 Kū-choa̍t Kiáⁿ ê bô chiap-la̍p Pē; soan-jīn Kiáⁿ chiū-sī chiap-la̍p Pē. 
1John2:23 Kū-choa̍t Kiáⁿ ê bô chiap-la̍p Pē; soan-jīn Kiáⁿ chiū-sī chiap-la̍p Pē. 
1John2:24 Tio̍h kian-siú lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit. Lín nā kian-siú tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit chiū ōe kè-sio̍k oa̍h tī Kiáⁿ kap Pē ê lāi-bīn. 
1John2:24 Tio̍h kian-siú lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit. Lín nā kian-siú tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit chiū ōe kè-sio̍k oa̍h tī Kiáⁿ kap Pē ê lāi-bīn. 
1John2:25 Che chiū-sī Ki-tok hō͘ lán ê èng-ún, sī éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John2:25 Che chiū-sī Ki-tok hō͘ lán ê èng-ún, sī éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John2:26 Góa siá chiah-ê hō͘ lín, sī koan-hē siūⁿ-beh bê-he̍k lín ê lâng ê sū." 
1John2:26 Góa siá chiah-ê hō͘ lín, sī koan-hē siūⁿ-beh bê-he̍k lín ê lâng ê sū." 
1John2:27 Tùi lín lâi kóng, lín tùi Ki-tok niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, chiū bô su-iàu pa̍t-lâng kā lín kà-sī, in-ūi chit-ūi Sèng Sîn beh kà-sī lín ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì; I ê kà-sī sī chin,ê, m̄-sī ké,ê. Án-ni, tio̍h chiàu Sèng Sîn kà-sī lín,ê, tiàm tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn." 
1John2:27 Tùi lín lâi kóng, lín tùi Ki-tok niá-siū ê Sèng Sîn tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn, chiū bô su-iàu pa̍t-lâng kā lín kà-sī, in-ūi chit-ūi Sèng Sîn beh kà-sī lín ta̍k-hāng tāi-chì; I ê kà-sī sī chin,ê, m̄-sī ké,ê. Án-ni, tio̍h chiàu Sèng Sîn kà-sī lín,ê, tiàm tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn." 
1John2:28 Taⁿ, siàu-liân-lâng, tio̍h tiàm tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn, án-ni tī I hián-hiān ê sî, lán tī I bīn-chêng chiah ōe hó-táⁿ, bōe in-ūi I ê lâi-lîm kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
1John2:28 Taⁿ, siàu-liân-lâng, tio̍h tiàm tī Ki-tok lāi-bīn, án-ni tī I hián-hiān ê sî, lán tī I bīn-chêng chiah ōe hó-táⁿ, bōe in-ūi I ê lâi-lîm kám-kak kiàn-siàu." 
1John2:29 Lín nā chai I sī kong-gī, eng-kai chai si̍t-hêng kong-gī ê lâng chiah sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî."

1John3:1 Lín siūⁿ-khòaⁿ leh, Pē jōa-á-ni̍h thiàⁿ lán, hō͘ lán thang chheng-chòe I ê kiáⁿ-jî; sū-si̍t lán chiū-sī. Sè-kan-lâng m̄ bat lán, in-ūi in m̄ bat Siōng-tè." 
1John3:1 Lín siūⁿ-khòaⁿ leh, Pē jōa-á-ni̍h thiàⁿ lán, hō͘ lán thang chheng-chòe I ê kiáⁿ-jî; sū-si̍t lán chiū-sī. Sè-kan-lâng m̄ bat lán, in-ūi in m̄ bat Siōng-tè." 
1John3:2 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, hiān-chāi lán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, chiong-lâi ōe án-chóaⁿ iáu-bē bêng-hián. M̄-kú lán chai, Ki-tok hián-hiān ê sî, lán ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ I, in-ūi lán ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê chin-siōng." 
1John3:2 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, hiān-chāi lán sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, chiong-lâi ōe án-chóaⁿ iáu-bē bêng-hián. M̄-kú lán chai, Ki-tok hián-hiān ê sî, lán ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ I, in-ūi lán ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê chin-siōng." 
1John3:3 Ki-tok sī sûn-kiat, só͘-í tùi Ki-tok ū chit-khoán ǹg-bāng ê lâng ōe ka-kī pó-chhî sûn-kiat." 
1John3:3 Ki-tok sī sûn-kiat, só͘-í tùi Ki-tok ū chit-khoán ǹg-bāng ê lâng ōe ka-kī pó-chhî sûn-kiat." 
1John3:4 Lâng hoān-chōe sī ûi-pōe Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat, in-ūi chōe sī ûi-pōe Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat." 
1John3:4 Lâng hoān-chōe sī ûi-pōe Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat, in-ūi chōe sī ûi-pōe Siōng-tè ê Lu̍t-hoat." 
1John3:5 Lín chai Ki-tok hián-hiān sī beh tû-khì lâng ê chōe, m̄-kú I pún-sin bô chōe." 
1John3:5 Lín chai Ki-tok hián-hiān sī beh tû-khì lâng ê chōe, m̄-kú I pún-sin bô chōe." 
1John3:6 Kap Ki-tok pó-chhî bi̍t-chhiat koan-hē ê lâng bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe; kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Ki-tok, mā m̄ bat I." 
1John3:6 Kap Ki-tok pó-chhî bi̍t-chhiat koan-hē ê lâng bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe; kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Ki-tok, mā m̄ bat I." 
1John3:7 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, m̄-thang siū bê-he̍k. Ki-tok sī gī-lâng, só͘-í si̍t-hêng kong-gī,ê chiah sī gī-lâng." 
1John3:7 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, m̄-thang siū bê-he̍k. Ki-tok sī gī-lâng, só͘-í si̍t-hêng kong-gī,ê chiah sī gī-lâng." 
1John3:8 Kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng sio̍k Mô͘-kúi, in-ūi Mô͘-kúi tùi khí-thâu chiū hoān-chōe. Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ hián-hiān ê bo̍k-te̍k sī beh phò-hoāi Mô͘-kúi ê chok-ûi." 
1John3:8 Kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe ê lâng sio̍k Mô͘-kúi, in-ūi Mô͘-kúi tùi khí-thâu chiū hoān-chōe. Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ hián-hiān ê bo̍k-te̍k sī beh phò-hoāi Mô͘-kúi ê chok-ûi." 
1John3:9 Tùi Siōng-tè siⁿ,ê bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe, in-ūi Siōng-tè ê oa̍h-miā tī in lāi-bīn; in bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe, in-ūi in sī tùi Siōng-tè siⁿ,ê." 
1John3:9 Tùi Siōng-tè siⁿ,ê bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe, in-ūi Siōng-tè ê oa̍h-miā tī in lāi-bīn; in bōe kè-sio̍k hoān-chōe, in-ūi in sī tùi Siōng-tè siⁿ,ê." 
1John3:10 Tùi án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî á-sī Mô͘-kúi ê kiáⁿ-jî chin chheng-chhó: Bô si̍t-hêng kong-gī, bô thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē,ê, m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John3:10 Tùi án-ni, sím-mi̍h-lâng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî á-sī Mô͘-kúi ê kiáⁿ-jî chin chheng-chhó: Bô si̍t-hêng kong-gī, bô thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē,ê, m̄-sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John3:11 Lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ; che sī lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit. 
1John3:11 Lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ; che sī lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h ê sìn-sit. 
1John3:12 Lán m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ Kai-ún; i sio̍k Siâ-ok-chiá, ū thâi-sí ka-kī ê sió-tī. I ná ōe thâi-sí sió-tī? In-ūi i ê hêng-ûi siâ-ok, m̄-kú sió-tī ê hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t." 
1John3:12 Lán m̄-thang chhin-chhiūⁿ Kai-ún; i sio̍k Siâ-ok-chiá, ū thâi-sí ka-kī ê sió-tī. I ná ōe thâi-sí sió-tī? In-ūi i ê hêng-ûi siâ-ok, m̄-kú sió-tī ê hêng-ûi chèng-ti̍t." 
1John3:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, sè-kan-lâng nā oàn-hūn lín, lín m̄-bián kî-koài." 
1John3:13 Hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, sè-kan-lâng nā oàn-hūn lín, lín m̄-bián kî-koài." 
1John3:14 Lán chai, lán í-keng chhut-sí-ji̍p-oa̍h, in-ūi lán ū thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē. Bô thiàⁿ,lâng-ê sī tiàm tī sí ê koán-hat-ē." 
1John3:14 Lán chai, lán í-keng chhut-sí-ji̍p-oa̍h, in-ūi lán ū thiàⁿ hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē. Bô thiàⁿ,lâng-ê sī tiàm tī sí ê koán-hat-ē." 
1John3:15 Oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē chiū-sī thâi-lâng; lín mā chai, thâi-lâng,ê, éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā bô tiàm tī i lāi-bīn." 
1John3:15 Oàn-hūn hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē chiū-sī thâi-lâng; lín mā chai, thâi-lâng,ê, éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā bô tiàm tī i lāi-bīn." 
1John3:16 Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán hi-seng sìⁿ-miā, tùi án-ni lán chai sím-mi̍h sī thiàⁿ; án-ni lán mā ài ūi-tio̍h hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē hi-seng sìⁿ-miā." 
1John3:16 Ki-tok ūi-tio̍h lán hi-seng sìⁿ-miā, tùi án-ni lán chai sím-mi̍h sī thiàⁿ; án-ni lán mā ài ūi-tio̍h hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē hi-seng sìⁿ-miā." 
1John3:17 Nā ū hó-gia̍h-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ū khiàm-kheh ia̍h bô tông-chêng lîn-bín, ná ōe-tàng kóng i ū thiàⁿ Siōng-tè?" 
1John3:17 Nā ū hó-gia̍h-lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē ū khiàm-kheh ia̍h bô tông-chêng lîn-bín, ná ōe-tàng kóng i ū thiàⁿ Siōng-tè?" 
1John3:18 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, saⁿ-thiàⁿ m̄-thang chí-ū ēng ōe á-sī ēng chhùi kóng, tio̍h si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi si̍t-hêng." 
1John3:18 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, saⁿ-thiàⁿ m̄-thang chí-ū ēng ōe á-sī ēng chhùi kóng, tio̍h si̍t-si̍t-chāi-chāi si̍t-hêng." 
1John3:19 Tùi án-ni lán chai lán sio̍k chin-lí. Lán nā siū liông-sim chek-pī, tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng lán ōe-tàng an-ún chū-chāi, in-ūi I ê sim pí lán ê sim koh-khah khoan-tāi, I ta̍k-hāng lóng chai." 
1John3:19 Tùi án-ni lán chai lán sio̍k chin-lí. Lán nā siū liông-sim chek-pī, tī Siōng-tè ê bīn-chêng lán ōe-tàng an-ún chū-chāi, in-ūi I ê sim pí lán ê sim koh-khah khoan-tāi, I ta̍k-hāng lóng chai."

1John3:21 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lán ê liông-sim nā bô kā lán chek-pī, lán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng chiū thang ióng-kám m̄-bián kiaⁿ." 
1John3:21 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lán ê liông-sim nā bô kā lán chek-pī, lán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng chiū thang ióng-kám m̄-bián kiaⁿ." 
1John3:22 Lán bô-lūn tùi I kiû sím-mi̍h lóng ōe tit,tio̍h, in-ūi lán chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, tī I bīn-chêng chòe I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê sū." 
1John3:22 Lán bô-lūn tùi I kiû sím-mi̍h lóng ōe tit,tio̍h, in-ūi lán chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, tī I bīn-chêng chòe I só͘ hoaⁿ-hí ê sū." 
1John3:23 I ê kài-bēng sī án-ni: Lán tio̍h sìn I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ, mā tio̍h chiàu I hō͘ lán ê bēng-lēng saⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
1John3:23 I ê kài-bēng sī án-ni: Lán tio̍h sìn I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê miâ, mā tio̍h chiàu I hō͘ lán ê bēng-lēng saⁿ-thiàⁿ." 
1John3:24 Chun-siú Siōng-tè kài-bēng ê lâng tiàm tī I lāi-bīn, I mā tī in lāi-bīn. Tùi Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lán ê Sèng Sîn lán chai Siōng-tè tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John3:24 Chun-siú Siōng-tè kài-bēng ê lâng tiàm tī I lāi-bīn, I mā tī in lāi-bīn. Tùi Siōng-tè sù hō͘ lán ê Sèng Sîn lán chai Siōng-tè tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John4:1 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, m̄-thang siong-sìn ta̍k-ê sîn; tio̍h chhat-giām chiah-ê sîn sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi á m̄-sī, in-ūi ū chin chōe ké sian-ti í-keng chhut-hiān tī chit sè-kan." 
1John4:1 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, m̄-thang siong-sìn ta̍k-ê sîn; tio̍h chhat-giām chiah-ê sîn sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi á m̄-sī, in-ūi ū chin chōe ké sian-ti í-keng chhut-hiān tī chit sè-kan." 
1John4:2 Lín thang ēng án-ni lâi jīn-bat Siōng-tè ê Sîn: Soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiâⁿ-chòe lâng lâi sè-kan hit-ūi Sîn sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê; 
1John4:2 Lín thang ēng án-ni lâi jīn-bat Siōng-tè ê Sîn: Soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiâⁿ-chòe lâng lâi sè-kan hit-ūi Sîn sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê; 
1John4:3 m̄ soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ hiah-ê sîn m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê. Che sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá ê sîn, lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h i teh-beh lâi, hiān-chāi í-keng tī sè-kan." 
1John4:3 m̄ soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ hiah-ê sîn m̄-sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi,ê. Che sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá ê sîn, lín ū thiaⁿ-tio̍h i teh-beh lâi, hiān-chāi í-keng tī sè-kan." 
1John4:4 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, lín sī sio̍k Siōng-tè, koh í-keng iâⁿ-kè ké sian-ti, in-ūi tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn ê Sèng Sîn pí tiàm tī sè-kan-lâng lāi-bīn ê sîn khah kiông khah tōa." 
1John4:4 Siàu-liân pêng-iú, lín sī sio̍k Siōng-tè, koh í-keng iâⁿ-kè ké sian-ti, in-ūi tiàm tī lín lāi-bīn ê Sèng Sîn pí tiàm tī sè-kan-lâng lāi-bīn ê sîn khah kiông khah tōa." 
1John4:5 Ké sian-ti sī sio̍k sè-kan, kóng sè-kan sū, só͘-í sè-kan-lâng ōe thiaⁿ in." 
1John4:5 Ké sian-ti sī sio̍k sè-kan, kóng sè-kan sū, só͘-í sè-kan-lâng ōe thiaⁿ in." 
1John4:6 Lán sī sio̍k Siōng-tè. Bat Siōng-tè ê lâng ōe thiaⁿ lán; bô sio̍k Siōng-tè ê lâng m̄ thiaⁿ lán. Tùi chit-ê, lán jīn-bat chin-lí ê Sîn kap bê-he̍k lâng ê sîn."

1John4:7 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ, in-ūi thiàⁿ sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi. Ū thiàⁿ ê lâng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, mā bat Siōng-tè." 
1John4:7 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ, in-ūi thiàⁿ sī tùi Siōng-tè lâi. Ū thiàⁿ ê lâng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî, mā bat Siōng-tè." 
1John4:8 Bô thiàⁿ ê lâng m̄ bat Siōng-tè, in-ūi Siōng-tè sī thiàⁿ." 
1John4:8 Bô thiàⁿ ê lâng m̄ bat Siōng-tè, in-ūi Siōng-tè sī thiàⁿ."

1John4:10 M̄-sī lán thiàⁿ Siōng-tè, sī I ū thiàⁿ lán, chhe I ê Kiáⁿ chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè lâi sio̍k lán ê chōe. Che chiū-sī thiàⁿ." 
1John4:10 M̄-sī lán thiàⁿ Siōng-tè, sī I ū thiàⁿ lán, chhe I ê Kiáⁿ chòe sio̍k-chōe-chè lâi sio̍k lán ê chōe. Che chiū-sī thiàⁿ."

1John4:13 Siōng-tè í-keng ū chiong I ê Sèng Sîn sù hō͘ lán, tùi chit-ê lán chai lán tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, I mā tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John4:13 Siōng-tè í-keng ū chiong I ê Sèng Sîn sù hō͘ lán, tùi chit-ê lán chai lán tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, I mā tī lán lāi-bīn." 
1John4:14 Pē chhe I ê Kiáⁿ lâi chòe sè-kan ê Kiù-chú, goán ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi chòe kiàn-chèng." 
1John4:14 Pē chhe I ê Kiáⁿ lâi chòe sè-kan ê Kiù-chú, goán ū khòaⁿ,tio̍h, hiān-chāi chòe kiàn-chèng." 
1John4:15 Soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng, Siōng-tè tiàm tī i lāi-bīn, i mā tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn." 
1John4:15 Soan-jīn Iâ-so͘ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng, Siōng-tè tiàm tī i lāi-bīn, i mā tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn." 
1John4:16 Só͘-í, lán chai koh sìn Siōng-tè ū thiàⁿ lán. Siōng-tè sī thiàⁿ, ū teh si̍t-hêng thiàⁿ ê lâng tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, Siōng-tè mā tiàm tī i lāi-bīn." 
1John4:16 Só͘-í, lán chai koh sìn Siōng-tè ū thiàⁿ lán. Siōng-tè sī thiàⁿ, ū teh si̍t-hêng thiàⁿ ê lâng tiàm tī Siōng-tè lāi-bīn, Siōng-tè mā tiàm tī i lāi-bīn." 
1John4:17 Tùi án-ni, thiàⁿ tī lán tiong-kan oân-choân si̍t-hiān chhut,lâi, hō͘ lán tī Sím-phòaⁿ ê Ji̍t thang ióng-kám m̄-bián kiaⁿ, in-ūi lán tī chit sè-kan kap Ki-tok kâng-khoán."

1John4:21 Thiàⁿ Siōng-tè mā tio̍h thiàⁿ ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, che sī lán tùi Ki-tok niá-siū ê kài-bēng." 
1John4:21 Thiàⁿ Siōng-tè mā tio̍h thiàⁿ ka-kī ê hiaⁿ-tī á-sī chí-bē, che sī lán tùi Ki-tok niá-siū ê kài-bēng." 
1John5:1 Sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok ê lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî. Thiàⁿ pē-bú, mā ōe thiàⁿ in só͘ siⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John5:1 Sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Ki-tok ê lâng lóng sī Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî. Thiàⁿ pē-bú, mā ōe thiàⁿ in só͘ siⁿ ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John5:2 Lán nā thiàⁿ Siōng-tè koh chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, án-ni chiū chai lán ū teh thiàⁿ Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John5:2 Lán nā thiàⁿ Siōng-tè koh chun-siú I ê kài-bēng, án-ni chiū chai lán ū teh thiàⁿ Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
1John5:3 Chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng chiū-sī thiàⁿ Siōng-tè. I ê kài-bēng m̄-sī oh chun-siú. 
1John5:3 Chun-siú Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng chiū-sī thiàⁿ Siōng-tè. I ê kài-bēng m̄-sī oh chun-siú. 
1John5:4 In-ūi Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng ōe-tàng khah iâⁿ sè-kan; hō͘ lán khah iâⁿ sè-kan,ê chiū-sī lán ê sìn. 
1John5:4 In-ūi Siōng-tè ê kiáⁿ-jî lóng ōe-tàng khah iâⁿ sè-kan; hō͘ lán khah iâⁿ sè-kan,ê chiū-sī lán ê sìn. 
1John5:5 Khah iâⁿ sè-kan,ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Kiám m̄-sī sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng? 
1John5:5 Khah iâⁿ sè-kan,ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? Kiám m̄-sī sìn Iâ-so͘ sī Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng? 
1John5:6 Chit-ūi Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chiū-sī thong-kè chúi kap huih lâi,ê; m̄-sī chí-ū thong-kè chúi, sī thong-kè chúi kap huih. Sèng Sîn chòe kiàn-chèng, in-ūi Sèng Sîn sī chin-lí."

1John5:10 Sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng, tī i sim-lāi ū chit-ê kiàn-chèng; m̄ sìn Siōng-tè ê lâng chiū-sī khòaⁿ Siōng-tè chòe pe̍h-chha̍t, in-ūi i m̄ sìn Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h I ê Kiáⁿ só͘ chòe ê kiàn-chèng."

1John5:11 Chit-ê kiàn-chèng chiū-sī: Siōng-tè í-keng ū sù lán éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā, chit-ê oa̍h-miā sī tùi I ê Kiáⁿ lâi,ê."

1John5:12 Lâng ū Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ chiū ū oa̍h-miā; bô Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ chiū bô oa̍h-miā.

1John5:13 Góa siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng chai, lín ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John5:13 Góa siá chiah-ê sī beh hō͘ lín sìn Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ ê lâng chai, lín ū éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
1John5:14 Lán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ióng-kám bô kiaⁿ, in-ūi lán nā chiàu I ê chí-ì kî-kiû, I ōe kā lán thiaⁿ." 
1John5:14 Lán tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ióng-kám bô kiaⁿ, in-ūi lán nā chiàu I ê chí-ì kî-kiû, I ōe kā lán thiaⁿ." 
1John5:15 Kì-jiân chai I ōe thiaⁿ lán ê kî-kiû, chiū chai lán tùi I só͘ kiû,ê í-keng ū tit,tio̍h." 
1John5:15 Kì-jiân chai I ōe thiaⁿ lán ê kî-kiû, chiū chai lán tùi I só͘ kiû,ê í-keng ū tit,tio̍h."

Mā ū ōe tì-kàu sí ê chōe, góa kóng “Tio̍h kî-kiû”, pèng m̄-sī chí chit-ê."

Mā ū ōe tì-kàu sí ê chōe, góa kóng “Tio̍h kî-kiû”, pèng m̄-sī chí chit-ê." 
1John5:17 It-chhè put-gī ê hêng-ûi lóng sī chōe, m̄-kú mā ū bōe tì-kàu sí ê chōe."

Lán kap chin Sîn Siōng-tè kiat-liân, in-ūi lán kap I ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok kiat-liân. Chit-ūi chiū-sī chin Sîn Siōng-tè, sī éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā."

2John1:1 Góa tiúⁿ-ló siá-phoe hō͘ siū kéng-soán ê hu-jîn kap lí ê kiáⁿ-jî: Góa chin-sim thiàⁿ lín, m̄-nā góa, liân só͘-ū jīn-bat chin-lí ê lâng mā thiàⁿ lín;" 
2John1:2 in-ūi chin-lí tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn, ōe éng-oán kap lán tông-chāi." 
2John1:2 in-ūi chin-lí tiàm tī lán lāi-bīn, ōe éng-oán kap lán tông-chāi." 
2John1:3 Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap Pē ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lán un-tián, lîn-bín, kap pêng-an, hō͘ lán ê seng-oa̍h chhiong-móa chin-lí kap jîn-ài!" 
2John1:3 Goān Pē Siōng-tè kap Pē ê Kiáⁿ Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok sù lán un-tián, lîn-bín, kap pêng-an, hō͘ lán ê seng-oa̍h chhiong-móa chin-lí kap jîn-ài!" 
2John1:4 Góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi góa hoat-kiàn lí ê kiáⁿ-jî tiong-kan ū lâng chun-thàn Pē ê kài-bēng, si̍t-hêng chin-lí." 
2John1:4 Góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi góa hoat-kiàn lí ê kiáⁿ-jî tiong-kan ū lâng chun-thàn Pē ê kài-bēng, si̍t-hêng chin-lí." 
2John1:5 Hu-jîn ah, góa iau-kiû lí, lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ. Góa teh siá hō͘ lí,ê m̄-sī sin ê kài-bēng, sī lán tùi khí-thâu chiū niá-siū,ê." 
2John1:5 Hu-jîn ah, góa iau-kiû lí, lán tio̍h saⁿ-thiàⁿ. Góa teh siá hō͘ lí,ê m̄-sī sin ê kài-bēng, sī lán tùi khí-thâu chiū niá-siū,ê." 
2John1:6 Lán chiàu Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng seng-oa̍h, chiū-sī thiàⁿ. Chit-ê kài-bēng sī lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, tio̍h chiàu chit-ê kài-bēng seng-oa̍h." 
2John1:6 Lán chiàu Siōng-tè ê kài-bēng seng-oa̍h, chiū-sī thiàⁿ. Chit-ê kài-bēng sī lín tùi khí-thâu só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê, tio̍h chiàu chit-ê kài-bēng seng-oa̍h." 
2John1:7 Ū chin chōe bê-he̍k-chiá í-keng lâi kàu chit sè-kan; in m̄ kong-khai sêng-jīn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chòe lâng lâi sè-kan. Chit-khoán lâng sī bê-he̍k-chiá, sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá." 
2John1:7 Ū chin chōe bê-he̍k-chiá í-keng lâi kàu chit sè-kan; in m̄ kong-khai sêng-jīn Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok chòe lâng lâi sè-kan. Chit-khoán lâng sī bê-he̍k-chiá, sī Ki-tok ê Te̍k-tùi-chiá." 
2John1:8 Tio̍h sió-sim, lín só͘ chòe ê kang chiah bōe lo̍k-khong, hoán-tńg ōe tit-tio̍h chhiong-chiok ê pò-siúⁿ." 
2John1:8 Tio̍h sió-sim, lín só͘ chòe ê kang chiah bōe lo̍k-khong, hoán-tńg ōe tit-tio̍h chhiong-chiok ê pò-siúⁿ." 
2John1:9 Phian-lī bô kian-siú Ki-tok kà-sī ê lâng bô kap Siōng-tè kiat-liân. Kian-siú kà-sī ê lâng chiah ū kap Pē í-ki̍p Kiáⁿ kiat-liân. 
2John1:9 Phian-lī bô kian-siú Ki-tok kà-sī ê lâng bô kap Siōng-tè kiat-liân. Kian-siú kà-sī ê lâng chiah ū kap Pē í-ki̍p Kiáⁿ kiat-liân. 
2John1:10 Nā ū lâng khì lín hia, só͘ thoân ûi-pōe chit-khoán ê kà-sī, m̄-thang chiap-la̍p i ji̍p lín ê chhù, mā m̄-thang kā i chhéng-an," 
2John1:10 Nā ū lâng khì lín hia, só͘ thoân ûi-pōe chit-khoán ê kà-sī, m̄-thang chiap-la̍p i ji̍p lín ê chhù, mā m̄-thang kā i chhéng-an," 
2John1:11 in-ūi kā i chhéng-an chiū-sī chham-ú i ê pháiⁿ hêng-ûi. 
2John1:11 in-ūi kā i chhéng-an chiū-sī chham-ú i ê pháiⁿ hêng-ûi. 
2John1:12 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá, m̄-kú bô ài ēng chóa-pit; góa khah ǹg-bāng khì lín hia, tng-bīn kap lín kóng, thang hō͘ lán ê hoaⁿ-hí chhiong-móa." 
2John1:12 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá, m̄-kú bô ài ēng chóa-pit; góa khah ǹg-bāng khì lín hia, tng-bīn kap lín kóng, thang hō͘ lán ê hoaⁿ-hí chhiong-móa." 
2John1:13 Kap lí pîⁿ-pîⁿ siū kéng-soán hit-ê chí-bē ê kiáⁿ-jî beh kā lí chhéng-an. 
2John1:13 Kap lí pîⁿ-pîⁿ siū kéng-soán hit-ê chí-bē ê kiáⁿ-jî beh kā lí chhéng-an. 
3John1:1 Góa tiúⁿ-ló siá-phoe hō͘ chhin-ài ê Kai-iû; lí sī góa chin-sim só͘ thiàⁿ,ê. 
3John1:1 Góa tiúⁿ-ló siá-phoe hō͘ chhin-ài ê Kai-iû; lí sī góa chin-sim só͘ thiàⁿ,ê. 
3John1:2 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa chiok lí bān-sū heng-thong, mā chiok lí sin-thé kiān-khong, chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ê sim-sîn hiah-ni̍h ióng-chòng." 
3John1:2 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa chiok lí bān-sū heng-thong, mā chiok lí sin-thé kiān-khong, chhin-chhiūⁿ lí ê sim-sîn hiah-ni̍h ióng-chòng." 
3John1:3 Ū kúi ê sìn-tô͘ lâi, kā góa chèng-si̍t lí tùi chin-lí tiong-sêng, sū-si̍t lí it-ti̍t ū teh si̍t-hêng chin-lí, góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí." 
3John1:3 Ū kúi ê sìn-tô͘ lâi, kā góa chèng-si̍t lí tùi chin-lí tiong-sêng, sū-si̍t lí it-ti̍t ū teh si̍t-hêng chin-lí, góa hui-siông hoaⁿ-hí." 
3John1:4 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h kóng góa ê kiáⁿ-jî ū teh si̍t-hêng chin-lí, bô chi̍t hāng pí che koh-khah hō͘ góa hoaⁿ-hí." 
3John1:4 Thiaⁿ-tio̍h kóng góa ê kiáⁿ-jî ū teh si̍t-hêng chin-lí, bô chi̍t hāng pí che koh-khah hō͘ góa hoaⁿ-hí." 
3John1:5 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lí ū tiong-si̍t chiap-thāi sìn-tô͘, te̍k-pia̍t sī chhut-gōa-lâng." 
3John1:5 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, lí ū tiong-si̍t chiap-thāi sìn-tô͘, te̍k-pia̍t sī chhut-gōa-lâng." 
3John1:6 In bat tī hōe-chiòng bīn-chêng chèng-si̍t lí ê thiàⁿ-sim. Chhiáⁿ lí chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê, pang-chān in kè-sio̍k in ê lú-thêng." 
3John1:6 In bat tī hōe-chiòng bīn-chêng chèng-si̍t lí ê thiàⁿ-sim. Chhiáⁿ lí chiàu Siōng-tè só͘ hoaⁿ-hí,ê, pang-chān in kè-sio̍k in ê lú-thêng." 
3John1:7 In-ūi in ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘ chhut-gōa thoân-tō, lóng bô tùi bī-sìn-chiá chiap-siū sím-mi̍h." 
3John1:7 In-ūi in ūi-tio̍h Ki-tok ê iân-kò͘ chhut-gōa thoân-tō, lóng bô tùi bī-sìn-chiá chiap-siū sím-mi̍h." 
3John1:8 Só͘-í lán ū gī-bū chiap-thāi chit-khoán ê lâng, hō͘ lán thang ūi-tio̍h chin-lí chiâⁿ-chòe tâng-kang." 
3John1:8 Só͘-í lán ū gī-bū chiap-thāi chit-khoán ê lâng, hō͘ lán thang ūi-tio̍h chin-lí chiâⁿ-chòe tâng-kang." 
3John1:9 Góa bat siá-phoe hō͘ kàu-hōe. Khó-sioh, ài-beh chòe kàu-hōe léng-siù ê Te̍k-te̍k-hui m̄ chiap-la̍p góa." 
3John1:9 Góa bat siá-phoe hō͘ kàu-hōe. Khó-sioh, ài-beh chòe kàu-hōe léng-siù ê Te̍k-te̍k-hui m̄ chiap-la̍p góa." 
3John1:10 Só͘-í, góa nā khì, beh kóng-khí i só͘ chòe ēng pháiⁿ-ōe húi-pòng kong-kek goán ê tāi-chì. M̄-nā án-ni, i pún-sin m̄ chiap-thāi sìn-tô͘, sīm-chì chó͘-tòng goān-ì chiap-thāi ê lâng, koh kā in kek-chhut kàu-hōe." 
3John1:10 Só͘-í, góa nā khì, beh kóng-khí i só͘ chòe ēng pháiⁿ-ōe húi-pòng kong-kek goán ê tāi-chì. M̄-nā án-ni, i pún-sin m̄ chiap-thāi sìn-tô͘, sīm-chì chó͘-tòng goān-ì chiap-thāi ê lâng, koh kā in kek-chhut kàu-hōe." 
3John1:11 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, m̄-thang o̍h pháiⁿ, tio̍h o̍h hó. Choh-hó,ê sio̍k Siōng-tè; choh-pháiⁿ,ê m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè." 
3John1:11 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, m̄-thang o̍h pháiⁿ, tio̍h o̍h hó. Choh-hó,ê sio̍k Siōng-tè; choh-pháiⁿ,ê m̄-bat khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Siōng-tè." 
3John1:12 Chèng-lâng lóng chheng-chàn Tí-bí-te̍k; chin-lí pún-sin mā ūi-tio̍h i choh-chèng. Goán mā ūi-tio̍h i choh-chèng; lí chai goán ê kiàn-chèng sī chin-si̍t. 
3John1:12 Chèng-lâng lóng chheng-chàn Tí-bí-te̍k; chin-lí pún-sin mā ūi-tio̍h i choh-chèng. Goán mā ūi-tio̍h i choh-chèng; lí chai goán ê kiàn-chèng sī chin-si̍t. 
3John1:13 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá, m̄-kú bô ài ēng chóa-pit." 
3John1:13 Góa iáu ū chin chōe ōe ài siá, m̄-kú bô ài ēng chóa-pit." 
3John1:14 Góa ǹg-bāng bô kú ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h lí, lán chiah tng-bīn lâi kóng." 
3John1:14 Góa ǹg-bāng bô kú ōe kìⁿ-tio̍h lí, lán chiah tng-bīn lâi kóng." 
3John1:15 Goān lí pêng-an! Lí ê pêng-iú lóng kā lí chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā lán ê pêng-iú chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê chhéng-an. 
3John1:15 Goān lí pêng-an! Lí ê pêng-iú lóng kā lí chhéng-an. Chhiáⁿ thòe góa kā lán ê pêng-iú chi̍t-ê chi̍t-ê chhéng-an. 
Jude1:1 Góa sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê po̍k-jîn, Ngá-kok ê hiaⁿ-tī Iû-tāi, góa siá-phoe hō͘ hiah-ê siū Siōng-tè soán-tiàu, tit-tio̍h Pē Siōng-tè ê thiàⁿ, siū Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok pó-iū ê lâng." 
Jude1:2 Goān Siōng-tè hong-hong-hù-hù sù lín lîn-bín, pêng-an, kap chû-ài!" 
Jude1:3 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, góa chá chiū it-ti̍t ài-beh siá-phoe hō͘ lín, kap lín tâm-lūn lán lóng ū-hūn ê chín-kiù. Góa kám-kak chit-chūn su-iàu sûi-sî siá-phoe kā lín kó͘-lē, ài lín ūi-tio̍h góa chòe-āu chi̍t piàn thoân-siū hō͘ sìn-tô͘ chit-ê sìn-gióng kè-sio̍k hùn-tò͘." 
Jude1:4 In-ūi ū chi̍t-kóa bô kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng thau-thau-á chǹg ji̍p-lâi lán tiong-kan, lī-iōng lán ê Siōng-tè ê un-tián chòe hòng-chhiòng ê chià-kháu, koh m̄ jīn î-it ê Chú-cháiⁿ lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok. Chin chá í-chêng Sèng-keng chiū ū-giân chiah-ê lâng it-tēng tio̍h siū hêng-hoa̍t." 
Jude1:5 Sui-jiân lín chai chiah-ê it-chhè ê sū, góa iáu-kú beh kā lín thê-chhíⁿ, Chú chi̍t piàn chiū oân-choân chiong Í-sek-lia̍t jîn-bîn tùi Ai-ki̍p tōe kiù,chhut-lâi, āu-lâi húi-bia̍t hiah-ê m̄-sìn ê lâng." 
Jude1:6 Koh hiah-ê bô siú pún-hūn, lī-khui pún-ūi ê thiⁿ-sài, in hō͘ só-liān éng-oán liān tī o͘-àm ê chhim-ian; Siōng-tè kā in koaiⁿ tī hia, thèng-hāu sím-phòaⁿ ê tōa Ji̍t-chí." 
Jude1:7 Tòa tī Só͘-to-má, Gô-mô͘-la, kap hù-kūn siâⁿ-chhī ê lâng, mā kap hiah-ê thiⁿ-sài siâng-khoán îm-loān, hòng-chhiòng hoán chū-jiân ê sèng-io̍k, siū-tio̍h éng-oán bōe hoa ê hé ê hêng-hoa̍t, chòe chèng-lâng ê kéng-kài." 
Jude1:8 Siâng-khoán, chiah-ê khong-su-bōng-sióng ê lâng mā sún-hāi ka-kī ê seng-khu, biáu-sī Siōng-tè ê koân-ui, bú-jio̍k thiⁿ-téng hiah-ê chun-êng-chiá." 
Jude1:9 Thiⁿ-sài-tiúⁿ Bí-ka-le̍k ūi-tio̍h Mô͘-se ê ûi-thé kap Mô͘-kúi cheng-lūn ê sî, mā m̄-káⁿ ēng húi-pòng ê ōe chek-pī, chí-ū kóng, “Chú khiàn-chek lí!”" 
Jude1:10 M̄-kú chiah-ê lâng húi-pòng in só͘ bô liáu-kái ê sū; in chhin-chhiūⁿ iá-siù khì chòe chiàu pún-lêng só͘ chai ê tāi-chì, kiat-kó siū húi-bia̍t." 
Jude1:11 In chhám ah! In-ūi in kiâⁿ Kai-ún ê lō͘, koh ūi-tio̍h chîⁿ-châi hām-lo̍h tī Pa-lân ê chhò-gō͘. In kap Khó-la siâng-khoán, in-ūi pōe-poān lâi bia̍t-bông." 
Jude1:12 In m̄-chai kiàn-siàu, tōa-chia̍h tōa-lim, ka-kī kò͘ chia̍h, lâi phò-hoāi lín ê ài-chhan. In chhin-chhiūⁿ hûn hō͘ hong chhe-lâi chhe-khì, lóng bô lo̍h-hō͘; chhin-chhiūⁿ chhiū kàu chhiu-thiⁿ ia̍h bô kiat ké-chí, hō͘ lâng liân kun khau,khí-lâi, sí kah ta-khok-khok." 
Jude1:13 In mā chhin-chhiūⁿ pho-lōng phùn-chhut chúi-phe̍h, lō͘-chhut ka-kī ê kiàn-siàu; chhin-chhiūⁿ lī-khui khúi-tō ê chhiⁿ lak ji̍p-khì Siōng-tè ūi-tio̍h in éng-oán pó-liû hit-ê o͘-àm ê chhim-ian." 
Jude1:14 A-tong ê tē-chhit tāi sun Í-lo̍k ū-giân chiah-ê lâng kóng, “Lín khòaⁿ! Chú ū chhōa chheng-chheng-bān-bān ê sèng thiⁿ-sài lâi," 
Jude1:15 beh sím-phòaⁿ só͘-ū ê lâng, hêng-hoa̍t it-chhè bô kèng-khiân ê chōe-jîn, in-ūi in ēng bô kèng-khiân ê hong-hoat chòe it-chhè bô kèng-khiân ê sū, koh kóng siat-to̍k Siōng-tè ê ōe.”" 
Jude1:16 Chiah-ê lâng put-sî nga̍uh-nga̍uh-liām, bâi-oàn, thàn su-io̍k chòe tāi-chì, kóng tōa-ōe, ūi-tio̍h lī-ek phô͘-tháⁿ pa̍t-lâng." 
Jude1:17 Chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê sù-tô͘ ū-giân ê ōe." 
Jude1:18 In ū kā lín kóng, “Tī boa̍t-kî, ū chi̍t-kóa thàn ka-kī bô kèng-khiân ê io̍k-liām chòe tāi-chì ê lâng ōe chhut-hiān, in ài thí-chhiò pa̍t-lâng ê sìn-gióng.”" 
Jude1:19 Chiah-ê sī chè-chō hun-cheng, siū pún-sèng chi-phòe, bô kap Sèng Sîn kiat-liân ê lâng." 
Jude1:20 Lín leh, chhin-ài ê pêng-iú, tio̍h chiong ka-kī kiàn-li̍p tī lín chì-sèng ê sìn-gióng téng-bīn; tio̍h khò Sèng Sîn kî-tó." 
Jude1:21 Tio̍h tiàm tī Siōng-tè ê thiàⁿ pó-siú ka-kī, gióng-bōng lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê lîn-bín, ti̍t-kàu tit-tio̍h éng-oán ê oa̍h-miā." 
Jude1:22 Tùi chi̍t-kóa sim chûn giâu-gî ê lâng, tio̍h lîn-bín in;" 
Jude1:23 ū chi̍t-kóa lâng, tio̍h tùi hé-tiong kā in kiù,chhut-lâi; koh ū chi̍t-kóa lâng, tio̍h lîn-bín in, m̄-kú tio̍h ka-kī kéng-kài, liân in hō͘ chêng-io̍k bak,tio̍h ê saⁿ to tio̍h iàm-ò͘ⁿ." 
Jude1:24 Siōng-tè ōe pó-hō͘ lín bōe tūi-lo̍h, hō͘ lín bô khoat-tiám, hoaⁿ-hoaⁿ-hí-hí khiā tī I êng-iāu ê bīn-chêng." 
Jude1:25 Goān to̍k-it ê Siōng-tè — lán ê Kiù-chú, thong-kè lán ê Chú Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok tit-tio̍h êng-kng, chun-giâm, lêng-le̍k, kap koân-pèng, tùi bān-kó͘ kàu hiān-chāi, ti̍t-kàu éng-oán. Amen!" 
Revelation1:1 Che sī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê khé-sī. Siōng-tè hō͘ I chit-ê khé-sī, ài I chiong it-tēng sûi-sî ōe hoat-seng ê tāi-chì chí-sī Siōng-tè ê chèng po̍k-jîn. Ki-tok ū chhe-khián I ê thiⁿ-sài khì chí-sī I ê po̍k-jîn Iok-hān." 
Revelation1:2 Iok-hān ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit kap Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok ê kiàn-chèng, chiū-sī i só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê it-chhè lâi choh-chèng." 
Revelation1:3 Tha̍k chit-pún chheh ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chit-ê ū-giân koh chun-siú chheh,ni̍h só͘ kì-chài ê lâng chin ū hok-khì; in-ūi sî-ki kūn lah. 
Revelation1:4 Góa Iok-hān siá-phoe hō͘ A-sè-a ê chhit ê kàu-hōe, kóng: Goān hiān-chāi chûn-chāi, kè-khì chûn-chāi, chiong-lâi mā chûn-chāi ê Siōng-tè, kap I chō-ūi chêng ê chhit ê sîn, í-ki̍p Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, sù lín un-tián kap pêng-an! Ki-tok sī tiong-sìn ê kiàn-chèng-jîn, thâu chi̍t ê tùi sí-lâng tiong koh-oa̍h, sī tōe-chiūⁿ bān-ông ê Chú-cháiⁿ. I thiàⁿ lán, ūi-tio̍h lán lâu-huih hi-seng lâi tháu-pàng lán thoat-lī chōe," 
Revelation1:5  
Revelation1:6 hō͘ lán chiâⁿ-chòe chi̍t ê kok-tō͘, choh chè-si lâi ho̍k-sāi I ê Pē Siōng-tè. Goān êng-kng kap koân-lêng kui tī Iâ-so͘ Ki-tok, ti̍t-kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
Revelation1:7 Lí khòaⁿ, I chē-hûn teh lâi, chèng-lâng ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I, liân ēng chhiuⁿ chha̍k I ê lâng mā ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ. Tōe-chiūⁿ bān-cho̍k lóng ōe in-ūi I thî-khàu. Chit-ê sū it-tēng ōe hoat-seng. Amen!" 
Revelation1:8 Hiān-chāi chûn-chāi, kè-khì chûn-chāi, chiong-lâi mā chûn-chāi ê Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè kóng, “Góa sī A-ní-hoat, sī A-bí-ka.”" 
Revelation1:9 Góa sī Iok-hān, sī lín ê hiaⁿ-tī, kap lín chòe-hé hun-tam Iâ-so͘ ê hoān-lān kap thun-lún, koh ū-hūn tī I ê thóng-tī. Ūi-tio̍h thoân Siōng-tè ê sìn-sit kap Iâ-so͘ ê kiàn-chèng, góa bat tòa tī chi̍t ê miâ kiò-chòe Poa̍t-mô͘ ê hái-tó." 
Revelation1:10 Ū chi̍t ê Chú-ji̍t, góa siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tī góa ê āu-bīn ū tōa ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ lat-pah teh hiáng," 
Revelation1:11 kóng, “Lí tio̍h chiong só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê siá chòe chheh, kià hō͘ Í-hut-só͘, Sū-múi-ná, Pia̍t-ka-mô͘, Chhui-ngá-chhui-lat, Sat-te̍k, Hui-la-thiat-hui, kap Ló-tí-ka chit chhit ê kàu-hōe.”" 
Revelation1:12 Góa oa̍t-tńg-sin beh khòaⁿ tùi góa kóng-ōe,ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng, chi̍t-ē oa̍t-tńg-sin, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chhit ki kim teng-tâi." 
Revelation1:13 Teng-tâi ê tiong-ng ū chi̍t ūi chhin-chhiūⁿ Jîn-chú, chhēng chi̍t niá sûi-lo̍h kàu kha ê tn̂g-phàu, heng-khám hâ kim-tòa." 
Revelation1:14 I ê thâu kap thâu-mn̂g chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ-mn̂g hiah-ni̍h pe̍h, chhin-chhiūⁿ seh hiah-ni̍h pe̍h; I ê ba̍k-chiu chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-iām." 
Revelation1:15 I ê kha chhin-chhiūⁿ kè hé-lô͘ thoàn-liān kng-liāng ê tâng; I ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi teh chhiâng ê siaⁿ. 
Revelation1:16 I ê chiàⁿ-chhiú the̍h chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ; I ê chhùi thò͘-chhut siang-bīn-lāi ê kiàm; I ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ iām-jia̍t ê ji̍t-thâu hoat-kng. 
Revelation1:17 Góa chi̍t-ē khòaⁿ-tio̍h I, chiū phak tī I kha-chêng chhin-chhiūⁿ sí,khì ê lâng. I ēng chiàⁿ-chhiú hōaⁿ góa, kóng, “M̄-bián kiaⁿ! Góa sī khí-thâu,ê, mā-sī soah-bé,ê." 
Revelation1:18 Góa sī oa̍h,ê. Góa ū sí, hiān-chāi teh oa̍h, ōe éng-éng-oán-oán oa̍h,teh. Góa ū sí-bông kap Im-hú ê só-sî." 
Revelation1:19 Só͘-í, lí tio̍h chiong só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ-ê, í-ki̍p hiān-chāi só͘ teh hoat-seng, kap í-āu ōe hoat-seng ê tāi-chì lóng siá,khí-lâi." 
Revelation1:20 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h góa chiàⁿ-chhiú the̍h hit chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ kap chhit ki kim teng-tâi ê ò-biāu sī án-ni: Chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ sī chhit ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài; chhit ki teng-tâi sī chhit ê kàu-hōe.” 
Revelation2:1 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Í-hut-só͘ ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Chiàⁿ-chhiú tháⁿ chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ, tī chhit ki kim teng-tâi ê tiong-kan teh kiâⁿ Hit-ūi án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation2:2 Góa chai lí ê só͘-chòe; lí án-chóaⁿ teh lô-khó͘ kap thun-lún. Góa chai lí bōe iông-jím pháiⁿ-lâng; lí mā bat khó-giām hiah-ê chū-chheng sī sù-tô͘ kî-si̍t m̄-sī ê lâng, khòaⁿ-chhut in sī pe̍h-chha̍t,ê." 
Revelation2:3 Lí ū thun-lún, bat ūi-tio̍h góa ê miâ jím-siū kan-khó͘, lóng bô ià-siān." 
Revelation2:4 M̄-kú, ū chi̍t hāng tāi-chì góa beh kā lí chek-pī, chiū-sī lí í-keng pàng-sak lí tong-chho͘ ê thiàⁿ-sim." 
Revelation2:5 Só͘-í, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit lí tùi tó-ūi tūi-lo̍h; tio̍h hóe-kái, chòe lí tong-chho͘ só͘ chòe ê kang-chok. Nā bô, góa ōe khì lí hia, chiong lí ê teng-tâi tùi goân-ūi sóa-khui." 
Revelation2:6 Put-kò, lí iáu ū chi̍t hāng khó-chhú ê sū, chiū-sī lí mā kap góa kâng-khoán oàn-hūn Nî-ko-la-tóng ê hêng-ûi." 
Revelation2:7 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe. “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng, góa beh hō͘ i chia̍h Siōng-tè ê Lo̍k-hn̂g tiong hit-châng oa̍h-miā-chhiū ê ké-chí.’”" 
Revelation2:8 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Sū-múi-ná ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Khí-thâu,ê kap soah-bé,ê, sí ū koh-oa̍h Hit-ūi án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation2:9 Góa chai lí ê hoān-lān kap sàn-chhiah; kî-si̍t lí sī hó-gia̍h. Góa chai lí ū siū-tio̍h chū-chheng Iû-thài -lâng ê lâng ê húi-pòng; kî-si̍t in m̄-sī Iû-thài -lâng, sī Sat-tàn ê chi̍p-thoân." 
Revelation2:10 M̄-bián kiaⁿ lí teh-beh siū ê khó͘-lān. Lí khòaⁿ, Mô͘-kúi teh-beh chiong lín tiong-kan kúi-nā lâng koaiⁿ-lo̍h kaⁿ, beh kā lín khó-giām, lín ōe siū khó͘-lān cha̍p ji̍t. Lí tio̍h chīn-tiong kàu sí, góa ōe sù lí oa̍h-miā ê hoa-koan." 
Revelation2:11 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe. “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng choa̍t-tùi bōe siū-tio̍h tē-jī piàn sí ê chai-hāi.’” 
Revelation2:12 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Pia̍t-ka-mô͘ ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Ū siang-bīn-lāi ê kiàm Hit-ūi án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation2:13 Góa chai lí tòa tó-ūi, chiū-sī ū Sat-tàn ê chō-ūi hia. Lí ū kian-siú góa ê miâ, sīm-chì góa tiong-si̍t ê kiàn-chèng-jîn An-thê-phà tī lín tiong-kan, chiū-sī Sat-tàn tòa ê só͘-chāi, siū sat-hāi ê sî, lí mā bô hó͘-jīn tùi góa ê sìn-gióng." 
Revelation2:14 M̄-kú góa ū kúi-nā hāng tāi-chì beh kā lí chek-pī: In-ūi tī lí hia ū lâng chip-siú Pa-lân ê kà-sī, chit-ê Pa-lân ū kà Pa-le̍k khì ín-iú Í-sek-lia̍t ê kiáⁿ-sun, hō͘ in chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h, koh kiâⁿ kan-îm." 
Revelation2:15 Chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, lí hia mā ū lâng chip-siú Nî-ko-la-tóng ê kà-sī." 
Revelation2:16 Só͘-í, tio̍h hóe-kái. Nā bô, góa liâm-piⁿ ōe khì lí hia, ēng góa chhùi-lāi ê kiàm kap in kau-chiàn." 
Revelation2:17 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe. “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng góa beh chiong pó-chûn,khí-lâi ê má-ná hō͘ i, koh beh hō͘ i chi̍t tè pe̍h-chio̍h, chio̍h ê téng-bīn ū siá sin ê miâ; chit-ê miâ, niá-siū ê lâng í-gōa, bô lâng bat.’”" 
Revelation2:18 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Chhui-ngá-chhui-lat ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Siōng-tè ê Kiáⁿ, chiū-sī ba̍k-chiu chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-iām, kha chhin-chhiūⁿ kng-liāng ê tâng Hit-ūi án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation2:19 Góa chai lí ê hêng-ûi, lí ê thiàⁿ, sìn-sim, ho̍k-sāi, kap thun-lún; koh chai lí chòe-kūn ê só͘-chòe pí khí-thâu,ê khah hó." 
Revelation2:20 M̄-kú, ū chi̍t hāng tāi-chì góa beh kā lí chek-pī, chiū-sī lí iông-ún chū-chheng choh sian-ti ê hū-jîn-lâng Iâ-sé-phek; i kà-sī koh bê-he̍k góa ê po̍k-jîn khì hoān kan-îm koh chia̍h chè ngó͘-siōng ê mi̍h." 
Revelation2:21 Góa ū hō͘ i sî-kan thang hóe-kái, m̄-kú i m̄-khéng hóe-kái lī-khui îm-hēng." 
Revelation2:22 Khòaⁿ ah, góa beh hō͘ i kan-khó͘ tó-chhn̂g; hiah-ê kap i hoān kan-îm ê lâng nā bô hóe-kái, thêng-chí in kap i ê îm-hēng, góa mā beh hō͘ in siū tōa khó͘-lān." 
Revelation2:23 Góa beh thâi-sí hiah-ê tè i ê lâng. Án-ni lóng-chóng ê kàu-hōe chiū ōe chai góa sī kàm-chhat lâng ê sim-su ì-liām,ê, góa beh chiàu lín ta̍k-ê lâng ê hêng-ûi kā lín pò-èng." 
Revelation2:24 “‘Chóng-sī lín chiah-ê kî-tha ê Chhui-ngá-chhui-lat -lâng, lín bô siū chit-khoán kàu-tō, m̄ bat só͘-ūi Sat-tàn ê ò-pì ê lâng, góa kā lín kóng, góa bōe ke-thiⁿ pa̍t-khoán ê tāng-tàⁿ hō͘ lín." 
Revelation2:25 M̄-kú, lín tio̍h kian-siú lín í-keng ū,ê, ti̍t-kàu góa lâi." 
Revelation2:26 “‘Tek-sèng koh kè-sio̍k ūi-tio̍h góa chòe kang kàu lō͘-bé ê lâng, góa beh hō͘ i koân-pèng thang tī-lí bān-kok;" 
Revelation2:27 i beh ēng thih-koáiⁿ tī-lí in, chhin-chhiūⁿ kòng-chhùi hûi-khì;" 
Revelation2:28 góa mā ū án-ni tùi góa ê Pē niá-siū koân-pèng. Tek-sèng ê lâng, góa mā beh hō͘ i khé-bêng-chhiⁿ." 
Revelation2:29 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe.’” 
Revelation3:1 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Sat-te̍k ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Ū Siōng-tè ê chhit ê sîn kap chhit lia̍p chhiⁿ Hit-ūi án-ni kóng: Góa chai lí ê hêng-ûi, lâng kóng lí teh oa̍h, kî-si̍t lí sī sí." 
Revelation3:2 Tio̍h chhíⁿ,khí-lâi, ka-kiông teh-beh bô,khì ê khùi-si-á, in-ūi góa khòaⁿ, tī góa ê Siōng-tè bīn-chêng, lí ê hêng-ûi iáu bô oân-choân." 
Revelation3:3 Só͘-í, tio̍h ōe-kì-tit lí só͘ niá-siū, só͘ thiaⁿ,tio̍h-ê; tio̍h chun-siú, tio̍h hóe-kái. Lí nā bô chhíⁿ,khí-lâi, góa ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t lâi; lí it-tēng m̄ chai góa sím-mi̍h sî ōe lâi kàu lí hia." 
Revelation3:4 M̄-kú, tī Sat-te̍k iáu ū chi̍t-kóa lâng in ê saⁿ bô phah lâ-sâm, in ōe chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ kap góa chòe-hé kiâⁿ, in-ūi in ōe-kham,tit." 
Revelation3:5 “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng siâng-khoán ōe chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ; góa it-tēng bōe tùi oa̍h-miā-chheh kā i tû-miâ. Góa ōe tī góa ê Pē kap hiah-ê thiⁿ-sài bīn-chêng kong-khai jīn i ê miâ. 
Revelation3:6 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe.’” 
Revelation3:7 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Hui-la-thiat-hui ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Sèng-kiat koh chin-si̍t, chiáng-ak Tāi-pi̍t ê só-sî, khui chiū bô lâng ōe-tàng koaiⁿ, koaiⁿ chiū bô lâng ōe-tàng khui Hit-ūi án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation3:8 Góa chai lí ê hêng-ûi, lí khòaⁿ, góa í-keng tī lí ê bīn-chêng kā lí khui chi̍t ê mn̂g, sī bô lâng ōe-tàng koaiⁿ,ê; góa chai lí kan-ta ū tām-po̍h khùi-la̍t, khiok ū siú góa ê tō-lí, m̄-bat hó͘-jīn góa ê miâ." 
Revelation3:9 Lí khòaⁿ, Sat-tàn ê chi̍p-thoân, in chū-chheng Iû-thài -lâng, kî-si̍t m̄-sī, sī hiah-ê kóng pe̍h-chha̍t,ê; lí khòaⁿ, góa beh hō͘ in lâi phak tī lí ê kha-chêng, in chiū chai góa ū thiàⁿ lí." 
Revelation3:10 In-ūi lí ū chun-siú góa ê tō-lí thun-lún kàu lō͘-bé, góa mā beh pó-siú lí thoat-lī hit-ê chhì-liān ê sî, chit-ê sî teh-beh lîm-kàu choân sè-kài, lâi khó-giām tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng." 
Revelation3:11 Góa liâm-piⁿ kàu; lí só͘-ū,ê tio̍h kian-siú, chiah bián ū lâng kā lí ê hoa-koan the̍h,khì." 
Revelation3:12 “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng, góa beh hō͘ i chiâⁿ-chòe góa ê Siōng-tè tiān-lāi ê thiāu; i éng-oán bōe koh lī-khui. Góa beh chiong góa ê Siōng-tè ê miâ, í-ki̍p góa ê Siōng-tè ê siâⁿ, chiū-sī tùi thiⁿ-téng góa ê Siōng-tè hia kàng-lo̍h sin ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng ê miâ, kap góa sin ê miâ, lóng siá tī i téng-bīn." 
Revelation3:13 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe.’” 
Revelation3:14 “Lí tio̍h siá-phoe hō͘ Ló-tí-ka ê kàu-hōe ê thiⁿ-sài, kóng, “‘Hit-ūi Amen, tiong-sìn koh sìn-si̍t ê kiàn-chèng-jîn, Siōng-tè chhòng-chō ê kun-goân, án-ni kóng:" 
Revelation3:15 Góa chai lí ê hêng-ûi, lí bô léng bô sio. Góa khah ài lí khòaⁿ sī sio á-sī léng." 
Revelation3:16 Kì-jiân lí la-lûn-sio, m̄-chiâⁿ sio m̄-chiâⁿ léng, góa teh-beh tùi góa ê chhùi kā lí phùi,chhut-khì." 
Revelation3:17 In-ūi lí kóng: Góa hó-gia̍h, í-keng tōa hoat-châi, lóng bô khiàm-kheh. Lí khiok m̄ chai lí pi-chhám, khó-lîn, sàn-chhiah, sit-bêng, koh chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé." 
Revelation3:18 Góa khǹg lí tùi góa bóe keng-kè hé thoàn-liān ê kim, thang hō͘ lí hó-gia̍h; koh bóe pe̍h ê saⁿ khì chhēng, chiah bián hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h lí thǹg-theh ê kiàn-siàu; mā bóe io̍h-ko boah lí ê ba̍k-chiu, hō͘ lí ōe khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Revelation3:19 Góa só͘ thiàⁿ ê lâng, góa lóng kā in chek-pī kap koán-kàu. Só͘-í, tio̍h jia̍t-sim, tio̍h hoán-hóe." 
Revelation3:20 Lí khòaⁿ, góa í-keng khiā tī mn̂g-gōa teh phah-mn̂g; thiaⁿ-kìⁿ góa ê siaⁿ lâi khui-mn̂g ê lâng, góa beh ji̍p-khì chhē i, kap i chòe-hé chia̍h, i mā kap góa chòe-hé chia̍h." 
Revelation3:21 “‘Tek-sèng ê lâng, góa beh hō͘ i kap góa chòe-hé chē tī góa ê pó-chō, chhin-chhiūⁿ góa í-keng tek-sèng kap góa ê Pē chòe-hé chē tī I ê pó-chō." 
Revelation3:22 “‘Ū hī-khang ê lâng lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ Sèng Sîn kā chiah-ê kàu-hōe kóng ê ōe.’” 
Revelation4:1 Āu-lâi góa koh khòaⁿ, khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ-téng ū chi̍t ê khui-khui ê mn̂g. Góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ê thâu chi̍t piàn tùi góa kóng-ōe ê siaⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ lat-pah teh hiáng, kóng, “Khí-lâi chia, góa beh chí-sī lí í-āu it-tēng ōe hoat-seng ê tāi-chì.”" 
Revelation4:2 Góa chiū sûi-sî siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ-téng ū chi̍t ê pó-chō, ū chi̍t ūi chē tī pó-chō." 
Revelation4:3 I ê bīn-māu chhin-chhiūⁿ phek-ge̍k kap âng-pó-chio̍h; pó-chō ê chiu-ûi ū khēng, khòaⁿ,khí-lâi chhin-chhiūⁿ le̍k pó-chio̍h." 
Revelation4:4 Pó-chō ê chiu-ûi ū jī-cha̍p-sì ê chō-ūi, ū jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló chē tī chō-ūi, in chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ, thâu-khak tì kim ê hoa-koan." 
Revelation4:5 Tùi pó-chō ū hoat-chhut sih-nà, hiáng-siaⁿ, kap lûi; tī pó-chō chêng ū chhit ki tiám-to̍h ê hé-pé, chiū-sī Siōng-tè ê chhit ê sîn." 
Revelation4:6 Pó-chō chêng ū chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi-chiⁿ hiah-ni̍h thàu-bêng ê po-lê-hái. Pó-chō ê chiu-ûi ū sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h, in ê seng-khu chêng-āu lóng ū ba̍k-chiu." 
Revelation4:7 Thâu chi̍t ê oa̍h-mi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ sai, tē-jī ê oa̍h-mi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ gû-káng-á, tē-saⁿ ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng ê bīn, tē-sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h chhin-chhiūⁿ teh pe ê eng-chiáu." 
Revelation4:8 Chit sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ta̍k-ê lóng ū la̍k ki si̍t, chiu-ûi kap lāi-bīn kui seng-khu ū chin chōe ba̍k-chiu. In mî-ji̍t bô-thêng teh chhiùⁿ: Sèng,chài! Sèng,chài! Sèng,chài! Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè; kè-khì chûn-chāi, hiān-chāi chûn-chāi, chiong-lâi mā chûn-chāi." 
Revelation4:9 Ta̍k-piàn oa̍h-mi̍h chiong êng-kng, chun-kùi, kám-siā, kui hō͘ chē tī pó-chō, éng-éng-oán-oán oa̍h,teh Hit-ūi ê sî," 
Revelation4:10 jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló chiū phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài chē tī pó-chō, éng-éng-oán-oán oa̍h,teh Hit-ūi. In chiong hoa-koan hiat tī pó-chō chêng, kóng:" 
Revelation4:11 Goán ê Chú, goán ê Siōng-tè! Lí eng-kai tit-tio̍h êng-iāu, chun-kùi, kap koân-lêng, in-ūi lí chhòng-chō bān-iú; tùi lí ê chí-ì, bān-iú siū-chō, seng-chûn." 
Revelation5:1 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi ê chiàⁿ-chhiú ū chi̍t kńg chheh, lāi-bīn gōa-bīn lóng ū siá-jī, ēng chhit ê ìn hong,teh." 
Revelation5:2 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê ū tōa khùi-la̍t ê thiⁿ-sài, tōa-siaⁿ soan-pò͘ kóng, “Sím-mi̍h-lâng ū chu-keh thang thí-khui hit-kńg chheh, thiah-khui chheh ê hong-ìn?”" 
Revelation5:3 Tī thiⁿ-téng, tī tōe-chiūⁿ, tī tōe-ē, lóng bô lâng ōe-tàng thí-khui á-sī tha̍k hit-kńg chheh." 
Revelation5:4 Chhē bô chi̍t ê lâng ū chu-keh thí-khui á-sī tha̍k hit-kńg chheh, góa chiū tōa-siaⁿ khàu." 
Revelation5:5 Tiúⁿ-ló ê tiong-kan ū chi̍t ê tùi góa kóng, “M̄-thang khàu. Lí khòaⁿ, tùi Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k chhut,lâi ê Sai, Tāi-pi̍t ê Kun, í-keng tek-sèng, ōe-tàng khui hit-kńg chheh kap hit chhit ê hong-ìn.”" 
Revelation5:6 Āu-lâi góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Iûⁿ-ko khiā tī pó-chō chêng, ū sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h kap hiah-ê tiúⁿ-ló kā I ûi,teh. Iûⁿ-ko ká-ná bat siū sat-hāi, ū chhit ki kak, chhit lúi ba̍k-chiu, chiū-sī siū chhe-khián khì phó͘-thiⁿ-ē Siōng-tè ê chhit ê sîn." 
Revelation5:7 Iûⁿ-ko chiū chìn-chêng, tùi chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi ê chiàⁿ-chhiú the̍h hit-kńg chheh." 
Revelation5:8 I the̍h,tio̍h ê sî, hit sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h kap jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló lóng phak tī Iûⁿ-ko ê bīn-chêng, ta̍k-ê ū the̍h khîm kap tóe-móa hiuⁿ ê kim-lô͘; hiuⁿ chiū-sī sìn-tô͘ ê kî-tó." 
Revelation5:9 In gîm chi̍t siú sin ê si, kóng: Lí ū chu-keh the̍h hit-kńg chheh, thiah-khui i ê hong-ìn; in-ūi lí ū siū sat-hāi, ēng lí ê huih tùi ta̍k-ê cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k-chióng gú-giân, ta̍k-ê bîn-cho̍k, ta̍k-ê pang-kok sio̍k-hôe lâng kui Siōng-tè." 
Revelation5:10 Lí hō͘ in chiâⁿ-chòe kok-tō͘ kap chè-si lâi ho̍k-sāi lán ê Siōng-tè; in ōe tī tōe-chiūⁿ chiáng-koân. 
Revelation5:11 Góa koh khòaⁿ, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chheng-chheng-bān-bān thiⁿ-sài ê siaⁿ-im. In lóng ûi tī pó-chō, oa̍h-mi̍h, í-ki̍p tiúⁿ-ló ê chiu-ûi," 
Revelation5:12 tōa-siaⁿ kóng: Siū sat-hāi ê Iûⁿ-ko eng-kai tit-tio̍h koân-lêng, hù-jū, tì-hūi, khùi-la̍t, chun-kùi, êng-kng, kap chheng-chàn." 
Revelation5:13 Góa koh thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, tī thiⁿ-téng, tī tōe-chiūⁿ kap tōe-ē, hái,ni̍h kap ú-tiū tiong it-chhè ê pī-chō-bu̍t lóng kóng: Goān chheng-chàn, chun-kùi, êng-kng, koân-sè, lóng kui hō͘ chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi kap Iûⁿ-ko, tāi-tāi-bû-chīn!" 
Revelation5:14 Hit sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ìn kóng, “Amen!” Hiah-ê tiúⁿ-ló chiū phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài." 
Revelation6:1 Iûⁿ-ko khui chhit ê hong-ìn ê chi̍t ê ê sî, góa koh khòaⁿ, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê chi̍t ê, i ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ lûi ê siaⁿ, kóng, “Lâi!”" 
Revelation6:2 Góa khòaⁿ ê sî, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah pe̍h-bé, khiâ-bé ê lâng gia̍h keng; i niá-siū hoa-koan chhut-hoat, ūi-tio̍h beh pek-chiàn-pek-sèng." 
Revelation6:3 Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-jī ê hong-ìn ê sî, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tē-jī ê oa̍h-mi̍h kóng, “Lâi!”" 
Revelation6:4 Hit-sî ū pa̍t-chiah bé chhut,lâi, sī chhiah-sek,ê; khiâ-bé ê lâng ū niá-siū koân-pèng thang tùi tōe-chiūⁿ chhiúⁿ-toa̍t hô-pêng, hō͘ lâng hō͘-siōng chân-sat; i ū koh niá-siū chi̍t ki tōa-ki kiàm." 
Revelation6:5 Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-saⁿ ê hong-ìn ê sî, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tē-saⁿ ê oa̍h-mi̍h kóng, “Lâi!” Góa khòaⁿ ê sî, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah o͘-bé, khiâ-bé ê lâng chhiú the̍h chhìn-á." 
Revelation6:6 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ká-ná ū siaⁿ tùi sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h tiong-kan hoat-chhut kóng, “Chi̍t ji̍t ê kang-chîⁿ chí-ū thang bóe chi̍t kong-seng sió-be̍h; chi̍t ji̍t ê kang-chîⁿ chí-ū thang bóe saⁿ kong-seng tōa-be̍h; kaⁿ-ná-iû kap chiú m̄-thang phah-sńg.”" 
Revelation6:7 Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-sì ê hong-ìn ê sî, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tē-sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h kóng, “Lâi!”" 
Revelation6:8 Góa khòaⁿ ê sî, ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah hé-hu-sek ê bé, khiâ-bé ê lâng miâ kiò-chòe Sí-bông, Im-hú tè tī āu-bīn; in ū niá-siū koân-pèng thang koán-hat tōe-chiūⁿ sì-hūn-chi̍t ê thó͘-tōe, ēng to-kiàm, ki-hng, un-e̍k, kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê iá-siù khì sat-hāi lâng." 
Revelation6:9 Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-gō͘ ê hong-ìn ê sî, góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chè-tôaⁿ ē ū ūi-tio̍h Siōng-tè ê ōe kap ūi-tio̍h chòe kiàn-chèng siū sat-hāi ê lâng ê lêng-hûn." 
Revelation6:10 In tōa-siaⁿ âu-kiò kóng, “Sèng koh chin ê Chú-cháiⁿ ah, tio̍h koh jōa kú lí chiah beh sím-phòaⁿ tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng, thang ūi-tio̍h goán só͘ lâu ê huih sin-oan?”" 
Revelation6:11 Ta̍k-ê lâng chiū niá-siū chi̍t niá pe̍h-saⁿ, koh ū siaⁿ kā in kóng, tio̍h koh thèng-hāu chi̍t-sî-á kú, kàu pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn ê lâng í-ki̍p in ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē, chiū-sī teh-beh kap in siâng-khoán siū sat-hāi ê lâng ê sò͘-bo̍k móa ê sî." 
Revelation6:12 Āu-lâi góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-la̍k ê hong-ìn ê sî, hut-jiân tōe tōa tín-tāng, ji̍t-thâu pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ o͘ môa-pò͘ hiah-ni̍h o͘, ge̍h kui-ê pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ huih hiah-ni̍h âng;" 
Revelation6:13 thiⁿ-téng ê chhiⁿ tūi-lo̍h tōe, chhin-chhiūⁿ bû-hoa-kó-chhiū hō͘ tōa-hong sàu tín-tāng, iáu-bē sek ê ké-chí lóng lak-liáu-liáu." 
Revelation6:14 Thiⁿ siau-sit, chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t kńg chheh kńg,khí-lâi; soaⁿ kap hái-tó lóng sóa lī-khui goân-ūi." 
Revelation6:15 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông, thóng-tī-chiá, chiòng-léng, ū-chîⁿ,ê, ū-sè,ê, it-chhè chòe lô͘-lē,ê, kap chū-iû,ê lóng khì bih tī tōng-lāi kap soaⁿ-giâm tiong-kan ê phāng." 
Revelation6:16 In ǹg soaⁿ-niá kap soaⁿ-giâm hoah kóng, “Tó lo̍h-lâi kā goán khàm,teh, hō͘ goán thang siám-pī chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi ê bīn kap Iûⁿ-ko ê siū-khì." 
Revelation6:17 In-ūi in siū hêng-hoa̍t ê tōa Ji̍t-chí kàu lah, sím-mi̍h-lâng khiā ōe tiâu?”" 
Revelation7:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sì ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī tōe ê sì kak-thâu, chiong tōe sì-bīn ê hong cha̍h,khí-lâi, hō͘ hong bōe chhe-tio̍h tōe, hái, kap it-chhè ê chhiū-ba̍k." 
Revelation7:2 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài the̍h éng-oa̍h Siōng-tè ê ìn, tùi ji̍t chhut ê só͘-chāi chiūⁿ,lâi; i tùi ū niá-siū koân-pèng thang siong-hāi tōe kap hái hit sì ê thiⁿ-sài tōa-siaⁿ hoah," 
Revelation7:3 kóng, “Goán iáu-bē tī Siōng-tè po̍k-jîn ê thâu-hia̍h khàm-ìn í-chêng, m̄-thang siong-hāi tōe, hái, kap chhiū-ba̍k.”" 
Revelation7:4 Góa thiaⁿ,kìⁿ, tī Í-sek-lia̍t ta̍k-ê chi-cho̍k tiong siū khàm-ìn ê lâng lóng-chóng ū cha̍p-sì-bān sì-chheng." 
Revelation7:5 Sio̍k Iû-tāi chi-cho̍k siū khàm-ìn ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Lū-piān chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Ka-tek chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; 
Revelation7:6 sio̍k A-siat chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Ná-hut-tha-lī chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Má-ná-se chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; 
Revelation7:7 sio̍k Se-biān chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Lī-bī chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Í-sat-ka chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; 
Revelation7:8 sio̍k Se-pò͘-lûn chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Iok-sek chi-cho̍k ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng; sio̍k Piān-ngá-bín chi-cho̍k siū khàm-ìn ê lâng ū chi̍t-bān nn̄g-chheng. 
Revelation7:9 Āu-lâi, góa koh khòaⁿ, ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng, bô lâng ōe-tàng kè-sǹg in ê sò͘-bo̍k, sī tùi ta̍k-kok, ta̍k cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k bîn-cho̍k, kóng ta̍k-khoán gú-giân ê lâng lâi,ê, lóng khiā tī pó-chō kap Iûⁿ-ko ê bīn-chêng, chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ, chhiú gia̍h chang-chhiū-ki." 
Revelation7:10 In tōa-siaⁿ hoah: Goān chín-kiù kui tī chē tī pó-chō ê lán ê Siōng-tè, mā kui tī Iûⁿ-ko!" 
Revelation7:11 Só͘-ū ê thiⁿ-sài lóng khiā tī pó-chō, tiúⁿ-ló, kap sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê chiu-ûi, in tī pó-chō chêng, bīn phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài Siōng-tè," 
Revelation7:12 kóng: Amen! Goān siōng-chàn, êng-kng, tì-hūi, kám-siā, chun-kùi, koân-lêng, khùi-la̍t, kui tī lán ê Siōng-tè, kàu éng-éng-oán-oán. Amen!" 
Revelation7:13 Tiúⁿ-ló tiong ū chi̍t ê mn̄g góa kóng, “Chiah-ê chhēng pe̍h-saⁿ,ê sī sím-mi̍h-lâng? In tùi tó-ūi lâi?”" 
Revelation7:14 Góa ìn kóng, “Sian-siⁿ, lí chai.” Āu-lâi i kā góa kóng, “Chiah-ê lâng sī keng-kè tōa chai-lān chhut,lâi-ê, in ū sóe in ê saⁿ, ēng Iûⁿ-ko ê huih sóe kàu pe̍h." 
Revelation7:15 Só͘-í, in tī Siōng-tè ê pó-chō chêng, mî-ji̍t tī I ê sèng-tiān ho̍k-sāi I; chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi beh pó-hō͘ in." 
Revelation7:16 In bōe koh iau, bōe koh chhùi-ta; ji̍t-thâu kap iām-jia̍t lóng bōe siong-hāi in." 
Revelation7:17 Tī pó-chō tiong ê Iûⁿ-ko beh chòe in ê bo̍k-chiá; I beh chhōa in kàu oa̍h-miā-chúi ê chôaⁿ-goân; Siōng-tè beh tùi in ê ba̍k-chiu chhit-khì lóng-chóng ê ba̍k-sái.” 
Revelation8:1 Iûⁿ-ko khui tē-chhit ê hong-ìn ê sî, thiⁿ chēng-chēng iok pòaⁿ tiám-cheng kú." 
Revelation8:2 Āu-lâi góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chhit ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng, in ū niá-siū chhit ki lat-pah." 
Revelation8:3 Koh ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài lâi, chhiú the̍h kim hiuⁿ-lô͘ khiā tī chè-tôaⁿ chêng, niá-siū chin chōe hiuⁿ, thang kap chèng sìn-tô͘ ê kî-tó chòe-hé hiàn tī pó-chō chêng ê kim chè-tôaⁿ téng." 
Revelation8:4 Hiuⁿ ê ian kap sìn-tô͘ ê kî-tó tùi thiⁿ-sài ê chhiú chhèng kàu Siōng-tè bīn-chêng. 
Revelation8:5 Jiân-āu, thiⁿ-sài the̍h hiuⁿ-lô͘, tóe-móa chè-tôaⁿ téng ê hé, kā i hiat-lo̍h tōe, sûi-sî ū tân-lûi, hiáng-siaⁿ, sih-nà, kap tōe-tāng." 
Revelation8:6 Gia̍h chhit ki lat-pah ê chhit ê thiⁿ-sài chún-pī hó-sè beh pûn. 
Revelation8:7 Thâu chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, sûi-sî ū pha̍uh kap hé, chham huih hiat-lo̍h tōe; tōe ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t sio,khì, chhiū-ba̍k ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t sio,khì, só͘-ū chhiⁿ-chhùi ê chháu lóng sio,khì." 
Revelation8:8 Tē-jī ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, sûi-sî ū chhin-chhiūⁿ hé teh sio ê tōa-soaⁿ hiat-lo̍h hái; hái ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t pìⁿ-chòe huih;" 
Revelation8:9 hái,ni̍h ê oa̍h-mi̍h saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t sí,khì; chûn-chiah ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t sún-hoāi. 
Revelation8:10 Tē-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, sûi-sî ū chi̍t lia̍p tōa lia̍p chhiⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng lak,lo̍h-lâi, chhin-chhiūⁿ teh to̍h ê hé-pé lak tī saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t ê kang-hô kap só͘-ū ê chúi-chôaⁿ." 
Revelation8:11 Chit-lia̍p chhiⁿ ê miâ kiò-chòe Khó͘-hiāⁿ. Saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t ê chúi pìⁿ khó͘, chin chōe lâng in-ūi chit-ê chúi sí,khì, in-ūi chúi pìⁿ khó͘." 
Revelation8:12 Tē-sì ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, ji̍t ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t, ge̍h ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t, chhiⁿ ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t lóng siū kong-kek, tì-kàu ji̍t, ge̍h, chhiⁿ ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t pìⁿ àm, ji̍t,sî saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t bô kng, mî,sî mā saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t bô kng." 
Revelation8:13 Āu-lâi góa khòaⁿ, ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t chiah tī khong-tiong teh pe ê eng-chiáu tōa-siaⁿ kiò kóng, “Chhám ah! Chhám ah! Tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng chhám ah! In-ūi kî-tha ê saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài teh-beh pûn lat-pah lah.”" 
Revelation9:1 Tē-gō͘ ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, góa ū khòaⁿ-tio̍h tùi thiⁿ-téng lak lo̍h-lâi tōe-bīn hit-lia̍p chhiⁿ; chit-lia̍p chhiⁿ ū niá-siū bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ ê só-sî." 
Revelation9:2 I khui bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ, chiū ū tōa hé-lô͘ ê ian chhèng,khí-lâi. Ji̍t-thâu kap thài-khong in-ūi Chhim-khiⁿ ê ian chiū pìⁿ o͘-àm." 
Revelation9:3 Chháu-meh tùi ian ê lāi-bīn chhut-lâi hioh tī tōe-bīn; in niá-siū koân-pèng chhin-chhiūⁿ tōe-chiūⁿ ê giat-á-thâng ū ê koân-pèng. 
Revelation9:4 In siū kau-tài m̄-thang siong-hāi tōe-chiūⁿ ê chháu, ta̍k-chióng ê chhiū-ba̍k, kap it-chhè chhiⁿ-chhùi ê mi̍h, chí-ū thang siong-hāi thâu-hia̍h bô khàm Siōng-tè ê ìn ê lâng." 
Revelation9:5 Chháu-meh bô tit-tio̍h koân thang thâi-sí chiah-ê lâng, chí-ū thang hō͘ in siū thòng-khó͘ gō͘ ge̍h-ji̍t kú; in ê thòng-khó͘ chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng hō͘ giat-á-thâng kā,tio̍h ê thòng-khó͘." 
Revelation9:6 Chiah-ê ji̍t ê tiong-kan, lâng ōe kiû sí mā bōe tit sí, ài sí mā sí bōe khì." 
Revelation9:7 Chháu-meh ê hêng-chōng chhin-chhiūⁿ chún-pī beh chhut-chiàn ê bé; in ê thâu-khak téng tì chhin-chhiūⁿ kim ê hoa-koan; in ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ lâng ê bīn; 
Revelation9:8 in ê thâu-mn̂g chhin-chhiūⁿ hū-jîn-lâng ê thâu-mn̂g; in ê gê chhin-chhiūⁿ sai ê gê; 
Revelation9:9 in ê heng-khám chhēng chhin-chhiūⁿ thih ê hō͘-heng-kah; in ê si̍t hoat-chhut ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chin chōe chiàn-bé thoa-chhia phun-pháu beh khì kau-chiàn ê siaⁿ. 
Revelation9:10 In ū bé-liu chhin-chhiūⁿ giat-á-thâng ê bé-liu ū chhì; in ê bé-liu ū lêng-le̍k thang siong-hāi lâng gō͘ ge̍h-ji̍t kú. 
Revelation9:11 In ê ông sī koán-hat bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài; i ê miâ Hi-pek-lâi-gú kiò-chòe A-pa-tùn, Hi-la̍h-gú kiò-chòe A-po-lûn, ì-sù sī Húi-bia̍t-chiá." 
Revelation9:12 Thâu chi̍t ê chai-hō í-keng kè,khì; iáu ū nn̄g ê chai-hō teh-beh lâi. 
Revelation9:13 Tē-la̍k ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ū siaⁿ tùi Siōng-tè bīn-chêng ê kim chè-tôaⁿ hit sì ki kak chhut,lâi," 
Revelation9:14 kā gia̍h lat-pah ê tē-la̍k ê thiⁿ-sài kóng, “Lí tio̍h chiong koaiⁿ tī Iù-hoat-la-tí-hô hit sì ê thiⁿ-sài pàng,chhut-lâi.”" 
Revelation9:15 Chit sì ê thiⁿ-sài siū tháu-pàng, sī chá chiū an-pâi hó-sè, tī tiāⁿ-tio̍h ê nî, ge̍h, ji̍t, kap sî beh sat-hāi jîn-lūi ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t." 
Revelation9:16 Góa ū thiaⁿ-kóng bé-peng ê sò͘-bo̍k lóng-chóng ū nn̄g-ek. 
Revelation9:17 Tī īⁿ-siōng tiong, góa só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ ê bé kap khiâ-bé ê lâng sī án-ni: In chhēng ū hé-iām, nâ-pó-chio̍h, kap liû-hông ê sek-tì ê hō͘-heng-kah. In ê bé ê thâu chhin-chhiūⁿ sai ê thâu, tùi in ê chhùi thò͘-chhut hé, ian, kap liû-hông." 
Revelation9:18 Jîn-lūi ê saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t hō͘ bé ê chhùi thò͘,chhut-lâi ê hé, ian, kap liû-hông chit saⁿ hāng chai-hāi húi-bia̍t." 
Revelation9:19 Chiah-ê bé ê lêng-le̍k sī tī in ê chhùi kap bé-liu; in ê bé-liu chhin-chhiūⁿ chôa ū thâu, ēng chiah-ê thâu siong-hāi lâng." 
Revelation9:20 Kî-tha só͘ chhun,ê chiū-sī chiah-ê bô siū chai-hō sat-hāi ê lâng. In iáu bô hoán-hóe, bô pàng-sak in ê chhiú só͘ chō ê ngó͘-siōng; in chiàu-siông pài chiah-ê kúi, kap hiah-ê bōe khòaⁿ, bōe thiaⁿ, bōe kiâⁿ, ēng kim, gûn, tâng, chio̍h, chhâ chō ê ngó͘-siōng." 
Revelation9:21 In mā bô hoán-hóe, bô pàng-sak in hiong-sat, siâ-su̍t, îm-loān, thau-the̍h ê hêng-ûi." 
Revelation10:1 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê tōa khùi-la̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ-téng lo̍h,lâi; i ēng hûn choh saⁿ chhēng, thâu-khak téng ū khēng, i ê bīn chhin-chhiūⁿ ji̍t-thâu, kha chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-thiāu." 
Revelation10:2 I ê chhiú ū the̍h chi̍t kńg thí-khui ê sòe-kńg-chheh. I chiàⁿ-kha ta̍h hái, tò-kha ta̍h tōe." 
Revelation10:3 I tōa-siaⁿ hoah, chhin-chhiūⁿ sai teh háu, hit chhit ê lûi chiū chhut-siaⁿ ìn." 
Revelation10:4 Chhit ê lûi chhut-siaⁿ liáu-āu, góa tú-beh siá, thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng, “Chhit ê lûi só͘ kóng,ê, lí tio̍h hong,khí-lâi, m̄-thang kì-lio̍k.”" 
Revelation10:5 Āu-lâi, góa só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ kha ta̍h hái kap tōe hit-ê thiⁿ-sài gia̍h chiàⁿ-chhiú kí thiⁿ," 
Revelation10:6 kí hit-ūi éng-éng-oán-oán oa̍h,teh ê Siōng-tè, chiū-sī chhòng-chō thiⁿ kap thiⁿ-téng ê mi̍h, tōe kap tōe-chiūⁿ ê mi̍h, hái kap hái,ni̍h ê mi̍h,ê, soan-pò͘ kóng, “Bōe koh iân-tî lah!" 
Revelation10:7 Put-kò tē-chhit ê thiⁿ-sài teh-beh pûn i ê lat-pah, lat-pah ê siaⁿ tân ê ji̍t, Siōng-tè tùi I ê po̍k-jîn chèng sian-ti só͘ soan-kò ê ò-biāu ōe si̍t-hiān.”" 
Revelation10:8 Āu-lâi, góa chêng só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi hit-ê siaⁿ koh chi̍t piàn tùi góa kóng, “Lí khì, khì the̍h kha ta̍h hái kap tōe hit-ê thiⁿ-sài chhiú-tiong hit-kńg thí-khui ê chheh.”" 
Revelation10:9 Góa chiū khì thiⁿ-sài hia, chhiáⁿ i chiong hit-kńg sòe-kńg-chheh hō͘ góa; i kā góa kóng, “Lí the̍h,khì, chia̍h,lo̍h-khì, tī pak-tó͘ lāi ōe khó͘, m̄-kú tī chhùi-lāi ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ bi̍t hiah-ni̍h tiⁿ.”" 
Revelation10:10 Góa chiū tùi thiⁿ-sài ê chhiú the̍h hit-kńg sòe-kńg-chheh lâi chia̍h; chhùi-lāi kó-jiân chhin-chhiūⁿ bi̍t hiah-ni̍h tiⁿ, m̄-kú thun lo̍h-khì pak-tó͘ lāi chiū pìⁿ-chòe khó͘." 
Revelation10:11 Thiⁿ-sài koh kā góa kóng, “Lí tio̍h koh soan-pò͘ Siōng-tè koan-hē chin chōe bîn-cho̍k, pang-kok, gú-giân, kap kun-ông ê ū-giân.”" 
Revelation11:1 Góa ū niá-siū chi̍t ki chhioh, hêng chhin-chhiūⁿ koáiⁿ-á, koh ū siaⁿ tùi góa kóng, “Khí,lâi, khì niû Siōng-tè ê sèng-tiān kap chè-tôaⁿ, koh sǹg tiān-lāi kèng-pài ê jîn-sò͘." 
Revelation11:2 M̄-kú, sèng-tiān gōa-kháu ê tiâⁿ m̄-thang niû, in-ūi gōa-tiâⁿ í-keng kau hō͘ Gōa-pang-lâng; in ōe thún-ta̍h Sèng-siâⁿ sì-cha̍p-jī ge̍h-ji̍t kú." 
Revelation11:3 Góa beh chún góa nn̄g ê kiàn-chèng-jîn chhēng môa-saⁿ, ū koân thoân-tō chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah la̍k-cha̍p ji̍t kú.”" 
Revelation11:4 Chit nn̄g ê kiàn-chèng-jîn chiū-sī khiā tī choân-tōe ê Chú bīn-chêng ê nn̄g châng kaⁿ-ná-chhiū kap nn̄g ki teng-tâi. 
Revelation11:5 Nā ū lâng beh hāi in, in ōe tùi chhùi thò͘-chhut hé, chiong tùi-te̍k sio-bia̍t; nā ū lâng beh hāi in, it-tēng ōe án-ni siū sat-hāi." 
Revelation11:6 Chit nn̄g ê kiàn-chèng-jîn ū koân thang koaiⁿ thiⁿ, hō͘ in thoân-tō ê kî-kan bô lo̍h-hō͘; in mā ū koân chiáng-koán chúi, hō͘ i pìⁿ-chòe huih; koh chiàu in só͘ ài thang put-koán-sî kàng ta̍k-chióng chai-hāi kong-kek tāi-tōe." 
Revelation11:7 In kiàn-chèng oân-sêng liáu-āu, tùi bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ chiūⁿ,lâi hit-chiah siù ōe kap in kau-chiàn, chiong in cheng-ho̍k, kā in thâi-sí." 
Revelation11:8 In ê sin-si ōe tó tī tōa siâⁿ-chhī ê koe-lō͘; chit-ê siâⁿ-chhī lâng kā i pí-phēng chòe Só͘-to-má á-sī Ai-ki̍p; in ê Chú mā tī hia hō͘ lâng tèng si̍p-jī-kè. 
Revelation11:9 Saⁿ ji̍t pòaⁿ kú, tùi ta̍k-ê bîn-cho̍k, ta̍k-ê cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k-khoán gú-giân, ta̍k-ê pang-kok, ū lâng ōe lâi khòaⁿ in ê sin-si, m̄-chún lâng kā in bâi-chòng tī bōng,ni̍h." 
Revelation11:10 Tòa tī tōe-bīn-chiūⁿ ê lâng ōe in-ūi in ê sí lâi hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k, kau-ōaⁿ lé-mi̍h; in-ūi chit nn̄g ê sian-ti ū hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng siū-tio̍h khó͘-chhó͘." 
Revelation11:11 Saⁿ ji̍t pòaⁿ kè-liáu, tùi Siōng-tè hia ū oa̍h-khì ji̍p-khì in lāi-bīn, in chiū peh khí-lâi khiā; khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê lâng tōa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ." 
Revelation11:12 In nn̄g lâng thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ lâi tōa ê siaⁿ tùi in kóng, “Khí-lâi chia!” In chiū tī tùi-te̍k ê bīn-chêng chē-hûn chiūⁿ-thiⁿ." 
Revelation11:13 Tú hit-sî ū tōa tōe-tāng, hit-chō siâⁿ tó cha̍p-hūn-chi̍t; in-ūi tōe-tāng sí,khì-ê ū chhit-chheng lâng; kî-tha ê lâng tōa kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, kui êng-kng hō͘ thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè." 
Revelation11:14 Tē-jī ê chai-hō í-keng kè; tē-saⁿ ê chai-hō liâm-piⁿ kàu. 
Revelation11:15 Tē-chhit ê thiⁿ-sài pûn i ê lat-pah, thiⁿ-téng ū tōa ê siaⁿ, kóng: Sè-kan ê kok chiâⁿ-chòe lán ê Chú kap I só͘ siat-li̍p ê Ki-tok ê kok; I beh éng-éng-oán-oán choh-ông chiáng-koân." 
Revelation11:16 Tī Siōng-tè bīn-chêng chē tī in ka-kī chō-ūi ê jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló, bīn phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài Siōng-tè," 
Revelation11:17 kóng: Hiān-chāi chûn-chāi, kè-khì chûn-chāi Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè, goán kám-siā lí; in-ūi lí í-keng chiáng-ak tāi-koân; lí í-keng choh-ông chiáng-koân." 
Revelation11:18 Gōa-pang tōa siū-khì, lí mā hoat siū-khì; sí-lâng siū sím-phòaⁿ ê sî-ki kàu lah. Lí ê po̍k-jîn chèng sian-ti, lí ê sìn-tô͘, kap kèng-ùi lí ê miâ,ê, bô-lūn tōa,ê sòe,ê, lí pò-siúⁿ in ê sî-ki kàu lah. Pāi-hoāi tōe,ê, lí pāi-hoāi in ê sî-ki kàu lah." 
Revelation11:19 Siōng-tè tī thiⁿ-téng ê sèng-tiān chiū khui; tī sèng-tiān lāi I ê iok-kūi khòaⁿ-hiān-hiān; hut-jiân ū sih-nà, hiáng-siaⁿ, lûi tân, tōe-tāng, kap tōa-pha̍uh." 
Revelation12:1 Āu-lâi, tī thiⁿ-téng ū chi̍t ê tōa kéng-siōng chhut-hiān: Ū chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng sin chhēng ji̍t-thâu, kha ta̍h ge̍h-niû, thâu tì cha̍p-jī lia̍p chhiⁿ ê hoa-koan." 
Revelation12:2 I hoâi-īn beh siⁿ-kiáⁿ, teh chhui-chūn, thàng-thiàⁿ, âu-kiò." 
Revelation12:3 Tī thiⁿ-téng koh ū chi̍t ê kéng-siōng chhut-hiān: Ū chi̍t chiah tōa chiah chhiah-sek ê ok-lêng, i ū chhit ê thâu, cha̍p ki kak; chhit ê thâu tì chhit téng ông-koan." 
Revelation12:4 I ēng bé-liu kā thiⁿ-téng saⁿ-hūn-chi̍t ê chhiⁿ sàu-lo̍h tōe. Hit-chiah ok-lêng khiā tī teh-beh siⁿ-kiáⁿ ê hū-jîn-lâng ê bīn-chêng, thèng-hāu i ê kiáⁿ siⁿ,chhut-lâi thang kā i thun,lo̍h-khì." 
Revelation12:5 Hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng siⁿ chi̍t ê ta-po͘-kiáⁿ, chit-ê kiáⁿ beh ēng thih-koáiⁿ tī-lí bān-kok. M̄-kú, i ê kiáⁿ hō͘ lâng chiap-khì Siōng-tè bīn-chêng, kàu I ê pó-chō hia." 
Revelation12:6 Hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng tô-cháu khì khòng-iá, tī hia Siōng-tè ū kā i pī-pān chi̍t ê só͘-chāi, hō͘ i thang tit-tio̍h chiàu-kò͘ chi̍t-chheng nn̄g-pah la̍k-cha̍p ji̍t." 
Revelation12:7 Āu-lâi tī thiⁿ-téng ū chiàn-cheng. Bí-ka-le̍k kap i ê sù-chiá khì kap hit-chiah ok-lêng kau-chiàn, ok-lêng mā kap i ê sù-chiá khí-lâi èng-chiàn." 
Revelation12:8 Ok-lêng thâi su, i kap i ê sù-chiá tī thiⁿ-téng chiū bô só͘-chāi thang tòa." 
Revelation12:9 Hit-chiah tōa chiah ok-lêng chiū siū hiat,lo̍h-khì; i chiū-sī hit-bé lāu-chôa, kiò-chòe Mô͘-kúi, Sat-tàn, choân jîn-lūi ê bê-he̍k-chiá; i siū hiat-lo̍h tōe, i ê sù-chiá mā lóng kap i chòe-hé siū hiat-lo̍h tōe." 
Revelation12:10 Āu-lâi góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tī thiⁿ-téng ū tōa ê siaⁿ kóng: Hiān-chāi lán ê Siōng-tè ê chín-kiù, koân-lêng, kap chú-koân í-keng si̍t-hiān! I í-keng hián-sī I ê Ki-tok ê koân-pèng! Hit-ê mî-ji̍t tī lán ê Siōng-tè bīn-chêng khòng-kò lán ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē,ê í-keng siū hiat,lo̍h-khì." 
Revelation12:11 Lán ê hiaⁿ-tī chí-bē khò Iûⁿ-ko ê huih, kap in só͘ kiàn-chèng ê sìn-sit í-keng khah iâⁿ hit-chiah ok-lêng; in sīm-chì kàu sí to bô sioh ka-kī ê sìⁿ-miā." 
Revelation12:12 Só͘-í, chiah-ê thiⁿ kap tiàm tī hit tiong-kan,ê, lóng tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí! Chóng-sī, tōe kap hái chhám ah, in-ūi Mô͘-kúi í-keng khì-phut-phut lo̍h-khì lín hia, i chai-iáⁿ ka-kī ê sî bô kú lah." 
Revelation12:13 Hit-chiah ok-lêng chi̍t-ē chai ka-kī í-keng siū hiat-lo̍h tōe, chiū khì jip hit-ê siⁿ ta-po͘-kiáⁿ ê hū-jîn-lâng." 
Revelation12:14 Hū-jîn-lâng ū tit-tio̍h tōa chiah eng-chiáu ê nn̄g ki si̍t thang pe-khì khòng-iá, kàu i ka-kī ê só͘-chāi, tī hia tit-tio̍h chiàu-kò͘ saⁿ nî pòaⁿ kú, bô siū-tio̍h lāu-chôa ê kong-kek." 
Revelation12:15 Hit-bé chôa tī hū-jîn-lâng ê āu-bīn, tùi chhùi thò͘-chhut chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-hô ê chúi beh kā i chhiong-cháu" 
Revelation12:16 M̄-kú, tāi-tōe pang-chān hū-jîn-lâng, khui-chhùi kā hit-chiah ok-lêng thò͘,chhut-lâi ê hô-chúi thun,lo̍h-khì." 
Revelation12:17 Ok-lêng chiū tùi hū-jîn-lâng hoat siū-khì, khì kap hū-jîn-lâng kî-tha ê kiáⁿ-sun kau-chiàn, chiū-sī hiah-ê chun-siú Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng í-ki̍p chhî-siú Iâ-so͘ ê kiàn-chèng ê lâng." 
Revelation12:18 Āu-lâi, hit-chiah ok-lêng khì khiā tī hái-phiâⁿ ê soa-téng." 
Revelation13:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t chiah siù tùi hái,ni̍h khí,lâi; i ū cha̍p ki kak, chhit ê thâu; cha̍p ki kak ū tì cha̍p téng ông-koan; ta̍k-ê thâu-khak téng lóng ū pòng-to̍k Siōng-tè ê miâ-hō." 
Revelation13:2 Góa só͘ khòaⁿ,kìⁿ hit-chiah siù chhin-chhiūⁿ pà; i ê kha chhin-chhiūⁿ hîm ê kha, chhùi chhin-chhiūⁿ sai ê chhùi. Hit-chiah ok-lêng chiong ka-kī ê lêng-le̍k, ông-chō, kap tōa koân-pèng kau hō͘ hit-chiah siù." 
Revelation13:3 Siù ê chi̍t ê thâu-khak chhin-chhiūⁿ ū siū-tio̍h tì-miā ê tāng-siong, m̄-kú i ê tì-miā-siong ū tit-tio̍h i-hó. Thong sè-kài ê lâng lóng kám-kak chin hi-kî, khì tè tī siù ê āu-bīn." 
Revelation13:4 In lóng pài hit-chiah ok-lêng, in-ūi ok-lêng ū chiong i ê koân-pèng kau hō͘ siù; in mā pài siù, kóng, “Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kap chit-chiah siù saⁿ-pí? Siáⁿ-lâng ōe-tàng kap i kau-chiàn?”" 
Revelation13:5 Āu-lâi, chit-chiah siù ū tit-tio̍h chi̍t ê kóng tōa-ōe kap siat-to̍k ê chhùi; i tit-tio̍h ún-chún thang chip-hêng koân-pèng sì-cha̍p-jī ge̍h-ji̍t kú." 
Revelation13:6 I khui-chhùi siat-to̍k Siōng-tè, siat-to̍k I ê miâ kap I ê pò͘-pîⁿ, chiū-sī hiah-ê tah pò͘-pîⁿ tī thiⁿ-téng ê lâng." 
Revelation13:7 I mā tit-tio̍h ún-chún thang kong-kek sìn-tô͘, kā in cheng-ho̍k; i koh tit-tio̍h koân thang tī-lí ta̍k-ê cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k-ê bîn-cho̍k, ta̍k-ê pang-kok, kap kóng ta̍k-khoán gú-giân ê lâng." 
Revelation13:8 Só͘-ū tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng, tùi chhòng-chō sè-kài í-lâi, in ê miâ bô kì tī siū thâi Iûⁿ-ko ê oa̍h-miā-chheh,ê, lóng ōe pài hit-chiah siù." 
Revelation13:9 Ū hī-khang,ê lóng tio̍h thiaⁿ:
