Revelation13:10 Hit-ê eng-kai siū lia̍h,ê tio̍h siū lia̍h; hit-ê eng-kai siū sat-hāi,ê tio̍h siū to sat-hāi. In-ūi án-ni, sìn-tô͘ tio̍h ū nāi-sim kap sìn-sim." 
Revelation13:11 Āu-lâi, góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ū chi̍t chiah siù tùi tōe,ni̍h khí,lâi; i ū nn̄g ki kak chhin-chhiūⁿ iûⁿ ê kak, kóng-ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ ok-lêng." 
Revelation13:12 I tī thâu chi̍t chiah siù ê bīn-chêng chip-hêng thâu chi̍t chiah siù ê koân-pèng. I kiò tōe kap tòa tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng khì pài thâu chi̍t chiah siù, chiū-sī siū-tio̍h tì-miā-siong koh tit-tio̍h i-hó hit-chiah siù." 
Revelation13:13 I kiâⁿ tōa kî-chek, tī lâng ê bīn-chêng kiò hé tùi thiⁿ kàng-lo̍h tōe;" 
Revelation13:14 koh ēng siū ún-chún tī siù ê bīn-chêng kiâⁿ ê kî-chek lâi bê-he̍k tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng, hoan-hù in tio̍h kā hit-chiah siū to-siong iáu oa̍h,teh ê siù chō chi̍t chō siōng." 
Revelation13:15 I koh siū ún-chún chiong oa̍h-khì pûn ji̍p-khì siù ê siōng, hō͘ siù ê siōng ōe kóng-ōe, koh sat-hāi só͘-ū bô pài siù ê siōng ê lâng." 
Revelation13:16 I mā kiông-pek chèng-lâng, bô-lūn tōa-sòe, hó-gia̍h sàn-chhiah, chū-iû,ê choh lô͘-lē,ê, tī in ka-kī ê chiàⁿ-chhiú á-sī thâu-hia̍h khàm-ìn chòe kì-hō." 
Revelation13:17 Bô khàm siù ê miâ, á-sī bô tāi-piáu i ê miâ ê sò͘-jī,ê, chiū bōe-tàng bóe-bōe." 
Revelation13:18 Tùi chit-ê tāi-chì tio̍h ū tì-hūi. Chhong-bêng ê lâng tio̍h sǹg-chhut siù ê sò͘-jī, in-ūi sò͘-jī tāi-piáu chi̍t ê lâng ê miâ, chit-ê sò͘-jī sī la̍k-pah la̍k-cha̍p-la̍k." 
Revelation14:1 Āu-lâi góa koh khòaⁿ, ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Iûⁿ-ko khiā tī Sek-an-soaⁿ, ū cha̍p-sì-bān sì-chheng lâng kap I chòe-hé; in ê thâu-hia̍h lóng ū siá Iûⁿ-ko ê miâ kap I ê Pē ê miâ." 
Revelation14:2 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ū siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng chhut,lâi, chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa-chúi teh chhiâng ê siaⁿ, koh chhin-chhiūⁿ chhè-lûi ê siaⁿ; góa só͘ thiaⁿ,kìⁿ chit-ê siaⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ khîm-su teh tôaⁿ khiā-khîm ê siaⁿ." 
Revelation14:3 In tī pó-chō kap sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h í-ki̍p chèng tiúⁿ-ló ê bīn-chêng chhiùⁿ chi̍t siú sin ê koa, chit-siú koa tû-liáu tùi tōe-chiūⁿ sio̍k-hôe hit cha̍p-sì-bān sì-chheng lâng bô lâng ōe-tàng o̍h." 
Revelation14:4 In sī m̄-bat chhin-kūn lú-sèng ê chāi-sek-lâm. Iûⁿ-ko bô-lūn khì sím-mi̍h só͘-chāi, in lóng tè kàu hia. In sī tùi jîn-lūi tiong-kan sio̍k-hôe chhut-lâi chòe khí-thâu-se̍k ê ké-chí hiàn hō͘ Siōng-tè kap Iûⁿ-ko ê." 
Revelation14:5 In m̄-bat kóng pe̍h-chha̍t, lóng bô khoat-tiám." 
Revelation14:6 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tī pòaⁿ khong-tiong teh pe; i ū éng-oán ê hok-im beh thoân hō͘ tiàm tī tōe-chiūⁿ ê lâng, hō͘ ta̍k-ê pang-kok, ta̍k-ê cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k-ê bîn-cho̍k, kap kóng ta̍k-khoán gú-giân ê lâng." 
Revelation14:7 I tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Tio̍h kèng-ùi Siōng-tè, kui êng-kng hō͘ I! In-ūi I sím-phòaⁿ jîn-lūi ê sî kàu lah; tio̍h kèng-pài hit-ūi chhòng-chō thiⁿ, tōe, hái, kap chúi-goân ê Chú.”" 
Revelation14:8 Lēng-gōa ū tē-jī ê thiⁿ-sài sòa lo̍h-khì kóng, “Tó,lo̍h-khì lah! Hō͘ bān-kok lim i îm-loān ê lia̍t-chiú ê tōa Pa-pí-lûn tó,lo̍h-khì lah!”" 
Revelation14:9 Lēng-gōa ū tē-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài sòa lo̍h-khì tōa-siaⁿ kóng, “Nā ū lâng pài hit-chiah siù kap siù ê siōng, thâu-hia̍h á-sī chhiú ū khàm-ìn," 
Revelation14:10 hit-ê lâng mā tio̍h lim Siōng-tè siū-khì ê chiú, chiū-sī thîn tī Siōng-tè siū-khì ê poe ê sûn-chiú. I ōe tī sèng thiⁿ-sài kap Iûⁿ-ko ê bīn-chêng siū-tio̍h hé kap liû-hông ê khó͘-chhó͘." 
Revelation14:11 Khó͘-chhó͘ in ê hé-ian chhèng-chiūⁿ koân, éng-oán bô-thêng. Hiah-ê pài hit-chiah siù kap siù ê siōng, í-ki̍p ū khàm-tio̍h siù ê miâ ê ìn ê lâng, mî-ji̍t lóng bōe-tàng an-hioh.”" 
Revelation14:12 In-ūi án-ni, chun-siú Siōng-tè ê bēng-lēng koh kian-chhî sìn Iâ-so͘ ê sìn-tô͘ tio̍h ū nāi-sim." 
Revelation14:13 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tùi thiⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng, “Lí tio̍h siá,khí-lâi! Tùi taⁿ í-āu ūi-tio̍h Chú sòng-sit sìⁿ-miā ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!” Sèng Sîn kóng, “Sī, in ōe thoat-lī lô-khó͘ tit-tio̍h an-hioh, in-ūi in ê só͘-chòe ōe tit-tio̍h jīn-tēng.”" 
Revelation14:14 Āu-lâi, góa koh khòaⁿ, ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t phìⁿ pe̍h-hûn, hûn-téng chē chi̍t ūi chhin-chhiūⁿ Jîn-chú ê, thâu-khak tì kim hoa-koan, chhiú gia̍h chi̍t ki lāi ê liâm-le̍k-á." 
Revelation14:15 Koh ū chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi sèng-tiān hia chhut,lâi, tùi chē tī hûn-téng Hit-ūi tōa-siaⁿ hoah, “Tio̍h gia̍h liâm-le̍k-á lâi siu-koah; in-ūi siu-koah ê sî í-keng kàu, tōe-chiūⁿ ê lông-chok-bu̍t í-keng chin sek lah.”" 
Revelation14:16 Chē tī hûn-téng Hit-ūi chiū chiong liâm-le̍k-á hiat-lo̍h tōe, tōe-chiūⁿ ê lông-chok-bu̍t chiū siu-sêng." 
Revelation14:17 Lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ-téng ê sèng-tiān chhut,lâi, i mā gia̍h chi̍t ki lāi ê liâm-le̍k-á." 
Revelation14:18 Koh lēng-gōa chi̍t ê koán hé ê thiⁿ-sài tùi chè-tôaⁿ hia chhut,lâi, tōa-siaⁿ tùi gia̍h lāi ê liâm-le̍k-á hit-ê thiⁿ-sài hoah, kóng, “Ēng lí lāi ê liâm-le̍k-á koah tōe-chiūⁿ kui-pha ê phû-tô, in-ūi phû-tô í-keng sek lah.”" 
Revelation14:19 Thiⁿ-sài chiū chiong liâm-le̍k-á hiat-lo̍h tōe, koah tōe-chiūⁿ ê phû-tô, chiong phû-tô hiat lo̍h-khì Siōng-tè tōa siū-khì ê chiú-khut." 
Revelation14:20 Phû-tô tī siâⁿ-gōa ê chiú-khut hō͘ lâng ta̍h, chiū ū huih tùi chiú-khut lâu,chhut-lâi, tāi-iok ū nn̄g kong-chhioh chhim, saⁿ-pah kong-lí tn̂g." 
Revelation15:1 Āu-lâi, góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ tī thiⁿ-téng ū lēng-gōa chi̍t ê tōa koh kî-īⁿ ê kéng-siōng chhut-hiān, ū chhit ê thiⁿ-sài chiáng-koán chòe-āu chhit ê chai-hō, in-ūi Siōng-tè beh kàng chiah-ê chai-hō, chiong I ê siū-khì piàⁿ kàu-chīn." 
Revelation15:2 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ ū hé chham tī lāi-bīn ê po-lê-hái, mā khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hiah-ê tek-sèng ê lâng, in í-keng iâⁿ-kè hit-chiah siù, siù ê siōng, kap tāi-piáu siù ê miâ-jī ê sò͘-jī. In khiā tī po-lê-hái téng-bīn, chhiú the̍h Siōng-tè hō͘ in ê khiā-khîm." 
Revelation15:3 In chhiùⁿ Siōng-tè ê po̍k-jîn Mô͘-se ê koa kap Iûⁿ-ko ê koa, kóng: Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè, lí ê chok-ûi tōa koh kî-īⁿ; bān-ông ê Ông, lí ê tō-lō͘ kong-gī chin-si̍t." 
Revelation15:4 Chú ah, sím-mi̍h-lâng káⁿ bô kèng-ùi lí, káⁿ bô êng-kng lí ê miâ? In-ūi chí-ū lí sī sèng; bān-kok lóng ōe lâi, tī lí ê bīn-chêng kèng-pài lí; in-ūi lí kong-gī ê chok-ûi í-keng hián-bêng." 
Revelation15:5 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ-téng ê sèng-tiān í-keng khui, lāi-bīn ū hē kiàn-chèng ê Hōe-bō͘." 
Revelation15:6 Chiáng-koán chhit ê chai-hō ê chhit ê thiⁿ-sài tùi sèng-tiān chhut,lâi, chhēng chheng-khì koh kng-liāng ê iù-môa-pò͘ ê saⁿ, heng-khám hâ kim-tòa." 
Revelation15:7 Sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h ê chi̍t ê chiong chhit ê kim-óaⁿ kau hō͘ hit chhit ê thiⁿ-sài, lāi-bīn tóe-móa éng-éng-oán-oán oa̍h,teh ê Siōng-tè ê siū-khì." 
Revelation15:8 Sèng-tiān lāi chhiong-móa tùi Siōng-tè ê êng-kng kap koân-lêng chhèng,chhut-lâi ê ian, it-ti̍t kàu chhit ê thiⁿ-sài só͘ chiáng-koán hit chhit ê chai-hō kiat-sok í-chêng, bô lâng ōe-tàng chìn-ji̍p sèng-tiān." 
Revelation16:1 Āu-lâi, góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ ū tōa ê siaⁿ tùi sèng-tiān chhut-lâi kā hit chhit ê thiⁿ-sài kóng, “Lín khì chiong hit chhit óaⁿ Siōng-tè ê siū-khì piàⁿ-lo̍h tōe.”" 
Revelation16:2 Thâu chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài chiū khì, chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h tōe, hiah-ê ū siù ê kì-hō kap pài-kè siù ê siōng ê lâng chiū siⁿ chhàu koh to̍k ê chhng." 
Revelation16:3 Tē-jī ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h hái, hái-chúi chiū pìⁿ-chòe chhin-chhiūⁿ sí-lâng ê huih, hái,ni̍h ê oa̍h-mi̍h lóng sí,khì." 
Revelation16:4 Tē-saⁿ ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h kang-hô kap chúi-chôaⁿ, chúi chiū pìⁿ-chòe huih." 
Revelation16:5 Góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chiáng-koán chúi ê thiⁿ-sài kóng: Hiān-chāi chûn-chāi, kè-khì chûn-chāi, chì-sèng ê Siōng-tè, lí sī kong-gī, lí ê sím-phòaⁿ kong-chèng." 
Revelation16:6 In-ūi in ū lâu sìn-tô͘ kap sian-ti ê huih, hiān-chāi lí ēng huih hō͘ in lim; che sī in èng-siū ê pò-èng." 
Revelation16:7 Āu-lâi góa thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chè-tôaⁿ ū siaⁿ kóng: Sī lah, Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè, lí ê sím-phòaⁿ chin-si̍t kong-gī." 
Revelation16:8 Tē-sì ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī ji̍t-thâu, ji̍t-thâu chiū tit-tio̍h koân ēng iām-hé sio lâng." 
Revelation16:9 Lâng hō͘ tōa iām-hé sio chiū siat-to̍k ū koân chiáng-koán chiah-ê chai-hō ê Siōng-tè ê miâ; in iáu-kú bô hóe-kái, bô kui êng-kng hō͘ Siōng-tè." 
Revelation16:10 Tē-gō͘ ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī hit-chiah siù ê chō-ūi, siù ê ông-kok chiū pìⁿ-chòe o͘-àm, lâng in-ūi thòng-khó͘ kā-chi̍h," 
Revelation16:11 koh in-ūi thòng-khó͘ kap to̍k-chhng siat-to̍k thiⁿ-téng ê Siōng-tè; in iáu-kú bô hóe-kái lâi kái-piàn in ê só͘-chòe. 
Revelation16:12 Tē-la̍k ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ-lo̍h Iù-hoat-la-tí tōa-hô, hô-chúi chiū ta,khì, ūi-tio̍h tùi tang-hng lâi hiah-ê kun-ông chún-pī chi̍t tiâu lō͘." 
Revelation16:13 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ ū saⁿ ê bô chheng-khì ê sîn, chhin-chhiūⁿ chhân-kap-á, tùi ok-lêng ê chhùi, siù ê chhùi, kap ké sian-ti ê chhùi chhut,lâi." 
Revelation16:14 Chiah-ê sī ōe kiâⁿ kî-chek ê ok-mô͘ ê sîn, in chhut-khì chio-chi̍p phó͘-thiⁿ-ē ê kun-ông, tī Choân-lêng ê Siōng-tè só͘ tiāⁿ-tio̍h hit-ê tōa Ji̍t-chí chhut-lâi kau-chiàn." 
Revelation16:15 “Tio̍h chù-ì! Góa ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ chha̍t lâi. Hit-ê chhíⁿ-chhíⁿ, saⁿ chhēng piān-piān ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, i sî kàu m̄-bián thǹg-theh kiâⁿ, chiah bián hō͘ lâng khòaⁿ-tio̍h i chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé ê kiàn-siàu.”" 
Revelation16:16 Hiah-ê ok-mô͘ ê sîn chiū chū-chi̍p phó͘-thiⁿ-ē ê kun-ông tī chi̍t ê só͘-chāi, Hi-pek-lâi-ōe kiò-chòe Hap-má-ge̍k-tùn." 
Revelation16:17 Tē-chhit ê thiⁿ-sài chiong i hit-óaⁿ piàⁿ tī khong-tiong, chiū ū tōa ê siaⁿ tùi sèng-tiān ê pó-chō hoat-chhut, kóng, “Oân-sêng lah!”" 
Revelation16:18 Hit-sî ū sih-nà, hiáng-siaⁿ, lûi, kap tōa tōe-tāng; tōe-chiūⁿ ū jîn-lūi í-lâi m̄-bat ū chiah-ni̍h tōa ê tōe-tāng." 
Revelation16:19 Hit-ê tōa-siâⁿ Pa-pí-lûn chiū li̍h-chòe saⁿ tè, lia̍t-kok ê siâⁿ-chhī mā tó-hoāi. Siōng-tè ōe-kì-tit tōa Pa-pí-lûn -siâⁿ, hō͘ i lim hit-poe tóe Siōng-tè ke̍k-tōa siū-khì ê chiú." 
Revelation16:20 Só͘-ū ê hái-tó lóng cháu bô,khì, soaⁿ mā bô koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Revelation16:21 Jiân-āu tùi thiⁿ-téng ū lo̍h tōa-pha̍uh lâi tìm lâng, ta̍k-tè tāng iok gō͘-cha̍p kong-kun, lâng ūi-tio̍h pha̍uh ê chai-hō siat-to̍k Siōng-tè, in-ūi chit-ê chai-hō hui-siông giâm-tiōng." 
Revelation17:1 Hiah-ê the̍h chhit tè óaⁿ ê chhit ê thiⁿ-sài ê chi̍t ê lâi kap góa kóng-ōe, kóng, “Lâi, góa beh hō͘ lí khòaⁿ chē tī hô-liû téng-bīn hit-ê tōa îm-hū só͘ tio̍h siū ê sím-phòaⁿ." 
Revelation17:2 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông bat kap i kiâⁿ-îm; tōe-chiūⁿ ê chū-bîn mā bat lim i îm-loān ê chiú lim kàu chiú-chùi.” 
Revelation17:3 Góa siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, hō͘ thiⁿ-sài chhōa-khì khòng-iá. Góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê hū-jîn-lâng chē tī chi̍t chiah chu-âng-sek, koh chhiong-móa siat-to̍k ê miâ-hō ê siù téng-bīn; chit-chiah siù ū chhit ê thâu, cha̍p ki kak." 
Revelation17:4 Chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chhēng chí-sek kap chu-âng-sek ê saⁿ, ēng kim, pó-chio̍h, kap chin-chu chng-thāⁿ, chhiú the̍h kim-poe, tóe-móa khó-ò͘ⁿ ê mi̍h kap îm-loān ê ù-òe." 
Revelation17:5 I ê thâu-hia̍h ū siá chi̍t ê miâ, ū ún-ba̍t ê ì-sù, chiū-sī “Tōa Pa-pí-lûn, tōe-chiūⁿ îm-hū kap khó-ò͘ⁿ ê mi̍h ê lāu-bú”." 
Revelation17:6 Góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng lim sìn-tô͘ ê huih kap ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ chòe kiàn-chèng ê sûn-tō-chiá ê huih, lim kàu chùi. Góa khòaⁿ-tio̍h i ê sî tōa tio̍h-kiaⁿ." 
Revelation17:7 Thiⁿ-sài chiū kā góa kóng, “Sī-án-chóaⁿ tio̍h-kiaⁿ? Góa beh chiong chit-ê hū-jîn-lâng kap i só͘ khiâ hit-chiah ū chhit ê thâu cha̍p ki kak ê siù ê pì-bi̍t kā lí kóng." 
Revelation17:8 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h hit-chiah siù, kè-khì ū, hiān-chāi bô, teh-beh koh tùi bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ khí,lâi, chòe-āu bia̍t-bông. Tōe-chiūⁿ ê chū-bîn, tùi chhòng-sè í-lâi, in ê miâ bô kì tī oa̍h-miā-chheh,ê, khòaⁿ-tio̍h hit-chiah siù ōe tio̍h-kiaⁿ kî-koài, in-ūi hit-chiah siù kè-khì ū, hiān-chāi bô, āu-lâi ōe koh chhut-hiān." 
Revelation17:9 “Chit-ê tāi-chì tio̍h ēng tì-hūi lâi lí-kái. Hit chhit ê thâu chiū-sī hū-jîn-lâng só͘ chē ê chhit chō soaⁿ, in mā-sī chhit ê ông." 
Revelation17:10 Kî-tiong gō͘ ê í-keng tó,lo̍h-khì, chi̍t ê iáu tī,teh, lēng-gōa chi̍t ê iáu-bē lâi, nā lâi i it-tēng chiām-sî lâu,teh nā-tiāⁿ." 
Revelation17:11 Kè-khì ū, hiān-chāi bô hit-chiah siù chiū-sī tē-poeh ê ông, sī chhit ê ông tiong-kan ê chi̍t ê, i mā ōe bia̍t-bông." 
Revelation17:12 “Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h ê cha̍p ki kak chiū-sī hit cha̍p ê iáu m̄-bat thóng-tī ê ông; m̄-kú in ōe tit-tio̍h koân choh-ông kap siù chòe-hé thóng-tī chi̍t tiám-cheng kú. 
Revelation17:13 Chit cha̍p ê ông tông-ì chiong in ê lêng-le̍k kap koân-pèng kau hō͘ hit-chiah siù. 
Revelation17:14 In beh kap Iûⁿ-ko kau-chiàn, m̄-kú Iûⁿ-ko ōe thâi-iâⁿ chiah-ê ông, in-ūi I sī bān-chú ê Chú, bān-ông ê Ông; kap I chòe-hé hiah-ê siū ho͘-tiàu, siū kéng-soán, tiong-si̍t ê lâng mā ōe tek-sèng.”" 
Revelation17:15 Thiⁿ-sài koh kā góa kóng, “Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h hit-ê îm-hū chē,teh ê hô-liû chiū-sī ta̍k-ê bîn-cho̍k, ta̍k-ê cho̍k-kûn, ta̍k-ê pang-kok, kap kóng ta̍k-khoán gú-giân ê lâng." 
Revelation17:16 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h hit cha̍p ki kak kap hit-chiah siù ōe oàn-hūn hit-ê îm-hū, mā ōe hō͘ i bô i-óa, chhiah-sin-lō͘-thé; in ōe thun-chia̍h i ê bah, koh ēng hé kā i sio-bia̍t." 
Revelation17:17 In-ūi Siōng-tè chiong chip-hêng I ê chí-ì ê ì-liām hē tī hit cha̍p ê ông ê sim, hō͘ in tâng-sim chiong in ê kok kau hō͘ hit-chiah siù, ti̍t-kàu Siōng-tè ê ōe èng-giām." 
Revelation17:18 Lí só͘ khòaⁿ,tio̍h hit-ê hū-jîn-lâng chiū-sī teh chiáng-koán tōe-chiūⁿ hiah-ê kun-ông ê hit-chō tōa-siâⁿ.” 
Revelation18:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ-téng lo̍h,lâi. I ū tōa koân-pèng; i ê êng-kng hō͘ tōe-chiūⁿ kng,khí-lâi." 
Revelation18:2 I tōa-siaⁿ hoah: Tó,lo̍h-khì lah! Tōa Pa-pí-lûn tó,lo̍h-khì lah! Chit-ê siâⁿ chiâⁿ-chòe kúi khiā-khí ê só͘-chāi: it-chhè ù-òe ê sîn ê kaⁿ-lô, it-chhè ù-òe ê chiáu ê chiáu-lang, it-chhè ù-òe koh khó-ò͘ⁿ ê iá-siù ê lông-á." 
Revelation18:3 In-ūi lia̍t-kok lóng ū lim-tio̍h chit-ê îm-hū îm-loān ê chiú ín-khí Siōng-tè tōa siū-khì, tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông lóng ū kap i kiâⁿ-îm, tōe-chiūⁿ ê seng-lí-lâng lóng ū tùi i ê chhia-hoa hòng-tōng hoat tōa-châi." 
Revelation18:4 Góa koh ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ lēng-gōa chi̍t ê siaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng chhut,lâi, kóng: Góa ê chú-bîn ah, chhut,lâi, tio̍h tùi îm-hū hia chhut,lâi, chiah bián bak-tio̍h i ê chōe, chiah bián hō͘ i ê chai-hō liân-lūi,tio̍h." 
Revelation18:5 In-ūi i ê chōe í-keng lúi-chek tú-thiⁿ, Siōng-tè ōe-kì-tit i ê siâ-ok." 
Revelation18:6 I án-chóaⁿ tùi-thāi lâng, tio̍h chiàu án-ni tùi-thāi i, chiàu i ê só͘-chòe ka-pē kā i pò-èng, ēng i tiâu-hô chiú ê poe tiâu-hô ka-pē ê chiú hō͘ i!" 
Revelation18:7 I bat án-chóaⁿ êng-kng ka-kī, án-chóaⁿ chhia-hoa, tio̍h chiàu án-ni hō͘ i thòng-khó͘ pi-siong. In-ūi i sim-lāi ka-kī kóng: Góa chē tī pó-chō choh lú-ông; góa m̄-sī kóaⁿ-hū, choa̍t-tùi bōe tú-tio̍h choh kóaⁿ-hū ê pi-siong." 
Revelation18:8 Só͘-í, tī chi̍t ji̍t lāi chai-hō ōe kàu, ōe ū sí-bông, pi-siong, ki-hng. I ōe hō͘ hé sio-bia̍t, in-ūi sím-phòaⁿ i ê Chú Siōng-tè ū tōa khùi-la̍t." 
Revelation18:9 Kap i kiâⁿ-îm, kè chhia-hoa seng-oa̍h chiah-ê tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông, khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâⁿ tio̍h-hé-sio ê ian, ōe ūi-tio̍h siâⁿ pi-siong thî-khàu." 
Revelation18:10 In khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâⁿ só͘ siū ê kan-khó͘ chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, lóng khiā-hn̄g-hn̄g, kóng: Chhám ah, chit-ê tōa-siâⁿ! Pa-pí-lûn chit-ê kian-kò͘ ê siâⁿ chhám ah! In-ūi bô jōa kú, lí chiū ōe siū-tio̍h sím-phòaⁿ!" 
Revelation18:11 Tōe-chiūⁿ ê seng-lí-lâng ūi-tio̍h i thî-khàu ai-siong, in-ūi bô lâng koh bóe in ê hè," 
Revelation18:12 chiū-sī kim, gûn, pó-chio̍h, chin-chu; iù-môa-pò͘, si-tiû, ko-kùi ê chí-sek kap âng-sek pò͘-liāu; ta̍k-chióng hiuⁿ-chhâ, ta̍k-khoán chhiūⁿ-gê chè-phín, ta̍k-khoán kùi-khì ê bo̍k-châi chè-phín, tâng-khì, thih-khì, kap tāi-lí-chio̍h chè-phín;" 
Revelation18:13 jio̍k-kùi, phang-liāu, hiuⁿ, jú-hiuⁿ; chiú, kaⁿ-ná-iû, iù mī-hún, be̍h; gû, iûⁿ, bé, bé-chhia, lô͘-lē, í-ki̍p lâng." 
Revelation18:14 Chiah-ê seng-lí-lâng tùi i kóng: Lí ê sim só͘ ì-ài hiah-ê hó-mi̍h lóng bô,khì; lí ê êng-hôa-hù-kùi lóng siau-sit, éng-oán bōe-tàng koh khòaⁿ,tio̍h." 
Revelation18:15 Khò chit-ê siâⁿ chòe seng-lí hoat tōa-châi ê seng-lí-lâng, in-ūi khòaⁿ-tio̍h chit-ê siâⁿ só͘ siū ê khó͘-chhó͘ chin kiaⁿ-hiâⁿ, lóng ōe khiā-hn̄g-hn̄g pi-siong thî-khàu," 
Revelation18:16 kóng: Chhám ah, chhám ah, chit-ê tōa-siâⁿ! Lí koàn-sì chhēng iù-môa-pò͘, ko-kùi ê chí-sek kap âng-sek pò͘-liāu ê saⁿ, kòa kim, pó-chio̍h, kap chin-chu chòe chng-thāⁿ." 
Revelation18:17 Chi̍t-sî-á kú, só͘-ū ê châi-hù lóng bô,khì. Só͘-ū ê chûn-tiúⁿ, lú-kheh, chúi-siú, kap só͘-ū khò hái seng-oa̍h ê lâng, khiā-hn̄g-hn̄g," 
Revelation18:18 khòaⁿ-tio̍h siâⁿ tio̍h-hé-sio ê ian, lóng hoah: Ū tó chi̍t ê siâⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chit-ê tōa-siâⁿ?" 
Revelation18:19 In sám thô͘-hún tī ka-kī ê thâu-khak téng, thî-khàu pi-siong tōa-siaⁿ hoah: Chhám ah, chhám ah, chit-ê tōa-siâⁿ! Tī hái,ni̍h kiâⁿ-chûn ê lâng lóng khò chit-ê siâⁿ ê châi-hù hoat-châi. In-ūi chi̍t-sî-á kú, i ê it-chhè lóng bô,khì." 
Revelation18:20 Thiⁿ ah, tio̍h ūi-tio̍h chit-ê siâⁿ hoaⁿ-hí! Lín chiah-ê sìn-tô͘, sù-tô͘, kap sian-ti tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí, in-ūi Siōng-tè í-keng ū thòe lín sin-oan, kā i hêng-hoa̍t lah!" 
Revelation18:21 Āu-lâi, ū chi̍t ê tōa khùi-la̍t ê thiⁿ-sài giâ chi̍t tè chio̍h, chhin-chhiūⁿ tōa chio̍h-bō, kā i hiat-lo̍h hái, kóng: Tōa Pa-pí-lûn -siâⁿ mā ōe chhin-chhiūⁿ án-ni, hō͘ lâng tōa-la̍t kā i hiat,lo̍h-khì, éng-oán bōe koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Revelation18:22 Tôaⁿ-khîm, chhiùⁿ-koa, pûn-siau, pûn-lat-pah ê siaⁿ, lí mā bōe koh thiaⁿ,kìⁿ; ta̍k-chióng kang-gē sai-hū, lí mā bōe koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ; oe-bō ê siaⁿ, lí mā bōe koh thiaⁿ,kìⁿ;" 
Revelation18:23 teng-hé ê kng, bōe koh kā lí chiò; sin kiáⁿ-sài kap sin-niû ê siaⁿ, lí bōe koh thiaⁿ,kìⁿ; in-ūi lí ê seng-lí-lâng í-chêng tī tōe-chiūⁿ sī ū sè-le̍k ê lâng, in-ūi lí ū ēng siâ-su̍t bê-he̍k bān-kok." 
Revelation18:24 Sian-ti, kap sìn-tô͘, í-ki̍p só͘-ū tī tōe-chiūⁿ siū thâi ê lâng ê huih, tī chit-ê siâⁿ ta̍k só͘-chāi lóng khòaⁿ ōe tio̍h." 
Revelation19:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū thiaⁿ-kìⁿ tī thiⁿ-téng chhin-chhiūⁿ ū chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng tōa-siaⁿ teh hoah: Ha-lé-lú-iah, chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! Chín-kiù, êng-kng, koân-lêng lóng tùi lán ê Siōng-tè lâi!" 
Revelation19:2 I ê sím-phòaⁿ chin-si̍t kong-gī; in-ūi I ū sím-phòaⁿ hit-ê ēng îm-hēng pāi-hoāi tōe-chiūⁿ jîn-lūi ê tōa îm-hū, ū hêng-hoa̍t i lâu Siōng-tè po̍k-jîn ê huih ê chōe." 
Revelation19:3 In tē-jī piàn hoah: Ha-lé-lú-iah, chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! Siâⁿ tio̍h-hé-sio ê ian chhèng-koân éng-oán bōe thêng." 
Revelation19:4 Hit jī-cha̍p-sì ê tiúⁿ-ló kap hit sì ê oa̍h-mi̍h phak lo̍h-khì kèng-pài chē tī pó-chō ê Siōng-tè, kóng: Amen. Ha-lé-lú-iah!" 
Revelation19:5 Tùi pó-chō ū siaⁿ chhut,lâi, kóng: Só͘-ū Siōng-tè ê po̍k-jîn, só͘-ū kèng-ùi Siōng-tè ê lâng, bô-lūn pi-chiān chun-kùi, lóng tio̍h chheng-chàn lán ê Siōng-tè!" 
Revelation19:6 Góa koh thiaⁿ-kìⁿ chhin-chhiūⁿ chi̍t tōa-kûn lâng ê siaⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ chin chōe tiâu hô-liû ê siaⁿ, chhin-chhiūⁿ lûi tōa-tân ê siaⁿ, kóng: Ha-lé-lú-iah, chheng-chàn Siōng Chú! In-ūi lán ê Chú, Choân-lêng ê Siōng-tè choh-ông lah!" 
Revelation19:7 Lán tio̍h hoaⁿ-hí khoài-lo̍k, chiong êng-kng kui hō͘ I! In-ūi Iûⁿ-ko hun-lé ê ji̍t kàu lah; I ê sin-niû í-keng chún-pī hó-sè lah." 
Revelation19:8 Siōng-tè í-keng hō͘ sin-niû chhēng iù-môa-pò͘ kng-liāng chheng-pe̍h ê saⁿ. Iù-môa-pò͘ ê saⁿ sī sìn-tô͘ gī ê hêng-ûi. 
Revelation19:9 Āu-lâi, thiⁿ-sài kā góa kóng, “Lí tio̍h siá,khí-lâi; siū iau-chhiáⁿ chham-ka Iûⁿ-ko hun-iàn ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!” Thiⁿ-sài koh kā góa kóng, “Chiah-ê sī Siōng-tè chin-si̍t ê ōe.”" 
Revelation19:10 Góa chiū phak tī thiⁿ-sài ê kha-chêng beh kā i pài. M̄-kú i kā góa kóng, “Choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang! Góa kap lí, í-ki̍p hiah-ê chhî-siú Iâ-so͘ kiàn-chèng ê lâng lóng pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn; lí tio̍h pài Siōng-tè!” In-ūi Iâ-so͘ ê kiàn-chèng sī sian-ti siū kám-tōng só͘ kóng sìn-sit ê tiong-sim." 
Revelation19:11 Āu-lâi, góa khòaⁿ-kìⁿ thiⁿ khui, khòaⁿ-tio̍h chi̍t chiah pe̍h-bé. Khiâ tī bé téng,ê kiò-chòe “Tiong-sìn” kap “Chin-si̍t”; I chiàu kong-gī sím-phòaⁿ kap chok-chiàn." 
Revelation19:12 I ê ba̍k-chiu chhin-chhiūⁿ hé-iām; thâu-khak ū tì chin chōe ông-koan; seng-khu ū siá chi̍t ê miâ, chit-ê miâ i ka-kī í-gōa bô lâng bat." 
Revelation19:13 I chhēng bak-tio̍h huih ê tn̂g-phàu, I ê miâ kiò-chòe Siōng-tè ê Tō." 
Revelation19:14 Thian-kun chhēng iù-môa-pò͘ ê tn̂g-phàu, pe̍h koh chheng-khì, khiâ pe̍h-bé teh tè I." 
Revelation19:15 Tùi I ê chhùi thò͘-chhut chi̍t ki lāi-kiàm, beh ēng lâi phah-pāi lia̍t-kok; I beh ēng thih-koáiⁿ tī-lí in; I mā beh ta̍h Choân-lêng ê Siōng-tè ê chiú-khut, hō͘ I ê tōa siū-khì hoat-chhut." 
Revelation19:16 Tī I ê tn̂g-phàu kap tōa-thúi ū siá chi̍t ê miâ “Bān-ông ê Ông, bān-chú ê Chú”." 
Revelation19:17 Góa ū koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài khiā tī ji̍t-thâu téng, tōa-siaⁿ tùi hiah-ê tī khong-tiong teh pe lóng-chóng ê pe-chiáu hoah, “Lâi! Chū-chi̍p lâi hù Siōng-tè ê tōa iàn-se̍k!" 
Revelation19:18 Lâi chia̍h chiah-ê kun-ông ê bah, chiong-kun ê bah, ióng-sū ê bah, chiah-ê bé kap khiâ-bé ê lâng ê bah, mā chia̍h lóng-chóng chū-iû ê lâng kap lô͘-lē ê bah, pi-chiān kap chun-kùi ê lâng ê bah.”" 
Revelation19:19 Góa ū koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hit-chiah siù, tōe-chiūⁿ ê kun-ông kap in ê kun-tūi chū-chi̍p beh kap Hit-ūi khiâ pe̍h-bé,ê í-ki̍p I ê kun-tūi kau-chiàn." 
Revelation19:20 Hit-chiah siù siū lia̍h, hit-ê ké sian-ti, chiū-sī chêng bat tī siù ê bīn-chêng kiâⁿ kî-chek,ê, mā kap siù chòe-hé siū lia̍h. Chit-ê ké sian-ti bat ēng kî-chek bê-he̍k hiah-ê ū siù ê kì-hō kap bat pài siù ê siōng ê lâng. Hit-chiah siù kap hit-ê ké sian-ti nn̄g ê lóng hō͘ lâng oa̍h-oa̍h hiat-lo̍h liû-hông teh to̍h ê hé-ô͘." 
Revelation19:21 Só͘ chhun ê kun-tūi lóng hō͘ Hit-ūi khiâ-bé,ê ê chhùi thò͘-chhut ê kiàm sat-hāi; só͘-ū ê chiáu lóng lâi chia̍h in ê bah, chia̍h kàu pá." 
Revelation20:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê thiⁿ-sài tùi thiⁿ-téng lo̍h,lâi, chhiú the̍h bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ ê só-sî kap chi̍t tiâu tōa-tiâu thih-liān." 
Revelation20:2 I lia̍h hit-chiah ok-lêng, chiū-sī hit-bé lāu-chôa, sī Mô͘-kúi, sī Sat-tàn, kā i pa̍k chi̍t-chheng nî." 
Revelation20:3 Thiⁿ-sài kā i hiat-lo̍h bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ, jiân-āu kā bô-tóe-chhim-khiⁿ koaiⁿ-ba̍t, koh ēng ìn hong,khí-lâi, hō͘ i bōe-tàng koh khì bê-he̍k lia̍t-pang, it-ti̍t kàu chi̍t-chheng nî móa. Chit-ê kî-hān kè-liáu, i it-tēng tio̍h chiām-sî siū tháu-pàng." 
Revelation20:4 Góa ū koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ kúi-nā ê pó-chō, chē tī pó-chō,ê ū tit-tio̍h sím-phòaⁿ ê koân-pèng. Góa mā ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ hiah-ê ūi-tio̍h Iâ-so͘ ê kiàn-chèng kap Siōng-tè ê Tō hō͘ lâng chām-thâu ê lâng ê lêng-hûn. Chiah-ê lâng m̄-bat pài siù, mā m̄-bat pài siù ê siōng, in ê thâu-hia̍h á-sī chhiú bô chiap-siū siù ê kì-hō. In lóng koh-oa̍h kap Ki-tok chòe-hé thóng-tī chi̍t-chheng nî." 
Revelation20:5 Só͘ chhun ê sí-lâng kàu chi̍t-chheng nî móa ê sî chiah ōe koh-oa̍h. Che sī thâu chi̍t piàn ê koh-oa̍h. 
Revelation20:6 Ū-hūn tī thâu chi̍t piàn koh-oa̍h ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in sī sèng-kiat ê lâng. Tē-jī piàn ê sí bô koân thang kā in koán-hat, in ōe chòe Siōng-tè kap Ki-tok ê chè-si, mā ōe kap Ki-tok chòe-hé thóng-tī chi̍t-chheng nî." 
Revelation20:7 Chi̍t-chheng nî móa ê sî, Sat-tàn ōe siū tháu-pàng chhut-kaⁿ." 
Revelation20:8 I ōe chhut-khì bê-he̍k tōe-chiūⁿ sì-hng ê lia̍t-pang, chiū-sī Ko-kek kap Má-kok, chū-chi̍p in khì kau-chiàn; in ê sò͘-bo̍k chhin-chhiūⁿ hái-soa hiah-ni̍h chōe." 
Revelation20:9 In chìn-kun piàn-móa choân-tōe, ûi-khùn sìn-tô͘ ê iâⁿ kap Siōng-tè só͘ thiàⁿ ê siâⁿ. M̄-kú ū hé tùi thiⁿ kàng-lo̍h kā in sio-bia̍t." 
Revelation20:10 Hit-ê bê-he̍k in ê Mô͘-kúi siū hiat-lo̍h hé kap liû-hông ê ô͘; hit-chiah siù kap hit-ê ké sian-ti í-keng tī hia. In ōe mî-ji̍t siū khó͘-chhó͘, éng-oán bōe thêng." 
Revelation20:11 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chi̍t ê pe̍h-sek ê tōa pó-chō, kap chē tī hit téng-bīn Hit-ūi; thiⁿ kap tōe tùi I ê bīn-chêng tô-cháu, chiū bô koh khòaⁿ,kìⁿ." 
Revelation20:12 Góa koh ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sí,khì ê lâng, bô-lūn pi-chiān á-sī chun-kùi, lóng khiā tī pó-chō chêng. Kì-lio̍k ê chheh lóng thí-khui; lēng-gōa chi̍t pún oa̍h-miā-chheh mā thí-khui. Sí,khì ê lâng chiàu in ê hêng-ûi, kun-kù chiah-ê chheh só͘ kì-chài,ê siū sím-phòaⁿ." 
Revelation20:13 Hái chiong i lāi-bīn ê sí-lâng kau,chhut-lâi; Sí-bông kap Im-hú mā chiong in lāi-bīn ê sí-lâng lóng kau,chhut-lâi. Ta̍k-ê lâng lóng chiàu ka-kī ê hêng-ûi siū sím-phòaⁿ. 
Revelation20:14 Āu-lâi, Sí-bông kap Im-hú siū hiat-lo̍h hé-ô͘. Chit-ê hé-ô͘ chiū-sī tē-jī piàn ê sí." 
Revelation20:15 Miâ bô kì-chài tī oa̍h-miā-chheh ê lâng lóng siū hiat-lo̍h hé-ô͘. 
Revelation21:1 Āu-lâi, góa ū khòaⁿ-kìⁿ sin ê thiⁿ sin ê tōe, in-ūi chêng ê thiⁿ chêng ê tōe í-keng kè,khì, hái mā bô,khì." 
Revelation21:2 Góa koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ Sèng-siâⁿ, sin ê Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng, tùi thiⁿ-téng Siōng-tè hia kàng,lo̍h-lâi, chhin-chhiūⁿ sin-niû chng-thāⁿ hó-sè beh gêng-chiap tiōng-hu." 
Revelation21:3 Góa koh thiaⁿ-tio̍h ū tōa ê siaⁿ tùi pó-chō hoat-chhut, kóng, “Khòaⁿ ah, Siōng-tè ê hōe-bō͘ tī lâng ê tiong-kan! Siōng-tè beh kap in chòe-hé khiā-khí; in beh chòe I ê chú-bîn; Siōng-tè beh chhin-sin kap in tông-chāi, chòe in ê Siōng-tè." 
Revelation21:4 I beh chhit-khì in ba̍k-chiu lóng-chóng ê ba̍k-sái; bô koh ū sí-sit, mā bô koh ū ai-siong, âu-kiò, thàng-thiàⁿ, in-ūi chêng ê tāi-chì í-keng kè,khì.”" 
Revelation21:5 Āu-lâi, chē tī pó-chō Hit-ūi kóng, “Khòaⁿ ah, góa chiong bān-mi̍h lóng ōaⁿ-sin!” I koh kóng, “Tio̍h siá,khí-lâi, in-ūi chiah-ê ōe chin-si̍t khó-khò.”" 
Revelation21:6 I koh kā góa kóng, “Oân-sêng lah! Góa sī A-ní-hoat kap A-bí-ka, sī khai-sí kap kiat-sok. Chhùi-ta ê lâng góa beh chiong oa̍h-miā-chúi ê chúi-chôaⁿ pe̍h-pe̍h hō͘ in lim." 
Revelation21:7 Tek-sèng ê lâng ōe sêng-chiap chiah-ê; góa beh chòe in ê Siōng-tè, in beh chòe góa ê kiáⁿ-jî." 
Revelation21:8 M̄-kú, hiah-ê bô-táⁿ,ê, pōe-sìn,ê, hú-pāi,ê, thâi-lâng,ê, îm-loān,ê, kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t,ê, pài ngó͘-siōng,ê, í-ki̍p só͘-ū kóng pe̍h-chha̍t,ê, in tio̍h khì ê só͘-chāi sī hit-ê ēng hé kap liû-hông teh sio ê ô͘, chit-ê chiū-sī tē-jī piàn ê sí.”" 
Revelation21:9 Āu-lâi, chhit ê thiⁿ-sài, chiū-sī the̍h chhit tè óaⁿ tóe-móa lō͘-bé chhit hāng chai-hō,ê, kî-tiong chi̍t ê lâi tùi góa kóng, “Lâi, góa beh pò lí khòaⁿ Sin-niû, chiū-sī Iûⁿ-ko ê bó͘.”" 
Revelation21:10 Góa siū Sèng Sîn kám-tōng, hō͘ thiⁿ-sài chhōa kàu chi̍t chō tōa koh koân ê soaⁿ, hō͘ góa khòaⁿ tùi thiⁿ-téng Siōng-tè hia kàng,lo̍h-lâi ê Sèng-siâⁿ Iâ-lō͘-sat-léng." 
Revelation21:11 Chit-ê siâⁿ ū Siōng-tè ê êng-kng; siâⁿ ê kng chhin-chhiūⁿ siōng pó-kùi ê pó-chio̍h, chhin-chhiūⁿ phek-ge̍k, chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi-chiⁿ hiah-ni̍h kng-liāng." 
Revelation21:12 Siâⁿ ū tōa koh koân ê chhiûⁿ, siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ ū cha̍p-jī ê mn̂g, chiah-ê mn̂g ū cha̍p-jī ê thiⁿ-sài teh kò͘-siú, ū khek Í-sek-lia̍t kiáⁿ-sun cha̍p-jī chi-cho̍k ê miâ;" 
Revelation21:13 tang-pêng ū saⁿ ê mn̂g, sai-pêng ū saⁿ ê mn̂g, lâm-pêng ū saⁿ ê mn̂g, pak-pêng ū saⁿ ê mn̂g." 
Revelation21:14 Siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ ū cha̍p-jī ê tōe-ki, tōe-ki téng ū Iûⁿ-ko ê cha̍p-jī sù-tô͘ ê cha̍p-jī ê miâ." 
Revelation21:15 Tùi góa kóng-ōe ê thiⁿ-sài ū the̍h chi̍t ki kim lô͘-tek ê chhioh, beh niû hit-ê siâⁿ, siâⁿ-mn̂g, kap siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ." 
Revelation21:16 Siâⁿ sī sì-kak-hêng, tn̂g khoah sio-siâng. Thiⁿ-sài ēng chhioh niû siâⁿ: Ū nn̄g-chheng sì-pah kong-lí, tn̂g, khoah, koân lóng sio-siâng." 
Revelation21:17 Thiⁿ-sài mā chiàu lâng ê chhùn-chhioh niû siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ, koân la̍k-cha̍p kong-chhioh." 
Revelation21:18 Siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ sī ēng phek-ge̍k chō,ê, siâⁿ sī ēng chhin-chhiūⁿ po-lê chheng-liāng ê sûn-kim khí,ê." 
Revelation21:19 Siâⁿ-chhiûⁿ ê tōe-ki ēng ta̍k-chióng pó-chio̍h chong-sek: Thâu chi̍t ê tōe-ki sī phek-ge̍k, tē-jī ê sī nâ-pó-chio̍h, tē-saⁿ ê sī le̍k-bé-ló, tē-sì ê sī le̍k-pó-chio̍h," 
Revelation21:20 tē-gō͘ ê sī âng-bé-ló, tē-la̍k ê sī âng-pó-chio̍h, tē-chhit ê sī n̂g-kaⁿ-ná-chio̍h, tē-poeh ê sī chhùi-chhong-ge̍k, tē-káu ê sī n̂g-ge̍k, tē-cha̍p ê sī húi-chhùi-ge̍k, tē-cha̍p-it ê sī chí-bé-ló, tē-cha̍p-jī ê sī chí-chúi-chiⁿ." 
Revelation21:21 Hit cha̍p-jī ê mn̂g sī cha̍p-jī lia̍p chin-chu, ta̍k-ê mn̂g sī ēng chi̍t lia̍p chin-chu chòe,ê. Siâⁿ ê koe-lō͘ sī sûn-kim, chhin-chhiūⁿ thàu-bêng ê po-lê." 
Revelation21:22 Tī siâⁿ-lāi góa bô khòaⁿ-tio̍h sèng-tiān, in-ūi Choân-lêng ê Chú Siōng-tè kap Iûⁿ-ko chiū-sī chit-ê siâⁿ ê sèng-tiān." 
Revelation21:23 Chit-ê siâⁿ bô su-iàu ji̍t-thâu á-sī ge̍h-niû lâi chiò, in-ūi Siōng-tè ê êng-kng teh chiò, koh Iûⁿ-ko chiū-sī chit-ê siâⁿ ê teng." 
Revelation21:24 Lia̍t-pang ōe khò teng ê kng kiâⁿ-lō͘; tōe-chiūⁿ kun-ông ōe chiong in ê êng-hôa tòa-lâi hō͘ chit-ê siâⁿ. 
Revelation21:25 Ji̍t,sî, siâⁿ-mn̂g lóng bōe koaiⁿ; tī hia lóng bô mî,sî." 
Revelation21:26 Lâng ōe chiong lia̍t-pang ê êng-kng kap chun-kùi tòa ji̍p-lâi chit-ê siâⁿ. 
Revelation21:27 M̄-kú, bô chheng-khì ê mi̍h, í-ki̍p hêng-ûi khó-ò͘ⁿ kap kóng pe̍h-chha̍t ê lâng choa̍t-tùi bōe-ēng-tit ji̍p,khì; chí-ū miâ ū kì-chài tī Iûⁿ-ko ê oa̍h-miā-chheh ê lâng chiah ōe-tàng ji̍p,khì." 
Revelation22:1 Thiⁿ-sài koh pò góa khòaⁿ oa̍h-miā-chúi ê hô, chhin-chhiūⁿ chúi-chiⁿ hiah-ni̍h kng-liāng, tùi Siōng-tè kap Iûⁿ-ko ê pó-chō hia lâu,chhut-lâi," 
Revelation22:2 thong-kè siâⁿ tiong-sim ê koe-lō͘. Hô ê siang-pêng ū oa̍h-miā-chhiū, ōe kiat ké-chí cha̍p-jī piàn, ta̍k kò-ge̍h kiat chi̍t piàn, chhiū-hio̍h ōe chòe i-tī lia̍t-pang ê lō͘-ēng." 
Revelation22:3 Siâⁿ-lāi lóng bōe koh ū chiù-chó͘. Siōng-tè kap Iûⁿ-ko ê pó-chō ōe tī siâⁿ-lāi; I ê po̍k-jîn ōe kèng-pài I," 
Revelation22:4 mā ōe khòaⁿ-kìⁿ I ê bīn; I ê miâ ōe siá tī in ê thâu-hia̍h. 
Revelation22:5 Bōe koh ū mî,sî; in bô su-iàu teng ê kng á-sī ji̍t-thâu, in-ūi Chú Siōng-tè ōe kā in chiò-kng, in ōe éng-éng-oán-oán chiáng-koân." 
Revelation22:6 Thiⁿ-sài kā góa kóng, “Chiah-ê ōe chin-si̍t khó-khò. Hit-ūi kám-tōng chèng sian-ti ê Chú Siōng-tè ū chhe I ê thiⁿ-sài chiong it-tēng sûi-sî ōe hoat-seng ê tāi-chì chí-sī I ê chèng po̍k-jîn.”" 
Revelation22:7 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Khòaⁿ ah, góa liâm-piⁿ lâi. Chun-siú chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe ê lâng chin ū hok-khì!”" 
Revelation22:8 Góa Iok-hān, chiū-sī chhin-sin ū thiaⁿ,kìⁿ koh khòaⁿ-kìⁿ chiah-ê sū hit-ê lâng. Góa thiaⁿ,tio̍h koh khòaⁿ,tio̍h liáu-āu, chiū phak lo̍h-khì tī chiong chiah-ê sū chí-sī góa ê thiⁿ-sài kha-chêng beh kā i pài." 
Revelation22:9 Put-kò i kā góa kóng, “Choa̍t-tùi m̄-thang! Góa kap lí, í-ki̍p kap lí pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe hiaⁿ-tī ê sian-ti kap chun-siú chit-pún chheh ê ōe ê lâng, lóng pîⁿ-pîⁿ chòe po̍k-jîn. Lí tio̍h pài Siōng-tè!”" 
Revelation22:10 I koh kā góa kóng, “M̄-thang chiong chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe hong-ba̍t, in-ūi ū-giân si̍t-hiān ê sî-khek kūn lah." 
Revelation22:11 Hō͘ put-gī ê lâng kè-sio̍k chòe put-gī; hō͘ ù-òe ê lâng kè-sio̍k ù-òe; hō͘ gī ê lâng kè-sio̍k si̍t-hêng kong-gī; hō͘ sèng-kiat ê lâng kè-sio̍k sèng-kiat.” 
Revelation22:12 Iâ-so͘ kóng, “Khòaⁿ ah, góa liâm-piⁿ lâi! Góa beh tòa pò-siúⁿ lâi, chiàu ta̍k-ê lâng ê hêng-ûi kā i hôe-pò." 
Revelation22:13 Góa sī A-ní-hoat kap A-bí-ka, sī khí-thâu kap soah-bé, sī khai-sí kap kiat-sok.”" 
Revelation22:14 Chiong tn̂g-phàu sóe chheng-khì hiah-ê lâng chin ū hok-khì, in ū tit-tio̍h koân thang chia̍h oa̍h-miā-chhiū ê ké-chí, koh thang tùi chiah-ê mn̂g ji̍p-siâⁿ." 
Revelation22:15 Hiah-ê káu-lūi, kiâⁿ siâ-su̍t,ê, îm-loān,ê, thâi-sí-lâng,ê, pài ngó͘-siōng,ê, kap it-chhè ài kóng pe̍h-chha̍t koh chòe sū kan-chà,ê, lóng tio̍h lâu tī siâⁿ-gōa." 
Revelation22:16 “Góa — Iâ-so͘ í-keng chhe góa ê thiⁿ-sài, tī chiah-ê kàu-hōe chiong chiah-ê sū tùi lín choh-chèng. Góa sī Tāi-pi̍t ê Kun, sī i ê hō͘-tāi, sī kng-liāng ê Khé-bêng-chhiⁿ.”" 
Revelation22:17 Sèng Sîn kap Sin-niû lóng kóng, “Lâi!” Thiaⁿ,kìⁿ ê lâng tio̍h kóng, “Lâi!” Chhùi-ta ê lâng tio̍h lâi! Ì-ài ê lâng thang pe̍h-pe̍h niá-siū oa̍h-miā-chúi." 
Revelation22:18 Góa kā ta̍k-ê thiaⁿ-tio̍h chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe ê lâng kéng-kò: Nā ū lâng kā i ke-thiⁿ, Siōng-tè ōe chiong chit-pún chheh só͘ kì ê chai-hō ke-thiⁿ hō͘ i." 
Revelation22:19 Nā ū lâng san-tû chit-pún chheh ū-giân ê ōe, Siōng-tè mā ōe tùi chit-pún chheh só͘ kì oa̍h-miā-chhiū kap Sèng-siâⁿ ê hok-hūn san-tû i ê hūn-gia̍h." 
Revelation22:20 Ūi-tio̍h chiah-ê sū choh-chèng Hit-ūi kóng, “Tio̍h, góa liâm-piⁿ lâi!” Amen! Chú Iâ-so͘ ah, chhiáⁿ lâi!"
